src: Steve Wright, yesterday convicted of the murder of five women in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, has today been sentenced at Ipswich Crown Court to life imprisonment.
ref: Steve Wright, semalam disabitkan atas pembunuhan lima wanita di Ipswich, Suffolk, England, pada hari ini telah dijatuhkan hukuman penjara seumur hidup di Mahkamah Jenayah Ipswich.

src: The bodies of the five women who worked as sex workers in Ipswich were found around the town in December 2006.
ref: Mayat lima wanita yang bekerja sebagai pekerja seks di Ipswich ditemui di sekitar bandar tersebut pada Disember 2006.

src: "It is right you should spend your whole life in prison."
ref: "Adalah betul kamu perlu menghabiskan seluruh hidup anda di dalam penjara."

src: Speaking after the sentencing, Deputy Chief Constable of Suffolk Police, Jacqui Cheer said, "At the start of the inquiry we could not have asked for anything more."
ref: Bercakap selepas hukuman dijatuhkan, Timbalan Ketua Konstabel Polis Suffolk, Jacqui Cheer berkata, "Pada permulaan siasatan itu kita tidak boleh meminta apa-apa lagi."

src: "It is a tribute to all the people who have been involved - not only police officers but their support teams and all the members of the public who phoned-in offering information."
ref: "Ia merupakan satu penghormatan kepada semua orang yang telah terlibat - bukan sahaja pegawai polis tetapi pasukan sokongan dan semua orang ramai yang menelefon - untuk menawarkan maklumat."

src: Burns, the former chairman of the Nevada Libertarian Party, was asked if he thinks he has a good shot at winning the Libertarian nomination and ultimately the presidency.
ref: Burns, bekas pengerusi Parti Libertarian Nevada, ditanya sama ada beliau mempunyai peluang yang tinggi untuk memenangi pencalonan Libertarian dan akhirnya jawatan presiden.

src: He replied, "My chances of winning are not all in my hands."
ref: Beliau menjawab, "peluang saya untuk menang bukan semuanya berada di dalam tangan saya."

src: When asked about America's shrinking middle class he said, "The economic policies of the US government are the cause our troubles."
ref: Apabila ditanya mengenai pengecutan kelas pertengahan Amerika, dia berkata, "Dasar-dasar ekonomi kerajaan Amerika Syarikat adalah punca masalah kita."

src: Burns believes that the President "is not 'the leader of the free world,' rather....a person who attempts to protect our rights to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness."
ref: Burns percaya bahawa Presiden "bukan 'pemimpin dunia bebas, 'sebaliknya...seorang yang cuba melindungi hak kita untuk hidup, kebebasan, dan mengejar kebahagiaan."

src: Kasey Kahne rode into victory early Sunday morning at Richmond International Raceway in the state of Virginia, USA, in his first Nascar Nextel Cup victory.
ref: Kasey Kahne memandu ke arah kemenangan awal pagi Ahad di Litar Lumba Richmond International di negeri Virginia, AS, dalam kejuaraan Nascar Nextel Cup beliau yang pertama.

src: Kahne, who drives a Dodge, and is sponsored by the same company, won automaker competitor Chevrolet's sponsored race, the Chevy American Revolution 400.
ref: Kahne, yang memandu sebuah Dodge, dan ditaja oleh beberapa syarikat, memenangi perlumbaan yang ditaja pesaing pembuat kereta Chevrolet, Chevy American Revolution 400.

src: The 25-year old from Huntersville, North Carolina had previously gained the pole position for Saturday's night race on Friday.
ref: Pelumba berusia 25 tahun itu berasal dari Huntersville, North Carolina itu telah meraih kedudukan petak pertama sebelum ini untuk perlumbaan malam Sabtu pada hari Jumaat.

src: Early in the race, second-place finisher Tony Stewart took lead from Kahne, continuing on to lead over 100 cumulative laps in the race.
ref: Di awal perlumbaan, pemenang tempat kedua Tony Stewart mendahului Kahne, terus mendahului sebanyak lebih 100 jumlah pusingan di dalam perlumbaan tersebut.

src: Points leader Jimmie Johnson crashed his car early into the race, taking a last-place finish.
ref: Pendahulu mata Jimie Johnson terbabas dengan keretanya diawal perlumbaan, mendapat tempat terakhir.

src: Nader, who also ran for president in the previous three elections, made the announcement on NBC's television program Meet the Press.
ref: Nader, yang juga bertanding untuk Presiden dalam tiga pilihan raya sebelum ini, membuat pengumuman itu pada program televisyen NBC Meet the Press.

src: "Dissent is the mother of ascent, and in that context I have decided to run for president," said Nader.
ref: "Penentangan adalah sumber setiap kenaikan, dan saya telah membuat keputusan untuk bertanding sebagai presiden dalam konteks tersebut," kata Nader.

src: And I want everybody to have the right and opportunity to improve their country."
ref: Dan saya mahu semua orang untuk mempunyai hak dan peluang untuk memperbaiki negara mereka."

src: Many Democrats believe his campaign led to the election of Republican George W. Bush by taking away potential votes for Democrat Al Gore, especially in the state of Florida.
ref: Banyak Demokrat percaya kempennya membawa kepada pemilihan Republikan George W. Bush dengan mengambil undi yang berpotensi untuk Demokrat Al Gore, terutamanya di negeri Florida.

src: At a press conference yesterday, Democratic candidate Barack Obama doubted that a potential Nader candidacy would have the same impact as in 2000.
ref: Pada sidang akhbar semalam, calon Demokrat Barack Obama meragui bahawa Nader ialah calon berpotensi yang akan mempunyai kesan yang sama seperti pada tahun 2000.

src: "He thought that there was no difference between Al Gore and George Bush and, eight years later, I think people realize that Ralph did not know what he was talking about," Obama told reporters.
ref: "Dia berfikir bahawa tidak ada perbezaan antara Al Gore dan George Bush dan, lapan tahun kemudian, saya fikir orang ramai menyedari bahawa Ralph tidak tahu tentang apa yang dia bercakap," kata Obama kepada wartawan.

src: "Obviously it’s not helpful to whoever our Democratic nominee is," she said.
ref: "Jelas sekali ia tidak berguna kepada sesiapa penama Demokratik kita," katanya.

src: "I remember when he did this before, it didn't turn out too well for anyone, especially our country."
ref: "Saya masih ingat apabila dia berbuat demikian sebelum ini, ia tidak menghasilkan yang terlalu baik untuk semua, terutamanya negara kita."

src: She said Nader "prevented Al Gore from being the 'greenest' president we could have had", and she hoped his bid will be "just a passing fancy that people won't take too seriously."
ref: Beliau berkata Nader "menghalang Al Gore daripada menjadi Presiden 'paling hijau'kita mungking pernah ada", dan beliau berharap usahanya akan menjadi "hanya kelulusan yang mewah bahawa orang tidak akan mengambil begitu serius."

src: Nader dismissed criticism of his entry into the race, saying, "For anybody who thinks that the third try is something that should be demeaned, it represents persistence, it represents never giving up the struggle for justice."
ref: Nader menolak kritikan terhadap kemasukan ke dalam bangsa itu, katanya: "Bagi sesiapa yang berfikir bahawa percubaan ketiga adalah sesuatu yang harus dihina, ia mewakili kegigihan, ia mewakili tidak pernah berputus asa perjuangan untuk keadilan."

src: "I think it would always pull votes away from the Democrats, not the Republicans," he said.
ref: "Saya fikir ia akan sentiasa tarik undi dari Demokrat, bukan Republikan," katanya.

src: "So actually, Republicans would welcome his entry into the race and hope that a few more will join in."
ref: "Jadi sebenarnya, Parti Republik mengalu-alukan kemasukan beliau ke dalam perlumbaan dan berharap beberapa lagi akan turut serta."

src: Users worldwide are reporting that they are unable to login to Microsoft's (MS) live services such as Hotmail, Windows Live Messenger, and in some cases Xbox Live.
ref: Pengguna di seluruh dunia melaporkan bahawa mereka tidak dapat log masuk untuk servis langsung Microsoft (MS) seperti Hotmail, Windows Live Messenger, dan dalam beberapa kes Xbox Live.

src: "We are aware that some customers may be experiencing difficulty accessing their Windows Live accounts."
ref: "Kita sedar bahawa sesetengah pelanggan mungkin akan mengalami kesukaran mengakses akaun Windows Live mereka".

src: "We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience and disruption this may be causing our customers," said MS in a statement to the media.
ref: "Kami memohon maaf atas sebarang kesulitan dan gangguan ini boleh menyebabkan pelanggan kami," kata MS dalam satu kenyataan kepada media.

src: Iraq's council of ministers says the Turkish military is violating Iraqi sovereignty by conducting the incursion into Kurdish areas of northern Iraq.
ref: Menteri majlis Iraq berkata tentera Turki mencabul kedaulatan Iraq dengan menjalankan pencerobohan ke kawasan Kurdistan di utara Iraq.

src: The Turkish military crossed into Iraq to chase out Kurdish rebels from the Kurdistan Workers Party.
ref: Tentera Turki menyeberang ke Iraq untuk menghalau pemberontak Kurdistan dari Parti Pekerja Kurdistan.

src: The rebels want autonomy for Kurds in Turkey and have used bases inside Iraq to launch attacks on Turkish forces.
ref: Pemberontak mahu autonomi bagi orang Kurdistan di Turki dan telah menggunakan asas dalam Iraq untuk melancarkan serangan ke atas tentera Turki.

src: About 20 percent of Turkish citizens are Kurds and in the southeast, bordering Iraq, they make up the majority.
ref: Kira-kira 20 peratus daripada rakyat Turki adalah orang Kurdistan dan di bahagian tenggara, yang bersempadan dengan Iraq, mereka adalah majoriti.

src: But Kurds in Turkey say their culture and language are oppressed.
ref: Tetapi orang Kurdistan di Turki mengatakan budaya dan bahasa mereka tertindas.

src: Mahmoud al-Mashhadani, president of the Iraqi Parliament, says they have asked Turkey to resolve the situation peacefully.
ref: Mahmoud al-Mashhadani, Presiden Parlimen Iraq, berkata mereka meminta Turki untuk menyelesaikannya dengan aman.

src: Iraq's Shiite parliament ministers issued a statement rejecting the Turkish military operation and supporting calls for their immediate withdrawal.
ref: Menteri Syiah parlimen Iraq mengeluarkan kenyataan menolak operasi ketenteraan Turki dan menyokong saranan untuk pengunduran mereka dengan segera.

src: Elsewhere, a suicide bomber detonated in a bus near the northern city of Mosul, killing at least nine and wounding several others.
ref: Di tempat lain, seorang pengebom berani mati meletup dalam bas berhampiran bandar utara Mosul, membunuh sekurang-kurangnya sembilan orang dan mencederakan beberapa yang lain.

src: Iraqi TV showed huge crowds of Shiites walking in procession, beating drums, and whipping and hitting themselves in ritual prostration.
ref: TV Iraq menunjukkan orang ramai Syiah berjalan dalam perarakan, memukul gendang, dan menyebat dan memukul diri mereka dalam sujud.

src: The European Union (EU) competitions commission has announced its decision to fine the Microsoft Corporation €899 million (US$1.35 billion), approximately 1/10th of the company's gross yearly earnings, for failing to comply with the 2004 antitrust order.
ref: Pertandingan suruhanjaya Kesatuan Eropah (EU) telah mengumumkan keputusan untuk mendenda Syarikat Microsoft sebanyak €899 juta (US$1.35 billion), dianggarkan 1/10 dari keuntungan kasar tahunan syarikat itu, kerana gagal mematuhi perintah anti-pakatan 2004.

src: It is the highest ever fine charged by the EU (also being the largest fine of its kind ever imposed upon a company), and the first time that the EU has fined a company because of non-compliance with an antitrust decision.
ref: Ini ialah denda yang paling tinggu yang pernah di caj oleh EU (juga menjadi denda paling banyak yang pernah dikenakan kepada syarikat), dan kali pertama bahawa EU mendenda syarikat kerana ketidakpatuhan terhadap perintah anti-pakatan.

src: The first decision in this antitrust case was given in 2004 citing that Microsoft withheld needed interoperability information from rival software companies which prevented them from making software compatible with Windows.
ref: Keputusan pertama dalam kes anti-pakatan dinyatakan di 2004 menyebut bahawa Microsoft menahan informasi kesalingfungsian yang diperlukan oleh syarikat perisian pesaing untuk membuat perisian yang serasi dengan Windows.

src: The EU found these royalty fees unreasonable and Microsoft was ordered to lower them.
ref: EU berpendapat bahawa bayaran royalti ini tidak munasabah dan Microsoft telah diarahkan untuk mengurangkannya.

src: Microsoft complied with this, adjusting the royalty rates to 1.2% (changing the rates for the licenses to 0.7% and 0.5%, respectively) in the European Union, while keeping the rate the same for the rest of the world.
ref: Microsoft dikompilasikan dengan ini, melaraskan kadar royalti kepada 1.2% (menukar kadar untuk lesen kepada masing-masing 0.7% dan 0.5%) di Kesatuan Eropah, sambil menjaga kadar yang sama untuk seluruh dunia.

src: The EU still saw this as an unreasonable rate, and Microsoft, two month after lowering the rates, reduced the rates yet again to a flat rate of €10000 or a royalty of 0.4% applicable worldwide.
ref: EU masih nampak ini sebagai kadar yang tidak munasabah, dan Microsoft, selepas dua bulan menurunkan kadar tersebut, menurunkan lagi kadar kepada kadar rata €10,000 atau 0.4% royalti digunapakai seluruh dunia.

src: Microsoft's royalty rates, which were deemed unreasonable for the period of 15 months between June 21, 2006 and October 21, 2007 are the cause for the fine.
ref: Kadar royalti Microsft, yang difikirkan sebagai tidak munasabah untuk tempoh selama 15 bulan diantara 21 Jun 2006 sehingga 21 Oktober 2007 adalah penyebab kepada denda ini.

src: This fine will go towards the European Union annual budget.
ref: Denda ini akan disalurkan kepada bajet tahunan Kesatuan Eropah.

src: The European Anti-trust commissioner Neelie Kroes stated that the fine was "reasonable and proportionate", as the figure could have gone up as high as €1.5 billion, the maximum that the EU commission can impose.
ref: Pesuruhjaya Anti-pakatan Eropah Neelie Kroes berkata bahawa denda itu adalah "munasabah dan berpatutan," sebagai angka yang boleh naik lagi setinggi €1.5 billion, harga maksimum yang suruhanjaya EU boleh kenakan.

src: She also said that it should act as "a signal to the outside world, and especially Microsoft, that they should stick to the rules" and that "Talk is cheap."
ref: Beliau juga berkata bahawa mereka sepatutnya bertindak sebagai "satu isyarat kepada dunia luar, terutamanya Microsoft, bahawa mereka seharusnya patuh pada peraturan" dan bahawa "cakap itu murah."

src: Microsoft's General Counsel Brad Smith commented "It's clearly very important to us as a company that we comply with our obligations under European law."
ref: Peguam Am Microsoft Brad Smith mengulas "Ianya sangat jelas penting pada kami sebagai syarikat bahawa kami patuh pada kewajipan dibawah undang-undang Eropah."

src: "We'll study this decision carefully, and if there are additional steps that we need to take in order to comply with it, we will take them."
ref: "Kami akan mengkaji keputusan ini secara berhati-hati, dan jika ada langkah tambahan yang perlu diambil untuk mematuhinya, kami akan ambil."

src: Microsoft had appealed to fines by the EU before, but all the charges were defeated.
ref: Microsoft pernah merayu kerana didenda oleh EU sebelum ini, tetapi semua pertuduhan itu kalah.

src: "We didn't know it was this week, but we knew it was coming at some point."
ref: "Kami tidak tahu ianya jadi minggu ini, tapi kami tahu ianya datang satu ketika nanti."

src: This may not be the end of Microsoft's troubles with the European Union yet, as the commission is currently investigating two other complaints about the company's anti-competition practices.
ref: Ini mungkin bukan masalah terakhir Microsoft dengan Kesatuan Eropah, kerana suruhanjaya masih lagi menyiasat dua aduan lain berkenaan cara anti-persaingan syarikat itu.

src: The decisions came after Microsoft announced they were disclosing 30,000 pages of previously secret software code last Thursday (February 21st).
ref: Keputusan tersebut dibuat selepas Microsoft mengumumkan bahawa mereka mendedahkan 30,000 muka surat kod perisian rahsia Khamis yang lepas(21 Februari).

src: The EU competition commissioner's commented that this move "does not necessarily equal a change in business practice."
ref: Persaingan Pesuruhjaya EU mengulas bahawa tindakan ini "tidak semestinya bersamaan dengan perubahan amalan bisnes."

src: Microsoft was set to launch three new products: Windows Server 2008, SQL Server 2008 and Visual Studio 2008 at its "Heroes Happen Here" event today.
ref: Microsoft telah melancarkan tiga produk baharu: Window Server 2008, SQL Server 2008 dan Visual Studio 2008 pada acara "Wira Terjadi Disini" hari ini.

src: Microsoft shares slipped 12 cents to $28.26 on NASDAQ after news of the fine.
ref: Microsoft syer telah jatuh 12 sen kepada $28.26 di NASDAQ selepas berita berkenaan denda.

src: An early beta version of product, not including the anti-spyware capability, has already been released to Microsoft employees.
ref: Versi beta produk sebelum ini, tidak termasuk keupayaan anti perisian intip, telah dikeluarkan kepada kakitangan Microsoft.

src: Microsoft plans to make Windows OneCare available to customers for a yearly subscription fee.
ref: Microsoft merancang untuk menyediakan Windows OneCare kepada pelanggan dengan bayaran langganan tahunan.

src: Recently, Microsoft bought Giant software, makers of antivirus and spyware prevention software.
ref: Baru-baru ini, Microsoft telah membeli perisian Giant, pembuat antivirus dan perisian pencegahan perisian intip.

src: The details of the Prince's engagement had previously been kept secret by many British and international news agencies, including the BBC and the Associated Press.
ref: Butiran mengenai penyertaan Putera itu sebelum ini telah disembunyikan oleh banyak agensi berita Britain dan antarabangsa, termasuk BBC dan Associated Press.

src: Prince Harry will be flown home "immediately", after 10 weeks of front line service.
ref: Putera Harry akan diterbangkan pulang "segera," setelah 10 minggu berada di servis barisan hadapan.

src: During this he worked as a Joint terminal attack controller (JTAC) and was involved in major operations on the frontline against Taliban forces.
ref: Sebelum ini beliau bekerja sebagai pengawal bersama serangan terminal (JTAC) dan terlibat dalam beberapa operasi utama di barisan hadapan menentang kuasa-kuasa Taliban.

src: The media blackout was created to lower the risk to the royal, whilst in service in Afghanistan, and was the first large scale agreement of its kind.
ref: Penapisan media telah diwujudkan untuk mengurangkan risiko kepada golongan raja itu, semasa dalam perkhidmatan di Afghanistan, dan ia adalah perjanjian skala besar yang pertama seumpamanya.

src: Interpol has issued an "Orange Notice" for the leader of southeast Asian Jemaah Islamiyah, Mas Selamat bin Kastari, who escaped from a detention center Wednesday.
ref: Interpol telah mengeluarkan "Notis Orange" untuk pemimpin Asia Tenggara Jemaah Islamiyah, Mas Selamat bin Kastari, yang melarikan diri dari pusat tahanan pada hari Rabu.

src: Singapore Home Affairs Minister Wong Kan Seng told his Parliament that a "security lapse" is what led to Mas Selamat's escape.
ref: Menteri Dalam Negeri Singapura Wong Kan Seng memberitahu Parlimen bahawa "kesilapan keselamatan" menyebabkan pelarian diri Mas Selamat.

src: While waiting to visit his family, Mas Selamat escaped from the Internal Security Department's Whitley Road detention facility shortly after 4 PM local time after being granted permission to use the washroom.
ref: Sementara menunggu untuk melawat keluarganya, Mas Selamat melarikan diri dari pusat tahanan Jabatan Keselamatan Dalam Negeri Whitley Road tidak lama selepas waktu tempatan 4 petang selepas diberi kebenaran untuk menggunakan bilik air.

src: "When it comes to escapes, the first hours are crucial," said Jean-Michel Louboutin, Interpol's executive director of police services.
ref: "Dalam perkara pelarian diri, beberapa jam pertama sangat penting," kata Jean-Michel Louboutin, pengarah eksekutif perkhidmatan polis Interpol.

src: "The state of Singapore has put into operation everything that's needed to be done.
ref: "Negara Singapura telah melaksanakan semua yang yang perlu dilakukan.

src: It's a small country, so it's easy to cross and leave."
ref: Ia adalah sebuah negara yang kecil, jadi ia mudah untuk dilalui dan pergi".

src: He is "someone who presents a potential physical danger to others, but also a potential danger by organizing future bombings," Louboutin said.
ref: Dia adalah "seseorang yang mempunyai potensi bahaya fizikal kepada orang lain, tetapi juga potensi bahaya dengan menganjurkan pengeboman masa depan," kata Louboutin.

src: After the "Orange Notice" was released, Mas Selamat's picture and fingerprints were released to Interpol's 186 member countries.
ref: Selepas "Notis Orange" dikeluarkan, gambar dan cap jari Mas Selamat telah dilepaskan kepada 186 negara anggota Interpol.

src: As Wikleaks is a wiki and is therefore not run by anyone, Jonathon Winterview interviewed a spokesperson of Wikileaks, who answered all the below questions.
ref: Sebagaimana Wikileaks adalah sebuah wiki dan oleh itu tidak dijalankan oleh sesiapa, Jonathan Winterview menemuramah seorang jurucakap Wikileaks, yang menjawab semua soalan-soalan dibawah.

src: They have claimed that the lifting of the injunction was a "victory for the first amendment."
ref: Mereka menyatakan bahawa penarikan balik injunksi tersebut merupakan "kemenangan untuk pindaan pertama".

src: The representative stated that the ACLU hopes this injunction acts as an example to other judges who take part in similar cases.
ref: Jurucakap tersebut menyatakan bahawa ACLU berharap injunksi ini bertindak sebagai contoh kepada hakim lain yang mengendalikan kes serupanya.

src: This opinion was shown when the representative said that the lifting of the injunction will "hopefully help show other courts that injunctions against speech, including speech on the Internet, are not appropriate."
ref: Pendapat tersebut ternyata apabila jurucakap berkata penarikan balik perintah tersebut akan "diharapkan membantu menunjukkan kepada mahkamah lain tentang injunksi terhadap ucapan, termasuk ucapan di Internet, adalah tidak wajar".

src: The permanent injunction was granted in the California Northern District Court in San Francisco, California to Bank Julius Baer, a Swiss bank, which has caused the domain to be taken off line in the U.S.. Wikileaks previously published several documents obtained from a whistleblower of the Swiss Bank, "purportedly showing offshore tax evasion and money laundering by extremely wealthy and in some cases, politically sensitive, clients from the United States, Europe, China and Peru."
ref: Injunksi kekal telah diberikan di Mahkamah Daerah Utara California di San Francisco, California kepada Bank Julius Baer, sebuah bank Switzerland, yang mengakibatkan domain itu di bawa keluar talian di U.S. Wikileaks sebelum ini menerbitkan beberapa dokumen yang diperolehi daripada pemberi maklumat Swiss Bank, "kononnya menunjukkan pengelakan cukai luar negara dan pelaburan wang haram oleh orang yang sangat kaya dan dalam sesetengah kes, sensitif dari segi politik, pelanggan dari Amerika Syarikat, Eropah, Cina dan Peru".

src: "Blocking access to the entire site in response to a few documents posted there completely disregards the public's right to know," said Ann Brick a lawyer for the ACLU, in a statement made before the injunction was lifted.
ref: "Menyekat akses ke seluruh laman itu berikutan beberapa dokumen yang disiarkan di situ menafikan hak orang awam untuk tahu secara sepenuhnya," kata Ann Brick peguam untuk ACLU, dalam satu kenyataan yang dibuat sebelum injunksi ditarik balik.

src: Those documents have been forged into a joint amicus curiae ("friend of the court") brief; which will be submitted to the court and used as defense evidence in a hearing scheduled for Friday February 29.
ref: Dokumen tersebut telah dipalsukan dalam ringkasan amicus curiae ("rakan mahkamah") bersama; yang akan dikemukakan kepada mahkamah dan digunakan sebagai bukti pembelaan dan satu perbicaraan yang dijadualkan pada Jumaat 29 Februari.

src: Almost exactly one year ago, on March 7, Garuda Indonesia Flight 200 crashed during landing at Adisucipto International Airport, near Yogyakarta, after a scheduled domestic Indonesian passenger flight.
ref: Hampir tepat satu tahun yang lalu, pada 7 Mac, pesawat Garuda Indonesia Penerbangan 200 terhempas semasa mendarat di Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Adisucipto, berhampiran Yogyakarta, selepas satu penerbangan penumpang Indonesia domestik yang dijadualkan.

src: Overall, the plane had traveled 252m beyond the extreme end of the runway.
ref: Secara keseluruhannya, pesawat itu telah bergerak sepanjang 252m melepasi akhir landasan.

src: The final report, released in October, blamed pilot error for the disaster.
ref: Laporan terakhir, yang dikeluarkan pada bulan Oktober, menyalahkan kesilapan juruterbang untuk bencana itu.

src: The report stated that the aircraft had approached at a speed far exceeding that at which the wing flaps could properly operate, and attempted to execute a landing at 408 kph (254 mph), which is 160 kph (100 mph) above the safe speed.
ref: Laporan itu menyatakan bahawa pesawat itu menghampiri kelajuan yang keterlaluan di mana kepak sayap boleh beroperasi dengan betul, dan cuba untuk melaksanakan pendaratan pada 408 kmj (254 mph), iaitu 160 kmj (100 mph) melebihi kelajuan yang selamat.

src: It also found that captain Marwoto Komar had ignored fifteen activations of the Ground Proximity Warning System (GPWS) informing Mr Komar that the aircraft was flying at a speed beyond that at which it could safely land, but he failed to abort.
ref: Juga mendapati bahawa kapten Marwoto Komar telah mengabaikan lima belas pengaktifan Sistem Amaran Jarak Darat (GPWS) yang memberitahu Encik Komar bahawa pesawat itu terbang pada kelajuan melebihi pendaratan selamat, tetapi dia gagal untuk berhenti.

src: Mr Rochmana was also criticised for his failure to take control away from Mr Komar when it became apparent that the aircraft was being operated in an unsafe manner.
ref: Encik Rochmana juga dikritik kerana kegagalannya untuk menuntut kawalan daripada Encik Komar apabila ia menjadi jelas bahawa pesawat itu dikendalikan dengan cara yang tidak selamat.

src: in fact, training was found to be inadequate for both members of the cockpit crew.
ref: Sebenarnya, latihan didapati tidak mencukupi untuk kedua-dua anak kapal di kokpit.

src: However, the Indonesian authorities have recently generated intense controversy by deciding to prosecute Mr Komar for his role in the disaster.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, pihak berkuasa Indonesia baru-baru ini telah menjana kontroversi kuat dengan memutuskan untuk mendakwa Encik Komar untuk peranannya dalam bencana.

src: The unusually high number of Australians amongst the 140 passengers on board was attributable to a visit by Mr Downer.
ref: Jumlah orang Australia yang luar biasa tingginya di kalangan 140 penumpang adalah disebabkan oleh lawatan oleh Encik Downer.

src: One of those was Morgan Mellish of the Australian Financial Review, who died in the crash.
ref: Salah seorang daripada mereka adalah Morgan Mellish dari Kajian Kewangan Australia, yang meninggal dunia dalam hempasan itu.

src: His sister, Caroline Mellish, had specifically called for prosecution to be avoided, saying "I think having 21 deaths on your conscience is probably enough."
ref: Kakaknya, Caroline Mellish, telah secara khusus meminta supaya mengelakkan pendakwaan, berkata "Saya rasa 21 kematian untuk pengajaran mungkin sudah cukup bagi kamu."

src: "I don't think prosecuting the man is going to make any difference."
ref: "Saya tidak fikir pendakwaan lelaki itu akan membawa apa-apa perbezaan."

src: "I want to see people who have negligently allowed Australians … to be killed."
ref: "Saya mahu melihat orang yang telah cuai dan membenarkan orang Australia...terbunuh."

src: Australian Opposition Leader Kevin Rudd also made clear a desire for prosecutions, saying he had telephoned secretary-general of Indonesia's foreign affairs department and former ambassador to Australia Imron Cotan, telling him that he wanted those responsible "prosecuted to the absolute full".
ref: Pemimpin Pembangkang Australia Kevin Rudd juga menjelaskan keinginan untuk pendakwaan, beliau berkata beliau telah menelefon setiausaha agung jabatan hal ehwal luar negeri Indonesia dan bekas duta ke Australia Imron Cotan, yang memberitahunya bahawa beliau mahu mereka yang bertanggungjawab" didakwa dengan sepenuhnya."

src: "This is a serious matter," he said.
ref: "Ini adalah satu perkara yang serius," katanya.

src: National Transport Safety Committee chairman Tatang Kurniadi said at the time that no information from the report could be used in any criminal or civil liability investigations.
ref: Pengerusi Jawatankuasa Keselamatan Pengangkutan Kebangsaan Tatang Kurniadi berkata pada masa sekarang tiada maklumat daripada laporan itu yang boleh digunakan dalam mana-mana siasatan liabiliti jenayah atau sivil.

src: "I would like to go back to the objective of this", he said.
ref: "Saya ingin kembali kepada objektif ini," katanya.

src: "We will not give police or any institution (information) other than for safety purposes only."
ref: "Kami tidak akan memberikan polis atau mana-mana institusi (maklumat) selain daripada untuk tujuan keselamatan sahaja."

src: "it's in international regulations and we want to follow those regulations."
ref: "Ia dalam peraturan-peraturan antarabangsa dan kami mahu mengikut peraturan-peraturan."

src: He also confirmed that investigators cannot speak to the police, with the only permitted testimony under the legislation being to testify at a court hearing, and pointed out that the document does not actually appoint any blame.
ref: Beliau juga mengesahkan bahawa penyiasat-penyiasat tidak boleh bercakap kepada polis, dengan kesaksian hanya dibenarkan di bawah undang-undang untuk memberi keterangan dalam perbicaraan mahkamah, dan menegaskan bahawa dokumen itu sebenarnya tidak menunjukkan apa-apa kesalahan.

src: The only possible exception to this is where potential benefit would outweigh the "adverse domestic and international impact" on the investigation in question or any other either in progress or in the future.
ref: Satu-satunya pengecualian yang mungkin untuk ini adalah di mana potensi kebaikan lebih besar daripada "kesan buruk domestik dan antarabangsa" pada siasatan yang berkenaan atau mana-mana yang lain sama ada untuk sekarang atau pada masa akan datang.

src: The London-based International Federation of Air Line Pilots Associations (IFALPA) issued a press release condemning this move, saying that further investigations are needed into the crash, and that criminal proceedings could prevent an accurate version of events from ever being known.
ref: Persekutuan Persatuan Juruterbang Sistem Penerbangan Antarabangsa yang berpangkalan di London (IFALPA) mengeluarkan kenyataan akhbar mengutuk langkah ini, dengan mengatakan bahawa siasatan lanjut adalah diperlukan atas hempasan itu, dan bahawa prosiding jenayah boleh menghalang versi tepat peristiwa daripada diketahui.

src: Specifically, the release said that "IFALPA believes that the circumstances of the accident as set forth in the final report of the Indonesian investigation authority leaves many serious questions concerning the crew actions prior to the accident."
ref: Secara khusus, kenyataan itu berkata, "IFALPA percaya bahawa keadaan kemalangan tersebut seperti yang dinyatakan dalam laporan terakhir siasatan pihak berkuasa Indonesia meninggalkan banyak persoalan serius mengenai tindakan anak-anak kapal sebelum kemalangan itu."

src: "The Federation believes that the explanations proffered by the report do not square with the collective experience of our members."
ref: "Persekutuan itu percaya bahawa penjelasan yang diberikan oleh laporan itu tidak selaras dengan pengalaman kolektif ahli kami."

src: The release went on to state the opinion that prosecution may bring total foreclosure to the case and could only be counterproductive.
ref: Kenyataan itu pula menyatakan pendapat bahawa pendakwaan itu boleh membawa penutupan kes itu dan hanya akan menjadi tidak produktif.

src: It also said "He remains a professional who was involved in an unfortunate tragedy."
ref: Ia juga berkata, "Beliau kekal sebagai seorang yang profesional yang terlibat dalam tragedi malang."

src: One possible explanation had previously been suggested by the head of the Garuda pilots association, Stephanus Geraldus.
ref: Satu penjelasan yang mungkin sebelum ini telah dicadangkan oleh ketua juruterbang persatuan Garuda, Stephanus Geraldus.

src: He said that marital problems between Mr Komar and his wife Norma Andriani were "common knowledge" and was backed up by an industry analyst and pilot who said he believed the couple had been arguing late into the night, and expressed concern that the report had not addressed psychological issues.
ref: Katanya, masalah perkahwinan antara Encik Komar dan isterinya Norma Andriani "diketahui ramai" dan telah disokong oleh seorang penganalisis industri dan juruterbang yang berkata beliau percaya pasangan itu telah bergaduh sehingga lewat malam, dan melahirkan rasa kebimbangan bahawa laporan itu tidak menyatakan isu-isu psikologi.

src: Mr Geraldus also said sleep deprivation could have contributed, with the flight crew reporting for duty at 4:30 am and the flight departing an hour and a half later.
ref: Encik Geraldus juga berkata kekurangan tidur mungkin boleh menyumbang, dengan anak kapal penerbangan yang lapor diri untuk bertugas pada 4:30 pagi dan penerbangan itu berlepas satu jam setengah kemudian.

src: The report had hinted at problems, saying "The pilot was probably emotionally aroused because his conscious awareness moved from the relaxed mode "singing"to the heightened stressfulness of the desire to reach the runway by making an excessively steep and fast, unstabilised approach," It is also known that Mr Komar had been under police surveillance, during which time he was receiving psychological treatment.
ref: Laporan itu telah membayangkan masalah dengan berkata "juruterbang itu mungkin beremosi terangsang kerana kesedarannya bertukar dari mod santai "menyanyi" kepada keadaan tertekan keinginan untuk sampai ke landasan dengan membuat pendekatan yang terlalu curam dan cepat, tidak stabil," Juga diketahui bahawa Encik Komar telah berada di bawah pengawasan polis, pada waktunya dia telah menerima rawatan psikologi.

src: There were protests in Jakarta demanding his release and dozens of pilots across the nation also campaigned.
ref: Terdapat protes di Jakarta menuntut pembebasannya dan puluhan juruterbang di seluruh negara juga berkempen.

src: Meanwhile, two survivors, Adrianus Meliala and Retno Gunowati, went to the House of Representatives (DPR) to challenge those opposed to legal processes against the pilot.
ref: Sementara itu, dua mangsa terselamat, Adrianus Meliala dan Retno Gunowati, pergi ke Dewan Rakyat (DPR) untuk mencabar mereka yang menentang proses undang-undang terhadap juruterbang.

src: Mr Komar was released on police bail on February 15, and is currently awaiting trial.
ref: Encik Komar dibebaskan dengan ikat jamin pada 15 Februari, dan sedang menunggu perbicaraan.

src: He was forced to resign late in February with being fired his only alternative, and his licence has been suspended.
ref: Beliau terpaksa meletak jawatan di hujung Februari kerana dipecat adalah satu-satunya alternatifnya, dan lesennya telah digantung.

src: He is believed to be the only man ever prosecuted in Indonesian history over an airliner crash.
ref: Dia dipercayai menjadi satu-satunya lelaki yang pernah didakwa dalam sejarah Indonesia atas kemalangan pesawat.

src: Instead of pursuing the idea of using cameras or microchips in the ball to see if it has crossed the goal-line, the International Board wants to see if the introduction of two extra assistant referees can improve the quality of referee's decisions.
ref: Sebalik daripada menggunakan kamera atau mikrocip dalam bola untuk melihat jika ia telah merentasi garisan gol, Lembaga Antarabangsa mahu memperhatikan jika pengenalan dua penolong pengadil tambahan boleh meningkatkan kualiti keputusan pengadil.

src: FIFA general secretary Jerome Valcke declared: "We have decided to freeze for the time being the goal-line technology and all technology experiments."
ref: Setiausaha Agung FIFA, Jerome Valcke mengumum: "Kami telah memutuskan untuk membekukan teknologi garisan gol dan eksperimen teknologi buat masa ini".

src: "We will look on these two additional referees and we avoid considering any goal-line technology during this time."
ref: "Kami akan memperhatikan dua pengadil tambahan dan kami mengelak daripada menimbangkan apa-apa teknologi garisan gol pada masa ini".

src: FIFA President Sepp Blatter said the move was necessary to maintain the universal spirit of the game: "We have 260 million people directly involved in the game."
ref: Presiden FIFA, Sepp Blatter berkata langkah itu adalah perlu untuk mengekalkan semangat sejagat permainan itu: "Kami mempunyai 260 juta orang yang terlibat secara langsung dalam permainan ini".

src: "If we maintain the laws of the game ... it's so easy to understand ..." "We have to live with errors, football has to keep its human face."
ref: "Jika kami mengekalkan peraturan-peraturan permainan itu... ia begitu mudah untuk difahami..." "Kami harus menerima kesilapan, bola sepak perlu mengekalkan sifat kemanusiaannya".

src: "We have to maintain the laws of the game in their simplicity."
ref: "Kami perlu mengekalkan peraturan-peraturan permainan ini dalam kesederhanaannya".

src: "Do you want technical devices to take decisions?
ref: "Adakah anda mahu peranti teknikal untuk membuat keputusan?

src: That's why, after three years of tests with no conclusions, I am in favour of putting the whole thing on ice," Blatter explained.
ref: Itulah sebabnya, selepas tiga tahun ujian tanpa sebarang kesimpulan, saya menyokong penangguhan untuk kata pemutus," terang Blatter.

src: UEFA president Michel Platini agreed: "Football should stay human, but two more officials can help, especially around the goal."
ref: Presiden UEFA Michel Platini bersetuju: "Bola sepak patut terus mengekalkan sifat kemanusiaannya, tetapi dua pegawai tambahan boleh membantu, terutama di dalam perkara gol".

src: Platini made the suggestion to freeze all investigations into technology and to try two additional assistants behind each goal.
ref: Platini membuat cadangan untuk membekukan semua siasatan dalam teknologi dan mencuba dua pembantu tambahan di belakang setiap gol.

src: Blatter said the system using the microchip "was very complicated, needing electrified lines on the field of play and other devices including antennae and when we tested it in Tokyo last year there was one mistake during the seven matches we used as an experiment at the Club World Championship."
ref: Blatter berkata sistem yang menggunakan mikrocip "adalah sangat rumit, memerlukan garis elektrik di padang permainan dan peranti lain termasuk antena dan apabila kami menjalankan ujian di Tokyo tahun lepas ada satu kesilapan dalam tujuh perlawanan yang kami gunakan sebagai eksperimen di Kelab Kejohanan Dunia".

src: With regards to the system using cameras, he pointed to "problems with players obscuring the views of the cameras, or of flares or weather conditions."
ref: Merujuk kepada sistem yang menggunakan kamera, dia menunjukkan "masalah dengan pemain yang mengaburkan pandangan kamera, atau suar atau keadaan cuaca".

src: The FA clubs and referees supported the use of Hawk-Eye technology, said Mike Foster, general secretary of the English Premier League.
ref: Kelab FA dan pengadil menyokong penggunaan teknologi Hawk-Eye, kata Mike Foster, Setiausaha Agung Liga Perdana Inggeris.

src: The Scottish and Northern Irish FA also voted in favour of the goal-line technology.
ref: FA Scotland dan Northern Ireland juga mengundi memihak kepada teknologi garisan gol.

src: FA chief executive Brian Barwick expressed his disappointment at the annual meeting of the IFAB in Gleneagles, Scotland: "We were in favour of goal-line technology but there will be no more experiments and it will not be back on the agenda next year, or in the foreseeable future."
ref: Ketua eksekutif FA Brian Barwick melahirkan rasa kecewa pada mesyuarat tahunan IFAB di Gleneagles, Scotland: "Kami suka teknologi garisan gol tetapi tidak akan ada lebih eksperimen dan ia tidak akan kembali dalam agenda tahun depan, atau pada masa hadapan".

src: FIFA President Blatter denied ulterior motives for the decision: "There has been no change of heart."
ref: Presiden FIFA Blatter menafikan motif tersembunyi bagi keputusan itu: "Tiada sebarang perubahan dalam ketetapan".

src: Jayant Patel, wanted for manslaughter, grievous bodily harm and fraud in Australia, was arrested by FBI agents in Oregon, United States and is scheduled to face an extradition hearing on April 10.
ref: Jayant Patel, dikehendaki atas pembunuhan kejam, mengakibatkan kecederaan badan teruk dan penipuan di Australia, telah ditangkap oleh ejen-ejen FBI di Oregon, Amerika Syarikat dan dijadual menghadapi pendengaran ekstradisi pada 10 April.

src: Patel performed surgeries at Bundaberg that are alleged to have directly led to the deaths of several of his patients, including one procedure which he had previously been banned from performing in Oregon.
ref: Patel melakukan pembedahan di Bundaberg yang didakwa secara langsung membawa kepada kematian beberapa pesakit, termasuk satu prosedur yang telah sebelum ini telah dilarang daripada melakukannya di Oregon.

src: If successfully extradited to Australia, Patel "will get a fair trial", according to the Federal Member for Hinkler, Paul Neville, whose electorate includes Bundaberg, although the extradition may take some time due to Patel's US citizenship.
ref: Jika berjaya diekstradisi ke Australia, Patel "akan mendapat perbicaraan yang adil," menurut Ahli Persekutuan bagi Hinkler, Paul Neville, yang kawasan pengundian termasuk Bundaberg, walaupun ekstradisi mungkin mengambil sedikit masa kerana kerakyatan Amerika Syarikat Patel itu.

src: National secretary of the HSU, Kathy Jackson said admissions would be crippled, while intensive care patients would have to be evacuated to New South Wales, Tasmania and South Australia as hospitals will not be able to perform tests or administer treatment.
ref: Setiausaha negara HSU, Kathy Jackson berkata kemasukan akan lumpuh, sementara pesakit di penjagaan rapi akan dipindahkan ke New South Wales, Tasmania dan Australia Selatan akibat hospital tidak mampu menjalankan ujian atau rawatan pentadbiran.

src: When an ambulance shows up you can't admit a patient without an X-ray being available, you can't intubate them and you can't operate on them, she said.
ref: Apabila ambulan tiba kamu tidak boleh menerima pesakit tanpa X-ray sedia ada, kamu tidak boleh memasukkan tiub kepada mereka dan kamu tidak boleh membedah mereka, kata beliau.

src: If something goes wrong in an ICU you need to be able to X-ray, use nuclear medicine or any diagnostic procedure, said Ms Jackson.
ref: Jika sesuatu masalah berlaku di ICU kamu perlu boleh melakukan X-ray, menggunakan ubatan nuklear atau prosedur diagnostik, kata Puan Jackson.

src: Ms Jackson said the HSU offered arbitration last year, but the state government refused.
ref: Puan Jackson berkata HSU menawarkan timbang tara tahun lepas, tetapi kerajaan negeri menolak.

src: The government has offered the union a 3.25 per cent pay increase, in line with other public sector workers but the union has demanded more, but stopped short of specifying a figure.
ref: Kerajaan telah menawarkan kesatuan kenaikan sebanyak 3.25 peratus, sejajar dengan pekerja sektor kerajaan yang lain tetapi kesatuan telah menuntut lebih, tetapi berhenti daripada menyatakan angka yang jelas.

src: Victorian Premier John Brumby said the claim would be settled according to the government's wages policy.
ref: Perdana Victoria John Brumby berkata bahawa tuntutan itu akan selesai berdasarkan polisi gaji kerajaan.

src: we have a wages policy based around an increase of 3.25 per cent and, above that, productivity offset, he told parliament.
ref: Kami mempunyai polisi gaji berdasarkan kenaikan 3.25 peratus, dan lebih dari itu, rujukan produktiviti, kata beliau kepada parlimen.

src: The union claims it is also arguing against a lack of career structure, which has caused many professionals to leave the health service.
ref: Kesatuan menuntut ia juga berhujah menentang kekurangan dalam stuktur kareer, yang mana telah menyebabkan banyak professional meninggalkan servis kesihatan.

src: Ms Jackson said wages and career structures in Victoria were behind other states.
ref: Puan Jackson berkata gaji dan struktur kareer di Victoria adalah dibelakang berbanding negeri-negeri lain.

src: Victorian Opposition Leader Ted Baillieu said he was not in support of the proposed strike and called on the government to meet with unions.
ref: Ketua Pembangkang Victoria Ted Baillieu berkata dia tidak menyokong tindakan mogok dan memanggil kerajaan untuk bertemu dengan kesatuan.

src: There could not be a more serious threat to our health system than has been announced today.
ref: Tidak ada ancaman yang lebih serius kepada sistem kesihatan lebih daripada apa yang diumumkan hari ini.

src: We now have to do whatever is possible to stop this strike from proceeding, he said.
ref: Sekarang kita perlu lakukan apa yang kita mampu untuk menghentikan mogok ini daripada berterusan, kata beliau.

src: The opposition leader will meet with the union at 11:30 AM today.
ref: Ketua pembangkang akan bertemu dengan kesatuan pada 11:30 AM hari ini.

src: Victorian Hospitals Industry Association industrial relations services manager Simon Chant said hospitals were looking at the possible impact and warned that patients may have to be evacuated interstate if the strike goes ahead.
ref: Pengurus perkhidmatan perindustrian Persatuan Industri Hospital-hospital Victoria Simon Chant berkata hospital-hospital melihat akan kesan berkemungkinan dan memberi amaran bahawa pesakit mungkin terpaksa dipindahkan ke negeri lain jika mogok berterusan.

src: Britain has stated that it will reconsider the asylum application of a gay Iranian teenager who believes he will be persecuted for his sexuality if he is deported back to Iran.
ref: Britian telah menyatakan bahawa akan menimbangkan semula permohonan perlindungan oleh remaja gay Iran yang percaya dia akan ditahan kerana seksualiti jika di dihantar balik ke negara Iran.

src: The announcement Friday by the British government came after the European Parliament urged a resolution to the case and said that Iran has a history of torturing and executing homosexuals.
ref: Pengumuman itu dibuat pada hari Jumaat oleh kerajaan British selepas Parlimen Eropah menggesa resolusi kepada kes ini dan berkata bahawa Iran ada sejarah dalam menyeksa dan menghukum homoseksual.

src: Britain had initially rejected an asylum request by 19-year-old Mehdi Kazemi, and Kazemi fled to the Netherlands, where his case was turned down and he returned to Britain.
ref: Britian telah menolak permohonan perlindungan politik yang dimohon oleh Mehdi Kazemi berumur 19 tahun, dan Kazemi telah melarikan diri ke Belanda, dimana kesnya telah ditolak dan kembali ke Britian.

src: Roger Roberts of the House of Lords initiated the petition, and stated: "There is no doubt that he will be persecuted and possibly face state-sanctioned murder if he is forced to return."
ref: Rumah Diraja Roger Roberts memulakan petisyen dan menyatakan bahawa: "Tidak dinafikan dia akan dihukum dan akan berdepan dengan pembunuhan dipersetujui negeri jika dia di paksa pulang".

src: Simon Hughes, Member of Parliament for North Southwark and Bermondsey, said he would support Kazemi if he returns to the United Kingdom: "I hope Mr Kazemi will now come back to Britain where arrangements are already in place for an urgent meeting with him, his family, specialist lawyers and myself to prepare a new application to the Home Office."
ref: Simon Hughes, Ahli Parlimen Utara Southwark dan Bermondsey, berkata beliau akan menyokong Kazemi jika di pulang ke United Kingdom: "Saya berharap Encik Kazemi akan pulang semula ke Britian dimana telah aturan untuk pebincangan tergempar dengannya dibuat, keluarganya, peguam pakar dan saya sendiri untuk menyediakan permohonan baru kepada Pejabat Rumah".

src: His uncle spoke with CNN on condition of anonymity, and said that his nephew was studying in Britain in 2006 when his partner in Iran was arrested and hanged after being charged with sodomy.
ref: Pakciknya yang tidak mahu nama disiarkan bercakap dengan CNN dan berkata bahaw anak saudara nya belajar di Britian pada tahun 2006 semasa pasangannya di Iran telah ditahan dan digantung selepas dituduh meliwat.

src: After Britain's Home Office initially denied Kazemi's asylum application, he fled to Canada and then the Netherlands, where he was detained.
ref: Selepas Rumah Pejabat Britian pada awalnya menolak permohoan perlindungan Kazemi, dia terbang ke Kanada dan kemudian ke Belanda, dimana dia ditahan.

src: Kazemi faces deportation from the Netherlands to Britain, after their highest court rejected his plea on Tuesday.
ref: Kazemi dihantar pulang dari Belanda ke Britian, selepas mahkamah tertinggi mereka menolak rayuan dia pada selasa.

src: The Netherlands' highest court rejected the case, citing EU law that Kazemi's case was the responsibility of the country where he first requested asylum.
ref: Mahkamah tertinggi Belanda menolak kes ini, mengikut undang-undang EU bahawa kes Kazemi adalah tanggungjawab negara pertama yang dipohon untuk perlindungan politik.

src: A resolution passed by the European Parliament Thursday asked EU states "to find a common solution to ensure that Mehdi Kazemi is granted asylum or protection on EU soil and not sent back to Iran."
ref: Satu resolusi telah dihantar oleh Parlimen Eropah pada Khamis lalu meminta kenyataan EU "untuk mencari satu penyelesaian yang biasa untuk memastikan bahawa Mehdi Kazemi diluluskan untuk perlindungan politik atau perlindungan di tanah EU dan tidak dihantar balik ke Iran".

src: The resolution also stated that Iranian authorities "routinely detain, torture and execute persons, notably homosexuals" and that "Mehdi's partner has already been executed, while his father has threatened him with death."
ref: Resolusi itu juga menyatakan bahawa pihak berkuasa Iran "kerap menahan, menyeksa dan membunuh orang, terutamanya homoseksual" dan bahawa "pasangan Mehdi telah dibunuh, sementara ayahnya diugut untuk dibunuh".

src: In a September 2007 speech at Columbia University, Iranian president Mahmoud Ahmadinejad was challenged by University president Lee Bollinger for Iran's treatment of gays.
ref: Pada ucapan di Universiti Columbia pada September 2007, Presiden Iran Mahmoud Ahmadinejad telah dicabar oleh presiden universiti itu Bollinger untuk layanan Iran terhadap gay.

src: Ahmadinejad stated that "In Iran we don't have homosexuals like in your country," drawing laughter from the audience.
ref: Ahmadinejad berkata bahawa "Di Iran kami tidak ada homoseksual seperti di negara kamu," menyebabkan ketawa dari penonton.

src: "In Iran we do not have this phenomenon, I don't know who has told you that we have it."
ref: "Di Iran kami tidak ada fenomena ini, saya tidak tahu siapa yang memberitahu bahawa kami ada".

src: According to Iranian human rights activists, over 4,000 gay men and lesbians have been executed since the Iranian Revolution of 1979.
ref: Menurut aktivitis hak asasi manusia Iran, lebih 4000 lelaki gay dan perempuan lesbian telah dibunuh sejak Resolusi Iran 1979.

src: Even though this race is the second longest race in 2008 Tour de Taiwan, the weather challenged 89 cyclists due to an earlier rain in Taipei-Keelung metropolitan area.
ref: Walaupun perlumbaan ini merupakan yang kedua terpanjang di Tour de Taiwan 2008, keadaan cuaca mencabar 89 pelumba basikal disebabkan hujan pada awal pagi di kawasan bandar Taipei-Keelung.

src: Finally, Kyle Gritters from Health Net Pro Cycling Team won the Champion of this stage.
ref: Akhirnya, Kyle Gritters dari Pasukan Kesihatan Pelumba Basikal Professional mengungguli kejuaraan pada tahap ini.

src: Shawn Milne and Peter McDonald still threatened the current sprint and overall leader John Murphy within a difference less than 10 seconds.
ref: Shawn Milne dan Peter McDonald masih tergugat dengan pelumba sekarang dan ketua keseluruhan John Murphy dengan perbezaan kurang dari 10 saat.

src: A series of explosions have hit an Albanian arms depot near Tirana, leaving at least 155 people injured.
ref: Satu siri letupan telah menyerang depot senjata Albania berdekatan Tirana, menyebabkan sekurang-kurangnya 155 orang tercedera.

src: Juela Mecani, spokesperson for Albamian PM Sali Berisha, said to Reuters "We do not know the exact number (of casualties) but we fear the worst for the three teams, each of 21 people, working there at the time."
ref: Juela Mecani, jurucakap PM Albania Sali Berisha, berkata kepada Reuters "Kami tidak tahu angka sebenar (mangsa terkorban) namun kami amat risau akan tiga kumpulan, masing-masing terdiri daripada 21 orang, yang sedang bekerja di sana pada waktu tersebut".

src: The three teams referred to were dismantling obsolete munitions stored there, as part of a programme to remove Stalinist era arms and modernize the military in order to qualify for an invitation to join NATO next month.
ref: Ketiga-tiga kumpulan yang dinyatakan sebenarnya ditugaskan untuk menghapuskan senjata usang yang disimpan di situ, sebagai sebahagian daripada program untuk menghapuskan senjata era Stalinis dan memodenkan tentera untuk melayakkan pelawaan untuk menyertai NATO bulan depan.

src: Injured people have been rushed to hospitals amid ongoing explosions, which Interior Ministry spokesman Avni Neza says have prevented helicopters landing in the area.
ref: Orang yang tercedera telah dikejarkan ke hospital di tengah-tengah letupan yang berlaku, dimana jurucakap Kementerian Dalam Negeri Avni Neza berkata, yang menghalang helikopter untuk mendarat di sekitar kawasan.

src: The wounded are suffering from burns, concussion, broken limbs and shrapnel injuries.
ref: Yang tercedera mengalami lecur, gegaran, patah tangan dan kaki serta kecederaan serpihan bom.

src: Albanian health minister Nard Ndoka said that the 155 known to be hospitalized so far had to make their way to nearby villages as the ongoing explosions had also prevented road ambulances reaching the scene.
ref: Menteri kesihatan Albania Nard Ndoka berkata bahawa 155 orang yang diketahui dimasukkan ke hospital setakat ini terpaksa pergi ke kampung berdekatan berikutan letupan yang masih berterusan yang menghalang ambulans untuk sampai ke tempat kejadian.

src: Tirana Airport spokesman Arlinda Causholli said glass windows and doors at the airport, a few kilometers from the site, were shattered by the initial series of explosions.
ref: Jurucakap Lapangan terbang Tirana Arlinda Causholli berkata tingkap kaca dan pintu lapangan terbang, berjarak beberapa kilometer dari tempat kejadian, berkecai berikutan siri letupan awal.

src: "We evacuated passengers from the affected area and suspended flights for around 30 minutes," he said.
ref: "Kami memindahkan penumpang dari kawasan terlibat dan menangguhkan penerbangan selama 30 minit," katanya.

src: "Terrified people are leaving the area on foot along the highway, women and children…" "Cars with broken windows have been abandoned on the highway."
ref: "Orang yang takut meninggalkan kawasan tersebut dengan berjalan kaki sepanjang lebuhraya, wanita dan kanak-kanak..." "Kereta yang tingkapnya berkecai ditinggalkan di lebuhraya".

src: The initial blast was heard 150km away in Macedonia and Serbia
ref: Letupan awal didengari 150km jauh di Macedonia dan Serbia.

src: Australian Prime Minister Kevin Rudd announced today that the HSK Kormoran has been located approximately 112 nautical miles off Steep Point Western Australia.
ref: Perdana Menteri Australia Kevin Rudd hari ini mengumumkan bahawa HSK Kormoran telah dijumpai di kira-kira 112 batu nautika dari curam mata Australia Barat.

src: Sonar imagery of the Kormoran shows the site consists of two main pieces at a depth of 2560 metres.
ref: Imej sonar Kormoran menunjukkan lokasi terdiri daripada dua bahagian utama pada kedalaman 2560 meter.

src: A debris field 4 nautical miles south of the wreck believed to be the site of the battle.
ref: Serpihan di 4 batu nautika dari selatan bangkai kapal dipercayai menjadi tapak pertempuran.

src: The Kormoran (HSK 8) was a German auxiliary cruiser of Kriegsmarine during World War II.
ref: The Kormoran (HSK 8) adalah cruiser tambahan Kriegsmarine Jerman semasa Perang Dunia II.

src: On November 19, 1941, the Kormoran encountered the HMAS Sydney.
ref: Pada 19 November 1941, Kormoran menghadapi HMAS Sydney.

src: There have been many searches for the two vessels, this latest search is by the "Finding Sydney Foundation".
ref: Terdapat banyak carian untuk kedua-dua kapal, carian terkini ini adalah oleh "Yayasan Mencari Sydney".

src: "Finding the Kormoran is one big step forward," said Prime Minister Rudd.
ref: "Penemuan Kormoran adalah satu langkah besar ke hadapan," kata Perdana Menteri Rudd.

src: Warren Snowdon Minister for Defense Science and Personnel said that the Federal Republic of Germany has been advised of the discovery and that the site is to be protected.
ref: Menteri Pertahanan Sains dan Kakitangan Warren Snowdon berkata bahawa Persekutuan Republik Jerman telah diberitahu tentang penemuan itu dan bahawa tapak ini adalah dilindungi.

src: Finding Sydney Foundation Chairman Ted Graham says the search area for the Sydney can now be narrowed down to 300 nautical miles.
ref: Pengerusi Yayasan Mencari Sydney Ted Graham berkata kawasan pencarian untuk Sydney kini boleh ditumpukan kepada 300 batu nautika.

src: "As the Tibet uprising continues, reliable sources have confirmed that at least 80 people were killed on 14th March 2008 in Lhasa," the website Tibet.net reported.
ref: "Selama pemberontakan Tibet ini berterusan, sumber yang boleh dipercayai telah mengesahkan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya 80 orang terbunuh pada 14 Mac 2008 di Lhasa," laman web Tibet.net melaporkan.

src: The report from Xinhua, China's state-run news agency, was much different.
ref: Laporan dari Xinhua, agensi berita negeri yang dikendalikan oleh China, adalah jauh berbeza.

src: "In Friday's riot, at least ten civilians died, mostly from burns caused by the roving mobs and some others were injured," Xinhua said, citing the Tibetan Regional Government's report.
ref: "Dalam rusuhan pada hari Jumaat, sekurang-kurangnya sepuluh orang awam mati, kebanyakannya disebabkan luka terbakar yang disebabkan oleh rusuhan yang huru-hara dan beberapa orang lain tercedera," kata Xinhua, dengan memetik laporan Wilayah Kerajaan Tibet.

src: Additionally, they reported that police in Lhasa had saved 580 people, including an entire school, from the violent array of sabotage.
ref: Selain itu, mereka melaporkan bahawa polis di Lhasa telah menyelamatkan 580 orang, termasuk seluruh sekolah, dari jajaran sabotaj yang ganas.

src: At a press conference in Dharamsala, seat of the Tibetan government in exile, he said, "They simply rely on using force in order to simulate peace, a peace brought by force using a rule of terror."
ref: Dalam sidang akhbar di Dharamsal, ibu negara Tibet dalam buangan, beliau berkata, "Mereka hanya bergantung kepada penggunaan kekerasan untuk mensimulasikan keamanan, ketenangan yang dibawa oleh kuasa keras menggunakan peraturan keganasan".

src: China has declared a "People's War" against the protesters, vowing to "expose" the Dalai Lama.
ref: China telah mengisytiharkan "Perang Rakyat" terhadap penunjuk perasaan, bersumpah untuk "mendedahkan" Dalai Lama.

src: "We must wage a people's war to beat splittism and expose and condemn the malicious acts of these hostile forces and expose the hideous face of the Dalai Lama group to the light of day," officials were quoted as saying.
ref: "Kita mesti berperang bersama rakyat untuk mengalahkan penentangan fahaman pemisahan dan mendedahkan dan mengutuk tindakan berniat jahat kuasa-kuasa seteru dan mendedahkan wajah keji kumpulan Dalai Lama kepada orang ramai," pegawai telah disebut sebagai berkata.

src: China also prevented access to video website YouTube after many international videos of the protests were posted on the website.
ref: China juga menghalang akses ke laman web video YouTube selepas banyak video antarabangsa mengenai protes yang dipaparkan di laman web tersebut.

src: YouTube is normally easily accessible in China, which blocks other pornographic or subversive sites with its 'Great Firewall'.
ref: YouTube biasanya mudah diakses di China, yang menghalang laman web lucah atau subversif lain dengan 'Firewall Besar'nya.

src: A 72-golden-hour race of 2008 Tour de Taiwan in the Taipei-Keelung metropolitan area came to an end after entering the Taipei Xinyi Shopping Area as the final stage today.
ref: Perlumbaan 72-jam-keemasan 2008 Tour de Taiwan di kawasan metropolitan Taipei-Keelung berakhir selepas memasuki Kawasan Membeli-belah Taipei Xinyi sebagai peringkat akhir hari ini.

src: Before the main race, the organizer, Chinese Taipei Cycling Association held "The 3rd Taipei Citizen Elimination Road Race" to examine the achievements of basic cycling promotion.
ref: Sebelum perlumbaan utama, penganjur, Persatuan Berbasikal Chinese Taipei mengadakan "Penyingkiran Perlumbaan Jalanan Warganegara Taipei Ke-3" untuk mengkaji pencapaian promosi berbasikal asas.

src: Even though its racing scale is one third of the Taipei Stage (60 laps, 1 km/lap), but several local cycling clubs and senior cyclists participated in this promotional race.
ref: Walaupun skala perlumbaan adalah satu pertiga daripada Peringkat Taipei (60 pusingan, 1km/pusingan), tetapi beberapa kelab berbasikal tempatan dan penunggang basikal berpengalaman menyertai perlumbaan promosi ini.

src: Kuan-hua Lai, a cyclist from Giant Asia Racing Team, the current Taiwan leader of Tour de Taiwan, spoke to Wikinews Reporter Rico Shen before racing: "Since we [the Team] took the leading from Changhua County Stage until now, we were still be cautious of this current status because the competitors just lost behind within 15 seconds."
ref: Kuan-hua Lai, pelumba basikal dari Pasukan Giant Asia Racing, ketua Taiwan Tour de Taiwan kini, bercakap kepada Wartawan Wikinews Rico Shen sebelum perlumbaan: "Oleh kerana kami [pasukan] mendahului dari Peringkat Changhua County sehingga sekarang, kami masih berhati-hati dengan status semasa kerana pesaing hanya ketinggalan 15 saat di belakang".

src: "However, with several cyclists' actual strengths in several criterium stages, I think that the same incident won't take place again this year."
ref: "Walau bagaimanapun, dengan kekuatan sebenar beberapa orang penunggang basikal dalam beberapa peringkat kriterium, saya rasa kejadian yang sama tidak akan berlaku lagi pada tahun ini".

src: As a result in the middle-end section, the main group extremity controlled the condition of this race.
ref: Hasilnya di bahagian tengah hingga akhir, hujung kumpulan utama mengawal keadaan perlumbaan ini.

src: Finally, Marek Wesoły from Merida Europe Team won his second stage champion in this stage since he got former stage champion in Pingtung County.
ref: Akhir sekali, Marek Wesoły dari Pasukan Merida Eropah memenangi juara peringkat kedua dalam peringkat ini sejak dia mendapat bekas juara peringkat di Pingtung County.

src: With the stage champion went to Wesoły, John Murphy firmly won the overall champion in this series after 8 stages' racing.
ref: Dengan juara peringkat diperoleh oleh Wesoły, John Murphy selesa memenangi juara keseluruhan dalam siri ini selepas perlumbaan sebanyak 8 peringkat.

src: By the way, Kuan-hua Lai not only won the Taiwan Champion and was voted as the "Most Popular Taiwanese Cyclist", but also helped his team (Giant Asia Racing Team) to win the Team Champion in this series.
ref: Dengan ini, Kuan-hua Lai bukan sahaja memenangi Juara Taiwan dan diundi sebagai "Penunggang Basikal Taiwan yang Paling Popular," tetapi juga membantu pasukannya (Pasukan Giant Asia Racing) untuk memenangi Juara Pasukan dalam siri ini.

src: "Because of this issue, we cautiously chose some roads to do several attacks to keep the leading to the end."
ref: "Oleh kerana isu ini, kami berhati-hati memilih beberapa jalan untuk melakukan beberapa serangan untuk kekal mendahului sehingga ke akhir".

src: After this, my current teammates did several attempts covering me to the end, and finally, it took a good effort for me.
ref: Selepas ini, rakan sepasukan semasa saya melakukan beberapa percubaan untuk melindungi saya hingga akhir, dan akhirnya, ia mengambil usaha yang bagus untuk saya.

src: The Congressional Hispanic Caucus has blocked voting on legislation that would allow employers to rehire foreign seasonal workers.
ref: Kongres Hispanik Kaukus telah menyekat mengundi pada undang-undang yang akan membolehkan majikan untuk mengambil semula pekerja asing bermusim.

src: This year, the U.S. government will only issue 33,000 visas for winter workers and 33,000 for summer workers.
ref: Pada tahun ini, kerajaan Amerika Syarikat hanya mengeluarkan 33,000 visa pekerja musim sejuk dan 33,000 untuk pekerja musim panas.

src: This comes as a stark comparison to 2007, when 120,000 foreign workers entered the U.S. with H-2B visas.
ref: Ini datang sebagai perbandingan sekali dengan tahun 2007, apabila 120,000 pekerja asing memasuki Amerika Syarikat dengan visa H-2B.

src: Currently, the reduction in visas is having profounds effects on both Mexico and U.S.
ref: Pada masa ini, pengurangan dalam visa memberi kesan yang mendalam keatas kedua-dua Mexico dan Amerika Syarikat.

src: In Tlapacoyan, a Mexican town which in the last 30 years has exported a large seasonal workforce, using H-2B visas, to work in U.S. circuses and carnivals, the effects are already a stark reality.
ref: Di Tlapacoyan, sebuah bandar Mexico yang pada 30 tahun yang lalu telah mengeksport tenaga kerja bermusim yang besar, menggunakan visa H-2B, untuk bekerja di sarkas Amerika Syarikat dan karnival, kesan itu sudah menjadi realiti.

src: The local economy has been paralyzed, and unemployment has reached dramatic highs.
ref: Ekonomi tempatan telah lumpuh, dan pengangguran telah mencapai paras tertinggi dramatik.

src: Additionally, residents like Pablo Juarez Mendoza, who last year made $450 working in Texan livestock shows, are having difficulties finding local work.
ref: Selain itu, penduduk seperti Pablo Juarez Mendoza, yang tahun lepas yang dibuat $450 bekerja di rancangan ternakan Texan, yang menghadapi masalah mencari pekerjaan tempatan.

src: Those that do, are only making an average of $50 per week.
ref: Mereka yang berbuat demikian, hanya membuat purata $50 seminggu.

src: In Cape Cod, for example, the local chamber of commerce reports that town employers will only receive 15 of the 5,000 visas requested.
ref: Di Cape Cod, sebagai contoh, ruang tempatan perdagangan melaporkan bahawa majikan bandar hanya akan menerima 15 daripada 5,000 visa diminta.

src: Opponents of the change state that recent legislation blocking is part of the Caucus' efforts to push for comprehensive immigration reform, not seen in the U.S. since the early 1980s.
ref: Penentang nyatakan perubahan bahawa undang-undang menyekat baru-baru ini adalah sebahagian daripada usaha Kaukus 'untuk mendesak reformasi imigresen menyeluruh, tidak dilihat di Amerika Syarikat sejak awal 1980-an.

src: Hispanic Caucus Chairman, Rep. Joe Baca, D-California, hopes that policymakers will place attention not only on helping small businesses, but also on what to do with 12 million illegal immigrants currently residing in the U.S., and improving border security.
ref: Pengerusi Hispanik Kaukus, Rep. Joe Baca, D-California, berharap dasar akan meletakkan perhatian bukan sahaja kepada membantu perniagaan kecil, tetapi juga kepada apa yang perlu dilakukan dengan 12 juta pendatang tanpa izin kini menetap di Amerika Syarikat, dan meningkatkan keselamatan sempadan.

src: The issue of immigration has become a polarizing subject in the U.S., and one that has been an intrinsic part of the fabric that makes up the American society.
ref: Isu imigresen telah menjadi subjek polarisasi di Amerika Syarikat, dan satu yang telah menjadi aspek penting dalam kain yang membentuk masyarakat Amerika.

src: That same year, a NBC/Wall Street Journal poll revealed that the U.S. public was equally divided on the whether immigration helps or hurts the country.
ref: Pada tahun yang sama, satu tinjauan NBC/Wall Street Journal mendedahkan bahawa rakyat Amerika telah sama-sama bersetuju mengenai sama ada imigresen membantu atau menyakitkan negara ini.

src: The study revealed that by 2050, one in five Americans will be foreign-born, and the overall U.S. population will double to 438 million.
ref: Kajian ini mendedahkan bahawa pada tahun 2050, satu dalam lima rakyat Amerika akan lahir di luar negara, dan penduduk Amerika Syarikat secara keseluruhan akan berganda kepada 438 juta.

src: The U.S Latino population will account for 30% of the population, while Asians will account for 9%.
ref: Amerika Syarikat penduduk Latino akan menyumbang 30% daripada penduduk, manakala penduduk Asia akan menyumbang kepada 9%.

src: The study seems to also hint that this growth is in many ways connected to legislation passed by Congress in 1965, that abolished a quota system that had nearly ended immigration from non-European countries since the 1920s, and consequently caused an immigration surge.
ref: Kajian ini seolah-olah juga petunjuk bahawa pertumbuhan ini adalah dalam pelbagai cara berhubung dengan undang-undang yang diluluskan oleh Kongres pada tahun 1965, yang dihapuskan sistem kuota yang telah hampir berakhir imigresen daripada negara-negara bukan Eropah sejak tahun 1920-an, dan seterusnya menyebabkan lonjakan imigresen.

src: Earlier this week, Wikinews interviewed Sarah Walsh, a former Australian women's national soccer team (Matilidas) player, about women's football in the country.
ref: Awal minggu ini, Wikinews menemuramah Sarah Walsh, bekas pemain bola sepak wanita pasukan negara Australia (Matilidas), mengenai permainan bola sepak wanita di negara itu.

src: Meanwhile, Australia's men (Socceroos) are currently ranked 59th in the world, between the Burkina Faso and Slovakia national football team.
ref: Sementara itu, pasukan lelaki Australia (Socceroos) kini berada di kedudukan ke 59 di dunia, di tengah-tengah pasukan bolasepak negara Burkina Faso dan Slovakia.

src: She was on Matildas side that qualified for the World Cup for the first time while playing in the Asian Football Confederation instead of the Oceania Football Confederation.
ref: Beliau bersama pasukan Matildas yang telah layak ke Piala Dunia buat pertama kali semasa bermain untuk Konfederasi Bola Sepak Asia dan bukannya Konfederasi Bola Sepak Oceania.

src: She also played in two World Cup quarter-finals for the team.
ref: Beliau juga telah bermain dalam perlawanan suku akhir Piala Dunia sebanyak dua kali untuk pasukan tersebut.

src: Walsh played professionally in the United States for Sky Blue FC and Saint Louis Athletica.
ref: Matildas berada di kedudukan ke-8 di dalam kedudukan terkini oleh FIFA.

src: Should media coverage correlate to team performance and internationally rankings?
ref: Adakah ada unsur sindrom tall poppy dalam liputan Socceroos?

src: Is there an element of tall poppy syndrome in the coverage of the Socceroos?
ref: Apakah faktor lain yang boleh digunakan untuk menjelaskan perbezaan relatif dalam perhatian media selain persembahan?

src: What other factors can be used to explain the relative differences in media attention other than performance?
ref: Sarah Walsh: Secara tradisinya di Australia, sukan lelaki telah mendominasi liputan media.

src: ::Sarah Walsh: Traditionally in Australia, male sports have dominated media coverage.
ref: Secara perlahan kita boleh lihat sukan wanita ditampilkan dengan lebih kerap di penerbitan media arus perdana.

src: Slowly we are seeing women's sports feature more frequently in mainstream media publications.
ref: Terdapat minat yang semakin meningkat dalam sukan wanita, terutamanya pasukan kebangsaan wanita secara umum di Australia.

src: With time, the public will be exposed to more female sports on a daily basis and perhaps will build the same affections for these female sports.
ref: Sebagai seorang remaja, saya didedahkan kepada kehidupan NRL di Sydney, oleh sebab itu saya dengan semula jadinya mempunyai minat yang mendalam terhadap sukan ini berserta dengan bola sepak.

src: Young female teenagers today, have the option to turn the TV on and watch the W-league and follow their heroes.
ref: Saya percaya dalam masa 5 hingga 10 tahun kita akan lihat perubahan budaya berkaitan liputan media dan kecenderungan gender.

src: I believe in 5–10 years' time we will see a cultural change with regards to media coverage and gender bias.
ref: : Apakah perbezaan dalam gaya permainan antara pasukan kebangsaan lelaki dan wanita?

src: ::Sarah Walsh: Men :: They appear to play a possession-based game working at effective possession combined with a developing system of pressing using our natural athleticism and high work rate as well as our cultural mental strength.
ref: ::Sarah Walsh: Wanita: Pasukan wanita seakan-akan lebih mengamalkan "blok" yang lebih berketahanan dan teratur menyebabkan pasukan sukar bermain terutama di tengah dan kawasan belakang ketiga kami menggunakan masa peralihan (BPO-BP) untuk kesan baik dengan serangan cepat melalui kelajuan semulajadi pemain-pemain tertentu.

src: ::Sarah Walsh: Women ::The women seem to employ a more defensive and well organized "block" making it hard for teams to play through particularly in the middle and our back thirds utilizing transitional moments (BPO – BP) to good effect with quick attacks through the natural speed of certain players.
ref: :Mengapa Matildas lebih berjaya di pertandingan antarabangsa dan mempunyai kedudukan lebih baik dari Socceroos?

src: : Why are the Matildas more successful in international competitions and ranking wise than the Socceroos?
ref: ::Sarah Walsh: Terdapat beberapa faktor penyumbang.

src: ::Sarah Walsh: There could be a number of contributing factors.
ref: Terdapat lebih banyak sokongan kewangan kepada pasukan lelaki kebangsaan di peringkat global secara umumnya, saya percaya persaingan secara keseluruhan lebih meluas.

src: Due to this, there are more teams that compete at a higher level, so effectively this would make it difficult for the Socceroos to reach the same ranking as Matildas.
ref: : Mengapa kamu rasakan lelaki tidak menonton Matildas dengan bilangan yang sama seperti mereka menonton Socceroos?

src: : Why do you think men don't watch the Matildas in the same numbers as they watch the Socceroos?
ref: :Adakah media akur dengan streotaip jantina Australia yang tradisional dengan tidak meliputi sukan elit wanita?

src: : Does the media feed into traditional Australian gender stereotypes by not covering elite women's sports?
ref: :Apakah perwatakan kamu di dalam sukan?

src: : What is your role in sports?
ref: Wartawan?

src: Journalist?
ref: Akademik?

src: Academic?
ref: Pentadbir sukan?

src: Please provide one to two sentence biography to contextualize your answers.
ref: :: Sarah Walsh: Saya mula bermain bola sepak pada usia 5 tahun.

src: I made my debut for the Matildas at 21 (2004–2012) I have spent the past two years working in community football at FFA delivering a Drug and Alcohol program.
ref: Saya telah menghabiskan dua tahun yang lalu bekerja dengan komuniti bola sepak di FFA menyampaikan Program Dadah dan Alkohol.

src: I am currently the Women's Football Coordinator and Female Elite Player mentor at FFA.
ref: Saya kini adalah Penyelaras Bola Sepak Wanita dan penasihat pemain elit wanita di FFA.

src: Actually on wikipedia if you would like to cut and paste all that info!
ref: Sebenarnya ada di Wikipedia sekiranya awak mahu potong dan tampal semua maklumat tersebut!

src: On March 18, President Kevin Baugh of the Republic of Molossia, a micronation located in Nevada, announced that his country would hold its first ever international summit this June.
ref: Pada 18 Mac, Presiden Kevin Baugh dari Republik Molossia, sebuah negara mikro yang terletak di Nevada, mengumumkan bahawa negaranya akan mengadakan sidang kemuncak antarabangsa buat pertama kalinya Jun ini.

src: Grand Prince Christopher I and Princess Erin of the Principality of Vikesland, another micronation located in Canada, will be attending.
ref: Putera Besar Christopher I dan Puteri Erin daripada Kerajaan Vikesland, satu lagi negara mikro yang terletak di Kanada, akan hadir.

src: Besides the meeting itself, which is scheduled to take place in Molossia's capital city, Espera, President Baugh is to give them a tour of his country as well as the surrounding areas.
ref: Selain mesyuarat itu sendiri, yang dijadualkan akan berlangsung di ibu kota Molossia, Espera, Presiden Baugh akan membawa mereka melawat negaranya serta kawasan sekitarnya.

src: He is looking forward to the event and hopes that it may "open the way to future visits between Molossia and the other small nations of the world."
ref: Dia tidak sabar menanti acara itu dan berharap ia boleh "membuka jalan untuk lawatan masa hadapan antara Molossia dan negara-negara kecil lain di dunia".

src: The Republic of Molossia and Principality of Vikesland are not recognized by any major countries or international organizations.
ref: Republik Molossia dan Kerajaan Vikesland tidak diiktiraf oleh mana-mana negara besar atau organisasi antarabangsa.

src: Earlier this month, Wikinews held an interview with President Baugh.
ref: Awal bulan ini, Wikinews mengadakan satu temu bual dengan Presiden Baugh.

src: Just hours after firing two contract employees and disciplining a third for inappropriately examining the passport file of Democratic presidential candidate Sen. Barack Obama, US Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice told Sen. Hillary Clinton that her passport file was also breached in 2007.
ref: Hanya beberapa jam selepas memecat dua pekerja kontrak dan mendisiplinkan pekerja ketiga untuk memeriksa fail pasport calon presiden Demokrat Senator Barack Obama dengan tidak betul, Setiausaha Negara Amerika Syarikat Condoleezza Rice memberitahu Senator Hillary Clinton bahawa fail pasportnya juga diintai pada tahun 2007.

src: Both Clinton and McCain were informed that their files were improperly accessed, according to their Senate offices, after Rice called to apologize to Barack Obama for the incident hours before.
ref: Kedua-dua Clinton dan McCain diberitahu bahawa fail mereka telah diakses secara tidak wajar, menurut pejabat Senat mereka, selepas Rice menelefon untuk meminta maaf kepada Barack Obama untuk kejadian itu beberapa jam sebelum itu.

src: "We are going to do an investigation through the inspector general."
ref: "Kami akan melakukan siasatan melalui ketua polis."
