src: "None of us want us to have a situation where any American's passport file is accessed in an unauthorized way."
ref: "Tiada seorang pun antara kami mahu situasi di mana fail pasport sebarangan orang Amerika itu diketahui dengan cara penggunaan tanpa izin."

src: According to Assistant Secretary of State, Sean McCormack, at least one breach occurred during a training session, with a contract employee brought in to deal with a large backlog of passport applications.
ref: Menurut Penolong Setiausaha Negara, Sean McCormack, sekurang-kurangnya satu pengintaian berlaku semasa sesi latihan, dengan pekerja kontrak dibawa masuk untuk menangani tunggakan permohonan pasport yang besar.

src: "We do feel that the system worked, but the system isn't perfect," McCormack said.
ref: "Kami rasa sistem kerja itu berkesan, tetapi sistem itu tidak sempurna," kata McCormack.

src: Obama's response to the incident was "One of the things that the American people count on in their interactions with any level of government is that if they have to disclose personal information, then it is going to stay personal and stay private."
ref: Tindak balas Obama atas kejadian itu adalah "Salah satu perkara yang rakyat Amerika bergantung pada interaksi mereka dengan mana-mana peringkat kerajaan adalah bahawa jika mereka perlu mendedahkan maklumat peribadi, maka ia akan kekal peribadi dan kekal sulit."

src: He also told reporters he expects a full and thorough congressional investigation.
ref: Beliau juga memberitahu pemberita beliau mengharapkan satu siasatan kongres yang lengkap dan menyeluruh.

src: English football club Manchester United has beat Liverpool 3–0, making it six points clear at the top of the table for United.
ref: Kelab bola sepak Inggeris, Manchester United telah menewaskan Liverpool 3-0, menjadikannya enam mata di bahagian atas carta liga untuk United.

src: The match, which started at 13:30 local time featured several bookings and a red card for Javier Mascherano (Liverpool).
ref: Perlawanan yang bermula pada jam 13:30 waktu tempatan memaparkan beberapa denda dan kad merah untuk Javier Mascherano (Liverpool).

src: The half time score was 1–0 to Manchester United, with the other two goals being scored in the second half.
ref: Skor separuh masa adalah 1-0 kepada Manchester United, dengan dua gol lain yang dijaringkan pada separuh masa kedua.

src: The goal, scored by Wes Brown, was headed into the goal after a cross by Wayne Rooney.
ref: Gol itu, dijaringkan oleh Wes Brown, ditandukkan ke dalam gol selepas hantaran lintang Wayne Rooney.

src: The second goal was scored by Christiano Ronaldo, was also scored through a header, although this goal was scored seconds after a shot by the same player.
ref: Gol kedua dijaringkan oleh Christiano Ronaldo, turut menjaringkan gol melalui tandukan, walaupun gol ini dijaringkan saat selepas ditendang oleh pemain yang sama.

src: The third and final goal was scored by Luis Nani, just two minutes after the goal by Ronaldo.
ref: Gol ketiga dan terakhir dijaringkan oleh Luis Nani, hanya dua minit selepas gol oleh Ronaldo.

src: The goal was shot into the left hand side of the goal.
ref: Golnya ditendang ke sebelah kiri gawang.

src: The official newspaper of the government of China claimed that "the Dalai Lama is scheming to take the Beijing Olympics hostage to force the Chinese government to make concessions to Tibet independence."
ref: Akhbar rasmi kerajaan China mendakwa bahawa "Dalai Lama sedang merancang untuk menggunakan tebusan Beijing Olimpik bagi memaksa kerajaan China untuk berkompromi dengan kemerdekaan Tibet".

src: The protests, which began in Lhasa, have since spread to neighboring provinces.
ref: Bantahan itu, yang bermula di Lhasa, telah merebak ke wilayah berdekatan.

src: "People are anticipating that something big is going to happen."
ref: "Orang ramai sedang mengharapkan sesuatu yang besar akan berlaku".

src: Elsewhere in Sichuan, thousands of Tibetans turned out in the streets of Seda, according to the Tibetan Center for Human Rights and Democracy.
ref: Di kawasan lain di Sichuan, ribuan warganegara Tibet keluar ke jalan-jalan di Seda, menurut Pusat Hak Manusia dan Demokrasi Tibet.

src: The international community has repeatedly urged China to use restraint in dealing with protesters, and to start talks with the Dalai Lama.
ref: Komuniti antarabangsa juga sudah berulang kali menekan China untuk menggunakan sekatan dalam menangani pembantah, dan mula berbincang dengan Dalai Lama.

src: United States Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice said on Monday, "We have really urged the Chinese over several years to find a way to talk with the Dalai Lama, who is a figure of authority, who is not a separatist, and to find a way to engage him and bring his moral weight to a more sustainable and better solution of the Tibet issue."
ref: Setiausaha Negara Amerika Syarikat Condoleezza Rice berkata pada hari Isnin, "Kami sudah menekan China untuk beberapa tahun ini supaya mencari jalan bagi berbincang dengan Dalai Lama, seorang tokoh berwibawa, yang bukan seorang pemisah, dan mencari jalan bagi melibatkan beliau dan mengambil kira moral beliau ke arah penyelesaian yang lebih mampan dan bagus untuk isu Tibet itu".

src: A final report released today by the Indonesian National Transport Safety Committee found that Adam Air Flight 574 crashed because the pilots were distracted by an instrument failure.
ref: Laporan akhir yang dikeluarkan hari ini oleh Jawatankuasa Keselamatan Pengangkutan Nasional Indonesia mendapati bahawa Penerbangan 574 Udara Adam terhempas kerana juruterbang diganggu oleh kegagalan peralatan.

src: The loss of the budget carrier's Boeing 737 into the sea near Sulawesi on New Year's Day 2007 left all 102 on board missing and presumed dead.
ref: Kehilangan penerbangan kos rendah Boeing 737 itu ke dalam laut berhampiran Sulawesi pada Hari Tahun Baru 2007 meyebabkan kesemua 102 penumpang yang menaikinya hilang dan dianggap mati.

src: The report found that the 737, registered PK-KKW, suffered a Inertial Reference System (IRS) failure.
ref: Laporan itu mendapati bahawa 737 itu, yang didaftar sebagai PK-KKW, mengalami kegagalan Sistem Rujukan Inersia (IRS).

src: While pilots were troubleshooting for this navigational system they first unintentionally disconnected the autopilot, then failed to monitor other instruments informing them they were approaching the sea, crashing into it and destroying the aircraft.
ref: Walaupun juruterbang sedang menyelesaikan masalah untuk sistem pelayaran ini mereka mula-mulanya memberhentikan pandu auto secara tidak sengaja, kemudian gagal memantau peralatan lain yang memaklumkan bahawa mereka telah menghampiri laut, terhempas ke dalamnya dan memusnahkan pesawat.

src: National Transportation Safety Committee head Tatang Kurniadi told a press conference "This accident resulted from a combination of factors including the failure of the pilots to adequately monitor the flight instruments, especially in the last two minutes of the flight."
ref: Ketua Jawatankuasa Keselamatan Pengangkutan Kebangsaan Tatang Kurniadi memberitahu sidang akhbar "Kemalangan ini adalah hasil daripada gabungan beberapa faktor termasuk kegagalan juruterbang untuk memantau peralatan penerbangan secara secukupnya, terutamanya dalam dua minit terakhir penerbangan".

src: He also supplied a number of statistics concerning the final moments of the flight.
ref: Dia juga membekalkan beberapa statistik mengenai saat-saat akhir penerbangan.

src: The airspeed had reached 490 KCAS by the end of the recording.
ref: Kelajuan udara telah mencapai 490 KCAS sebelum rakaman berakhir.

src: In 2006 another B737 suffered a navigational problem and flew into a radar blackspot, leaving it lost for several hours before performing an emergency landing hundreds of miles from the intended destination.
ref: Pada tahun 2006 satu lagi B737 telah mengalami masalah penerbangan dan terbang ke kawasan kemalangan radar, meninggalkannya hilang selama beberapa jam sebelum melakukan pendaratan kecemasan beratus-ratus batu dari destinasi yang dirancang.

src: Sayogo said today that in the three months preceding the accident the airline had registered 154 defects in PK-KKW's navigational equipment.
ref: Sayogo berkata bahawa dalam tempoh tiga bulan sebelum kemalangan itu syarikat penerbangan itu telah mendaftarkan 154 kerosakan dalam kelengkapan pelayaran PK-KKW.

src: This prompted the authorities to ground Adam Air for three months after a regular evaluation, after which they may be permanently shut down.
ref: Ini mendorong pihak berkuasa untuk menahan Udara Adam selama tiga bulan selepas penilaian tetap, dan selepas itu mereka mungkin akan ditutup selama-lamanya.

src: Wikinews held an exclusive interview with American author and filmmaker Peter John Ross.
ref: Wikinews mengadakan wawancara eksklusif dengan pengarang Amerika dan pembuat filem Peter John Ross.

src: The head of Sonnyboo Productions, an independent film studio based in Columbus, Ohio, he has made numerous short films as well as co-directed a feature, the World War II B-movie Horrors of War.
ref: Ketua Sonnyboo Productions, sebuah studio filem individu yang berpangkalan di Columbus, Ohio, beliau telah memghasilkan banyak filem pendek dan juga mengarahkan satu rencana filem, Perang Dunia II B- filem Kengerian Perang.

src: He says that it "combines helpful articles for beginning filmmakers with narrative tales based on my experiences raising money for features and the crazy personalities that invade the world of microbudget filmmaking."
ref: Beliau mengatakan bahawa ia "menggabungkan artikel-artikel yang berguna untuk pembikin filem baru dengan cerita-cerita berdasarkan pengalaman saya mengumpul wang untuk rencana-rencana filem dan personaliti gila yang menyerbu dunia pembikinan filem microbudget".

src: When asked why he makes movies, Ross replied, "There is no greater thrill than sitting in a room full of strangers watching the stories unfold with flickering pictures and sound."
ref: Apabila ditanya mengapa dia membuat filem, Ross menjawab, "Tidak ada keseronokan yang lebih besar daripada duduk di dalam bilik yang penuh dengan orang yang tidak dikenali menonton cerita terungkap dengan kelipan gambar dan bunyi".

src: In the past two months, Parker Somerville, a videographer for the website TMZ.com, transitioned from an average guy leading an ordinary life, to living in an extraordinary voyeuristic existence, and back again to the beginning.
ref: Dalam tempoh dua bulan yang lepas, Parker Somerville, juruvideo bagi laman web TMZ.com, beralih daripada lelaki biasa yang menjalani kehidupan biasa, kepada hidup dalam pengalaman teruja yang luar biasa, dan kembali ke permulaan.

src: Simply put, it was a transition from reality to reality, with a two-week detour in reality television.
ref: Ringkasnya, ia merupakan satu peralihan daripada realiti ke realiti, melalui lencongan dua minggu di rancangan televisyen.

src: Peter Milliken, Speaker of the House of Commons of Canada, broke the tie on the vote on the second reading of the Canadian budget amendment, C-48, by voting in favour of the government, most likely averting a spring election, CBC Newsworld reported.
ref: Peter Milliken, jurucakap kepada Dewan Rakyat Kanada, memungkiri ikatan pada undian bacaan kedua pindaan belanjawan Kanada, C-48, dengan mengundi menyebelahi kerajaan, berkemungkinan menghindarkan pilihanraya musim bunga, CBC Newsworld melaporkan.

src: The amendment to the budget adds $4.6 billion in social spending and delays of tax cuts.
ref: Pindaan kepada belanjawan menambahkan $4.6 bilion kepada perbelanjaan sosial dan menagguhkan potongan cukai.

src: The vote for the amendment was tied at 152-152 until the Speaker's intervention, who only votes in the case of the tie.
ref: Undian kepada pindaan terikat 152-152 sehingga gangguan Yang di-Pertua, yang hanya mengundi dalam kes ikatan.

src: He stated his vote for the bill was in order to continue Parliamentary debate leading up to a third reading.
ref: Dia mengatakan yang undiannya terhadap bil tersebut dengan tujuan menyambung perdebatan Parlimen diikuti dengan bacaan ketiga.

src: The budget and the budget amendment were confidence motions, meaning that the government would have fallen and an election would have been called if either one failed.
ref: Belanjawan dan pindaan belanjaan adalah tindakan keyakinan, bermaksud yang kerajaan berkemungkinan telah jatuh dan pilihanraya mungkin perlu dijalankan jika salah satu gagal.

src: During the vote, Wikinews reporter Andrew pmk noted that the website of CBC, a major Canadian television network, was unavailable.
ref: Semasa undian, wartawan Wikinews Andrew pmk berkata yang laman web CBC, jaringan televisyen utama Kanada, tidak tersedia.

src: Puerto Rico is a semi-autonomous territory of the United States.
ref: Puerto Rico adalah wilayah separa autonomi Amerika Syarikat.

src: Some of the other people charged, however, have already been arrested and await trial.
ref: Sebahagian daripada orang lain yang didakwa, bagaimanapun, telah ditangkap dan menunggu perbicaraan.

src: This indictment comes after a two-year investigation by a Grand Jury of donations made to the Governor's past campaigns.
ref: Dakwaan ini datang selepas siasatan selama dua tahun oleh Jawatankuasa Siasatan Berkuasa atas derma yang diberi kepada kempen Gabenor yang lepas.

src: The defendants face three to ten years in federal prison, as well as several $100,000 to $250,000 fines.
ref: Defendan menghadapi tiga hingga sepuluh tahun hukuman penjara di persekutuan, serta beberapa denda antara $100,000 hingga $250,000.

src: To have primordial material coming out from inside a Saturn moon raises many questions on the formation of the Saturn system," said Hunter Waite, principal investigator for the Cassini Ion and Neutral Mass Spectrometer at the Southwest Research Institute located in San Antonio, Texas.
ref: Bahan asal yang keluar dari dalam bulan Zuhal menimbulkan banyak persoalan mengenai pembentukan sistem Zuhal," kata Hunter Waite, penyiasat utama bagi Ion Cassini dan Spektrometer Jisim Neutral di Institut Penyelidikan Southwest yang terletak di San Antonio, Texas.

src: The Ion and Neutral Mass Spectrometer saw a much higher density of volatile gases, water vapor, carbon dioxide and carbon monoxide, as well as organic materials, some 20 times denser than expected.
ref: Ion dan Spektrometer Jisim Neutral itu mendapati bahawa ketumpatan yang lebih tinggi gas mudah meruap, wap air, karbon dioksida dan karbon monoksida, serta bahan-bahan organik, lebih kurang 20 kali lebih padat daripada yang dijangkakan.

src: New high-resolution heat maps of the south pole by Cassini's Composite Infrared Spectrometer show that the so-called tiger stripes, giant fissures that are the source of the geysers, are warm along almost their entire lengths, and reveal other warm fissures nearby.
ref: Peta haba resolusi tinggi baru kutub selatan oleh Komposit Inframerah Spektrometer Cassini menunjukkan bahawa sesuatu yang dipanggil jalur harimau, rekahan gergasi yang merupakan sumber geisar, panas hampir keseluruhan panjangnya, dan mendedahkan rekahan panas lain yang berdekatan.

src: These more precise new measurements reveal temperatures of at least minus 93 degrees Celsius (minus 135 Fahrenheit.)
ref: Sukatan baru yang lebih tepat ini menggambarkan suhu sekurang-kurangnya negatif 93 darjah Celsius (negatif 135 Fahrenheit.

src: That is 17 degrees Celsius (63 degrees Fahrenheit) warmer than previously seen and 93 degrees Celsius (200 degrees Fahrenheit) warmer than other regions of the moon.
ref: ) Itu adalah 17 darjah Celsius (63 darjah Fahrenheit) lebih panas daripada yang diperlihatkan sebelum ini dan 93 darjah Celsius (200 darjah Fahrenheit) lebih panas daripada kawasan-kawasan lain bulan itu.

src: The warmest regions along the tiger stripes correspond to two of the jet locations seen in Cassini images.
ref: Kawasan paling panas di sepanjang jalur harimau itu bersamaan dengan dua daripada lokasi jet yang dilihat dalam imej Cassini.

src: We have quite a recipe for life on our hands, but we have yet to find the final ingredient, liquid water, but Enceladus is only whetting our appetites for more," said Dennis Matson, Cassini project scientist at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Pasadena, California.
ref: Kami mempunyai resipi untuk kehidupan di tangan kita, tetapi kami masih belum menjumpai bahan akhir, air cecair, tetapi Enceladus hanya memarakkan selera kami untuk lebih banyak maklumat," kata Dennis Matson, saintis projek Cassini di Makmal Pendorongan Jet NASA di Pasadena, California.

src: At closest approach, Cassini was only 30 miles from Enceladus.
ref: Pada jarak terdekat, Cassini hanya 30 batu dari Enceladus.

src: While nearly all cover of the 2008 Presidential election has focused on the Democratic and Republican candidates, the race for the White House also includes independents and third party candidates.
ref: Walaupun hampir semua liputan pada pilihan raya Presiden 2008 telah memberi tumpuan kepada calon-calon Demokrat dan Republikan, perlumbaan untuk Rumah Putih juga termasuk calon bebas dan calon-calon pihak ketiga.

src: These parties represent a variety of views that may not be acknowledged by the major party platforms.
ref: Parti-parti ini mewakili pelbagai pandangan yang mungkin tidak diakui oleh platform parti utama.

src: As a non-partisan news source, Wikinews has impartially reached out to these candidates, who are looking to become the 43rd person elected to serve their nation from 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW.
ref: Sebagai sumber berita tanpa bias, Wikinews telah tanpa berat sebelah mencapai calon-calon ini, yang ingin menjadi orang ke-43 dipilih untuk berkhidmat kepada negara mereka dari 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW.

src: Wikinews' own Patrick Mannion corresponded with the Socialist Party USA nominee and candidate, Brian Moore via e-mail.
ref: Patrick Mannion dari Wikinews menghubungi penama Parti Sosialis Amerika Syarikat dan calon, Brian Moore melalui e-mel.

src: Six of the world's largest computer companies are seeking to have a patent held by the Australian Government's Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation (CSIRO) revoked.
ref: Enam dari syarikt komputer terbesar dunia sedang mencari untuk membatalkan paten yang diletakkan oleh Saintifik Komanwel Kerajaan Australia dan Organisasi Kajian Industri (CSIRO).

src: Microsoft, Dell, Hewlett Packard, Intel, Apple and Netgear are taking legal action against the CSIRO to have its U.S. patent broken.
ref: Microsoft, Dell, Hewlett Packard, Intel, Apple dan Netgear mengambil tindakan undang-undang terhadap CSIRO untuk mendapatkan paten U.S. dimansuhkan.

src: In 1996, the CSIRO developed technology to allow computers to be networked together wirelessly.
ref: Pada 1996, CSIRO membina teknologi yang membenarkan komputer dirangkaikan bersama tanpa wayar.

src: The technology is now built in to most laptop computers and manufacturers currently pay the CSIRO a licence fee to use it.
ref: Teknologi itu kini dibina didalam kebanyakan komputer riba dan pengeluar pada masa ini membayar CSIRO bayaran lesen untuk menggunakannya.

src: The Australian Government's research arm has announced that it will fight the legal action to protect its intellectual property, the income of which it uses to fund its research.
ref: Lengan penyelidikan Kerajaan Australia itu telah mengumumkan yang ia akan melawan tindakan undang-undang untuk melindungi hak ciptanya, pendapatan yang digunakan untuk memberi dana kepada penyelidikannya.

src: "As part of our business we create high quality intellectual property and we are prepared to defend it," Garrett said.
ref: "Sebagai sebahagian dari urusan kami, kami mencipta hak cipta berkualiti tinggi dan kami bersedia untuk mempertahankannya," kata Garrett.

src: "We actively encourage the utilisation of the results of research in industry and communities, both nationally and globally, and any royalty income will be reinvested in further research."
ref: "Kami dengan aktifnya menggalakkan penggunaan hasil kajian dalam industri dan komuniti, kedua-dua tempatan dan global, dan sebarang pendapatan royalti akan dilaburkan semula untuk kajian lanjut".

src: The patent in question is U.S. Patent 5,487,069 Wireless LAN.
ref: Paten yang dipersoalkan ialah U.S. Paten 5,487,069 Wireless LAN.

src: The case also raises issues about the recent signing of a Free Trade Agreement between Australia and the United States.
ref: Kes ini turut membangkitkan isu mengenai Persetujuan Perdagangan Bebas yang ditandatangani baru-baru ini antara Australia dan Amerika Syarikat.

src: Per the agreement, Australia plans to introduce American-style intellectual property law.
ref: Meunurut perjanjian tersebut, Australia merancang untuk memperkenalkan undang-undang hak cipta gaya-Amerika.

src: The attack, first reported by Wired News, exploited a function of the forums to post JavaScript code.
ref: Serangan itu, pertama kali dilaporkan oleh Wired News, mengeksploitasikan fungsi forum-forum itu untuk memaparkan kod JavaScript.

src: The Epilepsy Foundation had to shut down the forum, and took some measures to prevent future attacks.
ref: Yayasan Sawan terpaksa menutup forum berkenaan, dan mengambil langkah-langkah untuk mencegah serangan pada masa akan datang.

src: They also posted a message regarding new measures saying "In our upping of security on the forums, we have established the following new rules: No animated images are allowed to be used anywhere from now on."
ref: Mereka juga meletakkan mesej tentang langkah-langkah baru yang berbunyi "Dalam usaha penaiktarafan keselamatan forum ini, kami telah menetapkan syarat-syarat baru: Tiada imej bergerak dibenarkan untuk digunakan di mana-mana mulai sekarang".

src: "No rich text is allowed in the body of messages at all, either."
ref: "Teks beraneka juga langsung tidak dibenarkan di dalam mesej-mesej".

src: The Austrian paper Krone reports that the "usual goal of their attacks is to raise a fuss or disturb others".
ref: Akhbar Austria Krone melaporkan bahawa "tujuan lazim serangan-serangan meraka adalah untuk membuat kecoh dan mengacau orang lain".

src: Wired News states that the attack on the forum may have been the first computer attack in history to inflict physical harm on its victims.
ref: Wired News menyatakan serangan ke atas forum itu mungkin merupakan serangan komputer pertama dalam sejarah yang menyebabkan kemudaratan fizikal kepada mangsa-mangsa.

src: Between three and five per cent of all epilepsy sufferers are vulnerable to seizures triggered by flashing lights, shapes or colours, like ones used in the attack.
ref: Antara tiga hingga lima peratus daripada kesemua pesakit epilepsi mudah diserang sawan yang dicetuskan oleh cahaya berkelipan, corak-corak atau warna-warna, sama seperti yang digunakan dalam serangan itu.

src: Recently a logo animation for the 2012 London Olympics caused thousands of people to experience seizures.
ref: Baru-baru ini sebuah animasi logo untuk Olimpik London 2012 telah menyebabkan beribu-ribu orang mengalami sawan.

src: In March, MTV refused to air a new video by Gnarls Barkley out of fear it would trigger seizures.
ref: Pada bulan Mac, MTV menolak untuk menyiarkan video baru oleh Gnarls Barkley kerana bimbang ia akan mencetuskan sawan.

src: The World Health Organization (WHO) announced Wednesday that an outbreak of viral hemorrhagic fever, caused by Marburg virus, in Angola has claimed the lives of 311 Angolans.
ref: Organisasi Kesihatan Dunia (WHO) mengumumkan pada Rabu bahawa wabak virus demam berdarah, disebabkan oleh virus Marburg, di Angola telah mengambil nyawa 311 rakyat Angola.

src: WHO estimates that 75% of the cases have occurred in children under the age of 5 years old.
ref: WHO menjangkakan bahawa 75% daripada kes-kes telah berlaku dikalangan kanak-kanak dibawah umur 5 tahun.

src: From the WHO: :'Marburg virus disease has no vaccine or curative treatment, and can be rapidly fatal.'
ref: Daripada WHO: 'Penyakit virus Marburg tidak mempunyai vaksin atau rawatan penyembuhan, dan berkemuungkinan membawa maut dengan cepat.

src: In the present outbreak, most deaths have occurred between 3 to 7 days following the onset of symptoms.'
ref: ' Dalam wabak terkini, kebanyakan kematian berlaku diantara 3 hingga 7 hari berikutan dari bermulanya simptom.

src: Past outbreaks indicate that close contact with bodily fluids of infected people, as may occur in health care settings or during burial practices, increases the risk of infection.'
ref: ' Wabak yang lalu menunjukkan bahawa sentuhan rapat dengan cecair badan orang yang dijangkiti, seperti yang mungkin terjadi semasa rawatan kesihatan atau upacara pengebumian, meningkatkan risiko terhadap jangkitan.

src: This is the largest recorded outbreak of Marburg viral hemorrhagic fever in history.
ref: ' Ini merupakan wabak terbesar yang pernah direkodkan oleh demam berdarah virus Marburg dalam sejarah.

src: The risk to international travelers is low, according to the WHO, because the disease requires close personal contact to be transmitted.
ref: Risiko terhadap pelancong antarabangsa adalah rendah, menurut WHO, kerana penyakit tersebut memerlukan sentuhan rapat terhadap seseorang untuk dijangkiti.

src: Steve Sinnott, who was the general secretary of the National Union of Teachers has died aged 56 of a suspected heart attack.
ref: Steve Sinnott, yang merupakan Setiausaha Agung Kesatuan Kebangsaan Guru-Guru telah meninggal dunia pada usia 56 tahun akibat kemungkinan serangan jantung.

src: The Prime Minister Gordon Brown commented on the Union leaders death, saying, "Steve Sinnott was inspirational in his devotion to teaching, not just for children in Britain, but around the world".
ref: Perdana Menteri Gordon Brown mengulas mengenai kematian Kesatuan pemimpin, katanya: "Steve Sinnott adalah inspirasi dalam dedikasi beliau atas pendidikan, bukan hanya untuk kanak-kanak di Britain, tetapi di seluruh dunia."

src: Born in Liverpool in 1952, he received a Social Sciences Bachelor of Arts from Middlesex Polytechnic in 1974.
ref: Dilahirkan di Liverpool pada tahun 1952, beliau menerima Sarjana Muda Sastera Sains Sosial dari Middlesex Politeknik pada tahun 1974.

src: His PGCE was obtained at Edge Hill College in 1975.
ref: PGCE beliau telah diperolehi di Edge Hill College pada tahun 1975.

src: He moved in 1979 to Broughton High School near Preston to take a post as head of economics and business studies.
ref: Beliau berpindah pada tahun 1979 ke Broughton High School berhampiran Preston untuk mengambil jawatan sebagai ketua ekonomi dan pengajian perniagaan.

src: In his private life he was a keen supporter of Everton F.C..
ref: Dalam kehidupan peribadi beliau, beliau adalah seorang penyokong hangat Everton F.C.

src: Bristol City Council has reported that it is possible the library will reopen on Tuesday, although it did say that it was likely the building would remain closed on that day.
ref: Majlis Bandaraya Bristol telah melaporkan bahawa kemungkinan perpustakaan itu akan dibuka semula pada Selasa, walaupun dikatakan bahawa bangunan itu mungkin akan masih ditutup pada hari itu.

src: as they fell 4-1 to D.C. United in Washington.
ref: kerana mereka jatuh 4-1 kepada D.C. United di Washington.

src: Early goals from Luciano Emilio and Santino Quaranta left Toronto in an uphill battle for the rest of the match.
ref: Gol awal dari Luciano Emilio dan Santino Quaranta meninggalkan Toronto dalam perjuangan yang berat untuk sepanjang perlawanan.

src: The hill only became bigger in the 22nd minute when Kevin Harmse put in a hard challenge on Gonzalo Peralta and was subsequently sent off.
ref: Bukit hanya menjadi lebih besar pada minit ke-22 apabila Kevin Harmse memberi cabaran keras pada Gonzalo Peralta dan seterusnya dibuang padang.

src: Quaranta crossed the ball and Gallardo was wide open to smash the ball into an open net.
ref: Quaranta melintasi bola dan Gallardo adalah terbuka luas untuk merembat bola ke gawang yang terbuka.

src: Jaime Moreno capped off the scoring for D.C. in the 78th before Edu opened Toronto's MLS account with his first goal of the season.
ref: Jaime Moreno menghabiskan jaringan untuk D.C. pada minit ke-78 sebelum Edu membuka akaun MLS Toronto dengan gol pertamanya musim ini.

src: DC now travel to play Real Salt Lake, while Toronto will visit David Beckham and the L.A. Galaxy.
ref: DC kini akan berjalan untuk bermain Real Salt Lake, manakala Toronto akan melawat David Beckham dan L.A. Galaxy.

src: Veteran group Blue Rodeo won in three categories: Group of the Year, Adult Alternative Album of the Year and Video of the Year.
ref: Kumpulan veteran Blue Rodeo menang dalam tiga katogeri: Kumpulan Tahun Ini, Album Alternatif Dewasa Tahun Ini dan Video Tahun Ini.

src: The Canadian Music Hall of Fame added veteran Canadian rock band Triumph to its honour roll.
ref: Fame, Dewan Muzik Canada menambah kumpulan rock veteran Kanada, Triumph kepada roll terhormatnya.

src: The Humanitarian Award was presented to country performer Paul Brandt while the Walt Grealis Special Achievement Award was presented to Citytv and MuchMusic founder Moses Znaimer.
ref: Anugerah Kemanusiaan telah dianugerahkan kepada penghibur negara, Paul Brandt sementara Anugerah Pencapaian Istimewa Walt Grealis telah dianugerahkan kepada Citytv dan pengasas MuchMusic, Moses Znaimer.

src: The Juno Awards began in 1970, initially known as the Gold Leaf Awards, and are Canada's most prominent annual music honours.
ref: Anugerah Juno bermula pada tahun 1970, yang mulanya dikenali sebagao Anugerah Daun Emas, dan merupakan penganugerahan tahunan muzik terpenting Kanada.

src: Next year's ceremonies will be hosted in Vancouver, British Columbia.
ref: Upacara tahun depan akan diadakan di Vancouver, British Columbia.

src: The Wikipedia team that carries out the assessment and quality control before conferring the status of featured articles promoted five articles to FA status at the same time: Walter de Coventre, Maximian, El Señor Presidente, Lord of the Universe, and Red-billed Chough.
ref: Pasukan Wikipedia yang membuat tugas dan mengawal kualiti sebelum mengesahkan status artikel piliahn itu mempromosikan lima artikel kepada status FA pada masa yang sama: Walter de Coventer, Maximian, El Senor Presidente, Lord of the Universe, dan Red-billed Chough.

src: With five promoted at the same time, conferring the status of 2,000th on one is an arbitrary decision and in some respects any of these articles could actually make a claim to the honour.
ref: Dengan lima promosi yang pada masa yang sama, mengesahkan status ke 2000 merupakan satu keputusan yang sewenang-wenangnyadan kemungkinan artikel tersebut mungkin akan menuntut kepada yang berhormat.

src: The professor of the class, Jon Beasley-Murray, began using Wikipedia as a collaborative space where his students could both do coursework and provide a type of virtual public service.
ref: Profesor kelas itu, Jon Beasley-Murray, mula menggunakan Wikipedia sebagai ruang kolaboratif dimana pelajarnya mungkin boleh membuat tugasan dan menyediakan servis maya awam.

src: Samer al-Issawi, a Palestinian prisoner who went on a hunger strike in an Israeli prison as a protest against his imprisonment, was released on Monday to his home in .
ref: Samer al-Issawi, seorang tahanan Palestin yang melancarkan mogok lapar dalam penjara Israel sebagai bantahan terhadap pemenjaraannya, telah dilepaskan pada hari Isnin ke rumahnya di.

src: Issawi returned Monday to his home in the Issawiyeh neighborhood in East Jerusalem after his release from the Shatta prison in northern Israel.
ref: Issawi kembali pada hari Isnin ke rumahnya di kejiranan Issawiyeh di Baitulmuqaddis Timur selepas dibebaskan dari penjara Shatta di utara Israel.

src: After his release, Issawi said during a TV interview, "It is our obligation as freedom fighters to free all the Palestinian political prisoners!".
ref: Selepas dibebaskan, Issawi berkata dalam satu wawancara TV, "Ia adalah tanggungjawab kita sebagai pejuang kebebasan untuk membebaskan semua tahanan politik Palestin!."

src: He was sentenced to more than 25 years in prison.
ref: Dia dijatuhi hukuman lebih daripada 25 tahun di dalam penjara.

src: In 2011, during a prisoner exchange deal Israel made with Hamas, Issawi was released along with over a thousand other Palestinian prisoners.
ref: Pada tahun 2011, semasa perjanjian pertukaran tahanan Israel dibuat dengan Hamas, Issawi telah dikeluarkan bersama-sama dengan lebih seribu tahanan Palestin yang lain.

src: He was released under restrictive conditions and forbidden to go outside of Jerusalem, his residence.
ref: Dia dibebaskan di bawah keadaan yang ketat dan dilarang keluar dari Baitulmuqaddis, kediamannya.

src: However, after only nine months from his release date he was arrested again for breaking the conditions.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, selepas hanya sembilan bulan dari tarikh pembebasannya dia ditangkap sekali lagi kerana melanggar syarat-syarat.

src: For more than 260 days he was fed water, vitamins, and additional materials only by infusion.
ref: Selama lebih daripada 260 hari dia telah diberi makan air, vitamin, dan bahan-bahan tambahan hanya dengan infusi.

src: According to the Los Angeles Times, Israel decided to start a negotiation lest Issawi's death in the Israeli prison cause violence from the Palestinians in the .
ref: Menurut Los Angeles Times, Israel memutuskan untuk memulakan rundingan supaya Issawi tidak mati di Israel kerana ia akan menyebabkan keganasan daripada rakyat Palestin di Tebing Barat.

src: American Major League Baseball relief pitcher Joba Chamberlain of the New York Yankees returned a call to his sister after an 8-5 loss to the Boston Red Sox Sunday night.
ref: Pembaling bantuan Liga Utama Besbol Amerika Joba Chamberlain dari New York Yankees menelefon semula kakaknya selepas kekalahan 8-5 kepada Boston Red Sox pada malam Ahad.

src: After speaking with his sister who was in Lincoln, Nebraska, he was in tears and being consoled by manager Joe Girardi.
ref: Selepas bercakap dengan adik perempuannya yang berada di Lincoln, Nebraska, dia menangis dan ditenangkan oleh pengurus Joe Girardi.

src: Joba's father, Harlan Chamberlain, 55, collapsed at his home in Lincoln, and is currently at St. Elizabeth Regional Medical Center.
ref: Bapa Joba, Harlan Chamberlain, 55, jatuh di rumahnya di Lincoln, dan kini berada di Pusat Perubatan Kawasan St Elizabeth.

src: He has been known to be in declining health in recent years.
ref: Beliau diketahui dalam kemerosotan kesihatan pada kebelakangan tahun ini.

src: Still, Harlan was in attendance at Yankee Stadium during the team's Opening Day series this year.
ref: Namun, Harlan telah hadir di Stadium Yankee semasa Hari Pembukaan siri pasukan itu tahun ini.

src: He also drove down to Kansas City, only three hours away from Lincoln, when the Yankees visited the Kansas City Royals.
ref: Beliau juga memandu ke Kansas City, hanya tiga jam perjalanan dari Lincoln, apabila Yankees melawat Kansas City Royals.

src: He made the same trips last year when Joba made his much-anticipated Major League debut.
ref: Beliau membuat lawatan yang sama tahun lepas apabila Joba menyertai Liga Utama buat kali pertama yang dinanti-nantikan.

src: Joba has been granted leave from the team to be with his father, and will not be with the Yankees at least during their two-game series against the Tampa Bay Rays at Tropicana Field in St. Petersburg, Florida.
ref: Joba telah diberi kebenaran daripada pasukan untuk bersama dengan bapanya, dan tidak akan dengan Yankees sekurang-kurangnya semasa siri dua perlawanan mereka melawan Tampa Bay Rays di Padang Tropicana di St Petersburg, Florida.

src: NASA has completed a major test of a 20-meter square solar sail, marking a "crucial milestone" in space propulsion technology.
ref: NASA telah menyiapkan satu ujian besar mengenai satu layar solar 20-meter persegi, menandakan satu "peristiwa penting" dalam teknologi angkasa pendorongan.

src: It is not the first to test solar sails, as the Japanese have deployed two solar sails in space.
ref: Ini bukan kali pertama untuk menguji layar solar, kerana Jepun telah menggunakan dua layar solar di angkasa lepas.

src: The Planetary Society is planning on launching a solar sail possibly by June 21.
ref: Persatuan Planetary sedang merancang untuk melancarkan satu layar solar mungkin sebelum 21 Jun.

src: Shot into orbit by a converted intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM), the Cosmos 1 would be launched from a submerged Russian submarine from within the Barents Sea.
ref: Pelancaran ke orbit oleh peluru berpandu balistik benua bertukar (ICBM), Cosmos 1 akan dilancarkan dari kapal selam Rusia yang tenggelam dari dalam Laut Barents.

src: The spacecraft, powered by the sail, will have no destination.
ref: Kapal angkasa itu, dikuasakan oleh layar, tidak akan mempunyai destinasi.

src: The purpose is simply to test the propulsion system that uses the pressure from solar light particles to move the ship outward from a starting orbit around the earth at 500 miles.
ref: Tujuannya adalah semata-mata untuk menguji sistem pendorongan yang menggunakan tekanan daripada zarah cahaya solar untuk menggerakkan kapal itu keluar dari orbit yang mengelilingi bumi pada 500 batu.

src: The propulsion technology is currently believed to be the most efficient available for interstellar space travel.
ref: Teknologi pendorongan ini kini dipercayai adalah yang paling berkesan yang boleh didapati untuk perjalanan angkasa antara bintang.

src: Approaching the speed of light would, however, require a long period of constant acceleration.
ref: Menghampiri kelajuan cahaya akan, bagaimanapun, memerlukan tempoh masa yang panjang untuk pecutan malar.

src: According to the National Geographic News, "NASA, the European Space Agency, Japan, and Russia all have developed solar sails, but none has yet tried to prove that the sails can propel a spacecraft under controlled flight."
ref: Menurut Berita Nasional Geographic, "NASA, Agensi Angkasa Eropah, Jepun, dan Rusia semua telah membina layar-layar solar, tetapi tiada satu pun yang pernah cuba untuk membuktikan bahawa layar itu boleh menggerakkan kapal angkasa di bawah penerbangan terkawal".

src: In Goma, on the eastern side of the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), at least 70 people, according to officials, have died because when a McDonnell Douglas DC-9 crashed on take off yesterday.
ref: Di Goma, di bahagian timur Republik Demokratik Congo, sekurang-kurangnya 70 orang, menurut pegawai, telah terbunuh kerana ketika McDonnel Douglas DC-9 terhempas semasa berlepas semalam.

src: VOA has reported that as many as 100 people could have been on board the plane at the time of its crash.
ref: VOA telah melaporkan yang seramai 100 orang mungkin berada didalam pesawat semasa ia terhempas.

src: A director of Hewa Bora Airways, the airline involved in the incident said that "we [the airline] have managed to save most of the passengers who have been evacuated to hospitals."
ref: Pengarah kepada Penerbangan Hewa Bora, syarikat penerbangan yang terlibat dalam kejadian tersebut berkata yang "kami [syarikat penerbangan] telah berjaya menyelamatkan kebanyakan penumpang yang telah dipindahkan ke hospital".

src: Naomi Schwarz, a journalist on the scene described the incident.
ref: Naomi Schwarz, seorang wartawan ditempat kejadian menceritakan tentang insiden tersebut.

src: "The whole top of the plane is ripped off and the two buildings next door are pretty much destroyed too."
ref: "Keseluruhan bahagian atas pesawat tercabut dan dua bangunan bersebelahan adalah turut rosak teruk".

src: "People are carrying buckets full of water to try to put out the fire."
ref: "Orang ramai membawa baldi penuh dengan air untuk cuba memadamkan api".

src: was launched simultaneously today (Thursday) on several UK and Irish television channels including BBC One, BBC Two, RTE 1, ITV1, Channel 4, and Sky One.
ref: telah dilancarkan secara serentak hari ini (Khamis) di beberapa saluran televisyen UK dan Ireland termasuk BBC One, BBC Two, RTE 1, ITV1, Channel 4, dan Sky One.

src: The song was originally recorded in 1984 by several of the biggest artists of the time including Bono, Bob Geldof, Paul McCartney and George Michael.
ref: Lagu ini pada asalnya direkodkan pada tahun 1984 oleh beberapa artis hebat pada masa itu termasuk Bono, Bob Geldof, Paul McCartney dan George Michael.

src: This year, in celebration of 20 years since the first single, the song has been remade by over 50 of today's best selling artists, including Coldplay frontman Chris Martin, Robbie Williams, Bono, Justin Hawkins of The Darkness and Dido.
ref: Tahun ini, untuk meraikan 20 tahun sejak single pertama, lagu ini telah dibuat semula oleh lebih 50 daripada jualan terbaik artis hari ini, termasuk orang depan Coldplay Chris Martin, Robbie Williams, Bono, Justin Hawkins dari The Darkness dan Dido.

src: The song, which is in aid of charity, is already tipped to be the Christmas No.
ref: Lagu itu, yang berada dalam bantuan kebajikan, sudah disebut-sebut sebagai Krismas No.

src: 1 in the UK and Ireland.
ref: 1 di UK dan Ireland.

src: The song will also be launched as a charity mobile phone ringtone to raise funds for Sudan's troubled Darfur region.
ref: Lagu ini juga akan dilancarkan sebagai nada dering telefon bimbit amal untuk mengumpul dana bagi rantau Darfur bermasalah Sudan.

src: Mycokemusic.com said it was going to put the track on its website from Thursday with all profits to be donated to charity.
ref: Mycokemusic.com berkata ia akan meletakkan trek di laman webnya dari hari Khamis dengan semua keuntungan akan disumbangkan kepada badan amal.

src: "Don't tell me, for the love of God, that food is expensive because of biodiesel," said Lula, when talking to reporters.
ref: "Jangan beritahu saya, demi tuhan, bahawa makanan adalah mahal disebabkan oleh biodiesel," kata Lula, apabila bercakap dengan pemberita.

src: "I and my government are ready to travel around the world," he said.
ref: "Saya dan kerajaan saya bersedia untuk mengelilingi dunia," katanya.

src: This move comes soon after a press release was made available by the European Parliament saying that "in the last year scientific evidence, though disputed, has indicated that biofuels may not be as good for the environment as was once thought."
ref: Gerakan ini terjadi tidak lama selepas kenyataan akhbar yang telah dikeluarkan oleh Parlimen Eropah berkata bahawa "dalam bukti saintifik tahun lepas, walaupun dipertikaikan, telah menyatakan bahawa biofuel mungkin tidak baik untuk alam sekitar seperti yang pernah difikirkan".

src: Indonesia has been angered by a decision of the European Union to leave all 51 of the nation's air carriers on the list of air carriers banned in the EU.
ref: Indonesia telah disebabkan menjadi marah dengan keputusan Kesatuan Eropah yang meninggalkan semua 51 pengangkut udara negara dalam senarai pengangkut udara yang diharamkan di Kesatuan Eropah.

src: State-owned flag carrier Garuda Indonesia had hoped to begin flights to Europe imminently and has ordered ten new jetliners to serve routes there and to the United States.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan milik negara Garuda Indonesia berharap untuk memulakan penerbangan ke Eropah tidak lama lagi dan telah mengarahkan sepuluh pesawat jet baru untuk menyediakant laluan ke sana dan ke Amerika Syarikat.

src: The EU is not a sovereign country and is not a member of the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organisation).
ref: EU bukan negara berdaulat dan bukan anggota ICAO (Pertubuhan Penerbangan Awam).

src: But we do respect the EU and its decision, and demand the same from the EU."
ref: Tetapi kita menghormati EU dan keputusannya, dan meminta yang sama daripada EU".

src: The ban was imposed after a string of accidents, of which the three most important were Adam Air Flight 574, a 102-fatality accident in which a Boeing 737-43Q plunged into the ocean after pilots distracted by instrument failure failed to maintain control, Adam Air Flight 172, in which another B737 snapped in half after a hard landing and Garuda Indonesia Flight 200, in which a third B737 attempted landing at extreme speed and overshot the runway, killing 21.
ref: Larangan itu dikenakan selepas satu rentetan kemalangan, di mana tiga yang paling penting ialah Penerbangan Adam Air 574, kemalangan 102 kematian di mana sebuah Boeing 737-43Q terjunam ke dalam laut selepas juruterbang terganggu oleh kegagalan peralatan dan gagal mengekalkan kawalan, Penerbangan Adam Air 172, di mana satu lagi B737 terputus pada setengah selepas pendaratan keras dan Garuda Indonesia Penerbangan 200, di mana B737 ketiga cuba mendarat pada kelajuan melampau dan terbabas dari landasan, membunuh 21 orang.

src: Indonesia grounded the carrier in March after another accident in which a B737 overshot a runway.
ref: Indonesia menghentikan pesawat itu pada bu;an Mac selepas satu lagi kemalangan di mana B737 terbabas dari landasan.

src: The EU reviewed the ban this week, but ruled that those responsible "have still to demonstrate that they have completed the corrective actions" needed to lift the ban.
ref: EU mengkaji semula larangan itu minggu ini, tetapi memutuskan bahawa mereka yang bertanggungjawab "masih perlu menunjukkan bahawa mereka telah menyelesaikan tindakan pembetulan" yang diperlukan untuk membatalkan larangan itu.

src: It is a blow to Indonesia, who had promised "fast-track" help to Garuda, Mandala Airlines, Premiair and Airfast to raise their safety to levels acceptable to the EU.
ref: Ia adalah satu tamparan kepada Indonesia, yang telah berjanji bantuan "laluan pantas" Garuda, Penerbangan Mandala, Premiair dan Airfast untuk meningkatkan keselamatan mereka ke tahap yang dibenarkan oleh EU.

src: British Airways, Korean Air and Qantas all previously admitted being involved and paid fines.
ref: British Airways, Korean Air dan Qantas sebelum ini pernah didakwa terlibat dan telah membayar denda.

src: The cartel, which created artificially high prices by eliminating competition between its members, was exposed by whistleblower Lufthansa, who alerted authorities in exchange for immunity to prosecution.
ref: Kartel itu, yang dicipta secara tiruan harga tinggi dengan menyingkirkan saingan antara rakan, yang telah didedahkan oleh pemberi maklumat Lufthansa, yang menyedari amaran pihak berkuasa dalam pertukaran untuk imuniti terhadap pendakwaan.

src: Japan will not take any further action against the carrier.
ref: Jepun tidak akan mengambil apa-apa tindakan lanjut terhadap syarikat pengangkutan tersebut.

src: However announcement of an overall victory for the MDC has come to a standstill as results from 23 out of the 210 constituencies are still being recounted.
ref: Namun pengumuman kemenangan keseluruhan bagi MDC telah terhenti kerana keputusan 23 daripada 210 kawasan pilihan raya masih dikira semula.

src: Mr. Mugabe asked his 15,000 strong audience to "maintain utmost vigilance in the face of vicious British machinations and the machinations of our other detractors, who are allies of Britain" while speaking at the Gwanzura Stadium in Zimbabwe's capital city of Harare.
ref: Encik Mugabe meminta 15,000 pengikut setianya untuk "mengekalkan kewaspadaan penuh dalam menghadapi komplot yang British ganas dan komplot pengkritik yang lain, yang merupakan rakan Britain" semasa berucap di Stadium Gwanzura di ibu negara Zimbabwe, Harare.

src: "Down with the British" was chanted, Mr. Mugabe saying the British are "like thieves fronting their lackeys among us, which they pay to confuse our people".
ref: "Jatuhkan British" telah dilaungkan, Encik Mugabe berkata British adalah "seperti pencuri menunjukkan penurut mereka di kalangan kita, yang mereka bayar untuk mengelirukan orang kita".

src: The speech was made in a celebration of 28 years since the day of Zimbabwean independence, which Mr. Mugabe called the day on which his nation "finally shook off the chains of British racist settler colonialism".
ref: Ucapan itu dibuat dalam upacara sambutan 28 tahun sejak hari kemerdekaan Zimbabwe, yang Encik Mugabe memanggil hari itu di mana kaumnya "akhirnya bebas daripada belenggu penjajahan peneroka British yang bersifat perkauman".

src: The driver of the SUV had survived, and is being detained on suspicion of drink driving, Spanish newspaper Sur claiming a breathalyser test revealed twice the legal blood alcohol limit.
ref: Pemandu SUV telah terselamat, dan kini ditahan kerana disyaki memandu dalam keadaan mabuk, akhbar Sepanyol Sur mendakwa ujian nafas menunjukkan dua kali ganda had alkohol dalam darah yang sah di sisi undang-undang.

src: Police say the SUV driver was attempting to illegally pass another vehicle.
ref: Polis berkata pemandu SUV itu cuba secara haram memotong kenderaan lain.

src: "There were 44 people on the bus, and it seems they were all Finnish," said a spokesman for the Civil Guard.
ref: "Terdapat 44 orang di dalam bas, dan ia seolah-olah mereka semua warga Finland," kata seorang jurucakap Pengawal Awam.

src: He also reported that six of the injured were in serious condition.
ref: Beliau juga melaporkan bahawa enam mangsa yang cedera berada dalam keadaan serius.

src: The eastbound lanes of the AP-7 highway where the collision occurred have been closed, Spanish media reported.
ref: Lorong timur di lebuh raya AP-7 di mana perlanggaran itu berlaku telah ditutup, media Sepanyol melaporkan.

src: A field hospital was set up at the site of the accident, which provided emergency first aid to the victims.
ref: Hospital sementara ditubuhkan di tempat kejadian kemalangan itu, yang menyediakan bantuan kecemasan kepada mangsa.

src: The injured tourists were then taken to five different hospitals in the Costa del Sol region.
ref: Para pelancong yang cedera dibawa ke lima hospital yang berbeza di rantau Costa del Sol.

src: The 11 tourists who emerged from the accident unscathed were taken to a hotel.
ref: 11 pelancong yang muncul dari kemalangan itu tanpa cedera telah dibawa ke sebuah hotel.

src: The bus accident is Spain's worst in more than seven years.
ref: Kemalangan bas itu adalah yang paling buruk di Sepanyol dalam lebih daripada tujuh tahun.

src: United States presidential candidate Hillary Clinton warned Iran against an attack on Israel; "I want the Iranians to know that if I'm the president, we will attack Iran," the former First Lady said.
ref: Calon Presiden Amerika Syarikat, Hillary Clinton memberi amaran kepada Iran terhadap serangan ke atas Israel; "Saya mahu orang Iran tahu bahawa jika saya Presiden, kami akan menyerang Iran," kata bekas Wanita Pertama itu.

src: "That's a terrible thing to say but those people who run Iran need to understand that because that perhaps will deter them from doing something that would be reckless, foolish and tragic."
ref: "Itu ialah satu perkara yang dasyat untuk dikatakan tetapi orang-orang yang memerintah Iran perlu memahami bahawa itu mungkin adalah perkara yang menghalang mereka daripada melakukan sesuatu yang melulu, bodoh dan tragis".

src: Last night, on MSNBC's Countdown with Keith Olbermann, Hillary Clinton said US allies in the Middle East are "intimidated and bullied into submission by Iran."
ref: Semalam, dalam rancangan Pengiraan Detik MSNBC bersama Keith Olberman, Hillary Clinton berkata bahawa sekutu Amerika Syarikat di Timur Tengah "ditakut-takutkan dan dibuli oleh Iran".

src: Here also, she warned that an attack on Israel would bring "massive retaliation" for Iran.
ref: Di sini juga, beliau memberi amaran bahawa serangan ke atas Israel akan membawa "tindakan balas besar-besaran" terhadap Iran.

src: Clinton and Obama face off today in the Pennsylvania Democratic primary.
ref: Clinton dan Obama akan bertembung hari ini di Demokratik Utama Pennsylvania.

src: The BBC has reported that 8000 schools have been fully or partially closed by today’s national UK teachers strike.
ref: BBC melaporkan bahawa 8000 sekolah telah pun ditutup sepenuhnya atau sebahagiannya pada hari ini disebabkan mogok guru-guru nasional UK.

src: The majority of state schools in the city of Bristol are closing for the strike, although many of the schools for students age 16+ are expected to remain open.
ref: Kebanyakan sekolah-sekolah kebangsaan di bandar Bristol ditutup berikutan mogok, walaupun banyak antara sekolah-sekolah untuk pelajar berusia 16+ dijangka akan terus dibuka.

src: Some schools that originally said they would be closed have made the decision not to close for the strike.
ref: Beberapa sekolah yang asalnya dikatakan akan ditutup telah membuat keputusan untuk tidak ditutup disebabkan mogok tersebut.

src: The Genetic Information Nondiscrimination Act, described by Massachusetts Senator Ted Kennedy as "the first major new civil rights bill of the new century," will now be sent back to the House of Representatives, where it could be approved as early as next week.
ref: Akta Nondiskriminasi Maklumat Genetik itu, digambarkan oleh Senator Massachussetts Ted Kennedy sebagai "rang undang-undang awam penting baru yang pertama di abad baru," akan dihantar semula ke Dewan Rakyat, di mana ia akan diluluskan secepat minggu hadapan.

src: President George W. Bush, who would have to sign the bill for it to become law, has voiced his support for the legislation.
ref: Presiden George W. Bush, yang perlu menandatangani rang itu untuk ia menjadi undang-undang, telah menyatakan sokongan beliau kepada penggubalannya.

src: The bill forbids employers from firing, refusing to hire, or otherwise discriminating against employees based on genetic information, such as a family history of a hereditary disease.
ref: Rang tersebut menghalang pekerja dari dipecat, ditolak untuk diambil kerja, ataupun diskriminasi terhadap pekerja berdasarkan maklumat genetik, seperti penyakit keturunan di dalam sejarah keluarga.

src: Snowe fears the threat of discrimination may discourage people from undergoing genetic testing, which can help to diagnose a wide range of diseases and lead to lifesaving therapy.
ref: Snowe khuatir ancaman diskriminasi boleh menjauhkan orang ramai dari menjalani ujian genetik, yang mampu membantu untuk mendiagnosis liputan penyakit yang luas dan membawa kepada terapi yang dapat menyelamatkan nyawa.

src: Kathy Hudson, director of the Genetics and Public Policy Center, reports that 92 percent are worried that information gained in genetic testing may be used against them.
ref: Kathy Hudson, direktor Pusat Genetik dan Polisi Awam, melaporkan 92 peratus risau maklumat yang diterima dari ujian genetik boleh digunakan ke atas mereka.

src: "After a very long wait," she says, "Americans can now be confident that their genetic information cannot be used by health insurers or employers in harmful or hurtful ways."
ref: "Setelah lama menunggu," katanya, "Rakyat Amerika kini boleh yakin yang maklumat genetik mereka tidak boleh digunakan oleh syarikat insurans kesihatan atau majikan dengan cara berbahaya atau menyakitkan."

src: "Federal legislation establishing a national and uniform basic standard is necessary to fully protect the public from discrimination and allay their concerns about the potential for discrimination," the bill reads, "thereby allowing individuals to take advantage of genetic testing, technologies, research, and new therapies."
ref: "Pengubalan persekutuan yang menyediakan satu standard asas yang nasional dan seragam perlu bagi melindungi orang awam sepenuhnya dari diskriminasi dan mengurangkan kerisauan mereka tentang potensi ada diskriminasi," rang tersebut mengatakan, "dengan itu membenarkan individu-individu untuk memanfaatkan ujian genetik, teknologi, kajian, dan terapi baru."

src: "We certainly improved the bill from a liability standpoint," said Coburn, an obstetrician.
ref: "Kami sudah tentu telah memperbaiki rang itu dari sudut liabiliti," kata Coburn, seorang pakar obsteterik.

src: Similar bills were unanimously passed by the Senate in 2003 and 2005, but in both years the bill stalled in the House.
ref: Rang-rang yang sama telah diluluskan sebulat suara oleh Senat pada 2003 dan 2005, tetapi di kedua-dua tahun rang itu telah dilengahkan di Dewan.

src: The current bill was passed in the House of Representatives a year ago by a 420-3 vote.
ref: Rang itu kini telah diluluskan Dewan Rakyat pada setahun lalu dengan undian 420-3.

src: A genetic nondiscrimination bill was first introduced 13 years ago by New York Representatives Louise Slaughter, who says the House will "get it out to the White House as quickly as we can."
ref: Satu rang nondiskriminasi genetik telah pertama sekali diperkenalkan 13 tahun lalu oleh Wakil New York Louise Slaughter, yang berkata Dewan akan "membawanya ke Rumah Putih secepat yang kami mampu."

src: in hopes of leveraging the internet presence of Yahoo!
ref: dengan harapan untuk memanfaatkan kehadiran internet Yahoo!

src: in Microsoft's battle with Google.
ref: dalam persaingan Microsoft dengan Google.

src: The original offer for Yahoo!
ref: Tawaran asal untuk Yahoo!

src: was $44 billion; however since this offer Microsoft has seen a revenue drop this last quarter which could greatly affect the software giant's ability to up the price again in hopes Yahoo!
ref: adalah $44 bilion; walau bagaimanapun sejak tawaran ini Microsoft telah melihat penurunan hasil pendapatan suku terakhir yang boleh amat menjejaskan keupayaan perisian gergasi itu untuk menaikkan lagi harga dengan harapan Yahoo!

src: would accept.
ref: akan menerima.

src: This includes a 24% drop in revenue from the Windows Operating System alone.
ref: Ini termasuk penurunan 24% dalam hasil daripada Sistem Operasi Windows sahaja.

src: have decreased during the merger discussions.
ref: telah menurun semasa perbincangan tentang pergabungan tersebut.

src: shareholders with a buyout plan.
ref: dengan pelan pembelian.

src: It is too early to tell how this will end, but Microsoft has made it known that it will try all available routes; up to and including a hostile takeover.
ref: Adalah terlalu awal untuk menyatakan bagaimana ini akan berakhir, tetapi Microsoft memberitahu bahawa ia akan cuba semua laluan yang ada; sehingga dan termasuk pengambil alihan bermusuhan.

src: Recent comments from Microsoft CEO Steve Ballmer and CFO Chris Liddell have mentioned that not acquiring Yahoo!
ref: Komen-komen terkini dari Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif Microsoft Steve Ballmer dan Ketua Pegawai Kewangan Chris Liddell telah menyebut bahawa tidak memperoleh Yahoo!

src: is also an option.
ref: juga merupakan satu pilihan.

src: Whatever Microsoft's plan is, the longer this takes, the more competitor Google will likely use this to their advantage is obtaining both clients and employees, says Juan Carlos Perez of IDG.
ref: Apa jua rancangan Microsoft, semakin lama masa diambil, semakin besar kemungkinan pesaingnya Google akan mengambil kesempatan untuk mendapatkan kedua-dua pelanggan dan pekerja, kata Juan Carlos Perez daripada IDG.

src: Complex 40 was first used in 1965, for the maiden flight of the Titan IIIC rocket.
ref: Complex 40 pertama kali digunakan pada tahun 1965, untuk penerbangan sulung roket Titan IIIC.

src: In November 1966, a boilerplate MOL space station was launched on a Titan IIIC from the complex, along with a Gemini capsule, and four satellites.
ref: Pada November 1966, sebuah boilerplate MOL stesen angkasa dilancarkan pada Titan IIIC dari kompleksnya, bersama dengan kapsul Gemini, dan empat satelit.

src: Following the cancellation of MOL, it was converted back to a regular Titan launch complex, and was used for 55 launches, of Titan IIIC, 34D, and IV rockets.
ref: Berikutan pembatalan MOL, ia ditukarkan kembali kepada kompleks pelancaran Titan biasa, dan digunakan sebanyak 55 pelancaran, untuk Titan IIIC, 34D, dan roket IV.

src: Two planetary probes, two commercial satellites, a British military communications satellite, and numerous payloads for the American armed forces were launched from the complex, which ceased operations in April 2005, when the penultimate Titan IV launched the Lacrosse-5 spy satellite for America's National Reconnaissance Office.
ref: Dua kuar planet, dua satelit komersial, satelit komunikasi tentera British, dan banyak muatan untuk angkatan tentera Amerika dilancarkan daripada kompleks, yang berhenti operasi pada April 2005, apabila pelancaran Lacrosse-5 satelit perisik kedua terakhir Titan IV untuk Pejabat Kebangsaan Peninjauan Amerika.

src: The launch pad is being demolished to make way for a new complex, which will be used by the SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket, currently scheduled to make its maiden flight in 2009.
ref: Pad pelancaran dirobohkan untuk memberi jalan kepada kompleks baru, yang akan digunakan oleh roket SpaceX Falcon 9, dijadualkan untuk membuat penerbangan sulungnya pada tahun 2009.

src: As well as being used for commercial launches, the new LC-40 will be used for cargo resupply missions to the International Space Station, under a Commercial Orbital Transportation Services (COTS) contract with NASA.
ref: Selain digunakan untuk pelancaran komersial, LC-40 baru akan digunakan untuk misi menambah bekalan kargo ke Stesen Angkasa Antarabangsa, dibawah kontrak Commercial Orbital Transportation Services (COTS) bersama NASA.

src: SpaceX currently has a five year lease on the site.
ref: SpaceX kini mempunyai pajakan lima tahun di tempat itu.

src: At least 400 homes have been evacuated in Sierra Madre near Los Angeles, California after a wildfire which started on Saturday, began to threaten their homes.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 400 rumah telah dipindahkan di Sierra Madre berhampiran Los Angeles, California selepas kebakaran yang bermula pada hari Sabtu, mula mengancam rumah mereka.

src: So far only five percent of the 350 acre fire is contained, with over 400 firefighters battling the blaze.
ref: Setakat ini hanya lima peratus daripada kebakaran 350 ekar boleh dikawal, dengan lebih 400 anggota bomba melawan api.

src: Authorities say the investigation into how it started may take up to three days to finish.
ref: Pihak berkuasa berkata, siasatan bagaimana ia bermula mungkin mengambil masa sehingga tiga hari untuk menyelesaikan.

src: So far there have been no injuries and no homes have yet been damaged, but one building storing equipment used by firefighters was burned to the ground.
ref: Setakat ini tidak ada sebarang kecederaan dan tiada rumah yang rosak, tetapi peralatan menyimpan satu bangunan yang digunakan oleh anggota bomba telah terbakar.

src: For a short time, at least 100 hikers were trapped in the mountains and a boy scout camp was also threatened by the blaze.
ref: Untuk masa yang singkat, sekurang-kurangnya 100 pendaki terperangkap di pergunungan dan kem budak pengakap juga diancam oleh kebakaran.

src: However, there are currently around 1000 people under mandatory evacuations, and the city has been declared in a state of emergency.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, pada masa ini terdapat kira-kira 1000 orang di bawah pemindahan mandatori, dan bandar telah diisytiharkan dalam keadaan darurat.

src: Chelsea beat Liverpool in extra time to advance to next month's UEFA Champions League Final in Moscow.
ref: Chelsea menewaskan Liverpool pada masa tambahan untuk mara ke Perlawanan Terakhir Kejohanan Liga UEFA bulan depan di Moscow.

src: Liverpool goalkeeper Jose Reina punched away Michael Ballack's shot which landed at the feet of Didier Drogba who capitalized by scoring the opening goal of the 2nd leg.
ref: Penjaga gol Liverpool Jose Reina menumbuk jauh pukulan Michael Ballack yang mendarat di kaki Didier Drogba yang mengambil kesempatan dengan menjaringkan gol pembukaan kaki ke-2.

src: Fernando Torres equalized in the 2nd half after Yossi Benayoun beat the defenders to set up the goal.
ref: Fernando Torres menyamakan kedudukan pada separuh masa ke-2 selepas Yossi Benayoun mengalahkan pemain pertahanan dalam menjaringkan gol itu.

src: After Chelsea were denied a goal by the Assistant Referee moments earlier, Referee awarded Chelsea a penalty shot which Frank Lampard converted.
ref: Selepas Chelsea dinafikan satu gol oleh Penolong Pengadil sejurus sebelum ini, Pengadil menganugerahkan Chelsea satu pukulan penalti yang ditukar arah oleh Frank Lampard.

src: Dider Drogba added Chelsea's 3rd goal of the 2nd leg.
ref: Dider Drogba menambah gol ke-3 Chelsea kaki ke-2.

src: Ryan Babbel brought Liverpool within a goal of advancing with 3 minutes of extra time remaining.
ref: Ryan Babbel membawa Liverpool dalam satu gol pendahuluan dengan baki 3 minit masa tambahan.

src: The win for Chelsea means that they have made their 1st ever UEFA Champions League final and will be competing in the 1st ever all-English final in UEFA Champions League history.
ref: Kemenangan Chelsea bermakna bahawa mereka telah mencapai Perlawanan Terakhir Kejohanan Liga UEFA pertama mereka dan akan bersaing dalam pusingan semua negara Inggeris pertama dalam sejarah Liga Kejohanan.

src: A Southern Sudan Air Connection aircraft has crashed today in Southern Sudan, killing over a dozen people, including the area's defence minister.
ref: Sebuah pesawat Hubungan Udara Sudan Selatan terhempas hari ini di Sudan Selatan, membunuh lebih daripada sedozen orang, termasuk menteri pertahanan di kawasan ini.

src: There are conflicting reports on how many people were on board and how many died in the Bahr Gazal crash, but at least twenty people were on board.
ref: Terdapat laporan bercanggah tentang berapa ramai orang yang berada di atas pesawat itu dan berapa ramai yang mati dalam kemalangan di Bahr Gazal, tetapi sekurang-kurangnya dua puluh orang berada di atas pesawat itu.

src: Some sources suggest nineteen fatalities and two survivors, and others say there were 26 deaths and no survivors; it should be noted that if either of these were correct then there were more than twenty on board.
ref: Sesetengah sumber mencadangkan sembilan belas kematian dan dua terselamat, dan yang lain mengatakan terdapat 26 kematian dan tiada mangsa terselamat; harus diambil perhatian bahawa jika salah seorang daripada ini adalah betul, maka terdapat lebih daripada dua puluh orang di atas pesawat.

src: This makes the journey around 450 kilometres (290 miles), with the plane crashing in a flat region 375 kilometres (around 220 miles) from Juba.
ref: Ini menjadikan perjalanan itu sepanjang kira-kira 450 kilometer (290 batu), dengan pesawat terhempas di kawasan rata berjarak 375 kilometer (sekitar 220 batu) dari Juba.

src: The UN also said that the aircraft was a Beechcraft 1900 and that they would fly in government officials and aviation experts to conduct an investigation.
ref: PBB juga berkata, pesawat itu merupakan Beechcraft 1900 dan bahawa mereka akan melibatkan pegawai kerajaan dan pakar penerbangan untuk menjalankan satu siasatan.

src: Kiir said in a press conference "Twenty-one passengers were killed and either two or three crew members."
ref: Kiir berkata dalam satu sidang akhbar "Dua puluh satu penumpang terbunuh dan sama ada dua atau tiga anak kapal".

src: He was an adviser to the president at the time of his death.
ref: Beliau merupakan penasihat kepada presiden pada masa kematiannya.

src: The disaster is thought to be an accident caused by mechanical trouble.
ref: Bencana tersebut dianggap sebagai suatu kemalangan yang disebabkan oleh masalah mekanikal.

src: The bus left the road when it skidded off a tight bend and struck a concrete barrier, rolling over and catching fire.
ref: Bas itu meninggalkan jalan apabila ia terbabas di selekoh tajam dan melanggar tembok konkrit, bergolek dan terbakar.

src: The bus ended the roll back the right way up and was completely destroyed by the fire.
ref: Bas itu berakhir dengan bergolek dari tempat atas dan musnah keseluruhan oleh api.

src: One wheel lay twelve metres from the main wreckage and skid marks were left on the road.
ref: Satu tayar tergolek dua belas meter dari bangkai utama dan tanda tergelincir ditinggalkan di atas jalan raya.

src: This was contradicted by Russian state owned service RIA Novosti, which stated just two Russians were among the dead.
ref: Ini bercanggah dengan kenyataan perkhidmatan yang dimiliki oleh Rusia yang mengatakan bahawa dua orang Rusia itu antara yang mati.

src: The Russian foreign ministry only said 16 Russians were injured and none killed, also contradicting the Egyptian security official who said only 14 people were injured in total.
ref: Menteri luar Rusia hanya berkata 16 warga Rusia yang cedera dan tiada tebunuh, juga bercanggah dengan pegawai keselamatan Mesir yang berkata bahawa hanya 14 orang yang cedera keseluruhannya.

src: The Ukrainian foreign ministry said a Ukrainian woman had been killed and the Romanian foreign ministry said a 41-year-old Romanian woman was amongst the dead.
ref: Menteri luar Ukrain berkata seorang wanita Ukrain telah terbunuh dan Menteri luar Rome berkata wanita berumur 41 tahun warga Rome antara mangsa yang meninggal.

src: The driver behind the wheel at the time survived the accident.
ref: Pemandu di belakang tayar pada masa itu terselamat dari kemalangan.

src: The crash occurred at 6:00 am (0300 GMT) about 70km (45 miles) from Suez, and many of the injured were rushed to hospital there.
ref: Nahas berlaku kira-kira jam 6:00 pagi (0300 GMT) lebih kurang 70km (45 batu) dari Suez, dan ramai yang cedera dikejarkan ke hospital disitu.

src: Traffic officials, security personnel, civil defence soldiers and ambulances all responded to the crash.
ref: Pegawai trafik, kakitangan keselamatan, askar pertahanan awam dan ambulans bertindak balas terhadap nahas.

src: In addition, the Azure Travel coach, like all Egyptian tour buses, had at least one armed police officer travelling on board.
ref: Tambahan pula, bas Azure Travel, seperti kebanyakan bas persiaran Mesir, ada sekurang-kurangnya seorang polis bersenjata yang menaiki bas.

src: Two Canadians and two British citizens are reported to be amongst the injured.
ref: Dua orang rakyat Kanada dan dua orang rakyat British dilaporkan antara yang tercedera.

src: Road accidents claim around 6,000 lives and injure 30,000 every year in Egypt.
ref: Kemalangan jalan raya mengorbankan sekurang-kurangnya 6000 nyawa dan mencederakan 30,000 setiap tahun di Mesir.

src: As part of peace talks between and the , Israel released on Tuesday early in the morning 26 Palestinian prisoners imprisoned before the 1994 for murder or attempted murder of Israelis.
ref: Sebagai sebahagian daripada rundingan damai antara dan, Israel mengeluarkan pada awal pagi hari Selasa pada 26 tahanan Palestin yang dipenjarakan sebelum tahun 1994 atas pembunuhan atau cubaan membunuh rakyat Israel.

src: As a prerequisite for the peace talks between the Israelis and the Palestinians led by the US, Israel committed in July to free 104 prisoners imprisoned before the Oslo accords.
ref: Sebagai syarat untuk rundingan damai antara Israel dan Palestin yang diketuai oleh Amerika, Israel berkomited pada bulan Julai untuk membebaskan 104 tahanan yang dipenjarakan sebelum perjanjian Oslo.

src: In this wave, the third out of four, Israel freed 26 Palestinian prisoners out of 'Ofer' prison in Israel.
ref: Dalam gelombang ini, ketiga daripada empat, Israel me, bebaskan 26 tahanan Palestin dari penjara 'Ofer'di Israel.

src: Addressing the issue, the Israeli Prime Minister, , said at the meeting of his party, "Leadership is judged by the ability to implement decisions, difficult as they may be.
ref: Menangani isu itu, Perdana Menteri Israel, berkata dalam mesyuarat parti, "Kepimpinan dinilai oleh keupayaan untuk melaksanakan keputusan, sukar walau bagaimanapun".

src: Police in Austria have reported that the situation in the cellar where people were illegally imprisoned for over two decades is 'oppressive'.
ref: Polis di Austria telah melaporkan yang situasi di bilik bawah tanah di mana orang telah dipenjarakan secara haram selama lebih dua dekad adalah 'zalim'.

src: They have also said that they cannot stay in the cellar for more than one hour.
ref: Mereka juga turut berkata yang mereka tidak dapat berada di bilik bawah tanah itu untuk lebih dari satu jam.

src: This announcement by the police comes after police in the Lower Austrian town of Amstetten arrested a 73 year old man who is alleged to have kept his daughter, now aged 42, locked in the cellar of his house in Amstetten since August 29, 1984.
ref: Pengumuman oleh polis ini timbul selepas polis di bandar Lower Austrian di Amstetten telah menahan seorang lelaki tua berusia 73 tahun yang didakwa telah menyimpan anak perempuannya, yang kini berumur 42 tahun, dikunci di dalam bilik bawah tanah rumahnya di Amstetten sejak dari 29 Ogos, 1984.

src: The man, identified by police as Josef Fritzl, is alleged to have started sexually abusing his daughter, named as Elisabeth Fritzl, when she was eleven years old, and to have subsequently fathered seven children by her.
ref: Lelaki itu, yang dikenalpasti polis sebagai Josef Fritzl, dikatakan telah mula mencabul secara seksual anak perempuannya, yang dinamakan sebagai Elisabeth Fritzl, ketika dia masih berusia sebelas tahun, dan kemudiannya melahirkan tujuh orang anak.

src: One of the children, one of a set of twins born in 1996, died of neglect shortly after birth and the body was burned by the father.
ref: Salah seorang dari anak-anaknya, satu set kembar yang dilahirkan pada tahun 1996, telah mati akibat pengabaian sejurus selepas kelahiran dan mayatnya dibakar oleh ayah mereka.

src: Rosemarie F. is said to have been unaware of her husbands' activities.
ref: Rosemarie F. dikatakan tidak sedar akan aktiviti suaminya.

src: Police became suspicious when a 19-year-old daughter, Kerstin, was taken to hospital with a mysterious life-threatening illness, and the family's medical records were checked.
ref: Polis menjadi sangsi apabila seorang anak perempuan berumur 19 tahun, Kerstin, telah dibawa ke hospital dengan satu penyakit membawa maut yang misteri, dan rekod perubatan keluarga itu telah diperiksa.

src: Police say that Elisabeth F. appeared to be "greatly disturbed" psychologically, and only agreed to talk after the authorities assured her that she would not have to have contact with her father, and that her children would be cared for.
ref: Polis berkata yang Elisabeth F. kelihatan "amat terganggu" dari segi psikologi, dan hanya bersetuju untuk bercakap setelah pihak berkuasa menjamin yang dia tidak akan perlu berhubung dengan bapanya, dan anak-anaknya akan dijaga.

src: The local authorities have recently released a statement regarding these incidents, an English translation of part of which is available below: The news has shocked Austria, as has its similarity to the case of Natascha Kampusch who was kidnapped aged 10, and escaped after being held in a "dungeon" for eight years in 2006.
ref: Pihak berkuasa tempatan baru-baru ini telah mengeluarkan satu kenyataan mengenai insiden ini, dengan satu bahagian terjemahan Bahasa Inggeris seperti di bawah: Berita itu telah mengejutkan Austria, kerana persamaannya dengan kes Natascha Kampusch yang diculik pada umur 10 tahun, dan telah melarikan diri setelah dikurung di dalam sebuah "kurungan bawah tanah" selama lapan tahun pada 2006.

src: Early Cinco De Mayo celebrations were interrupted after a suspicious package caused the closure of a busy street in Buffalo, New York's Allentown District.
ref: Sambutan awal Cinco De Mayo telah diganggu selepas satu bungkusan yang mencurigakan yang menyebabkan penutupan di jalan yang sibuk di Buffalo, Wilayah Allentown New York.

src: "It is my understanding that at about 4:30 this afternoon, a call went out for a suspicious person."
ref: "Pada fahaman saya bahawa lebih kurang 4:30 petang, ada satu panggilan keluar dari orang yang mencurigakan."

src: "The individual had a package under his jacket which tipped off the person as being suspicious."
ref: "Individu yang meletakkan bungkusan itu di bawah jaketnya yang menyebabkan dia dianggap mencurigakan."

src: "He dropped the package into the [box], and made his way out to Delaware Ave. towards Allen," stated Buffalo Police Lt., K Szyszkowski.
ref: "Dia meletakkan bungkusan kedalam [kotak], dan melarikan diri ke Delaware Ave. ke arah Allen," kata Lt. Polis Buffalo, K Szyszkowski.

src: When police arrived on scene, they evacuated the offices at 570 and the New York State Health Department building at 584 Delaware Avenue, while the Erie County Bomb Squad was called in to examine the drop box and the packages.
ref: Semasa polis tiba di tempat kejadian, mereka memindahkan pejabat di 570 dan bangunan Jabatan Kesihatan Negeri New York ke 584 Delaware Avenue, sambil Skuad Bom Negara Erie telah dipanggil untuk memeriksa bungkusan dan kotak itu.

src: The street between Allen and North was shut down to traffic while police secured the scene.
ref: Jalan diantara Allen dan Utara telah ditutup kepada trafik sambil polis menjaga tempat kejadian.

src: When Wikinews freelance reporter Jason Safoutin arrived on scene, at least 20 people were standing outside the buildings, most of whom appeared to be office employees.
ref: Semasa wartawan bebas Wikinews Jason Safoutin tiba di tempat kejadian, sekurang-kurangnya 20 orang berdiri di luar bangunan, kebanyakannya merupakan pekerja pejabat.

src: At approximately 6:10 p.m., the bomb squad arrived along with a K-9 unit.
ref: Pada lebih kurang pukul 6:10 petang, skuad bom tiba bersama unit K-9.

src: The commander of the bomb squad, Daniel Walczak entered the area between the buildings where the drop box was at about 7:15.
ref: Komander skuad bom, Daniel Walczal memasuki kawasan di antara bangunan dimana peti letak itu berada sekitar jam 7:15.

src: He then opened the box and examined several packages with an X-ray machine, but found nothing to indicate an explosive device was present.
ref: Beliau membuka kotak itu dan memeriksa beberapa bungkusan dengan mesin X-ray, tetapi gagal mengenalpasti kewujudan bahan letupan.

src: After about 15 minutes, Walczak exited the area with the suspect packages.
ref: Selepas lebih kurang 15 minit, Walczak keluar dari kawasan itu dengan bungkusan yang mencurigakan itu.

src: "It was a regular envelope, a UPS container about 18 inches by a foot and a half."
ref: "Ianya hanya sampul biasa, bekas UPS lebih kurang 18 inci melalui sekaki setengah."

src: Police would not say what might have been inside the packages.
ref: Polis tidak akan berbicara apa yang mungkin akan ada dalam bungkusan.

src: In November of 2007, at least 12 fire bombs were found inside a building at 15 Allen, just a few blocks away from Monday's incident.
ref: Pada November 2007, sekurang-kurangnya 12 bom api dijumpai di dalam bangunan di 15 Allen, hanya beberapa blok dari insiden Isnin itu.

src: People studying the situation in Myanmar are claiming that an inadequate response of the government of Myanmar (formerly Burma) to scientists' warnings about the cyclone, coupled with large-scale destruction of protective mangroves along its coasts, aggravated the devastation wreaked by tropical Cyclone Nargis.
ref: Mereka yang mengkaji keadaan di Myanmar mendakwa bahawa kekurangan tindak balas dari Kerajaan Myanmar (Sebelum ini dikenali sebagai Burma) terhadap amaran saintis mengenali taufan, ditambah pula dengan kemusnahan besar-besaran pokok bakau pelindung sepanjang pantai itu, memburukkan lagi kemusnahan yang diakibatkan oleh Taufan Tropika Nargis.

src: Scientists at the Indian Meteorological Department (IMD) in New Delhi, theWorld Meteorological Organisation's specialist centre for Asia, say they issued the first of the cyclone bulletins to Myanmar as early as 26 April.
