src: He added, "When the law punishes by death, it risks its own sudden descent into brutality, transgressing the constitutional commitment to decency and restraint."
ref: Beliau menambah, "apabila undang-undang menghukum dengan kematian, ia mengancam keruntuhannya secara tiba-tiba ke arah kezaliman, melanggari komitmen perlembagaan ke arah kesusilaan dan kesederhanaan."

src: On Wednesday, a United States federal appeals court upheld convictions of fraud and obstruction of justice against media mogul Conrad Black, along with three other executives from his former press corporation, Hollinger International.
ref: Pada hari Rabu, mahkamah rayuan persekutuan Amerika Syarikat mengekalkan sabitan penipuan dan menghalang keadilan ke atas media mogul Conrad Black, bersama tiga daripada eksekutif dari bekas syarikat akbarnya, Hollinger International.

src: Black, born in Canada and bearer of the title Baron Black of Crossharbour in the United Kingdom, was found guilty in July 2007 of three counts of wire and mail fraud for giving himself and others millions of dollars in illegal bonuses taken from Hollinger holdings, and for obstruction of justice based on surveillance footage of his moving 13 boxes of documents out of his Toronto office to his home the day after he was informed that he was being investigated.
ref: Black, dilahirkan di Kanada dan memegang gelaran Baron Black Crossharbour di United Kingdom, didapati bersalah pada Julai 2007 dalam tiga kiraan pendawaian dan penipuan mel untuk memberi dirinya dan yang lain milion dolar dalam bentuk bonus haram yang diambil dari Hollinger holdings, dan bagi menghalang keadilan berdasarkan jejak pengawasan pemindahan 13 kotak dokumen-dokumen ke luar dari pejabatnya Toronto ke rumahnya sehari selepas dia diberitahu bahawa dia sedang disiasat.

src: He was sentenced, and from March this year he began a 6 1/2-year prison term.
ref: Dia dijatuhkan bersalah, dan dia memulakan 6 1/2 tahun penggal penjara bermula Mac tahun ini.

src: The appeals panel from the United States Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit, who heard the defence attorneys' oral arguments, presented its opinion in a 16-page document in which they rejected arguments against the fraud and obstruction charges.
ref: Panel pengemuka dari Mahkamah Rayuan Amerika Syarikat untuk Litar Ketujuh, yang mana mendengar pembelaan oral peguam bela, dengan mengemukakan pendapatnya dalam dokumen 16 muka surat di mana mereka menolak bantahan ke atas tuduhan penipuan dan menghalang.

src: They noted that while the defence had presented a "no harm-no foul argument", in which it was argued that the accused were owed the money appropriated, "such arguments usually fare badly in criminal cases".
ref: Mereka mengambil kira bahawa semasa peguam bela mengemukakan "hujah tanpa mencederakan-tanpa kekasaran," ianya diragui bahawa tertuduh mempunyai wang yang seperti dinyatakan, "hujah berkenaan biasanya ditimbang tidak baik dalam kes jenayah."

src: They also dismissed claims that instructions given to the jury by the judge had been incomplete, or unclear, stating that "the defendants proposed a misleading statement as an alternative", and that in such situations the judge is allowed to stay with the original instruction, and in particular is not required "that a submitted charge be technically perfect to alert the court to the need for a particular charge".
ref: Mereka juga mengetepikan dakwaan bahawa arahan diberi kepada juri oleh hakim adalah tidak lengkap, atau tidak jelas, dengan menyatakan bahawa "defendan megusulkan kenyataan yang mengelirukan sebagai satu alternatif," dan dalam keadaan tersebut hakim dibenarkan untuk kekal dengan arahan asal, dan secara khususnya ia tidak diperlukan" utuk menghantar dakwaan yang lengkap secara teknikal untuk menyedarkan mahkamah untuk keperluan bagi dakwaan tertentu."

src: It was noted that choosing not to investigate the suspicious nature of the payments was equivalent to accepting their illegality.
ref: Ia ditekankan bahawa memilih untuk tidak menyiasat perkara yang mencurigakan adalah bayaran yang setimpal untuk menerima kesalahan mereka.

src: An argument from Black's defence regarding the obstruction charge, that in moving the documents he was not in fact escaping scrutiny, was similarly rejected, as "all that needed to be proved is that the document was concealed in order to make it unavailable in an official proceeding," according to the ruling as written by Judge Richard Posner.
ref: Alasan dari peguam bela Black berkenaan tuduhan menghalang, di mana memindahkan dokumen-dokumen bukanlah untuk lari dari penelitian, ditolak sama sekali, seperti "semua yang diperlukan untuk dibuktikan ialah dokumen disembunyikan untuk menjadikannya tidak wujud dalam prosiding rasmi," menurut keputusan yang ditulis oleh Hakim Richard Posner.

src: The February industrial disaster killed 13 people when the Imperial Sugar refinery at Port Wentworth, United States exploded.
ref: Bencana industri pada bulan Februari itu membunuh 13 orang apabila kilang penapisan Gula Imperial di Port Wentworth, Amerika Syarikat meletup.

src: This will allow access for investigators, and make way for replacement silos and a new sugar packaging building, which are scheduled to be in place by Summer 2009.
ref: Ini akan membolehkan akses untuk penyiasat, dan memberi laluan kepada penggantian silo dan sebuah bangunan pembungkusan gula yang baru, yang dijadual dilaksanakan menjelang musim panas 2009.

src: Imperial vice president Brian Harrison, who is overseeing reconstruction at the site, said of the move "Several people have indicated to me it's a passage from the old to the new and a significant sign of the progress we're making to rebuild."
ref: Naib Presiden Imperial Brian Harrison, yang menyelia pembinaan semula di tapak itu, berkata tentang langkah itu "Beberapa orang telah menyatakan kepada saya ia adalah satu saluran dari yang lama ke yang baru dan tanda besar kemajuan yang kami buat untuk membina semula."

src: Imperial brought in a crane with a bucket to retrieve this and intends to recycle it for ethanol production.
ref: Imperial membawa kren dengan baldi untuk mendapatkan semula ini dan berhasrat untuk kitar semulanya untuk pengeluaran etanol.

src: As the National Disaster Coordinating Agency continues to evaluate the reports coming from regions all over the Philippines, bodies of those who drowned or perished while at sea have started to float into the shores of islands in Central Philippines.
ref: Agensi Penyelarasan Bencana Negara terus menilai laporan yang datang dari kawasan-kawasan di seluruh Filipina, badan orang-orang yang mati lemas atau terbunuh manakala di laut telah mula terapung ke pantai pulau-pulau di Central Filipina.

src: Advanced decomposition has made identification difficult for authorities and, fearing a health epidemic, all of the bodies were immediately buried in makeshift graves.
ref: Penguraian maju telah membuat pengenalan sukar bagi pihak berkuasa dan, takut wabak kesihatan, semua mayat-mayat itu segera dikebumikan di kubur sementara.

src: The identification of the victims has caused a stir among relatives looking for their missing family members, as forensic investigators were rendered helpless in proceeding to the scattered locations where bodies have been washing ashore.
ref: Pengenalpastian mangsa telah menyebabkan kekecohan di kalangan saudara-mara mencari ahli keluarga mereka yang hilang, kerana penyiasat forensik telah diberikan tidak berdaya dalam meneruskan perjalanan ke lokasi yang bertaburan di mana mayat telah dicuci ke darat.

src: Disaster management officials in the country announced that the dead from the weekend battering from Typhoon Fengshen could reach to a high of 1,300 people nation-wide.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai pengurusan bencana di negara ini mengumumkan bahawa yang mati dari taufan hujung minggu dari Taufan Fengshen boleh mencecah ke paras tertinggi 1,300 orang di seluruh negara.

src: On board a tug boat, relatives became severely emotional after a Roman Catholic mass was celebrated to commemorate the memory of those lost at sea.
ref: Di atas sebuah kapal tunda, saudara-mara menjadi sangat emosi selepas massa Roman Katolik dirayakan untuk memperingati ingatan mereka hilang di laut.

src: Hillary Clinton appealed to her supporters to help Barack Obama and pledged that she will personally help in defeating the presidential plans of Republican presumptive Presidential candidate, Arizona senator John McCain.
ref: Hillary Clinton merayu kepada penyokong beliau untuk membantu Barack Obama dan berjanji bahawa dia sendiri akan membantu dalam mengalahkan rancangan presiden calon Presiden Republikan andaian, Arizona Senator John McCain.

src: Mrs. Clinton asked for nothing in exchange for her support of Obama, but Obama instead countered with a gesture of contributing to Mrs. Clinton campaign that is now burdened by debt.
ref: Puan Clinton meminta apa-apa dalam pertukaran untuk sokongan beliau Obama, tetapi Obama dan bukannya membalas dengan tanda menyumbang kepada kempen Puan Clinton yang kini dibebani dengan hutang.

src: The region's foreign minister said, "Georgia's aim is to destabilise the economic situation in Abkhazia."
ref: Menteri luar wilayah tersebut berkata, "Matlamat Georgia adalah untuk menjejaskan kestabilan situasi ekonomi di Abkhazia".

src: Shota Utiashvili ,an interior ministry spokesman, said, "It will be a humanitarian catastrophe if the border is closed."
ref: Shota Utiashvili, seorang jurucakap menteri dalaman, berkata, "Akan terjadi malapetaka manusia sekiranya sempadan ditutup".

src: "Thousands of Georgians in Abkhazia cross the border to get pensions, do their shopping and work".
ref: "Ribuan warga Georgia di Abkhazia merentas sempadan untuk mendapatkan pencen, membeli belah dan bekerja".

src: Russia, which is said to support the separatist forces, have peacekeeping troops within the region but this has been described as an occupying force by Georgia and Russia accused of trying to take over the region by stealth.
ref: Rusia, yang dikatakan menyokong tentera pihak pemisah, mempunyai pasukan pengaman di dalam wilayah itu tetapi ini telah disifatkan sebagai dikuasai Georgia dan Rusia dituduh cuba untuk mengambil alih wilayah tersebut secara diam-diam.

src: The border will be shut from tomorrow as security in the region is tightened.
ref: Sempadan itu akan ditutup bermula esok sebaik sahaja keselamatan wilayah itu diperketatkan.

src: A building in Iran's capital Tehran collapsed today and killed at least 19 people.
ref: Sebuah bangunan di ibu negara Iran Tehran runtuh hari ini dan membunuh sekurang-kurangnya 19 orang.

src: The victims were all labourers living inside the building, which is reported to have been in a seriously unstable condition for a month, with occupants refusing to comply with evacuation requests.
ref: Semua mangsa adalah pekerja yang tinggal di dalam bangunan itu, yang dilaporkan telah berada di dalam keadaan tidak stabil yang serius selama sebulan, dengan penghuni-penghuni enggan mematuhi permintaan untuk berpindah.

src: The early morning disaster in the Sa'adatabad district reduced the building to rubble in seconds.
ref: Bencana awal pagi itu di daerah Sa'adatabad menyebabkan bangunan itu musnah dalam beberapa saat.

src: Five people have been arrested, including the owner and contractors.
ref: Lima orang telah ditangkap, termasuk pemilik dan kontraktor.

src: Iranian state media promised that those responsible would be dealt with severely.
ref: Media kerajaan Iran berjanji bahawa mereka yang bertanggungjawab akan dikenakan tindakan tegas.

src: United States President George W. Bush today signed a bill providing $162 billion for the war efforts in Iraq and Afghanistan, which intends to fund the wars for the rest of Bush's term and well into the first year of the new President's term.
ref: Presiden Amerika Syarikat George W. Bush hari ini menandatangani rang undang-undang menyediakan $162 bilion untuk usaha-usaha perang di Iraq dan Afghanistan, yang bermaksud untuk membiayai peperangan sepanjang penggal Bush dan sehingga tahun pertama penggal Presiden baru.

src: In addition to war funds, the bill includes educational benefits for young troops and veterans, a 13-week extension of unemployment benefits, $2.7 billion in emergency relief for victims of the Midwest floods, and billions of dollars for items such as international food aid, anti-drug enforcement, and repairs of Louisiana levees.
ref: Sebagai tambahan dana perang, rang undang-undang itu termasuk manfaat pendidikan untuk angkatan tentera muda dan veteran, lanjutan 13 minggu faedah pengangguran, $2.7 bilion bantuan kecemasan untuk mangsa banjir Midwest, dan berbilion-bilion dolar untuk barang-barang seperti bantuan makanan antarabangsa, penguatkuasaan anti dadah, dan pembaikan tetambak Louisiana.

src: At a ceremony in the White House's Oval Office, Bush praised the legislation as a necessary product of bipartisanship.
ref: Pada satu majlis di Pejabat Oval Rumah Putih, Bush memuji perundangan itu sebagai produk dwipartisan yang perlu.

src: This bill shows the American people that even in an election year, Republicans and Democrats can come together to stand behind our troops and their families.
ref: Rang undang-undang ini menunjukkan rakyat Amerika bahawa walaupun pada tahun pilihan raya, Republikan dan Demokrat boleh bersatu untuk menyokong angkatan tentera kami dan keluarga mereka.

src: Although not mentioned by Bush in his statement, the bill also waives an older law that restricted America's capacity to finance the removal of nuclear weapons in North Korea.
ref: Walaupun tidak disebut oleh Bush dalam kenyataannya, rang undang-undang itu juga mengetepikan undang-undang yang lebih lama yang mengehadkan keupayaan Amerika untuk membiayai penghapusan senjata nuklear di Korea Utara.

src: The absence of the waiver could have led to an embarrassing situation where progress on dismantling North Korea's nuclear program would have been delayed because of a technicality, said Leonor Tomero of the Center for Arms Control and Non-Proliferation.
ref: Ketiadaan pengecualian itu boleh membawa kepada keadaan memalukan di mana kemajuan dalam menghapuskan program nuklear Korea Utara akan tertangguh akibat sebab teknikal, kata Leonor Tomero daripada Pusat Kawalan Senjata dan Pengawalan Senjata Nuklear.

src: North Korea was recently removed from a U.S. list of countries that sponsor terrorism, as a reward for turning over all documents relating to the country's nuclear program.
ref: Korea Utara baru-baru ini telah dikeluarkan dari senarai negara-negara A.S. yang menaja keganasan, sebagai ganjaran kerana menyerahkan semua dokumen yang berkaitan dengan program nuklear di negara tersebut.

src: For months, the Democrats and Republicans in Congress had argued over the bill, forcing several compromises to be made in the form of amendments.
ref: Selama berbulan-bulan, Demokrat dan Republikan di Kongres telah berdebat mengenai rang undang-undang itu, memaksa beberapa kompromi yang akan dibuat dalam bentuk pindaan.

src: It provides lower college tuition costs for war veterans, which was originally opposed by Bush and Senate Republicans, including Presidential candidate John McCain.
ref: Ia menyediakan kos pendidikan kolej yang lebih rendah untuk veteran perang, yang pada asalnya ditentang oleh Bush dan Senat Republikan, termasuk calon Presiden John McCain.

src: With the passing of this bill, Congress has provided $650 billion for the Iraq War effort, and nearly $200 billion for war operations in Afghanistan.
ref: Dengan kelulusan rang undang-undang ini, Kongres telah menyediakan $650 bilion untuk usaha Perang Iraq, dan hampir $200 bilion untuk operasi perang di Afghanistan.

src: Viacom, which owns several U.S. television networks such as MTV and Nickelodeon, launched a $1 billion lawsuit last year alleging that YouTube wasn't doing enough to stop its copyrighted material from appearing in over 160,000 unauthorized clips that have been viewed over 1.5 billion times.
ref: Viacom, yang memiliki beberapa rangakaian televisyen U.S. seperti MTV dan Nickelodeon, melancarkan $1 billion tuntutan mahkamah pada tahun lepas mendakwa YouTube tidak melakukan sebaiknya untuk menghentikan bahan berhakcipta daripada muncul di lebih 160,000 buah klip yang tidak dibenarkan yang mana telah ditonton lebih daripada 1.5 billion kali.

src: Google argued that this would cause privacy issues, but Stanton said it was just speculation.
ref: Google membantah kerana ini akan menyebabkan beberapa isu-isu privasi, tetapi Stanton berkata itu hanya spekulasi.

src: The Electronic Frontier Foundation, a San Francisco-based privacy advocate group, said the ruling was "a setback to privacy rights, and will allow Viacom to see what you are watching on YouTube."
ref: Yayasan Frontier Elektronik, kumpulan peguam bela hak-hak peribadi yang berpangkalan di San Francisco, berkata keputusan hakim ialah "bertentangan dengan hak privasi, dan akan membolehkan Viacom melihat apa yang anda lihat di YouTube".

src: said EFF's senior staff attorney Kurt Opsahl.
ref: kata peguam kanan EFF Kurt Opsahl.

src: Viacom had also requested for the code used to search keywords for each video and access to Google's advertising database to see if Google was receiving revenue from ads from the alleged videos, but these requests were denied by the judge, arguing that code and ad data was too valuable.
ref: Viacom juga telah memohon kod pencarian yang digunakan untuk mencari kata kunci untuk setiap video dan akses kepada pengkalan data pengiklanan Google untuk melihat samada Google mendapat pendapatan daripada iklan daripada video yang didakwa, tetapi permohonan ini dinafikan oleh hakim, mendakwa bahawa kod dan maklumat iklan adalah terlalu berharga.

src: According to reports, the government of People's Republic of China has stopped restricting access to the Chinese Wikipedia in some parts of the country starting on July 3.
ref: Menurut laporan, kerajaan People's Republic of China telah memberhentikan sekatan terhadap akses ke Wikipedia bahasa Cina di sesetengah tempat di negara itu bermula pada 3 Julai.

src: The report originated on the Wikimedia Foundation's mailing list quoting a website saying "Wikipedia Chinese version unblocked."
ref: Laporan itu berasal dari senarai mel Wikipedia Foundation yang memetik sebuah laman web mengatakan "Wikipedia versi bahasa Cina telah dibuka dari sekatan".

src: Wikinews has confirmed that the reports are accurate through discussion with people attempting to access Wikipedia from China.
ref: Wikinews mengesahkan bahawa laporan itu adalah benar melaui perbincangan dengan beberapa orang yang cuba mengakses Wikipedia dari China.

src: Despite the report, there are still some issues with accessing the site according to readers of the site.
ref: Meskipun dengan laporan sedemikian, masih terdapat beberapa isu berkenaan akses ke laman web tersebut menurut pembacanya.

src: The restriction in Beijing does not appear to cover the entire area: sources have told Wikinews the site can be accessed in many parts of Beijing.
ref: Penyekatan di Beijing tidak melibatkan kesuluruhan kawasan: sumber memberitahu Wikinews laman web itu boleh diakses di kebanyakan tempat di Beijing.

src: There has been some doubt on whether Wikipedia will remain accessible after the Olympic games.
ref: Masih terdapat keraguan sama ada Wikipedia akan kekal boleh diakses selepas sukan Olimpik.

src: The International Olympic Committee warned China in April that it wanted the internet freely accessible for the entire duration of the Olympic Summer Games.
ref: Jawatankuasa Olimpik Antarabangsa memberi amaran kepada China pada April bahawa mereka memerlukan kebebasan akses internet sepanjang tempoh Sukan Olimpik Musim Panas.

src: Unrestricted access is guaranteed to the 30,000 reporters and media staff expected for the Olympics under Beijing's 'host city contract'.
ref: Akses yang tiada sekatan dijamin kepada 30,000 wartawan dan staf media dijangka sempena Olimpik dibawah 'kontrak bandar tuan rumah'.

src: A British High Court judge has ruled that Pringles are not a potato snack and therefore not subject to a 17.5% tax.
ref: Seorang hakim Mahkamah Tinggi Britain telah memutuskan bahawa Pringles bukan snek kentang dan oleh itu tidak tertakluk kepada cukai 17.5%.

src: Justice Warren ruled that since Pringles are only 42% potato, it is exempt from VAT.
ref: Hakim Warren memutuskan bahawa kerana Pringles hanya mengandungi 42% kentang, dikecualikan daripada VAT.

src: Police are investigating a shooting on Buffalo's East Side late Saturday night which left one person in critical condition at a local hospital.
ref: Polis sedang menyiasat satu tembakan di sebelah Timur Buffalo pada malam Sabtu lepas yang mengakibatkan satu orang di dalam keadaan kritikal di hospital tempatan.

src: According to Buffalo police communications, at approximately 11:00 p.m. EDT a young male in his late teens was shot at least once in the head near 118 East Utica Street.
ref: Menurut komunikasi polis Buffalo, pada kira-kira jam 11:00 p.m. EDT seorang lelaki muda lewat belasan tahun ditembak sekurang-kurangnya sekali di kepala berdekatan Jalan 118 East Utica.

src: No other details on the suspect or his vehicle were given.
ref: Tiada apa-apa maklumat lanjut mengenai suspek ataupun kenderaannya telah diberikan.

src: Its location in an area accessible only via narrow alleys is hampering search and rescue efforts as heavy equipment such as cranes is having difficulty reaching the scene.
ref: Lokasinya yang terletak di kawasan yang dihubungi melalui lorong sempit ini menyukarkan kerja-kerja mencari dan menyelamat kerana sukar membawa alatan besar seperti jentera penyelamat ke kawasan pencarian.

src: Around 100 rescuers continue to pick through the rubble in the rain.
ref: Sekitar 100 orang pasukan penyelamat menyambung kerja mencari di runtuhan dalam keadaan hujan.

src: As of 11:00 am EDT, the Category 1 hurricane is located in the mid-Atlantic ocean, about 775 miles east of the Leeward Islands, according to the National Hurricane Center in Miami, Florida.
ref: Sehingga jam 11:00 am EDT, taufan Kategori 1 dikesan di lautan tengah Atlantik, kira-kira 775 miles arah timur Kepulauan Leeward, menurut Pusat Taufan Kebangsaan di Miami, Florida.

src: It has maximum sustained winds of 90 miles per hour, with higher gusts, and it is moving west-northwest at 15 miles per hour.
ref: Ia mempunyai angin yang berterusan maksimum 90 miles sejam, dengan tiupan angin kencang yang lebih tinggi, dan ia bergerak ke arah barat-barat laut pada 15 miles sejam.

src: The storm is expected to strengthen over the next 24 hours, with a possibility of intensifying into a Category 2 hurricane later today.
ref: Ribut itu dijangka akan bertambah kuat dalam tempoh 24 jam akan datang, dengan kemungkinan bertambah menjadi taufan Kategori 2 lewat hari ini.

src: The National Hurricane Center sees "no apparent environmental factors" to inhibit Bertha's intensification into a Category 2 storm.
ref: Pusat Taufan Kebangsaan melihat "tiada faktor-faktor alam sekitar yang jelas" untuk menghalang Bertha menjadi lebih kuat sehingga menjadi ribut Kategori 2.

src: Over the next few days, it is projected to gradually turn towards the northwest, while reducing in forward speed.
ref: Dalam beberapa hari akan datang, ia dijangka beransur-ansur menuju ke arah barat laut, di samping mengurangkan kelajuan ke hadapan.

src: The National Hurricane Center has not said whether Bertha will affect any land areas.
ref: Pusat Taufan Kebangsaan tidak berkata sama ada Bertha akan memberi kesan ke atas mana-mana kawasan tanah.

src: However, a five-day forecast map shows Bertha passing near Bermuda around Saturday.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, peta ramalan lima-hari menunjukkan Bertha melalui kawasan berhampiran Bermuda sekitar hari Sabtu.

src: "While the degree of the turn has important implications regarding potential impacts to Bermuda," the National Hurricane Center said, "it is much too early to determine if Bertha will actually threaten that island."
ref: "Walaupun darjah pertukaran arah itu mempunyai implikasi penting terhadap potensi kesan ke atas Bermuda," Pusat Taufan Kebangsaan berkata, "adalah terlalu awal untuk menentukan sama ada Bertha akan benar-benar mengancam pulau itu."

src: The Philippine shipping company Sulpicio Lines has asked a court to issue a temporary restraining order (TRO) stopping the Board of Marine Inquiry (BMI) from proceeding with its investigation into the loss of MV Princess of the Stars.
ref: Syarikat perkapalan Filipina Sulpicio Lines telah meminta mahkamah untuk mengeluarkan perintah larangan sementara (TRO) menghentikan Lembaga Siasatan Marin (BMI) daripada meneruskan siasatan ke atas kehilangan MV Princess of the Stars.

src: The passenger ferry capsised and sank off Sibuyan island on June 21 during Typhoon Fengshen (known locally as Typhhon Frank) with hundreds of casualties.
ref: Feri penumpang itu tenggelam dan karam dengan beratus-ratus mangsa berdekatan pulau Sibuyan pada 21 Jun semasa Taufan Fengshen (disebut orang tempatan sebagai Taufan Frank).

src: Sulpicio told the Manila Regional Trial Court that both Republic Act 9295 and the Domestic Shipping Development Act of 2004 removed the BMI's power to investigate maritime incidents and that the investigation the board launched on June 25 is "irregular, illegal, and null and void".
ref: Sulpicio memberitahu Perbicaraan Mahkamah Wilayah Manila bahawa kedua-dua Akta Republik 9295 dan Akta Pembangunan Perkapalan Domestik 2004 menghalang kuasa BMI untuk menyiasat insiden maritim dan siasatan lembaga yang dilancarkan pada 25 Jun adalah "tidak teratur, menyalahi undang-undang, dan tidak sah dan terbatal".

src: They say "prejudgment" has increased the "pervasive negative publicity" surrounding the line, since negative accusations are most often published in newspapers.
ref: Mereka berkata "prasangka" telah meningkatkan "publisiti negatif yang meluas" di sekitar garisan, apabila tuduhan negatif lebih kerap disiarkan dalam akhbar.

src: As a result Sulpicio is seeking ₱650,000 from the BMI.
ref: Hasilnya Sulpicio memohon ₱650,000 daripada BMI.

src: The House Committee on Transportation also launched its own inquiry into the disaster today.
ref: Jawatankuasa Dewan untuk Pengangkutan juga melancarkan siasatan sendirinya ke atas bencana itu hari ini.

src: UN Secretary General Kofi Annan fired the first UN official in connection with the Iraqi oil-for-food scandal.
ref: Setiausaha Agung UN Kofi Annan pecat pegawai UN yang pertama berkaitan dengan skandal minyak-untuk-makanan Iraq.

src: "Mr Stephanides was advised accordingly yesterday and separated from service with immediate effect.
ref: "Encik Stephanides telah dinasihatkan sewajarnya semalam dan dipisahkan daripada perkhidmatan berkuat kuasa serta merta.

src: This is a disciplinary action for a breach of staff rules regarding procurement."
ref: Ini adalah satu tindakan disiplin kerana melanggar peraturan staf mengenai perolehan".

src: He denies any wrong-doing and hired a lawyer to defend himself.
ref: Beliau menafikan sebarang salah laku dan mengupah seorang peguam untuk membela diri.

src: Aged 59, Stephanides worked for the UN for 25 years, and was due to retire in September this year.
ref: Berusia 59, Stephanides bekerja dengan UN selama 25 tahun, dan akan bersara pada bulan September tahun ini.

src: After a first food-for-oil interim report was released in February, Mr. Stephanides along with Benon Sevan were suspended.
ref: Setelah laporan makanan bagi minyak interim pertama telah dikeluarkan pada bulan Februari, Encik Stephanides bersama-sama dengan Benon Sevan digantung.

src: Sevan, the former head of the oil-for-food programme for 6 years, was also accused of breach of procurement rules in the report co-written by Paul Volcker.
ref: Sevan, bekas ketua program minyak untuk makanan selama 6 tahun, juga dituduh melanggar peraturan perolehan dalam laporan yang ditulis bersama Paul Volcker.

src: However, disciplinary measures against Sevan will not be carried out because of his status of diplomatic immunity.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, langkah-langkah tatatertib terhadap Sevan tidak akan dijalankan kerana statusnya kekebalan diplomatik.

src: In the meantime, he remains suspended from all UN duties, and is being given only a symbolic salary of one dollar a year.
ref: Dalam pada itu, beliau masih digantung daripada segala tugas UN, dan sedang diberikan hanya gaji simbolik satu dolar setahun.

src: A central and unanswered question, is whether either Stephanides or Sevan profited directly by their actions in executing and implementing the complex programme.
ref: Satu soalan pusat dan tidak dijawab, ialah sama ada sama ada Stephanides atau Sevan keuntungan secara langsung dengan perbuatan mereka dalam melaksanakan dan melaksanakan program yang kompleks.

src: The Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard has conducted a missile test exercise, in which nine missiles of three different types were launched simultaneously.
ref: Pengawal Revolusi Islam Iran telah menjalankan latihan ujian peluru berpandu, di mana sembilan peluru berpandu daripada tiga jenis yang berbeza telah dilancarkan secara serentak.

src: The exercise, known as Great Prophet III was conducted early this morning from an undisclosed location near to the Strait of Hormuz.
ref: Latihan itu, yang dikenali sebagai Great Prophet III dijalankan awal pagi tadi dari lokasi yang tidak didedahkan berhampiran Selat Hormuz.

src: The test is believed to have been a reaction to Israeli and American military exercises, which the Iranian government believed to be training for an attack on facilities related to the Iranian nuclear development programme.
ref: Ujian ini dipercayai merupakan reaksi kepada latihan ketenteraan Israel dan Amerika, dimana kerajaan Iran percaya mereka berlatih untuk serangan ke atas kemudahan yang berkaitan dengan program pembangunan nuklear Iran.

src: In addition to these tests, Iran's first indigenous satellite launch attempt, which will place the Omid spacecraft into low Earth orbit, is expected immanently.
ref: Selain ujian ini, cubaan pelancaran satelit pertama buatan Iran, yang akan menempatkan kapal angkasa Omid ke dalam orbit rendah Bumi, dijangka tidak lama lagi.

src: A successful satellite launch would demonstrate that Iran's missiles have global reach.
ref: Kejayaan pelancaran satelit ini akan menunjukkan bahawa peluru berpandu Iran mempunyai capaian global.

src: American presidential candidate John McCain suggested that it justified US proposals to construct a missile defence system in Eastern Europe, whilst his opponent Barack Obama described Iran's missile programme as a "great threat".
ref: Calon presiden Amerika John McCain mencadangkan bahawa cadangan Amerika Syarikat untuk membina sistem pertahanan peluru berpandu di Eropah Timur adalah wajar, manakala lawannya Barack Obama menyifatkan program peluru berpandu Iran sebagai "ancaman besar".

src: Russia, however called for diplomacy, stating that they believe Iran to be "ready for negotiations", and Israel's Prime Minister issued a statement saying that he had "no desire for conflict or hostilities with Iran".
ref: Rusia, bagaimanapun menggesa diplomasi, yang menyatakan bahawa mereka percaya Iran "sedia untuk rundingan," dan Perdana Menteri Israel mengeluarkan kenyataan yang mengatakan bahawa beliau "tiada keinginan untuk mempunyai konflik atau permusuhan dengan Iran".

src: At least seven United Nations peacekeepers are dead, and nearly two dozen wounded, after Janjaweed militants in Darfur, Sudan, ambushed their convoy around 11:45 GMT.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tujuh dari pasukan pengaman Pertubuhan Bangsa Bersatu terbunuh, dan hampir dua dozen cedera, selepas militia Janjaweed di Darfur, Sudan, menhendap konvoi mereka di sekitar 11:45 GMT.

src: Five of those troops were from the African nation of Rwanda.
ref: Lima daripada tentera adalah dari negara Afrika Rwanda.

src: Instead of actually protecting the civilians, they will end up not able even to protect themselves.
ref: Daripada melindungi orang awam, mereka akan berakhir tidak mampu walaupun untuk melindungi diri mereka.

src: It's going to discourage countries to contribute to the unit, which is creating problems.
ref: Ia akan mematahkan semangat negara-negara untuk menyumbang unit, di mana ia akan menimbulkan masalah.

src: The peacekeepers are part of a joint African Union-U.N. mission aimed at putting 26,000 troops in the region.
ref: Pasukan pengaman adalah sebahagian daripada Afrika bersama PBB dalam misi bertujuan untuk meletakkan 26,000 tentera di rantau ini.

src: So far only around 10,000 of that planned mission have been ordered to the region.
ref: Setakat ini hanya kira-kira 10,000 daripada misi dirancang diarah rantau ini.

src: Countries unwilling to contribute forces, and constant government restrictions from Sudan, have contributed to the slow movement of troops to the region.
ref: Negara tidak bersedia untuk menyumbang tenaga, dan sekatan kerajaan yang berterusan dari Sudan, telah menyumbang kepada pergerakan perlahan tentera ke rantau ini.

src: A car crash in the British region of Leicestershire has resulted in the deaths of six people: three men and three women.
ref: Satu kemalangan kereta di rantau British Leicestershire telah menyebabkan kematian enam orang: tiga lelaki dan tiga wanita.

src: The incident, involving a lorry and a Ford Mondeo, occurred at around 01:00 UTC today (02:00 local time) on the A607 road.
ref: Kejadian itu, yang melibatkan sebuah lori dan Ford Mondeo, berlaku pada kira-kira jam 01:00 UTC hari ini (02:00 waktu tempatan) di jalan raya A607 itu.

src: Simon Adkin of the local police said that, "the black Mondeo was travelling towards Leicester and the lorry was travelling in the opposite direction."
ref: Simon Adkin dari polis tempatan berkata, "kereta Mondeo hitam itu menuju ke arah Leicester dan lori itu bergerak dari arah yang bertentangan".

src: He announced that the police "are appealing to anyone who witnessed the incident and saw either of these vehicles beforehand to get in touch."
ref: Beliau mengumumkan bahawa polis "memohon kepada sesiapa sahaja yang menyaksikan kejadian itu dan telah melihat kedua-dua kenderaan itu sebelum ini untuk menghubungi pihak polis".

src: The driver of the Ford, who was killed in the incident, was a 23-year-old male.
ref: Pemandu kereta Ford itu, yang terbunuh dalam kejadian itu, ialah seorang lelaki berusia 23 tahun.

src: An 18-year-old man, 19-year-old woman and 18-year-old woman were also killed in the incident.
ref: Seorang lelaki berusia 18 tahun, wanita berusia 19 tahun dan wanita berusia 18 tahun juga terbunuh dalam kejadian itu.

src: The ages of the other two people are not yet known.
ref: Umur dua lagi mangsa belum dapat dipastikan.

src: As a result of the crash, the A607 is expected to remain closed for most of today.
ref: Akibat daripada kemalangan itu, A607 dijangka tutup hampir sepanjang hari ini.

src: Apple's new 3G iPhone was introduced to consumers in 21 nations on Friday, but its first sales day was marred by minimal supplies and sluggish phone activations.
ref: IPhone 3G Apple yang baru telah diperkenalkan kepada para pengguna di 21 negara pada hari Jumaat, tetapi hari jualan pertama telah dicemari oleh bekalan yang minimum dan pengaktifan telefon yang lembap.

src: Systems which enable the iPhones for service had difficulty due to network failures and insufficient capacity to meet the demand for first-day sales, particularly in the United States at Apple and AT&T stores, and in Canada.
ref: Sistem yang membolehkan iPhone untuk perkhidmatan sukar kerana kegagalan rangkaian dan kapasiti tidak mencukupi untuk memenuhi permintaan jualan hari pertama, khususnya di Amerika Syarikat di Apple dan kedai-kedai AT&T, dan di Kanada.

src: Long lineups of customers were waiting at Australian stores for the first day of iPhone sales there, where the phone is supported by Telstra, Optus and Vodafone.
ref: Barisan panjang pelanggan yang sedang menunggu di kedai-kedai Australia untuk hari pertama jualan iPhone, di mana telefon disokong oleh Telstra, Optus dan Vodafone.

src: The iPhone was sold to Canadians for the first time through Rogers Wireless stores.
ref: IPhone itu telah dijual kepada orang Kanada buat kali pertama melalui kedai Rogers Wireless.

src: Rogers has exclusive rights to the iPhone in Canada since it is the only national wireless carrier that supports the iPhone's transmission standards.
ref: Rogers mempunyai hak eksklusif terhadap iPhone di Kanada kerana ia adalah satu-satunya syarikat wayarles kebangsaan yang menyokong standard penghantaran iPhone.

src: Earlier complaints about high iPhone rates did not deter hundreds of would-be Canadian iPhone buyers who lined up hours before store opening times.
ref: Aduan sebelum ini mengenai kadar iPhone yang tinggi tidak menghalang beratus-ratus bakal pembeli iPhone Kanada yang baris berjam-jam sebelum waktu pembukaan kedai.

src: They soon learned, however, that the new phones were in short supply, and like other countries experienced delays in activating the phones.
ref: Mereka tidak lama kemudian tahu, bagaimanapun, bahawa telefon baru tidak mencukupi, dan seperti negara-negara lain mengalami kelewatan dalam mengaktifkan telefon.

src: Six people have been killed after a bus carrying Polish tourists crashed in Serbia.
ref: Enam orang telah terbunuh setelah bas yang membawa pelancong Polish berlanggar di Serbia.

src: The accident happened yesterday on a road north of Belgrade that led to Novi Sad.
ref: Kemalangan itu berlaku semalam di utara jalan Belgrade yang menghala ke arah Novi Sad.

src: The bus had been taking the tourists home after a trip to Bulgaria.
ref: Bas itu membawa pelancong pulang selepas lawatan ke Bulgaria.

src: A Reuters photograph shows the bus lying on its right side next to what appears to be a straight stretch of road.
ref: Gambar di Reuters menunjukkan bahawa bas terbalik di atas sisi kanan di sebelah apa yang dilihat sebagai jalan yang lurus.

src: There is a slight slope under the bus and its rear end appears to have reached the bottom of the drop, crushing the roof at the back of the bus.
ref: Terdapat sedikit cerun di bawah bas dan hujung belakang bas dilihat mencecah ke bahagian bawah, menghancurkan bumbung bahagian belakang bas.

src: It is not yet clear what caused the bus to swerve off the road, but as the crash occurred at 6:30 a.m. local time the driver may have fallen asleep at the wheel.
ref: Masih tidak jelas apa yang menyebabkan bas itu membelok keluar dari jalan, tetapi memandangkan nahas berlaku pada 6.30 pagi waktu tempatan pemandu kemungkinan telah tertidur.

src: There are also allegations that the double-decker bus may have been in a poor state of repair.
ref: Ada juga yang mendakwa bahawa bas dua tingkat itu mungkin berada dalam keadaan yang kurang baik.

src: The father of one victim said that the vehicle's windscreen wipers were taped together and the paintwork had been done by a brush instead of sprayed on.
ref: Bapa kepada salah seorang mangsa berkata pengelap cermin depan diikat bersama dan telah dicat dengan menggunakan berus bukannya disembur.

src: Poland supplied a military aircraft to transport relatives into Serbia.
ref: Poland menyediakan kapal terbang ketenteraan untuk membawa pihak keluarga ke Serbia.

src: New legislation has been proposed to fine violators more heavily, but has yet to be implemented.
ref: Undang-undang baru telah pun dicadangkan untuk menghukum pesalah dengan lebih berat, tetapi ia masih belum dilaksanakan.

src: On January 8, 2008 in Stephenville, Texas, one of the larger UFO sightings in the United States occurred.
ref: Pada 8 Januari 2008 di Stephenville, Texas, salah satu UFO yang lebih besar telah dilihat di Amerika Syarikat.

src: MUFON is a UFO investigative organization in the United States.
ref: MUFON adalah sebuah pertubuhan siasatan UFO di Amerika Syarikat.

src: Founded in 1969, it now has 3,000 members and is headquartered in Fort Collins, Colorado.
ref: Ditubuhkan pada tahun 1969, ia kini mempunyai 3,000 anggota dan beribu pejabat di Fort Collins, Colorado.

src: Shulze has radar experience from working at the White Sands Missile Range.
ref: Shulze mempunyai pengalaman mengenai radar kerana dia bekerja di White Sands Missile Range.

src: Powell has a chemistry degree and has extensive experience with semiconductors from working for Advanced Micro Devices.
ref: Powell mempunyai ijazah kimia dan mempunyai pengalaman yang luas berkenaan semikonduktor kerana bekerja untuk Advanced Micro Devices.

src: The report is an analysis of radar records from the Federal Aviation Administration and the National Weather Service, obtained through several Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests, and comparing them to witness accounts.
ref: Laporan itu adalah satu analisis rekod radar daripada Pentadbiran Penerbangan Persekutuan dan Perkhidmatan Cuaca Kebangsaan, yang diperolehi melalui beberapa permintaan atas Akta Kebebasan Maklumat (FOIA), dan membandingkan rekod-rekod itu dengan kenyataan-kenyataan saksi.

src: Much media attention has been focused on the report's observation that radar records show one of two objects moving directly toward the Prairie Chapel Ranch in Crawford.
ref: Banyak perhatian media telah difokuskan atas pemerhatian laporan bahawa rekod radar menunjukkan satu daripada dua objek yang bergerak terus ke arah Prairie Chapel Ranch di Crawford.

src: They did not draw any conclusion as to why such movement was observed.
ref: Mereka tidak membuat apa-apa kesimpulan mengapa pergerakan itu telah diperhatikan.

src: The authors also concluded that military air activity was heavy at the time, but that the radar records show no overt action toward the unknown object.
ref: Penulis juga membuat kesimpulan bahawa aktiviti tentera udara adalah berat pada masa itu, tetapi bahawa rekod radar menunjukkan tiada tindakan terang-terangan terhadap objek yang tidak dikenali.

src: They express concern about the possibilty that this could have been a terrorist aircraft with no transponder.
ref: Mereka menyatakan kebimbangan mengenai kemungkinan bahawa ini mungkin sebuah pesawat pengganas tanpa transponder.

src: Shulze/Powell stated that they felt that they had been stonewalled in some of their FOIA requests by some government agencies.
ref: Shulze/Powell menyatakan bahawa mereka merasakan bahawa mereka telah dihalang di beberapa permintaan FOIA mereka oleh beberapa agensi kerajaan.

src: They encouraged the government to more readily provide more information about the incident.
ref: Mereka menggalakkan kerajaan untuk membekalkan lebih banyak maklumat mengenai kejadian itu dengan lebih mudah.

src: Steve Allen, a pilot, observed the object from the ground and described it as being a half-mile with flashing strobe lights.
ref: Steve Allen, seorang juruterbang, memerhati objek itu dari tanah dan menyifatkannya sebagai sesuatu bersaiz setengah batu dengan nyalaan lampu berkelip-kelip.

src: He also said that it was pursued by two fighter jets, when it disappeared at a speed he estimated to be 3,000 mph.
ref: Dia juga berkata bahawa ia telah dikejar oleh dua jet pejuang, apabila ia hilang pada kelajuan yang dia anggar 3,000 mph.

src: Another witness was local law enforcement officer Leroy Gateman who reported it as a red glowing object suspended 3,000 feet in the air.
ref: Seorang lagi saksi adalah pegawai penguatkuasa undang-undang tempatan Leroy Gateman yang melaporkannya sebagai objek bercahaya merah yang tergantung 3,000 kaki di udara.

src: Rick Sorrells says he saw the object while deer hunting in the woods.
ref: Rick Sorrells mengatakan dia nampak objek itu semasa memburu rusa di dalam hutan.

src: He also claims that an unknown man came to his door, even once told him that,"Son we have the same caliber weapons you have, but we have more of them", after Sorrells grabbed his rifle, and, "You need to shut your mouth about what you saw."
ref: Dia juga mendakwa bahawa lelaki yang tidak dikenali datang ke pintunya, malah pernah memberitahunya bahawa, "Anak muda kita mempunyai senjata yang berkaliber yang sama seperti kamu, tetapi kami mempunyai lebih banyak senjata itua," selepas Sorrells mencapai senapangnya, dan, "Kamu harus mendiamkan diri tentang apa yang anda lihat".

src: "I'm trying to decide whether or not to open the door," Sorrells said to the Empire-Tribune.
ref: "Saya sedang memutuskan untuk membuka pintu atau tidak," Sorrells berkata kepada Empire-Tribune.

src: "That's when I realized he wanted me to see him."
ref: "Itulah waktunya saya sedar dia mahu saya berjumpa dengannya".

src: The man then turned away and walked into the woods.
ref: Lelaki itu berpaling muka dan berjalan ke dalam hutan.

src: The United States Air Force initially said witnesses must have seen reflections coming from commercial airliners.
ref: Tentera Udara Amerika Syarikat pada mulanya berkata saksi-saksi mesti telah lihat refleksi dari pesawat komersial.

src: However, they later clarified that ten F-16 Fighting Falcons had been on a night-time training mission in the area on January 8.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, mereka kemudian menjelaskan bahawa sepuluh buah F-16 Fighting Falcons telah pun dalam misi latihan pada waktu malam di kawasan tersebut pada 8 Januari.

src: According to Air Force spokesperson Karl Lewis, the aircraft were from the 457th Fighter Squadron and the error in the initial report was due to an internal communications problem between offices at the base.
ref: Menurut jurucakap Tentera Udara Karl Lewis, pesawat itu adalah dari Skuadron Pejuang ke-457 dan kesilapan dalam laporan awal adalah disebabkan oleh masalah komunikasi dalaman antara pejabat-pejabat di pangkalan.

src: A bomb explosion on a bus in Myanmar (alternatively Burma) has killed a 55-year-old man and left another man wounded.
ref: Satu letupan bom di dalam bas di Myanmar (ataupun Burma) telah membunuh seorang lelaki berusia 55 tahun dan menyebabkan seorang lagi lelaki cedera.

src: The deceased was identified only as Khant by the New Light of Myanmar, the Burmese government-owned daily newspaper.
ref: Mangsa itu hanya dikenali sebagai Khant oleh New Light of Myanmar, akhbar harian milik kerajaan Burma.

src: The bus had 35 passengers traveling from Kyaukkyi, and was near Daik Oo, some 85 miles from its destination.
ref: Bas itu mempunyai 35 penumpang dalam perjalanan dari Kyaukkyi, dan berhampiran Daik Oo, kira-kira 85 batu dari destinasinya.

src: The Co-operative Group (Co-op) and Bristol-based Somerfield today agreed on a deal worth £1.565 billion which results in Somerfield being acquired by Co-op.
ref: Co-operative Group (Co-op) dan Somerfield yang berpusat di Bristol hari ini bersetuju dengan perjanjian bernilai £1.565 bilion yang menyebabkan Somerfield diambil alih oleh Co-op.

src: Co-op has said that the acquisition took place on a "cash-free debt-free basis."
ref: Co-op telah berkata bahawa pengambilalihan itu dilakukan di atas "asas bebas hutang bebas tunai".

src: Peter Marks, chief executive of The Co-operative Group, claimed that "this is good news for consumers and for competition in the grocery market, where we will create a stronger fifth player in food and a convenience store chain with unrivalled geographic reach."
ref: Peter Marks, Ketua Eksekutif Co-operative Group, mendakwa bahawa "ini adalah berita baik untuk pengguna dan persaingan dalam pasaran runcit, di mana kita akan mewujudkan pemain kelima yang lebih kukuh dalam makanan dan rangkaian kedai serbaneka dengan jangkauan geografi yang tiada tandingan".

src: "The Co-operative Group and Somerfield have a similar focus in terms of customers, store types, product ranges and business vision."
ref: "Co-operative Group dan Somerfield mempunyai fokus yang sama dari segi pelanggan, jenis kedai, rangkaian produk dan visi perniagaan".

src: "Our shared vision of providing a high-quality and affordable convenience offer to local communities means that together we will be twice as strong, and therefore twice as able to deliver the local grocery shops British customers demand," he said.
ref: "Visi kami yang sama untuk menyediakan tawaran kemudahan yang berkualiti tinggi dan berpatutan kepada masyarakat tempatan bermakna bahawa bersama-sama kami akan menjadi dua kali lebih kuat, dan dua kali lebih mampu untuk menunaikan permintaan pelanggan kedai-kedai runcit tempatan British," katanya.

src: With 4.4% share of the market, the Co-op is the fifth largest grocery chain in the UK.
ref: Dengan 4.4% bahagian daripada pasaran, Co-op adalah rantaian runcit kelima terbesar di UK.

src: The owners of Somerfield made their wish to sell the company clear in January of this year.
ref: Pemilik Somerfield membuat hasrat mereka untuk menjual syarikat itu jelas pada bulan Januari tahun ini.

src: Co-op first expressed an interest in the purchase in April.
ref: Co-op menyatakan minat pembelian mereka buat pertama kali pada bulan April.

src: BBC News Online reported that the Competition Commission may force Co-op to sell some stores due to its increased presence.
ref: BBC News Online melaporkan bahawa Suruhanjaya Persaingan boleh memaksa Co-op untuk menjual beberapa kedai kerana kewujudannya yang semakin meningkat.

src: After its first appearance in the 3rd Division, Pavlos Melas Soccer Club finished in the 14th position and was relegated, despite its 2-1 victory over Doxa Dramas Football Club, with 36 points in 32 games.
ref: Selepas penampilan pertamanya di Divisyen ke-3, Kelab Bola Sepak Pavlos Melas mengakhiri kedudukandengan tempat ke-14 dan telah diturunkan, walaupun kemenangan 2-1 atas Kelab Bola Sepak Dramas Doxa, dengan 36 mata dalam 32 perlawanan.

src: The team from Salonika, Greece will be a serious contender for the championship in the 4th Division.
ref: Pasukan dari Salonika, Greece akan menjadi pesaing serius untuk kejohanan di Divisyen ke-4.

src: Former Olympiacos SFC player Alekos Tatsis, almost Anderlecht, Belgium's starlet, was released free by OSFC.
ref: Bekas pemain Olympiacos SFC Alekos Tatsis, hampir Anderlecht, bintang kecil Belgium, telah dibebaskan oleh OSFC.

src: Documents leaked on Wikileaks and seen by Wikinews have revealed that Cuba signed a confidential deal with Venezuela to ensure that Cuba gets access to a high speed internet connection by 2010.
ref: Dokumen yang bocor di Wikileaks dan diketahui Wikinews telah mendedahkan bahawa Cuba menandatangani perjanjian sulit dengan Venezuela bagi memastikan Cuba mendapat akses sambungan internet berkelajuan tinggi menjelang tahun 2010.

src: The document stated, in Spanish, that the countries aim to "build and operate a line of fiber optic cables between Venezuela and Cuba."
ref: Dokumen itu menyatakan, dalam bahasa Sepanyol, bahawa negara-negara bertujuan untuk "membina dan mengendalikan garis kabel gentian optik antara Venezuela dan Cuba."

src: Julian Assange, an investigative editor on Wikileaks, claimed that the information in the documents "adds weight to Cuban statements that the United States economic embargo of the island has forced it to rely on slow and expensive satellite links for Internet connectivity."
ref: Julian Assange, editor penyiasatan mengenai Wikileaks, mendakwa bahawa maklumat dalam dokumen "mempertingkatkan kepentingan kenyataan Cuba bahawa sekatan ekonomi oleh Amerika Syarikat ke atas pulau itu telah memaksanya bergantung pada hubungan satelit yang perlahan dan mahal untuk sambungan Internet."

src: The document then says that cable will "extend between two terminals located at the coast of both countries."
ref: Dokumen tersebut kemudian berkata bahawa kabel akan "disambung antara dua terminal yang terletak di pantai kedua-dua negara."

src: They base this on a fact that a cable between Cuba and Florida, which is a much shorter distance than between Cuba and Venezuela, would cost half a million dollars.
ref: Mereka mendasarkan ini pada fakta bahawa kabel antara Cuba dan Florida, yang berjarak lebih pendek daripada antara Cuba dan Venezuela, akan menelan kos setengah juta dolar.

src: The US government has prevented the building of the Florida cable.
ref: Kerajaan Amerika Syarikat telah menghalang pembinaan kabel di Florida.

src: Thai low-cost air carrier One-Two-Go Airlines has announced that it will be grounding all 16 of its aircraft immediately until September 15.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan kos rendah Thai Penerbangan One-Two-Go telah mengumumkan bahawa ia akan menghentikan penerbangan kesemua 16 pesawat dengan segera sehingga 15 September.

src: He says 70% of operating costs are taken up with fuel, and the airline has already raised fuel surcharges again by 100 baht to 850 baht per leg.
ref: Beliau berkata 70% daripada kos operasi dimakan bahan api, dan syarikat penerbangan itu telah menaikkan caj sampingan bahan api sekali lagi dari 100 baht ke 850 baht seorang.

src: He also said that the airline could return to service with ease if prices dropped, noting that, "if the situation improved with fuel prices being lowered and the profitability outlook was better, we could be airborne again."
ref: Beliau juga berkata syarikat penerbangan itu boleh kembali berkhidmat dengan mudah jika harga jatuh, menyatakan bahawa, "jika keadaan bertambah baik dengan harga bahan api diturunkan dan prospek keuntungan yang lebih baik, kita boleh kembali ke udara."

src: The airline began operations in 2003; it is a subsidiary of Orient Thai Airlines.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan itu mula beroperasi pada tahun 2003; ia adalah anak syarikat Syarikat Penerbangan Orient Thai.

src: Urdon said that a major part of the problem is that eight of the company's aircraft are MD-11s, which consume large volumes of fuel.
ref: Urdon berkata, sebahagian besar masalah ini adalah lapan pesawat syarikat jenis MD-11s syarikat itu, memerlukan jumlah yang besar bahan api.

src: He also said that a collapse of a damage limitation scheme with rivals Nok Airlines and Thai AirAsia had affected his decision.
ref: Beliau juga berkata bahawa kegagalan skim had kerosakan dengan pesaing Syarikat Penerbangan Nok dan Thai AirAsia telah menjejaskan keputusannya.

src: The news comes as the first families of victims of Flight OG269 launch legal action against the airline, as well as parent airline Orient Thai and lessor Grandmax Group.
ref: Berita itu diketahui ketika keluarga pertama mangsa Penerbangan OG269 melancarkan tindakan undang-undang terhadap syarikat penerbangan itu, dan juga syarikat penerbangan induk Orient Thai dan pemajak Kumpulan Grandmax.

src: Already confirmed to be involved in the action are Richard and Margaret Collins as well as Steve and Jean Jones, parents of Alex Collins, 22, and Bethan Jones, also 22, an unmarried Welsh couple who, a few days into a round-the-world trip, were among the 123 passengers on board.
ref: Adalah disahkan yang terlibat dalam tindakan itu adalah Richard dan Margaret Collins serta Steve Jones dan Jean, ibu bapa Alex Collins, 22, dan Bethan Jones, juga 22, pasangan Wales yang belum berkahwin, telah melancong mengelilingi dunia beberapa hari lalu, adalah antara 123 penumpang di atas pesawat tersebut.

src: Alex was reported missing but quickly confirmed to have died, while Bethan died ten days after the accident with her family at her bedside, bringing the final death toll to 90.
ref: Alex dilaporkan hilang tetapi dengan cepat disahkan telah meninggal dunia, manakala Bethan meninggal dunia sepuluh hari selepas kemalangan itu bersama keluarganya di sisi katil beliau, menjadikan jumlah kematian terakhir pada 90.

src: "We believe the air crash was completely avoidable and those responsible should be held to account."
ref: "Kami percaya nahas udara itu benar-benar boleh dielakkan dan mereka yang bertanggungjawab perlu dipertanggungjawabkan."

src: He also said that the action will be brought before courts in the United States.
ref: Beliau juga berkata, tindakan itu akan dihadapkan ke mahkamah di Amerika Syarikat.

src: He stated that he "would very much like it back" and that to him "it was absolutely priceless".
ref: Beliau menyatakan bahawa dia "berharap akan dapat semula" dan bagi beliau "ia adalah sangat tidak ternilai".

src: He is also said to have reported the theft on the Scotland Yard online reporting website, but was pessimistic about it being returned.
ref: Beliau juga menambah telah melaporkan kecurian itu dalam laporan laman web Scotland Yard, tetapi agak pesimis untuk ia dikembalikan.

src: The thieves are said to be a group of teenagers.
ref: Pencuri dikatakan adalah sekumpulan remaja.

src: Around 19,000 bicycles are reported stolen every year in London alone.
ref: Lebih kurang 19,000 basikal dilaporkan dicuri setiap tahun di London.

src: Cameron's spokesperson said he had owned the bike for five years, and used it regularly to cycle to work.
ref: Jurucakap Cameron berkata beliau telah memiliki basikal tersebut selama lima tahun, dan selalu menggunakannya ke tempat kerja.

src: She stated he was "pretty hacked off" by the theft.
ref: Dia berkata beliau "agak terperanjat" dengan kecurian itu.

src: Two bombs detonated in the Güngören district of Istanbul, Turkey Sunday evening, killing at least 17 people and wounding over 150.
ref: Dua bom diletupkan di daerah Gungoren Istanbul, Turki Ahad petang, membunuh sekurang-kurangnya 17 orang dan mecederakan lebih 150.

src: At least five of those killed were children, according to local officials.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya lima yang terbunuh adalah kanak-kanak, menurut pegawai tempatan.

src: This bombing was the worst terrorist attack in Istanbul since the 2003 Istanbul Bombings, in which truck bombs exploded outside two Istanbul synagogues, killing 23 and wounding more than 300.
ref: Pengeboman ini adalah serangan pengganas terburuk di Istanbul sejak Pengeboman Istanbul 2003, dimana bom lori meletup diluar dua rumah ibadat Istanbul, membunuh 23 dan mencederakan lebih dari 300.

src: The initial explosion caused little damage, but attracted crowds of onlookers.
ref: Letupan awal mengakibatkan kerosakan kecil, tetapi menarik sekumpulan orang ramai.

src: "But my elder son insisted on going back to find his father," said Nimet Arslan to International Herald Tribune.
ref: "Tetapi anak sulung saya bertegas untuk pergi semula untuk mencari ayahnya,"kata Nimet Arslan kepada Herald Tribune Antarabangsa.

src: Turkish President Abdullah Gül said in a statement, "Nothing can be achieved by terror, violently claiming lives of the innocent."
ref: President Turki Abdullah Gul berkata dalam satu keterangan, "tiada apa yang dapat dicapai melalui keganasan, dengan kejam mengambil nyawa yang tidak bersalah."

src: "These attacks show the inhumanity and misery of the assailants."
ref: "Keganasan ini menunjukkan tidak berperikemanusiaan dan kesengsaraan akibat serangan."

src: "Of course, there are links with the separatist organization," the governor of Istanbul province, Muammer Güler said, "It's surely a terror attack, there’s no doubt."
ref: "Sudah pasti, terdapat kaitan dengan pertubuhan pemisah," gabenor daerah Istanbul, Muammer Guler berkata, "Ianya pasti serangan pengganas, tiada keraguan."

src: Prime Minister Recep Tayyip Erdoğan visited the site on Monday, calling for calm and nationwide solidarity.
ref: Perdana Menteri Recep Tayyip Erdogan melawat tempat kejadian pada Isnin, memanggil kepada ketenangan dan perpaduan seluruh negara.

src: The Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) approved two new IEEE 1394 Firewire standards last week.
ref: Institut Kejuruteraan Elektrikal dan Elektronik (IEEE) meluluskan dua piawaian Firewire IEEE 1394 baru minggu lepas.

src: According to IEEE, the new standards are based on IEEE 1394b (FireWire 800) Standard.
ref: Menurut IEEE, piawaian baru tersebut adalah berdasarkan Piawaian IEEE 1394b (FireWire 800).

src: The new standard will allow peer-to-peer transfer without linking computers.
ref: Piawaian baru ini akan membolehkan pemindahan peer-to-peer tanpa menghubungkan komputer.

src: In addition, the S1600 and S3200 standards will continue supporting the S400 and S800 previous standards through backward compatibility.
ref: Di samping itu, piawaian S1600 dan S3200 akan terus menyokong piawaian S400 dan S800 yang sebelumnya melalui keserasian ke belakang.

src: "The new standard includes all of the amendments, enhancements and more than 100 errata which have been added to the base standard over the last 12 years," Les Baxter, chair of the working group which developed the standard, said in a press release cited in several sources.
ref: "Piawaian baru ini mengandungi semua pindaan, tambahan dan lebih daripada 100 errata yang telah ditambah kepada piawaian asas sejak 12 tahun lalu," kata Les Baxter, pengerusi kumpulan kerja yang membangunkan piawaian tersebut, dalam kenyataan akhbar yang disebut dalam beberapa sumber.

src: "This update provides developers with a single document they can rely upon for all of their application needs."
ref: "Kemas kini ini menyediakan pemaju dengan satu dokumen yang boleh mereka bergantung untuk semua keperluan permohonan mereka".

src: USB 3.0, the next generation of the competing USB standard, is due in 2010 with reported speeds of 4.8 Gbps.
ref: USB 3.0, generasi akan datang piawaian USB bersaing, disiapkan pada 2010 dengan kelajuan yang dilaporkan 4.8 Gbps.

src: It was the first Grand Prix win of Kovalainen's driving career and he became the 100th winner in Formula One history.
ref: Ia adalah Grand Prix pertama yang dimenangi oleh Kovalainen di dalam kerjaya pemanduannya dan dia menjadi pemenang ke-100 di dalam sejarah Formula Satu.

src: Ferrari driver Felipe Massa had dominated the race since the start when he overtook both McLaren front line sitters - first Kovalainen and then Lewis Hamilton.
ref: Pemandu Ferrari Felipe Massa telah menguasai perlumbaan sejak permulaan apabila dia memotong kedua-dua McLaren yang berada di barisan hadapan - pertama Kovalainen dan kemudian Lewis Hamilton.

src: During the first part of the race, Hamilton punctured his front tyre and lost more positions as well as his hopes of winning.
ref: Semasa bahagian pertama perlumbaan itu, tayar hadapan Hamilton telah pancit dan kehilangan lebih banyak tempat dan juga harapan untuk menang.

src: It seemed that Ferrari had the race in the pocket, but on the dying laps, Massa's engine was consumed by fire and he stopped on the main straight.
ref: Ferrari kelihatan seperti akan memenangi perlumbaan tetapi di dalam pusingan akhir, enjin Massa telah terbakar dan dia terhenti di bahagian lurus utama.

src: Timo Glock did a brilliant job for his Toyota team, taking the second place.
ref: Timo Glock telah menunjukkan keputusan yang baik untuk pasukan Toyotanya, dengan mendapat tempat kedua.

src: He qualified in fifth place and was in third until Massa went out.
ref: Dia layak dengan tempat kelima dan di tempat ketiga sehingga Massa terkeluar.

src: Still, his position was in danger from Kimi Räikkönen, who was racing close to Timo, but slowed down to secure his third place.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kedudukannya diancam Kimi Raikkonen, yang berlumba rapat dengan Timo, tetapi mengurangkan kelajuan untuk menjamin tempat ketiganya.

src: Ben was flown back to Britain on August 2 after a 22 hour operation to try and save his life.
ref: Ben telah diterbangkan semula ke Britain pada 2 Ogos selepas menjalani pembedahan 22 jam untuk percubaan menyelamatkan nyawanya.

src: He died at Morriston Hospital, in Swansea, Wales where he remained unresponsive.
ref: Beliau meninggal dunia di Hospital Morriston, di Swansea, Wales di mana beliau kekal tidak responsif.

src: The couple married on July 12 and later flew out to the holiday island.
ref: Pasangan itu berkahwin pada 12 Julai dan kemudiannya terbang ke pulau percutian itu.

src: Prime minister Baldwin Spencer has asked for Britain's help during the investigation.
ref: Perdana Menteri Baldwin Spencer telah meminta bantuan Britain semasa penyiasatan.

src: American celebutante and businesswoman Paris Hilton has bashed a recent presidential campaign ad by 2008 U.S. presidential hopeful John McCain in which he compared his rival Barack Obama to celebrities such as Hilton and Britney Spears.
ref: Celebutante Amerika dan ahli perniagaan Paris Hilton telah menghentam iklan kempen presiden baru-baru ini pada tahun oleh John McCain yang menaruh harapan untuk menjadi presiden Amerika Syarikat pada tahun 2008 di mana beliau membandingkan lawannya Barack Obama dengan selebriti seperti Hilton dan Britney Spears.

src: In McCain's TV ad, it was stated that Obama was "the biggest celebrity in the world."
ref: Dalam iklan TV McCain, dinyatakan bahawa Obama adalah "selebriti terbesar di dunia".

src: Hilton recorded and uploaded a video to comedy website Funny or Die, in which she mocked McCain by calling him a "wrinkly white-haired guy."
ref: Hilton merekod dan memuat naikkan sebuah video ke laman web Funny or Die, di mana dia mengejek McCain dengan memanggil dia "lelaki berkedut dan berambut putih".

src: "I am Paris Hilton, and I am a celebrity too," she states at the beginning of the video, but not before images of the Star Wars character Yoda and the cast of The Golden Girls are paraded across the screen apparently comparing the characters to McCain.
ref: "Saya Paris Hilton, dan saya seorang selebriti juga," dia menyatakan pada awal video, tetapi bukan sebelum imej watak Star Wars Yoda dan pelakon The Golden Girls diarakkan di skrin dengan jelasnya membandingkan aksara itu dengan McCain.

src: "Only I am not from the olden days, and I am not promising change like 'that other guy'."
ref: "Cuma saya bukan dari zaman dahulu, dan saya tidak menjanjikan perubahan seperti 'lelaki seorang lagi".

src: "I'm just hot," remarked Hilton, adding, "I guess I am running for president," since McCain's TV ad showed her.
ref: "Saya cuma seksi," kata Hilton, sambil menambah, "saya rasa saya sedang bertanding untuk presiden," kerana iklan TV McCain menunjukkannya.

src: McCain's advertisement, released early this week, states, "Is the biggest celebrity in the world ready to help your family?"
ref: Iklan McCain, yang dikeluarkan awal minggu ini, menyatakan, "Adakah selebriti terbesar di dunia bersedia untuk membantu keluarga anda"?

src: According to the Boston Globe and video displayed on its website, the narrator then points out that "the real Obama promises higher taxes, more government spending."
ref: Menurut Boston Globe dan video yang dipaparkan di laman webnya, pengulas itu kemudian menunjukkan bahawa "Obama menjanjikan cukai yang lebih tinggi, lebih banyak perbelanjaan kerajaan".

src: "Another day brings another dishonest attack from John McCain."
ref: "Sehari lagi membawa satu lagi serangan yang tidak jujur ​​dari John McCain".

src: "While Senator McCain knows that Senator Obama has proposed cutting taxes for 95% of American families, what he’s not telling us is that he wants to give $4 billion in tax breaks to the oil companies, continue giving tax breaks to corporations that ship our job overseas, and provide no direct tax relief for more than 100 million middle-class families."
ref: "Walaupun Senator McCain tahu bahawa Senator Obama telah mencadangkan pemotongan cukai sebanyak 95% daripada keluarga Amerika, apa yang dia tidak memberitahu kita ialah beliau mahu memberi $4 bilion pengecualian cukai kepada syarikat-syarikat minyak, terus memberi pengecualian cukai kepada syarikat-syarikat yang menghantar pekerjaan di luar negara, dan tidak memberikan pelepasan cukai secara langsung untuk lebih daripada 100 juta keluarga kelas pertengahan".

src: "And I want America to know, that I am like totally ready to lead."
ref: "Dan saya mahu Amerika untuk tahu, bahawa saya rasanya benar-benar bersedia untuk memimpin".

src: The two dominant parties of Pakistan's National Assembly have united in a coalition to impeach President Pervez Musharraf.
ref: Kedua-dua parti dominan Dewan Negara Pakistan telah bersatu dalam satu pakatan untuk mendakwa Presiden Pervez Musharraf.

src: The impeachment process is planned to start within the following week.
ref: Proses pendakwaan dirancang akan bermula dalam minggu berikutnya.

src: There have been concerns that an attempt at impeachment would result in a detrimental political battle in a country already facing political instability.
ref: Terdapat kebimbangan bahawa percubaan untuk pemecatan akan menyebabkan pertempuran politik yang memudaratkan di dalam negara yang sudah menghadapi ketidakstabilan politik.

src: A senior member of a party allied with Musharraf stated that the impeachment would "open a Pandora's box" regarding Pakistan's future.
ref: Seorang anggota kanan parti bersekutu dengan Musharraf menyatakan bahawa pendakwaan itu akan "membuka kotak Pandora" mengenai masa depan Pakistan.

src: Once the impeachment process begins, the coalition will need to muster a required two-thirds majority in order to successfully impeach Musharraf.
ref: Sebaik sahaja proses pendakwaan bermula, gabungan itu perlu mengumpul majoriti dua pertiga yang diperlukan untuk berjaya mendakwa Musharraf.

src: Musharraf has canceled his trip to the Beijing Olympics so that he can focus on planning a response to the coalition.
ref: Musharraf telah membatalkan lawatannya ke Sukan Olimpik Beijing supaya dia boleh memberi tumpuan kepada perancangan tindak balas kepada gabungan itu.

src: After two weeks of illness, Juan Bustos, the president of the Chamber of Deputies of Chile, died at 10:46 local time (14:46 UTC) yesterday.
ref: Dua minggu selepas sakit, Juan Bustos, presiden Dewan Perwakilan Chile, meninggal dunia pada 10:46 waktu tempatan ( 14:46 UTC) semalam.

src: At the time of his death, Bustos was with his wife and five of his seven children, who were deeply upset by the death.
ref: Pada masa kematiannya, Bustos bersama isterinya dan lima daripada tujuh anaknya, yang amat sedih dengan kematian beliau.

src: The other two children are expected to arrive from Europe soon to attend the funeral.
ref: Kedua-dua anak yang lain dijangka akan sampai dari Eropah tidak lama lagi untuk menghadiri pengebumian itu.

src: In addition, the flags at many government buildings are being flown at half mast to mark the death.
ref: Di samping itu, bendera-bendera di banyak bangunan-bangunan kerajaan diterbangkan separuh tiang untuk memberi kehormatan ata kematiannya.

src: The body has been moved to the former National Congress building so that the body can be guarded until the state funeral, which takes place at 11:00 local time tomorrow.
ref: Mayatnya telah dipindahkan ke bangunan bekas Kongres Kebangsaan supaya ia dapat dijaga sehingga pengebumian rasmi itu, yang dijadualkan pada jam 11:00 waktu tempatan esok.

src: After the state funeral, a private funeral for the family will take place.
ref: Selepas pengebumian rasmi ini, upacara pengebumian peribadi untuk keluarganya akan dijalankan.

src: After an investigation of allegations that Islam's holy book the Qu'ran was mishandled in front of inmates at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, the Bush administration has acknowledged the credibility of some of these reports.
ref: Selepas siasatan terhadap dakwaan bahawa kitab suci Islam al-Quran telah disalahgunakan di hadapan tahanan-tahanan di Teluk Guantanamo, Cuba, pentadbiran Bush telah mengakui kesahihan beberapa laporan tersebut.

src: According to Robert Burns of the Associated Press, U.S. military officials acknowledged that, "a Muslim holy book was splashed with urine," and "a detainee's Quran was deliberately kicked and another's was stepped on."
ref: Menurut Robert Burns daripada Persekutuan Akhbar, pegawai tentera U.S. mengakui bahawa, "kitab suci Islam telah disimbah dengan air kencing," dan "Al-Quran salah seorang tahanan disepak dengan sengaja dan satu lagi dipijak".

src: White House Press Secretary Scott McClellan criticized Newsweek's initial response to the incident, saying it was "puzzling."
ref: Setiausaha Akhbar Rumah Putih, Scott McClellan mengkritik respon awal Newsweek terhadap kejadian itu, berkata ia adalah "mengelirukan".

src: Later that day, Newsweek retracted the story, which the White House said was a "good first step".
ref: Lewat hari itu, Newsweek menarik balik cerita itu, yang mana Rumah Putih menyifatkan adalah "langkah pertama yang baik".

src: On May 20, the International Red Cross (IRC) revealed in a rare public announcement that it had documented and reported to the United States credible information concerning desecration of the Qur'an by Guantanamo Bay personnel.
ref: Pada 20 Mei, Persatuan Palang Merah Antarabangsa (IRC) mendedahkan dalam satu pengumuman awam yang jarang bahawa ia telah mendokumenkan dan melaporkan kepada Amerika Syarikat maklumat yang boleh dipercayai mengenai penodaan Al-Quran oleh kakitangan Teluk Guantanamo.

src: Pentagon spokesman Bryan Whitman, acknowledged that allegations were made on "rare occasions" but were uncorroborated.
ref: Jurucakap Pentagon, Bryan Whitman, mengakui bahawa dakwaan itu telah dibuat pada "waktu janggal" tetapi tiada bukti sokongan.

src: Simon Schorno, a Red Cross spokesman, disputed the Pentagon's denial saying, "All information we received were corroborated allegations."
ref: Simon Schorno, jurucakap Palang Merah, mempertikaikan penafian Pentagon itu dan berkata: "Semua maklumat yang kami terima telah menyokong dakwaan tersebut".

src: McClellan said, "Look, this report caused serious damage to the image of the United States abroad."
ref: McClellan berkata: "Lihat, laporan ini menyebabkan kerosakan yang serius ke atas imej Amerika Syarikat di luar negara".

src: "We appreciate the step that they took by retracting the story."
ref: "Kami menghargai langkah yang mereka ambil dengan menarik balik cerita".

src: "Now we would encourage them to move forward and do all that they can to help repair the damage that has been done by this report."
ref: "Sekarang kami akan menggalakkan mereka untuk maju ke hadapan dan melakukan semua yang mereka boleh untuk membantu membaiki kerosakan yang telah dilakukan oleh laporan ini".

src: On May 25, Amnesty International called for the shutdown on Guantanamo Bay due to numerous human rights violations, saying "The 'war on terror' appeared more effective in eroding international human rights principles than in countering international 'terrorism'."
ref: Pada 25 Mei, Amnesti Antarabangsa menggesa penutupan Teluk Guantanamo berikutan pencabulan banyak hak asasi manusia, dengan berkata "bahawa 'perang terhadap keganasan'menunjukkan lebih keberkesanan dalam menghakis prinsip-prinsip hak asasi manusia antarabangsa berbanding dalam menangani 'keganasan' antarabangsa".

src: The IRC has said it reported to the U.S. government detainee's reports of desecration of the Qur'an.
ref: IRC berkata ia melaporkan kepada laporan tahanan kerajaan U.S. tentang penodaan al-Quran.

src: White House spokesman Scott McClellan responded saying the report's allegations were "ridiculous and unsupported by the facts."
ref: Jurucakap Rumah Putih, Scott McClellan membalas dengan berkata dakwaan laporan itu adalah "tidak masuk akal dan tidak disokong oleh fakta-fakta".

src: "We have worked to advance freedom and democracy in the world so that people are governed under a rule of law and that there are... protections in place for minority rights, that women's rights are advanced so that women can fully participate in societies where now they cannot", as well as supporting the fight against AIDS in Africa.
ref: "Kami telah berusaha untuk memajukan kebebasan dan demokrasi di dunia supaya rakyat ditadbir di bawah kedaulatan undang-undang dan bahawa terdapat...tempat untuk perlindungan hak-hak minoriti, yang hak-hak wanita akan dimajukan supaya wanita boleh mengambil bahagian sepenuhnya dalam masyarakat di mana sekarang mereka tidak boleh", serta menyokong usaha memerangi AIDS di Afrika.

src: On May 31, U.S. President George W. Bush dismissed the human rights report as "absurd" for its harsh criticism of U.S. treatment of terrorist suspects at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, saying the allegations were made by prisoners "who hate America."
ref: Pada 31 Mei, Presiden U.S. George W. Bush menolak laporan hak asasi manusia sebagai "tidak masuk akal" untuk kritikan kerasnya mengenai layanan U.S. terhadap suspek pengganas di Teluk Guantanamo, Cuba, berkata dakwaan itu telah dibuat oleh banduan "yang membenci Amerika".

src: "The United States is a country that promotes freedom around the world," Bush said of the Amnesty International report.
ref: "Amerika Syarikat adalah sebuah negara yang menggalakkan kebebasan di seluruh dunia," kata Bush dalam laporan Amnesti Antarabangsa.

src: William F. Schulz, executive director of Amnesty International USA, defended the report, saying, "What is 'absurd' is President Bush's attempt to deny the deliberate policies of his administration."
ref: William F. Schulz, Pengarah Eksekutif Amnesti Antarabangsa USA, mempertahankan laporan itu, katanya: "Apa yang 'tidak masuk akal'adalah percubaan Presiden Bush untuk menafikan dasar yang disengajakan dalam pentadbiran beliau".

src: And, on Friday, the U.S. military released the results of their investigation and confirmed that in 5 separate incidents, American guards at the Guantánamo Bay prison "mishandled" the Islamic holy book.
ref: Dan, pada hari Jumaat, tentera U.S. mengeluarkan keputusan siasatan mereka dan mengesahkan bahawa dalam 5 kejadian berasingan, pengawal penjara Amerika di Teluk Guantanamo "menyalahgunakan" kitab suci Islam.

src: However, they stress that guards were usually "respectful" of the Qur'an.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, mereka menegaskan bahawa pengawal biasaanya "menghormati" al-Quran.

src: He said that the inquiry did not find any evidence supporting this particular allegation.
ref: Dia berkata, siasatan tidak menemui sebarang bukti yang menyokong dakwaan berkenaan.

src: "The inquiry found no credible evidence that a member of the Joint Task Force at Guantanamo Bay ever flushed a Qur'an down a toilet."
ref: "Siasatan itu mendapati tiada bukti yang boleh dipercayai bahawa seorang ahli Pasukan Petugas Bersama di Guantanamo Bay pernah membuang al-Quran ke dalam tandas".

src: On Saturday Mikheil Saakashvili, the President of Georgia, called for a ceasefire in the South Ossetia war.
ref: Pada Sabtu yang lalu Mikheil Saakashvili, Presiden Georgia, telah memanggil untuk membuat gencatan senjata di perang Selatan Ossetia.

src: "Russia has launched a full scale military invasion of Georgia."
ref: "Rusia telah melancarkan serangan ketenteraan secara keseluruhan terhadap Georgia".

src: After calling for the ceasefire Saakashvili continued by saying that "I am willing to have international mediation; I am willing to have international separation of forces; we have to establish normal regime under international supervision."
ref: Setelah Saakashvili memanggil untuk gencatan senjata, beliau menyambung "Saya bersedia untuk mempunyai perantaraan antarabangsa; saya bersedia untuk mengadakan pengasingan kuasa-kuasa antarabangsa; kita perlu menubuhkan rejim biasa dibawah pengawasan antarabangsa".

src: Russian President Dmitry Medvedev stated his position regarding the ending of the conflict in a phone call with Federal Chancellor of Germany Angela Merkel: "The only possible and reasonable way out of this situation is the withdrawal of Georgian troops to their initial positions and the immediate signing of a legally binding agreement on the non-use of force."
