ref: Presiden Rusia Dmitry Medvedev menyatakan kedudukan beliau mengenai pengakhiran konflik ini melalui perbualan telefon dengan Canselor Persekutuan Jerman Angela Markel: "Satu-satunya cara yang mustahil dan munasabah unutk keluar dari keadaan ini ialah dengan pengunduran pasukan tentera Georgia kepada kedudukan asal dan menandatangani perjanjian serta-merta yang terikat dengan undang-undang tentang tidak menggunakan kekerasan".

src: He reiterated much the same position in telephone conversation with the President of the United States, George W. Bush, today.
ref: Beliau menegaskan perkara yang sama tentang kedudukan beliau dalam perbualan telefon dengan Presiden Amerika Syarikat, George W. Bush, hari ini.

src: "I have signed a decree on a state of war."
ref: "Saya telah menandatangani perintah berperang di dalam negeri".

src: "Georgia is under a state of total military aggression by the Russian navy, air force, large-scale ground operations," he said in a televised meeting that was broadcast on national television.
ref: "Georgia ialah negeri dibawah penguasaan penuh oleh tentera laut Rusia, tentera udara, operasi darat berskala besar," kata beliau dalam mesyuarat yang disiarkan di televisyen dan disiarkan di stesen televisyen kebangsaan.

src: The crisis broke out after days of heavy fighting in the region.
ref: Krisis itu tercetus selepas beberapa hari perperangan besar di wilayah terbabit.

src: On August 7, Georgian troops launched an offensive against the Ossetian town of Tskhinvali.
ref: Pada 7 Ogos, pasukan tentera Georgia melancarkan serangan terhadap Bandar Ossetia di Tskhinvali.

src: According to the Russian Presidents office, drinking water is no longer available in what constitutes South Ossetia's capital, Tskhinvali, because "the water and sewage treatment plants have been destroyed".
ref: Menurut Pejabat Presiden Rusia, air minuman tidak boleh didapati di ibu negeri Selatan Ossetia, Tskhinvali, kerana "takungan air dan rawatan kumbahan telah dimusnahkan".

src: It is further stated that 30,000 people have left South Ossetia to seek refuge in Russia in the last 36 hours alone; and that preparations are underway to provide tented and permanent accommodation for these.
ref: Dianggarkan hampir 30,000 orang telah meninggalkan Selatan Ossetia untuk mencari perlindungan di Rusia dalam masa 36 jam yang lalu; dan persiapan sedang dijalankan untuk menyediakan khemah dan penempatan tetap untuk ini.

src: South Ossetia is a former province of Georgia that broke away from Georgia and declared its independence on November 28, 1991.
ref: Selatan Ossetia ialah bekas wilayah Georgia yang telah telah berpisah dari Georgia dan mengisyitiharkan kemerdekaan pada 28 November 1991.

src: At least three people are dead after two small planes collided in a remote area of Wyoming in the United States.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tiga orang mati selepas dua pesawat kecil bertembung di kawasan terpencil di Wyoming di Amerika Syarikat.

src: The collision occurred between a Cirrus SR22 and a Cessna 172 near Rock Springs just before 12:30 p.m. on Sunday afternoon.
ref: Kemalangan itu berlaku antara Cirrus SR22 dan Cessna 172 berhampiran Rock Springs sebelum jam 12:30 tengahari pada petang Ahad.

src: The Cirrus was carrying two people, both of whom died, and was traveling from Polson, Montana to Rock Springs.
ref: Cirrus membawa dua orang, kedua-duanya meninggal dunia, dan sedang dalam perjalanan dari Polson, Montana ke Rock Springs.

src: On Monday, Russian troops advanced roughly 25 miles into Georgia.
ref: Pada hari Isnin, tentera Russia mara kira-kira 25 batu ke Georgia.

src: The Russian Defence department has stated that the push into Georgian territory was necessary because of the continued attacks by the Georgian troops in South Ossetia.
ref: Jabatan Pertahanan Rusia telah menyatakan bahawa kemaraan ke wilayah Georgia adalah perlu kerana serangan berterusan oleh angkatan tentera Georgia di Selatan Ossetia.

src: A spokesman from the Georgian Interior ministry said that Russian units had also taken control of the town of Zugdidi.
ref: Jurucakap Kementerian Dalam Negeri Georgia berkata unit Rusia juga telah mengambil alih bandar Zugdidi.

src: Dmitry Medvedev, the President of Russia, stated that "the enforced detention of Russian citizens in Georgia is an unacceptable situation and in complete violation of international law," according to a press release published by the Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs.
ref: Dmitry Medvedev, Presiden Rusia, menyatakan bahawa "penguatkuasaan penahanan rakyat Rusia di Georgia adalah situasi yang tidak boleh diterima dan memang melanggar undang-undang antarabangsa," menurut kenyataan akhbar yang diterbitkan oleh Kementerian Luar Negeri Rusia.

src: Georgian sources confirmed the announcement, stating that the base had been destroyed.
ref: Sumber Georgia mengesahkan pengumuman itu, yang menyatakan bahawa pangkalan itu telah dimusnahkan.

src: Both the town of Senaki and Zugdidi lie in Georgia proper, outside the "security zone" around the region of Abkhazia.
ref: Kedua-dua bandar Senaki dan Zugdidi terletak di kedudukan Georgia yang betul, di luar "zon keselamatan" sekitar kawasan Abkhazia.

src: There has been increasing pressure by foreign powers for a ceasefire in the South Ossetian conflict.
ref: Ada juga peningkatan tekanan oleh kuasa-kuasa asing untuk gencatan senjata dalam konflik di Selatan Ossetia.

src: Mikhail Saakashvili, the President of Georgia signed a European Union supported ceasefire, but it was not accepted by Russia.
ref: Mikhail Saakashvili, Presiden Georgia menandatangani sokongan gencatan senjata Kesatuan Eropah, tetapi ia tidak diterima oleh Rusia.

src: The crisis broke out after days of fighting between Georgian forces and Ossetian separatist units.
ref: Krisis ini tercetus selepas hari pertempuran antara tentera Georgia dan unit pemisah Ossetia.

src: On August 10th, Russian Black Sea Fleet began a naval blockade of Georgian port of Poti and landed several thousand Russian troops in Abkhazia in western Georgia.
ref: Pada 10 Ogos, Armada Laut Hitam Rusia memulakan sekatan laut di pelabuhan Georgia di Poti dan menempatkan beberapa ribu orang tentera Rusia di Abkhazia di barat Georgia.

src: Ukraine threatened to bar Russian warships dispatched to the Abkhazian coast from returning to their Ukrainian base of Sevastopol if they engage in any military action.
ref: Ukraine mengancam untuk menyekat kapal perang Rusia yang dihantar ke pantai Abkhazia daripada kembali ke pangkalan Ukraine di Sevastopol mereka sekiranya mereka terlibat dalam sebarang tindakan ketenteraan.

src: The suspect is Tim Johnson, a white male, described by Gwatney's secretary as wearing "khaki pants, white shirt, silver-gray hair, late 40s."
ref: Suspek adalah Tim Johnson, seorang lelaki kulit putih, digambarkan oleh setiausaha Gwatney sebagai memakai "seluar khaki, kemeja putih, rambut putih, berumur lewat 40-an".

src: The end result was the shooting of the suspect, who was airlifted to a hospital and eventually died of his wounds.
ref: Akhirnya, suspek ditembak, dan diterbangkan ke hospital dan mati disebabkan kecederaannya.

src: According to The New York Times, Bill Clinton and Hillary Clinton issued a joint statement saying, "We are stunned and shaken by today's shooting at the Arkansas Democratic Party where our good friend and fellow Democrat Bill Gwatney was critically wounded ... Bill is not only a strong chairman of Arkansas' Democratic Party, but he is also a cherished friend and confidante."
ref: Menurut The New York Times, Bill Clinton dan Hillary Clinton membuat kenyataan bersama dan berkata, "Kami terkejut dan tergamam dengan tembakan hari ini di Parti Demokratik Arkansas di mana rakan baik kami dan ahli Demokrat Bill Gwatney telah cedera parah... Bill bukan sahaja seorang pengerusi Parti Demokratik Arkansas'yang kuat, beliau juga rakan dan tempat mengadu yang disayangi".

src: Gwatney was also a car dealership owner and former state senator.
ref: Gwatney juga adalah pemilik perniagaan kereta dan bekas ahli senat negeri.

src: On August 11, United States Senator and 2008 presidential Republican candidate John McCain gave a speech regarding the crisis between Georgia and Russia.
ref: Pada 11 Ogos, Senator Amerika Syarikat dan calon presiden 2008 Republikan John McCain memberi ucapan mengenai krisis antara Georgia dan Rusia.

src: Following the speech, a regular Wikipedia editor noticed that his speech was very similar to an article on Wikipedia also regarding the crisis, in what could be considered plagiarism.
ref: Berikutan ucapan itu, editor tetap Wikipedia sedar bahawa ucapannya adalah hampir sama dengan sebuah artikel di Wikipedia berkenaan krisis itu, berertinya ia boleh dianggap plagiarisme.

src: McCain continued his speech saying, "Georgia is an ancient country, at the crossroads of Eastern Europe and Central Asia, and one of the world’s first nations to adopt Christianity as an official religion.
ref: McCain teruskan ucapannya dengan berkata, "Georgia adalah sebuah negara purba, di persimpangan Eropah Timur dan Asia Tengah, dan salah satu daripada negara pertama di dunia untuk menerima agama Kristian sebagai agama rasmi.

src: As the Soviet Union crumbled at the end of the Cold War, Georgia regained its independence in 1991, but its early years were marked by instability, corruption, and economic crises."
ref: Semasa Kesatuan Soviet runtuh pada akhir Perang Dingin, Georgia mendapat semula kemerdekaannya pada tahun 1991, tetapi tahun-tahun awalnya telah ditandai oleh ketidakstabilan, rasuah, dan krisis ekonomi."

src: Not only did he notice the similarities, but after reading through the article's edit history, 'Killing Vector' noticed that his speech might have been lifted from Wikipedia, with some of the material in McCain's speech dating prior to the start of the Georgian and Russian crisis.
ref: Bukan sahaja dia meyedari persamaan-persamaan itu, tetapi selepas membaca suntingan artikel sejarah, 'Killing Vektor' sedar bahawa ucapannya mungkin telah dipetik dari Wikipedia, dengan beberapa bahan dalam ucapan McCain yang bertarikh sebelum permulaan krisis Georgia dan Rusia.

src: The paragraphs which discussed the history of Georgia simply didn't fit with the rest of the speech; the rhetorical style was jarringly different.
ref: Perenggan-perenggan yang membincangkan sejarah Georgia begitu tidak sesuai dengan seluruh ucapan; gaya retorik berbeza amat sekali.

src: I figured, where's someone in a hurry going to get basic information on the Republic of Georgia?"
ref: Saya rasa, "dari mana seseorang tergesa-gesa pergi untuk mendapatkan maklumat asas mengenai Republik Georgia?"

src: I opened up Wikipedia, went to the article, picked a recent but not current revision more or less at random (July 24th), and hit gold on the first try; McCain's speech and the Wikipedia article had significant strings of words in common, emphasized the same events, made largely the same word choices," Vector said to Wikinews.
ref: Saya membuka Wikipedia, pergi ke artikel itu, memilih edisi yang baru tetapi bukan terbaru lebih kurang secara rawak (24 Julai), dan mendapat jawapan pada percubaan pertama; ucapan McCain dan artikel Wikipedia mempunyai kebanyakan perkataan yang sama, menekankan peristiwa yang sama, yang dibuat sebahagian besarnya menggunakan pilihan perkataan yang sama," kata Vektor kepada Wikinews.

src: Although other media outlets reported the alleged plagiarism, the two passages below were dated at least one week prior to the Georgian and Russian crisis.
ref: Walaupun media lain melaporkan plagiarisme yang dikatakan itu, kedua-dua petikan di bawah bertarikh sekurang-kurangnya satu minggu sebelum krisis Georgia dan Rusia berlaku.

src: The first two paragraphs of McCain's speech appear to resemble the Wikipedia article in the history dated July 24, 2008.
ref: Dua perenggan yang pertama dalam ucapan McCain nampaknya menyerupai artikel Wikipedia dalam sejarah yang bertarikh 24 Julai 2008.

src: Those two paragraphs constitute the entire factual background of the speech, though — the rest is reaction and proposed policy, added Vector.
ref: Kedua-dua perenggan itu membentuk latar belakang fakta keseluruhan ucapan itu, walaupun - selebihnya adalah reaksi dan dasar cadangan, tambah Vektor.

src: There are only so many ways to state basic historical facts and dates and that any similarities to Wikipedia were only coincidental," said a spokesman for the McCain campaign, Brian Rogers to The Politico.
ref: "Ada begitu banyak cara untuk menyatakan fakta asas sejarah dan tarikh dan apa-apa persamaan dengan Wikipedia hanyalah kebetulan," kata seorang jurucakap kempen McCain itu, Brian Rogers kepada The Politico.

src: Wikinews contacted McCain's campaign, but has yet to receive a response.
ref: Wikinews menghubungi kempen McCain, tetapi masih belum menerima sebarang jawapan.

src: Wikinews e-mailed Jay Walsh, the director of communications for the Wikimedia Foundation to see what they thought of the situation, and what if anything they planned to do about it.
ref: Wikinews menghantar e-mel kepada Jay Walsh, pengarah komunikasi untuk Yayasan Wikimedia untuk mengetahui apa yang mereka fikir tentang keadaan itu, dan jika apa-apa yang mereka merancang untuk lakukan.

src: "We aren't particularly concerned with this", said Walsh who also added that "I'm only aware of this situation through media coverage I've seen, nor do we or I have any in-depth detail about the situation."
ref: "Kami tidak begitu mengambil berat tentang ini," kata Walsh yang juga menambah bahawa "Saya hanya menyedari keadaan ini melalui liputan media yang saya lihat, dan tidak pula kami atau saya mempunyai sebarang maklumat terperinci yang mendalam tentang keadaan itu."

src: Obviously when it's a matter of copyright then there are legal considerations, but the Foundation is not able to examine individual cases, added Walsh.
ref: Jelas sekali apabila ia adalah satu isu hak cipta maka adalah jadi pertimbangan undang-undang, tetapi Yayasan itu tidak dapat memeriksa kes-kes individu, kata Walsh.

src: The truce was signed by Saakashvili on Friday, after a meeting with US Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice.
ref: Genjatan senjata telah ditandatangani oleh Saakashvili pada Jumaat, selepas mesyuarat dengan Setiausaha US di Negeri Condoleezza Rice.

src: "We need to do our utmost to deter such behaviour in the future."
ref: "Kita perlu melakukan yang sebaik mungkin untuk menghalang tindakan seperti itu di masa hadapan".

src: By signing the agreement, both sides agree to pull back their forces to pre-conflict positions.
ref: Dengan menandatangani perjanjian tersebut, kedua-dua belah pihak bersetuju untuk menarik semula tentera mereka dari kedudukan pra-konflik.

src: The accord allows certain concessions to both Georgia and Russia.
ref: Perjanjian itu membenarkan beberapa konsesi kepada kedua-dua Georgia dan Rusia.

src: Initially Medvedev said that he had ordered Russian troops to begin leaving Georgia on August 11.
ref: Pada awalnya Medvedev memberitahu bahawa beliau telah mengarahkan tentera Russia supaya mula meninggalkan Georgia pada 11 Ogos.

src: Lavrov also said Russia would strengthen its contingent in South Ossetia.
ref: Lavrov juga berkata Rusia akan menguatkan kontijennya di Ossetia Selatan.

src: According to Sarkozy, these additional measures refer to the border area only.
ref: Mengikut kepada Sarkozy, ukuran tambahan itu merujuk kepada kawasan sempadan sahaja.

src: At the same time Georgian internal affairs ministry reported that Russian forces changed the administrative borders of Abkhazia, and captured one of the Georgian power plants in the area.
ref: Pada masa yang sama menteri hubungan dalaman Georgia melaporkan bahawa tentera Rusia mengubah sempadan pentadbiran di Abkhazia, dan menawan satu daripada kawasan pelan janakuasa Georgia.

src: Ms. Graham bought them in a Sue Ryder charity shop after seeing a member of Thatcher's staff drop them in the shop.
ref: Puan Graham membeli kasut itu di kedai pertubuhan amal Sue Ryder selepas menemui ahli pekerja Thatcher yang jatuhkannya di dalam kedai.

src: She guessed that they would increase in value over the years, so Ms. Graham purchased them.
ref: Beliau menjangkakan bahawa harganya akan meningkat merentasi tahun, jadi Puan Graham membeli kasut tersebut.

src: United States Presidential candidates Senators Barack Obama and John McCain each participated in a live forum broadcast from Saddleback Church in Lake Forest.
ref: Calon Presiden Amerika Syarikat Senator Barack Obama dan John McCain masing-masing mengambil bahagian dalam forum siaran langsung dari Gereja Saddleback di Lake Forest.

src: During the forum the candidates were each individually asked a series of identical questions by the pastor, with Senator Barack Obama going first and Senator John McCain taking his turn second.
ref: Dalam forum itu calon-calon masing-masing secara berasingan dipertanya beberapa soalan yang serupa oleh paderi itu, dengan Senator Barack Obama di tempat pertama dan Senator John McCain mengambil giliran keduanya.

src: Senator McCain traveled to the church and waited in a green room while Obama was speaking, and by agreement did not listen to the questions or Senator Obama's responses.
ref: Senator McCain pergi ke gereja dan menunggu di dalam bilik hijau semasa Obama bercakap, dan dengan persetujuan tidak mendengar soalan-soalan atau jawapan Senator Obama.

src: When asked whom they believed were the three wisest people to rely on as president, Obama answered that his wife and grandmother were at the top of his list along with a mix of Republican and Democratic Senators.
ref: Apabila ditanya siapa yang mereka percaya untuk percaya pada sebagai orang yang paling pintar sebagai presiden, Obama menjawab isterinya dan neneknya di bahagian paling atas senarai beliau bersama-sama dengan campuran Senator Parti Republik dan Demokrasi.

src: McCain comprised his list of a range of people: the architect of the troop surge in Iraq, General David Petraeus; Democratic Congressman and civil rights leader John Lewis; and the former CEO of eBay, Meg Whitman.
ref: McCain membentuk senarainya daripada pelbagai jenis orang, arkitek pembangunan angkatan tentera di Iraq, Jeneral David Petraeus; Ahli Kongres Demokratik dan pemimpin hak sivil John Lewis; dan bekas Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif eBay, Meg Whitman.

src: In response to being questioned about their toughest decisions in life, Obama answered that deciding to oppose the Iraq War in 2002 was his toughest, while McCain cited his refusal to leave his men behind in a POW camp in Vietnam when given the chance.
ref: Sebagai tindak balas terhadap disoal tentang keputusan paling sukar dalam kehidupan mereka, Obama menjawab bahawa memutuskan untuk menentang Perang Iraq pada tahun 2002 adalah yang paling sukar, manakala McCain menamakan keengganannya untuk meninggalkan pasukannya di belakang dalam kem tawanan perang di Vietnam apabila dia diberi peluang sedemikian.

src: On some philosophical questions the candidates differed in their moral stances.
ref: Dalam beberapa soalan falsafah calon-calon itu berbeza dalam pendirian moral mereka.

src: McCain related it to radical Islamic extremism relaying that he believed evil should be "defeated."
ref: McCain mengaitkannya dengan fahaman lampau radikal Islam yang beliau percaya kejahatan harus "dikalahkan".

src: They both answered that the biggest moral dilemmas in their lives were personal mistakes they had made when they were younger.
ref: Mereka berdua menjawab bahawa dilema moral yang paling besar dalam kehidupan mereka adalah kesilapan peribadi yang mereka telah lakukan ketika mereka masih muda.

src: For Obama, it was his drug use, for McCain it was his failed first marriage.
ref: Untuk Obama, ia adalah penggunaan dadahnya, sementara McCain adalah perkahwinannya pertamanya yang gagal.

src: According to Chaindrawa, Saakashvili's government bears little resemblance to a democracy.
ref: Menurut Chaindrawa, kerajaan Saakashvili menanggung hanya sedikit persamaan dengan demokrasi.

src: Rather, Chaindrawa claims that the government of Georgia is an authoritarian regime that suppresses civil liberties and the freedom of the press, similar to the Russian government policies of Vladimir Putin.
ref: Sebaliknya, Chaindrawa mendakwa bahawa kerajaan Georgia ialah rejim autoritarian yang menekan kebebasan awam dan kebebasan akhbar, sama dengan dasar-dasar kerajaan Rusia Vladimir Putin.

src: Chaindrawa states that Saakashvili tried to close down an independent TV station (Imelda TV), declared a state of emergency in 2007 against mass protests of the opposition, and committed election fraud.
ref: Chaindrawa menyatakan bahawa Saakashvili cuba untuk menutup stesen TV bebas (Imelda TV), mengisytiharkan darurat pada tahun 2007 berbanding bantahan besar-besaran pembangkang, dan penipuan pilihan raya yang komited.

src: Chaindrawa also asserts the politics of Saakashvili's government as a cause of the current war with Russia.
ref: Chaindrawa juga menegaskan politik kerajaan Saakashvili sebagai punca perang semasa dengan Rusia.

src: He says: "He wanted a victory parade in Zchinwali and got Russian troops marching toward Tbilisi".
ref: Dia berkata: "Dia mahu perarakan kemenangan dalam Zchinwali dan mendapat tentera Rusia menuju ke arah Tbilisi".

src: When asked why he was dismissed from the government in 2006, Chaindrawa stated that he tried to avoid military adventures in the conflict with South Ossetia and that he was highly critical of Saakashvili's failed 2004 attempt to conquer Zchinwali.
ref: Apabila ditanya mengapa beliau telah dipecat daripada kerajaan pada tahun 2006, Chaindrawa menyatakan bahawa beliau cuba mengelak pengembaraan ketenteraan dalam konflik dengan Ossetia Selatan dan bahawa dia adalah sangat kritikal gagal 2004 percubaan Saakashvili untuk menakluk Zchinwali.

src: On the question of what the West should do, Chaindrawa replies that the West should support the Georgian population, its civil society, and its institutions rather than the Saakashvili government.
ref: Mengenai persoalan apa yang Barat perlu dilakukan, Chaindrawa menjawab bahawa Barat harus menyokong penduduk Georgia, masyarakat awam, dan institusi dan bukannya kerajaan Saakashvili.

src: He continues to say that Georgia needs politicians who are pursuing reconciliation and compromise rather than confrontation.
ref: Beliau terus mengatakan bahawa Georgia memerlukan ahli-ahli politik yang mengikuti perdamaian dan tolak ansur dan bukannya konfrontasi.

src: In an article in The Washington Times, Tsotne Bakuria, a former member of the Georgian parliament and now a senior fellow at Global International Strategic Group in the U.S., formulates a similarly harsh criticism of Shakasvili's government.
ref: Dalam satu artikel dalam The Washington Times, Tsotne Bakuria, bekas anggota Parlimen Georgia dan kini merupakan rakan kanan di Global Group Strategik Antarabangsa di Amerika Syarikat, merumuskan kritikan sama keras kerajaan Shakasvili ini.

src: She calls its government a "reign of terror" and says that the country has no independent judiciary and that Saakashvili uses trumped-up criminal charges (alleged money laundering) to silence and suppress members of the opposition.
ref: Dia memanggil kerajaan yang "pemerintahan keganasan" dan mengatakan bahawa negara ini tidak mempunyai sistem kehakiman yang bebas dan Saakashvili menggunakan tuduhan jenayah yang direka-reka (dakwaan pengubahan wang haram) untuk menutup mulut dan menyekat ahli-ahli pembangkang.

src: The Terra Prometida camp had been invaded by the MST in May 2002 and there were about 200 MST families living there at the time of the attack.
ref: Kem Terra Prometida telah diceroboh oleh MST pada Mei 2002 dan terdapat lebih kurang 200 keluarga MST tinggal disana semasa serangan.

src: According to MST camp leaders the gunfighters set fire to MST tents and started shooting.
ref: Menurut ketua kem MST, penyerang bersenjata membakar khmeah-khemah MST dan mula menembak.

src: According to MST, in 2003 there were about 632 MST camps in Brazil.
ref: Menurut MST, pada 2003 terdapat 632 kem MST di Brazil.

src: MST is a large organization with many bases throughout Brazilian cities.
ref: MST ialah organisasi besar yang mempunyai banyak pengkalan diseluruh bandar-bandar Brazil.

src: The movement also receives funds by selling videos of their invasions.
ref: Pergerakan itu juga menerima dana dengan menjual video pencerobohan mereka.

src: Researchers say that two men claiming to be 'Bigfoot' hunters in Georgia in the United States and who claimed to have found the remains of the mythical creature earlier this month, are part of an elaborate hoax.
ref: Para pengkaji mengatakan dua lelaki yang mengaku sebagai pemburu 'Bigfoot'* di Georgia di Amerika Syarikat dan yang telah claimed* telah menjumpai tinggalan dari makhluk mistk itu awal bulan ini, adalah sebahagian dari *elaborated hoax.

src: "As soon as we saw it was a hoax, I filed the paperwork to terminate his employment," said Chief Turner.
ref: "Sebaik kami melihatnya sebagai penipuan, saya menfailkan kertas kerja untuk menamatkan kerjanya," kata Tuan Turner.

src: "He's disgraced himself, he's an embarrassment to the Clayton County Police Department, his credibility and integrity as an officer is gone, and I have no use for him," he declared.
ref: "Dia menghina dirinya, dia memalukan Jabatan Polis Clayton County, kredibiliti dan integritinya sebagai pegawai telah hilang, dan saya tidak memerlukannya," umumnya.

src: United States (U.S.) Senator Joe Lieberman is scheduled to speak at the Republican party convention, according to a member of the McCain campaign who wishes to remain anonymous.
ref: Senator Amerika Syarikat (U.S.) Joe Lieberman dijadualkan berucap di konvensyen parti Republikan, menurut ahli kempen McCain yang ingin kekal tanpa nama.

src: Lieberman, who was the Democratic vice presidential candidate in the 2000 presidential election, has been one of Republican party candidate, John McCain's, staunchest supporters.
ref: Lieberman, yang merupakan calon naib presiden Demokrat dalam pilihan raya presiden 2000, pernah menjadi salah seorang calon parti Republikan, penyokong setia John McCain.

src: In a interview with David Brody of CBN, Lieberman stated in response to the question about the possibility of him being at the convention that, "well, it's not clear yet but you might just see me there."
ref: Dalam temu bual dengan David Brody dari CBN, Lieberman berkata sebagai tindak balas kepada soalan mengenai kemungkinannya berada di konvensyen itu, "jadi, ia masih tidak jelas tetapi anda mungkin akan nampak saya di sana".

src: Lieberman is currently in Georgia, with Senator Lindsey Graham; he responded when asked if he would be speaking at the convention that "it's quite possible, but I'll let them announce it."
ref: Lieberman kini berada di Georgia, dengan Senator Lindsey Graham; beliau menjawab ketika ditanya sama ada beliau akan berucap di konvensyen itu bahawa "ia agak berkemungkinan, tetapi saya akan biarkan mereka mengumumkannya".

src: Lieberman has been recently considered a possible candidate for the Republican vice presidential seat.
ref: Lieberman telah baru-baru ini dianggap sebagai bakal calon untuk jawatan naib presiden Republikan.

src: The convention will be held in St. Paul, Minnesota from September 1 through the 4th.
ref: Konvensyen ini akan diadakan di St Paul, Minnesota dari 1 September hingga 4 ini.

src: Lieberman was the Democratic vice presidential candidate back in 2000, when he ran with Al Gore.
ref: Lieberman merupakan calon naib presiden Demokrat pada tahun 2000, apabila dia berkempen dengan Al Gore.

src: British television celebrity Jade Goody of Big Brother fame has been diagnosed with cervical cancer.
ref: Selebriti terkenal program Big Brother televisyen British, Jade Goody telah didiagnosis dengan kanser pangkal rahim.

src: Goody was a controversial character in last year's Big Brother, sparking over 40,000 complaints to Ofcom, the British broadcasting regulator after she allegedly made racist and defamatory remarks to fellow housemate and Indian celebrity Shilpa Shetty.
ref: Goody, watak bersifat kontroversi dalam Big Brother tahun lepas telah mencetuskan lebih 40,000 aduan kepada Ofcom, penyiaran pengatur British selepas dia didakwa membuat kenyataan bersifat perkauman dan fitnah kepada teman serumah dan selebriti India, Shilpa Shetty.

src: Goody has stated she agreed to take part on the Indian version of the show as an attempt to make up for her behaviour last year.
ref: Goody telah menyatakan dia bersetuju untuk mengambil bahagian dalam versi India sebagai usaha untuk membetulkan tingkah laku beliau tahun lepas.

src: Shetty is hosting the show, and has stated that her "prayers are with Jade."
ref: Shetty yang menjadi pengacara rancangan itu telah menyatakan bahawa "doanya adalah dengan Jade".

src: Goody has stated she "will worry for [her] boys if [she] get[s] unwell".
ref: Goody telah menyatakan beliau "akan bimbang untuk kanak-kanak lelaki beliau jika beliau menjadi kurang sihat".

src: She said that she entered the house, despite undergoing medical tests, because she "can't wait around for the doctors" and that bills need paying.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa dia pulang ke rumah, walaupun menjalani ujian perubatan, kerana dia "tidak boleh menunggu untuk doktor" dan bil perlu dibayar.

src: She is expected to undergo medical tests so doctors can see how far the cancer has spread.
ref: Beliau dijangka akan menjalani ujian perubatan supaya doktor boleh melihat sejauh mana kanser telah merebak.

src: "Thanks to technology, we know for certain there are people buried under the snow, but it's impossible to be sure exactly how many."
ref: "Kerana teknologi, kita tahu dengan pasti bahawa ada orang yang terkebumi di bawah salji, tetapi adalah mustahil untuk memastikan dengan tepat berapa ramai".

src: The avalanche started at an elevation of 3,600 meters and went down the mountainside for nearly 100 meters, leaving a trail 50 meters wide.
ref: Runtuhan salji bermula pada ketinggian 3,600 meter dan turun ke lereng gunung sepanjang hampir 100 meter, meninggalkan bekas 50 meter lebar.

src: about one hundred climbers have perished since June 1 in France, Italy and Switzerland altogether, of whom about twenty have died on Mont Blanc.
ref: Kira-kira seratus orang pendaki telah terkorban sejak 1 Jun di Perancis, Itali dan Switzerland secara jumlahnya, yang mana lebih kurang dua puluh telah meninggal dunia di Mont Blanc.

src: Cuban Taekwondo athlete Ángel Matos was banned for life yesterday after an assault on Swedish referee Chakir Chelbat during the 2008 Beijing Olympic games.
ref: Atlet Taekwondo Cuba Angel Matos digantung seumur hidup semalam selepas serangan ke atas pengadil Sweden Chakir Chelbat semasa Sukan Olimpik Beijing 2008.

src: Matos was competing in the bronze medal match against Arman Chilmanov of Kazakhstan when he sustained an injury.
ref: Matos bersaing dalam perlawanan pingat gangsa terhadap Arman Chilmanov Kazakhstan apabila dia mengalami kecederaan.

src: As he lay on the mat with medical attendants, Matos was disqualified for exceeding the one minute injury time limit.
ref: Sedang dia terbaring di atas tikar dengan pegawai-pegawainya perubatan, Matos telah hilang kelayakan untuk melebihi satu minit had masa kecederaan.

src: When Chilmanov was declared the winner of the bout, Matos delivered a kick to the face of Chelbat.
ref: Apabila Chilmanov diisytiharkan pemenang pertarungan, Matos menghantar tendangan ke muka Chelbat.

src: Touch judges rushed in to try to control the situation.
ref: Hakim Touch bergegas untuk cuba untuk mengawal keadaan.

src: Matos pushed one of them and then spat on the floor.
ref: Matos menolak salah seorang daripada mereka dan kemudian meludah ke lantai.

src: Both Matos and his coach Leudis Gonzalez were banned for life from all official Taekwondo events for their behavior in the incident.
ref: Kedua-dua Matos dan jurulatihnya Leudis Gonzalez telah diharamkan seumur hidup daripada semua acara Taekwondo rasmi untuk tingkah laku mereka dalam kejadian itu.

src: Later coach Leudis Gonzalez claimed the Kazaks offered him money to lose the bout.
ref: Kemudian jurulatih Leudis Gonzalez meragut Kazaks menawarkannya wang kehilangan pertarungan.

src: WTF secretary general Yang Jin-suk said "due process must be followed before officially banning the two."
ref: WTF Setiausaha Agung Yang Jin-suk berkata "proses perlu diikuti sebelum secara rasmi mengharamkan kedua-dua."

src: He has also admitted to being addicted to pornography for over 16 years.
ref: Beliau juga telah mengakui berasa ketagih kepada pornografi selama lebih 16 tahun.

src: For at least two years, Gugliemucci claimed to have leukaemia.
ref: Selama sekurang-kurangnya dua tahun, Gugliemucci mendakwa mempunyai leukemia.

src: Reports say that he received an unknown amount of money through donations for his treatments and even released an compact disc album single titled 'Healer'.
ref: Laporan mengatakan bahawa beliau menerima jumlah yang tidak diketahui wang melalui derma untuk rawatan dan juga mengeluarkan cakera padat album single bertajuk 'Healer'.

src: Some videos even showed him wearing an oxygen mask while he was performing his sermon.
ref: Beberapa video juga menunjukkan dia memakai topeng oksigen ketika dia sedang melaksanakan khutbahnya.

src: According to reports, several attempts to re-upload his videos to YouTube was quickly met with the site removing the videos under claims that they violate copyright laws.
ref: Menurut laporan, beberapa percubaan untuk memuat naik semula video beliau ke YouTube segera bertemu dengan laman web ini mengeluarkan video di bawah dakwaan bahawa mereka melanggar undang-undang hak cipta.

src: Wikinews has contacted the church, its publishing company, and YouTube for a statement regarding the removal of the videos, but has yet to receive a response.
ref: Wikinews telah menghubungi gereja, syarikat penerbitan, dan YouTube untuk mendapatkan suatu pernyataan mengenai penyingkiran video, tetapi masih belum menerima jawapan.

src: On the counsel and advice of our executive and board, after our up and coming Edge conference, we will take time to be with Mike and get him all the professional and spiritual help he needs to come to full recovery," said Danny Gugliemucci in a statement to the press.
ref: Mengenai nasihat dan nasihat eksekutif dan lembaga kami, selepas terperinci yang dan datang persidangan Edge, kami akan mengambil masa untuk bersama Mike dan mendapatkan segala bantuan yang profesional dan rohani dia perlu datang untuk pemulihan sepenuhnya," kata Danny Gugliemucci dalam kenyataan kepada pihak media.

src: "In September in 2006, Mike had an accident and went to hospital.
ref: "Pada September pada tahun 2006, Mike mempunyai kemalangan dan pergi ke hospital.

src: It was at this time, because of his torment of living a double life, Mike thought he could escape the pain by creating a diversion from his addiction to adult pornography, so he created the cancer scenario," added Danny.
ref: Ia adalah pada masa ini, kerana azab beliau menjalani kehidupan yang berganda, Mike berfikir dia boleh melarikan diri kesakitan dengan mewujudkan satu lencongan dari ketagihan beliau kepada pornografi dewasa, jadi dia mencipta senario kanser," kata Danny.

src: Large herd animals may have the ability to detect earth's magnetic field, concluded scientists in Germany in a report published in this week's Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences after performing studies of cattle and deer grazing and sleeping patterns.
ref: Haiwan kumpulan besar mungkin mempunyai keupayaan untuk mengesan medan magnet bumi, saintis di Jerman membuat kesimpulan pada laporan yang disiarkan dalam Prosiding minggu ini di Akademi Sains Kebangsaan selepas melakukan kajian lembu dan rusa meragut rumput dan corak tidur.

src: The animals tended to face north-south oriented toward the earth's magnetic poles.
ref: Haiwan-haiwan cenderung untuk menghadap orientasi utara-selatan menuju ke arah kutub magnet bumi.

src: Hynek Burda of the University of Duisburg-Essen in Germany led the team that announced the unconfirmed study.
ref: Hynek Burda dari Universiti Duisburg-Essen di Jerman mengetuai pasukan yang mengumumkan kajian yang belum disahkan itu.

src: Burda and his team gathered cattle data via analysis of Google Earth images.
ref: Burda dan pasukannya mengumpulkan data lembu ternakan melalui analisis imej Google Earth.

src: Cattle were easier to observe, and 8,510 head of cattle at 308 locations demonstrated a strong tendency to align body orientation in accordance with the earth's magnetic field.
ref: Lembu lebih mudah untuk diperhatikan, dan 8510 ekor lembu di 308 lokasi menunjukkan kecenderungan yang kuat untuk menyelaraskan orientasi badan mengikut medan magnet bumi.

src: Other possible factors such as wind or sunlight direction did not supply a better explanation for the behavior.
ref: Faktor-faktor lain yang mungkin seperti angin atau arah cahaya matahari tidak memberikan penjelasan yang lebih baik bagi tabiat ini.

src: To compare against a second large species, Burda and his team analyzed data on 2,974 deer studied through photography, direct observation, and snow imprints.
ref: Untuk membandingkan terhadap spesies kedua besar, Burda dan pasukannya menganalisis data pada 2974 rusa yang dikaji melalui fotografi, pemerhatian langsung, dan tapak kaki di salji.

src: "I think the really amazing thing is that hunters and herdsmen and farmers didn't notice it," said Burda according to a National Public Radio report.
ref: "Saya rasa perkara yang benar-benar menakjubkan adalah apabila pemburu dan gembala dan petani tidak menyedarinya," kata Burda menurut laporan Radio Awam Negara.

src: Peter August of the University of Rhode Island in Kingston, commented: "I was really amazed at the consistency with which they found north-facing cows and deer."
ref: Peter August dari Universiti Rhode Island di Kingston, mengulas: "Saya benar-benar kagum dengan keputusan yang konsisten dengan mereka yang terlibat dalam penemuan lembu dan rusa menghadap ke utara".

src: No independent study has yet confirmed the Duisburg-Essen team's findings.
ref: Masih tiada kajian bebas dapat mengesahkan penemuan pasukan Duisburg-Essen.

src: According to a report by Jeremy Hsu at MSNBC, "Previous research has shown that animals such as birds, turtles and salmon migrate using a sense of magnetic direction, and small mammals such as rodents and one bat species also have a magnetic compass."
ref: Menurut laporan oleh Jeremy Hsu di MSNBC, "Kajian sebelum ini menunjukkan bahawa haiwan seperti burung, penyu dan salmon berhijrah menggunakan rasa arah magnet, dan mamalia kecil seperti tikus dan satu spesies kelawar juga mempunyai kompas magnet".

src: Operation NANOOK 2008 was held from August 11 to August 25 by the Canadian Forces for the purpose of conducting mock emergency rescue operations for potential maritime disasters in the northeastern Canadian Arctic waters.
ref: Operasi NANOOK 2008 telah dilaksanakan dari 11 Ogos hingga 25 Ogos oleh Angkatan Tentera Kanada bertujuan sebagai latihan operasi menyelamat kecemasan bencana maritim yang mungkin akan berlaku di timur laut Perairan Artik Kanada.

src: Two Canadian navy ships and two airforce planes, a CC-138 Twin Otter and a CP-140 Aurora, took part in the exercises in the Canada's Arctic.
ref: Dua kapal tentera laut Kanada dan dua pesawat tentera udara iaitu CC-138 Twin Otter dan CP-140 Aurora, telah mengambil bahagian dalam latihan di Artik Kanada.

src: The Operation extended to Davis Strait, and Frobisher Bay during the annual NANOOK Operation.
ref: Operasi itu diperluaskan sehingga Selat Davis, dan Perlabuhan Frobisher dalam Operasi NANOOK tahunan.

src: As more Arctic ice melts, the ships sail through uncharted waters.
ref: Oleh kerana ais di Artik semakin cair, kapal-kapal belayar di kawasan perairan yang belum dikenal pasti.

src: General Walter Natynczyk, Canada's chief of Defence staff, the Honourable Peter MacKay, Defence Minister as well as Minister of the Atlantic Canada Opportunities Agency, and Steven Fletcher, Member of Parliament for Charleswood–St.James–Assiniboia and Parliamentary Secretary for Health, flew to Iqaluit, Nunavut to officially launch the exercise on August 19, 2008 and observe the process.
ref: Jeneral Walter Natynczyk, Ketua Pasukan Pertahanan Kanada, Yang Amat Berhormat Peter MacKay, Menteri Pertahanan serta Menteri Agensi Peluang Atlantik Kanada, dan Steven Fletcher, Ahli Parlimen Charleswood-St. James-Assiniboia dan Setiausaha Parlimen Kesihatan, tiba di Iqaluit, Nunavut dengan kapal terbang untuk melancarkan latihan itu secara rasmi pada 19 Ogos 2008 sambil memerhatikan proses tersebut.

src: In addition to the military exercises, Veterans Affairs Canada held a commemorative event onboard the HMCS Toronto to honour the 55th Anniversary of the Cease Fire in Korea, the 65th Anniversary of the Battle of the Atlantic, and the start of the Last 100 days of the First World War.
ref: Selain daripada latihan ketenteraan, Jambatan Hal Ehwal Veteran Kanada mengadakan acara peringatan di atas kapal HMCS Toronto demi memberi penghormatan kepada ulang tahun ke-55 Gencatan Senjata di Korea, Ulang Tahun ke-65 Pertempuran Atlantik, dan permulaan 100 hari terakhir Perang Dunia Pertama.

src: The community day ceremonies were organized by participants in Operation NANOOK 2008.
ref: Majlis hari masyarakat telah dianjurkan oleh peserta Operasi NANOOK 2008.

src: The public ceremonies received neither Nunavut politicians nor Inuit leaders.
ref: Upacara awam ini tidak menerima ahli-ahli politik Nunavut mahupun pemimpin Inuit.

src: New South Wales Police have broadened investigations into Australia's oldest Catholic boarding school, St Stanislaus College in Bathurst, New South Wales, following claims that at least 13 men were sexually abused while children at the school in the 1970s and 1980s.
ref: Polis New South Wales telah meluaskan siasatan ke sekolah asrama Katolik tertua di Australia, St Stanislaus College di Bathurst, New South Wales, berikutan dakwaan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya 13 orang lelaki telah didera secara seksual semasa mereka adalah kanak-kanak di sekolah itu pada tahun 1970-an dan 1980-an.

src: The claims have surfaced following police being alerted in August last year.
ref: Tuntutan itu telah muncul berikutan polis telah dimaklumkan pada bulan Ogos tahun lepas.

src: "I would imagine it would be very hard for anyone subject to these sort of things to come forward," Detective Superintendent Michael Goodwin said.
ref: "Saya dapat membayangkan yang ia akan menjadi sangat sukar untuk sesiapa sahaja yang mempunyai pengalaman ini untuk tampil ke hadapan," kata Penguasa Detektif Michael Goodwin.

src: "All I can say is that NSW police force will be providing every form of support we possibly can to make the process for them as trouble-free as possible."
ref: "Apa yang saya boleh katakan ialah pasukan polis NSW akan menyediakan segala bentuk sokongan yang kami boleh lakukan supaya proses itu bebas dari masalah untuk mereka".

src: Superintendent Goodwin reassured the community that the allegations date back two decades and there is "absolutely no suggestion whatsoever that the college involved is/has been looking to anything in the current day."
ref: Penguasa Goodwin memberi jaminan kepada komuniti bahawa dakwaan itu bertarikh dua dekad lalu dan tidak ada "sama sekali saranan yang mengatakan apa-apa yang sedang berlaku di kolej itu sedang/telah lama ada pada masa kini".

src: "The college involved has been cooperating with the police completely with this inquiry," Goodwin added.
ref: "Kolej terbabit sentiasa bekerjasama dengan polis sepenuhnya dalam penyiasatan ini sejak dahulu," tambah Goodwin.

src: The police would not release how many suspects were being investigated but said their inquiries had not led them to any other locations where former staff may have been employed.
ref: Pihak polis tidak akan menyatakan berapa ramai suspek yang sedang disiasat tetapi berkata siasatan mereka tidak membawa mereka ke mana-mana lokasi lain di mana bekas kakitangan mungkin telah bekerja.

src: The school's principal, John Edwards, said the police had served him with a search warrant last month which listed the names of three former staff members.
ref: Pengetua sekolah itu, John Edwards, berkata polis telah memberinya satu waran geledah bulan lepas yang menyenaraikan nama tiga orang bekas kakitangan.

src: "There were three former staff member who were listed on the search warrant that was served on me in early July, and we facilitated the gathering of material for police," Mr Edwards told Fairfax Radio Network.
ref: "Terdapat tiga orang bekas kakitangan yang telah disenaraikan dalam waran geledah yang telah diberikan kepada saya pada awal Julai, dan kami memudahkan pengumpulan bahan untuk polis," Encik Edwards memberitahu Fairfax Radio Network.

src: Mr Edwards called for the matter to be transparent and described the complaints as "gravely concerning" and he hopes they are properly dealt with by the courts.
ref: Encik Edwards menggesa supaya perkara itu supaya telus dan menyifatkan dakwaan itu sebagai "amat membimbangkan" dan dia berharap mereka akan diuruskan mahkamah dengan cara yang betul.

src: "It is absolutely a requirement for this matter to be open, for this matter to be addressed and this matter to be resolved," he said.
ref: "Ia sememangnya satu keperluan supaya perkara ini menjadi terbuka, supaya perkara ini boleh ditangani dan perkara ini boleh diselesaikan," katanya.

src: A former priest, Brian Joseph Spillane, aged 65 was arrested over the case in May.
ref: Seorang bekas paderi, Brian Joseph Spillane, berusia 65 tahun telah ditahan atas kes itu pada bulan Mei.

src: Spillane's lawyer, Greg Walsh, says media reports alerted him to the new claims.
ref: Peguam Spillane, Greg Walsh, berkata laporan media memaklumkan dia atas tuntutan baru.

src: It is alleged that boys were subject to sexual abuse or forced to assault each other once in the prayer room.
ref: Dikatakan bahawa kanak-kanak lelaki diarah kepada penderaan seksual atau dipaksa menyakiti satu sama lain sebaik sahaja mereka berada dalam bilik sembahyang itu.

src: The allegations came to light after one of the alleged victims made a visit to Bathurst last year to hand out fliers documenting the abuse and providing a link to his website address.
ref: Dakwaan-dakwaan tersebut diketahui selepas seorang daripada mangsa membuat lawatan ke Bathurst tahun lepas untuk menyerahkan risalah yang mendokumenkan deraan tersebut dan menyediakan pautan ke alamat laman webnya.

src: Following the escalation of investigations into St Stanislaus College in Bathurst, New South Wales, Australia, Wikinews has obtained a police statement from an alleged victim made in 1997 against priest Brian Joseph Spillane.
ref: Berikutan peningkatan siasatan St Stanislaus College di Bathurst, New South Wales, Australia, Wikinews telah mendapat satu kenyataan polis dari mangsa pada tahun 1997 terhadap paderi Brian Joseph Spillane.

src: The complainant came to the police's attention after he came to Bathurst handing out fliers documenting alleged abuses at the school and providing a link to a website he had set up.
ref: Aduan itu disampaikan ke pihak polis selepas dia datang ke Bathurst menyampaikan kertas iklan yang mendokumenkan penyalahgunaan yang didakwa dilakukan di sekolah itu dan menyediakan pautan kepada laman web yang telah dia tubuhkan.

src: St Stanislaus College contacted police and asked them to investigate.
ref: St Stanislaus College menghubungi polis dan meminta mereka untuk menyiasat.

src: In the graphic statement, he describes abuse which began following a poker game with the priest at the centre of the allegations.
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan bergrafik, dia menerangkan penyalahgunaan yang bermula selepas permainan poker bersama paderi di pertengahan dakwaan tersebut.

src: Bathurst Police refused to comment when contacted about the statement today.
ref: Polis Bathurst enggan mengulas ketika dihubungi untuk kenyataan hari ini.

src: Illinois Governor Rod Blagojevich’s office announced layoffs of up to 450 state employees and the closure of 25 historic sites and state parks.
ref: Pejabat Gabenor Illinois Rod Blagojevich mengumumkan pemberhentian 450 pekerja negeri dan penutupan 25 tempat bersejarah dan taman-taman negeri.

src: A spokesperson for the governor stated that the office had no choice but to make the budget cuts because of a faltering economy and an unbalanced state budget.
ref: Jurucakap Gabenor menyatakan bahawa pejabat tidak mempunyai pilihan lain tetapi untuk memotong bajet kerana ekonomi yang goyah dan bajet negeri yang tidak seimbang.

src: The closures and job cuts will save the state money over the next fiscal year.
ref: Penutupan dan pembuangan kerja akan menjimatkan wang negeri sepanjang tahun fiskal akan datang.

src: Once entrances to state parks are barred on November 1, the public will no longer be allowed to enter the sites.
ref: Sebaik sahaja pintu masuk ke taman-taman negeri dikunci pada 1 November, orang ramai tidak akan dibenarkan masuk ke kawasan-kawasan itu lagi.

src: Technology company Sony has recalled 440,000 Vaio laptops due to a fault in the wiring which could result in overheating.
ref: Syarikat teknologi Sony telah memanggil semua 440,000 komputer riba Vaio atas sebab kegagalan dalam pendawaian yang boleh menyebabkan pemanasan terlampau.

src: The recall involves some laptops in the VAIO VGN-TZ100 series, VGN-TZ200 series, VGN-TZ300 series and VGN-TZ2000.
ref: Pemanggilan semula itu melibatkan sebahagian komputer riba di dalam siri VAIO VGN-TZ100, siri VGN-TZ200, siri VGN-TZ300 dan VGN-TZ2000.

src: The recall affects 48 countries, with 373,000 of the recalled laptops being sold in countries other than Japan.
ref: Pemanggilan semula itu melibatkan 48 buah negara, dengan 373,000 komputer riba yang dipanggil semula itu telah dijual di negara-negara selain Jepun.

src: One of the countries not affected by the recall is the United Kingdom.
ref: Salah satu negara yang tidak terjejas dengan pemanggilan semula adalah United Kingdom.

src: A spokesperson for Sony UK said that there have "been no reported incidents of this potential issue in products sold in the UK to date, and a product recall is not required."
ref: Seorang jurucakap Sony UK berkata bahawa "tidak ada insiden yang dilaporkan mengenai kemungkinan isu ini di dalam produk yang dijual di UK sehingga kini, dan pemanggilan semula produk tidak diperlukan."

src: This is why the organization presented her with the award in 1977.
ref: Inilah sebab mengapa organisasi itu memberi anugerah itu kepadanya pada tahun 1977.

src: Her photograph of refugees in Beirut won her the press photography award.
ref: Foto pelarian di Beirut yang ditangkapnya membolehkan dia memenangi anugerah fotografi akhbar tersebut.

src: Jonathan Randall, a Washington Post correspondent who knew Demulder, paid his tributes to the photographer.
ref: Jonathan Randall, seorang wartawan Washington Post yang mengenali Demulder, telah memberi penghormatan kepada jurugambar itu.

src: The 'Invitational Games for the Deaf, Taipei 2008' started yesterday in Taipei, Taiwan.
ref: Undangan Perlawanan bagi Orang Pekak, Taipei 2008'telah bermula semalam di Taipei, Taiwan.

src: Reuters quotes the Ekho Moskvy (Echo of Moscow) radio station in Russia that all on board were dead.
ref: Reuters memetik stesen radio Ekho Moskvy (Echo Moscow) di Rusia bahawa semua yang berada dalam pesawat itu telah mati.

src: The plane crashed just outside the airport, while on final approach to land.
ref: Pesawat itu terhempas di luar lapangan terbang, semasa menghampiri pendaratan.

src: One report says it crashed into a ravine while another states it crashed into a swampy area.
ref: Satu laporan mengatakan ia terhempas ke dalam gaung manakala sumber lain mengatakan ia terhempas ke dalam kawasan paya.

src: Witnesses in apartments near the crash describe it as sounding like a "war [had] started", followed by a "huge flames."
ref: Saksi-saksi di pangsapuri berhampiran kemalangan itu menggambarkannya berbunyi seperti "perang [telah] bermula," diikuti dengan "api yang kuat".

src: The aircraft, registered as number VP-BKO, was sixteen years old, originally operated by Xiamen Airlines.
ref: Pesawat yang didaftarkan dengan nombor VP-BKO, berumur enam belas tahun, pada asalnya dikendalikan oleh Xiamen Airlines.

src: Officials are currently investigating the cause of the crash, but Sky News in Australia reports that there is no indication that terrorism was involved.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai sedang menyiasat punca kemalangan itu, tetapi Sky News di Australia melaporkan bahawa tidak ada sebarang petunjuk bahawa keganasan terlibat.

src: TIME reports that officials have located the plane's two black boxes and are analyzing the information.
ref: TIME melaporkan bahawa pegawai-pegawai telah mengesan lokasi dua kotak hitam pesawat dan sedang menganalisis maklumat dalamnya.

src: This is said to be Russia's worst commercial air disaster since August 2006 when 170 people died after a Tupolev Tu-154 passenger jet, flight 612, owned by St. Petersburg-based Pulkovo Airlines, crashed in the Ukraine.
ref: Ini dikatakan bencana udara komersial yang paling teruk bagi Rusia sejak Ogos 2006 apabila 170 orang maut selepas sebuah jet penumpang Tupolev Tu-154, penerbangan 612, yang dimiliki oleh Penerbangan Pulkovo yang berpangkalan di St. Petersburg, terhempas di Ukraine.

src: An investigation concluded that it had been hit by lightning.
ref: Suatu penyiasatan menyimpulkan bahawa ia telah disambar kilat.

src: The International Monetary Fund and the European Union approved aid packages to help Georgia recover from its conflict with Russia, which occurred in early August.
ref: Tabung Kewangan Antarabangsa dan Kesatuan Eropah meluluskan pakej bantuan untuk membantu Georgia pulih daripada konflik dengan Rusia, yang berlaku pada awal bulan Ogos.

src: The European Union also approved an aid package of €500 million in aid by 2010, which is expected to help internally displaced people (IDPs) and economic recovery in the form of new infrastructure.
ref: Kesatuan Eropah juga meluluskan pakej bantuan sebanyak €500 juta dalam bantuan pada tahun 2010, yang dijangka membantu orang pelarian (IDP) dan pemulihan ekonomi dalam bentuk infrastruktur baru.

src: Only €100 million of the EU aid will be given to Georgia this year.
ref: Hanya €100 juta bantuan EU akan diberikan ke Georgia pada tahun ini.

src: These loans are aimed to restore confidence in Georgia's economy and send a signal to international investors that Georgia's economy is sound.
ref: Pinjaman ini bertujuan untuk memulihkan keyakinan dalam ekonomi Georgia dan menghantar isyarat kepada pelabur antarabangsa bahawa ekonomi Georgia adalah kukuh.

src: According to the IMF, international investors have been "critical to Georgia's economic growth in recent years."
ref: Menurut IMF, pelabur antarabangsa telah "menzahirkan pendapat yang kritis kepada pertumbuhan ekonomi Georgia pada tahun-tahun kebelakangan ini."

src: Georgia has requested $2 billion in international aid to help it recover from the conflict.
ref: Georgia telah memohon $2 bilion dalam bantuan antarabangsa untuk membantu ia pulih daripada konflik.

src: So far, the United States has pledged $1 billion in aid.
ref: Setakat ini, Amerika Syarikat telah berjanji untuk memberikan $1 bilion bantuan.

src: Further assistance and loans to Georgia are expected from other organizations.
ref: Georgia dijangka mendapatkan bantuan lanjut dan pinjaman daripada organisasi lain.

src: Kato noted that "...Georgia is expected to receive financial assistance from multilateral and bilateral donors and creditors in support of the reconstruction effort."
ref: Kato menyatakan bahawa "...Georgia dijangka menerima bantuan kewangan daripada penderma dan pemiutang pelbagai hala dan dua hala dalam menyokong usaha pembinaan semula."

src: It is expected that an international donors' conference will take place next month to solicit more aid for the country.
ref: Ia dijangka bahawa persidangan penderma antarabangsa akan diadakan pada bulan hadapan untuk mendapatkan lebih banyak bantuan kepada negara.

src: Last week at the British Association's science festival Rev Professor Michael Reiss said that creation should not be ignored if it come up in class.
ref: Minggu lepas di festival sains British Association Rev Profesor Michael Reiss berkata bahawa penciptaan alam tidak seharusnya diendahkan sekiranya ia muncul di dalam kelas.

src: Professor Reiss, who was director of education at the Royal Society, said that since a substantial number of pupils have concerns about the issue, they are likely to "detach from" science if their concerns and world view are not addressed.
ref: Profesor Reiss, yang merupakan pengerusi pendidikan di Royal Society, berkata bahawa oleh kerana sebilangan besar pelajar mempunyai persoalan berkenaan isu tersebut, mereka berkemungkinan "tersasar dari" sains sekiranya persoalan mereka dan pandangan dunia tidak dijawab.

src: Creation should not be taught, he said, but if it comes up, teachers should be encouraged to explain the science of evolution.
ref: Penciptaan alam tidak seharusnya diajar, kata beliau, tetapi sekiranya ia muncul, pendidik wajar digalakkan untuk memberi penjelasan tentang evolusi sains.

src: This provoked a storm of protest from a group that included two Nobel Laureates and other scientists who strongly oppose the teaching, or even the discussion of creation in science class.
ref: Ini telah membangkitkan kemarahan sekumpulan pembantah termasuk dua penerima kepujian Nobel dan para saintis lain yang membantah keras pengajaran, ataupun perbincangan tentang kreasionisme di dalam kelas sains.

src: "As a result, Professor Reiss and the Royal Society have agreed that, in the best interests of the society, he will step down immediately as director of education."
ref: "Kesannya, Profesor Reiss dan Royal Society bersetuju bahawa, demi kepentingan terbaik persatuan, dia meletakkan jawatan serta merta sebagai pengarah pendidikan".

src: The Royal Society went on to say: "However, if a young person raises creationism in a science class, teachers should be in a position to explain why evolution is a sound scientific theory and why creationism is not, in any way, scientific."
ref: The Royal Society berkata: "Bagaimanapun, sekiranya orang muda membangkitkan kreasionisme di dalam kelas, pendidik seharusnya bersiap sedia untuk menjelaskan kenapa evolusi adalah teori saintifik dan kenapa kreasionisme bukan, di dalam sebarang bentuk, saintifik".

src: "I was at the actual discussion, and what I heard him say, however it has been reported, was essentially the position advocated by the Royal Society," Jackson said.
ref: "Saya berada di perbincangan sebenar, dan apa yang saya dengar dia berkata, apa carapun ia dilaporkan, yang penting kedudukan yang diseru oleh Royal Society," kata Jackson.

src: Christian Heritage Party candidate Steven Elgersma is standing for election in the riding of Haldimand—Norfolk.
ref: Calon Parti Christian Heritage Steven Elgersma menawarkan diri untuk pilihan raya di riding Haldimand-Norfolk.

src: Wikinews is in the process of contacting every candidate, in every riding across the country, no matter their political stripe.
ref: Wikinews sedang dalam proses untuk menghubungi setiap calon, dalam setiap perjalanan di seluruh negara, tidak kira jalur politik mereka.

src: New Democratic Party candidate Katy Austin is standing for election in the riding of Simcoe—Grey.
ref: Calon Parti Demokratik Baru Katy Austin berdiri dalam pemilihan di bahagian Simcoe-Grey.

src: Austin rode her bike, solo, from Victoria, British Columbia to Elmvale, Ontario (a total of 4 500 km) in 40 days during the summer of 1996, camping along the way.
ref: Austin menunggang motornya, bersendiri, dari Victoria, British Columbia ke Elmvale, Ontario (sejauh 4,500 km) dalam 40 hari semasa musim panas 1996, berkhemah disepanjang perjalanan.

src: Wikinews is in the process of contacting every candidate, in every riding across the country, no matter their political stripe.
ref: Wikinews ialah dalam proses untuk menghubungi setiap calon, dalam setiap bahagian diseluruh negara, tanpa mengira jalur politik mereka.

src: The riding is currently held by Helena Guergis (Conservative), the Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, International Trade and Sport.
ref: Bahagian tersebut buat masa ini dipegang oleh Helena Guergis (Konservatif), Setiausaha Negeri untuk Hubungan Luar, Perdagangan Antarabangsa dan Sukan.

src: Also challenging Guergis are Peter Ellis (Green), Andrea Matrosovs (Liberal), Caley McKibbin (Libertarian), and Peter Vander Zaag (Christian Heritage).
ref: Turut mencabar Guergis ialah Peter Ellis (Green), Andrea Matrosovs (Kebebasan), Caley McKibbin (Pertahanan), dan Peter Vander Zaag (Warisan Kristian).

src: Archaeologists Timothy Darvill of Bournemouth University and Geoff Wainwright, President of the Society of Antiquaries, claimed to have found evidence that Stonehenge was once a center of healing.
ref: Ahli-ahli arkeologi Timothy Darvill dari Universiti Bournemouth dan Geoff Wainwright, Presiden Persatuan Purbawan, mendakwa telah menjumpai bukti bahawa Stonehenge pernah menjadi sebuah pusat penyembuhan.

src: In an excavation conducted at the site, a large number of human remains were found that display signs of physical injury or disease.
ref: Di dalam satu penggalian yang dijalankan di tapak itu, sejumlah besar mayat manusia ditemui dengan menunjukkan kecederaan fizikal atau penyakit.

src: Study of the teeth from the skeletons indicates that about half of them were from outside the area.
ref: Kajian gigi dari rangka tulang menunjukkan bahawa kira-kira separuh daripada mereka adalah dari luar kawasan itu.

src: The inner circle of bluestones are the earliest stone structures found in this site.
ref: Bulatan dalaman batu biru adalah struktur batu terawal yang dijumpai di tapak ini.

src: "It could be that people were flaking off pieces of bluestone, in order to create little bits to take away... as lucky amulets," said Professor Darvill.
ref: "Mungkin orang ramai telah menyerpih keluar kepingan batu biru, untuk dijadikan kepingan kecil untuk dibawa pergi...sebagai azimat bertuah," kata Profesor Darvill.

src: Radiocarbon dating indicates that the original bluestone circle was built around 2300 BC.
ref: Pentarikhan radiokarbon menunjukkan bahawa bulatan batu biru asal itu telah dibina sekitar 2300 BC.

src: This date coincides with the burial of "Amesbury Archer", whose tomb was discovered near Stonehenge.
ref: Tarikh ini bertepatan dengan pengebumian "Amesbury Archer," yang kuburnya ditemui berhampiran Stonehenge.

src: The skeleton of this man reveals that he had serious knee injury and tooth problems.
ref: Rangka manusia ini mendedahkan bahawa dia mengalami kecederaan lutut dan masalah gigi yang serius.

src: In a recent study released by the World Bank and the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development (OECD), economic opportunities for women are still lagging behind opportunities for men in the developing world.
ref: Dalam satu kajian baru-baru ini yang dikeluarkan oleh Bank Dunia dan Pertubuhan Kerjasama Ekonomi dan Pembangunan (OECD), peluang-peluang ekonomi untuk wanita masih ketinggalan berbanding peluang untuk lelaki dalam negara membangun.

src: Improvements have been made in women health and education, according to the study.
ref: Penambahbaikan telah dibuat dalam kesihatan dan pendidikan wanita, menurut kajian itu.

src: The study calls for investments totaling over US$13 billion a year to achieve gender equality and women empowerment.
ref: Kajian ini meyeru pelaburan berjumlah lebih US$13 bilion setahun untuk mencapai kesaksamaan jantina dan pemerkasaan wanita.

src: Danny Leipziger, World Bank Vice President for Poverty Reduction and Economic Management, said, "gender equality is key for poverty reduction and growth."
ref: Danny Leipziger, Naib Presiden Bank Dunia bagi Pengurangan Kemiskinan dan Pengurusan Ekonomi, berkata, "kesaksamaan jantina adalah kunci untuk mengurangkan kemiskinan dan pertumbuhan."

src: The study Equality for Women: Where Do We Stand on Millennium Development Goal 3?
ref: Kajian Kesaksamaan untuk Wanita: Di manakah kita berdiri di Matlamat Pembangunan Milenium 3?

src: looks at the achievements made by the developing world as laid out by the Millennium Development Goals (MD).
ref: melihat kepada pencapaian yang dibuat oleh negara-negara membangun seperti yang dinyatakan oleh Matlamat Pembangunan Milenium (MD).

src: These goals are eight international development goals that 189 United Nations member states and at least 23 international organizations have agreed to achieve by the year 2015.
ref: Matlamat-matlamat ini adalah lapan matlamat pembangunan antarabangsa di mana 189 negara anggota Persatuan Bangsa-bangsa Bersatu dan sekurang-kurangnya 23 organisasi antarabangsa bersetuju untuk mencapai menjelang tahun 2015.

src: They include halving extreme poverty, reducing child mortality rates, fighting disease epidemics such as AIDS, and developing a global partnership for development.
ref: Ia termasuk mengurangkan kemiskinan ekstrem kepada separuh, mengurangkan kadar kematian kanak-kanak, memerangi wabak penyakit seperti AIDS, dan membangunkan perkongsian global untuk pembangunan.

src: The United Nations will hold a conference on Thursday at the annual session of the UN in New York to discuss the Millennium Development Goals.
ref: Persatuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu akan mengadakan persidangan pada hari Khamis pada sesi tahunan UN di New York untuk membincangkan Matlamat Pembangunan Milenium.

src: Libertarian Party candidate Kevin Stricker is standing for election in the riding of Saskatoon—Rosetown—Biggar.
ref: Parti Libertarian mencalonkan Kevin Stricker untuk bertanding pada pilihanraya Saskatoon-Rosetown-Biggar.

src: Born in Saskatoon, he graduated from the University of Saskatchewan in 2003, with a B.Sc.
ref: Lahir di Saskatoon, beliau merupakan graduan dari Saskatchewan Universiti tahun 2003, dengan B.Sc.

src: with Great Distinction in Computer Science; he received a University Medal in Science.
ref: Dengan Kepujian dalam Sains Komputer; beliau menerima Pingat Universiti dalam bidang Sains.

src: Wikinews contacted Kevin, to talk about the issues facing Canadians, and what they and their party would do to address them.
ref: Wikinews telah menghubungi Kevin, untuk bercakap mengenai isu-isu yang dihadapi oleh rakyat Kanada, dan apa yang mereka dan parti mereka buat untuk menanganinya.

src: Wikinews is in the process of contacting every candidate, in every riding across the country, no matter their political stripe.
ref: Wikinews dalam proses untuk menghubungi semua calon, dalam setiap tempat di negara itu, tidak mengambil kira jalur politik mereka.

src: The riding includes southwest Saskatoon and area, including rural areas Biggar, Rosetown and Delisle.
ref: Pemilihan ini termasuk baratdaya Saskatoon dan kawasan, termasuk kawasan luar bandar Biggar, Rosetown dan Delisle.

src: Christian Heritage Party candidate Jerome Dondo, CGA is standing for election in the riding of Brandon—Souris.
ref: Calon Parti Warisan Kristian Jerome Dondo, CGA akan bertanding di pilihanraya di kawasan Brandon - Souris.

src: Self-employed since 2000, Dondo works as a finance consultant with First Nation reserves, and provides accounting services to small business clients.
ref: Bekerja sendiri sejak tahun 2000, Dondo bekerja sebagai konsultan kewangan dengan rizab First Nation, dan memberi perkhidmatan perakaunan kepada klien dari perniagaan kecil.

src: From 1993-1998, he worked in the accounts department of Transport Canada.
ref: Dari tahun 1993-1998, beliau bekerja di jabatan akaun Pengangkutan Kanada.

src: He volunteered as a pastor for Pentecostal Faith Temple in Cat Lake, Ontario, and is currently on the Parent’s Advisory Committee of Ecole Gilbert Rosset, St-Claude, Manitoba.
ref: Beliau pernah menawarkan diri untuk menjadi paderi Kuil Kepercayaan Pentecostal di Cat Lake, Ontario, dan sekarang berada di dalam Jawatankuasa Penasihat Ibu Bapa di Ecole Gilbert Rosset, St-Claude, Manitoba.

src: Wikinews is in the process of contacting every candidate, in every riding across the country, no matter their political stripe.
ref: Wikinews sedang dalam proses untuk menghubungi setiap calon, di setiap kawasan di seluruh negara, tidak kira apa jalur politik mereka.

src: Merv Tweed is the Conservative Party incumbent in the riding.
ref: Merv Tweed adalah penjawat kini Parti Konservatif di kawasan itu.

src: Along with Dondo, challengers include M.J. Willard (Liberal), John Bouché (NDP), Dave Barnes (Green), and Lisa Gallagher (Communist).
ref: Bersama-sama Dondo, para pencabar termasuklah M.J. Willard (Liberal), John Bouche (NDP), Dave Barnes (Hijau), dan Lisa Gallagher (Komunis).

src: The videos have been reported to be of anti-Scientology protests, recorded by various members of the group Anonymous.
ref: Video tersebut telah dilaporkan sebagai protes anti-Saintologi, direkodkan oleh beberapa ahli kumpulan Anonymous.

src: In early September, an entity named American Rights Counsel LLC -- which has described itself as a 'rights group', but without provision of contact details -- requested the removal from YouTube of over 4,000 anti-Scientology videos.
ref: Pada awal September, satu entiti yang bernama Hak Peguam Amerika LLC - yang menggelar diri mereka sebagai 'kumpulan hak asasi', tetapi tanpa pemberian maklumat cara perhubungan - meminta pemadaman itu daripada YouTube daripada lebih 4,000 video anti-Saintologi.

src: Many of these videos consisted entirely of self-made content by anti-Scientology protesters; others were quite explicitly extracts from official Church of Scientology footage.
ref: Kebanyakan daripada video ini hanya terdiri daripada kandungan yang dibuat sendiri oleh penunjuk perasaan anti-Saintologi; yang lain adalah ekstrak yang jelas dari Gereja rasmi rakaman Scientology.

src: Users had initially speculated that Schaper was responsible for these requests; no evidence, however, has been obtained to this effect, nor has official comment been obtained from American Rights Counsel.
ref: Pengguna pada mulanya membuat spekulasi bahawa Schaper bertanggungjawab atas permintaan ini; tanpa bukti, bagaimanapun, telah diperolehi mengenai perkara ini, dan tiada komen rasmi diperolehi daripada Peguam Hak Amerika.

src: According to him, the videos were not of protests against Scientology, but instead were videos of alleged hate-crimes and hate-speech, which were allegedly attacking Schaper personally.
ref: Menurut beliau, video yang tidak berunsur protes terhadap Saintologi, tetapi sebaliknya adalah video yang didakwa berunsur jenayah hasutan dan ucapan hasutan, yang didakwa menyerang Schaper secara peribadi.

src: "I made the requests in accordance with YouTube’s terms and condition, after confirming directly with YouTube and the local ECTF office in Los Angeles, to remove material that infringes on my copyright."
ref: "Saya membuat permintaan mengikut terma dan syarat YouTube, selepas mengesahkan secara langsung dengan YouTube dan pejabat ECTF tempatan di Los Angeles, untuk membuang bahan yang melanggar hak cipta saya."

src: "None of the videos removed by YouTube fall under the fair use guidelines or can be considered news-worthy."
ref: "Tidak ada video dikeluarkan oleh YouTube jatuh di bawah garis panduan penggunaan adil atau boleh dianggap layak dijadikan berita."

src: "The content of the videos has been classified by law-enforcement as hate-speech and frivolous attack."
ref: "Kandungan video yang telah diklasifikasikan oleh undang-undang sebagai ucapan hasutan dan serangan semberono."

src: "The producers of these videos are based in the U.K. and local law-enforcement has been contacted by the FBI," said Schaper to Wikinews.
ref: "Pengeluar video ini adalah dari U.K. dan penguatkuasaan undang-undang tempatan telah dihubungi oleh FBI," kata Schaper kepada Wikinews.

src: When Wikinews asked Schaper if he was acting on behalf of the Church, Schaper denied any such involvement.
ref: Apabila Wikinews bertanya Schaper sama ada dia bertindak bagi pihak Gereja, Schaper menafikan sebarang penglibatan sedemikian.

src: He also stated that he was not attempting to remove videos critical of him, or the Church, but also emphasizes other videos still on YouTube that are "a personal attack against me and my beliefs."
ref: Dia juga menyatakan bahawa dia tidak cuba untuk memadam video yang mengkritiknya, atau Gereja, tetapi juga menekankan video lain masih dalam YouTube yang berunsur "serangan peribadi terhadap saya dan kepercayaan saya."

src: "Despite the fact that I am a Scientologist, none of the videos removed, where removed on behalf of the Church of Scientology or any organization associated with the church."
ref: "Walaupun hakikat bahawa saya seorang Saintologis, tiada video sedemikian dipadamkan, di mana dipadam bagi pihak Gereja Saintologi atau mana-mana organisasi yang berkaitan dengan gereja."

src: Dr. Schaper feels that that the two stated aims are not in conflict, stating, "I believe the First Amendment but I also see how Anonymous tries to abuse these liberties."
ref: Dr. Schaper merasakan bahawa kedua-dua matlamat yang ditetapkan tidak bercanggah sesama sendiri dan menyatakan, "Saya percaya Pindaan Pertama tetapi saya juga melihat bagaimana Anonymous cuba untuk menyalahgunakan kebebasan ini."

src: "Not everything is protected under the free speech clause and laws have been enacted to protect each citizen from abuse."
ref: "Tidak semua benda dilindungi di bawah fasal ucapan percuma dan undang-undang telah digubal untuk melindungi setiap rakyat daripada penderaan."

src: Schaper also stated that Anonymous is "breaking the law" by uploading material to YouTube which could be considered hate crimes.
ref: Schaper juga menyatakan bahawa Anonymous "melanggar undang-undang" dengan memuat naik bahan ke YouTube yang boleh dianggap sebagai jenayah hasutan.

src: He also states that he would not mind a one-on-one conversation with some members of Anonymous, but "these guys don’t have the balls for a direct sit-down because they should get their facts straight."
ref: Dia juga menyatakan bahawa dia tidak keberatan perbualan satu-satu dengan beberapa ahli-ahli Anonymous, tetapi "mereka tidak mempunyai keberanian untuk perbincangan sesama muka kerana mereka perlu mendapatkan fakta sebenar."

src: "Anonymous is overstating a case and claims that their abuse and online bullying would be protected under the First Amendment forgetting the fact that they indeed are breaking the laws," added Schaper.
ref: "Anonymous membesar-besarkan satu kes dan menuntut bahawa penyalahgunaan dan buli dalam talian akan dilindungi di bawah Pindaan Pertama dengan melupakan hakikat bahawa mereka sememangnya melanggar undang-undang," kata Schaper.

src: Wikinews has contacted YouTube for a statement regarding this incident, but has yet to receive a response.
ref: Wikinews telah menghubungi YouTube untuk mendapatkan suatu kenyataan mengenai kejadian ini, tetapi masih belum menerima apa-apa jawapan.

src: More than half of Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni's convoy was prevented from entering Rwanda on Thursday.
ref: Lebih separuh daripada konvoi Presiden Uganda Yoweri Museveni telah dihalang daripada memasuki Rwanda pada hari Khamis.

src: The President was travelling to Kigali to hand over the chairmanship of the Common Market for Eastern and Southern Africa (COMESA) to Rwandan president Paul Kagame.
ref: Presiden itu dalam perjalanan ke Kigali untuk menyerahkan jawatan pengerusi Pasaran Bersama untuk Afrika Timur dan Selatan (COMESA) kepada Presiden Rwanda Paul Kagame.

src: Rwandan officials have been quoted as saying that the Ugandan convoy violated rules on the number of guns they are allowed to carry across the border.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai Rwanda telah dipetik seperti berkata konvoi Uganda telah melanggar peraturan mengenai bilangan senjata yang dibenarkan dibawa menyeberangi kawasan sempadan.

src: What happened at the border was the sole responsibility of the Rwandese officials involved.
ref: Apa yang berlaku di sempadan adalah tanggungjawab pegawai-pegawai Rwanda yang terlibat.

src: If there had been extra guns, why could they not be left on the border for later collection and allow the vehicles to continue?
ref: Sekiranya ada senjata tambahan, mengapa mereka tidak boleh meninggalkannya di sempadan untuk diambil kemudian dan membenarkan kenderaan meneruskan perjalanan?

src: said a statement from Uganda's foreign ministry.
ref: kata satu kenyataan daripada Kementerian Luar Uganda.

src: The guns could even have been returned to Uganda, it is only 200 meters away.
ref: Senjata-senjata tersebut boleh dikembalikan ke Uganda, ia hanya 200 meter jauh.

src: The Common Market for Eastern and Southern Africa, is a free trade area stretching from Egypt to Namibia.
ref: Pasaran Bersama untuk Afrika Timur dan Selatan, adalah sebuah kawasan perdagangan bebas terbentang dari Mesir ke Namibia.

src: Over 100 people died in a massive stampede at the Chamunda Devi temple Jodhpur, in the western state of Rajasthan, India.
ref: Lebih daripada 100 orang maut disebabkan rempuhan besar di kuil Chamunda Devi di Jodhpur, di bahagian barat Rajasthan, India.

src: Several are still believed to be trapped under the rubble.
ref: Beberapa dipercayai masih terperangkap di bawah runtuhan.

src: In August another deadly incident resulting from a stampede occurred in the second day of a nine-day religious festival at the Naina Devi Temple in Himachal Pradesh state; more than 130 people were killed due to panic in Northern India.
ref: Pada Ogos satu lagi kejadian maut akibat rusuhan terjadi pada hari kedua daripada sembilan hari perayaan agama di Kuil Naina Devi di Himachal Pradesh; lebih dari 130 orang mati disebabkan panik di India Utara.

src: Another incident in January 2005 saw more than 250 Hindu worshippers killed in a stampede near a remote temple in the state of Maharashtra.
ref: Lagi satu kejadiaan berlaku pada Januari 2005 melihat lebih daripada 250 penganut Hindu mati akibat rusuhan berdekatan dengan kuil terpencil di bahagian Maharashtra.

src: Belkhir confirmed that "following these floods, we can sadly declare that 29 people have died."
ref: Belkhir mengesahkan yang "berikutan banjir ini, kita dapat mengumumkan dengan sedihnya yang 29 orang telah meninggal dunia."

src: He also said that 84 people were injured, although the Algerian interior ministry has since lowered the toll to 48.
ref: Dia juga berkata yang 84 orang tercedera, walaupun menteri dalaman Algeria telah menurunkan jumlah kepada 48.

src: Six hundred homes were also flooded in the incident, and several hundred people were evacuated by helicopter.
ref: Enam ratus rumah turut dibanjiri dalam insiden itu, dan beberapa ratus orang dipindahlan dengan helikopter.

src: According to reports on Algerian national radio, there may also be undiscovered damage in towns nearby Ghardaïa, which is approximately 600 kilometres from the Algerian capital, Algiers.
ref: Menurut laporan oleh radio kebangsaan Algeria, mungkin juga terdapat kemusnahan tidak ditemui di bandar-bandar berhampiran Ghardaia, yang lebih kurang 600 kilometer dari pusat bandar Algeria, Algiers.
