src: On April 4, 2008 Bobbi-Jo Arnold, accompanied by her mother Mary Patricia Moore and other family members, claimed a $3.5 million lottery ticket win in Toronto.
ref: Pada 4 April, 2008 Bobbi-Jo Arnold, ditemani oleh ibunya Mary Patricia Moore dan beberapa ahli keluarga lain, menuntut tiket loteri yang dimenangi berjumlah $3.5 juta di Toronto.

src: On October 2 the two women were arrested by Ontario Police.
ref: Pada 2 Oktober kedua-dua wanita telah ditahan oleh polis Ontorio.

src: The family dispute has led to Ms Moore (59) filing for divorce from her husband of ten years, Gerald Moore (81), in August.
ref: Pertikaian keluarga telah menyebabkan Cik Moore (59) memfailkan tuntutan cerai daripada suaminya yang telah bersamanya selama sepuluh tahun, Gerald Moore (81), pada bulan Ogos.

src: Mr Moore alleges Ms Arnold received the ticket from her mother, who took it from his bedside table.
ref: Encik Moore menuduh Cik Arnold menerima tiket dari ibunya, yang mengambil dari meja tepi katil beliau.

src: He further alleges his wife "manipulated" his medications to leave him incapable to grasp what was occurring.
ref: Beliau juga menuduh isterinya "memanipulasi" ubat mengakibatkan dia tidak mampu untuk memahami apa yang berlaku.

src: The Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corporation is also named in Mr Moore's civil suit for alleged negligence in investigating Ms Arnold's claim.
ref: Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corporation juga dinamakan dalam saman sivil Encik Moore kerana tuduhan kecuaian dalam menyiasat dakwaan Cik Arnold itu.

src: The bail judge's order requires Ms Moore to live with her daughter Arnold in a home she purchased with the lottery winnings, and not with her husband.
ref: Perintah jaminan hakim itu memerlukan Cik Moore untuk tinggal bersama anak perempuannya Arnold di rumah yang dibeli dengan wang kemenangan loteri, dan bukan dengan suaminya.

src: As well, both women are ordered not to leave Essex County, Ontario and to surrender their passports to the police.
ref: Selain itu, kedua-dua wanita diperintahkan untuk tidak meninggalkan Essex County, Ontario dan menyerahkan pasport kepada pihak polis.

src: The charge was repeated at a later rally for around 13,000 Orange County, California supporters.
ref: Tuduhan itu diulang pada perhimpunan berikutnya untuk sekitar 13,000 penyokong di Orange County, California.

src: The accusation centers around a report in The New York Times associating Obama with William C. Ayers, a Chicago professor who was a member of the radical Weathermen group during the 1960s.
ref: Tuduhan itu dalam laporan The New York Times mengaitkan Obama dengan William C. Ayers, profesor Chicago yang merupakan seorang ahli kumpulan Weathermen radikal semasa 1960-an.

src: Loading her attack with hot-button issues, Palin told supporters "one of Barack's earliest supporters is a man who, according to the New York Times, and they are hardly ever wrong, was a domestic terrorist and part of a group that quote launched a campaign of bombings that would target the Pentagon and US Capitol.
ref: Memuatkan serangannya dengan isu-isu politik, Palin berkata kepada penyokongnya "seorang daripada penyokong terawal Barack ialah seorang lelaki yang, menurut The New York Times, dan mereka tidak pernah salah, ialah seorang pengganas tempatan dan sebahagian dariapada kumpulan yang memetik melancarkan kempen pengeboman yang akan mensasarkan Pentagon dan US Capitol.

src: These are the same guys who think patriotism is paying higher taxes."
ref: Ini adalah lelaki yang sama yang berfikir patriotisme membayar cukai yang lebih tinggi."

src: Despite Palin's attack, the original article in the October 3 New York Times concluded that Obama and Ayers were never close, and that the connection was through Obama's initial run for office and a schools reform project, "saying that their paths have crossed sporadically".
ref: Walaupun serangan Palin, artikel asal dalam 3 Oktober New York Times menyimpulkan bahawa Obama dan Ayers tidak pernah rapat, dan sambungan adalah melalui pemilihan awal Obama untuk projek pembaharuan pejabat dan sekolah," mengatakan bahawa laluan mereka telah melintasi jarang sekali."

src: Democratic campaign aides claim the alleged relationship has been played up by the presidential hopeful's opponents as a smear campaign.
ref: Pembantu kempen demokratik mendakwa hubungan yang dikatakan itu telah dimainkan oleh calon lawan sebagai kempen memburuk-burukkan.

src: Comparisons to the Swift Boat Veterans for Truth (SBVT) have been drawn.
ref: Perbandingan kepada Swift Boat Veterans for Truth (SBVT) telah disediakan.

src: SBVT was a political group drawn together during the 2004 presidential election with the aim of opposing John Kerry's candidacy.
ref: SBVT adalah satu kumpulan politik yang disediakan bersama semasa pilihan raya presiden 2004 dengan tujuan untuk menentang pencalonan John Kerry.

src: In an effort to reduce the effect of the ongoing financial crisis, six central banks worldwide have reduced their interest rates by 0.5% in an unexpected move which took place today.
ref: Dalam usaha untuk mengurangkan kesan krisis kewangan yang sedang berlangsung, enam bank pusat di seluruh dunia telah mengurangkan kadar faedah sebanyak 0.5% dalam satu langkah yang tidak dijangka yang berlaku hari ini.

src: "Throughout the current financial crisis, central banks have engaged in continuous close consultation and have cooperated in unprecedented joint actions such as the provision of liquidity to reduce strains in financial markets," said the banks in a joint statement.
ref: "Sepanjang krisis kewangan kini, bank-bank pusat telah terlibat dalam rundingan terperinci secara berterusan dan bekerjasama dalam tindakan bersama yang tidak pernah berlaku sebelum ini seperti penyediaan kecairan untuk mengurangkan tekanan dalam pasaran kewangan," kata bank dalam kenyataan bersama.

src: "Inflationary pressures have started to moderate in a number of countries, partly reflecting a marked decline in energy and other commodity prices."
ref: "Tekanan inflasi telah mula mereda dalam beberapa negara, sebahagiannya mencerminkan penurunan yang ketara dalam tenaga dan harga komoditi yang lain".

src: "The recent intensification of the financial crisis has augmented the downside risks to growth and thus has diminished further the upside risks to price stability."
ref: "Peningkatan krisis kewangan baru-baru ini telah menambahkan risiko ke bawah ke atas pertumbuhan dan dengan itu telah mengurangkan lagi risiko kenaikan kestabilan harga".

src: Japan expressed support for the move, although it did not cut its own interest rate by 0.5% as that would mean bringing its interest rate down to 0% from 0.5%.
ref: Jepun menyatakan sokongan terhadap langkah itu, walaupun ia tidak mengurangkan kadar faedah sendiri sebanyak 0.5% kerana ia akan menurunkan kadar faedah kepada 0% daripada 0.5%.

src: The US interest rate was lowered to 1.5% as part of the move, while the UK rate was lowered to 4.5%.
ref: Kadar faedah AS telah diturunkan kepada 1.5% sebagai sebahagian daripada langkah itu, manakala kadar UK diturunkan kepada 4.5%.

src: The new rate of the Swiss National Bank is 2.5%, while Sveriges Riksbank, the Swedish central bank, lowered its rate to 4.25%.
ref: Kadar baru Bank Negara Swiss adalah 2.5%, manakala Sveriges Riksbank, bank pusat Sweden, menurunkan kadar kepada 4.25%.

src: Zimbabwe's 4.5 million students will not receive what was once the golden standard of education in Africa—or any education at all this school year.
ref: 4.5 juta pelajar Zimbabwe tidak akan menerima apa yang suatu masa dulu adalah piawai emas pendidikan di Afrika - atau sebarang pendidikan sepanjang tahun persekolahan ini.

src: Political violence during the country's recent presidential elections hit schools hard with strikes, murder and violence against teachers, and looting.
ref: Keganasan politik semasa pilihanraya presiden baru-baru ini melanda sekolah teruk dengan mogok, pembunuhan dan keganasan terhadap guru-guru, dan rompakan.

src: Now the country faces a second crisis due to economic troubles and an inflation rate of two trillion percent.
ref: Kini negara tersebut berhadapan krisis kedua akibat masalah ekonomi dan kadar inflasi dua trilion peratus.

src: "We don't even have chalk, or red pens, never mind books," says Amos Musoni, one of the few teachers still working.
ref: "Kami tidak mempunyai walaupun kapur, atau pen merah, jangankan buku," kata Amos Musoni, seorang dari beberapa guru yang masih bekerja.

src: Schools like the one where Musoni works have given up educating and simply entertain the children before sending them off for lack of equipment.
ref: Sekolah seperti dimana Musoni bekerja telah putus harapan dengan pendidikan dan hanya menghiburkan kanak-kanak sebelum menghantar mereka pulang kerana kekurangan peralatan.

src: College students, unable to register, are left waiting for more information.
ref: Penuntut kolej, tidak dapat mendaftar, ditinggalkan menanti untuk lebih maklumat.

src: Schools in the countries have not been able to prepare students for tests without timetables or even the results from last year.
ref: Sekolah-sekolah didalam negara tersebut tidak dapat menyediakan pelajar untuk ujian tanpa jadual waktu atau walaupun keputusan dari tahun lepas.

src: A suicide car bomber partly demolished an Anti-Terrorist Squad (ATS) building in the Pakistani capital Islamabad.
ref: Sebuah kereta pengebom berani mati merobohkan sebahagian bangunan Squad Anti-Pengganas (ATS) di ibu negara Pakistan Islamabad.

src: The number of dead is not certain, with numbers ranging from none to eight.
ref: Bilangan mati tidak pasti, dengan anggaran nombor dari kosong sehingga lapan.

src: "Everybody started running away from where the sound came," said eyewitness Amanat Khan while describing the event.
ref: "Semua orang mula melarikan diri dari mana datangnya bunyi itu," kata saksi Amanat Khan semasa menggambarkan peristiwa tersebut.

src: "I saw black smoke rising and the sound of a building crashing down".
ref: "Saya melihat asap hitam meningkat dan bunyi sebuah bangunan runtuh".

src: Police quickly closed off the area and declared an emergency in all hospitals.
ref: Polis cepat menutup kawasan tersebut dan mengisytiharkan kecemasan di semua hospital.

src: Those injured were taken to the nearby PIMS and Holy Family hospitals.
ref: Mereka yang cedera dibawa ke PIMS yang berhampiran dan hospital Holy Family.

src: Investigators suspect the involvement of a Bajaur-based militant group, Jaish-e-Islami Pakistan (JIP), whose commander was recently injured after an attack on its headquarters.
ref: Penyiasat mengesyaki penglibatan kumpulan militan yang berpangkalan di Bajaur, Jaish-e-Islami Pakistan (JIP), yang baru-baru ini komandernya tercedera selepas satu serangan ke atas ibu pejabatnya.

src: The suicide bomber had entered the office and placed a bag of 'sweets' on a desk, with a note threatening continued attacks if Pakistan continued to aid the US.
ref: Pengebom berani mati telah memasuki pejabat dan meletakkan sebeg 'gula-gula'di atas meja, dengan nota mengancam serangan berterusan jika Pakistan terus membantu Amerika Syarikat.

src: Prime Minister Syed Yousuf Raza Gilani and President Asif Ali Zardari both strongly condemned the suicide attack.
ref: Perdana Menteri Syed Yousuf Raza Gilani dan Presiden Asif Ali Zardari kedua-duanya mengutuk serangan bunuh diri ini.

src: The United States 2008 federal deficit has reached a record high, US$454.8 billion—more than double last year's deficit.
ref: Defisit persekutuan 2008 Amerika Syarikat telah mencecah rekod, US$454.8 bilion - lebih daripada defisit dua tahun lepas.

src: The deficit is now equivalent to 3.2% of the Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the United States, with the government's total income being 17.8% of GDP, and total outlays being equivalent to 21% of GDP.
ref: Defisit ini kini bersamaan dengan 3.2% daripada Keluaran Dalam Negara Kasar (GDP) di Amerika Syarikat, dengan jumlah pendapatan kerajaan yang 17.8% daripada GDP, dan jumlah perbelanjaan yang bersamaan dengan 21% daripada GDP.

src: He said the news would "reinforce the need to not only address short-term challenges, but pursue policies that promote economic growth and fiscal responsibility, and address entitlement reform".
ref: Beliau berkata, berita itu akan "mengukuhkan keperluan untuk bukan sahaja menangani cabaran jangka pendek, tetapi meneruskan dasar-dasar yang menggalakkan pertumbuhan ekonomi dan tanggungjawab fiskal, dan alamat kelayakan reformasi".

src: "The reality is that the next president will be inheriting a fiscal and economic mess of historic proportions," said Conrad, adding that "it will take years to dig our way out".
ref: "Realitinya adalah bahawa presiden akan datang akan mewarisi keadaan kucar-kacir fiskal dan ekonomi perkadaran bersejarah," kata Conrad, sambil menambah bahawa "ia akan mengambil masa untuk menggali jalan keluar".

src: "The eight years of this administration will include the five biggest budget deficits in history," he said.
ref: "Lapan tahun pentadbiran ini akan termasuk lima defisit bajet terbesar dalam sejarah," katanya.

src: Jim Nussle, director of the Office of Management and Budget said that he believes that the deficit will start to decline.
ref: Jim Nussle, Pengarah Pejabat Pengurusan dan Anggaran berkata beliau percaya bahawa defisit akan mula merosot.

src: "The bipartisan stimulus bill and the slow economy are the primary reasons for the increase in deficit as reflected in this year's budget results."
ref: "Rang undang-undang rangsangan kedua-dua parti dan ekonomi yang perlahan adalah sebab-sebab utama bagi peningkatan dalam defisit seperti yang ditunjukkan dalam hasil bajet tahun ini".

src: "This increase reinforces the need to adopt and maintain policies that promote economic growth and fiscal responsibility, including entitlement reform and pro-growth tax policies."
ref: "Peningkatan ini memperkukuhkan lagi keperluan untuk mengamalkan dan mengekalkan dasar-dasar yang menggalakkan pertumbuhan ekonomi dan tanggungjawab fiskal, termasuk pembaharuan kelayakan dan dasar cukai pro-pertumbuhan".

src: The UK Government has stated that children in Britain will no longer be required to take compulsory, externally marked tests at the age of fourteen.
ref: Kerajaan UK telah menyatakan bahawa kanak-kanak di Britain tidak lagi akan dikehendaki mengambil ujian wajib, bertanda secara luaran pada usia empat belas.

src: The change takes effect immediately, meaning that children who were due to take the test this year no longer have to do so.
ref: Perubahan ini berkuat kuasa serta-merta, yang bermaksud bahawa kanak-kanak yang sepatutnya mengambil ujian pada tahun ini tidak lagi perlu untuk berbuat demikian.

src: Secretary of State for Children, Schools and Families Ed Balls yesterday announced his plans to radically change the UK testing system yesterday, in parliament.
ref: Setiausaha Negara untuk Kanak-kanak, Sekolah dan Keluarga Ed Balls semalam mengumumkan rancangannya untuk mengubah sistem ujian UK semalam secara radikal, di Parlimen.

src: Currently, almost ten million tests are sat each year by British pupils.
ref: Pada masa ini, hampir sepuluh juta ujian telah diduduki setiap tahun oleh murid British.

src: This change is expected to cut the number of tests taken in half, according to The Guardian.
ref: Perubahan ini dijangka mengurangkan bilangan ujian yang diambil kepada separuh, menurut The Guardian.

src: A review group is being set up, however, to research the effect of these tests on eleven-year-olds.
ref: Sebuah kumpulan kajian sedang ditubuhkan, bagaimanapun, untuk menyelidik kesan ujian ini terhadap kanak-kanak berusia sebelas tahun.

src: Instead of league tables showing test results, the government will produce report cards for secondary schools.
ref: Daripada menggunakan jadual liga untuk menunjukkan keputusan ujian, sebaliknya kerajaan akan mengeluarkan kad laporan untuk sekolah menengah.

src: The decision to abolish the tests for fourteen year olds came as a result of a situation earlier this year, when there were long delays with the delivery of test results to students of this age.
ref: Keputusan untuk memansuhkan ujian untuk kanak-kanak berumur empat belas tahun itu adalah berpunca daripada keadaan pada awal tahun ini, dimana terdapat penangguhan penyampaian keputusan ujian yang lama kepada pelajar-pelajar ini.

src: "For too long English, mathematics and science teachers in secondary schools have found themselves skewing everything to enable their pupils to jump through a series of unnecessary hoops," she claimed, while Chris Keates, general secretary of the National Association of Schoolmasters Union of Women Teachers, said that "the sound of a deep collective sigh of relief will emanate from secondary schools across the country."
ref: "Sudah terlalu lama guru Bahasa Inggeris, Matematik dan Sains di sekolah menengah telah mendapati diri mereka melakukan segala-galanya untuk membolehkan murid-murid mereka untuk melompat mengatasi satu siri halangan yang sebenarnya tidak perlu," dakwa beliau, manakala Chris Keates, Setiausaha Agung Persatuan Kebangsaan Schoolmasters Kesatuan Wanita guru-guru, berkata bahawa "bunyi keluhan lega akan kedengaran dari sekolah-sekolah menengah di seluruh negara ini".

src: Conservative Shadow Secretary of State for Children Michael Gove stated that his party have "argued for fewer national tests and more rigor and we want to work constructively to improve the assessment and qualifications regime."
ref: Setiausaha Konservatif Shadow Negara bagi Kanak-kanak Michael Gove menyatakan bahawa partinya telah "berhujah untuk ujian nasional yang lebih sedikit dan lebih tegas dan kami mahu bekerja secara membina untuk memperbaiki rejim penilaian dan kelayakan".

src: David Laws, Shadow Secretary of State for Children for the Liberal Democrats, said that "the Sats tests taken by 14-year-olds are not only a waste of time but have been highly unreliable over the last few years."
ref: David Laws, Setiausaha Shadow Negara bagi Kanak-kanak untuk Demokrat Liberal, berkata bahawa "ujian Sats yang diambil oleh kanak-kanak berusia 14 tahun bukan sahaja membuang masa tetapi telah sangat tidak boleh dipercayai sejak beberapa tahun yang lalu".

src: An on duty superintendent in the New South Wales Police Force was caught speeding in an unmarked police car at 176km/h in a 100km/h zone on the Olympic Highway near Junee, New South Wales on October 13.
ref: Seorang penguasa yang bertugas di Pasukan Polis New South Wales telah ditangkap memandu sebuah kereta polis yang tidak bertanda melebihi had laju pada kejaluan 176km/j dalam zon 100km/j di Lebuhraya Olimpik berhampiran Junee, New South Wales pada 13 Oktober.

src: Superintendent Frank Goodyer, who was caught by his own officers in the Wagga Wagga Local Area Command, was charged with driving at more than 45km/h over the speed limit, had his automatically license suspended for six months and fined A$1674.
ref: Penguasa Frank Goodyer, yang telah ditangkap oleh pegawai-pegawai sendiri di Wagga Wagga Local Area Command, didakwa memandu lebih daripada 45km/j melebihi had laju, menyebabkan lesennya digantung secara automatik selama enam bulan dan didenda A$1674.

src: Superintendent Frank Goodyer told ABC Radio, "I accepted the penalty."
ref: Penguasa Frank Goodyer memberitahu ABC Radio, "Saya menerima hukuman itu."

src: Djibouti's President Omah Guelleh told the UN security council "Continued inaction in whatever form not only will encourage but will benefit Eritrea's attitude."
ref: Presiden Djibouti Omah Guelleh memberitahu badan keselamatan UN "Ketiadaan tindakan di dalam apa jua bentuk yang berterusan bukan hanya menggalakkan malah memberi manfaat kepada sikap Eritrea".

src: He claimed his country desired "the cultivation of good neighbourly relations with Djibouti," and said that "Contrary to the claims made, Eritrea has not taken any land that belongs to Djibouti and it does not have any territorial ambitions."
ref: Beliau mendakwa negaranya mahu "untuk memupuk hubungan baik dengan Djibouti," dan berkata bahawa "Bertentangan dengan dakwaan yang dibuat, Eritrea belum mengambil sebarang tanah milik Djibouti dan tidak mempunyai sebarang cita-cita untuk menjajah".

src: "Ethiopia has built from the Djiboutian side a network of winding roads up the mount and deployed offensive long-range artillery and heavy equipment directed at Eritrea," he said.
ref: "Ethiopia telah membina dari bahagian Djibouti satu rangkaian jalan berliku menaiki gunung dan meletakkan meriam serangan jarak jauh dan peralatan berat yang menghala ke Eritrea," kata beliau.

src: Olhaye dismissed the idea of Ethiopia's involvement with the claim "Whatever the Eritrean ambassador has said is hogwash."
ref: Olhaye menolak idea penglibatan Ethiopia itu dengan mendakwa "Apa sahaja yang dikatakan duta khas Eritrea itu adalah mengarut".

src: The UN security council has urged both nations to show restraint; it was the UN who called on the nations to agree to a ceasefire in June.
ref: Badan keselamatan UN menegaskan kepada kedua-dua negara untuk mengawal diri; dan UN telah berjaya menyeru kedua-dua negara tersebut untuk bersetuju bagi melaksanakan genjatan senjata pada Jun.

src: On Friday, Hudson's Mother Darnell Donerson, 57 and brother, Jason, 29, were shot and killed in the Southern Chicago home in what authorities are calling a domestic dispute.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, Ibu Hudson Darnell Donerson, 57 dan adiknya, Jason, 29, ditembak mati di rumah Chicago Selatan dalam pada apa yang pihak berkuasa namakan pertikaian domestik.

src: A cousin had found the bodies at around 2:44 p.m. (CDT) and called 9-1-1.
ref: Seorang sepupu telah menemui mayat pada kira-kira 2:44 petang (CDT) dan menghubungi 9-1-1.

src: Hudson's nephew, 7-year-old Julian King, was kidnapped from the scene and has not been seen since.
ref: Anak saudara Hudson, Julian King yang berusia 7 tahun, diculik dari tempat kejadian dan tidak dilihat semenjak itu.

src: An AMBER Alert was issued and police are looking for a 1994 white Chevrolet Suburban or a teal-green Chrysler Concorde.
ref: Amaran AMBER dikeluarkan dan polis sedang mencari sebuah Chevrolet Suburban putih keluaran 1994 atau Chrysler Concorde teal-hijau.

src: King's mother, Julia Hudson, who was previously reported missing, is pleading for whoever has her son, to release him.
ref: Ibu King, Julia Hudson, yang sebelum ini dilaporkan hilang, merayu kepada sesiapa yang menahan anaknya, untuk membebaskannya.

src: I don't know what else to do but pray," said Hudson during a press conference on Saturday.
ref: Saya tidak tahu apa lagi yang boleh dilakukan tetapi berdoa," kata Hudson dalam sidang akhbar pada hari Sabtu.

src: Reports say he is Julia's ex-boyfriend, having since been separated.
ref: Laporan mengatakan dia adalah bekas teman lelaki Julia, yang telah berpisah.

src: Police deny that he is a suspect in either the murders or kidnapping and will not confirm or deny if he is or was in custody.
ref: Polis menafikan bahawa dia adalah suspek sama ada dalam pembunuhan atau penculikan itu dan tidak akan mengesahkan atau menafikan jika dia sedang atau pernah di bawah tahanan.

src: Republican John McCain has conceded the election to Democrat Barack Obama.
ref: Ahli Republikan John McCain telah menyerah kalah kepada ahli Demokrat Barack Obama dalam pilihan raya.

src: The District of Columbia and at least 32 states had early voting before election day.
ref: Daerah Columbia dan tidak kurang daripada 32 negeri telah mengundi awal sebelum hari pihan raya.

src: By October 31, over 23 million people had voted by mail or at early voting locations.
ref: Sehingga 31 Oktober, lebih daripada 23 juta orang telah mengundi melalui pos atau melalui lokasi undi awal.

src: There were reports of technical problems and long lines across the country.
ref: Terdapat laporan-laporan masalah teknikal dan barisan panjang di seluruh negara.

src: The popular vote at this time was 62,992,553 (52%) for Obama, 55,796,823 (46%) for McCain.
ref: Undi popular pada waktu kini ialah 62,992,553 (52%) untuk Obama, 55,796,823 (46%) untuk McCain.

src: Hurricane Paloma, which the U.S. National Hurricane Center yesterday labeled as "extremely dangerous", has recently hit Cuba.
ref: Taufan Paloma, di mana Pusat Taufan Kebangsaan Amerika Syarikat semalam melabelkan sebagai "amat merbahaya", baru-baru ini melanda Cuba.

src: In preparation of this, at 1500 UTC yesterday, the Cuban provinces of Granma and Holguin were issued with a Hurricane warning by the country's government.
ref: Dalam persediaan ini, pada waktu 1500 UTC semalam, wilayah-wilayah Cuba di Granma dan Holguin telah dikeluarkan amaran taufan oleh kerajaan di negara ini.

src: 220,000 people were evacuated from low-lying areas in the Camaguey province, while 170,000 were evacuated from the province of Las Tunas.
ref: 220,000 orang telah dipindahkan dari kawasan-kawasan rendah di wilayah Camaguey, manakala 170,000 dipindahkan dari wilayah Las Tunas.

src: The Hurricane is now weakening, however, with the NOAA stating that "continued weakening is expected over the next day or two, even after Paloma moves off the coast of Cuba."
ref: Taufan ini kini semakin lemah, bagaimanapun, NOAA menyatakan bahawa "kami meramalkan ianya semakin lemah dalam tempoh sehari dua ini, walaupun selepas Paloma bergerak dari luar pantai Cuba."

src: "Rainfall accumulations of 5 to 10 inches are possible over the central Bahamas."
ref: "Pengumpulan hujan 5 hingga 10 inci mungkin berlaku di pusat Bahamas."

src: Hurricane Paloma was the seventeenth tropical depression of the 2008 Atlantic hurricane season.
ref: Taufan Paloma adalah bencana tropika ketujuh belas musim taufan Atlantik pada tahun 2008.

src: India's first lunar mission, the Chandrayaan-1 (meaning 'moon craft' in Sanskrit), reached its destined lunar orbit on Wednesday.
ref: Misi lunar pertama India, Chandrayaan-1 (yang bermaksud 'kraf bulan'dalam bahasa Sanskrit), mencapai destinasi orbit lunarnya pada hari Rabu.

src: According to Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) officials, the Moon Impact Probe (MIP), with an Indian flag painted on it, will be dropped late tonight.
ref: Menurut pegawai Pertubuhan Penyelidikan Angkasa Lepas India (ISRO), Moon Impact Probe (MIP) tersebut, dengan sebuah bendera India dilukis di atasnya, akan dilepaskan lewat malam ini.

src: The MIP has a mass of 29 kg and it will take 20 minutes to reach the moon's surface.
ref: MIP itu mempunyai jisim 29 kg dan ia akan mengambil masa 20 minit untuk sampai ke permukaan bulan.

src: Raouf Amin el-Araby, a 52-year-old Egyptian doctor who has been serving the Saudi Royal family for 20 years, was convicted of malpractice.
ref: Raouf Amin el_Araby, seorang doktor Mesir berusia 52 tahun yang berkhidmat keluarga diraja Saudi selama 20 tahun, disabitkan dengan penyelewengan.

src: Initially sentenced to 7 years and 700 lashes, he has been sentenced to 15 years and 1500 lashes, 70 a week, after making an appeal.
ref: Asalnya dihukum selama 7 tahun dan 700 sebatan, dia telah dihukum kepada 15 tahun dan 1500 sebatan, 70 seminggu, selepas membuat rayuan.

src: "1,500 lashes is unprecedented in the history of Islam," read one banner carried by protesters.
ref: "1,500 sebatan tidak pernah berlaku dalam sejarah Islam," menurut satu kain rentang yang dibawa oleh penentang.

src: read another.
ref: kata yang lain.

src: Hafez Abu Saeda, the director of EOHR, stated that the princess was prescribed the same medication that she was receiving in the United States, "so it is obvious that the doctor was not at fault for her addiction."
ref: Hafez Abu Saeda, pengarah EOHR, menyatakan bahawa puteri tersebut diberikan ubat yang sama yang baginda terima di Amerika Syarikat, "ia amat jelas bahawa doktor tersebut bukanlah sebab ketagihan baginda".

src: Organizers of the upcoming London Live 8 concert have announced that legendary rock band Pink Floyd plans to perform on July 2.
ref: Penganjur kepada London Live 8 konsert yang akan datang telah mengumumkan bahawa kumpulan rock legenda Pink Floyd merancang untuk membuat persembahan pada 2 Julai.

src: Guitarist David Gilmour, bassist Roger Waters, drummer Nick Mason, and keyboardist Richard Wright will play their first performance together since playing at Earls Court, London in 1981.
ref: Pemain gitar David Gilmour, pemain bass Roger Waters, pemain drum Nick Mason, dan pemain keyboard Richard Wright akan mengadakan persembahan pertama bersama sejak bermain di Earls Court, London pada tahun 1981.

src: The band will come together, along with other musical acts such as Coldplay, Elton John, and Paul McCartney for this event.
ref: Band ini akan datang bersama dengan ahli muzik seperti Coldplay, Elton John, dan Paul McCartney untuk acara ini.

src: These concerts, set on the 20th anniversary of Geldof's Live Aid, have been planned to support the Make Poverty History campaign, which aims to reduce African poverty.
ref: Konsert ini ditetapkan pada ulang tahun yang ke-20 Live Aid Geldof, telah dirancang untuk menyokong kempen Membuat Kemiskinan Sejarah, yang bertujuan untuk mengurangkan kemiskinan rakyat Afrika.

src: This lineup of Pink Floyd has not played together for 24 years due to a conflict between David Gilmour and Roger Waters over leadership and creative influence of the band.
ref: Barisan Pink Floyd sudah 24 tahun tidak bermain bersama-sama disebabkan oleh konflik antara David Gilmour dan Roger Waters atas kepimpinan dan pengaruh kreatif band.

src: However, it seems that they are willing to put their differences behind to support Live 8; "Like most people I want to do everything I can to persuade the G8 leaders to make huge commitments to the relief of poverty and increased aid to the third world," said David Gilmour and added, "Any squabbles Roger and the band have had in the past are so petty in this context, and if reforming for this concert will help focus attention then it's got to be worthwhile."
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, ianya seolah-olah mereka sanggup mengenepikan perbezaan mereka di belakang untuk menyokong Live 8; "Seperti kebanyakan orang, saya mahu lakukan yang terbaik dalam memujuk pemimpin-pemimpin G8 untuk memberi komitmen yang tinggi untuk mengurangkan kemiskinan dan meningkatkan bantuan kepada negara dunia ketiga," kata David Gilmour dan menambah, "Apa-apa pertengkarana Roger dan band yang berlaku di masa lalu adalah kecil di dalam konteks ini, dan jika pembaharuan untuk konsert ini akan membantu mendapatkan perhatian maka ianya sesuatu yang berbaloi."

src: Jolly, created by the late comedian Rikki Fulton, Scotland's First Minister, Alex Salmond, took part in the BBC's annual charity appeal for Children in Need.
ref: Jolly, yang dicipta oleh mendiang pelawak Rikki Fulton, Menteri Pertama Scotland, Alex Salmond, mengambil bahagian dalam majlis amal tahunan BBC untuk Kanak-kanak yang Memerlukan.

src: Last year the BBC's appeal raised approximately £37 million, and by 11pm last night the total raised had exceeded £10 million.
ref: Tahun lepas majlis BBC mengumpul kira-kira £37 juta, dan sebelum 11:00 malam tadi jumlah yang dikumpul telah melebihi £10 juta.

src: The BBC hopes to break last year's telethon total and final figures will not be available for some time.
ref: BBC berharap untuk memecah rekod jumlah telethon tahun lepas dan angka muktamad tidak akan diketahui buat sementara waktu.

src: The three minute skit was part of BBC Scotland's presentation of the charity appeal and was met with laughter from the Glasgow studio audience when the pre-recorded message was broadcast.
ref: Skit tiga minit itu adalah sebahagian daripada persembahan majlis amal BBC Scotland dan disambut dengan gelak ketawa daripada penonton studio Glasgow apabila mesej yang telah dirakam disiarkan.

src: The I.M.
ref: Watak I.M.

src: Jolly character was well-known in Scotland from having a spot on the Hogmanay (New Year's eve) schedule; in keeping with Fulton's terminally depressed character Salmond opened with the catchprase, "Hullo.
ref: Jolly memang terkenal di Scotland sehingga bertempat di jadual Hogmanay (malam sebelum Tahun Baru); selaras dengan watak Fulton yang sentiasa murung Salmond memulakan dengan ungkapan penarik, "Hullo.

src: The sketch gave Salmond an opportunity to be self-deprecating as well as poke fun at his predecessor in the office of First Minister, Jack McConnell, "I would like to pay tribute to the previous incumbent of the first ministership, the Right Reverend Jack McConnell.
ref: Skit itu memberikan Salmond satu peluang untuk mengutuk diri sendiri sambil memperlawakkan orang terdahulunya di pejabat Ahli Parlimen Scotlanda, Jack McConnell, "Saya ingin memberi penghormatan kepada Ahli Parlimen Scotland yang pertama, Reverend Kanan Jack McConnell.

src: And I would also like to thank him for the present of fish he left me in Bute House ...under the floorboards."
ref: Dan saya juga ingin mengucapkan terima kasih kepada beliau untuk hadiah ikan yang dia tinggalkan kepada saya di Bute House...di bawah lantai papan."

src: Closing the "Last Call" segment he appealed for donations, "Please dig deep - it's for the weans."
ref: Menutup segmen "Last Call" dia menyeru supaya menderma, "Sila dermakan lebih sedikit - ia untuk kanak-kanak kecil."

src: Reuters claimed that news of the attack raised crude oil prices around the world.
ref: Reuters mendakwa berita serangan itu menaikkan harga minyak mentah di seluruh dunia.

src: Vela International Marine, the ship's owner, has said the Sirius Star is fully loaded.
ref: Vela Marin Antarabangsa, pemilik kapal, telah mengatakan Sirius Star telah diisi penuh.

src: The US Navy reports that all 25 crew from the United Kingdom, Croatia, the Philippines, Poland, and Saudi Arabia are 'safe'.
ref: Tentera Laut US melaporkan bahawa kesemua 25 anak kapal yang berasal dari United Kingdom, Croatia, Filipina, Poland, dan Arab Saudi adalah 'selamat'.

src: The area off the East coast of Africa has seen a significant amount of piracy.
ref: Kawasan di luar pantai timur Afrika telah menyaksikan sejumlah besar masalah lanun.

src: In 2007, one-third of the world's piracy incidents occurred in this region.
ref: Pada tahun 2007, satu pertiga daripada kes pelanunan seluruh dunia berlaku di rantau ini.

src: Hijacking off the coast of Somalia has become increasingly common over the last decade.
ref: Rampasan di luar pantai Somalia telah menjadi semakin biasa sejak sedekad yang lalu.

src: Most recently, South Korea has announced intentions to send one of its destroyers after five South Koreans were kidnapped in a Japanese cargo ship hijacking.
ref: Baru-baru ini, Korea Selatan telah mengumumkan niat untuk menghantar salah satu kapal pemusnah selepas lima rakyat Korea Selatan telah diculik dalam sebuah rampasan kapal kargo Jepun.

src: The Sirius Star is the largest ship captured by pirates in the area to date.
ref: Sirius Star adalah kapal terbesar ditangkap oleh lanun di kawasan itu setakat ini.

src: This also sets a record for the farthest from the shore that pirates have struck.
ref: Ini juga menetapkan satu rekod bagi rampasan yang paling jauh dari pantai yang lanun tersebut lakukan.

src: Most of the repair time is covered by previously scheduled maintenance time, and CERN originally hoped to have the machine up and running again by early May.
ref: Kebanyakan masa pembaikan diliputi oleh masa penyelenggaraan yang dijadualkan sebelum ini, dan CERN asalnya berharap supaya mesin itu beroperasi semula pada awal bulan Mei.

src: However, CERN officials now believe that it may take until the end of July or longer.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, pegawai CERN kini percaya bahawa ia mungkin mengambil masa sehingga akhir bulan Julai atau lebih.

src: CERN spokesman James Gillies said:  "If we can do it sooner, all well and good."
ref: Jurucakap CERN James Gillies berkata: "Jika kami boleh melakukannya secepat mungkin, segalanya berkeadaan baik dan sempurna".

src: The machine operates at temperatures colder than outer space and must be gradually warmed up for experts to assess the damage, causing much of the delay.
ref: Mesin ini beroperasi pada suhu yang lebih sejuk daripada angkasa lepas dan perlu secara beransur-ansur dipanaskan untuk pakar-pakar menilai kerosakan, menyebabkan kelewatan itu.

src: CERN expects the repair cost to fall within the annual budget for the project.
ref: CERN menjangka kos pembaikan akan jatuh dalam bajet tahunan untuk projek tersebut.

src: The National Socialist Movement is, according to its website, the largest and most active Nazi party in the United States.
ref: Gerakan Nasional Sosialis ialah, menurut laman webnya, parti Nazi terbesar dan teraktif di dalam Amerika Syarikat.

src: Accordingly, it refers to itself as 'America's Nazi Party' and aims to instigate major change in the US.
ref: Oleh yang demikian, ia merujuk dirinya sendiri sebagai 'Parti Nazi Amerika'dan bertujuan untuk memulakan perubahan besar di US.

src: A ransom of $25 million is being sought, a quarter of the value of the vessel's cargo of oil.
ref: Tebusan sebanyak $25 juta sedang dicari, suku daripada harga minyak kargo di kapal tangki.

src: "I hope the owner of the tanker is wise enough and won't allow any military option because that would be disastrous for everybody.
ref: "Saya berharap pemilik kapal tangki itu bijak dan tidak akan benarkan sembarang pilihan tentera kerana itu akan menjadi buruk untuk semua".

src: "We are here to defend the tanker if attacked," said pirate Abdiyare Moalim.
ref: "Kami disini untuk mempertahankan kapal tangki itu jika ia diserang," kata lanun Abdiyate Moalim.

src: The news is not entirely bad, however, as a Greek tanker full of refined oil was released today, complete with cargo intact and crew of 19 unharmed.
ref: Berita itu bukan keseluruhannya tidak baik, walau bagaimanapun, kapal tangki Greek penuh dengan minyak bertapis telah dilepaskan hari ini, sepenuhnya bersama kargo dan kakitangan seramai 19 orang yang tidak dicederakan.

src: The MV Genius, now headed out of the area, was captured September 26, the same day as the MV Faina was taken.
ref: MV Genius, sekarang menuju keluar kawasan, ditangkap pada September 26, hari yang sama MV Faina diambil.

src: The Faina remains held with a cargo of military hardware including tanks.
ref: Faina kekal ditahan bersama kargo perkakasan tentera termasuk tangki.

src: The report expects this to account for 50,000 job losses in Scotland, with the worst level of unemployment since the 1990s - a jump from 74,000 to 124,000 out of work, or 4.4%.
ref: Laporan itu menjangka hal ini akan mengambil kira 50,000 kehilangan pekerjaan di Scotland, dengan tahap yang paling teruk pengangguran sejak tahun 1990-an - melompat dari 74,000 kepada 124,000 orang kehilangan pekerjaan, atau 4.4%.

src: Dougie Adams, author of the report, warns that if the financial crisis is worst than anticipated there could be a contraction of 1%, making 60,000 jobs lost.
ref: Dougie Adams, pengarang laporan itu, memberi amaran bahawa jika krisis kewangan lebih buruk daripada jangkaan mungkin akan berlaku penurunan sebanyak 1%, menjadikannya 60,000 kehilangan pekerjaan.

src: "The economy must face a future with a changed landscape for its previously buoyant banking sector," said Adams.
ref: "Ekonomi mesti menghadapi masa depan dengan perubahan landskap bagi sektor perbankan yang memberangsangkan sebelum ini," kata Adams.

src: "These include policy actions at a global and UK level, including any fiscal measures announced in the pre-Budget report, and the fall in oil and commodity prices."
ref: "Ini termasuk tindakan dasar di peringkat global dan UK, termasuk apa-apa langkah-langkah fiskal yang diumumkan dalam laporan pra-Belanjawan, dan kejatuhan harga minyak dan komoditi".

src: "The sharp decline in inflation that is in the pipeline will buoy disposable incomes and leaves an open door to further interest rate cuts."
ref: "Penurunan mendadak inflasi dalam perancangan akan mencegah pendapatan boleh guna dan meninggalkan pintu yang terbuka untuk melanjutkan pemotongan kadar faedah".

src: "Finally, the UK will also benefit from the sharp fall in sterling that is unlikely to be frittered away by wage inflation."
ref: "Akhirnya, UK juga akan mendapat manfaat daripada kejatuhan mendadak dalam sterling yang tidak mungkin dapat dielakkan dengan inflasi gaji".

src: "However, recovery critically depends on both the willingness of the banking system to extend credit and the readiness of businesses and consumers to use it."
ref: "Walau bagaimanapun, pemulihan secara kritikal bergantung kepada kesediaan sistem perbankan untuk memberi pinjaman dan kesediaan peniaga dan pengguna untuk menggunakannya".

src: "We ran the engines just like they would run during flight, but instead of being up in the air, they were held down.
ref: "Kami menghidupkan enjin sama seperti mereka akan hidup semasa penerbangan, sebaliknya bukan di udara, mereka diikat.

src: They weren’t moving," said Lauren Dreyer, SpaceX's manager for business development.
ref: Mereka tidak bergerak," kata Lauren Dreyer, pengurus SpaceX untuk pembangunan perniagaan.

src: This was the Falcon 9's first major test firing, and it marks a milestone for the company in its plans to capture a section of the commercial launch market.
ref: Ini adalah pertama kali ujian penembakan utama Falcon 9, dan ia menandakan satu peristiwa penting bagi syarikat itu dalam rancangan untuk menguasai sebahagian daripada pasaran pelancaran komersilnya.

src: The test reportedly shook the windows of houses 5 miles away, causing agitation among residents who felt that they had not received adequate warning.
ref: Ujian ini dilaporkan menggegarkan tingkap rumah yang 5 batu jauhnya, menyebabkan kemarahan di kalangan penduduk yang merasakan bahawa mereka tidak menerima amaran yang mencukupi.

src: The Falcon 9 rocket, and its smaller sibling the Falcon 1, are the first rockets capable of entering Low Earth Orbit (LEO) to have their design be privately funded in its entirety.
ref: Roket Falcon 9, dan adik-beradiknya yang lebih kecil Falcon 1, adalah roket pertama yang mampu memasuki Orbit Rendah Bumi (LEO) supaya reka bentuk mereka boleh dibiayai oleh pihak swasta secara keseluruhan.

src: According to SpaceX the Falcon 9 can generate 4 times the maximum thrust of a Boeing 747 while firing in a vacuum, and will eventually be able to perform interplanetary missions in addition to its initial role as an orbital launch vehicle.
ref: Menurut SpaceX Falcon 9 boleh menjana 4 kali tujahan maksimum Boeing 747 sambil menembak dalam vakum, dan akhirnya akan boleh melaksanakan misi antara planet di samping peranan awalnya sebagai kenderaan pelancaran orbit.

src: SpaceX is also designing a crew and cargo capsule for the Falcon 9, which it has named the "Dragon".
ref: SpaceX juga mereka bentuk anak-anak kapal dan kargo kapsul untuk Falcon 9, yang telah dinamakan "Dragon."

src: SpaceX is a contender for future commercial contracts from various government run space agencies, with NASA expressing particular interest.
ref: SpaceX merupakan pesaing bagi kontrak komersil masa depan dari pelbagai agensi angkasa kerajaan, dengan NASA menyatakan minat tertentu.

src: SpaceX has already reached an agreement with NASA to conduct three test flights of the Dragon capsule in conjunction with the Falcon 9.
ref: SpaceX telah mencapai persetujuan dengan NASA untuk menjalankan tiga ujian penerbangan kapsul Dragon dengan Falcon 9.

src: Elon Musk, CEO and CTO of SpaceX, said, "The full mission-length test firing clears the highest hurdle for the Falcon 9 first stage before launch.
ref: Elon Musk, Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif dan Ketua Pegawai Teknikal SpaceX, berkata, "ujian penembakan penuh mengikut tempoh masa misi telah menghilangkan halangan tertinggi peringkat pertama bagi Falcon 9 sebelum pelancaran.

src: An Airbus A320 airliner owned by Air New Zealand crashed into the Mediterranean Sea near Perpignan, killing at least two of a crew of seven, French officials reported on Thursday.
ref: Sebuah pesawat Airbus A320 yang dimiliki oleh Air New Zealand terhempas di Laut Mediterranean berhampiran Perpignan, membunuh sekurang-kurangnya dua daripada tujuh anak kapal, pegawai-pegawai Perancis telah melaporkan pada hari Khamis.

src: The seven on board included two XL Airways crew, Civil Aviation Authority inspector Jeremy Cook of Wellington, and four Air New Zealand personnel.
ref: Tujuh penumpang termasuk dua anak kapal XL Airways, Pihak Berkuasa Penerbangan Awam inspektor Jeremy Cook dari Wellington, dan empat anggota Air New Zealand.

src: Though rescue efforts persisted into the night, there is no hope of the remaining five crew members being found alive, according to French officials.
ref: Walaupun usaha-usaha penyelamatan berlarutan sehingga malam, tidak ada harapan untuk baki lima anak kapal untuk ditemui hidup, menurut pegawai-pegawai Perancis.

src: French, German, and New Zealand aviation authorities and investigators have been dispatched to the site to investigate the incident.
ref: Pihak berkuasa penerbangan dan penyiasat Perancis, Jerman, dan New Zealand telah dihantar ke tempat kejadian itu untuk menyiasat kejadian itu.

src: Manufacturer Airbus, based in Toulouse, will aid the investigation, Airbus spokespersons stated.
ref: Pengilang Airbus, yang berpangkalan di Toulouse, akan membantu siasatan, jurucakap Airbus menyatakan.

src: According to a French journalist and the imam of the local mosque, around 400 people have been killed in the riots that erupted due to a dispute in the result of the local elections.
ref: Menurut seorang wartawan Perancis dan imam sebuah masjid tempatan, seramai 400 orang telah terbunuh di dalam rusuhan yang meletus disebabkan pertikaian tentang keputusan pilihanraya tempatan.

src: Khaled Abubakar, the imam of the city's central mosque, made an estimate of the death toll.
ref: Khaled Abubakar, imam masjid pusat bandar itu, telah membuat anggaran jumlah kematian.

src: "Families are coming to identify and claim the bodies, while those that cannot be identified or are not claimed by anybody will be interred by the mosque."
ref: "Para keluarga akan datang untuk mengenalpasti dan menuntut mayat, sementara mereka yang tidak dikenalpasti atau dituntut akan dikebumikan oleh masjid".

src: Yakumu Pam, a Christian clergyman in Jos, also commented on the chaos.
ref: Yakumu Pam, seorang paderi Kristian di Jos, juga memberi komen tentang kekacauan tersbut.

src: "Hundreds of people have been killed in the last two days since the riots started," he stated.
ref: "Beratus orang telah terbunuh di dalam dua hari yang lepas sejak rusuhan bermula," katanya.

src: "Remains of burned bodies litter some parts of the town."
ref: "Abu mayat yang terbakar berselerak di beberapa bahagian bandar".

src: In an effort to stop the fighting, the army has been ordered to open fire on people, and to create a buffer zone between the Christians and the Muslims.
ref: Di dalam usaha untuk menghentikan pergaduhan, para tentera telah diarahkan untuk menembak orang ramai, dan mewujudkan zon penampan di antara orang Kristian dan Muslim.

src: Umaru Yar'Adua, the President of Nigeria, has stated that he is "very sad" about the ongoing violence.
ref: Umaru Yar'Adua, Presiden Nigeria, telah menyatakan yang beliau "sangat sedih" tentang keganasan yang berterusan itu.

src: Another member of the Pennsylvania State University's cheerleading squad will step in to play the Nittany Lion at the 2009 Rose Bowl, after the main performer was suspended after being charged with DUI and summary traffic violations late last month.
ref: Seorang lagi anggota daripada skuad sorak Universiti Negeri Pennsylvania akan campur tangan untuk bermain Nittany Lion di Rose Bowl musim 2009, selepas pelaku utama telah digantung selepas didakwa dengan DUI dan ringkasan pelanggaran lalu lintas akhir bulan lalu.

src: Penn State is the largest university in Pennsylvania and among the ten largest public universities in the United States.
ref: Penn State merupakan universiti terbesar di Pennsylvania dan antara sepuluh universiti awam terbesar di Amerika Syarikat.

src: Sheep was pulled over on campus at 3:16 am November 22, before Penn's game versus Michigan State.
ref: Sheep telah berhenti di kampus pada 3:16 pagi 22 November, sebelum perlawanan Penn dengan Negeri Michigan.

src: Sheep has avoided interview requests by The Daily Collegian, Penn State's newspaper, on multiple occasions.
ref: Sheep telah mengelak permintaan wawancara oleh The Daily Collegian, akhbar Negeri Penn, berkali-kali.

src: The Pennsylvania State University website lists Sheep on their website as the Lion from 2007-2008, conflicting with coach White's comment that he would return in the new year.
ref: Laman web Universiti Negeri Pennsylvania menyenaraikan Sheep di laman web mereka sebagai Lion dari 2007-2008, yang bercanggah dengan komen jurulatih White bahawa dia akan kembali pada tahun baru.

src: The mascot was introduced in 1907, brought in as a costume character in 1921, and is even the subject of the book The Nittany Lion: An Illustrated Tale.
ref: Maskot ini diperkenalkan pada tahun 1907, dibawa masuk sebagai watak pakaian kostum pada tahun 1921, dan adalah subjek buku The Nittany Lion: An Illustrated Tale.

src: Some earlier reports suggested that "46 current or former Penn State [football] players have been charged with crimes on 163 counts in the past six seasons."
ref: Beberapa laporan sebelum ini mencadangkan bahawa "46 kini atau bekas Penn State [rugbi] pemain telah didakwa dengan jenayah 163 pertuduhan dalam tempoh enam musim yang lalu."

src: Of those players charged, 27 were found guilty of at least one charge.
ref: Seorang pemain dikenakan, 27 didapati bersalah atas sekurang-kurangnya satu pertuduhan.

src: More details have emerged over the weekend after the surprise announcement last week of Honda's intention to sell its Formula One racing team, Honda Racing F1.
ref: Maklumat lanjut telah muncul pada hujung minggu selepas pengumuman mengejutkan pada minggu lalu tentang niat Honda untuk menjual pasukan lumba Formula Satu, Honda Racing F1.

src: However, Ross Brawn appears eager to retain the Briton and either retain Brazilian Rubens Barrichello or sign GP2 driver Bruno Senna, nephew of legendary racer Ayrton Senna.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Ross Brawn nampaknya bersungguh-sungguh untuk mengekalkan pemandu Britain itu dan sama ada mengekalkan pemandu Brazil, Rubens Barrichello atau menandatangan kontrak dengan pemandu GP2 Bruno Senna, anak saudara pelumba terkenal Ayrton Senna.

src: "And with the leadership of Ross Brawn, and the whole team as they are, we can come through this and be on the grid in 2009."
ref: "Dan dengan kepimpinan Ross Brawn, dan juga seluruh pasukan, kita boleh melalui ini dan berada di grid pada tahun 2009."

src: Button has also spoken of his shock and pain at Honda's decision.
ref: Button juga telah memperkatakan rasa kejutan dan sakit hatinya berkenaan keputusan Honda.

src: Ross Brawn, who was brought into the Honda team with much fan fare before the 2008 season, has spoken of his shock at finding out about the sale of the team.
ref: Ross Brawn, yang telah dibawa masuk ke dalam pasukan Honda dengan banyak liputan penyokong sebelum musim 2008, telah memperkatakan rasa terkejut atas penjualan pasukan.

src: Brawn, who is credited with helping Michael Schumacher and Ferrari dominate Formula One for much of the last decade, indicated he was expected funding cuts and had prepared a reduced budget but hadn't expected the full withdrawal of support that Honda announced.
ref: Brawn, yang mendapat nama dengan membantu Michael Schumacher dan Ferrari mendominasi Formula One selama mungkin sedekad yang lalu, menyatakan beliau menjangka pemotongan pembiayaan dan telah bersedia dengan bajet yang dikurangkan tetapi tidak menjangkakan pengurangan sokongan penuh seperti yang diumumkan Honda.

src: Brawn has also indicated understanding of Honda's reasoning, with their sales down 40% in some markets and Honda F1's £200m+ budget a cost they were unwilling to bear.
ref: Brawn juga telah menyatakan pemahaman terhadap pertimbangan Honda, dengan jualan mereka jatuh bawah 40% dalam beberapa pasaran dan bajet Honda F1 sebanyak £200m+ kos yang mereka tidak sanggup tanggung.

src: Though Honda has committed to providing a budget for the team until March, the budget is lower than that which had been expected and so the team has had to pull out of the crucial winter tests at Jerez.
ref: Walaupun Honda berkomited untuk menyediakan bajet untuk pasukan sehingga Mac, bajet adalah lebih rendah dari yang dijangkakan dan pasukan itu terpaksa menarik diri daripada ujian penting musim sejuk di Jerez.

src: "They've spent a lot of money to put themselves in that position so if anyone does want to be in F1 this is a team they should look to buy."
ref: "Mereka telah menghabiskan banyak wang untuk meletakkan diri mereka dalam kedudukan itu dan jika ada sesiapa yang mahu berada dalam F1 ini merupakan pasukan yang perlu mereka kaji untuk beli."

src: "It's a big opportunity for any company that's run efficiently to benefit."
ref: "Ia adalah satu peluang besar bagi mana-mana syarikat yang beroperasi dengan cekap untuk mendapat manfaat."

src: In proceedings by the Guantanamo military commission at the United States Guantanamo Bay Naval Base on Monday, Khalid Sheikh Mohammed and four alleged co-conspirators stated that they will confess and plead guilty to the charges they face in the planning and execution of the September 11 attacks in 2001.
ref: Dalam prosiding oleh suruhanjaya tentera Guantanamo di Pangkalan Tentera Laut Teluk Guantanamo Amerika Syarikat pada hari Isnin, Khalid Sheikh Mohammed dan empat pengkomplot bersama tertuduh menyatakan bahawa mereka akan mengakui dan mengaku bersalah terhadap tuduhan mereka hadapi dalam perancangan dan pelaksanaan serangan 11 September pada tahun 2001.

src: He also said it was "our earnest desire" to admit guilt and said he wanted the proceeding to end because "I do not trust Americans."
ref: Beliau juga berkata ia adalah "keinginan sungguh-sungguh kami" dan mengaku bersalah dan berkata dia mahu prosiding itu tamat kerana "Saya tidak percaya orang Amerika."

src: speaking in English.
ref: bercakap dalam bahasa Inggeris.

src: The judge would not accept pleas from Binalshibh and al-Hawsawi, ordering mental competency hearings for the two.
ref: Hakim tidak akan menerima rayuan daripada Binalshibh dan al-Hawsawi, dengan menyuruh supaya perbicaraan kecekapan mental untuk kedua-dua orang itu dijalankan.

src: Al Hawsawi objected and told the judge he decided to plead guilty "with all my complete mental capacity and voluntarily."
ref: Al Hawsawi membantah dan memberitahu hakim bahawa dia berkeputusan untuk mengaku bersalah "dengan semua kapasiti lengkap mental saya dan secara sukarela."

src: However, Mohammed told the judge they would not enter their pleas without Binalshibh and al-Hawsawi, "We want everyone to plead together."
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Mohammed memberitahu hakim mereka tidak akan membuat akuan mereka tanpa Binalshibh dan al-Hawsawi, "Kami mahu semua orang mengaku bersama-sama."

src: Monday's hearing was unusual in that, in addition to the press, the families of five 9/11 victims were also in attendance.
ref: Perbicaraan hari ini adalah luar biasa dalam bahawa, sebagai tambahan kepada akhbar, keluarga lima orang mangsa 9/11 juga hadir.

src: The United Kingdom Parliament is planning to expand the powers of bailiffs in pursuit of unpaid debts.
ref: Parlimen United Kingdom merancang untuk meluaskan kuasa bailif dalam mengejar hutang tidak berbayar.

src: The preemptive crackdown was introduced with predictions of hundreds of thousands of British citizens losing their homes to credit companies as the international financial crisis grows worse.
ref: Tindakan keras terlebih dahulu itu telah diperkenalkan dengan ramalan ratusan daripada ribuan penduduk British kehilangan tempat tinggal kepada syarikat penmiutang sebagaimana krisis kewangan antarabangsa semakin teruk.

src: Previous to the proposed laws, bailiffs were not allowed to break into or enter homes unless the debtor was already there, or as a last resort.
ref: Sebelum undang-undang baru tersebut, bailif tidak dibenarkan memecah masuk kedalam rumah kecuali penghutang berada disitu, ataupun sebagai pilihan terakhir.

src: Justice Lord Bach stated the Act would not be made active until after Parliament had finished extensive consulting, and that the new powers of bailiffs would be carefully monitored.
ref: Hakim Lord Bach menyatakan Akta tersebut tidak akan dijadikan aktif sehingga selepas Parlimen selesai membuat rundingan yang meluas, dan bahawa kuasa baru bailif akan dikawal rapi.

src: The New Zealand government retaliated by expelling Fiji's High Commissioner to Wellington, Ponsami Chetty.
ref: Kerajaan New Zealand membalas dengan membuang Pesuruhjaya Tinggi Fiji ke Wellington, Ponsami Chetty.

src: McDonald's expulsion was announced late this afternoon by Fiji's interim Attorney-General Aiyaz Sayed-Khaiyum, who said that it was "a direct result of McDonald's actions over the past year that have been contrary to the accepted international norms of diplomatic behaviour".
ref: Pengusiran McDonald telah diumumkan lewat petang ini oleh Peguam Negara sementara Fiji Aiyaz Sayed-Khaiyum, yang berkata bahawa ia adalah "hasil secara langsung daripada tindakan McDonald sepanjang tahun lalu yang bertentangan dengan norma-norma kelakuan diplomatik antarabangsa yang boleh diterima."

src: The Fijian government has accused New Zealand and Australia of spying on Fiji, claiming they were tapping phone lines and listening in on members of the interim regime.
ref: Kerajaan Fiji menuduh New Zealand dan Australia mengintip Fiji, mendakwa mereka memasang pengesan suara pada talian telefon dan mencuri dengar anggota rejim sementara.

src: The New Zealand government has denied any "misbehaviour" by McDonald.
ref: Kerajaan New Zealand telah menafikan sebarang "salah laku" oleh McDonald.

src: Last week the Fijian regime threatened to expel New Zealand's High Commissioner unless the New Zealand government granted a visa to George Nacewa, the son of a senior regime official.
ref: Pada minggu lalu rejim Fiji mengancam untuk mengusir Pesuruhjaya Tinggi New Zealand, melainkan kerajaan New Zealand memberi visa kepada George Nacewa, anak seorang pegawai rejim kanan.

src: But yesterday the interim regime apparently backed down on its threat, issuing a statement that it would not expel McDonald and announcing that it would establish a special team to improve relations between the two countries.
ref: Tetapi hari ini rejim sementara itu nampaknya menarik balik ancamannya, dengan mengeluarkan kenyataan bahawa ia tidak akan mengusir McDonald dan mengumumkan bahawa ia akan menubuhkan satu pasukan khas untuk memperbaiki hubungan antara kedua-dua negara.

src: McDonald is the second New Zealand diplomat expelled by Fiji.
ref: McDonald adalah diplomat New Zealand kedua yang diusir oleh Fiji.

src: In June 2007 then-New Zealand High Commissioner Michael Green was expelled after being accused of interfering in the country's domestic affairs.
ref: Pada bulan Jun 2007 Pesuruhjaya Tinggi New Zealand pada masa itu Michael Green dipecat selepas dituduh bercampur tangan dalam urusan dalaman negara.

src: Last week ONE News Pacific Correspondent Barbara Dreaver was deported as she arrived to cover the crisis.
ref: Minggu lalu Koresponden ONE News Pasific Barbara Dreaver dihantar pulang kerana dia tiba untuk meliputi krisis itu.

src: Fiji's military overthrew the country's elected government in a military coup in December 2006.
ref: Tentera Fiji menggulingkan kerajaan yang dipilih negara itu dalam rampasan kuasa tentera pada Disember 2006.

src: Wikileaks has obtained and released a list of all 3,863 websites that are being censored by Danish Internet Service Providers as of February 2008.
ref: Wikileaks telah mendapatkan dan mengeluarkan senarai semua 3,863 laman web yang ditapis oleh Perkhidmatan Pembekal Internet Danish pada Februari 2008. Sistem yang digunakan untuk menapis keluar pornografi kanak-kanak walaupun Wikileaks menunjukkan "boleh digunakan untuk menapis apa-apa sahaja" dan mendakwa "sebahagian besar senarai itu masih ditapis (i.

src: The system is used to filter out child pornography, although Wikileaks points out it "can be used to censor anything" and claims "most sites on the list are still censored (i.e must be on the current list), even though many have clearly changed owners or were possibly even wrongly placed on the list."
ref: e mesti dalam senarai terbaru), walaupun banyak yang jelas telah berubah milik atau berkemungkinan diletakkan di tempat yang salah dalam senarai".

src: We discussed the unusual leak with them, and the results are published here.
ref: Kami berbincang kebocoran luar biasa tersebut dengan mereka, dan keputusannya disiarkan di sini.

src: We asked if Wikileaks was worried about the criminal implications of linking to so much illegal content, but they were not.
ref: Kami bertanya adakah Wikileaks bimbang mengenai implikasi jenayah yang menghubungkan kandungan yang menyalahi undang-undang, tetapi mereka tidak.

src: We asked them if they were "concerned about the possibility of censorship in the UK, Denmark, Finland etc.?"
ref: Kami bertanya adakah mereka "ambil kisah akan kemungkinan penapisan di UK, Denmark, Finland dll.

src: "No," Wikileaks told us "We welcome it."
ref: "Tidak," Wikileaks berkata kepada kami "Kami mengalu-alukan itu".

src: Wikinews wondered if this was because of the Streisand effect, but Wikileaks said it was "because it will demonstrate how censorship systems are abused."
ref: Wikinews tertanya-tanya adakah ini kerana kesan Streisand, tetapi Wikileaks mengatakan bahawa ia adalah "kerana ia akan menunjukkan bagaimana sistem penapisan telah dicemari".

src: After seeking clarification, Wikinews was told "the question is not what we need to be told.
ref: Selepas mencari klarifikasi, Wikinews telah diberitahu "persoalannya bukanlah apa yang patut kami beritahu.

src: The question is what we need not to be told and who decides.
ref: Persoalannya adalah apa yang tidak perlu kami diberitahu dan siapa yang menentukan.

src: Wikinews then asked why they didn't leave the full list available, but mark which sites they felt should not be censored.
ref: Wikinews kemudian bertanya mengapa mereka tidak meninggalkan senarai penuh diperolehi, tetapi menanda laman mana yang mereka rasakan tidak perlu ditapiskan.

src: We have better things to do, was the response given.
ref: Kami mempunyai benda yang lebih baik untuk dilakukan, itu maklum balas yang diberikan.

src: And what would due process be?
ref: Dan apakah proses cukup matang?

src: The banks are politically a lot more powerful than the internet industry so this hasn't happened."
ref: Bank-bank adalah secara politiknya lebih berkuasa daripada industri internet jadi ini tidak pernah terjadi".

src: And should funds in these accounts be seized straight away, or simply frozen until a judge or similar clears their release?
ref: Dan sepatutnya dana dalam akaun-akaun ini terus dirampas, atau mudahnya dibekukan hingga hakim atau yang setaraf dengannya membebasan mereka?

src: "If the accounts are in-jurisdiction, they should be frozen and released or not at the end of the process.
ref: "Jika akaun-akaun dalam bidang kuasa, mereka sepatutnya dibekukan dan dimbebaskan atau tidak dibebaskannya di akhir proses.

src: Wikileaks then added "As an analogy, one might argue that everyone should have a loaded gun in the house to protect themselves against home invasions.
ref: Wikileaks kemudian menambah "Sebagai satu analogi, seseorang mungkin mempertikaikan bahawa semua orang sepatutnya memiliki pistol di rumah utuk mempertahankan diri mereka daripada pencerobohan rumah.

src: This seems perfectly reasonable; however experience has shown that once the gun is in the house, it will find other targets."
ref: Ini kelihatan sangat munasabah; walau bagaimanapun pengalaman menunjukkan bahawa apabila pistol berada di rumah, ia akan mencari sasaran lain".

src: Lower house deputies approved the Motion of Confidence by a majority of 88 votes to 45, with no abstentions.
ref: Timbalan rendah meluluskan Usul Keyakinan dengan majoriti 88 undi kepada 45, tanpa berkecuali.

src: Don't judge the government... by its intentions but by its results, but no results in the very short-term, judge us in 2011, Van Rompuy told the lawmakers.
ref: Jangan menilai kerajaan...berdasarkan niat mereka tetapi berdasarkan hasilnya, tetapi tiada hasil dalam jangka masa pendek, nilailah kami pada tahun 2011, Van Rompuy memberitahu penggubal undang-undang.

src: In his declaration, he urged the passage of bills to rejuvenate an ailing economy heading into deep recession and sought to resolve the 18 months political crisis after the country spent over nine months in caretaker rule.
ref: Dalam pengakuan beliau, beliau menggesa rang undang-undang tersebut diluluskan untuk memberi nafas baru kepada ekonomi yang tenat menuju ke arah kemelesetan dan untuk cuba menyelesaikan krisis politik 18 bulan selepas lebih sembilan bulan negara berada dibawah pemerintahan sementara.

src: He also asked for full restoration of confidence amid the near-collapse of the country’s two largest banks.
ref: Beliau juga meminta keyakinan yang penuh semula berikutan hampir jatuhnya dua bank terbesar di negara itu.

src: The previous government proposed such a plan (pumping 2 billion euros or $2.84 billion, into the economy next year, part of a 200 billion euro EU-wide stimulus package).
ref: Kerajaan sebelum ini mencadangkan rancangan tersebut (menambah 2 bilion euro atau $2.84 bilion, ke dalam ekonomi tahun depan, sebahagian daripada 200 bilion euro pakej rangsangan EU).

src: It must be enacted as soon as possible, Van Rompuy said.
ref: Ia perlu digubal secepat mungkin, kata Van Rompuy.

src: It is clear that in the coming weeks and months the government will take new initiatives to cope with the challenges that the crisis poses for the economy and employment, he added.
ref: Adalah jelas bahawa dalam beberapa minggu dan bulan akan datang kerajaan akan mengambil inisiatif baru untuk menangani cabaran-cabaran yang menimbulkan krisis kepada ekonomi dan pekerjaan, katanya.

src: Van Rompuy, age 61, is a conservative Belgian Flemish politician and member of the CD&V (formerly called CVP) who succeeds Yves Leterme.
ref: Van Rompuy, 61 tahun, adalah seorang ahli politik konservatif Belgian Flemish dan ahli CD&V (sebelum ini dikenali sebagai CVP) yang menjayakan Yves Leterme.

src: On December 28, 2008, he was asked by King Albert II to form a new Government after he was reluctant to take up the role of Prime Minister after the Leterme I government had fallen on 22 December 2008 due to the bank bailout scandal.
ref: Pada 28 Disember, 2008, beliau telah diminta oleh Raja Albert II untuk membentuk kerajaan baru selepas dia enggan mengambil jawatan Perdana Menteri selepas kerajaan Leterme I jatuh pada 22 Disember 2008 disebabkan oleh skandal menyelamatkan bank.

src: The Van Rompuy I Government became the new federal government of Belgium on December 30.
ref: Kerajaan Van Rompuy I menjadi kerajaan persekutuan baru Belgium pada 30 Disember.

src: Eighteen of the 22 ministers served in the same posts in Prime Minister Yves Leterme's government.
ref: Lapan belas daripada 22 menteri berkhidmat dalam jawatan yang sama dalam kerajaan Perdana Menteri Yves Leterme.

src: Prime Minister Yves Leterme offered the resignation of his government on December 18 to King Albert after a crisis erupted surrounding the sale of troubled Fortis bank to BNP Paribas.
ref: Perdana Menteri Yves Leterme menawarkan perletakan jawatan kerajaannya pada 18 Disember kepada King Albert selepas krisis meletus sekitar penjualan bank Fortis yang bermasalah kepada BNP Paribas.

src: Leterme, Justice Minister Jo Vandeurzen, and Didier Reynders were accused of violating the separation of powers and exerting improper influence by trying to influence the Court of Appeals; this accusation was made by the First Chairman of the Court of Cassation.
ref: Leterme, Menteri Kehakiman Jo Vandeurzen, dan Didier Reynders dituduh melanggar pengasingan kuasa dan menggunakan pengaruh yang tidak sepatutnya dengan cuba untuk mempengaruhi Mahkamah Rayuan; tuduhan ini telah dibuat oleh Pengerusi Pertama Mahkamah Keadilan.

src: Three days later the resignation was accepted by the king.
ref: Tiga hari kemudian peletakan jawatan itu diterima oleh raja.

src: It is a founding member of the European Union and hosts its headquarters, as well as those of other major international organizations, including NATO.
ref: Ia adalah ahli pengasas Kesatuan Eropah dan menjadi menguruskan ibu pejabat, dan juga pertubuhan antarabangsa utama lain, termasuk NATO.

src: Belgium shares borders with France (620 km), Germany (167 km), Luxembourg (148 km) and the Netherlands (450 km).
ref: Belgium berkongsi sempadan dengan Perancis (620 km), Jerman (167 km), Luxembourg (148 km) dan Belanda (450 km).

src: WFP officials said that they have begun to give bread to 15,000 new recipients, a number which added to the already large group of people that had been lining up for bread after two years of Israeli blockades of Gaza, the most recent of which began in early November.
ref: Pegawai WFP berkata mereka telah mula memberikan roti kepada 15,000 penerima baru, jumlah yang mana ditambah kepada kumpulan besar orang yang telah berbaris untuk roti selepas dua tahun sekatan Israel ke atas Gaza, yang terbaru bermula pada awal November.

src: The blockades, surely a catalyst for violent Hamas attacks, have been condemned by Human Rights Watch as a "violation of international humanitarian law."
ref: Sekatan, sudah pasti menjadi pemangkin kepada serangan ganas Hamas, telah dikutuk oleh Pemerhati Hak Kemanusiaan sebagai "melanggar undang-undang kemanusiaan antarabangsa".

src: Struggling Gazan hospitals say that they are completely out of even the most basic medical supplies and have little or no capacity to deal with further casualties.
ref: Hospital Gaza yang sedang berjuang berkata mereka telah kehabisan termasuklah bekalan perubatan paling asas dan mempunyai sedikit atau tidak berkapasiti untuk menangani mangsa kecederaan.

src: As sewage runs through the streets, many Gazans are trying to flee the area by storming the border with Egypt, a move which Egyptian police blocked on Sunday and are planning to do so again today as Egyptian leaders ordered their policemen to open fire on Gazans trying to flee into Egypt.
ref: Sisa kumbahan mengalir melalui jalan-jalan, ramai orang Gaza cuba melarikan diri dengan menyerbu masuk sempadan dengan Egypt, pergerakan dimana ia telah dihalang oleh polis Egypt pada Ahad dan bercadang untuk melakukannya lagi hari ini seperti yang diarahkan pemimpin Egypt kepada polis mereka untuk melepaskan tembakan terhadap penduduk Gaza yang cuba melarikan diri memasuki Egypt.

src: "There is no comparison between what we have and what [Israel] are doing to us."
ref: "Tiada apa yang dapat dibandingkan dengan apa yang kami ada dan apa yang [Israel] lakukan ke atas kami".

src: During a Palestinian rally in Qalqilyah in the West Bank against Israeli attacks on Gaza, Mufid Saleh Walweel, 22, was shot and killed Sunday by Israeli forces, according to Palestinian medical officials.
ref: Semasa perhimpunan Palestin di Qalqilyah di Tebing Barat menentang serangan Israel ke atas Gaza, Mufid Saleh Walweel, 22, telah ditembak dan dibunuh pada hari Ahad oleh tentera Israel, menurut pegawai perubatan Palestin.

src: Meanwhile protests around the world took place in response to Israel's latest attacks and ground assault on Gaza.
ref: Sementara itu protes di seluruh dunia berlaku sebagai tindak balas kepada serangan Israel terkini dan serangan darat ke atas Gaza.

src: On Friday in Chicago, 4,000 people marched from Tribune Plaza to the Israeli Consulate demanding an end to the occupation of Palestine, and to the raids on Gaza.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat di Chicago, 4,000 orang berarak dari Plaza Tribune ke Konsulat Israel untuk menuntut penamatan pendudukan Palestin, dan serangan ke atas Gaza.

src: On the same day in Toronto, Canada, 1,000 people gathered in the business district to protest Israeli actions.
ref: Pada hari yang sama di Toronto, Kanada, 1,000 orang berkumpul di kawasan perniagaan itu untuk membantah tindakan Israel.

src: In addition 10,000 people marched past United Kingdom Prime Minister Gordon Brown's residence in London, hurling hundreds of shoes at his home.
ref: Di samping itu 10,000 orang berarak melalui kediaman Perdana Menteri United Kingdom Gordon Brown di London, melemparkan ratusan kasut pada rumahnya.

src: Louis Michel, the European Union's humanitarian aid commissioner said in a statement on Sunday that "blocking access to people who are suffering and dying is also a breach of humanitarian law."
ref: Louis Michel, pesuruhjaya bantuan kemanusiaan Kesatuan Eropah, berkata dalam satu kenyataan pada hari Ahad bahawa "sekatan akses terhadap mereka yang menderita dan hampir mati juga merupakan pelanggaran undang-undang kemanusiaan".

src: But the IAJV had found a sizeable minority of Australian Jews who valued an independent perspective as opposed to the blindly pro-Israel position.
ref: Tetapi IAJV telah menemui sebilangan besar daripada minoriti Australia Yahudi yang mementingkan perspektif bebas yang bertentangan dengan kedudukan pro-Israel yang membuta tuli.

src: "However, since Palestinians have no means of self-defence against the most powerful military force in the Middle East."
ref: "Walau bagaimanapun, kerana rakyat Palestin tidak mempunyai cara untuk mempertahankan diri daripada kuasa yang paling berkuasa tentera di Timur Tengah".

src: "We particularly call on Israel to end its brutal assault on the vulnerable Palestinian people of Gaza and to reconsider its rejection of the United Nations Security Council's call for a ceasefire," the statement said.
ref: "Kami amat menyeru Israel menghentikan serangan kejam terhadap rakyat Palestin terdedah Gaza dan menimbang semula penolakan panggilan Majlis Keselamatan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu untuk gencatan senjata," kata kenyataan itu.

src: "History has demonstrated that military punishment has never broken the spirit of a people or produced peace," added the statement.
ref: "Sejarah telah menunjukkan bahawa hukuman tentera tidak pernah mematahkan semangat orang-orang atau menghasilkan keamanan," kata kenyataan itu.

src: "Above all, it would undermine attempts to work with peace-seeking Palestinians for a lasting, just solution."
ref: "Paling penting, ia akan menjejaskan usaha untuk bekerjasama dengan rakyat Palestin yang mahukan keamanan untuk penyelesaian yang adil dan berkekalan".

src: "They propose that the population of southern Israel must continue to live under constant rocket bombardment, opposing all practical efforts to actually invoke the right to self-defence the signatories say they recognize," he said.
ref: "Mereka mencadangkan bahawa penduduk selatan Israel mesti terus hidup di bawah pengeboman roket berterusan, menentang segala usaha praktikal untuk benar-benar memohon hak untuk mempertahankan diri penandatangan yang mengatakan mereka mengiktiraf," katanya.

src: The United Nations (UN) suspended all of its operations in Gaza from yesterday, after the bombing of a convoy of UN aid trucks which killed one Palestinian driver, and wounded three others.
ref: Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu (UN) menggantung semua operasi di Gaza dari semalam, selepas pengeboman konvoi lori bantuan UN yang mengorbankan seorang pemandu Palestin, dan mencederakan tiga yang lain.

src: Thursday was the second day of attacks on UN targets after three UN schools housing refugees were bombed on Tuesday, killing over 50 civilians.
ref: Khamis merupakan hari kedua serangan ke atas sasaran UN selepas tiga sekolah UN yang didiami pelarian telah dibom pada hari Selasa, membunuh lebih 50 orang awam.

src: The bombing of the UN trucks was the last straw for the UN, already angered after Israeli tanks fired on a UN school housing refugees killing 50 including an entire family of seven young children.
ref: Pengeboman lori-lori UN merupakan amaran terakhir bagi UN, telah menimbulkan kemarahan selepas kereta kebal Israel melepaskan tembakan pada sekolah UN yang didiami pelarian membunuh 50 orang termasuk sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai tujuh kanak-kanak.

src: More schools were attacked including the al-Fakhora School killing 40 people, many of them women and children.
ref: Lebih banyak sekolah telah diserang termasuk Sekolah al-Fakhora yang telah membunuh 40 orang, kebanyakannya wanita dan kanak-kanak.

src: Hours before the attack on the al-Fakhora School was an attack on Asma Elementary School which killed three Palestinian cousins.
ref: Beberapa jam sebelum serangan ke atas Sekolah al-Fakhora berlaku serangan ke atas Sekolah Rendah Asma yang mengorbankan tiga sepupu Palestin.

src: The cousin's father said the bodies were so mangled he couldn't tell the bodies apart, "We came to the school when the Israelis warned us to leave," he said.
ref: Ayah sepupu itu berkata badan-badan mereka begitu remuk sehingganya tidak dapat membezakan badan-badan mereka, "Kami datang ke sekolah apabila Israel memberi amaran kepada kita untuk pergi," katanya.

src: A relative came and told me one of my sons was killed.
ref: Seorang saudara datang dan memberitahu saya salah seorang anak lelaki saya telah dibunuh.

src: After getting there, they said, they found four starving children sitting next to the bodies of their dead mothers.
ref: Selepas sampai di sana, mereka berkata, mereka menemui empat orang kanak-kanak kelaparan duduk di sebelah mayat ibu-ibu mereka yang sudah mati.

src: "This is a shocking incident", said Pierre Wettach, ICRC chief for Israel and the occupied Palestinian territories.
ref: "Ini adalah kejadian yang mengejutkan," kata Pierre Wettach, Ketua ICRC untuk Israel dan wilayah kuasa Palestin.

src: Neither did they make it possible for us or the Palestinian Red Crescent to assist the wounded.
ref: Mereka juga tidak membolehkan kami atau Bulan Sabit Merah Palestin membantu mangsa yang cedera.

src: Israel granted a three-hour ceasefire yesterday that they gave for aid workers to enter areas that they had closed off.
ref: Israel membenarkan gencatan senjata selama tiga jam semalam untuk pekerja bantuan untuk memasuki kawasan-kawasan yang mereka telah tutup.

src: Yesterday, a Palestinian man was killed by Israeli forces after a confrontation in the West Bank Jewish settlement of Ma'ale Adumim near Jerusalem.
ref: Semalam, seorang lelaki Palestin telah dibunuh oleh tentera Israel selepas konfrontasi di penempatan Yahudi di Tebing Barat Ma'ale Adumim berhampiran Jerusalem.

src: Fighting has continued since the resolution, and yesterday Israel warned of increased military action.
ref: Pergaduhan telah berlaku sejak resolusi itu, dan semalam Israel memberi amaran akan meningkatkan tindakan ketenteraan.

src: US Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice has given an explanation for why the United States abstained and did not veto the resolution.
ref: Setiausaha Amerika Syarikat Beras Negara Condoleezza telah memberi penjelasan mengapa Amerika Syarikat mengecualikan diri dan tidak memberi kuasa veto terhadap resolusi itu.
