src: ...But after a great deal of consideration, we decided that this resolution, the text of which we support, the goals of which we support, and the objectives that we fully support, should indeed be allowed to go forward.
ref: ...Tetapi selepas pertimbangan terhadap tawaran hebat, kami memutuskan bahawa resolusi ini, petikan yang mana kami sokong, matlamat yang kami sokong, dan objektif yang kami sokong sepenuhnya, seharusnya dibenarkan untuk diteruskan.

src: I believe in doing so, the council has provided a roadmap for a sustainable, durable peace in Gaza.
ref: Saya percaya dengan ini, majlis telah menyediakan pelan hala tuju yang beterusan, keamanan yang kekal di Gaza.

src: But we are really satisfied with the outcome so far.
ref: Tetapi kami sangat berpuas hati dengan keputusan setakat ini.

src: What really concerns us the most is the immediate applicability of the resolution on ground.
ref: Apa yang membimbangkan kami sekarang ialah tindakan segera terhadap alasan resolusi itu.

src: We fear, and we have reasons to do so, that Israel will delay its acceptance and implementation of the cease-fire for few hours, if not few days.
ref: Kami takut, dan kami ada sebab berbuat begitu, bahawa Israel akan melambatkan penerimaan dan perlaksanaan gencatan senjata selama beberapa jam, kalau tidak beberapa hari.

src: United Nations aid agency UNRWA resumed aid shipments yesterday, after halting them on Thursday citing safety risks.
ref: Agensi bantuan Bangsa Bersatu UNRWA menghantar bantuan semula semalam, selepas menghentikan mereka pada Khamis selepas berdepan risiko keselamatan.

src: A significant portion of the American LGBT media landscape is about to become a conglomerate.
ref: Sebahagian besar daripada landskap media Amerika LGBT akan menjadi konglomerat.

src: (PlanetOut.com, Gay.com) sent out a press release stating it signed a definitive merger agreement with Here Networks LLC (operator of cable network here!)
ref: (PlanetOut.com, Gay.com) mengeluarkan satu kenyataan akhbar yang menyatakan ia menandatangani perjanjian penggabungan muktamad dengan Here Networks LLC (pengendali rangkaian kabel here!

src: and Regent Entertainment Media Inc. (properties including magazines The Advocate, Out).
ref: ) dan Regent Entertainment Media Inc. (aset termasuk majalah The Advocate, Out).

src: The deal comes after PlanetOut had been on the market for nearly a year.
ref: Tawaran datang selepas PlanetOut telah berada di pasaran selama hampir setahun.

src: The company sold its magazine and book publishing businesses back in April, and its vacation company in December.
ref: Syarikat itu menjual perniagaan majalah dan penerbitan buku ia pada bulan April lalu, dan syarikat percutian pada bulan Disember.

src: Its unknown whether any of struggling PlanetOut's jobs will be cut.
ref: Tidak diketahui sama ada mana-mana pekerjaan di PlanetOut yang bergelut akan dipotong.

src: Plans are for all three companies to operate separately, as of subsidiaries of Here Media.
ref: Rancangan adalah untuk ketiga-tiga syarikat beroperasi secara berasingan, sebagai anak syarikat Here Media.

src: The agreement still has to be approved by a majority of PlanetOut common stock holders, comply with regulatory filings and approvals, and meet various closing conditions.
ref: Perjanjian itu masih perlu diluluskan oleh majoriti pemegang saham biasa PlanetOut, mematuhi pemfailan dan kelulusan, dan memenuhi pelbagai syarat yang terkandung tertutup.

src: According to the news agency, other television news stations called Al-Alam and Al Arabiya are also based inside the building.
ref: Menurut agensi berita itu, stesen berita televisyen lain yang digelar Al-Alam dan Al Arabiya juga berpangkalan di dalam bangunan tersebut.

src: There was no warning prior to the attack and only journalists were inside the building when the rocket hit.
ref: Tiada amaran sebelum serangan itu dan hanya wartawan berada di dalam bangunan tersebut semasa roket menghentam.

src: Press TV uses the roof of their building to broadcast most of their live video feeds of Gaza.
ref: Press TV menggunakan bumbung bangunan mereka untuk menyiarkan kebanyakan video siaran langsung mereka untuk sedutan Gaza.

src: Despite the claim by witnesses and Press TV employees, a spokesperson for the IDF states that the building was not a target and was likely a result of "collateral damage."
ref: Walaupun dakwaan saksi dan pekerja Press TV, seorang jurucakap IDF menyatakan bahawa bangunan itu bukanlah sasaran dan berkemungkinan disebabkan oleh "kerosakan cagaran".

src: The flooding is mainly in the western part of the country's main island, Viti Levu, where most of the resorts hosting international travellers are located.
ref: Banjir tertumpu di bahagian barat pulau utama negara ini, Viti Levu, di mana terletaknya kebanyakan resort yang dihuni pelancong antarabangsa.

src: Fiji's National Disaster Office has advised all tourists still in the country to prepare for more bad weather and possibly more flooding.
ref: Pejabat Bencana Negara Fiji telah menasihati semua pelancong yang masih berada di negara ini untuk bersiap sedia menghadapi cuaca yang lebih buruk dan kemungkinan banjir yang lebih teruk.

src: Fiji's chief of disaster management Aisea Qumihajelo said in a statement, "There's another depression heading toward Fiji within the next two days and that will bring an additional threat."
ref: Ketua pengurusan bencana Fiji Aisea Qumihajelo berkata dalam satu kenyataan, "Ada musibah lain menuju ke arah Fiji dalam tempoh dua hari akan datang yang akan membawa ancaman tambahan".

src: Over 6,000 people have evacuated the area and are now in one of Fiji's 144 evacuation centers sheltered from the storm.
ref: Lebih 6,000 orang telah dipindahkan daripada kawasan itu dan kini berada di salah satu daripada 144 pusat pemindahan Fiji yang terlindung daripada ribut.

src: Government sources have reported that at least six people have been killed by floodwaters, and two people were crushed by a landslide.
ref: Sumber-sumber kerajaan telah melaporkan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya enam orang terbunuh disebabkan oleh air banjir, dan dua orang telah ditimpa tanah runtuh.

src: "Widespread flooding, including severe flooding of major rivers and streams, is expected on Wednesday and Thursday."
ref: "Dijangka banjir yang meluas, termasuk banjir teruk di sungai utama dan anak sungai, pada hari Rabu dan Khamis".

src: Vetaia Dokonivalu, a local resident from Ba, a hard-hit town, commented, "It was really frightening."
ref: Vetaia Dokonivalu, seorang penduduk tempatan dari Ba, sebuah bandar yang teruk terjejas, berkata, "Ia sangat mengerikan".

src: "We watched as the doors of our homes were forced open by the water."
ref: "Kami menyaksikan pintu rumah kami terbuka ditolak oleh air".

src: This flooding has also caused a food crisis in some parts.
ref: Banjir ini juga telah menyebabkan krisis makanan di beberapa bahagian.

src: Isimeli Tukana, a health official, said, "People need to collect as much rainwater as possible and drink as much of this as possible."
ref: Isimeli Tukana, seorang pegawai kesihatan, berkata, "Orang ramai perlu mengumpul air hujan sebanyak yang mungkin dan minum air tersebut sebanyak yang mungkin".

src: Israel's Central Election Committee voted yesterday to disqualify two Arab political parties from running in the country's general elections scheduled for February 10th.
ref: Jawatankuasa Pemilihan Pusat Israel semalam telah mengundi untuk membatalkan dua parti politik Arab dari bertanding dalam pilihan raya umum di negara ini yang dijadualkan pada 10 Februari.

src: Arabs constitute one fifth of the population in Israel but only have twelve of 120 parliamentary seats.
ref: Orang Arab merupakan satu perlima daripada penduduk di Israel tetapi hanya mempunyai dua belas daripada 120 kerusi Parlimen.

src: Services were slowly restored after an unscheduled strike by SNCF drivers closed one of Paris's six main railway stations.
ref: Semua perkhidmatan secara perlahan-lahan telah dipulihkan selepas serangan tidak dijadualkan oleh pemandu SNCF yang menutup salah satu daripada enam stesen kereta api utama di Paris.

src: Gare Saint-Lazare was closed from 10 am local time on Tuesday morning.
ref: Gare Saint-Lazare telah ditutup dari pukul 10 am waktu tempatan pada pagi Selasa.

src: 22 million counterfeit cigarettes have been found in Cardiff, Wales by officials working for HM Revenue & Customs (HMRC).
ref: 22 juta rokok palsu telah ditemui di Cardiff, Wales oleh pegawai-pegawai yang bekerja untuk HM Hasil & Kastam (HMRC).

src: The details of the discovery, which took place on December 19 last year, has only just been made public.
ref: Butiran mengenai penemuan itu, yang berlaku pada 19 Disember tahun lepas, baru sahaja diumumkan.

src: The HMRC have stated that they have worked to find the source of the illegal products during the time since the discovery was made.
ref: HMRC telah menyatakan bahawa mereka telah bekerja untuk mencari sumber produk haram ini sejak penemuan itu dibuat.

src: "Had it been successful, it would have undermined the business of honest traders who only sell duty paid tobacco products," he continued.
ref: "Sekiranya ia berjaya, ia akan menjejaskan perniagaan peniaga jujur yang hanya menjual produk tembakau yang cukai telah dibayar," katanya lagi.

src: "The sheer quantity involved in this attempt suggests these cigarettes could have ended up in locations across the UK."
ref: "Kuantiti sebenar yang terlibat dalam usaha ini menunjukkan rokok ini boleh berada di lokasi seluruh UK".

src: "We have prevented UK consumers from being conned into buying cigarettes that are counterfeit and could have more serious risk to health than legitimate brands."
ref: "Kami telah menghalang pengguna UK daripada ditipu untuk membeli rokok palsu dan mempunyai risiko yang lebih serius kepada kesihatan daripada jenama yang sah".

src: Sprint specialist Davis completed Sunday's final stage in the main pack to maintain the lead he had built up in time bonuses from sprint wins earlier in the race.
ref: Pakar pecut Davis menamatkan peringkat hari Ahad ini dalam kumpulan utama untuk mengekalkan kelebihan yang dia telah kumpulkan dalam bonus masa daripada pecutan yang dimenanginya dalam perlumbaan yang terdahulu.

src: American cyclist Lance Armstrong also participated in the race, his first professional bike race since the 2005 Tour de France.
ref: Pelumba Amerika Lance Armstrong juga telah mengambil bahagian dalam perlumbaan, perlumbaan basikal profesional pertama baginya sejak Tour de France 2005.

src: It is not clear if the seven-time Tour de France winner intended to compete for the general classification, but he did make an unsuccessful breakaway on Sunday in pursuit of a stage victory.
ref: Ianya tidak jelas jika pemenang tujuh kali Tour de France berhasrat untuk bersaing bagi klasifikasi umum, tetapi dia membuat pergerakan kehadapan yang tidak berjaya pada hari Ahad dalam mengejar kemenangan peringkat.

src: Despite several attacks over the week, Armstrong placed 29th in the general classification.
ref: Walaupun beberapa serangan sepanjang minggu, Armstrong di tempat ke-29 dalam klasifikasi umum.

src: The United Kingdom's flag carrier airline, British Airways (BA) has warned the markets that it will post a full year loss of up to £150 million.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan yang membawa bendera United Kingdom, British Airways (BA) telah memberi amaran kepada pasaran bahawa ia akan mencatatkan kerugian tahun penuh sehingga £150 juta.

src: The former state airline, privatised in 1987, saw its shares fall 8.5% on the back of an announcement that "further economic weakness in January and the outlook for February and March combined with the fall in sterling are impacting our outlook for the year", according to The Daily Telegraph.
ref: Bekas syarikat penerbangan negara itu, yang diswastakan pada tahun 1987, menyaksikan sahamnya jatuh 8.5% hasil daripada pengumuman bahawa "Kelemahan ekonomi seterusnya pada bulan Januari dan prospek bagi bulan Februari dan Mac digabungkan dengan kejatuhan sterling yang memberi kesan kepada prospek kami untuk tahun ini," menurut The Daily Telegraph.

src: Quarterly revenues are still anticipated to grow by 4%, but a full-year loss is now expected.
ref: Pendapatan suku tahunan masih dijangka tumbuh 4%, tetapi kerugian setahun kini dijangka.

src: Costs have risen in recent months, whilst the historic lows of sterling have hit the bottom line.
ref: Kos telah meningkat dalam beberapa bulan kebelakangan ini, manakala paras terendah dalam sejarah sterling telah melanda garis bawah.

src: First and Business Class traffic has fallen as the global credit crisis has hit premium and business travel.
ref: Pertama dan Kelas Perniagaan trafik telah jatuh kerana krisis kredit global telah melanda premium dan perjalanan perniagaan.

src: Fuel costs have fallen, but previous hedging has negated this benefit.
ref: Kos bahan api telah jatuh, tetapi nilai perlindungan sebelumnya telah menafikan manfaat ini.

src: The airline has been considering a merger with Spanish flag carrier Iberia, but The Guardian, relaying Reuters, reports that Iberia now has a larger market capitalisation than BA, changing the field of play.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan itu telah menimbangkan penggabungan dengan syarikat penerbangan Sepanyol Iberia, tetapi The Guardian, menyampaikan kepada Reuters, bahawa Iberia kini mempunyai permodalan pasaran yang lebih besar daripada BA, mengubah padang permainan.

src: The airline sector in general is facing trouble, with American and United posting fourth quarter losses and the Franco-Dutch Air France-KLM issuing a profits warning.
ref: Sektor penerbangan pada umumnya sedang menghadapi masalah dengan Amerika dan Amerika menghantar kerugian suku keempat dan Perancis-Belanda Air France-KLM mengeluarkan amaran keuntungan.

src: "If Apple decides to open the Mac OS to others, we would be happy to offer it to our customers," Dell wrote in an email to Kirkpatrick.
ref: "Jika Apple menetapkan untuk membuka Mac Os kepada lain, kami amat gembira untuk menawarkannya kepada pelanggan," Dell telah menulis email kepada Kirkpatrick.

src: Apple recently announced that it would begin using Intel x86 microprocessors in its computers next year, but has continued to deny reports that they will allow their OS to be run on non-Apple hardware.
ref: Apple baru-baru ini mengumumkan yang ia akan mula menggunakan mikropemproses Intel x86 dalam komputernya tahun depan, tetapi terus menafikan repot mengatakan mereka akan membenarkan OS mereka digunakan oleh perkakasan bukan Apple.

src: The workers are taking unofficial action in support of a three day strike at Lindsey Oil Refinery in Lincolnshire, England.
ref: Para pekerja mengambil tindakan tidak rasmi ini dalam menyokong mogok tiga hari di Kilang Penyuligan Minyak Lindsey di Lincolnshire, England.

src: Staff have walked out at sites in Scotland, Wales and Teesside in north eastern England.
ref: Pekerja telah berjalan keluar di kilang-kilang di Scotland, Wales dan Teesside di utara timur England.

src: The original strike was called over the awarding of a contract by refinery owners Total to an Italian company.
ref: Mogok asal dimulakan atas pemberian kontrak oleh pemilik kilang penapis minyak Total kepada syarikat Itali.

src: This brought 300 Italian and Portuguese workers on to the site.
ref: Ini membawa 300 pekerja Itali dan Portugis ke kilang tersebut.

src: The latest reports say workers at the UK's main oil refinery at Grangemouth in Scotland have come out in sympathy, as have workers at the former ICI plant on Teesside in England and at the nearby Corus steel plant.
ref: Laporan terkini mengatakan bahawa pekerja di kilang penapisan minyak utama di UK di Grangemouth di Scotland telah mogok kerana simpati, begitu juga pekerja di kilang ICI terdahulu di Teesside di England dan di kilang keluli Corus yang berhampiran.

src: Workers have walked out at a power station in Aberthaw in south Wales and at plants at Fidler's Ferry in Cheshire, at Lackenby in Teesside and at the gas terminals near Peterhead in Scotland and Milford Haven in Wales.
ref: Pekerja telah berjalan keluar di stesen janakuasa di Aberthaw di selatan Wales dan di kilang-kilang di Feri Fidler di Cheshire, di Lackenby di Teesside dan di terminal gas berhampiran Peterhead di Scotland dan Milford Haven di Wales.

src: Secondary industrial action has been illegal in the United Kingdom since the 1980s.
ref: Tindakan mogok kesetiakawanan menyalahi undang-undang di United Kingdom sejak tahun 1980-an.

src: The British rail regulator has announced new train services for the country's premier line.
ref: Pengawal atur kereta api British telah mengumumkan perkhidmatan kereta api baru bagi laluan utama di negara ini.

src: New "open access" (unregulated and non-franchised) company Grand Northern is to be given space (known in the industry as "paths") to run three train services a day between London King's Cross and Bradford, Halifax, Wakefield and Pontefract in West Yorkshire.
ref: "Akses terbuka" yang baru (yang tidak terkawal dan bukan francais) syarikat Grand Northern akan diberi ruang (dikenali dalam industri itu sebagai "laluan") untuk menjalankan tiga perkhidmatan kereta api sehari antara King's Cross di London dan Bradford, Halifax, Wakefield dan Pontefract di West Yorkshire.

src: Grand Northern's sister open access company Grand Central was given an extra path to increase services between King's Cross and Sunderland.
ref: Akses terbuka syarikat saudara Grand Northern, Grand Central telah diberi laluan tambahan untuk meningkatkan perkhidmatan antara King's Cross dan Sunderland.

src: It was replaced by a series of privately owned regional train franchises for set periods, several unfranchised open access services and a track control and maintenance company.
ref: Ia telah digantikan dengan satu siri francais kereta api serantau milik persendirian untuk tempoh yang ditetapkan, beberapa perkhidmatan akses terbuka tanpa francais dan sebuah syarikat kawalan landasan dan penyelenggaraan.

src: The voter turnout was around 57% of all eligible voters, which number 18 million people in a country of 21.7 million.
ref: Jumlah pengundi kira-kira 57% dari pengundi yang layak, yang berjumlah 18 juta orang dari 21.7 juta dalam negara.

src: Called the Truth and Justice Alliance, the main opposition is a union of candidates from the National Liberal Party and the Democrat Party.
ref: Dipanggil sebagai Pakatan Benar dan Kebenaran, tujuan pembangkang adalah untuk calon bersekutu dari Parti Liberal Nasional dan Parti Demokratik.

src: While PSD+PUR is currently leading, the most hotly-contested election in Romania's post-Communist history may come down to the run-off, to be held on December 12.
ref: Sementara PSD+PUR sekarang mendahului, pilihanraya paling panas dalam sejarah selepas Komunis Romania yang mungkin akan turun, akan diadakan pada 12 Disember.

src: Năstase's PSD+PUR coalition was also supported because they are credited with saving Romania from economic collapse during their presidential and legislative term from 2000 until the present time.
ref: Gabungan PSD+PUR Nastase telah disokong kerana mereka berbakat dalam memulihkan kejatuhan ekonomi Romania sebagai syarat untuk legasi dan presiden dari 2000 hingga sekarang.

src: In 2004, the economy is expected to grow by 8.6%, the highest rate in Europe.
ref: Pada 2004, ekonomi dijangka tumbuh sebanyak 8.6%, kadar tertinggi di eropah.

src: Băsescu won a majority in Bucharest, Romania's capital, as well as in the wealthier cities of Transylvania.
ref: Basescu menang majoriti di Bucharest, ibu negara Romania, juga bandar terkaya Transylvania.

src: In the legislative election, the PSD+PUR coalition obtained 40% of the vote, while the Truth and Justice alliance trailed with 35%.
ref: Dalam pemilihan legasi, gabungan PSD+PUR menerima 40% undian, manakala akatan Benar dan Keadilan mendapat 35%.

src: Because the PSD+PUR coalition did not gather the majority of the votes (50%+1), it will have to form a governing coalition with the minor parties, a process which is expected to be tedious given the fact that both of the major parties have ruled out entering into a coalition with ultra-nationalist The Greater Romania Party, which obtained around 12% of the vote.
ref: Oleh kerana gabungan PSD+PUR tidak mendapat undian majoriti (50%+1) ianya harus membuat gabungan kerajaan dengan parti minoriti, proses dimana dijangka untuk berlaku bahawa parti itu harus membentuk gabungan dengan ultra-nasionalis Parti Kemegahan Romania, yang mendapat 12% undian.

src: A trial date has been set in a fraud case against the Church of Scientology in France.
ref: Satu tarikh perbicaraan telah ditetapkan dalam kes penipuan terhadap Gereja Saintologi di Perancis.

src: The date for the first hearing has been set for May 25, 2009.
ref: Tarikh bagi perbicaraan pertama telah ditetapkan pada 25 Mei 2009.

src: Prosecutors claim that the Church is engaged in illicit practices in attempts to sell their alleged self-help material.
ref: Pendakwa mendakwa bahawa Gereja itu terlibat dalam amalan haram dalam cubaan untuk menjual bahan yang dikatakan berunsur bantuan diri.

src: The Church also faces charges of illegally operating as a pharmacy by illegally treating individuals with prescription medications.
ref: Gereja itu juga menghadapi tuduhan beroperasi secara haram sebagai farmasi kerana merawat individu dengan ubat-ubatan preskripsi secara haram.

src: The charges come from an unnamed woman, who in 1998 purchased nearly 140,000₣ (US$30,000) worth of Scientology self-help material which allegedly included prescription drugs.
ref: Tuduhan itu datang dari seorang wanita yang tidak dinamakan, yang pada tahun 1998 membeli bahan bantu diri Saintologi yang bernilai hampir 140,000₣ (US$30,000) yang dikatakan termasuk ubat-ubatan preskripsi.

src: Following several complaints from other unnamed individuals and an investigation, judge Jean-Christophe Hullin ordered the Church's 'Celebrity Center', and the seven managers to be put on trial for fraud and "illegally practicing as pharmacists."
ref: Berikutan beberapa aduan daripada seorang lagi individu yang tidak dinamakan dan satu siasatan, hakim Jean-Christophe Hullin mengarahkan 'Pusat Selebriti'Gereja tersebut, dan tujuh pengurus akan dibicarakan kerana penipuan dan "beramal sebagai ahli farmasi secara tidak sah."

src: On September 8, 2008 the Church released a statement following the order to stand trial saying that they felt "stigmatized" by the French judicial system.
ref: Pada 8 September 2008, Gereja itu mengeluarkan satu kenyataan berikutan perintah itu untuk membicarakan tuduhan yang mengatakan bahawa mereka berasa "dinodai" oleh sistem kehakiman Perancis.

src: They have also been convicted of it several times, including the Church's founder, L. Ron Hubbard who was convicted of fraud in 1978.
ref: Mereka juga telah disabitkan atas tuduhan itu beberapa kali, termasuk pengasas Gereja, L. Ron Hubbard yang disabitkan kesalahan kerana penipuan dalam tahun 1978.

src: The 1978 convictions included Hubbard and four Scientologists after a seven year investigation into the Church by the French authorities.
ref: Sabitan pada thun 1978 termasuk Hubbard dan empat orang Saintologis selepas siasatan selama tujuh tahun atas Gereja itu oleh pihak berkuasa Perancis.

src: The court ruled that Hubbard and the others were using Scientology by making fraudulent claims that it was curing people from diseases to "increase the financial revenue" of the Church, and the ruling ordered Hubbard and the Scientologists to serve four years in prison.
ref: Mahkamah memutuskan bahawa Hubbard dan orang lain telah mempergunakan Saintologi dengan membuat tuntutan palsu bahawa ia menyembuhkan orang daripada penyakit untuk "meningkatkan hasil kewangan" Gereja, dan perintah hakim meminta Hubbard dan Saintologis itu ditahan empat tahun di dalam penjara.

src: However, Hubbard, along with the four Scientologists fled France, never to return, and never served a prison term.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Hubbard, bersama dengan empat orang Saintologis melarikan diri dari Perancis, dan tidak kembali lagi, dan tidak pernah menjalani hukuman penjara.

src: The new ordinance is expected to be passed this spring.
ref: Ordinan baru itu dijangka akan diluluskan pada musim bunga ini.

src: If it is approved by the local parliament on February 9 it should be effective on April 26.
ref: Jika ia diluluskan oleh parlimen tempatan pada 9 Februari ia sepatutnya berkuatkuasa pada 26 April.

src: The Swiss canton aims to stop spread of 'indecent practice' by minimally-clad German climbers.
ref: Kanton Swiss bertujuan untuk menghentikan tersebarnya 'kelakuan sumbang'oleh pendaki Jerman yang hampir tidak berpakaian.

src: The problem started with a group of "boot-only hikers" who were stopped by the police in the Alpine region last autumn.
ref: Masalahnya bermula dengan sekumpulan "pejalan kaki dengan but sahaja" yang telah ditahan oleh pihak polis di kawasan Alpine musim luruh lepas.

src: A nude rambler dressed in nothing more than a rucksack and walking boots in the eastern Appenzell region was arrested and detained in the canton, but authorities were unable to file lawsuit because the act was not punished by law or ordinance at the time.
ref: Seorang pejalan bogel yang berpakaian tidak lebih daripada beg sandang dan but berjalan di kawasan Appenzell timur telah ditangkap dan ditahan di kanton itu, tetapi pihak berkuasa tidak dapat memfailkan tuntutan mahkamah kerana perbuatan itu tidak dihukum oleh undang-undang atau ordinan pada masa itu.

src: “Ultimately, in the summer lots of kids stay in our mountains,” he added.
ref: "Akhirnya, pada musim panas ramai kanak-kanak tinggal di gunung kami," tambahnya.

src: In the guidelines imposed, arrested offenders who cannot pay the fine, will face legal action.
ref: Dalam garis panduan yang dikenakan, pesalah yang ditahan yang tidak mampu membayar denda, akan dikenakan tindakan undang-undang.

src: German tabloid Bild Zeitung has editorially attacked Swiss intolerance and even suggested nudist alternatives worldwide, after hinting a Swiss tourism boycott.
ref: Tabloid Jerman, Bild Zeitung telah menyerang dalam rencana khasnya mengenai sikap tidak bertoleransi Switzerland dan juga mencadangkan alternatif kepada nudis di seluruh dunia, selepas memberi tanda untuk boikot ke atas pelancongan Switzerland.

src: Local authorities of Harz mountain range in central Germany have also announced the openness to any visitor of an “official naked walking route” in nature's outdoors.
ref: Pihak berkuasa tempatan banjaran gunung Harz di tengah Jerman juga telah mengumumkan keterbukaan untuk mana-mana pelawat ke satu "laluan berjalan kaki bogel yang rasmi" di alam semula jadi.

src: The naked ramblers have hoped it doesn't lead to another naturist-clothed 'war', like the one at a beach between German and Polish holidaymakers in 2008.
ref: Pejalan bogel telah berharap ia tidak membawa kepada satu lagi 'perang 'orang tidak berpakaian, seperti yang berlaku di pantai antara pelancong Jerman dan Poland pada tahun 2008.

src: Naturism has roots traced from the start of the 20th century.
ref: Amalan berbogel mempunyai asal usul yang dikesan dari awal abad ke-20.

src: "Abandoning unpractical clothes enables a direct contact with the wind, sun and temperature", naked hiker website nacktwandern.de stated.
ref: "Meninggalkan pakaian yang tidak praktikal membolehkan hubungan secara langsung dengan angin, matahari dan suhu," laman web pejalan kaki bogel nacktwandern.de menyatakan.

src: "The local people are upset and we in the government share their concern."
ref: "Orang tempatan berasa terganggu dan kami di kerajaan berkongsi kebimbangan mereka."

src: "They are definitely not people from the area, and I think many of them come from Germany,” he noted.
ref: "Mereka pasti bukan orang dari kawasan itu, dan saya rasa ramai antara mereka datang dari Jerman," katanya.

src: "But I would certainly enjoy doing the hike in the nude and I wouldn't want to be deprived of it."
ref: "Tetapi saya pasti akan gembira melakukan kembara dalam keadaan bogel dan saya tidak mahu kegembiraan itu dirampas."

src: "Maybe they should designate a couple of trails and people would know they might come across naturists there," she added.
ref: "Mungkin mereka perlu menetapkan beberapa laluan dan orang akan tahu mereka mungkin terserempak dengan orang bogel di sana," katanya.

src: Appenzell Innerrhoden (Appenzell Inner Rhodes) is the smallest canton of Switzerland by population and the second smallest by area, Basel-City having less area.
ref: Appenzell Innerrhoden (Appenzell Inner Rhodes) adalah kanton terkecil Switzerland dari segi populasi dan kawasan yang kedua terkecil mengikut keluasan, Basel-City mempunyai kawasan yang lebih kurang keluasan.

src: The population of the canton was 15,471 as of 2007, of which 1,510 (or 9.76%) were foreigners.
ref: Penduduk kanton itu adalah 15,471 pada tahun 2007, di mana 1,510 (atau 9.76%) adalah orang asing.

src: The canton in the north east of Switzerland has an area is 173 km².
ref: Kanton di timur utara Switzerland mempunyai keluasan 173 km persegi.

src: It was divided in 1597 for religious reasons from the former canton Appenzell, with Appenzell Ausserrhoden being the other half.
ref: Ia telah dibahagikan pada tahun 1597 atas sebab-sebab keagamaan dari bekas kanton Appenzell, dengan Appenzell Ausserrhoden separuh lagi kawasan.

src: Most of the canton is pastoral, this despite being mountainous.
ref: Kebanyakan kanton adalah kawasan desa, meskipun ia bergunung-ganang.

src: Cattle breeding and dairy farming are the main agricultural activities: Appenzeller cheese is widely available throughout Switzerland.
ref: Penternakan lembu dan perladangan tenusu adalah aktiviti-aktiviti pertanian utama: keju Appenzeller banyak didapati di seluruh Switzerland.

src: Due to the split of Appenzell along religious lines, the population (as of 2000) is nearly all Roman Catholic (81%), with a small Protestant minority (10%).
ref: Oleh kerana pembahagian Appenzell mengikut garis keagamaan, penduduk (pada tahun 2000) hampir semuanya Roman Katolik (81%), dengan sekumpulan kecil minoriti Protestan (10%).

src: The Republican National Committee has elected African-American Michael S. Steele as its chairman.
ref: Jawatankuasa Kebangsaan Republikan telah memilih seorang Afrika-Amerika, Michael S. Steele sebagai pengerusinya.

src: Steele, 50, a former Lieutenant Governor of Maryland, won after the sixth round of voting against Katon Dawson of South Carolina.
ref: Steele, 50, bekas Leftenan Gabenor Maryland, menang selepas pusingan keenam undian menyaingi Katon Dawson dari South Carolina.

src: Steele's candidacy was controversial as he was seen as being on the left of his party's base and had been a member of the Republican Leadership Council, an anti-social-conservatism movement.
ref: Pencalonan Steele adalah berkontroversi kerana dia dianggap sebagai bersayap kiri dalam dasar partinya dan telah menjadi ahli Majlis Kepimpinan Republikan, gerakan anti-sosial-konservatif.

src: He had denied being a moderate, telling CNN: "I'm proud to say I'm a conservative, have been, always will be."
ref: Beliau telah menafikan sebagai berpemikiran sederhana, dan memberitahu CNN: "Saya bangga mengatakan saya adalah konservatif, dulu, dan kini dan selamanya".

src: In addition to the election of Barack Obama of the opposing Democrats in the presidential election of 2008, the Democrats gained eight seats in the Senate and 21 seats in the House.
ref: Selain daripada pemilihan Barack Obama dari parti lawan Demokrat dalam pilihan raya presiden tahun 2008, Demokrat mendapat lapan kerusi di Senat dan 21 kerusi dalam Dewan.

src: According to the BBC, the Republicans are aware of not being able to reach the country's non-white population, a job made tougher by the Democrats having a very visible mixed-race leader in the White House.
ref: Menurut BBC, Republikan menyedari ia tidak dapat mencapai penduduk bukan kulit putih di negara ini, satu tugasan yang dijadikan lebih sukar oleh Demokrat yang mempunyai pemimpin bercampur bangsa yang sangat kelihatan di Rumah Putih.

src: In an off-the-record press lunch, which within 24 hours had his name attached to it, he had loudly criticized Bush's handling of the Iraq War and the Hurricane Katrina rescue effort.
ref: Dalam satu sidang media makan tengah hari tidak rasmi, yang dalam tempoh 24 jam dengan namanya dilampirkan, dia pernah lantang mengkritik pengendalian Bush atas Perang Iraq dan usaha menyelamat Taufan Katrina.

src: He told reporters that standing as a Republican at that time was like being branded, saying "I've got an R here, a scarlet letter."
ref: Katanya kepada pemberita bahawa berdiri sebagai Republikan pada masa itu adalah seperti seorang yang berjenama, berkata "Saya ada satu R sini, surat merah".

src: Steele spent more than $200,000 on his Convention election campaign.
ref: Steele membelanjakan lebih daripada $200,000 atas kempen pilihan raya persidangan beliau.

src: The newly formed Icelandic coalition interim government will take office today, according to a coalition leader.
ref: Pakatan kerajaan sementara Iceland yang baru ditubuhkan akan memegang jawatan hari ini, menurut pemimpin gabungan.

src: Iceland's interest rate is now 18%, with GDP expected to fall 9.6% this year.
ref: Kadar faedah Iceland kini adalah 18%, dengan GDP dijangka turun 9.6% tahun ini.

src: Therefore "today is a celebration," said protest organizer Hordur Torfason to the crowd who were cheering about hearing the news.
ref: Oleh itu "hari ini adalah sambutan," kata penganjur protes Hordur Torfason kepada orang ramai yang bersorak mendengar berita itu.

src: The new minority coalition will consist of Jóhanna's Social Democratic Alliance and the Left-Green Movement with backing from the Progressive Party.
ref: Gabungan minoriti baru akan terdiri daripada Perikatan Demokratik Sosial Johanna dan Pergerakan Left-Green dengan sokongan daripada Parti Progresif.

src: He criticizes her appointment because he believes she will not help the economic crisis, resulting in more government spending.
ref: Beliau mengkritik pelantikannya kerana beliau percaya dia tidak akan membantu krisis ekonomi, menyebabkan lebih banyak perbelanjaan kerajaan.

src: The quick appointment of the new government also means an early election, which is scheduled to take place on April 25.
ref: Pelantikan segera kerajaan baru juga bermakna pilihan raya awal, yang dijadualkan berlangsung pada 25 April.

src: Charges include grand larceny, securities fraud, conspiracy, and falsifying business records.
ref: Dakwaan temasuk pencurian besar, pemalsuan keselamatan, konspirasi, dan memalsukan rekod perniagaan.

src: The first trial ended in a mistrial after one juror received a threatening letter.
ref: Pengadilan pertama meakhir dengan pengadilan yang salah selepas seorang juri menerima surat ancaman.

src: Nancy Salomon says of the second trial that the "Defense was counting on the jury not reaching a verdict; they had used their challenges during the jury selection process to kick almost every potential juror who had a college degree, or had any business experience or Wall Street experience off the jury ... they were hoping that this case was just going to be too confusing for the jury."
ref: Nancy Solomon berkata mengenai pengadilan kedua yang "Pihak pembela berharap juri tidak mencapai keputusan; mereka telah menggunakan halangan mereka semasa proses pemilihan juri dengan menolak hampir semua juri berpotensi yang memiliki ijazah kolej, atau mempunyai sebarang pengalaman perniagaan atau pengalaman Wall Street dari juri...mereka berharap kes ini akan hanya menjadi terlalu mengelirukan kepada juri."

src: To combat the aggressive jury selection strategy undertaken by the defense, the prosecution "basically gave the jury several credit hours worth of an MBA", teaching them about following paper trails and detecting falsification of business records.
ref: Untuk menentang strategi pemilihan juri yang agresif yang diambil oleh pembela, pendakwa "pada dasarnya memberi beberapa kredit jam bernilai MBA," mengajar mereka tentang surat rujukan dan mengesan pemalsuan rekod-rekod perniagaan.

src: It paid off during deliberation as the jury requested over 100 documents to review.
ref: Ia terbayar semasa perdebatan apabila pihak juri meminta lebih dari 100 dokumen untuk dikaji.

src: The two former executives face a minimum of eight years in prison, up to a maximum of 25 years.
ref: Dua bekas eksekutif itu berhadapan minimum lapan tahun penjara, sehingga maksimum 25 tahun.

src: In addition, Kozlowski is accused of evading $1 million in sales taxes on six paintings that he bought in 2001 in a separate New York State case, and Swartz faces tax evasion charges in New Hampshire.
ref: Sebagai tambahan, Kozlowski dituduh mengelakkan $1 juta dalam cukai jualan keatas enam lukisan yang dibelinya pada 2001 dalam kes berasingan negeri New York, dan Swartz berhadapan tuduhan pengelakan cukai di New Hampshire.

src: The government of Ireland plans to inject €4 billion each into the Bank of Ireland and the Allied Irish Bank.
ref: Kerajaan Ireland merancang untuk menyuntik € 4 bilion ke dalam Bank of Ireland dan Allied Irish Bank.

src: The two banks have been in need of recapitalization for several weeks.
ref: Kedua-dua bank telah memerlukan permodalan semula untuk beberapa minggu.

src: The deal will see the government take on up to €24 billion of risk from speculative property loans by the banks.
ref: Perjanjian itu akan menyaksikan kerajaan mengambil sehingga 24 bilion € risiko daripada pinjaman hartanah spekulatif oleh bank.

src: The government has already moved to nationalize the country's third largest bank, Anglo Irish.
ref: Kerajaan telah pun berpindah memiliknegarakan bank ketiga terbesar di negara ini, Anglo Irish.

src: MySpace previously thought the site had 40,000 offender accounts registered.
ref: MySpace dahulunya menyangka laman itu mempunyai sebanyak 40,000 akaun pesalah yang telah didaftarkan.

src: North Carolina attorney general Roy Cooper and Connecticut attorney general Richard Blumenthal stated that they encourage and seek more social networking sites like MySpace to become safer.
ref: Peguam awam North Carolina Roy Cooper dan peguam awam Connecticut Richard Blumenthal telah menyatakan yang mereka menggalakkan dan berharap lebih banyak laman rangkaian sosial seperti MySpace menjadi lebih selamat.

src: After the MySpace team calculated the number of sex offenders on their website they submitted the numbers to both attorneys on Tuesday February 3.
ref: Selepas kumpulan MySpace membuat kiraan jumlah pesalah seks di laman web mereka dan menyerahkan jumlah itu kepada kedua-dua peguam tersebut pada Selasa 3 Februari.

src: They have already made both websites safer by implementing dozens of safeguards and a special features where users older than the age of 18 have limitations searching users less than 18 years of age.
ref: Mereka sudahpun menjadikan kedua-dua laman web lebih selamat dengan melaksanakan banyak perlindungan dan ciri khas di mana pengguna berumur lebih 18 tahun mempunyai carian terhad bagi pengguna berumur 18 tahun ke bawah.

src: At least one fisherman has died and 134 others were rescued on Lake Erie off the shores of Ohio after an eight mile wide piece of ice broke off the frozen lake's ice shelf and began to drift.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya satu nelayan telah meninggal dunia dan 134 yang lain diselamatkan di Tasik Erie di luar pantai Ohio selepas sekeping lapan batu lebar ais memutuskan ais rak tasik beku dan mula hanyut.

src: The Coast Guard also said that the fishermen were warned that the ice could break, but many didn't believe there was any danger.
ref: Pengawal Pantai juga berkata nelayan telah memberi amaran bahawa ais boleh pecah, tetapi ramai yang tidak percaya ada apa-apa bahaya.

src: It left all 135 people stranded more than 1,000 yards from the shoreline.
ref: Ia meninggalkan semua 135 orang terkandas lebih daripada 1,000 kilometer dari pantai.

src: The combination of both high winds and temperatures, broke the thick ice into dozens of large pieces.
ref: Gabungan kedua-dua angin kencang dan suhu, memecahkan ais tebal kepada berpuluh-puluh keping besar.

src: Ottawa County sheriff Bob Bratton called those who avoided the warnings "idiotic".
ref: Sherif Ottawa County Bob Bratton memanggil mereka yang mengabaikan amaran itu "bodoh".

src: "I don't know how else to put it," stated Bratton.
ref: "Saya tidak tahu bagaimana lagi untuk meletakkannya," kata Bratton.

src: Several helicopters were called in from Detroit, Michigan and Traverse City.
ref: Beberapa helikopter telah dipanggil dari Detroit, Michigan dan Bandar Traverse.

src: GUN's current international acts - including Wales' Bullet for My Valentine, Finland's Lordi and the Netherlands' Within Tempatation - will now be handled out of Sony's Munich international division.
ref: Persembahan semasa antarabangsa GUN - termasuk Bullet for My Valentine dari Wales, Lordi dari Finland dan Within Temptation dari Belanda - akan dikendalikan oleh divisyen antarabangsa Sony Munich.

src: National artists, such as Oomph!
ref: Artis kebangsaan, seperti Oomph!

src: and The Donots, will also be Sony's direct responsibility via either Four Music or Columbia Germany in Berlin.
ref: dan The Donots, juga akan berada di bawah tanggungjawab Sony sama ada melalui Four Music atau Columbia Germany di Berlin.

src: The closure will affect eight employees including Arno Hartfield, the managing director.
ref: Penutupan ini akan membawa kesan kepada lapan pekerja, termasuk Arno Hartfield, pengarah pengurusan.

src: "There is no correlation between the debris from that collision and those reports of re-entry," said STRATCOM military spokeswoman Major Maj. Regina.
ref: "Tiada hubungan antara serpihan perlanggaran itu dan laporan kemasukan semula," kata jurucakap tentera STRATCOM Major Maj. Regina.

src: "It's a natural meteor, definitely," said Bill Cooke, an astronomer at NASA's Meteoroid Environment Office.
ref: "Ia adalah satu meteor semula jadi, sudah pasti," kata Bill Cooke, seorang ahli astronomi di Meteoroid Persekitaran Pejabat NASA.

src: On Tuesday, February 10, the American civilian communications satellite Iridium 33, launched in 1997, and the defunct Russian military communications satellite Kosmos-2251, launched in 1993, collided over Siberia.
ref: Pada hari Selasa, 10 Februari, satelit komunikasi awam Amerika Iridium 33, yang dilancarkan pada tahun 1997, dan satelit komunikasi tentera Kosmos-2251 Rusia yang sudah rosak dan tidak berfungsi lagi, yang dilancarkan pada tahun 1993, bertembung di Siberia.

src: On Friday February 13, the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) issued an alert for falling debris from the satellites, following reports of "explosions and earthquakes" along with "flashes in the sky" in Jackson and Louisville, Kentucky.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat 13 Februari, Pentadbiran Lautan dan Atmosfera Negara (NOAA) mengeluarkan amaran mengenai jatuh serpihan daripada satelit, berikutan laporan "letupan dan gempa bumi" bersama dengan "kelipan di langit" di Jackson dan Louisville, Kentucky.

src: Then again on Sunday, calls to 9-1-1 began to come in to Williamson County, Texas sheriff's office around 12:30 p.m. (Central time) that burning debris and fireballs were seen falling from the sky onto parts of Austin, Houston, Waco and San Antonio.
ref: Kemudian lagi pada hari Ahad, panggilan ke 9-1-1 mula datang ke Daerah Williamson, pejabat syerif Texas sekitar 12:30 tengahari (masa Tengah) bahawa serpihan yang membakar dan bola api dilihat jatuh dari langit ke bahagian Austin, Houston, Waco dan San Antonio.

src: The FAA says the burning material over Texas is not related to this alert.
ref: FAA berkata bahan yang terbakar di Texas tidak berkaitan dengan amaran ini.

src: Residents in Texas reported their homes and windows shaking and large explosions on Sunday morning.
ref: Penduduk di Texas melaporkan rumah dan tingkap mereka bergoncang dan terdapat letupan besar pada pagi Ahad.

src: After a search of several areas, the Williamson county sheriff's office reported that no debris or impact sites were found.
ref: Selepas pemeriksaan ke atas beberapa kawasan, pejabat syerif daerah Williamson melaporkan tiada serpihan atau kesan hentaman ditemui.

src: Earlier unconfirmed reports had said the debris could have been the result of a small plane exploding.
ref: Terdahulu laporan yang belum disahkan berkata serpihan itu mungkin adalah hasil daripada letupan kecil pesawat.

src: "[It could] be months" before any of the satellite wreckage enters the earth's atmosphere.
ref: "[Mungkin mengambil masa] berbulan-bulan" sebelum mana-mana bangkai satelit itu memasuki atmosfera bumi.

src: "It will either vaporize or stay in orbit for some time before falling into earth's atmosphere."
ref: "Ia akan mengewap atau tinggal di orbit untuk beberapa ketika sebelum jatuh ke dalam atmosfera bumi."

src: However, the Union of Concerned Scientists (UCS) said on February 12 that the debris could have taken 10 days or less to reenter over portions of the planet.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Kesatuan Saintis Prihatin (UCS) berkata pada 12 Februari bahawa serpihan itu boleh mengambil 10 hari atau kurang untuk kembali semula ke atas bahagian planet ini.

src: "Within 24 hours of the collision, the U.S. space tracking system had identified 600 pieces of debris."
ref: "Dalam tempoh 24 jam selepas perlanggaran, sistem pengesanan ruang Amerika Syarikat telah mengenal pasti 600 keping serpihan."

src: "If the two satellites hit head-on, rather than a glancing blow, the energy of the collision would completely disintegrate both satellites into clouds of debris," said the UCS in a statement on their website who also added that the collision took place in "the same region of space where China destroyed a defunct Chinese weather satellite with an anti-satellite (ASAT) weapon" in 2007.
ref: "Jika dua satelit itu berlanggar berdepan, dan bukannya satu pukulan yang terkena sipi, tenaga perlanggaran itu akan menghancurkan sama sekali kedua-dua satelit menjadi kepulan serpihan," kata UCS dalam satu kenyataan di laman web mereka yang juga menambah bahawa perlanggaran itu berlaku di "kawasan sama ruang di mana China memusnahkan satelit cuaca China yang sudah rosak dan tidak berfungsi lagi dengan senjata anti-satelit (ASAT)" pada tahun 2007.

src: The results of a plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
ref: Keputusan analisis plot akan dipaparkan atas laman web awam.

src: The observation was made by the Gravity Probe B satellite, which carries finely-machined gyroscopes.
ref: Pemerhatian telah dilakukan oleh satelit Probe Graviti B, yang membawa mesin-halus giroskop.

src: The experiment was conducted on the satellite from 2004 to 2005.
ref: Eksperimen telah dijalankan ke atas satelit dari tahun 2004 ke 2005.

src: However, the complexity of the data analysis along with unforeseen engineering problems have made finding the effect in the experiment's results difficult.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kerumitan data disebabkan masalah kejuruteraan yang tidak dapat dilihat telah menjadikan ia sukar untuk menemui kesan tersebut dalam keputusan eksperimen itu.

src: In particular, the presence of small electrical charges on the gyroscopes interfered with their results.
ref: Khususnya, kehadiran sedikit caj elektrik di atas giroskop yang mengganggu keputusan mereka.

src: Francis Everitt, the experiment's Principal Investigator, stresses in an interview with the New York Times that their announcement is only preliminary and that, with further analysis, they hope to improve the precision of their results; currently, they say they have only detected the frame dragging effect to within plus or minus fifteen percent of its expected value.
ref: Francis Everitt, Penyiasat Prinsip eksperimen tersebut, menekankan dalam sesi temubual bersama New York Times bahawa pengumuman mereka hanya di peringkat awal dan, dengan analisis lanjut, mereka berharap untuk memperbaiki kepersisan keputusan mereka; sekarang, mereka berkata mereka cuma dapat mengesan kesan pengheretan rangka dalam tempoh penambahan atau penolakan lima belas peratus dari nilai yang dijangkakan.

src: The theory of general relativity was developed by Albert Einstein in the early 20th century to explain the behavior of moving objects in space, after the discovery that the speed of light was always the same no matter how the person measuring it was moving.
ref: Teori umum mengenai relativiti telah dibangunkan oleh Albert Einstein pada awal abad ke20 untuk menjelaskan kelakuan pergerakan objek dalam ruang, selepas penemuan bahawa kelajuan cahaya adalah sentiasa sama tidak kira bagaimana orang yang mengukur itu bergerak.

src: While it successfully explains many strange behaviors in space, such as the slow shifting of the orbit of Mercury and the bending of light by massive objects such as black holes, testing the theory on Earth has always been difficult due to the small scale of relativity's effects in everyday life.
ref: Semasa ia berjaya untuk menjelaskan banyak kelakuan pelik dalam ruang, seperti pergerakan perlahan orbit di Utarid dan pembelokan cahaya oleh objek besar seperti lubang hitam, menguji teori ke atas Bumi adalah sukar disebabkan oleh kesan relativiti yang berskala kecil dalam kehidupan seharian.

src: This act allowed foreign nationals suspected of terrorism to be detained, before being repealed in 2004 due to its discriminatory nature.
ref: Akta ini benarkan warga asing yang disyaki pengganas ditahan, sebelum dimansuhkan pada tahun 2004 kerana sifat diskriminasinya.

src: The British government claimed they believed the people detained were "a threat to our national security."
ref: Kerajaan British mendakwa mereka percaya orang yang ditahan adalah "satu ancaman kepada keselamatan negara kita."

src: The call-in quiz show is a staple of cheap programming throughout Europe.
ref: Rancangan kuiz panggilan-masuk merupakan simbol rancangan murah di serata Eropah.

src: The programs are often repetitive, the average question simple, the average prize small.
ref: Rancangan ini selalunya berulang, rata-rata soalannya adalah mudah, rata-rata hadiahnya adalah kecil.

src: Throwing the telephone down on the studio floor and stomping on it, she admonished her viewers, "I want the telephone to ring now.
ref: Menjatuhkan telefon ke atas lantai studio dan memijaknya, beliau mengingatkan penonton, "Saya mahu telefon berdering sekarang".

src: After presenting the broadcasts of this morning's call-in programs, including the same one she was supposedly fired from in January, Ms Lupșe spoke to Wikinews from her television studio in Budapest, Hungary to give her first full-length English interview and talk about her work and her version of events.
ref: Selepas mempersembahkan siaran itu di program panggilan-masuk pagi tadi, termasuk yang sama sebelum ini beliau yang sepatutnya dipecat bermula Januari, Cik Lupse berkata kepada Wikinews dari studio televisyennya di Budapest, Hungary untuk memberi temubual penuh berbahasa Inggeris pertamanya dan menceritakan mengenai kerja dan versi-versi acaranya.

src: I wanted to get some attention and get people to know my face.
ref: Saya mahu mendapatkan sedikit perhatian dan mahu orang mengenali wajah saya.

src: I want this attention because I'm aware of the fact that it is not easy to enter this world!
ref: Saya mahu perhatian ini kerana saya sedar akan kenyataan bahawa tidak senang untuk memasuki dunia ini!

src: And I was doing all this in order to increase my chances to get my dream job in television."
ref: Dan saya melakukan semua ini adalah untuk meningkatkan peluang saya untuk mendapatkan kerja idaman saya di televisyen".

src: She describes a typical day: "One hour and a half before the show I'm in the make-up room.
ref: Beliau menjelaskan hari biasa: "Saya berada di bilik solek satu jam setengah sebelum rancangan.

src: After I'm done with hair and make-up I go down to the studio for the before the show to talk to the producer.
ref: Setelah selesai dengan rambut dan solekan saya akan turun ke studio sebelum rancangan untuk bercakap dengan produser.

src: All of her banter on-air is improvised: "Definitely there is no script!
ref: Semua lawak yang disiarkan adalah yang ditambah baik: "Semestinya ia tiada skrip!

src: Everything that you see comes out spontaneosly during the show."
ref: Semua yang anda lihat keluar secara spontan ketika rancangan itu".

src: I enjoy it very much!
ref: Saya sangat seronok!

src: If I'm tired at the end of the show it means I've done a good show.
ref: Jika saya penat di akhir rancangan itu bermakna saya telah menjalankan satu rancangan yang baik.

src: I'm always excited when I'm about to give big prizes!
ref: Saya sentiasa teruja apabila saya akan memberikan hadiah yang besar!

src: There is no show without winners!
ref: Tiada rancangan tanpa pemenang!

src: She went to the studio, prepared her hair and makeup, spoke to the producer, and went onscreen.
ref: Beliau pergi ke studio, menyediakan rambut dan solekan, bercakap dengan produser, dan diskrinkan.

src: The first inkling she had, in fact, that there was something unusual about that day's broadcast was when, on January 9 2009, MTV Russia aired the clip of her shouting and stomping on the phone, mixed with some dramatic orchestral rock music.
ref: Pertamanya beliau merasakan, sebenarnya, ada sesuatu yang pelik mengenai siaran pada hari itu apabila, pada 9 Januari 2009, MTV Russia menyiarkan klip di mana beliau menjerit dan menghempas telefon, bersama dengan beberapa muzik orkestra rock yang dramatik.

src: And as for the charge most frequently leveled against her, that she's "crazy": "I think it is normal that people have prejudicies, everyone is free to express his opinion in the same way that I'm free to do my job the best that I can!
ref: Dan adapun tuduhan yang paling dibuat ke atas beliau, ialah beliau "gila":"Saya rasa itu normal untuk orang berprasangka, semua orang bebas meluahkan pendapat yang pada masa yang sama saya bebas melakukan kerja saya sebaik mungkin!

src: I'm hurt if my family is unhappy with people's comments but I think I gain the wisdom to ignore the negative feedback!
ref: Saya terluka jika keluarga saya sedih dengan komen orang-orang lain tetapi bila saya fikirkan semula saya mendapat kewarasan untuk membiarkan komen negatif!

src: Financial analysts say Google is planning an e-wallet service that could eventually compete with eBay's payment service PayPal.
ref: Penganalisis kewangan mengatakan Google merancang perkhidmatan e-dompet yang mungkin akhirnya dapat bertanding dengan PayPal, perkhidmatan pembayaran eBay.

src: The rumor is a first sign of Google's expected expansion of revenue sources to capitalize on its advertising customer base and search-engine traffic.
ref: Khabar angin itu merupakan penanda pertama berkenaan ramalan pertambahan sumber pendapatan Google dengan cara mengambil kesempatan terhadap pengiklanan berasaskan pelanggan dan trafik enjin cariannya.

src: Even Microsoft has been mentioned as a possible future competitor.
ref: Sehinggakan Microsoft telah disebut sebagai pesaing berkemungkinan masa depan.

src: But one business analyst saw potential benefit for Paypal , depending on exactly how the "Google Wallet" takes shape.
ref: Tetapi seorang penganalisis perniagaan melihat potensi keuntungan untuk Paypal, bergantung sepenuhnya kepada bagaimana "Dompet Google" berbentuk.

src: The uncertainty underlined the lack of substantive information behind the rumor.
ref: Ketidakpastian menggarisi kekurangan maklumat sebenar dibelakang khabar angin tersebut.

src: According to the New York Times, the CEO of a major online merchant, who spoke on the condition of anonymity, was approached by Google to take part in this service.
ref: Menurut New York Times, CEO kepada perniagaan utama dalam talian, yang bercakap diatas syarat tidak disiarkan nama, telah didekati Google untuk mengambil bahagian dalam perkhidmatan ini.

src: A Boeing 737-800 registered to Turkish Airlines with 135 people on board crashed at Schiphol Airport in Amsterdam, the Netherlands, on Tuesday.
ref: Pesawat Boeing 737-800 yang didaftarkan kepada Turkish Airlines dengan 135 orang yang diatas terhempas di Lapangan Terbang Schiphol di Amsterdam, Belanda, pada hari Selasa.

src: At least nine people, including the three pilots, were killed and over 80 had been injured.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya sembilan orang, termasuk tiga juruterbang, terbunuh dan lebih 80 orang telah cedera.

src: According to witness reports, about twenty people were seen walking away from the crash.
ref: Menurut laporan saksi, lebih kurang dua puluh orang dilihat melarikan diri daripada nahas terbabit.

src: "The plane was nose up and the tail section was at a 45-degree angle."
ref: "Kapal terbang itu muncung ke atas dan bahgian ekor berada di sudut 45 darjah".

src: "The tail section broke down first, which broke off," said a witness in an interview with the BBC who was riding on his bicycle by the airport when the aircraft crashed.
ref: "Bahagian ekor yang mula-mula patah, putus," kata saksi dalam interview bersama BBC yang sedang menaiki basikal melalui lapangan terbang ketika kapal terbang itu terhempas.

src: "And seconds after the crash people started exiting through the tail section [...]" "I saw dozens of people making it out very quickly, and as I was about to dial 112 the first sirens were noticeable, and within five minutes there were 10 or 15 ambulances."
ref: "Dan sesaat selepas nahas orang ramai mula keluar melalui bahagian ekornya [...]" "Saya melihat berdozen-dozen orang keluar dengan cepat, dan saya hampir menelefon 112 semasa bunyi siren yang pertama dapat dilihat, tidak sampai lima minit 10 atau 15 ambulan telah tiba".

src: Special vehicles were also used to enter the field, which wasn't easily accessible.
ref: Kenderaan istimewa juga digunakan untuk memasuki padang, yang mana sukar untuk di akses.

src: "We cannot say anything about the cause at the moment."
ref: "Kami tidak boleh berkata apa-apa berkaitan sebab kejadian pada masa sekarang".

src: "The priority of the authorities is providing help and care," stated the vice-mayor of the Haarlemmermeer municipality, Michel Bezuijen.
ref: "Keutamaan diberikan kepada pihak berkuasa dari segi bantuan dan penjagaan," kata Naib Datuk bandar bagi pembandaran Haarlemmermeer, Michel Bezuijen.

src: 72 Turkish and 32 Dutch people were on board the aircraft, according to the Turkish ambassador to the Netherlands.
ref: 72 orang Turki dan 32 orang Belanda berada di atas kapal terbang, menurut duta Turki ke Belanda.

src: Channel 4 has no production facilities itself; all television programmes are commissioned from independent companies .
ref: Channel 4 tidak mempunyai fasiliti pengeluaran sendiri; semua program tv adalah komisi dari syarikat bebas.

src: Cruise had been on a walkabout meeting and greeting fans, and was being interviewed by the crew under the impression that it was a serious interview, when they used a fake microphone to squirt him in the face.
ref: Cruise sedang dalam laluan menemui dan bersapa dengan peminat, dan ditemubual krew tersebut dibawah gambaran ia adalah inteview yang serius, apabila mereka menggunakan mikrofon palsu untuk memancutkan ke mukanya.

src: "Why would you do that?
ref: "Mengapa kamu melakukannya?

src: What's so funny about that?
ref: Apa yang lucu tentangnya?

src: It's ridiculous."
ref: Ia tidak masuk akal."

src: "I'm here giving you an interview, answering your questions and you do something nasty."
ref: "Saya disini memberi anda temubual, menjawab soalan anda dan anda lakukan sesuatu yang menjelekkan."

src: Security guards then took the filmcrew away, before they were arrested and bailed by the police.
ref: Pengawal keselamatan kemudian membawa mereka pergi, sebelum mereka ditangkap dan dijamin oleh polis.

src: Scotland Yard have said, "We will see whether to pursue the charges, or see whether the victim wants to pursue it."
ref: Scotland Yard telah berkata, "Kami akan melihat sama ada untuk meneruskan dakwaan, atau melihat sama ada mangsa mahu meneruskannya."

src: Tom Cruise resumed meeting fans and signing autographs, spending an hour in Leicester Square.
ref: Tom Cruise meneruskan menemui peminat dan menandatangani autograf, meluangkan satu jam di Leicester Square.

src: In 1995, Serbian forces, according to International Criminal Tribunal for the Former Yugoslavia (ICTY), massacred around 7500 Bosnian Muslims.
ref: Pada tahun 1995, tentera Serbia, menurut Tribunal Jenayah Antarabangsa bagi Bekas Yugoslavia (ICTY), membunuh kira-kira 7500 Bosnia Islam.

src: It is expected that by July 11 another 550 bodies will be identified and ready for burial.
ref: Ia dijangkan pada 11 Julai, 550 mayat lain akan dikenal pasti dan disiapkan untuk pengebumian.

src: A police officer has been killed in County Armagh, Northern Ireland by Continuity IRA gunmen a mere 48 hours after two soldiers were killed.
ref: Seorang pegawai polis telah dibunuh di County Armagh, Utara Ireland oleh pihak bersenjata Continuity IRA hanya 48 jam selepas dua askar terbunuh.

src: In what is presumed to be an attempt by dissident Republicans to derail the peace process, Pc Stephen Carroll was shot in the head just before 10:00 p.m. on March 9.
ref: Dalam apa yang dianggap sebagai satu percubaan oleh penentang Republikan untuk menggagalkan proses damai, Pc Stephen Carroll telah ditembak di kepala sebelum 10:00 malam pada 9 Mac.

src: The officer, described as an experienced veteran with 23 years of service, was responding to a call for help in the Lismore Manor estate in Craigavon when he was shot.
ref: Pegawai tersebut, yang digambarkan sebagai veteran yang berpengalaman dengan 23 tahun perkhidmatan, berkata demikian ketika menjawab panggilan bantuan di estet Lismore Manor di Craigavon apabila beliau telah ditembak.

src: A two vehicle patrol was sent to the incident given previous trouble in the area.
ref: Dua kenderaan peronda telah dihantar ke tempat kejadian disebabkan masalah di kawasan itu sebelumnya.

src: After standing off for a reasonable period to ensure that there was no ambush, the members of one vehicle got out to deal with the incident, whilst those in the second vehicle provided cover, while providing cover in the second vehicle that Pc Carrol was attacked.
ref: Selepas menunggu selama tempoh yang tertentu untuk memastikan bahawa tidak ada serangan hendap, ahli-ahli dari satu kenderaan keluar untuk menangani kejadian itu, manakala orang-orang di kenderaan kedua memberikan perlindungan, dan semasa memberikan perlindungan di dalam kenderaan kedua yang Pc Carrol telah diserang.

src: The PSNI, believe that the officer was hit by one of two shots fired by a gunman secreted in scrubland on the estate.
ref: PSNI, percaya bahawa pegawai itu telah terkena salah satu daripada dua das tembakan yang dilepaskan oleh seorang lelaki bersenjata yang bersembunyi di dalam kawasan belukar di estet.

src: There are unconfirmed reports that a second officer has also been injured.
ref: Terdapat laporan yang tidak disahkan bahawa seorang pegawai kedua juga telah cedera.

src: Investigators with the National Transportation Safety Board in the United States have issued an 'urgent safety recommendation' in connection to their role alongside the United Kingdom's Air Accidents Investigation Branch in investigating loss of power in Rolls-Royce engines on Boeing 777s, with the AAIB following suit.
ref: Penyiasat yang berkhidmat untuk Lembaga Keselamatan Pengangkutan Negara di Amerika Syarikat telah mengeluarkan 'cadangan keselamatan segera'berhubung dengan peranan mereka dalam Cawangan Siasatan Kemalangan Udara United Kingdom untuk menyiasat kehilangan kuasa enjin Rolls-Royce pada Boeing 777, berikutan AAIB.

src: On January 17, 2008 British Airways Flight 38 experienced a dual engine rollback (reduction of engine power) on final approach to Heathrow and crashed, leaving one passenger seriously injured, eight passengers and four of the flight crew with minor injuries and the airplane written off.
ref: Pada 17 Januari 2008, British Airways Flight 38 mengalami pengunduran dua enjin (pengurangan kuasa enjin) ketika menghampiri Heathrow dan terhempas, menyebabkan seorang penumpang cedera parah, lapan penumpang dan empat kru penerbangan cedera ringan dan kapal terbang musnah.

src: The second event occurred on November 26, 2008, when a Delta Air Lines Boeing 777 experienced a single engine rollback during cruise flight over Montana, United States while en route from Shanghai to Atlanta.
ref: Peristiwa kedua berlaku pada November 26, 2008, apabila sebuah Boeing 777 daripada Penerbangan Udara Delta mengalami masalah pengurangan kuasa enjin semasa penerbangan melalui Montana, Amerika Syarikat dalam perjalanan dari Shanghai ke Atlanta.

src: Normal operations resumed after the flight crew followed Boeing's published procedure to recover engine performance and the airplane landed safely in Atlanta.
ref: Operasi normal bersambung semula selepas anak-anak kapal mengikut prosedur terbitan Boeing untuk memulihkan semula prestasi enjin dan pesawat tersebut mendarat dengan selamat di Atlanta.

src: Boeing has already developed new procedures after the crash to prevent ice from building up within their 777 fuel systems after it became apparent that icing may have been a factor, and it was some of these that the Delta flight crew had followed.
ref: Boeing telah menghasilkan prosedur baru selepas kemalangan itu untuk mengelakkan ais membeku dalam sistem bahan api 777 selepas jelas bahawa ais mungkin menjadi faktor, dan ia adalah sebahagian daripada prosedur yang telah anak kapal penerbangan Delta ikuti.

src: This restricted the flow of fuel to the engine, resulting in the uncommanded engine rollback.
ref: Ini menghadkan aliran bahan api ke enjin, menyebabkan pengurangan kuasa enjin tanpa perintah juruterbang.

src: Investigators initially struggled to produce enough ice under test conditions but have now found that at high concentration, fuel can form ice at very low temperatures in enough quantity to seriously restrict fuel flow, according to a new interim report by the AAIB.
ref: Penyiasat pada mulanya berusaha untuk menghasilkan ais secukupnya di bawah keadaan ujian tetapi kini medapati bahawa pada kepekatan tinggi, bahan api boleh membentuk ais pada suhu yang sangat rendah dalam kuantiti yang cukup untuk menyekat aliran bahan api, menurut satu laporan sementara yang baru oleh AAIB.

src: This does not occur when fuel demand is lower, as the hot oil then becomes sufficient to entirely melt the ice.
ref: Ini tidak berlaku apabila penggunaan bahan api lebih rendah, kerana minyak panas sudah cukup untuk mencairkan ais sepenuhnya.

src: They have also confirmed that while ice may have formed elsewhere in the airliner's fuel system fuel was probably not restricted at any other location.
ref: Mereka juga telah mengesahkan bahawa ais mungkin terbentuk di tempat lain dalam sistem bahan api, bahan api pesawat mungkin tidak terhad di mana-mana lokasi lain.

src: Instead, it is thought 'soft' ice formed in the pipes and then broke off, travelling to the fuel/oil heat exchanger and restricting it.
ref: Sebaliknya, dianggap ais 'lembut' terbentuk dalam paip dan kemudian hancur, masuk ke penukar haba bahan api/minyak dan mengehadkannya.

src: There are 220 Boeing 777-200s - the only type using the affected engine - with Trent 800 series engines.
ref: Terdapat 220 buah Boeing 777-200s - satu-satunya jenis yang menggunakan enjin yang terjejas - dengan enjin siri 800 Trent.

src: The fuel/oil heat exchanger is a dual purpose part designed to simultaneously melt fuel ice and cool down engine oil.
ref: Penukar haba bahan api/minyak adalah bahagian dwiguna yang direka mencairkan ais bahan api dan menyejukkan minyak enjin secara serentak.

src: The major indicators in the NYSE had a gain of around 10 percent.
ref: Penunjuk utama di NYSE mempunyai keuntungan sebanyak kira-kira 10 peratus.

src: The Dow Jones industrial average (INDU) finished on 7223.98, an increase of 54 points from March 12 2009.
ref: Purata industri Dow Jones (INDU) berakhir pada 7223.98, peningkatan sebanyak 54 mata dari 12 Mac 2009.

src: The S&P 500 Index finished at 756.55 a 6 point gain and the NASDAQ composite had a 5.40 point gain as well to end the day at 1431.50.
ref: Indeks S&P 500 berakhir pada 756.55 untung 6 mata dan komposit NASDAQ memperoleh keuntungan 5.40 mata dan juga tamat di hari yang sama pada 1,431.50.

src: The rally began earlier this week after the news from Citigroup Inc. about managing profits during first two months of the year.
ref: Persaingan bermula awal minggu ini selepas berita dari Citigroup Inc. mengenai pengurusan keuntungan dalam dua bulan pertama tahun ini.

src: There was more good news from Bank of America Corp. and JPMorgan Chase & Co., who announced that they have had profits in the current year.
ref: Terdapat lebih banyak berita baik dari Bank of America Corp dan JPMorgan Chase & Co., yang mengumumkan bahawa mereka telah mendapat keuntungan pada tahun semasa.

src: Today was a mixed day for the financial sector, Drug makers had some gains and so did General Motors and Berkshire Hathaway , which helped the indexes gain.
ref: Hari ini merupakan hari berlainan bagi sektor kewangan, pemgeluar dadah mendapat sedikit keuntungan dan begitu juga dengan General Motors dan Berkshire Hathaway, yang menyumbang keuntungan indeks.

src: The value of the US dollar fell against other world currencies, but gold prices increased.
ref: Nilai matawang dolar Amerika susut terhadap matawang-matawang dunia lain, tetapi harga emas meningkat.

src: Rico has been in a variety of jobs but his passion is now his profession - he turns unwanted 'junk' into unusual pieces of furniture.
ref: Rico telah melakukan pelbagai jenis pekerjaan tetapi sekarang minatnya merupakan profesionnya - beliau telah menukar 'sampah'yang tidak diingini menjadi sebuah perabot yang luar biasa.

src: Rico's creations and the methods used to fabricate them are the subject of the Salvager shows.
ref: Ciptaan Rico dan kaedah yang digunakan untuk merekanya adalah subjek rancangan Salvager.

src: Rico spoke to Wikinews in January about his inspiration and early life, future plans, other hobbies and more.
ref: Rico berkata kepada Wikinews pada Januari mengenai inspirasi dan kehidupan awalnya, perancangan masa depan, hobi lain dan banyak lagi.

src: Read on for the full exclusive interview, published for the first time:
ref: Baca untuk temu bual eksklusif penuh, diterbitkan buat kali pertama:

src: A Vietnamese coal transport ship sank in the South China Sea on Friday killing three people on board, reported the Xinhua News Agency.
ref: Sebuah kapal pengangkutan batu arang Vietnam karam di Laut China Selatan pada hari Jumaat, membunuh tiga orang di atas kapal, lapor agensi berita Xinhua.

src: Saturday morning rescue operations were supplemented by a rescue helicopter.
ref: Operasi menyelamat pada Sabtu pagi telah ditambahkan dengan helikopter penyelamat.

src: Four are missing, while three bodies have been recovered by the South China Sea Rescue Bureau.
ref: Empat hilang, manakala tiga mayat dijumpai oleh Biro Penyelamat Laut China Selatan.

src: With an election coming up this Saturday in the Australian state of Queensland, Wikinews reporter Patrick Gillett previews the contesting parties.
ref: Berikutan dengan kedatangan pilihan raya pada hari Sabtu ini di Queensland, Australia, wartawan Wikinews Patrick Gillett memberi pratonton parti-parti yang bertanding.

src: The premier has received criticism from other parties for backflipping on its commitment to run a full term.
ref: Perdana Menteri tersebut telah menerima kritikan daripada pihak parti lain kerana pengunduran terhadap komitmen untuk bertugas pada jangka penuh.

src: The Opposition need to pick up at least twenty seats from the government to overcome the significant Labor majority and a number of independents.
ref: Pihak pembangkang perlu memperoleh sekurang-kurangnya dua puluh kerusi daripada kerajaan untuk mengatasi majoriti ketara parti Buruh dan beberapa calon bebas.

src: The Greens unveiled its policy to open two solar power stations on the weekend of January 31/February 1.
ref: Parti Greens melancarkan dasar untuk membuka dua stesen kuasa solar pada hujung minggu 31 Januari /1 Februari.

src: "We can tackle climate change and create long-term jobs, but Labor can't see that because they are blinded by the interests of their big donors - the urban development and coal industries," said Mt Coo-tha candidate Larrisa Waters.
ref: "Kita boleh menangani perubahan iklim dan mewujudkan peluang pekerjaan jangka panjang, tetapi parti Buruh tidak dapat melihatnya kerana mereka dibutakan oleh kepentingan penyumbang besar mereka - industri pembangunan urban dan arang batu," kata calon Pergunungan Coot-tha, Larrisa Waters.

src: "The Greens want to give the community and the environment a voice back in State Parliament," says Ms Waters.
ref: "Parti Greens mahu memberi masyarakat dan alam sekitar suara kembali ke Parlimen Negeri," kata Waters.

src: The Socialist Alliance will run two candidates as independents because of what they call "restrictive rules for registration."
ref: Pihak Sosialis Alliance akan melanjutkan dua calon sebagai calon bebas kerana apa yang mereka panggil "peraturan ketat untuk pendaftaran."

src: The Daylight Saving for South East Queensland (DS4EQ) party was set up in late 2008.
ref: Waktu Penjimatan Musim Panas untuk South East Queensland (DS4EQ) pihak telah ditubuhkan pada lewat tahun 2008.

src: DS4SEQ leader Jason Furze gave an interview to Wikinews in January.
ref: Pemimpin DS4SEQ Jason Furze memberikan sebuah temu bual dengan Wikinews pada bulan Januari.

src: "DS4SEQ would like to gain a sizeable percentage of the primary vote and win a number of seats," Mr furze said.
ref: "DS4SEQ ingin mendapatkan peratusan undi yang agak besar dalam undian saringan dan memenangi beberapa kerusi," kata Furze.

src: Courier Mail writer Dennis Atkins wrote in today's Courier Mail that DS4SEQ "will poll better than anyone expected - polling close to double figures in some seats around Brisbane and on the coasts."
ref: Penulis Courier Mail, Dennis Atkins menulis dalam Courier Mail hari ini bahawa DS4SEQ "akan diundi lebih baik daripada yang sesiapa jua jangkakan - pengundian menghampiri dua angka di beberapa kerusi di sekitar Brisbane dan di pinggir pantai."

src: News Limited newspapers The West Australian and the Courier Mail reported that swing voters would decide the election.
ref: Surat khabar News Limited Australia Barat dan Mail Courier melaporkan bahawa pengundi terapung akan membuat keputusan pilihan raya.

src: NASA has successfully launched Space Shuttle Discovery after over a month of delays.
ref: NASA telah berjaya melancarkan Space Shuttle Discovery selepas lebih sebulan kelewatan.

src: Discovery lifted off at 7:43 p.m. (EDT) from Cape Canaveral Air Force Station in Florida in the United States after NASA declared the weather to be "100% go for launch".
ref: Discovery diangkat dari pada 07:43 p.m. (EDT) dari Stesen Tentera Udara Cape Canaveral di Florida di Amerika Syarikat selepas NASA diisytiharkan cuaca menjadi "100% pergi untuk pelancaran."

src: "The clouds broke up and that's why we were go for launch," stated mission control on NASA TV.
ref: "Awan berpecah dan itulah sebabnya kami telah pergi untuk dilancarkan," kawalan misi dinyatakan di TV NASA.

src: A crystal clear blue sky could be seen in Discovery's background about 40 minutes before launch.
ref: Langit kristal yang biru boleh dilihat di latar belakang Discovery kira-kira 40 minit sebelum pelancaran.

src: NASA also said that there was a bat on STS-72 which managed to fly away just before the shuttle launched.
ref: NASA juga berkata terdapat kelawar pada STS-72 yang berjaya terbang sebelum pengangkutan ulang-alik dilancarkan.

src: The current scheduled mission, STS-119, is set to fly the Integrated Truss Structure segment ("S" for starboard, the right side of the station, and "6" for its place at the very end of the starboard truss) and install the final set of power-generating solar arrays to the International Space Station.
ref: Misi yang dijadualkan sekarang, STS-119, dijangka mengibarkan Segmen Truss Bersepadu Struktur ("S" untuk sisi kanan, sebelah kanan stesen, dan "6" untuk tempatnya pada akhir sangat kekuda sisi kanan) dan memasang set terakhir kuasa penjanaan array solar ke Stesen Angkasa Antarabangsa.

src: Altogether, the four sets of arrays can generate 84 to 120 kilowatts of electricity – enough to provide power for more than 40 average homes.
ref: Semua sekali, empat set tatasusunan boleh menjana 84-120 kilowatt tenaga elektrik - cukup untuk memberikan kuasa selama lebih daripada 40 rumah purata.

src: It was then delayed until February 27, but was then delayed indefinitely on February 20 after NASA discovered an issue with the hydrogen control valves.
ref: Ia kemudiannya ditangguhkan sehingga 27 Februari, tetapi kemudiannya ditangguhkan selama-lamanya pada 20 Februari selepas NASA menemui isu dengan injap kawalan hidrogen.

src: The Seattle Post-Intelligencer (P-I), the 146-year-old Seattle newspaper, will make its final print edition on today, before becoming an online-only news agency.
ref: Akhbar Seattle yang berusia 146 tahun, The Seattle Post-Intelligencer (P-I), akan membuat edisi cetakan terakhirnya pada hari ini, sebelum menjadi agensi berita dalam laman web sahaja.

src: With this closure, the Seattle Times is now Seattle's only major daily newspaper.
ref: Dengan penutupan ini, Seattle Times kini merupakan akhbar harian utama sulung di Seattle.

src: The newspaper industry in the country has been suffering as revenue from advertising plunges.
ref: Industri akhbar di negara ini telah mengalami kesusahan diakibatkan oleh hasil dari pengiklanan menurun.

src: Hifikepunye Pohamba, the president of the southern African country of Namibia, declared a state of emergency in in the country on Tuesday after heavy flooding killed 92 and displaced 5,032 since January.
ref: Hifikepunye Pohamba, presiden negara Afrika selatan Namibia, mengisytiharkan keadaan darurat di dalam negara itu pada hari Selasa selepas banjir besar membunuh 92 orang dan 5,032 pelarian sejak Januari.

src: 100,000 children were unable to attend classes due to the disaster, which closed 218 schools.
ref: 100,000 kanak-kanak tidak dapat menghadiri kelas disebabkan bencana itu, yang menutup 218 sekolah.

src: This year's floods appear to be worse, as President Pohamba stated that the Zambezi River had reached 7.1 metres, compared to last year's peak of 5.37 metres.
ref: Banjir tahun ini nampaknya lebih teruk lagi, kerana Presiden Pohamba berkata bahawa Sungai Zambezi telah mencapai 7.1 meter, berbanding dengan puncak tahun lepas sebanyak 5.37 meter.

src: Flooding has also reached neighbouring Angola, where nineteen people have died, according to the Red Cross.
ref: Banjir juga telah sampai negara jiran Angola, di mana sembilan belas orang terbunuh, menurut Palang Merah.

src: New Jersey is considering a state-wide ban on Brazilian waxes, the removal of hair from the bikini area.
ref: New Jersey sedang mempertimbangkan larangan di seluruh negeri terhadap cabutan berlilin Brazil, penyingkiran rambut dari kawasan bikini.
