src: Although genital waxing has never really been allowed in the state, the New Jersey Board of Cosmetology and Hairstyling plans to propose a ban with more specific legal wording, in response to two women who reported being injured during a wax.
ref: Walaupun cabutan berlilin alat kelamin tidak pernah benar-benar dibenarkan di negeri ini, Pengarah Lembaga Kosmetologi dan Rambut New Jersey merancang untuk mengemukakan cadangan pengharaman dengan susunan kata-kata undang-undang yang lebih khusus, sebagai tindak balas kepada dua wanita yang dilaporkan cedera ketika proses cabutan berlilin.

src: The board will consider the proposal at their next meeting on April 14.
ref: Lembaga akan mempertimbangkan cadangan itu dalam mesyuarat mereka seterusnya pada 14 April.

src: If the measure passes, New Jersey may become the only US state to ban the practice outright.
ref: Jika langkah itu diluluskan, New Jersey mungkin menjadi satu-satunya negeri AS yang mengharamkan amalan itu sepenuhnya.

src: Although millions of Americans engage in bikini waxes, which generally cost between $50 and $60 per session, the practice comes with risks.
ref: Walaupun berjuta-juta rakyat Amerika terlibat dalam cabutan berlilin bikini, yang biasanya berharga antara $50 dan $60 bagi setiap sesi, amalan tersebut disertai risiko.

src: Although New Jersey statutes have always banned bikini waxing, the laws were unclear and seldom enforced.
ref: Walaupun undang-undang New Jersey melarang cabutan berlilin bikini, undang-undang tidak jelas dan ia jarang dikuatkuasakan.

src: Many salon owners spoke out against the proposed ban, which they said would severely damage their business.
ref: Ramai pemilik salun bersuara menentang larangan yang dicadangkan, dimana mereka berkata ia akan memudaratkan perniagaan mereka.

src: "I really don't know if the state can stop it at this point," said Valentia Chistova, owner of the Monmouth County salon Brazil.
ref: "Saya benar-benar tidak tahu sama ada kerajaan boleh menghentikannya pada ketika ini," kata Valentia Chistova, pemilik salun Daerah Monmouth Brazil.

src: "I know a lot of women who are really hooked."
ref: "Saya tahu banyak wanita yang benar-benar ketagih".

src: Andry Rajoelina, who ousted Madagascan ex-president President Marc Ravalomanana earlier this week, officially became the leader of the country, after being sworn in on Saturday.
ref: Andry Rajoelina, yang menyingkirkan bekas presiden Madagascar Presiden Marc Ravalomanana awal minggu ini, secara rasmi menjadi pemimpin negara, selepas mengangkat sumpah Sabtu lalu.

src: Tens of thousands of people attended the event, although approximately 2,000 supporters of Ravalomanana held protests in the capital's Democracy Square.
ref: Berpuluh-puluh ribu orang menghadiri majlis tersebut, walaupun sekitar 2,000 penyokong Ravalomanana mengadakan protes di Democracy Square ibu negara.

src: "We proclaim today the end of the dictatorship," said the new president, promising to tackle corruption that was rife under Ravalomanana.
ref: "Kami mengishtiharkan hari ini sebagai tamatnya pemerintahan diktator," kata presiden baru, berjanji untuk menangani rasuah yang berleluasa di bawah Ravalomanana.

src: Earlier this week, then-president Ravalomanana gave up his power to military forces, which subsequently gave Rajoelina control over the government.
ref: Awal minggu ini, mantan presiden Ravalomanana menyerahkan kuasa kepada angkatan tentera, yang akhirnya memberi Rajoelina menguasai kerajaan.

src: Many foreign powers, among them the United States and France, have denounced the change in leadership as a coup.
ref: Kebanyakan kuasa asing, antara mereka adalah Amerika Syarikat dan Perancis, telah mengutuk perubahan dalam kepimpinan secara kudeta.

src: During a 60 Minutes interview, Obama said, "There's got to be an exit strategy."
ref: Di dalam temubual 60 minit, Obama berkata, "Strategi keluar mesti ada".

src: "There's got to be a sense that this is not perpetual drift."
ref: "Perlu difahami yang ini bukanlah satu perkara tanpa tujuan yang berterusan".

src: In February Obama said that 17,000 more troops would be sent this year before the August elections to supplement the 36,000 American troops already deployed in Afghanistan.
ref: Pada Februari Obama berkata yang 17,000 orang tentera lagi akan dihantar pada tahun ini sebelum pilihanraya Ogos bagi menambah kepada 36,000 orang tentera Amerika yang sudah diletakkan di Afghanistan.

src: Obama stated that the U.S. Mission in Afghanistan is "making sure that al-Qaeda cannot attack the U.S. homeland and U.S. interests and our allies."
ref: Obama menyatakan yang Misi U.S. di Afghanistan adalah untuk "memastikan al-Qaeda tidak dapat menyerang tanah air U.S. dan kepentingan U.S. dan sekutunya".

src: Options for a strategy include improving Afghan-Pakistani relations, while rebuilding Afghanistan's economy.
ref: Pilihan di dalam strategi itu termasuklah memperbaiki hubungan Afghan-Pakistan, dalam masa yang sama membina semula ekonomi Afghanistan.

src: "I found a very encouraging symmetry of views between our NATO allies and other troop-contributing countries and the United States," Richard Holbrooke, U.S. Special Representative for Afghanistan and Pakistan stated.
ref: "Saya menjumpai satu simetri pandangan yang amat menggalakkan di antara sekutu NATO dan tentera dari negara lain dengan Amerika Syarikat," Richard Holbrooke, Wakil Khas U.S. ke Afghanistan dan Pakistan berkata.

src: "There needs to be a way to withdraw from Afghanistan and place the focus on economic growth."
ref: "Mesti ada cara untuk keluar dari Afghanistan dan fokus kepada perkembangan ekonomi".

src: "We may need to coordinate more effectively with our allies."
ref: "Kami mungkin perlu mengkoordinasi dengan lebih efektif dengan sekutu kami".

src: "But we can't lose sight of what our central mission is."
ref: "Tetapi kami tidak boleh lari dari misi utama kami".

src: Only since 2006 has it been available without a prescription, following lobbying from the World Health Organization and American Medical Association.
ref: Hanya sejak 2006, kini ia boleh didapati tanpa preskripsi, berikutan kempen Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia dan Persatuan Perubatan Amerika.

src: Currently the drug is only available without a prescription to women over the age of 18.
ref: Pada masa ini ubat ini hanya boleh didapati tanpa preskripsi untuk wanita yang berumur 18 ke atas.

src: The lawsuit was filed in 2005 by the Center for Reproductive Rights.
ref: Tuntutan mahkamah itu difailkan pada tahun 2005 oleh Pusat Hak Reproduktif.

src: In the ruling, the judge blasted the FDA for giving in to "political considerations" and delaying approval of the new age limit.
ref: Dalam keputusan itu, hakim menyalahkan FDA kerana mengalah kepada "pertimbangan politik" dan melambatkan kelulusan had umur baru.

src: Susan F. Wood, former director of women's health at the FDA, resigned in 2005 in protest over the agency's handling of the drug.
ref: Susan F. Wood, bekas pengarah kesihatan wanita di FDA, meletak jawatan pada tahun 2005 kerana membantah pengendalian agensi dadah.

src: The Family Research Council, a conservative organization, said the judge had given in to "political ideology promoting sexual license for teens."
ref: Majlis Penyelidikan Keluarga, sebuah pertubuhan konservatif, berkata hakim itu telah mengalah kepada "ideologi politik yang mempromosikan lesen seks untuk remaja."

src: The FDA says it is reviewing the ruling, which it has thirty days to comply with.
ref: FDA berkata ia sedang mengkaji semula keputusan itu, yang mempunyai tiga puluh hari untuk mematuhinya.

src: Washington, D.C. - The Environmental Protection Agency may have a new tool in its arsenal to fight global warming.
ref: Washington, D.C. - Agensi Perlindungan Alam Sekitar mungkin mempunyai alat baru dalam gudang senjatanya untuk memerangi pemanasan global.

src: The agency has submitted a proposal to the Obama administration which aims to list carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gasses as pollutants under the Clean Air Act.
ref: Agensi itu telah mengemukakan cadangan kepada pentadbiran Obama yang bertujuan untuk menyenaraikan karbon dioksida dan gas-gas rumah hijau lain sebagai bahan pencemar di bawah Akta Udara Bersih.

src: The proposal lists the negative effects of global warming, including longer and hotter heat waves, increased flooding, and the increased spread of diseases due to warmer weather.
ref: Cadangan itu menyenaraikan kesan negatif pemanasan global, termasuk gelombang haba lebih lama dan lebih panas, kekerapan banjir meningkat, dan peningkatan penyebaran penyakit yang berpunca dari cuaca lebih panas.

src: Environmental groups applauded the finding, with the director of Clean Air Watch, Frank O'Donnell, calling it "a green-letter day for the environment."
ref: Kumpulan alam sekitar memuji pendapat tersebut, dengan pengarah Pemerhatian Udara Bersih, Frank O'Donnell, memanggilnya "hari perkataan hijau untuk alam sekitar".

src: One of the U.S. Chamber of Commerce vice presidents, William L. Kovacs, said if the the proposal is put into effect that it "will be devastating to the economy."
ref: Salah seorang daripada naib presiden Dewan Perniagaan Amerika Syarikat, William L. Kovacs, berkata bahawa jika cadangan itu dilaksanakan, "ia akan mengakibatkan kemusnahan ekonomi".

src: No specific timeline has been given for when a decision would be made.
ref: Tiada tempoh masa tertentu telah diberikan bila masanya keputusan akan dibuat.

src: An upcoming conference in Copenhagen, Denmark will focus on drawing up a new international global warming treaty, which the United States plans to attend, a clear reversal from the Bush administration's non-participation in the 1997 Kyoto Protocol.
ref: Persidangan akan datang di Copenhagen, Denmark akan tumpu dalam merangka perjanjian pemanasan global antarabangsa yang baru, di mana Amerika Syarikat merancang untuk hadir, yang merupakan satu perubahan arah yang nyata daripada pentadbiran Bush untuk tidak hadir dalam Protokol Kyoto pada tahun 1997.

src: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has stated that the cholera outbreak that has struck the African country of Zimbabwe seems to have passed its peak.
ref: Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia (WHO) telah menyatakan bahawa wabak taun yang telah melanda negara Afrika Zimbabwe seolah-olah telah melalui kemuncaknya.

src: "The overall trend over the last two months is of a decreasing number of cases and deaths," the WHO said.
ref: "Perkembangan keseluruhan dalam tempoh dua bulan lepas adalah beberapa pengurangan kes dan kematian," kata WHO.

src: The WHO stated that the fatality rate per week dropped from a peak of 6% in January to 2.3% this month.
ref: WHO menyatakan bahawa kadar kematian setiap minggu menurun daripada paras tertinggi 6% pada bulan Januari kepada 2.3% pada bulan ini.

src: The cholera epidemic is the deadliest in Africa for a decade and a half.
ref: Wabak taun adalah yang paling dahsyat di Afrika selama sedekad setengah.

src: Jenkins managed to reach a speed of 126.1 miles per hour (202.9 kilometres per hour) in his Greenbird car along the plains of Nevada's Ivanpah Lake.
ref: Jenkins berjaya melepasi kelajuaan 126.1 batu sejam (202.9 kilometer sejam) dalam kereta Greenbird beliau sepanjang tasik di Ivanpah, Nevada.

src: Jenkins said that he had worked for ten years to break the record, and that "things couldn't have been better" on the day he broke the record.
ref: Jenkins berkata bahawa beliau telah bekerja keras selama sepuluh tahun untuk memecahkan rekod, dan "perkara ini tidak akan lebih baik" pada hari beliau memecahkan rekod itu.

src: "Half the challenge is technical, having to create a more efficient vehicle than the previous record holder, then the rest is luck, being in the right place, at the right time, to get the perfect conditions, with the right people watching."
ref: "Sebahgian dari cabaran itu ialah teknikal, dengan mencipta kenderaan lebih effisen berbanding pemegang rekod sebelum ini, manakala selebihnya ialah tuah, berada di tempat yang betul, pada masa yang betul, untuk mendapat keadaan yang sempurna, dengan diperhatikan oleh orang ramai".

src: "I must have been on record standby at some remote location around the world for at least two months of every year for the past ten years," he said.
ref: "Saya mesti berada dalam rekod tersedia pada sesuatu temapt seluruh dunia ini sekurang-kurangnya selama dua bulan untuk setiap tahun selama lebih sepuluh tahun," dia berkata.

src: "Then everything came together perfectly and the Greenbird stepped up to the mark and performed amazingly.
ref: "Kemudian semuanya akan datang bersama secara sempurna dan Greenbird berada di garisan dan mempersembahkan secara menakjubkan.

src: The previous record for the fastest wind-powered land vehicle belonged to Bob Schumacher from the United States, who reached 116 miles per hour in his Iron Duck machine.
ref: Rekod sebelum ini untuk kenderaan darat tenaga-angin dimiliki oleh Bob Schumacher dari Amerika Syarikat, yang berjaya mecapai 116 batu sejam dengan mesin Iron Duck beliau.

src: The Greenbird is a fifth generation in an array of vehicles created by Jenkins in his ten-year effort to break the speed record.
ref: Greenbird merupakan generasi kelima dalam sejarah kenderaan yang dicipta oleh Jenkins dalam usaha sepuluh-tahun beliau untuk memecahkan rekod kelajuan.

src: It is composed out of carbon fibre composite, and powered only by wind.
ref: Ianya diperbuat dari komposit serat karbon dan hanya tenaga yang dihasilkan dari angin.

src: A Spanish court is considering opening a criminal investigation into whether six former George W. Bush administration officials gave legal cover for torture at Guantanamo Bay.
ref: Sebuah mahkamah Sepanyol sedang mempertimbangkan untuk membuka siasatan jenayah terhadap enam bekas pegawai pentadbiran George W. Bush sama ada mereka memberi perlindungan undang-undang atas seksaan Teluk Guantanamo.

src: The prosecutor's office must issue a recommendation on the merits of the case and on whether the high court has jurisdiction to pursue it.
ref: Pejabat pendakwa hendaklah mengeluarkan pengesyoran terhadap merit kes tersebut dan sama ada mahkamah tinggi mempunyai bidang kuasa untuk melaksanakannya.

src: A response is expected by next month, and an official close to the case said it was "highly probable" it would go forward and lead to arrest warrants.
ref: Jawapan dijangka akan diterima menjelang bulan depan, dan seorang pegawai yang berkaitan dengan kes tersebut menyatakan bahawa ia "berkemungkinan tinggi" dan ia akan diteruskan dan membawa kepada waran tangkap.

src: But American legal experts said the warrants, if issued, would be a largely symbolic gesture and that the officials would likely not be arrested if they did not leave the United States.
ref: Namun pakar undang-undang Amerika berkata jika waran itu, akan menjadi tanda simbolik dan pegawai itu mungkin tidak akan ditahan jika mereka tidak meninggalkan Amerika Syarikat.

src: The officials are accused of providing the framework of policies and legal opinions that justified torture at the Guantanamo Bay detention camp and afforded no protection under the Geneva Convention to Al-Qaeda suspects.
ref: Pegawai dituduh atas memberi rangka polisi dan pendapat undang-undang yang membenarkan penyiksaan di kem tahanan Teluk Guantanamo dan tidak memberikan sebarang perlindungan di bawah Konvensyen Geneva kepada suspek Al-Qaeda.

src: "They criticize me for promoting a controversial position that I never advocated."
ref: "Mereka mengkritik saya dalam mendapatkan satu jawatan berkontroversi yang saya tidak pernah sokong".

src: The other officials are former Vice President Dick Cheney's chief of staff David Addington, Pentagon attorney William Haynes, and Justice Department officials John Yoo and Jay Bybee.
ref: Pegawai lain merupakan bekas ketua pekerja Naib Presiden Dick Cheney, David Addington, peguam Pentagon William Haynes, dan pegawai Jabatan Kehakiman John Yoo dan Jay Bybee.

src: Defenders of the officials said their legal analyses, which were conducted immediately following the September 11 attacks, are now being unfairly second-guessed.
ref: Pembela pegawai terbabit menyatakan bahawa analisis undang-undang mereka, yang dijalankan sejurus selepas serangan 11 September, kini sedang dibuat andaian tidak adil.

src: A Spanish human rights group called the Association for Dignity of Inmates filed the criminal complaint.
ref: Sebuah kumpulan hak asasi manusia Sepanyol meminta Persatuan Kehormatan Banduan supaya mengfailkan aduan jenayah tersebut.

src: More than 300 "citizen reporters" hailing from countries as far apart as Chile and Norway are coming together at the OhmyNews International Citizen Reporters' Forum from June 23 to June 26, 2005 in Seoul.
ref: Lebih daripada 300 "pemberita rakyat" berasal dari negara sejauh Chile dan Norway hadir bersama-sama di Forum Wartawan Kerakyatan Antarabangsa OhmyNews dari 23 Jun hingga 26 Jun 2005 di Seoul.

src: OhmyNews is one of the most popular South Korean news websites, and it has played an important role in the election of reformist President Roh Moo-hyun.
ref: OhmyNews adalah salah satu laman berita Korea Selatan yang paling popular, dan ia telah memainkan peranan yang penting dalam pemilihan Presiden reformis Roh Moo-hyun.

src: A professional staff of journalists vets incoming submissions and decides which stories are to be published.
ref: Seorang kakitangan wartawan profesional menyemak serahan masuk dan memutuskan cerita mana yang akan disiarkan.

src: The project is sponsoring the forum in order to promote its English edition, officially launched in May 2004.
ref: Projek tersebut menaja forum itu untuk mempromosi edisi bahasa Inggerisnya, yang dilancarkan secara rasmi di bulan Mei 2004.

src: Citizen reporters writing in English exchange ideas and stories, and try to understand the inner workings of the Korean edition.
ref: Pemberita rakyat menulis dalam idea dan cerita pertukaran Inggeris, dan cuba untuk memahami mekanisme dalaman edisi Korea.

src: The conference is sponsored by Korean corporations such as Samsung, SK Corporation, LG, Yuhan-Kimberly, and Asiana Airlines.
ref: Persidangan itu ditaja oleh syarikat-syarikat Korea seperti Samsung, SK Corporation, LG, Yuhan-Kimberly dan Sistem Penerbangan Asiana.

src: The People's Republic of China has signed an agreement with ASEAN to establish the world's largest free trade area.
ref: Republik Rakyat China telah menandatangani satu perjanjian dengan ASEAN untuk menubuhkan kawasan perdagangan bebas terbesar di dunia.

src: ASEAN members include Myanmar, Laos, Thailand, Cambodia, Vietnam, Philippines, Malaysia, Brunei Darussalam, Singapore and Indonesia.
ref: Anggota ASEAN termasuk Myanmar, Laos, Thailand, Kemboja, Vietnam, Filipina, Malaysia, Brunei Darussalam, Singapura dan Indonesia.

src: In the last four years China has become a major importer of oil and commodities, and a major exporter of finished goods.
ref: Dalam tempoh empat tahun lepas China telah menjadi pengimport utama minyak dan komoditi, dan pengeksport utama barangan siap.

src: This pact lifts trade restrictions and removes tariffs from many imports and exports.
ref: Pakatan ini menghilangkan sekatan perdagangan dan membuang tarif dari banyak barang import dan eksport.

src: It also allows China to continue manipulating the value of its currency in its own interests.
ref: Ia juga membolehkan China untuk terus memanipulasikan nilai mata wang dalam kepentingan sendiri.

src: The yuan is currently undervalued, making Chinese-made goods artificially cheap for foreign importers.
ref: Yuan kini di bawah nilai, menjadikan barangan buatan China murah secara buatan bagi pengimport asing.

src: Stated in the agreement is ASEAN's intention to create a unified economy--and by implication polity--similar to the EU.
ref: Dinyatakan dalam perjanjian itu adalah niat ASEAN untuk mewujudkan ekonomi bersatu--dan dengan implikasi tatanegara--sama dengan EU.

src: Japanese Prime Minister Junichiro Koizumi and South Korean President Roh Moo-Hyun separately adopted accords with the 10-nation Association of Southeast Asian Nations, agreeing to launch the talks early next year.
ref: Perdana Menteri Jepun Junichiro Koizumi dan Presiden Korea Selatan Roh Moo-Hyun berasingan menerima kesepakatan dengan 10 negara dalam Persatuan Negara-negara Asia Tenggara, bersetuju untuk melancarkan rundingan awal tahun depan.

src: Howard played down these concerns but said on record that he reserves the right to preemptively act against terrorists on foreign soil if they threaten Australia.
ref: Howard meredakan kebimbangan ini tetapi berkata dalam rekod bahawa dia berhak untuk bertindak terlebih dahulu terhadap pengganas di negara asing jika mereka mengancam Australia.

src: Zimbabwean President Mugabe's Operation Murambatsvina ("Drive out rubbish") has seen at least 200,000 people made homeless in Zimbabwe as the government bulldozes "illegal" homes, buildings and markets.
ref: Operasi Murambatsvina Presiden Zimbabwe Mugabe ("Mengusir sampah") telah dilihat hampir 200,000 orang yang tiada tempat tinggal dalam Zimbabwe selepas kerajaan meratakan rumah "haram," bangunan dan pasar.

src: The opposition has said the operation is designed to "punish" those who object to Mugabe's government.
ref: Pembangkang telah berkata bahawa operasi itu telah direka untuk "menghukum" sesiapa yang membantah kerajaan Mugabe.

src: Two children under the age of two have been killed, the first deaths reported so far in the actions which have been taking place for a month now.
ref: Dua kanak-kanak bawah dua tahun telah dibunuh, kematian pertama yang dilaporkan setakat ini dalam tindakan yang telah diambil alih hampir sebulan sekarang.

src: The government has said the buildings it is destroying are "illegal", and have said that the "black markets" are to blame for the country's "economic meltdown".
ref: Kerajaan telah berkata bahawa bangunan yang dimusnahkan adalah "haram," dan telah berkata bahawa "pasar gelap" adalah punca kepada "kelembapan ekonomi" negara.

src: Sometimes the police have forced homeowners to carry out the destruction themselves.
ref: Kadang-kadang polis memaksa tuan rumah untuk melakukan kemusnahan sendiri.

src: At other times, the government has claimed it is destroying the buildings to get rid of unsafe structures and to reduce overcrowding.
ref: Pada masa yang lain, kerajaan mendakwa mereka memusnahkan bangunan untuk menghapuskan struktur yang tidak selamat dan mengurangkan kesesakan melampau.

src: Other children have died when the walls of their houses have collapsed.
ref: Terdapat kanak-kanak lain yang mati semasa dinding rumah mereka runtuh.

src: The country currently needs to import 1.2 million tonnes of food to avoid famine as rural farming production drops.
ref: Negara itu sekarang perlu mengimport 1.2 juta tan makanan untuk mengelakkan kebuluran kerana keluaran tamanan tempatan berkurang.

src: 300 millimeters (11.8 inches) of rain fell in six hours resulting in flash flooding on the New South Wales mid-north coast in Australia trapping thousands.
ref: 300 milimeter (11.8 inci) hujan turun dalam enam jam menyebabkan banjir kilat di New South Wales pantai pertengahan utara di Australia memerangkap ribuan orang.

src: "We're looking at a flood that is around the one in one hundred year flood level," said Phil Campbell, State Emergency Service spokesperson.
ref: "Kami melihat banjir di sekitar yang merupakan satu dalam seratus tahun," kata Phil Campbell, jurucakap Perkhidmatan Kecemasan Negeri.

src: Ambulance crews spent the night rescuing stranded residents caught off guard by the sudden deluge.
ref: Pasukan ambulan semalaman menyelamatkan penduduk yang terkandas terkejut oleh banjir secara tiba-tiba.

src: As many as 2,700 residents had been trapped by the floodwaters.
ref: Seramai 2,700 penduduk telah terperangkap oleh air banjir.

src: 420 people sought refuge in evacuation centres over night, of these all but 70 have returned home.
ref: 420 orang mencari perlindungan di pusat pemindahan bermalam, tetapi daripada semua ini 70 telah kembali ke rumah.

src: The Red Cross flood evacuation centre in Urunga was left without power but still harbours 300 who sought refuge there.
ref: Pusat pemindahan banjir Palang Merah di Urunga tanpa bekalan elektrik tetapi masih menempatkan 300 orang yang mencari perlindungan di sana.

src: Inland floodwaters trapped more than 1,000 residents in Coffs Harbour, New South Wales over night.
ref: Banjir pedalaman memerangkap lebih 1,000 penduduk di Pelabuhan Coffs, New South Wales dalam satu malam.

src: "It does seem likely that we'll need to make a natural disaster emergency declaration and that's something which obviously then brings some resources in."
ref: "Seolah-olah mungkin kita perlu membuat pengisytiharan darurat bencana alam dan itu sesuatu yang pastinya kemudian membawa masuk beberapa sumber".

src: Floodwaters are starting to recede, however the Bureau of Meteorology does not see an end to the heavy rains.
ref: Banjir mula surut, bagaimanapun Biro Meteorologi tidak melihat sebarang pengakhiran kepada hujan lebat.

src: According to police, Kile Wygle, 28, from Newark, Ohio, was arrested for drunk driving after he crashed his motorized bar stool.
ref: Menurut polis, Kile Wygle, 28, dari Newark, Ohio, telah ditahan kerana memandu dalam keadaan mabuk selepas dia melanggar bangku bar bermotornya.

src: While driving his bar stool, which is powered by a lawnmower engine, Wygle attempted to make a U-turn while going down his street and crashed.
ref: Ketika dia sedang memandu bangku barnya, yang kuasanya dibekalkan oleh enjin pemotong rumput, Wygle cuba untuk membuat pusingan-U ketika turun dari jalannya dan berlanggar.

src: When police arrived, he was taken to a local hospital where police say he admitted to drinking 15 beers.
ref: Apabila polis tiba, dia telah dibawa ke hospital di mana polis memberitahu dia mengaku meminum 15 botol arak.

src: Wygle pleaded not guilty when appearing in court and denies that he was drunk, but that he did begin to consume alcohol following the crash.
ref: Wygle mengaku tidak bersalah apabila tiba di mahkamah dan menafikan bahawa dia mabuk, tetapi dia mula untuk mengambil alkohol selepas kemalangan.

src: He also requested a jury be present during his trial.
ref: Dia juga meminta kepada juri untuk hadir ketika percubaannya.

src: Wygle says his vehicle can travel nearly 40 miles per hour.
ref: Wygle berkata kenderaannya mampu bergerak sejauh 40 baju sejam.

src: Most are made from old lawnmower parts, a steering wheel and a bar stool.
ref: Kebanyakan diperbuat daripada bahagian mesin rumput lama, tayar stereng dan bangku bar.

src: The United Stated Department of Justice has asked for corruption charges against former Alaska Senator Ted Stevens to be dropped because evidence was withheld from the defense team by the original prosecutors.
ref: Jabatan Kehakiman Amerika Syarikat telah meminta dakwaan rasuah terhadap bekas Senator Alaska Ted Steven digugurkan selepas bukti ditahan daripada pasukan pertahanan oleh pendakwa raya asal.

src: The Justice Department has stated that they will not retry Stevens.
ref: Jabatan Kehakiman menyatakan mereka tidak akan membicarakan Steven lagi.

src: "In light of this conclusion, and in consideration of the totality of the circumstances of this particular case, I have determined that it is in the interest of justice to dismiss the indictment and not proceed with a new trial."
ref: "Berdasarkan konklusi ini, dan petimbangan secara keseluruhan tentang keadaan kes ini, saya telah menetapkan untuk menolak dakwaan itu demi kepentingan keadilan dan untuk tidak meneruskan perbicaraan yang baru".

src: Stevens was convicted in October on seven felony counts of lying on senate disclosure forms about gifts, largely in the form of free renovations to his home, received from an oil service company; his conviction is thought to have been a large factor in his November electoral defeat to former Anchorage mayor Mark Begich, the current junior Senator from Alaska.
ref: Steven telah disabit kesalahan pada Oktober ke atas tujuh tuduhan feloni berbohong dalam borang pendedahan Senat berkaitan hadiah, sebahagian besarnya dalam bentuk pengubahsuaian percuma kepada rumahnya, menerima borang untuk syarikat penyelenggaraan minyak; kesalahan tersebut dikatakan menjadi faktor besar kepada kekalahannya di pilihanraya November lalu dengan bekas Datuk Bandar Anchotage Mark Begich, iaitu seorang senator muda dari Alaska sekarang.

src: The prosecution case has met with a number of procedural difficulties, with US District Court judge Emmet G. Sullivan holding the prosecution in contempt in March for failing to turn over documents concerning an FBI whistleblower's reports of mishandling of the case.
ref: Kes pendakwaan itu telah menemui beberapa kesukaran dalam prosedur, dengan Hakim Mahkamah Rendah US Emmet G. Sullivan yang mendakwa penghinaan mahkamah pada Mac kerana gagal menyerahkan dokumen - dokumen berkaitan laporan kegagalan mengendalikan kes oleh pemberi maklumat FBI.

src: The original trial team was removed, but in the end Attorney General Eric Holder thought it would be best if the case was dropped.
ref: Pasukan pembicaraan asal telah dimansuhkan, tetapi akhirnya Peguam Negara Eric Holder menganggap ianya adalah lebih baik jika kes ini digugurkan.

src: The trying prosecutors are under investigation by the Justice Department for their conduct in the matter.
ref: Pendakwa raya tersebut masih dibawah siasatan oleh Bahagian Kehakiman atas perbuatan mereka dalam hal tersebut.

src: General Motors Corporation (GM) announced on Wednesday that it saw a 45% drop in United States vehicle sales for its cars in March.
ref: Syarikat General Motor(GM) mengumumkan pada hari rabu bahawa mereka telah melihat penurunan penjualan kenderaan di Amerika Syarikat sebanyak 45% bagi kereta mereka di bulan Mac.

src: "It's too early to see a trend, but spring shows signs of hope."
ref: "Masih terlalu awal untuk melihat trendnya, tetapi ianya telah menunjukkan tanda harapan".

src: Other automobile manufacturers also saw their car sales slip: Chrysler and the Japanese Toyota both reported a 39% loss, whilst Ford Motor Company sales fell 41%.
ref: Pengeluar kenderaan lain juga menyaksikan penurunan penjualan kereta mereka.

src: Annualised sales of vehicles in the car industry in the US are predicted to have dipped below nine million in March, compared to February's 9.12 million, which was the lowest number since 1981.
ref: Syarikat Chrysler dan Syarikat Toyota dari Jepun keduanya mengalami kemerosotan sebanyak 39%, sementara jualan Syarikat Motor Ford menurun sebanyak 41%.

src: "Auto makers are pulling every lever in their effort to attract buyers, as evidenced by the new programs from Ford and GM."
ref: Jualan tahunan kenderaan dalam industri kereta di Amerika Syarikat telah diramalkan akan menjunam ke bawah 9 juta pada bulan Mac, berbanding dengan 9.12 juta pada Februari merupakan jumlah yang paling rendah semenjak tahun 1981. "Pembuat Kenderaan telah menarik setiap tuil dalam usaha mereka untuk menarik pembeli seperti yang dibuktikan oleh program-program baru daripada Syarikat Ford dan Syarikat GM".

src: "The typical incentive programs simply do not resonate in today's economy," Jesse Toprak, an analyst for Edmunds.
ref: "Program insentif biasa tidak akan bergema dalam ekonomi hari ini" kata Jesse Toprak, Penganalisis dari Edmunds.

src: Adam is a robot developed by Welsh Aberystwyth University researchers which combines artificial intelligence (AI), robotics and automation to independently conduct and analyse biological laboratory research.
ref: Adam adalah sebuah robot yang diperbuat oleh penyelidik Universiti Aberystwyth di Wales yang menggabungkan kecerdasan buatan (AI), robotik dan automasi untuk menjalankan dan menganalisis kajian makmal biologi secara bebas.

src: "What's new and exciting about Adam is [it is] the first time we've managed to show that a computer can not only think up new scientific ideas, but experimentally test them and decide whether they're true," said Ross King, a computer science professor and lead researcher at Aberystwyth University, "Adam makes up its own mind what to do.
ref: "Apa yang baru dan menarik tentang Adam adalah [ia] kali pertama kami berjaya menunjukkan bahawa komputer bukan sahaja boleh fikirkan idea-idea saintifik baru, menguji mereka melalui eksperimen dan membuat keputusan sama ada mereka betul," kata Ross King, seorang profesor sains komputer dan penyelidik di Universiti Aberystwyth, "Adam membuat keputusan sendiri apa yang perlu dilakukan".

src: The artificial intelligence alone spans three computers which holds the databases and analytical software to enable Adam to think.
ref: Kecerdasan buatan sahaja menjangkau tiga komputer yang memegang pangkalan data dan perisian analisis untuk membolehkan Adam untuk berfikir.

src: Adam compared all fields in the database to find the areas of missing information from which he devised 20 hypotheses.
ref: Adam membandingkan semua bidang di dalam pangkalan data untuk mencari bidang maklumat yang hilang dan dia telah mencipta 20 hipotesis.

src: William Melek, an assistant professor of mechanical engineering at Ontario's University of Waterloo, has noted that to set up the AI needed for subsequent experiments involving new biological variables and criteria, the human expertise would be time consuming to customize it.
ref: William Melek, penolong profesor kejuruteraan mekanikal di Waterloo Universiti di Ontario, telah menyatakan bahawa untuk menubuhkan Kecerdasan Buatan yang diperlukan untuk eksperimen berikutnya yang melibatkan pemboleh ubah biologi dan kriteria yang baru, kepakaran manusia akan memakan masa untuk menyesuaikannya.

src: David Waltz of Columbia University and Bruce Buchanan of the University of Pittsburgh say that "For the foreseeable future, the prospect of using automated systems as assistants holds vast promise as these assistants are becoming not only faster but much broader in their capabilities -- more knowledgeable, more creative, and more self-reflective," They note the potential of such lab assistants which may more efficiently process the research data.
ref: David Waltz dari Universiti Columbia dan Bruce Buchanan dari Pittsburgh Universiti mengatakan bahawa "Untuk masa akan datang, prospek menggunakan sistem automatik sebagai pembantu mempunyai potensi luas kerana pembantu ini menjadi bukan sahaja lebih cepat tetapi lebih luas dalam keupayaan mereka - lebih berpengetahuan, lebih kreatif, dan lebih merenung perlakuan diri," Mereka mendapati potensi pembantu makmal begitu mungkin memproses data penyelidikan dengan lebih cekap.

src: It was reported that Adam cost about $1million in production costs and this was weighed against the costs of hiring lab techs.
ref: Dilaporkan bahawa Adam menelan kos kira-kira $1 juta dalam kos pengeluaran dan ini dipertimbangkan dengan kos mengupah juruteknik makmal.

src: King said, We made many mistakes and learned from Adam.
ref: King berkata, Kami membuat banyak kesilapan dan belajar dari Adam.

src: Eve is the second AI computer under development by Professor King's research team.
ref: Eve adalah komputer Kercerdasan Buatan kedua di bawah pembangunan oleh pasukan penyelidikan Profesor King.

src: Eve's artificial intelligence will be enhanced to analyze compounds needed for medicinal drugs which may treat killer diseases such as malaria.
ref: Kecerdasan buatan Eve akan dipertingkatkan untuk menganalisis sebatian yang diperlukan untuk ubat ubatan yang boleh merawat penyakit pembunuh seperti malaria.

src: The Alaska Volcano Observatory (AVO) reported today a "significant explosive event" had occurred at Mount Redoubt in Alaska.
ref: Balai Cerap Gunung Berapi Alaska (AVO) melaporkan hari ini satu "kejadian letupan yang utama" telah berlaku di Gunung Redoubt di Alaska.

src: Lightning was observed within an ash cloud that formed over the volcano.
ref: Kilat dapat dilihat di dalam awan abu yang terbentuk di atas gunung berapi.

src: As a result the AVO raised the alert level to 'warning' and level 'red' for aviation.
ref: Akibat dari kejadian itu AVO telah menaikkan paras amaran ke 'peringatan'dan paras 'merah'untuk penerbangan.

src: According to the Observatory, seismic activity caused a major lahar, similar to a mudslide or landslide, to occur in the Drift River Valley.
ref: Menurut Balai Cerap tersebut, kegiatan seismos mengakibatkan satu lava besar, serupa dengan gelongsoran tanah atau lumpur, untuk berlaku di Lembah Sungai Drift.

src: Inhabitants of the Valley were advised to seek high ground and take immediate precautions against flooding.
ref: Penduduk Lembah itu telah dinasihatkan untuk menyelamatkan diri ke kawasan tinggi dan mengambil langkah pencegahan dengan segera terhadap banjir.

src: So far there are no reports of injuries or evacuations.
ref: Sehingga kini tidak ada laporan kecederaan atau pemindahan.

src: Wikinews has e-mailed the AVO for a statement regarding the event, but has yet to receive a reply.
ref: Wikinews telah menghantar e-mel kepada AVO untuk kenyataan berkenaan kejadian itu, tetapi masih belum mendapat jawapan.

src: "Strong, but diminishing seismic activity is continuing as of 07:35 AKDT," said the AVO on its website.
ref: "Aktiviti seismos yang kuat, tetapi semakin berkurangan masih berterusan pada jam 07:35 AKDT," AVO berkata di laman webnya.

src: At 9:18 a.m., the AVO reported that the event had ended.
ref: Pada pukul 9:18 pagi, AVO melaporkan yang kejadian itu telah tamat.

src: "Continuing seismic activity and web camera images indicate that low level emissions of steam, gas, and some volcanic ash are continuing to be emitted at the volcano at altitudes of [20,000 feet]."
ref: "Aktiviti seismos berterusan dan gambar kamera web menunjukkan pelepasan wap, gas dan abu gunung berapi berparas rendah masih terus dikeluarkan di gunung berapi itu di ketinggian [20,000 feet]".

src: The AVO is sending a team to investigate the latest eruption which will include a fly-over to take readings on the gases being emitted.
ref: AVO akan menghantar satu pasukan untuk menyiasat letupan baru-baru ini yang akan melibatkan penerbangan di atasnya untuk mengambil bacaan gas yang dilepaskan.

src: The explosion sent volcanic ash which spread to "Homer, Anchor Point, and Seldovia" to an altitude of over 50,000 feet.
ref: Letupan itu menyebabkan abu gunung berapi tersebar ke "Homer, Anchor Point, dan Seldovia" ke ketinggian setinggi 50,000 feet.

src: The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) has issued an advisory stating that ash fall can be expected from "Ninilchik Southward through mid morning."
ref: Pentadbiran Atmosfera dan Lautan Kebangsaan (NOAA) telah mengeluarkan makluman yang menyatakan abu yang jatuh boleh dijangkakan dari "Ninilchik Southward berterusan selama waktu matahari sedang naik".

src: During the last year the ice shelf has lost about 1800 square kilometers (694 square miles), or about 14 percent of its size, said Angelika Humbert from the Institute of Geophysics at University of Münster in Germany.
ref: Sepanjang tahun lepas bongkas ais itu kehilangan 1800 kilometer persegi (694 batu persegi), atau lebih kurang 14 peratus dari saiznya, kata Angelika Humbert dari Institut Geofizik dari Universiti Münster di Jerman.

src: Scientists say that the shelf, if it detaches from the mainland, won't cause an increase in sea levels, as it is already floating.
ref: Ahli-ahli saintis menyatakan bahawa, jika bongkah itu terpisah dari tanah besar, tidak akan mengakibatkan kenaikan paras air, kerana ia sudah terapung.

src: The international community has condemned the Fijian president's decision to abrogate the constitution.
ref: Masyarakat antarabangsa telah mengutuk keputusan presiden Fiji untuk membubarkan perlembagaan.

src: Australian Prime Minister Kevin Rudd condemned the move, saying that it would take Fiji backwards.
ref: Perdana Menteri Australia Kevin Rudd mengutuk langkah tersebut, dan mengatakan bahawa ia menyebabkan Fiji semakin mundur.

src: He called for the government to obey the court of appeal's ruling and hold elections promptly.
ref: Beliau menggesa kerajaan untuk mematuhi keputusan Mahkamah Rayuan dan mengadakan pilihan raya dengan segera.

src: New Zealand Foreign Minister Murray McCully said that the abrogation of the constitution "will merely compound the problems faced by ordinary Fijians".
ref: Menteri Luar Negara New Zealand, Murray McCully berkata bahawa pembubaran perlembagaan "hanya akan memburukkan lagi masalah yang dihadapi oleh rakyat biasa Fiji."

src: "The President's decision, no doubt prompted by the Commodore, to override the constitution, sack the judges, and depend upon the military to keep an unlawful regime in power, will compound the already serious economic difficulties confronted by Fiji," McCully said.
ref: "Keputusan Presiden, tidak syak lagi didorong oleh Commodore untuk menggubal perlembagaan, memecat hakim-hakim, dan bergantung kepada tentera untuk mengekalkan rejim kuasa tidak sah, akan memburukkan lagi masalah ekonomi yang serius dihidapi Fiji," kata McCully.

src: In a televised address this morning, President Iloilo abrogated the constitution, revoked all judicial appointments, and appointed himself as head of state.
ref: Dalam ucapan di televisyen pagi ini, Presiden Iloilo membubarkan perlembagaan, membatalkan semua pelantikan hakim, dan melantik dirinya sebagai ketua negara.

src: He said he would appoint a new interim government in the coming days to implement the reforms of the People's Charter for Change, Peace and Progress and pave the way for "true democratic and parliamentary elections" to be held by September 2014.
ref: Beliau berkata beliau akan melantik kerajaan sementara baru pada hari-hari yang akan datang untuk melaksanakan pembaharuan Piagam Rakyat untuk Perubahan, Keamanan dan Kemajuan dan membuka jalan untuk "demokrasi dan pilihan raya parlimen benar" yang akan diadakan pada September 2014.

src: According to exit polls, the Leftist Coalition for Bulgaria has a lead with around 31%, but without majority, neccesating creation of coalitions.
ref: Menurut tinjauan undi dari luar, pihak gabungan haluan kiri Bulgaria mendahului dengan kira-kira 31%, tetapi tanpa majoriti, perlunya pembentukan kerajaan campuran.

src: The National Movement for Simeon II which is currently ruling is in the second place, with around 21%.
ref: Pergerakan Kebangsaan Simeon II yang kini memerintah berada di tempat kedua, dengan kira-kira 21%.

src: The third is Ethnic Turks of Bulgaria, with around 11%.
ref: Ketiga ialah Etnik Turks Bulgaria, dengan kira-kira 11%.

src: It is expected that the National Movement for Simeon II will attempt to form a coalition with one of the lower placed parties in order to outnumber the Leftists.
ref: Dijangkakan bahawa Pergerakan Kebangsaan Simeon II akan cuba untuk membentuk kerajaan campuran dengan salah satu pihak yang berada di kedudukan lebih rendah untuk melebihi yang pihak berhaluan kiri.

src: At least 6,000 candidates (from 22 parties) ran for election to the 240 member parilament.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 6,000 calon (dari 22 pihak) bertanding untuk pemilihan ke parlimen dengan 240 anggota itu.

src: 4% of the votes are needed to gain a seat.
ref: 4% daripada jumlah undi adalah yang diperlukan untuk mendapatkan kedudukan.

src: We are ready to form a government ... and we will negotiate with any democratic party," Stanisheve said in a press conference.
ref: Kami bersedia untuk membentuk kerajaan...dan kami akan berunding dengan mana-mana parti demokratik," kata Stanisheve dalam satu sidang akhbar.

src: In the last six free elections held since 1989, no government has been re-elected -- each has had to implement stringent economic and social reforms, since the fall of communism, and has lost popular support as a result.
ref: Dalam enam pilihan raya bebas lalu yang diadakan sejak tahun 1989, tidak ada kerajaan telah dipilih semula - masing-masing perlu melaksanakan pembaharuan ekonomi dan sosial yang ketat, sejak kejatuhan komunisme, dan telah kehilangan sokongan rakyat sebagai akibatnya.

src: "The Stockholm district court has today found guilty the four individuals that were charged with accessory to breaching copyright laws."
ref: "Mahkamah daerah Stockholm hari ini telah mendapati empat individu yang didakwa terlibat dalam melanggar undang-undang hak cipta bersalah."

src: "This is just a theater for the media," said a spokesman for TPB.
ref: "Ini hanya teater untuk media," kata seorang jurucakap kepada TPB.

src: The spokesman also added that TPB "cannot and will not" pay the damages.
ref: Jurucakap itu juga menambah bahawa TPB "tidak boleh dan tidak akan" membayar ganti rugi.

src: The trial lasted two weeks, and ended on March 2.
ref: Perbicaraan berlangsung selama dua minggu, dan berakhir pada 2 Mac.

src: The lawsuit was filed on behalf of Sony Music Entertainment, Warner Bros. and Columbia Pictures among others.
ref: Saman telah difailkan bagi pihak Sony Music Entertainment, Warner Bros. dan Columbia Pictures antara lain.

src: Zahi Hawass, Egypt's pre-eminent archaeologist, revealed the first ancient artifacts which may lead to the discovery of Cleopatra and Marc Antony's resting place.
ref: Zahi Hawass, ahli arkeologi terkemuka Egypt, mendedahkan artifak tua pertama yang mana membwa boleh membawa kepada penemuan tempat rehat Cleopatra dan Marc Antony.

src: The expedition has found amulets, 22 bronze coins cast with Cleopatra's image and her name, a royal statue, an alabaster mask resembling Marc Antony, and a statue bust of Cleopatra.
ref: Ekspidisi telah menemui azimat, 22 acuan syiling gangsa dengan gambar dan nama Cleopatra, patung di raja, topeng alabaster menyerupai Marc Antony, dan patung dada Cleopatra.

src: "If you look at the face of Mark Antony, many believed he had this cleft on his chin and that's why I thought this could be Mark Antony," said Hawass.
ref: "Jika kamu lihat di muka Mark Antony, ramai mempercayai dia mempunyai rekahan di dagu dan oleh sebab itu saya fikir ini mungkin Mark Antony," kata Hawass.

src: Recently, outside the temple colourful mummies of nobles were excavated at a neighbouring necropolis.
ref: Baru-baru ini, di luar kuil bangsawan yang mumia berwarna-warni telah digali di perkuburan berhampiran.

src: No one would be buried outside a temple without a reason.
ref: Tiada siapa akan dikebumikan di luar kuil tanpa alasan.

src: We saw that in the pharaonic days, they were always buried beside pyramids," explained Hawass.
ref: Kami melihat di zaman Firaun, selalu terdapat tanah perkuburan bersebelahan dengan piramid," jelas Hawass.

src: "She needed a place to be protected in the afterlife.
ref: "Dia memerlukan tempat untuk dilindungi di kehidupan selepas mati.

src: If she had used the other burial site, she would have disappeared forever," said Kathleen Martinez, a Dominican archaeologist.
ref: Jika dia menggunakan kawasan pengkebumian lain, dia mungkin hilang selama-lamanya," kata Kathleen Martinez, ahli arkeologi Dominican.

src: Dr. Roger Vickers team used radar to locate three chambers within the rocky hill atop of which is the Temple of Taposiris Magna dedicated to the goddess Isis.
ref: Kumpulan Dr. Roger Vickers menggunakan radar untuk mengesan tiga ruang di dalam puncak bukit berbatu di mana Tokong Taposiris Magna ditujukan kepada tuhan Isis.

src: The temple was constructed about 300 BC by Ptolemy II.
ref: Kuil itu dibina lebih kurang 300 BC oleh Ptolemy II.

src: The Supreme Council of Antiquities (SCA) expedition led by Hawass has yet to excavate the burial chambers 40 feet (12 meters) underground where they hope to find a crown or Egyptian hieroglyph cartouches revealing the names of royalty.
ref: Ekspedisi Majlis Tertinggi Zaman Purba (SCA) dipimpin oleh Hawass telah menggali makam pengebumian 40 kaki (12 meter) bawah tanah di mana mereka berharap untuk menemui mahkota atau cartouches hiroglif menunjukkan nama-nama di raja.

src: The Supreme Council of Antiquities expedition consists of Zahi Hawass, Secretary General of the SCA, and Martinez who has extensively researched the life of Cleopatra.
ref: Ekspedisi Majlis Tertinggi Zaman Purba terdiri daripada Zahi Hawass, Jeneral Setiausaha SCA, dan Martinez yang membuat kajian meluas mengenai kehidupan Cleopatra.

src: According to Plutarch who studied Roman history, Caesar allowed Marc Antony and Cleopatra to be buried in the same tomb.
ref: Mengikut kepada Plutarch yang mempelajari sejarah Roman, Caesar membenarkan Marc Antony dan Cleopatra untuk dikebumikan bersama-sama dalam makam yang sama.

src: The archaeological site is on a hill along the Mediterranean Sea overlooking the summer home of Hosni Mubarak, president of Egypt.
ref: Kawasan arkeologi di bukit sepanjang Laut Mediterranean menghala ke rumah musim panas Hosni Mubarak, presiden Egypt.

src: The archaeologists fear they may have to postpone work for security reasons over the summer months.
ref: Ahli-ahli arkeologi takut mereka terpaksa menunda kerja mereka atas sebab-sebab keselamatan di sepanjang bulan-bulan panas.

src: According to a spokesman for NATO, an attempted hijacking of a Norwegian tanker in the Gulf of Aden by Somali pirates has been thwarted by NATO forces.
ref: Menurut jurucakap NATO, cubaan rampasan sebuah kapal tangki Norway di Teluk Aden oleh lanun Somalia telah digagalkan oleh tentera NATO.

src: The MV Front Ardennes came under attack by pirates in a small skiff at about 6:00 PM on Saturday.
ref: MV Front Ardennes diserang oleh lanun dalam perahu kecil pada kira-kira pukul 6:00 petang pada hari Sabtu.

src: Helicopters and a warship were dispatched to rescue the vessel, and the pirates were apprehended seven hours after the initial hijacking.
ref: Helikopter dan kapal perang telah dihantar untuk menyelamatkan kapal tersebut, dan lanun-lanun telahs ditahan selama tujuh jam selepas rampasan awal.

src: Seven of the pirate gunmen were temporarily detained, but were later released.
ref: Tujuh daripada lelaki bersenjata lanun ditahan buat sementara waktu, tetapi kemudiannya dibebaskan.

src: Piracy is rife off the eastern coast of Africa; on Saturday, Somali pirates seized a Belgian ship, the Pompei, with its ten crew members, as it was headed south for the Seychelles islands.
ref: Kegiatan melanun merebak di luar pantai timur Afrika; pada hari Sabtu, lanun Somalia merampas Pompei, sebuah kapal Belgium, dengan sepuluh ahli-ahli anak kapal, semasa ia menuju ke selatan untuk pulau-pulau Seychelles.

src: Currently, pirates are thought to be holding about three hundred crew members from seventeen ships.
ref: Pada masa ini, lanun dianggap sedang menahan kira-kira tiga ratus anak kapal dari tujuh belas kapal.

src: British author James Graham Ballard, known as J. G. Ballard has died at the age of 78.
ref: Pengarang British James Graham Ballard, yang dikenali sebagai JG Ballard telah meninggal dunia pada usia 78 tahun.

src: Ballard died on Sunday after a long battle with prostate cancer.
ref: Ballard meninggal dunia pada hari Ahad selepas sekian lama menghidap kanser prostat.

src: According to a spokesperson, Ballard had been sick "for several years" and that it was "with great sadness" to have to make the announcement of his death.
ref: Menurut jurucakap, Ballard telah sakit "untuk beberapa tahun" dan ianya adalah "satu kesedihan yang besar" untuk membuat pengumuman kematiannya.

src: "He had grown up in Shanghai and had very good manners."
ref: "Beliau telah dibesarkan di Shanghai dan mempunyai adab yang sangat baik."

src: Ballard was born in Shanghai, China in the Shanghai International Settlement in 1930.
ref: Ballard dilahirkan di Shanghai, China di Shanghai International Settlement pada tahun 1930.

src: Ballard says that he won't say happy things about his experience in the camp, but also no unpleasant ones either.
ref: Ballard berkata bahawa dia tidak akan berkata perkara yang gembira tentang pengalamannya di perkemahan, tetapi juga tidak berkata perkara yang tidak menyenangkan.

src: In an interview with BBC News, Ballard said "I remember a lot of the casual brutality and beatings-up that went on, but at the same time we children were playing a hundred and one games all the time."
ref: Dalam temu bual dengan BBC News, Ballard berkata, "Saya ingat banyak kekejaman dan pukul-memukul yang telah berlaku, tetapi pada masa yang sama, kami kanak-kanak bermain banyak permainan sepanjang masa."

src: In 1946 he moved to the UK with his sister and mother where he began to write.
ref: Pada tahun 1946 beliau berpindah ke UK dengan kakak dan ibunya di mana beliau mula menulis.

src: Twenty years later, in the 1960's, he employed himself as a full time writer.
ref: Dua puluh tahun kemudian, pada tahun 1960-an, dia yang bekerja sendiri sebagai penulis sepenuh masa.

src: He produced his first novel in 1961 titled The Wind from Nowhere and The Drowned World just a year later.
ref: Beliau menghasilkan novel pertama beliau pada tahun 1961 bertajuk The Wind fromNowhere dan The Drowned World hanya setahun kemudian.

src: Norm Coleman filed an appeal with the Minnesota Supreme Court challenging opponent Al Franken's court victory last week which gave Franken a 312-vote lead in the disputed 2008 Minnesota United States Senate election, reports the Minneapolis Star-Tribune.
ref: Norm Coleman telah memfailkan rayuan kepada Mahkamah Agung Minnesota bagi mencabar kemenangan lawannya Al Franken pada minggu lepas yang memberikan Fraken 312 undi mendahuluinya di dalam pilihanraya Senat Amerika Syarikat Minnesota 2008 yang dipertikaikan, akhbar Minneapolis Star-Tribune melaporkan.

src: Jim Langdon, lawyer for the Coleman campaign, said that the oral arguments in the court could begin in anywhere from "two weeks to two months", adding more time to a process which has continued since a razor-thin difference between the two candidates' vote totals triggered an automatic recount in November 2008.
ref: Jim Langdon, peguam kepada kempen Coleman, berkata bahawa perdebatan lisan di dalam mahkamah akan bermula pada bila-bila dari "dua minggu hingga ke dua bulan," menambah lagi masa ke proses yang telah berterusan sejak perbezaan yang sangat kecil di antara undi kedua calon tersebut telah menimbulkan kiraan semula automatik pada November 2008.

src: The Supreme Court is not required to hear oral arguments and it is possible they could refuse to hear the case.
ref: Mahkamah Agung tidak diwajibkan untuk mendengar perdebatan lisan tersebut dan boleh menolak untuk mendengar kes itu.

src: A spokesperson for the Franken campaign says that Coleman is up to the "same old, same old."
ref: Seorang jurucakap kempen Franken berkata yang Coleman sedang berusaha untuk melakukan "perkara yang sama dan berulang."

src: "Sometimes you come up on the short end of a close and bitter election."
ref: "Kadang-kadang kamu akan mendapat pengakhiran yang pahit di dalam pilihanraya."

src: The Coleman campaign argues that 4,400 ballots from Coleman-leaning districts have improperly not been counted, while some undetermined number of ballots (perhaps contributing up to 100 of Franken's 312-vote margin) were accidentally double-counted.
ref: Kempen Coleman mempertikaikan bahawa 4,400 undi dari daerah yang cenderung kepada Coleman tidak dikira seperti yang sepatutnya, manakala ada undi yang tidak dapat dipastikan jumlahnya(mungkin menyumbang sehingga 100 dari 312-undian menang Franken) telah dengan tidak sengaja dikira dua kali.

src: The Franken campaign, meanwhile, supports the previous three-judge panel (from a Democrat, a Republican, and an Independent) unanimous ruling giving Franken victory.
ref: Kempen Franken, sementara itu, menyokong keputusan tiga-panel hakim yang sebelumnya( dari Demokrat, Republikan, dan Bebas) sebulat suara memberi kemenangan kepada Franken.

src: The Franken campaign, anticipating a final victory and certification by the Minnesota Secretary of State, has begun hiring a staff for Franken's senatorial office.
ref: Kempen Franken, yang menantikan kemenangan terakhir dan pengesahan dari Setiausaha Negara Minnesota, telah mula mengambil seorang kakitangan untuk pejabat senat Franken.

src: Franken's spokespeople say he is going to start by hiring Alana Peterson, a former state director for Representative Jim Oberstar, as state director.
ref: Jurucakap Franken berkata beliau akan mula dengan mengambil Alana Peterson, bekas pengarah negara bagi wakil rakyat Jim Oberstar, sebagai pengarah negara.

src: The mayor of San Francisco, California, Gavin Newsom, has announced via Twitter that he will be running for the state's governor in the 2010 elections.
ref: Datuk Bandar San Francisco, California, Gavin Newsom, telah mengumumkan melalui Twitter bahawa beliau akan bertanding untuk gabenor negeri dalam pilihan raya 2010.

src: He will be in the running to replace California's current governor, Arnold Schwarzenegger.
ref: Beliau akan berada di dalam pemilihan untuk menggantikan gabenor kini California, Arnold Schwarzenegger.

src: Newsom also posted a video on his campaign website which was launched earlier this morning.
ref: Newsom juga memuatnaik video di laman web kempen beliau yang dilancarkan awal pagi ini.

src: I hope that you will join our campaign that has set out to change California, because I know we can do better.
ref: Saya harap anda akan menyertai kempen kami yang telah dibentangkan untuk menukar California, kerana saya tahu kita boleh melakukan yang lebih baik.

src: We can't afford to keep returning to the same old, tired ideas and expect a different result, says Newsom in his campaign video.
ref: Kita tidak mampu untuk terus kembali kepada idea lama, idea membosankan dan mengharapkan hasil yang berbeza, kata Newsom dalam video kempennya.

src: Newsom promises more green technology, local economic stimulus and universal healthcare.
ref: Newsom menjanjikan teknologi yang lebih hijau, rangsangan ekonomi tempatan dan penjagaan kesihatan universal.

src: Newsom has been San Francisco's mayor since 2003 and was re-elected in 2007.
ref: Newsom telah menjadi Datuk Bandar San Francisco sejak 2003 dan dipilih semula pada tahun 2007.

src: Earlier this year, the army launched a crackdown on the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (Tamil Tigers) to oust them from their territory in the northeastern part of Sri Lanka, which the rebels have occupied for several years.
ref: Pada awal tahun ini, tentera melancarkan operasi terhadap Harimau Pembebasan Tamil Eelam (Tamil Tigers) untuk menggulingkan mereka daripada wilayah mereka di bahagian timur laut Sri Lanka, yang pemberontak telah menduduki selama beberapa tahun.

src: Thangamuttu Sathyamurthi, a government health official in the war zone, reported that people were dying of starvation, and that there was a large deficit of medicine and food.
ref: Thangamuttu Sathyamurthi, seorang pegawai kesihatan kerajaan di zon perang, melaporkan bahawa orang akan mati kerana kelaparan, dan terdapat defisit ubat-ubatan dan makanan yang banyak.

src: According to the medical relief group Médecins Sans Frontières (Doctors without Borders), many of the people who had fled the conflict zone had gunshot and blast wounds.
ref: Menurut kumpulan bantuan perubatan Médecins Sans Frontières (doktor tanpa sempadan), banyak orang yang melarikan diri dari zon konflik mempunyai tembakan dan luka letupan.

src: The government has accused the Tamil Tiger rebels of using civilians as human shields, a claim that the rebels deny.
ref: Kerajaan telah menuduh pemberontak Tamil Tiger menggunakan orang awam sebagai perisai manusia, tuntutan yang pemberontak menafikan.

src: The rebels have accused the Sri Lankan army of randomly shelling civilian areas.
ref: Pemberontak menuduh tentera Sri Lanka secara rawak serangan kawasan awam.

src: The U.N. says that the rate of civilian deaths in the country has risen sharply.
ref: U.N. mengatakan bahawa kadar kematian orang awam di negara ini telah meningkat dengan ketara.

src: On average, 33 civilians were killed per day at the end of January.
ref: Rata-rata, 33 orang awam terbunuh setiap hari pada akhir bulan Januari.

src: The number has now increased to an average 116 per day.
ref: Jumlah itu telah meningkat kepada purata 116 setiap hari.

src: Homeland Security Secretary Janet Napolitano announced today at a news conference that the U.S. has declared a public health emergency in light of the swine flu outbreak.
ref: Setiausaha Keselamatan Dalam Negeri Janet Napolitano hari ini mengumumkan pada sidang media bahawa Amerika Syarikat telah mengisytiharkan kecemasan kesihatan awam memandangkan wabak selesema babi.

src: The total number of confirmed swine flu cases in the United States stands at 20.
ref: Jumlah kes selesema babi disahkan di Amerika Syarikat berjumlah 20.

src: One direct result of the declaration is the government's mobilization of approximately 12 million doses of Tamiflu to locations where the states can quickly access their share of the medication if needed.
ref: Satu hasil langsung daripada pengisytiharan itu ialah mobilisasi kerajaan kira-kira 12 juta dos Tamiflu ke lokasi di mana negeri-negeri tersebut dapat mengakses bahagian ubat mereka dengan cepat jika diperlukan.

src: Secretary Napolitano urged residents not to panic saying that the government is issuing a "declaration of emergency preparedness."
ref: Setiausaha Napolitano menggesa penduduk supaya tidak panik dengan berkata bahawa kerajaan sedang mengeluarkan "pengisytiharan kesediaan kecemasan."

src: Secretary Napolitano added, "Really that's what we're doing right now.
ref: Setiausaha Napolitano menambah, "Betul itu memang apa yang kami lakukan sekarang.

src: John Brennan, a Homeland Security assistant, added that "at this point, a top priority is to ensure that communication is robust and that medical surveillance efforts are fully activated."
ref: John Brennan, pembantu Keselamatan Dalam Negeri, menambah bahawa "pada masa ini, keutamaan adalah untuk memastikan komunikasi yang mantap dan usaha-usaha pengawasan perubatan diaktifkan sepenuhnya."

src: This afternoon, New York City Mayor Michael Bloomberg reported that 8 students from the St. Francis Prepatory School in Queens, New York have contracted the swine flu.
ref: Petang ini, Datuk Bandar New York City Michael Bloomberg melaporkan bahawa 8 orang pelajar dari St. Francis Prepatory School di Queens, New York telah dijangkiti selesema babi.

src: All in all, more than 100 students from that high school were absent last week with flu-like symptoms.
ref: Semua sekali, lebih daripada 100 pelajar dari sekolah tinggi tersebut tidak hadir minggu lepas disebabkan gejala seperti selesema.

src: Meanwhile, public health officials in Ohio today announced one confirmed case of swine flu in the state.
ref: Sementara itu, pegawai-pegawai kesihatan awam di Ohio hari ini mengumumkan satu kes disahkan selesema babi di negeri ini.

src: Thus far, California has reported 7 confirmed cases of swine flu, while Kansas and Texas have each reported two confirmed cases.
ref: Setakat ini, California telah melaporkan 7 kes yang disahkan selesema babi, manakala Kansas dan Texas masing-masing melaporkan dua kes yang disahkan.

src: At the same news conference Dr. Richard Besser, the acting director from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), said to expect additional cases of swine flu to be reported in the short term.
ref: Pada sidang akhbar yang sama Dr Richard Besser, pengarah yang bertindak dari Pusat Kawalan dan Pencegahan Penyakit (CDC), berkata dijangka banyak lagi kes selesema babi akan dilaporkan dalam jangka masa pendek.

src: So far, no one in the U.S. has died from swine flu.
ref: Setakat ini, tiada siapa di U.S. telah maut akibat selesema babi.

src: According to the witness reports the Al-Shabaab rebels took the town after two hours of fighting on Sunday.
ref: Menurut laporan saksi, pemberontak Al-Shabaab menawan bandar selepas dua jam pertempuran pada hari Ahad.

src: After overtaking the city, the militants released prisoners from the city jail.
ref: Selepas mengambil alih bandar, militan tersebut membebaskan tahanan dari penjara bandar.

src: A resident told Reuters that seven people died in the fighting.
ref: Seorang penduduk memberitahu Reuters bahawa tujuh orang mati dalam pertempuran.

src: The United Nations Security Council has expressed "concern at the loss of life and the worsening humanitarian situation arising out of the renewed fighting".
ref: Majlis Keselamatan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu telah menyatakan "kebimbangan pada kehilangan nyawa dan keadaan kemanusiaan yang semakin buruk yang timbul daripada pertempuran diperbaharui".

src: The Somali government has started to lose ground against Al-Shabaab in the past few weeks.
ref: Kerajaan Somalia telah mula ketinggalan berbanding Al-Shabaab dalam beberapa minggu yang lalu.

src: Currently, it does not control much area outside of the capital which is reinforced by African Union troops.
ref: Pada masa ini, ia tiada hak untuk mengawal banyak kawasan di luar ibu negara yang diperkukuh oleh tentera Kesatuan Afrika.

src: Most national newspapers congratulated their entrants on a job well done, while others trash-talked other entrants, and still others called for their countries to pull out of the Contest.
ref: Kebanyakan Suratkhabar Nasional mengucapkan tahniah dan syabas kepada peserta atas kerja yang dilaksanakan sementara yang lain mengarut "trash-talked" atas peserta lain dan yang lain-lain menggesa negata-negara mereka untuk tarik diri dari pertandingan.

src: Here are some interviews, articles and opinions that made it to the front pages of newspapers and to their sanctioned blogs.
ref: Ini adalah beberapa temubual, artikel dan pendapat di muka surat depan suratkhabar dan blog yang dibenarkan.

src: Police reports state that a bomb blast in a church in Nepal on Saturday has killed two people and injured at least a dozen more.
ref: Laporan polis menyatakan bahawa satu letupan bom di sebuah gereja di Nepal pada hari Sabtu telah membunuh dua orang dan mencederakan sekurang-kurangnya sedozen lagi.

src: The attack comes just hours before the national parliament was due to elect a new prime minister.
ref: Serangan itu muncul hanya beberapa jam sebelum parlimen negara dijadualkan untuk melantik seorang Perdana Menteri baru.

src: Around 150 people were in the church at the time of the explosion.
ref: Kira-kira 150 orang awam berada di dalam gereja pada masa letupan.

src: According to the Nepalese home ministry spokesman, Navin Ghimire, the National Defence Army, an obscure Hindu extremist group, left a message at the scene of the disaster, assuming responsibility for the explosion.
ref: Menurut jurucakap Kementerian Dalam Negeri Nepal, Navin Ghimire, Tentera Pertahanan Negara, sebuah kumpulan pelampau Hindu yang tidak terkenal, yang telah meninggalkan mesej di tempat kejadian bencana, dianggap bertanggungjawab untuk letupan itu.

src: This is the first bomb attack on a Christian church in Nepal.
ref: Ini adalah serangan bom pertama ke atas sebuah gereja Kristian di Nepal.

src: Bingu wa Mutharika, the president of the African country of Malawi, was inaugurated on Friday after having been reelected to a second five-year term.
ref: Bingu wa Mutharika, presiden Malawi negara di Afrika, telah dilantik pada hari Jumaat setelah dipilih semula bagi penggal lima tahun kedua.

src: "Corruption in whatever form or shape is an enemy to growth and prosperity because it robs the poor, and denies their legitimate right to development."
ref: "Rasuah dalam apa jua corak atau bentuk adalah musuh kepada pembangunan dan kesejahteraan kerana ia merompak orang miskin, dan menafikan hak sah mereka terhadap kemajuan".

src: He also promised to focus on food security and agriculture.
ref: Beliau juga berjanji untuk memberi tumpuan kepada keselamatan makanan dan pertanian.

src: He has said he will challenge the election's outcome in court.
ref: Beliau beerkata beliau akan mencabar keputusan pilihan raya di mahkamah.

src: This comes soon after a report released by the U.S. Commerce Department showed that the U.S. GDP fell by 5.7%, revised from the original figure of 6.1%.
ref: Ini hadir selepas laporan dikeluarkan oleh Jabatan Kewangan A.S. yang menunjukkan bahawa GDP A.S. jatuh sebanyak 5.7%, selepas semakan semula dari kiraan asalnya pada 6.1%.

src: "Oil market participants' conclusion that the worst of the recession has passed and that a recovery in demand must be at hand was bolstered overnight by higher than expected first quarter growth in India and a sharp jump in Japan's April industrial production," said MF Globa's John Kilduff.
ref: "Konklusi para peserta di pasaran minyak bahawa ia adalah merupakan yang terburuk dalam kemelesetan ekonomi lalu dan keperluan kepada pemulihan mesti berada di tangan yang disokong lebih tinggi daripada pertumbuhan suku pertama yang dijangkakan di India dan lompatan tajam dalam industri produksi pada April di Japan," kata John Kilduff dari MF Globa.

src: "We've got a lot more optimism about the economic outlook than we did."
ref: "Kami telah mendapat lebih banyak optimisme mengenai tinjauan ekonomi dari apa yang telah kami lakukan".

src: "The market is factoring in a recovery in demand by the end of the year," said an analyst for the Commodity Warrants Australia, Toby Hassall.
ref: "Pasaran ialah pemfaktoran dalam keperluan kepada pemulihan di akhir tahun," kata analisis bagi Komoditi Waran Australia, Toby Hassall.

src: State Secretary Rigmor Aasrud said that the activities in question might be prosecuted as fraud or as violations of existing healthcare regulations.
ref: Setiausaha Negera Rigmor Aasrud menyatakan bahawa aktiviti dalam persoalan ini mungkin akan didakwa sebagai penipuan atau pelanggaran undang-undang kesihatan sedia ada.

src: The statement was made after three journalists from the online edition of the newspaper Verdens Gang (VG) took the test.
ref: Kenyataan tersebut dibuat selepas tiga orang wartawan daripada surat khabar versi dalam talian Verdens Gang(VG) mengambil ujian tersebut.

src: The journalists wore hidden recording devices, and did not disclose that they were journalists; VG put the recordings on its website.
ref: Wartawan-wartawan tersebut memasang alat perakam tersembunyi dan tidak mendedahkan bahawa mereka adalah wartawan, VG memuat naik rakaman tersebut dalam laman webnya.

src: Scientology staff members told all three that they should buy a course to handle psychological issues.
ref: Kakitangan Saintologi memberitahu mereka bertiga mereka patut membeli kursus untuk menangani masalah psikologi.

src: Two of the journalists filled out the 200 questions with honest answers, while the third gave answers consistent with being depressed.
ref: Dua orang daripada wartawan tersebut menjawab 200 soalan secara jujur sementara wartawan ketiga menjawab soalan secara konsisten dalam kemurungan.

src: The "depressed" journalist was told that he should avoid traditional medicine, while one of the "normal" journalists was told that the course was her only hope for improvement unless she wanted to start taking "chemicals".
ref: Wartawan yang "murung" diberitahu bahawa dia sepatutnya mengelak daripada mengambi ubat tradisional sementara salah seorang daripada wartawan "normal" diberitahu bahawa kursus tersebut adalah satu-satunya harapannya untuk memperbaiki keadaannya kecuali dia mahu mula mengambil "ubat."

src: Matthias Fosse said that France is a far more secular society than Norway, and that France were going too far in their prosecution.
ref: Matthias Fosse berkata bahawa masyarakat Perancis jauh lebih sekular berbanding Norway, dan Perancis bertindak melampau dalam hukuman mereka.

src: He said that France has a list of 165 organizations considered to be "sects", which not just included Scientology but also covered Baptists such as former U.S. president Bill Clinton.
ref: Dia mengatakan bahawa Perancis menyenaraikan 165 organisasi sebagai "mazhab", dan ia bukan sahaja mengandungi Saintologi tetapi juga termasuk Baptist seperti bekas presiden A.S., Bill Clinton.

src: Fosse said that the OSCE, the U.S. State Department and the UN had criticised French "violations of human rights".
ref: Fosse mengatakan bahawa OSCE, Jambatan Negeri A.S. dan Pertubuhan Bangsa-bangsa Bersatu telah mengkritik Perancis "mencabuli hak asasi manusia."

src: According to an original Reuters report, Venezuela's President Hugo Chavez is moving his Bolivarian Revolution forward by nationalizing more private companies and clamping down against his opponents.
ref: Menurut laporan asal Reuters, Presiden Venezuela Hugo Chavez menggerakkan Revolusi Bolivarian ke hadapan dengan memiliknegarakan lebih banyak syarikat swasta dan pengapit menurunkan kepada lawannya.

src: Some oil service companies were nationalized earlier this month along with other sectors like banking, cement and steel.
ref: Beberapa syarikat perkhidmatan minyak telah dinegarakan awal bulan ini bersama-sama dengan sektor-sektor lain seperti perbankan, simen dan keluli.

src: Cited by Reuters, Chavez said on Saturday "We are proceeding and will continue to proceed with nationalizations of strategic sectors."
ref: Dipetik oleh Reuters, Chavez berkata pada hari Sabtu "Kami meneruskan perjalanan dan akan terus meneruskan nationalizations sektor strategik".

src: Past election victories since 1997 have strengthened Chavez's control and popularity (with more than 60% approval rating).
ref: Kemenangan pilihan raya lalu sejak 1997 telah mengukuhkan kawalan Chavez dan populariti (dengan lebih daripada 60% penarafan kelulusan).

src: Chavez, cited by Reuters, told party activists in April "I've said it before and I repeat, we must keep up the offensive, bulldozing the counter-revolution."
ref: Chavez, yang dipetik oleh Reuters, kepada aktivis parti pada bulan April "Saya telah katakan sebelum ini dan saya ulangi, kita mesti bersaing serangan, meratakan balas revolusi".

src: During the last years, Chavez relied on high oil prices to push his social agenda.
ref: Pada tahun-tahun lalu, Chavez bergantung kepada harga minyak yang tinggi untuk menolak agenda sosialnya.

src: With the shortening of cash, Chavez cannot use oil revenues anymore to finance his budget.
ref: Dengan memendekkan tunai, Chavez tidak boleh menggunakan hasil minyak lagi untuk membiayai belanjawan.

src: This wave of expropriation and the conflicts with oil service companies seems to reflect a desperate move to tackle the crisis, despite Chavez's words that the country is "well-equipped to weather the global recession."
ref: Gelombang rampasan dan konflik dengan syarikat-syarikat perkhidmatan minyak seolah-olah menggambarkan tindakan terdesak untuk menangani krisis itu, walaupun kata-kata Chavez bahawa negara ini adalah "yang lengkap untuk mengharungi kemelesetan global".

src: 36 bodies from the Harmony Gold mining company Eland mine shaft were brought up earlier on the weekend from depths up to 1.4 kilometers (1 mi).
ref: 36 mayat dari syarikat perlombongan emas Harmony telah dibawa naik terlebih awal melalui syaf lombong Eland pada hujung minggu dari kedalaman sehingga 1.4 kilometer (1 batu).

src: "We suspect there was a fire on the 18th of May."
ref: "Kami mengesyaki ada kebakaran pada 18 Mei".

src: "It seems more of a case of gas or smoke inhalation."
ref: "Ia kelihatannya seolah-olah kes terhidu gas atau asap".

src: The workers may have died from poisonous gasses, smoke inhalation, suffocation, cave-ins or carbon monoxide poisoning.
ref: Para pekerja mungkin telah mati akibat gas beracun, sedutan asap, lemas, runtuhan atau keracunan karbon monoksida.

src: Harmony gold mine will not send anyone in to the mine as the conditions are extremely dangerous and abandoned shafts are without safety equipment.
ref: Lombong emas Harmony tidak akan menghantar sesiapa masuk ke lombong itu kerana keadaan amat berbahaya dan syaf terbiar adalah tanpa peralatan keselamatan.

src: Illegal workers may gain access bypassing security at one mine site, and exit via a series of interconnected underground tunnels many miles away.
ref: Pekerja haram boleh mendapat akses keselamatan dengan melangkau kawalan keselamatan di satu tapak lombong, dan keluar melalui satu siri terowong bawah tanah bersambung berbatu-batu jauhnya.

src: Harmony is internationally the fifth largest gold mining company and has bought up old, abandoned mines.
ref: Harmony adalah syarikat perlombongan emas kelima terbesar pada peringkat antarabangsa dan telah membeli banyak lombong terbiar yang usang.

src: Police were seeking relatives to help identify the bodies, and are instigating an investigation into the circumstances.
ref: Polis sedang mencari saudara-mara untuk membantu mengenal pasti mayat, dan memulakan siasatan teradap kejadian itu.

src: Almost 300 "gold pirates" were arrested over the past two weeks at the Eland mine shaft alone.
ref: Hampir 300 "lanun emas" telah ditahan sejak dua minggu lalu di syaf lombong Eland sahaja.

src: "These are ex-miners and unemployed people - we need to target the syndicates," said Smith.
ref: "Mereka ini adalah bekas pelombong dan penganggur - kita perlu mensasarkan sindiket-sindiket itu," kata Smith.

src: There are over 4.18 million unemployed in South Africa due to the economic decline, and another 1 million may soon join the ranks.
ref: Terdapat lebih daripada 4.18 juta penganggur di Afrika Selatan disebabkan kemelesetan ekonomi, dan 1 juta lagi tidak lama lagi mungkin akan menyertai barisan itu.

src: Welkom, with a population of over 400,000 is located northeast of Bloemfontein, the provincial capital.
ref: Welkom, dengan penduduk seramai lebih 400,000 terletak di timur laut Bloemfontein, ibu kota wilayah.

src: Australia, Japan, South Korea and the Netherlands have all qualified for the 2010 FIFA World Cup.
ref: Australia, Jepun, Korea Selatan dan Belanda semuanya layak ke Piala Dunia FIFA 2010.

src: Australia drew 0–0 with Qatar, Japan defeated Uzbekistan 1–0, South Korea qualified by defeating the United Arab Emirates 2–0 and a 2–1 win over Iceland saw the Netherlands qualify.
ref: Australia seri 0-0 dengan Qatar, Jepun menewaskan Uzbekistan 1-0, Korea Selatan layak dengan mengalahkan Emiriyah Arab Bersatu 2-0 dan kemenangan 2-1 ke atas Iceland menyebabkan Belanda layak.

src: In a statement emailed out to the media, Football Federation Australia CEO Ben Buckley said, "It's another first for Australian football, and it's come off the back of a comprehensive qualification pathway which began in February last year."
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan melalui e-mel kepada media, Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif Persekutuan Bola Sepak Australia Ben Buckley berkata, "Ia adalah satu lagi perkara pertama bagi bola sepak Australia, dan ia datang dari laluan kelayakan menyeluruh yang bermula pada bulan Februari tahun lepas."

src: "While 'do or die' results, such as the famous Uruguay game four years ago are exciting, a qualifying campaign such as this one through the Asian zone is a tough test."
ref: "Sementara 'hidup atau mati'berhasil, seperti permainan Uruguay yang terkenal empat tahun lalu adalah menarik, kempen kelayakan seperti ini di seluruh zon Asia adalah ujian yang sukar."

src: FIFA named the Japan-Uzbekistan game as match of the day.
ref: FIFA menamakan permainan Jepun-Uzbekistan sebagai perlawanan harian.

src: Japanese forward Shinji Okazaki scored the only goal of that match, securing Japan's place at the World Cup.
ref: Pemain baris depan Jepun, Shinji Okazaki menjaringkan gol tunggal perlawanan itu, mengukuhkan tempat Jepun di Piala Dunia.
