src: "This time, I feel like I did very well for the Japanese team."
ref: "Kali ini, saya rasa saya telah lakukan yang terbaik untuk pasukan Jepun."

src: "Japan are a big team — both on and off the field — who have become a major force in world football."
ref: "Jepun adalah sebuah pasukan yang besar - di dalam dan di luar padang - yang telah menjadi kuasa utama dalam dunia bola sepak."

src: "We are delighted that they today became the first team to qualify for the 2010 FIFA World Cup," Danny Jordaan, World Cup organising committee chief, said.
ref: "Kami gembira bahawa mereka hari ini menjadi pasukan pertama yang layak ke Piala Dunia FIFA 2010," Danny Jordaan, ketua jawatankuasa penganjur Piala Dunia, berkata.

src: South Korea opened the scoring in there match with the UAE through Park Chu-young after five minutes.
ref: Korea Selatan membuka tirai jaringan pada perlawanan di sana dengan UAE melalui Park Chu-young selepas lima minit.

src: The Netherlands scored their two goals in the first ten minutes.
ref: Belanda menjaringkan dua gol dalam tempoh sepuluh minit pertama.

src: The AHLC (Ad-hoc Liaison Committee) met in Oslo, Norway on June 7 and 8 to discuss the Palestinian economical situation in Oslo.
ref: The AHLC (Badan Perhubungan Ad-hoc) bertemu di Oslo, Norway pada 7 dan 8 Jun untuk membincangkan keadaan ekonomi Palestin di Oslo.

src: Its mission is to bring the key donors of aid and relief together with the Israeli and Palestinian governments to address the current state of affairs between the two countries.
ref: Misinya adalah untuk membawa penderma utama bantuan bersama-sama dengan kerajaan Israel dan Palestin untuk menangani keadaan semasa hal ehwal antara kedua-dua negara.

src: The AHLC keeps track on how donor countries interact with the Palestinian authorities and how the support they provide is handled.
ref: The AHLC menjejaki bagaimana negara-negara penderma berinteraksi dengan pihak berkuasa Palestin dan bagaimana sokongan yang mereka beri dikendalikan.

src: Minister Støre underlined the importance of continuing aid, but stated that he understood that most countries still had problems because of the world economic crisis.
ref: Menteri Støre menegaskan kepentingan bantuan berterusan, tetapi menyatakan bahawa beliau memahami bahawa kebanyakan negara masih mempunyai masalah disebabkan krisis ekonomi dunia.

src: As for the unstable political situation in Palestine, Prime Minister Fayyad explained that "the political instability is also a reason why we need more aid."
ref: Bagi keadaan politik yang tidak stabil di Palestin, Perdana Menteri Fayyad menjelaskan bahawa "ketidakstabilan politik juga merupakan sebab mengapa kita masih memerlukan bantuan."

src: Minister Støre continued, stating, "It’s very important to stress that without a political horizon what we do as donors becomes less meaningful."
ref: Menteri Støre terus, menyatakan, "Amat penting untuk menekankan bahawa tanpa ufuk politik apa yang kita lakukan sebagai penderma akan menjadi kurang bermakna."

src: "So the current states of affairs where the political horizon is unclear and where we don’t have political negotiations of the two states as previous commitments indicates and obligate the party’s."
ref: "Maka hal ehwal negeri-negeri semasa dalam ufuk politik adalah tidak jelas dan kami tidak mempunyai rundingan politik kedua-dua negara seperti komitmen sebelumnya nyatakan dan wajibkan pada pihak itu."

src: "Donors start to change their stand and other agendas get the upper hand."
ref: "Penderma mula menukar pendirian mereka dan agenda lain mendapat kuasa kawalan."

src: "So in 2009 at this present stage, donors have only delivered half the amount they had at this time last year."
ref: "Oleh itu, pada tahun 2009 pada peringkat ini, penderma hanya menyerahkan separuh daripada jumlah yang mereka ada pada masa ini tahun lepas."

src: "You can leave that up to the financial crisis, but at the big donor conferences in Paris December 2007, and Sharm el-Sheikh February 2009 there were pledges enough to carry this through."
ref: "Anda boleh membiarkan krisis kewangan membuat keputusan, tetapi pada persidangan penderma besar di Paris Disember 2007, dan Sharm el-Sheikh Februari 2009 terdapat janji yang mencukupi untuk meneruskan agenda ini."

src: On the question if the donor countries had offered to give any immediate financial relief, Minister Støre said "This has to be stressed, [this] has not been a pledging conference."
ref: Tentang soalan jika negara-negara penderma telah menawarkan diri untuk memberikan apa-apa bantuan kewangan serta-merta, Menteri Støre berkata "ini perlu ditegaskan, sidang [ini] bukan sidang penyandar."

src: "This has not been a donor conference where governments have been invited to come and make new pledges, as I said if everybody lived by their Paris pledges in December 2007, which were three year pledges, we are exactly half way in that, we would have been more or less fine."
ref: "Belum ada persidangan penderma di mana kerajaan telah dijemput untuk datang dan membuat janji baru, seperti yang saya katakan jika semua orang berpegang dengan janji Paris pada Disember 2007, yang merupakan janji tiga tahun, kami betul-betul di separuh jalan, kita akan menjadi lebih atau kurang baik."

src: "But I think we have seen a forthcoming approach by some delegations, I will not name them or put a figure on it but I think it follows from what the prime minister and I have together have expressed here that there is an urgent need."
ref: "Tetapi saya rasa kita telah melihat pendekatan yang akan datang dari beberapa delegasi, saya tidak akan menamakan mereka atau meletakkan angka di atasnya tetapi saya fikir ia mengikuti apa yang Perdana Menteri dan saya telah bersama-sama menyatakan di sini bahawa terdapat keperluan yang segera."

src: A new meeting has been scheduled for September in New York, New York in conjunction with the United Nations General Assembly.
ref: Mesyuarat baru telah dijadualkan pada September di New York, New York sempena Perhimpunan Agung Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu.

src: Omar Bongo, the president of the western African country of Gabon, has died at a clinic in Barcelona, Spain, according to the Gabonese prime minister.
ref: Omar Bongo, presiden negara Afrika barat Gabon, telah meninggal dunia di sebuah klinik di Barcelona, ​​Sepanyol, menurut Perdana Menteri Gabon.

src: "I noted at that time that the head of state whom I visited in the intensive care unit was alive and well."
ref: "Saya berkata pada masa itu bahawa ketua negara yang saya melawat di unit rawatan rapi masih hidup dan baik."

src: "But we knew that the health of the president had become a source of concern in recent days," he said.
ref: "Tetapi kita tahu bahawa kesihatan presiden telah menjadi punca kebimbangan baru-baru ini," katanya.

src: The agency increased its pandemic alert level to the sixth level, its highest.
ref: Agensi itu meningkatkan tahap amaran pandemik kepada tahap keenam, yang tertinggi.

src: "On the basis of available evidence, and these expert assessments of the evidence, the scientific criteria for an influenza pandemic have been met.
ref: "Berdasarkan bukti yang ada, dan penilaian pakar ke atas bukti, kriteria saintifik untuk pandemik influenza telah dipenuhi.

src: According to Reuters, Chan earlier sent out a letter to WHO staff saying, "With today's announcement, WHO moves from an emergency to a longer-term response.
ref: Menurut Reuters, Chan sebelum ini menghantar surat kepada kakitangan WHO dan berkata, "Dengan pengumuman hari ini, WHO bergerak dari keadaan kecemasan kepada tindak balas jangka panjang.

src: Based on past experience, this pandemic will be with us for some months, if not years, to come."
ref: Berdasarkan pengalaman lalu, wabak ini akan bersama kita untuk beberapa bulan, jika tidak bertahun-tahun, akan datang".

src: Chan, however, stressed the move does not indicate that the influenza has become more deadly or severe.
ref: Chan, walau bagaimanapun, menegaskan langkah itu tidak menunjukkan bahawa influenza telah menjadi lebih berbahaya atau teruk.

src: "Moving to pandemic phase six does not imply we will see increases in deaths or serious cases," she said.
ref: "Melangkah ke fasa pandemik enam tidak bermaksud kita akan melihat peningkatan dalam kematian atau kes-kes yang serius," katanya.

src: Of those infected, the WHO says the majority are aged from 30 to 50 years old.
ref: Daripada mereka yang dijangkiti, WHO berkata majoriti berumur dari 30 hingga 50 tahun.

src: Currently, the WHO's official tally says there were almost thirty thousand confirmed cases of the H1N1 virus so far, with about 141 fatalities from the disease.
ref: Pada masa ini, rekod rasmi WHO berkata setakat ini terdapat hampir tiga puluh ribu kes yang disahkan virus H1N1, dengan kira-kira 141 kematian daripada penyakit ini.

src: According to Iranian state run media, current Iranian president Mahmoud Ahmadinejad has won re-election by a margin of 2 to 1.
ref: Menurut media milik negara Iran, Presiden semasa Iran, Mahmoud Ahmadinejad telah memenangi pemilihan semula dengan kelebihan 2-1.

src: According to the reports, the country's interior minister says Ahmadinejad won with 66% of the votes counted so far in the nation's election on Friday.
ref: Menurut laporan, Menteri Dalam Negeri di negara itu berkata Ahmadinejad menang dengan 66% undi yang dikira setakat ini dalam pilihan raya di negara tersebut pada hari Jumaat.

src: One of Ahmadinejad opponents Mir Hossein Mousavi, had earlier declared himself "definitely" the winner and said he may dispute the results.
ref: Salah satu lawan Ahmadinejad, Mir Hossein Mousavi, sebelum ini mengisytiharkan dirinya "pasti" menjadi pemenang dan berkata beliau boleh mempertikaikan keputusan.

src: At present, there are unconfirmed reports that Mir Hossein Mousavi may have been detained by "members of the intelligence community".
ref: Pada masa ini, terdapat laporan yang tidak disahkan bahawa Mir Hossein Mousavi mungkin telah ditahan oleh "ahli-ahli komuniti perisikan."

src: In addition, there are unconfirmed reports that Mousavi's Tehran campaign headquarters was surrounded by the intelligence service as well.
ref: Di samping itu, terdapat laporan yang tidak disahkan bahawa ibu pejabat kempen Mousavi di Tehran telah dikelilingi oleh perkhidmatan perisikan juga.

src: Mousavi's supporters have taken to the streets of Tehran to protest the election results.
ref: Penyokong Mousavi telah berada di jalan-jalan di Tehran untuk memprotes keputusan pilihan raya.

src: Due to nearby thunderstorms the launch was delayed about 20 minutes from the scheduled launch time of 5.12 p.m. EDT (2112 GMT).
ref: Disebabkan oleh ribut petir, berdekatan pelancaran itu ditangguhkan lebih kurang 20 minit dari jadual asal jam 5.12 p.m. EDT (2112 GMT).

src: From this impact, scientists hope to be able to detect any water ice or vapor using the LCROSS satellite which will crash land nearby four minutes later.
ref: Daripada impak ini, saintis berharap untuk mengesan apa-apa ais batu atau wap menggunakan satelit LCROSS yang akan terhempas mendarat berdekatan empat minit kemudian.

src: Astronomers who own amateur-class telescopes with apertures as small as 10 to 12 inches may be able to sight the ejecta cloud as it will have a period of brightness about one minute after impact.
ref: Ahli atronomi yang mempunyai teleskop kelas amatur dengan bukaan kecil antara 10 hingga 12 inci yang mungkin boleh melihat sedikit awam ejecta yang ada masa kecerahan lebih kurang seminit selepas impak.

src: The launch was originally planned for yesterday, but delayed for the launch of the Space Shuttle Endeavour, which was itself later delayed again due to another hydrogen fuel leak.
ref: Pelancaran itu dijadualkan untuk semalam, tetapi ditangguhkan kepada Space Shuttle Endeavour, yang sendirinya tertangguh lagi kerana terdapat kebocoran tangki hidrogen.

src: Sugar will return as host for the sixth series in the spring of next year.
ref: Sugar akan kembali sebagai hos untuk siri keenam pada musim bunga tahun hadapan.

src: Critics have raised concerns over Sir Alan holding both roles.
ref: Kritik telah mawujudkan kebimbangan terhadap Sir Alan yang memegang kedua-dua watak.

src: They commented that they have stated that it would breach the BBC's impartiality rules.
ref: Mereka memberi komen bahawa mereka telah menyatakan yang ia akan melanggar undang-undang keadilan BBC.

src: The Conservatives said that it would be impossible for him to continue both roles.
ref: Pihak Conservatives berkata adalah mustahil untuk beliau memegang kedua-dua watak.

src: As of this report, the main IRIB website could be reached.
ref: Ketika laporan ini, laman web utama IRIB boleh dicapai.

src: On further investigation, it was discovered that an individual or group claims responsibility for attacking the website on an Iranian internet forum.
ref: Dalam penyiasatan lanjut, ia telah mengenal pasti bahawa individu atau kumpulan yang mendakwa bertanggungjawab dalam serangan laman web di forum internet Iran.

src: As part of the attack, at least one section of the IRIB website, an apparent user space, was replaced with what appears to be videos and images of protests within Iran.
ref: Sebagai sebahagian daripada serangan, sekurang-kurangnya satu daripada bahagian laman web IRIB, ruang pengguna yang jelas, telah diganti dengan apa yang dilihat sebagai video-video dan gambar-gambar penunjuk perasan di Iran.

src: The page also contains the statement "hacked by the Iranian people."
ref: Laman tersebut juga mengandungi kenyataan "digodam oleh orang Iran".

src: It was also discovered that citizens have set up internet channels on IRC in an attempt to disseminate proxy servers and addresses to bypass the blocking of the internet by the Iranian government.
ref: Ia juga telah dikenal pasti bahawa rakyat telah membangunkan saluran Internet di IRC dalam cubaan untuk menyebarkan pelayan proxy dan alamat untuk memintas halangan internet oleh kerajaan Iran.

src: The Iranian government has blocked access to the Internet, or access to websites, in nearly all of Iran.
ref: Kerajaan Iran telah menghalang akses ke Internet, atau akses ke laman-laman web, di hampir seluruh Iran.

src: A partial list of blocked websites includes Facebook, BBC, and several Iranian based websites.
ref: Sebahagian daripada laman-laman web yang dihalang termasuk Facebook, BBC, dan beberapa laman web yang berpusat di Iran.

src: The number of hungry people in the world is projected to reach an all-time high of 1.02 billion this year, according to a report published by the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO).
ref: Bilangan orang yang lapar di dunia dijangka mencapai paras paling tinggi sebanyak 1.02 bilion tahun ini, menurut laporan yang diterbitkan oleh Pertubuhan Makanan dan Pertanian Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu (FAO).

src: The report blames this latest spike in world hunger chiefly on the global economic recession, which has increased unemployment and reduced incomes among the poor, leading to greater food insecurity.
ref: Laporan itu menyalahkan kenaikan terbaru dalam kebuluran dunia terutamanya pada kemelesetan ekonomi global, yang telah meningkat pengangguran dan mengurangkan pendapatan di kalangan golongan miskin, yang membawa kepada yang lebih besar makanan yang tidak selamat.

src: The report, published on Friday, estimates that over 1 billion people will go hungry each day in 2009, a first in human history.
ref: Laporan itu, yang disiarkan pada hari Jumaat, menganggarkan lebih 1 bilion orang akan kelaparan setiap hari pada tahun 2009, yang pertama dalam sejarah manusia.

src: This is a significant increase over last year's estimate of 915 million hungry people.
ref: Ini adalah peningkatan yang ketara ke atas anggaran tahun lepas sebanyak 915 juta orang lapar.

src: According to the FAO, this increase of around 100 million people is not a result of poor harvests, as in the past, but rather a poor economy.
ref: Menurut FAO, peningkatan kira-kira 100 juta orang bukan hasil tuaian yang miskin, seperti pada masa lalu, tetapi ekonomi yang miskin.

src: "A dangerous mix of the global economic slowdown combined with stubbornly high food prices in many countries has pushed some 100 million more people than last year into chronic hunger and poverty," said Jacques Diouf, Director-General of the FAO.
ref: "Satu campuran berbahaya daripada kelembapan ekonomi global yang digabungkan dengan harga makanan tinggi di banyak negara telah mendorong kira-kira 100 juta lebih ramai orang berbanding tahun lepas ke dalam kebuluran dan kemiskinan," kata Jacques Diouf, Ketua Pengarah FAO.

src: "The silent hunger crisis — affecting one sixth of all of humanity — poses a serious risk for world peace and security."
ref: "Krisis kelaparan senyap - yang melibatkan satu keenam semua umat manusia - menimbulkan risiko yang serius untuk keamanan dan keselamatan dunia".

src: Although food prices have declined from their record high levels in mid-2008, the report states that global food prices are still high compared to previous years, and that domestic prices remain prohibitively high in developing countries.
ref: Walaupun harga makanan telah menurun daripada rekod tahap yang tinggi pada pertengahan tahun 2008, laporan itu menyatakan bahawa harga makanan global masih tinggi berbanding dengan tahun-tahun sebelumnya, dan bahawa harga dalam negeri kekal terlampau tinggi di negara-negara membangun.

src: In Mauritania, for example, a staple food such as wheat still costs over 600 USD per tonne, whereas in the United States the price has fallen below 300 USD.
ref: Di Mauritania, sebagai contoh, makanan ruji seperti gandum masih berharga lebih 600 USD setiap tan, manakala di Amerika Syarikat dengan harga yang telah jatuh di bawah 300 USD.

src: The current economic situation has intensified the problem created by high food prices.
ref: Keadaan ekonomi semasa telah meningkatkan masalah yang dicipta oleh kenaikan harga makanan.

src: Many sources of income for developing countries, including remittances, foreign direct investment, foreign aid, and international trade, are expected to undergo severe declines.
ref: Banyak sumber pendapatan bagi negara-negara membangun, termasuk kiriman wang, pelaburan langsung asing, bantuan asing, dan perdagangan antarabangsa, dijangka mengalami kemerosotan yang teruk.

src: In developing countries, the report says, the urban poor are likely to be most affected by the economic slowdown, as their ability to find work is most dependent on factors like foreign investment and export demand.
ref: Di negara-negara membangun, kata laporan itu, golongan miskin di bandar mungkin akan paling terjejas oleh kelembapan ekonomi, kerana keupayaan mereka untuk mencari kerja adalah yang paling bergantung kepada faktor-faktor seperti pelaburan asing dan permintaan eksport.

src: However, rural areas could also be affected, as an urban back-migration to the farms would put more pressure on an already strained rural job market.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kawasan luar bandar juga boleh terjejas, sebagai migrasi belakang bandar ke ladang-ladang akan meletakkan lebih banyak tekanan pada pasaran kerja sudah tegang luar bandar.

src: Budget constraints would lead families to purchase more grain products, which are cheaper than meat, dairy products, and other foods rich in protein.
ref: Kekangan bajet akan membawa keluarga untuk membeli lebih banyak produk bijirin, yang lebih murah daripada daging, produk tenusu, dan makanan lain yang kaya dengan protein.

src: Investment in agriculture, according to Director-General Diouf, is the key to overcoming poverty and hunger in poorer countries.
ref: Pelaburan dalam bidang pertanian, menurut Ketua Pengarah Diouf, adalah kunci untuk mengatasi kemiskinan dan kebuluran di negara-negara miskin.

src: These countries "must be given the development, economic and policy tools required to boost their agricultural production and productivity", he said.
ref: Negara-negara ini "mesti diberi alat pembangunan, ekonomi dan dasar yang diperlukan untuk meningkatkan pengeluaran pertanian dan produktiviti," katanya.

src: Kanayo F. Nwanze, President of the International Fund for Agricultural Development, says that investment in agriculture is not only essential for overcoming hunger, but also for promoting economic growth in developing countries.
ref: Kanayo F. Nwanze, Presiden Tabung Antarabangsa bagi Pembangunan Pertanian, mengatakan bahawa pelaburan dalam bidang pertanian bukan sahaja penting untuk mengatasi kelaparan, tetapi juga untuk menggalakkan pertumbuhan ekonomi di negara-negara membangun.

src: "To unleash this potential and reduce the number of hungry people in the world," he said, the international community must ensure that farmers "have access not only to seeds and fertilisers but to tailored technologies, infrastructure, rural finance, and markets."
ref: "Bagi menggerakkan potensi ini dan mengurangkan jumlah orang yang lapar di dunia," katanya, masyarakat antarabangsa perlu memastikan bahawa petani "mempunyai peluang bukan sahaja kepada benih dan baja tetapi untuk teknologi disesuaikan, infrastruktur, kewangan luar bandar, dan pasaran".

src: Out of a required yearly budget of 6.4 billion USD, the agency currently has less than one-fourth of that amount.
ref: Daripada 6.4 bilion USD bajet tahunan yang diperlukan, agensi itu kini mempunyai kurang daripada satu perempat daripada jumlah itu.

src: Museum on Monday.
ref: New York pada hari Isnin.

src: Only twenty of the vehicles have survived since 1963, and the original price of £199 has soared to approximately £40,000 (US$ 65,000) today.
ref: Hanya dua puluh kenderaan itu yang masih kekal berfungsi sejak tahun 1963, dan harga asal £199 telah meningkat ke kira-kira £40,000 ( AS$65,000) hari ini.

src: Corus, the fifth largest steelmaker in the world, is set to cut 2000 jobs in both the United Kingdom and The Netherlands.
ref: Corus, pembuat baja yang kelima terbesar di dunia, merancang untuk mengurangkan 2,000 pekerjaan di kedua-dua United Kingdom dan Belanda.

src: Corus have blamed the move on the "further deterioration" of the demand for steel in both the United States and Europe.
ref: Corus menyalahkan langkah itu atas "kemerosotan lanjutan" permintaan untuk keluli di kedua-dua Amerika Syarikat dan Eropah.

src: Corus Chief Executive Kirby Adams stated, "Any recovery in Europe appears to be some time off".
ref: Ketua Eksekutif Corus Kirby Adams menyatakan, "Apa-apa pemulihan di Eropah nampaknya ketinggalan waktu".

src: In January of this year Corus cut approximately 3,500 staff worldwide; 2,500 of them in Britain.
ref: Pada bulan Januari tahun ini Corus memecat kira-kira 3,500 kakitangan di seluruh dunia; 2,500 daripadanya di Britain.

src: He added that it is clear a full recovery is years away.
ref: Dia menambah adalah jelas pemulihan sepenuhnya perlu mengambil masa beberapa tahun lagi.

src: Scunthorpe will lose 500 members of staff, with 379 going at Stocksbridge and 377 at Rotherham.
ref: Scunthorpe akan kehilangan 500 kakitangan, dengan 379 di Stocksbridge dan 377 di Rotherham.

src: Corus will also reduce operations at Hartlepool, Skinningrove and their Teesside Beam Mill, in Cleveland, where an additional 2,000 already face redundancy.
ref: Corus juga akan mengurangkan operasi kilang di Hartlepool, Skinningrove dan Teesside Beam, di Cleveland, di mana penambahan 2000 telahpun berlebihan.

src: A total of 11 plants in the United Kingdom are affected.
ref: Sejumlah 11 kilang di United Kingdom terjejas.

src: Elliot Morley, Labour Member of Parliament for Scunthorpe, told the BBC that he was disappointed with the job cuts and said he had previously told Corus that they should be a last resort.
ref: Elliot Morley, Ahli Parlimen Parti Buruh Scunthorpe, memberitahu BBC bahawa dia kecewa dengan pemotongan kerja dan berkata beliau sebelum ini memberitahu Corus bahawa ia seharusnya cara terakhit.

src: He added that this was a "sad day" for Scunthorpe.
ref: Beliau menambah bahawa ini adalah "hari yang menyedihkan" untuk Scunthorpe.

src: The company was bought in 1999 by Tata Steel, part of India's Tata Group.
ref: Syarikat itu telah dibeli pada tahun 1999 oleh Tata Steel, sebahagian daripada Kumpulan Tata India.

src: Two British soldiers were killed in Afghanistan on Wednesday, with one being the highest ranking British officer to be killed in 30 years.
ref: Dua orang tentera British telah terbunuh di Afghanistan pada hari Rabu, dengan salah seorang darinya adalah pengawai British dengan pangkat tertinggi yang pernah dibunuh dalam masa 30 tahun.

src: They had been travelling along the Shamalan Canal, near Lashkar Gah in Helmand Province, on their way to resupply an offensive underway currently against the Taliban.
ref: Mereka sedang bergerak di sepanjang Shamalan Canal, berdekatan Lashkar Gah di Wilayah Helmand, di dalam perjalanan untuk menambah bekalan serangan yang sedang dijalankan ketika ini menentang Taliban.

src: General Sir Richard Dannatt, the UK Chief of the General Staff, said Thornloe was "an outstanding commanding officer."
ref: Jeneral Sir Richard Dannatt, Ketua Staf Am UK, berkata Thornloe merupakan "seorang pengawai pemerintah yang cemerlang".

src: Lieutenant Colonel Thorneloe is survived by his wife, Sally, and daughters Hannah and Sophie.
ref: Leftenan Kolonel Thorneloe meninggalkan seorang isteri, Sally, dan dua orang anak perempuan Hannah dan Sophie.

src: Manuel Zelaya, the president of Honduras who was removed from power by the Honduran Supreme Court, has begun making his way back to his country.
ref: Manuel Zelaya, presiden Honduras yang telah dibuang kuasa oleh Mahkamah Agung Honduras, telah mula membuat perjalanan pulang ke negaranya.

src: The former president had announced his willingness to return to his country, hoping for a reintegration.
ref: Bekas presiden itu telah mengumumkan kesediaannya untuk kembali semula ke negaranya, mengharapkan pemaduan semula.

src: Zelaya asked his people to be able to "practice his rights peacefully" after his arrival in the Central American country.
ref: Zelaya meminta orang ramai supaya "mengamalkan haknya secara aman" selepas ketibaannya di negara Amerika Tengah itu.

src: Foreign Minister Enrique Ortez said "I have ordered to not allow him to enter, whoever he comes with, to avoid the imprudence of allowing a president of the republic to die, of allowing a president of the republic to get hurt, of allowing a person to die".
ref: Menteri Luar Negeri Enrique Ortez berkata "Saya telah diarahkan untuk tidak membenarkan dia untuk masuk, tanpa mengambil peduli dengan siapa dia datang bersama, untuk mengelakkan kelalaian membenarkan seorang presiden republik mati, dengan membenarkan seorang presiden republik tercedera, membenarkan seseorang untuk mati".

src: Zelaya travels together with the President of the United Nations General Assembly, Miguel D'Escoto.
ref: Zelaya terbang bersama Presiden Perhimpunan Agung Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, Miguel D'Escoto.

src: Other leaders of Latin America, who had promised to travel together with Zelaya, will instead monitor the development of events from El Salvador.
ref: Pemimpin Amerika Latin yang lain, yang telah berjanji untuk terbang bersama Zelaya, sebaliknya akan memantau perkembangan peristiwa dari El Salvador.

src: Zelaya's return takes place after the Organization of American States (OAS) voted in favour of suspending Honduras from the organization.
ref: Kepulangan Zelaya berlaku selepas Pertubuhan Negara-negara Amerika ( OAS) mengundi menyokong menggantung Honduras dari organisasi itu.

src: OAS resolved to suspend "immediately" the de facto Honduran government lead by Roberto Micheletti in accordance with the Inter-American Democratic Charter.
ref: OAS memutuskan untuk menggantung pemimpin de facto kerajaan Honduras "dengan segera" oleh Roberto Micheletti selaras dengan Piagam Demokratik Inter-Amerika.

src: A Mig-29 jet fighter of the Serbian Air Force and Air Defense crashed near Belgrade, Serbia, on Tuesday.
ref: Jet pejuang Mig-29 Tentera Udara dan Pertahanan Udara Serbia terhempas berhampiran Belgrade, Serbia, pada hari Selasa.

src: The pilot ejected from the airplane and was transferred to military hospital.
ref: Juruterbang dikeluarkan dari pesawat tersebut dan telah dipindahkan ke hospital tentera.

src: Lt. Col. Rade Randjelovic, aged 47, suffered serious injuries and died at the hospital.
ref: Lt Kol Rade Randjelovic, berusia 47 tahun, cedera parah dan meninggal dunia di hospital.

src: Randjelovic was conducting a training flight at the time of the accident and was preparing for the Belgrade aircraft acrobatics show.
ref: Randjelovic sedang menjalankan latihan penerbangan pada masa kemalangan itu berlaku dan bersedia untuk persembahan akrobatik pesawat di Belgrade.

src: The Serbian Air Force has five MiG-29s which were repaired between 2007 and 2008 at a cost of €15m (£13 m).
ref: Tentera Udara Serbia mempunyai lima MiG-29 yang telah dibaiki di antara 2007 dan 2008 dengan kos sebanyak €15Juta (£13 juta).

src: The cause of the crash is still unknown, pending an official investigation.
ref: Punca kemalangan masih tidak diketahui, menunggu siasatan rasmi.

src: Mark Webber gained his maiden Formula 1 win today at the German Grand Prix, after 130 races.
ref: Mark Webber mendapat kemenangan sulung Formula 1 hari ini di Grand Prix Jerman, selepas 130 perlumbaan.

src: His Red Bull teammate Sebastian Vettel came in second, with Ferrari's Felipe Massa third.
ref: Rakan Red Bull sepasukannya, Sebastian Vettel di tempat kedua, dengan Felipe Massa dari Ferrari di tempat ketiga.

src: Webber started from pole position, but touched Rubens Barrichello at the beginning after a slow start.
ref: Webber bermula di petak pertama, tetapi menyentuh Rubens Barrichello pada permulaan selepas permulaan yang perlahan.

src: He received a drive through penalty for this offence, which he served at the end of his fourteenth lap.
ref: Beliau menerima penalti pandu-lalu bagi kesalahan ini, yang beliau membuat pada akhir pusingan keempat belas beliau.

src: Jenson Button remains first in the championship with 68 points, with Vettel and Webber overtaking Barrichello, taking second and third respectively.
ref: Jenson Button kekal pertama dalam kejohanan itu dengan 68 mata, dengan Vettel dan Webber memintas Barrichello, dengan mengambil kedua dan ketiga.

src: "I had a drive-through and my engineer kept me calm."
ref: "Saya telah mendapat pandu lalu dan jurutera saya membuat saya tenang".

src: "It was a difficult winter, Sebastian showed in winter testing what the car could do, so I kept my motivation high and I was hurting a lot."
ref: "Ia adalah satu musim sejuk yang sukar, Sebastian menunjukkan pada ujian musim sejuk apa kereta boleh lakukan, jadi saya terus meningkatkan motivasi saya dan saya telah merasa agak kecewa".

src: "The team had patience with me, everyone in Australia and a few people who doubted me too so hello to them as well."
ref: "Pasukan itu bersabar dengan saya, semua orang di Australia dan beberapa orang yang ragu-ragu dengan saya juga jadi apa khabar kepada mereka juga".

src: 14 people have died after heavy rain and flash flooding hit a gorge near the south western city of Chongqing, China.
ref: 14 orang mati selepas hujan lebat dan banjir kilat menimpa sebuah gaung berdekatan selatan barat bandar Chongqing, China.

src: 16 members of the group of 35 were rescued but 14 died and 5 are still missing.
ref: 16 orang daripada 35 ahli kumpulan tersebut diselamatkan tetapi 14 terkorban dan 5 masih hilang.

src: Around 400 rescue workers are helping the rescue effort and looking for any possible survivors.
ref: Kira-kira 400 pekerja penyelamat membantu dalam misi mencari dan menyelamat mangsa yang berkemungkinan terselamat.

src: Several homes and streets were flooded during the rainstorm despite the effort of the villagers who built temporary flood guards.
ref: Beberapa rumah dan jalan telah dibanjiri air semasa hujan ribut disebalik usaha penduduk tempatan membina tembok sementara untuk mengelak banjir.

src: Fish warden Fabio Croci said, "It is quite unusual for Zanders to bite humans".
ref: Warden ikan Fabio Croci berkata, "Ia agak luar biasa bagi zander menggigit manusia".

src: It is suspected the fish's aggression could have been a result of a hormonal imbalance.
ref: Ia disyaki keagresifan ikan tersebut hasil daripada ketidakseimbangan hormon.

src: After attempts to capture the Zander with a net failed, police divers resorted to harpooning it.
ref: Selepas percubaan untuk menangkap zander dengan jaring yang gagal, polis penyelam terpaksa menembaknya.

src: Meat from the fish was later served to tourists around the lake.
ref: Daging daripada ikan itu kemudiannya disajikan kepada pelancong di sekitar tasik.

src: Both sets of cases were confirmed from batches of 24 samples sent for testing.
ref: Kedua-dua set kes telah disahkan dari kumpulan 24 sampel yang dihantar untuk ujian.

src: The 8 cases confirmed on Wednesday were all men, 7 from Suva and 1 from Nadi.
ref: 8 kes yang disahkan pada hari Rabu adalah kesemuanya lelaki, 7 dari Suva dan 1 dari Nadi.

src: The spokesman for the Fiji Health Ministry, Iliesa Tora, reiterated the Fijian government's advice to the public, stating that as yet there have been no H1N1 cases in Fiji that have incurred serious complications.
ref: Jurucakap Kementerian Kesihatan Fiji, Iliesa Tora, mengulangi nasihat kerajaan Fiji kepada orang ramai, yang menyatakan bahawa belum ada sebarang kes H1N1 di Fiji yang mengalami komplikasi yang serius.

src: A civilian helicopter chartered by NATO has crashed while taking off from Kandahar International Airport in Afghanistan, killing sixteen.
ref: Sebuah helikopter awam yang dicarter oleh NATO telah terhempas ketika berlepas dari Lapangan terbang Antarabangsa Kandahar di Afghanistan, enam belas terbunuh.

src: The helicopter had been chartered from the Russian company Vertical-T and all the victims were civilians.
ref: Helikopter tersebut telah dicarter daripada syarikat Rusia Vertical-T dan kesemua mangsa merupakan orang awam.

src: The Mil Mi-26 is believed to have been shot down; six Ukrainian civilians onboard and one Afghan girl on the ground were killed in the crash on Tuesday.
ref: Mil Mi-26 dipercayai telah ditembak jatuh; enam orang awam Ukraine dalam pesawat dan seorang wanita Afghan di lapangan terbunuh dalam nahas pada hari Selasa.

src: The helicopter had been taking supplies to a British military base.
ref: Helikopter tersebut digunakan untuk mengambil bekalan kepada pangkalan tentera Britain.

src: Roads in Afghanistan are often difficult to traverse, so militaries often contract aircraft, especially from Russia, to transport troops and cargo between bases.
ref: Jalan di Afghanistan adalah sukar dilalui, jadi kebanyakan tentera sering menyewa pesawat, terutamanya dari Rusia, untuk mengangkut angkatan tentera dan kargo antara pangkalan.

src: The dog died at the age of 15 on Tuesday night.
ref: Anjing itu mati pada usia 15 pada malam Selasa.

src: The dog was featured in the 1990s adverts that ran from 1997 to 2000.
ref: Anjing itu telah dipaparkan dalam iklan 1990-an dari tahun 1997 sehingga tahun 2000. Gidget digambarkan sebagai anjing jantan dan diingati kerana dialih suara dan berkata "Yo quiero Taco Bell" yang bermaksud "Saya hendak Taco Bell".

src: The advert was meant to be shown only once but was turned into a campaign.
ref: Iklan tersebut bertujuan untuk ditayangkan hanya sekali tetapi telah bertukar menjadi kempen.

src: Gidget was also featured in Legally Blonde 2 and adverts for the board game Trivial Pursuit.
ref: Gidget juga dipaparkan dalam Legally Blonde 2 dan iklan untuk permainan Trivial Pursuit.

src: Nico Rosberg drove his Williams up to fourth place, while the second McLaren of Heikki Kovalainen came fifth.
ref: Nico Rosberg memandu Williamsnya sehingga tempat keempat, manakala McLaren yang kedua Heikki Kovalainen mencapai tempat kelima.

src: He split the two Toyota cars of Timo Glock and Jarno Trulli, who completed the top eight.
ref: Beliau memotong dua buah kereta Toyota milik Timo Glock dan Jarno Trulli, yang mendapat lapan tempat terbaik.

src: The U.S. Supreme Court today ruled that Internet file sharing networks can be sued for copyright infringement.
ref: Mahkamah Agung Amerika Syarikat hari ini menentukan bahawa rangkaian-rangkaian perkongsian fail boleh didakwa atas pencabulan hakcipta.

src: Writing for the court, Justice David Souter wrote: "One who distributes a device with the object of promoting its use to infringe copyright, as shown by clear expression or other affirmative steps taken to foster infringement, going beyond mere distribution with knowledge of third-party action, is liable for the resulting acts of infringement by third parties using the device, regardless of the device's lawful uses."
ref: Bertulis untuk mahkamah, Hakim David Souter menulis "seseorang yang mengedarkan peralatan yang mempunyai objek menggalakkan penggunaannya untuk mencabul hakcipta, yang ditunjukkan dengan ekspresi jelas atau lain-lain langkah perakuan yang menggalakkan pencabulan demikian, telah bertindak melampaui tujuan sekadar mengedar dengan pengetahun perbuatan pihak ketiga, adalah bertanggungjawab ke atas perbuatan pencabulan oleh pihak ketiga menggunakan alat itu, walaupun peralatan tersebut digunakan mengikut undang-undang atau tidak".

src: The strength of the decision was unexpected — this is the first major Internet copyright case to reach the Supreme Court in many years, and the Justices' unanimity sends a strong message about their lack of tolerance for companies designed to violate the law.
ref: Kekuatan keputusan itu adalah di luar jangkaan - ini adalah kes hakcipta internet utama pertama yang sampai ke Mahkamah Agung dalam bertahun-tahun, dan kesepakatan para hakim menyampaikan mesej jelas bahawa mereka tidak akan bertolak ansur terhadap syarikat-syarikat yang direka untuk mecabuli undang-undang berkenaan.

src: The decision affects such companies as Grokster and StreamCast, both of which were defendants in this suit.
ref: Kepetusan berkenaan memberikan kesan kepada syarikat-syarikat seperti Grokster dan StreanCast, di mana kedua-duanya adalah defendan dalam saman tersebut.

src: Silences were held at football games throughout the country over the weekend, with fans creating makeshift shrines at Newcastle United and Ipswich Town, the two clubs he was most strongly associated with.
ref: Tafakur diadakan di permainan bola sepak di seluruh negara pada hujung minggu, dengan peminat membina tempat-tempat suci sementara di Newcastle United dan Ipswich Town, kedua-dua kelab yang paling kuat berkaitan dengannya.

src: Today Robson's widow was moved to tears when she visited the shrine created by over 50,000 fans at Newcastle.
ref: Hari ini janda Robson telah menangis kerana terharu apabila dia melawat kuil yang dibina oleh lebih daripada 50,000 peminat di Newcastle.

src: She went on to express her gratitude to the generosity and affection of fans who have since Friday raised over £2,000,000 for the Sir Bobby Robson Foundation, the cancer charity founded by her late husband.
ref: Dia terus menyatakan rasa terima kasih atas kemurahan hati dan kasih sayang peminat yang telah mengumpulkan lebih £2,000,000 untuk Yayasan Sir Bobby Robson sejak hari Jumaat, amal kanser yang diasaskan oleh mendiang suaminya.

src: Despite failing to win any major trophies with the national team, Bobby Robson was one of the most successful and best loved England managers.
ref: Walaupun gagal memenangi sebarang trofi utama untuk pasukan kebangsaan, Bobby Robson adalah salah seorang pengurus England yang paling berjaya dan paling disukai.

src: His team infamously lost a penalty shoot out to West Germany for a place in the finals of the 1990 World Cup.
ref: Pasukannya terkenal kerana kehilangan jaringan penalti kepada Jerman Barat untuk mengukuhkan tempat dalam pusingan akhir Piala Dunia 1990.

src: Robson was picked for the position of England manager after a 13 year spell at Ipswich Town enabling them to become league runners up twice and to win the FA Cup and the UEFA Cup.
ref: Robson telah dipilih untuk jawatan pengurus England selepas tempoh 13 tahun di Ipswich Town membolehkan mereka menjadi naib juara liga sebanyak dua kali dan memenangi Piala FA dan Piala UEFA.

src: Following the decision by the Football Association to not renew his contract after the 1990 World Cup, Robson won honours in club football with PSV Eindhoven, FC Porto, and FC Barcelona.
ref: Berikutan keputusan oleh Persatuan Bola Sepak untuk tidak memperbaharui kontraknya selepas Piala Dunia 1990, Robson mendapat kepujian dalam kelab bola sepak dengan PSV Eindhoven, FC Porto, dan FC Barcelona.

src: His success as a manager has been put down to a great tactical brain and the ability to get the best out of his players, not least through his respect and generosity of spirit towards them.
ref: Kejayaan beliau sebagai seorang pengurus berpunca daripada taktik otak yang hebat dan keupayaan mendapatkan kualiti terbaik daripada pemainnya, tidak kurangnya melalui penghormatan dan kemurahan hati semangat kepada mereka.

src: Robson will be remembered for his humour, his integrity, and his love of a game that he relished from childhood visits to his beloved Newcastle, a team he was later to manage.
ref: Robson akan diingati untuk jenaka, integriti, dan cintanya pada permainan yang dia gemari sejak lawatan ke Newcastle tercinta di zaman kanak-kanak, satu pasukan yang dia urus kemudian.

src: Food deliveries from the RMT were allowed into the Vestas plant in Newport, England yesterday, but were cut off by Vestas management this afternoon.
ref: Penghantaran makanan dari RMT diberi kebenaran untuk masuk ke loji Vestas di Newport, England semalam, tetapi telah dihalang oleh pentadbiran Vestas tengahari tadi.

src: Protesters at the Isle of Wight factory celebrated the delivery of supermarket bags filled with groceries, which entered with a police escort.
ref: Penunjuk perasaan di kilang Pulau Wight menyambut penghantaran beg pasaraya yang diisi barang-barang runcit, yang mana memasuki dengan iringan pihak polis.

src: This morning, the sixteen remaining occupiers were told to prepare a list of items for future deliveries.
ref: Pagi ini, enam belas baki penghuni telah diberitahu supaya menyediakan senarai barang-barang untuk penghantaran akan datang.

src: But, according to "Mark", an occupier in the Vestas plant, this afternoon Vestas management reversed their decision, terming the August 1 food delivery a one-time "goodwill gesture" and saying food would no longer be allowed in.
ref: Tetapi, mengikut kepada "Mark", penghuni di loji Vestas, pihak pentadbiran Vestas menterbalikkan keputusan mereka tengahari tadi, mengatakan penghantaran makanan satu kali pada 1 Ogos "tanda muhibbah" dan mengatakan tiada lagi makanan yang dibenarkan masuk.

src: The food delivery followed a formal complaint by the RMT that denying the occupiers food was a violation of their human rights.
ref: Penghantaran makanan mengikut aduan rasmi daripada RMT yang menafikan pembekalan makanan adalah mencabuli hak-hak kemanusiaan.

src: The people inside the factory have been conducting their occupation since July 20, in protest against the closure of the factory, which produces wind turbine blades for the generation of wind power, and the loss of 625 jobs in the Isle of Wight and nearby areas.
ref: Mereka-mereka yang di dalam kilang mengendalikan kerja mereka sejak 20 Julai, dalam bantahan menentang penutupan syarikat tersebut, yang mana prosedur membina kipas turbin untuk bekalan tenaga angin, dan kehilangan sebanyak 625 pekerjaan di Pulau Wight dan kawasan berhampiran.

src: Mark went on to praise the "brave people" who have circumvented the security ring around the plant in order to get food and other items to the occupiers.
ref: Mark pergi untuk memuji "orang yang berani" yang mana telah mengelakkan pusingan keselamatan di sekitar loji untuk mendapat makanan dan barang-barang lain untuk para penduduk.

src: An electric kettle thrown at the end of a rope up to the occupiers is said to be working well.
ref: Pemanas air elektronik diletakkan di hujung tali yang dihujungnya membawa kepada para penduduk itu dikatakan berjalan dengan baik.

src: Mark also noted that Louise Christian, a prominent British human rights lawyer, is now representing the Vestas occupiers.
ref: Mark juga menekankan bahawa Louise Christian, peguam hak-hak kemanusiaan British yang cukup menonjol, kini sedang mewakili penduduk-penduduk di Vestas.

src: In particular, the occupiers offered sympathy for Luke Paxton, who they say left the occupation due to a combination of personal issues and malnutrition brought on by the deprivation of food.
ref: Khususnya, penduduk menawarkan simpati untuk Luke Paxton, yang mana mereka katakan meninggalkan pekerjaan kerana kombinasi masalah peribadi dan malnutrisi akibat kekurangan makanan.

src: Paxton, Mark said, has the remaining occupiers' "full support" and continues to campaign for the Vestas workers.
ref: Mark berkata, Paxton, hanya tinggal penduduk "sokongan penuh" dan meneruskan kempen kepada pekerja di Vestas.

src: In contrast to claims that green socialist group Workers' Climate Action were behind the occupation, Mark presented a more nuanced picture: the Vestas workers' initial contacts were with veterans of the occupation of Visteon's auto parts plants, with the AWL, SWP and Socialist Party becoming involved later with "quite a big involvement" from all groups.
ref: Berbeza dengan dakwaan kumpulan sosialis hijau Tindakan Perubahan Pekerja berada di belakang pekerja, Mark mempersembahkan banyak gambar nuansa: Pekerja Vestas mulanya menghubungi pekerja berpengalaman di loji bahagian auto Visteon, dengan AWL, SWP dan Parti Sosialis yang kemudiannya terlibat "penglibatan yang agak besar" dari semua kumpulan.

src: In a July 24 statement, Solidarity backed the Vestas workers, with union executive member David Kerr saying "We are behind the Vestas workers 100 per cent.
ref: Dalam kenyataan pada 24 Julai, Perpaduan menyokong pekerja-pekerja Vestas, dengan ahli eksekutif kesatuan David Kerr berkata "Kami di belakang pekerja-pekerja Vestas 100 peratus.

src: Mark, in reply, told Wikinews: "We do not want their support...they go against a lot of the things people believe in here.
ref: Mark, untuk menjawab, memberitahu Wikinews: "Kami tidak mahu sokongan mereka.

src: Most of the Vestas occupiers remain independent of trade unions, with only three of the sixteen people inside being members of any union.
ref: .mereka mahu menentang banyak benda yang dipercayai orang di sini.

src: Mark closed with a message of solidarity with the occupiers of two Thomas Cook branches in Dublin, Ireland, whose employees began a sit-in at their offices on Friday after the announcement of surprise closures.
ref: Kebanyakan penduduk Vestas kekal bebas dari kesatuan kebangsaan, dengan hanya tiga daripada enam belas orang di dalam menjadi ahli kepada mana-mana kesatuan. Mark menutup mesej perpaduan dengan penduduk dari dua cawangan Thomas Cook di Dublin, Ireland, di mana perkerjanya mula duduk di pejabat mereka pada Jumaat selepas pengumuman mengejut penutupan.

src: "Don't back down...do not be pushed around, do not be intimidated".
ref: "Jangan berundur...jangan jadi yang dipermainkan, jangan jadi yang diancam".

src: Workers at SsangYong have been occupying their factory since May 22 in protest against a 36% cut in employees there.
ref: Pekerja di SsangYong telah pun memenuhi kilang mereka sejak 22 Mei dalam membantah ke atas 36% pengurangan pekerja di situ.

src: Neil O'Brien of centre-right think tank Policy Exchange told The Daily Telegraph that, while labour unrest had increased, the current state of affairs is "nothing compared to what is going to happen once the brakes are slammed on public spending."
ref: Pertukaran Polisi pusat-kanan tangki berfikir Neil O'Brien memberitahu Telegraf Harian bahawa, di ketika pergolakan pekerja meningkat, keadaan semasa perhubungan adalah "tiada apa-apa berbanding dengan apa yang akan berlaku apabila tahanan dihempaskan ke atas penggunaan umum".

src: The plane, which belonged to Merpati Nusantara Airlines, was travelling from Sentani Airport, Jayapura, Papua to Oksibil, a town near the Papua New Guinean border.
ref: Pesawat itu, yang dimiliki Sistem Penerbangan Merpati Nusantara, sedang dalam perjalanan dari Lapangan Terbang Sentani, Jayapura, Papua ke Oksibil, sebuah bandar berhampiran sempadan Papua New Guinea.

src: The journey normally takes fifty minutes and only three hours and thirty minutes worth of fuel was on board.
ref: Perjalanan itu biasanya mengambil masa lima puluh minit dan hanya terdapat bahan api untuk tiga jam tiga puluh minit di pesawat itu.

src: Both transportation authorities and the military have launched bids to locate the missing plane, with at least two aircraft taking off to search for the aircraft.
ref: Kedua-dua pihak berkuasa pengangkutan dan tentera telah menawar untuk mengesan lokasi kapal terbang yang hilang, dengan mengunakan sekurang-kurangnya dua pesawat untuk mencari pesawat.

src: The plane was over a mountainous area covered with dense forest when air traffic control lost contact.
ref: Pesawat itu berada di kawasan bergunung-ganang yang dipenuhi hutan tebal apabila kawalan trafik udara terputus hubungan.

src: "We're focusing our search on the border between [the] Keerom and Pegunungan Bintang districts... it's a mountainous, jungly region," said air force commander Suwandi Miharja, who is in charge of the search.
ref: "Kami menumpukan pencarian kami di sempadan antara Keerom [tersebut] dan daerah Pergunungan Bintang...ia adalah kawasan yg diliputi dgn gunung dan hutan," kata komander tentera udara Suwandi Miharja, yang bertanggungjawab dalam pencarian itu.

src: They say that the government of Lula is victim of a coup attempt by Bush supporters.
ref: Mereka mengatakan bahawa kerajaan Lula adalah mangsa cubaan rampasan kuasa oleh penyokong Bush.

src: The bus was headed to Six Flags St. Louis in Missouri for the band to play to a sold-out crowd.
ref: Bas tersebut menuju ke Six Flags St. Louis di Missouri untuk kumpulan ini membuat persembahan yang tiketnya habis dijual.

src: At 1:15 a.m. Saturday, according to witnesses, the bus was going through a green light when the car made a turn in front of it.
ref: Pada 1:15 pagi Sabtu, menurut saksi, bas tersebut melalui lampu hijau apabila kereta tersebut membuat pusingan di hadapan bas.

src: A photograph of the damaged bus was posted on the band's website, depicting moderate crumpling to the front area of the vehicle.
ref: Sekeping gambar berkenaan kerosakan bas telah dipaparkan di laman web kumpulan tersebut, menunjukkan kerosakan kemek sederhana di bahagian hadapan kenderaan.

src: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
ref: Sebelum ini agensi berita China Xinhua melaporkan sebuah pesawat akan dirampas.

src: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
ref: Kemudian laporan itu menyatakan pesawat itu menerima ancaman bom dan telah diubah arah kembali ke Afghanistan, mendarat di Kandahar.

src: It is not known how many people were on board the plane, but no injuries are reported.
ref: Adalah tidak diketahui berapa ramai orang yang berada di atas kapal terbang itu, tetapi tiada kecederaan dilaporkan.

src: A NATO official denied there was an emergency landing due to a threat and says the Chinese media reports are untrue.
ref: Seorang pegawai NATO menafikan terdapat pendaratan cemas disebabkan sesuatu ancaman dan berkata laporan media Cina adalah tidak benar.

src: As many as six hundred villagers from the island of Taiwan are missing after torrential rains from Typhoon Morakot caused mudslides, according to state media.
ref: Sebanyak enam ratus penduduk dari kepulauan Taiwan hilang selepas hujan lebat akibat Taufan Morakot yang menyebabkan lumpur runtuh, menurut media tempatan.

src: Taiwanese authorities said that approximately a hundred people were rescued after a portion of a mountain started to slump and flooded the village of Shiao Lin in the south of the country.
ref: Pihak berkuasa Taiwan berkata bahawa kira-kira seratus orang telah diselamatkan selepas sebahagian dari gunung mula runtuh dan membanjiri kampung Shiao Lin di selatan negara itu.

src: "The mudslide covered a large part of the village, including a primary school and many homes."
ref: "Lumpur runtuh meliputi sebahagian besar kampung, termasuk sebuah sekolah rendah dan banyak rumah".

src: A five-story hotel building along the river in Taitung has collapsed due to the raging flood.
ref: Sebuah bangunan hotel lima tingkat di sepanjang sungai di Taitung telah runtuh akibat banjir teruk.

src: In some areas of the country, the storm dumped as much as two metres of water.
ref: Di beberapa kawasan di negara ini, ribut menghempaskan sebanyak dua meter air.

src: Morakot has resulted in the deaths of at least fourteen people in Taiwan and a further 22 deaths in the Philippines.
ref: Morakot telah mengakibatkan kematian sekurang-kurangnya empat belas orang di Taiwan dan 22 lagi kematian di Filipina.

src: In what police believe is the second-largest heist in Britain, armed robbers stole almost £40 million from a London jewellery shop on August 6.
ref: Dimana polis percaya adalah rompakan kedua terbesar di Britain, perompak bersenjata merompak sehingga £40 milion daripada kedai emas di London pada August 6.

src: The duo escaped in a blue BMW, which they soon abandoned for a Mercedes.
ref: Kedua-dua mereka melarikan diri dengan BMW berwarna biru, dimana mereka kemudian meninggalkannya untuk sebuah Mercedes.

src: After driving to Farm Street, it is believed they may have got away in a third vehicle.
ref: Selepas memandu ke Farm Street, ia dipercayai mereka telah dapat melarikan diri dengan kenderaan ketiga.

src: "I would urge anyone who recognises them, knows the whereabouts of the jewellery or has any other information to contact us."
ref: "Saya menggesa sesiapa yang mengecam mereka, mengetahui tentang dimana mereka berada atau mempunyai maklumat lain supaya menghubungi kami."

src: In accordance with the Treaty on Open Skies, Norway and Denmark started conducting observation flights over Belarus and Russia yesterday.
ref: Mengikut perjanjian langit terbuka, Norway dan Denmark telah mula menjalankan pemerhatian penerbangan di atas Belarus dan Russia semalam.

src: These flights are expected to last until July 1, with seven Belarusian and two Russian inspectors monitoring foreign planes.
ref: Penerbangan ini dijangka akan berakhir hingga July 1, dengan 7 pegawai Belarus dan 2 pegawai Russia mengawasi kapal terbang asing.

src: The treaty establishes a program of unarmed aerial surveillance flights over the entire territory of its 34 state participants.
ref: Perjanjian itu menubuhkan rancangan pengawasan udara tanpa senjata diatas seluruh wilayah 34 negeri peserta.

src: According to the spokesman of Belarusian Ministry of Defense, Russia and Belarus have finished their analogous flight over the USA on June 25.
ref: Menurut jurucakap Menteri Pertahanan Belarus, Russia dan Belarus telah habis penerbangan analogi mereka diatas Amerika Syarikat pada June 25.

src: The islands' administration and Premier have been suspended for up to two years and their powers transferred to the UK-appointed Governor.
ref: Pentadbiran dan Premier pulau-pulau yang telah digantung selama dua tahun dan kuasa mereka dipindahkan kepada Gabenor UK.

src: The British Government has taken the unusual step because it alleges that former Premier Michael Misick and members of his cabinet have enriched themselves through the selling of crown land and other corrupt practices, and that the limits to suffrage in the islands make it impossible to form a jury immune to the influence of the accused.
ref: Kerajaan British telah mengambil langkah luar biasa kerana ia mendakwa bahawa bekas Perdana Menteri Michael Misick dan anggota kabinetnya telah memperkayakan diri mereka melalui penjualan tanah mahkota dan amalan rasuah yang lain, dan bahawa had kepada hak mengundi di pulau-pulau menjadikannya mustahil untuk membentuk juri kebal terhadap pengaruh tertuduh.

src: The Turks and Caicos Islands have been British overseas territories since 1799, and since achieving self-governance in 1976 have significantly developed offshore banking and tourism industries.
ref: Orang Turki dan Caicos telah berada di wilayah luar negara British sejak 1799, dan sejak mencapai pemerintahan sendiri pada tahun 1976 telah berkembang dengan ketara dalam industri perbankan dan pelancongan luar pesisir.

src: Leader of the Japanese opposition Democratic Party of Japan, Yukio Hatoyama, won a majority of votes in the House of Representatives of Japan in the Japanese general election on Sunday.
ref: Pemimpin pihak pembangkang parti Demokratik Jepun, Yukio Hatoyama, telah menang undian majoriti Dewan Rakyat Jepun di pilihan raya umum Jepun pada hari Ahad.

src: The results of the election were announced today, less that two and a half hours after polling stations closed, and end 54 years of nearly unbroken rule by the LDP.
ref: Keputusan pilihan raya tersebut diumumkan pada hari ini, kurang daripada dua jam setengah selepas pusat mengundi tutup, dan menamatkan permerintahan kebal LDP selama 54 tahun.

src: It has been estimated that roughly 30% of LDP supporters voted for the victorious DPJ, mainly due to the current economic climate.
ref: Dianggarkan secara kasar 30% penyokong LDP mengundi dan menyumbang kepada kemenangan DPJ, sebahagian besarnya disebabkan keadaan ekonomi baru-baru ini.

src: Outgoing Prime Minister Taro Aso has promised to resign as party leader, saying, "I believe this is the judgement of the public and we have to accept that and reflect on what we did."
ref: Bekas Perdana Menteri Taro Aso berjanji akan meletak jawatan sebagai ketua parti, katanya, "Saya percaya ini merupakan keputusan yang dibuat oleh rakyat dan kita harus menerima dan fikir tentang apa yang telah kita lakukan."

src: "The people have shown their disappointment with the party and I have to accept that as my destiny."
ref: "Rakyat telah menunjukkan kekecewaan terhadap parti dan saya harus menerimanya sebagai nasib saya."

src: Aso also said that he will stay on as leader until a new one is chosen.
ref: Aso juga berkata bahawa dia akan kekal sebagai ketua sehingga ketua baru dipilih.

src: The newly elected party also pledges to focus spending on households, especially rural families and those with children.
ref: Parti baru yang dipilih juga berikrar untuk fokus terhadap perbelanjaan isi rumah, terutamanya keluarga di luar bandar dan mereka yang mempunyai anak.

src: Tokyo economist Koichi Haji predicts that the hope instilled in the Japanese people by the election result will stimulate the economy, causing stock prices to rise.
ref: Pakar Ekonomi Tokyo Koichi Haji menjangka harapan yang diterapkan atas rakyat Jepun berdasarkan keputusan pilihan raya kali ini mampu merangsang ekonomi, dan menyebabkan harga saham naik.

src: However, questions have been raised about the Democratic Party's stability, due to the wide spectrum of views and ideologies the party encompasses.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, pelbagai soalan telah dibangkitkan mengenai kestabilan Parti Demokratik, berikutan spektrum yang luas dan ideologi yang dirangkumi parti tersebut.

src: Security officials say the bomber drove his vehicle into the convoy on the Jalalabad road, which is notorious for being the scene of frequent attacks by the Taleban.
ref: Pegawai keselamatan berkata pengebom memandu kenderaannya ke arah konvoi di jalan raya Jalalabad, yang terkenal kerana merupakan tempat kejadian serangan yang kerap oleh Taliban.

src: Two Afghan staff from the United Nations are feared to be among the casualties from the attack.
ref: Dua kakitangan Afghan dari Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dikhuatiri antara mangsa akibat serangan itu.

src: "I am shocked and greatly saddened to have learned that two of my staff members were among those killed in today's suicide bombing," said Kai Eide, the special representative for the UN.
ref: "Saya terkejut dan sangat sedih apabila telah tahu bahawa dua daripada kakitangan saya adalah antara yang terbunuh dalam pengeboman berani mati hari ini," kata Kai Eide, wakil khas untuk Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu.

src: The violence comes before Thursday's presidential election, which militants have promised to disrupt.
ref: Keganasan itu berlaku sebelum pilihan raya presiden pada hari Khamis, yang militan telah berjanji mengganggunya.

src: The Greater Manchester town of Rochdale has begun setting up decorations for a number of festivities, including Eid, a Muslim holiday.
ref: Pekan Greater Manchester dari Rochdale telah mula memasang perhiasan untuk beberapa perayaan, termasuk Aidilfitri, musim perayaan Muslim.

src: However, there's a twist—in order to save money, the town is also erecting Christmas decorations early.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, terdapat helah-untuk menjimatkan wang, bandar ini juga memasang perhiasan Krismas lebih awal.

src: Among the decorations were a giant Noel sign, holly leaves, and a skiing penguin.
ref: Antara hiasan adalah tanda Noel gergasi, daun holly, dan penguin berski.

src: "I know we haven't had much of a summer, but let's get it out of the way first".
ref: "Saya tahu kami tidak mendapat banyak dalam musim panas, tetapi mari kita keluarkannya dahulu".

src: "It's the height of summer and they're putting up Christmas lights."
ref: "Ia adalah kemuncak musim panas dan mereka meletakkan lampu Krismas".

src: "A worker told me they had to be up in time for all the religious festivals, but most of the lights refer to the Christian Christmas."
ref: "Seorang pekerja memberitahu saya yang mereka perlu dinyalakan sepanjang masa untuk semua perayaan agama, tetapi kebanyakan lampu merujuk kepada Kristian Krismas".

src: Yemeni government officials reported that Yemeni armed forces have killed over 100 Zaidi Shia rebel fighters following a battle to capture a town in the country's north.
ref: Pegawai Kerajaan Yaman melaporkan yang angkatan tentera Yaman telah membunuh lebih dari 100 pejuang pemberontak Shia Zaidi berikutan pertempuran untuk menawan bandar di utara negara tersebut.

src: "It seems that the bodies were those of rebels who were trying to flee the town during a mopping-up operation over the past two days."
ref: "Ia kelihatan sepreti mayat mereka yang memberontak yang cuba melarikan diri semasa operasi membanteras sepanjang dua hari lalu".

src: The statement also said that two commanders, Mohsen Saleh Hadi Gawd and Salah Jorman, were identified among the dead.
ref: Kenyataan itu turut menyatakan yang dua komander, Mohsen Saleh Hadi Gawd dan Salah Jorman, telah dikenalpasti antara yang mati.

src: The government statement said the Yemeni forces "totally [purged] the town of rebel elements in the past two days, forcing the rebels to surrender or flee."
ref: Kenyataan kerajaan itu menyatakan yang tentera Yemen "[membersihkan] sepenuhnya bandar itu dari unsur pemberontakan dalam dua hari lepas, memaksa pemberontak untuk menyerah atau melarikan diri".

src: The Zaidi insurgent group, also known as Houthis, have been fighting for northern independence for the past half decade.
ref: Kumpulan pengganas Zaidi itu, juga dikenali sebagai Houtis, telah berjuang untuk kemerdekaan utara selama separuh dekad lepas.

src: Two weeks ago, the Yemeni government started Operation Scorched Earth to try to exterminate the insurgents.
ref: Dua minggu lalu, kerajaan Yaman memulakan Operasi Bumi Hangus untuk menghapuskan pemberontak tersebut.

src: Harf Sufyan is a town in Yemen's northern mountain range.
ref: Harf Sufyan adalah bandar di kawasan pergunungan utara Yaman.

src: Baitullah Mehsud, amīr (leader) of the Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan (TTP), is dead, said two Taliban leaders in a phone call to the BBC.
ref: Baitullah Mehsud, Amir (pemimpin) daripada Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan (TTP), telah mati, berkata kedua-dua pemimpin Taliban dalam panggilan telefon kepada BBC.

src: Mehsud was reportedly killed on August 5, 2009, during a U.S. drone attack on South Waziristan; however, Hakimullah Mehsud, who was recently chosen as Baitullah's successor, and Wali-ur-Rehman told the BBC that Mehsud had died on Sunday, August 23, 2009 of injuries sustained on August 5.
ref: Mehsud dilaporkan terbunuh pada 5 Ogos 2009, semasa serangan pesawat tanpa pemandu A.S. di Waziristan Selatan; Walau bagaimanapun, Hakimullah Mehsud, yang baru-baru ini dipilih sebagai pengganti Baitullah, dan Wali-ur-Rehman memberitahu BBC bahawa Mehsud telah meninggal dunia pada Ahad 23 Ogos, 2009 kecederaan yang dialami pada 5 Ogos.

src: Major General Athar Abbas, ISPR spokesman, and Robert Gibbs of the White House had said that his death could not be confirmed although U.S. National Security Adviser James L. Jones had claimed that there was "pretty conclusive" evidence that proved Baitullah Mehsud had been killed and that he was 90% sure of it.
ref: Mejar Jeneral Athar Abbas, jurucakap ISPR, dan Robert Gibbs Rumah Putih berkata, kematiannya tidak dapat disahkan walaupun A.S. Penasihat Keselamatan Negara, James L. Jones mendakwa bahawa terdapat "cantik muktamad" bukti yang membuktikan Baitullah Mehsud terbunuh dan bahawa dia adalah 90% pasti daripadanya.

src: Pakistan blamed him for numerous attacks including the assassination in 2007 of Benazir Bhutto, the former Prime Minister of Pakistan and wife of President Asif Ali Zardari, according to Bloomberg News.
ref: Pakistan menyalahkan beliau kerana banyak serangan termasuk pembunuhan pada tahun 2007 Benazir Bhutto, bekas Perdana Menteri Pakistan dan isteri Presiden Asif Ali Zardari, menurut Bloomberg News.

src: The U.S. offered a US$5 million bounty for his capture.
ref: Amerika Syarikat menawarkan AS $5 juta upah untuk menangkap beliau.

src: Emergency crews said they were hopeful that they would be able to control the fire.
ref: Krew kecemasan berkata, mereka berharap bahawa mereka akan dapat mengawal api tersebut.

src: Currently, twenty-two percent of the blaze is contained, rising from only five percent as little as a day ago.
ref: Terbaru, masih terdapat dua puluh dua peratus kebakaran, meningkat hanya lima peratus dari hari sebelumnya.

src: "I'm feeling a lot more optimistic today than I did yesterday."
ref: "Saya berasa lebih optimis pada hari ini berbanding semalam".

src: "We have the toughest and best-trained firefighters in the world fighting to protect public safety and property."
ref: "Kami mempunyai anggota bomba yang paling gagah dan terlatih dengan baik di dunia berusaha untuk melindungi keselamatan orang awam dan harta benda".

src: Over 10,000 residents have evacuated areas threatened by the flames.
ref: Lebih 10,000 penduduk telah dipindahkan dari kawasan yang diancam api.

src: A cleanup effort is underway after torrential downpours on Friday, September 4 caused significant flooding in the north-east of Scotland.
ref: Usaha pembersihan sedang dijalankan selepas hujan lebat turun pada hari Jumaat, 4 September yang mengakibatkan banjir besar di utara-timur Scotland.

src: The Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA) said that the weather forecast in the coming days was improving, with no large amounts of rainfall predicted.
ref: Agensi Perlindungan Alam Sekitar Scotland (SEPA) berkata bahawa ramalan kaji cuaca beberapa hari mendatang adalah lebih baik, dengan tiada penurunan hujan berjumlah besar dijangkakan.

src: 400 homes were also evacuated in the Elgin area and 50 more in Fochabers.
ref: 400 rumah juga dipindahkan di kawasan Elgin dan 50 lagi di Fochabers.

src: Other areas affected included Aberdeen, Dyce, Lossiemouth and Rothes, where 25 homes had to be evacuated.
ref: Kawasan-kawasan lain yang terjejas termasuk Aberdeen, Dyce, Lossiemouth dan Rothers, di mana 25 rumah terpaksa dipindahkan.

src: The Grampian Police and Tayside Police advised residents not to drive unless absolutely necessary.
ref: Polis Grampian dan Polis Tayside menasihatkan para penduduk untuk tidak memandu melainkan betul-betul perlu.

src: About 67 millimetres of rain had fallen in Aberdeen - roughly the equivalent of an average month of rainfall.
ref: Hampir 67 milimeter hujan telah turun di Aberdeen - secara kasarnya bersamaan dengan purata hujan yang turun selama sebulan.

src: "All the time the river kept going up and up."
ref: "Di sepanjang masa itu air sungai naik dan terus naik".

src: "They came with sandbags, but by then it was too late."
ref: "Mereka datang dengan bag pasir, tetapi pada masa itu ia sudah terlalu lambat".

src: "The objective must now be for everyone to help the victims of the worst flooding to hit Moray for many years to assist them rebuild their lives and get back to normality as quickly as possible."
ref: "Objektif sekarang ialah untuk semua orang membantu mangsa-mangsa banjir buruk yang melanda Moray bagi beberapa tahun untuk membantu mereka membina semula kehidupan mereka dan mendapatkan semula normaliti secepat yang mungkin".

src: "The hard lessons learnt from this latest devastation include the need for local agencies to redouble their efforts to get flood prevention measures into place and to recognise that climate change will only lead to more flooding in the future."
ref: "Pengajaran penting yang dipelajari dari kehancuran terbaru ini termasuk keperluan agensi-agensi tempatan untuk menggandakan semula usaha mereka untuk mendapatkan perkiraan pencegahan banjir dan mengenal pasti bahawa perubahan iklim hanya akan menyebabkan lebih banyak banjir pada masa hadapan".

src: American-based online retailer Amazon.com has backtracked from its July decision and actions to remotely delete George Orwell's classic dystopian novels, Nineteen Eighty-Four and Animal Farm, from customers' Kindle e-book readers.
ref: Peruncit dalam talian yang berpusat di Amerika Amazon.com telah menarik balik keputusan Julai nya dan mengambil tindakan untuk memadam novel klasik dystopian George Orwell, Nineteen Eighty-Four dan Animal Farm, dari Kindle e-buku readers pelanggan.

src: Late Thursday, Amazon emailed owners of Kindle readers who had previously lost copies of these novels, offering a new copy of the deleted books, or a gift certificate or check for US$30.
ref: Lewat hari Khamis, Amazon telah menghantar e-mel kepada pemilik Kindle readers yang sebelum ini telah kehilangan salinan novel ini, dengan menawarkan salinan baru buku yang telah dipadam itu, atau satu baucar hadiah atau cek bernilai US$30.

src: In the aftermath of significant press coverage of Amazon's actions to remove content, legal action was started against them in Washington alleging violations of the company's published terms of service, the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act, and Washington's consumer protection legislation.
ref: Selepas liputan akhbar yang ketara mengenai tindakan Amazon yang membuang kandungan tersebut, tindakan undang-undang telah dimulakan terhadap mereka di Washington yang mendakwa pelanggaran syarat-syarat perkhidmatan yang diterbitkan oleh syarikat itu, Akta Penipuan dan Penyalahgunaan Komputer, dan undang-undang perlindungan pengguna Washington.

src: A Michigan student named as a plaintiff in the case explained that the deletion of his copy of 1984 had rendered his annotations and notes worthless.
ref: Seorang pelajar Michigan dinamakan sebagai plaintif di dalam kes itu menjelaskan bahawa penghapusan salinan beliau pada tahun 1984 telah membuat anotasi dan penjelasannya menjadi tidak bernilai.

src: First published in 1949, the novel Nineteen Eighty-Four will not enter the public domain in the United States until 2044.
ref: Diterbitkan pertama kali pada tahun 1949, novel Nineteen Eighty-Four tidak akan masuk ke dalam domain awam di Amerika Syarikat sehingga tahun 2044.

src: The University of Oregon Ducks opened their 2009 season with a 19–8 loss to rival Boise State Broncos.
ref: Pasukan Universiti Oregon, Duck, membuka musim 2009 mereka dengan kekalahan 19-8 oleh pesaingnya Pasukan Boise State Broncos.

src: The high-profile game was nationally televised on the ESPN network.
ref: Permainan berprofil tinggi itu telah disiarkan di seluruh negara melalui televisyen di rangkaian ESPN.

src: The volatile Blount, coming off a 1,000+ yard season in which he broke a school record for rushing touchdowns, had struggled in several 2008 games, including the encounter with the Broncos.
ref: Blount yang bersikap tidak menentu itu, berjaya dalam musim 1,000+ ela di mana dia memecahkan rekod sekolah dengan mengejar touchdown, telah berrmain bersusah-payah dalam beberapa perlawanan tahun 2008, termasuk pertemuan dengan Pasukan Broncos.

src: The Broncos, however, won 19–8 in their home field; and Blount and Oregon's offense failed to achieve a single first down for the game's first 37 minutes.
ref: Pasukan Broncos, bagaimanapun, menang 19-8 di padang sendiri; manakala kesalahan Blount dan Oregon gagal mencapai sebarang down pertama untuk 37 minit pertama permainan.

src: A few seconds after the end of the game, Boise State defensive end Byron Hout taunted Blount and pushed him on the shoulder pad.
ref: Beberapa saat selepas permainan berakhir, pemain posisi defensive end Pasukan Boise State, Byron Hout mengejek Blount dan menolaknya pada pad bahu.

src: But Blount responded with a swift punch to the jaw, knocking Hout to the ground.
ref: Sebaliknya Blount membalas dengan tumbukan pantas di rahang, menghentam Hout ke tanah.

src: Blount then pushed teammate Garrett Embry, who was attempting to restrain him.
ref: Blount kemudian menolak rakan sepasukan Garrett Embry, yang cuba untuk menghalangnya.

src: Boise State replayed the punch on their large screen in the end-zone multiple times, before Blount had returned to the locker room.
ref: Pasukan Boise State mengulang tayang tumbukan tersebut pada skrin besar mereka beberapa kali di zon akhir, sebelum Blount kembali ke bilik persalinan.

src: As he was escorted to the locker room, Blount confronted jeering Boise State fans.
ref: Oleh kerana dia diiring ke bilik persalinan, Blount berhadapan dengan ejekan peminat Boise State.

src: Two police officers and Oregon assistant coach Scott Frost restrained Blount and escorted him into the locker room.
ref: Dua pegawai polis dan penolong jurulatih Oregon Scott Frost menghalang Blount dan mengiringinya ke dalam bilik persalinan.

src: Blount apologized after the incident, saying: "I just apologize to everybody that was watching this — ESPN, national TV — I just apologize to all of our fans, all the Boise fans."
ref: Blount memohon maaf selepas kejadian itu, berkata: "Saya memohon maaf kepada semua orang yang menonton ini - ESPN, TV kebangsaan - Saya memohon maaf kepada semua penyokong kami, semua peminat Boise."

src: "I lost my head, and I shouldn't have taken it that far."
ref: "Saya hilang kewarasan, dan saya tidak sepatutnya melakukannya sehingga peringkat ini."

src: Coach Chip Kelly suspended Blount for the remainder of the 2009 season.
ref: Jurulatih Chip Kelly menggantung Blount bagi baki musim 2009.

src: Blount was not dismissed from the team, however, and will be permitted to attend practice and retain his scholarship.
ref: Blount tidak dipecat daripada pasukan, bagaimanapun, dan akan dibenarkan hadir latihan dan dikekalkan biasiswanya.

src: The incident was seen an important test for a leadership team in its first year.
ref: Kejadian itu dilihat sebagai ujian penting untuk kepimpinan pasukan dalam tahun pertamanya.

src: He consulted with Oregon officials in advance of Blount's suspension, and afterward, the Pac-10 expressed complete support for the suspension, while declining to comment on the Broncos, who are not part of the Pac-10.
ref: Dia berunding dengan pegawai-pegawai Oregon terlebih dahulu berkenaan penggantungan Blount, dan selepas itu, Pac-10 menyatakan sokongan sepenuhnya terhadap penggantungan itu, pada waktu yang sama enggan mengulas mengenai Pasukan Broncos, yang bukan sebahagian daripada Pac-10.

src: As a result of his negative rushing total (-5 yards) in the one game he played in the 2009 season prior to the suspension, combined with 1,002 yards in 2008, Blount holds the unusual distinction of having a 1,000-yard season with the Ducks, but less than 1,000 yards over his entire NCAA career.
ref: Kesan daripada jumlah (-5 ela) negative rushingnya dalam satu perlawanan dia bermain pada musim 2009 sebelum penggantungan itu, digabungkan dengan 1,002 ela pada 2008, Blount memegang perbezaan yang luar biasa dengan mempunyai musim 1000 ela dengan Ducks, tetapi kurang daripada 1,000 ela sepanjang kerjaya NCAAnya.

src: A 600 lb bomb which was found in Northern Ireland has been defused by a bomb disposal team.
ref: Satu bom dengan berat 600 paun yang ditemui di Ireland Utara telah dimatikan oleh pasukan pemusnah bom.

src: The explosives were home-made and weighed 600 lb (270 kg).
ref: Bahan letupan itu adalah buatan sendiri dan berat 600 paun (270 kg).

src: It is believed that the bomb was planted there by dissident republicans.
ref: Adalah dipercayai bahawa bom itu ditanam di sana oleh penentang republikan.

src: Chief Inspector Sam Cordner said: "The actions of terrorist criminals in planting this device in the Forkhill area put local people and police officers at significant risk."
ref: Ketua Inspektor Sam Cordner berkata: "Tindakan penjenayah pengganas dalam menanam peranti ini di kawasan Forkhill merisikokan rakyat dan pegawai polis tempatan".

src: "Their target may have been the police, but they did not care who they killed or injured."
ref: "Sasaran mereka mungkin adalah polis, tetapi mereka tidak peduli siapa mereka bunuh atau cederakan".

src: "It is only through the hard work and professionalism of police officers and their military colleagues that the area has been made safe," Cordner said.
ref: "Hanya melalui kerja susah dan profesionalisme pegawai-pegawai polis dan rakan-tentera mereka bahawa kawasan itu telah dijadikan selamat," kata Cordner.

src: 20 people had to evacuate their homes while the bomb was safely defused.
ref: 20 orang terpaksa meninggalkan kediaman mereka sementara bom itu selamat dimatikan.

src: The situation ended without incident and all passengers and crew on board the aircraft were able to leave safely.
ref: Keadaan tersebut berakhir tanpa sebarang kejadian dan semua penumpang dan krew di atas pesawat dapat keluar dengan selamat.

src: All hijackers were arrested after Mexican security forces boarded the plane.
ref: Semua perampas telah ditahan selepas pasukan keselamatan Mexico menaiki pesawat tersebut.

src: The incident began just after 1:30 p.m. (CDT) one man took control of the plane and demanded to speak to Felipe Calderon, Mexico's president.
ref: Kejadian bermula sejurus selepas 1:30 p.m. (CDT) seorang lelaki mengambil alih kawalan pesawat tersebut dan meminta untuk bercakap dengan Felipe Calderon, presiden Mexico.

src: The hijacker said that if his demand was not met, he would blow up the plane.
ref: Perampas berkata bahawa sekiranya kehendaknya tidak dipenuhi, dia akan meletupkan kapal terbang itu.

src: Earlier reports had stated there were explosives on board the aircraft, but none were found.
ref: Laporan awal menyatakan bahawa terdapat bahan letupan di atas pesawat, tetapi tiada yang telah dijumpai.

src: A short time later, four of the detained men were released without being charged.
