ref: Tidak berapa lama kemudian, empat lelaki yang ditahan telah dilepaskan tanpa sebarang dikenakan apa-apa.

src: Reports say he was carrying a box that he described as a bomb and would detonate it if his demand to speak to Calderon about the quake was not met.
ref: Laporan mengatakan dia membawa kotak yang diperihalkannya sebagai bom dan akan diletupkan sekiranya permintaannya untuk bercakap dengan Calderon mengenai gempa tersebut tidak dipenuhi.

src: 104 people were on board the plane, but all passengers and crew aboard the aircraft have left it safely.
ref: 104 orang berada di atas pesawat, tetapi semua penumpang dan krew di atas pesawat telah pergi dengan selamat.

src: The airport remained open while the plane was dealt with on an emergency runway.
ref: Lapangan terbang terus dibuka sementara pesawat tersebut diuruskan dengan melalui landasan kecemasan.

src: Calderon was inside the airport's presidential hangar waiting to depart when the plane landed.
ref: Calderon berada di hangar presiden di lapangan terbang menunggu untuk berlepas apabila pesawat tersebut mendarat.

src: The United States House of Representatives on June 29 passed a $1.17 billion funding bill for Amtrak in fiscal year 2006, an amount that is still short of the $2 billion Amtrak was originally seeking.
ref: Dewan Rakyat Amerika Syarikat pada 29 Jun meluluskan rang undang-undang pembiayaan $1.17 bilion untuk Amtrak dalam tahun fiskal 2006, jumlah yang masih kekurangan $2 bilion daripada jumlah asal yang Amtrak minta.

src: The funding was approved in an amendment to a more general transportation and treasury appropriations bill.
ref: Pembiayaan ini telah diluluskan pada pindaan kearah pengangkutan yang lebih umum dan peruntukan perbendaharaan undang-undang.

src: The House also removed the requirement in the bill that would mandate Amtrak to end passenger train service on currently unprofitable routes.
ref: Dewan juga mengeluarkan syarat-syarat dalam rang undang-undang yang akan membenarkan Amtrak untuk menamatkan perkhidmatan kereta api penumpang di laluan sekarang yang tidak menguntungkan.

src: The funding has yet to be approved by the Senate.
ref: Pembiayaan ini masih belum diluluskan oleh Senat.

src: A reporter's notes subpoenaed by the U.S. District Court in Washington may show United States President George W. Bush's chief political advisor Karl Rove as one of the two sources behind the leaking of the identity of undercover CIA agent Valerie Plame, according to one or more anonymous sources cited by MSNBC.
ref: Nota seorang wartawan disepina oleh Mahkamah Daerah U.S. di Washington mungkin menunjukkan ketua penasihat politik Presiden Amerika Syarikat George W. Bush Karl Rove sebagai salah satu daripada dua sumber di belakang kebocoran identiti ejen CIA yang menyamar Valerie Plame, menurut satu atau lebih sumber-sumber tanpa nama yang dipetik oleh MSNBC.

src: The notes are those of TIME magazine White House correspondent Matthew Cooper.
ref: Nota-nota tersebut adalah dari wartawan White House majalah TIME Matthew Cooper.

src: The court's ruling was based on the clause in Constitutional law summarized popularly with the phrase "Crying fire in a crowded theater": that when the degree to which the speech puts the safety of others at risk outweighs the degree to which it benefits others, so does their right to safety and security outweigh one's right to free expression.
ref: Keputusan mahkamah itu berdasarkan fasal dalam undang-undang Perlembagaan yang diringkaskan popular dengan ungkapan "Tangisan api dalam teater yang sesak": bahawa apabila tahap ucapan yang meletakkan keselamatan orang lain atas risiko mengatasi tahap ia memberi manfaat kepada orang lain, begitu juga hak mereka untuk keselamatan dan perlindungan melebihi hak seseorang ke atas kebebasan bersuara.

src: The Supreme Court on Monday refused to hear the reporters' appeal of the case.
ref: Mahkamah Agung pada hari Isnin menolak untuk mendengar rayuan pemberita terhadap kes itu.

src: The most successful country this year was Italy, with a total of 153 medals, 57 of which were gold.
ref: Negara yang paling berjaya tahun ini adalah Itali, dengan sejumlah 153 pingat, di mana 57 daripadanya adalah emas.

src: The next Mediterranean Games will be held in Pescara, Italy in 2009.
ref: Sukan Mediterranean seterusnya akan diadakan di Pescara, Itali pada tahun 2009.

src: 648 MEPs out of 680 voted today to reject the proposal, aimed at bringing Europe in-line with a similar U.S. bill.
ref: 648 MEP dari 680 telah mengundi pada hari ini untuk menolak cadangan, yang bertujuan untuk membawa Eropah sebaris dengan rang undang-undang U.S. yang serupa.

src: "This is a great victory for those who have campaigned to ensure that European innovation and competitiveness is protected from monopolisation of software functionalities and business methods."
ref: "Ini adalah satu kejayaan besar buat mereka yang berkempen untuk memastikan inovasi dan daya saing Eropah dipelihara dari pemonopolian fungsian perisian dan kaedah perniagaan".

src: "It marks the end of an attempt by the European Commission and governmental patent officials to impose detrimental and legally questionable practices of the European Patent Office (EPO) on the member states," said the Foundation for a Free Information Infrastructure, in opposition to the directive.
ref: "Ini menandakan pengakhiran usaha Suruhanjaya Eropah dan pengawai paten kerajaan bagi mengenakan kemerosotan dan amalan Pejabat Paten Eropah (EPO) yang boleh dipersoalkan secara undang-undang ke atas negara ahli," kata Penubuhan Infrastruktur Maklumat Bebas, yang menentang arahan tersebut.

src: Adversaries to the patent directive claim that a bill covering Intellectual Property (IP) would "stifle innovation" in Europe, as it allows the patenting of implementation within software.
ref: Penentang arahan paten itu mendakwa satu rang undang-undang yang meliputi Harta Intelektual (IP) akan "menahan inovasi" di Eropah, kerana ia membenarkan pelaksanaan paten di dalam perisian.

src: Many anti-patent activists say that if the bill were passed, small businesses and hobbyists would be in danger of lawsuit from corporations and their extensive patent portfolios.
ref: Banyak aktivis anti-paten berkata yang jika rang tersebut diluluskan, perniagaan kecil dan penggemar akan terdedah kepada bahaya tuntutan mahkamah dari syarikat besar dan potfolio paten mereka yang luas.

src: At least two people were wounded after two freight trains collided with each other near Kotri in southern Pakistan today.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya dua orang cedera apabila dua keretapi muatan berlanggar sesama sendiri berdekatan Kotri di selatan Pakistan hari ini.

src: Twenty eight goods wagons of the freight train carrying 1,372,000 litres of oil were derailed, and oil was spilled.
ref: Dua puluh lapan gerabak barangan keretapi muatan tersebut yang membawa 1,372,000 liter minyak tergelincir, dan menumpahkan minyak.

src: Rail traffic in both directions has been suspended on the track following this incident.
ref: Laluan keretapi dikedua-dua hala telah dihentikan berikutan insiden tersebut.

src: Firebrigade and ambulance immediately reached the spot while Pakistan Railway's emergency relief train has left Karachi towards the spot.
ref: Bomba dan ambulan segera tiba di tempat kejadian manakala keretapi penyelamat kecemasan Keretapi Pakistan telah meninggalkan Karachi menuju kearah tempat kejadian.

src: The Director of public prosecutions in England and Wales are going to seek a retrial for three men who are thought to have been involved in a plot to attempt to bomb transatlantic flights.
ref: Pengarah pendakwaan awam di England dan Wales akan mendapatkan perbicaraan semula untuk tiga lelaki yang dianggap telah terlibat dalam plot cubaan untuk mengebom penerbangan transatlantik.

src: Ibrahim Savant and Arafat Khan are both 28 years old.
ref: Kedua-dua Ibrahim Savant dan Arafat Khan berumur 28 tahun.

src: All of the men were recently found "not guilty" of attempting to bomb aircrafts.
ref: Semua lelaki itu baru-baru ini dijumpai "tidak bersalah" daripada cubaan untuk mengebom pesawat.

src: A spokesman for the Director of Public Prosecutions, Keir Starmer, confirmed that he will be seeking a retrial.
ref: Jurucakap Pengarah Pendakwaan Awam, Keir Starmer, mengesahkan bahawa beliau akan mendapatkan perbicaraan semula.

src: On Monday, a jury in Woolwich Crown Court in London, England failed to reach verdicts for the three men, based on charges of conspiracy to murder, which is why the Director of Public Prosecutions of England and Wales is seeking a retrial.
ref: Pada hari Isnin, juri di Woolwich Crown Court di London, England gagal mencapai keputusan yang dibuat untuk tiga orang, berdasarkan atas tuduhan konspirasi untuk membunuh, itulah sebabnya Pengarah Pendakwaan Awam England dan Wales memohon perbicaraan semula.

src: Starmer said: "My task is to judge whether, taking into account all relevant considerations, the public interest is better served in this particular case by offering no evidence or by seeking a further retrial."
ref: Starmer berkata: "Tugas saya ialah untuk menilai sama ada, dengan mengambil kira semua pertimbangan yang berkaitan, kepentingan awam dikhidmat dengan lebih baik dalam kes ini dengan menawarkan sebarang bukti atau dengan memohon perbicaraan semula lagi".

src: The explosion occurred in Nazran, the main city in the region of Ingushetia.
ref: Letupan itu berlaku di Nazran, bandar utama di kawasan Ingushetia.

src: Spokesman Kaloi Akhiltov said to the Associated Press news agency that a van packed with explosive material drove into the traffic checkpoint.
ref: Jurucakap Kaloi Akhiltov berkata kepada agensi berita Associated Press bahawa sebuah van yang penuh dengan bahan letupan dipandu ke pusat pemeriksaan terbabit.

src: The Caucasus region of Russia has seen an increase in attacks recently, following a few years of relative calm after two wars with separatists in the neigbouring region of Chechnya.
ref: Rantau Caucasus Rusia telah menyaksikan peningkatan serangan baru-baru ini, berikutan beberapa tahun tenang selepas dua peperangan dengan puak pemisah di kawasan jiran Chechnya.

src: Six energy companies in the United Kingdom have announced that it is likely that the prices for energy bills could increase over the course of 2010.
ref: Enam syarikat tenaga di United Kingdom telah mengumumkan bahawa berkemungkinan harga bil tenaga akan meningkat menjelang tahun 2010. Syarikat-syarikat tersebut, yang digelar "enam terbesar" di United Kingdom, tidak menyampaikan maklumat bahawa akan ada potongan harga dalam bil tenaga walaupun keuntungan mereka meningkat.

src: The companies, which are nicknamed the "big six" in the United Kingdom, did not pass on information that there would be price cuts in energy bills despite increasing profits.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, syarikat-syarikat tersebut telah menghantar pesanan sebagai jawapan dengan berkata bahawa harga bil mungkin meningkat menjelang tahun depan.

src: However, the companies have in fact sent a message in response saying that the prices of bills may even increase over the course of the next year.
ref: Syarikat tenaga pemerhati Pejabat Pasaran Gas dan Elektrik (Ofgem) telah menganggarkan bahawa syarikat-syarikat tenaga akan membuat margin kasar £170 ($276) bagi setiap dwi pelanggan bahan api sepanjang dua belas bulan yang akan datang, kerana kejatuhan dalam kos tenaga borong baru-baru ini.

src: Energy company watchdog the Office of Gas and Electricity Markets (Ofgem) have estimated that energy companies will make gross margins of ￡170 ($276) per dual fuel customer over the course of the next twelve months, due to the recent fall in wholesale energy costs.
ref: Ofgem telah berkata: "Analisis kami menunjukkan bahawa berdasarkan strategi perlindungan nilai 18 bulan dan andaian harga runcit kekal tidak berubah, unjuran margin kasar dijangka meningkat sebanyak kira-kira £80 untuk pelanggan dwi bahan api dalam tempoh enam bulan akan datang".

src: The "big six" energy companies in the United Kingdom are British Gas, E-on, Npower, Scottish and Southern Energy, Scottish Power, and EDF Energy.
ref: British Gas menyatakan: "Harga [adalah] dijangka kekal pada tahap yang tinggi dalam sejarah, malah mungkin meningkat kerana kos bukan komoditi yang meningkat".

src: British Gas stated: "Prices [are] likely to remain at historically high levels, and in fact likely to increase as non-commodity costs rise ever upwards."
ref: EDF Energy berkata: "[Kami] sudah bersedia untuk mengurangkan tarif jika keadaan pasaran membenarkan".

src: EDF Energy said: "[We] would of course be prepared to reduce tariffs if market conditions allowed."
ref: Scottish Power menyatakan: "Tiada isyarat segera yang menunjukkan kejatuhan harga runcit pada musim sejuk ini, dan risiko akan meningkat tahun depan".

src: Scottish Power stated: "There are no immediate signals that would indicate a fall in retail prices for this winter, and risks of an increase next year."
ref: Scottish & Southern Energy mengulas: "Dengan harga borong tahunan yang lebih tinggi, dan dengan tekanan kenaikan dari segi pengagihan, alam sekitar dan kos sosial, mencari jalan untuk mengelakkan peningkatan antara sekarang dan akhir tahun 2010 merupakan satu matlamat penting".

src: A spokesperson for Ofgem said that there was no evidence of any cartel in operation, or evidence of profiteering.
ref: Jurucakap itu berkata: "Terpulang kepada syarikat itu sendiri untuk membuat keputusan sama ada untuk mengurangkan bil-bil mereka".

src: The spokesperson commented: "It is up to the companies themselves to decide whether to cut their bills."
ref: "Data Consumer Focus menunjukkan bahawa Scottish Power telah meningkatkan harga dwi bahan api sejak tahun 2003 - setinggi 148% -

src: "Consumer Focus data suggests that Scottish Power has increased dual fuel prices by the most since 2003 - up 148% - while decreasing prices by 0.6% so far this year."
ref: Sambil mengurangkan harga sebanyak 0.6% setakat ini tahun ini".

src: "RWE's Npower has increased tariffs by 132% since 2003, but has reduced bills by 2.7% in 2009."
ref: "Npower milik RWE telah meningkatkan tarif sebanyak 132% sejak tahun 2003, tetapi telah mengurangkan bil sebanyak 2.7% pada tahun 2009.".

src: Friday marks the 50th anniversary of a mining disaster which occured in Lanarkshire, Scotland on September 18, 2009, killing 47 miners.
ref: Jumaat menandakan ulang tahun ke-50 bencana perlombongan yang berlaku di Lanarkshire, Scotland pada 18 September 2009, membunuh 47 pelombong.

src: Scotland's First Minister Alex Salmond MSP unveiled a bronze statue and a memorial garden in Moodiesburn on Sunday in front of a crowd of approximately 600.
ref: Menteri Pertama Scotland, Alex Salmond MSP melancarkan patung gangsa dan taman peringatan Moodiesburn pada hari Ahad di hadapan kira-kira 600 orang ramai.

src: They were subsequently killed after being trapped by a fire in the mine which prevented them from escaping.
ref: Mereka kemudiannya dibunuh selepas terperangkap dalam api di lombong yang menghalang mereka daripada melarikan diri.

src: First Minister Salmond unveiled a memorial garden and a bronze statue which had been placed to mark the 50th anniversary of the incident.
ref: Menteri Pertama Salmond melancarkan taman peringatan dan patung gangsa yang telah diletakkan untuk menandakan ulang tahun ke-50 kejadian itu.

src: A religious service was carried out from Bishop Joseph Devine.
ref: Servis agama telah dijalankan oleh Bishop Joseph Devine.

src: Memorial committee chairman Daniel Taylor read out the names of the late 47 people while another person was playing bagpipes in the background.
ref: Pengerusi Jawatankuasa Peringatan Daniel Taylor membacakan nama 47 orang yang meninggal sementara orang lain sedang bermain bagpipe di latar belakang.

src: When the service came to a close, First Minister Salmond commented on the tragedy, saying "The tragedy at Auchengeich Colliery left barely a town, village or mining family in North Lanarkshire unaffected."
ref: Apabila servis itu sampai ke penghujungnya, Menteri Pertama Salmond mengulas mengenai tragedi itu, berkata "Tragedi di Auchengeich Colliery hampir melibatkan kampung, bandar atau keluarga perlombongan di North Lanarkshire".

src: "Fifty years on, the memories of the fateful day which claimed the lives of so many husbands, fathers, brothers and sons endure and I am honoured to pay tribute to them."
ref: "Lima puluh tahun kemudian, kenangan hari malang yang meragut nyawa begitu ramai suami, bapa, abang adik dan anak-bertahan dan saya berbesar hati untuk memberi penghormatan kepada mereka".

src: "Scotland is fortunate enough to have been blessed with rich natural resources, from the abundant coal seams of the central belt to the oil and gas reserves off our shores and the emerging renewable energy sources we are just beginning to feel the benefits of."
ref: "Scotland cukup bertuah kerana dikurniakan dengan kekayaan sumber semula jadi, dari lipit batu arang yang banyak daripada tali pusat minyak dan gas rizab luar negara kita dan sumber tenaga boleh diperbaharui yang baru muncul kita hanya mula merasai manfaat".

src: "But we should never forget the human cost which has come with that."
ref: "Tetapi kita tidak boleh lupa kos manusia yang datang dengan itu".

src: "Just as the Piper Alpha tragedy more than two decades ago underlined the hazards of North Sea exploration, the Auchengeich disaster showed all too starkly the dangers and risks which miners all over Scotland took for granted as part of their job every time they descended the pits."
ref: "Sama seperti tragedi Piper Alpha lebih daripada dua dekad yang lalu menggariskan bahaya penerokaan Laut Utara, bencana Auchengeich menunjukkan terlalu bahayanya dan risiko pelombong di seluruh Scotland ambil diberikan sebagai sebahagian daripada tugas mereka setiap kali mereka turun lubang".

src: "Together, they are a truly fitting tribute to those 47 brave men who died in Auchengeich half a century ago."
ref: "Bersama-sama, ia adalah benar-benar satu penghormatan yang sesuai kepada orang-orang 47 lelaki berani yang meninggal dunia di Auchengeich setengah abad yang lalu".

src: However analysis of the new images show ridges up to 4 kilometres tall, similar in height to the Rocky Mountains or the Alps.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun analisis imej baru menunjukkan rabung sehingga 4 kilometer tinggi, tinggi yang sama dengan Pergunungan Rocky atau Alps.

src: The images were taken around the planet's equinox on August 11, when the Sun was directly over Saturn's equator and caught the rings edge on.
ref: Imej-imej tersebut diambil sekitar ekuinoks planet pada 11 Ogos, apabila Matahari berada tepat di atas khatulistiwa Zuhal dan mencapai sisi cincin.

src: With the light from the Sun reaching Saturn's rings at such a low angle, scientists were able to measure the shadows cast by bumps on the rings and discover their surprising height.
ref: Dengan cahaya dari matahari mencapai cincin Zuhal pada sudut yang sebegitu rendah, ahli sains dapat mengukur bayang-bayang oleh bonggol pada cincin dan menemui ketinggian mereka yang mengejutkan.

src: As Cassini project scientist Bob Pappalardo put it: "It's like putting on 3-D glasses and seeing the third dimension for the first time."
ref: Sebagai saintis projek, Cassini Bob Pappalardo mengatakan: "Ia seperti memakai cermin mata 3-D dan melihat dimensi ketiga buat kali pertama."

src: Some of the ring features are known to be caused by Saturn's moons, but others are harder to explain.
ref: Antara ciri-ciri cincin itu diketahui disebabkan oleh bulan-bulan Zuhal, tetapi yang lain adalah lebih sukar untuk diterangkan.

src: "To understand what we are seeing will take more time, but the images and data will help develop a more complete understanding of how old the rings might be and how they are evolving," said Linda Spilker, Cassini deputy project scientist.
ref: "Untuk memahami apa yang telah kami lihat akan mengambil lebih banyak masa, tetapi imej dan data akan membantu untuk membangunkan pemahaman yang lebih lengkap tentang kemungkinan berapa umur cincin dan bagaimana ia berkembang," kata Linda Spilker, timbalan saintis projek Cassini.

src: It is part of the Cassini-Huygens joint mission between NASA, the European Space Agency and the Italian Space Agency.
ref: Ia adalah sebahagian daripada misi bersama Cassini-Huygens antara NASA, Agensi Angkasa Lepas Eropah dan Agensi Angkasa Itali.

src: Michael Jackson's This Is It, a documentary film based on world-famous singer Michael Jackson rehearsing for his last tour before his untimely death, will be premiered in at least 15 cinemas in cities all over the world simultaneously.
ref: This Is It oleh Michael Jackson, sebuah filem dokumentari yang berdasarkan latihan penyanyi terkenal Michael Jackson untuk jelajah terakhir sebelum kematiannya, akan ditayangkan di sekurang-kurangnya di 15 panggung wayang di semua bandar di seluruh dunia secara serentak.

src: The world cities may be in different time zones with different dates but they will all be premiering the film at exactly the same time.
ref: Semua bandar di dunia mungkin mempunyai zon masa yang berbeza dengan tarikh yang berlainan tetapi semuanya akan menayangkan filem tersebut pad waktu yang betul-betul sama.

src: Other locations holding concurrent premieres are the South African city of Johannesburg, New York City in New York, German capital Berlin, Russian capital city Moscow, Japanese capital Tokyo, Australian city Sydney, French capital Paris, South Korean city Seoul, and Rio de Janeiro, a large city in Brazil.
ref: Lokasi lain yang turut mengadakan tayangan serentak adalah bandar Johannesburg di Afrika Selatan, bandar New York di New York, Berlin ibu negara Jerman, Moscow ibu kota Russia, Tokyo ibu kota Jepun, bandar Sydney Australia, Paris ibu kota Perancis, Seoul ibu kota Korea Selatan, dan Rio de Janeiro, sebuah bandar besar di Brazil.

src: Michael Jackson died on June 25, 2009 aged 50, after suffering from a cardiac arrest.
ref: Michael Jackson meninggal dunia pada 25 Jun, 2009 ketika berusia 50 tahun, selepas mengalami serangan jantung terhenti.

src: The movie will feature some of the rehearsal footage made in the weeks before his death.
ref: Filem itu akan menampilkan sebahagian potongan filem latihan yang dibuat beberapa minggu sebelum kematiannya.

src: Sony Pictures, the film production company, have yet to announce the other cities involved.
ref: Sony Pictures, syarikat produksi filem itu, masih belum mengumumkan bandar lain yang terlibat.

src: The film is directed by Kenny Ortega, who previously directed all the High School Musical films.
ref: Filem itu diarahkan oleh Kenny Ortega, yang dahulunya telah mengarah kesemua filem High School Musical.

src: Jeff Blake, chairman of worldwide marketing and distribution for Sony Pictures, said: "Michael Jackson has an army of fans everywhere around the world... we are giving the audiences an incredible opportunity to join together in celebration of Michael Jackson's incredible career."
ref: Jeff Blake, pengerusi pemasaran dan pengagihan seluruh dunia untuk Sony Pictures, berkata: "Michael Jackson mempunyai sekumpulan peminat-peminat di serata dunia...kami memberi penonton peluang luar biasa untuk bersama-sama di dalam meraikan karier Michael Jackson yang luar biasa".

src: Amid the confusion surrounding today's London blasts, officials have urged the public to avoid the city if possible to allow emergency services to operate more quickly.
ref: Di tengah-tengah kekeliruan akibat letupan yang berlaku di London hari ini, pegawai-pegawai telah meminta orang ramai untuk mengelak kawasan bandar jika boleh untuk membolehkan perkhidmatan kecemasan beroperasi dengan lebih cepat.

src: Air links are now closed at Stansted, Heathrow, Gatwick and London City airports.
ref: Perhubungan udara juga ditutup di lapangan-lapangan terbang Stansted, Heathrow, Gatwick dan London City.

src: Those trying to contact friends and family via mobile have struggled as the largest mobile networks, Vodafone, O2 and Orange, have all suffered from full capacity on several occasions this morning meaning voice calls failed.
ref: Mereka yang cuba untuk menghubungi rakan-rakan dan keluarga melalui telefon mudah alih juga mengalami kesukaran kerana rangkaian mudah alih terbesar, Vodafone, O2 dan Orange, telah terjejas pada kapasititi penuh beberapa kali pagi ini bermakna panggilan suara gagal.

src: On the web, websites such as BBC, TfL and the G8 2005 website struggled for a short time at one point this morning under the strain of so many web users visiting them.
ref: Di web, laman-laman web seperti BBC, TfL dan G8 2005 mengalami kesukaran waktu singkat pada suatu ketika awal pagi tadi apabila semua pengguna web melayarinya.

src: The national grid has said that it has sustained no damage to the electricity network.
ref: Grid negara telah berkata bahawa ia tidak mengalami sebarang kerosakan kepada rangkaian elektrik.

src: The Royal Mail is warning customers that mail collections and deliveries across the UK will be disrupted because of the incidents.
ref: Pusat Pengeposan Diraja memberi amaran pelanggan bahawa pengumpulan mel dan penghantaran ke seluruh UK akan terjejas disebabkan kejadian tersebut.

src: At least 25 per cent of the UK's mail moves through London, even if its end destination is elsewhere.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 25 peratus daripada mel UK bergerak melalui London, walaupun destinasi terakhir adalah di tempat lain.

src: Kadyrov did not appear in court but his lawyer, Andrei Krasnenkov, neither called witnesses nor questioned those brought by the defence.
ref: Kadyrov tidak hadir di mahkamah tetapi peguamnya, Andrei Krasnenkov, tidak memanggil saksi-saksi mahupun menyoal mereka yang dibawa oleh pihak pembelaan.

src: Krasnenkov said Orlov's words were helping destabilize Chechnya and told reporters that "Human rights defenders are miserable people."
ref: Krasnenkov berkata perkataan Orlov telah mengakibatkan ketidakstabilan Chechnya dan memberitahu pemberita bahawa "pembela hak asasi manusia adalah orang yang teruk".

src: Estemirova had been threatened several times by Kadyrov and had fled Russia previously as a result, sometimes for months.
ref: Estemirova telah diancam beberapa kali oleh Kadyrov dan melarikan diri dari Rusia sebelum ini, kadang-kadang selama beberapa bulan.

src: Memorial say they hope the court case, which gets under way on October 6, will reveal new evidence of serious crimes they claim Kadyrov routinely ignores.
ref: Memorial berkata, mereka berharap kes mahkamah itu, yang akan bermula pada 6 Oktober, akan mendedahkan bukti baru jenayah serius yang mereka dakwa kerap diabaikan oleh Kadyrov.

src: 75 people, mainly women and children, were aboard the vessel when it flipped over during a storm.
ref: 75 orang, kebanyakannya wanita dan kanak-kanak, telah menaiki bot tersebut yang kemudiannya terbalik semasa ribut.

src: They had been returning from a fair that marked the end of the Durga Puja, an annual Hindu festival that celebrates the worship of the Hindu goddess Durga.
ref: Penumpang bot tersebut dalam perjalanan pulang dari pesta untuk meraikan penghujung Durga Puja, sebuah festival tahunan Hindu yang merayakan pemujaan dewi Hindu Durga.

src: A search operation was launched by the Indian National Disaster Response Force, but efforts were hampered by nightfall.
ref: Operasi pencarian telah dilancarkan oleh Pasukan Respons Bencana Alam Kebangsaan India, tetapi usaha tersebut tidak dapat diteruskan pada waktu malam.

src: With the United States Australian rules football National Championship this weekend, Wikinews interviewed United States Australian Football League (USFooty) president Rich Mann, and Media Relations representative Kevin Smith.
ref: Sempena Kejohanan Bola Sepak Australia Amerika Syarikat pada hujung minggu ini, Wikinews menemu ramah Presiden Liga Bola Sepak Australia Amerika Syarikat (USFooty) Kaya Mann, dan wakil Perhubungan Media Kevin Smith.

src: This means that an American team can have no more than nine players who aren't Americans and a Canadian team no more than nine non-Canadians.
ref: Ini bermakna bahawa pasukan Amerika tidak boleh mempunyai lebih daripada sembilan pemain yang bukan warganegara Amerika dan pasukan Kanada tidak melebihi daripada sembilan bukan warganegara Kanada.

src: Australian rules football is played on a field 170 metres by 160 metres.
ref: Bola sepak Australia dimainkan di padang seluas 170 meter dengan 160 meter.

src: Parties to a lawsuit against Amazon.com agreed September 25 to a proposed settlement resolving claims that Amazon unlawfully deleted content from users' Kindle reading devices.
ref: Pihak yang membuat tuntutan mahkamah terhadap Amazon.com bersetuju pada 25 September terhadap cadangan penyelesaian yang menyelesaikan tuntutan bahawa Amazon menyalahi undang-undang kerana memadam kandungan dari peranti bacaan Kindle pengguna.

src: The plaintiffs argued that Amazon had breached its terms of service and violated the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act and Washington Consumer Protection Act.
ref: Pihak plaintif mendakwa bahawa Amazon telah melanggar terma dan syarat perkhidmatan dan mencabuli Akta Penipuan Komputer dan Penyalahgunaan dan Akta Perlindungan Pengguna Washington.

src: Amazon had first claimed it was forced to delete the books when it learned it did not have the right to sell them.
ref: Amazon pada mulanya mendakwa pihaknya terpaksa memadamkan buku-buku tersebut apabila sedar mereka tiada hak untuk menjualnya.

src: However, it apologized on July 23 and on September 7 offered affected customers either US$30 or a copy of the deleted book.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, pihaknya meminta maaf pada 23 Julai dan pada 7 September dengan menawarkan pelanggan yang terjejas sama ada US$30 atau sebuah salinan buku yang telah dipadamkan.

src: Amazon would also pay KamberEdelson, the plaintiffs' firm, US$150,000 in legal fees, with the proviso that it go to charity.
ref: Amazon juga akan membayar Kamber Edelson, firma pihak plaintif, US$150,000 sebagai bayaran undang-undang, dengan syarat bahawa ia pergi kepada badan amal.

src: Michael Aschenbrener, an attorney at KamberEdelson, described the agreement as a "great settlement" that "provides protection for Kindle users and provides confidence to them that the books, newspapers and magazines they purchase will not be subject to remote deletion by Amazon."
ref: Michael Aschenbrener, seorang peguam di Kamber Edelson, menggambarkan perjanjian itu sebagai "penyelesaian yang besar" yang "menyediakan perlindungan untuk pengguna Kindle dan memberikan keyakinan kepada mereka bahawa buku-buku, akhbar dan majalah yang mereka membeli tidak akan tertakluk kepada pemadaman jarak jauh oleh Amazon.

src: "It sends a message to digital media purveyors of all kinds that sellers really need to respect users' rights to that content."
ref: Ia memberitahu penyebar semua jenis media digital yang penjual benar-benar perlu menghormati hak pengguna atas kandungan tersebut".

src: Typhoon Parma was threatening to strike the Philippines capital of Manila, devastated from Typhoon Ketsana just one week earlier, but has taken a more northerly path, largely sparing the city.
ref: Taufan Parma mungkin akan melanda Manila ibu negara Filipina, yang baru dimusnahkan oleh Taufan Ketsana minggu lalu, tetapi telah dibawa ke bahagian utara, yang mana telah merosakkan sebahagian besar bandar tersebut.

src: However, Parma, still packing sustained 10-minute winds of 110 miles per hour, has knocked down trees and powerlines, and is forecast to drop heavy precipitation.
ref: Tetapi, Parma, masih lagi berterusan membawa angin 10-minit daripada 110 batu sejam, telah menjatuhkan pokok-pokok dan talian tenaga, dan dijangkakan akan membawa hujan lebat.

src: The most significant impacts may come in the form of mudslides.
ref: Kesan yang paling ketara yang bakal diterima ialah dalam bentuk tanah runtuh.

src: Tuguegarao Mayor Randolph Ting said, "Many houses have been destroyed and trees and electricity poles uprooted."
ref: Datuk Bandar Tuguegarao Randolph Ting berkata, "Banyak rumah-rumah telah musnah dan pokok-pokok dan batang tenaga elektrik telah tercabut".

src: "The province hasn’t been hit this hard in 10 years."
ref: "Wilayah itu telah lama tidak dilanda sekuat ini dalam masa 10 tahun ini".

src: Trevor Taylor, a resort owner in Santa Ana, Cagayan, reported that "The town is locking down; you don’t want to be on the road at this time."
ref: Trevor Taylor, pemilik kawasan peranginan di Santa Ana, Cagayan, melaporkan bahawa "Bandar masih ditutup; kamu tidak boleh berada di atas jalan raya dalam masa tersebut".

src: "We have moved everything that is loose, boarded every window and put extra material on the roof so it doesn’t get blown off."
ref: "Kami telah memindahkan semuanya yang longgar, menaikkan setiap tingkap dan meletakkan bahan tambahan di atas atap supaya ia tidak diterbangkan angin".

src: All interests in the areas potentially in the path of Typhoon Parma are urged to monitor its progress over the next few days.
ref: Semua kepentingan di kawasan-kawasan berpotensi dilalui Taufam Parma dinasihatkan agar memerhatikan perkembangannya dalam tempoh beberapa hari akan datang.

src: Al-Qaeda said in a web statement Thursday that it has killed Egypt's top envoy in Iraq, Ihab al-Sherif.
ref: Al-Qaeda menyebut dalam kenyataannya di laman web pada hari khamis bahawa mereka telah membunuh tentera berpangkat tinggi Mesir di Iraq, Ihab al-Sherif.

src: The Islamic terror group released a video showing a blindfolded al-Sherif identifying himself, but did not show his death.
ref: Kumpulan pengganas islam itu menyiarkan video menunjukkan al-Sharif yang ditutup matanya, memperkenalkan dirinya, tetapi kumpulan itu tidak menunjukkan kematiannya.

src: Mr Al-Sherif, 51, had been serving in Baghdad as chief envoy since early June; he was abducted on 03 July while out buying a newspaper, eyewitnesses said.
ref: Encik Al-Sherif, 51, telah bertugas di Baghdad sebagai ketua angkatan sejak dari awal Julai; beliau diculik pada 3 Julai ketika membeli surat khabar, menurut saksi.

src: Six people were killed after a suicide bomber detonated explosives at a funeral in Haditha on Monday.
ref: Enam orang terbunuh selepas seorang pengebom berani mati meletupkan bahan letupan di satu pengebumian di Haditha pada hari Isnin.

src: According to reports from witnesses, the blast was so strong that it threw bodies onto rooftops of neighbouring buildings.
ref: Menurut laporan daripada saksi-saksi, letupan itu begitu kuat sehingga ia melemparkan tubuh ke atas bumbung bangunan kejiranan.

src: Unlike previous such explosions, this explosion did not appear to be set by a suicide bomber.
ref: Tidak seperti letupan sebelum ini, letupan ini tidak kelihatan seperti dipasang oleh pengebom berani mati.

src: A witness near where the car bomb exploded said that a man had parked a blue truck, and left it a quarter of an hour before it exploded.
ref: Seorang saksi yang berhampiran tempat bom kereta meletup berkata bahawa seorang lelaki telah meletakkan sebuah trak biru, dan meninggalkannya satu suku jam sebelum ia meletup.

src: Royal Mail workers have voted 3:1 in favour of a nationwide postal strike in the United Kingdom.
ref: Pekerja Royal Mail telah mengundi 3:1 memihak kepada mogok pos di seluruh negara di United Kingdom.

src: The Communication Workers' Union (CWU), that represents employees of the postal service balloted members on nationwide strike action, following a series of regional strikes over the past 3 weeks.
ref: Kesatuan Komunikasi Pekerja (CWU), yang mewakili pekerja perkhidmatan pos telah mengundi ahli ke atas tindakan mogok di seluruh negara, berikutan satu siri mogok kawasan sepanjang 3 minggu yang lalu.

src: The Taliban claimed responsibility for the blast, saying their target was the embassy.
ref: Taliban mengaku bertanggungjawab terhadap letupan itu, berkata sasaran mereka adalah kedutaan.

src: Eyewitnesses reports said that the the blast was very powerful, shattering shop windows, filling the air with dust and scattering debris all along the road.
ref: Laporan saksi berkata bahawa letupan itu sangat kuat, memecahkan tingkap kedai, mengisi udara dengan habuk dan serpihan berselerak di sepanjang jalan.

src: General Sayed Abdul Ghafar Sahibzada, the Kabul police chief, said the suicide bomber exploded his vehicle in the center of the capital.
ref: Jeneral Sayed Abdul Ghafar Sahibzada, ketua polis Kabul, berkata pengebom berani mati itu telah meletupkan kenderaannya di tengah-tengah ibu negara.

src: Thursday's blast comes one day after the eighth anniversary of the U.S.-led invasion into Afghanistan to topple the Taliban government.
ref: Letupan hari Khamis terjadi sehari selepas ulang tahun kelapan pencerobohan yang diketuai U.S. ke dalam Afghanistan untuk menggulingkan kerajaan Taliban.

src: Last year, a similar attack by a Taliban suicide car bomber killed about 60 people near the Indian embassy.
ref: Tahun lalu, serangan yang sama oleh pengebom kereta bunuh diri Taliban yang telah membunuh kira-kira 60 orang berdekatan dengan Kedutaan India.

src: It was the deadliest assault in the capital since 2001.
ref: Ia adalah serangan paling dahsyat di ibu negara sejak 2001.

src: The committee also asked that Bosnia and Herzegovina and Albania be included in the visa liberalisation process, although neither has met EU-determined benchmarks yet.
ref: Suruhanjaya itu juga meminta untuk Bosnia dan Herzegovina dan Albania dimasukkan dalam pembebasan proses visa, walaupun masih belum memenuhi kriteria yang ditetapkan EU.

src: European Parliament members also want to initiate visa liberalisation dialogues with Kosovo and establish a roadmap for visa-free travel.
ref: Ahli Parlimen Eropah juga mahu memulakan dialog pembebasan visa dengan Kosovo dan membina pelan tindakan untuk perjalanan bebas visa.

src: Serbia, Macedonia, and Montenegro currently appear to have strong support within the Parliament for implementing the proposal.
ref: Serbia, Macedonia, dan Montenegro kini kelihatan memiliki sokongan kuat dari dalam Parlimen untuk melaksanakan cadangan tersebut.

src: “I am convinced that what we are trying to do now with Bosnia-Herzegovina and Albania will not slow down the other three countries.
ref: "Saya yakin yang apa yang kita cuba lakukan kini dengan Bosnia-Herzegovina dan Albania tidak akan memperlahankan tiga negara lain itu.

src: This was a political decision by all the member-states of the European community and that will not change,” said Tanja Fajon, the European Parliament Rapporteur on Visa Liberalization.
ref: Ini adalah keputusan politik oleh semua negara ahli komuniti Eropah yang tidak akan berubah," kata Tanja Fajon, pelapor Parlimen Eropah untuk Pembebasan Visa.

src: Two people have been killed and tens more wounded after the powerful Typhoon Melor struck the Japanese island of Honshu on Thursday.
ref: Dua orang terbunuh dan ramai lagi cedera selepas Taufan Melor yang kuat melanda kepulauan Honshu Jepun pada hari Khamis.

src: Melor is the first tropical cyclone to strike Japan in two years.
ref: Melor adalah siklon tropika pertama yang menyerang Jepun dalam dua tahun.

src: Some train services and airplane flights had to be cancelled due to inclement weather.
ref: Sesetengah perkhidmatan kereta api dan penerbangan kapal terbang terpaksa dibatalkan kerana cuaca teruk.

src: Both confirmed casualties from the storm were hit by debris by trees uprooted by heavy winds.
ref: Kedua-dua mangsa disahkan daripada ribut dilanda serpihan oleh pokok-pokok yang tumbang oleh angin kuat.

src: It is expected to move off the country's eastern coast by nightfall on Thursday.
ref: Ia dijangka akan bergerak di luar pantai timur negara itu sebelum matahari terbenam pada hari Khamis.

src: One eyewitness told the Voice of America news agency he was sitting in his shop when a big explosion shook the area Friday morning, sending dust in the air and causing objects to fall from the walls.
ref: Seorang saksi memberitahu agensi berita Suara Amerika yang dia sedang duduk didalam kedainya apabila letupan besar menggegarkan kawasan tersebut Jummat pagi, menghantar habuk keudara dan mengakibatkan barangan jatuh dari dinding.

src: Aid agencies and Indian government officials have warned that there may be food shortages in the country, following severe floods that affected southern states.
ref: Pegawai agensi pertolongan dan kerajaan India telah memberi amaran bahawa kemungkinan berlaku kekurangan makanan di negara itu, berikutan banjir besar yang menimpa negeri-negeri di selatan.

src: They said that agricultural production is likely to drop dramatically due to flooding of farmland and crops.
ref: Mereka berkata bahawa pengeluaran pertanian menunjukkan kejatuhan drastik akibat banjir di ladang dan tanaman.

src: The waters are said to have ruined large quantities of grain stocks as well.
ref: Air dikatakan telah turut merosakkan sebilangan besar stok gandum.

src: Jayakumar Christian, director of World Vision India, an aid agency working in the region, said that "floods and drought have set back India's fight against poverty by years."
ref: Jayakumar Christian, pengarah World Vision India, salah seorang agensi pertolongan yang bertugas di kawasan tersebut, berkata bahawa "banjir dan kemarau telah membantutkan usaha India menangani kemiskinan selama bertahun-tahun".

src: Heavy flooding last week, mainly in Andhra Pradesh and neighbouring Karnataka, has killed about three hundred people and forced the evacuation of over a milion.
ref: Banjir besar pada minggu lepas, terutamanya di Andhra Pradesh dan kejiranan Karnataka, telah membunuh lebih kurang tiga ratus orang dan memaksa pemindahan lebih jutaan orang.

src: Nearly 3,000 people demonstrated in Saint Petersburg, Russia on Saturday to oppose a proposition to construct a skyscraper in the city.
ref: Hampir 3,000 orang menunjuk perasaan di Saint Petersburg, Rusia pada hari Sabtu untuk menentang cadangan membina bangunan pencakar langit di bandar itu.

src: The demonstrators were protesting against the Okhta Center, a proposed supertall 77-story skyscraper for the gas company Gazprom measuring 400 metres (1,300 feet).
ref: Penunjuk perasaan membuat bantahan menentangi Pusat Okhta, cadangan pencakar langit 77 tingkat yang sangat tinggi untuk syarikat gas Gazprom berukuran 400 meter (1,300 kaki).

src: Galina Safronova, 55, said that "this action will destroy my city, the city where I grew up, and the city that I want to save for my grandchildren," as quoted by the Associated Press news agency.
ref: Galina Safronova, 55, berkata bahawa "tindakan ini akan memusnahkan bandar saya, bandar di mana saya membesar, dan bandar yang saya mahu simpan untuk cucu saya," seperti yang dipetik oleh agensi berita Associated Press.

src: UNESCO, the cultural body of the United Nations, warned that the skyscraper, if built, may endanger St Petersburg's world heritage site status.
ref: UNESCO, badan kebudayaan Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, memberi amaran bahawa pencakar langit itu, jika dibina, boleh membahayakan status tapak warisan dunia St Petersburg.

src: Gabon's constitutional court has upheld Ali Ben Bongo's win in the August presidential election.
ref: Mahkamah perlembagaan Gabon telah mengekalkan kemenangan Ali Ben Bongo dalam pilihan raya presiden pada bulan Ogos.

src: After recounting results from more than 2,800 polling stations, Gabon's constitutional court confirmed the election of the son of the country's long-time leader Omar Bongo.
ref: Selepas pengiraan semula daripada lebih 2,800 tempat mengundi, mahkamah perlembagaan Gabon mengesahkan pemilihan anak kepada pemimpin lama di negara ini Omar Bongo.

src: Announcing the results on state television, constitutional court president Marie Madeleine Mborantsuo reaffirmed Ali Ben Bongo's win with nearly 42 percent of the vote.
ref: Mengumumkan keputusan itu di rangkaian televisyen negara, presiden mahkamah perlembagaan Marie Madeleine Mborantsuo mengesahkan kemenangan Ali Ben Bongo dengan peratusan undi hampir 42 peratus.

src: But the recount changed their order, with Mamboundou now finishing slightly ahead of Obame.
ref: Tetapi pengiraan semula mengubah kedudukan mereka, dengan Mamboundou sekarang berakhir sedikit ke hadapan berbanding Obame.

src: Mborantsou said that the court annulled results from one polling station.
ref: Mborantsou berkata mahkamah membatalkan keputusan dari satu tempat mengundi.

src: The ruling rejects an electoral challenge by Obame, Mamboundou and other opposition candidates who accused electoral officials of massive vote fraud to benefit Bongo.
ref: Keputusan ini menolak cabaran pilihan raya oleh Obame, Mambundou dan calon-calon pembangkang yang lain yang menuduh pegawai-pegawai pilihan raya berkait dengan penipuan undi besar-besaran untuk memberi manfaat kepada Bongo.

src: He says fraudulent results are a humiliation for the massive numbers of people who voted for change.
ref: Beliau berkata keputusan yang ditipu adalah satu penghinaan kepada ramai orang yang mengundi untuk perubahan.

src: Bongo was considered the front-runner in the election since his father's death in June, after 42 years in power.
ref: Bongo dianggap pendahulu di dalam pilihan raya sejak kematian bapanya pada bulan Jun, selepas 42 tahun berkuasa.

src: When Bongo was first announced the winner following August's vote, police dispersed opposition demonstrators in the capital with tear gas.
ref: Apabila Bongo pertama kali diumumkan pemenang daripada undi Ogos, polis menyuraikan penunjuk perasaan pembangkang di ibu negara dengan gas pemedih mata.

src: Protesters in the city of Port Gentil burned the French Consulate and attacked offices of French and U.S. oil firms.
ref: Penunjuk perasaan di bandar Port Gentil membakar Konsulat Perancis dan menyerang pejabat-pejabat syarikat minyak Perancis dan Amerika Syarikat.

src: Interim President Rose Francine Rogombe says an investigation is under way to determine who is responsible for that violence.
ref: Presiden sementara Rose Francine Rogombe berkata siasatan sedang dijalankan untuk mengenal pasti siapa yang bertanggungjawab untuk keganasan itu.

src: American singer and actor Al Martino died yesterday, aged 82.
ref: Penyanyi dan pelakon Amerika Al Martino mati semalam, umurnya 82 tahun.

src: One of the ways in which he was best known was for his first single, "Here in My Heart", which became the first ever number 1 single in the UK Singles Chart on November 14, 1952.
ref: Satu caranya dimana dia dikenali ialah menerusi lagu pertamanya, "Here in My Heart", dimana ia menjadi single yang pertama nombor satu di carta single UK pada November 14, 1952.

src: More recently, Martino was known was for his character Johnny Fontane in the 1972 film The Godfather.
ref: Baru-baru ini, Martino dikenali untuk wataknya Johnny Fontane di dalam filem tahun 1972 The Godfather.

src: He reprised the role in the sequel films The Godfather II and The Godfather III.
ref: Dia kembali dengan watak itu di sekuel filem The Godfather II dan The Godfather III.

src: Martino died at his childhood hometown of Philadelphia, following an active 58 years in the music business.
ref: Martino mati di kampung halaman masa kecilnya di Philadelphia, setelah 58 tahun aktif di dalam bisnes muzik.

src: The latest attack occurred late on Thursday at a government residential area in Peshawar.
ref: Serangan terbaru berlaku lewat pada hari Khamis di kawasan perumahan kerajaan di Peshawar.

src: Officials said they suspect Taliban militants for being responsible for the attacks.
ref: Pegawai berkata, mereka mengesyaki militan Taliban bertanggungjawab terhadap serangan itu.

src: Soon after the assault on the FIA began, gunmen targeted two police training centers on the outskirts of Lahore.
ref: Tidak lama selepas serangan ke atas FIA bermula, lelaki bersenjata mensasarkan dua pusat latihan polis di pinggir Lahore.

src: In the suburb of Manawa, gunmen targeted a center that militants attacked earlier this year.
ref: Di luar bandar Manawa, lelaki bersenjata mensasarkan pusat yang diserang militan awal tahun ini.

src: It took several hours before security forces were able to gain control of all the sites.
ref: Ia mengambil masa beberapa jam sebelum pasukan keselamatan dapat mengawal semua kawasan itu.

src: Speaking to local media, Pakistani Interior Minister Rehman Malik said intelligence agencies had expected attacks on security sites in the country and that authorities will remain on high-alert.
ref: Bercakap kepada media tempatan, Menteri Dalam Negeri Pakistan Rehman Malik berkata agensi perisikan menjangkakan serangan ke atas kawasan keselamatan di negara ini dan pihak berkuasa akan sentiasa berwaspada.

src: He said the recent violence shows the militants want to bring the frontlines from Pakistan's violent northwest to Punjab province.
ref: Dia berkata keganasan baru-baru ini menunjukkan militan mahu membawa barisan hadapan dari barat laut ganas Pakistan ke wilayah Punjab.

src: The military is expected to launch a full-scale assault on Taliban militants in the region bordering Afghanistan.
ref: Tentera dijangka melancarkan serangan besar-besaran ke atas militan Taliban di kawasan bersempadan dengan Afghanistan.

src: Initial results gave Afghan President Hamid Karzai more than the 50% of votes necessary to re-elect him in the country's recent presidential elections.
ref: Keputusan awal memberikan Presiden Afghanistan Hamid Karzai lebih daripada 50% undi yang perlu untuk melantik beliau semula dalam pilihan raya presiden baru-baru ini di negara itu.

src: As the ECC reports to the Independent Election Commission (IEC) no official announcement has been made yet, although by law the IEC is obliged to accept the EEC findings; however foreign diplomats have suggested that the IEC may not accept the findings.
ref: Semasa ECC melaporkan kepada Suruhanjaya Pilihan Raya Bebas (IEC) masih tiada pengumuman rasmi telah dibuat, walaupun berlandaskan undang-undang IEC bertanggungjawab untuk menerima dapatan EEC; diplomat asing bagaimanapun telah mencadangkan bahawa IEC mungkin tidak akan menerima dapatan tersebut.

src: President Karzai has refused to accept the investigation's findings, which reduce his share of the vote from around 55% to under 50%, leading to what Mohammad Moin Marastyal, one of the campaign team members, describes as "deadlock".
ref: Presiden Karzai enggan menerima hasil siasatan itu, yang mengurangkan bahagian undinya daripada sekitar 55% ke angka di bawah 50%, yang membawa kepada penjelasan "kebuntuan," apa yang digambarkan oleh Mohammad Moin Marastyal, salah satu ahli pasukan kempen.

src: Marastyal claims that the EEC deliberately altered the facts to force a runoff.
ref: Marastyal mendakwa bahawa EEC sengaja mengubah fakta itu untuk memaksa pilihan raya penentu.

src: Gabon's new president Ali Ben Bongo has named his first government, after winning the country's recent presidential elections.
ref: Presiden baru Gabon, Ali Ben Bongo telah menamakan kerajaan yang pertama, selepas memenangi pilihan raya di negara ini presiden baru-baru ini.

src: Bongo has kept interim Prime Minister Paul Mba, who has served in the post since July when his predecessor stepped down to run against Bongo.
ref: Bongo telah menyimpan Perdana Menteri interim Paul Mba, yang telah berkhidmat dalam jawatan itu sejak Julai apabila pemimpin terdahulu meletakkan jawatan untuk menentang Bongo.

src: Angelique Ngoma was moved from her position as minister of families to the defense minister — the first time that a woman has held that post in Gabon.
ref: Angelique Ngoma dipindahkan dari kedudukannya sebagai menteri keluarga untuk Menteri Pertahanan - kali pertama seorang wanita telah memegang jawatan itu pada Gabon.

src: President Bongo was defense minister in the previous government of his father, Omar Bongo, who died in June after ruling for forty years.
ref: Presiden Bongo adalah Menteri Pertahanan dalam kerajaan sebelum ini bapanya, Omar Bongo, yang meninggal dunia pada bulan Jun selepas memerintah selama empat puluh tahun.

src: In all, a dozen members of the new government are veterans of the previous administration.
ref: Dalam semua, sedozen ahli kerajaan baru adalah veteran pentadbiran sebelumnya.

src: Prime Minister Mba said the move "is aimed primarily at efficiency".
ref: Perdana Menteri Mba berkata langkah itu "bertujuan terutamanya pada kecekapan".

src: Francois Engongah Owono is the secretary general of the presidency.
ref: Francois Engongah Owono adalah Setiausaha Agung jawatan presiden.

src: Owono said that the new, smaller government will be more efficient and includes people determined to get everyone in Gabon working together for a better country.
ref: Owono berkata baru, kerajaan yang lebih kecil akan menjadi lebih cekap dan termasuk orang telah dipilih untuk mendapatkan semua orang di Gabon bekerja bersama-sama untuk negara yang lebih baik.

src: Opposition candidates filed suit to overturn the results, accusing electoral officials of vote fraud to benefit the ruling party.
ref: Calon-calon pembangkang memfailkan saman untuk membatalkan keputusan, menuduh pegawai-pegawai pilihan raya menipu undi untuk memberi manfaat kepada parti pemerintah.

src: Gabon's constitutional court recounted returns from more than 2,800 polling stations and confirmed Bongo's win.
ref: Mahkamah perlembagaan Gabon menceritakan pulangan daripada lebih 2,800 pusat mengundi dan mengesahkan kemenangan Bongo ini.

src: Most election observers believe the vote was fair, despite irregularities that included security forces at polling stations, some ballot boxes not being properly sealed, and the absence of opposition representatives during some vote counting.
ref: Kebanyakan pemerhati pilihan raya percaya undi adalah adil, walaupun penyelewengan yang termasuk pasukan keselamatan di tempat mengundi, beberapa peti undi tidak betul dimeteraikan, dan jika tiada wakil pembangkang dalam beberapa pengiraan undi.

src: Bongo has promised to improve health, education, and housing in Gabon and more equitably distribute oil revenue.
ref: Bongo telah berjanji untuk meningkatkan kesihatan, pendidikan dan perumahan di Gabon dan lebih saksama mengedarkan hasil minyak.

src: Under his father, Gabon became the world's sixth-largest oil exporter, but 70% of the population still live in poverty.
ref: Di bawah bapanya, Gabon menjadi pengeksport minyak keenam terbesar di dunia, tetapi 70% daripada penduduk masih hidup dalam kemiskinan.

src: European Union (EU) Agriculture Commissioner Mariann Fischer Boel pledged €280 (US$418) million in aid to dairy farmers Monday, after weeks of protests.
ref: Pesuruhjaya Pertanian Kesatuan Eropah (EU) Mariann Fischer Boel berikrar memberi bantuan kewangan sebanyak €280 (AS$418) juta untuk membantu para petani tenusu pada hari Isnin, selepas bantahan berminggu-minggu.

src: A recent demonstration in Belgium saw farmers dump three million litres (660,000 gallons) of milk on fields — and requests from 21 EU member states for emergency aid.
ref: Satu demonstrasi baru-baru ini di Belgium menyaksikan para petani membuang tiga juta liter (660,000 gelen) susu di ladang-ladang - dan permintaan daripada 21 negara anggota Kesatuan Eropah untuk bantuan kecemasan.

src: This is in addition to the announcement in September that the EU would modify rules to allow temporary state aid payments; each farmer could receive a maximum of €15,000.
ref: Ini adalah tambahan kepada pengumuman pada bulan September bahawa Kesatuan Eropah akan mengubah peraturan-peraturan untuk membolehkan pembayaran bantuan kerajaan sementara; setiap petani akan menerima maximum sebanyak €15,000.

src: Last November, EU agriculture ministers planned to abolish milk quotas completely by 2015.
ref: November lalu, menteri-menteri pertanian Kesatuan Eropah bercadang memansuhkan sepenuhnya kuota susu pada tahun 2015.

src: Afghan President Hamid Karzai agreed yesterday to a runoff vote with former Foreign Minister Abdullah Abdullah on November 7, after much international pressure, following a report on voting irregularities.
ref: Presiden Afghanistan Hamid Karzai bersetuju semalam untuk pemilihan penentu dengan bekas Menteri Luar Abdullah Abdullah pada 7 November, selepas tekanan antarabangsa yang kuat, berikutan laporan mengenai penyelewengan pengundian.

src: President Karzai said it was "time to move forward to stability and national unity".
ref: Presiden Karzai berkata ini adalah "masa untuk bergerak ke hadapan untuk kestabilan dan perpaduan negara".

src: The French government confirmed on Wednesday that it has expelled illegal Afghan immigrants in its first joint deportation flight with the UK, in a move criticised by the opposition and human rights groups.
ref: Kerajaan Perancis mengesahkan pada hari Rabu bahawa ia telah mengusir pendatang haram Afghanistan dalam penerbangan pengusiran bersama pertamanya dengan UK, dalam satu gerakan yang dikritik oleh kumpulan pembangkang dan hak asasi manusia.

src: The deportation was widely anticipated, but the French government had refused to confirm that it would be expelling Afghan illegal immigrants until Wednesday.
ref: Pengusiran itu telah dijangkakan oleh orang ramai, tetapi kerajaan Perancis enggan mengesahkan bahawa ia akan mengusir pendatang tanpa izin Afghanistan sehingga Rabu.

src: Immigration Minister Eric Besson told Europe One radio that three Afghan men had been put on a plane that had been chartered by the British government.
ref: Menteri Imigresen Eric Besson memberitahu radio Europe One yang tiga lelaki Afghanistan telah ditempatkan di atas kapal terbang yang telah dicarter oleh kerajaan British.

src: The plane was also carrying illegal Afghan immigrants living in Britain.
ref: Pesawat itu juga membawa pendatang tanpa izin Afghanistan yang tinggal di Britain.

src: Besson said a fourth Afghan had been slated to be expelled as well, but was held back at the last minute.
ref: Besson kata orang Afghanistan yang keempat telah dijadualkan akan diusir juga, tetapi telah ditangguhkan pada saat-saat terakhir.

src: He said those expelled had lost their appeals against deportation, including one before the European Court of Human Rights.
ref: Beliau berkata mereka yang diusir telah kalah rayuan mereka terhadap pengusiran, termasuk satu di Mahkamah Hak Asasi Manusia Eropah.

src: He said that he will not rule out future deportation flights with Britain.
ref: Katanya, beliau tidak menolak kemungkinan penerbangan pengusiran pada masa depan dengan Britain.

src: The expulsions have sparked widespread outcry on the part of human rights groups and opposition politicians, including Paris Mayor Bertrand Delanoe.
ref: Pengusiran itu telah mencetuskan bantahan meluas di pihak kumpulan hak asasi manusia dan ahli politik pembangkang, termasuk Datuk Bandar Paris Bertrand Delanoe.

src: The French government, however, has argued that it is only trying to crack down on human smuggling rings and that illegal immigrants are given every legal recourse to remain in France.
ref: Kerajaan Perancis, bagaimanapun, telah berhujah habis-habisan bahawa ia hanya cuba melumpuhkan rangkaian penyeludupan manusia dan bahawa pendatang tanpa izin diberi setiap alternatif untuk kekal di Perancis.

src: Immigration Minister Besson defended the decision, saying that "if France never sends people back, it becomes the target for people traffickers."
ref: Menteri Imigresen Besson mempertahankan keputusan itu dengan berkata "jika Perancis tidak menghantar orang kembali, ia menjadi sasaran pemerdagangan manusia".

src: He was a member of the Royal Military Police, and was killed while on foot patrol in the Helmand province, close to the Gereshk district in Southern Afghanistan.
ref: Dia merupakan ahli Tentera Polis Diraja, dan terbunuh ketika membuat rondaan di wilayah Helmand, dekat dengan daerah Gereshk di Selatan Afghanistan.

src: The cause of death has been reported to be an explosion, but the source is unclear.
ref: Punca kematian telah dilaporkan akibat satu letupan, tetapi sumber tidak jelas.

src: It is my sad duty to confirm the death of a soldier, a Royal Military Policeman, in an explosion earlier today in Helmand Province, Lieutenant Colonel David Wakefield said of the incident.
ref: Adalah menjadi kewajipan sedih saya untuk mengesahkan kematian seorang askar, seorang Tentera Polis Diraja, dalam letupan awal hari ini di wilayah Helmand, Leftenan Kolonel David Wakefield berkata mengenai kejadian.

src: The majority of the 1,986 murders this year remain unsolved, and most involve drug gang members who have come from elsewhere to fight for control of the drug smuggling route into neighbouring El Paso, Texas, as well as the lucrative local trade in drugs.
ref: Majoriti daripada 1,986 pembunuhan pada tahun ini masih belum diselesaikan, dan kebanyakannya melibatkan ahli kumpulan dadah yang datang dari tempat lain untuk berlawan bagi menguasai laluan penyeludupan dadah kepada seberang El paso, Texas, serta keuntungan menjual dadah tempatan.

src: There is a jump of 815 murders from last year.
ref: Terdapat lompatan dari 815 pembunuhan tahun lepas.

src: However, this has failed to prevent the gangs battling to control the cocaine-smuggling trade run from the city.
ref: Bagaimanapun, ini telah gagal menghalang kumpulan itu untuk bergaduh menguasai laluan penyeludupan kokain daripada bandar ini.

src: US president Barack Obama declared a swine flu emergency in the country on Saturday, according to a statement released by the White House.
ref: Presiden US Barack Obama mengisytiharkan kecemasan selsema babi di negara itu pada Sabtu, menurut kepada kenyataan yang dibuat oleh White House.

src: Obama signed a declaration late on Friday, authorising health secretary Kathleen Sebelius to bypass some federal rules, in order to let health officials respond more efficiently to the outbreak of the H1N1 virus.
ref: Obama menandatangani pengisytiharan itu pada lewat Jumaat, setiausaha kesihatan yang bertanggungjawab Kathleen Sebelius untuk memintas beberapa undang-undang persekutuan, untuk membenarkan pegawai-pegawai kesihatan untuk bertindak dengan lebih efisien terhadap wabak virus H1N1.

src: The move is aimed at making it less difficult for people affected by the virus to seek treatment, and allow medical providers to give it immediately, bypassing potential hurdles such as health privacy regulations.
ref: Tindakan itu bertujuan untuk mengurangkan kesusahan orang yang telah dijangkiti virus untuk mendapatkan rawatan, dan membenarkan pembekal kesihatan untuk memberi dengan pantas, memintas halangan-halangan yang berpotensi seperti peraturan-peraturan privasi kesihatan.

src: Production of antiviral vaccines has been slower than initially predicted, and it is likely that the US government's targets for delivery won't be met by drug makers, according to Thomas Frieden, the director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
ref: Produksi vaksin antiviral telah mula perlahan dari jangkaan awal, dan dilihat bahawa matlamat penghantaran kerajaan US oleh pembuat ubat tidak dapat dicapai, mengikut kepada Thomas Frieden, pengarah Pusat Kawalan dan Pecegahan Penyakit.

src: Pakistani armed forces say they have captured the town of Kotkai on Saturday, the hometown of Taliban Chief Hakimullah Mehsud and one of his top officers, Qari Hussain.
ref: Angkatan tentera Pakistan berkata, mereka telah menangkap bandar Kotkai pada hari Sabtu, kampung halaman Taliban Ketua Hakimullah Mehsud dan salah seorang daripada pegawai atasan beliau, Qari Hussain.

src: The operation began the previous Saturday when Pakistani forces approached from three separate areas of South Waziristan.
ref: Operasi itu bermula hari Sabtu sebelumnya apabila tentera Pakistan didekati dari tiga kawasan berasingan di Selatan Waziristan.

src: Pakistan plans to trap Taliban within the area while approaching the towns of Makeen and Ladha, both of which are major Taliban strongholds.
ref: Pakistan merancang untuk memerangkap Taliban dalam kawasan sambil mengadap ke arah bandar-bandar Makeen dan Ladha, kedua-duanya adalah kubu kuat utama Taliban.

src: Major General Athar Abbas, the chief spokesman for the military, said at a news briefing that "we have complete control of Kotkai, a stronghold of the terrorists, where most of the houses had been converted into strong bunkers."
ref: Mejar Jeneral Athar Abbas, ketua jurucakap kepada tentera, berkata pada taklimat berita bahawa "kita mempunyai kawalan penuh terhadap Kotkai, kubu kuat pengganas, di mana kebanyakan rumah telah ditukar menjadi kubu kuat".

src: So far, Pakistani officials have reported that 163 militants have been killed, while the military sustained 23 casualties.
ref: Setakat ini, pegawai Pakistan telah melaporkan bahawa 163 militan terbunuh, manakala 23 tenteranya mengalami kemalangan jiwa.

src: The entire area has been closed off, but there have been recent acts of violence which have officials worried.
ref: Seluruh kawasan telah ditutup, tetapi baru-baru ini terdapat perbuatan keganasan yang menyebabkan pegawai-pegawai bimbang.

src: There have also been five attacks on an Islamic university in Islamabad, the capital.
ref: Terdapat juga lima serangan ke atas sebuah universiti Islam di Islamabad, ibu negara.

src: It has been reported that over 21,000 civilian families, an estimated 153,000 individuals, have fled South Waziristan, and have taken refuge in the North-West Frontier Province.
ref: Ia telah dilaporkan bahawa lebih 21,000 keluarga orang awam, kira-kira 153,000 individu, telah melarikan diri ke Selatan Waziristan, dan telah mengambil perlindungan di North-West Frontier Province.

src: Academy Award-winning film director Paul Haggis declared to Scientology spokesman Tommy Davis that he had decided to leave the Church of Scientology after being a member for 35 years.
ref: Pengarah filem pemenang anugerah Academy Paul Haggis mengumumkan kepada jurucakap Saintologi Tommy Davis yang dia telah memutuskan untuk meniggalkan Gereja Saintologi setelah menjadi ahli untuk 35 tahun.

src: His letter to Davis was posted Saturday on the blog of former high-ranking Scientology official Marty Rathbun.
ref: Suratnya kepada Davis diterbitkan Sabtu dalam blog bekas pegawai berpangkat tinggi Saintologi Marty Rathbun.

src: In his letter to Davis, Haggis wrote that he read the series in the St. Petersburg Times, where these former Scientology officials accused David Miscavige of physically abusing Scientologists.
ref: Dalam suratnya kepada Davis, Haggis menulis yang dia membaca siri didalam St. Petersburg Times, dimana bekas pegawai Saintologi menuduh David Miscavige mendera ahli-ahli Saintologi secara fizikal.

src: Haggis had not been known to be a vocal public supporter of Scientology prior to his declaration to Davis that he was leaving the organization.
ref: Haggis tidak diketahui sebagai penyokong awam bersuara Saintologi sebelum dia mengumumkan kepada Davis yang dia akan meninggalkan organisasi tersebut.

src: He expressed his disappointment to Davis, son of actress Anne Archer, that the San Diego, California branch of the Church of Scientology supported Proposition 8.
ref: Dia meluahkan kekecewaannya kepada Davis, anak lelaki kepada pelakon Anne Archer, bahawa Gereja Saintologi cawangan San Diego, California itu menyokong Keterangan 8.

src: Haggis said that Davis initially told him he would do something about the San Diego Church of Scientology's support for Proposition 8, but in the end Davis did not take action about this.
ref: Haggis memberitahu yang Davis pada mulanya akan membuat sesuatu mengenai Gereja Saintologi San Diego menyokong Keterangan 8, tetapi pada akhirnya Davis tidak mengambil tindakan mengenai ini.

src: Haggis called the inaction by Davis with regard to the San Diego Church of Scientology's stance on homosexuality "cowardly".
ref: Haggis menggelar sikap tiada tindakan oleh David berkenaan pendirian Gereja Saintologi San Diego tentang homoseksual sebagai "penakut."

src: Actress Deborah Rennard, wife of Haggis, was introduced to Scientology by her parents.
ref: Pelakon Deborah Rennard, isteri kepada Haggis, diperkenalkan kepada Saintologi oleh ibu bapanya.

src: According to Haggis, the Scientology practice of "disconnection" was imposed on Rennard and her husband, and they were ordered to disconnect from her parents because Rennard's parents had violated a rule of the organization.
ref: Menurut Haggis, amalan "putus hubungan" Saintologi dikenakan keatas Rennard dan suaminya, dan mereka diarahkan untuk memutuskan hubungan dari ibu bapanya kerana ibu bapa Rennard telah melanggar peraturan organisasi tersebut.

src: He concluded his letter to Davis by noting that his Scientologist friends might disassociate from him due to his words, writing, "...I am fully aware that some of my friends may choose to no longer associate with me, or in some cases work with me."
ref: Dia menyimpulkan suratnya kepada Davis dengan mencatatkan yang rakan Saintologinya mungkin menjauhkan diri darinya kerana kata-katanya, menulis, "...saya sedar sepenuhnya yang beberapa kawan saya mungkin memilih untuk tidak lagi berhubung dengan saya, atau dalam sesetengah kes bekerja dengan saya."

src: I will always take their calls, as I always took yours.
ref: Saya akan terus menjawab panggilan mereka, seperti saya selalu menjawab panggilan awak.

src: I am only ashamed that I waited this many months to act.
ref: Saya hanyalah malu yang saya menanti berbulan-bulan untuk bertindak.

src: "I hereby resign my membership in the Church of Scientology."
ref: "Saya dengan ini menarik keluar keahlian saya dalam Gereja Saintologi."

src: Roger Friedman of The Hollywood Reporter described the film director's decision to leave the Church of Scientology as "a stunning move".
ref: Roger Friedman dari The Hollywood Reporter menggambarkan keputusan pengarah filem tersebuut untuk meninggalkan Gereja Saintologi sebagai "tindakan menakjubkan."

src: Friedman wrote that "Haggis has taken an enormous step here, and one that should resonate among all celebrity Scientologists."
ref: Friedman menulis yang "Haggis telah mengambil langkah besar disini, dan satu langkah yang patut bergema dikalangan semua selebriti Saintologi."

src: Writing for Movieline, Kyle Buchanan characterized the letter by Haggis as "a candid, confrontational letter to Scientology top brass", and said "It's a must-read."
ref: Menulis untuk Movieline, Kyle Buchanan mencirikan surat oleh Haggis itu sebagai "surat tidak dijangka, konfrontasi kepada pegawai tinggi Saintologi," dan berkata "Ia mesti dibaca."

src: Radar Online observed "In a shock heard-round-the-Scientology world, Paul Haggis has very publicly quit the organization."
ref: Radar Online meninjau "Dalam kejutan kedengaran-mengelilingi-dunia Saintologi, Paul Haggos telah dengan terbukanya berhenti dari organisasi tersebut."

src: Foster Kamer wrote for Gawker that the letter by Haggis was "incredibly damning" to Scientology, and Adam McDowell of National Post called it "a scathing letter about church policy".
ref: Foster Kamer menulis untuk Gawker yang surat oleh Haggis adalah "sangat terkutuk" kepada Saintologi, dan Adam McDowell dari National Post memanggilnya "surat pedas tentang polisi gereja."

src: According to The Guardian, the Church of Scientology has not yet responded publicly to the statements made by Haggis in his letter to Davis.
ref: Menurut The Guardian, Gereja Saintologi masih belum lagi menjawab secara terbuka kepada kenyataan yang dibuat oleh Haggis dalam suratnya kepada Davis.

src: Haggis has multiple credits in film, including work as writer-director for Crash, and writer for Million Dollar Baby (directed by Clint Eastwood), Casino Royale, Quantum of Solace, and Letters From Iwo Jima.
ref: Haggis mempunyai banyak kredit dalam filem, termasuk kerja sebagai penulis-pengarah untuk Crash, dan penulis untuk Million Dollar Baby (diarahkan oleh Clint Eastwood), Casino Royale, Quantum of Solace, dan Letters From Iwo Jima.

src: Beghe previously went public with his own criticism after leaving the Church of Scientology, and described how members must pay large amounts of money to advance in Scientology levels.
ref: Beghe sebelum ini mengkritik dengan terbuka selepas meninggalkan Gereja Saintologi, dan menerangkan yang ahli perlu membayar jumlah besar wang untuk maju tahap dalam Saintologi.

src: Militants in Afghanistan have killed at least six foreign United Nations workers; three Afghans, and a US citizen, during an attack on an international guest-house in the capital Kabul on Wednesday.
ref: Militan di Afghanistan telah membunuh sekurang-kurangnya enam warga asing Pertubuhan Bangsa-pekerja; tiga Afghanistan, dan seorang warganegara Amerika Syarikat, semasa serangan ke atas seorang tetamu-rumah antarabangsa di Kabul semalam.

src: Local officials said three gunmen wearing suicide vests, disguised as police, stormed the compound around dawn that morning.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai tempatan berkata, tiga lelaki bersenjata memakai jaket bunuh diri, menyamar sebagai polis, menyerbu kawasan sekitar subuh pagi itu.

src: At least two Afghan security guards and a civilian died in the assault.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya dua pengawal keselamatan Afghanistan dan seorang orang awam mati dalam serangan itu.

src: A Taliban spokesman later took credit for the attack, calling it a "first step" to disrupt the planned November 7 presidential run-off election.
ref: Jurucakap Taliban kemudian mengambil melancarkan serangan tersebut, yang disifatkan sebagai "langkah pertama" untuk mengganggu pilihan raya November 7 presiden larian yang dirancang.

src: The group called for a boycott of the polls, and threatened violence against anyone who would vote.
ref: Kumpulan itu menggesa supaya memboikot pilihan raya, dan mengancam keganasan terhadap sesiapa sahaja yang akan mengundi.

src: "This has clearly been a very serious incident for us."
ref: "Ini jelas merupakan satu kejadian yang sangat serius bagi kami".

src: "We've not had an incident like this in the past," he said.
ref: "Kami tidak mempunyai satu insiden seperti ini pada masa lalu," katanya.

src: The US embassy released a statement saying that attacking civilian workers will not lessen US support for the Afghan people and their election process.
ref: Kedutaan Amerika mengeluarkan kenyataan yang mengatakan bahawa menyerang pekerja awam tidak akan mengurangkan sokongan AS untuk rakyat Afghanistan dan proses pilihan raya mereka.

src: The assault came a day after a series of bomb blasts in southern Afghanistan killed eight Americans, making October the deadliest month for US troops in the ongoing eight year war.
ref: Serangan itu datang sehari selepas beberapa siri letupan bom di selatan Afghanistan membunuh lapan rakyat Amerika, membuat Oktober bulan paling dahsyat bagi tentera AS yang berterusan perang selama lapan tahun.

src: Denmark supported the U.S.-led war on Iraq and fears of an attack are rising.
ref: Denmark menyokong perang yang diketuai Amerika Syarikat ke atas Iraq dan kebimbangan tentang serangan semakin meningkat.

src: "There are people out there that want to harm us."
ref: "Ada orang di luar di sana yang ingin mengancam kami."

src: "They are at war with us and it seems we're in war with them."
ref: "Mereka berada didalam perang bersama-sama kami dan seolah-olah kita sedang berperang dengan mereka."

src: The group that has claimed responsibility for the attacks on London, the "Secret Organisation Group of Al-Qaeda of Jihad Organisation", issued a statement yesterday where attacks on countries that supported the "crusades" against Iraq and Afghanistan are threatened.
ref: Kumpulan itu yang telah mengakui bertanggungjawab bagi serangan ke atas London, "Kumpulan Rahsia Pertubuhan Jihad Al-Qaeda," mengeluarkan satu kenyataan semalam di mana serangan ke atas negara-negara yang menyokong "perang salib" terhadap Iraq dan Afghanistan adalah terancam.

src: Erosion in Nigeria has lead to increasing concern on climate policy for the entire country.
ref: Hakisan di Nigeria telah membawa kepada peningkatan kebimbangan mengenai dasar iklim untuk seluruh negara tersebut.

src: Areas in Nigeria have been subject to damages caused by increasing erosion for over 50 years.
ref: Kawasan-kawasan di Nigeria telah menerima kerosakan yang disebabkan oleh peningkatan hakisan selama lebih 50 tahun.

src: This issue has grown over the past years, and responsibility has been pointed at a lack of national policy.
ref: Isu ini telah berkembang sejak beberapa tahun yang lalu, dan tanggungjawab telah ditujukan kepada kekurangan dasar negara.

src: However, locals recognize that they too contribute to the problem.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, penduduk tempatan menyedari bahawa mereka juga menyumbang kepada masalah ini.

src: "Some of the problem of erosion is created by our people, by our attitude to waste disposal."
ref: "Sebahagian daripada masalah hakisan dicipta oleh orang-orang kita, dengan sikap kita terhadap sisa buangan."

src: "When we dump garbage in the drains that are built by the government we simply aggravate the problem of erosion," said state environmental commissioner Michael Egbebike.
ref: "Apabila kita membuang sampah di dalam longkang yang dibina oleh kerajaan kita hanya memburukkan lagi masalah hakisan," kata Pesuruhjaya alam sekitar negeri Michael Egbebike.

src: "And this waste combined with the force of the flood and trying to erode the soil and sometimes they actually block the channel that has been created for flood dispersion and the floods come back and actually destroy their homes, and at that point they call on government," he added.
ref: "Dan sisa ini bercampur dengan rempuhan banjir dan cuba untuk menghakis tanah dan kadang-kadang ia menyekat saluran yang telah dicipta untuk penyerakan air banjir dan banjir kembali kemudian memusnahkan rumah-rumah mereka, dan hanya ketika itu mereka memanggil kerajaan," katanya.

src: Geological studies of the area affected most by erosion, Anambra, have concluded that the cost of implementing a project which could effectively slow erosion are estimated at US$2 billion.
ref: Kajian geologi kawasan yang paling terjejas dengan hakisan, Anambra, telah membuat kesimpulan bahawa kos pelaksanaan projek yangdengan efektif dalam memperlahankan hakisan dianggarkan sebanyak US$ 2 bilion.

src: "The state is struggling because the monies spent on this erosion problem are huge sums of money."
ref: "Negeri ini sedang mengalami kesusahan kerana wang yang dibelanjakan untuk masalah hakisan ini adalah jumlah wang yang besar."

src: "So we will of course need a lot of help from the international community and the federal government."
ref: "Oleh itu, kami sudah tentu memerlukan banyak bantuan daripada masyarakat antarabangsa dan kerajaan persekutuan."

src: "Alone it would be a Herculean task for Anambra state," commented Egbebike.
ref: "Secara sendirian ini akan menjadi satu tugas yang amat berat bagi negeri Anambra," komen Egbebike.

src: A 23-year-old pedestrian walking along Racecourse Road in the city of Londonderry, Northern Ireland at around 0220 GMT on Sunday night was struck by a black Volkswagen Passat and has been killed.
ref: Seorang pejalan kaki berusia 23 tahun berjalan sepanjang Jalan Racecourse dalam bandar Londonderry, Utara Ireland sekitar jam 0220 GMT pada ahad malam di langgar oleh Volkswagen Passat hitam dan telah terbunuh.

src: The road was closed so that investigations could be carried out but has since been reopened.
ref: Jalan itu ditutup untuk mebolehkan siasatan boleh dilakukan tetapi telah dibuka semula.
