src: The Police Service of Northern Ireland are asking any witnesses to contact them as soon as possible.
ref: Servis Polis di Utara Ireland telah menanya mana-mana saksi untuk menghubunginya secepat mungkin.

src: Also, another accident was reported which took place in Newtownhamilton, County Armagh in which two 17 year old boys were involved.
ref: Juga, kemalangan lain dilaporkan di Newtownhamilton, County Armagh dimana dua orang berusia 17 tahun juga terlibat.

src: One of them is severely ill while the other has been discharged from the hospital.
ref: Salah seorang dari mereka tealah dilaporkan sakit teruk manakala seorang lagi telah keluar dari hospital.

src: Three days after a US Navy helicopter collided with a US Coast Guard airplane off the coast of California, a search and rescue mission is ongoing for the nine crew onboard the two aircraft.
ref: Tiga hari selepas sebuah helikopter Tentera Laut AS berlanggar dengan pesawat Pengawal Perairan AS di Perairan California, misi mencari dan menyelamat berterusan untuk sembilan krew diatas kedua-dua pesawat tersebut.

src: They all had heat-retaining drysuits but it was unknown if they were wearing them at the time.
ref: Mereka semua mempunyai suit kering penyimpan-haba tetapi tidak diketahui samada mereka memakainya pada masa tersebut.

src: The accident occurred at 7:10 p.m. on Thursday in an area of military airspace that is sometimes closed to the public, although its status at the time of the accident was not known.
ref: Kemalangan itu berlaku pada 7:10 p.m. pada hari Khamis didalam kawasan ruang udara tentera yang kdangkala ditutup kepada awam, walaupun status pada masa kemalangan adalah tidak diketahui.

src: The helicopter had been in formation with two transports and another SuperCobra to practise night flying, while the Coast Guard plane was conducting search and rescue for 50-year-old boater David Jines.
ref: Helikopter tersebut adalah dalam formasi dengan dua lagi pesawat pengangkut dan sebuah lagi SuperCobra untuk latihan penerbangan malam sementara pesawat Pengawal Perairan sedang menjalankan pencarian dan penyelamat untuk kelasi beusia 50 tahun David Jines.

src: The search for Jines ends today whether he is found or not.
ref: Pnecarian untuk Jines tamat pada hari ini samada dia diketemui atau tidak.

src: Operations are currently focusing near the military's San Clemente Island, where an area of about 50 miles of floating wreckage is located.
ref: Operasi kini difokus berdekatan dengan kem Pulau San Clemente, dimana kawasan lebih kurang 50 batu dari bangkai terapung ditemui.

src: A suicide bomber has killed at least 24 people near the Pakistani army headquarters in Rawalpindi when he detonated explosives while riding on a motorbike outside a bank, several hundred metres away from army headquarters.
ref: Seorang pengebom berani mati telah membunuh sekurang-kurangnya 24 orang berhampiran ibu pejabat tentera Pakistan di Rawalpindi apabila dia meletupkan letupan sambil menunggang motorsikal diluar sebuah bank, beberapa ratus meter dari ibu pejabat tentera.

src: Many people, such as retired and serving military officials, civilians, had come to the bank to collect their salaries, were killed or wounded by the blast.
ref: Ramai orang, seperti pesara dan pegawai tentera berkhidmat, orang awam, telah datang ke bank tersebut untuk mengutip gaji mereka, telah tebunuh atau cedera oleh letupan itu.

src: Many hospitals declared emergency services and rushed to help the people out.
ref: Banyak hospital mengumumkan khidmat kecemasan dan berkejar untuk membantu mereka.

src: Soon after the bomb blast, military personnel patrolled the road and diverted all the traffic in front of the bank and Shalimar hotel beside it.
ref: Sebaik selepas bom tersebut meletup, pegawai tentera meronda jalan tersebut dan mengalihkan semua kenderaan didepan bank dan hotel Shalimar dihadapannya.

src: The bomb blast destroyed many window panes in the building and in neighbouring buildings.
ref: Letupan bom merosakkan banyak tingkap dalam bangunan tersebut dan bangunan berjiranan.

src: Raja Sajid, who was an eyewitness to the incident, helped people into the ambulances.
ref: Raja Sajid, yang merupakan saksi kejadian tersebut, membantu orang kedalam ambulans.

src: Militants carried out several retaliatory attacks last month that killed hundreds of people.
ref: Pegawai tentera melancarkan beberapa serangan balas bulan lalu yang membunuh beratus orang.

src: MSNBC translator Jacob Keryakes has stated that the claim of responsibility for the London bombings of July 7, supposedly made by a militant Islamist group, contains an error in one of the Quranic verses that it cites, suggesting that the claim may be phony.
ref: Jurualih bahasa MSNBC Jacob Keryakes telah menyatakan bahawa dakwaan tanggungjawab ke atas letupan di London pada 7 Julai lalu, yang dikatakan telah dilakukan oleh kumpulan militan Islam, mempunyai kesalahan di dalam salah satu ayat Quran yang dibacakan mereka, mencadangkan dakwaan itu adalah palsu.

src: The claim of responsibility by The Secret Organization of al-Qaida in Europe for the London attacks has also been questioned on the grounds that the rhetoric is not consistent with militant Islamic ideology.
ref: Dakwaan bertanggungjawab oleh Organisasi Rahsia al-Qaida di Eropah ke atas serangan di London itu juga diragui dengan alasan retorik itu tidak konsisten dengan ideologi militan Islam.

src: According to the Associated Press, Islamic expert Mishari al-Thaidi wrote in an essay published Saturday in the London-based Arabic Asharq Al Awsat newspaper: "What strikes attention here is addressing the Arab nation."
ref: Menurut Associated Press, pakar Islamik Mishari al-Thaidi menulis di dalam satu esei yang diterbitkan pada hari Sabtu di dalam akhbar bahasa arab Asharq Al Awsat yang berpusat di London: "Apa yang menarik perhatian di sini ialah bagaimana mereka menyampaikannya kepada bangsa Arab".

src: British mercenary Simon Mann was released from a jail in Equatorial Guinea after being pardoned for attempting to overthrow the government.
ref: Askar upahan British Simon Mann telah dibebaskan dari penjara di Equatorial Guinea selepas diampunkan atas cubaan untuk menggulingkan kerajaan.

src: Their plans were foiled, however, and Mann was arrested after arriving in Zimbabwe to purchase firearms and grenades.
ref: Pelan mereka berjaya digagalkan, namun, Mann telah ditahan selepas tiba di Zimbabwe untuk membeli senjata api dan bom tangan.

src: The conspirators had planned to install exiled opposition leader Severo Moto as president and to gain control over the country's vast oil supplies.
ref: Pakatan jahat telah membuat pelan untuk memasang ketua pembangkang yang dibuang Svevero Moto sebagai presiden dan untuk mengambil alih kuasa terhadap negara pembekal minyak yang besar.

src: The government said that the decision was made on compassionate grounds, seeing as Mann, aged 57, was reportedly not in good health.
ref: Kerajaan berkata bahawa keputusan diambil atas alasan belas kasihan, melihat Mann, berumur 57 tahun, setelah dilaporkan mengalami masalah kesihatan.

src: Amnesty was also given to four other co-conspirators, among them Nick Du Toit, from South Africa.
ref: Pengampunan juga telah diberikan kepada empat lagi pembantu konspirasi jahat, termasuk Nick Du Toit, dari Afrika Selatan.

src: The deal, which is yet to be approved by the University's Board of Governors, could result in students starting classes in the building as early as September 2006.
ref: Perjanjian, yang masih belum diluluskan oleh Lembaga Pengarah Universiti Gabenor, boleh mengakibatkan pelajar memulakan kelas dalam bangunan itu seawal September 2006.

src: The building has been a huge vacancy in the downtown core, with only the broadcasting corporation CHUM Limited using any space.
ref: Bangunan ini telah menjadi kekosongan besar dalam teras pusat bandar, dengan hanya perbadanan penyiaran CHUM Limited menggunakan mana-mana ruang.

src: University of Alberta President Indira Samarasekera has said there are no plans to ask the company, which owns 91.7 The Bounce and A-Channel to move.
ref: Presiden Universiti Alberta Indira Samarasekera telah berkata tidak ada rancangan untuk meminta syarikat itu, yang memiliki 91.7 The Bounce and A-Channel untuk berpindah.

src: The total University population is growing much faster than the number of facilities required to support it, so expanding beyond the current campus makes sense.
ref: Jumlah populasi Universiti itu semakin meningkat lebih cepat daripada bilangan kemudahan yang diperlukan untuk menyokongnya, jadi berkembang di luar kampus sekarang adalah masuk akal.

src: The University has not yet decided how the project would be funded, but is currently looking at a number of options, including partnerships with all three levels of government.
ref: Universiti itu belum lagi membuat keputusan bagaimana projek itu akan dibiayai, tetapi kini sedang mengkaji beberapa pilihan, termasuk perkongsian dengan ketiga-tiga peringkat kerajaan.

src: Residents of the suburb of Minyama, Australia have come to a compromise with restaurant chain McDonald's.
ref: Penduduk pinggir bandar Minyama, Australia telah bersetuju bertolak ansur dengan restoran rantaian McDonald's.

src: Every other day it will be open from five in the morning to eleven at night.
ref: Setiap hari lain ia akan dibuka dari lima pagi ke sebelas malam.

src: "They will all be restricted to Nicklin Way," said John Meyer-Gleaves, a spokesperson for protest group Say No To McDonald's, referring to late night customers.
ref: "Mereka akan dihadkan kepada Nicklin Way," kata John Meyer-Gleaves, jurucakap untuk kumpulan bantahan Katakan Tidak Kepada McDonald's, merujuk kepada pelanggan lewat malam.

src: In December, Sunshine Coast Regional Council knocked backed the then-proposed store with mayor Bob Abbot expressing concern about its proximity to a residential area.
ref: Pada Disember, Majlis Daerah Sunshine Coast menggagalkan kedai yang dicadangkan dengan datuk bandar Bob Abbot menyatakan kebimbangan mengenai jaraknya dengan kawasan kediaman.

src: "I'm pretty sure I'm the only councillor who already has a 24-hour McDonald's in my division, we have enough issues with that one, and this is overkill," Councillor Chris Thompson, Division 4 in the Sunshine Coast Regional Council, had said about a 24 hour seven day a week store at Minyama.
ref: "Saya yakin saya adalah satu-satunya ahli majlis yang telah mempunyai McDonald's 24 jam dikawasan saya, kami mempunyai isu yang cukup dengannya, dan ini ialah membunuh," Ahli Majlis Chris Thompson, Bahagian 4 di Majlis Daerah Sunshine Coast, telah berkata mengenai kedai 24 jam tujuh hari di Minyama.

src: The 24-hour McDonald's in Councillor Thompson's division, Mooloolaba, is part of a larger complex and does not back onto residential premises.
ref: McDonald's 24 jam di kawasan Majlis Thompson, Mooloolaba, adalah sebahagian dari kompleks besar dan tidak memasuki kawasan premis kediaman.

src: The United Nations World Health Organization (WHO) stated that the H1N1 virus, more commonly known as swine flu, has become the dominant flu strain in the world.
ref: Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia (WHO) menyatakan bahawa virus H1N1, lebih dikenali sebagai selesema babi, telah menjadi selesema yang dominan di dunia.

src: He added that he expects the trend to continue through the winter months, with more severe cases and even deaths.
ref: Beliau menambah bahawa beliau menjangkakan trend itu akan berterusan melalui bulan-bulan musim sejuk, dengan kes yang lebih teruk dan juga kematian.

src: Fukuda said the vaccine currently in use in some 20 countries around the world remains effective and safe, and that no rare or dangerous side effects have been reported.
ref: Fukuda berkata vaksin yang digunakan masa dalam kira-kira 20 buah negara di seluruh dunia kekal berkesan dan selamat, dan tidak ada kesan sampingan yang jarang berlaku atau berbahaya telah dilaporkan.

src: "East Asia is one of the parts of the world where seasonal influenza viruses have remained in reasonably high circulation."
ref: "Asia Timur adalah salah satu tempat di dunia di mana virus selesema bermusim kekal dalam edaran yang agak tinggi".

src: "But even in that part of the world, the pandemic virus is becoming dominant," Fukuda commented.
ref: "Tetapi di bahagian dunia, virus pandemik menjadi dominan," Fukuda mengulas.

src: The WHO says most people recover without hospitalization, although Fuduka pointed out that people with severe health complications and pregnant women were most at risk.
ref: WHO berkata kebanyakan orang pulih tanpa rawatan di hospital, walaupun Fuduka menegaskan bahawa orang yang mempunyai komplikasi kesihatan yang teruk dan wanita hamil adalah paling berisiko.

src: The World Health Organization has declared the swine flu outbreak a pandemic.
ref: Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia telah mengisytiharkan selesema wabak babi pandemik.

src: As of October 25, 2009, the WHO says there have been more than 440,000 laboratory confirmed cases of H1N1 influenza and more than 5,700 deaths reported to the UN agency.
ref: Sehingga Oktober 25, 2009, WHO berkata terdapat lebih daripada 440,000 makmal mengesahkan kes nfluenza H1N1 dan lebih daripada 5,700 kematian dilaporkan kepada agensi UN.

src: The NATO-led force in Afghanistan issued a statement on Friday saying that that two of its troops went missing on Wednesday while on a routine supply mission.
ref: Pasukan yang dipimpin NATO di Afghanistan mengeluarkan kenyataan pada hari Jumaat mengatakan bahawa dua daripada angkatan tenteranya hilang pada hari Rabu semasa menjalankan misi bekalan rutin.

src: The statement said a search operation is under way, but did not give many details.
ref: Kenyataan itu berkata operasi pencarian sedang dijalankan, tetapi tidak memberikan banyak maklumat.

src: A NATO press officer said that "We continue exhaustive search and rescue operations to locate our missing service members."
ref: Seorang pegawai akhbar NATO berkata, "Kami teruskan pencarian dan operasi penyelamatan secara menyeluruh untuk mencari ahli-ahli perkhidmatan kami yang hilang".

src: Local police said that the soldiers were likely swept away by a river in Badghis, a western province, while they were trying to get to an airdropped food parcel that had fallen into the river.
ref: Polis tempatan berkata bahawa tentera-tentera itu mungkin dihanyutkan oleh sungai di Badghis, satu wilayah barat, ketika mereka sedang cuba untuk mencapai bungkusan makanan yang dijatuhkan oleh kapal terbang yang telah jatuh ke dalam sungai.

src: Officials said it was not likely that they were taken captive.
ref: Pegawai berkata, ia tidak kemungkinan bahawa mereka telah ditawan.

src: An aide to ousted Honduran President Manuel Zelaya said that a deal designed to end the country's political crisis has failed, after interim leader Roberto Micheletti announced the formation of a new cabinet.
ref: Seorang pembantu Presiden Honduras yang digulingkan Manuel Zelaya berkata perjanjian yang direka untuk menamatkan krisis politik negara telah gagal, selepas pemimpin sementara, Roberto Micheletti mengumumkan pembentukan kabinet baru.

src: Micheletti said late on Thursday that he is installing a national unity government without the participation of Zelaya, who has declined to name any cabinet members.
ref: Micheletti berkata pada lewat hari Khamis bahawa beliau sedang membentuk sebuah kerajaan perpaduan kebangsaan tanpa penyertaan Zelaya, yang enggan menamakan mana-mana ahli kabinet.

src: The two signed an agreement last week to resolve the four-month political standoff.
ref: Kedua-duanya telah menandatangani perjanjian pada minggu lalu untuk menyelesaikan kebuntuan politik yang berlarutan selama empat bulan.

src: Zelaya warned on Thursday the accord was at risk of collapsing unless the Honduran Congress held a vote to restore him to power immediately to serve out his term that ends in January.
ref: Zelaya memberi amaran pada hari Khamis perjanjian itu berisiko untuk gagal kecuali Kongres Honduras mengadakan pembuangan undi untuk mengembalikan kuasanya secara serta-merta untuk berkhidmat dalam tempoh yang berakhir pada bulan Januari.

src: Congress must vote on Zelaya's restitution, but has not yet done so.
ref: Kongres mesti mengundi untuk pengembalian kuasa Zelaya, tetapi mereka masih belum berbuat demikian.

src: The recently signed pact does not stipulate a deadline for the Congressional vote.
ref: Pakatan yang ditandatangani baru-baru ini tidak menetapkan tarikh akhir untuk buangan undi Kongres.

src: The governments of several countries have threatened not to recognize the presidential elections if Zelaya is not first returned to power.
ref: Kerajaan-kerajaan beberapa negara telah mengancam untuk tidak mengiktiraf pilihan raya presiden jika Zelaya tidak kembali berkuasa terlebih dahulu.

src: Zelaya was ousted in a military-backed coup in June, but returned to Honduras in September, where he has taken refuge in the Brazilian embassy in Tegucigalpa.
ref: Zelaya digulingkan dalam rampasan kuasa yang disokong tentera pada bulan Jun, tetapi pulang ke Honduras pada bulan September, di mana beliau telah mendapatkan perlindungan di kedutaan Brazil di Tegucigalpa.

src: A NATO airstrike has killed at least seven members of the Afghan security forces in the western province of Badghis on Friday, according to the Afghan defence ministry.
ref: Satu serangan udara NATO telah membunuh sekurang-kurangnya tujuh anggota pasukan keselamatan Afghan di wilayah barat Badghis pada Jumaat, menurut kementerian keselamatan Afghan.

src: "Due to a NATO forces air strike on November 6 in Badghis province seven Afghan security personnel (both Afghan army and national police) were martyred and also some were wounded," the ministry stated.
ref: "Berikutan satu serangan udara pasukan NATO pada 6 November di wilayah Badghis tujuh anggota keselamatan (kedua-dua tentera Afghan dan polis negara) gugur dan juga sebahagian cedera," kementerian tersebut menyatakan.

src: Afghan Defence Ministry spokesman, Gen Mohammad Zahir Azimi, said that the airstrike hit a base housing NATO and Afghan troops.
ref: Jurucakap Kementerian Pertahanan Afghan, Gen Mohammad Zahir Azimi, berkata bahawa serangan udara tersebut menyerang satu pangkalan perumahan NATO dan tentera Afghan.

src: Pakistan's military has said that its soldiers killed twelve militants in recent operations targeting Taliban insurgents in South Waziristan.
ref: Tentera Pakistan mengatakan bahawa anggota tenteranya telah membunuh dua belas militan dalam operasi baru-baru ini mensasarkan pemberontak Taliban di Selatan Waziristan.

src: The military said security forces battled militants on Friday as they fought for control of Makeen, an area considered the main base of the Pakistani Taliban.
ref: Pihak tentera itu berkata pasukan keselamatan bertempur dengan militan pada hari Jumaat untuk mendapatkan kawalan Makeen, sebuah kawasan yang dipercayai pangkalan utama Taliban Pakistan.

src: The military statement also says troops battled to tighten their control over Sararogha, which is another Taliban stronghold.
ref: Keterangan pihak tentera juga mengatakan tentera berjuang untuk mengetatkan kawalan ke atas Sararogha, yang merupakan satu lagi kubu pertahanan Taliban.

src: The accounts of the Pakistan army's offensive in the tribal region near the Afghan border are difficult to verify, as journalists and aid workers are not allowed into the battle zone.
ref: Keadaan serangan tentera Pakistan ke atas kawasan puak berhampiran sempadan Afghanistan adalah sukar untuk disahkan, kerana wartawan dan pekerja bantuan tidak dibenarkan ke dalam zon pertempuran.

src: Pakistan launched an offensive against the Taliban last month in South Waziristan, an area that is believed to be a stronghold for rebels, and where the government does not have much influence.
ref: Pakistan telah melancarkan serangan terhadap Taliban pada bulan lepas di Selatan Waziristan, kawasan yang dipercayai menjadi kubu kuat untuk pemberontak, dan di mana kerajaan tidak mempunyai pengaruh yang banyak di sana.

src: The kidnappers have threatened to kill three of the tuna trawler's crew after a stand-off with Spanish forces.
ref: Penculik telah mengugut untuk membunuh tiga daripada krew bot pukat selepas bertempur dengan tentera Sepanyol.

src: They called upon the government to free two captured Somalis held in Spain, who are suspected of being involved in the seizure of the Alakrana and its crew of 36.
ref: Mereka memanggil kerajaan untuk membebaskan dua Somali yang ditahan di Sepanyol, yang mana disyaki terlibat dalam perampasan Alakrana dan 36 krewnya.

src: Ricardo Blach, the captain of the trawler who is being held by the pirates, warned relatives by phone that they intended to kill the three crew members—moved from the trawler on Thursday and returned on Friday in a bid to pressure the Spanish government—should their demands not be met.
ref: Ricardo Blach, kapten bot pukat yang mana telah ditahan oleh lanun, memberi amaran kepada saudara-maranya melalui telefon bahawa mereka bercadang untuk membunuh tiga ahli krew-berpindah daripada bot pukat pada Khamis dan kembali pada Jumaat dalam percuban untuk menekan kerajaan Sepanyol-seharusnya tuntutan mereka tidak dipenuhi.

src: "They have just told us that if in three days there is no change over the two held in Spain, they will kill the three and then three others and then more," he said.
ref: "Mereka baru memberitahu bahawa jika dalam tempoh tiga hari tiada perubahan ke atas dua yang ditahan di Sepanyol, mereka akan membunuh tiga yang tersebut dan kemudian tiga yang lain dan lebih ramai lagi," katanya.

src: The Spanish government has ruled this out, but is willing to hand them over to an African country, such as Kenya, as happened in May.
ref: Kerajaan Sepanyol telah menetapkan perkara ini, tetapi sanggup untuk menyerahkan mereka kepada negara Afrika, seperti Kenya, seperti yang berlaku pada bulan Mei.

src: "That is an issue for the courts to decide," commented Deputy Prime Minister María Teresa Fernández de la Vega Sanz to reporters, adding that talking about this "technical topic which is legally very complicated" was "risky".
ref: "Terdapat isu yang perlu ditentukan oleh mahkamah," komen Timbalan Perdana Menteri Maria Teresa Ferna ndez de la Vega Sanz kepada wartawan, menambah bahawa bercakap mengenai "topik teknikal yang mana tidak salah di sisi undang-undang adalah sangat rumit" adalah "berisiko".

src: Spanish Foreign Minister Miguel Ángel Moratinos stressed the need for calm amongst the tension of the removal and return of the three hostages.
ref: Menteri Luar Sepanyol Minguel Angel Moratinos menekankan keperluan untuk bertenang di ketika keadaan tegang untuk penyingkiran dan pemulangan tiga tahanan.

src: "What does this mean?"
ref: "Apa yag dimaksudkan dengan itu"?

src: " It means we must remain calm."
ref: "Ia bermaksud kita perlu terus kekal tenang".

src: "Kidnappings are complicated situations, with highs and lows, they are very difficult and stressful."
ref: "Penculikan merupakan situasi yang rumit, degan tinggi dan rendah, mereka sangat sukar dan penuh stress".

src: "But we must remain confident and calm," he said during a news conference.
ref: "Tetapi kita kekal berkeyakinan dan tenang," kata beliau ketika sidang akhbar.

src: "If we remain calm and confident I am certain that what all Spaniards want, what the families want, what the government wants—that the hostages can return to their homes safe and sound and this kidnapping ends satisfactorily."
ref: "Jika kita kekal tenang dan berkeyakinan saya yakin bahawa semua yang Sepanyol mahukan, apa yang keluarga mereka mahukan, apa yang kerajaan mahukan-tahanan dapat pulang ke rumah mereka dengan selamat dan penculikan berakhir dalam keadaan yang memuaskan".

src: Families say the captured crew have "little drinking water or food,".
ref: Keluarga berkata krew yang ditangkap mempunyai "sedikit air minuman dan makanan".

src: "We demand that all the parties work in the same direction" and requested that the Spanish government chooses "negotiation" as opposed to risking the life of the crew in danger by forceful means.
ref: "Kami meminta semua pihak bekerja dalam satu arah" dan memohon bahawa kerajaan Sepanyol memilih "perundingan" berbanding dengan untuk mempertaruhkan nyawa krew yang dalam bahaya secara paksa.

src: The crew comprises sixteen Spaniards, the crew includes eight Indonesians and members from Ghana, the Ivory Coast, Madagascar, Senegal and the Seychelles.
ref: Krew terdiri daripada enam belas warga Sepanyol, krew termasuk lapan warga Indonesia dan ahli kepada Ghana, Ivory Coast, Madagascar, Senegal dan Seychelles.

src: Spanish military captured the two suspected pirates when they left the trawler via a small boat.
ref: Tentera Sepanyol menangkap dua yang disyaki lanun apabila mereka meninggalkan bot tunda melalui bot kecil.

src: On Friday, Spain's secretary of state for defence, Constantino Mendez, insisted that their release "is not negotiable."
ref: Pada Jumaat, setiausaha pertahanan negeri Sepanyol, Constantino Mendez, berkeras bahawa pembebasan mereka "tidak dapat dirundingkan".

src: He announced on Spanish National Radio that the hostages are "in good health" and that the kidnappers are "dramatising" the situation as a "negotiating tactic."
ref: Beliau mengumumkan di Radio Nasional Sepanyol bahawa tahanan "berada dalam keadaan baik" dan penculik "berdrama" dengan keadaan sebagai "taktik perundingan".

src: The Ministry of Defence has announced that a British soldier has been killed in an explosion in the Helmand Province of Afghanistan.
ref: Menteri Pertahanan telah mengumumkan bahawa seorang tentera British telah terbunuh dalam letupan di Wilayah Helmand di Afghanistan.

src: With this announcement, the total number of military personnel that has been killed in Afghanistan has now increased to 231.
ref: Dengan pemgumuman itu, jumlah anggota tentera yang telah terbunuh di Afghanistan kini meningkat kepada 231.

src: He came from 2nd Battalion, The Rifles, and was serving with 4th Battalion, The Rifles.
ref: Beliau merupakan dari Batalion ke-2, The Rifles, dan berkhidmat untuk Batalion ke-4, The Rifles.

src: The soldier's family have now been informed of the death, the Ministry said.
ref: Keluarga tentera tersebut kini telah dimaklumkan mengenai kematian itu, kata Menteri.

src: Lieutenant Colonel David Wakefield is the spokesperson for Task Force Helmand.
ref: Leftenan Kolonel David Wakefield merupakan jurucakap bagi Pasukan Petugas Helmand.

src: Pakistani officials have said that a suicide bomber struck a crowded market today in northwest Pakistan, killing an anti-Taliban mayor.
ref: Pihak kerajaan Pakistan berkata seorang pengebom bunuh diri telah meletupkan dirinya di pasar yang penuh sesak hari ini di barat laut Pakistan, membunuh seorang datuk bandar anti-Taliban.

src: The market was crowded with shoppers ahead of the Muslim festival of Eid.
ref: Pasar itu penuh sesak dengan pelanggan sebelum perayaan Eid Muslim.

src: Officials said that Malik, a former Taliban supporter, had switched sides and raised a militia to fight the Taliban.
ref: Pihak berkuasa berkata Malik, bekas penyokong Taliban, telah bertukar pihak dan memulakan tentera awam militia untuk melawan Taliban.

src: He had survived several attempts on his life since shifting his allegiance.
ref: Dia telah terselamat dari beberapa percubaan untuk membunuhnya sejak menukar kesetiaannya.

src: "Malik had survived several attacks on his life in the recent past, since he turned against the militants," said the top Peshawar official, Sahibzada Anis.
ref: "Malik telah terselamat dari beberapa percubaan untuk membunuhnya pada masa yang lalu, sejak dia berpaling menentang militan," kata pegawai Peshawar tertinggi, Sahibzada Anis.

src: South African Vipers completed a hat-trick to win their third consecutive Singapore Cricket Club International Rugby Sevens.
ref: Vipers Afrika Selatan melengkapkan hatrik untuk memenangi kali ketiga berturut Kelab Kriket Singapura Ragbi Seven Antarabangsa.

src: It was tough and tight start with both teams putting heavy tackles and showing strong defence until the sixth minute when the SA Vipers finally managed a fast run down the left wing to score a converted try.
ref: Ia permulaan yang sukar dan ketat dengan kedua-dua pasukan meletakkan tanganan berat dan menunjukkan pertahanan kuat sehingga minit keenam apabila SA Vipers akhirnya berjaya berlari laju ke sayap kiri untuk mendapatkan penukaran percubaan gol.

src: Only two minutes into the second half the Vipers breached Davetalevu's defence and scored a relatively easy try yet failing to convert.
ref: Hanya dua minit dalam separuh masa kedua Vipers mematahkan pertahanan Davetalevu dan mendapat percubaan yang agak mudah tetapi gagal bertukar kepada penukaran.

src: A few minutes later Vipers crossed again and then scored a further try down the favoured left wing to bring the margin to 24-0 which would be the final score.
ref: Beberapa minit kemudian Vipers melangkah lagi dan kemudian mendapat percubaan yang lebih jauh di sayap kiri untuk membawa kepada pungutan 24-0 yang mungkin menjadi mata akhir.

src: In the minor finals the Casuarina Cougars easily won the Bowl competition with a 17-0 defeat of Australian team East Arnhem Rugby.
ref: Dalam kejohanan akhir minor Casuarina Cougars menang dengan senang pertandingan The Bowl dengan 17-0 mengalahkan pasukan Australia Ragbi East Arnhem.

src: The Plate final saw a strong performance from Borneo Eagles to beat New Zealand team Oriental Rongotai by 31 to 5.
ref: Kejohanan akhir The Plate melihatkan pertunjukan hebat dari Borneo Eagles mengalahkan pasukan New Zealand Oriental Rongotai dengan 31 kepada 5.

src: Leading 12-5 at half-time the Eagles never seemed troubled during the final.
ref: Mendahului 12-5 pada separuh masa the Eagles tidak pernah kelihatan bersusah semasa kejohanan akhir.

src: Serving out of Borneo the squad gathered before the commencement of their quarter-final to pay respect both to their own squadron but also in tribute to Remembrance Day which coincided with the weekend tournament.
ref: Berkhidmat diluar Borneo pasukan tersebut berkumpul sebelum permulaan suku akhir mereka untuk memberi hormat kepada kedua-dua skuadron mereka dan juga dalam peringatan kepada Hari Peringatan yang kebetulan sama dengan hujung minggu kejohanan.

src: A minute of silence in respect to fallen soldiers was observed.
ref: Satu minit berdiam diri kepada askar yang tewas telah diperhatikan.

src: Kukris scored a try after full-time yet failing to convert a relatively simple kick that would have won the game for them.
ref: Kukris menjaring satu percubaan setelah masa penuuh tetapi gagal untuk menukar tendangan yang agak mudah yang boleh memungkinkan kemenangan permainan tersebut untuk mereka.

src: Final score was 21-20 with Singapore Barbarians taking the honours.
ref: Mata akhir ialah 21-20 dengan Singapore Barbarians mengambil kehormatan tersebut.

src: Featuring teams from thirteen nations from as far as Kenya, South Africa and Scotland the tournament has grown from success to success over the past years and now features on the calendar of major sporting events in Singapore.
ref: Mempersembahkan pasukan dari tiga belas negara dari sejauh Kenya, Afrika Selatan dan Scotland kejohanan tersebut telah berkembang dari kejayaan ke kejayaan pada tahun-tahun lepas dan kini diperkenalkan dalam kalendar untuk acara sukan utama di Singapura.

src: The tournament began in 1947 as an invitational event for Singapore and Malaysian teams and since grown into national and club teams from around the world are invited.
ref: Kejohanan tersebut bermula pada 1947 sebagai acara jemputan untuk pasukan Singapura dan Malaysia dan telah berkembang ke pasukan negara dan kelab dari seluruh dunia dijemput.

src: It is hoped that the SCC 7s will soon feature on the International Rugby Boards 7s circuit according to club officials.
ref: Ia diharapkan yang SCC 7s akan tidak lama lagi dipersembahkan dalam litar Lembaga Ragbi Antarabangsa 7s menurut pegawai-pegawai kelab.

src: Data from the Underground system's power and control systems have revealed that all three bombs went off within 50 seconds of each other, at 8.50am, with the managing director of Transport for London, Tim O'Toole saying the bombs went "bang bang bang, very close together".
ref: Data dari sistem kuasa dan kawalan sistem bawah tanah ini telah mendedahkan bahawa ketiga-tiga bom meletup dalam 50 saat antara satu sama lain, pada 8:50 pagi, dengan pengarah urusan Pengangkutan London, Tim O'Toole berkata bom kedengaran "bang bang bang, sangat dekat di antara satu sama lain".

src: The first bomb to detonate was on the Liverpool Street train soon after it left for Aldgate on the Circle line, seconds before the others.
ref: Bom pertama meletup di stesen kereta api Liverpool Street sejurus selepas ia berlepas ke Aldgate di laluan Circle line, beberapa saat sebelum yang lain.

src: The first call the police received that morning reported "a bang" at Aldgate East, coming within a minute of the blast.
ref: Panggilan pertama diterima polis pada pagi itu melaporkan bunyi "bang" di Aldgate East, berlaku dalam satu minit dari letupan itu.

src: The Edgware Road train, leaving for Paddington and also on the Circle, exploded opposite a train coming from the other direction, making people think at first that it was a derailment.
ref: Kereta api Edgware Road, berlepas ke Paddington dan juga pada Circle, meletup bertentangan kereta api yang datang dari arah yang lain, mengakibatkan orang berfikir pada mulanya bahawa ia adalah satu kegelinciran.

src: The first call to the Police spoke not of an explosion, but of a person falling under the wheels of the train.
ref: Panggilan pertama kepada pihak Polis tidak menyatakan mengenai letupan, tetapi mengenai orang yang jatuh di bawah roda kereta api.

src: The confirmation of a bomb did not come until 9.17am, but by that time the emergency services were already on scene.
ref: Pengesahan mengenai bom tidak tiba sehingga 9:17 pagi, tetapi pada masa itu perkhidmatan kecemasan sudah berada di tempat kejadian.

src: The first indication of the Piccadilly line bomb was when the tunnel telephone system wires were cut by the blast, an event logged by other software.
ref: Petunjuk pertama bom di laluan Piccadilly adalah apabila sistem wayar telefon terowong terpotong akibat letupan, satu kejadian yang dicatat oleh perisian lain.

src: The tunnel itself suffered only slight damage and is safe, but the train - which was packed with commuters heading for Russell Square - is very badly damaged.
ref: Terowong itu sendiri hanya mengalami kerosakan kecil dan selamat, tetapi kereta api - yang penuh sesak dengan penumpang menuju ke Russell Square - sangat rosak teruk.

src: London Underground declared a 'code Amber' within minutes, moving trains to platforms and opening all doors.
ref: London Underground mengisytiharkan 'kod Amber'dalam masa beberapa minit, kereta api bergerak ke platform dan membuka semua pintu.

src: A 'code Red' - full evacuation - was set at around 9.15am.
ref: Satu 'kod Merah'- pemindahan penuh - telah ditentukan pada kira-kira 9:15 pagi.

src: O'Toole described the decision to evacuate as being "very grave, not taken lightly".
ref: O'Toole menyifatkan keputusan untuk pemindahan sebagai "sangat berbahaya, tidak dipandang ringan".

src: When questioned as to whether everything possible had been done on the day to save lives, the managing director of Transport for London was "very proud" of the choices made that morning.
ref: Ketika ditanya sama ada segala yang mungkin telah dilakukan pada hari tersebut untuk menyelamatkan nyawa, pengarah urusan Pengangkutan London berasa "amat berbangga" pilihan yang dibuat pagi itu.

src: As investigations continue, all bodies have been removed from the sub-surface Circle line trains, but the carriages themselves are still in situ while a painstaking forensic investigation takes place.
ref: Dengan siasatan diteruskan, semua mayat telah dikeluarkan dari sub-permukaan kereta api laluan Circle, tetapi semua gerabak masih kekal di situ sementara siasatan forensik yang teliti dilakukan.

src: Currently, work is on-going to retrieve bodies and forensic evidence from the carriage of the train in the deep tunnel of the Piccadilly line near King's Cross.
ref: Pada masa ini, kerja masih berterusan untuk mengumpulkan mayat-mayat dan bukti forensik dari gerabak kereta api di dalam terowong dalam laluan Piccadilly berdekatan King's Cross.

src: Teams of rescue workers looking for human remains are working alongside forensics experts in a "meticulous" search to find evidence.
ref: Pasukan pekerja penyelamat yang mencari mayat manusia akan bekerjasama dengan pakar-pakar forensik dalam carian "teliti" untuk mencari bukti.

src: Conditions are described as being very difficult, with high temperatures and lots of dust.
ref: Keadaan digambarkan sebagai sangat sukar, dengan suhu yang tinggi dan banyak habuk.

src: The exact number of bodies still in the wrecked carriage is unknown.
ref: Jumlah sebenar mayat masih dalam gerabak yang remuk belum diketahui.

src: Police have revealed that the bombs were 'high explosives' - not homemade.
ref: Polis telah mendedahkan bahawa bom itu 'bahan letupan tinggi'- bukan buatan sendiri.

src: Police will not confirm or deny if any parts of a timer have been found, but have said that "any device will now be in a million pieces".
ref: Polis tidak akan mengesahkan atau menafikan jika mana-mana bahagian pemasa telah dijumpai, tetapi berkata bahawa "mana-mana peranti ini kini telah hancur sepenuhnya".

src: Thailand has further threatened to close borders with its neighbour.
ref: Thailand juga telah mengugut untuk menutup sempadan dengan jirannya itu.

src: Thaksin will address 300 Cambodian economics experts on Thursday in Phnom Penh and is expected to remain "two or three days" according to Cambodian cabinet spokesman Phay Siphan.
ref: Thaksin akan bercakap kepada 300 orang pakar ekonomi Kemboja pada hari Khamis di Phnom Penh dan dijangka akan berada di situ "dua atau tiga hari" menurut jurucakap kabinet Kemboja Phay Siphan.

src: "We are looking forward to learning from Thaksin's great economic experience and we are convinced that his experience will contribute to our country's economic development," he said.
ref: "Kami tidak sabar untuk mempelajari sesuatu dari pengalaman ekonomi Thaksin yang hebat dan kami yakin pengalamannya akan memberi sumbangan kepada pembangunan ekonomi negara kami," katanya.

src: He is still influential in Thailand, using protests by the Red Shirts, and the Thai government fears that Thaksin will use Cambodia as base to campaign.
ref: Beliau masih berpengaruh di Thailand, menggunakan mogok oleh Kemeja Merah, dan kerajaan Thailand risau Thaksin akan menggunakan Kemboja sebagai pusat untuk berkempen.

src: However, Thaksin published a letter on his website on Monday indicating that he did not intend to "go to Cambodia to help Cambodia fight with Thailand [...]" "As I travel to Cambodia to discuss poverty and the world economic situation, I will try to preserve Thai interests with our friends in Phnom Penh, despite the Thai government still hounding me wherever I go," he stated.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Thaksin mengeluarkan satu surat di laman webnya pada hari Isnin menyatakan dia tidak berniat untuk "pergi ke Kemboja bagi membantu Kemboja melawan Thailand [...]" "Oleh kerana saya pergi ke Kemboja untuk membincangkan kemiskinan dan situasi ekonomi dunia, saya akan cuba untuk mengekalkan kepentingan Thailand dengan rakan-rakan kami di Phnom Penh, walaupun kerajaan Thailand masih memburu saya ke mana pun saya pergi," katanya.

src: Speakers of the actions said, students are complaining that universities are underfunded and understaffed.
ref: Penceramah daripada pergerakan itu berkata, pelajar mengadu bahawa universiti-universiti kekurangan dana dan kekurangan kakitangan.

src: Actions also took place in Utrecht, Turin, Rome, Lublin, London and Birmingham.
ref: Tindakan juga berlaku di Utrecht, Turin, Rome, Lublin, London dan Birmingham.

src: Mozambique's main opposition party has rejected the results of last month's national elections, alleging fraud and ballot-stuffing.
ref: Parti pembangkang utama Mozambique telah menolak keputusan pilihan raya negara bulan lalu, mendakwa penipuan dan pengisian undian.

src: Official results were released on Wednesday confirming that President Armando Guebuza had won another term in office.
ref: Keputusan rasmi dikeluarkan pada Rabu mengesahkan yang President Armando Guebuza telah memenangi satu lagi penggal dalam pejabat.

src: The secretary-general of the opposition Renamo Party, Ussufo Momade, announced his party's rejection of the election results, saying there had been widespread fraud.
ref: Setiausaha Agung Pembangkang Parti Renamo, Ussufo Momade, mengumumkan yang partinya menolak keputusan pilihan raya, mengatakan terdapat penipuan meluas.

src: "We demand the cancellation of the results that were just announced and we insist on a new vote."
ref: "Kami mendesak untuk membatalan keputusan yang baru diumumkan dan mendesak untuk undian baru."

src: The National Electoral Commission said Wednesday that Guebuza had received more than 75% of the valid votes cast two weeks ago.
ref: Suruhanjaya Pilihanraya Kebangsaan berkata pada Rabu yang Guebuza telah menerima lebih dari 75% undian terpakai yang dilakukan dua minggu lepas.

src: "The National Electoral Commission declares that Armando Emilio Guebuza has been elected president of the Republic of Mozambique for five years," the commission stated.
ref: "Suruhanjaya Pilihanraya Kebangsaan mengumumkan yang Armando Emilio Guebuzatelah dipilih sebagai Presiden Republik Mozambique untuk lima tahun," suruhanjaya tersebut menyatakan.

src: The president's Frelimo Party also won 191 of the 250 seats in parliament.
ref: Parti Frelimo president juga memenangi 191 dari 250 kerusi di Parlimen.

src: Before the elections, Frelimo had 160 seats and Renamo 90.
ref: Sebelum pilihanraya, Frelimo memiliki 160 kerusi dan Renamo 90.

src: Frelimo has been in power since 1975, when Mozambique declared independence from Portugal.
ref: Frelimo telah didalam kuasa sejak 1975, apabila Mozambique mengumumkan kemerdekaan dari Portugal.

src: Renamo's candidate, Afonso Dhlakama, received 16% of the vote, while the leader of a new party, Daviz Simango of the Mozambique Democratic Movement (MDM), received 8%.
ref: Calon Renamo, Afonso Dhlakama, menerima 16% dari undian, sementara pemimpin kepada parti baru, Daviz Simango dari Pergerakan Demokratik Mozambique (MDM), menerima 8%.

src: Sixteen other parties were also in contention for parliament seats, but none of them received more than one percent of the vote.
ref: Enam belas parti lain turut didalam perebutan untuk kerusi parlimen, tetapi tiada dari mereka yang menerima lebih dari satu peratus dari undian.

src: Frelimo, which has a two-thirds majority in the parliament, has a sufficient number of seats to alter the constitution without support from other parties.
ref: Frelimo, yang memiliki dua pertiga majotiri dalam parlimen, memiliki jumlah kerusi yang cukup untuk mengubah perlembagaan tanpa sokongan dari parti-parti lain.

src: Senior Frelimo party members, however, promised that Guebuza had no intention of seeking another term.
ref: Ahli senior parti Frelimo, walau bagaimanapun, berjanji yang Guebeza tiada niat untuk mencari satu lagi penggal.

src: "The majority in parliament will give us more freedom to choose what is best for Mozambican people."
ref: "Majoriti didalam parlimen akan memberi kami lebih kebebasan untuk memilih apa yang terbaik untuk rakyat Mozambique."

src: Soon after the election results were announced, Renamo alleged that there had been widespread ballot-stuffing in some districts, and that its observers had been expelled from others.
ref: Sebaik selepas keputusan pilihan raya diumumkan, Renamo mengatakan yang terdapat pengisian undian berleluasa dibeberapa daerah, dan pemantaunya telah disingkirkan dari yang lain.

src: The party also made a list of alleged voting irregularities, which was given to media and election observers.
ref: Parti tersebut juga membuat senarai dakwaan perubahan pengundian, yang diserahkan kepada media dan pemantau pilihan raya.

src: He also rejected the electoral body's verdict that the poll was credible.
ref: Dia juga menolak keputusan badan pilihan raya yang undian adalah boleh dipercayai.

src: "If that was not the case, why did they arrest most of our polling station watchers?"
ref: "Jika itu bukan yang berlaku, mengapa mereka menangkap kebanyakan pemerhati stesen undian kami?"

src: An observation consortium of religious and civic groups conducted a parallel tabulation of the vote in eight percent of the stations nationwide.
ref: Konsortium pemerhati kumpulan keagamaan dan masyarakat menjalankan penjadualan selari undian tersebut dalam lapan peratus dari stesen seluruh negara.

src: Some observers concluded that such fraud might have affected the outcome in one of the contests for parliament, and several of those for the provincial assemblies.
ref: Sebahagian pemerhati merumuskan yang penipuan mungkin memberi kesan kepada keputusan dalam satu dari pertandingan untuk parlimen, dan beberapa untuk Dewan Wilayah.

src: Most international observers, however, had deemed the elections fair and free, although there had been some criticism that the electoral commission had disqualified MDM candidates for all but four provincial assemblies on technical grounds.
ref: Kebanyakan pemerhati antarabangsa, walau bagaimanapun, menganggap pilihan raya tersebut adil dan bebas, walaupun terdapat beberapa kritikan yang suruahnjaya pilihan raya telah menolak kelayakan calon MDM untuk semua kecuali empat Dewan Wilayah atas alasan teknikal.

src: "The pre-election phase was characterized by peaceful, tolerant and yet enthusiastic political atmosphere."
ref: "Fasa pre-pilihan raya telah dikategorikan sebagai aman, bertoleransi dan masih bersuasana semangat politik."

src: The national elections commission stated that no official complaints of voting irregularity were submitted to them.
ref: Suruhanjaya Pilihanraya Kebangsaan berkata yang tiada aduan rasmi mengenai kelainan undian yang diserahkan kepada mereka.

src: "Political parties have two days after the voting day to present complaints or proof of irregularities."
ref: "Parti-pati politik mempunyai dua hari selepas hari undian untuk menyerahkan aduan atau bukti kelainan."

src: The program began last Thursday and will continue until the end of the year.
ref: Program itu bermula Khamis lalu dan akan berterusan sehingga akhir tahun ini.

src: There were 1,043 road fatalities in Illinois last year, and this year officials want that figure to be at 943 or less.
ref: Terdapat 1,043 kemalangan maut di Illinois pada tahun lepas, dan pada tahun ini pegawai mahu jumlah itu menjadi 943 atau kurang.

src: If successful, the state will have experienced the fewest road fatalities since 1921.
ref: Jika berjaya, negeri ini akan mempunyai kemalangan maut paling sedikit sejak tahun 1921.

src: Organizations and advocacy groups throughout the state are encouraging citizens to promote public awareness of unsafe driving practices, such as driving while impaired, distracted, or unbelted.
ref: Organisasi dan kumpulan penyokong di seluruh negeri menggalakkan rakyat untuk mempromosikan kesedaran awam terhadap amalan memandu yang tidak selamat, seperti memandu semasa kesihatan terganggu, bingung, atau tidak bertali pinggang keledar.

src: According to the National Safety Council, the average economic cost associated with a road fatality is $1 million.
ref: Menurut Majlis Keselamatan Negara, purata kos ekonomik yang dikaitkan dengan kematian di jalan raya adalah $1 juta.

src: All other member states, except Austria, which has to strengthen its efforts, expect to reach the target, too.
ref: Semua ahli negara lain, kecuali Austria, yang telah memperkukuhkan usaha mereka, dijangkakan mencapai sasaran, juga.

src: "Commitments to deep emission cuts are urgently needed to preserve our chances to keep planetary temperature increases below 2ºC."
ref: "Komitmen mendalam terhadap pengurangan perlepasan adalah diperlukan segera untuk melindungi peluang kita memastikan kenaikan suhu dibawah 2ºC".

src: Both ethnic Albanians and the minority Serb population may vote for local mayors and councillors, a move seen as testing the government's capacity to organise its own democratic elections.
ref: Kedua-dua etnik Albania dan penduduk minoriti Serb boleh mengundi untuk datuk bandar dan majlis tempatan, satu langkah yang dilihat sebagai ujian keupayaan kerajaan untuk menganjurkan pilihan raya sendiri secara demokratik.

src: The territory was run by the United Nations mission before its split from Serbia in February 2008.
ref: Wilayah ini telah dijalankan oleh misi United Nations sebelum pecahan daripada Serbia pada Februari 2008.

src: The main concern is the number of citizens who will vote, as only a 40% turnout level is expected.
ref: Kebimbangan utama adalah bilangan rakyat yang akan mengundi, kerana tahap keluar mengundi hanya dijangka 40%.

src: According to the BBC, most of the 120,000 Serbs oppose Kosovo's independence.
ref: Menurut BBC, kebanyakan 120,000 orang Serbia menentang kemerdekaan Kosovo.

src: The government in Belgrade and the Serbian Orthodox Church have called for a boycott.
ref: Kerajaan di Belgrade dan Gereja Ortodoks Serbia telah dipanggil untuk memboikot.

src: Polling stations are due to close at 7pm (1800 UTC); the first unofficial results are expected late Sunday evening.
ref: Tempat mengundi akan ditutup pada 07:00 (1800 UTC); keputusan tidak rasmi pertama dijangka petang Ahad.

src: Syria's President Bashar al-Assad has rejected moves by Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to negotiate, saying that he had no "Israeli partner" and not being serious about peace.
ref: Presiden Syria Bashar al-Assad telah menolak langkah oleh Perdana Menteri Israel, Benjamin Netanyahu untuk berunding, dengan berkata bahawa dia tidak mempunyai "rakan kongsi Israel" dan tidak serius tentang keamanan.

src: "If Mr Netanyahu is serious, he can send a team of experts, and we'll send a team of experts to Turkey."
ref: "Jika Encik Netanyahu adalah serius, dia boleh menghantar satu pasukan pakar, dan kami akan menghantar sebuah pasukan pakar ke Turki".

src: "Then we can really talk, if they're interested," he said.
ref: "Kemudian kami benar-benar boleh berbincang, jika mereka berminat," katanya.

src: "There is a mediator, Turkey, which is ready to resume its mediation."
ref: "Akan ada orang tengah, Turki, yang bersedia untuk meneruskan tugas pengantaraannya".

src: "What we lack is an Israeli partner who is ready to go forward and ready to come to a result."
ref: "Apa yang kita kurang adalah rakan Israel yang bersedia untuk maju ke hadapan dan bersedia untuk mencapai hasilnya".

src: According to the BBC, France has been the major contributor in attempting to bring Syria back to diplomatic talks.
ref: Menurut BBC, Perancis telah menjadi penyumbang utama dalam usaha untuk membawa Syria kembali ke rundingan diplomatik.

src: Since Israel's creation in 1948, Syria has been in a state of war with the country, having at no point recognized the existence of the state of Israel.
ref: Sejak penciptaan Israel pada tahun 1948, Syria telah berada dalam keadaan perang dengan negara ini, tidak mempunyai sebarang sebab untuk mengiktiraf kewujudan negara Israel.

src: The last direct talks between the two states collapsed in 2000.
ref: Rundingan langsung terakhir antara kedua-dua negara musnah pada tahun 2000.

src: Kenya's livestock minister, Mohammed Kuti, said today that cattle rustlers have killed eleven people near the central town of Isiolo.
ref: Menteri penternakan Kenya, Mohammed Kuti, hari ini berkata bahawa pencuri lembu telah membunuh sebelas orang berhampiran bandar utama Isiolo.

src: Kuti, who is also the member of parliament for Isiolo, said the rustlers raided in a village in the area early in the day.
ref: Kuti, juga salah seorang ahli parlimen Isiolo, berkata bahawa pencuri itu membuat serbuan di kawasan kampung itu awal hari ini.

src: "The eleven people were killed when rustlers stormed a village in Kisima area early this morning," he commented.
ref: "Sebelas orang dibunuh semasa pencuri menyerbu kampung di daerah Kisima awal pagi ini," beliau menyambung.

src: Cattle rustling is common in Kenya, and the extended drought has heightened competition for scarce sources of food.
ref: Mencuri lembu merupakan kebiasaan di Kenya, dan kemarau panjang mengakibatkan persaingan tinggi untuk sumber makanan yang sukar didapati.

src: In mid-September, 30 people were killed in a shootout as rustlers from the Pokot tribe attacked the Samburu tribe and made off with hundreds of cattle.
ref: Pada pertengahan September, 30 orang terbunuh dalam penembakan apabila pencuri dari puak Pokot menyerang puak Samburu dan melarikan beratus ekor lembu.

src: The governing body of world football, FIFA, has threatened Iraq with expulsion after the Iraqi Olympic Committee (IOC) took control of the country's governing body of football and disbanded it.
ref: Kawalan perbadanan bolasepak, FIFA, telah mengancam Iraq dengan pengusiran selepas jawatankuasa olimpik Iraq (IOC) mengambil kawalan perbadanan bolasepak negerinya dan membubarkannya.

src: FIFA has given the country 72 hours to restore the Iraq Football Association (IFA); if this is not done, the case is to be referred to FIFA's emergency committee.
ref: FIFA telah memberi negeri itu 72 jam untuk menggembalikan Persatuan Bolasepak Iraq (IFA); jika ini tidak dibuat, kes ini akan dirujukkan kepada jawatankuasa kecemasan FIFA.

src: The IFA and the IOC have disputed over who controls the game in the country for several years.
ref: IFA dan IOC telah mempertikaikan siapa mengawal perlawanan di dalam negara untuk beberapa tahun.

src: The IOC has blamed the IFA for the FIFA ban on the country not being allowed to host international friendly matches due to security reasons.
ref: IOC telah menyalahkan IFA untuk larangan FIFA keatas negaranya tidak dibenarkan untuk menjadi tuan rumah untuk perlawanan persahabatan antarabangsa kerana masalah keselamatan.

src: Since the 2003 invasion by American forces, Iraq has hosted two internationals matches, both against Palestine.
ref: Semenjak pencerobohan 2003 oleh tentera Amerika, Iraq telah menjadi tuan rumah untuk dua perlawanan antarabangsa, kedua-duanya menentang Palestin.

src: A statement was released on the FIFA website said: "FIFA appeals once more to all stakeholders in Iraq to respect the autonomy of sport in general and the IFA in particular and to allow IFA to conduct its affairs according its statutes and those of FIFA."
ref: Sebuah kenyataan telah dikeluarkan di laman web FIFA berkata: "FIFA memohon sekali lagi kepada semua pihak di Iraq untuk menghormati sukan secara umum dan IFA khususnya dan membenarkan IFA untuk menjalankan urusannya mengikut undang-undang dan FIFA".

src: Should the case be passed over to FIFA's emergency committee, it would most likely result in a ban from the sport.
ref: Jika kes itu diserahkan kepada jawatankuasa kecemasan FIFA, ia kemungkinan akan dilarang daripada sukan itu.

src: On the same day Algeria, Greece, Slovenia, Portugal and France also qualified for the tournament.
ref: Pada hari yang sama Algeria, Greece, Slovenia, Portugal dan Perancis juga layak ke kejohanan itu.

src: Walter Centeno scored for Costa Rica but a draw failed to seal a win for Costa Rica and lost the game and the chance to qualify for the 2010 World Cup.
ref: Walter Centeno menjaringkan gol untuk Costa Rica tetapi satu seri gagal untuk mengekalkan kemenangan untuk Costa Rica dan kekalahan permainan itu dan peluang untuk layak ke Piala Dunia 2010.

src: The game continued despite it being stopped after five minutes media started scuffling with the Costa Rica substitutes.
ref: Permainan ini berterusan walaupun ia dihentikan selepas lima minit media mula bergelut dengan pemain gantian Costa Rica.

src: With Uruguay's qualification they join other South American teams Brazil, Argentina, Paraguay and Chile.
ref: Dengan kelayakan Uruguay mereka menyertai pasukan Amerika Selatan lain iaitu Brazil, Argentina, Paraguay dan Chile.

src: Two-time former winners Uruguay missed the 2006 World Cup after losing in a qualifier to Australia, who have also qualified for next year's tournament.
ref: Bekas juara sebanyak dua kali Uruguay terlepas Piala Dunia 2006 selepas tewas dalam permainan kelayakan ke Australia, yang juga telah layak untuk kejohanan tahun depan.

src: Next year's World Cup will see the return of several teams to the tournament.
ref: Piala Dunia tahun depan akan menyaksikan kembalinya beberapa pasukan untuk kejohanan itu.

src: New Zealand and Honduras have also qualified, their last appearance was in 1982 and North Korea have not competed in the World Cup since 1966.
ref: New Zealand dan Honduras juga layak, penampilan terakhir mereka adalah pada tahun 1982 dan Korea Utara tidak bertanding dalam Piala Dunia sejak 1966.

src: The tournament is due to start in South Africa on the June 11, 2010 and last for one month.
ref: Kejohanan ini dijangka bermula di Afrika Selatan pada 11 Jun 2010 dan berlangsung selama satu bulan.

src: The experiment, the largest of its kind in the world, was first switched on with great fanfare in September 2008, but suffered an electrical fault just nine days later.
ref: Eksperimen tersebut, yang terbesar sepertinya di dunia, telah pertama kali digerakkan dengan pengumuman besaran pada September 2008, tetapi mengalami kegagalan elektrik hanya sembilan hari kemudian.

src: Repairs have cost approximately £24 million, on top of the £6 billion spent originally.
ref: Pembaikan telah berkos lebih kurang £24 juta, ditambah kepada £6 bilion perbelanjaan asal.

src: "We've still got some way to go before physics can begin, but with this milestone we're well on the way," stated Rolf Heuer, director-general of CERN, the European research group running the collider.
ref: "Kami masih memerlukan beberapa langkah sebelum fizik boleh dimulakan, tetapi dengan pencapaian ini kita dalam perjalannya," kata Rolf Heuer, ketua pengarah CERN, kumpulan pengkaji Eropah yang menjalankan perlanggaran tersebut.

src: By studying these collisions, scientists hope to shed light on theories such as supersymmetry and the Higgs boson.
ref: Dengan mengkaji perlanggaran ini, para saintis berharap untuk mendapatkan penerangan mengenai teori seperti supersimetri dan boson Higgs.

src: The six physicists Guralnik, Hagen, Kibble, Higgs, Brout, and Englert who predicted this particle in 1964 were recently awarded the 2010 J. J. Sakurai Prize for Theoretical Particle Physics for this work.
ref: Enam ahli fizik Guralnik, Hagen, Kibble, Higgs, Brout, dan Englert yang meramalkan partikel ini pada 1964 baru-baru ini dianugerahkah Pingat J. J. Sakurai 2010 untuk Teori Partikel Fizik untuk kerja ini.

src: Oprah Winfrey has announced that she will retire from her talk show on September 9, 2011, during season 25.
ref: Oprah Winfrey telah mengumumkan bahawa beliau akan bersara daripada wawancaranya pada 9 September 2011, semasa musim 25.

src: Winfrey made the announcement on Friday's broadcast of The Oprah Winfrey Show.
ref: Winfrey membuat pengumuman itu pada siaran hari Jumaat di The Oprah Winfrey Show.

src: Suppressing tears, she explained that careful thought and prayer had gone into her decision.
ref: Dengan menahan air mata, beliau menjelaskan bahawa pemikiran yang teliti dan doa telah membawa kepada keputusannya.

src: In the late 1990s her show changed focus to incorporate stories relating to spirituality and human interest.
ref: Pada akhir 1990-an rancangan beliau berubah fokus untuk menggabungkan cerita-cerita yang berkaitan dengan kerohanian dan kepentingan manusia.

src: Winfrey has had lasting effects on the city of Chicago, Illinois.
ref: Winfrey mempunyai kesan mendalam terhadap bandar Chicago, Illinois.

src: The surrounding neighborhood of Harpo Productions was rundown prior to the company's success.
ref: Kawasan sekeliling Harpo Productions telah diruntuhkan sebelum kejayaan syarikat itu.

src: Taliban militants fired rockets at the same hotel last month, which is heavily guarded.
ref: Anggota militan Taliban melancarkan roket keatas hotel yang sama bulan lepas yang dikawal ketat.

src: No one was injured in that attack, which came on the same day that a suicide-bomb explosion killed five UN staff members and two Afghans at their quarters in another part of Kabul.
ref: Tiada siapa yang cedera semasa serangan itu, yang datang pada hari yang sama pengeboman berani mati yang membunuh seramai lima staf UN dan dua orang Afghan di kuaters mereka di tempat lain di Kabul.

src: Taliban militants also attacked the Serena Hotel in January 2008, in a commando-style assault that killed at least eight people.
ref: Militan Taliban juga menyerang Hotel Serena pada Januari 2008, pembunuhan jenis komando yang telah mengakibatkan sekurang-kurangnya lapan orang terbunuh.

src: The American Physical Society has awarded its 2010 J. J. Sakurai Prize for Theoretical Particle Physics to six scientists for their contributions to theories on the origin of mass, including the key concepts of the Higgs boson and Higgs mechanism.
ref: Pertubuhan Fizikal Amerika telah menganugerahkan Hadiah Zarah Teori Fizik J. J. Sakurai 2010 kepada enam orang saintis atas sumbangan mereka kepada teori-teori mengenai asal-usul jisim, termasuk konsep-konsep utama boson Higgs dan mekanisme Higgs.

src: The full citation stated the prize was awarded "For elucidation of the properties of spontaneous symmetry breaking in four-dimensional relativistic gauge theory and of the mechanism for the consistent generation of vector boson masses."
ref: Petikan penuh menyatakan bahawa hadiah telah dianugerahkan "Untuk penjelasan sifat-sifat simetri spontan dipecahkan dalam teori kerelatifan tolok empat dimensi dan mekanisme untuk generasi konsisten vektor jisim boson."

src: The papers that introduce this mechanism were published in the journal Physical Review Letters in 1964 and were each recognized as milestone papers by PRL's 50th anniversary celebration.
ref: Kertas-kertas yang memperkenalkan mekanisme ini telah diterbitkan dalam jurnal Surat Kajian Fizikal pada tahun 1964 dan telah diiktiraf sebagai satu kertas penanda dalam sambutan ulang tahun ke-50 PRL itu.

src: The Large Hadron Collider at CERN and the Tevatron in the United States are searching for a particle, the Higgs boson, that will constitute evidence for this theory.
ref: Pelanggaran Hadron Besar di CERN dan Tevatron di Amerika Syarikat untuk mencari satu zarah, Higgs boson, yang akan menjadi bukti bagi teori ini.

src: Because of its importance this particle is often referred to as the "God Particle".
ref: Oleh kerana kepentingannya, zarah ini sering dirujuk sebagai "Zarah Tuhan."

src: The LHC, a vast scientific experiment to smash together sub-atomic particles, recently moved a step closer to its goal.
ref: LHC, satu eksperimen saintifik yang luas untuk melanggar semua zarah sub-atom, baru-baru ini maju setapak lebih dekat kepada matlamatnya.

src: This follows a major setback which shut down the collider for 14 months.
ref: Ini diikuti oleh masalah besar yang menutup pelanggar itu selama 14 bulan.

src: The nation is currently being run by a caretaker government.
ref: Negara itu kini sedang dipimpin oleh kerajaan sementara.

src: Natapei was elected Prime Minister on September 22, 2008, as President of the socialist, Anglophone Vanua'aku Pati party.
ref: Natapei telah dipilih sebagai Perdana Menteri pada 22hb September, 2008, sebagai Presiden parti sosialis, Anglophone Vanua'aku Pati.

src: According to Action Against Hunger the number of children with acute malnutrition has reached almost twice the level of the WHO's emergency threshold of 2% in the Moyamba district of Sierra Leone.
ref: Menurut Tindakan Menentang Kelaparan bilangan kanak-kanak dengan kekurangan zat makanan yang teruk telah mencapai tahap hampir dua kali ganda daripada ambang kecemasan WHO sebanyak 2% di daerah Moyamba di Sierra Leone.

src: Since 2002 the country received $1 billion in aid but the infant mortality rate is almost the highest in the world, lower than Angola but higher than Afghanistan.
ref: Sejak tahun 2002 negara itu menerima $1 bilion dalam bentuk bantuan tetapi kadar kematian bayi adalah hampir yang tertinggi di dunia, lebih rendah daripada Angola tetapi lebih tinggi daripada Afghanistan.

src: The newspaper further reports that the United Nations state that 1 in 8 Sierra Leonean women die giving birth, as compared to 1 in 4,800 in the United States and that life expectancy in Sierra Leone is merely 41 years while in Bangladesh life expectancy reaches 60 years.
ref: Akhbar tersebut selanjutnya melaporkan bahawa Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu menyatakan bahawa 1 daripada 8 wanita mati bersalin di Sierra Leone, berbanding dengan 1 daripada 4,800 di Amerika Syarikat dan bahawa jangka hayat di Sierra Leone hanya 41 tahun sementara di Bangladesh jangka hayat mencecah 60 tahun.

src: "What is crucial now is that Sierra Leone actually receives the necessary funding and technical assistance to realise this objective."
ref: "Apa yang penting sekarang ialah Sierra Leone sebenarnya menerima pembiayaan yang diperlukan dan bantuan teknikal untuk merealisasikan matlamat ini".

src: "It is time that words are being followed up by concrete action."
ref: "Sudah tiba masanya untuk kata-kata disusuli dengan tindakan konkrit".

src: "If not, people who could otherwise be saved will continue to die needlessly every day."
ref: "Jika tidak, orang-orang yang mampu diselamatkan akan terus mati sia-sia setiap hari".

src: While Germany declined to support president Bai Koroma’s "Agenda for Change" and urged to give more consideration to women's welfare the country received support from the European Union, DFID, UNIPSIL, World Bank, IFAD and the African Development Bank.
ref: Manakala Jerman enggan menyokong "Agenda Perubahan" Presiden Bai Koroma itu dan menggesa untuk memberi lebih pertimbangan terhadap kebajikan wanita negara tersebut mendapat bantuan dari Kesatuan Eropah, DFID, UNIPSIL, Bank Dunia, IFAD dan Bank Pembangunan Afrika.

src: From the pledges of $850 million the government of Sierra Leone was hoping for only about $300 millions could be secured, with attached conditionalities concerning the use of funding.
ref: Daripada $850 juta yang dijanjikan kerajaan Sierra Leone berharap kira-kira $300 juta dapat diperoleh, dengan syarat-syarat dikenakan berkenaan penggunaan dana.

src: In a presentation at the Ministry of Finance and Economic Development in Freetown the Unicef representative for Sierra Leone, Mr. Mahimbo Mdoe, expressed gratitude about a pledge of about $1.3 million conveyed by the Ambassador of Japan to Sierra Leone, His Excellency Mr. Keiichi Katakami, and about earlier donations to UNICEF-Sierra Leone in the past years, amounting to over $20 million.
ref: Dalam pembentangan di Kementerian Kewangan dan Pembangunan Ekonomi di Freetown wakil Unicef untuk Sierra Leone, Encik Mahimbo Mdoe, melahirkan penghargaan mengenai perjanjian kira-kira $1,300,000 disampaikan oleh Duta Besar Jepun ke Sierra Leone, Tuan Yang Terutama Encik Keiichi Katakami, dan mengenai sumbangan kepada UNICEF-Sierra Leone pada tahun-tahun yang lalu, yang berjumlah lebih daripada $20 juta.

src: A statement from Iran's Revolutionary Guards said that, after investigation, it reached the conclusion that their illegal entry was a mistake.
ref: Kenyataan dari Pengawal Revolusiner Iran berkata, selepas penyiasatan, ia membawa kepada kesimpulan bahawa kemasukan tanpa izin mereka itu satu kesilapan.

src: Britain's Foreign Office confirmed the release, and said the yachtsmen are being towed to international waters, and were expected to head to Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
ref: Pejabat Luar Negeri Britain mengesahkan pembebasan itu, dan pelayar kapal layar itu ditunda ke perairan antarabangsa, dan dijangka akan menghala ke Dubai, Emiriah Arab Bersatu.

src: Iranian naval forces detained the Britons on the 25th of November as they sailed from Bahrain to Dubai for a race.
ref: Angkatan tentera laut Iran menahan warga Britain itu pada 25 November ketika mereka belayar dari Bahrain ke Dubai bagi tujuan perlumbaan.

src: "We reached the conclusion that they entered Iran’s territorial waters by mistake."
ref: "Kami mencapai kesimpulan bahawa mereka memasuki kawasan perairan Iran dengan tidak sengaja".

src: The news comes hours after British Foreign Secretary David Miliband spoke to his Iranian counterpart Manouchehr Mottaki by phone and pressed him for clear information on the incident.
ref: Berita itu tiba beberapa jam selepas Setiausaha Luar Negeri British, David Miliband berkata kepada rakan sejawatnya di Iran, Manouchehr Mottaki melalui telefon dan meminta beliau untuk maklumat yang jelas mengenai kejadian itu.

src: Brown hailed Pakistan's efforts to "disrupt the activities of al-Qaeda", and referred to them as his "allies", promising to provide another £50 million to support the operations to stabilise the borders of the nation; announcing this pledge, he said "This is your fight but it is also Britain's fight."
ref: Brown memuji usaha Pakistan untuk "mengganggu aktiviti-aktiviti al-Qaeda", dan merujuk kepada mereka sebagai "sekutu" beliau, berjanji untuk menyediakan satu lagi £50 juta bagi menyokong operasi untuk menstabilkan sempadan negara; mengumumkan ikrar ini, beliau berkata "Ini adalah perjuangan kamu tetapi ia juga adalah perjuangan Britain".

src: Gilani said in a press conference today "I doubt the information which you are giving is correct because I don't think Osama Bin Laden is in Pakistan."
ref: Gilani berkata dalam satu sidang akhbar hari ini "Saya meragui maklumat yang kamu berikan adalah benar kerana saya tidak fikir Osama Bin Laden berada di Pakistan".

src: He said that Pakistani officials "are carefully examining" Barack Obama's new Afghanistan plan, which he announced yesterday, before making a decision on whether or not to support it.
ref: Katanya, pegawai Pakistan "sedang memeriksa dengan berhati-hati" atas pelan Afghanistan baru Barack Obama, yang diumumkan semalam, sebelum membuat keputusan sama ada menyokongnya atau tidak.

src: A deadly hotel bombing in Mogadishu, the capital of Somalia, has killed at least fifteen people, including three Somali Cabinet ministers, earlier today.
ref: Satu pengeboman maut hotel di Mogadishu, ibu negara Somalia, telah membunuh sekurang-kurangnya lima belas orang, termasuk tiga menteri Kabinet Somalia, awal hari ini.

src: Eyewitnesses reported that a suicide bomber gained access to the venue dressed as a woman, donning a full abaya and a veil.
ref: Para saksi melaporkan bahawa seorang pengebom berani mati dapat masuk ke tempat itu dengan berpakaian seperti seorang wanita, memakai abaya dan tudung yang lengkap.

src: The attacker was wearing an explosive strapped to his torso, but was not patted down by security.
ref: Penyerang memakai bahan letupan yang diikat pada badannya, tetapi tidak ditepuk-tepuk oleh pengawal keselamatan.

src: The director of Median Hospital, Ali Yusuf, commented that "forty people with shrapnel wounds, including students and medical doctors, have been hospitalized today.
ref: Pengarah Hospital Median, Ali Yusuf, mengulas bahawa "empat puluh orang luka terkena serpihan termasuk pelajar dan doktor perubatan, telah dimasukkan ke hospital hari ini.

src: Former Islamic Courts Union members at the scene identified the bomber, whose head and face had been completely shaven, as a member of al-Shabab, the ultra-conservative Islamist group believed to have links to al-Qaeda.
ref: Bekas ahli Kesatuan Mahkamah Islam di tempat kejadian dikenal pasti sebagai pengebom, yang kepala dan mukanya dicukur sepenuhnya, sebagai ahli al- Shabab, kumpulan Islam ultra-konservatif itu dipercayai mempunyai kaitan dengan al- Qaeda.

src: The blast rocked inside the hotel, killing three ministers and wounding another one."
ref: Letupan itu menggegarkan dalaman hotel, membunuh tiga orang menteri dan mencederakan seorang lagi."

src: Adow served as the foreign secretary of the insurgent Islamic Courts Union when it took power in 2006.
ref: Adow berkhidmat sebagai setiausaha asing untuk pemberontak Kesatuan Mahkamah Islam apabila ia mengambil alih kuasa pada tahun 2006.

src: Mohamed Mohamoud, an attending graduate of the ceremony, said that he personally saw the remains of the health minister on the ground, as well as the corpses of other government officials.
ref: Mohamed Mohamoud, graduan yang menghadiri majlis itu, berkata bahawa dia sendiri melihat mayat menteri kesihatan itu di atas lantai, di samping mayat pegawai-pegawai kerajaan yang lain.

src: They have been studying in such a horrific environment, and today they passed away without benefiting from their education.
ref: Mereka telah belajar di persekitaran yang begitu dasyat, dan hari ini mereka meninggal dunia tanpa bermanfaat daripada pendidikan mereka.

src: Two journalists, a reporter for Radio Shabelle and a cameraman with al-Arabia TV, were also found dead from the explosion.
ref: Dua wartawan, seorang wartawan Radio Shabelle dan jurukamera TV al- Arabia, juga didapati mati akibat letupan.

src: The National Union of Somali Journalists has issued a statement condemning the attack and expressing outrage at the loss of their colleagues.
ref: Kesatuan Kebangsaan Wartawan Somalia telah mengeluarkan kenyataan mengutuk serangan itu dan menyatakan kemarahan atas kehilangan rakan-rakan mereka.

src: Somalia is one of the world's most dangerous places for journalists to work.
ref: Somalia merupakan salah satu tempat paling berbahaya di dunia untuk pekerjaan wartawan.

src: Hotel Shamo is often chosen by government officials to host events and at one time was a popular lodging option for foreign journalists.
ref: Hotel Shamo sering dipilih oleh pegawai-pegawai kerajaan untuk menjadi tuan rumah majlis dan pada satu masa adalah pilihan penginapan popular untuk wartawan asing.

src: The hotel security staff say that they were kicked out of the room prior to the ceremony, as government security officials wanted sole handling of the event.
ref: Pihak keselamatan hotel mengatakan bahawa mereka telah diusir dari bilik itu sebelum majlis bermula, pegawai-pegawai keselamatan kerajaan mahu pengendalian tunggal upacara itu.

src: The government officials were attending the graduation of 43 students from the local Banadir University.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai kerajaan telah menghadiri istiadat graduasi 43 pelajar dari universiti tempatan Universiti Banadir.

src: Until recently, suicide bombings were an unusual practice in Somalia.
ref: Sehingga kebelankangan ini, pengeboman berani mati adalah satu amalan luar biasa di Somalia.

src: Two vehicles containing explosives were given entry to the AMISOM base and subsequently blew up.
ref: Dua kenderaan yang mengandungi bahan letupan dengan dibenarkan masuk ke pangkalan AMISOM dan seterusnya meletup.

src: The AMISOM forces are mandated with the protection of key city sites such as the airport, seaport, and presidential palace.
ref: Kuasa-kuasa AMISOM diberi mandat dengan perlindungan tapak utama bandar seperti lapangan terbang, pelabuhan, dan istana presiden.

src: The Wiltshire town beat 24 others in a competition to become the first ever to be twinned with the famous resort.
ref: Bandar Wiltshire telah mengalahkan 24 bandar lain di dalam sebuah pertandingan untuk menjadi bandar kembar pertama tempat peranginan terkenal itu.

src: Rebecca Warren, a local building society worker, created a poem and video praising Swindon which won over the judges.
ref: Rebecca Warren, seorang pekerja bangunan masyarakat tempatan, telah menghasilkan satu puisi dan video yang memuji Swindon dan telah memenangi hati para hakim.

src: A sign marking the twinning is planned for the roundabout.
ref: Satu papan tanda menunjukkan kembaran itu dirancangkan bagi bulatan tersebut.

src: Other towns shortlisted in the competition included Aberdeen, Blackpool, Milton Keynes, and Cambridge.
ref: Bandar lain di dalam senarai terpilih pertandingan itu termasuk Aberdeen, Blackpool, Milton Keynes, dan Cambridge.

src: The Philippine military said today that gunmen have seized at least 75 people, most of them schoolchildren, after a raid on a remote elementary school in the southern Philippines.
ref: Askar Filipina hari ini berkata lelaki bersenjata telah merampas sekurang-kurangnya 75 orang, kebanyakannya budak sekolah, selepas satu serbuan di sekolah kebangsaan terpencil di selatan Filipina.

src: Military officials said that about fifteen gunmen from the Manobo tribe abducted some of the residents of a village on the Mindanao island on Thursday.
ref: Askar rasmi berkata bahawa lebih kurang lima belas orang lelaki bersenjata dari puak Manobo menculik sebahgian dari penduduk kampung di pulau Mindanao pada hari Khamis.

src: The group, reportedly armed with M-14 and M-16 rifles, captured four teachers and the school principal of the New Maasim Elementary School, and an unknown number of students.
ref: Kumpulan itu, dilaporkan memiliki senapang M-14 dan M-16, menangkap empat guru sekolah dan guru besar di Sekolanh Kebangsaan New Maasim, dan jumlah pelajar yang tidak diketahui.

src: The seizure occurred shortly after the flag ceremony, when they were due to start classes.
ref: Serbuan itu berlaku sejurus selepas acara bendera, semasa meraka mahu memulakan kelas.

src: Two foresters for the Department of Environment and Natural Resources were also taken hostage.
ref: Dua pengawas hutan untuk Bahagian Alam Sekitar dan Sumber Asli juga diambil sebagai tebusan.

src: Negotiations are being made to release the captives, according to a local police chief.
ref: Perundingan telah dibuat untuk melepaskan tawanan, menurut ketua polis tempatan.

src: Industry Canada announced today that the government, through the Privy Council Office, has effectively overturned a decision by the Canadian Radio-Television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) regarding the status of Globalive Wireless Management Corporation, which was set to launch in November under the WIND Mobile brand.
ref: Industry Canada hari ini mengumumkan bahawa kerajaan, melalui Pejabat Majlis Privi, telah membatalkan keputusan Radio-Televisyen dan Telekomunikasi Kanada (CRTC) mengenai status Perbadanan Pengurusan Tanpa Wayar Globalive, yang telah bersedia untuk dilancarkan pada bulan November di bawah jenama bergerak WIND.

src: In a release issued this morning, Tony Clement, Minister of Industry is quoted as saying "Globalive is a Canadian company, and meets Canadian ownership and control requirements under the Telecommunications Act," differing with the CRTC's decision, where they ruled that control-in-fact of Globalive was with Cairo-based Orascom Telecom Holding S.A.E., the corporation holding much of Globalive's equity and debt.
