ref: Selepas tragedi itu, kerajaan telah mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan memeriksa bangunan yang berusia lebih daripada 50 tahun dalam satu bulan.

src: The government has restricted access to buildings at 45G and 45H as they were in danger.
ref: Kerajaan telah mengehadkan akses ke bangunan di 45G dan 45H kerana mereka berada dalam bahaya.

src: Two US soldiers killed in Afghanistan yesterday were shot by an Afghan interpreter in Wardek province south-west of Kabul, according to NATO.
ref: Dua orang tentera US yang dibunuh di Afghanistan semalam selepas ditembak oleh seorang penterjemah bahasa warga Afghan di wilayah Wardek barat daya Kabul, menurut NATO.

src: An official said the translator shot them at an eastern Afghanistan outpost before he was shot dead by other soldiers.
ref: Seorang pengawai berkata penterjemah itu telah menembak mereka di satu pertahanan di timur Afghanistan sebelum dia ditembak mati oleh tentera lain.

src: It is not yet clear why the interpreter started shooting; However, the attacker seemed to be a "disgruntled employee", as opposed to a militant, according to a US military official.
ref: Sebab mengapa penterjemah bahasa itu memulakan tembakan masih belum dijelaskan; Namun, penyerang itu sepertinya adalah seorang "pekerja yang tidak berpuas hati," dan bukanlah seorang ahli militan, menurut kepada seorang pengawai tentera US.

src: The interpreter had supposedly argued with the soldiers over pay and treatment before opening fire.
ref: Penterjemah bahasa itu dikatakan telah bergaduh dengan tentera-tentera itu berkenaan upah dan layanan terhadapnya sebelum menembak.

src: NATO originally only released a terse statement yesterday, stating that two soldiers and one civilian had been killed.
ref: NATO pada awalnya hanya mengeluarkan satu kenyataan ringkas semalam, yang menyatakan bahawa dua orang tentera dan seorang orang awam telah terbunuh.

src: It is not thought that the two incidents are related.
ref: Kedua-dua kejadian tidak difikirkan mempunyai kaitan.

src: NATO called the deaths "regrettable" and is to carry out an investigation.
ref: NATO menyatakan yang kematian itu adalah "disesalkan" dan akan membuat siasatan ke atasnya.

src: Opposition leader Kim Beazley has said that Labor supported the plan.
ref: Ketua Pembangkang, Kim Beazley telah berkata bahawa Parti Buruh menyokong rancangan tersebut.

src: Mr Beazley has been critical of the government in recent weeks because of its military focus on Iraq rather than Afghanistan, which he says is the source of the terrorist threat.
ref: Encik Beazley telah mengkritik kerajaan dalam beberapa minggu kebelakangan ini kerana fokus ketenteraan ke atas Iraq dan bukan Afghanistan, yang katanya adalah sumber ancaman pengganas.

src: Beazley offered that it has been "obvious for some time that the job was only partially completed when the commitment was made earlier."
ref: Beazley menawarkan bahawa ia telah "jelas untuk seketika bahawa tugas hanya siap separuh walaupun komitmen telah dibuat sebelum ini."

src: The commitment comes amid a resurgence of the Taliban and an increase in insurgency activities in Afghanistan.
ref: Komitmen datang semasa kebangkitan Taliban dan peningkatan aktiviti pemberontakan di Afghanistan.

src: "The progress that has been made in the establishment of a legitimate government in Afghanistan has come under increasing attack and pressure from the Taliban - and some elements of al-Qaeda," Mr Howard said.
ref: "Kemajuan yang dicapai dalam pertubuhan kerajaan yang sah di Afghanistan berlaku di bawah peningkatan serangan dan tekanan daripada Taliban - dan beberapa elemen al-Qaeda," kata Encik Howard.

src: The additional troop commitment has been welcomed by the Afghani government.
ref: Komitmen tentera tambahan telah dialu-alukan oleh kerajaan Afghanistan.

src: Lutfullah Mashal, Afghanistan's Interior Ministry spokesman, said that assistance with security or reconstruction and development is always welcome, however he expressed disappointment that the deployment would only be for 12 months.
ref: Jurucakap Kementerian Dalam Negeri Afghanistan, Lutfullah Mashal, berkata bantuan keselamatan atau pembinaan semula dan pembangunan sentiasa dialu-alukan, bagaimanapun beliau berasa kecewa kerana penempatan itu hanya selama 12 bulan.

src: Mr Howard has said that he does not like to make open ended commitments, and also stated that extra security would be needed for the APEC summit in 2007.
ref: Encik Howard telah berkata bahawa dia tidak suka membuat komitmen terbuka, dan juga menyatakan bahawa keselamatan tambahan akan diperlukan untuk sidang kemuncak APEC pada tahun 2007.

src: "At the time of the APEC meeting and in the months leading up to it, the need in this country is for a heightened elite security capacity," he said.
ref: "Pada masa mesyuarat APEC dan pada bulan-bulan sebelum ia bermula, keperluan di negara ini adalah kapasiti keselamatan elit yang tertinggi," katanya.

src: Trains were not stopped but the two-minute silence was announced and marked through the underground and overground services.
ref: Kereta api tidak berhenti tetapi berdiam diri untuk dua minit telah diumumkan dan ditandakan melalui perkhidmatan bawah tanah dan atas tanah.

src: At the bombing sites, wreaths were laid in respect, with hundreds gathering at the sites to mark the silence.
ref: Di tapak pengeboman, lingkaran bunga diletakkan untuk penghormatan, dengan beratus-ratus orang berkumpul di tapak itu untuk menandakan kesunyian.

src: At Buckingham Palace, Queen Elizabeth II stood on the forecourt in silence, accompanied by Foot Guards.
ref: Di Istana Buckingham, Queen Elizabeth II berdiri di perkarangan dalam diam, diiringi oleh Pengawal Kaki.

src: Prime Minister Tony Blair marked the silence in the garden of 10 Downing Street, and Mayor of London Ken Livingstone paid his respects at Trafalgar Square.
ref: Perdana Menteri Tony Blair menanda kesunyian di taman 10 Downing Street, dan Datuk Bandar London Ken Livingstone memberi penghormatan beliau di Trafalgar Square.

src: Yesterday, Anfield stadium fell in silence during the Liverpool F.C.
ref: Semalam, Anfield stadium berdiam semasa liga bola sepak EUFA Liverpool F.C.

src: In Paris, France, President Jacques Chirac stood in silence at the Elysee Palace before taking part in the Bastille Day parade.
ref: Di Paris, Perancis, Presiden Jacques Chirac berdiri dalam diam di Elysee Palace sebelum mengambil bahagian dalam perarakan Hari Bastille.

src: The European Parliament marked the silence along with European Commission offices across the EU.
ref: Parlimen Eropah menanda diam bersama-sama dengan pejabat-pejabat Suruhanjaya Eropah di seluruh EU.

src: The hurricane, which has been upgraded to Category 2 status, hit the island early this morning and has caused widespread damage.
ref: Taufan tersebut, yang telah dinaik taraf ke status Kategori 2, melanda pulau itu awal pagi ini dan telah menyebabkan kerosakan yang meluas.

src: It has been reported that many buildings have lost their roofs and there has been much flooding.
ref: Ia telah dilaporkan bahawa banyak bangunan telah kehilangan bumbung dan terdapat banyak kejadian banjir.

src: The storm affected the northern parishes of St. Patrick's and St. Andrew's the worst and also caused considerable damage to the nearby islands of Carriacou and Petite Martinique.
ref: Ribut menjejaskan kariah utara St Patrick dan St Andrew yang paling teruk dan juga menyebabkan kerosakan besar ke pulau-pulau berhampiran di Carriacou dan Petite Martinique.

src: Earlier this year Hurricane Dennis hit Cuba and Haiti, leaving 41 people dead.
ref: Awal tahun ini Taufan Dennis melanda Cuba and Haiti, lmenyebabkan 41 orang mati.

src: Emily is the fifth tropical storm to develop this hurricane season.
ref: Emily adalah ribut tropika kelima yang terbentuk musim taufan ini.

src: It was the earliest time on record that five named storms had formed in the Atlantic.
ref: Ia adalah masa paling awal yang dirakamkan bahawa lima ribut yang bernama telah terbentuk di Atlantik.

src: The British Royal Navy, which usually deploys two ships to the Caribbean, has placed the destroyer HMS Liverpool and the tanker RFA Wave Knight on standby.
ref: Tentera Laut Diraja Britain, yang biasanya menghantar dua kapal ke Caribbean, telah meletakkan kapal pemusnah HMS Liverpool dan kapal tangki RFA Wave Knight dalam siap sedia.

src: During Hurricane Frances and Ivan last year, HMS Richmond and RFA Wave Ruler were actively involved in humanitarian relief.
ref: Semasa taufan Frances dan Ivan tahun lepas, HMS Richmond dan RFA Wave Raja telah terlibat secara aktif dalam bantuan kemanusiaan.

src: Prime Minister Keith Mitchell of Grenada had effectively run his country for seven hours from Richmond after his home had been destroyed.
ref: Perdana Menteri Keith Mitchell Grenada telah mentadbir negaranya secara berkesan selama tujuh jam dari Richmond selepas rumahnya telah musnah.

src: Serie A champions Juventus have confirmed the $24,000,000 (£13,700,000, €20,000,000) capture of Arsenal captain Patrick Vieira.
ref: Juara Liga Seria A Juventus telah mengesahkan pembelian kapten pasukan Arsenal Patrick Viera bernilai $24,000,000 (£13,700,000, €20,000,000).

src: The Frenchman joins the side despite being strongly linked with a move to Real Madrid over the last two summers.
ref: Pemain Perancis itu menyertai pasukan tersebut walaupun sering dikaitkan dengan perpindahan ke Real Madrid sejak 2 bulan yang lalu.

src: Vieira ends his Premiership stay after nine years in England since he became Arsene Wenger's first signing at Arsenal.
ref: Vieira mengakhiri kerjayanya di Premiership setelah 9 tahun di England sejak beliau menjadi pembelian Arsene Wenger yang pertama di Arsenal.

src: China looks to launch it's second manned space mission in October, two years after it's first flight, a newspaper reported Friday.
ref: China berharap untuk melancarkan misi angkasa yang dipandu manusia yang keduanya pada bulan Oktober, dua tahun selepas penerbangan pertamanyanya, lapor sebuah akhbar semalam.

src: The government planned to launch a two-man crew into orbit in September or October on a five to six day flight.
ref: Kerajaan itu merancang untuk menghantar dua anak kapal lelaki ke orbit pada bulan September atau Oktober dalam satu penerbangan selama lima hingga enam hari.

src: The Shenzhou VI capsule will "preferably be launched in early October," said Sun Weigang the director of the Space Department of the China Aerospace Science and Technology Corp, said in the report in the China Daily newspaper.
ref: Kapsul Shenzhou VI akan "sebaik-baiknya dilancar pada awal Oktober," kata Sun Weigang pengarah Jabatan Angkasa Perbadanan Sains Angkasa Lepas dan Teknologi China, berkata dalam satu laporan dalam akhbar Harian China.

src: Chinese officials say to they plan to land an unmanned probe on the moon by 2010 and operate a space station.
ref: Pegawai dari China berkata mereka merancang untuk mendaratkan sebuah prob tanpa manusia di bulan pada tahun 2010 dan mengendalikan sebuah stesen angkasa.

src: Research by a team from Canada have published a report in the magazine Science stating that seabirds are the main carriers of pollution in coastal ponds in the Arctic.
ref: Kajian oleh kumpulan daripada Kanada telah menerbitkan report di dalam majalah Science menyatakan bahawa burung laut adalah merupakan pembawa utama kepada pencemaran di tambak di Arctic.

src: They showed that local sources of pollution are rare, meaning that seabirds played a proportionally greater role in local pollution.
ref: Mereka menunjukkan bahawa sumber setempat kepada pencemaran jarang berlaku, bermakna burung laut memainkan peranan besar dalam pencemaran setempat.

src: Starr was the 2401st individual to have a star awarded on the walk.
ref: Starr adalah individu ke-2401 yang mempunyai bintang anugerah pada jalan itu.

src: Starr said outside of the event: "This is the start of the next 50 years of stars."
ref: Starr berkata di luar upacara itu: "Ini adalah permulaan untuk 50 tahun bintang-bintang akan datang".

src: According to Reuters," fellow Beatles bandmate Sir Paul McCartney was unable to attend the ceremony due to the fact that he was in England at the time", Starr said.
ref: Menurut Reuters, "Rakan Beatles Sir Paul McCartney tidak dapat menghadiri majlis tersebut kerana bahawa dia berada di England pada masa itu," kata Starr.

src: Less than twelve months before Ringo was given his star on the Walk of Fame, Paul McCartney assisted in revealing a star for another former Beatles member, the late George Harrison.
ref: Kurang daripada dua belas bulan sebelum Ringo dianugerahkan bintangnya di Walk of Fame, Paul McCartney membantu dalam menganugerahkan bintang untuk satu lagi bekas anggota Beatles, mendiang George Harrison.

src: The late John Lennon was also given a star on the pavement, which means that Paul McCartney is now the only member of the Beatles who has not yet been awarded a star.
ref: Mendiang John Lennon juga dianugerahkan bintang di turapan itu, maka bermaksud Paul McCartney kini adalahsatu-satunya anggota Beatles yang masih belum dianugerahkan bintang.

src: He referred to the other members of the Beatles as his "brothers".
ref: Beliau merujuk kepada ahli-ahli lain dari Beatles sebagai "saudara" beliau.

src: He also said about them: "They looked out for me, and I looked out for them."
ref: Beliau juga berkata tentang mereka: "Mereka menjaga saya, dan saya menjaga mereka".

src: American Alpine ski racer James Heuga has died at the age of 66.
ref: Pelumba ski American Alpine, James Heuga telah meninggal dunia pada usia 66 tahun.

src: Richard Rokos, a coach who helped Heuga with his training in his later years commented on his death.
ref: Richard Rokos, jurulatih yang membantu Heuga dalam latihannya pada tahun berikutnya memberi komen ke atas kematian tersebut.

src: He said "He tried to do his best, and when he didn't do as well as he was hoping for, he was disappointed.
ref: Dia berkata "Beliau cuba untuk melakukan yang terbaik, dan apabila beliau tidak dapat melakukan seperti mana yang diharapkan, beliau kecewa.

src: Heuga competed for the United States at the 1964 Winter Olympics.
ref: Heuga bertanding mewakili Amerika Syarikat dalam Olimpik Musim Sejuk pada 1964.

src: Heuga, along with Billy Kidd who won silver in the same event became the first Americans to win a medal in Alpine ski racing.
ref: Heuga, bersama dengan Billy Kidd yang memenangi pingat perak dalam pertandingan yang sama menjadi warga Amerika pertama memenangi pingat dalam perlumbaan ski Alpine.

src: Forced to retire early from competitive sport due to multiple sclerosis, Heuga continued to train as an athlete.
ref: Dipaksa untuk bersara awal dari pertandingan sukan disebabkan sklerosis berbilang, Heuga meneruskan latihan sebagai atlit.

src: In 1984 he opened up the Jimmie Heuga Center to help sufferers with multiple sclerosis.
ref: Pada 1984 beliau membuka Pusat Jimmie Heuga untuk membantu mereka yang menghidap sklerosis berbilang.

src: Billy Kidd, whom he shared the podium with at the 1964 games, said “Obviously, the world knew him for his accomplishments as a ski racer, but I admire him even more because of how he led his life, especially with the challenges of MS.”
ref: Billy Kidd, yang juga berkongsi podium dengannya dalam perlawanan 1964, berkata "Yang jelas, dunia mengenal beliau disebabkan pencapaian beliau sebagai pelumba ski, tetapi saya mengaguminya lebih lagi disebabkan cara dia mengendalikan kehidupannya, lebih-lebih lagi dengan cabaran MS."

src: Several other possible victims were soon rushed by ambulance to a nearby hospital.
ref: Beberapa lagi yang dikhuatiri mangsa dikejarkan ke hospital berdekatan dengan ambulan.

src: The surrounding area has since been cordoned off, and the entire university is currently under lockdown.
ref: Persekitaran kawasan tersebut telah disekat, dan seluruh universiti pada masa ini dikunci.

src: Other reports suggest that the death toll could be as high as 25.
ref: Laporan lain menyatakah bahawa kematian mungkin setinggi 25 orang.

src: Rescuers were still trying to free bodies from the wreckage of the trains more than eight hours after the crash, which occurred in snowy conditions at 08:28 local time (0728 UTC) near the station of Buizingen in the municipality of Halle, about 15 kilometres southwest of the Belgian capital.
ref: Pasukan penyelamat masih cuba untuk mengeluarkan mayat dari bangkai kereta api lebih dari lapan jam selepas nahas, yang berlaku semasa keadaan bersalji pada jam 08:28 waktu tempatan (UTC 0728) berdekatan stesen Buizigen di ibu negeri Halle, lebih kurang 15 kilometer barat daya dari bandar Belgian.

src: The collision saw the first two carriages of one train being forced upwards into the air over the first carriage of the second train.
ref: Perlanggaran melihatkan dua gerabak pertama oleh salah satu kereta api yang ditolak keatas keudara oleh gerabak pertama kereta api satu lagi.

src: Eyewitnesses described the collision as "brutal", with passengers being thrown "violently" around the carriages.
ref: Saksi menggambarkan perlanggaran itu sebagai "brutal," dengan penumpang dilemparkan ke sekeliling dengan "ganas".

src: Television footage showed the two smashed locomotives forced up in the air, with passenger cars strewn over a wide area and dazed survivors wandering at the crash site.
ref: Rakaman televisyen menunjukkan dua perlanggaran lokomotif yang ditolak ke udara, dengan penumpang gerabak tercampak di kawasan yang luas dan mangsa yang selamat berkeliaran di kawasan nahas.

src: Initial reports suggest that the Leuven–Braine-le-Comte train was on the wrong line.
ref: Laporan awal mencadangkan bahawa kereta api Leuven-Braine-le-Comte berada di landasan yang salah.

src: It is not known if the train went through a red signal or if there was a problem with the signalling.
ref: Masih belum diketahui sama ada kereta api melanggar lampu merah atau terdapat masalah dengan isyarat lampu.

src: Thalys services between Brussels and Cologne have now resumed, but services to Amsterdam and Paris are still suspended.
ref: Servis Thalys antara Brussels dan Colonge telah beroperasi semula, tetapi servis ke Amsterdam dan Paris masih lagi ditangguhkan.

src: One passenger on board, Christian Wampach, described conditions on board the train, "It was a nightmare."
ref: Seorang penumpang diatas kereta api, Christian Wampach, menggambarkan keadaan dalam kereta api itu "macam mimpi buruk".

src: "There were a number of people injured in my car but I think all the dead were in the first car."
ref: "Terdapat beberapa orang di dalam gerabak saya cedera tetapi saya rasa semua orang mati di gerabak pertama".

src: Another passenger, Patricia Lallemand, said, "When we came out we saw dead bodies lying next to the tracks, some mutilated."
ref: Seorang lagi penumpang, Patricia Lallemans, berkata, "Semasa kami keluar kami nampak mayat terbaring di sebelah trek, sebahagiannya cacat".

src: The British tabloid The Daily Mirror today suggested that the London bombers may not have planned to commit suicide, while a Scotland Yard spokesman said they have not definitely confirmed that the four men intended to die when they carried out the attacks.
ref: Tabloid Britain The Daily Mirror hari ini mencadangkan bahawa pengebom London mungkin tidak merancang untuk membunuh diri, manakala jurucakap Scotland Yard berkata, mereka belum pasti mengesahkan bahawa keempat-empat lelaki bertujuan untuk mati apabila mereka melakukan serangan itu.

src: The Daily Mirror claims that the bombers brought return rail tickets to Luton, and that they purchased pay and display car park tickets before boarding the train at Luton Station.
ref: Daily Mirror mendakwa bahawa pengebom membeli tiket pulang balik kereta api ke Luton, dan mereka membeli dan memaparkan tiket letak kereta sebelum menaiki kereta api di Stesen Luton.

src: The tabloid paper also states how the bombers all had personal items on their person at the time of the attacks, such as wallets, driving licences and bank cards.
ref: Akhbar tabloid juga menyatakan bagaimana kesemua pengebom mempunyai barang-barang peribadi mereka pada masa serangan, seperti dompet, lesen memandu dan kad bank.

src: It also points to evidence from the bombers' families, where two of the men had pregnant wives.
ref: Ia juga menunjukkan bukti daripada keluarga pengebom, di mana dua daripada lelaki itu mempunyai isteri yang mengandung.

src: This was probably done to protect their master's identity, the paper suggested, since there was a high probability the bombers would be caught had they lived.
ref: Ini mungkin dilakukan untuk melindungi identiti tuan mereka, akhbar-akhbar menjangkakan, kerana terdapat kebarangkalian yang tinggi pengebom akan ditangkap jika mereka masing hidup.

src: According to an announcement made by the Office for National Statistics (ONS) on Tuesday, the inflation rate of the United Kingdom measured by the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increased to 3.5% in January 2010, an increase of 0.6% from December 2009.
ref: Menurut pengumuman yang dibuat oleh Pejabat Statistik Kebangsaan (ONS) pada hari Selasa, kadar inflasi di United Kingdom yang diukur oleh Indeks Harga Pengguna (CPI) meningkat ke paras 3.5% pada bulan Januari 2010, iaitu peningkatan sebanyak 0.6% dari bulan Disember 2009.

src: The causes of this inflation rise include a 70% rise in oil prices, and value added tax recently being increased to 17.5%.
ref: Punca-punca kenaikan inflasi ini ialah kenaikan harga minyak sebanyak 70% dan Cukai Nilai Tambahan yang baru-baru ini telah meningkat ke 17.5%.

src: Meanwhile, the underlying rate of RPI increased from 3.8% to 4.6% over the same period.
ref: Sementara itu, kadar asas RPI meningkat dari 3.8% kepada 4.6% dalam tempoh yang sama.

src: The British Government has an inflation target of 2%, which was surpassed by more than 1%.
ref: Ini telah melebihi 1% daripada sasaran inflasi Kerajaan British yang sebanyak 2%.

src: For this reason, Mervyn King, who is the Governor of the Bank of England has written a required explanatory letter to Chancellor of the Exchequer Alistair Darling.
ref: Atas sebab ini, Mervyn King, yang merupakan Gabenor Bank Negara England telah menulis surat penjelasan yang diperlukan kepada Canselor Perbendaharaan, Alistair Darling.

src: In the letter, King wrote: "Although it is likely to remain high over the next few months, inflation is more likely than not to fall back to the target in the second half of this year."
ref: Dalam surat itu, King telah menulis: "Walaupun ia mungkin kekal tinggi dalam tempoh beberapa bulan akan datang, inflasi adalah lebih cenderung untuk kembali ke sasaran pada pertengahan kedua tahun ini."

src: Alistair Darling then wrote a letter in response, which said that the future expectations of the inflation was "subject to some uncertainty" as countries around the world continue to recover from what he called the "deepest downturn in modern times".
ref: Alistair Darling menulis surat balasan, berkata bahawa jangkaan masa depan inflasi adalah "tertakluk kepada beberapa ketidakpastian" kerana negara-negara di seluruh dunia terus pulih daripada apa yang dipanggil "kemelesetan terdalam di zaman moden" ini.

src: The battle began at about 13:00 local time (12:00 UTC), ending about four hours later, with both foot soldiers and tanks involved, although no significant deployment of the military was reported.
ref: Pertempuran itu bermula kira-kira jam 13:00 waktu tempatan (12:00 UTC), yang berakhir kira-kira empat jam kemudian, dengan kedua-dua pasukan berjalan kaki dan kereta kebal terlibat, walaupun tidak ada kerahan besar tentera telah dilaporkan.

src: The morning after the battle, the streets were relatively quiet, and the only significant military presence is heavy artillery around the presidential palace.
ref: Pagi selepas pertempuran itu, jalan-jalan agak tenang, dan hanya meriam berat di sekitar istana presiden menunjukkan kehadiran tentera.

src: Additionally, a curfew has been imposed, and the military has closed Niger's borders.
ref: Selain itu, perintah berkurung telah dikenakan, dan tentera telah menutup sempadan Niger.

src: Despite the crisis, the government has yet to release an official statement as to its status.
ref: Walaupun dengan krisis itu, kerajaan masih belum mengeluarkan kenyataan rasmi mengenai statusnya.

src: The West African group of countries Ecowas has already dispatched a delegation to talk to the group responsible for the coup.
ref: Kumpulan Afrika Barat negara-negara Ecowas telah menghantar satu delegasi untuk berbincang dengan kumpulan yang bertanggungjawab atas rampasan kuasa itu.

src: These actions have led to increasing pressure against him and the government, culminating with a thousands-strong demonstration against the government last week.
ref: Tindakan ini telah membawa kepada peningkatan tekanan menentang beliau dan kerajaan, dan memuncak dengan beribu demonstrasi kuat menentang kerajaan pada minggu lepas.

src: "We would like to see a member of Congress look into whether or not the president committed impeachable offenses," said John Bonifaz, a constitutional lawyer.
ref: "Kami telah mengadakan perbincangan dengan beberapa pejabat".

src: "We've been having that discussion with a number of offices."
ref: Tetapi Conyers masih enggan mengambil langkah yang seberani itu.

src: But Conyers is reluctant to take such a bold step just yet.
ref: "Keinginan saya pada masa ini adalah tidak melakukan sesuatu seperti itu," kata Conyers, walaupun dia berkata dia mahu menekan satu siasatan dengan cara-cara lain, termasuk menghantar penyiasat-penyiasat jawatankuasa ke London.

src: The Resolution of Inquiry is a privileged resolution, which means that if it is not acted on in 14 legislative days after it is introduced, the member of Congress who introduced it is entitled to request that it be brought to the House floor for a vote.
ref: Resolusi Siasatan adalah resolusi istimewa, bermaksud bahawa jika tindakan tidak diambil dalam 14 hari perundangan selepas ia diperkenalkan, anggota Kongres yang memperkenalkannya berhak untuk meminta supaya ia dibawa ke Dewan untuk pengundian.

src: The committee may take the matter up right away, and could vote it down before the August recess.
ref: Jawatankuasa itu mungkin akan membawa perkara itu dengan segera, dan boleh mengadakan undi penentuan sebelum tamat penggal pada bulan Ogos.

src: A multi-center US study of 748 patients, who were to undergo treatment for coronary artery disease, has found that prayer by Christian, Muslim, Jewish, and Buddhist groups had no measurable effects on the medical health of the study subjects.
ref: Satu kajian Pusat Berbilang Kajian AS dengan 748 pesakit, yang menjalani rawatan bagi penyakit arteri koronari, telah mendapati bahawa doa oleh agama Kristian, Islam, Yahudi, dan Buddha tidak memberi kesan yang boleh diukur kepada kajian dalam subjek perubatan kesihatan.

src: The study, published in the 16 July 2005 issue of The Lancet, found that the likelihood of an adverse cardiovascular event in hospital, re-admission or death within six months was unaffected by prayer.
ref: Penyelidikan tersebut, yang diterbitkan dalam The Lancet terbitan 16 Julai 2005, mendapati bahawa kemungkinan sesuatu keadaan buruk kardiovaskular terjadi, kemasukan semula atau kematian di hospital dalam tempoh enam bulan adalah tidak terjejas oleh doa.

src: Practitioners qualified to Level 1 Healing Touch taught the patient relaxation techniques and played soothing music before applying 21 Healing Touch hand positions, over a 40 minute session.
ref: Pengamal yang berkelayakan untuk Tahap 1 Sentuhan Pemulihan mengajar teknik-teknik bersantai kepada pesakit dan bermain muzik yang menenangkan sebelum memulakan Sentuhan Pemulihan 21 lokasi, sepanjang sesi 40 minit.

src: However, while the set of patients was evenly split, only 7 patients who received MIT therapy died, and 20 patients who did not receive it died.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kumpulan pesakit telah dipecahkan sama rata, hanya 7 pesakit yang menerima terapi MIT meninggal dunia, dan 20 pesakit yang tidak menerima ia meninggal dunia.

src: One hypothesis they propose for such effects are "non-local features of consciousness based theoretically around observations in quantum physics."
ref: Salah satu hipotesis mereka mencadangkan untuk kesan-kesan tersebut adalah "ciri-ciri bukan kesedaran sendiri dan berdasarkan teori pemerhatian dalam fizik kuantum."

src: The Speaker of the Bundestag, Wolfgang Thierse, welcomed the decision and urged the parties to conduct fair campaigns.
ref: Yang di-Pertua Bundestag, Wolfgang Thierse, mengalu-alukan keputusan itu dan menggesa pihak-pihak untuk mengadakan kempen yang adil.

src: Chancellor Schröder also paid his respect to Köhler, calling his decision confident and again expressed that he intents to resume the good way on which Germany is heading under his leadership.
ref: Canselor Schröder juga menghormati Köhler, mengatakan keputusannya berkeyakinan dan sekali lagi menyatakan bahawa dia ingin meneruskan ragam baik seperti mana arah Jerman menuju di bawah kepimpinan beliau.

src: The Chair of the conservative Christian Democrats (CDU) and her party's candidate for chancellor, Angela Merkel, welcomed the call for early elections and wants to get Germany on the right track if her party gets to power in September.
ref: Pengerusi konservatif Demokrat Kristian (CDU) dan calon parti untuk Canselor, Angela Merkel, mengalu-alukan seruan untuk pilihan raya awal dan mahu membawa Jerman ke jalan yang betul jika parti itu mendapat kuasa pada bulan September.

src: The dissolving is the result of a long political muddle that began on May 22th when Schröder's Social Democrats (SPD) lost the most populous state of Germany, North Rhine-Westphalia, to the CDU, the biggest opposition party.
ref: Pembubaran itu adalah hasil daripada kekacauan politik yang lama yang bermula pada 22 Mei apabila Parti Demokrat Sosial Schröder ini (SPD) kehilangan negeri yang mempunyai paling ramai penduduk Jerman, North Rhine-Westphalia, kepada CDU, parti pembangkang yang terbesar.

src: However, the Basic Law of Germany does not permit the self-dissolving of the Bundestag.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Undang-undang Asas Jerman tidak membenarkan pembubaran sendiri oleh Bundestag.

src: The only way to achieve early elections is when the chancellor loses a motion of confidence.
ref: Satu-satunya cara untuk mencapai pilihan raya awal adalah ketika Canselor kehilangan usul keyakinan.

src: All major parties, including the opposition, support the call for early election.
ref: Semua pihak utama, termasuk pembangkang, menyokong seruan untuk pilihan raya awal.

src: Polls also indicate that 75% of the population support going to the ballots in September.
ref: Undian juga menunjukkan bahawa 75% daripada sokongan penduduk ada pada pembuangan undi pada bulan September.

src: However, some MP's, most notably Werner Schulz of SPD's coalition partner, The Greens, say that the procedure was unconstitutional because the loss of confidence was orchestrated.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, beberapa Ahli Parlimen, terutama rakan kongsi kesatuan SPD Werner Schulz, The Greens, mengatakan bahawa prosedur itu tidak mengikut perlembagaan kerana kehilangan keyakinan telah dirancang.

src: They announced that they will sue against the dissolving before the Constitutional Court of Germany.
ref: Mereka mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan menyaman pembubaran itu di Mahkamah Perlembagaan Jerman.

src: The governing SPD-Green coalition is faced with an overwhelming opposition majority in the Bundesrat, the upper chamber, that is able to block most bills.
ref: Kesatuan SPD-Green yang memerintah berhadapan dengan majoriti pembangkang yang amat sangat dalam Bundesrat, dewan atas, yang mampu menyekat kebanyakan rang undang-undang.

src: Schröder claims that the CDU is engaging in a policy of blockade rendering him unable to make laws and implement policy changes while Angela Merkel, says that Schröder's government is simply incapable to take action.
ref: Schröder mendakwa bahawa CDU terlibat dalam dasar sekatan yang menyebabkan dia tidak dapat memrangka undang-undang dan melaksanakan perubahan dasar manakala Angela Merkel, mengatakan bahawa kerajaan Schröder ini tidak mampu mengambil tindakan.

src: Actor, director, and artist Dennis Hopper has died today at the age of 74.
ref: Pelakon, pengarah dan artis Dennis Hopper meninggal dunia pada hari ini di umur 74 tahun.

src: He was known to suffer from prostate cancer since October 2009.
ref: Beliau diketahui ramai telah menderita dengan sakit kanser prostat sejak dari Oktober 2009.

src: He was born Dennis Lee Hopper on May 17, 1936 in Dodge City, Kansas.
ref: Beliau dilahirkan sebagai Dennis Lee Hopper pada 17 May 1936 di Dodge City, Kansas.

src: As a young man, Hopper became interested in acting and eventually became a student of the Actors Studio.
ref: Pada usia muda, Hopper mula menunjukkan minat dalam bidang lakonan dan seterusnya mendaftar sebagai salah seorang pelajar di Actors Studio.

src: He made his first television appearance in 1955, and appeared in two films featuring James Dean, Rebel Without a Cause (1955) and Giant (1956).
ref: Beliau membuat kemunculan pertama di televisyen pada tahun 1955 dan berlakon di dalam dua filem di mana James Dean berlakon sebagai watak utama, Rebel Without a Cause(1955) dan Giant(1956).

src: He subsequently received critical recognition for his work in Blue Velvet and Hoosiers, with the latter film garnering him an Academy Award nomination for Best Supporting Actor.
ref: Beliau kemudiannya menerima pengiktirafan kritik untuk hasil kerjanya di dalam Blue Velvet dan Hoosiers dengan filem Hoosiers berjaya mencalonkan beliau sebagai Pelakon Sampingan Terbaik di Anugerah Akademi.

src: Hopper's more recent work included a leading role in the television series Crash.
ref: Hasil kerja terkini Hopper termasuklah watak utama di dalam siri televisyen Crash.

src: On January 12, 2010, several months after the cancer diagnosis, Hopper had filed for divorce from his wife Victoria Duffy leading to an extended public feud between the couple over the course of the following months.
ref: Pada 12 Januari 2010, beberapa bulan selepas disahkan menghidap kanser, Hopper telah memfailkan penceraian kepada isterinya Victoria Duffy yang membawa kepada pergaduhan terbuka antara keduanya yang berpanjangan sehingga beberapa bulan berikutnya.

src: On September 27, 2009, Rhys Johnson and his friend, aged 12, took, without permission, an air gun which belonged to Rhys' father.
ref: Pada 27 September 2009, Rhys Johnson dan rakannya, berusia 12 tahun, mengambil, tanpa kebenaran, pistol udara yang dipunyai oleh bapa Rhys.

src: The two boys played with it near to the location of the Johnson house in the district of Llansamlet.
ref: Kedua-dua kanak-kanak lelaki bermain dengannya berhampiran dengan lokasi rumah Johnson di daerah Llansamlet.

src: The friend, who has remained anonymous, shot Rhys Johnson in the heart with the .22 caliber Webley Vulcan air gun at close range.
ref: Kawannya, yang tidak diketahui, ditembak Rhys Johnson di hati dengan .22 kaliber Webley Vulcan pistol udara pada jarak dekat.

src: Johnson died in a hospital at 0211 BST the next day from said wound.
ref: Johnson meninggal dunia di hospital pada 0211 BST pada hari berikutnya dari luka itu.

src: Philip Rogers, a coroner from Swansea, recorded the verdict as an accidental death.
ref: Philip Rogers, seorang koroner dari Swansea, mencatatkan keputusan itu sebagai kematian akibat kemalangan.

src: He was told that the friend had no intention of shooting Johnson.
ref: Dia diberitahu bahawa rakannya tidak mempunyai niat untuk menembak Johnson.

src: Therefore, no legal action has been taken against Johnson's friend accordingly.
ref: Oleh itu, tiada tindakan undang-undang yang diambil terhadap rakan Johnson sewajarnya.

src: As he turned he felt the gun to be heavy.
ref: Sambil berpaling ia merasa senjata itu menjadi berat.

src: As it fell away he pulled it towards him and accidentally fired the trigger.
ref: Kerana ia jatuh jauh dia ditarik ke arahnya dan secara tidak sengaja melepaskan picu.

src: Rhys was holding himself to the chest—he thought he was joking then he thought he's shot Rhys in the hand.
ref: Rhys memegang dadanya-dia fikir dia bergurau kemudian dia fikir dia tembak Rhys di tangan.

src: The detective stated that the friend "was crying and apologizing for what happened."
ref: Detektif itu menyatakan bahawa rakan "telah menangis dan meminta maaf atas apa yang berlaku."

src: Rhys Johnson's father, David, age 36, an engineer in a workshop and the owner of the air rifle testified, "I would allow him to use it if he was with me when I was up the garden or we were spending time together.
ref: Bapa Rhys Johnson, David, umur 36, seorang jurutera di bengkel dan pemilik senapang udara memberi keterangan, "Saya akan membenarkan dia untuk menggunakannya jika beliau dengan saya apabila saya naik taman atau kami menghabiskan masa bersama-sama.

src: Rhys would have shown interest in it from when he was about eight-years-old."
ref: Rhys akan menunjukkan minat daripada apabila dia adalah kira-kira lapan tahun."

src: The coroner urged "anyone with children to try and ensure that such weapons are not used without parental supervision," going on to say that he was "sure Mr. and Mrs. Johnson were not aware the children were using the weapon unsupervised."
ref: Koroner menggesa "sesiapa yang mempunyai kanak-kanak untuk mencuba dan memastikan bahawa senjata itu tidak digunakan tanpa pengawasan ibu bapa," berlaku untuk mengatakan bahawa beliau "yakin Encik dan Puan Johnson tidak menyedari kanak-kanak itu menggunakan senjata tanpa pengawasan."

src: An earthquake with a magnitude of 7.0 Mw struck the Ryukyu Islands, off the coast of Japan on Friday morning at 5:31am (20:31 UTC).
ref: Gempa bumi dengan magnitud 7.0 Mw melanda Kepulauan Ryukyu, di luar pantai Jepun pada pagi Jumaat jam 5:31 pagi (20:31 UTC).

src: The Pacific Tsunami Warning Center said there was no "destructive threat" from the tsunami.
ref: Pusat Amaran Tsunami Pasifik berkata tidak ada "ancaman yang merosakkan" dari tsunami tersebut.

src: At its center, the depth of the earthquake had been measured at ten kilometers (6.2 miles).
ref: Di tengahnya, kedalaman gempa bumi telah diukur pada sepuluh kilometer (6.2 batu).

src: At 5:57am local time (20:57 UTC), the Japan Meteorological Agency recorded a ten centimetre (four inch) tsunami Nanjō, Okinawa.
ref: Pada jam 5:57 pagi waktu tempatan (20:57 UTC), Agensi Meteorologi Jepun mencatatkan sepuluh sentimeter (empat inci) tsunami Nanjō, Okinawa.

src: There were no reports of damage, although, according to the Agency, "there may be slight sea level changes from now on."
ref: Tiada laporan kerosakan, walaupun, menurut Agensi, "mungkin ada perubahan aras laut sedikit dari sekarang".

src: The islands were advised to evacuate from the seashore were Okinawa Islands, Amami Islands and Tokara Islands.
ref: Pulau-pulau yang telah dinasihatkan untuk berpindah dari pantai adalah Pulau Okinawa, Kepulauan Amami dan Kepulauan Tokara.

src: Jumpers are the most dangerous so that sent me under the desk.
ref: Gegaran adalah paling berbahaya jadi itu menyebabkan saya masuk ke bawah meja.

src: This is better than the comparable figure in a year-earlier Army survey.
ref: Ini adalah lebih baik daripada angka yang setanding dalam penyiasatan Army tahun lebih awal.

src: Reportedly, most bothersome to the soldiers was the length of their required stay in Iraq, which was at least 1 year.
ref: Dilaporkan, paling menyeksakan kepada tentera adalah tempoh mereka perlu tinggal di Iraq, iaitu sekurang-kurangnya 1 tahun.

src: Defense Secretary Donald H. Rumsfeld said that the Army's 12-month requirement is linked to reorganization.
ref: Setiausaha Pertahanan Donald Rumsfeld H. berkata syarat 12 bulan Tentera sudah dihubungkan dengan penyusunan semula.

src: I've tried to get the Army to look at the length of tours and I think at some point down the road they will, Rumsfeld said.
ref: Saya telah cuba untuk membuat tentera melihat kepada tempoh lawatan dan saya rasa satu hari nanti mereka akan, kata Rumsfeld.

src: Rep. Tancredo has refused to make any apologies, saying "When we bombed Hiroshima, when we bombed Dresden, we punished a lot of people who were not necessarily (guilty)."
ref: Rep. Tancredo enggan untuk meminta maaf, dengan mengatakan "Apabila kami mengebom Hiroshima, apabila kami mengebom Dresden, kami telah menghukum ramai orang yang tidak semestinya(bersalah)."

src: "Not every German was a member of the Nazi Party."
ref: "Tidak semua rakyat Jerman adalah ahli Parti Nazi."

src: The British Parliament approved the first stage of the new Crossrail underground railroad through London as a £15 billion construction project earlier this month.
ref: Parlimen British meluluskan peringkat pertama kereta api bawah tanah Crossrail baru melalui London sebagai projek pembinaan £15 bilion awal bulan ini.

src: After a second reading in Parliament, it was voted upon and decided that the government will commit to the project so that the line will be built.
ref: Selepas bacaan kedua di Parlimen, ia telah diundi dan diputuskan bahawa kerajaan akan mengambil bahagian dalam projek itu supaya landasan itu boleh dibina.

src: The next issue before Parliament of to ensure that the implementation of the bill so it is consistent with private interests of neighborhoods to be affected by Crossrail.
ref: Isu seterusnya di Parlimen adalah untuk memastikan bahawa pelaksanaan rang undang-undang itu supaya ia selaras dengan kepentingan kejiranan terjejas oleh Crossrail.

src: As a result of construction of the Crossrail line, hundreds of homes will have new tunnels excavated beneath them.
ref: Hasil daripada pembinaan landasan Crossrail, ratusan rumah akan mempunyai terowong baru digali di bawah mereka.

src: On contacting Crossrail, they have indicated approximately £50 will be offered to each landowner to buy all the land rights-of-way to build the train tunnel more than 9 meters below the residential buildings.
ref: Dalam menghubungi Crossrail, mereka telah menyatakan kira-kira £50 akan ditawarkan kepada setiap pemilik tanah untuk membeli tanah secara sah di sisi undang-undang untuk membina terowong kereta api lebih daripada 9 meter di bawah bangunan kediaman.

src: Under UK compulsory purchase laws to be used in this bill, the residents are entitled to the difference in the value of the whole property with and without a tunnel under it.
ref: Di bawah undang-undang UK pembelian wajib yang akan digunakan dalam rang undang-undang ini, penduduk berhak memperolehi perbezaan nilai keseluruhan harta itu dengan dan tanpa terowong di bawahnya.

src: If the offer given by Crossrail is not accepted by any of the residents, the residents can take the case to the Land Tribunal, where the fair value will be established.
ref: Jika tawaran yang diberikan oleh Crossrail tidak diterima oleh mana-mana penduduk, penduduk boleh membawa kes itu ke Tribunal Tanah, di mana nilai saksama akan dipastikan.

src: Local government officials have said that at least eleven people were killed on Sunday in southern Afghanistan by a roadside bomb.
ref: Pejabat kerajaan tempatan telah berkata bahawa sekurang-kurangnya sebelas orang dibunuh Ahad lalu di selatan Afghanistan oleh pengeboman tepi jalan.

src: According to the spokesman, a family was riding on a tractor with a truck-bed hitched on back, when it hit the explosives on a central road; all of the people aboard died, including two children and two women.
ref: Menurut jurucakap, satu keluarga sedang menaiki traktor dengan trak yang mempunyai katil dibelakang, semasa berlanggar dengan letupan di jalan tengah; semua yang menaiki mati, termasuk dua kanak-kanak dan dua wanita.

src: According to senior officials in the Obama administration, the U.S. is to significantly and permanently reduce its stockpile of nuclear weapons by thousands of weapons as part of a major rethinking of American nuclear policy.
ref: Menurut pegawai kanan dalam pentadbiran Obama, A.S. sedang mengurangkan simpanan stok senjata nuklear dengan ketara dan selama-lamanya daripada beribu-ribu senjata sebagai sebahagian daripada pemikiran semula dasar utama nuklear Amerika.

src: The move is coming as part of a major policy review intended to stop the proliferation of nuclear weapons around the world.
ref: Langkah itu adalah sebahagian daripada kajian semula dasar utama yang bertujuan menghentikan pertambahan senjata nuklear di seluruh dunia.

src: As part of the new policy, conventional weapons will have a greater role in the future.
ref: Sebahagian daripada polisi baru, senjata konvensional akan memainkan peranan yang lebih besar pada masa hadapan.

src: According to officials, there are thousands of weapons that could be retired, largely by eliminating those currently stored.
ref: Menurut pegawai, terdapat beribu-ribu senjata yang boleh bersara, sebahagian besarnya dengan menghapuskan senjata yang masih disimpan.

src: The move comes as a significant step towards Obama's stated goal of reducing and eventually ending the spread of nuclear weapons worldwide.
ref: Langkah itu diambil sebagai langkah penting ke arah matlamat Obama yang dinyatakan untuk mengurangkan dan akhirnya mengakhiri penyebaran senjata nuklear di seluruh dunia.

src: The policy changes come as part of the Nuclear Posture Review, a document which is undertaken by all presidents.
ref: Perubahan dasar adalah sebahagian daripada Kajian Semula Sikap Nuklear, sesuatu dokumen yang dilaksanakan oleh semua presiden.

src: A centerpiece of the new policy is a new plan called the "Prompt Global Strike," which involves a new type of conventional weapon that could be fired from the U.S. and reach anywhere in the world within an hour, providing an effective option for attacks worldwide, such as against a missile launch from North Korea or a strike against Al-Qaeda in Pakistan.
ref: Pertengahan dasar baru adalah pelan baru yang dipanggil "Tembakan Global Segera," yang melibatkan senjata konvensional jenis baru yang boleh dilancarkan dari Amerika Syarikat dan sampai mana-mana sahaja di dunia dalam masa satu jam, memberikan pilihan yang baik untuk serangan di seluruh dunia, seperti terhadap pelancaran peluru berpandu Korea Utara atau serangan terhadap Al-Qaeda di Pakistan.

src: The changes reflect a new focus on nonproliferation and arms control by the Obama administration, policies that were largely dismissed by the Bush administration.
ref: Perubahan itu mencerminkan tumpuan baru atas pengawalan nuklear dan senjata oleh pentadbiran Obama, dasar-dasar yang sebahagian besarnya ditolak oleh pentadbiran Bush.

src: In conjunction with new domestic policies, the Obama administration is trying to win passage of the Comprehensive Test Ban Treaty, which would ban all nuclear explosions for any purposes.
ref: Bersempena dengan dasar-dasar baru dalam negeri, pentadbiran Obama cuba untuk memenangi peredaran Fahaman Perjanjian Pengharaman Menyeluruh, yang akan mengharamkan semua letupan nuklear untuk apa-apa tujuan.

src: The treaty was defeated in the 1990s, during the Clinton presidency, and still faces strong resistance in the U.S. Senate.
ref: Perjanjian itu telah dikalahkan pada 1990-an, semasa petadbiran Presiden Clinton, dan masih menghadapi rintangan yang kuat di Senat Amerika Syarikat.

src: The Obama administration is also trying to revise the Nuclear Nonproliferation Treaty to close loopholes that have been exploited by North Korea and Iran.
ref: Pentadbiran Obama juga cuba untuk menyemak semula Perjanjian Pengawalan Nuklear untuk menutup kelemahan yang telah dieksploitasi oleh Korea Utara dan Iran.

src: Democrats have been pressuring the administration to formally declare that the role of America's nuclear weapons is solely to deter nuclear attack on the United States.
ref: Ahli Parti Demokrasi telah mendesak pentadbiran itu untuk mengisytiharkan secara rasmi bahawa peranan senjata nuklear Amerika adalah semata-mata untuk menghalang serangan nuklear ke atas Amerika Syarikat.

src: American military officials, as well as some officials within the White House, however, have urged the administration to retain more ambiguous wording from the Bush era, which says that nuclear deterrence is only the primary role of American nuclear weapons, which would leave open the option of using nuclear weapons against enemies that threaten the US with chemical or biological weapons.
ref: Pegawai tentera Amerika, serta beberapa pegawai di White House, bagaimanapun, telah menggesa pentadbiran untuk mengekalkan kata-kata yang kurang jelas dari era Bush, yang mengatakan bahawa pencegahan nuklear hanya merupakan peranan utama senjata nuklear Amerika, yang akan meninggalkan pilihan terbuka untuk menggunakan senjata nuklear terhadap musuh-musuh yang mengancam Amerika Syarikat dengan senjata kimia atau biologi.

src: Apple sued HTC, a Taiwanese manufacturer of mobile phones, on Tuesday, in a lawsuit claiming 20 different patent infringements, largely relating to the user interface of the iPhone, which is manufactured by Apple.
ref: Apple menyaman HTC, pengeluar telefon bimbit Taiwan, pada Selasa, dalam tuntutan mahkamah mendakwa 20 pelanggaran paten berlainan, kebanyakannya berkaitan interface pengguna iPhone, yang dikeluarkan oleh Apple.

src: The lawsuit says that HTC, in selling the phones, knowingly induced those using the mentioned products to violate patents owned by Apple, some of which were filed in the mid-1990s.
ref: Tuntutan mahkamah tersebut menyatakan yang HTC, dalam menjual telefon-telefon tersebut, dengan pengetahuan mendorong mereka yang menggunakan produk dinamakan untuk melanggar paten dimiliki oleh Apple, yang mana sebahagiannya difailkan pada pertengahan 1990-an.

src: The operating system has seen increasing popularity in the last year, and has increasingly included multi-touch input of the type mentioned in the lawsuit.
ref: Sistem operasi tersebut telah dilihat meningkat popular pada tahun lepas, dan telah meningkat menyertakan input pelbagai-sentuhan dari jenis yang dinyatakan didalam tuntutan mahkamah tersebut.

src: Others said that Apple was suing HTC instead of Google because the phone manufacturer was an easier target than Google.
ref: Yang lain berkata bahawa Apple menyaman HTC daripada Google kerana pengeluar telefon tersebut ialah sasaran lebih mudah berbanding Google.

src: Another analyst from MKM Partners said that "HTC is an optimal target for Apple-it's a relatively small vendor with a weak brand."
ref: Analisis lain dari MKM Partner berkata yang "HTC ialah sasaran optimum untuk Apple - ia adalah pembekal kecil dengan jenama yang lemah".

src: In the documents, Apple said that their goal was to permanently block HTC from importing and selling devices that had the offending qualities, as well a significant cash payment in damages.
ref: Didalam dokumen tersebut, Apple berkata yang gol mereka adalah untuk menyekat selamanya HTC dari mengimport dan menjual peralatan yang mempunyai qualiti bersalah, dan juga sejumlah besar tunai bayaran dalam kerosakan.

src: The Singapore Navy on Thursday warned of a possible pirate threat to ships passing through the Strait of Malacca after receiving a correspondence from an unnamed terrorist organization.
ref: Tentera Laut Singapura pada hari Khamis diberi amaran kemungkinan ancaman lanun terhadap kapal-kapal yang melalui Selat Melaka selepas menerima surat daripada sebuah organisasi pengganas yang tidak bernama.

src: While the threat received covered only oil tankers, other large cargo ships were also at risk of attack, naval officials went on to say.
ref: Walaupun ancaman yang diterima hanya meliputi kapal tangki minyak, kapal-kapal kargo besar yang lain juga mempunyai risiko serangan, pegawai tentera laut seterusnya berkata.

src: They also recommended that ships maintain a higher speed and report any unusual incidents to the proper authorities.
ref: Mereka juga mencadangkan supaya kapal-kapal mengekalkan kelajuan perjalanan yang lebih tinggi dan melaporkan sebarang kejadian luar biasa kepada pihak berkuasa.

src: The advisory said that past attacks in the Strait had been carried out by small vessels such as motorboats or fishing boats with armed crews.
ref: Penasihat mengatakan bahawa serangan yang lalu di Selat itu dilakukan oleh kapal-kapal kecil seperti bot bermotor atau bot nelayan dengan anak kapal bersenjata.

src: Both Indonesia and Malaysia have also announced plans to increase patrols in order to provide additional security.
ref: Indonesia dan Malaysia juga telah mengumumkan rancangan kedua-dua negara untuk meningkatkan rondaan bagi menyediakan keselamatan tambahan.

src: The Strait of Malacca is a major conduit for oil shipments.
ref: Selat Melaka merupakan saluran utama bagi penghantaran minyak.

src: With around a third of global oil shipments passing through, it is the main route for travelling from the Middle East to Asia.
ref: Dengan kira-kira satu pertiga daripada penghantaran minyak global melalui kawasan tersebut, ia adalah laluan utama bagi perjalanan dari Timur Tengah ke Asia.

src: An extensive vaccination campaign across 19 West and Central African countries is to begin today in an attempt to stem a year-long polio epidemic in the region.
ref: Kempen vaksinasi besar-besaran seluruh 19 negara Barat dan Afrika Tengah bermula hari ini dalam satu cubaan untuk menangkis wabak polio sejak setahun lama dalam wilayah tersebut.

src: These countries will be the focus of the campaign, along with Benin, Cape Verde, Central African Republic, Côte d'Ivoire, Gambia, Ghana, Guinea-Bissau, Niger, Nigeria and Togo.
ref: Negara-negara ini akan menjadi fokus kempen, disertai dengan Benin, Cape Verde, Republik Afrika Tengah, Cote d'Ivoire, Gambia, Ghana, Guniea-Bissau, Niger, Nigeria dan Togo.

src: Efforts last year failed to halt the disease because not enough children were vaccinated.
ref: Usaha tahun lepas gagal untuk menghentikan penyakit kerana kanak-kanak yang divaksinasikan masih tidak cukup.

src: The program failed in part because local religious leaders told parents that the vaccines would sterilize their children, or cause AIDS.
ref: Program tersebut kerana pemimpin agama tempatan menyatakan kepada ibu bapa bahawa vaksin mensterilkan anak-anak mereka, atau menyebabkan AIDS.

src: The campaign is funded by Rotary International who have provided $30 million.
ref: Kempen ini dibiayai oleh Rotary International yang memberi sebanyak $30 juta.

src: In 2009 the World Health Organization reported that approximately 1,600 children were paralysed by the virus worldwide.
ref: Pada 2009 Organisasi Kesihatan Dunia melaporkan bahawa sekitar 1,600 kanak-kanak lumpuh berikutan virus tersebut sedunia.

src: While minors are still prohibited from sending nude photos of other minors taken on cell phones, they will no longer be required to register as sex offenders.
ref: Walaupun sebahagian kecil masih dilarang dari menghantar gambar bogel kepada yang lain yang diambil oleh telefon bimbit, mereka tidak lagi disabitkan kesalahan sebagai pesalah seks.

src: Instead, they could be punished with court-ordered supervision or community service.
ref: Sebaliknya, mereka boleh dihukum dengan pengawasan mahkamah dengan perintah makhamah atau khidmat masyarakat.

src: The bill, which was sponsored by State Representative Darlene Senger from Naperville, passed with a 114–1 majority and will be considered by the Illinois Senate.
ref: Rang undang-undang, yang dikeluarkan oleh Wakil Negeri Darlene Senger dari Naperville, yang diluluskan dengan majoriti 114-1 dan akan dipertimbangkan oleh Senat Illinois.

src: The lone dissenter, State Representative Careen Gordon from Morris, declined to comment on her vote.
ref: Seorang yang tidak bersetuju itu, Wakil Negeri Careen Gordon dari Morris, enggan mengulas undian beliau.

src: According to local media, 25 people have died in an illegal coal mine in central China, after a fire broke out there.
ref: Menurut media tempatan, 25 orang telah meninggal dalam satu lombong arang batu haram di China tengah, selepas satu kebakaran berlaku di sana.

src: There were 31 total miners inside the mine; six were able to escape, but the others burnt to death.
ref: Sebanyak 31 pelombong di dalam lombong; enam berjaya melarikan diri, namun yang lain mati terbakar.

src: The owner, manager, and an investor of the mine were taken into police custody on Monday.
ref: Pemilik, pengurus, dan pelabur lombong tersebut ditahan polis pada Isnin.

src: Their assets, and those of the mine, have been frozen by the authorities.
ref: Aset mereka, dan lombong tersebut, telah dibekukan oleh pihak berkuasa.

src: It was not immediately clear what caused the blaze, although an investigation is underway.
ref: Punca kebakaran tidak jelas, walaupun penyiasatan masih dijalankan.

src: The government has pledged to crack down upon illegal mines and enforce safety rules.
ref: Kerajaan menjamin untuk bertindak tegas terhadap lombong haram dan menguatkuasakan peraturan keselamatan.

src: He was quoted as saying that the spilt "would stop the bloodshed and burning of places of worship."
ref: Beliau dipetik berkata pembahagian itu "akan menghentikan pertumpahan darah dan pembakaran rumah-rumah ibadat".

src: During his speech to students, Gaddafi spoke about the partition of India.
ref: Semasa ucapannya kepada para pelajar, Gaddafi bercakap tentang pemecahan India.

src: He called that division a "historic, radical solution" which saved the lives of "millions of Hindus and Muslims," despite reports that one million people were killed.
ref: Beliau memanggil pembahagian itu sebagai satu"penyelesaian bersejarah dan radikal" yang telah menyelamatkan nyawa "berjuta-juta orang Hindu dan Muslim," walaupun laporan mengatakan satu juta orang telah terbunuh.

src: He also called the recent violence in Jos a "deep conflict of a religious nature," and put the blame on the British stating that the federal state was imposed by Britain.
ref: Beliau juga memanggil rusuhan ganas baru-baru ini di Jos sebagai satu "percanggahan agama yang mendalam," dan menuduh pihak Britain dengan menyatakan negara persekutuan itu telah dikawal oleh Britain.

src: Around 100 people have died already this year in violence near the city of Jos.
ref: Kira-kira 100 orang awam telah mati tahun ini di dalam keganasan berdekatan bandar Jos.

src: Police briefly cordoned off Mile-End tube station in East London on Saturday morning.
ref: Polis mengepung secara ringkas stesen kereta api bawah tanah Mile-End di Timur London pada pagi Sabtu.

src: A man has been taken away and the alert has now been lifted.
ref: Seorang lelaki telah ditangkap dan pengawasan telah ditambah.

src: The cancellation of the tour has come days after a failed bomb attack on London.
ref: Pembatalan jelajah itu berlaku beberapa hari selepas serangan bom yang gagal di London.

src: Only one match — the game against Crystal Palace — was to have been played in London.
ref: Hanya satu perlawanan - perlawanan menentang Crystal Palace - sepatutnya telah berlangsung di London.

src: Inter Milan confirmed in a statement that the attacks on London compelled the club to cancel their tour of England, saying that: "Football takes a step back because of increasing serious events which touch the sensitivity of everyone."
ref: Inter Milan mengesahkan dalam satu kenyataan bahawa serangan ke atas London memaksa kelab tersebut untuk membatalkan lawatan mereka di England, mengatakan bahawa: "Bola sepak mengambil satu langkah ke belakang kerana peningkatan aktiviti yang serius yang menyentuh sensitiviti semua orang".

src: "For this reason, and given the situation, the club has decided to cancel the team's tour of England."
ref: "Atas sebab ini, dan memandangkan keadaan, kelab telah memutuskan untuk membatalkan lawatan pasukan di England".

src: Caloundra lead Glasshouse by 153 runs at stumps on day two of the 2010 Sunshine Coast, Australia division one cricket grand final.
ref: Caloundra mengatasi Glasshouse dengan 153 larian pada wiket di hari kedua divisyen satu pusingan akhir kriket 2010 Sunshine Coast, Australia.

src: You try and put it in the back of your mind but it’s still there,” Glasshouse captain Brett Milini said.
ref: Awak cuba meletakkannya di belakang kepala awak tetapi ia masih di situ," kata kapten Glasshouse Brett Milini.

src: Caloundra were all out in their first inning for 193.
ref: Caloundra berhempas-pulas di dalam babak pertama mereka untuk 193. Saya fikir 250 adalah nilai par dan saya fikir kami masuk dengan peluang besar," kata Milini.

src: I thought 250 was a par score and I thought we were in with a big chance,” Milini said.
ref: "Kalau kita cukup bagus, kita sepatutnya menang dengan cukup mudah tetapi kita tidak memukul dengan baik hari ini".

src: Caloundra rounded out day two at six out for fifty seven, leaving Glasshouse an outside chance of snatching the championship.
ref: "Kami telah memberi diri sendiri peluang sekali lagi tetapi jika kita memukul seperti yang kami lakukan dalam babak pertama, kami sudah kalah," katanya.

src: “It should be a real good game, it’s interesting cricket.”  Results for the second division, third B division, southern fourth division and fifth division traditional grand finals have not been accessible to Wikinews as of this report
ref: Keputusan untuk divisyen kedua, divisyen ketiga B, divisyen keempat selatan dan divisyen kelima pusingan akhir tradisional belum boleh dicapai oleh Wikinews semasa laporan ini.

src: On Sunday, a group of 80 people from Beijing and Shanghai landed at Heathrow to become the first Chinese to arrive in the United Kingdom on tourist visas.
ref: Pada hari Ahad, sekumpulan 80 orang dari Beijing dan Shanghai mendarat di Heathrow untuk menjadi warga Cina pertama yang tiba di United Kingdom menggunakan visa pelancong.

src: After protracted negotiations last year, the UK was granted "Approved Destination Status" (ADS) by the People's Republic of China in January 2005.
ref: Selepas rundingan berlarutan tahun lepas, UK telah diberikan "Status Destinasi Diluluskan" (SDD) oleh Republik Rakyat China pada Januari 2005.

src: The agreement will also allow travel companies to establish offices in China to promote tourism to the UK.
ref: Perjanjian itu juga akan membolehkan syarikat-syarikat pelancongan untuk menubuhkan pejabat di China untuk menggalakkan pelancongan ke UK.

src: Before the signing of the agreement, China allowed only students and people on business trips to visit the country.
ref: Sebelum majlis menandatangani perjanjian itu, China hanya membenarkan pelajar-pelajar dan orang-orang di perjalanan perniagaan untuk melawat negara itu.

src: It is estimated that 135,000 people visited the UK last year — just 0.6% of China's external tourism market.
ref: Dianggarkan 135,000 orang melawat UK tahun lepas - hanya 0.6% daripada pasaran pelancongan luar China.

src: The 80 tourists are expected to visit London, Oxfordshire, Stratford-upon-Avon and Scotland, where they will meet the First Minister, Jack McConnell, in Edinburgh Castle.
ref: 80 pelancong dijangka melawat London, Oxfordshire, Stratford-upon-Avon dan Scotland, di mana mereka akan berjumpa dengan Menteri Pertama, Jack McConnell, di Edinburgh Castle.

src: The Duke of York is expected to greet the tourists at the Tower of London later today.
ref: The Duke of York dijangka menyambut pelancong-pelancong di Menara London lewat hari ini.

src: Other destinations will include Liverpool (twinned with Shanghai) and Manchester's Old Trafford stadium, where the football team Manchester United play.
ref: Destinasi lain termasuk Liverpool (berkembar dengan Shanghai) dan stadium Old Trafford Manchester, di mana pasukan bola sepak Manchester United bermain.

src: They have a large following in China and are currently on a Far East tour.
ref: Mereka mempunyai pengikut yang ramai di China dan kini dalam lawatan ke Timur Jauh.

src: They are to play Beijing Hyundai in a friendly match tomorrow.
ref: Mereka akan bertemu Beijing Hyundai dalam perlawanan persahabatan esok.

src: Windsor Castle, one of Queen Elizabeth II of the United Kingdom's official residences, is to get a hydro-electric power scheme.
ref: Istana Widsor, satu daripada kediaman rasmi Queen Elizabeth United Kingdom, akan mendapat skim tenaga hidro-elektrik.

src: The £1 million project will consist of a series of under-water turbines to be installed at Romney Weir in the nearby River Thames.
ref: Projek L1 milion akan melibatkan siri-siri pemasangan turbin di bawah air di Romney Weir di berhampiran Sungai Thames.

src: The scheme was announced after it gained planning permission from the local council, the plans having been submitted in February of last year.
ref: Skim itu diumumkan selepas mendapat plan kebenaran daripada majlis tempatan, plan tersebut telah dihantar pada Februari tahun lepas.

src: The Windsor Castle is not the only environmentally-friendly Royal scheme.
ref: Istana Widsor bukanlah satu-satunya skim Diraja yang mesra alam.

src: A borehole beneath Buckingham Palace provides cold water for air-conditioning and the Duke of Edinburgh's taxi runs on liquid petroleum gas.
ref: Lubang gerudi di bawah Istana Buckingham membekalkan air sejuk untuk penyaman udara dan teksi Duke of Edinburgh bergerak menggunakan cecair petroleum gas.

src: Mohammed Bouyeri, a radical Islamist who was a member of the Hofstad Network, was sentenced to life in prison by a court in Amsterdam for the killing of the controversial filmmaker Theo van Gogh in November 2004.
ref: Mohammed Bouyeri, seorang Islamis radikal yang pernah menjadi ahli Rangkaian Hofstad, dijatuhi hukuman penjara seumur hidup oleh mahkamah di Amsterdam diatas pembunuhan pembikin filem kontroversi Theo van Gogh pada bulan November 2004.

src: Van Gogh was ambushed on an Amsterdam street and shot repeatedly in the chest before Bouyeri stabbed him and slit his throat.
ref: Van Gogh telah diserang hendap di sebatang jalan di Amsterdam dan ditembak berulang kali di bahagian dada sebelum Bouyeri menikam dan membelah kerongkongnya.

src: He made a confession in the courtroom and vowed he would "do it again" if he had the chance.
ref: Beliau membuat pengakuan di mahkamah dan berjanji beliau akan "mengulangi perbuatannya" jika dia mempunyai peluang.

src: Van Gogh directed several movies critical of Islam, most notably Submission in which verses of the Qur'an were written on naked women's bodies.
ref: Van Gogh telah mengarah beberapa filem yang mengkritik Islam, terutamanya Submission di mana ayat-ayat al-Quran ditulis pada badan wanita yang bertelanjang.

src: Wikipedia, one of the top ten websites on the internet, will soon be receiving a face lift.
ref: Wikipedia, salah satu daripada sepuluh laman web yang paling terkenal di internet, tidak lama lagi akan muncul dengan wajah baru.

src: The first part of the change is a new skin called Vector.
ref: Bahagian pertama perubahan itu adalah luaran baru yang dikenali sebagai Vektor.

src: This skin, currently used on Wikinews, will be enabled for Wikipedia on April 5th and provide a more updated look and feel.
ref: Luaran ini, pada masa ini digunakan pada Wikinews, akan diaktifkan untuk Wikipedia pada 5 April dan memberikan pandangan dan tanggapan yang lebih dikemaskini.

src: The second part will change the toolbar when editing, and is intended to ease common tasks.
ref: Bahagian kedua akan mengubah palang semasa mengedit, dan bertujuan untuk meringankan tugas-tugas biasa.

src: Both changes are important to encourage new people to edit and update content.
ref: Kedua-dua perubahan adalah penting untuk menggalakkan orang baru untuk mengedit dan mengemaskini kandungan.

src: Wikipedia is a website maintained by users in unprecedented numbers.
ref: Wikipedia adalah sebuah laman web yang diselenggara oleh pengguna-pengguna dalam jumlah yang belum pernah berlaku dalam sejarah.

src: Maintenance and updating processes are dependent on just one percent of their users.
ref: Proses penyelenggaraan dan pengemaskinian hanya bergantung pada satu peratus pengguna mereka.

src: Based on some statements, fewer than a thousand users do the maintenance and updating work.
ref: Berdasarkan sesetengah kenyataan, kurang daripada satu ribu pengguna melakukan kerja penyelenggaraan dan pengemaskinian.

src: Outgoing Iranian president Mohammad Khatami said that the proposed nuclear fuel work would not include producing enriched uranium, but stressed that Iran would ultimately resume its uranium enrichment programme.
ref: Presiden Iran yang lantang Mohammad Khatami berkata kerja bahan api nuklear yang dicadangkan tidak akan menghasilkan uranium diperkaya, tetapi menegaskan bahawa Iran akhirnya akan meneruskan program pengayaan uranium.

src: Khatami told reporters "Whether Europeans mention our right to resume activities at the uranium conversion facility at Isfahan or not, we will definitely resume them regardless."
ref: Khatami memberitahu pemberita "Sama ada orang Eropah menyebut hak kami untuk meneruskan aktiviti di kemudahan penukaran uranium di Isfahan atau tidak, kami pasti akan menyambungnya".

src: Though Iran has large oil stocks, environmental concerns and the Kyoto Protocol may preclude their continued development.
ref: Walaupun Iran mempunyai stok minyak yang besar, isu alam sekitar dan Protokol Kyoto boleh menghalang pembangunan berterusan mereka.

src: This has prompted last minute action by the President to lobby individual members of the House, reminding them that Central American countries have committed troops and other resources to fight the U.S. War on Terror.
ref: Ini telah mendorong tindakan saat-saat terakhir oleh Presiden untuk melobi ahli-ahli individu Dewan Rakyat, mengingatkan mereka bahawa negara-negara Amerika Tengah mempunyai angkatan tentera yang berdedikasi dan sumber-sumber lain yang menyumbang kepada Perang A.S. ke atas Keganasan.

src: Other Republican leaders have been using the party's traditional pro-business message and linking it to homeland security issues.
ref: Pemimpin Republik lain telah menggunakan mesej tradisional parti yang pro-perniagaan dan mengaitkannya dengan isu-isu keselamatan dalam negeri.

src: CAFTA is "a bad deal for Central Americans and also for Latinos in this community... (with CAFTA) the exploitation of workers will continue in Central America," Democrat Representative Hilda Solis of Los Angeles said.
ref: CAFTA adalah "perjanjian yang tidak memanfaatkan rakyat Amerika Tengah dan juga untuk orang Latin di komuniti ini... (dengan CAFTA) eksploitasi pekerja akan berterusan di Amerika Tengah," Wakil Demokrat Los Angeles Hilda Solis berkata.

src: Her views are common among Democrats, who are overwhelmingly against the treaty.
ref: Pandangan beliau adalah biasa di kalangan wakil Demokrat, yang amat sangat membantah perjanjian itu.

src: "This will be a vote in the middle of the night."
ref: "Ini adalah pembuangan undi di pertengahan malam".

src: After a year of turbulent weather in Mexico and destruction of their habitat, the Monarch butterfly (Danaus plexippus) population could be down by as much as 50% to 60% this year, experts say.
ref: Selepas cuaca buruk di Mexico dan kemusnahan habitat mereka, populasi rama-rama Monarch (Danaus plexippus) akan berkurangan sehingga 50% ke 60% tahun ini, menurut pakar.

src: A gathering area for the butterflies northwest of Mexico City was affected particularly hard by severe weather this winter, which killed 50 people in the region.
ref: Kawasan berkumpul rama-rama itu yang terletak di barat laut Mexico City itu didorong oleh cuaca yang teruk pada musim sejuk ini, dimana ianya membunuh 50 orang di rantau ini.

src: According to Lincoln Brower, a monarch expert with Sweet Briar College in Virginia, "things are in pretty bad shape."
ref: Menurut Lincoln Browner, pakar monarch dengan Sweet Briar College di Virginia berkata, "hal ini menjadi semakin teruk".

src: The southbound migration was already the smallest in recorded history, and with the destructive winter, over half of the species' population might have been killed.
ref: Migrasi ke selatan telah direkodkan sebagai yang terendah dalam sejarah, dan dengan kemusnahan yang disebabkan oleh musim sejuk, lebih separuh dari populasi spesis mungkin telah terbunuh.

src: "This means the numbers going to Texas are going to be down", said Chip Taylor, a professor of entomology at the University of Kansas-Lawrence.
ref: "Ini bermakna bilangan yang akan ke Texas akan berkurangan", kata Chip Taylor, seorang profesor entomology dari University of Kansas-Lawrence.

src: He believes it could take years for the Monarchs to repopulate.
ref: Beliau percaya bahawa ianya akan mengambil masa bertahun-tahun bagi Monarch untuk mempopulasi kembali.

src: Taylor also said that "We’re talking about significant degradation at overwintering sites; the loss of habitat in the United States and Canada and climate change in Mexico."
ref: Taylor juga berkata "Kita bercakap tentang pengurangan yang ketara di kawasan yang terlebih sejuk; kehilangan habitat di Amerika Syarikat dan Kanada dan perubahan iklim di Mexico".

src: "We’ve had three major killing winter storms in the last decade that have never been seen previously."
ref: "Kita mengalami tiga ribut salji maut pada dekad ini dan kita tidak pernah mengalaminya sebelum ini".

src: "We’re dealing with something new here, and that’s consistent with climate change."
ref: "Kita berhadapan dengan sesuatu yang baru disini, dan ianya konsisten dengan perubahan iklim".

src: Illegal logging in Mexico and a lack of milkweed in the Midwest United States for the butterflies to lay their eggs in has also taken a toll on the Monarchs' population.
ref: Pembalakan haram di Mexico dan kekurangan milkweed di tengah barat Amerika Syarikat untuk rama-rama itu bertelur dan juga penyebab kepada populasi Monarch.

src: According to reports, multiple Israeli airstrikes in the Gaza Strip have injured three children, including one infant.
ref: Menurut satu laporan, beberapa serangan udara Israel ke Semenanjung Gaza telah mencederakan tiga kanak-kanak, termasuk seorang bayi.

src: According to a reporter for Al Jazeera, at least six locations were attacked by the strikes; meanwhile, Palestinian sources told the BBC that there were a total of at least thirteen strikes.
ref: Menurut seorang wartawan Al Jazeera, sekurang-kurangnya enam kawasan telah diserang; manakala, sumber Palestin memberitahu BBC bahawa jumlah serangan adalah paling kurang sebanyak tiga belas serangan.

src: A correspondent for the BBC reported that the attacks were the most serious in the area in over a year.
ref: Wartawan BBC melaporkan bahawa serangan tersebut adalah terburuk di kawasan itu dalam masa setahun ini.

src: Israel's military commented that it was targeting weapon storage areas in the centre of the Gaza Strip, and that their move was a reaction to rockets fired from Gaza.
ref: Tentera Israel mengeluarkan komen bahawa sasaran mereka adalah kawasan penyimpanan senjata di tengah Semenanjung Gaza, dan tindakan mereka itu adalah tindak balas kepada roket-roket yang ditembak dari Gaza.

src: An overnight explosion and fire at a Washington State oil refinery in Anacortes, Washington, United States, a city about 80 miles south of Vancouver, Canada, yesterday killed four people and critically injured three others.
ref: Letupan dan kebakaran semalaman di sebuah kilang penapisan minyak Washington State di Anacortes, Washington, Amerika Syarikat, sebuah bandar kira-kira 80 batu ke selatan Vancouver, Kanada, semalam membunuh empat orang dan menyebabkan kecederaan teruk terhadap tiga orang lain.

src: The fire, whose cause is not yet known, burned for around an hour and a half before being extinguished.
ref: Api tersebut, yang puncanya masih belum diketahui, membakar selama kira-kira satu jam setengah sebelum dipadamkan.

src: Initially, Tesoro announced that three people had died in the fire.
ref: Pada mulanya, Tesoro mengumumkan bahawa tiga orang telah mati dalam api itu.

src: According to a spokesperson from Harborview Medical Center in Seattle, a fourth person, a 29-year-old woman, later died from her injuries at the hospital, while three other people, a woman and two men, all remain in critical condition with major burns.
ref: Menurut seorang jurucakap dari Pusat Perubatan Harborview di Seattle, orang yang keempat, seorang wanita berusia 29 tahun, kemudian meninggal dunia akibat kecederaan di hospital, manakala tiga orang lain, seorang wanita dan dua lelaki, semua masih dalam keadaan kritikal dengan luka terbakar teruk.

src: Three of the dead were named as Matthew Bowen, Darren Hoines and Daniel Aldridge, while the person who died in the hospital has not been identified.
ref: Tiga daripada yang mati itu dikatakan bernama Matthew Bowen, Darren Hoines dan Daniel Aldridge, manakala orang yang meninggal dunia di hospital itu belum dikenal pasti lagi.

src: The incident was the first fire at an oil refinery in Anacortes since 2007, when a fire at the Shell Puget Sound Refinery damaged a storage, resulting in three minor injuries.
ref: Insiden itu adalah kejadian api pertama di kilang penapisan minyak di Anacortes sejak tahun 2007, apabila kejadian api di Kilang Penapisan Shell Puget Sound merosakkan penyimpanan, mengakibatkan tiga orang cedera ringan.

src: 38 people were said to have died in a suicide bombing during a political rally in the North-West Frontier Province of Pakistan.
ref: 38 orang dilaporkan mati dalam pengeboman berani mati semasa perhimpunan politik di Wilayah Sempadan Utara-Selatan Pakistan.

src: The incident occurred during a political rally by the leading local party.
ref: Insiden itu berlaku semasa perhimpunan politik oleh kepimpinan parti tempatan.

src: "We have received 38 dead bodies," Doctor Wakeel Ahmed, head of the principal hospital in the town told AFP (Agence France-Presse) news agency.
ref: "Kami telah menerima 38 mayat," kata Doktor Wakeel Ahmad, ketua pengarah hospital di bandar kepada agensi berita AFP(Media Agensi Perancis).

src: The Awami National Party (ANP), the predominant political party in North West Frontier Province had organized the celebrations because of their decision to rename the province to Khyber-Pakhtunkhwa.
ref: Parti Kebangsaan Awami (ANP), parti politik yang berpengaruh di Wilayah Sempadan Utara-Timur telah mengadakan satu jamuan kerana keputusan untuk menukar nama wilayah itu kepada Khyber-Pakhtunkhwa.

src: This attack was followed by a triple attack in Peshawar by suspected Islamist insurgents.
ref: Serangan ini disusuli oleh tiga kali serangan di Peshawar disyaki oleh pemberontak Islam.

src: Images from new cameras have revealed that a section of foam weighing some 250 g fell away from the external fuel tank during launch, but did not strike the Orbiter.
ref: Imej dari kamera baru telah mendedahkan bahawa sebahagian busa seberat kira-kira 250 g jatuh dari tangki bahan bakar luaran semasa pelancaran, tetapi tidak mengena Pengeliling Orbit itu.

src: As part of the check for damage the crew of Discovery used a laser-scanner on the robotic arm to inspect the craft's wing leading-edges and nosecone.
ref: Sebagai sebahagian daripada pemeriksaan kerosakan kru Discovery menggunakan pengimbas laser pada lengan robot untuk memeriksa sayap paling-tepi pesawat itu dan kun muncung.

src: The belly of the Orbiter will be checked later this week.
ref: Perut Pengeliling Orbit akan diperiksa lewat minggu ini.
