src: The incident occurred in the Upper Big Branch mine in Montcoal, West Virginia.
ref: Kejadian itu berlaku di lombong Upper Big Branch di Montcoal, West Virginia.

src: A team attempting to ventilate the mine is expected to complete the work by Wednesday evening.
ref: Satu pasukan yang cuba untuk mengalih udara lombong itu dijangka menyiapkan kerja pada petang Rabu.

src: US President Barack Obama held a prayer breakfast in the White House Tuesday morning.
ref: Presiden Amerika Syarikat Barack Obama mengadakan upacara doa ketika bersarapan di Rumah Putih pagi Selasa.

src: He said that "I would ask for the faithful who are gathered here to pray for the safe return of the missing, the men and women who put their lives on the line to save them and the souls that have been lost in this tragic accident."
ref: Beliau berkata, "Saya akan meminta orang yang beriman berkumpul di sini mendoakan kepulangan selamat bagi yang hilang, para lelaki dan wanita yang meletakkan nyawa mereka untuk menyelamatkan mereka dan jiwa-jiwa yang telah hilang dalam kemalangan tragis ini."

src: 148 member countries are trying to reach a consensus on how to proceed with the Doha round of talks which are scheduled to be agreed in 2006.
ref: 148 negara anggota sedang cuba mencapai kata sepakat mengenai bagaimana caranya meneruskan pusingan rundingan Doha yang dijadualkan akan disetujui pada tahun 2006.

src: However, they are now behind the deadlines they set and the Geneva meeting saw no progress.
ref: Bagaimanapun, mereka kini melewati tarikh akhir dan mesyuarat Geneva itu nampaknya tiada perkembangan.

src: The two announced the merger yesterday, and said that the deal, which has been expected for a long time, is to be implemented by the end of 2010.
ref: Keduanya mengumumkan penggabungan tersebut semalam, dan berkata bahawa penggabungan itu, yang sudah dijangka untuk masa yang panjang, akan dilaksanakan akhir 2010.

src: Under the plan, both companies keep their own brands and operations, but will be owned by International Airlines Group, a new holding company.
ref: Di bawah perancangan itu, kedua syarikat tersebut akan kekal mempunyai jenama dan operasi sendiri, tetapi akan dimiliki oleh Kumpulan Penerbangan Antarabangsa, sebuah syarikat pemegang baru.

src: It will be listed in London, but taxed in Spain.
ref: Syarikat itu akan disenaraikan di London, tetapi akan dicukaikan di Sepanyol.

src: The airlines believe the merger will save $530 million annually.
ref: Syarikat-syarikat penerbangan itu mempercayai penggabungan ini akan dapat menjimatkan $530 juta tahunan.

src: In February, BA reported a loss of $102.4 million for the final three quarters of 2009, whilst Iberia posted an operating loss of $629 million.
ref: Pada bulan Februari, BA melaporkan kerugian sebanyak $102.4 juta untuk akhir suku ketiga 2009, sementara Iberia pula menunjukkan kerugian operasi sebanyak $629 juta.

src: Meanwhile, investors in BA will receive an IAG share for every BA share they own, and stockholders in Iberia 1.0205 shares for each share in the Spanish airline; thus, BA shareholders will take 55% of IAG.
ref: Sementara itu, pelabur-pelabur di BA akan menerima satu saham IAG bagi setiap saham BA yang mereka miliki, dan pemegang saham di Iberia 1.0205 saham bagi setiap saham di penerbangan Sepanyol; oleh itu, pemegang saham BA akan mengambil 55% dari IAG.

src: Meanwhile, Iberia chief executive Antonio Vázquez remarked: "This is an important step in creating one of the world's leading global airlines that will be better equipped to compete with other major airlines and participate in future industry consolidation."
ref: Sementara itu, ketua eksekutif Iberia Antonio Vazquez memberi komen: "Ini adalah satu langkah penting di dalam mewujudkan salah satu penerbangan global terkemuka di dunia yang lebih bersedia bagi bersaing dengan penerbangan utama yang lain dan menyertai konsolidasi industri di masa depan."

src: Independent aviation specialist James Halstead said he believed the merger was necessary for BA to remain competitive amongst other European air carriers.
ref: Pakar penerbangan persendirian James Halstead berkata dia percaya penggabungan ini perlu bagi BA untuk kekal dalam persaingan dengan pesawat udara Eropah yang lain.

src: "BA's unique position at Heathrow could help it survive for a short while, but in the long run it needs more than just Heathrow."
ref: "Posisi BA yang unik di Heathrow akan dapat membantunya untuk bertahan buat jangka masa pendek, tetapi dalam jangka masa panjang ia akan memerlukan lebih dari Heathrow."

src: The raids were in connection with the failed bombings on July 21.
ref: Serbuan adalah merupakan kesinambungan dari kegagalan pengeboman pada 21 Julai.

src: Scotland Yard have announced that a number of arrests have been made, and that three of the suspected July 21 bombers are now in custody.
ref: Kawasan Scotland telah mengumumkan bahawa jumlah yang ditahan telah pun dibuat, dan tiga daripada suspek pengebom pada 21 Julai lalu kini dalam tahanan.

src: Officers in full body armour, helmets and gas masks and armed with shotguns and assault rifles were seen moving in.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai dalam perisai badan penuh, helmet dan topeng gas dan bersenjatakan senapang patah dan senapang serangan dilihat sedang bergerak masuk.

src: Small explosions were heard soon after, and CS gas and stun grenades are also believed to have been used.
ref: Letupan kecil kedengaran sejurus selepas, dan gas CS dan bom tangan dipercayai telah digunakan.

src: Police are cautioning that CS grenade launchers and explosive entries could be mistaken for shots, and have said that no shots were fired.
ref: Polis mengueluarkan amaran bahawa pelancar bom tangan CS dan entri letupan penembakan mungkin satu kesilapan, dan telah menyatakan bahawa tiada tembakan telah dilepaskan.

src: Police at one point described the raid as entering a "challenging phase".
ref: Polis di suatu tahap menjelaskan bahawa serbuan setelah memasuki "fasa yang mencabar".

src: Eyewitnesses said that the police asked one person in a building that was surrounded to give himself up.
ref: Saksi berkata polis meminta seseorang di dalam bangunan yang telah dikepung supaya menyerah diri.

src: Muktar Said Ibrahim, one of two suspects named after the failed 21 July bombing attempts, is also known as Muhammad.
ref: Muktar Said Ibrahim, satu daripada dua suspek yang dinamakan untuk kegagalan cubaan pengeboman 21 Julai, juaga dikenali sebagai Muhammad.

src: The other officially-named suspect has already been arrested in Birmingham.
ref: Suspek lain yang dikenali namanya telah pun ditahan di Birmingham.

src: At one point the cordon around the area was expanded, cutting off TV news stations from their broadcast vehicles which were caught inside the sealed-off area.
ref: Pada satu tahap kepungan di sekitar kawasan diperluas, memotong berita stesyen televisyen daripada disiarkan kenderaan yang mana telah ditangkap di kawasan yang ditutup.

src: Two weeks before the failed attacks of July 21, a series of bombs on July 7 killed 56 people, including four suicide bombers.
ref: Dua minggu sebelum kegagalan serangan pada 21 Julai, siri bom pada 7 Julai telah membunuh 56 ornag, termasuk empat pengebom berani mati.

src: Officials say the crash, which occurred when the plane was approaching a Russian airport on Saturday, was due to dense fog, and that there are no survivors.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai berkata, kemalangan yang berlaku apabila pesawat itu menghampiri lapangan terbang Rusia pada hari Sabtu, adalah disebabkan oleh kabus tebal, dan bahawa tidak ada mangsa terselamat.

src: Sergei Antufyev, the governor of the Smolensk area, said on Russian television that no one survived the crash; the claim was backed by Polish news agencies as well.
ref: Sergei Antufyev, Gabenor kawasan Smolensk itu, berkata di televisyen Rusia bahawa tiada mangsa terselamat; tuntutan itu juga disokong oleh agensi-agensi berita Poland.

src: "As it was preparing for landing, the Polish president's aircraft did not make it to the landing strip," he commented.
ref: "Oleh kerana ia telah bersedia untuk pendaratan, pesawat presiden Poland tidak sampai jalur pendaratan," katanya.

src: "According to preliminary reports, 85 members of the delegation and the crew," he added.
ref: "Menurut laporan awal, 85 anggota delegasi dan anak-anak kapal," katanya.

src: The exact passenger number was not known at first, with conflicting figures given by the Russian police, who said there were 132 people on board, and Polish officials.
ref: Bilangan penumpang yang tepat tidak diketahui pada mulanya, dengan angka yang bercanggah yang diberikan oleh polis Rusia, yang berkata terdapat 132 orang di atas pesawat, dan pegawai-pegawai Poland.

src: However, a full flight manifest received from the Presidential Office has been published by several news portals, giving 96 as the number of killed in the crash, including eight members of the crew.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kenyataan penerbangan penuh yang diterima daripada Pejabat Presiden telah diterbitkan oleh beberapa portal berita, memberi 96 sebagai bilangan terbunuh dalam kemalangan itu, termasuk lapan anggota anak kapal.

src: The manifest is also available on the Office's official web page.
ref: Kenyataan ini juga boleh didapati di laman web rasmi Pejabat.

src: Television footage showed the burning plane with its charred parts scattered in the forest where it crashed.
ref: Rakaman televisyen menunjukkan pesawat itu terbakar dengan bahagian-bahagiannya hangus bertaburan di hutan di mana ia terhempas.

src: "Two flashes of fire next to each other," he said, as quoted by the BBC.
ref: "Dua kelipan api bersebelahan antara satu sama lain," katanya, seperti yang dipetik oleh BBC.

src: Poland has declared a week of national mourning after the incident.
ref: Poland telah mengisytiharkan perkabungan kebangsaan selama seminggu selepas kejadian itu.

src: Russian Prime Minister Vladimir Putin was immediately appointed by Dmitry Medvedev, the president, as the head of the commission to investigate the crash.
ref: Perdana Menteri Rusia Vladimir Putin dilantik segera oleh Dmitry Medvedev, presiden, sebagai ketua suruhanjaya untuk menyiasat kemalangan itu.

src: The latter also sent Sergei Shoigu, the Russian minister of emergency situations, to the site of the crash.
ref: Presiden juga menghantar Sergei Shoigu, menteri situasi kecemasan Rusia, ke tapak kemalangan itu.

src: Hussein is a UK citizen who was born in Somalia, and later moved to Britain and naturalized.
ref: Hussein ialah seorang warganegara UK yang dilahirkan di Somalia, dan kemudiannya berpindah ke Britain dan diwarganegarakan.

src: The eruption has created a large hole in the glacier, as well as a fissure that is forming under the glacier, which is now around 2 kilometers (1 mi) long.
ref: Letusan tersebut telah membentuk satu lubang yang besar, serta rekahan di bawah glasier, yang kini sepanjang 2 kilometer (1 mi).

src: The first evacuations began at about 02.00 local time (03.00 UTC) today, because earthquakes in the area had pointed to an imminent eruption.
ref: Pemindahan pertama bermula pada kira-kira 02.00 waktu tempatan (03.00 UTC) hari ini, kerana gempa bumi di kawasan itu menunjukkan petanda letusan akan berlaku.

src: Air traffic is prohibited in a large area around the eruption zone.
ref: Trafik udara dilarang di kawasan besar sekitar zon letusan.

src: Thousands of people have taken to the streets of Krakow objecting to plans to bury the Polish president, Lech Kaczynski, at Wawel Castle.
ref: Beribu-ribu orang telah berarak di jalan di Krakow bagi membantah rancangan untuk mengebumikan Presiden Poland, Lech Kaczynski, di Istana Wawel.

src: Kaczynski and his wife are set to be buried on Sunday.
ref: Kaczynski dan isterinya ditetapkan untuk dikebumikan pada hari Ahad.

src: Burial spaces at Wawel castle are normally reserved for Polish kings and heroes.
ref: Ruang untuk dikebumikan di Istana Wawel biasanya dikhaskan untuk raja-raja Poland dan wira negara.

src: Several of the world’s leaders and dignitaries are to attend the president's funeral, including US president Barack Obama and Russian leader Dmitry Medvedev.
ref: Beberapa pemimpin dan pembesar-pembesar di dunia akan menghadiri pengebumian presiden, termasuk Presiden Amerika Syarikat Barack Obama dan pemimpin Rusia Dmitry Medvedev.

src: Schriner previously ran for president in 2000, 2004, and 2008, but failed to gain much traction in the races.
ref: Schriner sebelum ini bertanding untuk presiden pada tahun 2000, 2004, dan 2008, tetapi gagal untuk mendapat banyak kuasa tarikan dalam pertandingan.

src: He announced his candidacy for the 2012 race immediately following the 2008 election.
ref: Beliau mengumumkan pencalonannya untuk pertandingan 2012 sejurus selepas pilihan raya 2008.

src: Schriner refers to himself as the "Average Joe" candidate, and advocates a pro-life and pro-environmentalist platform.
ref: Schriner merujuk kepada dirinya sebagai calon "Average Joe," dan menyokong platform pro-hidup dan pro-pencinta alam sekitar.

src: He has been the subject of numerous newspaper articles, and has published public policy papers exploring solutions to American issues.
ref: Beliau telah menjadi subjek banyak rencana akhbar, dan telah menerbitkan kertas-kertas dasar awam yang meneroka penyelesaian atas isu-isu Amerika.

src: The mayor of Champaign, Illinois denies that Barack Obama is eligible to hold the highest office in the United States, joining others who question the validity of the president's birth certificate.
ref: Datuk bandar Champaign, Illinois menafikan yang Barack Obama layak memegang jawatan tertinggi di Amerika Syarikat, mengikut serta pihak lain yang menyoalkan kesahan surat beranak presiden tersebut.

src: The Republican, three-term mayor of the central Illinois city made the comment to a man holding a video camera during a Tea Party protest at West Side Park in Champaign.
ref: Republikan tersebut, datuk bandar bagi bandar pertengahan Illinois sebanyak tiga penggal memberi komen tersebut kepada seorang lelaki yang memegang kamera video di protes Tea Party di Taman West Side di Champaign.

src: Schweighart's concerns reflect those held by some Tea Party proponents and "birthers", who claim that Obama is not eligible to be the president because he was not born in the United States.
ref: Persoalan Schweighart menggambarkan kebimbangan beberapa penyokong dan "birther" Tea Party, yang mendakwa Obama tidak layak untuk menjadi presiden kerana beliau tidak dilahirkan di Amerika Syarikat.

src: Although officials in Hawaii have confirmed that Obama was born there, birthers still insist that he has not proven his constitutional eligibility as a natural born citizen.
ref: Walaupun pihak kerajaan di Hawaii telah mengesahkan bahawa Obama dilahirkan di situ, birthers masih menegaskan bahawa beliau belum membuktikan kelayakan perlembagaannya sebagai warganegara yang dilahirkan di negara tersebut.

src: "It's a ridiculous statement to make, and that's why I felt like he polarized the city with those kinds of bias."
ref: "Ia adalah kenyataan yang tidak masuk akal untuk dikatakan, dan kerana itu saya rasa dia telah menyebabkan berlakunya polarisasi dengan sikap berat sebelah seperti itu".

src: "I think from this statement, it will make him a very ineffective mayor," he said.
ref: "Saya rasa berdasarkan kenyataan ini, ia akan menjadikannya seorang datuk bandar yang tidak cekap," katanya.

src: "I respect the mayor greatly but I am somewhat disheartened by his comments."
ref: "Saya amat menghormati datuk bandar tetapi saya agak kecewa dengan kenyataannya".

src: "If we all get fired for making dumb comments, we'd sure be moving around a lot," she said.
ref: "Jika kita semua dibuang kerja kerana membuat kenyataan yang bodoh, sudah pasti kita banyak melahu," katanya.

src: At 8:50 AM local time (15:50 UTC) a man attempting to enter the United States at the Tijuana – San Diego section of the US – Mexican border, tried to escape U.S. customs officers, after he could not provide official documentation.
ref: Pada waktu tempatan 8:50 pagi (15:50 UTC) seorang lelaki cuba untuk memasuki Amerika Syarikat di Tijuana - seksyen San Diego di U.S. - sempadan Mexico, cuba melarikan diri daripada pegawai kastam U.S., selepas dia tidak dapat menyediakan dokumen rasmi.

src: According to Lieutenant Kevin Rooney of the San Diego police department, "the agent referred the driver to a secondary inspection and he [the driver] quickly accelerated away."
ref: Menurut Leftenan Kevin Rooney daripada jabatan polis San Diego, "ejen tersebut merujuk pemandu itu untuk pemeriksaan kedua dan dia [pemandu] memecut melarikan diri dari sini".

src: The acceleration caused him to crash into a pickup truck.
ref: Pecutan menyebabkan dia berlanggar dengan sebuah trak pikap.

src: When customs officers surrounded the vehicle, the driver went into reverse, which led to two officers opening fire on the vehicle.
ref: Apabila pegawai kastam mengelilingi kenderaannya, pemandu tersebut mengundurkan kenderaanya, yang memaksa dua pegawai melepaskan tembakan pada kenderaan.

src: The man was shot only once and the wound was not life threatening.
ref: Lelaki itu telah ditembak sekali sahaja dan luka tersebut tidak mengancam nyawa.

src: Police officials believe the driver tried to flee because the vehicle was reported to have been stolen from Colorado.
ref: Pegawai polis percaya pemandu cuba melarikan diri kerana kenderaan itu dilaporkan dicuri dari Colorado.

src: Tom Cruise this week took the delivery service to a whole new level.
ref: Tom Cruise pada minggu ini membawa perkhidmatan penghantaran ke satu tahap yang baru.

src: Celebrating his 43rd birthday with numerous guests at a party in the USA, Cruise decided to call up his three favorite chefs, all living in Italy, to prepare a meal.
ref: Menyambut hari jadinya ke-43 dengan ramai tetamu dalam sebuah jamuan di AS, Cruise memutuskan untuk memanggil tiga tukang masak kegemarannya, semuanya tinggal di Itali, untuk menyediakan makanan.

src: Barrichello was with the team since 2000, won nine Grand Prix, helping win five constructor titles.
ref: Barrichello bersama pasukan itu sejak tahun 2000, memenangi sembilan Grand Prix, membantu memenangi lima kejuaraan pembuat enjin.

src: "I am aware of the responsibility it places on me and I cannot wait to be part of a team like Ferrari, alongside the best driver in the world, Michael Schumacher," said Massa.
ref: "Saya sedar tanggungjawab diletakkan pada saya dan saya tidak sabar untuk menjadi sebahagian daripada pasukan seperti Ferrari, bersama pemandu terbaik di dunia, Michael Schumacher," kata Massa.

src: The earthquake, which struck at 08:17 am AWST (00:17 UTC), is the strongest to hit the region of Goldfields-Esperance in 50 years.
ref: Gempa bumi itu, yang melanda pada jam 08:17 pagi AWST (00:17 UTC), adalah yang paling kuat melanda di rantau Goldfields-Esperance dalam 50 tahun.

src: Goldfields is considered one of the more geologically stable regions of Australia, in comparison to the southwest corner of the state, which is an active zone at the edge of the Yilgarn block.
ref: Goldfields dianggap sebagai salah satu rantau geologi yang stabil di Australia, berbanding dengan barat daya, yang merupakan zon aktif di pinggir blok Yilgarn.

src: Kalgoorlie is also the largest urban centre in Goldfields, and has the largest number of buildings that would be vulnerable to such an earthquake.
ref: Kalgoorlie juga adalah pusat bandar terbesar di Goldfields, dan mempunyai bilangan terbesar bangunan yang boleh terjejas dengan gempa bumi seperti itu.

src: Minor casualties and building damage have been reported, and miners and schoolchildren have been evacuated.
ref: Kecederaan ringan dan kerosakan bangunan telah dilaporkan, dan pelombong - pelombong dan kanak-kanak sekolah telah dipindahkan.

src: Until now the one hundred dollar note, along with the one and two dollar notes, was not part of the newest batch of dollar note redesigns.
ref: Sehingga kini seratus dolar, bersama-sama dengan wang kertas satu dan dua dolar, bukan sebahagian daripada kumpulan terbaru rekaan semula wang kertas dolar.

src: The Bureau of Engraving and Printing redesigned the series 2006 5, 10, 20, and 50 dollar notes previously.
ref: Biro Ukiran dan Percetakan mereka semula siri 2006 wang kertas 5, 10, 20, dan 50 dolar nota sebelum ini.

src: Along with a new stylized portrait of Benjamin Franklin, the note also features a quill pen and inkwell on the obverse.
ref: Bersama-sama dengan potret Benjamin Franklin yang digayakan baru, nota ini juga mempunyai sebuah pena bulu ayam dan tempat tinta pada muka depan wang itu.

src: On the reverse it has a new larger printed '100' in gold lettering.
ref: Dibahagian belakang ia mempunyai cetakan '100'baru yang lebih besar dalam huruf emas.

src: The note was originally slated for release in 2008 although budget constraints pushed the release date back to late 2009 or early to mid 2010.
ref: Wang kertas itu pada asalnya dijadualkan akan dikeluarkan pada tahun 2008 walaupun kekangan bajet menunda tarikh keluaran ke akhir tahun 2009 atau awal hingga pertengahan 2010.

src: The note will go into general circulation by early 2011.
ref: Wang kertas itu akan masuk ke dalam peredaran umum pada awal 2011.

src: The murder probably took place on Sunday, July 31 according to the local police, which also states that at least ten suspects have been questioned.
ref: Pembunuhan itu kemungkinan berlaku pada Ahad, 31 Julai menurut polis tempatan, yang juga menyatakan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya sepuluh suspek telah disoal.

src: Development on this $350 million system by Northrop Grumman Corporation was begun in March of 2004 with basic operation achieved in just 4 months.
ref: Pembangunan sistem yang bernilai $350 juta ini diusahakan oleh Northrop Grumman Corporation, bermula pada bulan Mac 2004 dengan operasi asas dicapai hanya dalam masa 4 bulan.

src: "The Homeland is more secure when each hometown is more secure," said Secretary of Homeland Security Tom Ridge in DHS's February 24, 2004 press release that launched the program.
ref: "Negeri ini akan lebih selamat apabila setiap kampung halaman menjadi lebih selamat," kata Setiausaha Keselamatan Dalam Negeri, Tom Ridge pada dalam sidang akhbar DHS 24 Februari 2004 yang melancarkan program ini.

src: Future program expansion will include the county level, communication at the classified SECRET level, and the involvement of the private sector.
ref: Program masa depan akan termasuk perluasan ke peringkat daerah, komunikasi di peringkat pengelasan RAHSIA dan penglibatan sektor swasta.

src: HSIN lets most government agencies as well as many private companies doing business with the government share information on the whereabouts and suspicious activities of anyone that comes to their attention.
ref: HSIN membolehkan agensi-agensi kerajaan serta syarikat-syarikat swasta yang berurusan dengan kerajaan dapat berkongsi maklumat mengenai tempat dan aktiviti yang mencurigakan oleh sesiapa sahaja yang menarik perhatian mereka.

src: Internal policies and the judgement of the system's users provide privacy and civil rights protections, while who can access the system is determined by DHS.
ref: Polisi dalaman dan penghakiman kepada pengguna sistem itu menyediakan privasi dan hak-hak perlindungan sivil, manakala individu yang boleh mengakses sistem ini ditentukan oleh DHS.

src: Cook, aged 59, was flown to a hospital in Inverness by a rescue service helicopter half an hour after collapsing.
ref: Cook, berumur 59 tahun, dikejarkan ke hospital di Inverness oleh servis helikopter penyelamat setengah jam selepas beliau rebah.

src: A spokesperson for NHS Highland said that Mr. Cook arrived at hospital 90 minutes after his collapse, and was reported dead five minutes later.
ref: Jurucakap untuk NHS Highland berkata bahawa Encik Cook tiba di hospital 90 minit selepas beliau rebah, dan dilaporkan mati lima minit kemudian.

src: A postmortem examination has concluded that he died from hypertensive heart disease.
ref: Ujian posmoterm telah membuat kesimpulan bahwa beliau mati disebabkam penyakit jantung hipertensi.

src: Mr. Cook was buried on August 12 at St Giles Cathedral in Edinburgh in a service attended by close family, friends and political figures from across the world.
ref: Encik Cook telah di kebumikan pada 12 Ogos di Gereja ST Giles di Edinburgh yang dihadiri oleh keluarga terdekat, rakan-rakan dan ahli politik dari serata dunia.

src: He resigned as Leader of the House of Commons in 2003 in protest against Prime Minister Blair's foreign policies.
ref: Beliau meletak jawatan sebagai Ketua di Rumah Biasa pada 2003 kerana membantah polisi luar oleh Perdana Menteri Blair.

src: The aftershock reached a magnitude of 5.9 with the epicenter located nineteen kilometers west of Pichilemu, according to the University of Chile Geological Survey (UCGS).
ref: Gempa susulan mencapai magnitud 5.9 dengan pusat gempa terletak sembilan belas kilometer barat Pichilemu, menurut Kajian Geologikal Universiti Chile (UCGS).

src: However, the United States Geological Survey (USGS) reported that it reached a magnitude of 5.8; had a depth of 8,5 kilometers; and that the epicenter was located 65 kilometers at the southwest of San Antonio, Valparaíso; 100 kilometers at the west of Rancagua, O'Higgins 105 kilometers at the northwest of Curicó, Maule and; 135 kilometers at the southwest of Santiago, Metropolitan Region.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat (USGS) melaporkan bahawa ia telah mencapai magnitud 5.8; mempunyai kedalaman 8.5 kilometer; dan bahawa pusat gempa terletak 65 kilometer di barat daya San Antonio, Valparaiso; 100 kilometer di barat Rancagua, O'Higgins 105 kilometer di barat laut Curicó, Maule dan; 135 kilometer di barat daya Santiago, Wilayah Metropolitan.

src: Pakistani military agreed to help in the rescue mission of Slovenian alpinist Tomaž Humar.
ref: Tentera Pakistan bersetuju untuk membantu dalam misi menyelamat pendaki gunung Slovenia Tomaž Humar.

src: The rescue team managed to locate Humar on face on Sunday, but said they need a better helicopter for the actual rescue mission.
ref: Pasukan penyelamat berjaya mengesan Humar pada muka pada hari Ahad, tetapi berkata bahawa mereka memerlukan helikopter yang lebih baik untuk misi menyelamat yang sebenar.

src: In a televised Pentagon press briefing Tuesday, U.S. Secretary of Defense Donald Rumsfeld stood by a press release from the Pentagon on Monday that reported explosives and bombs crossed into Iraq from across the Iranian border.
ref: Dalam sidang akhbar dengan televisyen Pentagon pada hari Selasa, Setiausaha Pertahanan Amerika Donald Rumsfeld berhadapan dengan kenyataan akhbar dari Pentagon pada hari Isnin yang melaporkan bahan letupan dan bom yang menyeberang Iraq dari sempadan Iran.

src: It is true that weapons, clearly, unambiguously from Iran have been found in Iraq, Rumsfeld said today.
ref: Memang benar bahawa senjata, dengan jelas sekali dari Iran telah ditemui di Iraq, Rumsfeld, hari ini.

src: Evidence reportedly indicated the quality and sophistication of the weapons was such that they may have been manufactured in Iran, but Rumsfeld was unable or unwilling to describe the weapons further.
ref: Bukti dilaporkan menunjukkan kualiti dan kecanggihan senjata adalah seperti yang mungkin telah dihasilkan di Iran, tetapi Rumsfeld tidak boleh atau tidak ingin menggambarkan senjata itu dengan lanjut.

src: Rumsfeld, with the Chairman of the Joint Chief of Staffs, Richard Myers, said the jihadist effort in Iraq was aimed at inciting civil war, since they realize they cannot directly defeat the coalition.
ref: Rumsfeld, dengan Pengerusi Ketua Staf Bersama, Richard Myers, berkata usaha jihad di Iraq bertujuan menghasut perang saudara, kerana mereka menyedari bahawa mereka tidak boleh secara langsung mengalahkan persatuan itu.

src: The two cited progress by the Iraqi government in working toward the August 15 deadline for drafting a new constitution.
ref: Kedua-dua kemajuan yang dinamakan oleh kerajaan Iraq dalam bekerja ke arah tarikh akhir 15 Ogos untuk merangka perlembagaan baru.

src: They reasserted previous President Bush statements that there is no clear time-table for an Iraqi withdrawal because it depends on the situation at the time.
ref: Mereka menegaskan sekali lagi kenyataan Presiden Bush sebelum ini bahawa tidak ada jadual waktu yang jelas untuk pengunduran Iraq kerana ia bergantung kepada keadaan pada masa itu.

src: The drawdowns that will occur eventually will obviously be based on those conditions.
ref: Surutan bilangan angkatan tentera yang akan berlaku akhirnya jelas akan secara jelasnya berdasarkan syarat-syarat itu.

src: Further questions by reporters intending to pin down a clear withdrawal time-line were rebuffed.
ref: Soalan-soalan lebih lanjut oleh pemberita-pemberita yang berhasrat untuk menyalahkan waktu pengunduran telah ditolak.

src: Myers said, "You have economic progress that has to be made; you have political progress that has to be made."
ref: Myers berkata, "Anda mempunyai kemajuan ekonomi yang perlu dibuat; Anda mempunyai kemajuan politik yang perlu dibuat".

src: Falkirk were today relegated from the Scottish Premier League (SPL), after they failed to beat Kilmarnock away from home.
ref: Falkirk hari ini telah diturunkan dari Liga Perdana Scotland(SPL), selepas mereka gagal menewaskan Kilmarnock di tempat lawan.

src: It is the first time Falkirk have been in the second tier of Scottish football since 2005.
ref: Ini adalah yang pertama kali Falkirk berada di liga tahap kedua dalam bolasepak Scotland sejak 2005.

src: Kilmarnock had previously been two points clear of twelfth position, occupied instead by Falkirk.
ref: Kilmarnock sebelum ini berada dua mata di atas posisi ke dua belas liga yang diduduki oleh Falkirk.

src: The team in last place would be relegated, and, only needing a draw, Kilmarnock played a slow and defensive game.
ref: Pasukan di tempat tercorot akan diturunkan, dan dengan hanya memerlukan keputusan seri, Kilmarnock bermain perlahan dan secara bertahan.

src: It is the first time Falkirk have been in the second tier of Scottish football since 2005.
ref: Ini adalah yang pertama kali Falkirk berada di liga tahap kedua dalam bolasepak Scotland sejak 2005.

src: With only two shots on target the entire game, much of the credit for the draw went to each team's defensive line, putting in several last-ditch tackles to stifle attacks.
ref: Dengan hanya 2 rembatan on target sepanjang perlawanan, kepujian banyak diberikan kepada barisan pertahanan pasukan masing-masing yang telah melakukan beberapa tackle saat akhir untuk menyekat serangan.

src: On 77 minutes, the Falkirk side had the ball in the net, but the goal was disallowed for a clear foul on the Kilmarnock goalkeeper.
ref: Pada minit ke 77, Falkirk telah meletakkan bola ke dalam gol, namun jaringan mereka dibatalkan kerana kekasaran yang jelas ke atas penjaga gol Kilmarnock.

src: Falkirk had a glorious opportunity to win the game on 86 minutes, when the ball landed for Ryan Flynn with the goal empty, but the young midfielder put it over from ten yards.
ref: Falkirk mempunyai peluang besar untuk memenangi perlawanan pada minit ke 86 apabila bola sampai kepada Ryan Flynn dengan gol yang kosong, namun pemain tengah muda itu mensia-siakan peluang dari jarak 10 ela.

src: Kilmarnock manager Jimmy Calderwood, speaking after the game, spoke of his experiences: "It was a long, long day."
ref: Pengurus pasukan Kilmarnock, Jimmy Calderwood berkata selepas tamat perlawanan mengenai pengalamannya "Ia merupakan satu hari yang sangat panjang."

src: "I wouldn't advise it for anybody to be honest, you know. "
ref: "Secara jujur, saya tidak akan menyarankannya kepada sesiapa pun."

src: "We had a chance on the counter attack, we didn't take it, and then I think it was the 92nd or 93rd minute young Flynn missed a dottie of a chance."
ref: "Kami mempunyai satu peluang melalui serangan balas, kami tidak menyempurnakannya, dan saya rasa pemain muda Flynn melepaskan peluang baik pada minit 92 atau 93."

src: When asked about his future at the club, Calderwood replied: "I'll see what the idea is."
ref: Apabila ditanya tentang masa depan beliau bersama kelab tersebut, Calderwood membalas "Saya akan lihat."

src: " I wouldn't want to stay with too many games like this."
ref: "Saya tidak mahu menghadapi terlalu banyak perlawanan seperti ini."

src: The manager of Falkirk, Steven Pressley, also told Radio Scotland his views on the game: "It was a very emotional day, you know, we're bitterly disappointed, but once again I couldn't ask any more from this group of players. "
ref: Pengurus pasukan Falkirk, Steven Pressley, juga memberitahu Radio Scotland tentang pandangannya terhadap perlawanan ini "Ianya adalah hari yang sangat emosi, kami sangat kecewa, tapi sekali lagi saya tidak boleh meminta apa-apa lagi dari pemain pasukan ini."

src: This was Pressley's first season as a manager, and he was questioned on his experience in the role: "I love it. "
ref: Ini adalah musim pertama Pressley sebagai seorang pengurus, dan dia ditanyakan tentang pengalamannya dalam tugas itu: "Saya sukakannya."

src: "It's been an emotional day today, but in terms of my three months in charge, it's been a terrific experience. "
ref: "Ia merupakan hari yang emosi hari ini, tetapi dalam 3 bulan saya bertugas, ia merupakan satu pengalaman yang hebat."

src: "I very much enjoy it here and hopefully we can certainly build for next season."
ref: "Saya sangat sukakannya di sini dan diharap kami pasti dapat membinanya semula pada musim hadapan."

src: A truck carrying 35,500 pounds (16,100 kg) of explosives used in mining and seismic exploration overturned and exploded on a rural mountain section of U.S. Highway 6 in Utah's Spanish Fork Canyon Thursday afternoon.
ref: Sebuah trak yang membawa 35,500 paun (16,100 kg) bahan letupan untuk digunakan dalam perlombongan dan penerokaan seismik terbalik dan meletup di kawasan gunung luar bandar Lebuhraya A.S. 6 di Spanish Fork Canyon Utah petang Khamis lalu.

src: The wreck occurred shortly after 2 pm, as driver Travis Stewart, 30, of Rexburg, Idaho, was leaving Ensign-Bickford Co., a commercial explosives manufacturing plant at the mouth of the canyon.
ref: Kemalangan tersebut berlaku sejurus selepas jam 2 petang, apabila pemandu Travis Stewart, 30, dari Rexburg, Idaho, meninggalkan Ensign-Bickford Co, kilang bahan letupan komersial di muara gaung.

src: Lt. Peay said the posted speed limit on the road is 60 mph, but the advised speed is 40.
ref: Lt. Peay berkata had laju yang ditunjukkan di jalan raya adalah 60 mph, tetapi kelajuan yang dinasihatkan ialah 40.

src: The driver was transported via helicopter to a hospital, where he was listed in fair condition, and was later released.
ref: Pemandu itu dibawa ke hospital dengan menggunakan helikopter, di mana beliau telah disenaraikan dalam keadaan yang stabil, dan kemudiannya dibenarkan pulang.

src: The co-driver Troy Lysfjord, 37, of Blackfoot, Idaho, was helped from the wreck by passers by and listed in fair condition at Utah Valley Regional Hospital in Provo.
ref: Pembantu pemandu Troy Lysfjord, 37, dari Blackfoot, Idaho, dibantu keluar dari tempat kejadian oleh orang awam dan disenaraikan dalam keadaan yang stabil di Hospital Wilayah Utah Valley di Provo.

src: Utah Department of Transportation spokesman Tom Hudachko said officials hoped to have the road fully repaired by Friday afternoon, adding that, "When you take a look at that hole that was there 24 hours ago, I think it's amazing the progress that was made."
ref: Jurucakap Jabatan Pengangkutan Utah Tom Hudachko berkata pegawai-pegawai berharap jalan tersebut dapat dibaiki sepenuhnya pada tengah hari Jumaat, sambil menambah: "Apabila kamu lihat pada lubang yang berada di sana 24 jam yang lalu, saya fikir kemajuan yang telah dibuat adalah menakjubkan."

src: The explosion consumed all but about 60 pounds of explosives, and loosened some boulders on the north side of the highway, damaged railroad tracks and some fiber optic lines buried along the roadway.
ref: Letupan tersebut menggunakan hampir semua kecuali kira-kira 60 paun bahan letupan, dan melonggarkan beberapa batu-batu di sebelah utara lebuh raya, merosakkan landasan kereta api dan beberapa talian gentian optik yang ditanam di sepanjang jalan tersebut.

src: Amtrak and Union Pacific reported delays resulting from the wreck.
ref: Amtrak dan Kesatuan Pasifik melaporkan kelewatan disebabkan oleh kemalangan itu.

src: Uinta National Forest spokesman Loyal Clark said forest firefighters were unable to respond to several small fires nearby that were apparently started by flying debris, and that helicopters dropped water to extinguish them.
ref: Jurucakap Hutan Negara Uinta Loyal Clark berkata anggota bomba hutan tidak dapat mengambil tindakan terhadap beberapa kebakaran kecil berhampiran yang nampaknya bermula dengan serpihan yang berterbangan, dan helikopter telah menjatuhkan air untuk memadamkannya.

src: The cost of repairs, while paid immediately by the state, will ultimately be borne by the trucking company's insurance carrier.
ref: Kos pembaikan, walaupun dibayar serta-merta oleh kerajaan, akan ditanggung sendiri oleh syarikut insuran pengangkutan trak itu nanti.

src: The truck is registered to R&R Trucking of Duenweg, Missouri.
ref: Trak tersebut didaftarkan pada R & R Trucking daripada Duenweg, Missouri.

src: The Russian and Turkish governments today signed an agreement that would lead to Russia building a US$20 billion nuclear power plant in Turkey, the country's first.
ref: Kerajaan Rusia dan Turki hari ini telah menandatangani perjanjian yang akan membawa Rusia membina sebuah loji kuasa nuklear berharga US$20 bilion di Turki, yang pertama di negara itu.

src: Russia has attempted to build a nuclear power plant in Turkey, and the contract signed Wednesday "really looks rather impressive," according to Russian President Dmitry Medvedev.
ref: Rusia telah cuba untuk membina loji kuasa nuklear di Turki, dan kontrak yang ditandatangani pada hari Rabu "benar-benar kelihatan menarik," menurut Presiden Rusia Dmitry Medvedev.

src: One such project is a major pipeline between the Turkish ports of Samsun on the Black Sea and Ceyhan on the Mediterranean Sea, built in conjunction with an oil refinery in Ceyhan.
ref: Satu daripada projek ialah saluran paip utama antara pelabuhan Turki di Samsun di Lautan Hitam dan Ceyhan di Lautan Mediterranean, dibina sempena kilang penapis minyak di Ceyhan.

src: In a press conference, Russian President Medvedev said that the agreements signal "a new page in our cooperation...Our talks today showed that Turkey and Russia are strategic partners not only in words but in deeds."
ref: Di sidang akbar, Presiden Rusia Medvedev berkata bahawa persetujuan menunjukkan "halaman baru dalam syarikat kami...Perbincangan kami hari ini menunjukkan bahawa Turki dan Rusia adalah rakan strategik bukan sekadar kata-kata tetapi dalam perbuatan".

src: Turkish President Abdullah Gul said that the two countries "share a determination to increase the trade volume from a current US$38 billion to US$100 billion in five years."
ref: Presiden Turki Abdullah Gul berkata bahawa kedua negara "berkongsi penentuan untuk meningkatkan jumlah dagangan daripada US$38 bilion sekarang kepada US$100 bilion dalam tempoh lima tahun".

src: The British and Dutch embassies in Thailand also halted their services after the Thai government said that it would seal off the area.
ref: Kedutaan British dan Belanda di Thailand juga menghentikan perkhidmatan mereka selepas kerajaan Thailand berkata ia akan menutup kawasan itu.

src: While giving interviews with foreign journalists, Sawasdipol appeared to have been shot in the head by a sniper.
ref: Sambil memberikan temu bual dengan wartawan asing, Sawasdipol nampak ditembak di kepala oleh penembak hendap.

src: He was later taken to a local hospital for emergency treatment.
ref: Dia kemudiannya dibawa ke hospital tempatan untuk rawatan kecemasan.

src: One other protester, 25-year-old Chartchai Bualao, was killed in the incident, but it is still unclear as to who is responsible for the shooting.
ref: Seorang lagi penunjuk perasaan, Chartchai Bualao, berusia 25 tahun, terbunuh dalam kejadian itu, tetapi ia masih tidak jelas mengenai siapa yang bertanggungjawab menembaknya.

src: Thai military forces moved in quickly to suppress the protesters just after the shooting, aiming to put down the opposition movement and secure the area in which they had barricaded themselves since early April.
ref: Angkatan tentera Thai bergerak dengan cepat untuk menindas penunjuk perasaan sejurus selepas berlakunya tembakan, yang bertujuan untuk melumpuhkan pergerakan pembangkang dan mengawal kawasan di mana mereka telah membuat kurungan mereka sejak awal bulan April.

src: This incident is only the latest in an ongoing series of violent outbreaks among protesters and the Thai government.
ref: Kejadian ini merupakan yang terbaru dalam siri keganasan berterusan antara penunjuk perasaan dan kerajaan Thailand.

src: Russian president Dmitriy Medvedev met with the Khaled Meshaal, leader of the Hamas group, earlier this week in Syria, prompting criticism from Israel.
ref: Presiden Rusia Dmitriy Medvedev bertemu dengan Khaled Meshaal, pemimpin kumpulan Hamas, awal minggu ini di Syria, yang membawa kritikan daripada Israel.

src: Medvedev, during the meeting, had encouraged Hamas to reconciliate with rival Fatah; a spokeswoman quoted him as saying that "no one" should be left out of the peace process.
ref: Medvedev, semasa mesyuarat itu, telah menggalakkan Hamas untuk berdamai dengan musuhnya Fatah; seorang jurucakap memetik beliau sebagai berkata bahawa "tiada siapa" harus ketinggalan dalam proses pendamaian ini.

src: A statement by the Israeli foreign ministry read: "Hamas is a terror organization whose declared goal is the destruction of the state of Israel.
ref: Menurut kenyataan Kementerian Luar Israel membaca: "Hamas adalah sebuah pertubuhan pengganas yang mengisytiharkan matlamatnya adalah kemusnahan negara Israel".

src: We expect the same attitude when we are talking about the Hamas terrorism against Israel."
ref: Kami menjangkakan sikap yang sama apabila kita bercakap mengenai keganasan Hamas menentang Israel".

src: Ha'aretz, an Israeli newspaper, described the meeting as being "a surprise" for the country.
ref: Ha'aretz, sebuah akhbar Israel, menyifatkan pertemuan itu sebagai "satu kejutan" untuk negara itu.

src: It is a movement that draws on the trust and sympathy of a large number of Palestinians.
ref: Ia adalah sebuah gerakan yang ditubuhkan daripada kepercayaan dan simpati sebilangan besar rakyat Palestin.

src: A Cathay Pacific passenger aircraft from Hong Kong was escorted by two Canadian military aircraft after the pilot issued an alert of a bomb threat to the aircraft.
ref: Pesawat penumpang Cathay Pacific dari Hong Kong telah ditemani oleh dua pesawat tentera Kanada selepas juruterbang mengeluarkan amaran berkenaan ugutan bom kepada pesawat.

src: Passengers were initially kept on board the aircraft before being allowed to get off; the plane was moved to a secure section of the airport while police investigated the incident.
ref: Penumpang pada awalnya dibiarkan di dalam pesawat sebelum dibenarkan keluar; pesawat digerakkan ke bahagian yang lebih selamat di lapangan terbang sambil polis memeriksa kejadian itu.

src: According to a police official authorities had taken the threat seriously, even though no dangerous substances had been found on board the plane, and passengers had not been in danger.
ref: Menurut pejabat polis pihak berkuasa mengambil serius tentang ugutan ini, walaupun tiada bahan berbahaya yang dijumpai di atas kapal da penumpang tidak berada dalam bahaya.

src: The investigation into the plane crash that killed Polish President Lech Kaczyński has revealed that passengers were in the cockpit of the crashed plane.
ref: Siasatan ke atas nahas kapal terbang yang meragut nyawa Presiden Poland Lech Kaczyński mendapati bahawa penumpang di dalam kokpit pesawat yang terhempas.

src: According to the head of the technical commission involved with investigating the crash, Alexei Morozov, the crew of the aircraft had been warned of limited visibility, although it has not been determined whether or not the crew's decision to land had been influenced by the passengers on board.
ref: Menurut ketua suruhanjaya teknikal yang terlibat dalam siasatan nahas, Alexei Morozov, anak-anak kapal pesawat telah diberi amaran penglihatan terhad, walaupun ia belum ditentukan sama ada ya atau tidak keputusan anak-anak kapal untuk mendarat telah dipengaruhi oleh penumpang kapal.

src: He said that the crew "did not undergo regular simulated training, including the practice of co-ordination and emergency situations during flights."
ref: Dia berkata bahawa anak-anak kapal "tidak menjalani latihan simulasi yang kerap, termasuk amalan koordinasi dan situasi kecemasan semasa penerbangan".

src: The overall leader of the investigation, Tatyana Anodina, confirmed that unauthorized people had been in the cockpit near the end of the flight, saying that "in the cockpit there were individuals who were not members of the crew."
ref: Ketua keseluruhan siasatan, Tatyana Anodina, mengesahkan bahawa orang yang tidak dibenarkan telah berada di kokpit di akhir penerbangan, berkata bahawa "di dalam kokpit terdapat individu yang bukan ahli daripada anak-anak kapal".

src: One person had been identified, although their name has not been released.
ref: Seorang telah dikenal pasti, walaupun nama mereka belum dikeluarkan.

src: The investigation also found that the aircraft involved had been in normal operating condition; Anodina said that "[t]he engines were working up till the moment the plane collided with the ground."
ref: Siasatan juga mendapati bahawa pesawat yang terlibat berada dalam keadaan operasi normal; Anodina berkata bahawa "enjin [itu] berfungsi sehingga pesawat berlanggar dengan tanah".

src: The move comes after a Pakistani court ordered a temporary block of social networking site Facebook on Wednesday, when a row unfolded concerning a group on Facebook urging users on the popular social networking site to draw pictures of the Prophet Mohammed.
ref: Tindakan itu datang selepas mahkamah Pakistan mengarahkan halangan sementara laman rangkaian sosial Facebook pada hari Rabu, apabila pergaduhan ditemui melibatkan kumpulan di Facebook yang menggesa pengguna laman rangkaian sosial itu untuk melukis gambar Nabi Mohammed.

src: According to a spokesman, the agency only did so after "all possible" options had been exhausted.
ref: Menurut jurucakap, agensi tersebut hanya berbuat begitu selepas "semua kemungkinan" pilihan telah habis.

src: The spokesman, Khoram Ali Mehran, said that they were "just following the government's instructions and the ruling of the Lahore High Court", and that "if the government decides to unblock it, then that's what we will do".
ref: Jurucakap tersebut, Khoram Ali Mehran, berkata yang mereka "hanya menurut perintah kerajaan dan pemerintah Mahkamah Tinggi Lahore," dan "jika kerajaan memutuskan untuk mebuka sekatan tersebut, maka itulah yang akan kami lakukan".

src: The Facebook user who created the group, entitled "Everybody Draw Mohammed Day", said that she had got the idea for the group after watching an episode of South Park on the television channel Comedy Central, in which a line involving the Prophet had been 'bleeped out'.
ref: Pengguna Facebook yang mencipta kumpulan, bertajuk "Hari Mari Melukis Mohammed," berkata yang dia mendapat idea untuk kumpulan tersebut selepas menonton satu dari episod South Park disaluran televisyen Comedy Central, dimana satu baris yang melibatkan Nabi telah di padamkan.

src: The site was blocked the day before the event was scheduled to take place.
ref: Laman tersebut telah disekat sehari sebelum acara itu dijadualkan diadakan.

src: YouTube was blocked in Pakistan in 2008, when material deemed "offensive to Muslims" led to restrictions.
ref: Youtube telah disekat di Pakistan pada 2008, apabila bahan dianggap "menghina Muslim" disekat.

src: In a policy change prompted by activists staying in Gaza protesting Israel's plan to close Jewish settlements there, Israel announced that nonresidents will not be allowed into the territory.
ref: Dalam perubahan dasar yang didorong oleh aktivis yang menetap di Gaza membantah rancangan Israel untuk menutup penempatan Yahudi di sana, Israel mengumumkan bahawa bukan pemastautin tidak akan dibenarkan ke wilayah itu.

src: Israel's Southern Command on Thursday announced "only residents of the Israeli communities in the Gaza Strip will be allowed [entry into Gaza]", where the Jewish state plans to end its decades-long presence.
ref: Perintah Selatan Israel pada hari Khamis mengumumkan "hanya penduduk di komuniti Israel di Semenanjung Gaza akan dibenarkan [masuk ke Gaza]," di mana negara Yahudi merancang untuk menamatkan kehadiran sepanjang sedekad.

src: Israel also will stop issuing permits to close relatives of settlers.
ref: Israel juga akan berhenti mengeluarkan permit kepada saudara-saudara penghuni.

src: Instead, they will remain standing and be placed in Palestinian control.
ref: Sebaliknya, mereka akan kekal dan diletakkan di bawah kawalan Palestin.

src: The deal allows one of the Gaza strip's largest employers to remain intact.
ref: Perjanjian itu membolehkan seseorang majikan terbesar di Semenanjung Gaza untuk kekal utuh.

src: Greenhouses in the region currently employ more than 4,000 people.
ref: Rumah hijau di rantau ini kini mempunyai lebih daripada 4,000 orang.

src: Mr. Wolfenson will purchase the greenhouses using funds amounting to US$14 million.
ref: Encik Wolfenson akan membeli rumah hijau menggunakan dana berjumlah AS$14 juta.

src: Daniel Ayalon, Israeli ambassador to the United States, spoke optimistically of the greenhouse agreement.
ref: Daniel Ayalon, duta Israel ke Amerika Syarikat, bercakap secara optimistik akan perjanjian rumah hijau itu.

src: Said Mr. Ayalon, "As we leave Gaza, and some parts of the West Bank, we are not leaving scorched earth.
ref: Kata Encik Ayalon, "Ketika kami meninggalkan Gaza, dan beberapa kawasan di Tebing Barat, kita tidak meninggalkan bumi hangus.

src: In Gaza, the median age is 15 and about 80% of the population live in poverty.
ref: Di Gaza, umur median adalah 15 dan kira-kira 80% daripada penduduk hidup dalam kemiskinan.

src: US Supreme Court Justice John Paul Stevens has given federal prosecutors until next Friday to respond to the request of former Illinois governor Rod Blagojevich and his brother Robert to delay their corruption trial.
ref: Hakim John Paul Stevens Mahkamah Agung Amerika Syarikat telah memberikan masa sehingga hari Jumaat depan kepada pendakwa-pendakwa persekutuan untuk bertindak balas kepada permintaan bekas gabenor Illinois Rod Blagojevich dan adik-beradiknya Robert untuk menangguhkan perbicaraan kes rasuah mereka.

src: The trial is set to begin on June 3, and many of the charges they face are based on a federal honest-services law.
ref: Perbicaraan itu ditentukan untuk bermula pada 3 Jun, dan kebanyakan dari tuduhan-tuduhan yang mereka hadapi adalah berdasarkan undang-undang perkhidmatan beramanah persekutuan.

src: The Blagojevich brothers challenge the constitutionality of this law and believe the trial should be delayed until the high court is expected to decide the issue next month.
ref: Adik-beradik Blagojevich mencabar kejituan perlembagaan undang-undang ini dan percaya perbicaraan itu perlu ditangguhkan sehingga mahkamah tinggi dijangka untuk memutuskan isu itu bulan depan.

src: The request had already been denied by District Judge James Zagel and the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals.
ref: Permintaan itu telah pun dinafikan oleh Hakim Daerah James Zagel dan Mahkamah Rangkaian Rayuan Ketujuh.

src: Prosecutors added new charges, including bribery, against the brothers in case the Supreme Court finds the honest-services law unconstitutional.
ref: Pendakwa menambah dakwaan baru, termasuk rasuah, terhadap adik-beradik itu sekiranya Mahkamah Agung mendapati undang-undang perkhidmatan beramanah tidak mengikut perlembagaan.

src: They believe the June 3 start date should not be held back.
ref: Mereka fikir tarikh permulaan 3 Jun tidak perlu ditangguhkan.

src: Paul Gray, American musician and bassist of the heavy metal band Slipknot, has been found dead in his hotel room in Iowa.
ref: Paul Gray, ahli muzik Amerika dan pemain bass daripada kumpulan musik heavy metal Slipknot, telah ditemui mati di dalam bilik hotelnya di Iowa.

src: Police investigating the death said that no foul play was suspected.
ref: Polis yang menyiasat kematian itu berkata tiada unsur jenayah disyaki.

src: He added that Gray had "stayed at the hotel before and was remembered as being a quiet and respectful guest."
ref: Tambahnya, Gray telah "tinggal di hotel sebelum ini dan nampaknya seorang tetamu yang diam dan bersopan".

src: They released, in 1996, their first album, which sold over a million copies worldwide.
ref: Mereka menerbitkan, pada tahun 1996, album pertama mereka, yang dijual lebih satu juta salinan di seluruh dunia.

src: The group has received seven Grammy award nominations and won one in 2006 for "Best Metal Performance" with "Before I Forget".
ref: Kumpulan itu telah menerima tujuh pencalonan anugerah Grammy dan memenangi satu pada tahun 2006 untuk "Persembahan Metal Terbaik" atas "Before I Forget".

src: Gray was known by his fans by either his band number #2 or his nickname "The Pig".
ref: Gray dinamakan oleh peminatnya dengan nombor kumpulan musiknya #2 atau nama gelaran "The Pig".

src: Along with drummers Joey Jordison and Shawn Crahan, Gray was one of only three original members of Slipknot that still remained in the band.
ref: Bersama-sama dengan pemain dram Joey Jordison dan Shawn Crahan, Gray adalah salah satu daripada tiga anggota asal Slipknot yang masih kekal dalam kumpulan muzik itu.

src: Fellow musicians paid tribute to Gray, with many of them releasing statements after his death.
ref: Pemuzik-pemusik yang lain memberi penghormatan kepada Gray, dengan ramai antara kalangan mereka memberikan kenyataan selepas kematiannya.

src: J.R. Siems, from the band Sound Proof Coalition, said: "everybody seemed to think he was in good health again, so it came as a big shock that this had to happen."
ref: J.R. Siems, dari kumpulan musik Sound Proof Coalition, berkata: "semua orang seolah-olah rasa beliau dalam keadaan sihat lagi, jadi ia adalah satu kejutan besar yang ini berlaku".

src: "He had the biggest heart of anyone I knew and would give anyone the shirt off his back."
ref: "Dia seorang yang paling pemurah dan baik hati yang saya kenal dan akan memberikan apa-apa sahaja orang minta".

src: Belostenny was a key player in the Soviet Union basketball team and was both a European and Olympic medallist.
ref: Belostenny adalah seorang pemain utama dalam pasukan bola keranjang Kesatuan Soviet dan adalah kedua-dua pemenang pingat Eropah dan Olimpik.

src: He won gold in the 1979, 1981 and 1985 European championships and gold in the 1982 FIBA World Championship.
ref: Beliau memenangi emas Kejohanan Eropah pada tahun 1979, 1981 dan 1985 dan emas Kejohanan Dunia FIBA pada tahun 1982.

src: The bright memory of Alexander M. Belostenny will always live in our hearts."
ref: Memori jelas Alexander M. Belostenny akan sentiasa hidup dalam hati kami."

src: By studying difference in the animal's brains after slaughter, the study also showed what could be a biological determiner for what makes a ram male-oriented instead of female-oriented sexually.
ref: Dengan membuat kajian keatas perbezaan otak haiwan selepas disembelih, kajian itu turut menunjukkan apa yang boleh dijadikan penentu biologi kepada sebab biri-biri jantan meminati jantan dan bukannya betina secara seksual.

src: A 1991 study of human brains of AIDS victims showed a similar hypothalamus size difference between gay and heterosexual men.
ref: Sebuah kajian pada 1991 terhadap otak manusia yang merupakan mangsa AIDS menunjukkan persamaan terhadap beza saiz hipotalamus diantara lelaki homoseksual dan heteroseksual.

src: The sheep researchers postulate that low levels of aromatase hormones in the brain of a developing male sheep fetus may have kept the brain from fully masculinizing, leading to sexually male-oriented rams.
ref: Para penyelidik biri-biri menganggap bahawa paras rendah hormon aromatase didalam otak fetus biri-biri jantan yang sedang berkembang mungkin menghalang otak daripada menjadi maskulin, menghasilkan biri-biri jantang yang meminati jantan secara seksual.

src: Professor Stormshak believes that "understanding sexual drives and the continuum of sexual behavior could possibly help explain the scientific basis of sexual assault [and] put an end to assertions that homosexuality is a lifestyle choice."
ref: Profesor Stormshak percaya bahawa "memahami pemacu seksual dan lanjaran tabiat seksual mungkin membantu dalam penjelasan asas saintifik atau serangan seksual [dan] meletakkan pengakhiran kepada dakwaan homoseksualiti adalah pilihan kehidupan".

src: Irish Senator Kieran Phelan has died suddenly at the age of 60.
ref: Senator Ireland Kieran Phelan telah meninggal dunia secara tiba-tiba pada usia 60 tahun.

src: Phelan died after falling ill in his hotel in Dublin this morning, shortly before a meeting due to be held by the Seanad.
ref: Phelan meninggal dunia selepas jatuh sakit di hotelnya di Dublin pagi ini, tidak lama sebelum mesyuarat yang dijadualkan diadakan oleh Seanad.

src: Phelan sat on the Industrial and Commercial Panel and had been a Senator since 2002.
ref: Phelan merupakan Panel Industri dan Perdagangan dan telah menjadi Senator sejak tahun 2002.

src: He was also a Laois County councillor and was elected council chairman in 1998.
ref: Beliau juga merupakan ahli majlis Daerah Laois dan dilantik sebagai pengerusi majlis pada tahun 1998.

src: As a mark of respect, Leader of the House Donie Cassidy proposed that the house be adjourned until June 1st.
ref: Sebagai tanda hormat, Ketua Dewan Donie Cassidy mencadangkan bahawa persidangan ditangguhkan sehingga 1 Jun.

src: After a slew of crises during Santana Lopes's tenure, including poor credit ratings and accusations of media censorship, Sampaio dissolved the parliament on Friday in an attempt to restore credibility to the nation.
ref: Selepas sebilangan besar krisis semasa tempoh pemegangan Santana Lopes, termasuk kedudukan kredit yang buruk serta tuduhan penapisan media, Sampaio membubarkan parlimen pada hari Jumaat dalam cubaan mengekalkan kebolehpercayaan rakyat.

src: He then scheduled new elections ahead of the ones already scheduled for 2006.
ref: Dia kemudiannya menjadualkan pilihanraya baru lebih awal dari pilihanraya yang telah dijadualkan pada 2006.

src: The latest death came on the same day as Terry Gou, Chairman of Foxconn's parent Hon Hai Precision, opened the Shenzen production facility to the media for the first time.
ref: Kematian terakhir berlaku pada hari sama di mana Terry Gou, Pengerusi syarikat induk Foxconn Hon Hai Precision, merasmikan kemudahan pengeluaran Shenzen kepada media buat kali pertama.

src: In the face of accusations that he ran a modern day sweatshop, he showed off employee recreation facilities.
ref: Dalam menghadapi tuduhan-tuduhan bahawa dia menjalankan kilang paksaan pakaian zaman moden, dia menunjukkan kemudahan rekreasi pekerja.

src: Gou, bowing as an expression of regret, promised to work to prevent such tragedies occurring again.
ref: Gou, akur sebagai ekspresi penyesalan, berjanji untuk berusaha mengelakkan tragedi seperti itu daripada berlaku lagi.

src: However, Foxconn claims that the suicides were mostly the result of relationship problems unrelated to its own management style, and it argues that for a work force so large the number of suicides is small.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Foxconn mendakwa kejadian bunuh diri kebanyakannya hasil daripada masalah hubungan yang tiada kaitan dengan gaya pengurusan sendiri, dan ia bertegas bahawa tenaga kerja yang begitu besar dibandingkan jumlah kes bunuh diri ia adalah kecil.

src: The Canadian Government is watching the "slowing growth" of the BP oil spill.
ref: Kerajaan Kanada sedang memantau "penyebaran perlahan" tumpahan minyak BP.

src: Canada is running their dash-8 on a twice a day mission to the gulf, monitoring for signs that the BP Oil slick may expand up the Eastern seaboard into Canadian waters, and to provide assistance to US efforts to contain the spill.
ref: Kanada menggunakan dash-8 mereka dalam misi dua kali sehari ke teluk, memantau tanda-tanda tumpahan minyak BP mungkin berkembang sehingga pesisir Timur sampai ke dalam perairan Kanada, dan memberi bantuan kepada usaha AS untuk mengawal tumpahan.

src: This started in May, and is expected to continue until the spill has been fully contained, or no longer needed.
ref: Ini bermula pada bulan Mei, dan dijangka berterusan sehingga tumpahan telah terkawal sepenuhnya, atau tidak lagi diperlukan.

src: While the risk is slim that the oil slick will move up the seaboard enough to get into Canadian waters, it is possible.
ref: Walaupun risiko adalah tipis bahawa tumpahan minyak akan merebak sehingga ke atas pesisir dan cukup untuk memasuki perairan Kanada, ia tidak mustahil.

src: If oil is swept up into the Loop Current—which moves at about 3.3 to 6.5 feet (one to two meters) a second—there's essentially no way to stop it, Tony Sturges, professor emeritus of oceanography at Florida State University, told National Geographic.
ref: Jika minyak tersebut diserap ke dalam Arus Loop - yang bergerak kira-kira 3.3 ke 6.5 kaki (1 hingga 2 meter) sesaat - pada dasarnya tidak ada cara untuk menghentikannya, Tony Sturges, profesor emeritus oseanografi di Universiti Florida State, memberitahu National Geographic.

src: This spill could devastate the fishing industry of Canada, and harm any potential tourism on the beautiful coastal waters of Eastern Canada.
ref: Tumpahan ini mampu melumpuhkan industri perikanan di Kanada, dan merosakkan potensi industri pelancongan di perairan pantai yang indah di Timur Kanada.

src: Two sculptures have been confiscated and thirteen pro-democracy activists arrested in Hong Kong, in what critics have described as "politically motivated" censorship.
ref: Dua arca telah dirampas dan tiga belas aktivis pro-demokrasi ditahan di Hong Kong, dimana kritikan menyifatkan ia sebagai penapisan "dorongan politik".

src: The sculptures, a new replica of the "Goddess of Democracy" and a carving called the "Tiananmen Massacre Relief", had been placed in the piazza of Hong Kong's Times Square shopping mall in remembrance of the 21st anniversary of the Tiananmen Square Incident.
ref: Arca tersebut, sebuah replika baru "Goddess of Democracy" dan sebuah ukiran yang dipanggil "Tiananmen Massacre Relief", telah ditempatkan di medan pusat membeli-belah Time Square Hong Kong dalam memperingati ulangtahun ke 21 Kejadian Tiananmen Square.

src: Although the Causeway Bay piazza is designated as a public space, its day-to-day operations are run by the shopping mall's management.
ref: Walaupun medan Causeway Bay dikhususkan sebagai tempat awam, ia merupakan operasi harian yang dijalankan oleh pihak pengurusan pusat membeli-belah tersebut.

src: The statue was removed and is currently in the custody of the Customs and Excise department (C&ED).
ref: Arca itu telah dialihkan dan kini berada dalam penjagaan Jabatan Kastam dan Eksais (C&ED).

src: The 13 persons arrested were released on bail the same day.
ref: 13 orang yang ditahan telah dilepaskan atas ikat jamin pada hari yang sama.

src: Alliance secretary Albert Ho claimed that as Times Square was a public area, the police had no right to stop them, that similar activities had been held before, and that he had "...never been treated so barbarically and so violently...".
ref: Setiausaha Alliance Albert Ho mendakwa oleh kerana Times Square merupakan tempat awam, polis tidak berhak untuk menyekat mereka, perkara yang serupa juga telah terjadi sebelum ini, dan dia "...tidak pernah dilayan dengan sangat kasar dan sangat kejam...".

src: As part of its Basic Law, Hong Kong continues to enjoy western-style liberties within the One country, two systems settlement within China.
ref: Sebagai sebahagian daripada undang-undang asas, Hong Kong meneruskan untuk menikmati kebebasan gaya-barat didalam Satu negara, dua sistem penempatan di dalam China.

src: In the past political activities that are taboo in China proper have been tolerated by the Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China (SAR) authorities.
ref: Di waktu dulu, aktiviti berunsur politik yang merupakan taboo di dalaman China telah ditoleransi oleh pihak berkuasa Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China (SAR).

src: On Saturday, May 29, Bingu wa Mutharika, President of the African country of Malawi, granted pardons to a gay couple who had been sentenced to 14 years in jail for sodomy and indecency charges.
ref: Pada Sabtu, 29 Mei, Bingu wa Mutharika, Presiden salah satu negara Afrika, Malawi, memberikan pengampunan kepada pasangan homoseksual yang telah dihukum penjara selama 14 tahun diatas caj meliwat dan perbuatan yang keji.

src: In December, Steven Monjeza, 26, and Tiwonge Chimbalanga, 20, were arrested following a personal engagement ceremony.
ref: Pada bulan Disember, Steven Monjeza, 26, dan Tiwonge Chimbalanga, 20, telah ditangkap susulan majlis pertunangan peribadi mereka.

src: The men were charged with gross indecency and unnatural acts, based on laws imposed during the British colonial period in Malawi.
ref: Mereka telah didakwa atas perbuatan keji dan luar tabii, berdasarkan undang-undang yang dikenakan semasa zaman penjajahan British di Malawi.

src: Aníbal Archila, a Guatemalan reporter for Notisiete, was killed Thursday night as he was reporting on the eruption of the Pacaya volcano.
ref: Anibal Archila, wartawan dari Guatemala untuk Notisiete, terbunuh malam Khamis semasa dia melaporkan letusan di Gunung Berapi Pacaya.

src: Firefighters and another journalist found his body near Cerro Chino.
ref: Ahli bomba dan wartawan lain menemui mayatnya berhampiran Cerro Chino.

src: Two more bodies were found near Cerro, both in the path of a lava flow.
ref: Dua lagi mayat ditemui berhampiran Cerro, kedua-duanya dalam laluan aliran lahar.

src: Fellow worker Vinicio Fuentes said that Archila couldn't escape from the rain of volcanic stones, but his cameraman and another group of local reporters could.
ref: Rakan sekerja Vinico Fuentes berkata yang Archila tidak dapat keluar dari hujan batu gunung berapi, tetapi jurukameranya dan sekumpulan wartawan tempatan lain berjaya.

src: Archila was found with several lava and rock injuries on his body.
ref: Archila ditemui dengan beberapa luka lahar dan batu dibadannya.

src: President Álvaro Colom and many other Guatemalan officials attended Archila's wake at a local chapel.
ref: Presiden Alvaro Colom dan banyak lagi pegawai Guatemala menghadiri penghormatan Archila di gereja tempatan.

src: Archila's body was taken at 08:30 (14:30 UTC) to the Metropolitan Cathedral for a mass.
ref: Mayat Archila diambil pada 08:30 (14:30 UTC) ke Gereja Metropolitan untuk penghormatan.

src: Later, it was moved to Notisiete's headquarters, where a memorial took place.
ref: Kemudian, ia dipindahkan ke ibu pejabat Motisiete, dimana sebuah peringatan akan dilangsungkan.

src: Internment will take place at the Hermano Pedro cemetery in Mixco.
ref: Pengebumian akan dilangsungkan di Perkuburan Hermano Pedro di Mexico.

src: About 1,600 people have been evacuated from the region, and La Aurora International Airport has been closed.
ref: Lebih kurang 1,600 orang telah dipindahkan dari daerah tersebut, dan Lapangan terbang Antarabangsa La Aurora telah ditutup.

src: On Friday, the 189 Parties to the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty (NPT) agreed to a final resolution calling for steps toward the banning of weapons of mass destruction (WMD) in the Middle East.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, 189 Parti kepada Perjanjian Pengawalan Nuklear (NPT) bersetuju atas resolusi akhir menyeru untuk langkah-langkah ke arah pengharaman senjata pemusnah besar-besaran (WMD) di Timur Tengah.

src: The resolution directs United Nations Secretary-General Ban Ki-Moon to organize a conference of all the Middle East states.
ref: Resolusi itu mengarahkan Setiausaha Agung Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, Ban Ki-Moon untuk mengadakan satu persidangan yang melibatkan semua negera Timur Tengah.

src: "It ignores the realities of the Middle East and the real threats facing the region and the entire world."
ref: "Ia mengabaikan realiti di Timur Tengah dan ancaman sebenar yang dihadapi rantau ini dan seluruh dunia".

src: The statement went on to state, "[the resolution] singles out Israel, the Middle East's only true democracy and the only country threatened with annihilation."
ref: Kenyataan itu disambung, "[resolusi itu] mengecualikan Israel, satu-satunya negara demokrasi sebenar di Timur Tengah dan satu-satunya negara terancam dengan penghapusan".

src: An Arab-backed proposal for a WMD-Free zone in the Middle East, supported in 1995 by the NPT Conference, was never acted upon.
ref: Cadangan yang disokong Arab untuk zon Bebas-WMD di Timur Tengah, disokong pada tahun 1995 oleh Persidangan NPT, tidak pernah mengambil tindakan.

src: A robotic system at Stanford Medical Center was used to perform a laparoscopic gastric bypass surgery successfully with a theoretically similar rate of complications to that seen in standard operations.
ref: Sistem robotik di Pusat Perubatan Stanford berjaya digunakan untuk menjalankan pembedahan pintasan laparoskopi gastrik dengan kadar komplikasi yang sama secara teori seperti yang dilihat dalam pembedahan biasa.

src: However, as there were only 10 people in the experimental group (and another 10 in the control group), this is not a statistically significant sample.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, memandangkan hanya terdapat 10 orang dalam kumpulan eksperimen tersebut (dan 10 orang lagi di dalam kumpulan kawalan), ini bukanlah satu sampel yang bererti.

src: Note that this is not a fully automated system, as a human doctor controls the operation via remote control.
ref: Dimaklumkan bahawa ini bukanlah sistem automatik sepenuhya, di mana doktor manusia mengawal pembedahan ini menggunakan alat kawalan jauh.

src: There were concerns that doctors, in the future, might only be trained in the remote control procedure.
ref: Terdapat kebimbangan di mana doktor-doktor, di masa hadapan, hanya akan dilatih untuk mengendalikan prosedur alat kawalan jauh.

src: Ronald G. Latimer, M.D., of Santa Barbara, CA, warned "The fact that surgeons may have to open the patient or might actually need to revert to standard laparoscopic techniques demands that this basic training be a requirement before a robot is purchased.
ref: Ronald G. Latimer, Dr., di Santa Barbara, CA, memberi amaran "Fakta bahawa pakar bedah berkemungkinan perlu membedah pesakit atau mungkin perlu kembali kepada teknik laparoskopik piawaian yang memerlukan latihan asas ini menjadi syarat sebelum sebuah robot dibeli.

src: We should not be seduced to buy this instrument to train surgeons if they are not able to do the primary operations themselves."
ref: Kita tidak harus tergoda untuk membeli kelengkapan ini untuk melatih pakar bedah jika mereka tidak mampu menjalankan pembedahan-pembedahan utama dengan sendiri".

src: A previous "new technology", the electrocardiogram (ECG), has lead to a lack of basic education on the older technology, the stethoscope.
ref: "Teknologi baru" yang lepas, elektrokardiogram (ECG), telah membawa kepada kekurangan dalam pendidikan asas teknologi terdahulu, stetoskop.

src: The 2010 United Nations Climate Change Conference negotiations continued this week in Bonn, Germany.
ref: Persidangan Perubahan Iklim Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu 2010 meneruskan rundingan pada minggu ini di Bonn, Jerman.

src: The 4,500 attendees include government delegates from 182 governments, representatives from business and industry, environmental organizations and research institutions.
ref: 4,500 yang hadir termasuk delegasi kerajaan dari 182 kerajaan, wakil-wakil daripada perniagaan dan industri, pertubuhan alam sekitar dan institusi penyelidikan.

src: He criticised the outgoing head of the U.N.'s climate secretariat, Yvo de Boer, and the European Union's climate commissioner Connie Hedegaard for their scepticism.
ref: Dia mengkritik ketua sekretariat iklim Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu yang akan tamat tempoh, Yvo de Boer, dan Kesatuan Eropah pesuruhjaya iklim Connie Hedegaard atas keraguan mereka.

src: The talks were designed to discuss issues that were not resolved at the 2009 United Nations Climate Change Conference in Copenhagen.
ref: Rundingan telah direka untuk membincangkan isu-isu yang tidak dapat diselesaikan di Persidangan Perubahan Iklim Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu 2009 di Copenhagen.

src: These groups were specifically designed to negotiate a long-term response to climate change.
ref: Kumpulan-kumpulan ini telah direka khusus untuk berunding tindak balas jangka panjang kepada perubahan iklim.

src: The AWG-LCA is the negotiating group tasked to deliver a new "COP16 negotiative text" ahead of the June negotiating session.
ref: AWG-LCA adalah kumpulan rundingan ditugaskan untuk menyampaikan "teks yang boleh dirunding COP16" yang baru menjelang sesi rundingan Jun.

src: The AWG-KP is to focus on emissions reduction commitments for the 37 industrialised countries that have ratified the Kyoto Protocol for the period beyond 2012.
ref: AWG-KP memberi tumpuan kepada komitmen pengurangan pelepasan untuk 37 negara-negara perindustrian yang telah mengesahkan Protokol Kyoto bagi tempoh selepas tahun 2012.

src: There are also two UNFCCC standing committees meetings, the Subsidiary Body for Scientific and Technological Advice and the Subsidiary Body for Implementation .
ref: Terdapat juga dua mesyuarat UNFCCC jawatankuasa semasa, Badan Subsidiari untuk Saintifik dan Teknologi dan Badan Subsidiari bagi Pelaksanaan.

src: The conference is officially referred to as the 16th session of the Conference of the Parties to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC) and the 6th session of the Conference of the Parties serving as the meeting of the Parties to the Kyoto Protocol.
ref: Persidangan itu secara rasmi disebut sebagai sesi ke-16 Persidangan Para Pihak kepada Konvensyen Rangka Kerja Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu mengenai Perubahan Iklim (UNFCCC) dan sesi ke-6 Persidangan Para Pihak yang berfungsi sebagai mesyuarat Pihak-Pihak kepada Protokol Kyoto.

src: Police have found the body of a man they had been hunting in Cumbria, United Kingdom for a series of shootings.
ref: Polis menemui mayat seorang lelaki yang diburu di Cumbria, United Kingdom atas beberapa siri tembakan.

src: Police later confirmed that twelve people had been killed with a further thirteen injured, three critically.
ref: Polis kemudian mengesahkan bahawa dua belas orang telah dibunuh dengan tiga belas lagi cedera, tiga dalam kritikal.

src: The prime suspect was named as 52 year old local man Derrick Bird, a taxi driver.
ref: Suspek utama dikenali sebagai lelaki tempatan berusia 52 tahun Derrick Bird, seorang pemandu teksi.

src: The first of Bird's victims was a fellow taxi driver shot in Whitehaven at about 10.30 local time, with the following victims being shot at random as Bird drove down the west coast.
ref: Mangsa pertama Bird adalah rakan pemandu teksi yang ditembak di Whitehaven pada kira-kira jam 10:30 waktu tempatan, dengan mangsa-mangsa berikut ditembak secara rawak apabila Bird memandu ke pantai barat.

src: Originally driving a Citroën Picasso, he was later said to be on foot when he crashed his vehicle.
ref: Pada asalnya memandu Citroen Picasso, beliau kemudiannya dikatakan berjalan kaki selepas kenderaannya terhempas.

src: Members of the public were advised by police to stay indoors, and for those who saw him not to approach him, but to call them.
ref: Orang ramai dinasihatkan oleh pihak polis untuk berada dalam rumah, dan bagi mereka yang terlihatnya supaya tidak mendekatinya, tetapi untuk menelefon mereka.

src: The manhunt covered the Boot or Scafell Pike area, and at 14:04 BST (13:04 UTC) the Deputy Chief Constable of Cumbria reported that a body believed to be Bird was found in a wood near Boot with a firearm, and that he had turned the weapon on himself.
ref: Pemburuan yang meliputi kawasan Boot atau Scafell Pike, dan pada 14:04 BST (13:04 UTC) Timbalan Ketua Konstabel Cumbria melaporkan bahawa satu mayat dipercayai adalah Bird ditemui dalam hutan berhampiran Boot dengan senjata api, dan dipercayai bahawa dia telah menembak dirinya.

src: The affected area is popular with walkers and hikers, and currently, many schools across England are on half term, meaning the pupils have no classes.
ref: Kawasan yang terjejas adalah popular dengan pejalan kaki dan pendaki, dan pada masa ini, banyak sekolah di England kini separuh semester, bermakna murid tidak mempunyai kelas.

src: British news network BBC News spoke to several eye-witnesses in relation to the incidents, from each of the areas, including Peter Watson of Whitehaven.
ref: Rangkaian berita Britain BBC bercakap dengan beberapa saksi berhubung kejadian, dari setiap kawasan, termasuk Peter Watson dari Whitehaven.

src: When I first got here it must have just happened.
ref: Apabila saya mula-mula sampai di sini ia semestinya baru sahaja berlaku.

src: There was a man lying on the ground with police stood over him and a jacket on him, he reported.
ref: Ada seorang lelaki terbaring di atas tanah dengan polis berdiri berdekatan dan jaket di atasnya, beliau melaporkan.

src: Home Secretary Theresa May is due to make a statement on the incident to the House of Commons tomorrow.
ref: Setiausaha Dalam Negeri Theresa Mei akan membuat kenyataan mengenai kejadian itu di Dewan Rakyat esok.

src: Israeli soldiers are in the process of removing Jewish protesters from synagogues in Neve Dekalim and Kfar Darom in the Gaza Strip as part of an operation to force the evacuation of settlements.
ref: Tentera Israel sedang dalam proses memindahkan penunjuk perasaan Yahudi dari rumah-rumah ibadat di Neve Dekalim dan Kfar Darom di Semenanjung Gaza sebagai sebahagian daripada operasi untuk memaksa pemindahan penempatan.

src: The settlement of Neve Dekalim was founded in 1983 and was home to 500 Orthodox Jewish families.
ref: Penempatan Neve Dekalim ditubuhkan pada tahun 1983 dan merupakan rumah kepada 500 keluarga Ortodoks Yahudi.

src: It also was occupied earlier before back in the 1940s, settled by a couple Jewish families who were able to hold off the Eygptian army.
ref: Ia juga telah diduduki lebih awal sebelum tahun 1940-an, diduduki oleh pasangan keluarga Yahudi yang dapat menolak tentera Mesir.

src: Around 1,500 protesters inside the synagogue refused to leave despite warnings from the soldiers.
ref: Kira-kira 1,500 penunjuk perasaan di dalam rumah ibadat itu enggan pergi walaupun diberi amaran oleh tentera.

src: Many protesters have been retaliating to the soldiers' commands, and have even started shoving and punching a few guards.
ref: Ramai penunjuk perasaan telah bertindak balas terhadap arahan askar, dan telah pun mula menolak dan menumbuk beberapa orang pengawal.
