ref: Pada majlis pelancaran kempen kami pagi ini kami mempunyai wakil-wakil dari pihak pembangkang, menteri dari parti pembangkang yang berjawatan setimpal, begitu juga belia serta jurucakap Greens untuk belia yang menunjukkan bahawa ini bukan berkenaan orang yang telah diundi, ia merupakan hakikat bahawa mereka telah mendapat peluang untuk mengundi, kata Perdana Menteri, Julia Gillard apabila dia melancarkan kempen itu lima minggu lalu.

src: In July 2010, Rudd was replaced as leader of the ALP and as Prime Minister by Ms Gillard.
ref: Pada bulan Julai 2010, Rudd telah digantikan sebagai pemimpin ALP dan sebagai Perdana Menteri oleh Cik Gillard.

src: Tony Abbott became leader of the Liberal Party of Australia in December 2009 replacing Malcolm Turnbull, who had replaced Brendan Nelson two years previously.
ref: Tony Abbott menjadi pemimpin Parti Liberal Australia pada Disember 2009 menggantikan Malcolm Turnbull, yang telah menggantikan Brendan Nelson dua tahun sebelumnya.

src: Tropical Storm Danielle is now a Category 1 hurricane, with winds up to 130 km/h (80 mph).
ref: Ribut Tropika Danielle kini adalah taufan Kategori 1, dengan angin selaju 130 km/j (80 mph).

src: Hurricane Danielle is the second hurricane of the 2010 Atlantic hurricane season.
ref: Taufan Danielle adalah taufan kedua dalam musim taufan Atlantik 2010.

src: Mexico has issued a tropical storm watch in the area.
ref: Mexico telah mengeluarkan amaran ribut tropika di kawasan tersebut.

src: Meteorologists predict that Danielle will be the first of several storms to form within the next two weeks, as the Atlantic hurricane season is currently at its peak.
ref: Ahli meterologi menjangkakan yang Danielle akan menjadi yang pertama dari beberapa ribut terbentuk dalam dua minggu berikut, memandangkan musim taufan Atlantik adalah kini dipuncaknya.

src: "Even though the 2010 season seems to be one with low activity, emergency officials are still stressing safety and awareness to residents in hurricane-prone areas."
ref: "Walaupun musim 2010 kelihatan seperti akan rendah aktiviti, pegawai kecemasan masih menekankan keselamatan dan kesedaran kepada penduduk dikawasan terdedah taufan."

src: Hurricane Andrew was a catastrophic Category 5 storm that came during a year when it was a lower-than-average season.
ref: Taufan Andrew adalah bencana ribut Kategori 5 yang pada tahun dimana ianya musim rendah dari purata.

src: Iraq has carried out the first executions since the demise of the Saddam Hussein regime.
ref: Iraq telah menjalankan hukuman mati pertama sejak keruntuhan rejim Saddam Hussein.

src: Three men convicted of murder were hanged on Thursday morning in Baghdad.
ref: Tiga lelaki yang disabitkan kesalahan membunuh dihukum gantung pada pagi Khamis di Baghdad.

src: The Iraqi government argues that the death penalty will help to deter criminals but spokesman Laith Kubba admitted that "this is not an easy thing to do".
ref: Kerajaan Iraq membahaskan bahawa hukuman mati akan membantu mencegah penjenayah tetapi jurucakap Laith Kubba mengakui bahawa "ini bukan suatu perkara yang mudah dilakukan".

src: Iraqi president Jalal Talabani is personally opposed to capital punishment and stated that he would never sign a death sentence, not even against Saddam Hussein himself.
ref: Presiden Iraq Jalal Talabani secara peribadinya menentang hukuman mati dan menyatakan bahawa dia tidak akan menandatangani hukuman mati, walaupun terhadap Saddam Hussein sendiri.

src: The three men, named as Bayan Ahmed Said, Ouday Dawood Salman and Dhahar Jasim Hassan were convicted of murdering three policemen in the city of Kut, Wasit province.
ref: Ketiga-tiga lelaki itu, yang dinamakan Bayan Ahmed Said, Ouday Dawood Salman dan Dhahar Jasim Hassan itu didapati bersalah kerana membunuh tiga anggota polis di bandar Kut, wilayah Wasit.

src: Alain Corneau, a French film director, has died at the age of 67.
ref: Alain Corneau, seorang pengarah filem Perancis, telah meninggal dunia pada usia 67.

src: Before the success of his first film, Corneau attempted to make a documentary about New York and an adaptation of a novel.
ref: Sebelum kejayaan filem pertamanya, Corneau cuba untuk membuat dokumentari mengenai New York dan sebuah adaptasi daripada novel.

src: The awards included Best Film, Best Director, and Best Music.
ref: Anugerah itu termasuk Filem Terbaik, Pengarah Terbaik dan Muzik Terbaik.

src: Corneau said in a 1992 interview in the New York Times that "Many people got emotional about this film, and that made it possible for it to escape cult status."
ref: Corneau berkata pada satu temubual pada tahun 1992 dalam New York Times bahawa "Ramai orang menjadi emosi tentang filem ini, dan itu yang membolehkannya untuk melarikan diri dari status pujaan."

src: French President Nicolas Sarkozy commented on the death of Corneau.
ref: Presiden Perancis Nicolas Sarkozy mengulas mengenai kematian Corneau.

src: He said "Corneau was a courageous man and a great director."
ref: Beliau berkata, "Corneau adalah seorang yang berani dan seorang pengarah yang hebat."

src: Corneau was set to appear at the Toronto Film Festival in September.
ref: Corneau telah ditetapkan untuk muncul di Festival Filem Toronto pada bulan September.

src: This follows the statewide mandate requiring ethanol to be mixed into gasoline—also a first by Minnesota—which took effect in 1997.
ref: Ini berikutan mandat seluruh negeri yang memerlukan etanol untuk dicampur ke dalam petrol - juga pertama oleh Minnesota-yang berkuat kuasa pada tahun 1997.

src: The biodiesel mandate was approved by the 2002 state legislature, and was sent to then-Governor Jesse Ventura.
ref: Mandat biodiesel telah diluluskan oleh badan perundangan negeri 2002, dan kemudian telah dihantar kepada Gabenor Jesse Ventura.

src: Ventura allowed the bill to become law without his signature, stating his concern that the increased cost of fuel would affect the trucking industry—potentially spurring inflation—though he felt that this was nearly balanced by the positive impact the mandate would have on agriculture in the state.
ref: Ventura membenarkan rang undang-undang menjadi undang-undang tanpa tandatangannya, dengan menyatakan kebimbangan beliau bahawa peningkatan kos bahan api akan memberi kesan kepada industri berpotensi seperti trak, merangsang inflasi walaupun dia merasakan bahawa ianya adalah hampir seimbang dengan kesan positif mandat itu di pertanian setiap negeri.

src: The law had an initial target date of July 1, 2005, but would only go into effect once production capacity exceeded 8 million gallons (30 millon liters) per year.
ref: Undang-undang ini mempunyai tarikh sasaran awal pada 1 Julai, 2005, tetapi hanya akan berkuat kuasa apabila kapasiti pengeluaran melebihi 8 juta gelen (30 liter millon) setahun.

src: At the beginning of 2005, the state was only capable of producing three million gallons each year, but two new facilities in Albert Lea and Brewster increased state capacity twentyfold when they opened this summer.
ref: Pada awal tahun 2005, negeri hanya mampu menghasilkan tiga juta gelen setiap tahun, tetapi dua kemudahan baru di Albert Lea dan Brewster meningkatkan kapasiti twentyfold negeri semasa mereka beroperasi ketika musim panas ini.

src: Each of the two new plants can produce 30 million gallons (113 ML) annually.
ref: Setiap satu daripada dua kilang baru boleh menghasilkan 30 juta gelen (113 ML) setiap tahun.

src: Agriculture Commissioner Gene Hugoson verified production levels in the August 29 edition of the Minnesota State Register, meaning that the law will become effective following a month-long notification period.
ref: Pesuruhjaya Pertanian Gene Hugoson mengesahkan tahap pengeluaran dalam edisi 29 Ogos daripada Pendaftar Minnesota State, bermaksud undang-undang akan mula berkuatkuasa berikutan tempoh pemberitahuan selama sebulan.

src: Despite the dramatic increase in capacity, biodiesel production is not yet a broad solution to shortages or high prices—in 2001, the state used 14.3 million gallons of petroleum every day.
ref: Walaupun terdapat peningkatan dramatik dalam kapasiti, pengeluaran biodiesel masih lagi bukan penyelesaian yang luas untuk kekurangan atau harga tinggi - pada tahun 2001, negeri menggunakan 14.3 juta gelen minyak setiap hari.

src: December 22, 2004 The controversial European Union Directive on the Patentability of Computer Implemented Inventions, also called the "software patent directive" has been put to rest for 2004.
ref: 22 Disember, 2004 arahan kontroversi Kesatuan Eropah terhadap kebolehan paten pada ciptaan komputer dilaksanakan, juga dikenali sebagai "paten arahan perisian" telah reda pada tahun 2004.

src: Software developers, who supported the European Parliament's proposal last year to definitively rule out software patents, welcomed the delay as a chance to reintroduce those provisions into the current draft.
ref: Pemaju perisian, yang menyokong cadangan Parlimen Eropah pada tahun lepas untuk menolak paten perisian, mengalu-alukan kelewatan sebagai peluang untuk memperkenalkan semula peruntukan itu ke dalam draf semasa.

src: said Mueller in a press release.
ref: Mueller berkata dalam satu kenyataan akhbar.

src: "Now Europe has the opportunity to have a constructive debate on the severe shortcomings of the current Council text, under the new Luxembourgish EU presidency next year."
ref: "Sekarang Eropah mempunyai peluang untuk mengadakan perdebatan yang membina mengenai kelemahan yang teruk dalam teks majlis semasa, di bawah presiden Luxembourg EU baru tahun depan."

src: "We were well aware that [the current proposal] has room for improvement with an eye to the objective of arriving at a consensus position between the EU Council and the European Parliament," Germany's Federal Minister of Justice Brigitte Zypries said in a Tuesday statement.
ref: "Kami sedia maklum bahawa [cadangan semasa itu] mempunyai ruang untuk penambahbaikan dengan fokus kepada matlamat untuk mencapai persetujuan bersama antara Majlis EU dan Parlimen Eropah," kata Menteri Persekutuan Jerman Keadilan Brigitte Zypries dalam satu kenyataannya pada hari selasa.

src: "We will continue to work constructively toward finding a solution that even better meets the needs of those concerned than the decision taken in May of this year."
ref: "Kami akan terus bekerjasama secara membina ke arah mencari penyelesaian yang memenuhi keperluan mereka yang berkenaan lebih daripada keputusan yang diambil pada bulan Mei tahun ini."

src: On May 18, 2004 EU Council reached a political agreement on a "Common Position" on the directive which ignored the European Parliament's vote from last year.
ref: Pada 18 Mei 2004 Majlis EU mencapai perjanjian politik dalam "Kedudukan Bersama" dalam arahan mengabaikan undi Parlimen Eropah dari tahun lepas.

src: The 20 countries that supported the Directive on May 18 fall short of the new qualified majority by 16 votes.
ref: 20 negara yang menyokong Arahan pada 18 Mei adalah kurang daripada majoriti baru yang berkelayakan sebanyak 16 undi.

src: ETA (Euskadi Ta Askatasuna), a separatist group based out of the Basque region of northern Spain, announced in a recorded and written message that it would end its armed campaign for independence, instead focusing on political means for achieving its goals.
ref: ETA (Euskadi Ta Askatasuna), sebuah kumpulan pemisah berpusat di rantau ini Basque di utara Sepanyol, mengumumkan dalam mesej yang direkodkan dan bertulis bahawa ia akan mengakhiri kempen bersenjata untuk kemerdekaan, dan bukannya memberi tumpuan kepada cara politik untuk mencapai matlamatnya.

src: Author Paddy Woodworth found in a recent trip to the region that the group's actions had made former supporters of the movement believe ETA was politically finished.
ref: Pengarang Paddy Woodworth menjumpai di dalam perjalanan baru-baru ke rantau ini bahawa tindakan kumpulan itu telah membuat bekas penyokong gerakan percaya ETA telah selesai politik.

src: The group, which is listed as a terrorist organization by the European Union and the United States, have declared ceasefires several times before, which have all ended in a resumption of violence.
ref: Kumpulan itu, yang disenaraikan sebagai pertubuhan pengganas oleh Kesatuan Eropah dan Amerika Syarikat, telah mengisytiharkan gencatan senjata beberapa kali sebelum ini, yang mempunyai semua berakhir dengan semula keganasan.

src: The bombing was frowned upon by all involved in the peace process, including other Basque separatist parties in the region.
ref: Pengeboman itu dikecam oleh semua pihak yang terlibat dalam proses damai, termasuk pihak pemisah Basque lain di rantau ini.

src: Riad al-Saray, an Iraqi television presenter, has been shot dead.
ref: Riad al-Saray, seorang penyampai televisyen Iraq, telah ditembak mati.

src: He was killed at 06.00 am (03.00 GMT) on Tuesday in western Baghdad by unknown gunmen while he was heading to his work place in Karbala.
ref: Dia dibunuh pada pukul 06.00 pagi (03.00 GMT) pada hari Selasa di barat Baghdad oleh penembak yang tidak dikenali bila dia sedang menuju ke tempat kerjanya di Karbala.

src: Saray presented several political and religious programs on al-Iraqiya TV.
ref: Saray telah menyampaikan beberapa rancangan politik dan agama di TV al-Iraqiya.

src: He said that police have reported a silencer was used in what is thought to have been a planned attack.
ref: Dia berkata polis telah melaporkan bahawa penyenyap telah digunakan dalam apa yang dianggap sebagai serangan yang dirancang.

src: Human rights organization Reporters Without Borders released a statement stating, "Reporters Without Borders calls for a proper investigation capable of identifying and arresting both the perpetrators and instigators of this murder and bringing them to justice."
ref: Pertubuhan hak asasi manusia Reporters Without Borders mengeluarkan satu kenyataan, "Reporters Without Borders menyeru untuk siasatan yang betul yang mampu mengenal pasti dan menangkap kedua-dua pesalah dan pelaku jenayah ini dan membawa mereka ke muka pengadilan."

src: "It would be deplorable it this killing were to go unpunished, which unfortunately has been the case in 99 per cent of the 230 murders of journalists and media workers since the US-led invasion in 2003."
ref: "Ia akan menjadi buruk jika pembunuhan ini tidak dihukum, yang malangnya telah terjadi dalam 99 peratus daripada 230 pembunuhan wartawan dan pekerja media semenjak serangan yang diketuai Amerika Syarikat pada tahun 2003."

src: Saray's death brings the death toll of al-Iraqiya journalists killed since the removal of Saddam Hussien to 15.
ref: Kematian Saray membawa jumlah kematian daripada wartawan al-Iraqiya terbunuh semenjak penyingkiran Saddam Hussein kepada 15.

src: Around 50 people have been arrested ahead of a planned human rights protest in Swaziland.
ref: Lebih kurang 50 orang telah ditahan diatas rancangan mengadakan protes hak asasi manusia di Swaziland.

src: The protest had been planned against the monarchy of Swaziland to call attention to the country's alleged lack of human rights.
ref: Protes tersebut telah dirancang bertentangan dengan monarki Swaziland untuk menarik perhatian terhadap kekurangan hak asasi manusia di negara itu.

src: Many of those arrested have been released but several people remain in custody.
ref: Ramai tahanan telah dilepaskan tetapi beberapa orang masih dalam tahanan.

src: Several South African trade unionists were included in the protesters arrested.
ref: Beberapa ahli kesatuan sekerja Afrika Selatan termasuk dalam penunjuk perasaan ditahan.

src: A spokesman for Cosatu, the South African trade union federation, said that two of the unionists had not been released and their current whereabouts are unknown.
ref: Jurucakap Cosatu, kesatuan sekerja Persekutuan Afrika Selatan, berkata dua daripada ahli kesatuan itu masih belum dilepaskan dan keberadaan mereka sekarang tidak diketahui.

src: Swaziland is the last country in Africa to hold an absolute monarchy.
ref: Swaziland merupakan negara terakhir di Afrika yang mengekalkan monarki mutlak.

src: "The Israeli Army can stop 12 to 50 ships if it wants," Feiler said.
ref: "Tentera Israel boleh memberhentikan 12 hingga 50 kapal jika ia mahu," Feiler berkata.

src: The Israel Defense Force is monitoring the actions of the planned flotilla, according to a report in the Jerusalem Post on Tuesday.
ref: Tentera Pertahanan Israel sedang memantau tindakan flotila yang dirancang, menurut sebuah laporan di Jerusalem Post pada hari Selasa.

src: A wide range of scenarios is being prepared for which include the possibility that due to the larger number of ships reported to be part of the flotilla, the Israeli navy may need to intercept it before the ships get close to Israel's shoreline.
ref: Terdapat banyak situasi sedang disediakan termasuk kemungkinan kerana lebih banyak kapal dilaporkan sebahagian daripada flotila, tentera laut Israel mungkin harus memintasnya sebelum kapal pergi berdekatan dengan pantai Israel.

src: Officials say that Israel will warn ship operators that their crew may be detained and the vessel held until impound fees are paid, claiming the backing of international maritime treaties.
ref: Pegawai berkata Israel akan memberi amaran kepada pengusaha kapal yang kakitangan mereka mungkin akan ditahan dan kapal akan ditahan hingga bayaran kurungan dibayar, mendakwa mendapat sokongan daripada perjanjian maritim antarabangsa.

src: The first flotilla to challenge the blockade was stopped by Israeli naval commandos in May this year.
ref: Flotila pertama yang mencabar sekatan telah dihentikan oleh komando tentera laut Israel pada bulan May tahun ini.

src: Nine activists were killed, and several dozen activists and seven Israeli commandos were wounded after Israeli troops clashed with activists.
ref: Sembilan aktivis mati, dan beberapa dozen lagi aktivis dan tujuh komando Israel cedera selepas tentera Israel bertempur dengan aktivis.

src: Today, Prime Minister Dominique de Villepin visited the president and discussed a number of urgent matters, such as the help proposed to the United States following from the disastrous Hurricane Katrina.
ref: Hari ini, Perdana Menteri Dominique de Villepin telah melawat presiden dan membincangkan beberapa perkara penting, seperti bantuan untuk mencadangkan kepada Amerika Syarikat berikutan bencana Taufan Katrina.

src: The resolution comes in response to questions that have been raised by senior intelligence officials and information revealed in leaked U.K. documents such as the Downing Street Memo, regarding the handling of pre-war intelligence by the Bush administration, and the planning and execution of the Iraq war.
ref: Resolusi tersebut tercetus sebagai respon kepada persoalan yang diutarakan oleh pegawai kanan perisikan dan maklumat yang didedahkan dalam dokumen U.K. yang bocor seperti Downing Street Memo, berkaitan pengendalian perisikan pra-perang oleh pentadbiran Bush, dan perancangan dan pelaksanaan perang Iraq.

src: Originally proposed by Congresswoman Barbara Lee (D-Calif.), the Resolution of Inquiry had 83 co-sponsors at the time of voting, including one Republican member of the International Relations Committee, Jim Leach, who was the only Republican voting in favor of the resolution.
ref: Asalnya diusul oleh Ahli Kongres Wanita Barbara Lee (D-Calif.), Resolusi Inkuiri mempunyai 83 penaja bersama pada waktu pengundian, termasuk satu ahli Republikan Jawatankuasa Hubungan Antarabangsa, Jim Leach, merupakan satu-satunya Republikan yang mengundi dalam resolusi tersebut.

src: Some members of the committee from each party were absent.
ref: Sebahagian ahli jawatankuasa daripada setiap pihak telah tidak hadir.

src: The inventor of The Club steering lock James E. Winner, Jr. has died in a head-on car accident in Clarion County, Pennsylvania aged 81 today.
ref: Pencipta kunci stereng The Club James E. Winner, Jr telah meninggal dunia dalam kemalangan kereta di bahagian depan kereta di Clarion County, Pennsylvania berusia 81 pada hari ini.

src: Authorities say the accident occurred when Winner drove his SUV into oncoming traffic.
ref: Pihak berkuasa berkata kemalangan itu berlaku apabila Winner memandu kereta SUVnya ke arah kereta-kereta yang datang dari depan.

src: He came up with the idea while fighting in the Korean War; he secured his vehicle with metal chains to stop anybody taking it.
ref: Beliau mendapat idea itu semasa berperang dalam Perang Korea; beliau mengunci kenderaannya dengan rantai besi untuk menghalang sesiapa daripada mengambilnya.

src: Winner also owned hotels, a steel company, and other companies.
ref: Winner juga memiliki beberapa hotel, sebuah syarikat keluli, dan syarikat-syarikat lain.

src: A spokesman for Winner International said in a statement, "[this is] a very difficult time for all of us and the family would request that you honor their privacy."
ref: Seorang jurucakap Winner Antarabangsa berkata dalam satu kenyataan, "[ ini ] adalah masa yang sangat sukar untuk kita semua dan keluarganya ingin meminta supaya anda menghormati privasi mereka".

src: At least six people died in a raid lead by Iraqi forces assisted by US troops near the Iraqi city of Fallujah Wednesday.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya enam orang mati dalam satu serbuan yang diketuai oleh tentera Iraq yang dibantu oleh tentera AS berhampiran bandar Fallujah di Iraq pada hari Rabu.

src: US Army spokesman Major Rob Philips says the troops went into an al-Qaeda hideout.
ref: Jurucakap Tentera Darat Mejar Rob Philips berkata angkatan tentera masuk ke dalam tempat persembunyian al-Qaeda.

src: Insurgents shot at the troops and they returned fire, killing six.
ref: Pemberontak-pemberontak menembak angkatan tentera itu dan mereka membalas tembakan itu, membunuh enam orang.

src: Reports from Fallujah police say seven people died and the raid was illegal and troops targeted civilians.
ref: Laporan daripada polis Fallujah mengatakan tujuh orang mati dan serbuan itu adalah salah di sisi undang-undang dan angkatan tentera menyasarkan orang awam.

src: They say there is high tension in Iraq's Anbar province over the government's military actions.
ref: Mereka berkata terdapat ketegangan yang tinggi di wilayah Anbar Iraq atas tindakan tentera kerajaan.

src: The raids comes after US president Barack Obama withdrew combat forces from Iraq, leaving 50,000 behind to aid Iraqis, two weeks ago.
ref: Serbuan dibuat selepas Presiden Amerika Syarikat Barack Obama menarik balik pasukan pertarungan dari Iraq, meninggalkan 50,000 untuk membantu rakyat Iraq, dua minggu lalu.

src: Leonard Skinner, the namesake of rock band Lynyrd Skynyrd, has died at the age of 77.
ref: Leonard Skinner, yang sama nama dengan kumpulan musik rok Lynyrd Skynyrd, telah meninggal dunia pada usia 77. Skinner adalah seorang guru gimnasium dan jurulatih bola keranjang dan mengajar ahli-ahli kumpulan itu.

src: Skinner was a gym teacher and basketball coach and taught members of the group.
ref: Kematiannya diumumkan oleh anak lelakinya, yang juga bernama Leonard Skinner, yang juga berkata bahawa dia menghidap penyakit Alzheimer.

src: His death was announced by his son, also named Leonard Skinner, who also said that he was suffering from Alzheimer's disease.
ref: Skinner meninggal dunia di rumah jagaan St. Catherine Laboure Manor di Riverside pada 02:30 pagi.

src: The coach taught the members of the group in the 1960s and was reportedly hard on the students.
ref: Jurulatih itu mengajar ahli-ahli kumpulan itu pada tahun 1960-an dan dilaporkan tegas terhadap pelajarnya.

src: He later said in a 2009 interview that "he was just following the rules".
ref: Beliau kemudian berkata dalam satu temu bual pada tahun 2009 bahawa "dia hanya mengikut peraturan".

src: He disputed the rumours that he was extra tough on them or that he kicked them out of school.
ref: Beliau mempertikaikan khabar angin bahawa beliau bertindak keras terhadap mereka atau bahawa beliau mengusir mereka keluar dari sekolah.

src: Talks between the European Union Trade Commissioner Peter Mandelson and Chinese Commerce Minister Bo Xilai, held today in Beijing, brought no compromise on unblocking 80 milion pieces of Chinese textiles impounded in the EU.
ref: Perbincangan di antara Pesuruhjaya Perdagangan Kesatuan Eropah Peter Mandelson dan Menteri Perdagangan China Bo Xilai, telah diadakan hari ini di Beijing, membawa tiada kompromi dalam melepaskan sekatan 80 juta helai tekstil China yang ditahan di EU.

src: The clothing is held in European warehouses due to overshoot of the China-to-the-EU export quotas.
ref: Pakaian tersebut ditahan di gudang Eropah disebabkan kuota eksport China ke EU yang melampaui kuota.

src: In June, the EU member states agreed to raise the limit by approximately 10%, but EU importers and Chinese producers continue to push for a greater amount of trade.
ref: Pada bulan Jun, negara-negara EU bersetuju untuk menaikkan hadnya dengan lebih kurang 10%, tetapi pengimport EU dan pengeluar China terus menekan untuk jumlah perdagangan yang lebih besar.

src: Concerns on textiles imported from Asia have split the EU countries: those with strong retail sector support increasing the quotas, while others, which have large clothing industries (Spain, Portugal, Italy) want to keep, or even reduce, limits in the future.
ref: Kebimbangan tentang tekstil yang diimport dari Asia telah memecahkan negara-negara EU: mereka dengan sektor jualan runcit yang kuat menyokong penambahan kuota, sementara yang lain, yang mempunya industri pakaian yang besar (Spain, Portugal, Italy) hendak menjaga, ataupun mengurangkan, had pada masa hadapan.

src: On Friday, George W. Bush's administration announced new quotas on imports of Chinese bras and synthetic fabric, after negotiations between both countries broke down.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, pentadbiran George W. Bush mengumumkan kuota baru terhadap pengimportan coli dan kain sintetik China, selepas perundingan diadakan di antara kedua-dua negara.

src: Leclerc had the distinct honour of being the first person to score nul points at the 1962 contest.
ref: Leclerc diberi penghormatan berbeza sebagai orang pertama yang mendapat sifar dalam pertandingan 1962.

src: The singer performed at the first contest in 1956 and appeared again two years later and achieved his best result with his performance of Ma petite chatte.
ref: Penyanyi tersebut telah membuat persembahan di pertandingan pertama pada 1956 dan muncul kembali dua tahun kemudian dan mencapai keputusan terbaik beliau dengan persembahan Ma petite chatte.

src: After appearing for the third time at the 1960 contest he made his final appearance at the 1962 contest.
ref: Selepas muncul pada kali ketiga pada tahun 1960 beliau membuat penampilan terakhir di pertandingan 1962.

src: At the 1962 contest Leclerc became the first person in Eurovision history to fail to score any points, also known as Nul Points.
ref: Pada pertandingan 1962 Leclerc menjadi orang pertama dalam sejara Eurovision yang gagal untuk mendapatkan sebarang mata, juga dikenali Mata Sifar.

src: During his career he also worked as a pianist and a songwriter.
ref: Dalam sepanjang kerjaya beliau turut bekerja sebagai pemain piano dan penulis lagu.

src: After his final Eurovision appearance he left the music industry and became a building contractor.
ref: Selepas kemunculan Eurovision terakhir yang beliau meninggalkan industri musik dan menjadi kontraktor bangunan.

src: A documentary set to be shown on October 10, 2010 in Australia about the life and times of the soon to be canonised Mary MacKillop — who will be the first Australian to be made a saint — suggests that nuns including MacKillop of the Sisterhood of St Joseph of the Sacred Heart in South Australia were condemned and even excommunicated by high-ranking priests for informing the authorities of the apparent paedophilic acts of Father Patrick Keating at a local public school in Kapunda, South Australia.
ref: Satu dokumentari ditetapkan untuk ditayangkan pada 10 Oktober 2010 di Australia mengenai kehidupan dan masa Mary Mackillop yang akan dikanunkan tidak lama lagi - yang akan menjadi rakyat Australia pertama dijadikan wali - mencadangkan nun termasuk Mackillop dari Persaudaraan St Joseph dari Sacred Heat di Australia Selatan telah dikutuk dan juga dikucilkan oleh paderi berpangkat-tinggi keatas memaklumkan penguatkuasa mengenai tindakan seksual keatas kanak-kanak yang jelas oleh Father Patrick Keating di sekolah awam tempatan di Kapunda, Australia Selatan.

src: The excommunication of MacKillop and other nuns was performed by the Bishop of Adelaide, Laurence Bonaventure Sheil, in 1871, but the documentary is set to suggest that the influence of Father Charles Horan was the driving force behind the act.
ref: Pengucilan MacKillop dan nun-nun lain dilakukan oleh Bishop Adelaide, Laurence Bonaventure Sheil, pada 1871, tetapi dokumetari itu ditetapkan untuk mencadangkan yang pengaruh Father Charles Horan ialah kuasa penggerak dibelakang kelakuan tersebut.

src: According to Ignatius Fennessy in the Journal of the Galway Archaeological and Historical Society:"One Thursday evening, 21 September 1871, Horan told Mary MacKillop that the bishop (who had called while she was out that day) wanted her to go to another convent."
ref: Menurut Ignatius Fennesy dalam Journal of the Galway Archeological and Historial Society: "Satu Kahims petang, 21 Spetember 1871, Horan memberitahu Mary MacKillop yang bishop (yang dipanggil semasa dia keluar hari itu) mahu dia pergi ke biara lain".

src: "She could not go that night and wanted to discuss matters with the sisters and the bishop as well."
ref: "Dia tidak dapat pergi pada malam tersebut dan juga hendak berbincang dengan sister dan bishop".

src: "The next morning the bishop arrived with four priests and, in a ranting mood, amid the hysteria of some of the sisters, and with MacKillop kneeling down on her knees in the chapel, he excommunicated her and sent her back into the world."
ref: '" "Pada pagi esoknya bishop tiba dengan empat paderi dan, dalam perasaan marah, ditengah-tengah histeria sesetengah sister, dan dengan MacKillop berlutut didalam gereja, dia dikucilkan dan dihantar kedunia luar".

src: Bishop Shiel renounced the excommunications on his deathbed five months later.
ref: Bishop Shiel menarik-balik pengucilan itu semasa diranjang kematian lima bulan kemudian.

src: The alleged paedophile priest, Father Keating, returned to Ireland, where he continued in fatherhood in the Catholic Church.
ref: Paderi yang didakwa melakukan seks keatas kanak-kanak, Father Keating, kembali ke Irelan, dimana dia meneruskan didalam dunia Father dalam Gereja Katolik.

src: Mary MacKillop officially becomes the first sainted Australian on October 17, 2010 in a ceremony at The Vatican.
ref: Mary MacKillop secara rasmi menjadi rakyat Australia pertama disucikan pada 17 Oktober, 2010 dalam majlis di The Vatican.

src: New research published in the journal Nature Medicine has shown a link between a faulty gene and migraines.
ref: Penyelidikan baru yang diterbitkan dalam jurnal Nature Medicine telah menunjukkan hubungan antara gen rosak dan migrain.

src: Scientists hope that this discovery will lead to improved pain management treatments for sufferers, with possible benefits for pain treatment generally.
ref: Ahli-ahli sains berharap penemuan ini akan membawa kepada rawatan pengurusan kesakitan yang lebih baik untuk pesakit, dengan faedah mungkin untuk rawatan sakit secara am.

src: The breakthrough involves a gene known as TRESK, thought to control the brain's reaction to pain: if it is defective, then many normal activities and actions will be painful.
ref: Kejayaan ini melibatkan gen yang dikenali sebagai TRESK, difikirkan mengawal tindak balas otak untuk sakit: jika ia rosak, maka banyak aktiviti dan tindakan normal akan sakit.

src: Migraine sufferers (thought in the United Kingdom to number about eight per cent of men and eighteen per cent of women) often complain that light, noise and touch cause pain.
ref: Penghidap migrain (difikirkan di United Kingdom sebanyak kira-kira lapan peratus lelaki dan lapan belas peratus wanita) sering mengadu bahawa cahaya, bunyi dan sentuhan menyebabkan kesakitan.

src: TRESK can potentially be affected by drugs that would change the point at which it reports pain, which would alleviate the suffering of those with migraines.
ref: TRESK mungkin boleh dipengaruhi oleh ubat-ubatan yang akan mengubah titik di mana ia melaporkan rasa sakit, yang akan mengurangkan penderitaan mereka yang mempunyai migrain.

src: They looked at the DNA of 110 people with migraine and members of their family, and found that TRESK was a major component in migraines.
ref: Mereka melihat DNA 110 orang yang mempunyai migrain dan ahli-ahli keluarga mereka, dan mendapati TRESK merupakan komponen utama dalam migrain.

src: One of the Oxford researchers, consultant neurologist Zameel Cader, described it as a "once in a generation find" and said that it could "potentially lead to a treatment for pain in general."
ref: Salah seorang penyelidik Oxford, pakar perunding neurologi Zameel Cader, menyifatkannya sebagai "amat sukar dijumpai" dan berkata bahawa ia mungkin "berpotensi membawa kepada rawatan sakit secara umum".

src: Migraines are described by the World Health Organisation as a major worldwide cause of disability.
ref: Migrain dikatakan oleh Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia sebagai penyebab utama hilang upaya di seluruh dunia.

src: In Britain, it is estimated that migraines affect 20 per cent of the population, with about 190,000 migraines occurring daily and over 25 million lost days from work every year.
ref: Di Britain, dianggarkan bahawa migrain menjejaskan 20 peratus penduduk, dengan kira-kira 190,000 migrain berlaku setiap hari dan lebih 25 juta hari hilang kerja setiap tahun.

src: The police claim they shot at eight people carrying guns on the bridge.
ref: Polis mendakwa bahawa mereka menembak lapan orang yang membawa senjata di jambatan itu.

src: This comes as Mayor Robin Nagin began to turn the city over to state and federal control.
ref: Ini berlaku semasa Datuk Bandar Robin Nagin mula menyerahkan bandar itu kepada negeri dan kawalan persekutuan.

src: Deputy Police Chief W.J.
ref: Timbalan Ketua Polis W.J.

src: Riley said police shot at eight people carrying guns, killing five or six.
ref: Riley berkata polis menembak lapan orang yang membawa senjata, membunuh lima atau enam orang.

src: However, according to foreign sources, the five killed were contractors for the Army.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, menurut sumber asing, lima orang yang terbunuh adalah kontraktor yang berkhidmat untuk Tentera Darat.

src: In a unrelated incident, a civilian helicopter crashed near the Danziger Bridge.
ref: Dalam kejadian berasingan, sebuah helikopter awam terhempas berhampiran Jambatan Danziger.

src: The two passengers on board escaped with only minor cuts and scrapes.
ref: Kedua-dua penumpang terselamat dengan hanya luka kecil dan calar.

src: The Danziger Bridge spans a canal which connects Lake Pontchartrain and the Mississippi River.
ref: Jambatan Danziger menjangkau satu terusan yang menghubungkan Tasik Pontchartrain dan Sungai Mississippi.

src: The cause of death was established to be complications of diabetes.
ref: Komplikasi Diabetes disahkan sebagai punca kematian.

src: Gonzalez had suffered with the illness for several years and was wheelchair bound.
ref: Gonzales telah menghidapi penyakit itu selama beberapa tahun dan terikat pada kerusi roda.

src: Standing over 7.5 feet (2.3 metres) tall, Gonzalez was originally a basketball player before becoming a wrestler.
ref: Dengan ketinggian lebih dari 7.5 kaki(2.3 meter), Gonzalez merupakan seorang pemain bola keranjang sebelum menjadi ahli gusti.

src: Upon moving to the United States, he was drafted in the third round of the 1988 NBA draft by the Atlanta Hawks.
ref: Selepas berpindah ke Amerika Syarikat, beliau telah dirangka oleh Alanta Hawks dalam pusingan ketiga di NBA Draft pada tahun 1988.

src: During his time there, he wrestled as El Gigante for two years, then joining the World Wrestling Federation (WWF), now World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE).
ref: Pada masa di sana, beliau bergusti sebagai El Gigante selama dua tahun, kemudian menyertai World Wrestling Federation(WWF) yang sekarang dikenali sebagai World Wrestling Entertainment(WWE).

src: He spent the entire of his time at with the WWF feuding with Undertaker and left the company in July 1993 after losing a Rest in Peace match to him.
ref: Beliau menghabiskan seluruh masa di WWF bersaing dengan Undertaker dan meninggalkan syarikat itu pada Julai 1993 selepas tewas dalam pertandingan Rest in Peace dengan dia.

src: After leaving the company, he wrestled in Japan before retiring in 1995 after suffering from sciatic nerve pain.
ref: Selepas meninggalkan syarikat itu, beliau bergusti di Jepun sebelum bersara pada tahun 1995 selepas mengalami kesakitan saraf sciatic.

src: Vladimir Putin has relieved from power Admiral Vladimir Kuroyedov, the head of the Russian navy.
ref: Vladimir Putin telah dilepaskan daripada kuasa Laksamana Vladimir Kuroyedov, ketua tentera laut Rusia.

src: This comes a month after an incident where 7 Russian sailors became trapped in a submarine, and had to be rescued with help from abroad.
ref: Ini berlaku sebulan selepas satu kejadian di mana 7 pelayar Rusia terperangkap dalam kapal selam, dan terpaksa diselamatkan dengan bantuan dari luar negara.

src: No reason was given for Kuroyedov's dismissal, although Admiral Eduard Baltin speculated on Moscow Radio that it may be because of the navy chief's poor health.
ref: Tiada sebab diberikan bagi pemecatan Kuroyedov, walaupun Laksamana Eduard Baltin menspekulasikan di Radio Moscow bahawa ia mungkin kerana kesihatan ketua tentera laut itu terganggu.

src: Kuroyedov is being replaced by Vladimir Masorin, who was previously serving as the Chief of staff for the Russian Navy.
ref: Kuroyedov digantikan oleh Vladimir Masorin, yang sebelum ini berkhidmat sebagai Ketua Turus untuk Tentera Laut Rusia.

src: In remarks Putin made about this leadership change and referring to Masorin, he said "The recent exercises, including those I have attended, show that the navy is developing and that is certainly your merit to a large extent."
ref: Dalam ucapan Putin tentang perubahan kepimpinan tersebut dan merujuk kepada Masorin, beliau berkata "Latihan kebelakangan ini, termasuk yang saya telah menghadiri, menunjukkan bahawa tentera laut sedang membangun dan sebahagian besarnya adalah merit untuk anda".

src: Masorin added while in a hall at the Admiralty, "One thing is clear — to continue in the condition which we are in and do nothing is simply not possible."
ref: Masorin menambah semasa di dalam dewan di Admiralty, "Satu perkara yang jelas - ia adalah tidak mungkin untuk terus berada dalam keadaan kita sekarang dalam dan tidak membuat apa-apa".

src: "I have been given the task of stopping the navy shaking public opinion."
ref: "Saya telah diberi tugas untuk menghentikan tentera laut dari menjejaskan pendapat orang ramai".

src: "I am not experiencing euphoria at being appointed head of the navy."
ref: "Saya tidak mengalami keghairahan kerana dilantik sebagai ketua tentera laut".

src: This deployment included all 70 of the province's private and public schools and affects more than 16,000 students.
ref: Penyebaran ini termasuklah kesemua 70 sekolah swasta dan awam di wilayah tersebut dan membawa kesan terhadap 16,000 pelajar.

src: The distribution installed, FUSS Soledad GNU/Linux, is a customized version of the popular Debian GNU/Linux distribution.
ref: Edaran yang dipasang itu, FUSS Soledad GNU/Linux, adalah versi penyesuaian daripada edaran yang terkenal, Debian GNU/Linux.

src: In addition to the desktops in the schools, more than 20,000 LiveCDs are scheduled to be created and given free of charge to the students and their families.
ref: Selain daripada komputer meja di sekolah-sekolah, lebih dari 20,000 LiveCD dijadualkan akan diwujudkan dan diberi secara percuma kepada pelajar dan keluarga mereka.

src: Project co-director Antonio Russo said, "With the participation of all the public and private schools, this will give to all the students, families, teachers, and operators from the educational world the opportunity to use a entirely free operating system, both at school and at home."
ref: Penolong pengarah projek Antonio Russo berkata, "Dengan penyertaan dari seluruh sekolah awam dan swasta, ini akan memberikan semua pelajar, keluarga, guru, dan pengendali dari bidang pendidikan peluang utuk menggunakan sistem pengendalian yang percuma sepenuhnya, di sekolah dan juga di rumah".

src: A group of 19 people, including local aborigines and Roads and Traffic Authority (RTA) staff, were sprayed by a crop duster in rural Australia today.
ref: Sekumpulan terdiri daripada 19 orang, termasuk orang asli tempatan dan kakitangan Pihak Berkuasa Jalan dan Trafik (RTA), telah disembur pesawat pendebu tanaman di luar bandar Australia hari ini.

src: They were walking the proposed route of a freeway bypass, looking for sites that may have significance to Aboriginal people.
ref: Mereka berjalan mengikuti laluan yang dicadangkan bagi jalan pintas lebuh raya, mencari kawasan yang mungkin berkepentingan kepada orang-orang Asli.

src: The freeway bypass will be part of the Hume Highway, near Coolac in south-west New South Wales.
ref: Pintasan lebuh akan menjadi sebahagian daripada Lebuhraya Hume, dekat Coolac di barat daya New South Wales.

src: Police are yet to rule out that the dusting was deliberate.
ref: Polis masih belum mengetepikan anggapan bahawa pendebuan itu adalah disengajakan.

src: "We don't know whether they knew the people were there or not so we're appealing for anyone who might have witnessed the incident or knows anything about a low-flying crop-duster in the area to contact police," she said.
ref: "Kami tidak tahu sama ada mereka tahu orang di sana atau tidak jadi kami merayu supaya sesiapa sahaja yang mungkin telah menyaksikan kejadian itu atau mengetahui apa-apa mengenai pesawat pendebu tanaman yang terbang rendah di kawasan itu supaya menghubungi polis," katanya.

src: Peter Hofmann, the project leader of the migration said the delay was because the "pilot was more important than we first thought and should last longer."
ref: Peter Hofmann, ketua projek migrasi tersebut berkata kelewatan adalah kerana "perintis adalah lebih penting daripada yang kita fikir dahulu dan harus berkekal lebih lama."

src: Once the pilot is completed all the departments will eventually be migrated to Linux and OpenOffice.org.
ref: Apabila perintis itu dilengkapi semua jabatan akhirnya akan bertukar ke Linux dan OpenOffice.org.

src: Munich made the decision to switch after Microsoft discontinued support for their current OS, Windows NT 4.
ref: Munich membuat keputusan untuk menukar selepas sokongan Microsoft dihentikan untuk OS semasa mereka, Windows NT 4.

src: While Suse was very involved in the early phases, Debian was ultimately selected to replace Windows on 14,000 desktops.
ref: Walaupun Suse sangat terlibat dalam fasa awal, Debian akhirnya dipilih untuk menggantikan Windows di kalangan 14,000 komputer meja.

src: The migration is estimated to cost between 30 and 34 million euros, once complete would affect approximately 16,000 users.
ref: Pertukaran tersebut dianggar berbelanja antara 30 dan 34 juta euro, sekiranya lengkap akan mempengaruhi kira-kira 16,000 pengguna.

src: The first department to migrate to Linux and OpenOffice.org will be the office of the Lord Mayor planed for the middle of 2006, though not all of the department's computers will be immediately migrated.
ref: Jabatan pertama yang akan berpindah kepada Linux dan OpenOffice.org adalah pejabat Datuk Bandar yang dirancang bagi pertengahan tahun 2006, walaupun bukan semua komputer jabatan itu akan segera ditukarkan.

src: Many young children, travelling to an inter-village football tournament in Michaungai, were killed when the boat sank.
ref: Banyak kanak-kanak, berjalan ke pertandingan bola sepak antara kampung di Michaungai, terbunuh apabila bot tehrsebut tenggelam.

src: Authorities are continuing to search for three people who are still missing after the disaster.
ref: Penguatkuasa berharap untuk mencari tiga orang yang masih hilang selepas bencana tersebut.

src: There were 79 people aboard the boat when it sank in the Irrawaddy river, according to an unnamed official.
ref: 79 orang menaiki bot tersebut semasa ia tenggelam di sungai Irrawaddy, menurut pegawai yang tidak disiarkan nama.

src: Locals suggested that the boat, which was reportedly overloaded, flipped and lost balance, trapping young children underneath.
ref: Penduduk tempatan mencadangkan yang bot tersebut, yang dilaporkan lebih muatan, terbalik dan hilang kawalan, memerangkap kanak-kanak dibawahnya.

src: The accident took place as strong winds and heavy rain battered the area, causing large waves and strong currents in waterways.
ref: Kemalangan itu berlaku apabila angin kuat dan hujan lebat melanda kawasan tersebut, mengakibatkan ombak besar dan arus kuat dilaluan air.

src: He also said the miners "have no anxiety," saying that "they've waited a few months now for their rescue and are aware that they will have to wait some more days."
ref: Beliau juga berkata pelombong "tidak ada apa untuk dibimbangkan," berkata bahawa "mereka kini telah menunggu beberapa bulan untuk tindakan menyelamatkan mereka dan sedar yang mereka akan perlu untuk tunggu beberapa hari lagi".

src: The offices of DirectNIC, a New Orleans based webhost and services provider, were visited by armed members of the 82nd Airborne Division during an interview with Wikinews reporters Tuesday evening.
ref: Pejabat DirectNIC, satu acara dan perkhidmatan New Orleans berasaskan webhost dan pemberi servis, telah dilawati oleh anggota bersenjata Bahagian Udara ke-82 dalam satu temu bual dengan wartawan Wikinews petang Selasa.

src: DirectNIC has been the home of "Outpost Crystal" — an information dissemination effort involving hundreds of volunteers throughout the world — since Hurricane Katrina wracked the United States Gulf Coast last Monday.
ref: DirectNIC telah menjadi rumah "Outpost Kristal" - satu usaha penyebaran maklumat yang melibatkan beratus-ratus sukarelawan di seluruh dunia - sejak Hurricane Katrina memusnahkan Gulf Coast Amerika Syarikat pada Isnin lepas.

src: A 21-year-old Swedish man killed himself and broadcast it over the internet via his webcam feed Monday, after posting to a message board that he had swallowed some painkillers and was going to hang himself.
ref: Rakyat Sweden lelaki berusia 21 tahun membunuh diri dan menyiarkannya di internet dengan siaran webcam pada Isnin, selepas memuat naik mesej bahawa dia telah menelan beberapa ubat tahan sakit dan akan menggantung diri.

src: At 11:51 a.m. Central European Summer Time (0951 UTC), Marcus Jannes, a student from Järna, Stockholm, posted to the Mental Health Problems forum of Sweden's Flashback message boards using the newly-registered username "LurifaxFlux", stating that he was going to hang himself, adding that he had already swallowed 100mg of dexofen and 1500mg of paracetamol.
ref: Pada 11:51 a.m. Waktu Musim Panas Eropah (0951 UTC), Marcus Jannes, pelajar dari Jarna, Stockhlom, memuat naik ke ruangan mesej Imbasan Kembali di forum Masalah Kesihatan Mental Sweden menggunakan nama pengguna yang didaftar baru "LurifaxFlux," menyatakan bahawa dia akan menggantungkan dirinya, menambah bahawa dia telah menelan 100mg dexofen dan 1500mg paracetamol.

src: He said that he had set up a webcam to record the event, and would post details later of a FTP server for people to watch.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa dia telah menyediakan webcam untuk merekod kejadian itu, dan akan memuat naik butir-butirnya kemudian di pelayan FTP untuk ditonton.

src: When everything is at its worst, it can only get better", and "Think of poor people, mutilated people, people who are lame or blind."
ref: Apabila semua berada dalam keadaan paling teruk, ia hanya akan jadi lebih baik," dan "Fikirkan orang miskin, orang cacat, orang yang bodoh atau buta".

src: But you still have the ability to alter yours!"
ref: Tapi kamu masih ada kemampuan untuk mengubah kehidupan kamu"!

src: However, other users posted messages saying they didn't believe him, wishing him luck with his attempt, and calling him an attention whore and a troll.
ref: Tetapi, pengguna lain memuat naik mesej tidak mempercayai apa yang dia katakan, mengucapkan semoga berjaya dengan cuabaannya itu, dan memanggilnya penagih perhatian dan troll.

src: He also told them that he had Asperger syndrome and High-functioning autism, and was emotionally vulnerable and lacked normal social skills.
ref: Dia juga memberitahu mereka bahawa dia mempunyai sindrom Asperger dan autism fungsi tinggi, serta beremosi lemah dan kurang kemahiran normal bersosial.

src: He admitted to feeling lonely, and alluded to experiencing problems at school, but admitted that he had a good upbringing and had a rather good life.
ref: Dia mengaku bahawa dia merasa sunyi, dan menyebut bahawa dia ada mengalami masalah di sekolah, tetapi mengaku bahawa dia mempunyai suasana pembesaran dan kehidupan yang agak baik.

src: In order to find P-2 level officers for the United Nations Secretariat, the international organization is holding competitive recruitment competitions in 42 countries.
ref: Dalam usaha untuk mencari pegawai peringkat P-2 untuk Sekretariat Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, organisasi antarabangsa itu mengadakan pertandingan pengrekrutan yang kompetitif di 42 buah negara.

src: Six occupational groups are being sought: Architecture, Demography, Library, Security, Science and Technology, and Statistics.
ref: Enam kumpulan pekerjaan yang sedang dicari: Seni Bina, Demografi, Perpustakaan, Keselamatan, Sains dan Teknologi, dan Statistik.

src: There will be a written examination (both a general paper and a specialised paper) and an interview.
ref: Peperiksaan bertulis (kedua-duanya satu kertas am dan satu kertas khusus) dan temuduga akan dibuat.

src: Candidates must write their answers for the general paper in English or French.
ref: Calon-calon mesti menulis jawapan mereka untuk kertas umum dalam bahasa Inggeris atau Perancis.

src: However, they may write their answers for the specialized paper in English, French, or any of the other four official languages of the Secretariat, i.e., Arabic, Chinese, Russian, or Spanish.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, mereka boleh menulis jawapan mereka untuk kertas khusus dalam bahasa Inggeris, Perancis, atau mana-mana daripada empat bahasa rasmi Sekretariat, iaitu Arab, Cina, Rusia, atau Sepanyol.

src: The examinations will take place on February 28, 2006 in New York, Addis Ababa, Andorra La Vella, Athens, Bangkok, Beirut, Geneva, Monaco, Nairobi, Santiago, Vaduz, Valletta, and Vienna.
ref: Peperiksaan itu akan diadakan pada 28 Februari 2006 di New York, Addis Ababa, Andorra La Vella, Athens, Bangkok, Beirut, Geneva, Monaco, Nairobi, Santiago, Vaduz, Valletta, dan Vienna.

src: According to the UN, applicants "should hold at least a first-level university degree relevant to the occupational group in which they would like to take the examination."
ref: Menurut UN, pemohon "perlu mempunyai sekurang-kurangnya ijazah universiti peringkat pertama yang berkaitan dengan kumpulan pekerjaan yang mereka ingin mengambil peperiksaan".

src: The practice of scouting under-represented nations for highly-qualified employees is an annual occurrence.
ref: Usaha mencungkil bakat dari negara-negara yang kurang diwakili sebagai pekerja yang berkelayakan tinggi diadakan setiap tahun.

src: The United Nations Secretariat is one of the principal organs of the United Nations and it is headed by the United Nations Secretary General and assisted by a staff of international civil servants worldwide.
ref: Sekretariat Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu adalah salah satu organ utama Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dan ia diketuai oleh Setiausaha Agung Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dan dibantu oleh seorang kakitangan awam antarabangsa dari seluruh dunia.

src: It provides studies, information, and facilities needed by United Nations bodies for their meetings.
ref: Ia menyediakan kajian, maklumat dan kemudahan yang diperlukan oleh badan-badan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu untuk mesyuarat mereka.

src: It also carries out tasks as directed by the UN Security Council, the UN General Assembly, the UN Economic and Social Council, and other UN bodies.
ref: Ia juga menjalankan tugas-tugas seperti yang diarahkan oleh Majlis Keselamatan UN, Perhimpunan Agung UN, Majlis Ekonomi dan Sosial UN dan badan-badan UN yang lain.

src: The United Nations Charter provides that the staff be chosen by application of the "highest standards of efficiency, competence, and integrity," with due regard for the importance of recruiting on a wide geographical basis.
ref: Piagam Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu memperuntukkan bahawa kakitangan dipilih dengan aplikasi "standard efektif, kecekapan dan integriti yang tertinggi," dengan mengambil kira kepentingan merekrut dalam geografi yang luas.

src: The miners have been trapped since 03:00 (08:00 UTC) local time.
ref: Pelombong-pelombong itu telah terperangkap sejak 03:00 (08:00 UTC) waktu tempatan.

src: According to the Under-Secretary of Mining Development, Jorge Espinoza, the men are trapped 500 feet (150 meters) below the surface.
ref: Menurut Setiausaha Kedua Kemajuan Perlombongan, Jorge Espinoza, semua lelaki itu telah terperangkap sejauh 500 kaki (150 meter) dari permukaan.

src: Rescuers are currently on the scene and they expect to reach the men within 24 hours.
ref: Para penyelamat pada ketika ini sedang berada di tempat kejadian dan mereka jangka akan mencapai lelaki-lelaki itu dalam masa 24 jam.

src: The mine is suspected to have collapsed due to a build up of underground water which caused the mine's supports to buckle and collapse, blocking all exits.
ref: Lombong tersebut disyaki telah runtuh kerana air bawah tanah yang bertakung dan menyebabkan sokongan lombong membengkok dan runtuh, menutup semua laluan keluar.

src: Don Brash, leader of the opposition National Party in New Zealand, admitted that he was aware that members of the Exclusive Brethren church were going to release contentious brochures attacking his political rivals.
ref: Don Brash, pemimpin pembangkang Parti Nasional di New Zealand, mengakui yang beliau menyedari ahli-ahli gereja Exclusive Brethren hendak mengeluarkan risalah kontroversi yang menyerang pesaing politiknya.

src: Mr Brash said he had met members of the church a number of times.
ref: Encik Brash berkata beliau telah berjumpa ahli-ahli gereja itu untuk beberapa kali.

src: He has admitted today that he was aware of the group's intention to publish brochures that were critical of the Labour Party and The Greens.
ref: Beliau mengakui hari ini bahawa beliau menyedari niat kumpulan itu untuk menerbitkan risalah yang kritis terhadap Parti Buruh dan The Greens.

src: The pamphlets were published without the link to the Church being obvious.
ref: Risalah-risalah itu telah diterbitkan tanpa hubungannya dengan Gereja nampak jelas.

src: However, former members of the Church identified the men as belonging to the church which has been described as a sect.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, bekas ahli-ahli Gereja itu mengecam lelaki-lelaki tersebut sebagai ahli gereja yang digambarkan sebagai satu taifah.

src: Its members are not allowed to listen to Radio, Television or use computers at all.
ref: Ahli-ahlinya tidak dibenarkan langsung mendengar Radio, Televisyen atau menggunakan komputer.

src: They are linked to political support for George Bush and other conservative politicians.
ref: Mereka dikaitkan dengan sokongan politik untuk George Bush dan ahli-ahli politik konservatif lain.

src: Both rebel groups and government troops are accused of rape, with march organisers hoping to draw international attention to rape as a weapon in war.
ref: Kedua-dua kumpulan pemberontak dan tentera kerajaan dituduh merogol, dengan penganjur perarakan berharap untuk menarik perhatian antarabangsa kepada rogol sebagai senjata dalam peperangan.

src: Some rape victims left hospital to participate in the march.
ref: Sesetengah mangsa rogol meninggalkan hospital untuk mengambil bahagian dalam perarakan.

src: Peace and development were also on the agenda for women from nations including Togo, South Africa, Pakistan, and Brazil.
ref: Keamanan dan pembangunan juga dalam agenda untuk wanita dari negara-negara itu termasuk Togo, Afrika Selatan, Pakistan, dan Brazil.

src: Yesterday, economists warned that one of the impacts of Katrina on the US economy would be a reduction in the number of jobs by up to 400,000.
ref: Semalam, ahli ekonomi memberi amaran bahawa satu daripada kesan dari Katrina terhadap ekonomi U.S. adalah merupakan pengurangan dalam bilangan pekerjaan sebanyak 400,000.

src: The Executive Director of the International Energy Agency (IEA), Claude Mandil, announced a collective action by members of the 26 nation agency.
ref: Pengarah eksekutif Agensi Tenaga Kebangsaan (IEA), Claude Mandil, mengumumkan tindakan kolektif oleh ahli-ahli dari 26 agensi kebangsaan.

src: The biggest contribution of total response comes from North America (52%), then by Europe (30%), and finally the Pacific region (18%).
ref: Sumbangan terbesar daripada keseluruhan tindak balas adalah daripada Utara Amerika (52%), diikuti oleh Eropah (30%) dan akhirnya kawasan Pasifik (18%).

src: The share of these increases is based upon of the consumption from each of the IEA member areas.
ref: Perkongsian kenaikan tersebut adalah berdasarkan daripada penggunaan oleh setiap ahli kawasan IEA.

src: In one of the most shocking changes in No.
ref: Di dalam salah satu perubahan No.

src: The 19-1 rally makes it the fifth biggest gain to No.
ref: Perhimpunan 19-1 telah membuatkannnya perolehan kelima terbesar untuk No.

src: 1 in Hot 100 history.
ref: 1 di dalam sejarah Hot 100.

src: The song also gains a record 94-2 on Billboard’s Pop 100 chart kept out of the No.
ref: Lagu itu juga mendapat rekod 94-2 di carta Pop 100 Billboard dan mengeluarkan lagu No.

src: 2 with “Shake It Off”.
ref: 2 dengan "Shake It Off."

src: “Shake” was widely expected to gain to the Hot 100 pole position this week.
ref: "Shake" telah dijangka umum untuk mendapat tempat teratas di Hot 100 minggu ini.

src: Mariah Carey was No.
ref: Mariah Carey berada di No.

src: 1 all summer with “Together” dethroned only once before by American Idol winner Carrie Underwood with “Inside Your Heaven” on the July 2 chart.
ref: 1 seluruh musim panas dengan "Together" diturunkan sekali sahaja sebelum ini oleh pemenang American Idol Carrie Underwood dengan "Inside Your Heaven" pada carta 2 Julai.

src: Missy Elliott’s “Lose Control” featuring Ciara and Fat Man Scoop gained 5-3 while “Don’t Cha” dropped to No.
ref: "Lose Control" oleh Missy Elliott bersama Ciara dan Fat Man Scoop mendapat 5-3 sementara "Don't Cha" jatuh ke No.

src: Bow Wow’s “Like You” featuring Ciara gained 7-6 trading places with Rhianna’s “Pon de Replay”.
ref: "Like You" oleh Bow Wow bersama Ciara mendapat 7-6 bertukar tempat dengan "Pon de Replay" oleh Rhianna.

src: The only other song gaining into the top-10 is Fall Out Boy’s “Sugar, We’re Going Down” rising 12-8.
ref: Satu sahaja lagu yang dapat memasuki senarai 10 lagu terbaik adalah "Sugar" oleh Fall Out Boy menaiki 12-8.

src: The Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) is facing several lawsuits, including one filed by residents of San Bruno, California, after a gas line exploded in their neighborhood on September 10, completely destroying over 50 structures, 37 of them homes.
ref: Pacific Gas dan Electric Company (PG&E) sedang menghadapi beberapa tindakan mahkamah, termasuk satu yang difailkan oleh penduduk San Bruno, California, selepas paip gas meletup di kejiranan mereka pada September 10, memusnahkan keseluruhan 50 struktur, 37 daripada mereka rumah.

src: They further allege that the company was aware that the pipeline could fail, but did not act.
ref: Mereka lagi mendakwa bahawa syarikat itu sedar yang saluran paip itu boleh gagal, tetapi tidak membuat apa-apa.

src: The Danko firm who is representing the residents say they expect to file at least a dozen more lawsuits against the company alleging they were liable and responsible for the explosion and the damages that occurred as a result of it.
ref: Firma Danko yang mewakili penduduk berkata mereka mejangka untuk mengfailkan sekurang-kurangnya se-dozen lagi tindakan mahkamah terhadap syarikat kerana mendakwa mereka bertanggungjawab atas keletupan dan kerosakan yang terjadi kerananya.

src: It has also been reported that several other wrongful death lawsuits have been filed against PG&E.
ref: Ia dilaporkan yang beberapa tindakan mahkamah mati yang salah telah difailkan terhadap PG&E.

src: The explosion and subsequent fire was originally thought to have been a downed commercial aircraft.
ref: Letupan dan kebakaran itu pada mulanya difikir daripada sebuah kapal terbang komersial yang dijatuhkan.

src: Live scanner communications at the time of the explosion had stated that fire departments from six different companies reported to the scene.
ref: Komunikasi pengimbas secara langsung pada masa letupan telah menyatakan jabatan bomba dari enam syarikat berbeza melaporkan diri di tempat kejadian.

src: Residents filing the lawsuits are seeking damages and removal of the pipeline from the neighborhood.
ref: Penduduk yang mengfailkan tindakan mahkamah menuntut ganti rugi dan penyingkiran saluran paip daripada kejiranan.

src: "We want our neighborhood rebuilt, and we want our people back," he said.
ref: "Kami mahu masyarakat kami dibina semula, dan kami mahu orang kami kembali," dia berkata.

src: A PG&E spokesperson denied having officially received the lawsuits, but said: "We remain committed to our customers in San Bruno and will continue to be there to help rebuild the neighborhood."
ref: Jurucakap PG&E menafikan telah menerima tindakan mahkamah secara rasmi, tetapi berkata: "Kami kekal komited dengan pelanggan kami di San Bruno dan akan terus berada disana untuk menolong mereka membina kembali masyarakat".

src: On October 22, WikiLeaks released nearly 400,000 United States military field reports detailing events of the Iraq War between 2004 and 2009.
ref: Pada 22 Oktober, WikiLeaks telah mengeluarkan hampir 400,000 laporan medan ketenteraan Amerika Syarikat yang memperincikan peristiwa-peristiwa Perang Iraq antara tahun 2004 dan 2009.

src: The war logs describe scenes of torture and abuse asserted to have been committed by Iraqi security forces.
ref: Log peperangan itu menggambarkan adegan penyeksaan dan penderaan yang menegaskan telah dilakukan oleh pasukan keselamatan Iraq.

src: After Saturday September 3, it was agreed with state officials the Red Cross was not needed because the large-scale evacuation of the city was under way.
ref: Selepas Sabtu 3 September, ia telah dipersetujui oleh pegawai kerajaan negeri bahawa Palang Merah tidak diperlukan kerana pemindahan bandar secara besar-besaran sedang dijalankan.

src: On September 1, the Red Cross offered to Louisiana state officials to enter New Orleans, who rejected the offer due to logistical difficulties.
ref: Pada 1 September, Palang Merah menawarkan kepada pegawai kerajaan negeri Louisiana untuk memasuki New Orleans, yang mana menolak tawaran itu kerana masalah logistik.

src: Making the offer the next day to Col. Jay Mayeaux, the deputy director of the Louisiana Office of Homeland Security and Emergency Preparedness, the Red Cross was asked to wait 24 hours while preparations were made.
ref: Memberi tawaran pada hari berikutnya kepada Kolonel Jay Mayeaux, timbalan pengarah Pejabat Keselamatan Dalam Negeri dan Persediaan Kecemasan Louisiana, Palang Merah telah diminta untuk menunggu 24 jam sementara persediaan sedang dilakukan.

src: By the next day, Saturday September 3rd, the National Guard had arrived in the city, felt they had adequate supplies and did not need the Red Cross.
ref: Pada keesokan harinya, Sabtu 3 September, Pengawal Negara telah tiba di bandar raya itu, merasakan mereka mempunyai bekalan yang mencukupi dan tidak memerlukan Palang Merah.

src: At least two people have died at a Cypriot army aircraft crash in the village of Kolossi this morning, west of the island's southern coastal town of Limassol.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya dua orang telah meninggal dunia dalam satu kemalangan pesawat tentera Cypriot di perkampungan Kolossi pagi ini, di barat bandar pantai selatan pulau Limassol.

src: Director of the President's Press Office Marios Karoyan told CNA that the aircraft was a PC - 9 (Pilatus).
ref: Pengarah Pejabat Akhbar Presiden, Marios Karoyan memberitahu CNA bahawa pesawat itu adalah PC - 9 (Pilatus).

src: It is one of the two training military aircraft of the National Guard (Cyprus Army) and according to the first reports two people have died, believed to be the two pilots.
ref: Ia adalah salah satu daripada dua pesawat tentera latihan Pengawal Kebangsaan (Tentera Cyprus) dan menurut laporan pertama dua orang telah meninggal dunia, dipercayai adalah dua orang juruterbang.

src: Defence Minister Kyriakos Mavronicolas and National Guard Commander Lieutenant-General Athanasios Nikolodemos have rushed to the area.
ref: Menteri Pertahanan Kyriakos Mavronicolas dan Komander Pengawal Kebangsaan Leftenan Jeneral Athanasios Nikolodemos telah bergegas ke kawasan itu.

src: The adult literacy program Read Santa Clara marked its tenth anniversary today with a gathering of program participants, staff, and supporters from the community.
ref: Program literasi dewasa Baca Santa Clara menyambut ulang tahun kesepuluhnya hari ini dengan perhimpunan peserta program, kakitangan dan penyokong program itu dari masyarakat.

src: In the presentation, program staff and supporters reviewed the program's history and growth, honored long-time participants, and looked toward the future.
ref: Dalam pembentangan itu, kakitangan program dan penyokong mengulas sejarah program dan pertumbuhannya, penghormatan peserta lama, dan memandang ke arah masa depan.

src: Program coordinators estimate that tutors volunteered some 5000 hours last year.
ref: Penyelaras program menganggarkan bahawa pembimbing membuat kerja sukarela dalam 5000 jam pada tahun lepas.

src: Juan Velasquez said, "My life has changed a lot...I did many things I could not have done without help."
ref: Juan Velasquez berkata, "Hidup saya telah banyak berubah...saya membuat banyak perkara yang saya tidak boleh lakukan tanpa bantuan."

src: A song released yesterday in support of the BBC is making an impact on several UK music charts.
ref: Sebuah lagu dikeluarkan semalam untuk menyokong BBC sedang membuat kesan di beberapa carta muzik UK.

src: Stand-up comic Mitch Benn wrote I'm Proud of the BBC in response to the criticism the licence fee-funded corporation has received from its commercial competitors and the right-wing press.
ref: Komik berdiri Mitch Benn menulis Saya Berbangga dengan BBC sebagai tindak balas kepada kritikan yang lesen yang dibiayai perbadanan telah menerimanya dari pesaing komersial dan akhbar sayap kanan.

src: The Conservative-led coalition government announced two weeks ago that the licence fee is to be frozen for six years, and that the BBC will take over responsibility from the Foreign Office for funding the World Service.
ref: Kerajaan campuran yang diketuai oleh Konservatif mengumumkan dua minggu lalu bahawa bayaran lesen akan dibekukan selama enam tahun, dan BBC akan mengambil tanggungjawab daripada Pejabat Asing untuk pembiayaan Perkhidmatan Dunia.

src: The song, loosely inspired by Billy Joel, lists many of the BBC's achievements.
ref: Lagu itu, sedikit sebanyak diilhamkan dari Billy Joel, menyenaraikan banyak pencampaian BBC.

src: Benn, a regular on BBC Radio 4's satirical programme The Now Show, decided to release I'm Proud of the BBC as a single after realising that it was provoking emotional responses from audiences during his nationwide tour.
ref: Benn, seorang tetap di rancangan menyindir BBC Radio 4, The Now Show, mengambil keputusan untuk mengeluarkan Saya Berbangga dengan BBC sebagai lagu single setelah menyedari bahawa ia telah memprovokasi tindak balas emosi dari penonton semasa di pelancongan seluruh negara.

src: He told BBC Radio 5 Live that the song was receiving standing ovations, and people were wiping away tears.
ref: Dia memberitahu BBC Radio 5 bahawa lagu itu menerima tepukan gemuruh, dan penonton mengesat air mata mereka.

src: A video was filmed last month outside of Broadcasting House, White City and Television Centre with a cast of volunteers recruited from the social networking site Twitter.
ref: Sebuah video telah difilemkan bulan lalu diluar Broadcasting House, White City dan Television Centre bersama para sukarelawan yang direkrut daripada rangkaian sosial Twitter.

src: Yesterday's charts reveal that it has reached pole position on Amazon's rock chart, and is listed as the 14th most downloaded track overall.
ref: Semalam carta mendedahkan bahawa ia telah mencapai kedudukan teratas di carta rock Amazon, dan disenaraikan sebagai nombor 14 lagu paling banyak muat turun keseluruhannya.

src: Fans have created two Facebook groups to promote the single in an attempt to get it to a good position in the UK Singles Chart, which would force the BBC's commercial rivals to play the track.
ref: Peminat telah membuat dua kumpulan Facebook untuk mempromosikan lagu itu untuk mendapatkan ia di kedudukan yang bagus di Carta Single UK, yang akan memaksa saingan komersial BBC untuk memainkan lagu itu.

src: Benn says that he has always been a supporter of the BBC, and yesterday compared it to the emergency services.
ref: Benn berkata dia sentiasa adalah peminat BBC, dan semalam membandingkannya dengan perkhidmatan kecemasan.

src: He points out that he only receives a small percentage of his income from the corporation; last night he played with his band The Distractions at the Bloomsbury Theatre in London.
ref: Dia menunjukkan bahawa dia hanya menerima peratusan kecil dari pendapatan daripada perbadanan, semalam dia bermain bersama kumpulan The Distractions di Bloomsbury Theatre di London.

src: Insulin resistance (IR) is a condition where the body's cells are unable to respond properly to insulin-based treatments.
ref: Rintangan insulin (IR) adalah suatu keadaan di mana sel-sel badan tidak dapat bertindak balas dengan betul kepada rawatan berasaskan insulin.

src: The pancreas continues insulin production but fails to prevent increases in glucose levels; in other words, the body becomes unable to respond to the insulin properly.
ref: Pankreas terus menghasilkan insulin tetapi gagal menghalang kenaikan paras glukosa; dalam erti kata lain, badan menjadi tidak dapat bertindak balas terhadap insulin dengan betul.

src: The researchers found the liver expresses higher levels of the gene encoding "selenoprotein P" (SEPP1) in people with type 2 diabetes – those with more insulin resistance.
ref: Para penyelidik mendapati hati meghasilkan tahap lebih tinggi dalam pengekodan gen "selenoprotein P" (SEPP1) dalam kalangan orang dengan diabetes jenis 2 - mereka yang mempunyai lebih rintangan insulin.

src: This new connection between SEPP1 and adipokine is to be an area for further research.
ref: Hubungan baru antara SEPP1 dan adipokine ini adalah sebagai suatu bidang untuk penyelidikan selanjutnya.

src: The discovery may help in understanding plaques associated with Alzheimer's disease.
ref: Penemuan itu boleh membantu dalam pemahaman plak yang dikaitkan dengan penyakit Alzheimer.

src: Researchers at Kyushu University in Fukuoka, Japan concluded in an earlier study that insulin resistance and the development of plaques found in Alzheimer's sufferers were likely linked.
ref: Penyelidik di Universiti Kyushu di Fukuoka, Jepun membuat kesimpulan dalam kajian sebelum ini bahawa rintangan insulin dan penghasilan plak yang ditemui dalam penghidap Alzheimer mungkin berkaitan.

src: The World Health Organisation estimates 37 million people worldwide live with dementia and/or Alzheimer's.
ref: Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia menganggarkan 37 juta orang di seluruh dunia hidup dengan demensia dan/atau Alzheimer.

src: Space Shuttle Discovery's final launch on the STS-133 mission to the International Space Station has been delayed at least an additional day.
ref: Pelancaran akhir Kapal Angkasa Discovery di misi STS-133 ke Stesen Angkasa Antarabangsa telah ditangguhkan sekurang-kurangnya satu hari lagi.

src: Technicians are now working to repair technical glitches discovered yesterday on a main engine control computer.
ref: Juruteknik kini sedang bekerja membaiki gangguan teknikal yang ditemui kelmarin pada komputer pengawal enjin utama.

src: The mission management team (MMT) is meeting today to discuss and troubleshoot Discovery's newfound electrical problems.
ref: Kumpulan pengurusan misi (MMT) akan bermesyuarat hari ini untuk membincangkan dan menyelesaikan masalah elektrik Discovery yang baru ditemui.

src: STS-133 is scheduled to be an 11-day mission to the International Space Station to ship supplies to the crew, as well as additional components for the orbital outpost's construction, including the Permanent Multipurpose Module and the third of four ExPRESS Logistics Carriers.
ref: STS-133 dijadualkan untuk misi 11 hari ke Stesen Angkasa Antarabangsa untuk menghantar bekalan kepada krew, dan juga tambahan komponen untuk pembinaan pangkalan orbit, termasuk Modul Pelbagai Guna Tetap dan Pengangkutan Logistik ExPRESS ketiga dari empat.

src: Lexmark International introduced the Lexmark P450 in the USA yesterday, the first printer to have a built-in CD burner.
ref: Lexmark Antarabangsa memperkenalkan Lexmark P450 di USA semalam, mesin pencetak pertama yang mempunyai penyalin CD di dalamnya.

src: The P450 is a small, portable printer that can print 4in by 6in photos.
ref: P450 tersebut adalah mesin pencetak yang kecil, mudah alih yang boleh mencetak gambar 4in kali 6in.

src: Photos can be printed from USB flash drives, memory cards, Bluetooth devices and PictBridge compatible digital cameras.
ref: Gambar boleh dicetak dari pemacu USB flash, kad memori, peranti Bluetooth dan kamera digital yang serasi PictBridge.

src: The printer includes a 2.4-inch color LCD from which users can perform basic editing tasks such as cropping, rotating, and removing red-eye.
ref: Mesin pencetak tersebut termasuk 2.4-inci LCD berwarna dimana pengguna boleh melakukan tugas penyuntingan asas seperti memotong, memutar, dan mengeluarkan mata merah.

src: "The Lexmark P450 brings more photo processing functions to the home."
ref: "Lexmark P450 membawa lebih banyak fungsi memproses gambar di rumah."

src: "People can now save and organize their digital photos on CD, print from a cell phone, view their photos on a television and much more."
ref: "Orang ramai kini boleh menyimpan dan mengemaskini gambar-gambar digital mereka pada CD, mencetak dari telefon bimbit, melihat gambar-gambar mereka di televisyen dan banyak lagi."

src: This printer will compete with many other portable printers such as the popular and slightly cheaper HP Photosmart 375.
ref: Pencetak ini akan bersaing dengan banyak pencetak mudah alih yang lain seperti yang popular dan sedikit lebih murah iaitu HP Photosmart 375.

src: The Lexmark P450 is scheduled to be released in the USA in October, with an estimated retail price of $199USD, and Canada in November, with an estimated retail price of $299CAD.
ref: Lexmark P450 dijadualkan akan dikeluarkan di Amerika Syarikat pada bulan Oktober, dengan harga runcit anggaran $199USD, dan Kanada pada bulan November, dengan harga runcit anggaran $299CAD.

src: Joe Gibbs Racing driver Denny Hamlin, who qualified thirtieth, won the NASCAR Sprint Cup Series 2010 AAA Texas 500 held on Sunday at Texas Motor Speedway in Fort Worth, Texas, United States.
ref: Pemandu kereta lumba Joe Gibbs Denny Hamlin, yang layak di tempat ketiga puluh, memenangi Siri Piala Sprint 2010 AAA Texas 500 NASCAR yang diadakan pada hari Ahad di Litar Lumba Motorsikal Texas di Fort Worth, Texas, Amerika Syarikat.

src: Throughout the course of the race there were nine cautions and thirty-five lead changes among fourteen different drivers.
ref: Sepanjang perjalanan perlumbaan itu terdapat sembilan amaran dan tiga puluh lima perubahan utama di kalangan empat belas pemandu berbeza.

src: On the final restart, Matt Kenseth caught Hamlin and passed him.
ref: Pada babak kedua perlawanan akhir, Matt Kenseth memotong kereta Hamlin dan melepasinya.

src: Later the same lap, Hamlin reclaimed the position, after Kenseth collided into the wall, prompting him to finish second during the race.
ref: Kemudian dalam pusingan yang sama, Hamlin menuntut semula kedudukan itu, selepas Kenseth merempuh dinding, menyebabkannya menduduki tempat kedua dalam perlumbaan itu.

src: Joey Logano managed the fourth position in the closing laps of the race, after starting twentieth on the grid.
ref: Joey Logano berjaya menduduki kedudukan keempat dalam pusingan terakhir perlumbaan itu, selepas bermula pada kedudukan kedua puluh atas grid.

src: Greg Biffle, from the Roush Fenway Racing team, clinched the fifth position, after leading 223 laps during the race.
ref: Greg Biffle, daripada pasukan Lumba Roush Fenway, meraih kedudukan kelima, selepas mendahului sebanyak 223 pusingan dalam perlumbaan itu.

src: Kevin Harvick followed Biffle in sixth, while Clint Bowyer could only manage seventh.
ref: Kevin Harvick mengikuti Biffle pada tempat keenam, manakala Clint Bowyer hanya mampu menduduki tempat ketujuh.

src: The Manufacturers' сhampionship standings is led by Chevrolet with 249, 40 points ahead of Toyota and 91 ahead of Ford with two races remaining in the season.
ref: Kedudukan kejuaraan Pengeluar diketuai oleh Chevrolet dengan 249, 40 mata lebih banyak daripada Toyota dan 91 mata lebih banyak daripada Ford dengan baki dua perlumbaan pada musim itu.

src: Looking forward to next week, Hamlin said, "I'm going to race Phoenix as if I'm 33 behind, to be honest with you.
ref: Menanti minggu depan dengan penuh harapan, Hamlin berkata, "Saya akan berlumba dengsn Phoenix jika saya 33 di belakang, untuk menjadi jujur ​​dengan anda.

src: There's no comfortable margin going into Homestead, because anything can happen.
ref: Tidak ada margin selesa dalam mara ke Homestead, kerana apa-apa sahaja boleh berlaku.

src: So for me — Phoenix being an up-and-down race track for me — I've got to really be focused on practice day to get what I need, to give [crew chief] Mike [Ford] the information that I need — just 100 percent stay focused is all I can do.
ref: Jadi bagi saya - Phoenix adalah landasan perlumbaan yang berubah-ubah bagi saya - saya harus benar-benar fokus pada hari latihan untuk mendapatkan apa yang saya perlukan, untuk memberikan [ketua kru] Mike [Ford] maklumat yang saya perlukan - hanya 100 peratus menumpukan perhatian adalah apa yang boleh saya lakukan.

src: But like I say, I'm not going to be conservative having the lead.
ref: Tetapi seperti yang saya katakan, saya tidak akan berfikiran konservatif jika saya mempunyai pilihan.

src: The event, deemed 'unique' in the local press, raises money for local musical projects on the islands.
ref: Acara itu, yang dianggap 'unik'dalam akhbar tempatan, mengumpul wang untuk projek-projek muzik tempatan di pulau-pulau.

src: Power outages were reported with sustained winds of 80 mph and rain, up to 6 inches, in the southeast portion of the state.
