ref: Gangguan bekalan tenaga dilaporkan dengan kelajuan angin kekal pada 80 mph dan hujan, sehingga 6 inches, di bahagian tenggara negeri itu.

src: Residents and tourists had been ordered on Sunday to evacuate Ocracoke by governor Michael F. Easley.
ref: Penduduk dan pelancong telah diarahkan supaya berpindah dari Ocracoke pada Ahad oleh gabenor Michael F. Easley.

src: Tourists on Hatteras Island were also ordered to leave, but earlier on Monday, emergency officials for Dare County decided against an ordered evacuation for the northern portion of the Outer Banks.
ref: Pelancong di Pulau Hatteras juga telah diarahkan utuk meninggalkan pulau itu, tetapi pada awal hari Isnin, pegawai kecemasan bagi Dare County menetapkan satu perintah pemindahan bagi kawasan sebelah utara Outer Banks.

src: Weaker tropical and hurricane storms such as Ophelia have in the past still caused major damage from flooding in North Carolina's barrier islands from winds stirring up the shallow sound waters between the mainlaind and Outer Banks.
ref: Tropikal dan ribut taufan lemah seperti Ophelia yang melanda sebelum ini mengakibatkan kerosakan teruk dari banjir di pulau sempadan Utara California dari angin yang membuat kacau air yang sepertinya cetek antara tanah besar dan Outer Banks.

src: Nearly two dozen F-15 fighter jets were moved from Hampton's Langley Air Force base out of Ophelia's way to Florida.
ref: Hampir dua dozen jet pejuang F-15 telah dipindahkan dari pengakalan Tentera Udara Langley Hampton memandangkan Ophelia yang dalam perjalanan ke Florida.

src: The body’s immune system is less effective at quashing disease than it could be - but if it were better the immune system might do more harm than good, according to new research by Michael Deem and colleagues of Rice University in Houston.
ref: Sistem imunisasi badan kurang berkesan untuk membatalkan penyakit daripada boleh - tetapi jika ia adalah lebih baik dari sistem imunisasi mungkin melakukan lebih berbahaya daripada baik, menurut penyelidikan baru oleh Michael Deem dan rakan-rakan dari Universiti Rice di Houston.

src: The immune system has apparently evolved to be mildly inefficient so that it achieves a balance between quick response to disease and decreased probability of autoimmune disease, a condition in which the immune system attacks healthy tissue.
ref: Sistem imunisasi nampaknya telah berkembang untuk menjadi sedikit tidak cekap supaya ia mencapai keseimbangan antara maklum balas yang cepat kepada penyakit dan kebarangkalian penyakit autoimun, suatu keadaan di mana serangan sistem imunisasi tisu yang sihat berkurangan.

src: The authors drew their conclusions from a model of the dynamics of antibody evolution.
ref: Para penulis menarik kesimpulan mereka daripada model dinamik evolusi antibodi.

src: An 18-year-old UK student suspected of throwing a fire extinguisher from the roof of the headquarters of the Conservative Party ('Tories'), 30 Millbank, London, was arrested on Monday.
ref: Seorang pelajar UK berusia 18 tahun yang disyaki membuang alat pemadam api dari bumbung ibu pejabat Parti Konservatif ('Tories'), 30 Millbank, London, telah ditangkap pada hari Isnin.

src: He was today released on bail after a court appearance.
ref: Dia dibebaskan hari ini dengan jaminan selepas perbicaraan di mahkamah.

src: Over sixty arrests have been made in conjunction with the protest.
ref: Lebih daripada enam puluh tangkapan dibuat berikutan protes tersebut.

src: The sixth-form student, who was wanted on suspicion of attempted murder earlier this week, handed himself in at his local police station and was taken to Belgravia police station for questioning.
ref: Pelajar tingkatan enam, yang dikehendaki kerana disyaki cuba membunuh awal minggu ini, menyerahkan diri di balai polis tempatan dan telah dibawa ke balai polis Belgravia untuk disoal siasat.

src: Today, he appeared at Westminster Magistrates' Court charged with violent disorder, speaking only to confirm his name age and address.
ref: Hari ini, dia menghadiri Mahkamah Majistret Westminster di atas dakwaan masalah keganasan, bersuara hanya untuk mengesahkan umur namanya dan alamat.

src: Until then, Woollard has been granted bail, on condition that he remains at his current address, and does not enter the City of Westminster.
ref: Sehingga itu, Woollard telah diikat jaminan, dengan syarat dia kekal di alamat sekarang, dan tidak memasuki Bandar Westminster.

src: Sparking controversy and eliciting widespread condemnation in an interview with the Washington Post, Pakistan's President, Pervez Musharraf, has made some poorly-judged comments about rape and rape victims.
ref: Di dalam sebuah temubual dengan Washington Post yang menyebabkan kontroversi dan pengutukan berleluasa, Presiden Pakistan, Pervez Musharraf, telah membuat ulasan yang tidak dinilai dengan baik tentang rogol dan mangsa-mangsa rogol.

src: Musharaff was quoted as having said, "Rape has become a money-making concern" and he suggested that getting raped was a method of getting a visa to western countries.
ref: Musharaff dipetik sebagai berkata, "Rogol telah menjadi perkara membimbangkan yang menghasilkan wang" dan dia mencadangkan bahawa dengan dirogol adalah cara untuk mendapatkan visa ke negara-negara barat.

src: In New York, speaking at the Clinton Global Initiative, British Prime Minister Tony Blair spoke with "brutal honesty" about the UNFCCC's Kyoto protocol and global warming.
ref: Di New York, berucap di Initiatif Global Clinton, Perdana Menteri British Tony Blair bercakap dengan "kejujuran pedas" mengenai Protokol Kyoto UNFCC dan pemanasan global.

src: Blair, a longtime supporter of the Kyoto treaty, recognized that countries will not accept the limits imposed on Kyoto: "No country is going to cut its growth."
ref: Blair, penyokong jangka panjang perjanjian Kyoto tersebut, mengiktiraf negara itu tidak akan menerima had yang dikenakan keatas Kyoto: "Tiada negara yang akan memotong pertumbuhannya".

src: Of India and China, "They're not going to start negotiating another treaty like Kyoto."
ref: Mengenai India dan China, "Mereka tidak akan mula berunding satu lagi perjanjian seperti Kyoto".

src: India and China are classified as developing countries in the Kyoto protocol, so they can get money and technology but are not restricted by its limits.
ref: India dan China adalah diklasifikasikan sebagai negara membangun dalam Protokol Kyoto, jadi mereka boleh mendapatkan wang dan teknologi tetapi tidak terhad oleh hadnya.

src: Turnout was strong, turnout results are predicted to be to be higher than the 2002 turnout (77%) Under New Zealand's MMP system, parties must win either a electorate seat or 5% of the party vote to win a seat in the 120-seat, parliament.
ref: Jumlah kehadiran pengundi adalah memberangsangkan, keputusan kehadiran pengundi diramal akan menjadi lebih tinggi daripada jumlah kehadiran pengundi pada 2002 (77%) Di bawah sistem MMP New Zealand, parti-parti mesti memenangi kerusi pengundi atau 5% daripada undi parti itu untuk memenangi sebuah kerusi daripada 120 kerusi, parlimen.

src: Preliminary election results will be on Wikinews as they come through it is expected that all votes will be counted by 11:30 UTC (23:30 NZST) The official results are expected to be available by Saturday, 1 October 2005, on the Chief Electoral Office 2005 General Election Results website
ref: Keputusan pilihan raya awal akan diumumkan melalui Wikinews dijangka semua undi akan dikira pada jam 11:30 UTC (23:30 NZST) Keputusan rasmi dijangka dapat diperolehi pada Sabtu, 1 Oktober 2005, di laman web Pejabat Ketua Pilihan Raya 2005 Keputusan Pilihan Raya Umum

src: A jawbone found in Aruba is not that of missing American Natalee Holloway, who was a recent high school-graduate at the time of her disappearance.
ref: Tulang rahang yang dijumpai di Aruba bukan milik orang Amerika Natalee Holloway yang hilang, seorang graduan sekolah tinggi baru-baru ini pada masa kehilangannya.

src: Officials confirmed the news after Dutch scientists completed tests on the bone.
ref: Pegawai mengesahkan berita itu selepas saintis-saintis Belanda selesai melakukan ujian ke atas tulang tersebut.

src: The jawbone, which also had a wisdom tooth with it, was found by an American tourist close to the Phoenix Hotel.
ref: Tulang rahang tersebut, yang juga dijumpai bersama gigi bongsu, ditemui oleh pelancong Amerika dekat dengan Hotel Phoenix.

src: A second bone had also been found by another tourist earlier this month.
ref: Tulang kedua juga telah ditemui oleh pelancong lain awal bulan ini.

src: Taco Stein, the Aruban Solicitor General, released a statement after the announcement was made.
ref: Taco Stein, Peguam Cara Awam Aruba, mengeluarkan satu kenyataan selepas pengumuman itu dibuat.

src: He commented on the speed of the identification; he said that they had quickly ruled out Holloway because her records had shown that she had her wisdom teeth previously removed.
ref: Beliau mengulas mengenai kepantasan pengenalan itu; beliau berkata bahawa mereka telah mengecualikan Holloway kerana rekodnya telah menunjukkan bahawa gigi bongsunya telah dicabut sebelum ini.

src: The 80-year-old billionaire was treated in hospital for head injuries he sustained in the attack, in which the four muggers stole £200,000 of jewellery from him and his 31-year-old girlfriend.
ref: Jutawan berusia 80 tahun itu dirawat di hospital bagi kecederaan kepala yang dialaminya dalam serangan itu, di mana empat penyangak telah mencuri barang kemas yang bernilai £200,000 daripadanya dan teman wanitanya yang berusia 31 tahun.

src: The attack occurred as Ecclestone visited his company's office with girlfriend Fabiana Flosi—who was reportedly "shaken" but uninjured—in central London.
ref: Serangan itu berlaku semasa Ecclestone melawat pejabat syarikatnya dengan teman wanitanya Fabiana Flosi - yang dilaporkan "terkejut" tetapi tidak mengalami sebarang kecederaan - di pusat bandar London.

src: Four years ago, Ecclestone was mugged as he parked his car outside his £10 million home in Chelsea Square; two wheels were taken from the car.
ref: Empat tahun lalu, Ecclestone telah dirompak semasa dia meletakkan keretanya di luar rumahnya yang bernilai £10 juta di Chelsea Square; dua roda telah diambil dari kereta.

src: Australian airline Qantas has returned the first of its fleet of Airbus A380s to service, after all six of the "superjumbo" aircraft were grounded three weeks ago following one aircraft's engine sustaining extensive midair damage; it landed safely in Singapore without injury.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan Australia, Qantas sudah mengembalikan Airbus A380s, airbus pertama dalam kumpulan kapal terbang untuk diservis, selepas kesemua enam kapal terbang "superjumbo" telah dihalang daripada penerbangan tiga minggu yang lalu akibat engin salah satu kapal terbang mengalami kerosakan teruk di udara; kapal terbang itu mendarat di Singapura dengan selamat tanpa kecederaan.

src: The airline stated that all of the aircraft have undergone extensive safety inspections and they are satisfied they are safe.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan tersebut menyatakan bahawa semua pesawat udara sudah menjalani pemeriksaan keselamatan yang terperinci dan pihak syarikat amat berpuas hati atas hasil pemeriksaan.

src: Qantas has replaced at least 14 engines, and modifications have been made to Trent 900s used by two other companies, Lufthansa and Singapore Airlines.
ref: Qantas sudah menggantikan sekurang-kurangnya 14 engin dan pengubahsuaian telah dijalankan terhadap Trent 900 yang digunakan oleh dua syarikat lain iaitu, Syarikat Penerbangan Lufthansa dan Syarikat Penerbangan Singapura.

src: Experts said that the incident was embarrassing for Airbus; the airline's shares have dropped by 7% since.
ref: Pakar-pakar menyatakan bahawa peristiwa itu amat memalukan untuk Airbus; saham syarikat penerbangan itu telah menurun sebanyak 7% sejak itu.

src: Aviation journalist Tom Ballantyne said that the failure earlier this month was "certainly the most serious incident that the A380 has experienced since it entered operations."
ref: Wartawan penerbangan, Tom Ballantyne berkata bahawa kegagalan pada awal bulan ini "sudah tentu kejadian paling serius yang A380 alami sejak kapal terbang itu mula beroperasi."

src: The A380 made its first commercial flight in 2007, and is now in service with several other airlines, including Air France.
ref: A380 menjalankan penerbangan komersial pertamanya pada tahun 2007, dan kapal terbang ini sekarang bekerja dengan beberapa syarikat penerbangan lain termasuk Air France.

src: The London bomb suspect, Hussain Osman, also known as Hamdi Issac, has arrived in London and been arrested following his extradition from Italy.
ref: Suspek bom di London, Hussain Osman, juga dikenali sebagai Hamdi Isaac, telah tiba di London dan telah ditahan berikutan ekstradisid dia dari Itali.

src: Allegedly involved in the second set of attacks on London in July, which targeted the city's public transport infrastructure, Osman was arrested in Rome by Italian police on July 29, just one week after the failed attacks.
ref: Didakwa terlibat dalam set serangan kedua ke atas London pada bulan Julai, yang menyasarkan infrastruktur pengangkutan awam di bandar ini, Osman telah ditangkap di Rome oleh polis Itali pada 29 Julai, hanya seminggu selepas serangan yang gagal.

src: On September 13, a final appeal against extradition was rejected by an Italian court despite his lawyer's protests that he could not get a fair trial in the UK.
ref: Pada 13 September, rayuan terakhir menentang ekstradisi ditolak oleh mahkamah Itali walaupun peguamnya menbantah bahawa dia tidak akan dapat perbicaraan yang adil di UK.

src: Pending his extradition, he was held at Rebibbia jail, Rome, a high-security facility on the outskirts of the city.
ref: Sementara menunggu ekstradisinya, beliau telah ditahan di penjara Rebibbia, Rom, fasiliti keselamatan yang tinggi di pinggir bandar.

src: He left the jail late on Thursday and the Ethiopian-born terror suspect flew out of Italy at 12pm local time, accompanied by officers from the Metropolitan police.
ref: Dia meninggalkan penjara lewat pada hari Khamis dan suspek keganasan kelahiran Ethiopia itu terbang keluar dari Itali pada jam 12:00 waktu tempatan, diiringi pegawai polis Metropolitan.

src: Flying on a chartered private jet, Osman and his escort landed at RAF Northolt, where Osman was charged on arrival.
ref: Berterbangan dengan jet peribadi yang disewa, Osman dan pengiring beliau mendarat di RAF Northolt, di mana Osman didakwa pada ketibaan.

src: He is expected to be put on trial at the Old Bailey in London, alongside the other suspects involved in the failed attacks.
ref: Beliau dijangka dibicarakan di Old Bailey di London, bersama suspek lain yang terlibat dalam serangan yang gagal itu.

src: The game opened its first period with 4 goals for the Whalers, with right wing player Dan Collins scoring two.
ref: Permainan membuka babak pertama dengan 4 gol untuk Whalers, dengan pemain sayap kanan Dan Collins memasukkan dua.

src: Teammates James Neal and John Vigilante picked up the remainder.
ref: Teman sepasukan James Neal dan John Vigilante memungut bakinya.

src: The second period started with an early goal by Michal Birner for the Spirit.
ref: Babak kedua bermula dengan gol awal daripada Michal Birner untuk pasukan Spirit.

src: He did not return to play for the remainder of the game.
ref: Dia tidak kembali untuk bermain untuk baki permainan.

src: Although the sole occupant of the Peugeot was fatally injured, the occupant of the lorry was uninjured.
ref: Walaupun penumpang tunggal kereta Peugeot itu cedera parah, penumpang lori tersebut tidak mengalami cedera.

src: A spokesperson stated: "Officers would like to speak to anyone who witnessed the collision or the vehicles prior to the collision."
ref: Seorang jurucakap berkata: "Pegawai polis ingin mengambil keterangan seseiapa sahaja yang menyaksikan pelanggaran atau keadaan sebelum perlanggaran."

src: An investigation has begun to try to establish whether the icy and snowy weather conditions were a factor in this collision.
ref: Pasukan penyiasat telah memulakan pencarian untuk menentukan sama ada keadaaan berais dan cuaca bersalji yang menjadi faktor kepada perlanggaran ini.

src: A huge fire at a Chilean prison in San Miguel has killed at least 81 inmates, and injured another 14, including a firefighter and three gendarmerie officers, the Chilean Health Minister Jaime Mañalich reported.
ref: Satu kebakaran besar di penjara Chile di San Miguel telah membunuh sekurang-kurangnya 81 banduan, dan mencederakan 14 yang lain, termasuk seorang ahli bomba dan tiga pegawai gendarmerie, menurut laporan Menteri Kesihatan Chile Jaime Mañalich.

src: The fire is considered the worst accident in the country's jail history.
ref: Kebakaran ini dianggap kemalangan yang paling teruk dalam sejarah penjara di negara ini.

src: Fifteen corpses have been identified, Interior Minister Rodrigo Hinzpeter reported.
ref: Lima belas mayat telah dikenal pasti, menurut laporan Menteri Dalam Negeri, Rodrigo Hinzpeter.

src: Overall 55.95% (1 457 355) voted yes and 44.05% (1 147 236) voted no.
ref: Keseluruhan keputusan undi adalah 55.95%(1 457 355) mengundi Ya dan 44.05% (1 147 236) mengundi Tidak.

src: Smaller formations, both from the extreme Right and extreme Left, attempted to smear fear of massive immigration and unemployement.
ref: Kumpulan yang lebih kecil, keduanya dari kumpulan ekstrem Kanan dan ekstrem Kiri telah mencuba untuk memalitkan ketakutan akan immigrasi secara besar-besaran dan pengangguran.

src: According to the first exit polls published by TNS OBOP and PBS for TVP1 Polish public television station, the Law and Justice (PiS) party has won today's parliamentary election in Poland with a 27,6% result.
ref: Menurut keputusan pilihan raya pertama yang diterbitkan oleh TNS OBOP dan PBS untuk stesen televisyen awam Polish, TVP1, Parti Undang-Undang dan Keadilan (PIS) telah memenangi pilihan raya parlimen hari ini di Poland dengan keputusan 27.6%.

src: Runners up were Citizens Platform (PO) with 24,1% and Alliance of the Democratic Left (SLD) with 11,3%.
ref: Naib juara adalah Citizens Platform (PO) dengan 24.1% dan Alliance of the Democratic Left (SLD) dengan 11.3%.

src: PO and PiS, both of which will form the future government, will have 304 places in the new Sejm, which is 3 less than is required for making changes to the Polish constitution, which both parties support.
ref: PO dan PiS, salah satu daripadanya akan membentuk kerajaan pada masa depan, akan mempunyai 304 tempat di Sejm baru, iaitu kurang 3 tempat daripada yang diperlukan untuk membuat perubahan kepada perlembagaan Poland, yang disokong olehkedua-dua pihak.

src: Reports state that at least four suspects are in custody with one suspect still at large.
ref: Laporan menyatakan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya empat suspek ditahan dengan seorang suspek lagi masih bebas.

src: Terry was killed at around 11:00 p.m. local time (PST) Tuesday night near Rio Rico.
ref: Terry dibunuh sekitar jam 11:00 p.m. waktu tempatan (PST) malam selasa berhampiran Rio Rico.

src: Border Patrol spokesman Eric Cantu told the Associated Press that the FBI is probing the agent's death and had few details at the time.
ref: Jurucakap Peronda Sempadan Eric Cantu memberitahu Akhbar Persekutuan bahawa FBI sedang meniasat kematian agen dan mendapatkan beberapa maklumat masa itu.

src: Commissioner of U.S. Customs and Protection also released a statement saying, "Our thoughts and prayers are with the Terry family for their tragic loss."
ref: Pesuruhjaya Pertahanan dan Kastam U.S. telah mengeluarkan kenyataan berkata, "Tanggapan dan doa kita bersama dengan keluarga Terry kerana kehilangan tragik".

src: "Our commitment to Agent Terry and his family is that we will do everything possible to bring to justice those responsible for this despicable act."
ref: "Komitmen kita kepada Agen Terry dan keluarga bahwa kita akan cuba sedaya upaya untuk membawa yang terlibat dalam perbuatan jenayah ini kemuka pengadilan".

src: U.S. flags across Arizona will be flown at half-staff in honor of Terry.
ref: Bendera U.S. yang merentasi Arizona akan dikibarkan separuh tiang sempena mengingati Terry.

src: Nearly 200 rounds of artillery were fired at the island.
ref: Hampir 200 butir meriam dilepaskan ke arah pulau itu.

src: Four people were killed and another 14 were injured in the attack.
ref: Empat orang terbunuh dan 14 yang lain tercedera dalam serangan itu.

src: South Korea had been taking part in annual military exercises with the U.S., off the island's west coast when the attack occurred.
ref: Korea Selatan telah mengambil bahagian dalam latihan ketenteraan tahunan dengan Amerika Syarikat, di luar pantai barat pulau itu apabila serangan itu berlaku.

src: They returned fire, firing nearly 80 rounds of artillery, but no damage was reported on the North Korean side.
ref: Mereka berbalas tembakan, menembak hampir 80 pusingan meriam, tetapi tiada kerosakan dilaporkan bagi pihak Korea Utara.

src: "Second and third self-defensive blows that cannot be predicted will be dealt."
ref: "Tembakan pertahanan diri kedua dan ketiga yang tidak boleh diramal akan dikenakan tindakan".

src: "The intensity and range of the firepower will create a situation more serious than one on Nov. 23," said a statement released by the North Korean government via the Korean Central News Agency (KCNA), the country's main news agency.
ref: "Kekuatan dan julat senjata api itu akan mewujudkan keadaan yang lebih serius daripada yang berlaku pada Nov 23," kata kenyataan yang dikeluarkan oleh kerajaan Korea Utara melalui Pusat Agensi Berita Korea (KCNA), agensi berita utama di negara itu.

src: It accused the two nations of creating "hysteria of war of aggression against the DPRK, escalating the military tension and confrontation."
ref: Ia menuduh kedua-dua negara itu kerana mewujudkan "histeria pencerobohan perang terhadap DPRK, peningkatan ketegangan ketenteraan dan konfrontasi".

src: The country considers any exercises that take place on Yeonpyeong Island, to be a violation of their territory.
ref: Negara itu menganggap mana-mana latihan yang berlaku di Pulau Yeonpyeong, adalah pencabulan kewibawaan wilayah mereka.

src: "There’s nothing provocative or unusual or threatening about these exercises."
ref: "Tiada apa-apa unsur provokasi atau luar biasa atau mengancam tentang latihan ini".

src: "The North Koreans have been notified about what South Korea plans to do," said Philip J. Crowley, a spokesman for the State Department.
ref: "Pihak Korea Utara telah dimaklumkan tentang apa yang Korea Selatan rancang," kata Philip J. Crowley, jurucakap Jabatan Negara.

src: He achieved a second goal for his team 43 minutes after the game commenced.
ref: Beliau mendapatkan gol kedua untuk pasukannya 43 minit selepas perlawanan bermula.

src: Referee Craig Thomson decided this rulebreaking occurred immediately outside of the penalty area.
ref: Pengadil Craig Thomson mengambil keputusan pelanggaran undang-undang ini berlaku sejurus di luar kawasan penalti.

src: "The attitude and the sort of tempo of how we're going about it in the second half is just sort of the place in the right direction where I feel we've gotta go."
ref: "Tindakan dan corak bagaimana kami akan menuju ke separuh masa ke dua merupakan suatu yang dirasakan perlu pada arah yang betul di mana saya rasa kami perlu pergi."

src: In a separate BBC Sport interview, Kilmarnock manager Mixu Paatelainen commented: "I thought for the first half we were excellent."
ref: Dalam temuramah berasingan Sukan BBC, komen pengurus Kilmarnock, Mixu Paatelainen: "Saya rasa kami hebat dalam separuh masa pertama."

src: "The second half was a little bit stickier for us, owing to Hibs."
ref: "Separuh masa kedua adalah sedikit sengit untuk kami, disebabkan Hibs."

src: "They put us under pressure but, you know, thankfully our defence did their job and we only conceded one goal which was a fantastic strike from Riordan."
ref: "Mereka meletakkan kami dalam tekanan tetapi, kamu tahu, terima kasih kepada pertahanan kami yang melakukan kerja dengan baik dan kami hanya bolos satu gol yang mana merupakan serangan hebat dari Riordan."

src: The explosion had an estimated blast radius of three miles.
ref: Letupan itu dijangkakan meletus pada jejari 3 batu.

src: Describing exploding gas tanks that flew through the air, Carlos Hipolito, who fled the scene with approximately 60 relatives, described the incident to Milenio Television as a "catastrophe".
ref: Dengan menjelaskan letupan tanki gas yang berterbangan di ruang udara, Carlos Hipolito, yang menyelamatkan diri dari tempat kejadian itu bersama kira-kira 60 saudara-mara, menyifatkan kejadian itu kepada Televisyen Milenio sebagai sebuah "malapetaka".

src: Living ten blocks from where the explosion occurred, 58-year-old Jose Luis Chavez explained that he had heard a minimum of two loud explosions and witnessed flames rising over 10 meters (30 feet) into the air.
ref: Tinggal sepuluh blok daripada tempat berlakunya letupan, Jose Luis Chaves yang berusia 58 tahun memberitahu dia mendengar sekurang-kurangnya dua letupan kuat dan menyaksikan api marak setinggi 10 meter (30 kaki) ke udara.

src: Valentin Meneses, Puebla state interior secretary, stated: "They lost control because of the high pressure with which the fuel exits the pipeline."
ref: Valentin Meneses, setiausaha dalaman negeri Puebla, menyatakan: "Mereka hilang kawalan disebabkan tekanan tinggi yang disertakan dengan bahan api keluar dari saluran paip".

src: Pemex has explained that the theft of oil from the pipelines causes them to lose hundreds of millions of dollars every year.
ref: Pemex menjelaskan bahawa kecurian minyak melalui saluran paip menyebabkan mereka kerugian ratusan juta setiap tahun.

src: Juan José Suárez Coppel, the head of the company, stated that the pipeline section near to the location of the blast was tapped illegally on 60 occasions.
ref: Juan Jose Suarez Coppel, presiden syarikat tersebut, menyatakan bahawa bahagian saluran paip berdekatan kawasan letupan telah ditoreh secara haram 60 kali.

src: He also reported that across Mexico, 550 cases of illegal tapping had occurred.
ref: Dia juga melaporkan bahawa diseluruh Mexico, 550 kes penorehan haram telah berlaku.

src: Expressing his condolences to the families of those that had died because of this incident, Mexican president Felipe Calderon stated that the federal government is to launch an investigation to try to establish the identities of the offenders and apprehend them.
ref: Dengan menyatakan takziahnya kepada keluarga yang terkorban dalam kejadian ini, presiden Mexico Felipe Calderon menyatakan bahawa kerajaan persekutuan akan melancarkan siasatan untuk membuktikan identiti pesalah berkenaan dan menahan mereka.

src: China has said it is prepared to support eurozone countries during the financial crisis that has hit the sixteen member states.
ref: China mengatakan bahawa ia telah bersedia untuk membantu negara-negara kesatuan eropah ketika masalah kewangan yang mana telah melanda enam belas wilayah ahli.

src: The country's foreign ministry spokesperson Jiang Yu said: "We are ready to support the eurozone to overcome the financial crisis and realise economic recovery."
ref: Jurucakap menteri luar negara berkenaan Jiang Yu berkata: "Kami sedia membantu kesatuan eropah untuk menangani masalah kewangan dan penyedaran pemulihan ekonomi".

src: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) and European Union (EU) have signed deals to hand a €110bn aid package to Greece, and an €85bn rescue package to Ireland.
ref: Tabung Kewangan Antarabangsa (IMF) dan Kesatuan Eropah (EU) telah menandatangani penyerahan €110bn pakej bantuan kepada Greece, dan €85bn pakej bantuan kepada Ireland.

src: Jiang said China had an interest in supporting the region, saying eurozone member states would, in the future, become "a major market" for Chinese foreign exchange investments.
ref: Jiang berkata China berminat dalam membantu wilayah, katakan ahli kesatuan eropah setuju, di masa hadapan, menjadi "pasaran besar" bagi tukaran pelaburan besar China.

src: Analysts have suggested China plans to purchase more euros in the future.
ref: Juruanalisis mencadangkan plan untuk China membeli lebih banyak euro di masa akan datang.

src: Other reports suggest China is preparing to buy between four and five billion euros to help Portugal fend off pressure in bond markets.
ref: Laporan lain menunjukkan China sedang bersedia untuk membeli empat dan lima bilion euro untuk membantu Portugal menangkis tekanan bon pasaran.

src: The Sea Wolf sent a distress signal via emergency satellite beacon at about 1:35 AM on Thursday, seven miles off Cape May.
ref: Sea Wolf menghantar isyarat kecemasan melalui api isyarat kecemasan satelit pada kira-kira 1:35 pagi pada hari Khamis, tujuh batu dari Cape May.

src: A member of the State Police informed the Coast Guard who sent out an MH-65 rescue helicopter and two rescue launches.
ref: Seseorang anggota Polis Negeri memaklumkan Pengawal Pantai yang menghantar satu MH- 65 helikopter penyelamat dan melancarkan dua usaha penyelamatan.

src: The helicopter managed to save Steve Hopkins of the District of Columbia but was unable to do the same for Gregory Arlotta of Florida.
ref: Helikopter itu berjaya menyelamatkan Steve Hopkins dari Daerah Columbia tetapi tidak mampu melakukan perkara yang sama untuk Gregory Arlotta dari Florida.

src: Arlotta had recently bought the vessel in New York; its previous owner was in his seventies and had decided to sell the ship.
ref: Arlotta membeli kapal itu di New York baru-baru ini; pemilik sebelumnya dalam lingkungan umur tujuh puluhan dan telah membuat keputusan untuk menjual kapal itu.

src: The United States' first major blizzard of the winter season has left much of the New England region covered in snow.
ref: Ribut besar pertama yang melanda Amerika Syarikat pada musim sejuk telah menyebabkan banyak kawasan di New England diselaputi salji.

src: Stretching from Virginia to Maine, the storm, packing winds of over 50 miles per hour (80.5 kilometres per hour), dropped more than two feet of snow in some areas.
ref: Keadaan tegang dari Virginia ke Maine, ribut, membawa angin berkelajuan lebih daripada 50 batu sejam (80.5 kilometer sejam), menyebabkan salji lebih dari dua kaki di beberapa kawasan.

src: Residents prepared for what would be one of the worst nor'easters in quite some time.
ref: Penduduk bersedia menghadapi nor'easters terburuk dalam tempoh beberapa ketika.

src: A total of 32 inches (81.3 centimetres) fell in Rahway, part of the hardest-hit state in the storm's path.
ref: Keseluruhan dengan jumlah 32 inci (81.3 sentimeter) turun di Rahway, merupakan antara negeri yang paling kuat dilanda ribut.

src: Drivers also ran into problems on major highways as accidents were unavoidable on the slick roads.
ref: Pemandu-pemandu juga menghadapi masalah di lebuhraya-lebuhraya besar di mana kemalangan tidak dapat dielakkan di atas jalan yang licin.

src: Seismologists at USGS have indicated that this earthquake is an aftershock of the 9.0 earthquake which had occurred just a few hours earlier, 305 km (190 miles) distant, in the Indian Ocean near Sumatra, Indonesia.
ref: Ahli seismologi di USGS telah mengindikasikan yang gempa bumi ini ialah gegaran selepas gempa bumi 9.0 yang berlaku hanya beberapa jam sebelum, berjarak 305 km (190 batu), di Laut India berhampiran Sumatra, Indonesia.

src: His successor is Mikhail Myasnikovich, a former Deputy Prime Minister of Belarus back in the 1990s.
ref: Pengganti beliau adalah Mikhail Myasnikovich, bekas Timbalan Perdana Menteri Belarus pada 1990an.

src: He is Belarus' longest serving Prime Minister, having served over seven years.
ref: Beliau merupakan Perdana Menteri Belarus yang paling lama berkhidmat, telah berkhidmat lebih dari tujuh tahun.

src: This comes a week after the Presidential election which saw the re-election of the incumbent Alexander Lukashenko who has ruled Belarus since the establishment of the office in 1994.
ref: Ini berlaku seminggu selepas pilihanraya Presiden yang menampakkan pilihanraya semula penjawat kini Alexander Lukashenko yang telah memerintah Belarus sejak penubuhan pejabatnya pada 1994.

src: Following the elections, an estimated 600 people were detained by the government, including 11 Russian nationals.
ref: Berikutan pilihanraya tersebut, dianggarkan seramai 600 rakyat telah ditahan oleh pihak kerajaan, termasuk 11 warganegara Rusia.

src: A tornado warning for Cincinnati and nearby towns was issued by the Tulsa weather center nine minutes before the storm struck.
ref: Sebuah amaran puting beliung untuk Cincinnati dan bandar-bandar berdekatan telah dikeluarkan oleh pusat cuaca Tulsa sembilan minit sebelum ribut melanda.

src: "Any time you have a significant change in air mass there is going to be unsettled weather marking the two different air masses," said Joe Sellers, a meteorologist from the National Weather Service in Oklahoma.
ref: "Bila-bila masa anda mengalami perubahan yang ketara dalam jisim udara dimana akan dapat ketidaktenteraman cuaca menandakan dua jisim udara yang berbeza," kata Joe Penjual, seorang ahli meteorologi dari Perkhidmatan Cuaca Kebangsaan di Oklahoma.

src: The attacks occurred to the north of Miranshah town in the North Waziristan region.
ref: Serangan berlaku di utara bandar Miranshah di kawasan Utara Waziristan.

src: Security officials in the town informed AFP that in the first strike, US drones fired four missiles on a car, killing seven suspected militants.
ref: Pegawai keselamatan di bandar memaklumkan AFP bahawa dalam serangan pertama, pesawat AS melepaskan empat peluru berpandu atas sebuah kereta, membunuh tujuh suspek militan.

src: A nearby "militant compound" was also destroyed by the missiles.
ref: Sebuah "kawasan militan" yang berdekatan juga telah dimusnahkan oleh peluru berpandu.

src: Intelligence officials believe that the militants were associated with Hafiz Gul Bahadur.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai perisik percaya bahawa militan-militan itu berkaitan dengan Hafiz Gul Bahadur.

src: "We are trying to establish identity of the militants but most of them are believed to be fighters of Hafiz Gul Bahadur," an official told the media.
ref: "Kami cuba untuk mengenalpasti identiti militan tetapi kebanyakan mereka dipercayai adalah pejuang Hafiz Gul Bahadur," seorang pegawai memberitahu media.

src: However, the death toll and the identity of those killed was not officially confirmed.
ref: Bagaimanapun, jumlah kematian dan identiti mereka yang terbunuh tidak disahkan secara rasmi.

src: Santa Ana Volcano's view from Coatepeque Lake changed as a huge flow of "hot mud" flowed from the crater towards the lake.
ref: Pandangan Gunung Berapi Santa Ana dari Tasik Coatepeque berubah setelah satu aliran besar "lumpur panas" mengalir dari kawah ke arah tasik.

src: The road that was designed as an evacuation route from that sector of the volcano was blocked completely and the inhabitants of the area had to be evacuated by helicopters.
ref: Jalan yang direka sebagai laluan pemindahan dari sektor gunung berapi telah dihalang sepenuhnya dan penduduk di kawasan tersebut terpaksa dipindahkan menggunakan helikopter.

src: Minutes after the flow of hot mud was visible from Lake Coatepeque, a huge cloud of ash appeared, which reached an altitude of 50,000 feet, then covering the northwestern part of the country which contains the largest concentration of coffee farms (main export).
ref: Beberapa minit selepas aliran lumpur panas boleh dilihat dari Tasik Coatepeque, satu kepulan besar debu muncul, mencecah sehingga ketinggian 50,000 kaki, seterusnya meliputi bahagian barat laut negara ini yang mengandungi kepekatan terbesar ladang kopi (eksport utama).

src: The local authorities expect that this layer of ash burns the coffee plants of the affected area, decreasing the coffee production of the region considerably.
ref: Pihak berkuasa tempatan menjangkakan lapisan debu ini membakar tanaman kopi di kawasan terjejas, mengurangkan banyak pengeluaran kopi di rantau ini.

src: Along with the ash cloud, a large amount of hot rocks (some reaching three feet in diameter) flew on all directions, damaging roads, homes and vegetation.
ref: Bersama kepulan debu, sejumlah besar batu panas (sebahagian menghampiri tiga meter diameter) terbang di pelbagai arah, merosakkan jalan-jalan, rumah-rumah dan tanaman.

src: Authorities report the loss of two human lives due to this incident, the cause has not yet been revealed.
ref: Pihak berkuasa menyatakan kehilangan dua nyawa akibat insiden ini, punca masih belum diberitahu.

src: In response to this, the army and the police agreed to patrol the areas evacuated in order to prevent robberies.
ref: Bagi bertindak ke atas perkara ini, tentera dan polis bersetuju untuk mengawal kawasan-kawasan yang dikosongkan bagi mengelak kecurian.

src: Google Inc. formally submitted a bid to provide free wireless internet, or WiFi, in response to a request from Mayor Gavin Newsom's office.
ref: Google Inc. dengan rasminya menghantar tawaran untuk menyediakan internet tanpa wayar percuma, atau WiFi, sebagai menjawab permohonan pejabat Datuk Bandar Gavin Newson.

src: The company's goal is to ensure easy, reliable access to its search engine at all times.
ref: Matlamat syarikat itu ialah untuk memastikan dengan mudah, akses yang dipercayai untuk enjin carian mereka di sepanjang masa.

src: In another sign of its interest in Internet access, Google recently bought an undisclosed stake in a Maryland startup, the Current Communications Group, which is trying to provide high-speed connections through power lines.
ref: Dalam tanda kepentingan akses Internetnya yang lain, Google baru-baru ini membeli kepentingan yang tidak diberitahu di penubuhan Maryland, Kumpulan Komunikasi Terkini, yang mana sedang cuba untuk membekalkan sambungan berkelajuan tinggi melalui talian tenaga.

src: Serial killer Michael Ross appeared before a Connecticut court today, and told Judge Patrick Clifford that he wanted to die.
ref: Pembunuh bersiri Michael Ross hadir di hadapan mahkamah Connecticut hari ini, dan memberitahu Hakim Patrick Clifford bahawa dia mahu mati.

src: If executed, Ross will be the first person put to death in Connecticut in over 40 years.
ref: Jika dilaksanakan, Ross akan menjadi orang yang pertama dihukum mati di Connecticut dalam lebih 40 tahun.

src: Ross admitted to killing eight women in Connecticut and New York in the 1980s, and to raping several of them.
ref: Ross mengaku membunuh lapan wanita di Connecticut dan New York pada tahun 1980-an, dan merogol beberapa orang daripada mereka.

src: Dr. Michael Norko, appointed by the court to examine Ross, testified that Ross is a sexual sadist and is prone to depression.
ref: Dr. Michael Norko, yang dilantik oleh mahkamah untuk memeriksa Ross, memberi keterangan bahawa Ross ialah seorang sadis seksual dan terdedah kepada kemurungan.

src: Ross had attempted suicide three times in the past, Norko told the court, but he is not suicidal now.
ref: Ross telah cuba membunuh diri sebanyak tiga kali pada masa lalu, Norko memberitahu mahkamah, tetapi dia tidak berkeinginan membunuh diri sekarang.

src: Norko testified that Ross made a rational decision in electing to waive his appeals, and the court agreed, finding Ross clear headed and well educated.
ref: Norko memberi keterangan bahawa Ross membuat keputusan yang rasional dalam memilih untuk mengetepikan rayuan, dan mahkamah bersetuju, mendapati Ross berfikiran waras dan berpelajaran tinggi.

src: "This decision is his right to make," Judge Clifford said from the bench.
ref: "Keputusan ini adalah haknya," kata Hakim Clifford dari kerusi hakim.

src: There is no word when the Rockville court will rule.
ref: Tidak ada sebarang penjelasan bilakah mahkamah Rockville akan membuat keputusan.

src: California-based Autodesk Inc. announced yesterday that they plan to acquire Toronto-based Alias for $182 million in cash.
ref: Autodesk Inc. yang berpangkalan di California semalam mengumumkan bahawa mereka merancang untuk mendapatkan Alias ​​yang berpangkalan di Toronto atas harga $182 juta dalam bentuk wang tunai.

src: The acquisition is expected to be completed within six months.
ref: Pengambilalihan itu dijangka selesai dalam tempoh enam bulan.

src: Autodesk is the creator of one of the top computer aided design programs; AutoCAD, which is used by many engineers and architects for design activities including drafting.
ref: Autodesk adalah pencipta salah satu program reka bentuk bantuan komputer terunggul; AutoCAD, yang digunakan oleh ramai jurutera dan arkitek untuk aktiviti reka bentuk termasuk lakaran.

src: They are the 5th largest PC software company in the world.
ref: Mereka adalah syarikat perisian PC ke5 terbesar di dunia.

src: They merged with Wavefront Technologies under SGI in 1995 and changed its name to Alias in July 2003.
ref: Mereka bergabung dengan Wavefront Technologies di bawah SGI pada tahun 1995 dan menukar namanya kepada Alias ​​pada Julai 2003.

src: In June, 2004 they were spun off from Silicon Graphics Inc. and acquired by Accel-KKR and Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan.
ref: Pada bulan Jun, 2004 mereka telah dipisahkan dari Silicon Graphics Inc. dan diperoleh oleh Accel-KKR dan Pelan Pension Guru Ontario.

src: In the 2005 fiscal year they earned $83 million in revenue.
ref: Dalam tahun fiskal 2005 mereka telah mendapat hasil keuntungan $83 juta.

src: According to Alias, their software has been used in nearly every film nominated for an Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences award in the Best Visual Effects and Best Animated Feature Films categories.
ref: Menurut Alias, perisian mereka telah digunakan dalam hampir setiap filem yang dicalonkan untuk anugerah Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences dalam kategori Kesan Visual Terbaik dan Ciri Filem Animasi Terbaik.

src: In a Tuesday media event, Verizon Wireless announced it had reached an agreement with Apple Inc. and would begin selling a CDMA version of the iPhone 4 beginning early February.
ref: Pada acara media pada Selasa, Verizon Wireless mengumumkan ia telah mencapai persetujuan dengan Apple Inc. dan akan mula menjual iPhone 4 versi CDMA bermula awal Februari.

src: The move means the end of rival company AT&T's status as the only official US carrier of the iPhone, a status it held since the first iPhone debuted in 2007.
ref: Langkah itu bermakna pengakhir kepada status syarikat saingan AT&T sebagai satu-satunya pembekal rasmi US kepada iPhone, status yang dipegang sejak iPhone pertama pada 2007.

src: The press conference, held in New York City, was hosted by Verizon's president, Lowell McAdam, Apple's chief operating officer, Tim Cook, and Verizon Wireless' chief executive officer, Dan Mead.
ref: Sidang media, diadakan dibandar New York, dihoskan oleh presiden Verizon, Lowell MsAdam, ketua pegawai operasi Apple, Tim Cook, dan ketua pegawai eksekutif Verizon Wireless, Dan Mead.

src: iPhone 4 pre-orders for current Verizon users begin February 3, and a public release is scheduled for February 10.
ref: Pra-pesanan iPhone 4 untuk pengguna Verizon masa kini bermula 3 Februari, dan pelancaran awam dijaudalkan pada 10 Februari.

src: This means, however, that Verizon iPhone users will not be able to use the company's 4G LTE (long term evolution) network, and will thus be unable to make calls and access the Internet at the same time.
ref: Ini bermaksud, bagaimanapun, pengguna iPhone Verizon tersebut tidak dapat menggunakan jaringan 4G LTE (evolusi jangka panjang) syarikat tersebut, dan dengan itu tidak dapat membuat panggilan dan akses Internet pada masa yang sama.

src: However, Verizon's iPhone 4 allows the user to create a personal Wi-Fi hotspot, which means up to five other wireless devices can connect to the Internet through the phone.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, iPhone 4 Verizon membolehkan pengguna mencipta Wi-Fi hotspot persendirian, yang bermaksud sehingga lima peralatan tanpa wayar lain boleh berhubung dengan Internet melalui telefon tersebut.

src: However, Verizon said it would not mention the cost of data plans at this time, with Mead saying, "We talked about the device pricing, but we're not going to talk about the pricing for the network for that connectivity."
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, Verizon berkata ia tidak akan menyatakan kos pelan data buat masa ini, dengan Mead mengatakan, "Kami berbincang tentang harga perkakas, tetapi kami tidak berbincang tentang harga untuk jaringan sambungan tesebut."

src: The announcement was issued as a preemptive measure in preparation for an expected 6-12 inches of snow Wednesday, although the Metropolitan Transportation Authority claims to be ready for 14 inches.
ref: Pengumuman itu dikeluarkan sebagai langkah berjaga-jaga sebagai persediaan untuk salji yang dijangka 6-12 inci Rabu ini, walaupun Pihak Berkuasa Pengangkutan Metropolitan mendakwa bersedia untuk 14 inci.

src: We intend to make sure that does not happen again."
ref: Kami berhasrat untuk memastikan bahawa ianya tidak akan berlaku lagi".

src: Despite declaring an emergency, the mayor said the city would not make the decision to close public schools until 5 AM.
ref: Walaupun mengisytiharkan kecemasan, Datuk Bandar berkata bandar itu tidak akan membuat keputusan untuk menutup sekolah-sekolah awam sehingga 5 pagi.

src: The city is looking for people to shovel snow off sidewalks and intersections.
ref: Bandar ini mencari orang untuk menyodok salji di luar kaki lima dan persimpangan.

src: A red tide continues along South Padre Island and into Mexico, according to officials with the Texas Parks and Wildlife Department.
ref: Air pasang merah berterusan disepanjang Pulau South Padre dan ke Mexico, menurut pegawai-pegawai dari Jabatan Taman dan Hidupan Liar Texas.

src: Natural factors can intersect to produce ideal conditions, allowing this algae to increase in number dramatically.
ref: Faktor semula jadi boleh bersilang untuk menghasilkan keadaan ideal, membenarkan alga ini meningkat dalam jumlah yang dramatik.

src: The algae produces a neurotoxin that can disable nerves in both humans and fish.
ref: Alga tersebut menghasilkan neurotoksin yang boleh melumpuhkan saraf kedua-dua manusia dan ikan.

src: Fish often die because of the high concentrations of the toxin in the waters.
ref: Ikan biasanya mati akibat kepekatan toksin yang tinggi didalam air.

src: Also, South Padre officials are investigating a paralyzed cat and deceased coyote who may have consumed fish killed by the red tide.
ref: Juga, pegawai South Padre sedang menyiasat kucing yang lumpuh dan anjing hutan yang mati yang mungkin memakan ikan dibunuh oleh air pasang merah.

src: This bloom has lingered almost three weeks, and affects waters parallel to South Padre Island for about 25 miles, and may extend as far as 10 miles along Mexico beaches.
ref: Perkembangan ini telah berterusan lebih kurang tiga minggu, dan menjejaskan air selari dengan Pulau South Padre untuk lebih kurang 25 batu, dan mungkin berlanjutan sejauh 10 batu sepanjang pantai Mexico.

src: Ten suspected terrorists were arrested in three different parts of Britain.
ref: Sepuluh pengganas yang disyaki telah ditahan dalam tiga kawasan berlainan di Britain.

src: In the Croydon section of south London three men were arrested.
ref: Di Croydon bahagian selatan London tiga lelaki ditahan.

src: In Wolverhampton four were arrested in a series of dawn raids at three addresses and three in Derby, Scotland Yard said.
ref: Di Wolverhampton empat orang ditahan dalam siri serbuan subuh di tiga alamat dan tiga orang di Derby, kata Scotland Yard.

src: Numerous smuggled artifacts were found at an Austrian tour guide's home.
ref: Banyak artifak diseludup ditemui di rumah seorang pemandu pelancong Austria.

src: Five Italians were arrested and twenty-eight others are now being investigated.
ref: Lima orang Itali telah ditangkap dan dua puluh lapan yang lain sedang disiasat.

src: The Austrian, known as "Mozart" in the art trafficking world, received a citation for his involvement.
ref: Orang Austria itu, yang dikenali sebagai "Mozart" dalam dunia perniagaan haram seni, menerima saman untuk penglibatannya.

src: Police claim that some 600 artifacts, which had been illegally excavated, were found.
ref: Polis berkata bahawa kira-kira 600 artifak, yang telah digali secara haram, ditemui.

src: Many of the items were gold and silver, along with ceramics.
ref: Kebanyakan daripada artikel itu adalah emas dan perak, seramik juga.

src: One item, a cup, has been valued at several thousand Euros.
ref: Satu barang, sebuah cawan, telah bernilai beberapa ribu Euro.

src: The artifacts were plundered from an archaeological site near Rome by "Mozart" using his tour guide credentials.
ref: Artifak yang telah dijarah dari tapak arkeologi berhampiran Rom oleh "Mozart" menggunakan kelayakan pemandu pelancongnya.

src: Italian authorities expect that the plundered artifacts will finally be displayed in Italian museums.
ref: Pihak berkuasa Itali menjangkakan bahawa artifak yang dijarah akan akhirnya dipamerkan di muzium-muzium Itali.

src: The Thai Prime Minister, Thaksin Shinawatra, despatched an additional 1,000 troops to the south of the country to help deal with the widespread violence.
ref: Perdana Menteri Thailand, Thaksin Shinawatra, yang menghantar 1,000 angkatan tentera tambahan di selatan negara itu untuk membantu menangani keganasan yang berleluasan.

src: Mr. Shinawatra's recent visit to the region was followed by further shootings.
ref: Lawatan baru-baru Encik Shinawatra ke rantau ini diikuti dengan tembak-menembak yang berterusan.

src: In Narathiwat Province a 40 year old village worker was shot while helping a neighbour repair a fence.
ref: Di Wilayah Narathiwat seorang pekerja kampung berusia 40 tahun telah ditembak semasa membantu jirannya membaiki pagar.

src: Friday saw the shooting of an assistant village head in Yala Province, and an elderly couple were shot in Pattani Province whilst returning from a local market.
ref: Hari Jumaat memperlihatkan tembak-menembak pembantu ketua kampung Wilayah Yala, dan satu pasangan tua telah ditembak di Wilayah Pattani semasa pulang dari pasaran tempatan.

src: The insurgency and campaign for an independent Muslim state in the southern provinces has resulted in an exodus from the area.
ref: Pemberontakan dan kempen untuk menubuhkan sebuah negara Islam yang merdeka di wilayah selatan telah menyebabkan penghijrahan dari kawasan itu.

src: Estimates put the number of Thai Buddhists who have fled the area at 34,000.
ref: Anggaran bahawa jumlah penganut agama Buddha Thai yang melarikan diri dari kawasan itu berangka 34,000.

src: There are also some reports that Muslim inhabitants of the area have been seeking refuge in Malaysia.
ref: Terdapat juga beberapa laporan bahawa penduduk Islam di kawasan itu telah meminta perlindungan di Malaysia.

src: The state of emergency imposed last month has had a mixed reception.
ref: Keadaan darurat yang dilancarkan pada bulan lalu mempunyai sambutan berbeza-beza.

src: Despite these security measures, over 1,000 people have died in the insurgency.
ref: Walaupun langkah-langkah keselamatan telah dilaksanakan, lebih daripada 1,000 orang terbunuh dalam pemberontakan itu.

src: Category 1 Hurricane Vince, which was formed from a non-tropical low today, is forecast to head east towards Portugal, rather than west as is usual.
ref: Taufan Vince Kategori 1, yang ditubuhkan daripada kerendahan bukan tropika hari ini, dijangka menuju ke arah timur ke arah Portugal, dan bukan barat seperti biasa.

src: Vince caught forecasters by surprise, since the waters in the area are around 25ºC.
ref: Vince memerangkap peramal secara mengejut, kerana air di kawasan tersebut adalah sekitar 25ºC.

src: It is forecast to weaken as it moves towards Portugal, and to finally become extratropical.
ref: Ia dijangka akan menjadi lemah kerana ia bergerak ke arah Portugal, dan akhirnya di luar kawasan tropika.

src: In about 48 hours, they believe Vince will be absorbed by a front in Portugal or Spain.
ref: Dalam kira-kira 48 jam, mereka percaya Vince akan diserap oleh kawasan depan Portugal atau Sepanyol.

src: A father and son from Romania have been found guilty of a string of prostitution-related offences in the United Kingdom.
ref: Seorang bapa dan anak lelaki dari Romania disahkan bersalah berikutan rentetan kesalahan yang berkaitan dengan pelacuran di United Kingdom.

src: For four years, Marius "Mario" Nejloveanu and father Bogdan trafficked women into and around the UK, forcing their victims into prostitution.
ref: Selama empat tahun, Marius "Mario" Nejloveanu dan bapanya Bogdan memperdagangkan wanita ke dan sekitar UK, memaksa mangsa mereka melacurkan diri.

src: There, they worked six or seven days each week, sleeping in brothels and having sex with eight-to-ten men each night against their will.
ref: Di situ, mereka bekerja enam atau tujuh hari seminggu, tidur di rumah pelacuran dan melakukan seks dengan lapan hingga sepuluh lelaki setiap malam bukan atas keinginan mereka.

src: Typical fees from customers were around £40 but some may have paid as low as £10.
ref: Bayaran biasa daripada pelanggan adalan sekitar £40 namun ada yang membayar serendah £10.

src: Around half of each fee went to the Nejloveanus and half to the brothel.
ref: Sekitar separuh daripada bayaran akan dibahagi kepada Nejloveanus dan separuh lagi kepada pelacur tersebut.

src: Police launched raids, rescuing the women after receiving a tip-off.
ref: Polis telah melancarkan serbuan, menyelamatkan wanita terbabit selepas menerima maklumat awam.

src: Bogdan was accused by Rachel Smyth, prosecuting, of giving advice and assistance to Marius; Smyth opened the trial last year telling Manchester Crown Court "[h]aving heard the evidence you [the jury] may conclude that the son, Marius, learnt this trade from his father and that this was a family business."
ref: Bogdan telah dituduh oleh Rachel Smyth, mendakwa, atas memberi nasihat dan bantuan kepada Marius; Smyth mengfailkan perbicaraan pada tahun lepas dengan memberitahu Mahkamah Crown Manchester "setelah mendengar bukti anda [para juri] bolehlah membuat kesimpulan bahawa anak lelaki itu, Marius, mempelajari perniagaan ini daripada bapanya dan ini merupakan peniagaan keluarga."

src: The woman were "threatened, beaten and degraded" and faced "extreme sexual violence and humiliation," the court heard.
ref: Wanita tersebut "diancam, dipukul dan dihina" dan menghadapi "keganasan seksual yang melampau dan penghinaan," mahkamah menyatakan.

src: Marius was found guilty of five counts of trafficking women into the UK for sexual exploitation, one count of conspiracy to traffic a woman into the UK for sexual exploitation, two counts of trafficking women within the UK for sexual exploitation, one count of trafficking a woman out of the UK for sexual exploitation, four counts of rape, five counts of assault, two counts of causing a woman to engage in sexual activity without consent, five counts of controlling prostitution for gain, and one count of witness intimidation to total 27 offences.
ref: Marius disahkan bersalah melibatkan lima tuduhan perdagangan wanita ke UK untuk eksploitasi seksual, satu tuduhan melibatkan kospirasi untuk memperdagangkan wanita ke UK bagi tujuan eksploitasi seksual, dua tuduhan melibatkan perdagangan wanita dalam UK bagi eksploitasi seksual, satu tuduhan melibatkan perdagangan seorang wanita ke luar UK bagi eksploitasi seksual, empat tuduhan melibatkan rogol, lima tuduhan melibatkan serangan, dua tuduhan mengakibatkan wanita melibatkan diri dalam aktiviti seksual tanpa kebenaran, lima tuduhan mengawal pelacuran demi keuntungan, dan satu tuduhan melibatkan ugutan saksi membawa jumlah kepada 27 kesalahan.

src: The duo join two others who admitted lesser roles in the scheme.
ref: Kumpulan dua orang itu menyertai orang dua orang lain yang menjalankan peranan lebih kecil dalam skim terbabit.

src: Costel Maruntelu, 24, was previously jailed for five years and six months for sex trafficking crimes.
ref: Costel Maruntelu, 24, sebelum ini ditahan selama lima tahun dan enam bulan atas jenayah perdagangan seks.

src: Juanita "Toni" Huntingdon, 41, helped set up the Birmingham brothel and acted as a receptionist at both sites and entered guilty pleas to five counts of controlling prostitution for gain.
ref: Juanita "Toni" Huntingdon, 41, membantu menubuhan rumah pelacuran di Birmingham dan bertanggungjawab sebagai penyambut tetamu di kedua-dua tempat dan mengaku bersalah atas lima tuduhan mengawal pelacuran demi keuntungan.

src: December 29, 2004 The death toll from the earthquake and tsunamis that has hit countries in Asia and Eastern Africa continues to rise, passing 80,000 people according to reports from several news agencies.
ref: Pada 29 Disember 2004 Angka kematian akibat gempa bumi dan tsunami yang melanda negara-negara di Asia dan Afrika Timur terus meningkat, lebih daripada 80,000 orang menurut laporan daripada beberapa agensi berita.

src: The immediate fatalities from the earthquake and resulting tsunamis are but a fraction of the total effect from the disaster.
ref: Kematian segera akibat gempa bumi dan tsunami itu adalah sebahagian kecil daripada jumlah kerosakan akibat bencana itu.

src: Officials continue to struggle with burying the dead and delivering basic suvival provisions to the population in the coastal and island areas most hit by the disaster.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai terus bekerja keras menanam orang mati dan membahagikan bekalan keperluan asas kepada penduduk di kawasan pantai dan pulau yang paling teruk dilanda bencana.

src: In a statement to CNN, Iraqi national security advisor Muwaffaq Rubaie said that "...this is going to be a fair, just trial with a defense counsel in there, with a proper prosecuting counsel as well there..." The first charge, filed earlier this month, alleges Hussein's responsibility in the 1982 killing of 143 residents of Dujail, in which he was the target of a botched assassination attempt.
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan kepada CNN, penasihat keselamatan kebangsaan Iraq Muwaffaq Rubaie berkata bahawa "...ini akan menjadi satu perbicaraan yang adil, saksama dengan peguambela di sana, dengan peguam pendakwa yang diiktiraf juga di sana..." Bagi tuduhan pertama, didaftarkan awal bulan ini, mendakwa tanggungjawab Hussein dalam pembunuhan 143 penduduk Dujail pada tahun 1982, yang dia adalah sasaran cubaan membunuh yang tidak dilakukan dengan cermat.

src: The tribunal, which was set up in December 2003, has been marred by delays.
ref: Mimbar itu, yang ditubuhkan pada bulan Disember 2003, telah dicemari oleh kelewatan.

src: There are accusations of bias from the defense counsel of Hussein, as well as fears for the judges' safety which have consistently pushed the trial back.
ref: Terdapat tuduhan berat sebelah daripada peguambela Hussein, begitu juga kebimbangan untuk keselamatan hakim yang secara konsisten menyambut percubaan itu dengan dingin.

src: The defense team has challenged the tribunal's legitimacy and stated they have not been given enough time to prepare.
ref: Pasukan pembelaan telah mencabar kesahihan mimbar itu dan menyatakan bahawa mereka tidak diberi masa yang cukup untuk bersedia.

src: This concern has been echoed in the past by some human rights groups, "It's really critical that it's done right," says Michael Posner, executive director of the Lawyers Committee for Human Rights.
ref: Kebimbangan ini telah bergema pada masa lalu oleh beberapa kumpulan hak asasi manusia, "Ia benar-benar penting bahawa ia dilakukan dengan betul," kata Michael Posner, pengarah eksekutif Jawatankuasa Peguam bagi Hak Asasi Manusia.

src: Many Iraqis, particularly Shia and Kurdish, want to see Hussein tried for chemical gas attacks on the Kurds in the 1980s.
ref: Ramai rakyat Iraq, terutamanya Syiah dan Kurdish, mahu melihat Hussein dibicarakan atas serangan gas kimia di Kurd pada tahun 1980-an.

src: In 1988, one of these chemical attacks killed as many as 5,000 people.
ref: Pada tahun 1988, satu daripada serangan kimia itu membunuh hampir 5,000 orang.

src: Sodium thiopental, the first of a three drug cocktail used in 34 states to render the prisoner to be executed unconscious, was manufactured in Italy until Italian authorities stated that they would only license the manufacture if it was used for medical purposes and not, crucially, for executions.
ref: Sodium thiopental, dadah koktel yang pertama dari tiga ubat yang digunakan di 34 negeri untuk menjadikan banduan yang akan dilaksanakan hukuman mati tidak sedarkan diri, telah dibuat di Itali sehingga pihak berkuasa Itali menyatakan bahawa mereka hanya akan memberi lesen pengilangan jika ia telah digunakan untuk tujuan perubatan dan tidak, penting, untuk hukuman mati.

src: The move means that the United States is without a viable supplier for sodium thiopental.
ref: Langkah itu bermakna bahawa Amerika Syarikat adalah negara tanpa pembekal yang berdaya maju untuk sodium thiopental.

src: Although many European countries manufacture the drug, which is primarily used in Europe as an anæsthetic, no manufacturer has been found that is willing to supply it for use in conjunction with the death penalty, the abolition of which has been lobbied by the EU since 2008.
ref: Walaupun banyak negara-negara Eropah mengeluarkan dadah, yang terutamanya digunakan di Eropah sebagai Anaesthetic, tiada pengeluar yang didapati sanggup untuk membekalkannya untuk digunakan dengan hukuman mati, pemansuhan yang telah dilobi oleh Kesatuan Eropah sejak tahun 2008.

src: These delays are likely to be prolonged as the legal process of drawing up new drugs to be used for injections is lengthy.
ref: Kelewatan ini mungkin akan berpanjangan kerana proses undang-undang untuk merangka ubat-ubatan baru yang digunakan untuk suntikan adalah panjang.

src: Pentobarbital, an alternative which is used at the Dignitas clinic in Switzerland, is used for lethal injections in Oregon, and has started to be used by Oklahoma.
ref: Pentobarbital, alternatif yang digunakan di klinik individu ini di Switzerland, digunakan untuk suntikan maut di Oregon, dan telah mula digunakan oleh Oklahoma.

src: Hospira's decision caused mixed reactions throughout the medical community, with the American Society of Anesthesiologists stating Monday that sodium thiopental is an "important and medically necessary anesthetic agent" that is a "first-line anesthetic in many cases", citing geriatric and cardiovascular conditions, among others.
ref: Keputusan Hospira menyebabkan pelbagai reaksi di seluruh masyarakat perubatan, dengan Persatuan Amerika Anesthesiologists menyatakan bermula Isnin ini bahawa natrium thiopental adalah "ejen anestetik penting dan perlu dari segi perubatan" itu adalah "anestetik barisan pertama dalam banyak kes," memetik keadaan geriatrik dan kardiovaskular, antara lain.

src: Spanish police believe they are close to capturing Aribert Heim, the 91-year-old known as "Dr. Death".
ref: Polis Sepanyol percaya mereka hampir menangkap Aribert Heim, berusia 91 tahun yang dikenali sebagai "Dr. Kematian".

src: The Times reports that Heim led a normal civilian life after the end of the Second World War, but fled Germany in 1962, when the authorities were about to issue a warrant for his arrest.
ref: The Times melaporkan bahawa Heim menjalankan kehidupan orang awam yang normal selepas berakhirnya Perang Dunia Kedua, tetapi melarikan diri dari Jerman pada tahun 1962, apabila pihak berkuasa hampir mengeluarkan waran untuk penangkapannya.

src: The center's founder, Simon Wiesenthal, was himself active in pursuing Heim prior to his death last month.
ref: Pengasas pusat itu, Simon Wiesenthal, juga aktif dalam memburu Heim sebelum kematiannya pada bulan lalu.

src: Other evidence pointing the trail to Palafrugell involve banking transfers and tax filings.
ref: Bukti lain menunjukkan jejak untuk Palafrugell melibatkan pemindahan perbankan dan pemfailan cukai.

src: The officer, Jeffrey Stenroos, who had worked for the Los Angeles Unified School District police for eight years, caused thousands of students to remain on lockdown for hours.
ref: Pengawai itu, Jeffrey Stenroos, telah bekerja di Sekolah Polis Beersatu Daerah Los Angeles selama lapan tahun, menyebabkan ribuan pelajar berada dalam keadaan terkunci selama beberapa jam.

src: The council voted to ask Stenroos to pay the city for the cost of the search.
ref: Perbandaran mengundi meminta Stenroos membayar gantirugi kos siasatan tersebut kepada bandar itu.

src: Council president Eric Garcetti said, "We had thousands of dollars spent on police overtime."
ref: Presiden Perbandaran Eric Garcetti berkata, "Kami telah belanja ribuan dolar atas kerja lebih masa polis".

src: Stenroos allegedly mishandled a firearm and shot himself in his bulletproof vest, according to an anonymous police official.
ref: Stenroos kononnya cuai dalam penggunaan senjata api dan menembak dirinya dalam keadaan berpakaian jaket peluru, menurut seorang pengawai polis dengan namanya tidak diketahui berkata.

src: The news came hours after six journalists who reported on the protests were released from custody.
ref: Berita itu keluar selepas enam jam wartawan-wartawan yang melaporkan terhadap bantahan itu dibebaskan dari tahanan.

src: Hosni Mubarak yesterday announced a new cabinet, which does not include several figures who protesters largely do not approve of.
ref: Hosni Mubarak semalam mengumumkan kabinet baru yang tidak termasuk beberapa individu yang membuat bantahan besar yang tidak diluluskan.

src: Analysts have, however, suggested little had changed within the government; many positions, they say, are filled with military figures.
ref: Penganalisis berkata, walau bagaimanapun, mencadangkan sedikit perubahan dalam kerajaan; banyak jawatan, mereka kata, diisi oleh angkatan tentera.

src: The local transit union was not involved in the strike, their offices were picketed by striking Telus workers.
ref: Kesatuan transit tempatan tidak terlibat dalam mogok, pejabat-pejabat mereka berpiket dengan menarik pekerja Telus.

src: "If solutions aren't found, on Wednesday of this week, another massive shutdown in a different area of this province will take place," shouted Jim Sinclair, B.C.
ref: "Jika penyelesaian tidak ditemui, pada hari Rabu minggu ini, satu lagi penutupan besar-besaran di kawasan yang berbeza di wilayah ini akan berlaku," jerit Jim Sinclair, B.C.

src: Federation of Labour president, to a crowd gathered on the lawn of the Legislature yesterday.
ref: Presiden Persekutuan Buruh kepada orang ramai yang berkumpul di rumput Badan Perundangan semalam.

src: Inside, the opposition NDP used Question Period to repeatedly probe the ruling Liberal party's decision to not speak with the BC Teacher's Federation (BCTF).
ref: Di dalam, pembangkang NDP gunakan Tempoh Soalan untuk berkali-kali menyiasat keputusan parti Liberal pemerintah untuk tidak bercakap dengan Persekutuan Guru BC (BCTF).

src: The union and leaders may also face criminal charges after the government appointed Len Doust as an independent special prosecutor to assess whether criminal contempt charges may be brought.
ref: Kesatuan dan pemimpin juga mungkin menghadapi tuduhan jenayah selepas kerajaan dilantik Len Doust sebagai pendakwa khas bebas untuk menilai sama ada tuduhan menghina mahkamah jenayah boleh bawa.

src: Hurricane Wilma strengthened on its path around Cuba, and is projected to travel onward and outward towards central and south Florida.
ref: Taufan Wilma mengukuh laluannya sekitar Cuba, dan dijangka untuk perjalanan seterusnya dan keluar ke arah tengah dan selatan Florida.

src: Wilma ties the record for most tropical storms (named storms) in a season at 21, and the record for most hurricanes in a season at 12.
ref: Wilma hubungan rekod ribut tropika yang paling (dinamakan ribut) dalam satu musim pada 21, dan rekod bagi kebanyakan ribut taufan dalam satu musim pada 12.

src: It is moving to the west-northwest at 7 mph (11 KM/HR)with maximum sustained winds of 165 mph (270 km/h), with higher gusts, making it a dangerous Category 5 hurricane on the Saffir-Simpson Scale, and has a minimum central pressure of 900 mbar (26.58 InHg).
ref: Ia bergerak ke barat-barat laut pada 7 mph (11 KM/HR) dengan angin yang berterusan maksimum 165 mph (270 km/h), dengan kelajuan angin yang lebih tinggi, menjadikannya berbahaya Kategori 5 taufan pada Skala Saffir-Simpson, dan mempunyai tekanan minimum tengah 900 mbar (26.58 inHg).

src: Rainfall accumulations are expected in amounts of 5 to 10 inches, with isolated areas of 25 inches over the Cayman Islands, Jamaica, Haiti, and Cuba.
ref: Pengumpulan hujan dijangka dalam jumlah 5 hingga 10 inci, dengan kawasan-kawasan terpencil 25 inci ke atas Kepulauan Cayman, Jamaica, Haiti, dan Cuba.

src: Rains of 4 to 6 inches can be expected in areas of Honduras and Nicaragua.
ref: Hujan dari 4 hingga 6 inci boleh dijangka dalam bidang Honduras dan Nicaragua.

src: At 5pm EDT the country of Mexico issued a Hurricane Watch for the Yucatan Peninsula from Punta Allen to Cabo Catoche.
ref: Pada pukul 5 petang EDT negara Mexico mengeluarkan Hurricane Watch untuk Semenanjung Yucatan dari Punta Allen ke Cabo Catoche.

src: A hurricane warning remains in effect from San Felipe to Tulum on the Yucatan peninsula...including Cozumel and nearby islands.
ref: Satu amaran taufan masih berkuat kuasa dari San Felipe Tulum di semenanjung Yucatan...termasuk Cozumel dan pulau-pulau berhampiran.

src: A tropical storm warning is in effect from south of Tulum to Chetumal Mexico.
ref: Amaran ribut tropika berkuat kuasa dari selatan ke Chetumal Tulum Mexico.

src: A hurricane watch remains in effect for the east coast of the Yucatan peninsula from south of Tulum to Punta Gruesa.
ref: Jam taufan masih berkuat kuasa untuk pantai timur Semenanjung Yucatan dari selatan Tulum Punta Gruesa.

src: A tropical storm warning is in effect for Belize from the border With Mexico southward to Belize City.
ref: Amaran ribut tropika di kesan Munich dari sempadan dengan Mexico selatan ke Belize City.

src: A tropical storm warning remains in effect for Honduras from the Honduras/Nicaragua border westward to Cabo Camaron.
ref: Amaran ribut tropika masih berkuat kuasa untuk Honduras dari sempadan Honduras/Nicaragua ke arah barat ke Cabo Camaron.

src: Residents of the Florida Keys and the peninsula should monitor the progress of the storm.
ref: Penduduk di Florida Keys dan Semenanjung perlu memantau kemajuan ribut.

src: Following a dispute with London-based company Independent International Investment Research (IIIR), Internet company Google Inc. has dropped the use of its "Gmail" name for its free email service.
ref: Berikutan pertikaian dengan syarikat Pelaburan Penyelidikan Bebas Antarabangsa (IIIR) berpangkalan di London, syarikat Internet Google Inc. telah menggugurkan penggunaan nama "Gmail" dalam servis email percumanya.

src: All other countries (except Germany, where a similar dispute also resulted in a name change) will continue to use the Gmail name and domain (gmail.com).
ref: Semua negara lain (kecuali Jerman, dimana pertikaian serupa juga mengakibatkan pertukaran nama) akan terus menggunakan nama dan domain Gmail (gmail.com).

src: The change took place on Wednesday, when all new Gmail accounts created from a UK IP address will use the @googlemail.com domain, instead of the former @gmail.com.
ref: Perubahan itu berlaku pada Rabu, apabila semua akaun baru Gmail dihasilkan dari alamat IP UK akan menggunakan domain @googlemail.com, daripada yang dahulunya @gmail.com.

src: As the service is still "invite-only", invitations for the service will also be made for the @googlemail.com domain.
ref: Memandangkan servis itu masih "jemputan sahaja", jemputan untuk servis tersebut juga akan dibuat untuk domain @googlemail.com.

src: Former UK Gmail users will continue to use the @gmail.com domain for the near future.
ref: Bekas pegguna UK Gmail akan terus menggunakan domain @gmail.com untuk jangkamasa terdekat.

src: The Wikimedia Foundation, the mother organization of the popular Wikipedia encyclopedia, and Answers.com, a search engine company, announced a new partnership.
ref: Wikimedia Foundation, organisasi ibu Wikipedia ensiklopedia popular, dan Answers.com, sebuah syarikat enjin carian, mengumumkan satu perkongsian baru.

src: This partnership will lead to the development of a special edition of Answers.com's 1-Click Answers tool, called 1-Click Answers, Wikipedia Edition.
ref: Perkongsian ini akan membawa kepada pembangunan edisi khas 1-Click Jawapan alat Answers.com, yang dipanggil 1-Klik Jawapan, Wikipedia Edition.

src: The advertising revenues from this software will be split with the Wikimedia Foundation.
ref: Hasil pengiklanan daripada perisian ini akan berpecah dengan Yayasan Wikimedia.

src: Jimmy Wales, president of the Wikimedia Foundation, said he was pleased to partner with Answers.com, encouraging software that improves access to Wikipedia.
ref: Jimmy Wales, Presiden Yayasan Wikimedia, berkata beliau gembira dapat bekerjasama dengan Answers.com, perisian yang meningkatkan akses kepada Wikipedia menggalakkan.

src: Bob Rosenschein, Answers.com's founder and CEO, told the media that Wikipedia is "the most dynamic of over 120 content sources found in Answers.com".
ref: Bob Rosenschein, pengasas dan Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif Answers.com, memberitahu media bahawa Wikipedia adalah "yang paling dinamik dari lebih 120 sumber kandungan dijumpai di dalam Answers.com."

src: The Norwegian government has in recent days taken several steps to prevent a possible bird flu epidemic from entering the country and further spreading within the nations border.
ref: Kerajaan Norway kebelakangan ini mengambil beberapa langkah untuk mencegah kebarangkalian wabak selesema burung daripada memasuki negara itu dan seterusnya merebak sehingga ke sempdan kebangsaan.

src: The authority also asked the border customs to increase the inspections against possible illegal import of poultry.
ref: Pihak berkuasa turut mengarahkan kastam sempadan untuk menambah pemeriksaan terhadap kemungkinan pengimportan haram ayam dan itik.

src: When it was announced that William and Kate had become engaged Prince Harry commented saying that: "It means I get a sister, which I have always wanted," and that he was "delighted".
ref: Apabila ia telah diumumkan bahawa William dan Kate telah bertunang, Prince Harry mengulas dengan mengatakan bahawa: "Ia bermakna saya mendapat seorang kakak, yang saya telah sentiasa mahu," dan bahawa dia "gembira".

src: The four bridesmaids have been announced as the daughter of the Earl and Countess of Wessex, Lady Louise Windsor, who is seven years old.
ref: Empat pengapit telah diumumkan sebagai anak kepada Earl dan Countess of Wessex, Lady Louise Windsor, yang berusia tujuh tahun.

src: Eight-year-old Margarita Armstrong-Jones, who is the daughter of Viscount and Viscountess Linley, and three-year-old Grace van Cutsem, the daughter of Hugh van Cutsem, who is a close friend to both William and Kate.
ref: Margarita Armstrong-Jones berusia lapan tahun, anak perempuan Viscount dan Viscountess Linley, dan Grace van Cutsem berusia tiga tahun, anak perempuan Hugh van Cutsem, yang merupakan kawan rapat kepada kedua-dua William dan Kate.

src: The three-year-old granddaughter of the Duchess of Cornwall will be the forth bridesmaid.
ref: Cucu Duchess of Cornwall yang berusia tiga tahun akan menjadi pengapit keempat.

src: Two page boys have been announced as William Lowther-Pinkerton and Tom Pettifer.
ref: Dua budak kundang telah diumumkan sebagai William Lowther-Pinkerton dan Tom Pettifer.

src: Lowther-Pinkerton is the son of William's private secretary while Pettifer is the son of William and Harry's former nanny, Tiggy Legge-Bourke.
ref: Lowther-Pinkerton adalah anak kepada Setiausaha Sulit William manakala Pettifer adalah anak kepada bekas pengasuh William dan Harry, Tiggy Legge-Bourke.

src: India won the first match of the 2011 Cricket World Cup against Bangladesh by 87 runs on February 19.
ref: India memenangi perlawanan pertama Kriket Piala Dunia Tahun 2011 menentang Bangladesh dengan 87 larian pada 19 Februari.

src: The Group B match was played at the Shere Bangla National Stadium in Mirpur, Bangladesh.
ref: Perlawanan Kumpulan B dimainkan di Stadium Kebangsaan Shere Bangla di Mirpur, Bangladesh.

src: The first referral of the World Cup came after the 4th ball of the 2nd innings was bowled.
ref: Referral pertama Piala Dunia datang selepas bola ke-4 dalam mati baling inning ke-2.

src: India's Shanthakumaran Sreesanth had bowled a yorker and the umpire declared it not out.
ref: India Shanthakumaran Sreesanth telah mematibalingkan seorang dari York dan pengadil mengisytiharkan ia tidak keluar.

src: Dhoni referred it to the TV umpire and a replay showed it might have missed the leg stump, so the original decision was upheld.
ref: Dhoni merujuk hal itu kepada pengadil TV dan perlawanan ulangan menunjukkan ia mungkin telah terlepas tunggul kaki, jadi keputusan asal dikekalkan.

src: Veteran fighter Carlo "Neo" Prater also prevailed in his Strikeforce debut against Bryan Travers.
ref: Pelawan veteran Carlo "Neo" Prater juga telah berjaya menewaskan Bryan Travers di dalam kemunculan pertama kalinya di dalam Strikeforce.

src: Ryan Couture, son of MMA legend Randy Couture, remained undefeated in his second-ever bout.
ref: Ryan Couture, anak lelaki legenda MMA Randy Couture, kekal tidak ditewaskan di dalam perlawanan keduanya.

src: "This is going to be a fun, tough, hard fight that I expect will go everywhere," stated Beerbohm in a pre-fight media workout on Wednesday.
ref: "Ini akan menjadi perlawanan yang menarik, sukar dan mencabar yang saya jangka akan ke merata tempat," kata Beerbohm di dalam senaman media sebelum perlawanan pada hari Rabu.

src: "My time has come and I am really looking forward to the fight."
ref: "Masa saya telah tiba dan saya amat menunggu-nunggu perlawanan itu."

src: Beerbohm also stated he wanted to eventually fight for a Strikeforce Lightweight title, but recognized that he first needed to move past his veteran opponent, Pat Healey, who came into the fight with a record of 25-17-0, who was making his return to action since his loss to Josh Thompson via submission in 2010.
ref: Beerbohm turut menyatakan yang dia akhirnya nanti mahu berlawan untuk gelaran Strikeforce Lightweight, tetapi faham yang dia perlu melepasi pesaing veterannya terlebih dahulu, Pat Healey, yang masuk ke perlawanan dengan rekod 25-17-0, dan kembali beraksi setelah kekalahannya kepada Josh Thompson dengan cara pergelutan pada 2010.

src: The bout was very close, going the distance through all three rounds.
ref: Perlawanan tersebut amat dekat, dengan melalui jarak ketiga-tiga pusingan.

src: The last few minutes of the fight proved to be the best for Healey, who wore down Beerbohm's strength and left him gasping for air, allowing Healey to attempt more submissions on the ground.
ref: Minit-minit terakhir perlawanan terbukti yang terbaik bagi Healey, yang telah melemahkan Beerbohm dan membuatnya kepenatan, membolehkan Healey membuat beberapa cubaan pergelutan di atas tanah.

src: After the match, Beerbohm was upbeat, but felt he had won the bout.
ref: Selepas perlawanan itu, Beerbohm dalam kepenatan, tetapi merasakan yang dia telah memenangi perlawanan tersebut.

src: "But that's what happens when you let it go to the hands of the judges."
ref: "Tetapi inilah yang terjadi apabila keputusan dibiarkan dibuat oleh hakim."
