ref: Selepas satu mesyuarat menteri-menteri luar negeri NATO di Berlin, Setiausaha Negara Amerika Syarikat Hillary Clinton berkata, "Kerajaan Syria tidak memenuhi tuntutan sah rakyat Syria."

src: The delegation asked for a deadline for their demands to be met.
ref: Delegasi itu meminta satu tarikh akhir supaya tuntutan mereka dipenuhi.

src: "If they manage to calm the situation in Daraa, the government believes it will be able to contain the situation throughout Syria."
ref: "Jika mereka berjaya menenangkan keadaan di Daraa, kerajaan percaya ia akan boleh mengawal keadaan di seluruh Syria."

src: PCS members "suffer oppressive working conditions that simply result in high levels of stress and sickness" according to the union, and points to the 2,779 staff who left Jobcentre Plus call centres since April last year – approximately 20% of the workforce in the 37 Jobcentre Plus offices handling calls from the public – as evidence of the challenging work environment.
ref: Ahli PCS "mengalami keadaan kerja yang menindas yang hanya menyebabkan tahap stres yang tinggi dan penyakit" menurut kesatuan, dan menunjukkan 2779 kakitangan yang meninggalkan pusat panggilan Jobcentre Plus sejak April tahun lepas - kira-kira 20% daripada tenaga kerja dalam 37 pejabat Jobcentre Plus yang mengendali panggilan daripada orang ramai - sebagai bukti persekitaran kerja yang mencabar.

src: The union says management is "obsessed with hitting call centre targets at the expense of providing good quality services to the public".
ref: Kesatuan itu berkata pengurusan adalah "taksub dengan menyasarkan pusat panggilan demi persediaan perkhidmatan yang berkualiti kepada orang awam".

src: The DWP characterises the action differently, stating 75% of staff voted against the strike.
ref: DWP menyifatkan tindakan itu dengan pendapat yang berbeza, menyatakan 75% daripada kakitangan mengundi membantah mogok.

src: According to the DWP staff work under reasonable terms, but "we have to ensure that our service is available when our customers, who include some of the most vulnerable people in the country, need us."
ref: Menurut DWP kakitangan berkerja di bawah keadaan yang munasabah, tetapi "kita perlu memastikan bahawa perkhidmatan kami boleh didapati apabila pelanggan-pelanggan kami, yang termasuk beberapa orang yang mudah terancam di negara ini, memerlukan kita".

src: To that end the DWP readily admits it uses performance measures to ensure high productivity and performance, their goal is to "deliver value for money for the taxpayer", and they do not have any plans to change the way they do business.
ref: Untuk itu DWP dengan sudinya mengakui ia menggunakan penilaian prestasi bagi memastikan produktiviti dan prestasi yang tinggi, matlamat mereka adalah untuk "menyampaikan nilai untuk wang bagi pembayar cukai", dan mereka tidak mempunyai sebarang rancangan untuk mengubah cara mereka menjalankan perniagaan.

src: Similarly, the Lancashire Telegraph cites 120 staff on strike at the Cardwell Place call centre and the expectation that 2,500 across the North West of England were expected to take action; Middleman is quoted describing the call centres as "the modern day equivalents of dark, satanic mills where our members are over worked, overly monitored and forced to endure an obsession with arbitrary targets".
ref: Begitu juga, Telegraf Lancashire merujuk kepada 120 kakitangan yang mogok di pusat panggilan Cardwell Tempat dan jangkaan bahawa 2500 di Barat Utara England dijangka akan mengambil tindakan; kata-kata Middleman yang dipetik menggambarkan pusat panggilan sebagai "hari moden yang setara dengan kilang syaitan yang gelap, di mana ahli-ahli kami berkerja terlalu banyak, terlalu dipantau dan terpaksa bertahan dengan satu obsesi yang bersasarkan sebarangan orang".

src: The DWP reported the union informed them approximately 40% of the 9,000 staff in JSP contact centres would be taking action, which tallied with their own estimates.
ref: DWP melaporkan kesatuan itu memberitahu mereka kira-kira 40% daripada 9000 kakitangan di pusat hubungan JSP akan mengambil tindakan, yang selaras dengan anggaran mereka sendiri.

src: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu actively pushed for a military strike on Iran, according to a report published in the Israeli newspaper Haaretz on Thursday.
ref: Perdana Menteri Israel Benjamin Netanyahu secara aktif menggesa askarnya untuk membedil Iran, menurut laporan yang disiarkan dalam akhbar Haaretz Khamis lalu.

src: A document revealed by Wikileaks, dated July 20, 2007, shows that Mr. Netanyahu, leader of the Likud party, urged an attack on Iran in exchange for joining the government at the time, led by Ehud Olmert.
ref: Dokumen yang didedahkan oleh Wikileaks, bertarikh 20 July 2007 menunjukkan Encik Netanyahu, pemimpin parti Likud, menggesa serangan keatas Iran dalam pertukaran kerana menerima kerajaan pada masa itu, dipimpin oleh Ehud Olmert.

src: Mr. Netanyahu's request was made as part of discussions to form a government of national unity between Likud and Mr. Olmert's Kadima party, according to the leaked cable, classified as "confidential" and penned by Marc.J.
ref: Permintaan Encik Netanyahu dibuat sebagai sebahagian dari perbincangan untuk membuat satu kerajaan pakatan nasional antara Likud dan parti Kadima Encik Olmert, menurut dari sumber dedahan, dikelaskan sebagai "sulit" dan disogok oleh Marc.

src: Sievers, who was at the US embassy in Tel Aviv as a political counselor.
ref: J. Sievers, yang berada di Kedutaan US di Tel Aviv sebagai kaunsler politik.

src: However, Mr. Netanyahu demanded military action against Iran as the price for his participation in the proposed coalition.
ref: Bagaimanpun, Encik Netanyahu nahukan tindakan tentera terhadap Iran sebagai harga untuk penyertaan dalam cadangannya.

src: According to the advisor cited in the US cable, Mr. Netanyahu urged the Kadima leader to "galvanize Israel for action against Iran."
ref: Menurut penasihat yang juga kabel US, Encik Natanyahu menggesa pemimpin Kadima untuk "merangsang Israel kerana mengambil tindakan terhadap Iran".

src: Israel has previously entertained the possibility of military strikes to prevent Iran from attaining nuclear weapons capability.
ref: Israel sebelum ini memberitahu kemungkinan untuk askar tentera menyerang untuk menghalang Iran dari mendapatkan kebolehan senjata nuklear.

src: The Iranian government later accused the US and Israel of responsibility for the malware.
ref: Kerajaan Iran kemudian menyalahkan US dan Israel terhadap tanggungjawab penyebaran ini.

src: A three-year-old girl has been bitten by two dingoes while holidaying with her parents on Fraser Island, Queensland, Australia.
ref: Seorang gadis berusia tiga tahun telah digigit oleh dua dingo ketika bercuti bersama ibu bapanya di Pulau Fraser, Queensland, Australia.

src: The two animals responsible for the attack have since been captured and euthanised by wildlife rangers.
ref: Kedua-dua haiwan yang bertanggungjawab untuk serangan itu telah pun ditangkap dan diberi eutanasia oleh renjer hidupan liar.

src: Witnesses report that the child wandered into nearby sand dunes where she was repeatedly bitten on the legs by the wild dogs.
ref: Saksi melaporkan bahawa kanak-kanak itu merayau ke bukit-bukit pasir berdekatan di mana dia telah digigit berulang kali di kaki oleh anjing-anjing liar itu.

src: Members of the Fraser Island Preservation group believe that the parents are to blame for the attack.
ref: Ahli-ahli kumpulan Pemeliharaan Pulau Fraser percaya bahawa ibu bapanya harus dipersalahkan kerana serangan itu.

src: Spokeswoman Bree Jashin has stated the attack was the result of inattentiveness.
ref: Jurucakap Bree Jashin telah menyatakan serangan itu adalah hasil daripada kecuaian.

src: "The child was unsupervised and you have to ask how could a three-year-old get so close to the dingoes?"
ref: "Kanak-kanak itu tidak diawas dan anda perlu bertanya bagaimana seorang yang berusia tiga tahun boleh begitu dekat dengan dingo"?

src: "This is a very timely reminder for everybody about how important it is to stay very close to your children on Fraser Island," Harper stated.
ref: "Ini adalah satu peringatan yang sangat tepat pada masanya untuk semua orang mengenai kepentingan untuk berada sangat dekat dengan anak-anak anda di Pulau Fraser," Harper berkata.

src: The child received medical attention at the site of the attack and was then transported to Gympie Hospital.
ref: Kanak-kanak itu menerima rawatan perubatan di tapak serangan itu dan kemudiannya dibawa ke Hospital Gympie.

src: Former Tory cabinet minister Peter Lilley said: "Every chief constable knows their job is up for re-selection in the next year or so."
ref: Bekas menteri kabinet Tory Peter Lilley berkata: "Setiap ketua konstabel tahu tugas mereka adalah untuk pemiilihan semula tahun yang akan datang atau lebih".

src: Home Office minister Hazel Blears denied the claims: "It is entirely proper that the police were there to make their case and for Parliament to consider it."
ref: Menteri di Kementerian Dalam Negeri Hazel Blears menafikan dakwaan tersebut: "Ia adalah sepenuhnya betul yang polis berada di sana untuk memberi penjelasan dan bagi Parlimen untuk mempertimbangkannya".

src: "Certainly, as a Member of Parliament I would want to have the benefit of the best professional advice I could get before reaching my decision."
ref: "Sudah tentu, sebagai Ahli Parlimen saya mahu mendapat manfaat daripada nasihat profesional terbaik yang saya boleh dapatkan sebelum mencapai keputusan saya".

src: The predominantly Thai crew were kidnapped at gunpoint, and a ransom has been demanded for their release.
ref: Kebanyakannya kru kapal Thai telah diculik dan diacukan pistol, dan wang tebusan telah dituntut untuk pembebasan mereka.

src: The merchant ship was en-route from Brazil to Yemen with a cargo of sugar.
ref: Kapal saudagar sedang dalam laluan dari Brazil ke Yaman dengan membawa muatan gula.

src: Somalia has largely disintegrated into fiefdoms since the former dictator Siad Barre was ousted in 1991.
ref: Somalia sebahagian besarnya hancur ke dalam sistem feudal sejak bekas diktator Siad Barre digulingkan pada tahun 1991.

src: It is the fourth ship to be attacked in the space of a week.
ref: Ia adalah kapal keempat yang diserang dalam ruang masa seminggu.

src: According to the IMB, there have been 23 other pirating attacks in coastal waters off the east African nation since March 15.
ref: Menurut IMB, terdapat 23 serangan lanun lain di perairan negara Afrika timur sejak 15 Mac lalu.

src: Sir Paul McCartney is scheduled on Saturday, November 12, to perform the first concert broadcast live into space.
ref: Sir Paul McCartney dijadualkan pada hari Sabtu, 12 November, untuk melaksanakan konsert pertama disiarkan secara langsung ke angkasa lepas.

src: Songs played will include "English Tea" from his newly-released album "Chaos and Creation in the Backyard."
ref: Lagu dimainkan termasuk "English Tea" dari album baru dikeluarkan "Chaos dan Creation in the Backyard".

src: The idea for the show originally came from a report McCartney received about "Good Day Sunshine" being used to wake astronauts aboard the space shuttle Discovery as it prepared to land in August.
ref: Idea untuk persembahan asalnya datang daripada laporan McCartney menerima kira-kira "Good Day Sunshine" digunakan untuk bangun angkasawan di atas kapal kapal angkasa Discovery kerana ia bersedia untuk mendarat di bulan Ogos.

src: Said Sir Paul "I was extremely proud to find out that one of my songs was played for Discovery this summer.
ref: Kata Sir Paul "Saya amat bangga untuk mengetahui bahawa salah satu daripada lagu-lagu saya dimainkan untuk Discovery musim panas ini.

src: This event will mark the first time a live music show is broadcast into space.
ref: Acara ini akan menandakan kali pertama persembahan muzik secara langsung disiarkan ke angkasa lepas.

src: State officials in Queensland, Australia, have begun working on a draft protocol to use security cameras to record conversations in taxis.
ref: Pegawai kerajaan negeri di Queensland, Australia, telah mula mengusahakan draf protokol untuk menggunakan kamera keselamatan untuk merakamkan perbualan didalam teksi.

src: The new draft proposes to change a current policy which allows for cameras in taxis which do not record sound for privacy reasons, in the hope that audio recordings will make some investigations easier.
ref: Draf baru mencadangkan untuk menukar polisi yang sedia ada sekarang yang membolehkan kamera di teksi yang tidak rekod bunyi kerana sebab-sebab privasi, dengan harapan rakaman audio boleh memudahkan siasatan.

src: The paper, which says audio recordings would "provide greater certainty with regard to investigations, particularly in situation of conflicting statements," is currently at the Transport and Main Roads department.
ref: Kertas itu, yang berkata rakaman audio akan "memberikan lebih kepastian dengan mengambil kira siasatan, terutama sekali di situasi yang kenyataannya bercanggah," sedang berada di Jabatan Pengangkutan dan Jalan Utama.

src: The proposal also suggests extending the time taxi companies can keep recordings downloaded from security cameras from the current 30–35 days.
ref: Cadangan itu juga mencadangkan melanjutkan masa syarikat teksi boleh menyimpan rakaman yang dimuat turunkan daripada kamera keselamatan daripada 30-35 hari.

src: "In 2006 the government introduced the security cameras and most cabs now have GPS units," he said.
ref: "Pada tahun 2006 kerajaan memperkenalkan kamera keselamatan dan kebanyakan teksi sekarang mempunyai unit GPS," dia berkata.

src: "What we've got now is an improvement over having nothing at all and as a result there has been a fair improvement in the reduction of assaults on taxi drivers."
ref: "Apa yang kami ada sekarang ialah peningkatan disebalik tidak mempunyai apa-apa dan akibatnya terdapat kemajuan yang adil dengan kekurangan serangan keatas pemandu teksi".

src: Queensland Taxi Advisers Incorporated, a union of taxi operators, said they supported the introduction of audio recording because it would create "greater transparency and certainty in investigations where there were conflicting statements from drivers and passengers."
ref: Penasihat Perbadanan Teksi Queensland, kesatuan pemandu teksi, berkata mereka menyokong akan pengenalan rakaman audio kerana ia akan membuat "lebih ketelusan dan kepastian di dalam siasatan dimana kenyataan bercanggah dari pemandu dan penumpang".

src: To address privacy concerns, the paper proposes to add stickers to the entry points at the taxis.
ref: Untuk menangani kebimbangan privasi, kertas itu mencadangkan untuk menambah pelekat di bahagian masuk teksi.

src: Scott Emerson, a spokesperson for the Liberal National Party of Queensland, objected to the measure on privacy grounds.
ref: Scott Emerson, seorang jurucakap untuk Pihak Negara Liberal Queensland, membantah langkah tersebut kerana alasan privasi.

src: "We need to know how these recordings are going to be used," he said.
ref: "Kita harus tahu bagaimana rakaman ini akan digunakan," dia berkata.

src: "We're swapping from saying it's about safety to saying it's about setting fare disputes," he said.
ref: "Kami bertukar daripada berkata ia mengenai keselamatan kepada berkata ia mengenai pertikaian tambang," dia berkata.

src: Annastacia Palaszczuk, Queensland's Transport Minister, said the ideas within the proposal would be heavily considered before being implemented.
ref: Menteri Pengangkutan Queenland, Annastacia Palaszczuk, berkata idea di dalam cadangan akan dipertimbangkan dengan berat sebelum dilaksanakan.

src: She said: "If people think it's a good idea then we go to full consultation."
ref: Dia berkata: "Jika orang ramai fikir ia cadangan yang bagus kemudian kita akan membuat konsultasi penuh".

src: "I would be meeting with the privacy commissioner, I'd be meeting with the taxi industry, I'd be consulting with members of the public in a much more formal way."
ref: "Saya akan bertemu dengan pesuruhjaya privasi, saya akan bertemu dengan industri teksi, saya akan berunding dengan orang awam dengan cara yang lebih formal".

src: The police reported 284 vehicles being torched in petrol bomb attacks on Sunday, the 18th consecutive night of the riots.
ref: Polis melaporkan 284 kenderaan yang dibakar dalam serangan bom petrol pada hari Ahad, malam rusuhan ke-18 yang berturut-turut.

src: The number is lower than the previous night, when 374 cars were destroyed, and considerably below previous week's peak of 1,400.
ref: Bilangan ini adalah lebih rendah daripada malam sebelumnya, apabila 374 kereta telah dimusnahkan, dan jauh di bawah puncak minggu lepas yang berbilang 1,400.

src: Chirac was quoted by a government spokesman as saying that the emergency powers were "strictly temporary and will only be applied where they are strictly necessary."
ref: Chirac dinyatakan oleh jurucakap kerajaan berkata bahawa kuasa-kuasa darurat adalah "hanya sementara dan akan hanya akan digunakan semasa perlu."

src: Since the beginning of the unrest on October 27, more than 8,000 cars have been torched, more than 2,700 people arrested and dozens of buildings wrecked.
ref: Sejak awal rusuhan pada 27 Oktober, lebih daripada 8,000 kereta telah dibakar, lebih daripada 2,700 orang ditangkap dan berpuluh-puluh bangunan dirosakkan.

src: According to José Manuel Durão Barroso, President of the European Commission, the European Union is prepared to release 50 million € in aid for damaged areas.
ref: Menurut José Manuel Barroso Durão, Presiden Suruhanjaya Eropah, Kesatuan Eropah bersedia untuk mmberikan 50 juta € sebagai bantuan untuk kawasan-kawasan yang rosak.

src: The submarine was seen by Hanna Harge, a 40-year-old entrepreneur who lives locally, when walking with her dog on the morning of 13 April this year.
ref: Kapal selam itu dijumpai oleh Hanna Harge, seorang usahawan berusia 40 tahun yang tinggal berdekatan, apabila berjalan-jalan dengan anjingnya pada pagi 13 April tahun ini.

src: Soon afterwards, the Navy's intelligence agency visited Harge, taking the pictures to technical staff.
ref: Sejurus selepas itu, agensi perisikan tentera laut tersebut melawat Harge, mengambil gambar-gambar tersebut kepada staf teknikal.

src: In addition to the Armed Forces of Sweden, other government agencies are also involved in the investigation such as SMHI and Environmental Protection Agency.
ref: Selain daripada tentera bersenjata Sweden, agensi kerajaan lain turut terlibat dalam siasatan tersebut seperti SMHI dan Agensi Perlindungan Alam Sekitar.

src: According to Andersson Larsson of the technical staff, the proceedings of the investigation are classified and it is expected to be finished and sent to the Government of Sweden within two months.
ref: Menurut seorang staf teknikal, Anderson Larsson, perkembangan siasatan itu telah dirahsiakan dan ia dijangka akan berakhir dan dihantar ke Kerajaan Sweden dalam masa dua bulan.

src: Emergency Contraceptive Pills or ECPs ("morning-after" or "next-day" pills ) are used to prevent an unintended pregnancy, following unprotected sexual intercourse.
ref: Pil kecemasan Pencegah Kehamilan atau ECPs ("selepas pagi" atau "esok hari" pil) digunakan untuk mencegah kehamilan yang tidak diingini, berikutan hubungan seks tanpa perlindungan.

src: They are objectionable for abortion opponents who consider their use to be a form of abortion, though scientific studies (including those by the FDA) classify them as contraceptives.
ref: Mereka membantah golongan pengguguran yang menganggap penggunaan pil itu untuk menjadi satu bentuk pengguguran, walaupun kajian saintifik (termasuk oleh FDA) mengklasifikasikan mereka sebagai pencegah kehamilan.

src: The pill, called Plan B is manufactured by Barr Laboratories and had been approved earlier by the FDA as a prescription drug.
ref: Pil, yang disebut Pelan B dihasilkan oleh Makmal Barr dan telah diluluskan sebelum ini oleh FDA sebagai ubat preskripsi.

src: Barr Laboratories requested that the drug be approved for OTC sale for adults and prescription-only sale for minors.
ref: Makmal Barr meminta ubat itu diluluskan untuk jualan OTC untuk orang dewasa dan penjualan preskripsi hanya untuk golongan bawah umur.

src: The decision to not approve went against the advice given by the FDA's Joint Advisory Committee and its Review staff and led to a GAO investigation into the decision making process.
ref: Keputusan untuk tidak diluluskan bertentangan dengan nasihat yang diberikan oleh Jawatankuasa Penasihat Bersama FDA dan Ulasan kakitangan dan membawa kepada siasatan GAO ke dalam proses membuat keputusan.

src: The investigation was requested by 30 House members and 17 Senators.
ref: Siasatan telah diminta oleh 30 ahli Dewan Rakyat dan 17 Ahli Dewan Negara.

src: The decision was not signed off by the director of the office responsible for the application and the director of the Office of New Drugs, as they disagreed with the "reject" decision.
ref: Keputusan itu tidak ditandatangani oleh pengarah pejabat yang bertanggungjawab bagi permohonan dan pengarah Pejabat Dadah Baru, kerana mereka tidak bersetuju dengan keputusan "ditolak".

src: The Plan B decision was the only one of 67 proposed prescription to OTC changes to be disapproved, even after advisory committees approved the changes.
ref: Keputusan Pelan B adalah hanya satu daripada 67 cadangan preskripsi kepada perubahan OTC yang tidak diluluskan, walaupun selepas jawatankuasa penasihat meluluskan perubahan.

src: FDA review staff told the investigators that they were told early in the review process that the decision would be made by high-level management.
ref: Kakitangan kajian FDA memberitahu penyiasat bahawa mereka diberitahu awal dalam proses kajian semula itu bahawa keputusan akan dibuat oleh pihak pengurusan peringkat tertinggi.

src: E-mail and other documents involving the then-FDA Commissioner Mark McClellan were found to have been destroyed "routinely".
ref: E-mel dan dokumen-dokumen lain yang melibatkan Pesuruhjaya FDA-terdahulu Mark McClellan didapati telah musnah "secara rutin".

src: The acting director cited concerns about the potential behavioral implications for younger adolescents from OTC marketing of Plan-B, given their supposed lower cognitive ability, and that it was not valid to extrapolate data from older to younger audiences.
ref: Pemangku pengarah menyatakan kebimbangan mengenai implikasi tingkah laku yang berpotensi untuk remaja yang lebih muda daripada pemasaran OTC Pelan-B, memandangkan keupayaan kognitif lebih rendah mereka sepatutnya, dan ia adalah tidak sah untuk membuat anggaran data dari lebih tua kepada penonton muda.

src: India's has labelled honour killings a "slur on the nation," and warned the death penalty will await those found guilty of the crime.
ref: India telah melabelkan pembunuhan maruah satu "penghinaan kepada negara," dan memberi amaran bahawa hukuman mati akan menunggu mereka yang didapati bersalah atas jenayah itu.

src: An independent study says each year an estimated 900 people are murdered in India for bringing dishonour to their families, usually by falling in love and marrying outside their caste or within their sub-caste.
ref: Satu kajian bebas berkata setiap tahun kira-kira 900 orang dibunuh di India kerana membawa keaiban kepada keluarga mereka, biasanya dengan jatuh cinta dan berkahwin di luar kasta mereka atau dalam sub-kasta mereka.

src: Honour killings, accepted as a cultural tradition in some parts of India, are normally punished with life imprisonment.
ref: Pembunuhan maruah, diterima sebagai tradisi budaya di beberapa kawasan di India, biasanya dihukum penjara seumur hidup.

src: "It is time to stamp out these barbaric, feudal practices which are a slur on the nation.
ref: "Sudah tiba masanya untuk menghapuskan amalan kejam, dan feudal ini yang merupakan penghinaan kepada negara.

src: All persons who are planning to perpetrate honour killings should know that gallows await them," Justice Katju said.
ref: Semua orang yang merancang untuk melakukan pembunuhan maruah perlu tahu bahawa tali gantung menanti mereka," kata Hakim Katju.

src: The crack-down came yesterday, as the Supreme Court dismissed an appeal to lessen the life imprisonment of Bhagwan Dass.
ref: Tindakan keras itu berlaku semalam, semasa Mahkamah Agung menolak rayuan untuk mengurangkan hukuman penjara seumur hidup Bhagwan Dass.

src: The Supreme Court also condemned the traditional village councils who endorse these honour killings and order them to be carried out.
ref: Mahkamah Agung juga mengutuk majlis-majlis kampung tradisional yang menyokong pembunuhan maruah ini dan memerintahnya supaya dijalankan.

src: Two people were killed in a magnitude 5.9 earthquake in Turkey shortly before midnight local time on Thursday.
ref: Dua orang terbunuh dalam gempabumi bermagnitud 5.9 di Turki sebaik sahaja selepas tengah malam waktu tempatan pada Khamis.

src: Officials said two people were killed;  one was thought to have suffered a heart attack and the other died after jumping from a window in panic.
ref: Pegawai mengatakan yang dua orang terbunuh; Seorang disangkakan menderita serangan jantung dan seorang lagi mati selepas melompat keluar dari tingkap dalam kepanikan.

src: Emergency services dispatched search and rescue crews and gave out blankets, food and water.
ref: Khidmat kecemasan menghantar anggota mencari dan menyelamat dan mengedarkan selimt, makanan dan air.

src: Officials said a wastewater dam had not been damaged by the earthquake, and it posed "no risk."
ref: Pegawai berkata yang loji air kumbahan tidak dirosakan oleh gempa bumi tersebut, dan ia menandakan "tiada risiko".

src: More than 18,000 people died following two earthquakes with a magnitude of more than 7.0 in northwestern Turkey in 1999.
ref: Lebih dari 18,000 orang mati berikutan dua gempabumi dengan magnitud lebih dari 7.0 di barat laut Turki pada 1999.

src: Pakistani militants killed ten soldiers and injured fifteen more during an attack on PNS Mehran, a military base in Karachi, in a revenge strike after the killing of Osama bin Laden.
ref: Militan Pakistan membunuh sepuluh askar dan mencederakan lebih lima belas semasa serangan ke atas PNS Mehran, sebuah pangkalan tentera di Karachi, dalam serangan balas dendam selepas pembunuhan Osama bin Laden.

src: Commandos have cleared the base of militants; three of the attackers were reported also to have been killed.
ref: Komando telah membersihkan pangkal militan; tiga daripada penyerang dilaporkan juga telah dibunuh.

src: The militants reportedly took hostages inside the base but officials said they all had been rescued unharmed.
ref: Militan dilaporkan mengambil tebusan di pangkalan tetapi pegawai berkata, mereka semua telah diselamatkan tanpa kecederaan.

src: Military forces continued to fight off the militants on Monday morning, hours after the attack began the night before when as many as twenty militants stormed hangars at the base and used rocket-propelled grenades to destroy a number of military aircraft, including a P-3C Orion.
ref: Angkatan tentera terus melawan militan pada pagi Isnin, beberapa jam selepas serangan bermula malam sebelumnya apabila sebanyak dua puluh militan menyerbu hangar di pangkalan dan menggunakan bom tangan roket untuk memusnahkan beberapa pesawat tentera, termasuk P-3C Orion.

src: Witnesses reported hearing a number of loud explosions and heavy gunfire as the militants continued to attack the base.
ref: Saksi-saksi melaporkan mendengar beberapa letupan kuat dan tembakan berat apabila kumpulan militan terus menyerang pangkalan.

src: "They were carrying guns, rocket-propelled grenades and hand grenades," a spokesperson for the Pakistan navy said.
ref: "Mereka membawa senjata, bom tangan roket dan bom tangan," kata seorang jurucakap tentera laut Pakistan itu.

src: Yusuf Raza Gilani, the prime minister, said the attack was a "cowardly act of terror".
ref: Yusuf Raza Gilani, Perdana Menteri berkata, serangan itu adalah "tindakan keganasan pengecut".

src: Reports last night indicated hostages may have been taken at the base, but officials have confirmed all foreigners at the base are safe and any hostages taken have been freed.
ref: Laporan semalam menunjukkan tebusan mungkin telah diambil di pangkalan, tetapi pegawai-pegawai telah mengesahkan semua warga asing di pangkalan adalah selamat dan sebarang tebusan diambil telah dibebaskan.

src: Commandos moved in after the attack begun and fighting continued throughout the night, and more loud explosions and gunfire were heard in the base on Monday morning.
ref: Komando bergerak selepas serangan bermula dan pertempuran berterusan sepanjang malam, dan letupan lebih kuat dan tembakan kedengaran di pangkalan pada pagi Isnin.

src: "It was the revenge of martyrdom of Osama bin Laden," the spokesperson said.
ref: Ia adalah membalas dendam syahid Osama bin Laden, kata jurucakap itu.

src: "It was the proof that we are still united and powerful."
ref: "Ini adalah bukti bahawa kita masih bersatu dan kuat".

src: The group warned after the death of bin Laden that they would attack Pakistani military targets.
ref: Kumpulan itu memberi amaran selepas kematian bin Laden bahawa mereka akan menyerang sasaran tentera Pakistan.

src: The United Nations Human Rights Commissioner has questioned Australia's tough asylum seeker policies this week, stating that Australia's mandatory detention regime has "cast a shadow" over its human rights record.
ref: Pesuruhjaya Hak Asasi Manusia Bangsa-bangsa Bersatu telah menyoal dasar-dasar pencari suaka yang ketat minggu ini, menyatakan bahawa peraturan penahanan mandatori Australia telah "mencemarkan" rekod hak asasi manusianya.

src: This bilateral agreement, if signed, would see 800 refugees attempting to get to Australia by boat immediately transported to Malaysia instead.
ref: Perjanjian dua hala ini, jika ditandatangani, akan melihat 800 pelarian yang cuba pergi ke Australia dengan bot terus dihantar ke Malaysia.

src: In return, Australia would take 4,000 genuine refugees from Malaysia over a space of four years.
ref: Sebagai balasan, Australia akan mengambil 4,000 pelarian tulen dari Malaysia selama empat tahun.

src: However, Malaysia has not signed either the international Refugee Convention, or the Convention Against Torture.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Malaysia belum menandatangani sama ada Konvensyen Pelarian, atau Konvensyen Menangani Penyeksaan.

src: In an interview with the ABC, Ms Pillay voiced concern over this, stating that Australia may "violate refugee law" by sending asylum seekers to a country where no laws are in place to protect them.
ref: Di dalam temubual dengan ABC, Cik Pillay menyuarakan kebimbangan terhadap perkara ini, menyatakan bahawa Australia mungkin "mencemari undang-undang pelarian" dengan menghantar pencari suaka ke sebuah negara di mana tiada undang-undang yang akan melindung mereka.

src: Pillay, a South African former anti-apartheid protester, also voiced distress over the omnipresence of political "demonising" of these asylum seekers stating, "[t]he consequence of the constant political refrain that Australia is being 'flooded' by people who are 'queue jumpers' has resulted in a stigmatisation of an entire group of people, irrespective of where they have come from or what dangers they have fled".
ref: Pillay, seorang bekas pembantah anti-apartheid Afrika Selatan, juga menyuarakan kebimbangan terhadap kewujudan "penggambaran seseorang sebagai kejam" secara politik pencari-pencari suaka ini dengan menyatakan, "akibat penahanan politik yang berterusan 'dibanjiri'orang yang 'mengelat'telah menyebabkan pengecapan seluruh kumpulan, tidak mengira dari mana mereka datang atau daripada bahaya apa yang mereka melarikan diri".

src: The mistreatment of refugees was today reinforced with the release of an Australian Rights Commission report, which revealed extensive problems of self-harm and depression among detainees at the Villawood Detention Centre in Sydney.
ref: Penganiayaan pelarian ini telah diperkukuhkan hari ini dengan pelepasan laporan Suruhanjaya Hak Australia, yang memperlihatkan masalah-masalah besar kemurungan dan yang membahayakan diri di antara tahanan-tahanan di Pusat Penahanan Villawood di Sydney.

src: Update November 21, 2005: All of the 14 miners missing were confirmed dead on Monday, the official Xinhua News Agency said.
ref: Dikemas kini pada 21 November, 2005: Kesemua 14 pelombong yang hilang disahkan meninggal dunia pada hari Isnin, pegawai Agensi Xinhua News berkata.

src: The Xinhua news agency reports the latest coal mine disaster occurred around 5:00 a.m. on Saturday in Xingtai City.
ref: Agensi Xinhua News melaporkan bencana lombong batu terbaru itu berlaku sekitar pukul 5:00 a.m. hari Sabtu di Bandar Xingtai.

src: State media reports say the disaster occurred at a pit in Xingtai City, but gave few other details.
ref: Media milik negara melaporkan bahawa bencana tersebut berlaku di satu jurang di Bandar Xingtai, namun hanya memberikan sedikit maklumat.

src: China's mines, many of them illegal, are considered the world's most dangerous.
ref: Lombong China, kebanyakannya adalah haram, dianggap sebagai yang paling bahaya di dunia.

src: Other independent estimates put the real figure at around 20,000.
ref: Persatuan bebas menganggarkan angka sebenar sekitar 20,000.

src: Xinhua reports that rescue work is underway, according to the local work safety supervision bureau.
ref: Xinhua melaporkan bahawa kerja menyelamat sedang dijalankan menurut biro pengawasan keselamatan kerja tempatan.

src: This is the second fatal mine accident in the area in two weeks.
ref: Ini merupakan kemalangan maut yang kedua di kawasan tersebut dalam masa dua minggu.

src: Cave-ins at three plaster mines on November 6 caused 33 deaths and left at least four missing.
ref: Runtuhan tiga lombong plaster pada 6 November meagakibatkan 33 kematian dan menyebabkan sekurang-kurangnya empat orang hilang.

src: The fourteenth Quiksilver Ceremonial Punta de Lobos Big Wave Invitational surf championship took place on Saturday in the Chilean city of Pichilemu, often called the "Capital of the Surf."
ref: Kejuaraan luncur air Quiksilver Ceremonial Punta de Lobos Big Wave Invitational telah diadakan pada Sabtu lalu di bandar Chilean di Pichilemu, juga dikenali sebagai "Ibu kota luncur air".

src: In this year's competition, 24 surfers from countries such as South Africa, Peru, Chile, the United States, and Argentina participated in the championship, including Pichileminians Ramón Navarro and Cristian Merelló, and Hawaiian Köhl Christensen.
ref: Dalam perlawanan tahun ini, 24 orang peluncur air dari negara seperti Afrika Selatan, Peru, Chile, Amerika Syarikat, dan Argentina telah menyertai kejuaraan ini, termasuklah warganegara Pichilemu Ramon Navarro dan Cristian Merello, dan warganegara Hawaii Kohl Christensen.

src: A man claiming to have attached a bomb to his body has been arrested after a stand-off with police officers in a town in Hertfordshire, England.
ref: Seorang lelaki yang mendakwa telah melampirkan bom di badannya telah diberkas selepas bertentang dengan pegawai polis di bandar di Hertfordshire, England.

src: Police were notified of the incident at the Co-operative Bank on Market Street, Watford at approximately 1020 BST (0920 UTC) Thursday.
ref: Polis diberitahu mengenai kejadian di Cooperative Bank di Market Street, Watford pada kira-kira 1020 BST (0920 UTC) pada hari Khamis.

src: Much of the town centre was sealed off during this incident.
ref: Kebanyakan tempat bandar ditutup semasa kejadian ini.

src: "There will be police activity in the town centre for a while to come."
ref: "Akan ada aktiviti polis di bandar untuk beberapa hari akan datang".

src: "Understandably this caused concern within the community and we would like to thank members of the public for their co-operation in this matter."
ref: "Difahamkan ini mendatangkan kebimbangan didalam masyarakat dan kami ingin berterima kasih kepada orang awam kerana bekerjasama dalam hal ini".

src: Online organisations around the world are today testing (IPv6) — a new system of Internet addresses hoped to resolve the issue of the present system being at capacity.
ref: Organisasi atas talian seluruh dunia kini menguji (IPv6) - satu sistem baru mengenai alamat internet berharap untuk menyelesaikan isu kapasiti sistem sedia ada.

src: The current standard was set up in the 1980s; it gives everything on the Internet a twelve-digit address and allows for 4.3 billion combinations.
ref: Piawaian semasa ditetapkan pada 1980an; memberi kesemua benda atas talian satu alamat dua belas-digit dan membenarkan 4.3 bilion kombinasi.

src: Fiji and Australia are among the first countries to have business-hours web traffic during the test.
ref: Fiji dan Australia merupakan antara negara pertama yang mempunyai web trafik waktu perniagaan semasa ujian tersebut.

src: The no-confidence vote against Paul Martin's government was introduced by three of the opposition parties last week.
ref: Undi tidak percaya terhadap kerajaan Paul Martin telah diperkenalkan oleh tiga parti pembangkang minggu lepas.

src: NASA's Cassini–Huygens spacecraft has discovered evidence for a large-scale saltwater reservoir beneath the icy crust of Saturn's moon Enceladus.
ref: Kapal angkasa NASA, Cassini-Huygens telah menemui bukti kewujudan takungan besar air masin di bawah kerak berais bulan Zuhal Enceladus.

src: The data came from the spacecraft's direct analysis of salt-rich ice grains close to the jets ejected from the moon.
ref: Data datang dari analisis langsung kapal angkasa ke atas bijirin ais yang kaya yang diusir berdekatan dengan jet dari bulan.

src: The study has been published in this week's edition of the journal Nature.
ref: Kajian ini telah diterbitkan dalam edisi minggu ini jurnal Nature.

src: Data from Cassini's cosmic dust analyzer show the grains expelled from fissures, known as tiger stripes, are relatively small and usually low in salt far away from the moon.
ref: Data daripada penganalisis debu kosmik Cassini menunjukkan bijirin diusir keluar dari rekahan, yang dikenali sebagai jalur harimau, adalah kecil dan biasanya kandungan garam rendah jauh dari bulan.

src: Closer to the moon's surface, Cassini found that relatively large grains rich with sodium and potassium dominate the plumes.
ref: Semakin dekat dengan permukaan bulan, Cassini mendapati bahawa bijirin yang agak besar kaya dengan natrium dan kalium memenuhi kepulan.

src: The salt-rich particles have an "ocean-like" composition and indicate that most, if not all, of the expelled ice and water vapor comes from the evaporation of liquid salt-water.
ref: Zarah garam yang kaya mempunyai komposisi "seperti lautan" dan menunjukkan bahawa kebanyakan, jika tidak semua, ais dan air wap diusir berasal dari penyejatan cecair air masin.

src: Cassini's ultraviolet imaging spectrograph also recently obtained complementary results that support the presence of a subsurface ocean.
ref: Spektograf pengimejan ultraviolet Cassini juga baru-baru mendapat keputusan pelengkap yang menyokong kehadiran lautan subpermukaan.

src: These observations of distinct jets, from a 2010 flyby, are consistent with results showing a difference in composition of ice grains close to the moon's surface and those that made it out to the E ring, the outermost ring that gets its material primarily from Enceladean jets.
ref: Pemerhatian dari jet berbeza, dari flyby 2010, selaras dengan keputusan yang menunjukkan perbezaan dalam komposisi bijirin ais berhampiran dengan permukaan bulan dan yang berjaya keluar ke gelanggang E, gelang paling luar yang mendapat bahan terutamanya daripada jet Enceladean.

src: The data suggests a layer of water between the moon's rocky core and its icy mantle, possibly as deep as about 50 miles (80 kilometers) beneath the surface.
ref: Data menunjukkan adanya lapisan air di antara teras berbatu bulan dan mantel berais, mungkin sedalam kira-kira 50 batu (80 kilometer) di bawah permukaan.

src: As this water washes against the rocks, it dissolves salt compounds and rises through fractures in the overlying ice to form reserves nearer the surface.
ref: Seperti air ini mengalir terhadap batu-batu, ia larut sebatian garam dan naik melalui retakan dalam bahagian atas ais untuk membentuk rizab dekat permukaan.

src: If the outermost layer cracks open, the decrease in pressure from these reserves to space causes a plume to shoot out.
ref: Jika retak lapisan paling luar terbuka, penurunan tekanan daripada rizab ini membuka ruang menyebabkan kepulan ditembak keluar.

src: Roughly 400 pounds (200 kilograms) of water vapor is lost every second in the plumes, with smaller amounts being lost as ice grains.
ref: Kira-kira 400 pound (200 kilogram) wap air hilang setiap saat dalam kepulan, dengan jumlah yang lebih kecil yang hilang sebagai bijirin ais.

src: "We imagine that between the ice and the ice core there is an ocean of depth and this is somehow connected to the surface reservoir," added Postberg.
ref: "Kami membayangkan bahawa antara ais dan teras ais di sana adalah lautan yang mendalam dan ini entah bagaimana ia berhubung dengan takungan permukaan," tambah Postberg.

src: In 2009, scientists working with the cosmic dust analyzer examined some sodium salts found in ice grains of Saturn's E ring but the link to subsurface salt water was not definitive.
ref: Pada tahun 2009, ahli-ahli sains bekerja dengan penganalisis debu kosmik memeriksa beberapa garam natrium yang terdapat di dalam bijirin ais pergelangan E Zuhal tetapi pautan ke bawah permukaan air garam tidak muktamad.

src: The new paper analyzes three Enceladus flybys in 2008 and 2009 with the same instrument, focusing on the composition of freshly ejected plume grains.
ref: Kertas baru menganalisis tiga Enceladus flybys pada tahun 2008 dan 2009 dengan instrumen yang sama, memberi tumpuan kepada komposisi bijirin gumpalan yang baru dikeluarkan.

src: Electrical fields inside the cosmic dust analyzer separated the various constituents of the impact cloud.
ref: Medan elektrik di dalam penganalisis debu kosmik memisahkan pelbagai kesan juzuk awan.

src: "Enceladus has got warmth, water and organic chemicals, some of the essential building blocks needed for life," said Dennis Matson in 2008, Cassini project scientist at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Pasadena, California.
ref: "Enceladus telah mendapat kehangatan, air dan bahan kimia organik, beberapa blok bangunan yang penting diperlukan untuk kehidupan," kata Dennis Matson pada tahun 2008, Cassini saintis projek di Jet Propulsion Laboratory NASA di Pasadena, California.

src: "This finding is a crucial new piece of evidence showing that environmental conditions favorable to the emergence of life can be sustained on icy bodies orbiting gas giant planets," said Nicolas Altobelli, the European Space Agency's project scientist for Cassini.
ref: "Penemuan ini adalah sekeping bukti penting baru yang menunjukkan bahawa keadaan persekitaran yang menggalakkan untuk kemunculan kehidupan dapat dikekalkan pada badan berais yang mengorbit planet gas gergasi," kata Nicolas Altobelli, Agensi Angkasa Eropah projek saintis untuk Cassini.

src: A United Nations court today convicted a woman, a former minister in the Rwandan government, for her role in the 1994 genocide in the ethnic war between the Tutsi and the Hutu peoples.
ref: Sebuah mahkamah Persatuan Bangsa-bangsa Bersatu hari ini mensabitkan seorang wanita, bekas menteri dalam kerajaan Rwanda, untuk peranannya dalam pembunuhan beramai-ramai 1994 dalam perang etnik antara rakyat Tutsi dan Hutu.

src: Jamaican Olympic athlete and coach Pablo McNeil has died at the age of 71.
ref: Atlet Olimpik Jamaica dan jurulatih, Pablo McNeil telah meninggal dunia pada usia 71.

src: The cause of death was a long illness he suffered since a stroke in December 2007.
ref: Punca kematian adalah sakit yang lama dialami olehnya sejak mendapat strok pada Disember 2007.

src: A sprinter since childhood, McNeil competed at two Olympic Games.
ref: Pelari pecut sejak kecil, McNeil telah bertanding di dua Sukan Olimpik.

src: He convinced Bolt to make the switch from cricket to track and trained him up until the age of 16, when Bolt joined the Jamaica Amateur Athletic Association-administered High Performance Training Centre in Kingston.
ref: Beliau meyakinkan Bolt untuk membuat pertukaran daripada kriket kepada trek dan melatih dia sehingga umur 16 tahun, apabila Bolt menyertai Persatuan Olahraga Amatur Jamaica - ditadbir Pusat Latihan Prestasi Tinggi di Kingston.

src: Bolt, through his publicist, said that "Coach McNeil was a part of my early track and field life."
ref: Bolt, melalui jurucakap beliau, berkata bahawa "Jurulatih McNeil ialah sebahagian daripada kehidupan awal trek dan padang saya."

src: "I would like to offer my condolences and sympathies to his family and close friends."
ref: "Saya ingin merakamkan ucapan takziah dan simpati kepada ahli keluarga dan sahabat rapatnya."

src: "He was a good competitor for Jamaica and went on to nurture, mentor, inspire and coach some of our fine young athletes at William Knibb High School - including Usain Bolt who has been such a success and inspiration."
ref: "Beliau ialah seorang pesaing yang baik untuk Jamaica dan pergi untuk memupuk, menjadi mentor, memberi inspirasi dan melatih beberapa atlet muda kami yang bagus di William Knibb High School - termasuk Usain Bolt yang telah menjadi satu kejayaan dan inspirasi."

src: "On behalf of the Government and people of Jamaica, I offer sincerely condolences to Pablo McNeil’s family, friends, and the entire Track and Field fraternity who will be saddened by his passing."
ref: "Bagi pihak kerajaan dan rakyat Jamaica, saya setulus ikhlas merakamkan ucapan takziah kepada keluarga Pablo McNeil, rakan-rakannya, dan seluruh warga balapan dan padang yang sedih dengan pemergian beliau."

src: The two share a distinct genetic marker not present in other brown bears, strongly suggesting that all modern polar bears are descended from the same extinct species.
ref: Kedua-dua berkongsi penanda genetik yang tidak berada di dalam beruang coklat lain, mencadangkan bahawa semua beruang kutub moden adalah keturunan spesies pupus sama.

src: The study found evidence of polar bear hybridization with a now-extinct population of brown bears that lived in Ireland and Britain during the last ice age.
ref: Kajian mendapati bahawa kutub beruang pembiakan kacukan dengan populasi beruang coklat yang hidup di Ireland dan Britain yang pupus semasa zaman ais terakhir.

src: Brown bears are no longer found on the British Isles, and it had been thought that polar bears interbred more recently with brown bears living around Alaska.
ref: Beruang coklat tidak lagi dapat ditemui di Kepulauan British, dan ia telah disangka bahawa beruang kutub telah bercampur aduk dengan beruang coklat yang tinggal di sekitar Alaska baru-baru ini.

src: Climate change is thought to have presented opportunities for the two species to mate now and then in the past 100,000 years.
ref: Perubahan iklim dianggap telah menyediakan peluang kepada kedua-dua spesies untuk mengawan dari sekarang dan kemudian dalam 100,000 tahun yang lalu.

src: Ten Irish brown bears from between 10,000 and 38,000 years ago carried a distinct sequence of mitochondrial DNA, originating from a specific female brown bear, and this DNA sequence has been passed down the female polar bear line and is found in all polar bears today.
ref: Sepuluh beruang coklat Ireland dari antara 10,000 dan 38,000 tahun dahulu mempunyai urutan DNA mitokondria berbeza yang berasal dari wanita beruang coklat tertentu, dan urutan DNA ini telah diwarisi beruang kutub betina dan ditemui dalam semua beruang kutub hari ini.

src: Fossils from the last species of ancient brown bears in Ireland, living from 3,000 to 5,000 years ago, have a different genetic fingerprint, matching neither that of polar bears nor of modern brown bears.
ref: Fosil dari spesies terakhir beruang perang purba di Ireland yang telah hidup daripada 3,000 hingga 5,000 tahun lalu, mempunyai cap jari genetik berbeza yang berbeza dengan beruang kutub atau beruang coklat moden.

src: This maternal lineage is now present in all modern polar bears."
ref: Garis keturunan ini hadir dalam semua beruang kutub moden".

src: They suggest that hybridization may be more common than previously recognized and may be a way species deal with loss of their habitats when the environment is changing.
ref: Mereka mencadangkan bahawa pembiakan kacukan mungkin lebih biasa daripada yang diiktiraf sebelum ini dan boleh menjadi cara spesies berurusan dengan kehilangan habitat mereka apabila persekitaran berubah.

src: After Kenyans voted "no" for the implementation of the new constitution, the "Orange" anti-constitution campaign and the "Banana" pro-constitution campaign finally sat down together to discuss the way forward.
ref: Selepas Kenya mengundi "tidak" bagi pelaksanaan perlembagaan baru, "Orange" kempen anti-perlembagaan dan "pisang" kempen pro-perlembagaan akhirnya duduk bersama-sama membincangkan jalan ke hadapan.

src: It would have also given women equal rights to inherit property, and addressed local elections.
ref: Ia akan juga telah memberikan wanita hak yang sama untuk memperoleh harta, dan berucap di pilihan raya tempatan.

src: A day after the results were announced, the President of the country, Mwai Kibaki, fired his whole cabinet.
ref: Sehari selepas keputusan diumumkan, Presiden negara ini, Mwai Kibaki, memecat seluruh kabinet beliau.

src: Clinton is on a two-day visit to Turkey and made some of her comments during a news conference on the Turkish CNN channel during an event where she answered questions from Turkish citizens.
ref: Clinton dalam lawatan dua hari ke Turki dan memberi sedikit komen beliau semasa sidang berita di saluran CNN Turki dalam satu acara di mana beliau menjawab soalan daripada rakyat Turki.

src: Answering a question regarding the issue, she said that "I do not think it’s necessary or in Turkey's interests to be cracking down on journalists and bloggers and the Internet [...] it seems to me inconsistent with all the other advances that Turkey has made."
ref: Menjawab satu soalan mengenai isu itu, beliau berkata, "Saya tidak rasa ia adalah perlu atau demi kepentingan Turki yang penindasan wartawan dan penulis blog dan Internet [...] pada saya itu seolah-olahnya tidak selaras dengan semua kemajuan lain yang Turki telah lakukan".

src: In a press conference jointly held with Ahmet Davutoglu, Turkey's foreign minister, Clinton suggested that Turkey could serve as an example for Arab countries currently undergoing governmental changes.
ref: Dalam sidang akhbar yang diadakan bersama Ahmet Davutoglu, Menteri Luar Turki, Clinton mencadangkan supaya Turki boleh menjadi teladan bagi negara-negara Arab yang sedang menjalani perubahan kerajaan.

src: In some recent arrests, authorities have cited anti-terror laws as justification.
ref: Dalam beberapa tangkapan baru-baru ini, pihak berkuasa telah menamakan undang-undang anti-keganasan sebagai justifikasi.

src: Such human rights concerns have long served as a stumbling block for Turkey's attempts to join the European Union.
ref: Keprihatinan hak asasi manusia telah lama menjadi penghalang percubaan Turki untuk menyertai Kesatuan Eropah.

src: British singer Amy Winehouse died today in her London home in Camden Square, aged 27.
ref: Penyanyi British Amy Winehouse meninggal dunia hari ini di rumahnya di London di Camden Square, berumur 27.

src: "On arrival, officers found the body of a 27-year-old female who was pronounced dead at the scene", said a police statement on their website.
ref: "Ketika mereka tiba, pegawai mendapati mayat seorang wanita berusia 27 tahun yang disahkan meninggal dunia di tempat kejadian", disebut dalam satu kenyataan polis di laman web mereka.

src: Lieutenant Paul Vernon of the Los Angeles Police Department says the two men are in critical condition.
ref: Leftenan Paul Vernon dari Jambatan Polis Los Angeles berkata bahawa kedua-dua lelaki tersebut berada di dalam keadaan kritikal.

src: Witnesses say the two men, both Asian and in their 20s, were smoking outside the club when a man wearing a ski mask approached and shot the two around 1:30 a.m. local time (9:30 UTC).
ref: Saksi berkata 2 lelaki itu, dan kedua-duanya lelaki Asia berusia 20-an, sedang merokok di luar kelab itu apabila seorang lelaki memakai topeng ski mendekati dan menembak dua orang tersebut pada pukul 1:30 pagi waktu tempatan (9:30 UTC).

src: The men suffered multiple wounds and crawled into the club.
ref: Lelaki - lelaki tersebut mengalami beberapa kecederaan dan merangkak masuk ke dalam kelab.

src: Investigators say there were ten bullet casings at the scene from a semiautomatic firearm.
ref: Penyiasat berkata terdapat sepuluh sarung peluru di lokasi itu berasal daripada senjata api separuh automatik.

src: Professor Mirecki had left his home and was driving to breakfast when he noticed the men tailgating him in a pickup truck.
ref: Profesor Mirecki telah meninggalkan rumahnya dan memandu untuk bersarapan pagi apabila dia mendapati orang mengekori beliau dalam sebuah trak pikap.

src: He said, "I just pulled over hoping they would pass, and then they pulled up real close behind."
ref: Dia berkata, "Saya berhenti dengan harapan mereka akan terus melalui saya, dan kemudian mereka behenti amat dekat di belakang".

src: "They got out, and I made the mistake of getting out."
ref: "Mereka keluar, dan saya silap kerana keluar".

src: John Calvert, managing director of the Intelligent Design Network, had previously objected to Professor Mirecki's focus on creationism as mythology, and claimed that the religious studies professor was "labeling anybody who proposes [intelligent design] to be simply a religious nut".
ref: John Calvert, pengarah urusan Rangkaian Reka Bentuk Pintar, yang sebelum ini pernah membantah tumpuan Profesor Mirecki pada kreasionisme sebagai mitos, dan mendakwa bahawa profesor pengajian agama tersebut "melabelkan sesiapa yang mencadangkan [reka bentuk pintar] sebagai kegilaan agama".

src: Paul Mirecki had already decided to cancel the course after he caused controversy by using the slang term "fundies" to refer to Christian Fundamentalists in an email to a student organization, the Society for Open Minded Atheists and Agnostics.
ref: Paul Mirecki telah memutuskan untuk membatalkan kursus selepas dia menimbulkan kontroversi dengan menggunakan istilah slanga "fundies" merujuk kepada Fundamentalis Kristian dalam e-mel kepada sebuah pertubuhan pelajar, Persatuan Pemikiran Terbuka Ateis dan agnostik.

src: Professor Mirecki has apologized for using the term, which is viewed as a slur by some conservatives.
ref: Profesor Mirecki telah memohon maaf atas penggunaan istilah itu, yang dilihat sebagai satu sindiran oleh sesetengah pihak konservatif.

src: A new advertising campaign in USA for the Sony PSP which looks like graffiti and is often sprayed on previously vandalized walls has come under attack from other graffiti artists.
ref: Satu kempen pengiklanan baru di Amerika Syarikat untuk Sony PSP yang kelihatan seperti grafiti dan sering disembur pada dinding yang sebelum ini dirosakkan telah diserang oleh artis-artis grafiti lain.

src: But not all the responses have been negative, with many artists defending Sony saying they have the right.
ref: Tetapi bukan semua tindak balas adalah negatif, dengan ramai artis mempertahankan Sony mengatakan mereka mempunyai hak itu.

src: "They have done it for (a) very long time very successfully and spoke the language of the streets without being patronizing."
ref: "Mereka telah berjaya melakukannya sekian lama yang dan bercakap menggunakan bahasa jalanan tanpa direndah-rendahkan".

src: Sony says it is paying the building owners like Casa Maria for the right to advertise on their walls.
ref: Sony berkata ia membayar pemilik bangunan seperti Casa Maria bagi mendapat kebenaran untuk membuat iklan di dinding mereka.

src: Casa Maria was paid $100 for two weeks' use of its wall, co-owner Mario Arana told Wired News.
ref: Casa Maria telah dibayar $100 untuk penggunaan dinding bangunan tersebut selama dua minggu, pemilik bersama Mario Arana memberitahu Wired News.

src: Tats Cru, the graffiti crew responsible for the designs, have also been targeted with insulting slogans on Sony's advertisements.
ref: Tats Cru, kru grafiti yang bertanggungjawab terhadap reka bentuk itu, juga telah dikecam dengan slogan menghina pada iklan Sony.

src: On the last sitting day of the year in Federal Parliament, the Opposition opened with three successive motions to attempt to bring the Government to account over the major issues that the Government has faced over the last fortnight.
ref: Pada hari persidangan terakhir bagi tahun tersebut, pihak pembangkang mengemukakan tiga usul secara berturutan dalam percubaan untuk membawa Kerajaan bagi mengambil kira isu-isu utama yang Kerajaan telah hadapi sepanjang dua minggu sebelumnya.

src: The motions to suspend standing orders was first put by Wayne Swan (the shadow Treasurer) dealt with the Treasurer Peter Costello, calling on him to release documents and information regarding Robert Gerard; the following two put by Kevin Rudd (the shadow Foreign Minister) and (the member for Corio) dealt with the Government's involvement in the Australian Wheat Board inadvertently paying money to a front business of Saddam Hussein.
ref: Usul bagi menggantung jawatankuasa peraturan mesyuarat pada mulanya dicadangkan oleh Wayne Swan ( Bendahari bayangan) telah berunding dengan Bendahari Peter Costello, menghubunginya untuk mengeluarkan dokumen dan maklumat mengenai Robert Gerard; kedua-dua yang berikut dibawakan oleh Kevin Rudd (Menteri Kewangan bayangan) dan (ahli Corio) telah berunding dengan penglibatan Kerajaan dalam Lembaga Gandum Australia yang secara tidak sengaja membayar wang ke salah satu perniagaan utama Saddam Hussein.

src: It also finds boys who masturbate are more likely to engage in safe sex than boys who don't.
ref: Ia juga mendapati bahawa lelaki yang melakukan onani biasanya akan melibatkan diri dengan sex secara sihat berbanding dengan lelaki yang tidak.

src: Dr. Cynthia L. Robbins, the study's lead author from Indiana University in Indianapolis, spoke of the need for the academic community to focus more on masturbation.
ref: Dr. Cynthia L. Robbins, ketua penulis kajian dari Universiti Indiana di Indianapolis, berkata akan keperluan untuk komuniti pendidik untuk memberi fokus lebih kepada perlakuan onani.

src: "Many adolescent boys and girls masturbate, and among sexually active teens masturbation is associated with other sexual behaviors and condom use."
ref: "Ramai remaja lelaki dan perempuan melakukan onani, dan kebanyakan daripada remaja yang aktif melakukan onani berkait dengan perlakuan seksual yang lain dan penggunaan kondom."

src: A representative nationwide sample of 820 teens 14–17 years old participated in the study with parental permission.
ref: Sampel wakil seluruh negara daripada 820 orang remaja berusia 14 hingga 17 tahun menyertai kajian itu dengan kebenaran dari ibu bapa penjaga.

src: The findings were published Monday in the Archives of Pediatrics and Adolescent Medicine.
ref: Penemuan itu diterbitkan pada Isnin di Arkib Pediatrik dan Perubatan Remaja.

src: Male and female respondents were asked to note how frequently they masturbated in the past three months, the past year, and throughout their lifetime.
ref: Responden lelaki dan perempuan diminta untuk mengambil nota mengenai berapa kali mereka melakukan onani dalam tempoh tiga bulan yang lepas, tahun lepas, dan sepanjang kehidupan mereka.

src: Nearly three-fourths of boys reported having masturbated, compared to only less than half of girls.
ref: Hampir tiga daripada empat lelaku melaporkan mereka melakukan onani, berbanding dengan hanya separuh remaja perempuan.

src: About half of boys reported masturbating twice or more per week, also higher than the 23 percent of girls.
ref: Hampir separuh remaja lelaki melaporkan mereka melakukan onani dua kali atau lebih seminggu, juga 23 peratus lebih tinggi daripada remaja perempuan.

src: The researchers who conducted the study urge more open and educational discussion of this highly stigmatized topic.
ref: Pengkaji yang menjalankan kajian ini digesa untuk membuka lebih dan berbincang dari sudut pembelajaran mengenai topik yang banyak didiskriminasikan ini.

src: Former Republican governor Carroll Campbell will lie in state today on the second floor of the Statehouse in Columbia, SC.
ref: Keranda bekas Gabenor dari Parti Republik Carroll Campbell akan berada di tingkat dua Statehouse di Columbia, SC hari ini untuk diberi penghormatan terakhir oleh orang ramai.

src: There will be a funeral at Trinity Episcopal Church in Columbia at 10:30 a.m. local time on Saturday, and there will be an additional funeral service and burial at All Saints Episcopal Church in Pawleys Island.
ref: Akan diadakan pengebumian di Gereja Trinity Episcopal di Columbia pada pukul 10:30 pagi waktu tempatan pada hari Sabtu, dan akan ada upacara pengebumian tambahan dan dikebumikan di Gereja All Saints Episcopal di Pulau Pawleys.

src: Thirty Americans were killed in the crash, including at least seventeen members of SEAL Team 6, Air Force members, the helicopter's crew, a dog handler and a civilian interpreter, while eight members of the Afghan Army were also on board and died.
ref: Tiga puluh orang Amerika terbunuh dalam kemalangan itu, termasuk sekurang-kurangnya tujuh belas anggota pasukan SEAL 6, anggota Tentera Udara, anak-anak kapal helikopter, pengendali anjing dan jurubahasa awam, pada masa lapan anggota Tentera Afghanistan turut berada di dalam dan meninggal dunia.

src: The Taliban said that they had brought the aircraft down while it was involved in an operation targeting a house where insurgents were meeting.
ref: Taliban berkata bahawa mereka telah menjatuhkan pesawat itu semasa ia terlibat dalam operasi yang mensasarkan sebuah rumah di mana pemberontak bermesyuarat.

src: While Taliban forces do not have a history of shooting down aircraft, they claim to have modified their RPGs for improved accuracy, but there is no proof of this.
ref: Walaupun tentera Taliban tidak mempunyai sejarah menembak jatuh pesawat itu, mereka mendakwa telah mengubahsuai RPG mereka untuk ketepatan yang lebih tinggi, tetapi tidak ada bukti untuknya.

src: The members of the group Christians Against All Terrorism (CAAT) breached base security at dawn and two of them infiltrated two perimeter fences and scaled a building, before being arrested.
ref: Ahli kumpulan Kristian Menentang Semua Keganasan (CAAT) melanggar keselamatan pengkalan sekuriti di awal pagi dan kedua mereka yang menyusup pagar dua perimeter dan memanjat bangunan, sebelum ditangkap.

src: A Northern Territory police spokeswoman said three men and two women had been charged over the incident while another woman would be summoned to appear in Alice Springs court next week over obstructing police.
ref: Jurucakap polis Wilayah Utara berkata tiga lelaki dan dua wanita telah dikenakan hukuman diatas kejadian itu sementara lagi satu wanita akan dipanggil untuk muncul di mahkahmah Alice Springs minggu depan kerana menghalang polis.

src: The spokeswoman said the activists had allegedly cut holes in the external and internal fences at the defence facility.
ref: Jurucakap itu berkata aktivis itu didakwa telah memotong lubang di luar dan dalam pagar di kawasan pertahanan.

src: The group spoke yesterday of their efforts to conceal a digital camera memory stick in the clothing of key members to avoid the images being confiscated by police.
ref: Kumpulan itu bercakap semalam mengenai usaha mereka untuk menyembunyikan sebuah kamera digital stik memori di dalam pakaian ahli - ahli penting untuk mengelakkan gambar-gambar itu dirampas oleh polis.

src: Four of the protesters are from Queensland, one is from New South Wales, and the other is from Victoria.
ref: Empat daripada pembangkang adalah daripada Queensland, satu daripada New South Wales, dan lagi satu daripada Victoria.

src: They say they wanted to conduct a citizens inspection of the controversial Pine Gap facility.
ref: Mereka berkata mereka mahu mengendalikan pemeriksaan warga negara ke atas kawasan Pine Gap yang berkontroversi itu.

src: "It's time the Australian public knew the reality of what is happening on our land."
ref: "Sudah masanya untuk orang awam Australia mengetahui realiti apa yang berlaku di tanah kita".

src: "So for me it was an attempt to come to a place that I think propagates death and start to proclaim truth," she said.
ref: "Jadi untuk saya ia adalah percubaan untuk datang ke tempat yang saya fikir cuba menyebarkan kematian dan mula memberitahu kebenaran," dia berkata.

src: Two of the group were released on bail facing charges, including: unlawfully entering a prohibited area destroying or damaging Commonwealth property; trespassing on Commonwealth land; damaging property under the NT law.
ref: Dua daripada kumpulan itu dilepaskan dengan ikat jamin dan menghadap dua dakwaan, termasuk; menyalahi undang-undang memasuki kawasan terlarang memusnahkan dan menghancurkan barangan Commonwealth; mencerobohi tanah Commonwealth; memusnahkan barangan dibawah undang-undang NT.

src: A sixth member was arrested for aiding and abetting but was released without charge.
ref: Ahli keenam ditangkap kerana menolong dan bersubahat tetapi dilepaskan tanpa dakwaan.

src: Up to 30 police officers were stationed at a roadblock at the turn-off to Pine Gap at 6:00 a.m. local time and Gap staff were ordered to remain in their cars at the roadblock.
ref: Sebanyak 30 anggota polis ditempatkan di sekatan jalan raya di selekoh Pine Gap pada pukul 6:00 pagi waktu tempatan dan kakitangan Gap diarahkan untuk berada di dalam kereta mereka di sekatan jalan raya tersebut.

src: CAAT member Brian Law, said four of the group split into two groups and entered the base in a co-ordinated movement.
ref: Ahli CAAT Brian Law, berkata empat daripada kumpulan berpisah menjadi dua kumpulan dan memasuki pengkalan dengan pergerakan yang berselaras.

src: He said four members walked 10km through thick scrub and entered the base at 4:00 a.m. local time.
ref: Dia berkata empat ahli berjalan 10km melalui belukar tebal dan memasuki pengkalan pada pukul 4:00 pagi waktu tempatan.

src: Mr Law and the fourth member arrested, former human shield Donna Mulhearn, 37, (taken hostage by militants in Fallujah in Iraq last year) were released.
ref: Encik Law dan ahli keempat ditangkap, bekas perisai manusia Donna Mulhearn, 37 tahun, (diambil sebagai tebusan oleh pengganas di Fallujah di Iraq tahun lepas) telah dilepaskan.

src: They were bailed to face the Alice Springs Magistrates Court next Wednesday.
ref: Mereka telah diikat jamin untuk menghadapi Mahkamah Majistret Alice Springs Rabu depan.

src: The threat was received within minutes of the Associated Press running a story on Clinton being added to the program.
ref: Ancaman itu telah diterima dalam beberapa minit dari Associated Press menulis cerita mengenai Clinton ditambah ke dalam program.

src: Clinton said, "There's no way that I'm gonna let petty politics get in the way of the deal.
ref: Clinton berkata, "Tidak sama sekali saya akan biarkan politik kecil menghalang perjanjian itu".

src: The organizers later reported that they had "called the administration's bluff."
ref: Pihak penganjur kemudian melaporkan bahawa mereka telah "meminta bukti daripada pentadbiran".

src: In his speech Friday, Clinton described the Bush administration's opposition to Kyoto as "flat wrong."
ref: Dalam ucapannya Jumaat, Clinton menyifatkan tentangan pentadbiran Bush kepada Kyoto sebagai "salah secara total".

src: Vice-President Dick Cheney directed the U.S. envoy to walk out Thursday, in response to comments by Canadian Prime Minister Paul Martin on Thursday.
ref: Naib Presiden Dick Cheney mengarahkan utusan Amerika Syarikat untuk mengakhiri hubungan pada Khamis, sebagai respon terhadap komen daripada Perdana Menteri Kanada Paul Martin pada Khamis.

src: The walk out is not believed to relate to Clinton's attendance.
ref: Pengakhiran hubungan itu tidak dipercayai berkaitan dengan kehadiran Clinton.

src: Various sources have indicated that as of today no significant international aid has arrived in the island of Nias -- a small volcanic island off the coast (North Sumatra province, Indonesia) -- a full ten days after the 2004 Indian Ocean earthquake occurred.
ref: Pelbagai sumber telah menyatakan bahawa sehingga hari ini tiada bantuan antarabangsa yang sampai di pulau Nias - pulau gunug berapi kecil di pantai (wilayah Utara Sumatera, Indonesia) -- selepas genap sepuluh hari berlakunya gempa bumi di Lautan India 2004.

src: These observations were noted by former Indonesian central parliament member Firman Jaya Daeli, activists from Howu-howu (a Dutch NGO), and Surf Aid International.
ref: Pemerhatian itu telah dinyatakan oleh bekas ahli parlimen tengah Indonesi Friman Jaya Daeli, aktivis dari Howu-howu (NGO Belanda) dan Bantuan Antarabangsa Surf.

src: Most international aid in Indonesia has been focused on the province of Naggroe Aceh Darussalam (Aceh), as it is where the biggest number of dead has been reported.
ref: Kebanyakan bantuan antarabangsa di Indonesi telah memfokuskan kepada wilayah Naggroe Aceh Darussalam (Aceh), dimana jumlah kematian banyak dilaporkan.

src: There has also been other reports from local media that the island of Simeulue is suffering similar fate.
ref: Terdapat juga laporan lain dari media tempatan mengatakan bahawa pulau Simeulue juga menderita nasib yang sama.

src: Although the number of dead in these two islands is relatively small compared to other areas, the number of people left homeless is far from insignificant.
ref: Walaupun angka kematian di dua pulau ini secara kasarnya kecil dari kawasan lain, tetapi jumlah yang kehilangan tempat tinggal agak tinggi.

src: The number of destroyed houses in Nias is estimated at 4 500.
ref: Jumlah kerosakan rumah di Nias dianggarkan 4 500.

src: Infrastructure damage, leading to slow distribution of food aid, has lead to the very real possibility of widespread starvation.
ref: Kerosakan infrastruktur, menyebabkan kelambatan bantuan makanan, telah membawa kepada kemungkinana untuk kelaparan yang berleluasa.

src: The island is popular with surfers who have mounted a considerable grassroots campaign to provide aid to the island (see links below).
ref: Pulau itu popular dengan aktiviti meluncur air telah membuat satu kempen untuk memungut bantuan kepada pulau itu (lihat pautan dibawah).

src: Communication to and from the isolated island proves to be difficult.
ref: Komunikasi dari dan kepada pulau berkenaan membuktikan bahawa ianya susah.

src: Norton Fredrick, the Sri Lankan cricketer who played for the national All Ceylon team during the 1960s, has died at the age of 73.
ref: Norton Fredrick, pemain kriket Sri Lanka yang bermain untuk pasukan kebangsaan All Ceylon dalam tahun 1960-an, telah meninggal dunia pada usia 73.

src: He played for the Bloomfield Cricket and Athletic Club as well as nationally for the All Ceylon team, before Sri Lanka had test status.
ref: Beliau bermain untuk Kriket Bloomfield dan Kelab Athletic dan juga di peringkat kebangsaan untuk pasukan All Ceylon, sebelum Sri Lanka mengadakan status ujian.

src: The match was played at the Colombo Oval – Sara Stadium.
ref: Perlawanan itu telah dimainkan di Colombo Oval - Stadium Sara.

src: I still remember the three victims – R. Ramesh, V. V. Kumara and G. Thomas.
ref: Saya masih ingat tiga orang mangsa - R. Ramesh, VV Kumara dan G. Thomas.

src: During an unofficial test match against India in 1965 he set up a four-wicket win after taking seven wickets.
ref: Dalam perlawanan ujian tidak rasmi menentang India pada tahun 1965 beliau menghasilkan kemenangan dengan empat wiket selepas mengambil tujuh wiket.

src: This was the first time that the All Ceylon team had won against India.
ref: Ini adalah kali pertama pasukan All Ceylon menang melawan India.

src: Another son served as an army officer and died during the Sri Lankan civil war.
ref: Seorang lagi anak lelaki berkhidmat sebagai seorang pegawai tentera dan meninggal dunia dalam perang saudara Sri Lanka.

src: Fredrick's death comes in the same month as Gamini Goonasena, another former Sri Lankan cricketer who died at the age of 80.
ref: Kematian Fredrick adalah dalam bulan yang sama dengan Gamini Goonasena, seorang lagi bekas pemain kriket Sri Lanka yang meninggal dunia pada usia 80 tahun.

src: At least four people died and forty were injured Saturday night as the result of a stage collapsing at the Indiana State Fair, located within the US state of Indiana.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya empat orang terbunuh dan empat puluh cedera pada malam Sabtu akibat pentas yang runtuh di Pesta Negeri Indiana, yang terletak dalam negara bahagian California.

src: The Indianapolis Star has attributed the incident to poor weather.
ref: Indianapolis Star telah mengaitkan kejadian dengan cuaca buruk.

src: Captain Brad Weaver, an Indiana State Police employee, described witnessing "the framework from the stage start to come over", having given a public safety announcement shortly prior to the collapse.
ref: Kapten Brad Weaver, seorang pekerja Polis Indiana State, menyifatkan menyaksikan "rangka kerja dari peringkat awal", setelah diberi pengumuman keselamatan awam tidak lama sebelum keruntuhan.

src: Numerous patients, including adults and children, have been admitted to hospital.
ref: Ramai pesakit, termasuk orang dewasa dan kanak-kanak, telah dimasukkan ke hospital.

src: One witness, who has been identified only as Chris, informed the BBC of the events he sighted.
ref: Seorang saksi, yang hanya dikenali sebagai Chris, memberitahu BBC peristiwa yang beliau lihat.

src: "We could see the sky get really dark and there was lightning and thunder."
ref: "Kita boleh melihat langit benar-benar gelap dan ada kilat dan guruh.

src: "The stage just leaned to the right and crashed down."
ref: "Pentas itu bersandar ke kanan dan terhempas ke bawah.

src: "Everyone was scrambling and it was horrifying because you knew people were underneath it."
ref: " "Semua orang berpecah dan ia menakutkan kerana anda tahu orang berada di bawahnya.

src: David Lindquist, a journalist for The Indianapolis Star, described the scenario as "bad, very bad", and that one "could clearly see people were under the footprint of the rigging."
ref: David Lindquist, seorang wartawan untuk The Indianapolis Star, menyifatkan senario itu sebagai "tidak baik, sangat buruk," dan satu yang "dapat dilihat dengan jelas orang yang berada di bawah tapak kaki pelantar," katanya.

src: Freeing trapped victims from underneath the wreckage took rescue workers under twenty minutes, according to Lindquist.
ref: Membebaskan mangsa yang terperangkap dari bawah bangkai mengambil pekerja penyelamat di bawah dua puluh minit, mengikut Lindquist.

src: A Twitter account representing the Indiana State Fair confirmed the fatalities and stated that their "prayers are with the families of all affected".
ref: Akaun Twitter mewakili Pesta Negeri Indiana mengesahkan kematian dan menyatakan bahawa mereka "doa kami adalah dengan semua keluarga yang terjejas".

src: At the time of the incident — approximately 2100 EST Saturday night or 0000 UTC Sunday morning — US country music band Sugarland were about to perform.
ref: Pada masa kejadian itu - lebih kurang 2100 malam EST Sabtu atau 0000 pagi UTC Ahad - Kugiran muzik country negasa AS Sugarland akan membuat persembahan.

src: "We are praying for our fans, and the people of Indianapolis."
ref: "Kami berdoa untuk peminat kami, dan rakyat Indianapolis.

src: Sara Bareilles, another scheduled performer at the event, also commented on Twitter.
ref: " Sara Bareilles, seorang lagi penyanyi yang dijadualkan pada majlis itu, turut mengulas di Twitter.

src: Bareilles said she was "speechless" and felt "hopeless" in the aftermath of the situation.
ref: Bareilles berkata beliau "tidak dapat mengatakan apa-apa" dan merasa "tiada harapan" selepas kejadian.

src: Microsoft has launched its much-hyped Xbox 360 console into Japan, but unlike the European and American markets the Japanese are not rushing out to buy them.
ref: Microsoft telah melancarkan konsol Xbox 360 yang digemburkan memasuki Japan, tetapi tidak seperti pasaran Eropah dan Amerika warga Japan tidak terburu-buru untuk membelinya.

src: When launched in the American and European markets, stores sold out early.
ref: Apabila ia dilancarkan di pasaran Amerika dan Eropah, ia habis dijual awal dikedai.

src: One store-owner says that fewer than 50 units were sold in the first 2 hours of its release.
ref: Satu pemilik kedai berkata bahawa tidak sampai 50 buah telah dijual dalam 2 jam pertama barang itu dilancarkan.

src: Many believe that in Japan it is difficult for any games console to be successful that isn't from a Japanese company, such as Sony or Nintendo.
ref: Banyak percaya bahawa di Japan ia adalah sukar bagi apa-apa konsol permainan untuk berjaya yang bukan daripada syarikat Japan, seperti Sony atau Nintendo.

src: The first generation of Xbox consoles performed similarly possibly due to being released two years after the PlayStation 2.
ref: Generasi pertama konsol Xbox berprestasi sama berkemungkinan disebabkan ia dilancarkan dua tahun selepas PlayStation 2.

src: The large size of the console and the differing style of games was also said to have contributed.
ref: Saiz konsolnya yang besar dan cara permainan yang berbeza juga dikatakan menjadi faktor penyumbang.

src: Steve Jobs, founder of Apple, has chosen to step down from his post as CEO of the company.
ref: Steve Jobs, pengasas Apple, telah memilih untuk meletak jawatan sebagai Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif syarikat itu.

src: In that same letter, Jobs stated that his desire was to remain as chairman of the board.
ref: Dalam surat yang sama, Jobs menyatakan bahawa keinginannya adalah untuk kekal sebagai pengerusi lembaga.

src: He briefly made an appearance in March and June to unveil the iPad 2 and the iCloud, an online cloud computing service.
ref: Beliau tampil untuk masa singkat pada bulan Mac dan Jun untuk memperkenalkan iPad 2 dan iCloud, perkhidmatan pengkomputeran awan dalam talian.

src: Tim Cook was personally recommended by Jobs to take over as CEO and has been serving as interim CEO since the beginning of Jobs' medical leave.
ref: Tim Cook secara peribadinya disyorkan oleh Jobs untuk mengambil alih jawatan Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif dan telah berkhidmat sebagai Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif interim sejak awal cuti sakit Jobs.

src: He received $59 million for his performance in the position.
ref: Dia menerima $59 juta atas prestasinya dalam jawatan tersebut.

src: Analyst Charles Golvin predicts that the resignation will not begin to affect Apple performance for 1.5 to 2 years.
ref: Penganalisa Charles Golvin meramal bahawa perletakan jawatan itu tidak akan mula menjejaskan prestasi Apple untuk 1.5 hingga 2 tahun.

src: Many of the new products are already under development and Jobs will continue to steer the company from his position as chairman of the board.
ref: Banyak produk baru itu sedang dalam pembangunan dan Jobs akan terus mengemudi syarikat itu dengan kedudukannya sebagai pengerusi lembaga.

src: Art Levinson, chairman of Genentech and a member of the board, adds, "Steve will continue to serve Apple with his unique insights, creativity and inspiration".
