ref: Art Levinson, Pengerusi Genentech dan ahli lembaga, menambah, "Steve akan terus berkhidmat untuk Apple dengan pandangan yang unik, kreativiti dan inspirasinya".

src: A contrary view is offered by Charles O'Reilly, a management expert at Stanford University, who stated, "Great companies rarely go from strength to strength".
ref: Pandangan bertentangan diberi oleh Charles O'Reilly, seorang pakar pengurusan di Universiti Stanford, yang menyatakan, "Syarikat-syarikat hebat jarang berkembang dan terus maju".

src: Richard Doherty attributes Steve Jobs' success as the ability to hold off on a product until it is perfect.
ref: Richard Doherty menganggap kejayaan Steve Jobs kepada keupayaannya untuk menangguh satu produk sehingga ia sempurna.

src: He states "A lot of products could have gotten to market earlier, but he wanted it better."
ref: Dia menyatakan "Banyak produk boleh dipasarkan lebih awal, tetapi dia mahu ia menjadi lebih baik".

src: In light of the revelation, Apple shares (AAPL) slid $19.37 in after hours trading—a drop of over 5%.
ref: Semasa pendedahan produk itu, saham Apple (AAPL) merosot ke $19.37 selepas waktu perdagangan - pengurangan lebih 5%.

src: Since market open, Apple shares rose to $373.72, a drop of only $2.46 since Wednesday's close.
ref: Sejak bursa saham berbuka, saham Apple meningkat ke $373.72, turun sebanyak hanya $2.46 sejak penutupan pada hari Rabu.

src: Following a military coup d'etat in 2002, the two-month strike battered the country's oil industry in a effort to oust the elected president Hugo Chavez.
ref: Berikutan rampasan kuasa tentera pada tahun 2002, mogok dua bulan mendera industri minyak di negara ini dalam usaha untuk menggulingkan Presiden yang dipilih Hugo Chavez.

src: "I'm no conspirator or coup plotter and I didn't betray my country."
ref: "Saya bukan konspirator atau perancang rampasan kuasa dan saya tidak mengkhianati negara saya. "

src: Chavez himself attempted (and failed) to carry out a military coup in 1992.
ref: Chavez sendiri cuba (dan gagal) untuk menjalankan satu rampasan kuasa tentera pada 1992.

src: Since then, Chavez was democratically elected president in 1998, 2000, and survived a recall referendum against him in 2004, and the constitutional reform referendum which he supported was supported by over 70% of the population in 1999.
ref: Sejak itu, Chavez telah dipilih secara demokratik menjadi presiden pada tahun 1998, 2000, dan berjaya dalam pengutan suara terhadapnya pada tahun 2004, dan pungutan pembaharuan perlembagaan yang disokongnya disokong oleh lebih 70% daripada penduduk pada tahun 1999.

src: Sudanese President Omar al-Bashir announced the release of all journalists detained in the country's jails in an address to a gathering of journalists in the capital of Khartoum, on Saturday.
ref: Presiden Sudan Omar al-Bashir mengumumkan pembebasan semua wartawan yang ditahan di penjara di negara tersebut untuk menyambut seruan perhimpunan wartawan di ibu kota Khartoum, pada hari Sabtu.

src: "I declare amnesty for all the journalists detained by the security authorities and their release," said Al-Bashir.
ref: "Saya mengisytiharkan pengampunan untuk semua wartawan yang ditahan oleh pihak berkuasa keselamatan dan pembebasan mereka," kata Al-Bashir.

src: Al-Almin had served a prison term of nearly two years after he violating press restrictions and reporting on alleged co-operation between Sudan and the Iranian Revolutionary Guard.
ref: Al-Almin telah dihukum penjara selama hampir dua tahun selepas dia melanggar sekatan akhbar dan membuat laporan mengenai kerjasama antara Sudan dan Iran Pengawal Revolusi yang disyaki.

src: The release and amnesty follows a series of fresh violations of 'press freedoms', which resulted in the suspension of independent newspapers such as Al-Jaridah and Al-Ahdath on August 20 and 21.
ref: Pembebasan dan pengampunan itu berikut siri pelanggaran baru 'kebebasan akhbar', yang mengakibatkan penggantungan akhbar bebas seperti Al-Jaridah dan Al-Ahdath pada 20 Ogos dan 21.

src: According to Mozdalifa Mohamed Osman, Al-Ahdath's newsroom chief, the suspension caused financial losses of US$10,000.
ref: Menurut Mozdalifa Mohamed Osman, Ketua bilik berita Al-Ahdath itu, penggantungan itu menyebabkan kerugian kewangan sebanyak US$10,000.

src: No reasons were given for the suspension of the newspapers.
ref: Tiada sebab diberikan bagi penggantungan akhbar-akhbar itu.

src: According to press-freedom watchdog the Committee to Protect Journalists (CPJ), the Sudanese government aggressively attacks journalists through "contrived legal proceedings, politicized criminal charges, and confiscations".
ref: Menurut badan pemantau kebebasan akhbar Jawatankuasa untuk Melindungi Wartawan (CPJ), kerajaan Sudan menyerang wartawan secara agresif melalui "prosiding undang-undang buatan, pendakwaan jenayah yang dipolitikkan, dan sitaan."

src: Press freedoms may deteriorate with the National Congress Party contemplating further restrictions, including the possibility of pre-publication censorship.
ref: Kebebasan media mungkin merosot dengan Parti Kongres Kebangsaan yang ingin mengadakan sekatan lanjutan, termasuk kemungkinan penapisan pra-penerbitan.

src: The Australian Labor Party has appointed SLW Group to run it's advertisement campaign for the 2007 Australian Legislative Election.
ref: Parti Buruh Australia telah melantik Kumpulan SLW untuk menjalankan kempen iklan mereka di Pilihan Raya Undangan Australia tahun 2007.

src: SLW Group was successul in gaining the $10 million account it was revealed today.
ref: Kumpulan SLW mendedahkan kejayaan mereka dalam mendapatkan akaun sebanyak $10 juta pada hari ini.

src: He also added that Lawrence had worked on the campaign for election of Australian Republican Movement representatives to the Australian Constitutional Convention in 1998.
ref: Beliau juga menambah bahawa Lawrence telah menyertai kempen pilihan raya di Australia sebagai wakil Pergerakan Republikan dalam Konvensyen Perlembagaan Australia pada tahun 1998.

src: The Australian Government has said in response to the recent tsunami tragedy that it may take Sri Lankans as humanitarian refugees.
ref: Kerajaan Australia telahberkata dalam respon kepada tragedi tsunami baru-baru ini bahawa mereka mungkin mengambil Sri Lanka sebagai pelarian kemanusiaan.

src: Sri Lankans already in the Australian community, however, are being overlooked, according to Ian Rintoul of the Refugee Action Coalition.
ref: Sri Lanka telah berada di komuniti Australia, bagaimana pun, telah terlepas pandang, menurut Ian Rintoul, Gabungan Tondakan Pelarian.

src: The government issued hundreds of Sri Lankans their deportation orders on Christmas Eve, and similar conditions affect people from Aceh in Indonesia, near the epicenter of the quake.
ref: Kerajaan telah mengeluarkan arahan pengusiran terhadap beratus warga Sri Lanka pada malam menjelang Krismas, dan keadaan yang sama mempengaruhi orang dari Aceh, Indonesia, berdekatan dengan pusat gempa bumi.

src: The Australian Department of Immigration and Multicultural and Indigenous Affairs (DIMIA) said it has had a special hotline running since December 30 in response to the tsunami disaster.
ref: Bahagian Imigrasi dan Pelabagai Budaya dan Adat Australia (DIMIA) berkata terdapat talian istimewa yang berjalan sejak 30 Disember dalam respon kepada bencana tsunami.

src: "People who usually live in an area that has been directly affected by the tsunamis and may wish to temporarily extend their stay in Australia should contact the Department on the hotline on 1300 735 683," a Department spokesperson said.
ref: "Orang yang biasa tinggal di kawasan terbabit telah terlibat secara langsung oleh tsunami dan mungkin mahu memanjangkan niat mereka untuk tinggal lebih lama di Australia boleh menghubungi Bahagian itu di talian 1300 735 683," kata jurucakap Bahagian tersebut.

src: Six media organisations, including Fairfax, are mounting a constitutional challenge to secret hearings in an upcoming terrorism trial in Australia.
ref: Enam organisasi media, termasuk Fairfax, adalah pelekap satu cabaran perlembagaan untuk perbicaraan rahsia dalam percubaan keganasan akan datang di Australia.

src: Lodhi is accused of conspiring with French terror suspect Willie Brigitte to attack Sydney's military bases and electricity supply network.
ref: Lodhi dituduh bersubahat dengan suspek keganasan Perancis Willie Brigitte untuk menyerang pengkalan tentera Sydney dan rangkaian bekalan elektrik.

src: Federal Attorney-General Phillip Ruddock will issue a certificate to prevent information judged to be sensitive from reaching the public at Lodhi's trial.
ref: Peguam Negara Persekutuan Phillip Ruddock akan mengeluarkan sijil untuk mengelakkan maklumat dinilai sebagai sensitif daripada sampai orang ramai dalam perbicaraan Lodhi ini.

src: The Federal Attorney-General has the powers to do this under the National Security Information (Criminal and Civil Proceedings) Act.
ref: Peguam Negara Persekutuan mempunyai kuasa untuk melakukannya di bawah Akta Maklumat Keselamatan Negara (Jenayah dan Prosiding Awam).

src: The grounds for the challenge are that National Security Information legislation violates the separation of executive and judical powers, required by the Australian constitution.
ref: Alasan-alasan untuk cabaran ini adalah bahawa undang-undang Maklumat Keselamatan Negara melanggar pengasingan kuasa eksekutif dan kehakiman, yang dikehendaki oleh perlembagaan Australia.

src: Tom Blackburn, SC, counsel for the media groups mounting the challenge claims that the act allows for the federal executive to intrude into judicial matters by ordering parts of the trial are kept secret.
ref: Tom Blackburn, Penasihat Kanan Undang-undang, peguam yang mewakili kumpulan media meningkatkan cabaran mendakwa bahawa perbuatan itu membolehkan eksekutif persekutuan untuk menceroboh ke dalam perkara-perkara kehakiman dengan memerintah bahagian perbicaraan itu perlu dirahsiakan.

src: In the course of Lodhi's trial, towards the end of December Justice Anthony Whealy ruled that evidence and pre-trial matters are to remain secret.
ref: Dalam perbicaraan Lodhi ini, ke arah akhir bulan Disember Hakim Anthony Whealy memutuskan bahawa bukti dan perkara sebelum perbicaraan yang perlu kekal dirahsiakan.

src: That was said by some, especially from nationalistic and populist parties, such as Peace and Justice, and Self-Defense and League of Polish Families, candidates in the last elections (both parliamentary and presidential), who had been promising people a strengthening of the position of Polish president.
ref: Ia telah diberitahu oleh sesetengah pihak, terutamanya dari parti-parti nasionalistik dan populis, seperti Keamanan dan Keadilan, dan Pertahanan-Diri dan Kesatuan Keluarga Poland, calon-calon dalam pilihanraya yang lalu (parlimen dan presiden), yang mana telah menjajikan untuk menguatkan jawatan presiden Poland.

src: He was unable to stand for re-election again as the Constitution of Poland states that the Polish president can only be re-elected once.
ref: Beliau tidak dapat bertanding untuk pemilihan semula kerana menurut Perlembagaan negeri Poland bahawa presiden Poland hanya boleh dipilih semula sekali.

src: King Abdullah of Saudi Arabia has announced women will be allowed to vote in the country and run for municipal elections there.
ref: Raja Abdullah dari Arab Saudi telah mengumumkan wanita akan dibenarkan untuk mengundi di negara itu dan bertanding dalam pilihan raya perbandaran di sana.

src: Abdullah clarified that female adults "will be able to run as candidates in the municipal election and will even have a right to vote."
ref: Abdullah menjelaskan bahawa perempuan dewasa "akan dapat bertanding sebagai calon pada pilihan raya perbandaran dan juga akan mempunyai hak untuk mengundi".

src: Activists have sought women's right to vote in Saudi Arabia for years.
ref: Aktivis-aktivis telah berusaha meminta hak wanita untuk mengundi di Arab Saudi selama bertahun-tahun.

src: This makes the Delhi Metro the first of its kind in the world to do so.
ref: Ini menjadikan Delhi Metro yang pertama seumpamanya di dunia untuk berbuat demikian.

src: This comes under the Clean Development Mechanism (CDM) of the UN under the Kyoto Protocol.
ref: Ini adalah di bawah Mekanisme Pembangunan Bersih (CDM) oleh UN di bawah Protokol Kyoto.

src: The UN said the rail based system has helped to save 630,000 tonnes of pollution a year.
ref: UN berkata yang sistem berasaskan kereta api itu telah membantu mengurangkan 630,000 tonnes pencemaran dalam setahun.

src: According to the DMRC, it has reduced road traffic by more than 91,000 vehicles per day.
ref: Menurut DMRC, ia telah mengurangkan penggunaan jalan raya sebanyak lebih daripada 91,000 buah kenderaan setiap hari.

src: After twelve months of speculation amongst former users and many sites popping up to try and take its place, Preston says "it is time for everybody to know the truth and that it is time for me to stop pretending like nothing ever happened".
ref: Selepas spekulasi selama dua belas bulan diantara bekas penggunanya dan kemunculan banyak laman web lain yang cuba untuk mengambil alih tempatnya, Preston berkata "inilah masanya untuk semua orang tahu kebenarannya dan inilah masanya untuk saya berhenti berpura-pura seperti tiada apa-apa berlaku".

src: According to Preston his nightmare began in November, 2004 when he received a phonecall from his ISP stating that Preston's servers had just been raided.
ref: Menurut Preston mimpi ngerinya bermula sejak November 2004 apabila beliau menerima panggilan telefon daripada ISP beliau menyatakan bahawa pelayan-pelayan milik Preston sudah diserbu.

src: After reading about himself in various Slovenian newspapers in early December, Preston decided to take his suprnova.org site offline.
ref: Selepas membaca tentang dirinya di beberapa surat khabar Slovenian pada awal Disember, Preston bernekad untuk menghentikan laman web suprnova.org miliknya.

src: Preston claims that a month or so after his site went offline his home was raided by the police at 6:30 in the morning.
ref: Preston mendakwa bahawa lebih kurang sebulan selepas penutupan laman web miliknya rumahnya telah diserbu oleh pihak polis pada pukul 6:30 pagi.

src: Preston was then called into the local police unit another month later for a hearing.
ref: Preston kemudiannya dipanggil ke balai polis tempatan sebulan kemudiann untuk membuat kenyataan.

src: Preston, on the advice of his lawyer decided he would not answer anything during the interview with the police.
ref: Preston, diatas nasihat peguamnya mengambil keputusan untuk tidak menjawab apa-apa semasa disoal-siasat oleh pihak polis.

src: Preston recalls that on October 18, 2005 he received a notice to go to the post office and pick up another letter which he must sign for.
ref: Preston mengimbau semula bahawa pada 18 Oktober 2005, beliau mendapat notis untuk pergi ke pejabat pos dan mengambil satu surat lagi yang memerlukan tandatangannya.

src: Preston however was greeted with good news at the post office when he opened the letter and discovered that his matter had been dropped.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun Preston dijamu dengan berita baik di pejabat pos apabila beliau membuka surat tersebut dan mengetahui bahawa kesnya telah digugurkan.

src: The scandal has already resulted in an independent investigation, civil grand jury proceedings, Gonzales's censure by the council, and council members calling for his resignation or removal from office.
ref: Skandal tersebut sudah membawa kepada siasatan umum, prosiding jemaah juri awam, kecaman ke atas Gonzales oleh dewan, dan ahli-ahli dewan menggesa perletakan jawatannya atau diusir dari pejabat.

src: In a statement responding to the DA's investigation, Gonzales announced he has hired Allen Ruby, a high-profile Silicon Valley attorney, to represent him in this matter.
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan membalas siasatan DA, Gonzales mengumumkan bahawa dia telah mengupah Allen Ruby, peguam Silicon Valley berprofil tinggi, untuk mewakilinya dalam hal ini.

src: Gonzales's statement also supported the decision of the DA to conduct further investigations into the city's contract.
ref: Kenyataan Gonzales juga menyokong keputusan DA untuk meneruskan siasatan lebih lanjut tentang kontrak bandar.

src: An Australian man arrested last December near the Cambodian border in Vietnam, Trinh Huu, has been sentenced to death by a Vietnamese People's Court for smuggling 2kg of heroin.
ref: Seorang lelaki warganegara Australia yang ditahan Disember lalu berdekatan sempadan Kemboja di Vietnam, Trinh Huu, telah dijatuhkan hukuman mati oleh Mahkamah Rakyat Vietnam atas kesalahan menyeludup 2kg heroin.

src: Amnesty International has urged the Australian Federal Government to do everything it can to help the man.
ref: Amnesti Antarabangsa telah menggesa Kerajaan Persekutuan Australia untuk melakukan apa sahaja bagi membantu lelaki tersebut.

src: The Australian Department of Foreign Affairs has said that Trinh was receiving consular assistance, but that it was too early to negotiate for clemency as his case is still subject to appeal.
ref: Jabatan Hal-ehwal Luar Negeri Australia telah berkata bahawa Trinh sedang mendapat bantuan konsul, tetapi masih terlalu awal untuk berunding untuk belas kasihan kerana kesnya masih terbuka untuk rayuan.

src: The government has reiterated its long standing opposition to the death penalty.
ref: Kerajaan telah memperbaharui pendapat jangka panjangnya dalam menentang hukuman mati.

src: Since the Indian Ocean tsunami, patchy progress has been made on the return to a normal life for those who lived through the experience.
ref: Sejak tsunami Lautan India tersebut, sedikit kemajuan telah dibuat untuk kembali kekehidupan normal untuk mereka yang melalui pengalaman tersebut.

src: Efforts to implement a warning system similar to that coordinated by the Pacific Tsunami Warning Center in Hawaii have past a number of significant milestones.
ref: Usaha untuk melaksanakan sistem amaran sama seperti yang diselaraskan Pusat Amaran Tsunami Pasifik di Hawai telah melalui beberapa pencapaian penting.

src: Yet still there remain those who may never recover from the tragic events of one year ago.
ref: Tetapi masih ada mereka yang mungkin tidak akan pulih dari kejadian tragik satu tahun lepas.

src: The study endorses the use of nuclear energy and attacks some of the data used by anti-nuclear campaigners.
ref: Kajian itu mengesahkan penggunaan tenaga nuklear dan serangan terhadap beberapa data yang digunakan oleh penyokong kempen anti nuklear.

src: The scientists from the University of Melbourne say their research shows that the benefits of nuclear energy have been underestimated and concerns about nuclear waste overplayed.
ref: Para saintis dari Universiti Melbourne berkata penyelidikan mereka menunjukkan kebaikan tenaga nuklear telah dipandang ringan dan kesedaran terhadap nuklear disia-siakan melampaui batasan.

src: "One thing that's perhaps not always realised is that the amount of waste that comes out of a typical plant is around 30 tonnes a year," he said.
ref: "Satu perkara yang mungkin tidak selalu disedari ialah jumlah buangan yang terhasil daripada sebuah loji tipikal adalah disekitar 30 tan setahun," kata beliau.

src: "The amount of waste that comes out of a coal-fired power plant is around 1,000 tonnes a day."
ref: "Jumlah buangan yang terhasil daripada loji kuasa arang batu adalah disekitar 1,000 tan sehari".

src: "This previous research overestimated the energy costs and carbon emissions generated by the construction of nuclear power plants and for mining uranium," Prof Sevior said.
ref: "Kajian sebelum ini membuat anggaran berlebihan terhadap kos-kos tenaga dan pengeluaran karbon yang dihasilkan oleh pembuatan loji kuasa nuklear dan pelombongan uranium," kata Profesor Sevior.

src: The Australian Conservation Foundation's (ACF) nuclear campaigner, Dave Sweeney, says the study appears flawed and does not provide a sound argument for the use of nuclear energy.
ref: Penyokong kempen nuklear Dasar Pemuliharaan Australia (ACF), Dave Sweeney, berkata kajian itu menunjukkan kecacatan dan tidak memberikan hujah yang kukuh untuk penggunaan tenaga nuklear.

src: "It glances over some really key concerns of proliferation, key areas of reactor safety are not delved into too deeply and they have direct links to industry websites for further information," said Mr Sweeney.
ref: "Pandangannya lebih kepada beberapa kebimbangan utama sebenar terhadap percambahan angka, bidang utama keselamatan reaktor tidak begitu diulas dengan mendalam dan mereka memunyai pautan lansung kepada laman web industri untuk maklumat lanjut," kata Sweeney.

src: "I'm not sure it's altogether appropriate or altogether balanced to be referring people to the nuclear industry's own websites for further information on such matters as radioactive waste, nuclear weapons and nuclear reactor safety."
ref: "Saya kurang pasti ia wajar sama sekali atau waras sama sekali untuk memberi rujuk orang ramai kepada laman web kepunyaan industri nuklear untuk maklumat lanjut diatas hal-hal seperti buangan radioaktif, senjata nuklear dan keselamatan reaktor nuklear".

src: The six-month study found Australia has more uranium than was previously thought.
ref: Kajian enam tahun itu menjumpai bahawa Australia mempunyai lebih uranium daripada yang disangkakan sebelum ini.

src: "We have enough uranium in Australia to power the country for thousands of years," said Prof Sevior.
ref: "Kita ada uranium yang cukup di Australia untuk memberi kuasa kepada negara selama ribuan tahun," kata Profesor Sevior.

src: The famous Greek lawyers, Sakis Kechagioglou and George Nikolakopoulos have been imprisoned in the Athens' jail of Korydallus, as they were found guilty of graft and corruption.
ref: Peguam terkenal Greek, Sakis Kechagioglou dan George Nikolakkopoulus telah dipenjarakan di penjara Athen di Korydallus, selepas didapati bersalah kerana suapan dan rasuah.

src: As a result of this, a big scandal within the Greek legal community has been raised through the exposure of illegal actions that judges, lawyers, solicitors and attorneys have done during the previous years.
ref: Sebagai jawapan kepada ini, skandal besar dalam undang-undang masyarakat Greek telah dinaikkan melalui hakim yang menyalahi undang-undang bahawa hakim, peguam, peguam cara dan pendakwa raya telah ada semasa tahun lepas.

src: A few weeks ago, after the information published by the journalist Makis Triantafylopoulos in his popular Television show "Zoungla" in Alpha TV, the member of Parliament and lawyer, Petros Mantouvalos was abdicated as members of his office had been involved in illegal graft and corruption.
ref: Beberapa minggu lalu, selepas informasi yang disiarkan oleh penulis Makis Triantafylopouslos dalam rancangan televisyen terkenal "Zoungla" dalam Alpha TV, seorang ahli Parlimen dan peguam, Petron Mantouvalous telah dikeluarkan kerana ahli pejabatnya kerana terlibat dalam suapan haram dan rasuah.

src: Moreover, top judge Evangelos Kalousis is imprisoned as he found guilty of corruption and degenerate behaviour.
ref: Tambahan lagi, hakim utama Evangelos Kalousis dipenjarakan kerana didapati bersalah terhadap rasuah dan tingkah laku merosot.

src: The body of a 28-year-old Pakistani journalist was found in his home in Lahore, Pakistan on Friday.
ref: Mayat seorang wartawan Pakistani berumur 28 tahun dijumpai dirumahnya di Lahore, Pakistan pada hari Jumaat.

src: The Pakistani police stated the journalist, Faisal Qureshi, who was working for a London-based online site, The London Post, was murdered on Friday in the early morning.
ref: Polis Pakistan menyatakan bahawa wartawan, Faisal Qureshi, yang bekerja untuk laman web siber yang berpangkalan di London, The London Post, dibunuh pada hari Jumaat awal pagi.

src: Investigators have said the journalist was found with visible torture marks, as well as numerous stab wounds.
ref: Penyiasat telah berkata wartawan telah ditemui dengan tanda penyeksaan yang nyata, dan juga banyak kesan tikaman.

src: Zahid told police he hurried to his brother's place late Thursday after his brother failed to answer his phone.
ref: Zahid memberitahu polis yang dia tergesa-gesa ke rumah abangnya pada lewat Khamis apabila abangnya tidak menjawab panggilannya.

src: The independent New York-based Committee to Protect Journalists (CPJ) called on Friday for an independent inquiry into the death.
ref: Syarikat bebas Committee to Protect Journalists (CPJ) yang berpangkalan di New York menyeru pada hari Jumaat untuk penyiasatan bebas di dalam kematian itu.

src: Rabies is a disease that has no cure and nearly everyone it infects is dead just two weeks after the symptoms show.
ref: Penyakit anjing gila ialah satu penyakit yang tiada ubat dan hampir semua orang yang menghidapinya maut hanya dalam masa dua minggu selepas semua gejala hadir.

src: And yet, last week a teenage girl named Jeanna Giese was released from a hospital having been successfuly treated.
ref: Walaupun begitu, pada minggu lepas seorang remaja perempuan bernama Jeanna Giese telah dikeluarkan dari sebuah hospital kerana telah berjaya dirawat.

src: On September 12, 2004, Jeanna — a 15 year old from Fond du Lac, Wisconsin— was bitten by a bat while attending church.
ref: Pada 12 September, 2004, Jeanna - yang berumur 15 tahun dari Fond du Lac, Wisconsion - telah digigit seekor kelawar ketika menghadiri gereja.

src: By the time she saw a doctor about fatigue and numbness, it was October 18, and the bat incident was not brought up until several days later.
ref: Apabila dia berjumpa dengan doktor kerana keletihan dan rasa kebas, adalah pada 18 Oktober, dan insiden kelawar tidak diceritakan sehinggalah beberapa hari kemudian.

src: Usually when there is a possibility of rabies, doctors will vaccinate patients: the vaccine has a chance to act before the symptoms appear.
ref: Selalunya jika ada kemungkinan penyakit anjing gila, para doktor akan memvaksin pesakit: vaksin mempunyai peluang bertindak sebelum gejala-gejala timbul.

src: In Jeanna's case it was too late to try to vaccinate, and her doctors at the Children's Hospital of Wisconsin devised a new treatment.
ref: Di dalam kes Jeanna sudah terlalu lambat untuk mencuba pemvaksinan, dan doktornya di Hospital Kanak-kanak Wisconsin telah memikirkan satu rawatan baru.

src: Jeanna was put into a drug-induced coma for a week, and doctors began an intensive treatment to prop up her nervous system until her natural immunity recovered enough to fight the disease.
ref: Jeanna diletakkan di dalam koma di bawah pengaruh dadah untuk seminggu, dan semua doktor memulakan rawatan intensif bagi membantu menampung sistem saraf sehingga imuniti semulajadinya cukup sembuh bagi melawan penyakit itu.

src: By surviving and recovering, Jeanna became the only person known in medicine to overcome rabies without a vaccine.
ref: Dengan terselamat dan dalam proses pemulihan, Jeanna telah menjadi satu-satunya orang yang diketahui di dalam perubatan untuk sembuh dari penyakit anjing gila tanpa vaksin.

src: The novel treatment is hailed by doctors as promising, but needs analysis and verification on another human.
ref: Rawatan yang aneh itu disambut oleh para doktor sebagai satu harapan, tetapi memerlukan analisis dan pengesahan ke atas manusia lain.

src: Jeanna's is the sixth case of human recovery from a rabies infection, but the other five people were vaccinated against rabies either before infection, or before the symptoms appeared.
ref: Jeanna adalah kes pemulihan manusia yang keenam dari jangkitan penyakit anjing gila, tetapi lima orang yang lain telah diberi vaksin melawan penyakit itu samaada sebelum jangkitan atau sebelum gejala-gejala timbul.

src: 120 years after it was founded, the University of Wales (UoW) will shut down.
ref: Selepas 120 tahun ia ditubuhkan, Universiti Wales (UoW) akan ditutup.

src: With a charter from 1893 and the Prince of Wales as its chancellor, problems began at UoW last year after concerns the head of a Malaysian partner institution, a local pop artist, had non-legitimate qualifications.
ref: Dengan satu piagam dari tahun 1893 dan Putera Wales sebagai canselornya, masalah bermula di UoW pada tahun lepas yang melibatkan ketua institusi rakan kongsi warganegara Malaysia, seorang penyanyi pop tempatan, mempunyai kelayakan tidak sah.

src: The Quality Assurance Agency said UoW's overseas checks on foreign institutions were inadequate.
ref: Agensi Jaminan Kualiti berkata semakan luar negara UoW ke atas institusi asing adalah tidak mencukupi.

src: The UK Border Agency is investigating a possible visa scam whereby foreign students were sold exam answers for a qualification leading to UoW entry and British visas.
ref: Agensi Sempadan UK sedang menyiasat satu kemungkinan penipuan visa di mana pelajar asing dijual jawapan peperiksaan bagi kelayakan yang membawa kepada kemasukan ke UoW dan visa British.

src: Two colleges — Rayat London College and Lampton College — are suspended over the claims.
ref: Dua kolej - Kolej Rayat London dan Kolej Lampton - telah digantung atas dakwaan tersebut.

src: Trinity St David and Swansea Metropolitan universities are to merge, forming University of Wales: Trinity St David.
ref: Universiti Trinity St David dan Swansea Metropolitan akan bergabung, membentuk Universiti Wales: Trinity St David.

src: Newport and Glyndwr are set to become universities in their own right.
ref: Newport dan Glyndwr akan menjadi universiti dengan hak tersendiri.

src: "I warmly welcome the historic decision taken today by the University of Wales Council," said UoW Vice-Chancellor Professor Medwin Hughes, who will fill the same role for the new University of Wales: Trinity St David.
ref: "Saya dengan besar hati mengalu-alukan keputusan bersejarah yang dibuat pada hari ini oleh Badan Universiti Wales," kata Naib-Canselor UoW Profesor Medwin Hughes, yang akan memegang peranan serupa di Universiti Wales: Trinity St David yang baru.

src: PepsiCo has acquired Poland's Star Foods, a leading maker of snacks, for an undisclosed sum.
ref: PepsiCo telah mengambil alih Star Food Poland, pembuat terkemuka makanan ringan, untuk jumlah yang tidak didedahkan.

src: The deal strengthens its position in Poland in snacks sales such as potato chips.
ref: Tawaran itu menguatkan lagi kedudukannya di Poland dalam jualan makanan ringan seperti kerepek kentang.

src: 13 American coal miners were trapped 2 miles (3 kilometers) inside the Sago coal mine in the US state of West Virginia.
ref: 13 orang pelombong arang warga Amerika terperangkap 2 batu (3 kilometer) didalam lombong arang batu Sago di negeri Barat Virgina Amerika Syarikat.

src: They were trapped since 6:40 am Eastern, Monday, January 2 following a methane gas explosion which caused the shaft to collapse.
ref: Mereka terperangkap sejak 6:40 am timur laut, Isnin 2 Januari selepas gas metane meletup yang mengakibatkan syaf api runtuh.

src: Rescue operations have commenced and at last report they were 1,400 feet from the location of the miners.
ref: Operasi menyelamat telah dilakukan dan laporan terakhir bahawa mereka 1,400 kaki dari lokasi pelombong.

src: Governor Joe Manchin, who lost an uncle in a 1968 mining disaster is there along with families who held a vigil in the Sago Baptist Church.
ref: Datuk Bandar Joe Manchin, yang kehilangan pakcik nya dalam bencana lombong 1968 ada disana bersama keluarga yang berjaga di Gereja Baptis Sago.

src: According to the Bureau of Meteorology, (BOM) 2005 was the hottest year since reliable, widespread temperature observations became available in 1910.
ref: Menurut Biro Meteorologi, (BOM) 2005 adalah tahun yang paling panas sejak pemerhatian suhu boleh dipercayai, dan meluas tersedia pada tahun 1910.

src: The Bureau of Meteorology says the result is more evidence of climate change.
ref: Biro Meteorologi berkata hasilnya adalah lebih banyak bukti tentang perubahan iklim.

src: The Bureau's Blair Trewin said: "We've seen things like the general retreat of the winter snow line."
ref: Biro Blair Trewin berkata: "Kami telah melihat perkara seperti pengunduran umum garisan salji musim sejuk."

src: "All the projections we have from climate models we would expect to see continued warming through the 21st century," he said.
ref: "Semua unjuran kami dapat dari model iklim kami akan menjangka untuk menyaksikan pemanasan berterusan sepanjang abad ke-21," katanya.

src: "Numbers like this ... are another piece of evidence that climate change is real and it's a real issue."
ref: "Angka seperti ini...adalah satu lagi bukti bahawa perubahan iklim adalah benar dan ia adalah satu isu sebenar."

src: Despite unseasonably cool weather in the South West of Western Australia, 2005 was a hot year over most of the nation, with the Northern Territory (NT) bearing the brunt.
ref: Meskipun terdapat cuaca sejuk bukan pada musimnya di Barat Selatan Australia Barat, 2005 merupakan tahun panas di kebanyakan kawasan negara itu, dengan Wilayah Utara (NT) menerima bahagian yang paling hebat.

src: The NT area-average maximum temperature was 1.45°C above the long-term mean, the largest anomaly of any state or territory.
ref: Suhu maksimum purata dari segi kawasan Wilayah Utara adalah 1.45ºC di atas purata jangka panjang, anomali terbesar mana-mana negeri atau wilayah.

src: The Bureau says that while these temperature departures may seem relatively small, a 1°C increase in mean temperatures is equivalent to many southern Australian towns shifting northward by about 100km.
ref: Biro itu berkata sementara perbezaan suhu sebenar dan suhu normal mungkin kelihatan agak kecil, peningkatan suhu sebanyak 1º C dalam suhu purata bersamaan dengan peralihan ke arah utara di banyak bandar di selatan Australia sebanyak kira-kira 100km.

src: However, no such event occurred in 2005, making the record warmth even more unusual.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, tiada kejadian seperti itu berlaku pada tahun 2005, menjadikan rekod kehangatan itu lebih luar biasa.

src: Since 1979, all but four years have been warmer than average in Australia.
ref: Sejak tahun 1979, kesemua masa kecuali empat tahun telah lebih panas daripada suhu purata di Australia.

src: Scientific studies have linked global and Australian temperature increases to the enhanced greenhouse effect.
ref: Kajian saintifik telah mengaitkan kenaikan suhu global dan Australia dengan kesan rumah hijau tertingkat.

src: The early months of 2005 were also very dry over much of Australia with the January-May period being the 2nd driest on record.
ref: Bulan pada awal tahun 2005 juga sangat kering di kebanyakan kawasan Australia dengan tempoh Januari-Mei yang merupakan waktu kedua kering dalam rekod.

src: Observations from this network reveal that, when compared to historical records, Tasmania was the wettest State in 2005, while Queensland and Western Australia were the driest.
ref: Pemerhatian dari rangkaian ini mendedahkan bahawa, jika dibandingkan dengan catatan lepas, Tasmania merupakan negeri paling basah pada tahun 2005, manakala Queensland dan Australia Barat adalah paling kering.

src: Over the New Year bushfires have caused havoc in many parts of Australia, with houses, farm stock devastated.
ref: Sejak kebakaran belukar Tahun Baru telah menyebabkan malapetaka di banyak tempat di Australia, dengan rumah-rumah, ternakan ladang musnah.

src: Thousands of hectares of bushland and farmland have been burnt out.
ref: Beribu-ribu hektar hutan belukar dan tanah ladang terbakar.

src: Environmentalists say the weather is a precursor of things to come: "2005 gave us a little taste of what life will be like if we fail to tackle climate change," Greenpeace's Catherine Fitzpatrick said.
ref: Ahli alam sekitar berkata cuaca adalah pelopor benda akan datang: "Tahun 2005 memberi kami sedikit rasa bagaimana hidup akan menjadi jika kami gagal menangani perubahan iklim," kata Catherine Fitzpatrick dari Greenpeace.

src: Ms Fitzpatrick said the Federal Government was as beholden to the coal and aluminium industries as the Japanese government was to whaling companies, and with far more devastating impacts.
ref: Cik Fitzpatrick berkata kerajaan pusat terhutang budi kepada industri arang batu dan aluminium sama seperti kerajaan Jepun terhutang budi kepada syarikat penangkapan ikan paus, dan dengan kesan yang lebih dahsyat.

src: "Today's figures should spur our Environment Minister ... to real action – ratify Kyoto, quit coal and move towards clean, renewable energy," Ms Fitzpatrick said.
ref: "Angka hari Ini seharusnya merangsang Menteri Alam Sekitar kami...untuk tindakan sebenar - mengesahkan Kyoto, menghentikan tenaga arang batu dan menuju ke arah tenaga bersih, boleh diperbaharui," kata Cik Fitzpatrick.

src: "I regard climate change as the number one environmental challenge …" "These figures add to the weight of evidence that climate change is real and it's a problem that the world needs to work together to seek to solve."
ref: "Saya menganggap perubahan iklim sebagai cabaran alam sekitar nombor satu..." "Angka-angka ini menambah kepada kepentingan bukti bahawa perubahan iklim adalah benar dan ia adalah satu masalah dunia perlu bekerjasama untuk berusaha menyelesaikannya."

src: Australia and the United States are the only developed nations to have refused to sign the Kyoto Protocol, which calls on countries to cut greenhouse emissions by 5.2 per cent below 1990 levels by 2012.
ref: Australia dan Amerika Syarikat adalah satu-satunya negara maju yang enggan menandatangani Protokol Kyoto, yang menyeru semua negara supaya mengurangkan pengeluaran rumah hijau sebanyak 5.2 peratus di bawah tahap 1990 sebelum tahun 2012.

src: The Government argues Kyoto will not work because it does not commit developing nations to reducing emissions.
ref: Kerajaan berpendapat protokol Kyoto tidak akan berjaya kerana ia tidak melibatkan negara-negara membangun untuk mengurangkan pelepasan.

src: "It only covers just over a third of the countries of the world and ... we need something that includes all countries of the world," said Senator Campbell.
ref: "Ia hanya melibatkan hanya lebih daripada satu pertiga negara-negara di dunia dan...kita perlu sesuatu yang melibatkan semua negara di dunia," kata Senator Campbell.

src: According to a preliminary estimate released by the World Meteorological Organization (WMO), the global mean temperature for 2005 was about 0.48°C above normal, putting 2005 amongst the four warmest years globally since records commenced in 1861.
ref: Menurut anggaran awal yang dikeluarkan oleh Pertubuhan Kajicuaca Sedunia (WMO), suhu purata global bagi tahun 2005 adalah kira-kira 0.48º C di atas paras normal, meletakkan 2005 antara empat tahun paling panas di seluruh dunia sejak catatan dimulakan pada tahun 1861.

src: This is an excerpt translation of a text found on the German wikipedia site, with an update.
ref: Ini adalah petikan yang diterjemahkan di laman wikipedia Jerman yang telah dikemaskini.

src: The roof over the local ice and tennis court crashed shortly after the end of the official skating time on 2 Jan 05, at about 16.50 hrs.
ref: Bumbung di bahagian meluncur ais dan gelanggang tenis telah runtuh sejurus selepas berakhirnya waktu rasmi meluncur ais pada 2 Jan 05 sekitar jam 4.50 petang.

src: At the time, there were about 50 people inside, mostly families with children.
ref: Pada waktu itu, sekitar 50 orang masih berada di dalam yang kebanyakannya keluarga bersama anak.

src: By 10 pm, five had been found dead, one child among them.
ref: Pada jam 10 malam, lima mayat telah dijumpai, termasuk seorang budak.

src: 20 to 25 people have been injured, just as many are missing.
ref: 20 ke 25 orang telah cedera selain masih ramai lagi yang hilang.

src: The reason for the cave-in of the roof was most likely massive snowfalls.
ref: Punca berlakunya runtuhan bumbung adalah kerana salji yang turun secara lebat.

src: Earlier that afternoon, measurements had been taken to determine its stability.
ref: Awal tengahari tadi, ukuran telah diambil bagi menentukan tahap kestabilan.

src: The police haven't been able to contact their respective relatives.
ref: Pihak polis masih belum dapat menghubungi saudara keluarga tersebut.

src: It is believed that the fire affected at least five other homes.
ref: Kebakaran itu dipercayai turut menjejaskan sekurang-kurangnya lima rumah lain.

src: Their vessels were found hiding in mangroves off the Kimberley coast.
ref: Kapal-kapal mereka didapati bersembunyi di hutan bakau di pantai Kimberley.

src: The fisherman were found in possession of nearly two tonnes of trochus shell, a shell valued for fashioning into high quality buttons, beads and trinkets.
ref: Nelayan tersebut dijumpai memiliki hampir dua tan cengkerang kon sfera, cengkerang yang bernilai untuk fesyen menghasilkan butang berkualiti tinggi, manik dan perhiasan.

src: The WA Fisheries Department says the jail terms reflect the seriousness with which the offence is being viewed.
ref: Jabatan Perikanan WA berkata terma hukuman penjara mencerminkan betapa seriusnya kesalahan itu dilihat.

src: Department officer Chris Mitchell says the fishermen had traversed 200 miles of Commonwealth waters and were inside the three nautical mile state limit when they were caught.
ref: Pegawai jabatan Chris Mitchell berkata nelayan telah merentasi 200 batu perairan Komanwel dan berada dalam had negeri tiga batu nautika apabila mereka ditangkap.

src: "In the early days, the courts would have given a good behaviour bond for a first offender", he said.
ref: "Pada peringkat awal, mahkamah selalunya akan memberikan bon berkelakuan baik ke atas pesalah kali pertama," beliau berkata.

src: That was more specifically for the traditional sail-powered vessels, not these motorised vessels that are coming down and because these are in state waters it is far more serious.
ref: Itu lebih khusus untuk kapal berkuasa-layar tradisional, bukan kapal-kapal bermotor yang datang dan kerana ini berada dalam perairan negeri ia adalah jauh lebih serius.

src: On Thursday, skippers of 11 Indonesian fishing boats were fined by a Perth court.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, kapten daripada 11 bot nelayan Indonesia telah dikenakan denda oleh mahkamah Perth.

src: The remaining eight were fined $9000 each and given 60 days to pay.
ref: Lapan yang lain telah didenda $9000 setiap satu dan diberi 60 hari untuk dibayar.

src: The magistrate ordered that they spend between 60 and 100 days in jail in Western Australia if the fines were not paid.
ref: Majistret mengarahkan mereka menghabiskan antara 60 dan 100 hari dalam penjara di Australia Barat jika denda tidak dibayar.

src: A woman in Australia has been killed in a shark attack.
ref: Seorang wanita di Australia telah terbunuh dalam satu serangan jerung.

src: The attack occurred at 5pm (Local Time) just off Amity Point, North Stradbroke Island, south-east of Brisbane.
ref: Serangan itu berlaku pada pukul 5 petang (Waktu Tempatan) tidak jauh dari Amity Point, North Stradbroke Island, tenggara Brisbane.

src: Emergency Services Rescue Helicopter crew officer Rod Morgan said the woman had suffered massive blood loss.
ref: Pegawai krew helikopter Perkhidmatan Kecemasan Penyelamat Rod Morgan berkata, wanita itu telah mengalami kehilangan darah yang sangat banyak.

src: "She was very pale" he said, "We were diverted right away and were able to be on the scene within minutes and were able to have the patient at hospital within an hour of the attack."
ref: "Dia sangat pucat" katanya, "Kami telah alihkan segera dan dapat berada di tempat kejadian dalam masa beberapa minit dan dapat menghantar pesakit ke hospital dalam masa sejam dari serangan itu."

src: There were many witnesses at the scene and they are now being interviewed by Police at Amity Point.
ref: Terdapat banyak saksi di tempat kejadian dan mereka kini sedang ditemuramah oleh Polis di Amity Point.

src: One witness, who asks to not be identified, described that the victim was swimming in the sea with her Border Collie.
ref: Seorang saksi, yang meminta untuk tidak dikenal pasti, terangkan bahawa mangsa sedang berenang di laut dengan Border Collie beliau.

src: "It was just a little black-and-white dog but he was crazy so I locked him under the house."
ref: "Ia hanya anjing hitam dan putih yang kecil tetapi dia gila jadi saya menguncinya di bawah rumah."

src: Other reports claim that the woman had been scuba diving in murky shallow water approximately 15 metres from the shore.
ref: Laporan lain mendakwa bahawa wanita itu telah menyelam di dalam air cetek keruh kira-kira 15 meter dari pantai.

src: The woman is believed to be from McDowall in Brisbane, but her name has not yet been released.
ref: Wanita itu dipercayai dari McDowall di Brisbane, tetapi namanya masih belum dikeluarkan.

src: A resident of Amity Point for 20 years, Brad Ross, said tourists visiting the area have been warned of potential attacks; "The shore just falls away into 30m of water and there are plenty of bull sharks out there."
ref: Seorang penduduk Amity Point selama 20 tahun, Brad Ross, berkata pelancong yang melawat kawasan ini telah diberi amaran tentang kemungkinan serangan; "Pantai ini hanyalah sejauh dari 30m air dan terdapat banyak jerung jenis bull shark di luar sana."

src: Other beaches on the island are protected by drum lines.
ref: Pantai-pantai lain di pulau itu dilindungi oleh perangkap jerung.

src: Queensland state police inspector Peter Harding believes from the severity of the woman's injuries that she was attacked by a group of bull sharks, a species known for aggressive behavior this time of year.
ref: Inspektor Polis negeri Queensland Peter Harding percaya dari teruknya keadaan kecederaan wanita itu bahawa dia telah diserang oleh sekumpulan jerung jenis bull shark, spesis yang terkenal dengan tingkah laku agresif pada masa ini.

src: Water police will search for the sharks today and as a result, beaches on the east and west of Amity Point have been closed.
ref: Polis marin akan mencari jerung hari ini dan akibatnya, pantai-pantai di sebelah timur dan barat Amity Point telah ditutup.

src: Local wisdom cautions against allowing dogs in the water at swimming beaches, because of a fear that they attract sharks, perhaps because of residue accumulated from fleas which live on the dog's blood.
ref: Kepercayaan tempatan memberi amaran tentang membenarkan anjing di dalam air di pantai berenang, kerana bimbang mereka akan menarik perhatian jerung, mungkin kerana sisa terkumpul daripada kutu yang hidup di dalam darah anjing.

src: Two suspected robbers west of Kissimmee, Florida released one hostage after negotiating with sheriffs' deputies.
ref: Dua perompak yang disyaki di barat Kissimmee, Florida melepaskan seorang tebusan selepas berbincang dengan timbalan syerif.

src: Police later shot and killed one bank robber and arrested a second on after a 10 hour stand-off with police.
ref: Polis seterusnya menembak dan membunuh perompak bank pertama dan menahan yang kedua selepas 10 jam berlawan dengan pihak polis.

src: The suspects had escaped the Mercantile Bank, a mile west of Walt Disney World's Wide World of Sports, with one hostage after authorities blasted through the rear door using an explosive device.
ref: Suspek Bank Mercantile telah melarikan diri, satu batu dari barat Walt Disney World's Wide World of Sports, bersama seorang tebusan setelah pihak berkuasa meletupkannya dari pintu belakang menggunakan peranti letupan.

src: But police soon cornered them in their getaway car, authorities said.
ref: Tetapi, tidak lama kemudian polis telah mengepung mereka yang berada di dalam kereta untuk melarikan diri, kata pihak berkuasa.

src: "He tried to leave again and at that point he was taken down by one of our snipers."
ref: "Dia cuba untuk pergi sekali lagi dan di ketika itu dia telah ditewaskan oleh salah seorang penembak kami."

src: Deputies had been using cell phones to negotiate with the suspects, who were wearing masks, wigs and coats.
ref: Timbalan syerif telah menggunakan telefon bimbit untuk berunding dengan suspek, yang mana mengenakan topeng muka, rambut palsu dan kot.

src: The suspects escaped with a female hostage and drove away in a bank employee's car, but they traveled less than a mile before street barricades stopped them.
ref: Suspek melarikan diri bersama tebusan wanita dan memandu lari dengan kereta milik pekerja bank, tetapi hanya memandu kurang dari satu batu sebelum diberhentikan oleh penghadang jalan.

src: The suspects had been holed up in the bank since Tuesday morning.
ref: Suspek telah bersembunyi di bank sejak pagi Selasa.

src: The first hostage was released when the robbers panicked when deputies arrived so quickly after the robbery, said sheriff's spokeswoman Twis Lizasuain.
ref: Tebusan pertama dibebaskan di ketika perompak dalam keadaan kalut apabila timbalan syerif tiba cepat selepas rompakan terjadi, kata jurucakap sheriff Twiss Lizasuain.

src: Police did not release the names the hostages, but the suspects were identified Wednesday as a 50-year-old male, Gaetano Alessandrello, and a 26-year old woman, Amanda Lynn Moeller.
ref: Polis tidak menyiarkan nama-nama tebusan, tetapi suspek dikenal pasti pada Rabu sebagai Gaetano Alessandrello, lelaki berusia 50 tahun, dan Amanda Lynn Moeller, wanita berusia 26 tahun.

src: It was not immediately clear whether the suspects ever got any money.
ref: Ia tidak segera diketahui samada suspek pernah mendapatkan duit atau tidak.

src: Tourists near the bank, in hotels, were confined to them for hours as police asked them "to stay indoors".
ref: Pelancong yang tinggal di hotel berdekatan dengan bank, berkurung selama satu jam seperti mana diarahkan oleh polis kepada mereka "terus tinggal di dalam."

src: The hostages said they were treated well and were not threatened with violence, Hansell said.
ref: Tebusan berkata mereka dilayan dengan baik dan tidak diancam dengan keganasan, kata Hansell.

src: It is unclear if the two robberies are connected or not.
ref: Ia tidak jelas samada dua rompakan ini berkait atau tidak.

src: As of January 9th, the agency's website is in compliance with the Brazilian government's program to use free software throughout the public sector.
ref: Pada 9 Januari, sebuah laman web agensi menuruti program kerajaan Brazil untuk menggunakan perisian percuma diseluruh sektor awam.

src: Free software is software which, once obtained, can be used, copied, studied, modified and redistributed.
ref: Perisian percuma adalah perisian dimana, sekali didapati, boleh digunakan, dicetak, dipelajari, diubahsuai dan diagih semula.

src: It is often made available online without charge or offline for the cost of distribution; free software is not limited to being given away, but can be "free as in free speech" and sold for profit.
ref: Ia selalunya boleh didapati dalam talian tanpa caj atau diluar talian dengan kos pengagihan; perisian percuma tidak diterhadkan untuk dijadikan pemberian, tetapi boleh menjadi "bebas sebagaimana kebebasan bersuara" dan dijual demi keutungan.

src: The change has taken about a year and a half, since the first changes of some workstations and servers of Radiobrás.
ref: Perubahan itu telah dijalankan selama setahun setengah, sejak perubahan pertama di sesetengah tempat kerja dan server Radiobras.

src: The switch to free software is being implemented by the National Institute of Technology of Information (ITI), inspired by similar decisions made in another countries.
ref: Pertukaran kepada perisian percuma itu dilaksanakan oleh Institut Teknologi Maklumat Kebangsaan (ITI), diilhamkan oleh keputusan serupa yang dibuat di negara-negara lain.

src: The United Nations Food and Agriculture Organization has asked countries neighbouring Turkey, specifically mentioning Armenia, Azerbaijan, Georgia, Iraq, Iran, and Syria, to be cautious and take measures to prevent the avian flu, H5N1, from spreading.
ref: Kesatuan Makanan Bersatu dan Pertubuhan Pertanian telah meminta negara-negara jiran Turki, khususnya Armenia, Azerbaijan, Georgia, Iraq, Iran dan Syria, supaya berhati-hati dan mengambil langkah berjaga-jaga untuk mngelak selesema burung, H5N1, dari merebak.

src: The UN also warned that civilians in these countries should be given more information about the disease.
ref: UN turut memberi amaran bahawa orang awam dalam negara ini patut diberi lebih maklumat mengenai penyakit tersebut.

src: Two people have died in Turkey so far, possibly a third, and more hospitalized, after contracting the flu virus.
ref: Dua telah meninggal di Turki setakat ini, berkemungkinan yang ketiga, dan masih banyak yang dimasukkan di hospital, selepas dijangkitivirus selesema tersebut.

src: All 15 confirmed cases in Turkey had close contact with birds.
ref: Kesemua 15 kes yang disahkan di Turki mempunyai sentuhan rapat dengan burung.

src: A 7-year old Tennessee boy who was eager to get his driver's license got an early education when he decided to take his parents pick-up truck for a joyride.
ref: Seorang budak lelaki 7-tahun dari Tennessee yang bersemangat untuk mendapatkan lesen memandunya mendapat pendidikan awal apabila dia memutuskan untuk mengambil trak pikap ibu bapanya untuk bersiar-siar dgn kereta yang dicuri itu.

src: The boy, whose name was not released, remembered to wear his seatbelt and even used his turn signal when he was supposed to.
ref: Budak itu, yang namanya tidak dipaparkan, teringat untuk memakai tali pinggang keledar dan juga menggunakan lampu isyarat belok apabila sepatutnya.

src: "He was so short he had to sit up close to the steering wheel," Laverette said.
ref: "Dia sangat rendah, dia terpaksa duduk sangat dekat dengan stereng," kata Laverette.

src: "There were like probably five city cars and three county cars and a state trooper" all of which were chasing the pickup, said Susan Daniel, a witness to the incident.
ref: "Rasanya terdapat lima kereta bandar dan tiga kereta daerah dan polis negeri" yang semuanya mengejar pikap itu, kata Susan Daniel, seorang saksi kejadian itu.

src: "Then to come find out it was a child, I was really shocked."
ref: "Kemudian kami mengetahui dia adalah seorang kanak-kanak, saya benar-benar terkejut".

src: Mehmet Ali Agca, jailed in 1981 for shooting and injuring former Pope John Paul II in Rome has been released from Turkish prison.
ref: Mehmet Ali Agca, dipenjarakan pada 1981 kerana menembak dan mencederakan bekas Pope John Paul II di Rome telah dibebaskan dari penjara Turki.

src: A Turkish court had determined that he had already completed his sentence with time served.
ref: Mahkamah Turki telah menetapkan yang dia telah memenuhi hukumannya dengan memenuhi masanya.

src: Agca shot the Pope as he rode around St Peter's Square in a open-topped car.
ref: Agca menembak Pope tersebut semasa menaiki kereta berbumbung terbuka dikawasan Dataran St Peter.

src: Turkish citizens were outraged that he served only four and a half years for murder.
ref: Penduduk Turki marah kerana dia hanya menjalani empat setengah tahun kerana membunuh.

src: The Turkish government has come under fire from officials in Dogubayazit, where three siblings died from the H5N1 strain of Bird Flu, for not sending enough resources and not responding quickly enough in the region.
ref: Kerajaan Turki telah dikritik oleh pegawai-pegawai di Dogubayazit, dimana tiga beradik mati dari H5N1 Selsema Burung, kerana tidak menghantar sumber mencukupi dan tidak bertindak balas secepatnya di daerah tersebut.

src: The mayor of Dogubayazit, Mukkades Kubilay, claims that the Turkish government sent only three doctors and that there were not enough workers to destroy poultry.
ref: Datuk Bandar Dogubayazit, Mukkades Kubilay, menyatakan yang kerajaan Turki hanya menghantar tiga doktor dan tiada pekerja mencukupi untuk memusnahkan ayam.

src: The government has been accused of doing too little, too late.
ref: Kerajaan telah dituduh melaksanakan terlalu sedikit, terlalu lambat.

src: Agriculture Minister Mehdi Eker dismissed the claim, saying that culling of infected poultry began immediately following the discovery of H5N1 on December 15, 2005.
ref: Menteri Pertanian Mehdi Eker menolak kenyataan tersebut, mengatakan yang pemusnahan ayam terjangkit bermula segera berikutan penemuan H5N1 pada 15 Disember, 2005.

src: Questions about whether the government acted aggressively enough early in the outbreak emerged as officials tried to contain the disease, which Eker said had been confirmed in 11 of Turkey's 81 provinces and was suspected in 14 others.
ref: Persoalan samada kerajaan bertindak cukup agresif diawal kemunculan wabak apabila pegawai-pegawai cuba menghadkan penyakit tersebut, dimana Eker mengatakan telah disahkan di 11 dari 81 dareah Turki dan disuspek didalam 14 daerah lain.

src: Several others with the virus have shown few symptoms or are in a stable condition.
ref: Beberapa yang lain dengan virus tersebut telah menunjukkan beberapa simptom atau didalam keadaan stabil.

src: Authorities suggest that the strain may not be as deadly as first thought.
ref: Penguatkuasa menyarankan yang tekanan mungkin tidak seburuk yang difikirkan pada mulanya.

src: Of those who contracted the virus in Asia, half died.
ref: Mereka yang dijangkiti virus tersebut di Asia, separuh telah meninggal dunia.

src: An eight-year-old child who became infected after playing with dying chickens has been released from hospital.
ref: Seorang kanak-kanak berumur lapan tahun yang dijangkiti selepas bermain dengan ayam hampir mati telah dikeluarkan dari hospital.

src: Nationwide, 355,000 birds have been slaughtered in an attempt to slow the outbreak.
ref: Diseluruh negara, 355,000 burung telah disembelih dalam cubaan memperlahankan penyebaran wabak.

src: The Agricultural ministry is complaining that it has only 24 workers in Dogubayazit, a city of 56,000, and culling could take up to a month to complete.
ref: Kementerian Pertanian mengadu yang mereka hanya mempunyai 24 pekerja di Dogubayazit, bandar yang mempunyai 56,000 ayam dan pemusnahan mungkin memerlukan sebulan untuk diselesaikan.

src: Experts are still warning of a possible pandemic, prompting the world bank to release US$500 million in aid to assist countries combat H5N1.
ref: Pakar masih memberi amaran yang kemungkinan penyebaran wabak, mendorong bank dunia untuk mengeluarkan US$500 juta bantuan untuk membantu negara-negara menangani H5N1.

src: Robertson was one of the people at the heart of the project which was supported by many other evangelicals who worked to raise $50 million (USD).
ref: Robertson adalah salah seorang daripada orang penting projek itu yang disokong oleh ramai mubaligh Kristian lain yang berusaha mengumpul $50 juta (USD).

src: Israeli tourism minister, Avraham Hirchson, and Robertson were just about to sign an agreement that the Israeli government would set aside land and infrastructure for the site, when Robertson made comments on his daily show, The 700 Club, claiming that Israeli Prime Minister Ariel Sharon's stroke was "Divine retribution" for withdrawing from the Gaza Strip.
ref: Menteri Pelancongan Israel, Avraham Hirchson dan Robertson hampir menandatangani perjanjian bahawa kerajaan Israel akan memperuntukkan tanah dan infrastruktur untuk tapak itu, apabila Robertson membuat komen dalam rancangan hariannya, The 700 Club, mendakwa bahawa strok Perdana Menteri Israel, Ariel Sharon adalah "hukuman Ilahi" kerana menarik diri dari Semenanjung Gaza.

src: Robertson said, "'This is my land,' and for any prime minister of Israel who decides he is going to carve it up and give it away, God says, 'No, this is mine.'"
ref: Robertson berkata, "'Inilah tanah saya, dan bagi mana-mana Perdana Menteri Israel yang memutuskan dia akan membahagikan dan menyerahkannya, Tuhan berkata, 'Tidak, ini adalah milik saya.

src: On Wednesday, Robertson sent a letter addressed to Sharon's son Omri apologizing for his comments.
ref: Pada hari Rabu, Robertson menghantar surat kepada anak Sharon, Omri untuk meminta maaf atas komennya.

src: In the letter, Robertson said Sharon is "kind, gracious, and gentle man" who was "carrying an almost insurmountable burden of making decisions for his nation."
ref: Dalam surat itu, Robertson kata Sharon "baik hati, baik budi, dan orang yang lemah-lembut" yang "mendukung beban yang hampir tidak dapat diatasi demi membuat keputusan untuk negara beliau".

src: The letter further added, "My concern for the future safety of your nation led me to make remarks which I can now view in retrospect as inappropriate and insensitive in light of a national grief."
ref: Surat itu turut menambah, "Kebimbangan saya untuk keselamatan masa depan negara anda menyebabkan saya membuat kenyataan yang saya kini boleh melihat kembali tidak sesuai dan tidak mempedulikan perasaan orang lain dengan mempertimbangkan kepiluan negara".

src: Robertson wrote, "I ask your forgiveness and the forgiveness of the people of Israel."
ref: Robertson menulis, "Saya memohon maaf daripada anda dan pengampunan orang Israel".

src: Hirchson said on Wednesday that "Robertson's help was no longer welcome."
ref: Hirchson berkata pada hari Rabu bahawa "bantuan Robertson tidak lagi dialu-alukan".

src: Ironically, Robertson helped make television ministries what they are today, and the Heritiage Center would contain studios and satellite uplinks for live broadcasts.
ref: Yang ironknya, Robertson membantu dakwah televisyen mencapai peringkat sebegini sekarang, dan Pusat Warisan akan mempunyai studio dan hubungan satelit untuk siaran langsung.

src: A peaceful protest in Sarajevo, lasting for several weeks so far, was ignited by a post on an online discussion board, Sarajevo-X.
ref: Satu protes aman di Sarajevo, berlanjutan selama beberapa minggu setakat ini, telah dinyalakan oleh satu paparan di papan perbincangan dalam talian, Sarajevo-X.

src: In a post named "Patriotism" one user, with nickname Stolac92, expressed his dissatisfaction with Bosnia today, writing among other things on December 22: "My heart hurts.
ref: Dalam paparan yang dinamakan "Patriotisme" seorang pengguna, dengan nama panggilan Stolac92, melahirkan rasa tidak puas hati dengan Bosnia hari ini, menulis pada 22 Disember salah satu ayat yang berbunyi: "Hati saya sakit.

src: But what hurts the most is that we are quiet, we are tolerating, forgiving instead of doing something about it."
ref: Tetapi apa yang paling menyakitkan adalah bahawa kita tenang, kita bertolak ansur disebalik melakukan sesuatu mengenainya".

src: After receiving support from other forum members, the user proposed gathering in front of the Assembly building every day, starting from 5pm.
ref: Selepas menerima sokongan daripada ahli-ahli forum yang lain, pengguna mencadangkan perhimpunan di hadapan bangunan Dewan Undangan setiap hari, bermula dari pukul 5 petang.

src: They decided to use an open palm with a Bosnian map on it for their symbol, with word Dosta (Enough) as their slogan.
ref: Mereka memutuskan untuk menggunakan satu tapak tangan terbuka dengan peta Bosnia di atasnya sebagai simbol mereka, dengan perkataan Dosta (Cukuplah) sebagai slogan mereka.

src: Bosnia and Herzegovina has been divided in two ethnic entities since the end of the war, the Serbian Republic and Federation of Bosniaks and Croats.
ref: Bosnia dan Herzegovina telah dibahagikan dengan dua entiti etnik sejak perang berakhir, Republik Serbia dan Persekutuan Bosnia dan Croatia.

src: Council leader Angus Campbell intends to press the Scottish Government on the final funding; "it would be a huge shame if all the other funding is lost", he said.
ref: Ketua Majlis Angus Campbell bertujuan untuk menggesa Kerajaan Scotland dalam dana terakhir; "ia merupakan satu keaiban besar jika kesemua dana hilang", kata beliau.

src: Campbell describes what would be the first UK museum with Gaelic as its primary language as "a generational project" with benefits throughout the communities of the Outer Hebrides.
ref: Campbell menjelaskan muzium pertama UK dengan Gaelis sebagai bahasa utama sebagai "projek bergenerasi" dengan keuntungan seluruh komuniti Outer Hebrides.

src: Local MSP Alasdair Allan commended the council's efforts to save Lews Castle saying they, and other agencies, "have been working tirelessly to progress plans that would ensure Lews Castle becomes both a cultural and economic asset to the islands."
ref: MSP tempatan Alasdair Allan memuji usaha majlis untuk menyelamatkan Istana Lewis berkata mereka, dan agensi lain, "telah bekerja kuat untuk meneruskan rancangan yang akan memastikan Istana Lewis menjadi kedua-dua aset budaya dan ekonomi kepada pulau tersebut."

src: In World War II, the castle was the base for a Naval hospital and squadron of amphibious biplanes.
ref: Dalam Perang Dunia ke II, istana tersebut merupakan pangkalan kepada hospital Naval dan skuadron biplan amfibia.

src: Post-war, it spent 30 years as a technical college and school.
ref: Selepas perang, ia menghabiskan selama 30 tahun sebagai kolej dan sekolah teknikal.

src: If the final tranche of funding is secured, in 2014 the castle will become the first-ever archive facility in the Western Isles.
ref: Dalam dana terakhir yang berjaya dikumpul, pada 2014, istana tersebut bakal menjadi kemudahan arkib pertama di Western Isles.

src: The collections of Museum nan Eilean (MnE) could move from their current home into the castle; items held by the National Archives of Scotland could return to their native isles.
ref: Koleksi Muzium nan Eilean (MnE) bolehlah dipindahkan daripada lokasi semasa ke istana tersebut; barang-barang yang disimpan Arkib Negara Scotland bolehlah dipulangkan ke kepulauan asal.

src: And, modern facilities would permit collections from the National Museum of Scotland and the British Museum – such as the Lewis Chessmen – to be exhibited there.
ref: Dan, kemudahan moden akan membenarkan koleksi daripada Muzium Negara Scotland dan Muzium British - seperti Lewis Chessmen- untuk dipamerkan disitu.

src: Marek is the editor of a regional weekly newspaper, the Wiesci Polickie (news from the town of Police).
ref: Marek adalah editor sebuah akhbar mingguan serantau, Wiesci Polickie (berita dari bandar Police).

src: In February 2001, he published an article alleging that a local municipal employee, who privately ran an advertising agency, had a conflict of interest in which he profited from his position to obtain business for his agency.
ref: Pada bulan Februari 2001, dia menerbitkan satu artikel yang mendakwa bahawa pekerja majlis perbandaran tempatan, yang secara peribadi mempunyai sebuah agensi pengiklanan, ada konflik kepentingan di mana dia mendapat keuntungan dari kedudukannya untuk mendapatkan perniagaan bagi agensi itu.

src: Upon appeal in November 2003, he had the three-month prison sentence suspended on the condition that he apologise to the libellee.
ref: Apabila rayuan dibuat pada bulan November 2003, dia diberi hukuman penjara tiga bulan dengan syarat bahawa dia meminta maaf kepada defendan fitnah itu.

src: Marek refused to apologise and applied for a presidential pardon in March 2004.
ref: Marek enggan meminta maaf dan memohon ampun daripada presiden pada Mac 2004.

src: On March 23, 2004, a court in Szczecin suspended the application of the sentence by six months due to problems with Marek's wife's pregnancy.
ref: Pada 23 Mac, 2004, sebuah mahkamah di Szczecin menggantung permohonan hukuman enam bulan atas masalah dengan kehamilan isteri Marek itu ini.

src: On July 18, 2003, Dorota Nieznalska was sentenced to six months of community service for displaying a work of art that showed a penis on a cross.
ref: Pada 18 Julai 2003, Dorota Nieznalska dijatuhi hukuman khidmat masyarakat selama enam bulan kerana paparan karya seni yang menunjukkan zakar pada salib.

src: On January 5, 2005, Jerzy Urban was fined 20,000 złoty (about 5000 euros) for having insulted Pope John Paul II, who qualified for legal protection against insults due to his role as a visiting head of state.
ref: Pada 5 Januari 2005, Jerzy Urban didenda 20,000 zloty (kira-kira 5000 euro) kerana telah menghina Pope John Paul II, yang layak untuk perlindungan undang-undang terhadap penghinaan kerana peranannya sebagai ketua lawatan negara.

src: The debate over whether Australians should be required to have a national identity card has been reignited following an announcement by Attorney-General Phillip Ruddock yesterday that a study will be conducted.
ref: Perdebatan sama ada warga Australia patut diwajibkan untuk memiliki kad identiti nasional telah dicetuskan semula berikutan pengumuman oleh peguam besar Philip ruddock semalam di mana kajian akan dilakukan.

src: The idea was abandoned after being defeated in the Australian Senate and due to strong criticism.
ref: Idea ini telah dihentikan selepas dikalahkan di Senat Australia dan disebabkan oleh kritikan hebat.

src: Defence Minister Robert Hill is cautious of such a plan, saying "I don't believe governments are entitled to any more information about you than is absolutely necessary".
ref: Menteri Pertahanan Robert Hill berwaspada terhadap pelan seperti itu, berkata "Saya tidak percaya kerajaan berhak mendapat apa-apa maklumat lanjut tentang kamu selain yang benar-benar diperlukan."

src: The Australian Chamber of Commerce and Industry, which represents big business in Australia has voiced its opposition to the plan claiming the system could cost $750 per person to introduce, most of which would be borne by big business.
ref: Dewan Perniagaan dan Industri Australia, yang mewakili perniagaan yang besar di Australia telah menyuarakan bantahannya terhadap pelan itu, mendakwa sistem boleh berkos sebanyak $750 setiap seorang untuk dijalankan, kebanyakan yang akan ditanggung oleh perniagaan yang besar.

src: Currently, Arsenal, Manchester United and Chelsea have put in bids for the player, although he admits that he wants to transfer to his childhood dream-club, Arsenal.
ref: Pada masa ini, Arsenal, Manchester United dan Chelsea telah meletakkan tawaran untuk pemain itu, walaupun dia mengakui bahawa dia mahu berpindah ke kelab impian zaman kanak-kanaknya, Arsenal.

src: Walcott and his family are keen to take his current skills to an even higher plataeu, and feel that only this kind of skill could be achieved with Arsenal, despite the fact that other clubs have offered to outbid Arsenal.
ref: Walcott dan keluarganya berminat untuk membawa kemahirannya sekarang ke tahap yang lebih tinggi, dan merasakan bahawa jenis kemahiran ini boleh dicapai dengan Arsenal, walaupun pada hakikatnya bahawa kelab lain telah membuat tawaran untuk mengalahkan Arsenal.

src: When interviewed on his interest in the striker, he revealed that he had been watching him and was a big admirer
ref: Ketika ditemu ramah berkenaan minat ke atas penyerang itu, dia mendedahkan bahawa dia telah memerhatikannya dan merupakan peminat besarnya.

src: Initial reports say the vessel has been spotted off Cape York, three days after it was reported missing.
ref: Laporan awal mengatakan kapal itu telah dikesan di luar Cape York, tiga hari selepas ia dilaporkan hilang.

src: The Australia West Papua Association (AWPA) says the boat was carrying people who left for security reasons as a campaign against Indonesian rule of the Melanesian province continues.
ref: Persatuan Australia Barat Papua (PABP) berkata bot itu membawa orang-orang yang meninggalkan atas sebab-sebab keselamatan kerana kempen terhadap pemerintahan Indonesia di wilayah Melanesian berterusan.

src: Any application for possible asylum can only be submitted to the Australian authorities if they reach the Australian mainland.
ref: Apa-apa permohonan untuk kemungkinan suaka hanya boleh dikemukakan kepada pihak berkuasa Australia jika mereka sampai di tanah besar Australia.

src: Australia operates a detention centre in Nauru to process people intercepted at sea while trying to reach Australia illegally.
ref: Australia mengendalikan pusat tahanan di Nauru untuk memproses orang yang melintas di laut ketika cuba untuk sampai ke Australia secara haram.

src: The AWPA said the group had been forced to flee Papua by boat because the usual way of leaving the province — by crossing the eastern border into Papua New Guinea — had been made more difficult by increased surveillance.
ref: PABP berkata kumpulan itu telah dipaksa untuk melarikan diri dari Papua dengan bot kerana cara yang biasa untuk meninggalkan wilayah itu - dengan menyeberangi sempadan timur ke Papua New Guinea - telah menjadi lebih sukar oleh peningkatan pengawasan.

src: "No one (has) come from West Papua in boats before like this, seeking political asylum," said a spokesperson for AWPA.
ref: "Tiada siapa (pernah) datang dari Papua Barat dalam bot sebelum ini, mencari suaka politik," kata seorang jurucakap GABP.

src: "A vessel fitting the information reported was located by Coastwatch at about 2pm at Cape York," an immigration department spokeswoman told AFP.
ref: "Sebuah kapal yang mengenai maklumat yang dilaporkan dijumpai oleh penjaga perairan pada kira-kira pukul 2 petang di Cape York," kata seorang jurucakap Jabatan Imigresen kepada AFP.

src: Customs and government officials were on their way to meet the boat, she added.
ref: Pegawai kastam dan kerajaan sedang dalam perjalanan untuk berjumpa dengan bot itu, tambahnya.

src: The project includes the French and German governments along with a host of European technology companies such as Thomson, France Telecom and Deutsche Telekom.
ref: Projek ini termasuk kerajaan Perancis dan German serta tuan rumah syarikat teknologi Eropah seperti Thomson, France Telecom dan Deutsche Telekom.

src: It is scheduled to be submitted to France's Agency of Industrial Innovation later this month.
ref: Ia dijadualkan dihantarkan kepada Agency of Industrial Innovation Perancis akhir bulan ini.

src: The agency which has a budget of €2 billion ($2.41 billion) hasn't specified how much of this money will be spent on Quaero.
ref: Agensi itu yang mempunyai bajet Euro 2 bilion ($2.41 bilion) belum menyatakan berapa banyakkah duit ini akan dibelanjakan untuk Quaero.

src: French broadcasters are also planning an international television network, CFII aimed at presenting the French view on world events.
ref: Penyiar Perancis juga merancang rankaian televisyen antarabangsa, CFII tujuan untuk menyampaikan pandangan Perancis terhadap peristiwa dunia.

src: The network is slated to begin broadcasting in French and English to Europe, the Middle East and Africa sometime next year.
ref: Rangkaian itu dijadualkan untuk bermula penyiaran dalam bahasa Perancis dan Inggeris untuk Eropah, di Timur Tengah dan Afrika tahun depan.

src: Designers hope that Quaero will be the world's most advanced multimedia search engine to locate and translate video and audio over the internet.
ref: Pereka berharap Quaero akan menjadi enjin multimedia pencarian yang termaju di dunia untuk mencari dan menterjemahkan video dan audio melalui internet.

src: Most industry experts remain skeptical and fear that the program would be costly and unwieldy to administer and would produce no tangible commercial advances.
ref: Pakar industri yang tetap ragu dan bimbang bahawa program itu akan menjadi mahal dan susah digunakan untuk mentadbir dan tidak akan menghasilkan sebarang kemajuan komersial yang ketara.

src: "I'm not too confident that Quaero will be able to produce anything that the private sector isn't already offering or will develop on its own in the future," said John Lervik, chief executive of Fast Search & Transfer, a Norwegian software company that provides search solutions to businesses for data stored on their corporate networks.
ref: "Saya tidak begitu yakin Quaero akan menghasilkan sesuatu yang sektor swasta tidak lagi menawarkan atau akan bangun dengan sendiri pada masa depan," kata John Lervik, ketua eksekutif Fast Search & Transfer, sebuah syarikat perisian Norwegian yang menyediakan carian penyelesaian untuk perniagaan untuk data yang disimpan di rangkaian korporat mereka.

src: Nine people have died in bush-fires in the region of the Eyre Peninsula in South Australia.
ref: Sembilan orang terbunuh dalam kebakaran belukar di kawasan Semenanjung Eyre di Australia Selatan.

src: The fire has spread over 40,000 hectares of scrub, bushland and farmland so far and is still burning out of control.
ref: Kebakaran itu telah merebak lebih 40,000 hektar belukar, hutan belukar dan tanah ladang setakat ini dan masih membakar di luar kawalan.

src: Of the nine who have died, eight were attempting to escape the advancing fire in their cars.
ref: Daripada sembilan yang telah meninggal dunia, lapan telah cuba untuk melarikan diri dengan kereta dari api yang merebak.

src: Thousands of sheep and cattle have also been killed in the fires.
ref: Beribu ekor biri-biri dan lembu juga telah terbunuh dalam kebakaran.

src: Separate fires have also been burning around Mount Osmond and Cleland National Park in the Adelaide hills.
ref: Kebakaran berasingan juga berlaku di sekitar Mount Osmond dan Taman Negara Cleland di bukit Adelaide.

src: Two years ago, over 400 houses were burnt down in a bush fire in the Australian capital city, Canberra.
ref: Dua tahun lalu, lebih 400 buah rumah telah terbakar di dalam kebakaran belukar di ibu negara Australia, Canberra.

src: At least eight people have died in a fire in a multi-storied office center, namely, in the office belonging to the Russian Savings Bank (Sberbank), in the Russian Pacific port city of Vladivostok, the Russian Emergency Situations Ministry said Monday.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya lapan telah maut dalam satu kebakaran di pusat pejabat berbilang tingkat, iaitu, dalam satu pejabat yang dimiliki Bank Simpanan Rusia (Sherbank), di bandar pelabuhan Rusia Pasifk Vladivostok, Kementerian Situasi Kecemasan Rusia berkata, Isnin.

src: A spokesman said that the blaze broke at about 12:00 local time (02:00 UTC) on the sixth floor of the building.
ref: Jurucakap berkata bahawa kebakaran tersebut berlaku sekitar 12:00 waktu tempatan (02:00 UTC) di tingkat enam bangunan tersebut.

src: In addition to the fatalities, another 15 people were hospitalized with burns and injuries.
ref: Di samping kematian, 15 yang lain dihospitalkan berikutan kesan terbakar dan kecederaan.

src: According to firefighters, serious breaches of fire-safety regulations were partly to blame for the deaths.
ref: Menurut ahli bomba, pelanggaran serius terhadap peraturan keselamatan kebakaran adalah sebahagian dari sebab kematian.

src: A door to the attic was locked and people could not escape through an emergency exit.
ref: Sebuah pintu ke loteng dikunci dan orang tidak boleh melarikan diri melalui pintu kecemasan.

src: A team of investigators led by the deputy prosecutor of the Maritime Territory, Sergei Luchaninov, is looking into how the fire started.
ref: Satu kumpulan penyiasat diketuai oleh pendakwa Wilayah Maritim, Sergei Luchaninov, sedang mencari bagaimana kebakaran bermula.

src: During his trial today, Muslim cleric Abu Hamza al-Masri, denied the claim that he had incited his followers to commit acts of murder.
ref: Semasa perbicaraan hari ini, ulama Islam Abu Hamza al-Masri, menafikan dakwaan bahawa dia telah menghasut pengikutnya untuk melakukan perbuatan membunuh.

src: The charges against Abu Hamza include nine counts of soliciting to murder and three of trying to stir up racial hatred.
ref: Pertuduhan terhadap Abu Hamza termasuk sembilan tuduhan meminta untuk membunuh dan tiga adalah cubaan untuk mencetuskan kebencian kaum.

src: The defense barrister warned the jury to ignore the comments of the press as they may have convicted the defendant before the trial has begun.
