ref: Peguam bela memberi amaran kepada juri untuk mengabaikan komen akhbar kerana ia mungkin telah mensabitkan defendan sebelum perbicaraan dimulakan.

src: Comments such as "Captain Hook" and "Hook off Hooky" have been used.
ref: Komen seperti "Captain Hook" dan "Hook off Hooky" telah digunakan.

src: The cleric faces nine charges under the Offences against the Person Act 1861, plus four charges under the Public Order Act 1986 of "using threatening, abusive or insulting words or behavior with the intention of stirring up racial hatred".
ref: Ulama itu menghadapi sembilan pertuduhan di bawah Akta Kesalahan terhadap Akta Orang 1861, ditambah empat tuduhan di bawah Akta Ketenteraman Awam 1986 kerana "menggunakan ancaman, kata-kata kesat atau menghina atau tingkah laku dengan niat untuk mencetuskan kebencian perkauman".

src: In this month's edition on the campaign trail: the campaign manager for a candidate already seeking two presidential nominations discusses the likelihood his candidate will run for the Reform Party's nomination; a lesser known candidates forum reveals an alternative fuel possibility and concludes in a dramatic fashion; and the newly nominated candidate for the Boston Tea Party talks with Wikinews.
ref: Dalam edisi bulan ini di sepanjang kempen: pengurus kempen untuk seorang calon yang sudah mencari dua pencalonan presiden membincangkan kemungkinan calonnya akan bertanding bagi pencalonan Parti Pembaharuan itu; satu forum calon kurang dikenali mendedahkan satu kemungkinan bahan api alternatif dan membuat kesimpulan dengan cara yang dramatik; dan calon yang baru dicalonkan untuk Parti Boston Tea bercakap dengan Wikinews.

src: Mexican foreign minister Luis Ernesto Derbez says he is confident that he will become the next Organization of American States (OAS) Secretary General, and will be in the post within 4 months.
ref: Menteri Luar Negeri Mexico Luis Ernesto Derbez berkata dia yakin bahawa dia akan menjadi Setiausaha Agung Pertubuhan Negara-negara Amerika (OAS) seterusnya, dan akan berjawat dalam tempoh 4 bulan.

src: He claims to have 17 of the 18 votes needed in order to have the support of a majority within the 34 member states of the OAS.
ref: Dia mendakwa mempunyai 17 daripada 18 undi yang diperlukan untuk mendapat sokongan majoriti dalam 34 negara anggota OAS.

src: The post became available after the previous Secretary General, Miguel Ángel Rodriguez, served only 24 days of his term of office, before returning home to Costa Rica to face corruption charges.
ref: Jawatan itu tersedia selepas Setiausaha Agung sebelumnya, Miguel Ángel Rodriguez, berkhidmat hanya 24 hari dari tempoh jawatannya, sebelum pulang ke Costa Rica untuk menghadapi tuduhan rasuah.

src: Meanwhile Francisco Flores is in the Dominican Republic on the beginning of a tour of Caribbean countries drumming up support for his own candidacy.
ref: Sementara itu Francisco Flores berada di Republik Dominican pada awal lawatan ke negara-negara Caribbean mendapatkan sokongan untuk pencalonan sendiri.

src: A judge in Montana yesterday released Barry Beach after 28 years and eleven months behind bars.
ref: Seorang hakim di Montana kelmarin membebaskan Barry Beach selepas 28 tahun dan sebelas bulan didalam penjara.

src: Most of the passengers were schoolchildren returning from a ski trip.
ref: Sebahagian besar penumpang adalah kanak-kanak sekolah pulang dari lawatan ski.

src: At about 4 p.m. the four-car train derailed near Bioče, a small village nearly 15 kilometers northeast of Podgorica as it was emerging from a tunnel above the Moraca River.
ref: Pada kira-kira 4 p.m. sebuah kereta api empat gerabak tergelincir berhampiran Bioče, sebuah perkampungan kecil 15 kilometer dari timur laut Podgorica semasa ia muncul dari terowong di atas Sungai Moraca.

src: "The train simply went wild, out of control," said one injured passenger.
ref: "Kereta api itu hanya bergerak dengan rawak, hilang kawalan," kata seorang penumpang yang cedera.

src: "I was fine because I was in a back compartment, those in the front got the worst of it."
ref: "Saya didenda kerana saya berada di bahagian belakang, mereka yang di hadapan menerima yang paling teruk sekali."

src: "It was horrible, I saw many dead and wounded around me," said another passenger from Hungary, Karman Chofu.
ref: "Ia adalah sangat dahsyat, saya melihat banyak orang mati dan cedera di sekeliling saya," kata penumpang lain dari Hungary, Karman Chofu.

src: "I had fallen asleep when a loud noise woke me," said Stanislava Bukovic, 60, another injured passenger.
ref: "Saya tertidur apabila bunyi yang kuat mengejutkan saya," kata Stanislava Bukovic, 60, penumpang lain yang tercedera.

src: Miodrag Djurovic, the head of the main Podgorica hospital, stated that another five passengers had died overnight.
ref: Miodrag Djurovic, ketua hospital utama Podgorica, menyatakan bahawa lima orang penumpang lain telah meninggal dunia malam semalam.

src: Djurovic also said at least 198 people, 90 of them children, have been treated at the hospital.
ref: Djurovic juga berkata bahawa sekurang-kurangnya 198 orang, di mana 90 orang daripadanya kanak-kanak, telah dirawat di hospital.

src: "The children's hospital admitted 90 children, 34 of them are still there, six have undergone surgery," Djurovic said.
ref: "Hospital kanak-kanak tersebut telah menerima masuk 90 kanak-kanak, dimana 34 daripadanya masih disana and enam orang telah menjalani pembedahan," kata Djurovic.

src: Earlier Deputy Prime Minister Miroslav Ivanisevic told the media that the death toll stood at 30 and the amount injured at 135, but said those figures could rise as rescuers continue to reach victims.
ref: Sebelum ini Timbalan Perdana Menteri, Miroslav Ivanisevic memberitahu media bahawa jumlah kematian adalah sebanyak 30 dan jumlah yang cedera di 135, tetapi berkata angka-angka boleh meningkat kerana penyelamat terus mencari mangsa.

src: Because of the accident, Montenegro's transport minister, Andrija Lompar, and National Railways chief Ranko Medenica resigned.
ref: Disebabkan kemalangan itu, Menteri Pengangkutan Montenegro, Andrija Lompar, dan Ketua Jabatan Kereta api Kebangsaan, Ranko Medenica meletak jawatan.

src: The driver of the train has been arrested because of suspicion of negligence.
ref: Pemandu kereta api itu telah ditangkap kerana disyaki kecuaian.

src: The train was heading from the northeastern town of Bijelo Polje to the Montenegrin coastal city of Bar.
ref: Kereta api menuju dari bandar timur laut Bijelo Polje ke bandar pesisiran pantai Montenegrin di Bar.

src: The Council of Europe is pressing member governments to provide information concerning CIA prisons operating secretly in Europe.
ref: Majlis Eropah menekan ahli-ahli kerajaan untuk memberikan maklumat mengenai penjara CIA yang beroperasi secara rahsia di Eropah.

src: In an interim report by the human rights council rapporteur, Swiss senator Dick Marty made public the 42-member nation's preliminary conclusions regarding CIA activity on European Union soil.
ref: Dalam sebuah laporan interim oleh majlis pelapor hak asasi manusia, senator Swiss Dick Marty mengumumkan kesimpulan awal 42-ahli negara berkenaan aktiviti CIA di tanah Kesatuan Eropah.

src: The report estimates the rendition of "more than a hundred persons."
ref: Laporan itu menganggarkan soal siasat "lebih daripada seratus orang".

src: But when it comes right down to it, no irrefutable evidence exists to confirm allegations that the CIA operated secret detention centers in Europe.
ref: Tetapi apabila disiasat lebih dalam, tidak ada bukti yang wujud untuk mengesahkan dakwaan bahawa CIA mengendalikan pusat tahanan rahsia di Eropah.

src: "There is a great deal of coherent, convergent evidence pointing to the existence of a system of 'relocation' or 'outsourcing of torture'," the report stated while further noting that, "It is highly unlikely that European governments, or at least their intelligence services, were unaware."
ref: "Ada banyak yang bukti yang koheren, menumpu yang menunjukkan kewujudan satu sistem 'penempatan semula'atau 'penyeksaan dari luar," kata laporan itu manakala selanjutnya menyatakan bahawa, "Ia adalah sangat mustahil yang kerajaan Eropah, atau sekurang-kurangnya perkhidmatan perisikan mereka, tidak menyedarinya".

src: "Our aim is to find out the truth that is being hidden from us today", he said.
ref: "Matlamat kami adalah untuk mencari kebenaran yang sedang disembunyikan daripada kita," katanya.

src: A researcher for Human Rights Watch, John Swift, said; "Cooperation is going to be needed if this investigation is going to succeed."
ref: Seorang penyelidik daripada Human Rights Watch, John Swift, berkata; "Kerjasama diperlukan jika mahu penyiasatan ini berjaya".

src: US State Department spokesman Sean McCormack has rejected the report and stated that it was an example of the "same old reports wrapped up in some new rhetoric."
ref: Jurucakap Jabatan Negara US Sean McCormack telah menolak laporan itu dan menyatakan bahawa ia adalah satu contoh "laporan lama yang sama dan dibungkus dalam beberapa retorik baru".

src: The group Amnesty International USA is calling for the US Congress to create a commission to investigate detention and interrogation practices.
ref: Kumpulan Amnesti Antarabangsa USA menggesa Kongres US untuk mewujudkan sebuah suruhanjaya bagi menyiasat aktiviti penahanan dan soal siasat.

src: The United States neither confirms nor denies the existence of secret detention centers.
ref: Amerika Syarikat tidak mengesahkan atau menafikan kewujudan pusat-pusat tahanan rahsia tersebut.

src: Former Australian Prime Minister John Howard supported the launch of a new book "How to Get Expelled from School: A Guide to Climate Change for Pupils, Pundits and Parents", authored by geology professor .
ref: Bekas Perdana Menteri Australia, John Howard menyokong pelancaran buku baru "Bagaimana untuk Dibuang dari Sekolah: Panduan Perubahan Iklim untuk Pelajar, Cendekiawan dan Ibu Bapa," yang ditulis oleh profesor geologi.

src: The book includes 101 questions for students to use to challenge their climate science teachers.
ref: Buku ini juga mengandungi 101 soalan untuk digunakan oleh pelajar untuk mencabar guru-guru sains iklim mereka.

src: Professor Plimer said the previous book received feedback from parents concerned about education.
ref: Profesor Plimer berkata buku sebelum ini menerima maklum balas daripada ibu bapa yang mengambil berat tentang pendidikan.

src: "I want my children to have the basics of scientists, I don't want to be fed activism'."
ref: "Saya mahu anak-anak saya mempunyai asas-asas ahli-ahli sains, saya tidak mahu disalur dengan aktivisme".

src: He says he considered it feasible if the rest of the world acted too, otherwise to introduce carbon trading plans would risk Australian industries.
ref: Katanya beliau menganggap ia boleh dilaksanakan jika seluruh dunia bertindak juga, jika tidak untuk memperkenalkan rancangan perdagangan karbon yang akan memberi risiko pada industri Australia.

src: Professor Ian Enting, complex system scientist at the University of Melbourne, said the book includes scientific errors and insufficient references.
ref: Profesor Ian Enting, ahli sains sistem kompleks di Universiti Melbourne, berkata buku itu termasuk kesilapan saintifik dan rujukan yang tidak mencukupi.

src: What science teachers do, she said, "is put all of the facts, pro and con, against any topic, whatever it is, and show the children how to work through the evidence".
ref: Apa yang dilakukan guru-guru sains, dia berkata, "adalah meletakkan semua fakta-fakta, baik dan buruk, terhadap mana-mana topik, apa sahaja yang ada, dan mengajar kanak-kanak untuk bekerja melalui bukti".

src: Professor Plimer said of the 101 questions in his book, "They're questions that kids should be asking of teachers, because if the teacher can answer it means they might know something about the subject."
ref: Profesor Plimer berkata antara 101 soalan dalam bukunya, "Soalan-soalan ini sepatutnya anak-anak perlu tanya pada guru-guru, kerana jika guru boleh menjawab ia bermakna mereka mengetahui sesuatu tentang subjek itu".

src: "Parents are telling me that schools have been captured by a lot of activists and kids are being fed stuff that is not relevant to the real world."
ref: "Ibu bapa memberitahu saya bahawa sekolah-sekolah telah ditawan oleh banyak aktivis dan kanak-kanak sedang diajar benda tidak berkaitan dengan dunia sebenar".

src: The EC ruled in March 2004 that Microsoft had abused its position in the low-end server and media player market, and required that Microsoft "disclose complete and accurate interface documentation which would allow non-Microsoft work group servers to achieve full interoperability with Windows PCs and servers".
ref: EC memutuskan pada Mac 2004 bahawa Microsoft telah menyalahgunakan kedudukannya sebagai pelayan dan pasaran pemain media untuk tahap murah, dan meminta supaya Microsoft "mendedahkan dokumentasi antara muka yang lengkap dan tepat yang akan membolehkan pelayan kumpulan kerja bukan Microsoft untuk mencapai saling kendali penuh dengan Windows PC dan pelayan".

src: Microsoft reacted by making available 12,000 pages of technical documentation and up to 500 hours of technical support, but the EC came to the conclusion that it was not enough.
ref: Microsoft bertindak balas dengan menyediakan dokumentasi teknikal sebanyak 12,000 muka surat dan sokongan teknikal sebanyak 500 jam, tetapi EC mencapai kesimpulan bahawa ianya tidak mencukupi.

src: "While we are confident that we are presently in full compliance with the Decision, we wish to dispel any notion that Microsoft’s technical documents are insufficient", said Smith.
ref: "Walaupun kami yakin bahawa kami pada masa ini mematuhi sepenuhnya Keputusan itu, kita ingin menghilangkan sebarang tanggapan bahawa dokumen teknikal Microsoft adalah tidak mencukupi," kata Smith.

src: However, EC Competition Commissioner spokesman Jonathan Todd commented that "it would be premature to conclude access to the source code would resolve the problem of the lack of compliance with our decision."
ref: Bagaimanapun, jurucakap Pesuruhjaya Pertandingan EC Jonathan Todd mengulas bahawa "adalah terlalu awal untuk membuat kesimpulan bahawa akses ke atas kod sumber akan menyelesaikan masalah kekurangan pematuhan berdasarkan keputusan kami".

src: A similar offer was made by Microsoft in August 2002 during its antitrust lawsuit filed by the United States Department of Justice and several states' Attorneys General.
ref: Satu tawaran yang sama telah dibuat oleh Microsoft pada bulan Ogos 2002 semasa tuntutan antitrust yang difailkan oleh Jabatan Kehakiman Amerika Syarikat dan 'Peguam-peguam Negara beberapa negeri.

src: The resulting "Microsoft Communications Protocols Program" had suffered continuous criticism regarding excessive cost, paperwork, and non-disclosure agreements.
ref: "Protokol Program Komunikasi Microsoft" yang terhasil telah mengalami kritikan berterusan mengenai kos berlebihan, kertas kerja, dan perjanjian tersembunyi.

src: Microsoft is expected to return to the EC courts in April.
ref: Microsoft dijangka kembali ke mahkamah EC pada bulan April.

src: Charles Graner guilty of abusing prisoners at Iraq's Abu Ghraib prison.
ref: Charles Graner bersalah kerana mendera tahanan di penjara Abu Ghraib di Iraq.

src: Graner, 36, was described as the ringleader during his four-day trial before a military jury.
ref: Graner, 36, telah digambarkan sebagai ketua geng dalam perbicaraan selama empat hari di hadapan seorang juri ketenteraan.

src: He pleaded innocent to the five charges brought against him, but the ten person jury took five hours to find him guilty.
ref: Dia mengaku tidak bersalah atas lima pertuduhan terhadapnya, tetapi sepuluh orang juri mengambil masa lima jam untuk mendapati dia bersalah.

src: Woodruff was evacuated to the Balad Airbase, 68 kilometers north of Baghdad and is currently undergoing surgery.
ref: Woodruff dipindahkan ke Pangkalan Udara Balad, 68 kilometer utara Baghdad dan kini sedang menjalani pembedahan.

src: "Bob and Doug are in serious condition and are being treated at a U.S. military hospital in Iraq," ABC said in a statement.
ref: "Bob dan Doug dalam keadaan serius dan sedang dirawat dihospital tentera U.S. di Iraq," kata ABC dalam kenyataannya.

src: ABC also reports that exchanges of small arms fire took place shortly after the explosion.
ref: ABC turut melaporkan yang pertukaran tembakan tangan kecil berlaku sebaik selepas letupan.

src: The Associated Press is reporting that the two men were standing in the hatch of the vehicle at the time of the explosion, and that no other people were injured.
ref: Associated Press melaporkan yang kedua-dua lelaki tersebut sedang berdiri didalam lubang kenderaan tersebut semasa letupan, dan tiada orang lain yang cedera.

src: ABC also said that both Woodruff and Vogt were wearing body armor and helmets.
ref: ABC juga berkata yang kedua-dua Woodruff dan Vogh memakai perisai badan dan helmet.

src: The U.S. military headquarters in Baghdad has confirmed the attack took place.
ref: Ibu pejabat tentera U.S. di Baghdad telah mengesahkan yang serangan tersebut berlaku.

src: Vogt, a 46-year-old Canadian based in France, is an Emmy-award winning cameraman for ABC News with 25 years of experience.
ref: Vogt, rakyat Kanada yang berpusat di Perancis berusia 46 tahun, ialah jurukamera penerima anugerah Emmy untuk ABC News dengan pengalaman 25 tahun.

src: According to the Committee to Protect Journalists, 61 journalists have been killed in the line of duty in Iraq since the U.S.-led invasion in 2003.
ref: Menurut Jawatankuasa untuk Melindungi Wartawan, 61 wartawan telah terbunuh semasa bertugas di Iraq sejak pencerobohan diketuai U.S. pada 2003.

src: Woodruff became the permanent co-anchor of ABC's World News Tonight, with Elizabeth Vargas on January 3, 2006, replacing the late Peter Jennings.
ref: Woodruff menjadi pembaca berita tetap bersama untuk ABC Berita Dunia Malam Ini, dengan Elizabeth Vargas pada 3 Januari, 2006, menggantikan mendiang Peter Jennings.

src: James Hipwell, a former financial reporter for the Daily Mirror tabloid, told the Leveson Inquiry today he believed hacking into voicemails of celebrities and others was a "bog-standard tool" for entertainment journalists at the Mirror.
ref: James Hipwell, seorang bekas wartawan kewangan tabloid Daily Mirror, memberitahu Leveson Inquiry hari ini beliau percaya bahawa menggodam mel suara selebriti dan lain-lain adalah "alat bog-standard" untuk wartawan hiburan di Mirror.

src: Hipwell was fired from the paper in 2000 and then convicted and sent to prison in February 2006 for using his "City Slicker" column in the newspaper to write about companies he had a financial stake in, which netted him approximately £40,000.
ref: Hipwell telah dipecat dari akhbar tersebut pada tahun 2000 dan kemudian didapati bersalah dan dihantar ke penjara pada bulan Februari 2006 kerana menggunakan ruangan "City Slicker" nya di dalam akhbar itu untuk menulis tentang syarikat-syarikat yang mempunyai risiko kewangan, yang bernilai kira-kira £40,000.

src: Hipwell told the inquiry he believed that voicemail hacking was "genuinely accepted", "happened every day" and "was entirely accepted by the senior editors on the newspaper" and that "it was seen as a slightly underhand thing to do but not illegal."
ref: Hipwell memberitahu penyiasatan itu yang beliau percaya menggodam mel suara adalah "benar-benar diterima", "yang berlaku setiap hari" dan "telah diterima sepenuhnya oleh editor kanan di akhbar" dan bahawa "ia dilihat sebagai satu perkara yang sedikit salah tetapi tidak menyalahi undang-undang."

src: Morgan claims that under his editorship, he was unaware of any hacking, but Hipwell claims it is unlikely Morgan did not know about hacking going on at the paper.
ref: Morgan mendakwa bahawa di bawah tanggungjawabnya sebagai editor, beliau tidak tahu mengenai sebarang penggodaman, tetapi Hipwell mendakwa tidak mungkin Morgan tidak tahu tentang penggodaman yang berlaku di akhbar.

src: The Leveson Inquiry was set up by the British Prime Minister David Cameron following the scandal which engulfed the News of the World after widespread allegations they hacked into voicemails of crime victims and their families including the murdered schoolgirl Milly Dowler, and has so far interviewed numerous representatives of the media industry, and alleged victims of press intrusion and phone hacking.
ref: Leveson Inquiry telah ditubuhkan oleh Perdana Menteri Britain David Cameron berikutan skandal yang melanda News of the World selepas dakwaan tersebar luas yang mereka menggodam mel suara mangsa jenayah dan keluarga mereka termasuk murid yang dibunuh Milly Dowler, dan setakat ini telah menemuramah ramai wakil-wakil industri media, dan mangsa dakwaan pencerobohan akhbar dan penggodaman telefon.

src: Speaker Boehner announced the agreement in a brief statement: "Senator Reid and I have reached an agreement that will ensure taxes do not increase for working families on January 1".
ref: Pengerusi Boener mengumumkan perjanjian itu di dalam satu kenyataan pendek: "Senator Reid dan saya telah mencapai satu persetujuan yang akan dapat memastikan cukai tidak akan dinaikkan kepada keluarga bekerja pada 1 Januari".

src: Boehner informed other congressmen of the deal in a conference call yesterday evening.
ref: Boehner memberitahu semua anggota kongres tentang perjanjian itu di dalam satu panggilan persidangan petang semalam.

src: The House may pass the bill via unanimous consent today, which would not require the presence of all members.
ref: Dewan Negara mungkin akan meluluskan rang undang-undang tersebut dengan persetujuan sebulat suara hari ini, yang mana tidak memerlukan kehadiran dari semua ahli.

src: Boehner and Reid also agreed to a bipartisan negotiation committee to sort out differences and extend the tax cut for an entire year, a goal recently sought by Republicans in the House.
ref: Boehner dan Reid juga bersetuju untuk mewujudkan jawatankuasa rundingan dwipemihak bagi menyelesaikan perbezaan dan melanjutkan pengurangan cukai untuk sepanjang tahun, satu matlamat baru yang diminta oleh ahli Republikan di dalam Dewan Rakyat.

src: The extension of the payroll tax cut, which would prevent approximately 160 million Americans from seeing a tax increase in 2012, had already been passed by the Senate last weekend.
ref: Lanjutan pengurangan cukai gaji, yang dapat mengelak kira-kira 160 juta rakyat Amerika dari menghadapi kenaikan cukai dalam tahun 2012, sudah diluluskan oleh Dewan Negara pada minggu lepas.

src: "Why not do the right thing for the American people even though it's not exactly what we want."
ref: "Mengapa tidak melakukan perkara yang betul untuk rakyat Amerika walaupun itu bukanlah apa yang kami mahu dengan tepat".

src: President Obama also responded to the development in a statement: "This is good news, just in time for the holidays."
ref: Presiden Obama turut memberi respon kepada perkembangan ini di dalam satu kenyataan: "Ini adalah satu berita baik, tepat masanya untuk hari perayaan".

src: "This is real money that will make a real difference in people's lives."
ref: "Inilah wang sebenar yang akan dapat membawa perubahan sebenar ke dalam hidup rakyat".

src: The tax cut extension impasse began when the House effectively rejected the Senate-approved version of the bill on Tuesday after being faced with opposition from House Republicans, specifically those associated with the Tea Party movement, who advocated for spending cuts and the controversial Keystone XL oil pipeline.
ref: Lanjutan untuk pengurangan cukai menemui jalan buntu apabila Dewan Rakyat dengan efektif menolak rang undang-undang yang telah diluluskan Senat pada hari Selasa selepas menghadapi tentangan dari Dewan Rakyat Republikan, terutama sekali dari mereka yang terlibat dengan gerakan Tea Party, yang menyokong kerana menggunakan potongan tersebut dan talian paip minyak Keystone XL yang kontroversi.

src: The preliminary result was reportedly from a United States military laboratory in Cairo; the World Health Organisation are expected to seek confirmation of this from a UK laboratory.
ref: Keputusan awal dilaporkan dari makmal tentera Amerika Syarikat di Kaherah; Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia dijangka akan mendapatkan pengesahan ini dari makmal UK.

src: The victim was Shangen Abdul Qader, a 15-year-old girl from the northern Kurdish village of Raniya.
ref: Mangsa adalah Shangen Abdul Qader, seorang gadis berusia 15 tahun dari kampung Kurdish utara Raniya.

src: The death of the girl's uncle is also believed to be under investigation due to him having symptoms that may indicate flu.
ref: Kematian bapa saudara gadis itu juga dipercayai berada di bawah siasatan kerana dia mempunyai tanda-tanda yang mungkin menunjukkan selesema.

src: Turkey's last reported victim, Fatma Ozcan, was also aged 15.
ref: Mangsa terakhir Turki yang dilaporkan, Fatma Ozcan, juga berusia 15 tahun.

src: They hope to do so by the end of 2012, following a consultation in the new year.
ref: Mereka berharap untuk berbuat demikian pada akhir tahun 2012, berikutan perundingan dalam tahun baru itu.

src: Hidden fees are often not shown until the end of an ordering process on the web which prevents consumers from making an informed choice and comparing the actual prices of different products and services according to the Office of Fair Trading.
ref: Yuran tersembunyi sering tidak ditunjukkan sehingga akhir proses pesanan di laman web yang menghalang pengguna daripada membuat pilihan berdasarkan pengetahuan maklumat dan membandingkan harga sebenar produk dan perkhidmatan yang berbeza menurut Pejabat Perdagangan Adil.

src: Plans are also underway to bring in Europe-wide regulation of credit card fees in 2014.
ref: Terdapat juga rancangan sedang dijalankan untuk memperkenalkan peraturan seluruh Eropah mengenai yuran kad kredit pada 2014.

src: Mark Hoban, a Treasury Minister, said consumers "have a right to understand the charges they may incur up front and not be hit through a hidden last-minute payment surcharge."
ref: Mark Hoban, seorang Menteri Perbendaharaan, berkata pengguna "mempunyai hak untuk memahami caj yang mereka akan mengenakan terlebih dahulu dan bukan dikenakan bayaran surcaj tersembunyi pada saat-saat akhir."

src: He said the plans announced today will increase "transparency" for consumers, and that consumers currently "feel ripped off".
ref: Beliau berkata rancangan yang diumumkan hari ini akan meningkatkan "ketelusan" untuk pengguna, dan pengguna kini "rasa ditipu."

src: The consumer group Which?
ref: Kumpulan pengguna Which?

src: claimed that these surcharges were increasing the cost of air travel by £265,000 a day (or about £97 million per year).
ref: mengatakan bayaran tambahan ini telah meningkatkan kos penerbangan sebanyak £265,000 sehari (atau kira-kira £97 juta setahun).

src: The OFT stated that the figure was £300m a year.
ref: OFT menyatakan bahawa angka itu adalah £300 juta setahun.

src: On Tuesday the 31st of January, Dr Don Brash, the leader of the New Zealand National Party gave his third state of the nation speech to the Orewa Rotary Club where he focussed on the economy.
ref: Selasa 31 Januari, Dr Don Brash, ketua Parti Kebangsaan New Zealand memberikan kenyataan kebangsaan ketiganya melalui ucapan beliau kepada Kelab Orewa Rotary di mana yang bertumpu pada ekonomi.

src: Brash said the blame for any recession will lie squarely with the Prime Minister Helen Clark and Labour.
ref: Brash berkata kesalahan setiap kemelesetan akan jatuh sepenuhnya ke atas Perdana Menteri Helen Clark dan Labour.

src: He also said that he intends to lead National in the next New Zealand general election (2008) and would be surprised if he is replaced before then.
ref: Beliau juga berkata bahawa dia berharap untuk mengetuai National dalam pilihan raya umum New Zealand yang akan datang (2008) dan beliau amatlah terkejut jika digantikan sebelum itu.

src: He also claimed the speech was riddled with inaccuracies, particularly over Government spending.
ref: Beliau juga mendakwa bahawa ucapan tersebut dipenuhi dengan ketidaktepatan, terutamanya mengenai perbelanjaaan Kerajaan.

src: Some regard the speech as a watershed moment in New Zealand politics.
ref: Sesetengah orang mengambil kira ucapan tersebut sebagai titik perubahan dalam politik New Zealand.

src: The House IP address was briefly banned from editing Wikipedia articles in the wake of the initial controversy, but the ban was lifted on January 30 after Wikipedia administrators decided that there have been a number of valuable contributions made through the House and Senate IP addresses in addition to the controversial edits.
ref: Alamat IP Dewan Rakyat diharamkan secara sementara daripada menyunting artikel Wikipedia berikutan kontroversi awal, tetapi larangan itu ditarik balik pada 30 Januari selepas pentadbir Wikipedia memutuskan bahawa terdapat beberapa sumbangan bernilai tinggi yang dibuat melalui alamat IP Dewan Rakyat dan Senat sebagai tambahan kepada suntingan kontroversi.

src: On January 31 and February 1, however, the U.S. House of Representatives' common IP address, 143.231.249.141, were banned again for three hours due to vandalism.
ref: Pada 31 Januari dan 1 Februari, walau bagaimanapun, alamat IP Dewan Rakyat Amerika Syarikat, 143.231.249.141, diharamkan sekali lagi selama tiga jam kerana vandalisme.

src: Because the IP address is shared by House staff members, it is uncertain whether or not the same person(s) responsible for the previous vandalism are also responsible for the latest.
ref: Oleh kerana alamat IP itu dikongsiguna oleh kakitangan Dewan Rakyat, ia tidak dapat dipastikan sama ada orang yang sama bertanggungjawab untuk vandalisme sebelum ini juga bertanggungjawab untuk peristiwa yang terbaru.

src: All mentions of the bill were removed from the article.
ref: Semua rangkaan rang undang-undang itu dikeluarkan daripada artikel itu.

src: Also removed was a paragraph about Chris Shays raising $70,000 with House Speaker Dennis Hastert at a country club event.
ref: Juga dipadamkan adalah perenggan mengenai Chris Shays mengumpul $70,000 bersama dengan Jurucakap Dewan Rakyat Dennis Hastert di satu acara kelab negara.

src: Wikipedia edits in Congress are not coming from the House of Representatives alone.
ref: Suntingan Wikipedia di Kongres bukan dari Dewan Rakyat sumber perseorangan.

src: An edit from the Senate in July removed references to a plagiarism scandal with Senator Joe Biden, who has informally said he may seek a Democratic nomination for president in 2008.
ref: Satu suntingan dari Senat pada Julai memadamkan sebutan mengenai skandal plagiarisme Senator Joe Biden, yang secara tidak rasmi berkata beliau boleh mendapatkan pencalonan Demokrat untuk presiden pada tahun 2008.

src: As of February 4, 2006, the edit has not been fixed by Wikipedia users.
ref: Pada 4 Februari 2006, suntingan itu masih belum ditetapkan oleh pengguna Wikipedia.

src: Fourteen bodies were found on Thursday by police in Baghdad, Iraq.
ref: Empat belas mayat ditemui pada Khamis oleh polis di Baghdad, Iraq.

src: According to the Iraq Interior Ministry, the bodies appeared to have been tortured.
ref: Menurut Menteri Dalaman Iraq, mayat-mayat tersebut telah dijumpai diseksa.

src: Eleven of the men were found in the back of a truck.
ref: Sebelas lelaki dijumpai di belakang sebuah lori.

src: The other three were found near a road in Rustamiya on the southeastern outskirts of the capital.
ref: Selebih tiga dijumpai berdekatan sebuah jalan di Rustamiya di bahagian pinggir tenggara ibu negara.

src: Police do not yet know the identities of the men.
ref: Polis belum mengetahui identiti semua lelaki tersebut.

src: Iranian officials have said that Iran will respond by downgrading its cooperation with the IAEA and resuming full scale fuel enrichment.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai Iran berkata bahawa Iran akan bertindak balas dengan mengurangkan kepentingan kerjasama dengan IAEA dan meneruskan pengayaan bahan api berskala penuh.

src: Catholic priest Andrea Santore, 61, who was based at the Trabzon Santa Maria Catholic Church was shot dead during prayer in the northern Turkish province of Trabzon on Sunday.
ref: Paderi Katolik Andrea Santore, 61 tahun, yang berpangkalan di Gereja Katolik Trabzon Santa Maria ditembak mati semasa sembahyang di wilayah utara Turki di Trabzon pada hari Ahad.

src: The murderer, a 17-18 year old man is being sought by the police.
ref: Pembunuhnya, seorang lelaki berusia 17-18 tahun sedang dicari polis.

src: The killer entered the church at 3:45 pm and shot the Italian priest from behind.
ref: Pembunuh itu memasuki gereja pada jam 3:45 petang dan menembak paderi Italia itu dari belakang.

src: Turkish Prime Minister Recep Tayyip Erdogan condemned the assassination of a Catholic priest.
ref: Perdana Menteri Turki Recep Tayyip Erdogan mengutuk pembunuhan paderi Katolik itu.

src: Many people in Turkey associate this incident with the current crisis over the publication of cartoons of the Prophet Mohammed in European papers.
ref: Ramai orang di Turki mengaitkan kejadian ini dengan krisis semasa di atas penerbitan gambar kartun Nabi Muhammad di akhbar Eropah.

src: The Chargers spread things evenly in the first quarter; five players scored for the team in the period.
ref: Chargers yang mengagihkan tugas dalam suku pertama; lima pemain menjaringkan gol untuk pasukan itu dalam tempoh tersebut.

src: Both forward Jon Cabarrus and guard Dylan Gordon followed their own shots and scored on putbacks.
ref: Kedua-dua penyerang Jon Cabarrus dan penjaga Dylan Gordon mengambil gerakan mereka sendiri dan menjaringkan gol dalam putbacks.

src: While Los Lunas managed several rebounds, they were unable to get any baskets over the outstretched arms of Moya and Thompson.
ref: Sementara Los Lunas menangani beberapa lantunan, mereka tidak mendapat sebarang jaringan melepasi tangan terentang Moya dan Thompson.

src: Cabarrus scored on another putback for his fourth points of the game late in the quarter, helping Academy to a twelve to eight lead at the end of the first.
ref: Cabarrus menjaringkan gol dalam satu lagi putback untuk mata keempatnya dalam permainan lewat dalam suku permainan itu, membantu Akademi mencapai pendahuluan dua belas lapan pada akhir musim pertama.

src: The Chargers scored just nine points, but also held Los Lunas to only three.
ref: Chargers hanya menjaringkan sembilan mata, tetapi bertahan terhadap Los Lunas yang hanya menjaringkan tiga mata.

src: Both offenses were struggling when guard Andrew Matthew stole the ball and made a pass to Gordan, who threw another pass to fellow guard Jordan Fleisher, who took the ball and scored on a layup.
ref: Kedua-dua pertahanan bergelut apabila pengawal Andrew Matthew mencuri bola itu dan membuat hantaran kepada Gordan, yang menghantar bola kepada rakannya pengawal Jordan Fleisher, yang mengambil bola dan menjaringkan gol dalam layup.

src: With a minute in the half, reserve Matt Brown took a pass and drove the length of the court for a layup.
ref: Dengan masa satu minit pada separuh masa, pemain simpanan Matt Brown menerima hantaran bola dan melangkaui gelanggang untuk memasukkan jaringan berdekatan keranjang.

src: Academy ended the second half with a twenty-one to eleven lead.
ref: Akademi mengakhiri separuh masa yang kedua dengan mata pendahuluan dua puluh satu kepada sebelas.

src: Leading the way in the second half was Patrick Zacharias, who scored seven points in the half.
ref: Yang mendahului dalam separuh masa kedua adalah Patrick Zacharias, yang menjaringkan tujuh mata pada separuh masa.

src: Gordon connected with Thompson on a play that gave Thompson a layup.
ref: Gordon bergabung dengan Thompson dalam satu permainan yang memberikan Thompson satu jaringan bola berdekatan dengan keranjang.

src: Gordon stole the ball away from Los Lunas and made a pass to Thompson while sandwiched between two Los Lunas defenders.
ref: Gordon mencuri bola daripada Los Lunas dan membuat hantaran kepada Thompson sambil mengapit di antara dua penahan Los Lunas.

src: Los Lunas came back with a three pointer by #24 and some layups by other players.
ref: Los Lunas kembali dengan tiga penunjuk oleh #24 dan beberapa jaringan bola berdekatan dengan keranjang oleh pemain lain.

src: The quarter ended with Academy still holding the lead, 33-22.
ref: Suku itu berakhir dengan Akademi masih mendahului, 33-22.

src: AA was again playing tough defense midway through the fourth quarter until #32 hit a three pointer, sparking a small Los Lunas rally, but it was not enough to overcome the offense and defense of the Chargers.
ref: AA sekali lagi bermain pertahanan yang tegar dari pertengahan sehingga suku masa keempat hingga #32 mencecah tiga penunjuk, mencetuskan Los Lunas perhimpunan yang kecil, tetapi ia masih tidak mencukupi untuk mengatasi kesalahan dan pertahanan Chargers.

src: Zacharias scored on a tip in of a Gordon shot that hung on the rim and fell out.
ref: Zacharias menjaringkan bola atas satu peluang daripada jaringan Gordon yang tergantung pada bingkai dan terjatuh keluar.

src: Zacharias was also fouled on the shot and made the free throw to complete the three point play.
ref: Zacharias juga dikasari pada jaringan itu dan membuat lemparan percuma untuk melengkapkan permainan tiga mata.

src: Team manager Lincoln Stanfield also saw action in the game, and even scored his first points of the season at the end of the fourth quarter.
ref: Pengurus pasukan Lincoln Stanfield juga menyaksikan tindakan dalam permainan, dan juga mendapat mata pertama musim itu pada akhir masa suku keempat.

src: With less than fifteen seconds left, Stanfield received a pass underneath the basket.
ref: Dengan kurang daripada baki lima belas saat, Stanfield menerima hantaran bawah jaring.

src: His shot didn't fall, but he was fouled with seven seconds left.
ref: Rembatannya tidak jatuh, tetapi dia dikasari pada masa baki tujuh saat kiri.

src: His second shot bounced high in the air two times before falling through the hoop.
ref: Pukulan keduanya melantun tinggi di udara dua kali sebelum jatuh melalui gelung.

src: Stanfield threw his arms up in celebration over his made shot, putting an end to Academy's 14-1 season.
ref: Stanfield melempar lengan dalam sambutan jaringan yang dibuat, mengakhiri musim Akademi 14-1.

src: The first speakers have been all women speaking in support of passing control from the Health Minister to the TGA: Australian National Party Senator Fiona Nash, Australian Democrats Senator Lyn Allison, Australian Labor Party Senator Claire Moore.
ref: Speaker pertama adalah semua wanita yang menyokong supaya peralihan kuasa kawalan daripada Menteri Kesihatan kepada TGA: Senator Parti Kebangsaan Australia Fiona Nash, Senator Demokrat Australia Lyn Allison, Senator Parti Buruh Australia Claire Moore.

src: They have drawn attention to the fact that abortion is already legal in Australia, the inappropriateness of a Parliament minister to regulate a single drug versus a scientific and independent body, and if RU486 is an unsafe drug then the TGA will not approve the drug.
ref: Mereka telah menarik perhatian tentang hakikat bahawa menggugurkan kandungan sudah dibenarkan di Australia, ketidaksesuaian seorang menteri Parlimen untuk mengawal selia ubat tunggal berbanding badan saintifik dan bebas, dan jika RU486 adalah dadah yang tidak selamat maka TGA tidak akan meluluskan dadah tersebut.

src: Australian Liberal Party Senator Gary Humphries then spoke, stating that the bill is a "mistake", not because of the possible risks, or that the TGA is unfit to perform the evaluation, but because RU486 is "not just another drug", "facilitating a medical procedure that is not just a medical procedure".
ref: Senator Parti Liberal Australia Gary Humphries kemudian bercakap, menyatakan bahawa rang undang-undang tersebut adalah satu "kesilapan," bukan kerana kemungkinan risikonya, atau TGA tidak layak untuk membuat penilaian, tetapi kerana RU486 adalah "bukan hanya sejenis lagi dadah," "memudahkan prosedur perubatan yang bukan sahaja prosedur perubatan".

src: Family First Party Senator Steven Fielding spoke out against the bill also, likening the TGA as comprising of "unelected bureaucrats".
ref: Senator Parti Family First Steven Fielding bercakap menentang rang undang-undang itu juga, menyamakan TGA sebagai terdiri daripada "birokrat yang tidak dipilih".

src: He further commented that Family First cannot consider the social policy issues without considering social views, and drew attention to the TGA's response in the earlier Senate inquiry that the TGA "cannot consider social and ethical issues".
ref: Beliau juga mengulas bahawa Family First tidak boleh mempertimbangkan isu-isu dasar sosial tanpa mengambil kira pandangan sosial, dan menarik perhatian kepada tindak balas TGA dalam siasatan Senat sebelum ini bahawa TGA "tidak boleh mempertimbangkan isu-isu sosial dan etika".

src: Fielding drew attention to the guillotine being placed on the debate of the bill and the attitudes of the non-Government senators earlier criticising the Government on the industrial relations legislation being "rammed through" late last year.
ref: Fielding menarik perhatian kepada alat pemenggal kepala yang diletakkan di atas perbahasan rang undang-undang dan sikap senator bukan Kerajaan yang sebelum ini mengkritik Kerajaan mengenai undang-undang perhubungan perusahaan yang "dilanggar" akhir tahun lepas.

src: The last two journalists reported killed at the turn of the year were Syrians; just at a time when protests and violence in the country are escalating, and the Arab League begins its initial assessment of the situation.
ref: Kedua-dua wartawan lepas dilaporkan terbunuh pada awal tahun ini adalah orang-orang Syria; hanya ketika protes dan keganasan di negara ini semakin meningkat, dan Liga Arab memulakan penilaian awal ke atas keadaan tersebut.

src: The senior journalist was shot in the face after arriving home from work at a radio station in Darayya, on the southern outskirts of the capital city Damascus.
ref: Wartawan kanan itu ditembak di muka selepas pulang dari kerja di sebuah stesen radio di Darayya, di pinggir selatan ibu kota Damsyik.

src: According to Reporters Without Borders, he died three days after the shooting at Al Mouwsat Hospital.
ref: Menurut Reporters Without Borders, beliau meninggal dunia tiga hari selepas ditembak di Hospital Al Mouwsat.

src: Burghol, 56, was a journalist for about 21 years, working for the newspaper Al-Thawra (The Revolution) whilst also hosting a weekly show for Radio Damascus.
ref: Burghol, 56, adalah seorang wartawan lebih kurang 21 tahun, bekerja untuk akhbar Al-Thawra (Revolusi) sementara turut menganjurkan pertunjukan mingguan untuk Radio Damsyik.

src: A source told the Xinhua news agency Burghol had received threats.
ref: Satu sumber memberitahu agensi berita Xinhua Burghol telah menerima ancaman.

src: Basil Al-Sayed became the last journalist to die in 2011, shot on December 29 by a sniper in the city of Homs.
ref: Basil Al-Sayed menjadi wartawan terakhir yang mati pada tahun 2011, ditembak pada 29 Disember oleh penembak hendap di bandar Homs.

src: The shooting of Al-Sayed took place in the Bab Amr section of Homs.
ref: Pembunuhan Al-Sayed berlaku di bahagian Bab Amr di Homs.

src: In the last week of the year, the Bab Amr neighbourhood was attacked by the Syrian military and experienced heavy violence.
ref: Pada minggu terakhir tahun ini, kejiranan Bab Amr telah diserang oleh tentera Syria dan mengalami keganasan berat.

src: Ferzat Jarban — the first known journalist to be killed in Syria — was a freelance camera operator, arrested on November 19 whilst filming protests in Al-Qusayr, Homs Governorate.
ref: Ferzat Jarban - wartawan pertama yang diketahui dibunuh di Syria - adalah pengendali kamera bebas, ditangkap pada 19 November ketika penggambaran protes di Al-Qusayr, Homs Governorate.

src: Three journalists are now known to have been killed in Syria.
ref: Tiga wartawan kini diketahui telah terbunuh di Syria.

src: In December, the Committee to Protect Journalists (CPJ) addressed an open letter to Syrian President Al-Assad calling for the release of all journalists in detention; the CPJ documented 29 cases of journalists being detained in 2011.
ref: Pada bulan Disember, Jawatankuasa untuk Melindungi Wartawan (CPJ) yang menyerahkan surat terbuka kepada Presiden Syria Al-Assad meminta pembebasan semua wartawan dalam tahanan; CPJ mendokumenkan 29 kes wartawan ditahan pada tahun 2011.

src: German police are embarrassed after a 27-year-old man, whom they had just booked for burglary, walked out of the police station and stole an unmarked police vehicle.
ref: Polis Jerman malu selepas seorang lelaki berusia 27 tahun itu, yang mereka baru sahaja catatkan butiran persendirian atas kesalahan pecah rumah, berjalan keluar dari balai polis dan mencuri kenderaan polis yang tidak bertanda.

src: "It's not just unusual, it's embarrassing," said a spokesman for police in the town of Eschwege.
ref: "Ia bukan hanya luar biasa, ia memalukan," kata seorang jurucakap polis di bandar Eschwege.

src: When he was booked and released, he was observed by officers getting into the unmarked police car.
ref: Apabila butiran persendiriannya dicatat dan dibebaskan, beliau telah diperhatikan oleh pegawai-pegawai polis yang dia masuk ke dalam kereta polis yang tidak bertanda.

src: Three vehicles (including the stolen police car) were damaged during the pursuit.
ref: Tiga kenderaan (termasuk kereta polis yang dicuri) telah rosak semasa kejaran.

src: The stolen vehicle was recovered upon arrest of its unlawful driver.
ref: Kenderaan yang dicuri dapat ditemui semula semasa penangkapan pemandu yang menyalahi undang-undang.

src: A massive demonstration march on Thursday of over half a million Shiite Muslims in Beirut, Lebanon heard Sheik Hassan Nasrallah, the leader of Hezbollah, tell the U.S. President George W. Bush and his Secretary of State, Condoleezza Rice, to "shut up" after they reportedly accused Iran and Syria of fueling protest demonstrations over the Muhammad cartoons.
ref: Demonstrasi perarakan besar pada Khamis melibatkan lebih dari milion Shiite Muslim di Beirut, Lebanon mendengar Sheik Hassan Nasrallah, ketua Hezbollah, memberitahu Presiden A.S. George W. Bush dan Setiausaha Negara, Condoleezza Rice, supaya "diam" selepas mereka melaporkan menuduh Iran dan Syria untuk menyemarakkan demonstrasi bantahan ke atas kartun Muhammad.

src: Let Condoleezza Rice and Bush and all the tyrants shut up.
ref: Biar Condoleezza Rice dan Bush dan semua yang zalim itu diam.

src: We are an Islamic nation that cannot tolerate, be silent or be lax when they insult our prophet and sanctities.
ref: Kami negara Islam tidak akan bertoleransi, duduk diam atau bersikap lembut apabila mereka menghina nabi kita dan kesuciannya.

src: We will uphold the messenger of God not only by our voices but also by our blood," Nasrallah told the crowd, estimated to be 700,000 (police said the figure was likely to be even higher).
ref: Kami akan menegakkan utusan Tuhan bukan hanya dengan suara kami tetapi juga dengan darah kami," Nasrallah memberitahu orang ramai, yang dianggarkan seramai 700,000 orang (polis memberitahu jumlah sebenar mungkin adalah lebih tinggi).

src: The Hezbollah leader also told the crowd that protests must continue until laws are passed in Europe banning insults to Muhammad.
ref: Ketua Hezbollah juga memberitahu orang ramai, bahawa bantahan mesti diteruskan hingga undang-undang diluluskan di Eropah untuk menghalang penghinaan kepada Muhammad.

src: NATO defence ministers are in Brussels meeting to discuss the controversy's security implications.
ref: Menteri pertahanan NATO yang kini di Brussels bertemu untuk berbincang mengenai implikasi kontrovesi keselamatan.

src: Speaking Wednesday at a joint news conference in Washington with the new Israeli Foreign Minister, Tzipi Livni, the U.S. Secretary Rice said, "Iran and Syria have gone out of their way to inflame sentiments and to use this to their own purposes and the world ought to call them on it."
ref: Berkata pada hari Rabu di persidangan baru bersama di Washington dengan Menteri Luar Israek, Tzipi Livni, Setiausaha A.S. Rice berkata, "Iran dan Syria telah keluar dari jalan mereka untuk menghidupkan sentimen-sentimen dan menggunakannya untuk tujuan mereka dan dunia patut menghubungi mereka untuk itu".

src: Her comments were preceded earlier that day President Bush who also called for an end to the violence: "I call upon the governments around the world to stop the violence.
ref: Komen beliau mendahului awal pada hari Presiden Bush juga menghubungi untuk mengakhirkan kegansan: "Saya menghubungi kerajaan-kerajaan di seluruh dunia untuk menghentikan keganasan.

src: A new report by the International Federation of Journalists (IFJ) documents 129 cases where media workers have been killed because of their work during 2004.
ref: Satu laporan baru oleh Persekutuan Wartawan Antarabangsa (IFJ) mendokumenkan 129 kes di mana pekerja media terbunuh disebabkan kerja mereka pada tahun 2004.

src: 49 casualties (close to 40%) occurred in Iraq, making it by far the deadliest country for journalists.
ref: 49 kematian (hampir 40%) berlaku di Iraq, menjadikannya setakat ini negara yang paling membawa maut untuk wartawan.

src: At least 20 of those appeared to be cases where journalists were directly targeted because of their profession.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 20 daripada mereka muncul sebagai kes di mana wartawan secara langsung menjadi sasaran disebabkan pekerjaan mereka.

src: In a ceremony attended by several European political leaders and 5,000 VIP guests, Airbus unveiled plans for the A380, a twin-deck aircraft that can carry up to 840 people in all-economy class (550 for a Boeing 747), or 555 people in typical three mixed classes layout.
ref: Dalam upacara yang dihadiri oleh beberapa ketua politik Eropah dan 5,000 tetamu VIP, Airbus melancarkan rancangan untuk A380, pesawat dua tingkat yang dapat membawa seramai 840 orang dalam seluruh kelas ekonomi (550 untuk Boeing 747), atau 555 orang untuk susunatur biasa campuran tiga kelas.

src: The new aircraft will take the world's-largest title away from rival Boeing's 747.
ref: Pesawat baru itu akan mengambil gelaran terbesar di dunia dari Boeing 747.

src: Airbus chief executive Noel Forgeard stated that he expected sales of the aircraft to exceed the 250 required for the project to break even.
ref: Ketua Eksekutif Airbus Noel Forgeard menyatakan yang dia menjangka jualan pesawat tersebut melebihi 250 yang diperlukan untuk projek itu pulang modal.

src: British and American airline Virgin Atlantic has purchased six of these aeroplanes and intend to fit them with gyms and bars as well as seats.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan British dan Amerika Virgin Atlantic telah membeli enam dari pesawat tersebut dan menyasarkan untuk memuatkan mereka dengan gim dan bar dan juga kerusi.

src: The Council of Australian Governments (COAG) will meet in Canberra today for its first meeting of 2006.
ref: Majlis Kerajaan-Kerajaan Australia (COAG) akan bertemu di Canberra hari ini untuk mesyuarat pertama bagi 2006.

src: Members of COAG are the Prime Minister, State Premiers, Australian Capital and Northern Territory Chief Ministers, and the President of the Australian Local Government Association.
ref: Ahli-ahli COAG terdiri daripada Perdana Menteri, Tetuan Utama Negeri, Ketua-Ketua Menteri bagi Ibu Negara dan Kawasan Utara Australia, dan Presiden Persatuan Kerajaan Tempatan Australia.

src: On the agenda is a wide range of issues such as health, economic reform, regulation, and education.
ref: Dalam agenda terdapat pelbagai isu seperti kesihatan, pembaharuan ekonomi, undang-undang, dan pendidikan.

src: The state leaders (all of whom are members of the Australian Labor Party), met last night to develop a strategy for dealing with John Howard, Australia's Prime Minister.
ref: Pemimpin-pemimpin negeri (yang kesemuanya anggota Parti Buruh Australia), bertemu semalam untuk membangunkan satu strategi untuk menangani John Howard, Perdana Menteri Australia.

src: Several thousand Muslims protested today in Paris, France, as well as the eastern city of Strasbourg, against the publication of caricatures of the prophet Muhammad in a Danish newspaper and the re-publication of some of these caricatures in French newspapers: the daily France Soir and the weekly Charlie Hebdo.
ref: Beribu-ribu Muslim mengadakan protes hari ini di Paris, Perancis, dan juga di bandar timur Starsbourg, menentang penerbitan karikatur Nabi Muhammad dalam satu akhbar Denmark dan penerbitan semula sesetengah karikatur ini dalam akhbar Perancis: France Soir terbitan harian dan Charlie Hebdo terbitan mingguan.

src: Charlie Hebdo is a weekly paper known for its extremely acerbic positions against organized religion; it often mocks Catholicism, the largest religious denomination in France.
ref: Charlie Hebdo merupakan akhbar mingguan yang terkenal dengan posisinya yang sangat tajam terhadap agama terancang; sering mengejek Katolik, denominasi agama terbesar di Perancis.

src: Some banners claimed that freedom of speech should not imply the possibility of insulting religious figures.
ref: Sebahagian kain rentang mendakwa bahawa hak bersuara hendaklah tidak menyifatkan kemungkinan menghina tokoh keagamaan.

src: Other banners claimed that French society was applying dual standards.
ref: Kain rentang yang lain menyatakan bahawa masyarakat Perancis mengamalkan double standard.

src: Some protesters demanded a law against "islamophobia"; France does not have blasphemy laws and has a tradition of anticlericalism.
ref: Sebahagian penentang menuntut satu undang-undang menentang "islamofobia"; Perancis tidak mempunyai undang-undang penghinaan agama dan mempunyai tradisi anticlericalism.

src: Many of the female protesters wore a scarf to hide their hair, and some wore a hijab or veil.
ref: Kebanyakan penentang wanita memakai tudung bagi menyembunyikan rambut mereka, dan sebahagian memakai hijab atau selendang.

src: The French government enacted a law prohibiting conspicuous religious symbols in government-operated schools, a move widely considered to be targeting the veil and scarf, which many consider a sign of subordination of females.
ref: Kerajaan Perancis menggubal satu undang-undang menghalang simbol agama yang ketara di sekolah-sekolah dikendalikan kerajaan, satu gerakan yang dianggap secara meluas menyasarkan selendang dan tudung, yang dianggap orang ramai sebagai merendahkan wanita.

src: The protest was followed at a distance by a large complement of CRS and other police forces.
ref: Protes tersebut diikuti oleh satu pelengkap set besar terdiri daripada CRS dan angkatan polis lain dari jarak jauh.

src: The heavy and sustained precipitation across the lower mainland regions have caused mudslides and flooding, with roads and highways being closed and families evacuated.
ref: Hujan lebat dan berterusan di seluruh wilayah darat yang lebih rendah itu telah menyebabkan tanah runtuh dan banjir, dan jalan raya dan lebuh raya ditutup dan keluarga dipindahkan.

src: In Port Coquitlam, a retaining wall burst, throwing concrete and rubble tens of metres and covering an arterial road with mud to a depth of two metres.
ref: Di Port Coquitlam, sebuah tembok penahan pecah, melemparkan konkrit dan runtuhan batu sepanjang berpuluh-puluh meter dan menutupi satu jalan raya utama dengan lumpur sedalam dua meter.

src: Further inland and north, where colder temperatures have prevailed, the precipitation has been falling as freezing rain and sleet, or heavy snowfalls.
ref: Di kawasan pedalaman dan utara, di mana lazimnya bersuhu sejuk, hujan telah berkurangan kerana hujan membeku dan hujan bercampur salji, atau salji berat.

src: "If the rain continues at the same magnitude and according to the forecast, then some of the rivers could reach flood stage either later [Tuesday] or Wednesday morning," said Allan Chapman, a hydrologist with the River Forecast Centre in Victoria.
ref: "Jika hujan berterusan pada magnitud yang sama dan mengikut ramalan, maka sesetengah sungai boleh mencecah tahap banjir sama ada kemudian [Selasa] atau pagi Rabu," kata Allan Chapman, seorang pakar hydrologi Pusat Ramalan Sungai di Victoria.

src: The source of the wet weather is a large system reaching the coast from the Pacific Ocean tropics, a type of system nicknamed by meteorologists a "Tropical Punch".
ref: Sumber cuaca basah adalah satu sistem yang besar sampai ke pantai dari kawasan tropika Lautan Pasifik, sejenis sistem digelar "Punch Tropika" oleh ahli kaji cuaca.

src: A similar system caused severe flooding and precipitation in 2003.
ref: Sistem yang sama menyebabkan banjir yang teruk dan hujan pada tahun 2003.

src: Environment Canada expects the system, which lies southwest of Vancouver Island, to continue to develop "waves" of weather which will strike the mainland and head inland over the next several days to a week, possibly dropping 50-100 mm (2"-4") of additional rain per day at least until the end of the weekend.
ref: Alam Sekitar Kanada menjangka sistem itu, yang terletak di barat daya Pulau Vancouver, untuk terus menaikkan "gelombang" cuaca yang akan menyerang tanah besar dan menuju ke arah pedalaman dalam tempoh beberapa hari akan datang sehingga seminggu, mungkin menurunkan 50-100 mm (2"-4") hujan tambahan setiap hari sekurang-kurangnya sehingga akhir hujung minggu.

src: On Friday, the United States Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) expanded its long-standing definition of rape to include men, and the rape of any gender by lack of consent — as opposed to physical coercion.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, Biro Siasatan Federal Amerika Syarikat (FBI) memperluaskan definisi rogol yang sedia ada untuk memasukkan lelaki, dan kes rogol mana-mana jantina tanpa kebenaran- yang bertentangan dengan pemaksaan fizikal.

src: Valerie Jarrett, a White House adviser, said it was a "very, very important step."
ref: Valerie Jarret, penasihat Rumah Putih, berkata ia adalah "langkah yang sangat, sangat penting."

src: Describing the changes to crime reporting as "long overdue", United States Attorney General Eric Holder said the revised definition of rape will, "help ensure justice for those whose lives have been devastated by sexual violence and reflect the Department of Justice's commitment to standing with rape victims".
ref: Menerangkan perubahan terhadap jenayah yang dilaporkan sebagai "lama tertangguh," Peguam Negara Amerika Syarikat Eric Holder menyatakan definisi semak semula rogol tersebut akan, "membantu memastikan keadilan terhadap mereka yang hidup terhancur akibat keganasan seksual dan menggambarkan komitmen Jabatan Keadilan untuk menyokong mangsa rogol."

src: The prior definition of rape — "the carnal knowledge of a female, forcibly and against her will" — was set by the FBI in 1927.
ref: Definisi rogol sebelum ini- "Persetubuhan dengan wanita, secara paksa dan tanpa kehendaknya"- ditetapkan oleh FBI pada 1927.

src: In contrast, the revised definition drops the requirement that there be physical resistance, thus including crimes where the victim is unable to give consent because they are under the influence of alcohol or drugs, or due to their age.
ref: Sebaliknya, definisi semak semula tersebut menjatuhkan syarat sekiranya terdapat penentangan fizikal, sekali gus termasuk jenayah yang melibatkan mangsa tidak dapat memberi kebenaran kerana mereka di bawah pengaruh alkohol dan dadah, atau disebabkan usia mereka.

src: The changes are primarily a revision to the Uniform Crime Reports system (UCR), and are not expected to impact prior cases or current prosecutions.
ref: Perubahan tersebut terutamanya merupakan semakan semula terhadap sistem Laporan Jenayah Seragam (UCR), dan tidak dijangka akan memberi kesan kepada kes terdahulu atau perbicaraan semasa.

src: Introducing no changes to current State or Federal law, the FBI expects the revised definition of rape will see victim numbers "more accurately reflected in national crime statistics".
ref: Tanpa memperkenalkan perubahan kepada Undang-undang negeri atau persekutuan, FBI mengharapkan definisi semak semula rogol tersebut akan dapat melihat bilangan mangsa "ditunjukkan dengan lebih tepat dalam statistik jenayah negara."

src: Close to the revised rape definition is a 2010 study by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which included male rape and non-consensual sex; their figures indicate that, at some point in their lives, about 20% of women and 1.5% of men in the United States have been raped.
ref: Hampir sama dengan definisi semak semula rogol tersebut, kajian 2010 oleh Pusat Kawalan dan Pencegahan Penyakit (CDC), yang merangkumi kes rogol lelaki dan seks tanpa kerelaan; angka mereka menunjukkan bahawa, pada satu ketika dalam hidup mereka, sekitar 20% wanita dan 1.5% lelaki di Amerika Syarikat pernah dirogol.

src: Writing for Significance magazine, Stephanie Kovalchik says this report shows the US "is experiencing an epidemic of sexual violence."
ref: Menulis untuk majalah Significance, Stephanie Kovalchik berkata laporan ini menunjukkan bahawa AS "sedang mengalami wabak keganasan seksual."

src: Comparing with other CDC reports, she highlights "that [the] number of American women who have been raped is greater than the number who are current smokers."
ref: Berbanding laporan CDC yang lain, dia menyatakan "[bilangan] wanita Amerika yang dirogol lebih banyak daripada bilangan perokok sekarang."

src: Whilst still in the Senate, Biden led efforts to implement legislative change — including authoring the Violence Against Women Act.
ref: Sementara masih dalam Dewan Senat, Biden mengetuai usaha untuk melaksanakan perubahan perundangan- termasuk menggubah Akta Keganasan terhadap Perempuan.

src: Between June 1 and the end of August this year, the city will be flooded by herds of decorated cow sculptures, exhibited at well-known landmarks, such as The Palace of the Parliament, Europe's largest building, as well as on the streets and outside metro stations.
ref: Antara 1 Jun dan hujung Ogos tahun ini, bandar ini akan dibanjiri berkawan-kawan lembu arca yang dihiasi, dipamerkan di tempat-tempat yang terkenal, seperti Istana Parlimen, bangunan terbesar di Eropah, dan juga di jalan-jalan dan di luar stesen-stesen metro.

src: Over 3000 local and international artists will participate in the event, decorating more than 100 life-sized fibreglass cows.
ref: Lebih daripada 3000 artis tempatan dan antarabangsa akan mengambil bahagian dalam acara itu, menghiasi lebih daripada 100 gentian kaca bersaiz lembu sebenar.

src: After the event ends, all the cows will be auctioned off, with the proceeds donated to the Special Olympics Romania, a charity helping athletes with mental disabilities.
ref: Selepas acara itu tamat, semua lembu akan dilelong, dengan hasilnya didermakan kepada Sukan Olimpik Khas Romania, sebuah badan amal membantu atlet kurang upaya mental.

src: The Bucharest CowParade is organised by Event Horizon, a Romanian marketing consultancy.
ref: Bucharest CowParade dianjurkan oleh Event Horizon, sebuah syarikat perunding pemasaran Romania.

src: CowParade, which was first held in Zurich in 1998, has been held in 22 cities in 5 continents and is today the world's largest public art event.
ref: CowParade, yang pertama kali diadakan di Zurich pada tahun 1998, telah diadakan di 22 bandar di 5 benua dan kini ia adalah acara seni awam terbesar di dunia.

src: The high-profile event is expected to boost the image of Bucharest worldwide, especially in the artistic scene.
ref: Acara berprofil tinggi itu dijangka meningkatkan imej Bucharest di seluruh dunia, terutama di tempat seni.

src: The ringleaders of the so-called Bali Nine were today sentenced to death by a Denpasar court.
ref: Ketua-ketua geng yang diberi nama Bali Nine hari ini dijatuhi hukuman mati oleh mahkamah Denpasar.

src: Andrew Chan received the news via translators at about 3:45 p.m. AEDT, and Myuran Sukumaran was sentenced at about 4:50 p.m. AEDT.
ref: Andrew Chan menerima berita itu melalui penterjemah pada kira-kira 3:45 p.m. AEDT, dan Myuran Sukumaran dijatuhi hukuman pada kira-kira 4:50 p.m. AEDT.

src: The two were charged with attempting to smuggle 8.3 kg of heroin from Bali to Australia.
ref: Kedua-dua mereka didakwa cuba menyeludup 8.3 kg heroin dari Bali ke Australia.

src: Chan was alleged to be the mastermind of the operation, and Myuran was alleged to be an enforcer.
ref: Chan didakwa menjadi dalang operasi, dan Myuran didakwa sebagai penguatkuasa.

src: Chan, who claimed to have rediscovered his Christian faith, prayed for divine intervention prior to the sentence being handed down.
ref: Chan, yang mendakwa telah menjumpai semula iman Kristiannya, berdoa untuk campur tangan kuasa tuhan sebelum hukuman itu sedang dijatuhkan.

src: Donald Rothwell, a Professor of International Law at the University of Sydney, has said that, unlike countries such as Singapore, it may not be long before the two are executed.
ref: Donald Rothwell, Profesor Undang-undang Antarabangsa di Universiti Sydney, telah berkata bahawa, tidak seperti negara-negara seperti Singapura, ia mungkin tidak mengabil masa yang lama sebelum kedua-duanya dilaksanakan hukuman.

src: "The Indonesian judicial system is one in which death sentences are often carried out very quickly," he said.
ref: "Sistem kehakiman Indonesia adalah salah satu di mana hukuman mati sering dijalankan dengan sangat cepat," katanya.

src: "So unlike the situation of Van Nguyen in Singapore, where an appeal process and a clemency process played out over quite some time, this may not be the situation in Bali."
ref: "Jadi tidak seperti keadaan Van Nguyen di Singapura, di mana proses rayuan dan proses pengampunan dijalankan agak lebih lama, ini mungkin bukan keadaan di Bali".

src: Foreign Affairs Minister Alexander Downer told parliament today that he had made a direct request to the Indonesian government that the death penalty not be imposed.
ref: Menteri Luar Alexander Downer memberitahu Parlimen hari ini bahawa dia telah membuat permintaan langsung kepada kerajaan Indonesia supaya hukuman mati tidak dikenakan.

src: "On the 18th of December last year, I wrote to the Indonesian Attorney-General reminding him that the Australian Government was opposed to the death sentence and we didn't want to see, in the context of the Bali nine, any of the Australians sentenced to death," he said.
ref: "Pada 18 Disember tahun lepas, saya telah menulis kepada Peguam Negara Indonesia mengingatkan beliau bahawa kerajaan Australia telah menentang hukuman mati dan kami tidak mahu melihat, dalam konteks Bali Nine, sesiapa daripada warga Australia dihukum mati," katanya.

src: The remaining three members of the Bali Nine have been sentenced to life in prison by a Denpasar court.
ref: Baki tiga ahli Bali Nine telah dijatuhkan hukuman penjara seumur hidup oleh mahkamah Denpasar.

src: All nine have now been found guilty and sentenced, with seven receiving life in prison, and the two ringleaders being sentenced to death yesterday.
ref: Kesemua sembilan orang kini telah didapati bersalah dan dihukum, dengan tujuh orang menerima penjara seumur hidup, dan kedua-dua ketua kumpulan dijatuhkan hukuman mati semalam.

src: Art thieves in Greece broke into the Athens National Gallery on Monday and stole three valuable works of art.
ref: Pencuri karya seni di Greece memecah masuk ke dalam Galeri Negara Athens pada hari Isnin dan mencuri tiga karya seni yang bernilai.

src: Among them was a painting by famous Spanish painter Pablo Picasso, dated 1939, called Woman's Head which was a gift to the Greek people for their resistance to the Nazis during World War 2.
ref: Antaranya ialah lukisan oleh pelukis terkenal Sepanyol Pablo Picasso, bertarikh 1939, yang dikenali sebagai Woman's Head yang merupakan hadiah kepada orang Yunani untuk ketahanan mereka kepada Nazi semasa Perang Dunia ke-2.

src: The police stated multiple alarms during the evening of the heist in other parts of the building had distracted the gallery guard.
ref: Pihak polis menyatakan beberapa penggera yang berbunyi sepanjang malam rompakan di bahagian-bahagian lain bangunan itu telah mengalih perhatian pengawal galeri.

src: The artwork in question was on display at the gallery as part of an exhibition called "Unknown Treasures", including works of Albrecht Durer and Rembrandt.
ref: Karya seni yang terlibat adalah yang dipamerkan di galeri ini sebagai sebahagian daripada pameran yang dikenali sebagai "Khazanah yang tidak diketahui," termasuk kerja-kerja Albrecht Durer dan Rembrandt.

src: The Australian House of Representatives have considered the bill regarding whether the Australian Health Minister Tony Abbott, or the Therapeutic Goods Administration (TGA) regulate the abortifacient mifepristone (RU486), and has passed the bill unamended.
ref: Wakil Rumah Australia telah mempertimbangkan rang undang-undang sama ada Menteri Kesihatan Australia Tony Abbott, atau Pentadbiran Barang-Barang Terapi (TGA) untuk mengawal penggunaan dadah berbahaya (RU486) dan telah meluluskan undang-undang yang tidak dipinda itu.

src: Earlier today, the Prime Minister John Howard (Australian Liberal Party, Bennelong) has spoken on the amendments earlier proposed by Jackie Kelly (Liberal, Lindsay) and Andrew Laming (Liberal, Bowman), speaking in favour of the Laming amendments and reiterating his support for Abbott, stating that he is the "best friend that Medicare ever had", Abbott's usual phrase he states in Question Time in support of the Government's handling of Medicare.
ref: Awal pagi ini, Perdana Menteri John Howard (Parti Liberal Australia, Bennelong) telah bercakap mengenai pindaan awal yang dicadangkan oleh Jackie Kelly (Liberal, Lindsay) dan Andrew Laming (Liberal, Bowman), bercakap mengenai pindaan Laming dan mengulangi sokongan beliau terhadap Abbott, menegaskan bahawa beliau ialah "rakan karib yang Medicare pernah ada", ayat yang selalu dikatakan oleh Abbott dalam Masa Soalan dalam menyokong cara Kerajaan mengendali Medicare.

src: Howard's counterpart, the Leader of the Opposition, Kim Beazley (Australian Labor Party, Brand), spoke in support of the bill in its unamended form, noting that it is "simply commonsense that the minister does not have the scientific capacity" to evaluate the drug, and reiterating that the bill is "not really about Tony Abbott".
ref: Rakan sejawat Howard, Ketua Pembangkang, Kim Beazley (Parti Buruh Australia, Brand), berkata dalam menyokong rang undang-undang didalam borang yang dipinda, menegaskan bahawa ianya "hanya pemikiran biasa sahaja bahawa menteri tiada pengetahuan saintifik" untuk menilai dadah, dan mengulangi undang-undang itu "bukan berkaitan dengan Tony Abbott".

src: More controversially he however said that those with certain personal views such as Tony Abbott's conservative Catholic faith should not hold certain offices in Government, which drew criticism from the Government later in the debate noting that an earlier Labor Prime Minister of Australia John Curtin's pacificism was a strong wartime leader.
ref: Lebih kontrovesi apabila beliau berkata bahawa seseorang yang mempunyai pandangan sendiri seperti kepercayaan konvertif Katolik Tony Abbott yang tidak sepatutnya memegang jawatan di pejabat kerajaan, yang akan menerima kritikan dari kerajaan kemudian dalam bahas bahawa Buruh Perdana Menteri Australia John Curtin mempunyai kepimpinan yang hebat.

src: Later, the Kelly amendments were put to the vote and were lost on the voices and in subsequent division with 49 agreeing to the amendments and 96 disagreeing.
ref: Kemudian, permindaan Kelly diletakkan kepada undian dan kalah pada majoriti dan dalam bahagian seterusnya denag 49 setuju untuk pindaan manakala 96 lagi tidak setuju.

src: The vote on whether the bill should be read a second time 95 for to 50 against.
ref: Undian sama ada undang-undang itu sepatutnya dibacakan kali kedua ialah 95 setuju manakala 50 lagi tidak.

src: In the consideration in detail stage, the Laming amendments were debated, but the vote on these amendments were lost with 56 supporting the amendments and 90 against them.
ref: Dalam pertimbangan fasa terakhir, pindaan Laming telah dibahaskan, tetapi undian untuk pindaan itu kalah dengan 56 menyokong pindaan manakala 90 lagi menentang.

src: The bill as unamended was agreed to and passed the third reading on the voices, without having to resort to a vote.
ref: Rang undang-undang itu teleh dipersetujui untuk tidak dipinda dan meluluskan bacaan ketiga dalam sebulat suara, tanpa perlu mngambil jalan keluar untuk mengundi.

src: The prosecutor did not withhold complains for "simple" and "severe" physical harm by negligence against gendarmes Poget and Deiss in the trial of the Aubonne Bridge affair.
ref: Pendakwa tidak akan menahan aduan untuk kecederaan fizikal jenis "ringan" dan "teruk" atas kecuaian terhadap pegawai polis Perancis Poget dan Deiss dalam perbicaraan urusan Aubonne Bridge.

src: The Australian based pharmaceutical company CSL has announced that despite promising human trials of their bird flu vaccine, more research is needed before the final formula can be developed.
ref: Syarikat perubatan berpangkalan di Australia CSL telah mengumumkan bahawa walaupun percubaan menjanjikan vaksin selsema burung mereka, lebih kajian diperlukan sebelum formula akhir dapat dihasilkan.

src: Late last year the Australian federal government gave CSL AU$ 5 million to speed up research into the bird flu vaccine.
ref: Lewat tahun lepas kerajaan persekutuan Australia memberikan CSL AU$5 juta untuk mempercepatkan kajian didalam vaksin selsema burung itu.

src: The strain of bird flu used for the trials was taken from a bird flu victim in Vietnam and neutralised to prevent it from being contagious.
ref: Tekanan dari selsema burung yang digunakan untuk ujian tersebut diambil dari mangsa selsema burung di Vietnam dan dineutralkan dari berjangkit.

src: The next phase of the trial will include 700 people from varying age groups.
ref: Fasa berikut ujian akan melibatkan 700 orang dari pelbagai kumpulan umur.

src: CSL has previously indicated that once their vaccine is approved, it could take between three and six months to manufacture enough of the vaccine to inoculate every Australian.
ref: CSL telah sebelumnya menyatakan yang apabila vaksin mereka diluluskan, ia akan mengambil antara tiga hingga enam bulan untuk menghasilkan cukup vaksin untuk menyuntik setiap rakyat Australia.

src: Three men suspected of drug dealing were arrested: Fernando Pereira Lima (aged 22) Alessandro Martins (aged 27) and a boy (aged 17 - Brazilian laws forbid the release of names of teenagers younger than 18 in reporting legal cases).
ref: Tiga suspek lelaki atas urusan dadah telah diberkas: Fernando Pereira Lima (22 tahun) Allessandro Martins (27 tahun) dan seorang budak (17 tahun - undang-undang Brazil melarang pendedahan nama bagi remaja yang berumur bawah 18 tahun dalam melaporkan kes undang-undang).

src: The teenager allegedly shot the grenade against the policemen, but was himself hurt.
ref: Remaja terbabit disyaki melepaskan bom tangan ke atas pegawai polis, tetapi mencederakan diri sendiri.

src: He is stable after treatment at the Miguel Couto hospital.
ref: Dia kini stabil selepas rawatan di hospital Miguel Couto.

src: Local populations of both Morro da Rocinha and Vidigal are endangered by the criminals, and have demanded urgent actions by the authorities.
ref: Penduduki tempatan di kedua Moro da Rocinha dan Vidigal terancam oleh penjenayah-penjenayah, dan telah meminta tindakan segera dari pihak berkuasa.

src: Mahendra Singh Dhoni (77 not out, 56b, 6x4, 4x6) was another important contributor to the Indian Innings.
ref: Mahendra Singh Dhoni (77 tidak keluar, 56b, 6x4, 4x6) merupakan satu lagi penyumbang penting kepada Innings India.

src: The Pakistani bowling, apart from a probing spell from paceman Rao Iftekar Anjum, was made to look ordinary.
ref: Hantaran Pakistan, selain persembahan dari paceman Rao Iftekar Anjum, telah dibuat kelihatan biasa.

src: When on 64, Yuvraj was put down at covers by Shoaib Malik.
ref: Apabila pada 64, Yuvraj berlaku telah diredakan oleh penutup dari Shoaib Malik.

src: Tendulkar carried the drinks, indicating that in this Indian side experience and youth blended into one.
ref: Tendulkar membawa minuman, mengatakan bahawa kumpulan berpengalaman dan muda india bersatu.

src: In Tendulkar's absence, Rahul Dravid opened the innings with Gautam Gambhir.
ref: Dalam ketiadaan Tendulkar, Rahul Dravid membuka innings dengan Gautam Gambhir.

src: Mohammed Asif has not been a big factor in the ODIs since the away going delivery is a lesser weapon in this variety of the game, especially if a side is bowling in the afternoon.
ref: Mohammed Asif tidak menjadi faktor besar dalam ODIs sejak penghantaran yang jauh akan adalah senjata yang lebih kecil dalam kepelbagaian permainan, terutama jika pasukan yang sedang bowling pada sebelah petang.

src: Gambhir once again wasted a start, but the opening pair had, importantly, raised 69.
ref: Gambhir sekali lagi mensia-siakan permulaan, tetapi pasangan pembukaan itu yang penting, membangkitkan 69.

src: Dravid's 50 (6x4) might have consumed 82 deliveries, but he made sure that, in the absence of Virender Sehwag and Tendulkar, the Indians had enough wickets in hand before they began the final onslaught.
ref: Dravid ini 50 (6x4) mungkin telah mengambil 82 penghantaran, tetapi dia memastikan bahawa, dalam ketiadaan Sehwag dan Tendulkar, pasukan India mempunyai wickets yang cukup di tangan sebelum mereka memulakan serangan akhir.

src: It was Sreesanth who dented Pakistan in the morning after Zaheer Khan and Ajit Agarkar shared the new ball.
ref: Sreesanthlah yang mematahkan Pakistan pagi itu selepas Zaheer Khan dan Ajit Agarkar kongsi bola baru.

src: He struck thrice and Pakistan, from 62 without loss, slumped to 77 for three.
ref: Beliau menyerang tiga kali dan Pakistan, daripada 62 tanpa kalah, merosot kepada 77 selama tiga.

src: There is fluency about Sreesanth's run-up and action that is hard to ignore, and he did bowl well at the death, swinging the ball into the right-hander.
ref: Terdapat kefasihan tentang penampilan Sreesanth dan tindakan ini sukar untuk diabaikan, dan beliau menghayun bola dengan baik pada masa saat akhir, mengayun bola ke sebelah kanan.

src: The bowlers, backed by aggressive fielding, had performed a fair job, under the conditions.
ref: Penghantar, disokong oleh pemain agresif, telah menunjukkan prestasi kerja yang baik, di bawah syarat-syarat.

src: The dean of Auckland University's Faculty of Medical and Health Sciences, Professor Iain Martin says the review “can’t come soon enough”.
ref: Dekan Fakulti Perubatan dan Sains Kesihatan Universiti Auckland, Profesor Iain Martin berkata kajian semula itu "akan ada tidak lama lagi".

src: Pro-democracy leader Aung San Suu Kyi of Myanmar registered yesterday as a candidate in the parliamentary by-election.
ref: Pemimpin pro-demokrasi Aung San Suu Kyi dari Myanmar didaftarkan semalam sebagai calon dalam pilihan raya kecil Parlimen.

src: Suu Kyi is to contest in elections for the first time.
ref: Suu Kyi akan bertanding dalam pilihan raya untuk kali pertama.

src: Her party won the 1990 election, but she was under house arrest.
ref: Parti beliau memenangi pilihan raya tahun 1990, tetapi dia berada di bawah tahanan rumah.

src: The military junta did not accept NLD's majority in that election.
