ref: Junta tentera tidak menerima kemenangan majoriti NLD dalam pilihan raya itu.

src: Suu Kyi's party would not have much power even if it won all the 48 available seats in the election.
ref: Parti Suu Kyi tidak akan mempunyai banyak kuasa walaupun ia memenangi kesemua 48 kerusi dalam pilihan raya.

src: Nevertheless, her participation could be a test for democratic reforms in Myanmar.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, penyertaan beliau boleh menjadi cabaran bagi perubahan demokratik di Myanmar.

src: Ricin is one of the most deadly poisons in the world and can exist in the form of a pellet, mist, or powder.
ref: Ricin adalah salah satu racun paling berbahaya di dunia dan boleh wujud dalam bentuk pelet, kabut, atau serbuk.

src: Such tests are designed to error on the side of caution, thus ensuring that possible poisoning victims receive treatment in time.
ref: Ujian tersebut direka berkesilapan demi berhati-hati, dengan itu memastikan bahawa mangsa keracunan menerima rawatan sebelum terlewat.

src: Last year there were similar false positive reports of ricin in London, which were further publicized by Vice President Cheney and Secretary of State Colin L. Powell.
ref: Tahun lepas terdapat sama laporan positif palsu ricin di London, yang telah dihebahkan lagi oleh Naib Presiden Cheney dan Setiausaha Negara Colin Powell.

src: Having outlined his manifesto in his last pre-election radio broadcast, beleaguered Thai Prime Minister Thaksin Shinawatra has failed to deflect calls for his resignation.
ref: Setelah menggariskan manifestonya dalam siaran radio pra-pilihan raya yang terakhir, Perdana Menteri Thailand, Thaksin Shinawatra yang dilanda masalah gagal memesongkan seruan untuk peletakan jawatannya.

src: Offering an increased minimum wage, additional debt relief for farmers, and pay rises for civil servants the PM starts the election campaign with his Thai Loves Thais (Phak Thai Rak Thai) party in good shape for the snap election announced last Friday.
ref: Menawarkan peningkatan gaji minimum, pelepasan hutang tambahan bagi petani, dan meningkatkan gaji untuk kakitangan awam, PM memulakan kempen pilihan raya dengan parti Thai Loves Thais (Phak Thai Rak Thai) dalam keadaan yang baik untuk mengadakan pilihan raya mengejut yang diumumkan Jumaat lalu.

src: Zafi-in Jae-loh, the deputy chairman of Narathiwat Islamic Committee said the move would do nothing to help the situation faced by ethnic Malay Muslims in the south.
ref: Timbalan Pengerusi Jawatankuasa Islam Narathiwat, Zafi-in Jae-loh, berkata langkah itu akan tidak akan membantu keadaan yang dihadapi oleh etnik Melayu Islam di selatan.

src: The three southernmost provinces, Narathiwat, Pattani, and Yala face near-daily bombings and shootings with a considerable armed forces presence contributing to tensions in the area.
ref: Tiga wilayah paling selatan, Narathiwat, Pattani, Yala menghadapi pengeboman hampir setiap hari dan diancam kehadiran angkatan tentera besar menyumbang kepada ketegangan di kawasan itu.

src: Opposition parties concerned that the three years early election will not resolve the current political situation have announced that they may boycott the April 2 poll.
ref: Parti-parti pembangkang bimbang bahawa pilihan raya tiga tahun lebih awal tidak akan menyelesaikan keadaan politik semasa dan telah mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan memboikot pilihan raya pada April 2.

src: The Democrats (Phak Prachatipat) and the smaller Great People's Party (Phak Mahachon) took over 25% of the vote in the February 2005 elections.
ref: Parti Demokrat (Phak Prachatipat) dan Parti Great People (Phak Mahachon) yang lebih kecil mengambil alih 25% undi dalam pilihan raya Februari 2005.

src: Third placed at the last election with 11.4% of the vote, the Thai Nation Party (Phak Chart Thai) have yet to announce their decision, leaving party leader Banharn Silapa-archa to decide.
ref: Tempat ketiga pilihan raya lepas dengan 11.4% undi, Parti Thai Nation (Phak Chart Thai) masih belum mengumumkan keputusan mereka, membenarkan pemimpin parti Banharn Silapa-archa untuk membuat keputusan.

src: The People’s Alliance for Democracy was reported to be monitoring a crowd they were suspicious of ahead of the rally in Sanam Luang, Bangkok.
ref: Perikatan Rakyat Untuk Demokrasi dilaporkan akan memantau sekumpulan orang yang disyaki menjelang perhimpunan di Sanam Luang, Bangkok.

src: Reports indicated that the total number in attendance and supporting the call for the now-caretaker Prime Minister to go were in the tens of thousands.
ref: Laporan menunjukkan bahawa jumlah bilangan yang akan hadir dan menyokong seruan Perdana Menteri sementara sekarang adalah dalam puluhan ribu.

src: Anti-Thaksin banners displayed at the open-air rally stated that the he had "No right to rule", while others read "Thaksin=Toxin" below an image aimed at comparing the PM with Adolf Hitler.
ref: Sepanduk anti-Thaksin dipamerkan di perhimpunan terbuka menyatakan bahawa beliau "Tiada hak untuk memerintah," manakala yang lain mengandungi "Thaksin=Toksin" di bawah gambar yang bertujuan membandingkan PM tersebut dengan Adolf Hitler.

src: The sale, to Temasek Holdings, was widely seen as allowing control of key telecoms infrastructure to pass into foreign hands.
ref: Penjualan itu, kepada Temasek Holdings, telah dilihat sebagai membolehkan kawalan infrastruktur telekomunikasi utama jatuh ke tangan orang asing.

src: Simon Crean, Shadow Minister for Regional Development, has accused the Howard Government of abandoning regional development and showing no commitment to rural Australia.
ref: Simon Crean, Menteri Bayangan Pembangunan Wilayah, menuduh Kerajaan Howard mengabaikan pembangunan wilayah dan tidak menunjukkan komitmen terhadap luar bandar Australia.

src: In a media release timed to coincide with the ten-year anniversary of the Howard Government, Mr. Crean said that the privatisation of Telstra and a failure to reform the Regional Partnerships program demonstrated the government's lack of commitment to the bush.
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan media bertepatan dengan ulangtahun ke sepuluh Kerajaan Howard, Encik Crean berkata bahawa pengswastaan Telstra dan kegagalan membaharui program Kerjasama Serantau menunjukkan kekurangan komitmen kerajaan terhadap kawasan luar bandar.

src: "Likewise Beaudesert Rail, the recipient of $5.7 million in Government grants, has not travelled a single kilometre."
ref: "Begitu juga Beaudesert Rail, penerima $5.7 juta dalam geran kerajaan, masih tidak berjalan walau satu kilometer."

src: According to a government media release, there is $360.9 million available under this program for the period 2005-06 to 2008-09.
ref: Menurut satu kenyataan media oleh kerajaan, terdapat $360.9 juta di bawah program ini bagi tempoh 2005-06 sehingga 2008-09.

src: Mr Crean also criticised the National party for "[selling out] rural and regional Australia - on Telstra, on trade and on essential services."
ref: Encik Crean juga mengkritik parti Nasional kerana "[menjual] kawasan luar bandar dan wilayah Australia- atas Telstra, atas perdagangan, dan atas perkhidmatan asas."

src: "Telstra are expected to provide those kinds of services," he said.
ref: "Telstra dijangkakan untuk membekalkan perkhidmatan sedemikian," kata beliau.

src: "I think the time will come when we will move on to new technology and some of those systems that were more important in the past will be less important in the future but there are still many Australians who still depend on payphones and community telephone systems."
ref: "Saya rasa masa telah tiba untuk kita beralih ke teknologi baru dan sesetengah sistem yang penting pada masa lalu akan menjadi kurang penting pada masa akan datang namun masih ada orang Australia yang bergantung kepada telefon awam dan sistem telefon komuniti."

src: The current cap allows for loans during a lifetime of AU$50,950.
ref: Amaun tertinggi kini yang membolehkan pinjaman sepanjang hayat bernilai AU$50,950.

src: "Setting the FEE-HELP limit at this amount biases the market against courses that are long or have high per year costs, or both," argues Norton in the paper.
ref: "Menetapkan had FEE-HELP pada jumlah ini memberi bias ke atas pasaran terhadap kursus panjang atau yang berkos tinggi per tahun, atau kedua-duanya," Norton berhujah di dalam laporan itu.

src: "The loan cap is a crude way of controlling lending, taking no account of course costs or capacity to repay."
ref: "Amaun tertinggi pinjaman adalah cara kejam untuk mengawal pinjaman, tidak mengambil kira kos kursus atau keupayaan untuk membayar balik."

src: "A truly radical reform would make student loans mimic commercial loans: students with good earning prospects could borrow large sums, other students could borrow less, and some could not borrow at all," he said.
ref: "Satu pembaharuan yang benar-benar radikal akan membuatkan pinjaman pelajar meniru pinjaman komersial: Pelajar yang mempunyai prospek pendapatan yang baik boleh meminjam jumlah wang yang besar, pelajar-pelajar lain boleh meminjam lebih kurang, dan ada yang tidak boleh meminjam sama sekali," katanya.

src: The paper was criticised by Senator Kerry Nettle, Education Spokesperson for the Australian Greens.
ref: Laporan itu telah dikritik Senator Kerry Nettle, Jurucakap Pendidikan untuk Greens Australia.

src: "Student fees have spiralled upward under the Howard government and any further deregulation would just make a bad system worse," she added.
ref: "Yuran pelajar telah melambung tinggi di bawah kerajaan Howard dan mana-mana pembatalan kawalselia lain hanya akan membuat sistem yang tidak baik, menjadi lebih buruk," tambahnya.

src: The third author of Holy Blood and the Holy Grail Henry Lincoln, is not involved in the case.
ref: Penulis ketiga Holy Blood and the Holy Grail, Henry Lincoln, tidak terlibat dalam kes tersebut.

src: Random House is the of publisher of both The Da Vinci Code and The Holy Blood and The Holy Grail.
ref: Random House merupakan penerbit kedua-dua The Da Vinci Code dan The Holy Blood and the Holy Grail.

src: "As publisher of both The Da Vinci Code and The Holy Blood and The Holy Grail, we are genuinely saddened that two of the three authors of HBHG have chosen to bring this litigation against us...Random House takes no pleasure in defending a legal action that it believes is without merit and we are confident that we will prevail."
ref: "Sebagai penerbit kedua-dua The Da Vinci Code dan The Holy Blood and the Holy Grail, kami benar-benar sedih bahawa dua daripada tiga orang penulis HBHG telah memilih utuk membawa tuntutan menentang kami...Random House tidak berasa senang untuk mempertahankan tindakan undang-udang yang kami percaya asas kebenarannya dan kami yakin bahawa kami akan menang."

src: If this case is successful it could threaten the film; starring Tom Hanks and Sir Ian McKellen from opening.
ref: Sekiranya kes ini berjaya ia boleh megancam filem tersebut; yang dibintangi Tom Hanks dan Sir Ian McKellen daripada majlis pembukaan.

src: Brown's next book, The Solomon Key, is rumoured to be about the Yale Skull and Bones society.
ref: Buku Brown yng seterusnya, The Solomon Key, dikhabar anginkan adalah mengenai persatuan Yale Skull and Bones.

src: Notable alumni of the society include current United States President George W. Bush, former President George H.W.
ref: Alumni terkenal persatuan tersebut termasuklah Presiden Amerika Syarikat sekarang George W. Bush, bekas Presiden George H.W.

src: A leaked draft of a report on instances of state repression during Mexico's "dirty war" has been called into question by top officials.
ref: Draf laporan yang terbocor mengenai kejadian penindasan negeri semasa "perang kotor" Mexico telah dipersoalkan oleh pegawai-pegawai atasan.

src: Report author, Ignacio Carrillo, assigned to the task by President Fox, commented by saying, "He will have to render his report."
ref: Penulis laporan, Ignacio Carrillo, yang ditugaskan tugasan oleh Presiden Fox, mengulas dengan mengatakan, "Dia perlu memberikan laporannya".

src: This being a reference to the fact that the Supreme Court has ruled that it is too late to prosecute possible offenders.
ref: Ini adalah rujukan secara hakikatnya bahawa Mahkamah Agung telah memutuskan bahawa ia sudah terlambat untuk mendakwa pesalah yang disyaki.

src: Carrillo claims, however, that his report is similar to the recently leaked draft.
ref: Carrillo mendakwa, bagaimanapun, laporannya sama dengan draf terbocor baru-baru ini.

src: The draft was published by a Mexican magazine, claiming that the public has a right to know.
ref: Draf ini telah diterbitkan oleh sebuah majalah Mexico, dengan mendakwa bahawa orang ramai berhak mengetahuinya.

src: The basis for the report is recently declassified military documents from the years 1964 – 1982.
ref: Dasar laporan adalah dokumen tentera dari tahun 1964-1982 yang diubah status.

src: The Dirty War refers to the use of state terrorism in Latin America in a period from the 1960s to the 1980s, usually targeted at groups opposed to the government (usually leftist groups).
ref: Perang Kotor merujuk kepada penggunaan keganasan negara di Amerika Latin dalam tempoh dari 1960-an hingga 1980-an, biasanya disasarkan pada kumpulan-kumpulan yang menentang kerajaan (biasanya golongan sayap kiri).

src: Much controversy exists in the region about what is to be done with alleged offenders in the Dirty War.
ref: Banyak kontroversi wujud di rantau ini tentang apa yang perlu dilakukan dengan pesalah yang didakwa ketika Perang Kotor.

src: Palestinian extremist group Hamas has been invited to meet with representatives of the South African government.
ref: Kumpulan ekstremis Palestin Hamas telah dijemput untuk bertemu dengan wakil kerajaan Afrika Selatan.

src: According to Pahad South Africa wishes to share its experiences on the transformation from the Apartheid-era to democracy with the Palestinians and Israel.
ref: Menurut Pahad Afrika Selatan berharap untuk berkongsi pengalamannya dalam transformasi dari era Apartheid ke demokrasi dengan Palestin dan Israel.

src: Sami Abu Zuhri, a Hamas spookesman said that there is no date for talks with South Africa yet.
ref: Sami Abu Zuhri, seorang jurucakap Hamas berkata bahawa masih belum lagi ada tarikh untuk perbincangan dengan Afrika Selatan.

src: Russia has invited leaders of the Hamas for talks, which will begin on Friday.
ref: Russia telah menjemput pemimpin Hamas untuk perbincangan, yang akan bermula pada hari Jumaat.

src: The Russian invitation was the first one after the elections of January 2006.
ref: Jemputan Russia tersebut adalah yang pertama kali selepas pilihanraya pada Januari 2006.

src: However, Russia has put Hamas under pressure to recognize Israel and renounce violence.
ref: Bagaimanapun, Russia telah meletakkan Hamas di bawah tekanan supaya mengakui Israel dan meninggalkan keganasan.

src: There have been talks between Hamas leaders and the Turkish foreign minister, Abdullah Gul.
ref: Perbincangan di antara pemimpin Hamas dan menteri luar negara Turki, Abdullah Gul telah berlangsung.

src: Zulia has a large portion of Venezuela's oil and gas reserves and is ruled by governor Manuel Rosales, a friend of the United States.
ref: Zulia mempunyai sebahagian besar dalam simpanan minyak dan gas Venezuela dan dikuasai oleh gabenor Manuel Rosales, seorang sahabat Amerika Syarikat.

src: He said that the imperialists are attempting to give strength and form to the secessionist movement, with the goal of controlling the oil in the region.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa imprialis tersebut cuba untuk memberi kekuatan dan membentuk pergerakan penyokong pemisah, dengan bermatlamatkan pengawalan minyak di rantau itu.

src: Environmental scientists say they have concrete evidence that the planet is undergoing the "largest mass extinction in 65 million years".
ref: Saintis alam sekitar berkata mereka memerlukan bukti yang kukuh mengenai planet sedang mengalami "kepupusan jisim terbesar dalam 65 juta tahun".

src: Scientists forecast that up to five million species will be lost this century.
ref: Saintis meramalkan bahawa akan hampir lima juta spesis akan hilang pada abad ini.

src: He projected this rate in the late 1980s to much criticism, but the figure is now widely accepted by scientists.
ref: Beliau mengunjurkan kadar ini di penghujung tahun 1980 dengan banyak kritikan, tetapi angka ini kini diterima dengan meluas oleh para saintis.

src: "The whole thing is taking place in what you might call a flickering of an evolutionary eye," said Myers.
ref: "Semua apa yang difikirkan terjadi dalam apa yang kamu katakan kelipan dalam mata evolusi," kata Myers.

src: "It's hard to keep up with unless we damp down on some of the causes of the evolution."
ref: "Ia susah untuk mengekalkannya melainkan kita mengecilkan sebahagian sebab terjadinya evolusi ini".

src: At least 15 people are feared dead and at least 60 others are wounded after three explosions in the Hindu pilgrimage town of Varanasi, India.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 15 orang dikhuatiri terbunuh dan sekurang-kurangnya 60 yang lain cedera selepas tiga letupan di bandar penyucian Hindu Varanasi, India.

src: The second took place just minutes later at the Cantonment Railway Station, leaving a crater just outside the stationmaster's room, and the third occurred on the Shiv Ganga Express, which had been leaving for New Delhi.
ref: Letupan kedua berlaku hanya beberapa minit kemudian di Stesen Kereta Api Cantonment, mengakibatkan satu kawah terbentuk di luar bilik ketua stesen, dan yang ketiga berlaku di atas Ekspres Shiv Ganga, yang telah berlepas ke New Delhi.

src: Officials say that the area has been cordoned off and the injured have been shifted to a hospital on the Benaras Hindu University campus.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai berkata bahawa kawasan itu telah ditutup dan yang cedera telah dipindahkan ke sebuah hospital di kampus Universiti Benaras Hindu.

src: They also report that at least four unexploded bombs were found near a holy site by the Ganges River.
ref: Mereka juga melaporkan bahawa sekurang-kurangnya empat bom yang tidak meletup telah ditemui berhampiran tapak suci Sungai Ganges.

src: According to media advisor Sanjay Baru, Prime Minister Manmohan "has appealed for peace and calm.
ref: Menurut penasihat media Sanjay Baru, Perdana Menteri Manmohan "telah membuat rayuan untuk keamanan dan bertenang.

src: Four journalists from The Sun newspaper and one police officer have been arrested today as part of Operation Elveden, the investigation into payments by journalists working at News International to police officers.
ref: Empat wartawan dari akhbar The Sun dan seorang pegawai polis telah ditangkap hari ini atas sebahagian daripada Operasi Elveden, penyiasatan ke atas pembayaran oleh wartawan yang bekerja di Berita Antarabangsa kepada pegawai polis.

src: The police officer has been identified as a 29-year-old officer in the Territorial Policing Command at the Metropolitan Police.
ref: Pegawai polis itu telah dikenal pasti sebagai seorang pegawai yang berusia 29 tahun dalam Perintah Kepolisan Wilayah di Polis Metropolitan.

src: The police have not identified the journalists, but the BBC suggest they are Fergus Shanahan, ex-deputy editor of The Sun; Graham Dudman, ex-managing editor; Mike Sullivan, crime editor; and Chris Pharo, head of news.
ref: Pihak polis belum mengenal pasti wartawan-wartawan itu, tetapi BBC mencadangkan mereka adalah Fergus Shanahan, bekas timbalan editor The Sun; Graham Dudman, bekas editor pengurusan; Mike Sullivan, editor kes jenayah; dan Chris Pharo, ketua berita.

src: The offices of News International at Wapping have also been searched today as part of the investigation.
ref: Pejabat News International di Wapping juga digeledah hari ini sebagai sebahagian daripada penyiasatan.

src: The judge in the U.S. federal death penalty trial against Zacarias Moussaoui ruled on Friday that prosecutors can seek replacement witnesses for seven Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) employees whose testimony was tainted, and therefore disallowed because of pre-trial coaching by a Transportation Security Administration (TSA) lawyer.
ref: Hakim kepada perbicaraan hukuman mati persekutuan U.S. menentang Zacarias Moussaoui menjatuhkan pada Jumaat yang pendakwa boleh mencari saksi pengganti untuk tujuh pekerja Pentadbiran Penerbangan Persekutuan (FAA) yang telah tercemar keterangan mereka, dan juga dilarang kerana dilatih sebelum perbicaraan oleh peguam Pentadbiran Keselamatan Pengangkutan (TSA).

src: The 18-member jury (6 alternates) were sent home for a week while the court dealt with the revelation that government aviation security witness had been contacted prior to the trial by TSA lawyer Carla J. Martin, to help prepare their testimony in the case.
ref: 18-ahli juri (6 berganti) telah dihantar pulang selama seminggu sementara mahkamah berurusan dengan penemuan yang saksi keselamatan penerbangan kerajaan telah dihubungi sebelum perbicaraa oleh peguam TSA Carla J. Martin, untuk membantu menyediakan keterangan mereka dalam kes tersebut.

src: Martin, aged 51, is accused of misconduct by sending prosecution witnesses e-mail that included trial transcripts of another related case along with observations of her own that pertained to the Moussaoui case, including suggestions and talking points.
ref: Martin, berusia 51, dituduh dengan salah laku dengan menghantar e-mail kepada saksi pendakwaan yang menyertakan transkrip perbicaraan kepada kes lain yang berkaitan selain pemerhatiannya sendiri berhubung kes Moussaoui, termasuk cadangan dan titik percakapan.

src: She was recently suspended with pay by the TSA and retained Roscoe Howard to act as legal counsel in the face of legal actions that might arise against her.
ref: Dia baru-baru ini digantung berbayar oleh TSA dan mengekalkan Roscoe Howard untuk bertindak sebagai penasihat undang-undang dalam menghadapi tindakan undang-undang yang mungkin timbul terhadapnya.

src: The connection to the Carla Martin involvement in the case was discovered in a separate trial involving liability lawsuits against two U.S. airline companies for losses as a result of the attacks.
ref: Hubungan mengenai penglibatan Carla Martin dalam kes tersebut ditemui dalam perbicaraan berasingan melibatkan tuntukan mahkamah liabiliti terhadap dua syarikat penerbangan U.S. untuk kerugian hasil daripada serangan tersebut.

src: Family member lawyers of flight attendants drew attention to contacts by Martin to persons involved in the case.
ref: Peguam ahli keluarga kepada pramugari menarik perhatian hubungan dari Martin kepada mereka yang terlibat dengan kes tersebut.

src: A U.S. federal public defender appointed to Moussaoui argued for the jury to spare his life during opening statements on Monday, March 6, in the trial that will determine his fate — either life in prison or death by lethal injection.
ref: Seorang peguam awam persekutuan U.S. dilantik untuk Moussaoui memohon kepada juri untuk memelihara nyawanya ketika kenyataan pembukaan pada Isnin, 6 Mac, dalam perbicaraan yang akan menentukan nasibnya - samada hidup dipenjara atau mati dengan suntikan maut.

src: Defense attorney Edward B. MacMahon said that Moussaoui "aspires to martyrdom," and called on jurors to deny the Al-Qaeda operative his wish to die.
ref: Peguam bela Edward B. MacMahon berkata yang Moussaoui "menginginkan syahid," dan menyeru kepada juri yang menafikan Al-Qaeda menggerakkan keinginannya kepada kematian.

src: A wish that would result in him becoming "a smiling face on a recruiting poster for Osama bin Laden," MacMahon said.
ref: Keinginan yang mungkin membawa kepadanya menjadi "wajah tersenyum pada poster merekrut untuk Osama bin Laden," MacMahon berkata.

src: Moussaoui is believed by some to be the missing member in the team of 19 other attackers that carried out the suicide airliner strikes in New York City and Washington D.C. Arrested in Minnesota on immigration charges three weeks prior to the attacks, Moussaoui could have warned officials of the pending attacks, but failed to do so, argued Assistant U.S. Attorney Rob Spencer for the prosecution in opening statements.
ref: Moussaoui dipercayai oleh sesetengah orang sebagai ahli yang hilang dari kumpulan 19 orang penyerang yang menjalankan serangan bunuh diri berpesawat di bandar New York dan Washington D.C. Ditahan di Minnesota diatas tuduhan imigresen tiga minggu sebelum serangan, Moussaoui mungkin boleh memberi amaran kepada pihak berkuasa mengenai serangan yang dirancang, tetapi gagal berbuat demikian, hujah Penolong Peguam U.S. Rob Spencer untuk pendakwaan semasa kenyataan pembukaan.

src: He said that he was to play a role in another future attack on the White House using an aircraft.
ref: Dia berkata yang dia akan memainkan peranan dalam satu lagi serangan masa depan keatas White House menggunakan pesawat.

src: Family members of the nearly 3,000 killed in the attacks were able to watch the Alexandria, Virginia courtroom proceedings by closed-circuit television in six U.S. cities: New York, Boston, Central Islip, N.Y., Newark, N.J., and Philadelphia.
ref: Ahli keluarga kepada hampir 3,000 yang terbunuh dalam serangan tersebut dapat menonton prosiding bilik mahkamah Alexandar, Virginia itu melalui televisyen litar-tertutup di enam bandar U.S. : New York, Boston, Central Islip, N.Y., Newark, N.J., and Philadelphia.

src: Upon leaving the Tuesday, March 7 court session for a recess, Moussaoui pumped his right fist in the air and shouted, "Allah Akbar!
ref: Semasa meninggalkan sesi mahkamah untuk rehat pada hari Selasa, 7 Mac, Moussaoui mengangkat genggaman kanannya ke udara dan melaungkan, "Allah Akbar!

src: God curse America!
ref: Tuhan hina Amerika!

src: Bless Osama bin Laden!"
ref: Lindungi Osama bin Laden"!

src: The outbursts have been timed to occur outside the earshot of Judge Brinkema and the jury as those persons filed out of the courtroom for recesses.
ref: Tunjuk perasaan itu telah dirancang terjadi diluar pendengaran Hakim Brinkema dan juri kerana mereka meninggalkan bilik mahkamah tersebut untuk rehat.

src: With the new updates, Twitter can now withdraw individual posts and accounts in specific countries, as opposed to a global deletion.
ref: Dengan pengemaskinian yang baru, Twitter kini boleh memadamkan pos dan akaun individu di negara-negara tertentu, bertentangan dengan pencoretan global.

src: Twitter announced these changes in a blog post on Thursday, and released a clarification update on Friday.
ref: Twitter mengumumkan bahawa perubahan ini dalam pos blog pada hari Khamis, dan mengeluarkan satu penjelasan baru pada hari Jumaat.

src: Twitter says it needed to make the changes to expand on an international level.
ref: Twitter berkata ia perlu untuk membuat perubahan untuk berkembang di peringkat antarabangsa.

src: It said in a blog post entitled Tweets still must flow, "we will enter countries that have different ideas about the contours of freedom of expression."
ref: Katanya dalam satu pos blog yang bertajuk Tweet masih perlu mengalir, "kami akan masuk negara-negara yang mempunyai idea-idea yang berbeza dalam kontur kebebasan bersuara".

src: "Some differ so much from our ideas that we will not be able to exist there."
ref: "Ada yang berbeza begitu banyak daripada idea kita sehingga kita tidak akan boleh wujud di sana".

src: "Others are similar but, for historical or cultural reasons, restrict certain types of content, such as France or Germany, which ban pro-Nazi content."
ref: "Yang lain hampir sama tetapi, atas sebab-sebab sejarah atau budaya, sekatan beberapa jenis kandungan, seperti Perancis atau Jerman, yang mengharamkan kandungan pro-Nazi".

src: The organization Reporters without Borders sent an open letter to Twitter's chairman, Jack Dorsey, saying "We urge you to reverse this decision, which restricts freedom of expression and runs counter to the movements opposed to censorship that have been linked to the Arab Spring, in which Twitter served as a sounding board..." "Twitter is depriving cyberdissidents in repressive countries of a crucial tool for information and organization."
ref: Organisasi Wartawan tanpa Sempadan menghantar satu surat terbuka kepada pengerusi Twitter, Jack Dorsey, berkata "Kami menggesa anda untuk menterbalikkan keputusan ini, yang menyekat kebebasan bersuara dan bertentangan dengan pergerakan yang menentang penapisan yang telah dikaitkan dengan Hambur Arab, dalam mana Twitter berkhidmat sebagai saluran..." "Twitter menghalang cyberdissidents di negara-negara terindas yang menjadi satu alat penting untuk maklumat dan organisasi".

src: An "Asian security source" stated that the missiles may have been launched in the direction of China by mistake, and landed just inside the North Korean border.
ref: Satu "sumber keselamatan Asia" menyatakan bahawa peluru-peluru berpandu itu mungkin telah dilancarkan ke arah China dengan tidak sengaja, dan mendarat di dalam sempadan Korea Utara.

src: A "Western military source", however, claimed that they were launched to the east, in the direction of the Sea of Japan, but still says they landed in North Korean territory.
ref: Satu "sumber tentera Barat," bagaimanapun, mendakwa bahawa peluru-peluru berpandu itu telah dilancarkan ke timur, ke arah Laut Jepun, tetapi masih mengatakan mendarat di wilayah Korea Utara.

src: North Korea surprised the world when it launched a ballistic missile over northern Japan in 1998.
ref: Korea Utara telah mengejutkan dunia apabila ia melancarkan peluru berpandu balistik ke utara Jepun pada tahun 1998.

src: It is believed to be developing a ballistic missile that could reach Alaska, Hawaii, or even the continental United States.
ref: Adalah dipercayai bahawa ia sedang mengkaji peluru berpandu balistik yang boleh sampai Alaska, Hawaii, atau bahkan benua Amerika Syarikat.

src: Susan G. Komen for the Cure has stopped funding breast cancer screening and educational programming on breast health run by fellow US-charity Planned Parenthood and its affiliates.
ref: Susan G. Komen untuk Cure telah berhenti membiayai pemeriksaan kanser payudara dan program pendidikan mengenai kesihatan payudara yang dikendalikan oleh kebajikan Planned Parenthood-US dan sekutunya.

src: The Komen institute cites an ongoing investigation, while Planned Parenthood blame political pressures.
ref: Institut Komen menyebutkan tentang satu penyiasatan yang sedang dijalankan, manakala Planned Parenthood menyalahkan tekanan politik.

src: Planned Parenthood received nearly 700,000 from the Komen Foundation last year alone.
ref: Tahun lepas sahaja Planned Parenthood menerima hampir 700,000 daripada Yayasan Komen.

src: In the last five years, the funding from the foundation has granted 170,000 women breast exams.
ref: Dalam tempoh lima tahun yang lalu, pembiayaan dari yayasan itu telah memberikan 170,000 pemeriksaan payudara wanita.

src: Leslie Aun, a spokesperson for the Komen Foundation, said the organization adopted a new rule that does not allow grants or funding to be awarded to organizations that are under legal investigation.
ref: Leslie Aun, seorang jurucakap Yayasan Komen, berkata pertubuhan itu menerima pakai peraturan baru yang tidak membenarkan geran atau pembiayaan diberikan kepada organisasi yang sedang disiasat undang-undang.

src: Stearns is investigating whether taxes are used to fund abortions through Planned Parenthood in his role as chairman of the Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee, which is under the umbrella of the House Energy and Commerce Committee.
ref: Stearns sedang menyiasat sama ada cukai digunakan untuk membiayai pengguguran melalui Planned Parenthood dalam peranannya sebagai pengerusi Pengawasan dan Penyiasatan Jawatankuasa Kecil, yang berada di bawah naungan Tenaga dan Perdagangan Jawatankuasa Dewan.

src: "While it is regrettable when changes in priorities and policies affect any of our grantees, such as a longstanding partner like Planned Parenthood, we must continue to evolve to best meet the needs of the women we serve and most fully advance our mission," Aun said.
ref: "Walaupun adalah dikesali apabila perubahan dalam keutamaan dan dasar menjejaskan mana-mana penerima geran kami, seperti rakan kongsi lama seperti Planned Parenthood, kami mesti terus berkembang untuk berkhidmat memenuhi keperluan terbaik wanita dan memajukan sepenuhnya misi kami," Aun berkata.

src: Cecile Richards, president of Planned Parenthood, said, "While this is deeply disturbing and disappointing, we want to assure women who rely on Planned Parenthood for breast care that we're still here for them, and we always will be. "
ref: Cecile Richards, presiden Planned Parenthood, berkata, "Walaupun ini amatlah membimbangkan dan mengecewakan, kami ingin memberi jaminan wanita yang bergantung kepada Planned Parenthood untuk penjagaan payudara yang kami masih di sini untuk mereka, dan kami akan sentiasa".

src: The new fund we're launching to support these services will ensure that the Komen Foundation's decision doesn't jeopardize women's health."
ref: Dana baru yang kami lancarkan untuk menyokong perkhidmatan ini akan memastikan bahawa keputusan Komen Yayasan tidak menjejaskan kesihatan wanita".

src: Palestinian militants denied claims by an Israeli minister that they had agreed a ceasefire.
ref: Militan Palestin menafikan kenyataan oleh Menteri Israel bahawa mereka telah bersetuju untuk gencatan senjata.

src: CANDU reactors, which are designed in Canada, are one of the most advantageous forms of nuclear reactors due to their fuel efficiency and low amount of down-time.
ref: Reaktor CANDU, yang direka di Kanada, adalah salah satu bentuk reaktor nuklear yang paling berfaedah kerana kecekapan bahan bakar dan jumlah masa tidak aktif yang rendah.

src: NASA has announced that the Cassini spacecraft has found what seem to be geysers spewing water on the moon Enceladus.
ref: NASA telah mengumumkan bahawa kapal angkasa Cassini telah menemui apa yang seolah-olah geiser yang memancut air di bulan Enceladus.

src: The find raises the possibility of life on other planets, as liquid water is believed to be a requirement for life.
ref: Penemuan ini menimbulkan kemungkinan kehidupan di planet lain, kerana cecair air dipercayai merupakan satu keperluan untuk kehidupan.

src: "This marks the first time that scientists have seen evidence of water in liquid form so close to the surface on another body beyond Earth," said Cassini scientist Torrence Johnson.
ref: "Ini merupakan kali pertama bahawa saintis telah melihat bukti air dalam bentuk cecair begitu dekat dengan permukaan pada tempat lain di luar Bumi," kata saintis Cassini Torrence Johnson.

src: Although life may be found on the moon, most scientists concede that if Enceladus does harbor life, it probably consists of microbes or other robust organisms capable of living in extreme conditions.
ref: Walaupun kehidupan boleh didapati di bulan, kebanyakan saintis mengakui bahawa jika Enceladus tidak mempunyai hidupan ia mungkin terdiri daripada mikrob atau organisma teguh lain yang boleh hidup dalam persekitaran yang melampau.

src: "We realize that this is a radical conclusion — that we may have evidence for liquid water within a body so small and so cold," said Dr. Carolyn Porco, Cassini imaging team leader at the Space Science Institute, Boulder, Colorado.
ref: "Kami sedar bahawa ini adalah kesimpulan radikal - kalau kita mempunyai bukti untuk cecair air dalam badan begitu kecil dan terlalu sejuk," kata Dr. Carolyn Porco, Cassini ketua pasukan pengimejan di Institut Sains Angkasa, Boulder, Colorado.

src: "However, if we are right, we have significantly broadened the diversity of solar system environments where we might possibly have conditions suitable for living organisms."
ref: "Bagaimanapun, jika kita betul, kita telah banyak meluaskan kepelbagaian persekitaran sistem solar di mana kita mungkin mempunyai keadaan yang sesuai untuk organisma hidup".

src: Japan's Chief Cabinet Secretary, Shinzo Abe, has advised against using the Winny peer-to-peer software due to concerns over its interaction with viruses.
ref: Ketua Setiausaha Kabinet Jepun, Shinzo Abe, telah menasihatkan supaya tidak menggunakan perisian perangkaian padan Winny berikutan daripada kebimbangan tentang saling tindaknya dengan virus.

src: One virus, Antinny (or Kintama (testicle)-virus) is believed responsible for uploading documents to the filesharing network without first obtaining user permission.
ref: Satu virus, Antinny (atau virus Kintama (testikel)) dipercayai bertanggungjawab memuat naik dokumen kedalam rangkaian perkongsian fail tanpa mendapatkan kebenaran pengguna terlebih dahulu.

src: This is believed to be the cause of virus-induced leaks from the police and Defense Agency.
ref: Ini dipercayai menjadi punca virus pencetus kebocoran daripada pihak polis dan Agensi Pertahanan.

src: The Chief Cabinet Secretary stated in a press interview, "Unless each one bewares and takes counter measures, information leaks cannot be prevented."
ref: Ketua Setiausaha Kabinet menyatakan dalam satu sidang akhbar, "Melainkan setiap orang berjaga-jaga dan mengambil langkah balas, kebocoran maklumat tidak dapat dicegah".

src: In her interview Supinya, secretary general of the Campaign for Popular Media, had stated that Shin corporation gained revenue following the election of Prime Minister Thaksin Shinawatra, the company's founder.
ref: Dalam wawancaranya setiausaha agung Campaign for Popular Media, Supinya, telah menyatakan bahawa perbadanan Shin mendapat keuntungan berikutan pilihan raya Perdana Menteri Thaksin Shinawatra, yang merupakan pengasas syarikat.

src: Internet search king Google is preparing to provide free VoIP service — a technology that that makes it possible to have a telephone conversation over the internet.
ref: Carian Internet ulung Google sedang bersedia menyediakan perkhidmatan percuma VoIP - teknologi yang menjadikannya boleh menjalankan perbualan telefon dengan internet.

src: Sources suggest that Google may firstly introduce its telephony service to users in the United Kingdom, but the actual date when the service will launch and the exact details of the plan are as yet unknown.
ref: Sumber menunjukkan bahawa Google mungkin akan mula-mula memperkenalkan perkhidmatan telefon kepada pengguna di United Kingdom, tetapi tarikh sebenar apabila perkhidmatan itu akan dilancarkan dan maklumat tepat tentang pelan tersebutmasih tidak diketahui.

src: Google is a California-based search engine whose mission "is to organize the world's information and make it universally accessible and useful".
ref: Google adalah enjin carian yang berpangkalan di California yang misinya "adalah untuk menyusun maklumat dunia dan menjadikannya boleh diakses dan berguna".

src: The largest search engine on the web, Google receives over 200 million queries each day through its various services.
ref: Enjin carian terbesar di web, Google menerima lebih daripada 200 juta pertanyaan setiap hari melalui pelbagai perkhidmatannya.

src: According to The Baltic Times, specialists say that this time up to 40 tons of oil might have leaked into the sea from the Runner 4.
ref: Menurut The Baltic Times, pakar menyatakan bahawa kali ini sehingga 40 tan minyak berkemungkinan telah tumpah ke dalam laut melalui Runner 4.

src: The ship was carrying, according to MTV3, over 100 tons of heavy fuel oil and 35 tons of light fuel oil.
ref: Kapal tersebut membawa, menurut MTV3, lebih 100 tan minyak berat dan 35 tan minyak ringan.

src: He says, according to Finland's national broadcasting company (YLE), that the countermeasures should have started a week ago, immediately after the disaster, instead of now.
ref: Dia berkata, menurut syarikat penyiaran negara Finland (YLE), bahawa tindak malas hendaklah bermula sejak seminggu lepas, sejurus selepas bencana, bukanlah sekarang.

src: He said, "It's difficult now to get the oil under control.
ref: Dia berkata, "Ia agak sukar untuk mengawal minyak tersebut sekarang.

src: The Estonian Border Guard's representative Helena Loorents says that Finland was not asked for help, as every day spent in the cleaning costs a lot of money.
ref: Wakil Pengawal Sempadan Estonia Helena Loorents berkata bahawa Finland tidak meminta bantuan, berikutan setiap hari yang dihabiskan untuk pembersihan memerlukan wang yang banyak.

src: According to Urmas Raudsepp, the director of Estonia's Institute of Marine Research, the oil spill's location was only found out on Thursday March 16.
ref: Menurut Urmas Raudsepp, pengarah Institut Penyelidikan Marin Estonia, lokasi tumpahan minyak hanya dijumpai pada Khamis 16 Mac.

src: The Finnish ships had, however, arrived at the site on the day before.
ref: Kapal Finland tersebut, walaubagaimanapun, tiba di kawasan tersebut sehari sebelum kejadian.

src: The wind is over 17 meters per second (38 miles per hour) and it is raining.
ref: Angin melebihi 17 meter per saat (38 batu per jam) dan hari sedang hujan.

src: The oil spill is moving into waters too shallow for the three Finnish vessels, so they can no longer do their job.
ref: Tumpahan minyak tersebut bergerak ke arah air terlalu cetek untuk tiga kapal Finland tersebut, tidak lagi mampu menjalankan tugas.

src: Hylje will be heading back to Finland on March 19 and the other two might follow within a few days.
ref: Hylje bakal bergerak kembali ke Finland pada 19 Mac dan dua yang lain bakal mengikuti dalam masa beberapa hari.

src: Three nations in three continents have seen attention focused on high suicide rates this week.
ref: Tiga negara dari tiga benua telah memberi fokus perhatian terhadap kadar pembunuhan diri yang tinggi minggu ini.

src: A study found Scotland's suicide rate to be increasing away from neighbouring England, Russian press and politicians are examining the world's third-highest teen suicide rate, and new figures showed increasing Aboriginal children's suicides in Australia's Northern Territory.
ref: Kajian mendapati bahawa kadar pembunuhan diri di Scotland akan meningkat daripada kejiranan England, pihak akbar Russia dan ahli politik sedang memeriksa kadar ketiga tertinggi pembunuhan diri remaja di dunia, dan angka terbaru menunjukkan peningkatan pembunuhan diri kanak-kanak Orang Asli di wilayah utara Australia.

src: "Until the highest authorities see suicide as a problem, our joint efforts will be unlikely to yield any results," Boris Polozhy of Moscow's Serbsky psychiatric center said yesterday.
ref: "Sehingga pihak berkuasa tinggi melihat pembunuhan diri sebagai sebuah masalah, usaha bersama kami mungkin tidak dapat menghasilkan apa-apa keputusan," Boris Polozhy dari pusat psikiatri berkata semalam.

src: Thursday saw national children's ombudsman Pavel Astakhov say 4,000 youths kill themselves each year.
ref: Hari Khamis dilihatkan pegawai kebangsaan kanak-kanak Pavel Astakhov berkata 4,000 remaja bunuh diri setiap tahun.

src: He said Russian schools, which are criticised for understaffing and perceived inattention to bullying, should teach psychology.
ref: Dia bercakap sekolah-sekolah Rusia, yang dikritik kerana kekurangan kakitangan dan dilihat tidak memberi tumpuan kepada buli, perlu mengajar psikologi.

src: "I have seen websites that offer a thousand ways of killing oneself," he claimed.
ref: "Saya telah melihat laman web yang menawarkan beberapa ribu cara untuk membunuh diri sendiri," dia mendakwa.

src: Astakhov wanted schools to offer assistance via a social networking presence and tackle online bullying.
ref: Astakhov mahu sekolah-sekolah menawarkan bantuan melalui rangkaian sosial dan menangani buli siber.

src: Recent high-profile cases include yesterday's death of a twelve-year-old who hung himself at home in Krasnoyarsk, Siberia, and two fourteen-year-olds who jumped hand-in-hand to their ends from a building in Lobnya, Moscow.
ref: Kes berprofil tinggi baru-baru ini termasuk kematian seorang budak dua belas tahun yang menggantungkan dirinya di rumah di Krasnoyarsk, Siberia, semalam, dan dua kanak-kanak empat belas tahun yang melompat berpegangan tangan dari sebuah bangunan di Lobnya, Moscow.

src: Data was sorted by age, gender, and method; marked increases were seen among Scotsmen aged from 25 to 54 with hanging increasing in popularity.
ref: "Kajian ini menambahkan pemahaman kami tentang corak pembunuhan diri di Britain dengan mengeluarkan bukti yang kukuh dalam perbezaan trend jangka panjang di Scotland berbanding England dan Wales," kata Profesor Stephen Platt, penyelidik utama dari Universiti Edinburgh Pusat Penduduk Sains Kesihatan.

src: "This study adds to our understanding about patterns of suicide in Great Britain by producing sound evidence on divergences in long-term trends in Scotland compared to England and Wales," said Professor Stephen Platt, a lead researcher from Edinburgh University's Centre for Population Health Sciences.
ref: "Kami akan mencadangkan penjelasan untuk kadar tinggi pembunuhan diri di Scotland di kertas panduan akan datang".

src: Fellow joint lead researcher Roger Webb of the Centre for Suicide Prevention of Manchester University said the high Scottish hanging rate was "of particular concern as hanging has high case-fatality and is difficult to prevent, except within institutional settings."
ref: Dia berkata "kempen maklumat awam mengenai gantung diri" adalah satu cara mengurangkan kadar.

src: He noted "a public information campaign about hanging" could be one way of reducing the rate.
ref: Dibayar oleh pembayar cukai Scotland, keputusan itu muncul di Jurnal British daripada Psikiatri.

src: Paid for by the Scottish taxpayer, the results appeared in the British Journal of Psychiatry.
ref: Di kejadian bersamaan kepada kematian di Moscow baru-baru ini, pada tahun 2009 pihak media Scotland dan Britain membuat publisiti satu kes berprofil tinggi dimana dua remaja melompat bersama daripada Jambatan Erskine, tempat bunuh diri terkenal dimana kira-kira lima belas orang membunuh diri setiap tahun.

src: This week also saw Howard Bath, Children's Commissioner for Australia's Northern Territory, suggest the area had the highest proportion of Aborignal girl suicides in the West.
ref: Terdapat peningkatan yang ketara semenjak campur tangan kecemasan lima tahun yang lalu sebagai tindak balas untuk laporan bertajuk Anak-Anak Kecil yang Suci yang mendokumenkan penderaan seksual meluas kepada kanak-kanak di wilayah utara dan kegagalan oleh pihak berkuasa untuk tindak balas secukupnya.

src: There has been a significant increase since an emergency intervention five years ago in response to a report titled Little Children are Sacred which documented widespread sexual abuse of Northern Territory children and failures by authorities to adequately respond.
ref: Siasatan pembunuhan diri Kawasan Utara yang disokong kerajaan negara sedang berlangsung dan dijangka dilaporkan bulan depan.

src: A national government-backed Northern Territory suicide inquiry is ongoing and due to report next month.
ref: Siasatan telah mendengar kelompok kematian berlaku di sekitar timur dan barat Arnhem, Katherine, dan persekitaran Alice Springs.

src: The inquiry has heard clusters of deaths occurred around East and West Arnhem, Katherine, and the vicinity of Alice Springs.
ref: Pulau Tiwi mempunyai kadar tinggi dari tahun 2000 hingga 2005, tetapi sekarang tidak mempunyai sebarang pembunuhan diri untuk setahun.

src: The Tiwi Islands had a very high rate from 2000 to 2005, but has now not had a suicide for a year.
ref: Pembunuhan diri di kalangan perempuan telah meningkat banyak sehingga 40% daripada pembunuhan diri di wilayah utara di kalangan orang-orang yang berumur lapan belas tahun kebawah.

src: Female suicide rates have greatly increased to account for 40% of Northern Territory suicides amongst those aged less than eighteen.
ref: "Kami sekarang mempunyai situasi di wilayah dimana terdapat hampir sama banyak pembunuhan diri wanita dan lelaki," Bath berkata.

src: Lack of information is a problem; the all-party inquiry has heard evidence of much under-reporting and poor data collection.
ref: Gary Robinson dari Sekolah Menzies dari Kesihatan menyeru untuk pendaftaran pembunuhan diri gaya Queensland.

src: The Menzies School of Health's Gary Robinson called for a Queensland-style register of suicides.
ref: Robinson mencadangkan psikosis ganja ialah faktor penyumbang tetapi merungut "Masalah besar adalah tiada siapa yang menyimpan data".

src: Robinson suggests cannabis-induced psychosis to be a contributing factor but laments "The big problem is nobody keeps any data."
ref: Dia juga mencadangkan buli, dimana di Rusia, adalah masalah sementara Bath berkata keganasan terhadap wanita juga boleh mengambil peranan.

src: He also suggested bullying, as in Russia, is a problem while Bath notes violence against women may also take a role.
ref: "Wanita orang asli dimasukkan hospital untuk serangan pada 80 kali lebih dari kadar wanita lain".

src: He also notes "I am concerned, as the commissioner, about children who are frequently exposed to violence in the home or in the immediate family."
ref: Dia juga berkata, "Saya khuatir, sebagai pesuruhjaya, tentang kanak-kanak yang sering didedahkan kepada keganasan di rumah atau di keluarga terdekat".

src: New South Wales, with the nation's largest indigenous population, has a suicide rate of one per 100,000 but the Northern Territory rate is over 30 per 100,000.
ref: New South Wales, dengan penduduk asli yang terbesar di negara ini, mempunyai kadar bunuh diri satu bagi setiap 100,000 tetapi kadar wilayah utara adalah lebih daripada 30 bagi setiap 100,000.

src: In the Six Nations Cup, Ireland beat England 28 points to 24, to win The Triple Crown.
ref: Dalam Kejohanan Enam Negara, Ireland mengalahkan England 28 mata kepada 24, untuk memenangi Mahkota Tiga.

src: Ireland have now beaten England on the last three occasions that these sides have met.
ref: Ireland kini telah mengalahkan England dalam tiga acara akhir pertemuan mereka.

src: After every earthquake, flood, or other disaster, the call goes out for pledges to fund emergency relief.
ref: Selepas setiap gempa bumi, banjir, atau bencana lain, panggilan dikeluarkan bagi berjanji untuk membiayai bantuan kecemasan.

src: Then a second round of begging tries to convert those pledges into actual payments.
ref: Kemudian pusingan kedua mengemis cuba untuk menukar perjanjian berkenaan ke dalam pembayaran yang sebenar.

src: In the meantime, some relief is delayed, and people die.
ref: Dalam pada itu, sesetengah bantuan ditangguhkan, dan orang-orang mati.

src: "The CERF will provide a ready pool of resources that better empower the United Nations in funding immediate relief efforts in the aftermath of disasters", said UN Secretary-General Kofi Annan on March 9.
ref: "CERF akan menyediakan kumpulan bersedia sumber-sumber yang lebih baik memberi kuasa kepada Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dalam membiayai usaha-usaha bantuan serta-merta selepas kejadian bencana," kata Setiausaha Agung PBB Kofi Annan pada 9 Mac.

src: Jan Egeland, the UN Emergency Relief Coordinator, will manage the Fund.
ref: Jan Egeland, Penyelaras Bantuan Kecemasan PBB, akan menguruskan dana tersebut.

src: The biggest donations paid so far are $41 million from Sweden and $30 million from Norway.
ref: Sumbangan terbesar dibayar setakat ini adalah $41 juta dari Sweden dan $30 juta daripada Norway.

src: The largest pledges are $70 million from the United Kingdom and $24 million from the Netherlands.
ref: Perjanjian yang terbesar adalah $70 juta daripada United Kingdom dan $24 juta dari Belanda.

src: US President George W. Bush, with dwindling public support for the war, marked the occasion with a speech, outlining his commitment to democracy in the region.
ref: Presiden AS George W. Bush, dengan sokongan awam yang semakin berkurangan terhadap perang, menandakan acara ini dengan ucapan, menggariskan komitmennya kepada demokrasi rantau ini.

src: Duckworth's victory earns her a spot in the race against Republican state Senator Peter Roskam, who won the Republican nomination to replace retiring Congressman Henry Hyde.
ref: Kemenangan Duckworth yang mendapatkan satu tempat untuknya dalam perlumbaan menentang kerajaan Republikan terhadap Senator Peter Roskam, yang memenangi pencalonan Republikan untuk menggantikan Ahli Kongres yang bersara Henry Hyde.

src: Cegalis, a software engineer, was running unopposed for the nomination until Duckworth joined the race in December.
ref: Cegalis, seorang jurutera perisian, berkempen tanpa bertanding untuk pencalonan sehingga Duckworth menyertai pertandingan pada bulan Disember.

src: The race became strongly contested between self-proclaimed progressive activists supporting Cegalis and Democrats who preferred to work with the party candidate.
ref: Pertandingan itu menjadi sengit dipertandingkan antara ahli aktivis progresif pengisytiharan sendiri yang menyokong Cegalis dan ahli Demokrat yang lebih suka bekerjasama dengan calon parti.

src: Duckworth, who lost her legs in Iraq in 2004, received a strong showing of support from outside the district, including large fundraisers in New York and Chicago.
ref: Duckworth, yang kehilangan kakinya di Iraq pada tahun 2004, menerima sokongan kuat dari luar daerah itu, termasuk sekumpulan besar pengutip dana di New York dan Chicago.

src: Scott, a former pastor of an evangelical church in Des Plains, attempted to paint the race in religious terms.
ref: Scott, seorang bekas paderi gereja evangelis di Des Plains, cuba untuk mewarnai perlumbaan itu berasakan keagamaan.

src: His campaign was run on the principle that he could win votes through his moderate, religious views, which he said would attract Republican voters in the district.
ref: Kempennya telah dijalankan atas prinsip bahawa dia boleh menang undi melalui, pandangan agamanya yang sederhana, yang katanya akan memikat hati pengundi Republikan di daerah itu.

src: The new book Game of Shadows: Barry Bonds, BALCO, and the Steroids Scandal that Rocked Professional Sports, by Mark Fainaru-Wada and Lance Williams of The San Francisco Chronicle, is being released today.
ref: Buku terbaru Game of Shadow: Barry Bonds, BALCO, dan Streroids Scandal oleh Sukan Professional Rocked, oleh Mark Fainaru-Wada dan The San Francisco Chronicle oleh Lance Williams, telah dilancarkan hari ini.

src: The authors not only implicate professional baseball celebrity Barry Bonds in the use of performance-enhancing drugs, but also say Gary Sheffield received human growth hormone and testosterone from Greg Anderson, Bonds's personal trainer.
ref: Penulis bukan sahaja mengaplikasikan pemain besbol profesional terkenal Barry Bonds dalam penggunaan dadah unutk meningkatkan prestasi, tetapi juga menyatakan Gary Sheffield menerima hormon pertumbuhan manusia dan testosteron dari Greg Anderson, pelatih peribadi Bonds.

src: Sheffield's response to the claims was quite simple: when asked if the allegations made against him were true, his response was "Nope."
ref: Sheffield menjawab untuk menuntut yang agak mudah: bila ditanya jika dakwaan dibuat terhadap beliau benar, respon beliau ialah "bukan".

src: Despite the book's accusations of Sheffield and Giambi, it centers around Bonds and the founder of the Bay Area Laboratory Co-Operative or BALCO, Victor Conte Jr. Conte is currently serving four months in prison for distribution of steriods and money laundering.
ref: Walaupun tuduhan di dalam buku Sheffield dan Giambi, ia tertumpu sekitar Bonds dan pengasas Makmal Ko-Operatif Kawasan teluk atau BALCO, Victor Conte Jr. Conte sekarang sedang berkhidmat di dalam penjara selama empat bulan kerana mengedarkan dadah jenis streroid dan pelaburan wang haram.

src: It appears that the steroid controversy concerning Bonds will only intensify as he continues to march on towards the career home runs record, one of baseball's most sacred records.
ref: Ia timbul bahawa steriod itu mengundang kontrovasi berkenaan Bonds yang hanya akan memperhebatkan dimana beliau menyambung untuk bergerak kehadapan terhadap kerjaya rekod home run, salah satu rekod yang paling menggerunkan dalam besbol.

src: Two explosions were heard in the city of La Paz, Bolivia on Tuesday night, March 22 and in the early morning Wednesday, March 23.
ref: Dua letupan kedengaran di bandar La Paz, Bolivia pada malam Selasa, 22 Mac dan pada awal pagi Rabu 23 Mac.

src: The second explosion occurred at 01:45 (05:45 UTC) at the Hotel Riosinhio II, less than a block from the La Paz bus terminal, injuring two people.
ref: Letupan kedua berlaku pada 01:45 (05:45 UTC) di Hotel Riosinhio II, kurang daripada satu blok dari terminal bas La Paz, mencederakan dua orang.

src: Hours later, two suspects in the crime were arrested by the police in the city of El Alto.
ref: Beberapa jam kemudian, kedua-dua suspek dalam jenayah itu telah ditahan oleh pihak polis di bandar El Alto.

src: They were American Claudio Lestat, approximately 30 years old (25 according to some sources) and his partner, Uruguayan Alda Ribeiros, of 35 years (40 according to other sources).
ref: Mereka adalah warga Amerika Claudio Lestat, berusia lebih kurang 30 tahun (25 menurut beberapa sumber) dan pasangannya, warga Uruguay Alda Ribeiros, 35 tahun (40 menurut sumber-sumber lain).

src: Police also announced that the Chilean consulate in the Bolivian capital was also a target, to be attacked on Saturday the 25th.
ref: Polis turut mengumumkan bahawa konsulat Chile di ibu negara Bolivia juga menjadi sasaran, akan diserang pada hari Sabtu 25 haribulan.

src: The last 12 pages of this comprehensive rebuttal are responses to specific article criticisms, mainly consisting of differences of opinion on style and article composition, but some citing outright factual errors on Natures part.
ref: 12 muka surat yang terakhir di bantahan menyeluruh ini adalah jawapan kepada kritikan artikel tertentu, terutamanya yang terdiri daripada perbezaan pendapat pada gaya dan artikel komposisi, tetapi beberapa memetik kesilapan fakta secara terang-terangan pada bahagian Natures.

src: In their response, Nature refused to reveal their original data for comparison, and commented that Britannica had raised their grievances in private some time ago, and then received no further correspondence until Britannicas open letter of 22 March 2006.
ref: Sebagai tindak balas, Natures enggan mendedahkan data asal mereka untuk perbandingan, dan mengulas bahawa Britannica telah menimbulkan rasa tidak puas hati mereka secara peribadi pada masa lalu, dan kemudian tidak menerima sebarang respons sehingga surat terbuka daripada Britannica pada 22 Mac 2006.

src: Nature notes that Britannica criticised 'less than half the points [their] reviewers raised', and states that the two encyclopædias were subject to the same treatment.
ref: Nature menyatakan bahawa Britannica mengkritik 'kurang daripada separuh dalam senarai yang dibangkitkan oleh pengulas mereka', dan menyatakan bahawa kedua-dua Ensiklopedia tertakluk kepada layanan yang sama.

src: The December 2005 study was seen at the time as a major boost to the credibility of Wikipedia.
ref: Kajian Disember 2005 telah dilihat pada masa itu sebagai rangsangan utama kepada kredibiliti Wikipedia.

src: Jimmy Wales was notified by one of his team members, on 27 January 2006 that all corrections provided by Nature were in place.
ref: Jimmy Wales telah diberitahu oleh salah seorang ahli pasukannya, pada 27 Januari 2006 bahawa semua pembetulan yang disediakan oleh Nature telah ditempatkan.

src: Commander Leroy Chiao and Flight Engineer Salizhan Sharipov have just completed their mission's first space walk aboard the International Space Station.
ref: Komander Leroy Chiao dan Jurutera Penerbangan Salizhan Sharipov baru menamatkan misi pertama mereka berjalan kaki di ruang angkasa lepas di Stesen Angkasa Antarabangsa.

src: The mission lasted 5 hours, 28 minutes, ending at 1311 UTC.
ref: Misi ini berlangsung selama 5 jam, 28 minit, berakhir di 1311 UTC.

src: Chiao and Sharipov installed a work platform, called the Universal Work Platform, along with its base and associated wiring.
ref: Chiao dan Sharipov memasang platform kerja, yang dikenali sebagai Platform Kerja Universal, bersama-sama dengan asas dan pendawaian yang berkaitan.

src: Residue accumulation around the vents of the Elektron oxygen generator was noted and photographed by Sharipov.
ref: Pengumpulan sisa di sekitar bolong penjana oksigen Elektron telah diberi perhatian dan digambar oleh Sharipov.

src: Technicians on the ground will analyze the information to determine if this residue has been contributing to the problematic operation of the Elektron.
ref: Juruteknik bertugas akan menganalisis maklumat tersebut untuk menentukan sama ada sisa ini telah menyumbang kepada permasalahan dalam operasi Elektron.

src: Expedition 10 is scheduled to conduct its second spacewalk in March.
ref: Ekspedisi 10 dijadual melakukan perjalanan angkasa lepas kedua pada bulan Mac.

src: Councillor Quinn described the EDL as a hate-filled group wishing to come to Hyde to try and incite hatred".
ref: Ahli Dewan Quinn menyifatkan EDL sebagai satu kumpulan yang penuh kebencian yang ingin datang ke Hyde untuk mencuba dan menyebarkan kebencian".

src: The EDL march was started in response to an attack on February 4 against two 17-year-old males in Hyde, Daniel Stringer-Price and Kavan Brown.
ref: Perarakan EDL dimulakan sebagai tindak balas kepada serangan pada 4 Februari terhadap dua lelaki berusia 17 tahun di Hyde, Daniel Stringer-Price dan Kavan Brown.

src: The teenagers claim they were attacked by a gang of Asian men, and the police are investigating it as being a racially-motivated crime.
ref: Remaja terbabit mendakwa mereka telah diserang oleh sekumpulan lelaki Asia, dan polis sedang menyiasat kes tersebut sebagai satu jenayah perkauman.

src: Daniel's mother, Cheryl Stringer, has said she does not want the EDL rally to be held: "The EDL have decided to do this and it's go nothing to do with us whatsoever.
ref: Ibu Daniel, Cheryl Stringer, berkata dia tidak mahu perhimpunan EDL ini diadakan: "EDL telah memutuskan untuk melakukannya dan ia tiada kaitan dengan kami.

src: Peter Fahy, the Chief Constable of Greater Manchester Police, said that the police were concerned "that there could be a threat to peace and order".
ref: Peter Fahy, Ketua Konstabel Polis Greater Manchester, berkata, pihak polis bimbang "akan ada ancaman kepada keamanan dan ketenteraman".

src: Early exit polls for the Israeli parliamentary elections suggest that the newly formed Kadima party of Prime Minister Ariel Sharon and Acting PM Ehud Olmert managed to capture between 28 and 32 seats in the 17th Knesset with Labor coming in second with 20 to 22 seats ahead of Yisrael Beiteinu with 12 to 14 seats.
ref: Pemilihan awal keluar untuk pilihan raya parlimen Israel menunjukkan bahawa perti Kadima yang baru ditubuhkan Perdana Menteri Ariel Sharon dan Pemangku PM Ehud Olmert berjaya menguasai antara 28 dan 32 kerusi di Knesset ke-17 dengan Buruh di tempat kedua dengan 20 hingga 22 kerusi di hadapan Yisrael Beiteinu dengan 12 hingga 14 kerusi.

src: The Pensioners party performed better than expected, capturing 6 to 8 seats, United Torah Judaism got 5 to 6 seats and Meretz around 5 seats.
ref: Prestasi Parti Pesara lebih baik daripada yang dijangkakan, menangkap 6-8 kerusi, United Torah Judaism mendapat 5 hingga 6 kerusi dan Meretz sekitar 5 kerusi.

src: "The next prime minister is Ehud Olmert," said Roni Bar-On, a Member of the Knesset for Kadima.
ref: "Perdana Menteri seterusnya adalah Ehud Olmert," kata Roni Bar-On, Ahli Knesset untuk Kadima.

src: "This a crisis unlike any that has ever hit Likud," said Dan Naveh, a senior MK of the party referring to Likud's fall from being one of the dominating Israeli parties in the last decades to finishing only 4th.
ref: "Krisis ini tidak seperti yang pernah melanda Likud," kata Dan Naveh, seorang MK kanan parti itu merujuk kepada kejatuhan Likud daripada menjadi salah satu pihak mendominasi Israel di dekad yang lalu untuk menyelesaikan hanya ke 4.

src: Correspondents for the BBC stress that Israeli exit polls are considered to be relatively unreliable, and that it may take some time to get definitive results.
ref: Wartawan untuk BBC menegaskan bahawa pemilihan keluar Israel dianggap agak tidak boleh dipercayai, dan bahawa ia mungkin mengambil sedikit masa untuk mendapatkan keputusan muktamad.

src: Senator Joe Ludwig (Labor, Queensland) asked of the Minister for Justice and Customs Senator Chris Ellison in Question Time whether he stood by his claim that he made yesterday that the discovery of the Jian Seng demonstrated that the Australian Government had in place "aerial and maritime surveillance to intercept a vessel in these circumstances, and that was done", and asked why it took the Government two weeks to intercept the vessel after it entered Australian waters.
ref: Senator Joe Ludwig (Buruh, Queensland) mempersoalkan Menteri Keadilan dan Kastam Chris Ellision di Waktu Pertanyaan sama ada dia berpendirian terhadap kenyataan yang dibuatnya semalam bahawa penemuan Jian Seng menunjukkan kerajaan Australia telah menempatkan "pengawasan udara dan laut untuk memintas kapal tangki didalam keadaan ini, dan telah dilakukan", dan menyoal mengapa Kerajaan mengambil dua minggu untuk memintas kapal tersebut selepas memasuki perairan Australia.

src: Senator Ellison responded that at the vessel's first sighting on March 8 "it was not doing anything illegal", and criticised the Opposition's claim that the ship was drifting for seventeen days, saying that "it was not stated as having drifted for the whole of the 17 days".
ref: Senator Ellison membalas bahawa kapal tersebut pertama kali dilihat pada 8 Mac "tidak melakukan apa-apa menyalahi undang-undang", dan mengkritik kenyataan Pembangkang yang kapal itu hanyut selama tujuh belas hari, menyatakan bahawa "tidak dinyatakan bahawa ia hanyut berterusan 17 hari".

src: Ludwig went on to note that it was not Customs that spotted the ship but a "passing Australian barge", but Ellison had defended this, stating that Ludwig "thinks that commercial vessels have absolutely no role in looking out for Australia" and that Ellison will "rely on reports to our hotline and go out and inspect vessels".
ref: Ludwig menambah perhatian bahawa bukan Kastam yang melihat kapal tersebut tetapi "tonkang Australia yang melepasi", tetapi Ellison mempertahankan ini, menyatakan bahawa Ludwig "berfikir bahawa kapal komersial langsung tidak mempunyai tugas dalam menjaga Australia" dan Ellison akan "bergantung kepada laporan kepada hotline dan keluar memeriksa kapal".

src: Later, Senator Kerry O'Brien (Labor, Tasmania) criticised the Government's implementation of coastal defense, and highlighted the dangers of ignoring the ship for seventeen days, saying that "it posed and possibly still poses unknown environmental and quarantine risks" and that the Jian Seng "has been refused admission to Weipa harbour...It could have been carrying literally anything."
ref: Kemudian, Senator Kerry O'Brien (Buruh, Tasmania) mengkritik pelaksanaan pertahanan perairan oleh Kerajaan, dan menekankan bahaya mengabaikan kapal tersebut selama tujuh belas hari, mengatakan bahawa "ia menimbulkan and berkemungkinan masih menimbulkan risiko tidak diketahui kepada alam sekitar dan kuarantin" and Jian Seng "telah menolak kemasukan ke pelabuhan Weipa...Ia berkemungkinan membawa apa-apa sahaja".

src: Fighting words were exchanged in the Australian House of Representatives over the matter of the division of Medicare safety net payments per electorate.
ref: Kata-kata bersabung telah didebatkan di Dewan Perwakilan Australia mengenai isu pembahagian jaringan pembayaran keselamatan Medicare setiap pengundi.

src: The Minister for Health and Ageing Tony Abbott (Liberal, Warringah) had introduced a policy that the Government would pay Medicare users up to a fixed amount — the safety net — to help in addressing "gaps" in certain payments which Medicare would not cover, such as certain hospital payments.
ref: Menteri Kesihatan dan Penuaan Tony Abbott (Liberal, Warringah ) telah memperkenalkan satu dasar bahawa kerajaan akan membayar pengguna Medicare sehingga jumlah yang ditetapkan - jaringan keselamatan - untuk membantu dalam menangani "jurang" pembayaran tertentu yang Medicare tidak akan liputi, seperti bayaran hospital tertentu.

src: The Opposition was opposed to the idea on efficacy counts.
ref: Pihak pembangkang telah menentang idea itu atas timbangan keberkesanan.

src: Abbott was asked a Dorothy Dixer in Question Time today about the benefits of the safety net.
ref: Abbott telah ditanya oleh Dixer Dorothy dalam Waktu Soalan hari ini mengenai faedah jaringan keselamatan.

src: He alleged that criticism by the Opposition Health spokeswoman Julia Gillard (Labor, Lalor) that the safety net favoured Liberal/National Party coalition electorates was misleading as it was a Labor electorate, Grayndler that received the "highest safety net benefits per electorate".
ref: Beliau mendakwa bahawa kritikan oleh jurucakap Kesihatan pembangkang Julia Gillard (Buruh, Lalor) bahawa jaringan keselamatan berpihak kepada pengundi gabungan Liberal/Parti Kebangsaan adalah mengelirukan kerana ia merupakan pengundi Buruh, Grayndler yang menerima "manfaat jaringan keselamatan tertinggi setiap pengundi."

src: This led Gillard to make a personal explanation after Question Time, stating that "the top four electorates receiving money under the Medicare safety net are Wentworth, North Sydney, Bradfield and Warringah" — all coalition electorates.
ref: Ini meyebabkan Gillard membuat penjelasan perseorangan selepas Waktu Soalan, menyatakan bahawa "empat pengundi paling tinggi menerima wang di bawah jaringan keselamatan Medicare adalah Wentworth, North Sydney, Bradfield dan Warringah" - semuanya pengundi campuran.

src: The Leader of the Opposition, Kim Beazley (Labor, Brand), put a question to the Speaker of the House, David Hawker (Liberal, Wannon) asking of the Speaker his "assurance that no person is being deliberately misled by the actions of any other person".
ref: Ketua Pembangkang itu, Kim Beazley (Buruh, Brand), mempersoalkan Yang di-Pertua Dewan, David Hawker (Liberal, Wannon) meminta Yang di-Pertua tentang pendapatnya "jaminan bahawa tiada seorang pun yang sengaja dikelirukan oleh tindakan sebarang orang lain."

src: Abbott had then interjected towards Beazley, saying "You big bellowing cow"; the Speaker asked Abbott to withdraw, but Abbott mentioned that "the Leader of the Opposition regularly interjects 'pompous ass' and 'goose', but I am happy to withdraw".
ref: Abbott telah kemudian mencelah Beazley, dengan mengatakan "Kamu lembu besar yang meraung"; Yang di-Pertua meminta Abbott untuk menarik balik kata-kata itu, tetapi Abbott berkata bahawa "Ketua Pembangkang selalu menyampuk 'keldai sombong'dan 'angsa', tetapi saya gembira untuk menarik balik."

src: She attempted to debate the motion but a gag motion to silence Gillard was moved and won because of Government numbers.
ref: Dia cuba untuk membahaskan usul itu tetapi gerakan penindasan untuk menutup mulut Gillard telah digerakkan dan telah menang kerana bilangan pihak Kerajaan.

src: Anthony Albanese, the Labor member for Grayndler attempted to second the motion but the gag was moved on him as well.
ref: Anthony Albanese, ahli Parti Buruh untuk Grayndler cuba menyokong usul itu tetapi gerakan penindasan turut digerakkan terhadapnya juga.

src: The final vote on the motion was lost 55 to 79.
ref: Undi akhir mengenai usul itu telah kalah 55 dan 79.

src: With the actual poll only days away, Thailand's Administrative Court has ruled against a new requirement introduced by the country's Election Commission.
ref: Dengan pengundian sebenar hanya sehari lagi, Mahkamah Pentadbiran Thailand telah memutuskan tidak menyebelahi keperluan baru yang diperkenalkan oleh Suruhanjaya Pilihan Raya di negara ini.

src: Ruling that the change to require the use of a rubber stamp is in contravention of election law, Judge Anuwat Tharasawaeng highlighted that election law does not mandate how a mark must be made on the ballot.
ref: Keputusan mahkamah memerlukan penggunaan setem getah adalah dengan melanggar undang-undang pilihan raya, Hakim Anuwat Tharasawaeng menekankan bahawa undang-undang pilihan raya tidak memberi mandat bagaimana tanda hendaklah dibuat pada kertas undi.

src: Some estimates of those injured currently range between 700-1,200 people.
ref: Beberapa jangkaan yang mereka tercedera kini berjumlah antara 700-1,200 orang.

src: The first earthquake measured a 4.7 on the Richter magnitude scale and was in a mountainous area and the second measured a 5.1.
ref: Gempa bumi pertama berukuran 4.7 pada skala magnitud Richter dan dalam kawasan bergunung dan yang kedua berukuran 5.1.

src: The third quake measured a 6.0 and hit Doroud and the villages surrounding the area at 4:47 a.m. local time (0117 GMT) on Friday.
ref: Gempa ketiga berukuran 6.0 melanda Doroud dan kampung sekitar kawasan tersebut pada 4:47 a.m. waktu tempatan (0117 GMT) pada Jumaat.

src: They also report that the previous day, a quake measuring 4.7 in magnitude occurred in the same area.
ref: Mereka juga melaporkan yang hari sebelumnya, satu gempa berukuran magnitud 4.7 berlaku dalam kawasan yang sama.

src: Some reports say that at least 20 villages have been destroyed.
ref: Sesetengah laporan mengatakan yang sekurang-kurangnya 20 kampung telah musnah.

src: In December of 2003, a magnitude 6.6 earthquake killed over 31,000 people and in February of 2005 a 6.4 eathquake killed 600 people near Zarand in the Kerman province.
ref: Pada Disember 2003, gempa bumi bermagnitud 6.6 membunuh lebih dari 31,000 orang dan pada Februari 2005 gempa bumi 6.4 membunuh 600 orang berhampiran Zarand dalam daerah Kerman.

src: At least 57 people are now known to have died when a boat designed similar to a traditional dhow capsized one mile of the coast of Bahrain in the Persian Gulf.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 57 orang kini diketahui telah terbunuh apabila sebuah bot yang direka serupa dengan dhow tradisional karam satu batu dari pantai Bahrain di Teluk Parsi.

src: The passengers were mostly foreigners from the Nass-Murray and Roberts construction company, and were enjoying an evening dinner cruise in celebration of their completion of part of the Bahrain World Trade Centre towers.
ref: Penumpang kebanyakannya warga asing dari Nass-Murray dan syarikat pembinaan Roberts, dan telah menikmati makan malam di pelayaran malam untuk meraikan penyempurnaan mereka untuk sebahagian pembinaan menara Perdagangan Dunia Bahrain.

src: Most who died were dining on the lower deck, and were trapped below.
ref: Kebanyakan mati ketika memakan malam di dek bawah, dan telah terperangkap di bawah.

src: The boat capsized in calm seas soon after it left, trapping many below.
ref: Bot karam di laut tenang tidak lama selepas ia bertolak, memerangkap ramai orang di bawah.

src: The Bahrain Interior Ministry is to investigate the accident and establish if the boat was seaworthy.
ref: Kementerian Dalam Negeri Bahrain akan menyiasat kemalangan itu dan menentukan sama ada bot itu layak belayar.

src: The world's second largest auto parts maker, Delphi Corporation, has announced today that 8,500 salary workers may be out of a job soon as part of a major restructuring plan, which will also include voiding the contract with the UAW union.
ref: Pembuat bahagian auto kedua terbesar di dunia, Delphi Corporation, telah mengumumkan hari ini bahawa 8,500 pekerja gaji mungkin keluar dari pekerjaan tidak lama lagi sebagai sebahagian daripada rancangan penyusunan semula utama, yang juga akan termasuk mengganggu kontrak dengan kesatuan UAW itu.

src: The move would also shutdown over a third of its factories worldwide, including twenty one located in the United States.
ref: Langkah itu juga akan tutup lebih satu pertiga daripada kilang-kilang di seluruh dunia, termasuk dua puluh satu yang terletak di Amerika Syarikat.

src: Eight plants in the U.S. are slated to continue operating.
ref: Lapan kilang di Amerika Syarikat itu dijadual untuk terus beroperasi.

src: Those located in Clinton, Mississippi, Brookhaven, Mississippi, Lockport, New York, Rochester, New York, Warren, Ohio, Vandalia, Ohio, Kokomo, Indiana, and Grand Rapids, Michigan will continue to serve as Delphi properties.
ref: Yang terletak di Clinton, Mississippi, Brookhaven, Mississippi, Lockport, New York, Rochester, New York, Warren, Ohio, Vandalia, Ohio, Kokomo, Indiana, dan Grand Rapids, Michigan akan terus berkhidmat sebagai hartanah Delphi.

src: The rest of the factories are said to either be sold to other companies, or to be closed entirely.
ref: Selebihnya daripada kilang-kilang dikatakan sama ada dijual kepada syarikat-syarikat lain, atau ditutup sepenuhnya.

src: In addition to the proposed closings and layoffs, 34,000 workers may experience cut wages and less benefits.
ref: Selain penutupan dan pemberhentian yang dicadangkan itu, 34,000 pekerja mungkin mengalami pemotongan gaji dan kurang manfaat.

src: The President of the Hellenic Republic, Carolos Papoulias, attended the inauguration ceremony of the Greek Orthodox Church of the Annunciation in Alexandria, Egypt.
ref: Presiden Republik Hellenic, Carolos Papoulias, menghadiri majlis perasmian gereja Yunani Ortodoks untuk upacara "Annunciation" di Alexandria, Mesir.

src: The ceremony was blessed by the Ecumenical Patriarch of Constantinople, Bartholomew.
ref: Majlis ini diberkati oleh Ketua Constantinople untuk seluruh gereja Kristian, Bartholomew.

src: Tomorrow, President Papoulias will meet unofficially in Cairo with President Hosni Mubarak of Egypt.
ref: Esok, Presiden Papoulias akan bertemu secara tidak rasmi dengan Presiden Hosni Mubarak dari Mesir di Kaherah.

src: On Sunday, Iran tested its second underwater missile, the Fajr-3.
ref: Ahad lalu, Iran telah menguji peluru berpandu dalam air keduanya, Fajr-3.

src: "The missile carries a very powerful warhead that enables it to operate against groups of warships and big submarines."
ref: "Peluru berpandu ini mempunyai kepala peledak yang berkuasa tinggi yang dapat berfungsi terhadap kumpulan kapal perang dan kapal selam bersaiz besar."

src: "Even if an enemy's warship sonar can detect the missile, no warship can escape from this missile because of its high speed," said General Ali Fadavi of the Revolutionary Guards.
ref: "Walaupun kapal perang musuh dapat mengesan peluru ini dengan sonar, tiada kapal perang yang dapat melarikan diri dari peluru ini kerana kelajuannya yang tinggi," kata Jeneral Ali Fadavi, dari Revolutionary Guards.

src: He said the missile can travel at 328 feet a second.
ref: Dia berkata peluru ini dapat bergerak dengan kelajuan 328 kaki per saat.

src: If Iran's claims are correct, it would make this missile the fastest underwater missile in the world.
ref: Jika apa yang dikatakan Iran adalah benar, ini bermaksud peluru berpandu ini adalah peluru berpandu dalam air yang terpantas di dunia.

src: Australian Prime Minister John Howard has announced a five year plan costing AU$1.8 billion to address issues with the country's mental health system.
ref: Perdana Menteri Australia, John Howard telah mengumumkan rancangan lima tahun yang bernilai AU$1.8 bilion untuk menangani isu-isu berkaitan dengan sistem kesihatan mental di negara itu.

src: The federal government will improve access to clinical and health services, increase the number of mental health professionals in Australia, create mental health work teams consisting of GPs, psychiatrists, psychologists and mental health nurses, provide respite services for people suffering mental illness and their carers, and introduce new programs for community awareness.
