ref: Kerajaan Persekutuan akan meningkatkan akses kepada perkhidmatan klinikal dan kesihatan, meningkatkan bilangan profesional kesihatan mental di Australia, membentuk pasukan kerja kesihatan mental yang terdiri daripada doktor, pakar psikiatri, psikologi dan jururawat kesihatan mental, menyediakan perkhidmatan tempoh pendek untuk orang yang mengalami penyakit mental dan penjaga mereka, dan memperkenalkan program-program baru untuk kesedaran masyarakat.

src: Mr Howard said the plan addresses issues which fall into its area of responsibility.
ref: Encik Howard berkata pelan itu menangani isu-isu di dalam bidang kuasanya.

src: He hopes that the states and territories will complement the federal government's package by investing in supported accommodation, hospital and emergency services, crisis care services and the provision of mental health care in gaols.
ref: Beliau berharap negeri-negeri dan wilayah-wilayah akan melengkapkan pakej kerajaan persekutuan dengan melabur dalam penginapan sokongan, hospital dan kecemasan, perkhidmatan penjagaan krisis dan penyediaan penjagaan kesihatan mental di pusat tahanan.

src: Under the federal government's plan, psychologists will play a greater role in the mental health system.
ref: Di bawah rancangan kerajaan pusat, pakar psikologi akan memainkan peranan yang lebih besar dalam sistem kesihatan mental.

src: From November, Patients will be able to claim a rebate from Medicare (Australia's universal healthcare scheme) for the services of psychologists if they have been referred by a GP or psychiatrist.
ref: Dari bulan November, Pesakit boleh menuntut rebat daripada Medicare (skim penjagaan kesihatan sejagat Australia) untuk perkhidmatan psikologi jika mereka telah dirujuk oleh GP atau pakar psikiatri.

src: At present patients pay around $100 for a standard 30 minute consultation.
ref: Pada masa ini pesakit membayar sekitar $100 untuk konsultasi 30 minit yang biasa.

src: Mr Howard claims that there is an issue for mental health professionals in treating patients with a substance abuse problem and mental illness.
ref: Encik Howard mendakwa bahawa terdapat isu untuk ahli profesional kesihatan mental dalam merawat pesakit yang mempunyai masalah penyalahgunaan dadah dan penyakit mental.

src: The government will increase the mental health workforce by funding an additional 400 mental health nursing and 200 clinical psychology places.
ref: Kerajaan akan meningkatkan tenaga kerja kesihatan mental dengan membiayai 400 jururawat kesihatan mental tambahan dan 200 tempat psikologi klinikal.

src: The government has promised increase funding for telephone counselling and suicide prevention services, living skills programs and additional support for those with a mental illness who are having difficulty finding or keeping work.
ref: Kerajaan telah berjanji peningkatan dana untuk kaunseling telefon dan perkhidmatan pencegahan bunuh diri, program kemahiran hidup dan sokongan tambahan bagi mereka yang mempunyai penyakit mental yang menghadapi kesukaran mencari atau mengekalkan pekerjaan.

src: The government will also provide 900 personal helpers and mentors, increase funding for living skills programs and provide additional employment assistance to those who have difficulty finding or retaining employment due to their illness.
ref: Kerajaan juga akan menyediakan 900 pembantu peribadi dan mentor, meningkatkan dana untuk program kemahiran hidup dan memberikan lebih banyak bantuan pekerjaan kepada mereka yang mempunyai kesukaran mencari atau mengekalkan pekerjaan kerana penyakit mereka.

src: Hamas, a radical islamist party, has won by a large majority in the Gaza Strip council elections held last month.
ref: Parti radikal Islam, Hamas, telah memenangi majoriti besar dalam pilihan raya majlis Jalur Gaza yang diadakan pada bulan lepas.

src: Fathiya Barghouti Rheime, a 30-year-old high school teacher, and mother of two, was one of the seven Hamas mayors elected in the Gaza strip.
ref: Fathiya Barghouti Rheime, guru sekolah berusia 30 tahun, dan ibu kepada dua orang anak, merupakan seorang daripada tujuh orang datuk bandar yang dipilih di jalur Gaza.

src: She has become the second female mayor of a Palestinian community, and the first ever elected one.
ref: Beliau menjadi datuk bandar kedua di komuniti penduduk Palestin, dan yang paling pertama pernah dipilih.

src: "It's a sign of change," she said.
ref: "Ini merupakan tanda kepada perubahan," kata beliau.

src: In the West Bank, Female candidates won 52 of 306 seats.
ref: Di Tebing Barat, calon Wanita memenangi 52 daripada 306 buah kerusi.

src: Two and a half times the number of seats that had been reserved for women.
ref: Sebanyak dua setengah daripada jumlah kerusi telah dirizab untuk wanita.

src: Legislators in the Massachusetts General Court, their name for the state legislature, approved legislation on Tuesday, April 4, that would make it the first state in the United States to require all residents to have health insurance and impose penalties for non-compliance.
ref: Penggubal undang-undang di Mahamah Am Massachusetts, yang nama mereka untuk badan perundangan negeri, meluluskan undang-undang pada hari Selasa, 4 April, menjadikan ia negeri pertama di Amerika Syarikat yang memerlukan semua penduduk untuk mempunyai insurans kesihatan dan mengenakan penalti jika tidak mematuhi undang-undang.

src: Massachusetts Governor Mitt Romney, a Republican who is expected to run for U.S. President in 2008, is expected to sign the bill.
ref: Gabenor Massachusetts Mitt Romney, seorang Republikan yang dijangka untuk bertanding Presiden Amerika Syarikat pada tahun 2008, dijangka akan menandatangani rang undang-undang itu.

src: The bill passed the lower house, the Massachusetts House of Representatives by a vote of 155-2, and unanimously by the state senate.
ref: Rang undang-undang diluluskan dewan rakyat Massachusetts dengan undi 155-2, dan sebulat suara oleh Senat negeri ini.

src: At least one other state (Hawaii) requires employers to provide employee health insurance, but no other state holds individuals accountable for coverage.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya satu negeri yang lain (Hawaii) memerlukan majikan menyediakan insurans kesihatan pekerja, tetapi tidak ada negeri lain yang memegang sesorang individu bertanggungjawab untuk perlindungan.

src: Medha Patkar, Narmada Bachao Andolan activist in the ninth day of a hunger strike protesting the Sardar Sarovar Project, is forcibly moved to hospital in New Delhi by police.
ref: Medha Patkar, aktivis Narmada Bachao Andolan pada hari yang kesembilan mogok lapar membantah Projek Sardar Sarovar, secara paksa dipindahkan ke hospital di New Delhi oleh polis.

src: On the ninth day of the hunger strike she and two other activists had undertaken to protest the Indian government's decision to raise the height of the Sardar Sarovar dam across the Narmada river and the lack of progress in rehabilitating people displaced by the dam project.
ref: Pada hari kesembilan mogok lapar dia dan dua aktivis lain telah diambil untuk membantah keputusan kerajaan India untuk meningkatkan ketinggian empangan Sardar Sarovar seberang sungai Narmada dan kurangnya kemajuan dalam memulihkan orang pelarian oleh projek empangan.

src: Patkar was taken to the All India Institute of Medical Sciences where she was placed under intensive care.
ref: Patkar dibawa ke Institut Sains Perubatan All India di mana dia telah diletakkan di bawah rawatan rapi.

src: Doctors have said that she is conscious and her condition is stable.
ref: Doktor telah berkata bahawa dia sedar dan keadaannya stabil.

src: Glen Stollery is a New Zealand website developer who created the site ScienTOMogy.info in mid 2005.
ref: Glen Stollery adalah pemaju laman web New Zealand yang mencipta laman web ScienTOMogy.

src: The site, which is a parody of Tom Cruise and his involvement with the Church of Scientology, became the centre of controversy when it was served with a number of cease and desist orders initiated by the Church.
ref: info pada pertengahan tahun 2005. Laman web tersebut, adalah parodi Tom Cruise dan penglibatannya dengan Gereja Saintologi, menjadi kontroversi apabila ia berhadapan dengan beberapa perintah pemberhentian operasi daripada gereja.

src: On March 19, 2006, Glen issued a media release stating that his web hosting provider, YouTube, had removed videos of Tom Cruise which formed part of the site.
ref: Pada 19 Mac, 2006, Glen mengeluarkan kenyataan media yang menyatakan bahawa pembekal pengehosan webnya, YouTube, telah mengeluarkan video yang Tom Cruise merupakan sebahagian daripada laman web tersebut.

src: The release suggested that YouTube had taken this action under external pressure from Cruise or Viacom.
ref: Pelepasan itu menyatakan bahawa YouTube telah mengambil tindakan ini di bawah tekanan luar dari Cruise atau Viacom.

src: The People's Republic of China called on Syrian government forces and opposition in the Syrian uprising, such as the Free Syrian Army, to end the violence.
ref: Republik Rakyat China menggesa tentera kerajaan Syria dan pembangkang dalam pemberontakan Syria seperti Tentera Pembebasan Syria, untuk menamatkan keganasan.

src: "The fact that aid is prevented and access is refused to United Nations officials constitutes another crime," the minister said.
ref: "Hakikat bahawa bantuan dihalang dan akses ditolak terhadap pegawai Pertubuhan Bangsa Bersatu merupakan satu jenayah yang lain," kata menteri itu.

src: Alexander Downer, Australia's foreign affairs minister, told the Cole Inquiry yesterday that it was not his department's job to investigate claims that wheat exporter AWB was paying kickbacks to Saddam Hussein in the lead up to the US-led invasion of Iraq in 2003.
ref: Alexander Downer, menteri hal-ehwal luar negeri Australia, memberitahu Cole Inquiry semalam bahawa ia bukan tugas jabatannya untuk menyiasat dakawaan bahawa pengeksport gandum AWB telah membayar wang sogokan kepada Saddam Hussein yang membawa kepada pencerobohan Iraq yang diketuai Amerika pada tahun 2003.

src: The claims are in stark contrast to a statement made to parliament in February where Mr Downer said "Of course I would have read them".
ref: Dakwaan itu berkontras dengan kenyataan yang dibuat kepada parlimen pada bulan Februari di mana Encik Downer berkata "Memang saya telah membacanya."

src: When asked why the department of foreign affairs and trade did nothing about the allegations first received in 2000, he told the inquiry that his department couldn't investigate AWB and responsibility for the oil for food program laid with the UN.
ref: Apabila ditanya mengapa jabatan hal-ehwal dan dagangan luar negara tidak bertindak terhadap tuduhan yang diterima pada pertama kalinya di tahun 2000, dia memberitahu inkuiri bahawa jabatannya tidak dapat menyiasat AWB dan tanggungjawab untuk program minyak untuk makanan adalah di tangan UN.

src: "The department does not have the legal authority to go into AWB and access their files" he said.
ref: "Jabatan ini tidak mempunyai bidang kuasa untuk memasuki AWB dan mendapat akses ke fail mereka" katanya.

src: The document alleged that Alia may have been paying kickbacks to the Iraqi regime.
ref: Dokumen itu mendakwa Alia telah membayar wang sogokan kepada rejim Iraq.

src: "There is so much intelligence."
ref: "Ada terlalu banyak perisikan."

src: "It's a very major challenge, to deal with intelligence" he said.
ref: "Ia cabaran yang besar, untuk berurusan dengan perisikan" katanya.

src: Mr Downer was also questioned about a cable delivered in June 2003 from US army captain Puckett which claimed that every contract under the UN's oil for food program contained a kickback.
ref: Encik Downer juga ditanya tentang telegram yang dihantar pada Jun 2003 oleh Puckett kapten tentera Amerika yang mendakwa setiap perjanjian di bawah program minyak untuk makanan UN mengandungi wang sogokan.

src: According to Mr Downer it is common practice in his department to have two advisors at such meetings, where one of them takes notes so there is a record of what is said.
ref: Menurut Encik Downer, ia adalah amalan biasa di dalam jabatannya untuk mengadakan dua penasihat di mesyuarat sebegitu, di mana salah seorang daripada mereka akan mengambil nota supaya ada catatan tentang apa yang diperkatakan.

src: He also told the inquiry that he couldn't recall if he noticed that nobody was taking notes as he would have been "focused a little more on the meeting than on somebody taking notes".
ref: Beliau juga memberitahu inkuiri bahawa beliau tidak ingat jika beliau menyedari tiada siapa pun yang mengambil catatan kerana beliau "lebih bertumpu kepada mesyuarat daripada seseorang yang mengambil nota."

src: Yesterday morning, local media reports indicated that his condition was listed as "critical", but a source close to Mr. Knutsen described his condition yesterday morning as "grave".
ref: Pagi semalam, laporan media tempatan menyatakan bahawa keadaan beliau disenaraikan sebagai "kritikal," namun satu sumber rapat Encik Knutsen menerangkan keadaan beliau pagi semalam sebagai "pusara".

src: Mr. Knutsen has performed for many years throughout Texas as a professional clown.
ref: Encik Knutsen telah melakukan persembahan selama bertahun-tahun di seluruh Texas sebagai badut profesional.

src: He made a brief (uncredited) appearance many years ago on one episode of the hit television show In Living Color.
ref: Beliau membuat penampilan ringkas (tanpa kredit) bertahun-tahun lalu dalam satu episod rancangan televisyen terkemuka In Living Color.

src: An Islamic militant web forum has released a videotape of Al-Qaeda's second in command, Ayman al-Zawahiri, who reportedly released the tape to commemorate the battle of Tora Bora in December 2001.
ref: Sebuah forum web militan Islam telah mengeluarkan satu rakaman video pemerintah kedua Al-Qaeda, Ayman al-Zawahiri, yang dilaporkan telah mengeluarkan rakaman itu bagi memperingati perang Tora Bora pada Disember 2001.

src: He appeared in two tapes in January, and in one tape on March 4, 2006.
ref: Dia muncul di dalam dua rakaman pada Januari, dan satu video pada 4 Mac, 2006.

src: However, the body of Atwah has not yet been found and the identities of the others killed are not yet known.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, mayat Atwah masih belum ditemui dan identiti orang lain yang terbunuh masih belum diketahui.

src: It is believed that at least two children were also killed.
ref: Adalah dipercayai bahawa sekurang-kurangnya dua kanak-kanak turut terbunuh.

src: and Abdel Rahman, is accused of being responsible for the bombings of the American embassies in Kenya and Tanzania on August 7, 1998 which killed 20 Americans and at least 200 Africans.
ref: dan Abdel Rahman, dituduh bertanggungjawab atas pengeboman kedutaan-kedutaan Amerika di Kenya dan Tanzania pada 7 Ogos 1998 yang membunuh 20 orang Amerika dan sekurang-kurangnya 200 orang Afrika.

src: "The confirmation is based upon multiple intelligence sources," said Ahmed.
ref: "Pengesahan itu adalah berdasarkan pelbagai sumber perisikan," kata Ahmed.

src: Pakistani forces used missile fire and explosives launched from assault helicopters to kill the expert in the North Waziristan village of Naghar Kalai, which lies near the border of Afghanistan.
ref: Tentera Pakistan menggunakan api dan bahan letupan peluru berpandu yang dilancarkan dari serangan helikopter untuk membunuh pakar itu di kampung Waziristan Utara di Naghar Kalai, yang terletak berhampiran sempadan Afghanistan.

src: However, it is believed that associates of the alleged terrorists killed removed the bodies and buried them in an unidentified location, but at least four tribesmen that were killed were buried in the town's cemetery.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, adalah dipercayai bahawa sekutu pengganas tertuduh yang terbunuh mengeluarkan mayat mereka dan menanam mereka di lokasi yang tidak diketahui, tetapi sekurang-kurangnya empat anggota puak yang terbunuh telah dikebumikan di tanah perkuburan bandar itu.

src: So far, neither the United States FBI nor U.S. officials in Egypt have confirmed the death of Atwah.
ref: Setakat ini, baik Amerika Syarikat FBI mahupun pegawai A.S. di Mesir, masih belum mengesahkan kematian Atwah.

src: A Saudi Arabian man named Abu Marwan al-Suri, 38, suspected of being a senior al-Qaeda "bag man", was killed in a shootout on Thursday, according to the Pakistan army spokesman Major-General Shaukat Sultan.
ref: Seorang lelaki Arab Saudi yang bernama Abu Marwan al-Suri, 38, disyaki ahli senior al-Qaeda "beg lelaki," terbunuh dalam pertempuran pada hari Khamis, menurut jurucakap tentera Pakistan, Mejar Jeneral Shaukat Sultan.

src: It is believed he has been killed at a checkpoint in Khar, a town in the tribal district of Bajaur, Pakistan, when he opened fire on security officials from inside a car.
ref: Adalah dipercayai bahawa dia dibunuh di pusat pemeriksaan di Khar, sebuah bandar di daerah puak Bajaur, Pakistan, apabila dia melepaskan tembakan ke atas pegawai keselamatan dari dalam kereta.

src: According to Sultan, al-Suri opened fire when asked to stop his car.
ref: Menurut Sultan, al-Suri melepaskan tembakan apabila dia diminta menghentikan keretanya.

src: "He was giving them money every three months," said officials.
ref: "Dia memberikan mereka wang setiap tiga bulan," kata pegawai.

src: Pakistani officials say they have his body and that it will be examined to determine its true identity at a hospital in the city of Peshawar.
ref: Pegawai Pakistan mengatakan mereka mempunyai mayatnya dan bahawa ia akan dikaji untuk menentukan identiti sebenar dia di sebuah hospital di bandar Peshawar.

src: Pramod Mahajan, the general secretary of India's main opposition party, the Bharatiya Janata Party, was shot in Mumbai earlier today.
ref: Pramod Mahajan, setiausaha agung parti pembangkang utama India, Parti Bharatiya Janata, ditembak di Mumbai awal hari ini.

src: The attack occurred at Mahajan's residence at around 6:30 a.m. IST (0100 UTC).
ref: Serangan itu berlaku di kediaman Mahajan pada kira-kira 6:30 IST (0100 UTC).

src: His lawyer Nandkumar Rajukar claimed that he was depressed and suffering from some mental trauma.
ref: Peguamnya Nandkumar Rajukar mendakwa beliau tertekan dan mengalami beberapa trauma mental.

src: A senior surgeon at the hospital stated that Mr. Mahajan was still in critical condition and that the next 72 hours would be "crucial".
ref: Seorang pakar bedah kanan di hospital menyatakan bahawa Encik Mahajan masih dalam keadaan kritikal dan bahawa 72 jam seterusnya adalah "penting".

src: There is talk of using the help of doctors from the armed forces, who have better experience in treating bullet injuries.
ref: Terdapat perbincangan untuk menggunakan bantuan doktor dari angkatan tentera, yang mempunyai pengalaman yang lebih baik dalam merawat kecederaan yang disebabkan oleh peluru.

src: Mr. Mahajan's liver was severely injured in the incident, leading to massive blood loss.
ref: Hati Encik Mahajan cedera teruk dalam kejadian itu, yang membawa kepada kehilangan darah yang amat banyak.

src: Praveen Mahajan has been booked under Section 307 of the Indian Penal Code that deals with attempt to murder.
ref: Praveen Mahajan telah ditahan mengikut Seksyen 307 Kanun Keseksaan India yang berurusan dengan percubaan untuk membunuh.

src: Senior politicians from across India are arriving in Mumbai to offer their support to the popular leader.
ref: Ahli politik kanan dari seluruh India tiba di Mumbai untuk memberi sokongan kepada pemimpin popular itu.

src: The Prime Minister of India Manmohan Singh, speaker of the Indian parliament Somnath Chatterjee and the President of India A P J Abdul Kalam have expressed shock over the attack.
ref: Perdana Menteri India Manmohan Singh, Speaker Parlimen India Somnath Chatterjee dan Presiden India APJ Abdul Kalam menzahirkan rasa terkejut dengan serangan itu.

src: Japan brought five pitchers to Canberra for their Australian tour.
ref: Jepun membawa lima pembaling ke Canberra untuk lawatan Australia mereka.

src: Since the last Olympics, Japan has been in a rebuilding period.
ref: Sejak Olimpik yang terakhir, Jepun berada di dalam tempoh pembangunan semula.

src: One of their best pitchers is only nineteen years old.
ref: Salah seorang pembaling terbaik mereka hanyalah berumur sembilan belas tahun.

src: The ACT side included Australian national team members Aimee Murch and Clare Warwick; Olympic bronze medalist Brenda De Blaes; Victorian state team representative, national team member and Olympic bronze medalist Justine Smethurst; and Clare Currie, who narrowly missed the cut for the national team.
ref: Belah ACT termasuk ahli-ahli pasukan kebangsaan Australia Aimee Murch dan Clare Warwick; pemegang pingat gangsa Olimpik Brenda De Blaes; wakil pasukan negeri Victoria, ahli pasukan kebangsaan dan pemegang pingat gangsa Olimpik Justine Smethurst; dan Clare Currie, yang hampir kehilangan peluang untuk ke pasukan kebangsaan.

src: De Blaes started the top of the first with a hit.
ref: De Blaes memulakan separuh masa pertama di dalam yang pertama dengan satu pukulan.

src: Murch was pitching for the ACT to start the bottom of the first.
ref: Murch telah membaling untuk ACT memulakan separuh masa kedua di dalam yang pertama.

src: Number 6 hit a double during this inning, scoring Japan's only run.
ref: Nombor 6 memukul double semasa inning ini, memberikan markah kepada hanya satu larian Jepun.

src: The top of third inning saw numbers 24 and 21 ground out.
ref: Separuh masa pertama di inning ketiga menyaksikan nombor-nombor 24 dan 21 ground out.

src: The bottom of the third saw Japan's first batter ground out, number 8 getting a single on an infield hit, another playing getting an out, and the inning ending with number 11 hitting an infield ground out.
ref: Separuh masa kedua yang ketiga melihat pemukul Jepun pertama ground out, nombor 8 mendapat single di pukulan kawasan dekat, permainan satu lagi mendapat out, dan inning berakhir dengan nombor 11 memukul kawasan dekat ground out.

src: The rest of the game followed much the same pattern.
ref: Permainan selebihnya mengikut corak yang sama.

src: Two players, an ACT player and a Japanese, were struck by balls and required trainers to look at them.
ref: Dua pemain, seorang pemain ACT dan seorang dari Jepun, terkena bola dan jurulatih perlu melihat keadaan mereka.

src: An announcement was made at the end of the game that the match scheduled for tomorrow would start fifteen minutes earlier than the advertised start time of 18:00.
ref: Sebuah pengumuman dibuat di akhir permainan bahawa permainan yang dijadualkan untuk esok akan bermula lima belas minit lebih awal dari masa yang diiklankan iaitu pukul 18:00.

src: The move follows a report into a November 2010 crash that killed a pilot in Alaska.
ref: Gerakan itu berikutan laporan keatas kemalangan pada November 2010 yang membunuh juruterbang di Alaska.

src: The experienced 31-year-old was on a night mission when his aircraft crashed nose-down among mountains.
ref: Juruterbang berpengalaman berusia 31 tahun itu dalam misi malam apabila pesawatnya terhempas hidung-kebawah dikawasan pergunungan.

src: The first was that pulling the ring could require intense effort, the second that it was possible to drop the ring between seats, and the third that pilots in cold-weather gear could struggle to grasp it.
ref: Pertama ialah untuk menarik gegelang tersebut memerlukan usaha sengit, kedua ialah berkemungkinan untuk menjatuhkan gegelang diantara tempat duduk, dan ketiga ialah juruterbang dalam cuaca kesejukan mungkin bertarung untuk mencapainya.

src: Haney's death has been attributed by his employer as the result of his "channelized attention" on getting the main oxygen system to restart after it automatically cut out when it detected engine bay air leaks.
ref: Kematian Haney telah disifatkan oleh majikannya sebagai keputusan kepada "penyaluran perhatian" untuk mendapatkan sistem oksigen utama bergerak semula selepas ianya secara automatik terhenti apabila mengesan kebocoran udara dienjin.

src: The report notes he was conscious and fighting to keep his jet airbourne up until impact.
ref: Laporan mencatat yang dia sedar dan bertarung untuk mengekalkan pesawat tersebut terbang sehingga hentakan.

src: Documents filed with a court in Illinois claim the handle's position is "in an area impossible for a pilot to reach while he or she maneuvered the sophisticated aircraft at speeds exceeding the speed of sound and while he or she experienced forces many times the force of gravity."
ref: Dokumen difailkan dengan mahkamah di Illinois mendakwa yang posisi pemegang adalah "di kawasan yang mustahil untuk juruterbang capai apabila dia mengendalikan pesawat canggih pada kelajuan melebihi kelajuan bunyi dan sementara dia mengalami tekanan berkali ganda melebihi tekanan graviti."

src: The fatal accident is not the only such problem to beset the F-22, which despite being billed by the Air Force as their most advanced fighter has never been deployed to combat since coming into service seven years ago.
ref: Kemalangan yang memmbawa maut bukanlah satu-satunya masalah yang melanda F-22, dimana walaupun dibilkan oleh Tentera Udara sebagai pesawat pejuang terkini mereka tidak pernah digunakan dalam pertempuran sejak berkhidmat tujuh tahun lalu.

src: Three other Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson pilots activated emergency oxygen supplies during "physiological incidents" last month, said a spokesperson for the base.
ref: Tiga lagi juruterbang Pengkalan Bersama Elmendorf-Richardson mengaktifkan bekalan oksigen kecemasan semasa "kemalangan fisiologi" bulan lalu, menurut jurucakap kepada pengkalan.

src: Raptors were grounded nationwide for five months last Summer over the oxygen systems.
ref: Raptor telah dilarang terbangselama lima bulan Musim Panas lepas kerana sistem oksigen.

src: The leader of the main opposition party, Alaksandar Milinkievič, has been jailed for 15 days in Belarus for taking part in an 'unsanctioned rally'.
ref: Pemimpin parti pembangkang utama, Alaksandar Milinkievič, dihukum penjara selama 15 hari di Belarus kerana mengambil bahagian dalam 'perhimpunan tidak sah.'

src: Held every year, it is a traditional forum for expressing political opposition.
ref: Diadakan setiap tahun, ia adalah satu forum tradisional untuk menyuarakan bangkangan politik.

src: At least 6,000 protesters took part, accompanied by riot police.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 6,000 penunjuk perasaan mengambil bahagian, diringi oleh polis perusuh.

src: Demonstrators are said to have asked permission for the rally and to have received authorisation for having the protest on some sites.
ref: Penunjuk perasaan dikatakan meminta kebenaran untuk perhimpunan tersebut dianjurkan dan telah menerima kebenaran untuk membuat bantahan di beberapa tempat.

src: The opposition party has organised numerous demonstrations and rallies, and over 1,000 of their members being arrested.
ref: Parti pembangkang telah menganjurkan banyak demonstrasi dan perhimpunan, dan lebih 1,000 ahli-ahli mereka telah ditangkap.

src: US secretary of state Condoleezza Rice has said the US "condemns this act" and called upon Belarus to act within accepted international principles on the treatment of political opposition.
ref: Setiausaha Amerika Syarikat Condoleeza Rice telah menyatakan bahawa Amerika Syarikat "mengutuk tindakan ini" dan telah mengarah Belarus untuk bertindak mengikut prinsip-prinsip antarabangsa yang diterima atas layanan terhadap pembangkang politik.

src: NATO chief Jaap de Hoop Scheffer has also condemned the action.
ref: Ketua NATO Jaap de Hoop Scheffer juga mengutuk tindakan itu.

src: This follows Romney's win in the Illinois primary on Tuesday, where he beat Rick Santorum by 12 percentage points.
ref: Ini berikutan kemenangan Romney di pilihan raya Illinois pada hari Selasa, di mana beliau menewaskan Rick Santorum dengan mata 12 peratus.

src: In a statement, Bush argued that "now is the time for Republicans to unite behind Governor Romney and take our message of fiscal conservatism and job creation to all voters this fall".
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan, Bush berhujah bahawa "kini adalah masa untuk Parti Republikan bersatu di bawah Gabenor Romney dan mengambil mesej kami tentang konservatisme fiskal dan mewujudkan peluang pekerjaan kepada semua pengundi musim ini".

src: "He has long demonstrated an outstanding ability to bring people together."
ref: "Beliau telah lama menunjukkan kebolehan yang luar biasa untuk memimpin rakyat supaya bersatu".

src: "I therefore take tremendous pride in having earned his endorsement."
ref: "Oleh itu saya berasa bangga dalam mendapatkan sokongan beliau".

src: Fundraising figures have been released for February: Romney raised 12.5 million during the month, and spent $12.3 million on advertising.
ref: Angka pengumpulan dana telah dikeluarkan untuk bulan Februari: Romney mengumpul 12.5 juta pada bulan itu, dan menghabiskan $12.3 juta untuk pengiklanan.

src: In Wisconsin, Romney is reported to be spending $2 million on television adverts compared to Santorum's $50,000.
ref: Di Wisconsin, Romney dilaporkan membelanjakan $2 juta atas iklan televisyen berbanding Santorum sebanyak $50,000.

src: Eleven protesters, including five members of Congress, were arrested on charges of disorderly conduct and unlawful assembly.
ref: Sebelas orang penunjuk perasaan, termasuk lima orang ahli Kongres telah ditahan atas tuduhan perbuatan melanggar peraturan dan perhimpunan haram.

src: "The Sudanese government has shown total disregard for the wishes of the global, civilized community."
ref: "Kerajaan Sudan telah menunjukkan sikap tidak menghiraukan kehendak global, komuniti bertamadun".

src: Democratic House members James McGovern and John Olver of Massachusetts, Sheila Jackson Lee of Texas, and Jim Moran of Virginia were among the others arrested and released after paying $50 fines after being arrested in front of the Sudanese embassy.
ref: Ahli Dewan Demokratik James McGovern dan John Olver daripada Massachusetts, Sheila Jackson Lee daripada Texas, dan Jim Moran daripada Virginia antara mereka yang ditahan dan dilepaskan selepas membayar denda $50 selepas ditangkap di depan kedutaan Sudan.

src: There will be rallies across our country to send a message to the Sudanese government that the genocide must stop.
ref: Perhimpunan akan dijalankan di seluruh negara ini bagi menghantar mesej kepada kerajaan Sudan bahawa pembasmian kaum harus dihentikan.

src: "I want the Sudanese government to understand the United States of America is serious about solving this problem," Bush said.
ref: "Saya mahu kerajaan Sudan untuk memahami bahawa Amaerika Syarikat serius dalam menyelesaikan masalah ini," Bush berkata.

src: About 100 people protested the detention and treatment of 13 men accused of terrorism offences and held at the Barwon maximum security prison, in the state of Victoria, Australia.
ref: Kira-kira 100 orang menunjuk perasaan membantah penahanan dan layanan terhadap 13 lelaki yang dituduh dengan kesalahan keganasan dan ditahan di penjara maxima keselamatan Barwon, di negeri Victoria, Australia.

src: Some of the accused have been held in solitary confinement for 6 months up to and during their trial.
ref: Sebahagian daripada tertuduh telah ditahan selama 6 bulan dalam kurungan persendirian dalam tempoh perbicaraan mereka.

src: The group Civil Rights Defence organised the event with family members of the accused and news reporters as a peaceful protest.
ref: Kumpulan Pertahanan Hak Sivil itu menganjurkan acara ini dengan ahli keluarga tertuduh dan pemberita sebagai bantahan aman.

src: The police said that their main concern was the health and safety of everyone as the protest was being held next to a busy road.
ref: Pihak polis berkata, kebimbangan utama mereka adalah kesihatan dan keselamatan semua orang kerana rusuhan itu diadakan di sebelah jalan raya yang sibuk.

src: The fire fighters were met with laughter and sarcastic applause.
ref: Ahli bomba disambut dengan gelak ketawa dan tepukan sindiran.

src: In a statement read at the protest, one of the accused and his wife (Eman Abdou and Shane Kent) said they were upset at the Australian media for participating in lying to the Australian public and the government for the way they have treated the accused.
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan yang dibacakan ketika tunjuk perasaan, seorang daripada tertuduh dan isterinya (Eman Abdou dan Shane Kent) berkata mereka kecewa dengan media Australia kerana mengambil bahagian dalam pembohongan kepada rakyat Australia dan kerajaan atas cara mereka melayan tertuduh.

src: "I believe the conditions out at the Barwon Prison Acacua Unit are oppressive and inhumane."
ref: "Saya percaya keadaan di Penjara Barwon Unit Acacua adalah menindas dan tidak berperikemanusiaan".

src: "These men have a right to a fair trial, and everyone is innocent until proven guilty," the statement read.
ref: "Orang-orang tersebut mempunyai hak untuk perbicaraan yang adil, dan semua orang adalah tidak bersalah sehingga dibuktikan bersalah," kata kenyataan itu.

src: The statement also went on say that the limited legal visits were often shortened and that the best treated accused are in solitary confinement for 18 hours a day while some are in solitary confinement consistently.
ref: Kenyataan itu juga mengatakan bahawa lawatan berkebenaran terhad sering dipendekkan dan bahawa cara terhadap tertuduh yang terbaik adalah kurungan persendirian selama 18 jam sehari manakala ada yang berada di dalam kurungan secara konsisten.

src: Omar Mehri, the brother of one of the accused spoke at the day's event and talked about verbal harassment and hate mail he and his family have received.
ref: Omar Mehri, saudara salah seorang daripada tertuduh berucap dalam majlis itu dan bercakap tentang gangguan lisan dan mel kebencian yang dia dan keluarganya telah terima.

src: He also talked of his brother being amazed to see grass after 5 months.
ref: Dia juga bercakap abangnya terperanjat melihat rumput selepas 5 bulan.

src: Speakers at the event said the current laws used to prosecute murderers and other criminals should be used to prosecute terrorist suspects and had the same sentiments as Eman Abdou and Shane Kent.
ref: Penceramah di majlis itu berkata undang-undang semasa yang digunakan untuk mendakwa pembunuh dan penjenayah lain boleh digunakan untuk mendakwa suspek pengganas dan mempunyai sentimen yang sama seperti Eman Abdou dan Shane Kent.

src: Omar Merhi, brother of one of the detained said in a statement "My brother and the other arrested men are confused and want to know why they are in Australia's highest security unit for simply practising their religion."
ref: Omar Merhi, abang kepada salah seorang yang ditahan dalam satu kenyataan "Abang saya dan orang-orang lain yang ditahan keliru dan ingin tahu mengapa mereka berada di dalam unit keselamatan tertinggi di Australia hanya kerana mengamalkan agama mereka".

src: The Colombian Caracol Radio reported on January 31, 2005 that the government of Colombia released a detailed document which describes how the FARC operates in Colombia and around the world.
ref: Radio Colombian Caracol melaporkan pada 31 Januari 2005 bahawa kerajaan Columbia mengeluarkan dokumen terperinci yang menerangkan bagaimana FARC beroperasi di Columbia dan di seluruh dunia.

src: The art collection was donated by Dr. Vance E. Kondon and Elisabeth Giesberger to both the Museum of Contemporary Art San Diego and the San Diego Museum of Art.
ref: Koleksi seni itu disumbang oleh Doktor Vance E. Kondon dan Elisabeth Giesberger kepada kedua-dua Muzium Seni Kontemporari San Diego dan Muzium Seni San Diego.

src: Kondon, a former board member of the Museum of Contemporary Art, died in 1997 and Giesberger died in 2011.
ref: Kondon, bekas ahli lembaga Muzium Seni Kontemporari, meninggal dunia pada tahun 1997 dan Giesberger meninggal dunia pada 2011.

src: Kondon was a notable art collector in San Diego, and collected for over 30 years.
ref: Kondon adalah seorang pengumpul seni yang terkenal di San Diego, dan telah mengumpul selama lebih 30 tahun.

src: Roxana Velásquez, SDMA executive director, described their bequeathed collection's "rarity" and said the pieces would add "depth" to the two existing museum collections.
ref: Roxana Velásquez, pengarah eksekutif SDMA, menyifatkan "jarangnya" koleksi yang diwasiatkan kepada mereka dan berkata koleksi itu akan menambah "saiz" kepada kedua-dua koleksi muzium yang sedia ada.

src: The Museum of Art was bequeathed 48 German Expressionist paintings, drawings and prints.
ref: Muzium Seni mewarisi 48 lukisan ekspresionis Jerman, lukisan dan cetakan.

src: In the immediate aftermath of the announcement, the name received much criticism for sounding too much like "wee", an English slang word meaning urine.
ref: Sejurus selepas pengumuman itu, nama yang menerima banyak kritikan kerana sebutannya yang terlalu mirip dengan "wee", perkataan slanga Bahasa Inggeris yang bermaksud air kencing.

src: The northern port of Thessaloniki, Greece's second biggest city, will host the Inter-Balkan co-operation Summit, on the 3rd and 4th of May 2006.
ref: Pelabuhan utara Thessaloniki, bandar kedua terbesar Yunani, akan menjadi tuan rumah Sidang Kemuncak Kerjasama Antara-Balkan, pada 3 dan 4 Mei 2006.

src: On the sidelines of the Inter-Balkan Cooperation Summit, which will take place at the Hyatt Regency Hotel of Thessaloniki, Greek Premier Kostas Caramanlis will meet with his Turkish counterpart Recep Tayyip Erdogan on Thursday in order to discuss bilateral issues, including the Cyprus problem.
ref: Di samping Sidang Kemuncak Kerjasama Antara-Balkan, yang akan berlangsung di Hyatt Regency Hotel Thessaloniki, Perdana Menteri Yunani Kostas Caramanlis akan bertemu dengan rakan sejawatnya dari Turki Recep Tayyip Erdogan pada hari Khamis untuk membincangkan isu-isu dua hala, termasuk masalah Cyprus.

src: Microsoft released today the final version of its new service, MSN Search.
ref: Microsoft hari ini mengeluarkan versi terakhir perkhidmatan barunya, MSN Search.

src: The new features that are available include tabs that allow consumers to target searches to the Web, news, images, music, desktop or Microsoft Encarta.
ref: Ciri-ciri baru yang tersedia adalah termasuk tab yang membolehkan pengguna mensasarkan carian pada Web, berita, imej, muzik, desktop atau Microsoft Encarta.

src: Australian Prime Minister John Howard will visit Banda Aceh this afternoon.
ref: Perdana Menteri Australia John Howard akan melawat Banda Aceh petang ini.

src: He will also hold talks with senior Indonesian ministers who are overseeing relief efforts.
ref: Beliau juga akan bercakap dengan menteri kanan Indonesia yang menyelia usaha bantuan.

src: A five tonne borer drilling machine has been secured in place to drill a one metre hole through the remaining 12-16 metres of rock that fell into the main shaft.
ref: Sebuah mesin pengorek gerudi lima tan telah ditempatkan untuk menggerudi lubang satu meter menerusi baki 12-16 meter dari batu yang jatuh ke dalam aci utama.

src: Meanwhile on the surface, the ever-growing media frenzy in Beaconsfield has forced the mine operators to enforce bag checks of rescuers entering the mine to ensure that no recording devices are taken into the mine.
ref: Sementara itu diatas darat, media terkemuka yang semakin meningkat di Beaconsfield telah memaksa pengusaha lombong untuk menguatkuasakan pemeriksaan beg terhadap penyelamat yang memasuki lombong itu untuk memastikan bahawa tiada peranti rakaman yang dibawa ke dalam lombong.

src: Injuries may impact her chances, but in an interview with her, she did not think it would be a big problem.
ref: Kecederaan boleh memberi kesan kepada peluangnya, tetapi dalam satu temubual bersamanya, dia tidak fikir ia akan menjadi satu masalah besar.

src: The archer found out about her inclusion on the shadow team the night after returning from a concert by her favorite band, Celtic Thunder, in Wollongong.
ref: Pemanah mendapat tahu tentang kemasukan beliau dalam pasukan shadow selepas pulang dari konsert kumpulan kegemarannya, Celtic Thunder, di Wollongong.

src: The National Championships have possible Olympic qualification implications for Ingley as there are more girls on the shadow squad than eligible to compete on the full team at the Olympics, so cuts will be made based on performance at the event.
ref: Kejohanan Kebangsaan mempunyai kemungkinan implikasi bagi kelayakan Olimpik untuk Ingley kerana terdapat lebih ramai perempuan dalam skuad shadow daripada kelayakan untuk bersaing dalam pasukan penuh pada Sukan Olimpik, oleh itu pemilihan akan dibuat berdasarkan prestasi pada kejohanan itu.

src: From here, the three Australian women chosen to represent Australia will compete at the archery team event qualifier in the United States six weeks before the 2012 London Games.
ref: Dari sini, ketiga-tiga wanita Australia dipilih untuk mewakili Australia akan bersaing di acara kelayakan pasukan memanah di Amerika Syarikat enam minggu sebelum 2012 Sukan Olimpik London.

src: The possibility of individual qualification at the Games is another important part of the event, as Australia has only secured one spot for a female archer.
ref: Kemungkinan kelayakan individu pada Sukan itu merupakan satu lagi bahagian penting dalam majlis itu, kerana Australia hanya memastikan satu tempat untuk seorang pemanah wanita.

src: She is hyper focused on the sport at the moment, with archery being her life.
ref: Dia memberi tumpuan yangamat banyak kepada sukan itu pada masa ini, dengan memanah menjadi sebahagian hidupnya.

src: Ingley, who might be related to the historical Robin Hood, is not a stranger to high level international competition, having competed at the 2010 Youth Olympics.
ref: Ingley, yang mungkin mempunyai hubung kait dengan sejarah Robin Hood, bukan orang asing dalam persaingan antarabangsa tahap yang tinggi, pernah bertanding di Sukan Olimpik Belia 2010.

src: This event was the only time she enjoyed substantial media interest, as otherwise archery is largely ignored by the Australian press.
ref: Kejohanan itu merupakan satu-satunya acara yang banyak mendapat liputan media, sebaliknya memanah sangat diabaikan pihak media Australia.

src: She has also competed at the first Youth Olympics, the Junior World Cup and two senior World Cups.
ref: Dia juga pernah bertanding di Sukan Olimpik Belia pertama, Piala Dunia Remaja dan dua Piala Dunia.

src: She has also participated at the 2011 University Games in China and the 2011 Olympic Test Event in London.
ref: Dia juga telah mengambil bahagian di Sukan Universiti 2011 di China dan Olimpik 2011 Ujian Acara di London.

src: She has an American doppelganger, Miranda Leek, and the two are sometimes mistaken for each other at international competitions.
ref: Dia mempunyai wajah seiras dari Amerika, Miranda Leek, dan kedua-dua kadang-kadang tersilap antara satu sama lain pada pertandingan antarabangsa.

src: Ingley cannot drive, as she has not had the time to learn because of her archery focus.
ref: Ingley tidak boleh memandu, kerana dia tidak mempunyai masa untuk belajar disebabkan tumpuan terhadap memanah.

src: Fans of quirky numbers everywhere celebrated recently as the clock struck 01:02:03, 04/05/06 (using the DD/MM/YY date convention).
ref: Para peminat nombor aneh di serata tempat telah menyambut baru-baru ini apabila jam menandakan waktu 01:02:03, 04/05/06 (menggunakan tarikh konvensyen DD/MM/YY).

src: This once-in-a-century event was highlighted in advance by webloggers and websites such as Boing Boing.
ref: Acara sekali dalam satu abad ini telah ditekankan dari awal oleh para penulis laman blog dan laman web seperti Boing Boing.

src: For countries where the MM/DD/YY convention is more common, the event happened a month ago on 5th April.
ref: Untuk beberapa abad di mana konvensyen MM/DD/YY ini lebih biasa, acara ini diadakan sebulan lalu pada 5 April.

src: The date attracted numerous comments when posted to the news website Digg, and the special date has been mentioned by hundreds of thousands of websites, according to a Google search.
ref: Tarikh itu menarik perhatian banyak komen apabila ia diletakkan di laman web berita Digg, dan tarikh istimewa itu telah disebut ratusan orang di dalam ribuan laman web, menurut kepada satu pencarian Google.

src: Whilst 01:02:03, 04/05/06 won't happen again for another hundred years, those who missed out might want to celebrate 06:06:06, 06/06/06 in just over a month's time, unless you're a hexakosioihexekontahexaphobic.
ref: Walaupun 01:02:03, 04/05/06 tidak akan berlaku untuk seratus tahun lagi, bagi mereka yang terlepas mungkin mahu menyambut 06:06:06, 06/06/06 yang akan datang dalam masa sebulan, melainkan anda ada fobia takutkan nombor 666.

src: The United Kingdom Home Secretary Charles Clarke has lost his position in a Cabinet reshuffle by Tony Blair, on the morning after the Labour Party suffered losses in local elections across England.
ref: Setiausaha Utama United Kingdom Charles Clarke telah hilang kedudukannya dalam rombakan Kabinet oleh Tony Blair, pada waktu pagi selepas Parti Buruh kalah dalam pilihan raya tempatan di seluruh England.

src: The news follows two weeks of headlines caused by the release of over 1000 foreign prisoners mistakenly released from prison at the end of their sentence rather than being deported.
ref: Berita itu diikuti dengan dua minggu tajuk utama suratkhabar disebabkan kesilapan melepaskan lebih dari 1000 banduan asing dari penjara di akhir tempoh hukuman mereka daripada dihantar pulang.

src: Current Defence Secretary John Reid will replace Clarke as the new Home Secretary, and Jack Straw will become Commons leader.
ref: Setiausaha Pertahanan sekarang John Reid akan menggantikan Clarke sebagai Setiausaha Utama yang baru, dan Jack Straw akan menjadi pemimpin Commons.

src: A cruise ship caught fire 32 km (20 miles) off the southeast coast of England.
ref: Sebuah kapal pelayaran terbakar 32 km (20 batu) di luar pantai tenggara England.

src: The blaze started in the engine-room of the Calypso, which had 708 passengers and crew onboard.
ref: Kebakaran bermula di bilik enjin dari Calypso, yang mempunyai 708 penumpang dan anak kapal.

src: It was tugged to Southampton by the Anglican Monarch, a tug boat jointly operated by England and France.
ref: Ia ditunda ke Southampton oleh Monarch Anglican, sebuah bot tunda yang dikendalikan bersama oleh England dan Perancis.

src: IAG will have to make concessions after told the EC the deal would be anti-competitive.
ref: IAG perlu membuat konsesi selepas diberitahu EC perjanjian itu akan menjadi anti-persaingan.

src: The deal is set to cost IAG, who also own Iberia,£172.5 million.
ref: Perjanjian itu dijangka menelan belanja IAG, yang juga memiliki Iberia, £172.5 million.

src: IAG intends to use acquired slots at the busy , which serves London, to expand their own routes into Asia.
ref: IAG bercadang untuk menggunakan slot diperolehi di tempat yang sibuk, yang berfungsi di London, untuk mengembangkan laluan mereka sendiri ke Asia.

src: The EC required IAG to surrender a number of flight slots at the airport.
ref: EC memerlukan IAG untuk menyerahkan beberapa slot penerbangan di lapangan terbang.

src: The slots surrendered or made available for lease are for use to destinations in Scotland, France, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and Russia.
ref: Slot diserahkan atau disediakan untuk pajakan adalah untuk kegunaan ke destinasi di Scotland, Perancis, Mesir, Arab Saudi, dan Rusia.

src: The EC also insisted that combined BA/bmi routing be made available for competitors to buy transfer seats upon.
ref: EC juga menegaskan bahawa gabungan jalan BA/bmi disediakan bagi pesaing untuk membeli tempat duduk pindah.

src: Lufthansa intended to shut down bmi had the bid failed.
ref: Lufthansa bertujuan untuk menutup bmi jika tawaran itu gagal.

src: IAG boss called the sale "great news for Britain" with results that are "good for UK business and UK consumers."
ref: Bos IAG memanggil penjualan itu "berita baik untuk Britain" dengan keputusan yang "baik untuk perniagaan UK dan pengguna UK".

src: "Today's rubber-stamping of BA's purchase of bmi shows yet again that the EC has one rule for Europe's flag-carriers, but different rules for Ryanair", said Ryanair chief .
ref: "Pembelian bmi BA yang memberi kelulusan tanpa memberi pertimbangan yang cukup kebelakangan ini menunjukkan sekali lagi bahawa EC mempunyai satu peraturan untuk pembawa-bendera Eropah, tetapi peraturan yang berbeza untuk Ryanair", kata Ketua Ryanair.

src: About 700 AEK supporters boarded the ferry after the end of the Greek football cup final between Olympiacos and AEK which took place in Crete.
ref: Lebih kurang 700 penyokong AEK menaiki feri itu selepas perlawanan akhir bola sepak piala Greek antara Olympiacos dan AEK yang bertempat di Crete.

src: The victory of Olympiacos over AEK, 3-0, angered the supporters of AEK, which is believed to be the catalyst for damage in both the stadium and the ship.
ref: Kemenangan Olympiacos ke atas AEK, 3-0, menaikkan kemarahan penyokong AEK, yang mana dipercayai menjadi pemangkin kepada kerosakan kedua-dua stadium dan kapal.

src: During the trip, a group of youths started breaking everything for no apparent reason.
ref: Ketika dalam perjalanan, sekumpulan pemuda mula memecahkan semua benda tanpa alasa yang jelas.

src: The owner of the ship, Dane Sea Line of Piraeus, estimates the cost of damage to the ship at €150,000.
ref: Pemilik kapal, Dane Sea Line of Piraeus, menjangkakan jumlah kerosakan kepada kapal adalah E150,000.

src: The Greek media has accused the administration of Greek police and the Ministers of Public Order and Shipping of negligence in not doing more to prevent the events.
ref: Media Greek telah menuduh pihak pentadbiran polis Greek dan Menteri Ketenteraman Awam dan Perkapalan disebabkan kecuaian dalam usaha untuk menghalang kejadian itu.

src: In an attempt at a world first twenty short-tailed bats are to be moved by the New Zealand Department of Conservation from the Tararua Ranges to Kapiti Island.
ref: Dalam cubaan pertama didunia untuk memindahkan dua puluh kelawar ekor pendek oleh Bahagian Pemuliharaan New Zealand dari Tararua Ranges ke Pulau Kapiti.

src: If the transfer to predator-free Kapiti works, it will become the first time that bats have ever been trans-located.
ref: Jika pemindahan ke bebas pemangsa Kapiti berkesan, ia akan menjadi kali pertama yang kelawar pernah dipindah lokasi.

src: Conservation Minister Chris Carter said that while the trial was risky, it was also worthwhile.
ref: Menteri Pemuliharaan Chris Carter berkata yang walaupun percubaan tersebut berisiko, ia juga bermakna.

src: In the opening round of the 2012 ANZ Championship this past weekend, the Southern Steel beat the Bay of Plenty Magic in Invercargill, New Zealand by a score of 49–47, while over in Brisbane, Australia, the defending champion Queensland Firebirds lost to the Melbourne Vixens by a score of 47–42.
ref: Dalam pusingan pembukaan ANZ Championship 2012 hujung minggu yang lepas, Steel Southern mengalahkan Bay of Plenty Magic di Invercargill, New Zealand dengan skor 49-47, sementara di Brisbane, Australia, juara bertahan Queensland Firebirds kalah kepada Melbourne Vixens dengan skor 47-42.

src: The wins by the Steel and the Vixens are considered by those who follow the netball league to be major upsets.
ref: Kemenangan oleh Steel dan Vixens dianggap oleh pengikut liga bola jaring sebagai kehampaan utama.

src: The Firebirds' loss this past Sunday was their first in fifteen games extending back to last season.
ref: Kekalahan Firebirds Ahad lalu adalah yang pertama dalam lima belas permainan sejak musim lalu.

src: Going into the game, the teams had played eight games against each other, splitting the record at 4 wins each.
ref: Melangkah ke dalam permainan, pasukan tersebut telah bermain lapan perlawanan terhadap satu sama lain, memecah rekod pada 4 kemenangan masing-masing.

src: The Vixens' win can be credited to several players including English national team player Geva Mentor, and returning Vixen stars Bianca Chatfield and Julie Corletto.
ref: Kemenangan Vixens boleh dikreditkan kepada beberapa pemain termasuk pemain pasukan kebangsaan Inggeris Geva Mentor, dan bintang Vixen Bianca Chatfield dan Julie Corletto yang kembali.

src: Firebird captain Laura Geitz's quality play could not overcome other difficulties on the court for her team.
ref: Permainan berkualiti kapten Firebird Laura Geitz ini tidak dapat mengatasi masalah lain di gelanggang bagi pasukannya.

src: In the Magic versus Steel game, the teams were tied at 44–44 with five minutes left in the game.
ref: Dalam perlawanan Magic menentang Steel, pasukan tersebut terikat pada kedudukan 44-44 dengan lima minit terakhir dalam permainan.

src: The local crowd were behind the Steel, and they finished the game ahead by two baskets.
ref: Orang ramai tempatan menyokong Steel, dan mereka mengakhiri permainan dengan mendahului sebanyak dua jaringan.

src: Silver Ferns member Maria Tutaia was replaced by coach Debbie Fuller in favor of Grace Rasmussen, with Rasmussen making six out of seven shots to help put the game away for her team.
ref: Ahli Silver Ferns Maria Tutaia telah digantikan oleh jurulatih Debbie Fuller kepada Grace Rasmussen, dengan Rasmussen membuat enam daripada tujuh jaringan untuk membantu menjarakkan kedudukan permainan untuk pasukannya.

src: The team's captain Maree Bowden and coach Leigh Gibbs were disappointed in the team's performance but believed there were some positives and room for improvement.
ref: Kapten pasukan Maree Bowden dan jurulatih Leigh Gibbs kecewa dengan prestasi pasukan tetapi percaya terdapat beberapa peluang positif dan ruang untuk penambahbaikan.

src: The West Coast Fever are the only Australian side in the competition to never have won the league's championship, with their best ever finish being seventh in the ten-team competition.
ref: West Coast Fever adalah satu-satunya pasukan Australia dalam pertandingan itu yang tidak pernah memenangi kejuaraan liga, dengan kedudukan terbaik yang pernah mereka dapat adalah tempat ketujuh dalam pertandingan sepuluh pasukan.

src: In September of last year, following the Australian victory at the Netball World Championships held in Singapore in July, the Fever signed Australian national team coach Norma Plummer as the club's new coach.
ref: Pada bulan September tahun lepas, berikutan kemenangan Australia dalam Kejohanan Bola Jaring Dunia yang diadakan di Singapura pada bulan Julai, Fever menandatangani jurulatih pasukan kebangsaan Australia Norma Plummer sebagai jurulatih baru kelab itu.

src: She has sought to instill a greater sense of discipline in her players, not taking excuses for missing practices with the exception of Australian Diamond Susan Fuhrmann who is recovering from a chronic knee injury.
ref: Beliau telah berusaha untuk menanamkan rasa disiplin yang lebih tinggi dalam pemain beliau, tidak mengambil alasan untuk tidak menghadiri latihan kecuali Australia Diamond Susan Fuhrmann yang sedang pulih daripada kecederaan lutut yang kronik.

src: The Tactix are to play the Swifts at home this coming Monday in the second round.
ref: Tactix akan bermain dengan Swifts sebagai tuan rumah pada Isnin ini di pusingan kedua.

src: In the third round, the Tactix will play the Steel, in a game stuff.co.nzs writer Matt Richens believes they can win.
ref: Dalam pusingan ketiga, Tactix akan bermain bersama Steel, dalam stuff.co.nzs penulis Matt Richens percaya mereka boleh menang.

src: In Adelaide this past Saturday, the Adelaide Thunderbirds beat the NSW Swifts by a score of 57–40.
ref: Di Adelaide Sabtu lalu, Thunderbirds Adelaide mengalahkan NSW Swifts dengan skor 57-40.

src: Australian Diamond goal attack Sharelle McMahon has taken the season off from the Vixens as a result of pregnancy.
ref: Australia Diamond penyerang jaring Sharelle McMahon telah mengambil cuti daripada Vixens dalam musim ini akibat kehamilan.

src: Despite entering the match with the burden of having to score 32 points and receiving a bonus point (by scoring four tries), the Bulls managed to overcome fellow South African team, the Stormers, at Newlands Stadium in Cape Town on Saturday May 13, winning the match 43 points to 10 in the final round of the regular season.
ref: Walaupun memasuki pertandingan dengan bebanan perlu menjaringkan 32 mata dan menerima satu mata bonus (dengan menjaringkan empat percubaab), the Bulls berupaya mengatasi rakan-rakan pasukan Afrika Selatan, the Stormers, di Stadium Newlands di Cape Town pada Sabtu 13 Mei, memenangi pertandingan 43 mata kepada 10 dipusingan akhir musim biasa.

src: After the Brumbies, who unlike the Sharks were actually ahead on the number of points, were soundly defeated by the Canterbury-based Crusaders, 33 points to 3, the result meant that either the Sharks or Bulls could mathematically take fourth position on the ladder.
ref: Selepas the Brumbies, yang tidak seperti the Sharks yang sebenarnya mendahului dengan beberapa mata, adalah dengan mudah dikalahkan oleh asal Canterbury-Crusader, 33 mata kepada 3, keputusan ini bermakna samada the Sharks atau Bulls boleh secara matematiknya mengambil tempat keempat diatas tangga.

src: Despite the set back of both prop Danie Thiart and captain Victor Matfield to the sin-bin in the first half, the Pretoria-based Bulls entered halftime leading 26 points to 3.
ref: Walaupun disukarkan dengan kedua-dua pemain tambahan Danie Thiart dan kapten Victor Matfield dikeluarkan padang pada separuh masa pertama, the Bulls-asal Pretoria memasuki separuhmasa mendahului 26 mata kepada 3.

src: Bryan Habana scored the last try, which was subsequently converted and pushed the Bulls into fourth place on the table on points difference.
ref: Bryan Habana menjaringkan cubaan terakhir, dimana kemudian menukarkan dan menolak the Bulls ke tempat keempat dijadual dengan perbezaan mata.

src: The Bulls will now faced the Crusaders in New Zealand next week for a spot in the final, the other spot is to be contested also in New Zealand, between the Wellington-based Hurricanes and the New South Wales Waratahs.
ref: The Bulls akan kini menghadapi the Crusader di New Zealand minggu depan untuk kedudukan di akhir, satu lagi kedudukan akan dipertandingkan juga di New Zealand, diantara the Hurricanes-asal Wellington dan the New South Wales Waratahs.

src: SKY TV had problems earlier with some viewers unable to tune into certain channels.
ref: SKY TV mempunyai masalah awal dengan sesetengah penonton tidak dapat menukar ke saluran tertentu.

src: The problem caused the following channels unable to be seen: Sky Movies, J2, Cartoon Network, Sky News, pay-per-view movie channels, radio channels including; National Radio, Concert FM and George FM.
ref: Masalah itu menyebabkan saluran berikut tidak dapat dilihat: Sky Movies, J2, Cartoon Network, Sky News, saluran filem bayar-setiap-tontonan, saluran radio termasuk; National Radio, Concert FM dan George FM.

src: Most of the free-to-air channels, however, were working, along with the sport channels, some channels did suffer from picture pixelation.
ref: Kebanyakan saluran percuma ke udara, bagaimanapun, boleh diikuti, bersama-sama dengan saluran sukan, beberapa saluran itu mengalami gambar berbintik-bintik.

src: It was to be released on Thursday with the 2006 budget, but since Telecom, a publicly traded company, found out they decided to release it early.
ref: Ia sepatutnya dikeluarkan pada hari Khamis menggunakan bajet 2006, tetapi memanadangkan Telecom, sebuah syarikat dagangan awam, telah mengetahui mereka membuat keputusan untuk mengeluarkan lebih awal.

src: Michael Ryan, May 2, was told to shred a document, but instead of doing that he took it and gave it to Telecom's Group Financial Controller Peter Garty, a close friend.
ref: Michael Ryan, 2 Mei, diberitahu untuk mengoyakkan satu dokumen, tetapi sebaliknya dia membawanya dan memberikan kepada Pengawal Kewangan Kumpulan Telecom Peter Garty, seorang teman rapat.

src: He gave it to Peter Garty because he thought he would find it interesting.
ref: Dia memberikannya kepada Peter Garty dengan andaian dia akan berminat.

src: Michael Ryan told Peter Garty to not make a copy of it.
ref: Michael Ryan memberitahu Peter Garty untuk tidak membuat salinan dokumen tersebut.

src: His actions were described as "gross and disgraceful dishonesty" by Prime Minister Helen Clark.
ref: Tindakannya telah disebut sebagai "jijik dan ketidakjujuran memalukan" oleh Perdana Menteri Helen Clark.

src: News articles frequently discuss some issues but neglect others that might be more critical.
ref: Artikel berita sering membincangkan sesetengah isu tetapi tidak mempedulikan isu lain yang mungkin lebih kritikal.

src: Today the UN issued its third annual list to focus attention on a set of these relatively ignored stories.
ref: Hari ini PBB mengeluarkan senarai tahunan ketiganya untuk menumpukan perhatian kepada satu set cerita yang telah diabaikan berbanding cerita lain.

src: Scientists studying data from the Chandra X-ray telescope have found strong evidence for the missing half of ordinary matter in the universe.
ref: Ahli-ahli sains pengkajian data dari teleskop X-ray Chandra telah menemui bukti kukuh tentang kehilangan separuh daripada jirim biasa di alam semesta.

src: Two immense intergalactic clouds confirm the existence of a cosmic web of hot gas, predicted by computer simulations, containing baryons, the material making up visible objects in the Universe.
ref: Dua awan antara galaksi yang amat besar mengesahkan kewujudan jaringan kosmik gas panas, telah diramalkan oleh simulasi komputer, mengandungi baryons, bahan yang membuat objek boleh dilihat dalam Alam Semesta.

src: Nicastro is lead author of a paper in the February 3, 2005 issue of Nature describing the recent research.
ref: Nicastro adalah penulis utama kertas saintifik dalam Nature isu 3 Februari, 2005 yang menggambarkan kajian terbaru itu.

src: Various measurements give a good estimate of the mass-density of baryons - the neutrons and protons that make up the nuclei of atoms and ions - in the Universe 10 billion years ago.
ref: Pelbagai ukuran memberikan anggaran yang baik tentang jisim kepadatan baryons - neutron dan protonnya yang membentuk nukleus atom dan ion - di dalam Alam Semesta 10 bilion tahun yang lalu.

src: However, sometime during the last 10 billion years a large fraction of the baryons, commonly referred to as "ordinary matter" to distinguish them from dark matter and dark energy, have gone missing.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kadang kala dalam 10 bilion tahun yang lalu, sebahagian besar daripada baryons, biasanya dirujuk sebagai "jirim biasa" untuk membezakan mereka dari jirim gelap dan tenaga gelap, telah hilang.

src: Using the computer predictions, Nicastro and colleagues searched specifically for the diffuse system of gas clouds galaxies and galaxy clusters form within.
ref: Dengan menggunakan ramalan komputer, Nicastro dan rakan-rakan dengan khususnya mencari resapan sistem gas awan galaksi dan gugusan galaksi terbentuk dari dalamnya.

src: The X-ray spectral data showed two hot gas clouds, 150 million and 370 million light years distant, absorbing the X-rays from Mkn 421.
ref: Data spektrum X-ray itu menunjukkan dua awan gas panas, sejauh 150 juta dan 370 juta tahun cahaya, menyerap sinar-X dari MKN 421.

src: The data shows the presence of carbon, nitrogen, oxygen, and neon present in the clouds.
ref: Data itu menunjukkan kehadiran karbon, nitrogen, oksigen, dan neon dalam awan.

src: The distance to Mkn 421 is 400 million light years.
ref: Jarak ke MKN 421 adalah 400 juta tahun cahaya.

src: The UN World Health Organization (WHO) says about 35,000 people have fallen ill, half the victims in the capital of Luanda, where the first cases were detected in February.
ref: Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia (WHO) PBB berkata kira-kira 35,000 orang telah jatuh sakit, separuh daripada mangsa di ibu negara Luanda, di mana kes pertama dikesan pada bulan Februari.

src: The UN say the epidemic is Angola’s worst cholera outbreak in almost two decades continues to rage on with 546 new cases and 31 deaths reported in the last 24 hours.
ref: PBB mengatakan wabak itu adalah wabak taun paling teruk di Angola dalam tempoh hampir dua dekad dan terus merebak dengan 546 kes baru dan 31 kematian dilaporkan dalam tempoh 24 jam.

src: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
ref: Amalan perubatan Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres dan Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia mengatakan bahawa ini adalah wabak paling teruk yang direkodkan di negara ini.

src: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
ref: Jurucakap Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman berkata: "Angola sedang menuju ke arah wabak paling teruk dan keadaan masih sangat buruk di Angola," katanya.

src: "It's very worrying, the official number of deaths countrywide is now more than 1,200, which is likely under-reported.
ref: "Ia amat membimbangkan, jumlah rasmi kematian di seluruh negara kini lebih daripada 1,200, yang mungkin kurang dilaporkan.

src: Many people will be at home and die at home and have no possibility to come to one of our treatment centres."
ref: Ramai orang akan berada di rumah dan mati di rumah dan tidak berpeluang datang ke salah satu pusat rawatan kami".

src: Cholera, an acute intestinal disease caused by ingestion of food or water contaminated with the bacterium Vibrio cholerae, causes copious, painless, watery diarrhoea that can quickly lead to severe dehydration and death if treatment, including rehydration, is not given promptly.
ref: Taun, penyakit usus akut yang disebabkan oleh pengambilan makanan atau air yang tercemar dengan bakteria Vibrio cholerae, menyebabkan cirit-birit, tidak menyakitkan, kehilangan air yang dengan cepat boleh menyebabkan dehidrasi teruk dan kematian jika rawatan, termasuk rehidrasi, tidak diberikan dengan segera.

src: The United Nations Committee against Torture told the United States today that the US should close its detention facility at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba as well as disclose the existence of any secret prisons it operates.
ref: Jawatankuasa Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu Terhadap Penderaan memberitahu Amerika Syarikat hari ini bahawa AS perlu menutup pusat tahanan di Teluk Guantanamo, Cuba di samping mendedahkan kewujudan mana-mana penjara rahsia yang beroperasi.

src: The committee, made up of 10 independent experts has urged the Bush administration to put a stop to the use of torture or cruel treatment during the interrogation of terror suspects.
ref: Jawatankuasa itu, yang terdiri daripada 10 pakar-pakar bebas menggesa pentadbiran Bush untuk menghentikan penggunaan seksaan atau layanan kejam dalam soal siasat suspek keganasan.

src: In an 11-page report, the committee said that the US should not detain anyone in a secret facility under its control.
ref: Dalam laporan 11 muka surat itu, jawatankuasa itu berkata bahawa Amerika Syarikat tidak boleh menahan sesiapa sahaja dalam kemudahan rahsia di bawah kawalannya.

src: The committee also said that the US should disclose and investigate any such facilities.
ref: Jawatankuasa itu juga berkata bahawa Amerika Syarikat harus mendedahkan dan menyiasat sebarang kemudahan itu.

src: It is alleged that the US has a number of secret prisons where suspects are transported to and questioned using techniques that violate international human rights conventions.
ref: Adalah dikatakan bahawa Amerika Syarikat mempunyai beberapa penjara rahsia di mana suspek dibawa ke sana dan mempersoal menggunakan teknik yang melanggar konvensyen hak asasi antarabangsa.

src: The delegation was criticized for failing to comment on questions relating to America's alleged secret prisons.
ref: Delegasi itu dikritik kerana gagal mengulas mengenai soalan berhubungan dengan dakwaan penjara rahsia Amerika.

src: The committee ruled that there was evidence that US military personnel in Iraq and Afghanistan had violated the rights of some detainees.
ref: Jawatankuasa itu memutuskan bahawa terdapat bukti bahawa anggota tentera Amerika Syarikat di Iraq dan Afghanistan telah melanggar hak-hak beberapa tahanan.

src: The committee said that some of the US' techniques had resulted in the deaths of prisoners during the interrogation process.
ref: Jawatankuasa itu berkata bahawa beberapa teknik AS telah menyebabkan kematian tahanan-tahanan dalam proses soal siasat.

src: The committee further claimed that "vague" guidelines had led to abuse of detainees.
ref: Jawatankuasa itu juga mendakwa bahawa garis panduan yang "kabur" telah membawa kepada layanan buruk tahanan-tahanan.

src: According to White House spokesman Tony Snow, the President is waiting for the US Supreme Court to decide on the issue of whether military tribunals or civilian courts would try the detainees.
ref: Menurut jurucakap Rumah Putih Tony Snow, Presiden sedang menunggu Mahkamah Agung Amerika Syarikat untuk membuat keputusan mengenai isu sama ada tribunal tentera atau mahkamah awam akan membicarakan tahanan-tahanan tersebut.

src: After a referendum, the Montenegro region of Serbia and Montenegro declares independence to form the new Republic of Montenegro.
ref: Selepas referendum, rantau Montenegro di Serbia dan Montenegro mengisytiharkan kemerdekaan untuk membentuk sebuah Republik Montenegro baru.

src: Unlike other Balkan states such as Slovenia, Croatia and Bosnia, Montenegro has achieved independence without violence.
ref: Tidak seperti negeri Balkan yang lain seperti Slovenia, Croatia dan Bosnia, Montenegro telah mencapai kemerdekaan tanpa keganasan.

src: "I am convinced Montenegro could be the next country from this region to join the European Union, after Romania, Bulgaria and Croatia, which are further along the process," says Prime Minister Milo Djukanovic, who has promoted Montenegro's independence.
ref: "Saya yakin Montenegro akan menjadi negara seterusnya dari rantau ini untuk menyertai Kesatuan Eropah, selepas Romania, Bulgaria and Croatia, yang mana telah bersama-sama dalam proses ini," kata Perdana Menteri Milo Djukanovic, yang telah mempromosikan kemerdekaan Montenegro.

src: With a population of 650,000, Montenegro is the world's newest country.
ref: Dengan populasi sebanyak 650,000, Montenegro merupakan satu negara baru di dunia.

src: Serbia reluctantly agreed to the split, and the European Union approved.
ref: Serbia dengan rasa berat hati telah bersetuju dengan tindakan pemisahan, dan Kesatuan Eropah juga telah bersetuju.

src: This is the first time Montenegro has been independent since 1916, when it became a part of Austro-Hungary.
ref: Ini kali pertama Montenegro mendapatkan kemerdekaan sejak 1916, apabila ia menjadi sebahagian daripada Austro-Hungary.

src: Soon Serbia, Croatia and Slovenia together formed "Kingdom of Serbs, Croats and Slovenians", which later changed the name into Kingdom Yugoslavia.
ref: Tidak lama kemudian Serbia, Croatia dan Slovenia bersatu membentuk "Negara Serbs, Croats dan Solvenians", yang kemudiannya ditukar nama kepada Negara Yugoslavia.

src: Known for his struggle against French rule, Ben Bella led the nation from 1963 to 1965 having only learned during a prison sentence.
ref: Terkenal dengan perjuangannya menentang pemerintahan Perancis, Ben Bella yang menerajui negara daripada 1963 hingga 1965 hanya mula belajar semasa dipenjarakan.

src: He came from a poor, agricultural background and left school early, but it was during his schooldays he joined Messali Hadj's Algerian People's Party.
ref: Beliau datang daripada keluarga yang miskin, latar belakang petani, dan meninggalkan sekolah pada usia awal, tetapi pada zaman persekolahannya beliau mula menyertai Messali Hadj's Algerian People's Party.

src: Serving in World War II, Ben Bella was decorated with five medals for actions including conflict at the 1944 Battle of Monte Cassino in Italy and shooting down a German aircraft over Marseille, France.
ref: Berkhidmat dalam Perang Dunia II, Ben Bella dihiasi dengan lima pingat kerana khidmatnya termasuk konflik di Pertempuran Monte Cassino 1944 di Itali dan menembak jatuh pesawat Jerman di Marseille, Perancis.

src: The movement was deemed illegal and Ben Bella escaped and fled two years after his 1951 arrest for his part in a fundraising robbery.
ref: Pergerakan itu dianggap tidak sah dan Ben Bella melarikan diri dua tahun selepas ditangkap pada 1951 kerana terlibat dalam rompakan pengumpulan dana.

src: The following year he took control of a one-party nation.
ref: Tahun seterusnya beliau mengambil alih kuasa sebuah negara satu parti.

src: Within years of attaining power, defence minister , an ally of current president Abdelaziz Bouteflika, overthrew Ben Bella in a coup.
ref: Selama beberapa tahun berkuasa, Menteri Pertahanan, sekutu Presiden kini Abdelaziz Bouteflika, menggulingkan Ben Bella dalam satu rampasan kuasa.

src: "Today we lost one of modern Algeria's bravest leaders," said Bouteflika, declaring eight days of mourning.
ref: "Hari ini kita kehilangan salah seorang pemimpin Algeria moden yang paling berani," kata Bouteflika, mengisytiharkan lapan hari berkabung.

src: Successive regimes detained Ben Bella first in prison and later his home from his deposition to 1980 when he left for Switzerland in exile, before being pardoned a decade later.
ref: Rejim berturut-turut menahan Ben Bella pertama di dalam penjara dan kemudian di rumahnya daripada peralihan kuasanya hingga 1980 apabila beliau dibuang ke Switzerland, sebelum diampunkan sedekad kemudian.

src: The Senator says the result came from entirely voluntary action – "no regulations, no levies or additional costs to shoppers."
ref: Senator itu berkata keadaan ini hasil itu terhasil daripada sikap sukarela sepenuhnya - "tiada undang-undang, pengenaan cukai atau kos tambahan terhadap pembeli."

src: "I am delighted that the major supermarkets are committed to achieving the 50 per cent goal by the end of this year."
ref: "Saya amat gembira bahawa pasar raya utama berkomited untuk mencapai matlamat 50 peratus menjelang akhir tahun ini."

src: "I also share their view that development of a viable degradable bag to replace existing lightweight plastic ones is a key to achieving further significant reductions."
ref: "Saya juga berkongsi pendapat dengan mereka tentang pembangunan beg boleh urai bagi menggantikan beg ringan yang tersedia ada adalah faktor utama untuk mencapai pengurangan lanjut yang lebih ketara."

src: Plastics have been widely used in Australia in the past few decades but environmentalists say plastic bags have had a devastating impact on the nation's natural environment.
ref: Plastik telah banyak digunakan di Australia sepanjang beberapa dekad sebelum ini namun pakar alam sekitar menyatakan bahawa beg plastik akan membawa kesan yang buruk terhadap alam semulajadi.

src: Many thousands of marine mammals and seabirds die every year around the world as a result of plastic litter.
ref: Beribu-ribu mamalia laut dan burung laut mati setiap tahun di seluruh dunia akibat pembuangan plastik.

src: The then Federal Environment Minister was reported as saying: "All environmental ministers believe that all plastic bags should be phased out within five years."
ref: Menteri Alam Sekitar Persekutuan pada ketika itu dilaporkan sebagai berkata: "Semua menteri alam sekitar percaya bahawa beg plastik perlu dihentikan dalam tempoh lima tahun."

src: "If this voluntary campaign isn’t working then of course we have to consider what to do (next)…."
ref: "Jika kempen sukarela ini tidak berhasil maka sudah tentu kami harus mempertimbangkan apa yang perlu dilakukan (seterusnya)..."

src: According to family, former United States senator for Texas and former Treasury Secretary, Lloyd Bentsen has died at the age of 85 in his home located in Houston, Texas.
ref: Menurut pihak keluarga, bekas senator Texas Amerika Syarikat dan bekas Setiausaha Perbendaharaan, Lloyd Bentsen telah meninggal dunia pada usia 85 di rumahnya yang terletak di Houston, Texas.

src: Bentsen is most famous for his words during a Vice Presidential debate on October 5, 1988.
ref: Bentsen paling terkenal dengan kata-kata beliau semasa perbahasan Naib Presiden pada 5 Oktober 1988.

src: Bush and Quayle defeated Michael Dukakis and Bentsen in the 1988 elections.
ref: Bush dan Quayle mengalahkan Michael Dukakis dan Bentsen dalam pilihan raya tahun 1988.

src: Bentsen was born on February 11, 1921 and represented the state of Texas for 28 years.
ref: Bentsen dilahirkan pada 11 Februari 1921 dan mewakili negeri Texas selama 28 tahun.

src: These are figures from a nationwide telephone survey of 1200 individuals conducted by Zogby International from Friday, May 12 through Tuesday, May 16, 2006.
ref: Ini adalah angka dari kaji selidik telefon 1200 individu di seluruh negara yang dilakukan oleh Zogby International dari Jumaat, Mei 12 sehingga Selasa, Mei 16, 2006.

src: The results have a margin of sampling error of +/- 2.9.
ref: Keputusan itu mempunyai margin pensampelan kesilapan +/- 2.9.

src: The poll was commissioned by 911truth.org, a single issue website aimed at pinning the blame of 9/11 on the Bush administration.
ref: Pungutan suara telah dijawatkuasakan oleh 911truth.org, sebuah laman web isu tunggal yang bertujuan untuk menyalahkan kejadian 9/11 atas pentadbiran Bush.

src: The results of this Zogby poll were released last Monday (22 May), but went largely unreported by the mass media, possibly due to bias within the source.
ref: Keputusan pungutan suara Zogby ini telah dibebaskan Isnin lepas (22 Mei), tetapi sebahagian besarnya tidak dilaporkan oleh media masa, mungkin disebabkan oleh berat sebelah dalam sumber itu.

src: The U.S. 9th Circuit Court of Appeals on Tuesday ruled that Honolulu's ban on aerial advertising is constitutional and rejected the arguments of a pro-life/anti-abortion group that contended that the ban restricts free speech.
ref: Mahkamah Litar Rayuan Amerika Syarikat ke-9 pada hari Selasa memutuskan pengharaman ke atas pengiklanan udara di Honolulu adalah berperlembagaan dan menolak hujah sebuah kumpulan pro kehidupan/anti pengguguran yang menegaskan pengharaman tersebut menyekat kebebasan bersuara.

src: The Center for Bioethical Reform (CBR) challenged Honolulu's ban, claiming that the ban infringes on their right to public advocacy.
ref: Pusat Pembaharuan Bioetika (CBR) mencabar pengharaman di Honolulu itu, mendakwa pengharaman tersebut mencabul hak mereka untuk advokasi awam.

src: The group planned to fly a plane towing a 100-foot banner showing graphic images of aborted fetuses, and contended that authorization they sought and received from the Federal Aviation Administration authorized the group to fly in all fifty states and Puerto Rico.
ref: Kumpulan itu merancang untuk menerbangkan pesawat yang menunda sebuah sepanduk bersaiz 100-kaki memaparkan imej janin yang digugurkan, dan menegaskan kebenaran yang mereka mohon dan terima daripada Pentadbiran Penerbangan Persekutuan memberi kuasa kepada kumpulan tersebut untuk membuat penerbangan di semua lima puluh negeri serta Puerto Rico.

src: The CBR has driven vans with such images around Honolulu in the past few years.
ref: CBR telah memandu van bersama imej-imej tersebut di sekitar Honolulu sejak beberapa tahun kebelakangan ini.

src: The appeal was argued before the 9th Circuit in Honolulu in November 2005.
