ref: Rayuan itu telah dibantah sebelum Litar ke 9 di Honolulu pada November 2005.

src: Announcing their intent to appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court, Gregg Cunningham, executive director of the CBR, said, "We never expected to get justice in the U.S. District Courts or in Honolulu."
ref: Mengumumkan hasrat mereka untuk merayu kepada Mahkamah Tertinggi Amerika Syarikat, Gregg Cunningham, pengarah eksekutif CBR, berkata, "Kami tidak pernah mendapat keadilan dalam Mahkamah Daerah Amerika Syarikat atau di dalam Honolulu."

src: "If the environmental groups and political leftists who are trying to suppress the truth about abortion think we're going to go away because we lost two cases that we fully expected to lose, they're in for a rude awakening," Cunningham said.
ref: "Jika kumpulan-kumpulan alam sekitar dan golongan politik berhaluan kiri yang sedang mencuba menyekat kebenaran tentang pengguguran berfikir kami akan pergi disebabkan kami kalah dua kes yang kami jangka sepenuhnya kami akan tewas, mereka akan menerima kejutan yang besar," kata Cunningham.

src: Hawaii has had a statewide prohibition on billboards and similar forms of advertising since 1927, and is unique among U.S. states in this regard.
ref: Hawaii mempunyai larangan di seluruh negeri mengenai papan tanda dan bentuk pengiklanan seumpamanya sejak 1927, ianya unik di kalangan negeri-negeri di Amerika Syarikat berkaitan perkara ini.

src: In addition, since 1957, Honolulu has had a comprehensive law regulating the size and content of signs.
ref: Di samping itu, sejak 1957, Honolulu mempunyai undang-undang yang menyeluruh yang mengawal saiz dan kandungan papan tanda.

src: Honolulu Mayor Mufi Hannemann praised the decision, saying, "This obviously has strong implications for our visitor industry to know that when people come here they're going to see things here that really make for an island paradise type of vacation."
ref: Datuk Bandar Honolulu Mufi Hanemann memuji keputusan tersebut, berkata, "Ia jelas sekali mempunyai impak yang besar terhadap industri pengunjung kami untuk tahu bahawa apabila orang datang ke sini mereka akan melihat semuanya di sini adalah benar-benar untuk syurga percutian pulau."

src: Mary Steiner, head of the Outdoor Circle, an environmental group that supports the ban, said, "We have never doubted for a moment the importance of the scenic environment that it is just as important as any of the rest of the environmental issues that are out there."
ref: Mary Steiner, ketua Lingkaran Outdoor, sebuah kumpulan alam sekitar yang menyokong pengharaman itu, berkata, "Kami tidak pernah meragui walau sedetik pun tentang kepentingan persekitaran berpemandangan indah yang sama pentingnya dengan mana-mana masalah alam sekitar yang lain di luar sana."

src: The attorney for the students suing to block use of the test says he still expects to prevail.
ref: Peguam kepada para pelajar yang menyaman untuk menyekat pengunaan peperiksaan berkata dia masih berharap akan menang.

src: "This case is far from over," said Arturo Gonzalez, the lead attorney in Valenzuela vs. O'Connell, in which Liliana Valenzuela, a Richmond High School student, and others sued to block the state's use of the test as a graduation requirement, "We think there is a strong chance that students in the Class of 2006 will receive their diplomas, even if it is after commencement ceremonies."
ref: "Kes ini masih jauh dari pengakhiran," kata Arturo Gonzalez, ketua peguam di dalam kes Valenzuela menentang O'Connell di mana Lilian Valenzuela, seorang pelajar di Sekolah Tinggi Richmond, dan pelajar lain menyaman untuk menyekat negeri dari menggunakan peperiksaan sebagai syarat untuk tamat sekolah, "Kami berpendapat bahawa pelajar Kelas Tahun 2006 mempunyai peluang cerah untuk mendapat sijil mereka walaupun selepas majlis konvokesyen".

src: "They have to stay in school and pass their classes."
ref: "Mereka masih perlu berada di sekolah dan lulus kelas mereka".

src: On May 12, Alameda County Superior Court Judge Robert Freedman agreed with Gonzalez' argument that the state's use of the test as a graduation requirement was unconstitutional because poor and minority students don't have access to equal educational resources, and therefore don't have equal protection under the law.
ref: Pada 12 Mei, hakim Mahkamah Tinggi Alameda County Robert Freedman bersetuju dengan kenyataan Gonzalez bahawa penggunaan peperiksaan sebagai syarat untuk tamat belajar oleh negeri adalah tidak mengikut perlembagaan kerana pelajar miskin dan minoriti tidak mempunyai capaian ke sumber pendidikan yang serupa, maka tidak mempunyai perlindungan undang-undang yang sama.

src: But State Superintendent of Schools Jack O'Connell quickly filed an appeal of Freedman's ruling and asked the State Supreme Court to issue a stay of Freedman's injunction.
ref: Bagaimanapun Penguasa Sekolah Negara Jack O'Connell dengan pantas memfailkan satu rayuan ke atas keputusan Freedman dan meminta Mahkamah Agung Negara untuk menangguhkan injuksi Freedman.

src: Earlier this week, the Court granted O'Connell's request for a stay, allowing schools to deny diplomas to students who haven't passed the test.
ref: Awal minggu ini, mahkamah agung telah meluluskan permintaan O'Connell untuk penangguhan, ini membolehkan pihak sekolah untuk menolak pemberian sijil lulus kepada pelajar yang masih belum lulus dalam peperiksaan.

src: On Thursday, Gonzalez petitioned the Appellate Court to expedite their hearing of the case to as soon as next week, but today the court denied Gonzalez' request and scheduled the case for a hearing on July 25.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, Gonzalez memberi petisyen kepada mahkamah Rayuan supaya mempercepatkan sidang dengar kes itu dengan secepatnya pada minggu hadapan, tetapi mahkamah telah menolak permintaan Gonzalez dan menjadualkan sidang dengar kes pada 25 Julai.

src: In an email to the James Logan Courier, Gonzalez said he thinks his case is strong enough to withstand the appeal.
ref: Di dalam sebuah e-mel kepada kurier James Logan, Gonzalez mengatakan bahawa dia merasakan kes ini cukup kuat untuk menahan rayuan itu.

src: "I will communicate with districts today to ensure they are aware that the exit exam is a graduation requirement" he said, "Students who have worked hard to pass this exam will be given a diploma that signifies their mastery of essential skills in reading and math."
ref: "Saya akan menghubungi daerah-daerah pada hari ini untuk memastikan bahawa mereka sedar yang peperiksaan akhir ini adalah syarat untuk tamat sekolah" kata beliau, "Pelajar yang telah berusaha keras untuk lulus peperiksaan ini akan diberikan sijil lulus bagi menandakan penguasaan kemahiran asas mereka dalam membaca dan matematik".

src: The two journalists, cameraman Paul Douglas and soundman James Brolan, both British, were embedded with the American 4th Infantry Division and were on a routine patrol when a nearby car packed with explosives was detonated.
ref: Dua wartawan tersebut, jurukamera Paul Douglas dan jurubunyi James Brolan, kedua-duanya orang British, telah mengikut serta Divisyen Infantri Ke-4 Amerika, sedang membuat rondaan rutin apabila kereta berdekatan yang dipenuhi dengan letupan telah diledakkan.

src: An U.S. army officer and an Iraqi interpreter were also killed.
ref: Seorang pegawai tentera Amerika dan seorang pentafsir Iraq juga terbunuh.

src: This compares to sixty-nine reporters killed during World War Two, and sixty-three in Vietnam.
ref: Ini berbeza dengan enam puluh sembilan wartawan terbunuh semasa Perang Dunia Kedua, dan enam puluh tiga di Vietnam.

src: A man in Rotorua today was shot after being involved in a crash outside the Rotorua International Stadium.
ref: Lelaki di Rotorua hari ini telah ditembak selepas terlibat dalam kemalangan di luar Stadium Internasional Rotorua.

src: Witness Alby King said "I just heard this big car crash, and we had a look and there was two guys fighting, and one just shot the other in the back of the head."
ref: Saksi Alby King berkata "Saya cuma mendengar kemalangan kereta besar ini, dan ada dua orang yang bergaduh, dan seorang daripadanya menembak seorang yang lain di belakang kepala".

src: The man, who was shot, survived the shooting and is in serious but stable condition at hospital.
ref: Lelaki, yang ditembak, terselamat dari tembakan tersebut dan berada dalam keadaan yang serius tetapi stabil di hospital.

src: The police say they have arrested a 38-year-old in relation to the shooting, he was found in a street nearby after fleeing the scene.
ref: Polis berkata bahawa mereka telah menahan lelaki yang berusia 38 tahun yang mana berkait dengan penembakan tersebut, dia ditemui di jalan berhampiran selepas melarikan diri dari tempat kejadian.

src: Between 3,000 (police estimate) and 8,000 people (organiser's estimate) took to the streets in Gießen, Germany today, protesting the planned introduction of tuition fees at Hessian universities.
ref: Antara 3,000 (anggaran pihak polis) hingga 8,000 orang (anggaran penganjur) berkumpul di jalan di GieBen, Jerman hari ini untuk membantah rancangan pengenalan yuran kelas di universiti-universiti Hessian.

src: They occupied the office of the Regierungsbezirk and the city office.
ref: Mereka memenuhi pejabat Regierungsbezirk dan pejabat bandaraya.

src: From 4 to 7pm, at least 200 people also blocked the Berliner Platz, the most important inner city crossing, bringing most of the downtown bus and car traffic to a standstill.
ref: Dari 4 hingga 7 petang, sekurang-kurangnya 200 orang juga menghalang Berliner Platz, laluan jalan terpenting di kawasan utama dalaman bandar menyebabkan kebanyakan pergerakan bas bandar dan kereta terhenti.

src: The crowd dispersed after the police threatend several times to clear the crossing by force.
ref: Orang ramai bersurai selepas pihak polis mengugut beberapa kali akan mengosongkan jalan dengan kekerasan.

src: Students unions from all parts of Hesse called for the joint demonstration in Gießen.
ref: Persatuan pelajar dari semua kawasan Hesse menyeru untuk demonstrasi gabungan di GieBen.

src: In July, the Hessian state legislature is due to pass a bill that would require all undergraduate students to pay a tuition fee of 500€ per semester; graduate students could be charged up to 1,500€.
ref: Pada bulan Julai, badan undang-undang Hessian akan mengeluarkan rang undang-undang baru yang memerlukan semua pelajar ijazah sarjana muda untuk membayar yuran belajar sebanyak 500 Euro per semester; pelajar sarjana pula perlu membayar sehingga 1,500 Euro.

src: Taken in 2002 and 2006, the photos starkly contrast the previous built-up area with the empty scrubland that remains.
ref: Diambil pada tahun 2002 dan 2006, gambar-gambar itu dengan jelasnya membezakan kawasan binaan sebelumnya dengan tanah semak-samun kosong yang tinggal.

src: Residents of Porta Farm had fought eviction in the past, winning judgements from the High Court of Zimbabwe that they should not be evicted unless the government provided suitable alternative accommodation.
ref: Penduduk Porta Farm telah berjuang melawan pengusiran pada masa lalu, memenangi penghakiman daripada Mahkamah Tinggi Zimbabwe bahawa mereka tidak boleh diusir kecuali kerajaan menyediakan penginapan alternatif yang sesuai.

src: However the High Court dismissed a contempt of court action that attempted to stop the 2005 evictions, giving no reason.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun Mahkamah Tinggi menggugurkan suatu penghinaan tindakan mahkamah yang cuba untuk menghentikan pengusiran 2005, tanpa memberi sebab.

src: He presented his diagnosis yesterday at the annual meeting of the American Association of Anatomists in San Diego.
ref: Beliau menyampaikan diagnosis itu semalam dalam mesyuarat tahunan Kesatuan Anatomis America di San Diego.

src: Asherman's syndrome is normally caused by a trauma to the uterus that results in internal scar tissue.
ref: Sindrom Asherman biasanya disebabkan oleh trauma terhadap uterus yang mengakibatkan luka tisu dalaman.

src: For example, it can occur after multiple procedures to clear the uterus after a miscarriage or abortion, which is known as a "D & C" procedure.
ref: Contohnya, ia akan berlaku selepas beberapa prosedur untuk membersihkan uterus selepas keguguran atau pengguguran yang dikenali sebagai prosedur "D&C."

src: Antelo said Kahlo tried to have children many times and her miscarriages, as well as three therapeutic abortions, could have further aggravated the scarring.
ref: Antelo berkata Kahlo cuba untuk mendapatkan anak beberapa kali tetapi keguguran, dan juga tiga terapi pengguguran, mungkin menyebabkan kecederaan itu menjadi lebih teruk.

src: "She kept attempting to have children with a uterus that wasn't in any condition to do that," Antelo said.
ref: "Dia terus cuba untuk mendapatkan anak dengan uterus yang tidak berkeadaan demikian," kata Antelo.

src: Antelo, who has been working on connections between art and medicine, says that Kahlo brought her infertility to the canvas and this can be seen in her many paintings of reproductive organs or in her depiction of her own bleeding body in the 1932 painting Henry Ford Hospital.
ref: Antelo, yang sudah berkhidmat dalam perhubungan diantara seni dan perubatan, berkata bahawa Kahlo membawa kemandulannya ke kanvas dan boleh dilihat dalam kebanyakan lukisannya tentang organ pembiakan atau gambarannya berkenaan tubuh yang berdarah didalam lukisan Hospital Henry Ford tahun 1932.

src: In that image, Kahlo is shown lying on a hospital bed with multiple umbilical cords extending from her body and each one holds an object or body part, except one holding a baby.
ref: Dalam imej tersebut, Kahlo dilihat berbaring diatas katil hospital dengan beberapa tali pusat dipanjangkan dari badannya dan setiap satu memegang satu objek atau bahagian badan, kecuali satu yang memegang seorang bayi.

src: The footage allegedly was on-air thrice last October and triggered multiple complaints to police.
ref: Rakaman ini didakwa adalah ke udara tiga kali Oktober lalu dan mencetuskan pelbagai aduan kepada polis.

src: Police had visited CCN offices in Port of Spain twice last year seeking the tape.
ref: Polis telah melawat pejabat CCN di Port of Spain dua kali tahun lepas mencari pita.

src: Alleyne issued a message to The Trinidad Express criticising the decision not to grant him bail until he appears in court.
ref: Alleyne mengeluarkan mesej kepada The Trinidad Express mengkritik keputusan untuk tidak memberinya jaminan sehingga dia muncul di mahkamah.

src: He said it "is really a sad state of affairs on the part of the police."
ref: Beliau berkata, "ianya adalah benar-benar hal ehwal di pihak polis dalam keadaan yang sedih".

src: "What have I done that they have seen it fit to ensure that I'm only granted bail before a magistrate?"
ref: "Apa yang telah saya lakukan bahawa mereka telah patut melihat untuk memastikan bahawa saya hanya dibenarkan ikat jamin ke hadapan majistret"?

src: In the United States, the state of Connecticut has repealed the death penalty, becoming the seventeenth state in the U.S. to do so.
ref: Di Amerika Syarikat, negeri Connecticut telah memansuhkan hukuman mati, menjadi negeri ketujuhbelas di U.S. melakukannya.

src: "This afternoon I signed legislation that will, effective today, replace the death penalty with life in prison without the possibility of release as the highest form of legal punishment in Connecticut."
ref: "Tengahari ini saya menandatangani undang-undang yang akan, berkuat kuasa hari ini, menggantikan hukuman mati dengan penjara seumur hidup tanpa kemungkinan dibebaskan sebagai hukuman tertinggi di Connecticut."

src: In future convictions, the death penalty will be replaced with life imprisonment with no possibility of parole.
ref: Dalam hukuman masa depan, hukuman mati akan digantikan dengan penjara seumur hidup tanpa kemungkinan parol.

src: However, despite the state's decision, prisoners currently serving a death row sentence are still set to be executed as planned.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, walaupun keputusan negeri, banduan yang sedang menjalani hukuman mati masih akan dilaksanakan seperti dirancangkan.

src: Currently in Connecticut, eleven prisoners are serving a death row sentence, all of them men.
ref: Buat masa ini di Connecticut, sebelas tahanan sedang menjalani hukuman mati, semuanya lelaki.

src: The senate had passed the measure just seven days before.
ref: Ahli Senat telah meluluskan tindakan tersebut hanya tujuh hari sebelumnya.

src: Jodi Rell, then Connecticut's governor, blocked a prior attempt at repeal by state lawmakers in 2009.
ref: Jodi Rell, bekas gabenor Connecticut, menyekat percubaan sebelumnya untuk memansuhkan oleh ahli parlimen negeri pada 2009.

src: Only one person in Connecticut has been executed since 1976, when the U.S. government reinstated the death penalty after the U.S. Supreme Court upheld capital punishment.
ref: Hanya seorang sahaja yang pernah dihukum mati di Connecticut sejak 1976, apabila kerajaan U.S. mengenalkan semula hukuman mati selepas Mahkamah Persekutuan U.S. mengekalkan hukuman mati.

src: "As our state moves beyond this divisive debate, I hope we can all redouble our efforts and common work to improve the fairness and integrity of our criminal justice system, and to minimize its fallibility," added Malloy.
ref: "Dengan negeri kita bergerak melangkaui perdebatan berbelah bahagi ini, saya berharap kita semua dapat menggandakan usaha kita dan kerja sama untuk meningkatkan keadilan dan integriti sistem keadilan jenayah kita, dan untuk meminimakan fallibilitinya," tambah Malloy.

src: On June 5, gunmen, who had posed as police officers, raided a bus station in central Baghdad and captured 50 people.
ref: Pada 5 Jun, beberapa orang lelaki bersenjata, yang menyamar sebagai seorang anggota polis, menyerbu sebuah stesen bas di pusat bandar Baghdad dan menangkap 50 orang.

src: Attackers raided bus stations and seized travellers and local vendors.
ref: Penyerang-penyerang menyerbu stesen bas serta menawan pelancong dan peniaga tempatan.

src: This happened a day after 21 people were dragged off buses and killed in Diyala province.
ref: Ini berlaku sehari selepas 21 orang diheret keluar dari bas lalu dibunuh di daerah Diyala.

src: Of the 50 people, there are two Syrians and one is an Interior Ministry official.
ref: Daripada 50 orang tersebut, terdapat dua warga Syria dan salah seorangnya pegawai Kementerian Dalam Negara.

src: The gunmen rounded up people from the area including people from the many travel agencies that populate the area.
ref: Penjenayah bersenjata tersebut mmengumpul orang-orang dari kawasan tersebut termasuk orang daripada pelbagai agensi pelancongan yang menduduki kawasan itu.

src: The people were then herded into cars and taken away.
ref: Orang-orang tersebut kemudiannya diiring ke dalam kereta-kereta dan dibawa lari.

src: "They took all the workers from the company and nearby shops," says Haidar Mohammed Eleibi, who works for the Swan Transportation Co. in the Salihiya business district.
ref: "Mereka mengambil semua pekerja dari syarikat itu dan kedai-kedai berdekatan," kata Haidar Mohammed Eleibi, yang bekerja dengan Syarikat Pengangkutan Swan dalam daerah perniagaan Salihiya.

src: Most of the buses at the station were headed to Jordan, Syria and Lebanon.
ref: Kebanyakan bas di stesen tersebut menghala ke Jordan, Syria dan Lebanon.

src: The United States Senate has defeated a proposed constitutional amendment banning gay marriage.
ref: Senat Amerika Syarikat telah mengalahkan usul pindaan untuk melarang perkahwinan homoseksual.

src: The bill fell 18 votes short of the 67 that were needed for approval.
ref: Rang undang-undang itu kekurangan 18 undian daripada 67 yang diperlukan untuk kelulusan.

src: In order for the bill to become part of the U.S. Constitution, this bill would have had to be approved by a two-thirds majority in both the Senate and the House of Representatives, then be approved by the legislatures of three fourths (that is, 38) of the States.
ref: Untuk rang undang-undang itu menjadi sebahagian Perlembangaan A.S. rang undang-undang ini harus diluluskan oleh majoriti dua pertiga di kedua-dua Senat dan Dewan Perwakilan, kemudian diluluskan oleh badan perundangan tiga perempat (iaitu, 38) oleh Negeri-negeri.

src: The bill would define marriage as between a man and a woman, and would preclude the official recognizing of same-sex marriages.
ref: Rang undang-undang ini akan mentakrifkan perkahwinan sebagai di antara seorang lelaki dan seorang perempuan, dan akan menghalang perestuan perkahwinan sama jantina secara rasmi.

src: It is now up to Northern Ireland Secretary of State Peter Hain to choose the next course of action.
ref: Ia sekarang terpulang kepada Setiausaha Negeri Ireland Utara Peter Hain untuk memilih langkah berikutnya.

src: The committee, known as the Preparation for Government Committee, convened Monday to begin its first task: the election of a chairperson for the committee.
ref: Jawatankuasa tersebut, dikenali sebagai Jawatankuasa Persediaan untuk Kerajaan, ditubuhkan Isnin untuk memulakan tugas pertama: pemilihan pengerusi untuk jawatankuasa tersebut.

src: The committee is made up of the two republican parties (Sinn Féin and SDLP), the two unionist parties (DUP and UUP) and the non-sectarianist Alliance Party.
ref: Jawatankuasa tersebut terdiri daripada dua parti republik (Sinn Fein dan SDLP), dua parti kesatuan (DUP dan UUP) dan Parti Perikatan tidak terikat.

src: However, Bell stated that it would inappropriate for her to take the post and refused.
ref: Tetapi, Bell menyatakan ia tidak sesuai untuknya menyandang jawatan tersebut dan menolaknya.

src: They also suggested the DUP MP for South Antrim William McCrea and Alliance Party leader David Ford as possible candidates.
ref: Mereka juga mencadangkan MP DUP untuk Antrim Selatan William McCrea dan ketua Parti Pakatan David Ford sebagai bakal calon.

src: Peter Hain called the refusal of parties to cooperate "frustrating."
ref: Peter Hain memanggil penolakan parti-parti untuk bekerjasama "mengecewakan".

src: "Yet again the DUP, instead of helping to remove obstacles to devolution, have shown themselves to be nothing but obstructive and lacking in any spirit of co-operation," said Sean Farren of the SDLP.
ref: "Sekali lagi DUP, daripada membantu menghilangkan halangan untuk penurunan, menunjukkan mereka tidak lebih dari halangan dan kekurangan semangat kerjasama," kata Sean Farren dari SDLP.

src: "If the DUP is not prepared to do the business or give any substantive indication in the course of June, then the British government would be as well stopping the salaries at the end of June," said Sinn Fein's Martin McGuinness.
ref: "Jika DUP tidak bersedia untuk berurusan atau memberikan sebarang indikasi substantif sehingga Jun, maka kerajaan British mungkin patut memberhentikan gaji pada hujung Jun," kata Martin McGuinness dari Sinn Fein.

src: "The practical reality is that the two biggest parties have not shown they are prepared to move forward at all."
ref: "Realiti praktikalnya ialah dua parti terbesar masih langsung tidak menunjukkan mereka bersedia untuk melangkah kehadapan".

src: "The prevarication and petty wriggling by the DUP is preventing the potential for progress and holding us all up to public ridicule."
ref: "Perbuatan berdalih dan agak putar belit oleh DUP menghalang kemungkinan kemajuan dan meletakkan kami menjadi ejekan orang awam".

src: On Monday, Ian Paisley asked for extension of the November 24 deadline fot two weeks.
ref: Pada Isnin, Ian Paisley meminta melanjutkan tarikh akhir 24 November untuk dua minggu.

src: This is part of plan by British Prime Minister Tony Blair and Irish Toaiseach Bertie Ahern to set up a devolved government in Northern Ireland after its assembly was suspended in October 2002 over allegations of a IRA spy ring.
ref: Ini adalah sebahagian rancangan Perdana Menteri British Tony Blair dan Timbalan Perdana Menteri Irish Bertie Ahern untuk mengakibatkan penurunan kerajaan di Ireland Utara selepas perhimpunan digantung pada Oktober 2002 atas dakwaan jaringan pengintip IRA.

src: If a plan for devolved government is not setup by November 24, direct rule from London will continue with greater input from the Republic of Ireland.
ref: Jika rancangan menjatuhkan kerajaan tidak ditubuhkan sehingga 24 November, pemerintahan langsung dari London akan diteruskan dengan input lebih besar dari Ireland.

src: The price for a barrel of oil dropped after news broke that Al Qaeda's leader in Iraq Abu Musab al-Zarqawi had been killed in a US airstrike Thursday.
ref: Harga bagi satu tong minyak jatuh selepas tersebar berita bahawa pemimpin Al Qaeda di Iraq Abu Musab al-Zarqawi telah terbunuh dalam sebuah serangan udara A.S. hari ini.

src: The death of al-Zarqawi seems to have been interpreted by the market as good news for the future supply of oil from the region.
ref: Kematian al-Zarqawi seolah-olah telah ditafsirkan oleh pasaran sebagai berita baik untuk bekalan masa depan minyak dari rantau ini.

src: Today on the New York Mercantile Exchange light crude futures for July dropped from over $70 a barrel to a low of $69.54 before rising to $69.63 for a $1.19 loss.
ref: Hari ini di Pertukaran Perdagangan Niaga New York minyak mentah ringan untuk Julai menurun daripada lebih daripada $70 satu tong kepada paras serendah $69.54 sebelum meningkat kepada $69.63 untuk kerugian $1.19.

src: "There's less of a terror threat in Iraq now," said Naohiro Niimura, vice president of energy derivatives at Mizuho Corporate Bank Ltd, in Tokyo, who gave his reason for the fall.
ref: "Terdapat kurang ancaman keganasan di Iraq sekarang," kata Naohiro Niimura, naib presiden tenaga derivatif di Bank Korporat Mizuho Ltd, di Tokyo, yang memberikan sebab baginya terhadap penurunan itu.

src: Iraq lies over one-third of known oil reserves but since the Iraq war in 2003 has been unable to pump more than 2 million barrels a day - 1 million less than prior to the coalition invasion.
ref: Iraq terletak diatas lebih satu pertiga daripada rizab minyak yang diketahui tetapi sejak perang Iraq pada tahun 2003 lebih daripada 2 juta tong sehari telah tidak dapat dipam - 1juta kurang daripada sebelum pencerobohan gabungan itu.

src: In May exports were said to be 1.5 million bpd.
ref: Pada bulan Mei eksport dikatakan 1.5 juta tong sehari.

src: The line on a graph that plotted oil price had done a steady incline over recent years, though many factors are involved in the price of a barrel of oil so it is almost impossible to say how much the troubles in Iraq contributed to this rise.
ref: Garis pada graf yang diplotkan harga minyak memberikan tanjakan yang stabil sejak beberapa tahun kebelakangan ini, walaupun banyak faktor yang terlibat dalam harga satu tong minyak jadi ia adalah hampir mustahil untuk mengatakan sebanyak mana masalah di Iraq menyumbang kepada peningkatan ini.

src: Iraq's exports make up the largest proportion of its Gross Domestic Product and a significant proportion of world supply.
ref: Eksport Iraq membentuk bahagian terbesar Keluaran Dalam Negara Kasar dan sebahagian besar daripada bekalan dunia.

src: Investors were said to have been worried about developing in the country citing lack of security and legal protection.
ref: Para pelabur dikatakan bimbang tentang pembangunan di negara ini memetik kekurangan keselamatan dan perlindungan undang-undang.

src: Al-Zarqawi, known for videotaped beheadings, suicide bombing campaigns against coalition forces and civilians and reportedly some attacks on oil infrastructure inside Iraq, had claimed responsibility for bombing three hotels in Amman, Jordan.
ref: Al-Zarqawi, yang dikenali daripada rakaman video pemenggalan kepala, kempen pengeboman berani mati menentang kerjasama tentera penceroboh dan orang awam dan dilaporkan beberapa serangan ke atas infrastruktur minyak di Iraq, telah didakwa bertanggungjawab bagi pengeboman tiga hotel di Amman, Jordan.

src: In a small-scale trial on humans, American scientists say they may have developed a new drug that could stop the spread of HIV and "rapidly clears" the blood of the virus.
ref: Di dalam satu ujian atas manusia berskala kecil, saintis Amerika berkata mereka telah mencipta ubat baru yang mungkin boleh menghentikan penyebaran HIV dan "dengan cepat membersihkan" darah daripada virus tersebut.

src: "There is a lot of interest in this product," said editor Keith Alcorn of the National Aids Manual.
ref: "Terdapat banyak kepentingan di dalam produk ini," kata editor National Aids Manual Keith Alcorn.

src: The drug called PA-457, which is derived from betulinic acid and comes from by-products from paper manufacturers, is being manufactured and developed by Maryland drug manufacturer Panacos Pharmaceuticals.
ref: Ubat tersebut yang dipanggil PA-457, yang dihasilkan daripada asid betulinik dan datang daripada hasil sampingan perkilangan kertas, sedang diperbuat dan diperkembangkan oleh kilang perubatan Panacos Pharmaceutical di Maryland.

src: The drug is known as a maturation inhibitor, which is a new group of drugs.
ref: Ubat tersebut yang dikenali sebagai perencat kematangan, merupakan sebuah kumpulan ubat baru.

src: The drug exposes the inner genetic material by making holes in the coating of the virus essentially causing it to break down and disabling its ability to be passed from one human to the next.
ref: Ubat tersebut mendedahkan bahan genetik dalaman dengan membuat lubang pada salutan virus itu pada dasarnya menyebabkan ia rosak dan hilang keupayaan untuk merebak dari seorang kepada orang lain.

src: "It's a truly novel new class of drugs, and I really support their development."
ref: "Ia benar-benar merupakan penemuan ubat kelas baru, dan saya sangat menyokong pembangunan mereka".

src: "If PA-457 turns out to be non-toxic, easy to use and not to select for resistance, it will find good use," said Charles Boucher who researches HIV at Utrecht university medical center in the Netherlands.
ref: "Sekiranya PA-457 didapati tidak bertoksik, mudah digunakan dan tidak dipilih untuk membentuk rintangan, ia mempunyai kegunaan yang bagus," kata Charles Boucher yang merupakan penyelidik HIV di pusat perubatan universiti Utrecht di Belanda.

src: "It stops the virus by interfering in one of the final stages in its assembly and stops it from 'budding out' from the wall of a cell," said Alcorn.
ref: "Ia memberhentikan virus tu dengan mengganggu salah satu peringkat akhir pemasangannya dan memberhentikannya daripada bertunas keluar daripada dinding sel," kata Alcorn.

src: Scientists are expected to begin a larger scale test on 48 people in one month, whose drugs are no longer working; however, the drug itself is not likely to be available for wide-scale use for at least 3 years.
ref: Saintis berjangka untuk memulakan ujian berskala besar ke atas 48 orang dalam satu bulan, yang ubat mereka tidak lagi berkesan; bagaimanapun, ubat itu sendiri berkemungkinan tidak tersedia untuk kegunaan skala besar untuk sekurang-kurangnya 3 tahun.

src: Test subjects will be administered either a placebo or PA-457 that will be taken in combination with the medication they already take.
ref: Subjek ujian akan diberikan sama ada plasebo atau PA-457 yang akan diambil bersama dengan ubat-ubatan yang mereka makan.

src: "This provides the basis for future studies that will be designed to provide a detailed understanding of the interaction between PA-457 and its target as well as insights into the design of new generations of maturation inhibitors," said CEO of Panacos Pharmaceuticals, Graham Allaway.
ref: "Ini memberikan asas kepada kajian masa depan yang akan dirancang untuk memperoleh kefahaman terperinci tentang interaksi diantara PA-457 dan sasarannya begitu juga sebagai wawasan kepada perancangan perencat kematangan generasi baru," kata CEO Panacos Pharmaceutical, Graham Allaway.

src: At least 80% of those suffering from the disease have shown resistance to other medications.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 80% daripada mereka yang menderita akibat penyakit tersebut telah menunjukkan rintangan terhadap ubat-ubatan lain.

src: Al-Qaeda's second in command, Ayman al-Zawahiri, has released a new videotape.
ref: Pegawai kanan kedua Al- Qaeda, Ayman al- Zawahiri, telah mengeluarkan satu rakaman video baru.

src: "Palestine was a land of Islam, and its liberation is the duty of every Muslim."
ref: "Palestin adalah tanah Islam, dan pembebasannya adalah kewajipan setiap Muslim."

src: "I call upon Muslims everywhere to support the brothers in Palestine."
ref: "Saya menyeru umat Islam di merata-rata tempat untuk menyokong saudara-saudara di Palestin."

src: Al-Zawahiri also claims that the United Nations is trying to "occupy" Sudan and is attempting to "divide" the nation.
ref: Al- Zawahiri juga mendakwa bahawa PBB sedang cuba untuk "menduduki" Sudan dan cuba untuk "membahagikan" negara itu.

src: "The spineless Sudanese government ... is joining the United States in dividing Sudan to stay in power."
ref: "Kerajaan Sudan yang lemah dan tidak berazam itu...akan menyertai Amerika Syarikat dalam membahagikan Sudan untuk terus berkuasa."

src: "In Sudan, the crusader (U.N.) Security Council decided to send military experts to Darfur in preparation for its occupation and division."
ref: "Di Sudan, tentera salib Majlis Keselamatan (U.N.) mengambil keputusan untuk menghantar pakar tentera Darfur sebagai persediaan untuk penempatan dan pembahagian," katanya.

src: Zawahiri also talks about judges in Egypt who wish to make the judiciary system independent.
ref: Zawahiri juga bercakap tentang hakim di Mesir yang ingin membentuk sistem kehakiman bebas.

src: "In Egypt, the crusader system supports the secular system that violates the judges' integrity, cheats in elections and enforces emergency law."
ref: "Di Mesir, sistem tentera salib menyokong sistem sekular yang melanggar integriti hakim, menipu dalam pilihan raya dan menguatkuasakan undang-undang darurat."

src: "You agreed on the constitution and the secular laws imposed on the nation by arms and suppression and torture and rigged elections."
ref: "Kamu bersetuju dengan perlembagaan dan undang-undang sekular yang dikenakan ke atas negara itu dengan senjata dan penindasan dan penyeksaan dan pilihan raya yang dimanipulasikan."

src: "I tell the Egyptian judges you will not gain independence because America and Israel simply and clearly do not want that, and what you see today in procedures against you is part of their promised American reform plan," added Zawahiri.
ref: "Saya memberitahu hakim-hakim Mesir kamu tidak akan mendapat kemerdekaan kerana Amerika dan Israel semata-mata dan jelas tidak mahu itu, dan apa yang kamu lihat hari ini dalam prosedur yang menentang kamu adalah sebahagian daripada rancangan pembaharuan Amerika yang dijanjikan kepada mereka," kata Zawahiri.

src: "The Arab governments did not have the courage to even meet the Palestinians' needs for one month."
ref: "Kerajaan Arab tidak mempunyai keberanian meskipun untuk memenuhi keperluan rakyat Palestin selama sebulan."

src: Two teenagers have been found shot to death in Salford, Greater Manchester, w:UK.
ref: Dua orang remaja didapati telah ditembak mati di Salford, Greater Manchester, w:UK.

src: A Greater Manchester Police spokeswoman said officers were still trying to establish the circumstances of the shooting.
ref: Seorang jurucakap Polis Greater Manchester berkata pegawai masih cuba untuk mengenalpasti kejadian tembakan.

src: "An 18 year-old boy was also found at the scene."
ref: "Seorang kanak-kanak lelaki berusia 18 tahun turut ditemui di tempat kejadian".

src: "He was taken to a hospital by ambulance but died a short time later."
ref: "Dia telah dibawa ke hospital oleh ambulans tetapi meninggal dunia tidak lama selepas itu".

src: The Heath Avenue area is sealed off while officers investigate.
ref: Kawasan Heath Avenue ditutup semasa para pegawai menyiasat.

src: Passes were frequently misplaced and attacks from both teams lacked cutting edge.
ref: Hantaran bola kerap disalahletak dan serangan dari kedua-dua pasukan kurang mantap.

src: Paraguay lost number one goalkeeper Justo Villa to an injury in the sixth minute of the game.
ref: Paraguay kehilangan penjaga gol nombor satu Justo Villa kerana kecederaan pada minit keenam permainan.

src: England's Swedish manager Sven-Göran Eriksson's side had more possession but failed to score more than the one early goal.
ref: Pengurus pasukan England dari Sweeden Sven-Göran Eriksson mempunyai lebih permilikan tetapi gagal menjaringkan lebih daripada satu gol awal.

src: England next face Trinidad and Tobago while Paraguay face the England manager's home nation, Sweden.
ref: England akan bertemu dengan Trinidad dan Tobago manakala Paraguay menghadapi tanah air pengurus England, Sweden.

src: All exhibit pieces will remain on display until September 10 and will be available for sale at a fixed-price this weekend.
ref: Semua bahan pameran akan di pamerkan sehingga 10 September dan akan di buka untuk jualan pada harga tetap hujung minggu ini.

src: Today, during the exhibition's banquet, the museum is to present Bob Kuhn with their lifetime achievement award.
ref: Hari ini, semasa jamuan pameran, muzium itu menghadiakan kepada Bob Kuhn pencapaian sepanjang hayat beliau.

src: Over 50 pieces of his work is being featured in a special exhibit at the museum.
ref: Lebih 50 buah hasil kerja beliau dipaparkan di pameran istimewa di dalam muzium.

src: For more information, visit the National Cowboy & Western Heritage Museum website.
ref: Untuk keterangan lanjut, sila layari laman web rasmi Muzium Koboi & Warisan Barat Nasional.

src: In what might amount to one of the shocks of the tournament Trinidad and Tobago drew with Sweden 0-0 in the second Group B match, Saturday, despite having a defender sent off.
ref: Apa yang boleh dianggap sebagai salah satu kejutan untuk kejohanan ini Tridad dan Tobago seri dengan Sweden 0-0 dalam perlawanan kedua Kumpulan B, Sabtu, meskipun mempunyai seorang pemain pertahanan dibuang padang.

src: But Shaka Hislop produced a string of outstanding saves, which included one 11 minutes from time when he stuck out a hand to stop Marcus Allback placing the ball over him.
ref: Tetapi Shaka Hislop menghasilkan beberapa rentetan aksi cemerlang menyelamatkan gawang, termasuk pada 11 minit sebelum waktu permainan tamat apabila beliau keluarkan satu tangan untuk menghentikan Marcus Allback meletakkan bola ke atasnya.

src: In reply Leo Benhakker changed to a more attacking 4-3-2 system and threw on an extra attacker.
ref: Sebagai tindak balas Leo Benhakker mengubah kepada sistem lebih menyerang 4-3-2 dan memasukkan seorang penyerang tambahan.

src: The West Indies team led by Yorke was competitive and hard in the tackle but Swedish pressure meant the team was in its own half of the pitch most of the game.
ref: Pasukan Hindia Barat diketuai oleh Yorke itu amat kompetitif dan menggasak keras tetapi tekanan Sweden memaksa pasukan itu berada di separuh padang sendiri di sebahagian besar perlawanan.

src: The team had few chances on goal because its attacking plays were few; but one shot from substitute Cornell Glen clipped the crossbar to the glee of supporters.
ref: Pasukan itu mempunyai sedikit peluang ke arah gol kerana aksi menyerang mereka adalah sedikit; tetapi satu rembatan daripada pemain gantian Cornell Glen terkena palang gol menuju ke penyokong.

src: Sweden made many goalscoring chances but its strikers must feel unfortunate that none were converted.
ref: Sweden telah menghasilkan banyak peluang untuk menjaringkan gol tetapi pemain penyerang mereka pasti berasakan nasib malang kerana tiada yang dapat dijaringkan.

src: Rami Shaaban in the Sweden goal did not have a save to make.
ref: Rami Shaaban di pintu gol Sweden tidak menghasilkan sebarang aksi menyelamatkan gawang.

src: A statistic that says much for the dominance of the Swedish yellow jerseys is that Sweden had eight corner kicks to Trinidad and Tobago's one.
ref: Statistik yang jelas menggambarkan dominasi Sweden berjersi kuning adalah Sweden mempunyai lapan sepakan penjuru berbanding satu oleh Trinidad dan Tobago.

src: The Lower Saxony, Germany tax authority is migrating 12,000 desktops to use SuSE Linux with KDE as the desktop environment.
ref: Lower Saxony, Jerman pihak berkuasa cukai memindahkan 12,000 komputer meja untuk menggunakan SuSE Linux dengan KDE sebagai persekitaran atas meja.

src: The systems are being migrated from Sun's Solaris x86 version 8, which has been in use at the organization since 2002.
ref: Sistem itu akan dihijrahkan dari Sun's Solaris x86 versi 8, yang telah digunakan dalam organisasi itu sejak tahun 2002.

src: According to Eva Brucherseifer, president of the KDE community in Germany and managing director of basysKom, the migration process in its "peak phase" and is porting 300 systems every day.
ref: Menurut Eva Brucherseifer, presiden masyarakat KDE di Jerman dan Pengarah Urusan basysKom, proses penghijrahan dalam "fasa puncak" dan sedang mengalih 300 sistem setiap hari.

src: The Entertainment Software Association president Douglas Lowenstein confirmed speculations that his group is planning to file a lawsuit against the state of Oklahoma because of a new law, HB3004.
ref: Presiden Persatuan Perisian Hiburan Douglas Lowenstein mengesahkan spekulasi yang kumpulannya bercadang untuk menfailkan tindakan undang-undang terhadap negeri Oklahoma kerana undang-undang baru, HB3004.

src: Under this law, games that have "inappropriate violence" are added to a list of materials that are considered harmful to minors.
ref: Dibawah undang-undang ini, permainan yang mempunyai "keganasan tidak bersesuaian" adalah ditambah kedalam senarai barangan yang dianggap merosakkan kanak-kanak.

src: Lowenstein said that the ESA believes "HB3004 will restrict the First Amendment rights of Oklahoma's citizens and intend to file suit in Oklahoma federal district court shortly, asking that the state's new video game law be overturned."
ref: Lowenstein berkata yang ESA percaya "HB3004 akan menyekat hak Pindaan Pertama rakyat Oklahoma dan berhasrat untuk menyaman mahkamah persekutuan Oklahoma segera, meminta supaya undang-undang baru permainan video negeri tersebut dibatalkan."

src: Similar laws have been found unconstitutional in St. Louis, Indianapolis, Washington, Illinois, and Michigan.
ref: Undang-undang serupa telah ditemui tidak diperlembagaankan di St. Louis, Indianapolis, Washington, Illinois, dan Michigan.

src: A California video game law is currently being reviewed in federal court.
ref: Satu undang-undang permainan video California kini sedang dikaji semula dimahkamah persekutuan.

src: President George W. Bush has made a surprise visit to Iraq hoping to bolster some support.
ref: Presiden George W. Bush telah membuat lawatan mengejut ke Iraq dengan harapan untuk meningkatkan sokongan.

src: He also went to meet their new Prime Minister Nouri al-Maliki and talk about next steps in the war.
ref: Dia juga pergi bertemu Perdana Menteri baru mereka Nouri al-Maliki dan bercakap tentang langkah seterusnya di peperangan.

src: Even al-Maliki didn't know that Bush was coming until five minutes before he arrived.
ref: Al-Maliki juga tidak tahu bahawa Bush akan datang sehingga lima minit sebelum kedatangannya.

src: The trip comes as over 70,000 mostly Iraqi citizens prepare to deploy into Baghdad to try and bring security to the capital.
ref: Perlawatan itu datang kerana lebih 70,000 yang kebanyakkannya rakyat Iraq bersedia maju ke dalam Baghdad untuk cuba membawa keselamatan ke ibu negara itu.

src: It was a very dramatic move by the president to travel to a violence crazed area in Baghdad less than a week after the death of al-Zarqawi.
ref: Ia adalah langkah yang sangat dramatik oleh seorang presiden untuk pergi ke kawasan keganasan dahsyat di kawasan Baghdad kurang seminggu selepas kematian al-Zarqawi.

src: The cause of death is reported to be a heart attack.
ref: Punca kematian dilaporkan adalah serangan jantung.

src: He was the former Thomson Corp. chairman and the company's controlling shareholder.
ref: Beliau adalah bekas pengerusi Thomson Corp dan pemegang saham majoriti syarikat itu.

src: He made most of his money by making his father's trans-Atlantic newspaper (The Globe and Mail) into one of the world's leading resources for electronic information and data.
ref: Beliau mendapat sebahagian besar keuntungannya dengan menjadikan akhbar bapanya (The Globe dan Mail) yang rentas-Atlantik ke dalam salah satu sumber maklumat dan data elektronik utama dunia.

src: Mr. Thomson is survived by his wife, Marilyn; three sons, David, who succeeded him as chairman of Thomson in 2002, Peter and Taylor; and a sister, Audrey Campbell.
ref: Encik Thomson meninggalkan seorang isteri, Marilyn; tiga anak lelaki, David, yang menggantikan beliau sebagai pengerusi Thomson pada tahun 2002, Peter dan Taylor; dan seorang adik perempuan, Audrey Campbell.

src: A memorial service will be held on a date that has yet to be announced.
ref: Sebuah upacara akan diadakan pada satu tarikh yang belum diumumkan.

src: Former New Mexico governor Gary Johnson received the 2012 presidential nomination of the U.S. Libertarian Party at Saturday's Libertarian National Convention in Las Vegas, Nevada.
ref: Bekas Gabenor New Mexico, Gary Johnson telah menerima pencalonan presiden 2012 daripada Parti Libertarian A.S. di Konvensyen Kebangsaan Libertarian pada hari Sabtu ini di Las Vegas, Nevada.

src: Judge James P. Gray of California was selected as his running mate.
ref: Hakim James P. Gray dari California telah dipilih sebagai rakan percalonan untuk jawatan yang lebih rendah.

src: Johnson's association with the Libertarian Party stretches back to 1993, when he was a dues-paying-member for about a year.
ref: Hubungan Johnson dengan Parti Libertarian telah bermula sejak tahun 1993, apabila beliau adalah seorang ahli yang membayar yuran selama setahun.

src: During his governorship, he vetoed over 750 bills, more than all other then-governors combined, and left the state with a $1 billion budget surplus.
ref: Semasa pemerintahan beliau, beliau telah menolak lebih daripada 750 bil, lebih dari gabungan gabenor lain ketika itu, dan meninggalkan negeri itu dengan lebihan bajet $ 1 bilion.

src: Since leaving office in 2003 due to term limits, he has advocated for marijuana legalization, climbed Mount Everest, and has entered into presidential politics.
ref: Sejak meninggalkan pejabat pada tahun 2003 disebabkan had tempoh, beliau telah menyokong kebenaran kegunaan ganja di sisi undang-undang, mendaki Gunung Everest, dan telah memasuki bidang politik presiden.

src: In 2012, he chose to mount his own presidential campaign, seeking the Republican Party nomination on a platform of non-interventionism in foreign affairs and extensive cuts to the federal budget.
ref: Pada tahun 2012, beliau memilih untuk melancarkan sendiri kempen presidennya, mencari pencalonan Parti Republikan pada platform yang berdasarkan tidak campur tangan dalam urusan luar negara dan memotong kebanyakan bajet persekutuan.

src: Though he participated in two early Republican debates, Johnson was barred from most due to low poll numbers.
ref: Walaupun beliau telah mengambil bahagian dalam dua perbahasan awal Republikan, Johnson telah dihalang daripada kebanyakan pembahasan kerana sokongan ramai yang rendah.

src: As a result, in December, he decided to end his Republican campaign and return to the Libertarian Party.
ref: Hasilnya, pada bulan Disember, beliau mengambil keputusan untuk menamatkan kempen Republikannya dan kembali ke Parti Libertarian.

src: In contrast, former Congressman Bob Barr took six ballots to secure the 2008 nomination.
ref: Sebaliknya, bekas ahli Kongres Bob Barr mengambil enam undi untuk mendapatkan pencalonan 2008.

src: He suggested the party nominate James P. Gray as his running mate, and they complied, choosing Gray as the vice presidential nominee.
ref: Beliau mencadangkan supaya parti mencalonkan James P. Gray sebagai rakan percalonan untuk jawatan yang lebih rendah, dan mereka mematuhinya, dengan memilih Gray sebagai calon naib presiden.

src: Gray is a jurist, who has served as a trial judge for Orange County, California since 1983.
ref: Gray adalah seorang juri, yang telah berkhidmat sebagai hakim perbicaraan untuk Orange County, California sejak tahun 1983.

src: He ran for Congress as a Republican in 1998, and was the Libertarian Party's 2004 nominee for U.S. Senate in California.
ref: Beliau berkempen untuk Kongres sebagai Republikan pada tahun 1998, dan merupakan calon Parti Libertarian pada tahun 2004 untuk Senat A.S. di California.

src: In his writings and media appearances, Gray has advocated against the War on Drugs.
ref: Dalam karya beliau dan penampilan media, Gray telah menyokong Perang terhadap Dadah.

src: In 2008, the Libertarian Party appeared on 45 state ballots with Barr winning 0.4 percent of the popular vote.
ref: Pada tahun 2008, Parti Libertarian muncul di 45 undi negeri dengan Barr memenangi 0.4 peratus berdasarkan undi popular.

src: A recent Public Policy Polling (PPP) survey shows Johnson with six percent national support in a matchup with President Barack Obama and the presumptive Republican nominee Mitt Romney.
ref: Satu kaji selidik Cabutan Undi Dasar Awam (PPP) baru-baru ini menunjukkan Johnson mempunyai enam peratus sokongan kebangsaan dalam pertandingan dengan Presiden Barack Obama dan calon andaian Republikan Mitt Romney.

src: On Monday in Canberra, the Australian government released its annual budget, one that promises a A$1.5 billion surplus for the year, but little was said of the potential impact of the budget on Australian sport in an Olympic year when Australia is looking to earn the fewest medals since the 1996 Games in Atlanta.
ref: Pada hari Isnin di Canberra, kerajaan Australia mengeluarkan bajet tahunan, sesuatu yang menjanjikan lebihan A$ 1.5 bilion untuk tahun ini, tetapi tidak banyak yag diperkatakan tentang potensi kesan bajet pada sukan Australia dalam tahun Olimpik apabila Australia dijangka untuk memperoleh pingat paling sedikit sejak 1996 Olimpik di Atlanta.

src: There were no apparent surprises for the sports sector in Australia in this budget.
ref: Tidak ada kejutan yang ketara untuk sektor sukan di Australia dalam bajet ini.

src: According to Keith Lyons, the University of Canberra Director of the National Institute of Sport Studies, sport is an important part of Australian culture and the development of sport enjoys bipartisan support.
ref: Menurut Keith Lyons, Universiti Pengarah Canberra daripada Institut Pengajian Sukan, berkata sukan adalah satu bahagian penting dalam budaya Australia dan pembangunan sukan mendapat sokongan kedua-dua parti.

src: The sport "budget supports infrastructure developments and reflects a renewal of Australian sport venues post ."
ref: Sukan dalam "bajet boleh menyokong pembangunan infrastruktur dan mencerminkan pembaharuan pos tempat sukan Australia."

src: "The Active After School investment reflects a commitment to support participation and engagement in physical activity and sport."
ref: "Pelaburan Active After School mencerminkan komitmen untuk menyokong penyertaan dan penglibatan dalam aktiviti fizikal dan sukan."

src: When Tony Naar of the Australian Paralympic Committee was asked about the impact of the budget on his organisation's efforts, he said there was little to report as there were "very few previously unannounced initiatives... the overall level of program funding was in line with the final year of the current funding cycle".
ref: Apabila Tony Naar Jawatankuasa Paralimpik Australia ditanya mengenai impak bajet terhadap usaha organisasinya, beliau berkata terdapat sedikit laporan kerana terdapat "sedikit inisiatif yang tidak diumumkan sebelum ini... tahap keseluruhan pembiayaan program itu adalah sejajar dengan tahun akhir kitaran pembiayaan semasa."

src: The budget promises to support cricket, specifically the 2015 Cricket World Cup, and soccer (football) with the 2015 Asian Cup by allocating funding for facility improvement.
ref: Bajet ini menjamin untuk membangunkan kriket, khususnya Kriket Piala Dunia pada tahun 2015 dan bola sepak (bola sepak) Piala Asia 2015 dengan memperuntukkan dana untuk peningkatan kemudahan fasiliti.

src: A$50 million will be spent on redeveloping the Sydney Cricket Ground, A$30 million on redeveloping the Adelaide Oval, and A$15 million on redeveloping the Bellerive Oval in Hobart.
ref: A$50 juta akan dibelanjakan untuk membangunkan semula Sydney Cricket Ground, A$30 juta untuk membangunkan semula Adelaide Oval, dan A$15 juta untuk membangunkan semula Bellerive Oval di Hobart.

src: A partnership between the government, New South Wales Government and the Sydney Cricket and Sports Ground Trust will cover additional costs associated with the Sydney Cricket Ground with work completed by 2014.
ref: Satu perkongsian antara kerajaan, Kerajaan New South Wales dan Sydney Cricket dan Sydney Cricket and Sports Ground Trust akan meliputi kos tambahan yang berkaitan dengan Sydney Cricket Ground dengan kerja dijangka siap pada 2014.

src: The budget promises assistance to parents to defray the cost of their children's extracurricular activities including sport as part of the SchoolKid Bonus, which will replace the Education Tax Refund.
ref: Bajet ini menjanjikan bantuan kepada ibu bapa untuk membiayai kos aktiviti kurikulum anak-anak mereka termasuk sukan sebagai sebahagian daripada Bonus SchoolKid, yang akan menggantikan Bayaran Balik Cukai Pendidikan.

src: Support for school based youth sport with A$39.2 million allocated to Active After-School Communities, a program that reaches 190,000 children, which encourages them to participate in school sports.
ref: Sokongan untuk sekolah berdasarkan sukan belia dengan A$39.2 juta diperuntukkan untuk komuniti Active After-School, sebuah program yang mencapai 190,000 kanak-kanak, yang menggalakkan mereka untuk mengambil bahagian dalam sukan sekolah.

src: In an attempt to curb drowning deaths of young children, an initiative has been launched to improve water safety that will be run through early childhood centres.
ref: Dalam usaha untuk membendung kematian kanak-kanak disebabkan oleh lemas, satu inisiatif telah dilancarkan untuk meningkatkan keselamatan di air yang akan dijalankan melalui pusat-pusat awal kanak-kanak.

src: A$19.2 million was extended to the Australian Sport Commission to run its Active After-School Communities program in 2012/2013 with similar funding for 2013/2014.
ref: A$19.2 juta telah dipanjangkan kepada Suruhanjaya Sukan Australia untuk menjalankan program komuniti Active After-School pada 2012/2013 dengan pembiayaan yang sama untuk 2013/2014.

src: 2,000 schools and 1,300 after/out of school programs will benefit from the funding.
ref: 2000 sekolah dan 1300 lepasan program sekolah akan mendapat manfaat daripada pembiayaan.

src: Aimed at bringing the homeless and unemployed into the community through participation in soccer, Reclink Australia will be given the funding to implement the program.
ref: Tujuan ini adalah untuk membawa golongan gelandangan dan penganggur ke dalam masyarakat melalui penyertaan dalam bola sepak, Reclink Australia akan diberi dana untuk melaksanakan program ini.

src: A$4.8 million was allocated to the Clontarf Foundation in New South Wales to support local sport and utilised elsewhere encourage Indigenous girls to participate in sport in Western Australia, Northern Territory, Victoria and Queensland through the Sporting Chance Program.
ref: A$4.8 juta telah diperuntukkan kepada Yayasan Clontarf di New South Wales untuk menyokong sukan tempatan dan digunakan di tempat lain mendorong gadis pribumi untuk mengambil bahagian dalam sukan di Australia Barat, Wilayah Utara, Victoria dan Queensland melalui Program Sporting Chance.

src: Canberra's Centenary celebrations are addressed in the Federal budget, with A$2.6 million allocated for 2011/2012, A$2.0 million allocated for 2012/2013 and A$1.0 million allocated for 2013/2014.
ref: Sambutan Centenary Canberra disebut dalam bajet Persekutuan, dengan A$2.6 juta diperuntukkan bagi 2011/2012, A$ 2.0 juta diperuntukkan bagi 2012/2013 dan A $ 1.0 juta diperuntukkan bagi 2013/2014.

src: Some money will go towards sport as a part of these celebrations.
ref: Sebahagian wang akan pergi ke bahagian sukan sebagai sebahagian daripada sambutan ini.

src: The Federal government is investing in Glenorchy, Tasmania, budgeting A$8.7 million in the redevelopment of the King George V sports and community precinct, with the money given to the local government.
ref: Kerajaan Persekutuan melabur dalam Glenorchy, Tasmania, belanjawan A$8.7 juta dalam pembangunan semula stadium King George V dan komuniti presint, dengan wang yang diberikan kepada kerajaan tempatan.

src: In the 2011/2012 budget year, A$2,729,510 was spent on Regional Australia, Local Government, Arts and Sport in special appropriations.
ref: Dalam bajet tahun 2011/2012, A$2,729,510 telah dibelanjakan untuk Wilayah Australia, Kerajaan Tempatan, Kesenian dan peruntukan khas sukan.

src: Estimates for receipts for 2012/2013 are A$537,000, up from A$220,000 in actual receipts in 2011/2012's budget.
ref: Anggaran bagi resit 2012/2013 adalah A$537,000, meningkat daripada A$220,000 dalam resit sebenar dalam bajet 2011/2012 ini.

src: The Australian Sports Commission spent A$214,534,000 in 2011/2012 in their first budget category, and have a smaller budget of A$101,942,000 for 2012/2013 in the same category.
ref: Suruhanjaya Sukan Australia membelanjakan A$214,534,000 pada 2011/2012 dalam kategori bajet pertama mereka, dan mempunyai bajet yang lebih kecil berjumlah A$101,942,000 untuk 2012/2013 dalam kategori yang sama.

src: For total appropriations, the first area decreased by a total of A$117,170,000 and the second area saw an increase in of A$114,353,000.
ref: Untuk jumlah Peruntukan, kawasan pertama menurun sebanyak A$117,170,000 dan kawasan kedua menyaksikan peningkatan dalam A$114,353,000.

src: Japan and Croatia drew 0-0 in the heat of Nuremburg, Sunday.
ref: Jepun dan Croatia seri 0-0 dalam kepanasan Nuremburg, Ahad lalu.

src: Both teams worked hard and had clear chances to score but lacked the necessary ruthlessness in front of goal.
ref: Kedua-dua pasukan bekerja keras dan mempunyai peluang yang cerah untuk membuat jaringan tetapi kekurangan kekejaman yang diperlukan di hadapan pintu gol.

src: On a hot field and under the blue sky in the Frankenstadion the conditions won as the match petered out at a walking pace.
ref: Di atas padang yang panas dan di bawah awan biru di Frankenstadion peluang untuk menang semakin lenyap pada kadar perlahan.

src: The Japanese keeper was centre of the action again when the Croatian coach's son Niko Kranjcar turned brilliantly and rattled the crossbar from 25 yards.
ref: Aksi penjaga gol Japan menjadi tumpuan semula apabila anak jurulatih Croatia Niko Kranjcar bertukar cemerlang dan menggegarkan palang dari jarak 25 ela.

src: With half an hour gone Kawaguchi got a shock - a bouncing back pass bobbled one meter in front of him.
ref: Selepas setengah jam berlalu Kawaguchi menerima kejutan - lantunan hantaran ke belakang melantun satu meter ke hadapannya.

src: Fortunately for Japan though it evaded his control the ball trickled just wide of the post.
ref: Nasib menyebelahi Jepun walaupun ia di luar kawalannya bola menerjah luar daripada pos.

src: Overall, their physical presence meant they were dangerous from their 11 corner kicks and were capable of making space to shoot from the edge of the area.
ref: Keseluruhannya, kehadiran fizikal mereka menjadikan mereka merbahaya dari 11 sepakan sudut dan berkeupayaan untuk menyediakan ruang untuk membuat menjaring dari pinggir kawasan.

src: If Zlatko Kranjcar might have wished for more luck in front of goal, Japan coach Zico might also rue the lack of finishing from his team.
ref: Jika Zlatko Kranjcar mungkin mengharapkan nasib yang lebih baik di hadapan gol, jurulatih Jepun Zico mungkin juga menyesal akan kekurangan di pengakhiran dari kumpulannya.

src: The result did not play either team out of the World Cup but the advantage in Group F remained with Brazil and Australia who had three points after the first games.
ref: Keputusan itu tidak memberi apa-apa kepada kumpulan di luar Piala Dunia tetapi kelebihan berada dalam Kumpulan F kekal bersama dengan Brazil dan Australia yang mana mempunyai tiga mata selepas permainan pertama mereka.

src: Poland came from behind with two set-piece goals to beat Costa Rica in Group A, Tuesday.
ref: Poland bangkit daripada ketinggalan dua gol set-piece untuk mengalahkan Costa Rica dalam Kumpulan A, Selasa.

src: The result of the match gave Poland three points but they did not qualify for the next round of the Fifa World Cup as Ecuador had six and Germany nine.
ref: Keputusan perlawanan itu memberikan Poland tiga mata tetapi mereka tidak layak untuk pusingan seterusnya dalam Piala Dunia kerana Ecuador mempunyai enam dan Jerman sembilan.

src: Costa Rica left the 2006 World Cup without a victory in three games.
ref: Costa Rica meninggalkan Piala Dunia 2006 tanpa sebarang kemenangan dalam tiga perlawanan.

src: Though the pace of the game was rather slow in the heat the outcome did seem to matter to the two teams who both wanted a World Cup win.
ref: Walaupun rentak permainan agak perlahan pada musim panas ini keputusan seolah-olah penting kepada kedua-dua pasukan yang mahu menang Piala Dunia.

src: Paraguay beat Trinidad and Tobago in a match that had no effect on the qualifiers through to the round sixteen of the Fifa World Cup, Tuesday.
ref: Paraguay menewaskan Trinidad dan Tobago dalam perlawanan yang tidak mempunyai kesan ke atas kelayakan mara ke pusingan enam belas Piala Dunia Fifa, Selasa.

src: Paraguay edged the game from start to finish and got a goal in each half.
ref: Paraguay menewaskan permainan itu dari awal hingga akhir dan mendapat gol dalam setiap babak.

src: Kelvin Jack, who started his first Fifa World Cup game, made seven saves.
ref: Kelvin Jack, yang memulakan perlawanan pertama Piala Dunia Fifanya, berjaya menyelamatkan percubaan sebanyak tujuh kali.

src: After 25 minutes Jack was a bystander when Roberto Acuna's freekick was driven hard into the box.
ref: Selepas 25 minit Jack ialah seorang pemerhati apabila sepakan percuma Roberto Acuna dipacu kuat ke dalam kotak itu.

src: The goal that sealed the game for the South Amercians was scored six minutes from time by Nelson Cuevas after he had exchanged passes with Roque Santa Cruz.
ref: Gol yang memeterai perlawanan itu untuk Amercians Selatan telah dijaringkan enam minit sebelum waktu tamat oleh Nelson Cuevas selepas dia berbalas hantaran dengan Roque Santa Cruz.

src: The game was notable for being the last appearance for Carlos Gamarra, 35, for his national side.
ref: Permainan ini terkenal sebagai penampilan terakhir untuk Carlos Gamarra, 35, untuk pasukan kebangsaannya.

src: After three games the Group B table was topped by England with seven points and then Sweden with five points with Paraguay and Trinidad and Tobago going out of the competition.
ref: Selepas tiga perlawanan jadual Kumpulan B telah diketuai oleh England dengan tujuh mata dan kemudian Sweden dengan lima mata dengan Paraguay dan Trinidad dan Tobago keluar dari perlawanan itu.

src: The Federated Farmers debated the law for a long time, saying that the cost of microchipping all their dogs will be a huge cost and an inconvenience.
ref: Persekutuan Peladang membahaskan undang-undang untuk masa yang lama, dengan mengatakan bahawa kos microchipping semua anjing mereka akan membawa kos yang banyak dan sesuatu yang menyusahkan.

src: Under previous legislation, all newly registered dogs were to have identification microchips embedded by July 1.
ref: Di bawah undang-undang sebelum ini, semua anjing yang baru didaftar ialah untuk mempunyai mikrocip pengenalan tertanam sebelum 1 Julai.

src: This law was introduced when Carolina Anderson, 7-year-old, was attacked in 2003.
ref: Undang-undang ini diperkenalkan apabila Carolina Anderson, berusia 7 tahun, telah diserang pada tahun 2003.

src: Patrick Viera and Thierry Henry scored second half goals to give France a 2-0 win over Togo in Group G, Friday.
ref: Patrick Viera dan Thierry Henry menjaringkan gol pada babak kedua untuk memberikan Perancis menang 2-0 ke atas Togo dalam Kumpulan G, pada hari Jumaat.

src: A win that should have been a rout but for the number of almost unwatchable misses racked up by David Trezeguet and Frank Ribery.
ref: Kemenangan yang sepatutnya keemenangan selesa tetapi untuk terlalu banyak bilangan percubaan tersasar oleh David Trezeguet dan Frank Ribery.

src: The lack of French execution in front of goal had fans in the crowd jeering when they were 2-0 up.
ref: Kekurangan pelaksanaan Perancis di depan gol diejek oleh orang ramai apabila mereka mendahului 2-0.

src: Before the game France were third in Group G with two points from two matches to Korea Republic's and Switzerland's four.
ref: Sebelum perlawanan itu Perancis di tempat ketiga dalam Kumpulan G dengan dua mata daripada dua perlawanan kepada Republik Korea dan Switzerland empat.

src: France had to win the game to get into the round of sixteen and the pressure seemed to be evident in the first half.
ref: Perancis harus memenangi perlawanan untuk masuk ke dalam pusingan enam belas dan tekanan itu seolah-olah dapat dilihat pada separuh masa pertama.

src: Togo did not play as much as a team as the French a fact reflected in their attack which forced Fabien Barthez to make just two saves.
ref: Togo tidak bermain sebanyak satu pasukan seperti Perancis yang dipaparkan dalam serangan mereka yang memaksa Fabien Barthez untuk membuat hanya dua tangkapan.

src: Ribery ran at the Togo defence and slipped a pass to Viera.
ref: Ribery berlari pada pertahanan Togo dan melorongkan hantaran kepada Viera.

src: Viera's presence was noted by the eight fouls he suffered in the game; his excellence by the fact he conceded no fouls.
ref: Kehadiran Viera telah dilihat oleh lapan faul yang beliau alami dalam permainan; kecemerlangan beliau berdasarkan fakta beliau tidak mengakui menmbuat sebarang faul.

src: He also got an assist on the second goal when he flicked a header to Henry in the penalty area.
ref: Beliau juga mendapat membantu gol kedua apabila dia menguis tandukan kepada Henry dalam kotak penalti.

src: A typically clinical finish, Henry's first touch put the ball in a position to shoot before his marker could react.
ref: Penamat biasanya klinikal, sentuhan pertama Henry meletakkan bola dalam kedudukan untuk menjaring sebelum pemain pertahanan lawan beliau boleh bertindak balas.

src: Raymond Domenech's side win earned a round of sixteen match against Group H winners Spain.
ref: Sebelah kemenangan Raymond Domenech memperoleh perlawanan pusingan enam belas menentang juara Kumpulan H Sepanyol.

src: In his opening remarks, Bush welcomed parents and grandparents to a "historic ballpark."
ref: Dalam ucapan pembukaan, Bush mengalu-alukan ibu bapa dan datuk dan nenek kepada "padang bola bersejarah."

src: The United Nations has confirmed that its convoy in Syria was bombed this afternoon while a human rights group reported a Syrian military attack on civilians at a nearby funeral in the Syrian town of Khan Sheikhoun in Idlib province today.
ref: Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu telah mengesahkan bahawa konvoinya di Syria telah dibom petang ini manakala sekumpulan hak asasi manusia melaporkan serangan tentera Syria ke atas orang awam di majlis pengebumian yang berhampiran di bandar Syria Khan Sheikhoun di wilayah Idlib hari ini.

src: UN personnel had to be left behind after the blast but no UN staff were injured.
ref: Kakitangan PBB terpaksa ditinggalkan selepas letupan itu tetapi tiada kakitangan PBB cedera.

src: Later, the UN sent a patrol to pick up personnel left behind.
ref: Kemudian, PBB menghantar pasukan peronda untuk mengambil kakitangan yang ditinggalkan.

src: A video uploaded to the video sharing website YouTube reportedly shows the UN convoy being targeted and bombed.
ref: Satu video yang dimuat naik ke laman web perkongsian video YouTube dilaporkan menunjukkan konvoi PBB yang menjadi sasaran dan dibom.

src: Several seconds later, a bomb explodes near what appears to be the lead car of the convoy severely damaging the front end of the vehicle and injuring several civilians.
ref: Beberapa saat kemudian, satu bom meletup berhampiran kereta yang nampaknya kereta pendahuluan konvoi dan merosakkan bahagian hadapan kenderaan dengan teruk dan mencederakan beberapa orang awam.

src: The lead car, still operating, begins to leave the area.
ref: Kereta pendahuluan itu, masih beroperasi, mula meninggalkan kawasan itu.

src: The UN has reportedly stated that none of their observers were injured.
ref: PBB telah dilaporkan menyatakan bahawa tiada pemerhati mereka yang cedera.

src: "We went to observe and after a while shooting occurred; We are safe with the Free Army and we are waiting for a [U.N.] group to pick us up," said UN observers to Reuters.
ref: "Kami pergi untuk memerhati dan sejurus selepas itu tembak-menembak berlaku; Kami selamat dengan Tentera Bebas dan kami menunggu satu [PBB] kumpulan untuk menjemput kami," kata pemerhati PBB kepada Reuters.

src: Mauritanians voted in favour of a new Constitution by an overwhelming majority in a referendum held on June 26, according to results announced by Interior Ministry officials today.
ref: Rakyat Mauritania telah mengundi setuju kepada Perlembagaan baru dengan majoriti besar di dalam referendum yang diadakan pada 26 Jun, menurut kepada keputusan yang diumumkan oleh pengawai Menteri Dalaman hari ini.

src: The new Constitution sets limits on the number of presidential terms a leader can serve, in contrast to several sub-Saharan countries, where several leaders have amended their Constitutions to retain power.
ref: Perlembagaan baru itu meletakkan had kepada jumlah tempoh presiden yang dibolehkan bagi seorang pemimpin, berlainan dengan beberapa negara sub-Sahara, di mana beberapa pemimpin telah mengubah Perlembagaan untuk mengekalkan kuasa.

src: The Interior Minister, Mohamed Ahmed Ould Mohamed Lemine said that over 96 percent votes cast were in favour of the new Constitution.
ref: Menteri Dalaman, Mohamed Ahmed Ould Mohamed Lemine berkata bahawa lebih dari 96 peratus undian adalah setuju kepada Perlembagaan baru.

src: The referendum will now lead to municipal and legislative elections to be held in November, followed by elections to the parliamentary upper house and the President's post in 2007.
ref: Referendum itu akan membawa kepada pilihanraya perbandaran dan undangan yang akan diadakan pada November, diikuti oleh pilihanraya peringkat senat Parlimen dan jawatan Presiden pada tahun 2007.

src: The new Constitution provides for a presidential form of government, with the President commanding significant powers, including the appointment of the prime minister.
ref: Perlembagaan baru menyediakan kerajaan berpresiden, dengan Presiden memerintah dengan kuasa terpenting, termasuk dalam melantik perdana menteri.

src: The Parliament though, can vote for no confidence in the government or censure it.
ref: Parlimen bagaimanapun, boleh mengundi untuk tidak yakin terhadap kerajaan atau mencelanya.

src: The Constitution disallows members of the present junta from running for the President's post and requires future leaders to swear on the Qur'an that they will not amend the Constitution to stay in power.
ref: Perlembagaan tidak membenarkan ahli-ahli junta semasa dari bertanding untuk jawatan Presiden dan memerlukan bakal pemimpin untuk bersumpah ke atas Qur'an yang mereka tidak akan mengubah Perlembagaan untuk kekal berkuasa.

src: International observers from the African Union and the Arab League said that the referendum appeared to have gone smoothly, but have yet to make their final reports.
ref: Pemerhati-pemerhati antarabangsa dari Kesatuan Afrika dan Liga Arab berkata bahawa referendum itu kelihatan seperti telah berlangsung dengan lancar, tetapi mereka masih perlu menyediakan laporan terakhir.

src: President Ely Ould Mohamed Vall, who also voted in the referendum said, "This is a great day and a rebirth for Mauritania ..." "I am sure that all Mauritanians feel the same way and that for this reason the Constitution will receive massive support."
ref: Presiden Ely Ould Mohamed Vall, yang turut mengundi di dalam referendum itu berkata, "Ini adalah hari yang baik dan satu kelahiran semula bagi Mauritania..." "Saya pasti yang semua rakyat Mauritania merasakan perasaan yang sama dan atas sebab itu Perlembagaan akan menerima sokongan kuat."

src: The Constitution has the backing of most civic and political groups, though two small parties called for a boycott of the referendum, saying the proposed Constitution ignores slavery, which is officially banned but still persists according to activists; and issues of "cohabitation between the different national communities" (such as Blacks and Arabs).
ref: Perlembagaan mendapat sokongan kebanyakan kumpulan-kumpulan politik dan sivik, walaupun ada dua parti kecil menyeru untuk memboikot referendum itu, dengan mengatakan Perlembagaan yang dicadangkan itu menghiraukan perhambaan, yang telah secara rasmi diharamkan tetapi masih lagi berterusan menurut aktivis; dan isu-isu "sekedudukan di antara komuniti berlainan nasional" (seperti Kulit gelap dan Arab).

src: Research published in the journal the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences (PNAS) suggests a link between male sexuality and conditions in the womb.
ref: Penyelidikan yang dikeluarkan oleh Journal Prosiding Akademi Sains Nasional (PNAS) mencadangkan hubungan antara seksualiti lelaki dan keadaan di dalam rahim.

src: Initial research by Dr. Anthony F. Bogaert and his colleagues at Brock University, Ontario revealed a possible link between the number of elder brothers a boy has and the likelihood he is to be gay.
ref: Penyelidikan awal dari Dr. Anthony F. Bogaert dan rakan sekerjanya di Universiti Brock, Ontario mendedahkan kemungkinan hubungan antara bilangan abang lelaki dan juga kemungkinan ianya menjadi gay homoseksual.

src: Whether this correlation be attributed to nature through the prenatal effects of the womb or to nurture through the psychosocial effects of growing up with elder siblings, however, remained unclear.
ref: Hubungan ini adalah antara semulajadi melalui kesan prenatal rahim atau penjagaan melalui kesan psikososial membesar dengan adik beradik yang lebih tua, masih lagi tidak dapat dijelaskan.

src: To further his research Bogaert studied 944 heterosexual and homosexual men.
ref: Untuk penyelidikan lanjut Bogaert menyelidik 944 lelaki heteroseksual dan homoseksual.

src: The study showed, however, that the link was found only in biological brothers.
ref: Namun, penyeidikan ini menunjukkan hubungan itu hanya wujud hanya pada abang kandung.

src: The amount of time an individual spent being raised with elder brothers had no bearing on sexual orientation; the relationship was even found to be true in brothers who were raised apart from one another.
ref: Jumlah individu itu meluangkan masa dibesarkan oleh abang-abangnya tidak mempunyai kesan terhadap orientasi seksualnya; hubungan itu juga benar dalam abang yang dibesarkan jauh antara satu sama lain.

src: Bogaert writes in this month's PNAS: "These results support a prenatal origin to sexual orientation development in men and indicate that the fraternal birth-order effect is probably the result of a maternal 'memory' for male gestations or births."
ref: Bogaert menulis dalam PNAS bulan ini: "Keputusan ini menyokong asal pranatal kepada perkembangan orientasi seksual dalam lelaki dan memberi isyarat bahawa kesan kelahiran fraternal mungkin hasil daripada 'memori'dengan ibu untuk kehamilan atau kelahiran".

src: He suggests that each male foetus prompts a progressively stronger immune reaction in the mother's body.
ref: Beliau mencadangkan setiap fetus lelaki mengeluarkan reaksi imunisasi yang lebih kuat dalam badan ibunya.

src: Scientists from Michigan State University added in an accompanying article: "These data strengthen the notion that the common denominator between biological brothers, the mother, provides a prenatal environment that fosters homosexuality in her younger sons."
ref: Saintis dari Michigan State University menambah dalam artikel: "Data ini menguatkan lagi penyataan yang biasa disebut antara adik-beradik abang kandung, ibunya, memberikan persekitaran pranatal yang mendorong homoseksualiti dalam anak lelaki mereka".

src: "Increasingly, credible evidence appears to indicate that being gay is genetically determined rather than being a so-called lifestyle choice."
ref: "Bukti yang sah semakin meningkat dan dilihat bahawa menjadi lelaki homoseksual ialah sesuatu yang ditentukan oleh genetik dan bukannya pilihan cara hidup".

src: However; Dr. Bogaert's study made no explanation for the origin of lesbianism.
ref: Bagaimanapun, penyelidikan Dr. Bogaert tidak mengulas mengenai asal-usul lesbianisma.

src: The Israeli military said the ministry office, controlled by Hamas, was "a meeting place to plan and direct terror activity."
ref: Tentera Israel berkata pejabat kementerian itu, yang dikawal oleh Hamas, adalah "tempat pertemuan untuk merancang dan mengarahkan aktiviti keganasan".

src: Days after the initial raid reports from Israeli officials stated that they had found the body of 18-year-old Eliyahu Yitzhak Asheri who was kidnapped by the Palestinian ruling party, Hamas, and shot in the back of the head on Sunday.
ref: Beberapa hari selepas laporan serbuan awal daripada pegawai-pegawai Israel menyatakan bahawa mereka telah menemui mayat Eliyahu Yitzhak Asheri yang berusia 18 tahun yang diculik oleh parti pemerintah Palestin, Hamas, dan ditembak di bahagian belakang kepala, kelmarin.

src: In his first appearance since the raid began, Palestinian PM and leader of the Hamas organization, Ismail Haniya denounced the raid saying it was a "premeditated plan" to bring down the new Hamas government.
ref: Dalam penampilan pertamanya sejak serbuan bermula, Perdana Menteri Palestin dan pemimpin organisasi Hamas, Ismail Haniya mengecam serbuan itu berkata ia adalah satu "rancangan yang dirancang" untuk menjatuhkan kerajaan Hamas yang baru.

src: The US House of Reprensentatives is seeking to lift a nine year old ban on export sales of the F-22A Raptor stealth fighter.
ref: Dewan perwakilan US sedang mencari untuk menarik balik larangan sembilan tahun keatas jualan eksport pesawat pejuang F-22A.

src: US lawmakers approved an amendment that would allow Lockheed Martin, the aircraft's primary manufacturer, to sell the aircraft overseas to foreign nations.
ref: Ahli parlimen US meluluskan pindaan yang akan membenarkan Lockheed Martin, pengeluar utama pesawat tersebut, untuk menjual pesawat tersebut keluar negara kepada negara asing.

src: Japan and South Korea, both strong allies of the United States are considered to be likely customers, if the ban is lifted.
ref: Jepun dan Korea Selatan, kedua-duanya sekutu kuat Amerika Syarikat dianggap sebagai pelanggan berkemungkinan, jika larangan tersebut ditarik balik.

src: The amendment was introduced by Rep. Kay Granger, (R-Texas), whose constituency, the Fort Worth district is home to a major Lockheed Martin facility.
ref: Pindaan tersebut diperkenalkan oleh Rep. Kay Granger, (R-Texas), yang bahagian pilihan raya, daerah Fort Worth rumah kepada infrastruktur utama kepada Lockheed Martin.
