src: Germany beat Argentina 4-2 on penalties to book a place in the Fifa World Cup semi-finals in Berlin, Friday.
ref: Jerman menewaskan Argentina 4-2 menerusi penentuan sepakan penalti untuk menempah tempat dalam Piala Dunia Fifa separuh akhir di Berlin, Jumaat.

src: The match had drawn 1-1 without many clear chances for either side due to defensive play on both sides.
ref: Perlawanan itu telah seri 1-1 tanpa banyak peluang jelas untuk mana-mana pihak kerana permainan pertahanan di kedua-dua belah pihak.

src: Four minutes after half-time Roberto Ayala got across Miroslav Klose to meet Juan Riquelme's corner which he powered between Jens Lehmann and his near post guard, Philipp Lahm.
ref: Empat minit selepas separuh masa Roberto Ayala memotong Miroslav Klose untuk bertemu Juan Riquelme di sudut yang dipunyai olehnya di antara Jens Lehmann dan pos kawalan berhampirannya, Philipp Lahm.

src: The goal early in the second period made for a more exciting match which had been mostly uneventful in a first half during which neither side could muster more than a single shot.
ref: Gol awal pada babak kedua membuat perlawanan yang lebih menarik yang selama ini kebanyakannya kurang memberangsangkan pada separuh masa pertama di mana tidak ada pihak boleh mengumpul lebih daripada satu tendangan.

src: Juergen Klinsmann may be credited with a substitution change that partially helped Germany get an equalising goal.
ref: Juergen Klinsmann boleh dikreditkan dengan perubahan penggantian yang sebahagiannya membantu Jerman mendapatkan gol penyamaan.

src: Argentine manager may also have made a tactical mistake and suffered form a moment of bad fortune.
ref: Pengurus Argentina juga mungkin telah membuat satu kesilapan taktikal dan mengalami masa yang bernasib buruk.

src: In the minutes before Germany equalised from Ballack's wonderful left field cross his goalkeeper had to be stretchered off with a muscle injury.
ref: Dalam minit sebelum Jerman menyamakan kedudukan dari penyeberangan padang kiri Ballack yang hebat penjaga gol terpaksa diusung keluar akibat kecederaan otot.

src: The bad luck and changes seemed to put Germany in charge of the tactical game for the first time in the match.
ref: Nasib buruk dan perubahan seolah-olah meletakkan Jerman yang bertanggungjawab bagi permainan taktikal buat kali pertama dalam perlawanan itu.

src: A minute after Cruz arrived Pekerman might have regretted his decision.
ref: Satu minit selepas Cruz tiba Pekerman mungkin telah menyesal keputusannya.

src: Klose's fifth World Cup goal ten minutes from time put him at the top of the Fifa Golden Boot leader board as the tournament's highest goalscorer.
ref: Gol kelima Piala Dunia Klose sepuluh minit dari semasa meletakkan dia di atas papan pemimpin Fifa Kasut Emas sebagai penjaring gol tertinggi kejohanan.

src: The game finished 1-1 and the two halves of extra time mirrored the match; first half uneventful, the second half more attacking.
ref: Permainan selesai 1-1 dan kedua-dua bahagian masa tambahan mencerminkan perlawanan; separuh pertama lancar, separuh kedua lebih menyerang.

src: Fabricio Coloccini came closest to breaking the deadlock when he hit the crossbar from 45 yards trying to catch Lehmann off his goal line.
ref: Fabricio Coloccini hampir memecah kebuntuan apabila terkena palang gol dari 45 ela ketika cuba untuk menangkap Lehmann dari garisan gol.

src: Neither Germany or Argentina had lost in a World Cup penalty contest; both sides had won three.
ref: Baik Jerman atau Argentina tidak pernah tewas pada pertandingan penalti Piala Dunia; kedua-dua pihak telah memenangi tiga.

src: All the penalties hit the target and were well struck, except Ayala's who hit a soft effort which Lehmann saved to his left.
ref: Semua tendangan penalti mencapai sasaran dan ditendang dengan baik, kecuali Ayala yang menendang dengan usaha lembut yang Lehmann selamatkan ke kirinya.

src: Unused Argentine substitute Leandro Cufre assaulted German Per Mertesacker and was presented the red card by Lubos Michel.
ref: Pengganti Argentina yang tidak digunakan Leandro Cufre diserang Jerman Per Mertesacker dan telah dibentangkan kad merah oleh Lubos Michel.

src: When Tim Borowski got Germany's fourth penalty he made a sign to the Argentine players to be quiet.
ref: Apabila Tim Borowski mendapat penalti keempat Jerman dia membuat tanda kepada pemain Argentina untuk menjadi tenang.

src: After the penalty kicks Argentine players approached Borowski and a scuffle of mostly pushing began that involved dozens of players, referees, coaches and substitutes.
ref: Selepas penalti tendangan pemain Argentina mendekati Borowski dan pergelutan kebanyakannya menolak mula dengan berpuluh-puluh pemain, pengadil, jurulatih dan pemain simpanan terlibat.

src: FIFA said television pictures would be looked at and fines or sanctions would be considered if appropriate.
ref: FIFA berkata gambar televisyen akan melihat dan denda atau sekatan akan dipertimbangkan sekiranya sesuai.

src: The bombing of Pan Am Flight 103 from London to New York resulted in 270 fatalities, including all 259 of the airplane's occupants and eleven individuals on the ground.
ref: Pengeboman Pesawat Pan Am 103 dari London ke New York menyebabkan 270 kematian, termasuk semua 259 penghuni pesawat dan sebelas individu di atas tanah.

src: The death toll for this terrorist incident is larger than that for any other which has occurred in the United Kingdom thus far.
ref: Angka kematian kejadian pengganas ini adalah lebih besar daripada kejadian pengganas bagi apa-apa lain yang telah berlaku di United Kingdom setakat ini.

src: Five years later, senior judges in Scotland were to review his case, but he dropped the appeal.
ref: Lima tahun kemudian, hakim-hakim kanan di Scotland mengkaji semula kes itu, tetapi dia membatalkan rayuan itu.

src: Current UK Prime Minister David Cameron commented on his belief that al-Megrahi "should never have been released from prison" and said his death was an occasion "to remember the 270 people who lost their lives in what was an appalling terrorist act".
ref: Perdana Menteri UK semasa David Cameron mengulas mengenai keyakinannya bahawa al-Megrahi "tidak sepatutnya dibebaskan dari penjara" dan berkata kematiannya adalah kesempatan "untuk mengingati 270 orang yang kehilangan nyawa mereka dalam apa adalah satu tindakan pengganas mengerikan."

src: According to Alex Salmond, First Minister of Scotland, the investigation into the Lockerbie bombing is ongoing.
ref: Menurut Alex Salmond, Menteri Pertama Scotland, siasatan pengeboman Lockerbie sedang dijalankan.

src: US citizen Susan Cohen, the mother of one of those killed in the Lockerbie bombing, thought of al-Megrahi as "a mass murderer" who "deserved to die", adding to CNN: "I feel no pity around him".
ref: Warganegara Amerika Syarikat Susan Cohen, ibu kepada salah seorang daripada mereka yang terbunuh dalam pengeboman Lockerbie, menganggap al-Megrahi sebagai "pembunuh besar-besaran" yang "berhak untuk mati," menambah kepada CNN: "Saya berasa tiada simpati di sekelilingnya."

src: However, UK citizen Jim Swire, father of another victim of the bombing, believes al-Megrahi was not guilty.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, warga UK Jim Swire, bapa mangsa lain daripada pengeboman, percaya al-Megrahi tidak bersalah.

src: He described al-Megrahi's death as "a sad time", telling the BBC he was "satisfied for some years that this man was nothing to do with the murder of my daughter".
ref: Dia menyifatkan kematian al-Megrahi sebagai "masa yang sedih," memberitahu BBC beliau "berpuas hati untuk beberapa tahun bahawa orang ini tiada kaitan dengan pembunuhan anak perempuan saya."

src: Ted Hollis, a criminal attorney from Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, is suing the creator of a website which allows women to complain about men they have dated after being named by two women on the self-proclaimed controversial site.
ref: Ted Hollis, seorang peguam jenayah dari Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, menyaman pencipta sebuah laman web yang membolehkan wanita untuk mengadu tentang lelaki yang mereka pernah berkasih selepas dinamakan oleh dua wanita di laman sendiri yang kontroversi.

src: The website, DontDateHimGirl.com, allows women to use a search engine to find alleged deceivers.
ref: Laman web, DontDateHimGirl.com, membolehkan wanita untuk menggunakan enjin carian untuk mencari penipu yang didakwa.

src: As well as featuring a discussion board that enables women to criticise partners, the website also includes the names, details, and photographs of so-called cheats.
ref: Serta memaparkan papan perbincangan yang membolehkan wanita untuk mengkritik rakan kongsi, laman web ini juga termasuk nama, butir-butir, dan gambar-gambar yang dipanggil penipu.

src: Men can respond to postings, but they can't get them erased.
ref: Lelaki boleh bertindak balas kepada posting, tetapi mereka tidak boleh memadamnya.

src: According to Hollis, two local women claimed the man was, among other things, two-timing.
ref: Menurut Hollis, dua wanita tempatan mendakwa lelaki itu, antara lain, menduakan mereka.

src: Mr Hollis added that he is blameless, and that the website should check the reliability of the information it contains.
ref: Mr Hollis berkata bahawa dia tidak bersalah, dan bahawa laman web yang perlu menyemak kebolehpercayaan maklumat yang terkandung di dalamnya.

src: Tasha Joseph, the creator of DontDateHimGirl.com, notes that this is the first lawsuit filed against her website.
ref: Tasha Joseph, pencipta DontDateHimGirl.com, menyatakan bahawa ini adalah tuntutan pertama difailkan terhadap laman web beliau.

src: Ferrari driver Michael Schumacher and his teammate Felipe Massa won the front row on the FIA Formula-1 United States Grand Prix on the Indianapolis Motor Speedway.
ref: Pemandu Ferrari, Michael Schumacher dan rakan sepasukan, Felipe Massa memenangi barisan hadapan pada FIA Formula-1 Grand Prix Amerika Syarikat di Indianapolis Motor Speedway.

src: Rubens Barrichello, Honda driver, wedged between the Renault cars on the starting grid and oust Fernando Alonso to the fifth place.
ref: Rubens Barrichello, pemandu Honda, desak antara kereta Renault di petak permulaan dan menggulingkan Fernando Alonso ke tempat kelima.

src: People came across Canada to Ottawa to celebrate Canada's 139th birthday.
ref: Orang ramai datang merentasi Kanada ke Ottawa untuk menyambut ulang tahun ke 139 Kanada.

src: About 25,000 people including Prime Minister Stephen Harper, his wife and their two children were there.
ref: Sekitar 25,000 orang termasuk Perdana Menteri Stephen Harper, isteri beliau dan dua anak mereka berada di sana.

src: Canadian artists like Colin James and Annie Villeneuve performed in front of the Peace Tower.
ref: Artis Kanada seperti Colin James dan Annie Villeneuve membuat persembahan di hadapan Menara Keamanan.

src: Since Canada has two official languages (English and French) some artists were from Quebec and sung in French.
ref: Sejak Kanada mempunyai dua bahasa rasmi (Bahasa Inggeris dan Bahasa Perancis) sebahagian artis dari Quebec dan menyanyi dalam Bahasa Perancis.

src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper urged Canadians to pay tribute to the soldiers and aid workers in Afghanistan.
ref: Perdana Menteri Stephen Harper meminta rakyat Kanada untuk memberi penghormatan kepada tentera dan pekerja bantuan keselamatan di Afghanistan.

src: "Let's show our appreciation, today and every day, to those who do it best for us in Afghanistan and around the world," Harper said.
ref: "Marilah kita menunjukkan penghargaan, hari ini dan setiap hari, kepada mereka yang melakukan yang terbaik bagi kita di Afghanistan dan seluruh dunia," kata Harper.

src: "Our diplomats, our development workers and brave men and women of the Canadian Forces."
ref: "Diplomat kita, pegawai pembangunan kita dan Angkatan Tentera Kanada lelaki dan wanita yang berani".

src: Michaëlle Jean noted Canada's prosperity, including in her remarks a thank you to the people who toil to provide the country with a safe and plentiful food supply.
ref: Michaelle Jean menyatakan kemakmuran Kanada, memasukkan dalam kenyataan beliau satu ucapan terima kasih kepada mereka yang bekerja keras untuk menyediakan bekalan makanan negara yang selamat dan banyak.

src: Bill Graham released a statement describing Canada as being like no other country, "made up of individuals, representing all ethnicities and all religions, bound together by our shared values of family, community, tolerance and freedom."
ref: Bill Graham mengeluarkan satu kenyataan menggambarkan Kanada sebagai sebuah negara tidak seperti yang lain, "terdiri daripada individu, mewakili semua kumpulan etnik dan agama, terikat bersama oleh nilai kekeluargaan, komuniti, toleransi dan kebebasan yang sama".

src: Amateur astronomers with 6-inch telescopes would be able to follow the speeding space debris in Europe and North America at its closest approach to the planet at 0425 UTC.
ref: Ahli-ahli astronomi amatur yang mempunyai teleskop 6-inci boleh mengikuti serpihan angkasa yang sedang memecut di Eropah dan Amerika Utara pada pendekatan yang paling dekat dengan planet ini pada 0425 UTC.

src: 2004 XP14 is named as a Potentially Hazardous Asteroid (PHA), along with 782 known others by Astronomers at the Smithsonian Astrophysical Observatory at Harvard.
ref: 2004 XP14 dinamakan sebagai Asteroid Berpotensi Berbahaya (PHA), bersama-sama dengan 782 yang lain yang dikenalpasti oleh Ahli-ahli astronomi di Balai Cerap Astrofizikal Smithsonian di Harvard.

src: Zipping about in the solar system no PHAs have yet been found on direct collision course with the Earth.
ref: Memecut laju di dalam sistem solar, masih tiada asteroid PHA didapati berlanggar secara langsung dengan Bumi.

src: Still, "For something of this size to come this close is unusual," said Don Yeomans, the head of NASA's Near Earth Object Program.
ref: Namun, "Untuk sesuatu yang sebesar itu datang sedekat ini adalah luar biasa," kata Don Yeomans, ketua Program Objek Berdekatan Bumi NASA.

src: Before 2004 XP14's exact orbital path around the sun was known with more precision, there were concerns it would hit the Earth.
ref: Sebelum 2004 laluan orbit sebenar XP14 yang mengelilingi matahari dikenalpasti dengan lebih tepat, terdapat kebimbangan ia akan menghentam bumi.

src: In the near future Jon Giorgini said such cosmic uncertainty would be much less and the public less alarmed.
ref: Dalam masa terdekat Jon Giorgini berkata ketidaktentuan kosmos seperti itu akan berkurangan dan orang awam kurang cemas.

src: "In the next 20 to 30 years, we'll have a complete catalog of hazardous objects," Giorgini said.
ref: "Dalam 20 hingga 30 tahun akan datang, kita akan mempunyai katalog lengkap objek berbahaya," kata Giorgini.

src: Edward Lu and Stanley Love, of Johnson Space Centre, Houston, also have allayed fears about a collision.
ref: Edward Lu dan Stanley Love, dari Pusat Angkasa Johnson, Houston, turut meredakan kebimbangan tentang perlanggaran.

src: Amorth, 85, who was appointed by the late Pope John Paul II, makes his remarks as Italian police try to determine if bones buried near the body of a mobster belong to Orlandi.
ref: Amorth, 85, yang dilantik oleh mendiang Pope John Paul II, membuat komennya apabila polis Itali cuba memastikan jika tulang-tulang yang dikebumikan berdekatan mayat seorang samseng adalah milik Orlandi.

src: Anonymous claims have suggested the tomb of contains clues to her disappearance.
ref: Dakwaan tanpa nama telah mengatakan yang kubur itu mengandungi bukti kepada kehilangannya.

src: Buried in a nearby crypt, the bones are thought to be centuries old but forensic tests are ongoing.
ref: Dikebumikan di bilik bawah gereja berdekatan, tulang-tulang itu dianggap sudah beratus tahun tetapi ujian forensik masih sedang berterusan.

src: One theory is Pedis kidnapped Orlandi to press Vatican officials over a financial dispute, with his onetime lover claiming her body was disposed of in a cement mixer.
ref: Satu teori adalah Pedis menculik Orlandi untuk mendesak penguatkuasa Vatican berkenaan perbalahan kewangan, dengan bekas kekasihnya mendakwa mayatnya dibuang ke dalam pencampur simen.

src: He further told La Stampa "The network involved diplomatic personnel from a foreign embassy to the Holy See.
ref: Dia juga memberitahu La Stampa "Rangkaian itu melibatkan kakitangan diplomatik dari sebuah kedutaan asing ke Holy See.

src: 25 New Zealand police officers have left today, July 11, for three months in East Timor.
ref: 25 pegawai polis New Zealand telah pergi hari ini, 11 Julai, selama tiga bulan di Timor Timur.

src: The police force will assist the 160 New Zealand Defence Force armed personnel that are already in East Timor as well as other country's personnel.
ref: Pasukan polis akan membantu 160 orang Angkatan Tentera New Zealand anggota bersenjata yang sudah berada di Timor Timur dan juga kakitangan negara lain.

src: Grant O'Fee, contingent commander, said "attempts will be made to establish good relations with village chiefs."
ref: Grant O'Fee, komander kontinjen, berkata "percubaan akan dibuat untuk mewujudkan hubungan yang baik dengan ketua kampung".

src: This appointment has been congratulated by the United Nations (UN) Secretary General, Kofi Annan.
ref: Pelantikan ini telah diucap tahniah daripada Setiausaha Agung Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu (PBB), Kofi Annan.

src: Today, it was announced that Syd Barrett, the founding member of British rock band Pink Floyd died from a complication with diabetes.
ref: Hari ini, telah diumumkan bahawa Syd Barrett, ahli pengasas Pink Floyd kumpulan rock British telah meninggal dunia akibat komplikasi kencing manis.

src: The band are naturally very upset and sad to learn of Syd Barrett’s death.
ref: Kumpulan itu sudah tentunya sangat susah hati dan sedih apabila mengetahui kematian Syd Barrett.

src: Syd was the guiding light of the early band line-up and leaves a legacy which continues to inspire, noted a statement issued by Pink Floyd.
ref: Syd merupakan pemacu arah di awal penubuhan kumpulan dan meninggalkan legasi yang terus mengilhamkan, dalam kenyataan oleh Pink Floyd.

src: During 1967-1968, Syd Barrett was considered to be the main member and songwriter of Pink Floyd.
ref: Pada tahun 1967-1968, Syd Barrett dianggap sebagai ahli utama dan penulis lagu untuk Pink Floyd.

src: Pink Floyd recorded Wish You Were Here as a tribute following Barrett's leave.
ref: Pink Floyd merakam Wish You Were Here sebagai tanda penghormatan di atas pemergian Barrett.

src: But on French television Zidane showed remorse for his behaviour.
ref: Tetapi di televisyen Perancis Zidane menunjukkan kesesalan atas kelakuannya.

src: "I want to ask for forgiveness from all the children who watched," he said.
ref: "Saya ingin meminta maaf kepada semua kanak-kanak yang menonton," katanya.

src: It was expected that Zidane would reveal what provoked him into the headbutt.
ref: Dijangka Zidane akan mendedahkan apa yang membangkitkan kemarahannya sehingga menyebabkannya melanggar dengan kepala.

src: However, Zidane refused to divulge what Materazzi actually said but did say that Materazzi made remarks which were "very personal" and specifically concerned his mother and sister.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Zidane enggan mendedahkan apa yang dikatakan Materazzi tetapi mengatakan bahawa Materazzi membuat kenyataan yang "sangat peribadi" dan secara khususnya berkenaan ibu dan kakaknya.

src: "Zidane is my hero and I have always admired him a lot," said Materazzi.
ref: "Zidane adalah wira saya dan saya sentiasa amat mengaguminya," kata Materazzi.

src: "I want to apologise to them [the children] but I can't regret what I did because it would mean that he [Materazzi] was right to say what he said".
ref: "Saya ingin meminta maaf kepada mereka [kanak-kanak] tetapi saya tidak boleh menyesal atas apa yang saya lakukan kerana ia akan bermaksud yang dia [Materazzi] betul untuk bercakap sebegitu".

src: The partial apology comes as FIFA President Sept Blatter said Zidane may be stripped of his Golden Ball award for the tournament's best player.
ref: Permohonan maaf separa itu berlaku semasa Presiden FIFA Sept Blatter berkata Zidane mungkin dilucutkan dari anugerah Bola Emasnya sebagai pemain terbaik dalam kejohanan itu.

src: FIFA set up a disciplinary committee to investigate Zidane's violent conduct.
ref: FIFA menubuhkan sebuah jawatankuasa disiplin untuk menyiasat kelakuan ganas Zidane.

src: After the red card to Zidane, Italy went on to win the final on penalty kicks.
ref: Selepas kad merah diberikan kepada Zidane, Itali telah memenangi perlawanan akhir dengan tendangan penalti.

src: "Since this morning Israeli naval vessels have enforced a full naval closure on Lebanon, because Lebanon's ports are used to transfer both terrorists and weapons to the terror organizations operating in Lebanon," a spokesman for Israeli Army said.
ref: "Sejak pagi ini kapal tentera laut Israel telah menguatkuasakan penutupan tentera laut penuh di Lebanon, kerana pelabuhan Lebanon digunakan untuk memindahkan kedua-dua pengganas dan senjata untuk pertubuhan-pertubuhan pengganas yang beroperasi di Lebanon," kata jurucakap tentera Israel berkata.

src: The spokesman did not comment on whether Israel had also blockaded Lebanon's airspace.
ref: Jurucakap itu tidak mengulas mengenai sama ada Israel juga telah dikepung ruang udara Lebanon.

src: However Israeli aircraft attacked Beirut's Rafik al-Hariri International Airport, Thursday morning, which damaged the main runway and forced incoming flights to divert to Cyprus.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun pesawat Israel menyerang Lapangan Terbang di Beirut Rafik al-Hariri Antarabangsa, pagi Khamis, yang merosakkan landasan utama dan memaksa penerbangan yang diterima untuk mengalihkan ke Cyprus.

src: Israel's Army Radio said that other airports might also be targeted in order to restrict access to Lebanon.
ref: Radio Tentera Israel berkata, lapangan terbang lain mungkin juga disasarkan untuk menyekat akses ke Lebanon.

src: "We will take all necessary measures to bring an end to the rogue behavior of a state that does not assume responsibility and put an end to the activities of a major partner in their own government," said Israeli Cabinet Minister Isaac Herzog to Reuters.
ref: "Kami akan mengambil semua langkah yang perlu untuk menamatkan peri laku penyangak sebuah negara yang tidak bertanggungjawab dan berakhir dengan aktiviti-aktiviti rakan kongsi utama dalam kerajaan mereka sendiri," kata Menteri Kabinet Israel Isaac Herzog kepada Reuters.

src: 27 civilians have been killed so far in Israeli raids on Lebanon.
ref: 27 orang awam terbunuh setakat ini dalam serbuan Israel ke atas Lebanon.

src: The total death toll stands at 178 people but many people are missing, and the figure might rise.
ref: Jumlah kematian mececah 178 orang tetapi ramai yang hilang, dan jumlah mungkin meningkat.

src: Floods, 10 meters high in some areas washed away 19,100 houses, damaged roads, power lines, and devastated villages and agriculture.
ref: Banjir, setinggi 10 meter disesetengah kawasan menghanyutkan 19,100 rumah, merosakkan jalan, talian elektrik, dan memusnahkan perkampungan dan pertanian.

src: Three million people were affected by the tropical storm which Xinhua, the state news agency, estimated would cost three billion yuan ($375 million) damage.
ref: Tiga juta orang mendapat kesan dari ribut petir tropika itu dimana Xinhua, agensi berita negeri, menjangkakan kerosakan berjumlah tiga bilion yuan ($375juta).

src: At least 92 died in Hunan where dam reservoirs rose to their limits.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 92 maut di Hunan dimana simpanan dam mencapai limit.

src: 40,000 people in the cities of Hengyang and Chenzhou were reported stranded.
ref: 40,000 orang di bandar Hengyang dan Chenzou dilaporkan tersekat.

src: 14 coal miners died when a dam burst, ravaging the land and flooding their pit at Shenjiawan Colliery.
ref: 14 pelombong arang mati akibat pecahan dam, merosakkan tanah dan membanjiri pitnya di Lombong Shenjiawan.

src: 10,000 workers were sent to repair the damaged sections of line.
ref: 10,000 pekerja dihantar untuk membaiki bahagian laluan yang rosak.

src: Lechang was submerged under three metres of water and 1663 prisoners had to be moved from the city.
ref: Lechang tenggelam dibawah tiga meter air dan 1663 tahanan penjara terpaksa dipindahkan dari bandar itu.

src: A new study by Duke University in the US suggests depressed adolescents who respond to treatment within twelve weeks are at a reduced risk of drug abuse later in their lives.
ref: Satu kajian baru oleh Universiti Duke di US menunjukkan remaja tertekan yang bertindak balas terhadap rawatan dalam tempoh dua belas minggu mempunyai kurang risiko penyalahgunaan dadah di dalam kehidupan mereka di masa hadapan.

src: Alcohol use problems, however, were equally prevalent regardless of treatment outcome.
ref: Masalah penggunaan alkohol, bagaimanapun, turut tersebar luas dengan sama tanpa mengira kesan rawatan.

src: Curry noted that the results for those treated successfully held true "whatever they responded to — cognitive-behavioral therapy, Prozac, both treatments, or a placebo".
ref: Curry berkata bahawa keputusan untuk mereka yang dirawat berjaya disahkan benar "apa sahaja yang mereka telah bertindakbalas - terapi kognitif tingkah laku, Prozac, kedua-dua rawatan, atau plasebo".

src: The study has called for treatments to take possible alcohol and drug use into account.
ref: Kajian ini telah mengambil berat tentang rawatan terhadap kemungkinan pengambilan alkohol dan penggunaan dadah.

src: Said Curry, "When the teenagers got over the depression, about half of them stayed well for the whole five-year period, but almost half of them had a second episode of depression... what we found out was that, for those who had both alcohol disorder and another depression, the alcohol disorder almost always came first".
ref: Kata Curry, "Apabila remaja telah mengatasi kemurungan, kira-kira separuh daripada mereka tinggal dengan baik untuk tempoh lima tahun sepenuhnya, tetapi hampir separuh daripada mereka mempunyai satu episod kedua kemurungan...apa yang kita dapati adalah bahawa, bagi mereka yang mempunyai kedua-dua gangguan alkohol dan kemurungan lain, gangguan alkohol hampir selalunya datang dahulu".

src: He also said the study had "a take-home message" in "that alcohol use disorders are very prevalent during that particular age period and there’s a need for a lot of prevention and education for college students to avoid getting into heavy drinking and then the beginnings of an alcohol disorder".
ref: Beliau juga berkata kajian itu mempunyai "satu mesej untuk dibawa pulang" iaitu "gangguan penyalahgunaan alkohol adalah sangat berleluasa dalam tempoh usia yang tersebut dan perlu ada banyak pencegahan dan pendidikan untuk pelajar kolej bagi mengelakkan diri mereka terjerumus ke dalam pengambilan arak yang banyak dan seterusnya permulaan kepada penyalahgunaan alkohol".

src: Curry, alongside Dr. Susan Silva, a co-author, want more research using larger groups.
ref: Curry, bersama Dr. Susan Silva, pengarang bersama, mahu lebih banyak kajian dengan menggunakan kumpulan yang lebih besar.

src: They also say work towards a comparison with non-depressed individuals is needed.
ref: Mereka juga berkata kerja-kerja ke arah perbandingan dengan individu tidak tertekan adalah diperlukan.

src: Warm air from the Gulf Stream is raising the temperature, and the hot weather is causing the asphalt on some public roads to melt, requiring gritting.
ref: Udara panas dari Arus Teluk menaikkan suhu, dan cuaca panas menyebabkan asfalt di beberapa jalan awam menjadi cair, yang memerlukan kersik.

src: People have also been asked to check the most vulnerable, including the elderly, the young and the sick.
ref: Orang ramai juga telah diminta untuk memeriksa mereka yang paling lemah, termasuk warga tua, yang muda dan yang sakit.

src: Lerwick in the Shetland Islands is currently cloudy with fog, at only 18ºC (64ºF) Weather forecasters have said that while the temperatures are not going to rise any further, it will get more humid as a band of showers arrive this evening, with night-time temperatures at 19ºC in London and Cardiff, 14ºC in Edinburgh and 18ºC in Dublin.
ref: Lerwick di Kepulauan Shetland kini mendung dengan kabus, hanya 18ºC (64ºF) Peramal cuaca telah berkata ketika suhu tidak akan naik lagi, ia akan menjadi lebih lembap dengan jalur hujan tiba petang ini, dengan suhu pada waktu malam pada 19ºC di London dan Cardiff, 14ºC di Edinburgh dan 18ºC di Dublin.

src: At a Friday press conference, owner J. Paul Reddam announced that the thoroughbred was injured and he will not only be removed from the race Saturday but he will be retired from any further racing.
ref: Dalam sidang akhbar pada hari Jumaat, pemilik belima, J. Paul Reddam mengumumkan belimanya telah tercedera dan ia bukan sahaja akan dikeluarkan daripada perlumbaan hari Sabtu, malah akan bersara daripada perlumbaan pada masa akan datang.

src: The reason I'll Have Another was scratched from the field was because of a swelling in his left front tendon, according to trainer Doug O'Neill.
ref: Punca I'll Have Another dikeluarkan daripada perlumbaan adalah kerana bengkak di sebelah tendon depan kirinya, menurut jurulatih Doug O'Neil.

src: Before the Kentucky Derby, I'll Have Another won the Santa Anita Derby.
ref: Sebelum Kentucky Derby, I'll Have Another telah memenangi Santa Anita Derby.

src: All of these races were won with Mexican jockey Mario Gutierrez.
ref: Kesemua perlumbaan ini telah dimenangi bersama dengan joki Mexico Mario Gutierrez.

src: Dale Romans, who is Dullahan's trainer, reacted to the news, "It's devastating."
ref: Dale Romans, yang merupakan jurulatih Dullahan, membalas berita itu, "Ia sangat menghancurkan harapan kami."

src: "I thought this was going to be one of the greatest races in history, and I wanted the opportunity to be part of it."
ref: "Saya ingatkan ini akan menjadi salah satu perlumbaan yang paling hebat dalam sejarah, dan saya ingin peluang itu menjadi sebahagian daripadanya."

src: Dullahan raced in this year's Kentucky Derby and took third place.
ref: Dullahan telah berlumba dalam Kentucky Derby pada tahun ini dan memenangi tempat ketiga.

src: Only eleven horses have ever won the Triple Crown in the United States.
ref: Hanya sebelas kuda pernah memenangi Triple Crown di Amerika Syarikat.

src: The dry spell will continue at least another year — the 34th year without a Triple Crown victory.
ref: Kemarau kejuaraan akan berterusan sekurang-kurangnya sehingga tahun berikutnya - tahun ke-34 tanpa pemenang Triple Crown.

src: Steven Lacey, 56, from Brooten, Minnesota, was killed in a one-vehicle rollover late Sunday night, July 16, 2006.
ref: Steven Lacey, 56, dari Brooten, Minnesota, telah terbunuh dalam satu kemalangan kenderaan lewat malam Ahad, 16 Julai, 2006.

src: The Pope County Sheriff’s Office said that at approximately 11 p.m. his vehicle went off the road and rolled over on 110th Avenue, near Brooten, Minnesota, in Pope County, Minnesota's Bangor Township, about 15 miles SE from Glenwood, MN, about 55 miles WNW from St.
ref: Pejabat Syerif Daerah Pope berkata yang pada lebih kurang jam 11 malam kenderaannya terkeluar dari jalan dan bergolek diatas 110th Avenue, berdekatan Brooten, Minnesota, dalam Daerah Pope, Bandar Bangor Minnesota, lebih kurang 15 batu SE dari Glenwood, MN, lebih kurang 55 batu WNW dari St.

src: Cloud, MN, or about 100 miles NW from the Twin Cities.
ref: Cloud, MN, atau lebih kurang 100 batu dari bandar Twin.

src: JetBlue Airways launched service from Raleigh-Durham International Airport to John F. Kennedy International Airport on Thursday, July 20.
ref: JetBlue Airways melancarkan perkhidmatan dari Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Raleigh-Durham ke Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa John F. Kennedy pada Khamis, 20 Julai.

src: The airline also announced daily service from Raleigh to Boston starting on October 18.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan itu juga mengumumkan perkhidmatan harian dari Raleigh ke Boston bermula pada 18 Oktober.

src: JetBlue's service in Raleigh is comprised of four daily flights to New York, the airline's hub.
ref: Perkhidmatan JetBlue di Raleigh terdiri daripada empat penerbangan harian ke New York, pusat syarikat penerbangan itu.

src: The aircraft are equipped with DirecTV and XM Satellite Radio programming.
ref: Pesawat ini dilengkapi dengan DirecTV dan program XM Radio Satelit.

src: Raleigh-Durham International Airport currently has 223 daily departures to 37 cities.
ref: Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Raleigh-Durham pada masa ini mempunyai 223 pelepasan setiap hari ke 37 bandar.

src: An underwater earthquake with a magnitude of 7.7 triggered the deadly wave which ravaged a 200km stretch of Java's southern coast.
ref: Gempa bumi di dasar laut dengan magnitud 7.7 menyebabkan ombak merbahaya yang mana memusnahkan 200km bahagian pantai barat Java.

src: They are too apprehensive to return home due to fears of another tsunami, but according to Reuters, health officials are worried about the threat of disease among those who are still in refuge.
ref: Mereka masih terlalu risau untuk pulang ke rumah kerana takut akan tsunami berikutnya, tetapi mengikut Reuters, pegawai kesihatan bimbang akan penyebaran penyakit di kalangan mereka yang masih di tempat perlindungan.

src: "The risk of catching diseases is there because they live in an open area with limited tents and water," said Rustan Pakaya, from the health ministry's crisis centre.
ref: "Adalah berkemungkinan untuk mereka mendapat penyakit kerana mereka tinggal di kawasan terbuka dengan khemah dan air yang terhad," kata Rustan Pakaya, dari pusat krisis kementerian kesihatan.

src: He added that people were being given injections to protect them from diseases like measles, tetanus and cholera.
ref: Beliau menambah bahawa mereka diberi suntikan untuk mengelakkan mereka dijangkiti penyakit seperti campak, kancing gigi, dan kolera.

src: Areas worst hit, like the small town of Pangandaran, are beginning to return to normal, and many businesses there have begun to open up again.
ref: Kawasan yang paling terjejas, seperti bandar kecil Pangandaran, telah mula kembali ke keadaan asal, dan banyak perniagaan di situ telah mula dibuka kembali.

src: "The market and many shops are already open today and although they are not operating fully, things are slowly returning to normal," district spokesman Wasdi bin Umri told AFP.
ref: "Pasar dan banyak kedai telah dibuka hari ini dan walaupun mereka tidak beroperasi sepenuhnya, keadaan perlahan-lahan mula kembali ke normal," beritahu jurucakap bandar Wasdi bin Umri kepada AFP.

src: Yesterday, Indonesia's President, Susilo Bambang Yudhoyono toured Pangandaran and met people who were staying in a temporary camp.
ref: Semalam, Presiden Indonesia, Susilo Bambang Yudhoyono melawat Pangandaran dan berjumpa orang-orang yang masih tinggal di kem sementara.

src: Speaking yesterday, Mr Yudhoyono vowed to hasten efforts to build an early warning system planned after the 2004 Asian tsunami.
ref: Bercakap semalam, Mr Yudhoyono berjanji akan segera berusaha untuk membina sistem amaran awal setelah tsunami Asia 2004. "Kami mahu mempercepatkan usaha untuk mendapatkan infrastruktur untuk sistem amaran tsunami ditempatkan".

src: "We want to expedite efforts to get infrastructure for the tsunami warning system in place," AP quoted him as saying.
ref: AP memetik kata-kata beliau.

src: The city hall building in Buffalo, New York was evacuated after fire alarms were activated.
ref: Bangunan dewan bandar di Buffalo, New York telah dikosongkan selepas penggera kebakaran telah diaktifkan.

src: "Smoke detectors went off on the 13th and 27th floors."
ref: "Pengesan asap berhenti berbunyi pada tingkat ke-13 dan ke-27." "Antara perkara lain ialah kami terputus komunikasi dengan luar bangunan tersebut".

src: "Among other things we lost all communications out of the building."
ref: "Ada sesuatu yang memutuskan komunikasi, ada sesuatu yang mencetuskan penggera dan memotong kuasa ke lif," kata Mike Lombardo, Pesuruhjaya Bomba Buffalo.

src: "Something cut off communications, something set off those alarms and cut power to elevators," said Mike Lombardo, Buffalo's fire commissioner.
ref: Polis dan anggota bomba tiba di tempat kejadian untuk menemui litar pintas di tingkat ke-27 yang memutuskan komunikasi di antara jabatan polis dan jabatan bomba di bandar itu selama hampir dua jam.

src: Police and fire crews arrived on scene to discover a power surge in the 27th floor knocked out all communications between the police and fire departments in the city for nearly two hours.
ref: Anggota bomba terpaksa menggunakan tangga kecemasan untuk memeriksa bangunan untuk kebakaran dan mangsa daripada bangunan 32 tingkat itu terpaksa menggunakan tangga kecemasan untuk meyelamatkan diri kerana lif di bangunan itu tidak berfungsi dengan baik.

src: According to Lombardo, "it looks like we have no fire whatsoever [in the building]" and that all 2,800 workers were allowed to return to work shortly after 12:00 p.m. "We've been able to re-set things...we feel very confident that there's no other problems," added Lombardo.
ref: "Kami telah dapat menyelesaikan semula perkara... kami berasa sangat yakin tiada masalah-masalah lain," tambah Lombardo.

src: The Jewish Federation of Greater Seattle building in Seattle, Washington was the site of a shooting on at around 4 pm on July 28.
ref: Bangunan Persekutuan Yahudi Greater Seatle di Seattle, Washington ialah tempat kejadian tembakan yang berlaku pada kira-kira 4 pm pada 28 Julai.

src: A gunman who walked into the building shot one person dead and wounded five others.
ref: Seorang lelaki bersenjata yang berjalan ke dalam bangunan itu menembak mati seorang dan mencederakan lima orang lain.

src: According to witnesses the man walked up to the building and shot a woman in the leg.
ref: Menurut seorang saksi yang menyaksikan orang itu berjalan masuk ke bangunan dan menembak kaki seorang wanita.

src: He entered the building to go onto the roof and fire one shot before walking back inside and firing several more shots.
ref: Dia memasuki bangunan itu untuk pergi ke bumbung dan melepaskan satu tembakan sebelum berjalan balik ke dalam dan melepaskan beberapa tembakan lagi.

src: Pop!'
ref: Pop!

src: "I saw one friend –– she had been shot twice in the stomach and was bleeding," All of the victims were women between 19 and 43.
ref: "Saya melihat seorang kawan - dia telah ditembak dua kali di perut dan berdarah," Kesemua mangsa adalah wanita berumur antara 19 dan 43.

src: Three of the five have been taken to the operating room, said Pamela Steele, spokeswoman for the Harbourview Medical Center.
ref: Tiga daripada lima orang itu telah dibawa ke bilik bedah, kata Pamela Steele, jurucakap Pusat Perubatan Harbourview.

src: The FBI will be working with local authorities on the case.
ref: FBI akan bekerjasama dengan pihak berkuasa tempatan atas kes itu.

src: It was surrounded by a fence, it has bullet proof windows and all visitors must be buzzed in by reception.
ref: Ia dikelilingi pagar, ia mempunyai tingkap kalis peluru dan semua pelawat mesti melalui kaunter penyambut tetamu.

src: The month long election campaign in the run up to this weekend's elections in the Democratic Republic of Congo has ended, with a one day break before voting can begin Sunday.
ref: Kempen pilihan raya yang mengambil masa berbulan-bulan lamanya sehingga pilihanraya hujung minggu ini di Republik Demokratik Congo telah berakhir, dengan cuti sehari sebelum undian boleh bermula hari Ahad ini.

src: The fiercely fought campaign began on June 29th and involved no less than 9,707 parliamentary candidates and 33 presidential candidates.
ref: Kempen sengit itu bermula pada 29 Jun dan melibatkan tidak kurang daripada 9,707 calon parlimen dan 33 calon presiden.

src: Kabila, who became the youngest head of state in Africa in 2001, used his final speech before voting to claim credit for taking the D.R.Congo to its first democratic elections in over 40 years.
ref: Kabila, yang menjadi ketua negeri paling muda di Afrika pada tahun 2001, menggunakan ucapan terakhirnya sebelum mengundi untuk menuntut kredit kerana membawa D.R.Congo ke arah pilihanraya demokratik yang pertama dalam masa lebih daripada 40 tahun.

src: "I can say to you without false modesty: mission accomplished" he told crowds of around 50,000 on Friday, "We've reunited and pacified the country."
ref: "Saya boleh katakan kepada kamu tanpa sebarang kerendahan hati palsu: misi telah tercapai" dia berkata kepada kira-kira 50,000 orang ramai pada Jumaat, "Kami telah bersatu semula dan mengamankan negara ini."

src: "It is also a message of hope, and for peace and development and security after the polls."
ref: "Ia juga adalah satu mesej tentang harapan, dan untuk keamanan dan pembangunan dan keselamatan selepas pilihanraya."

src: The international community is taking a keen interest in the elections — the first since 1961.
ref: Masyarakat antarabangsa mempunyai minat yang mendalam dalam pilihanraya itu - yang pertama sejak tahun 1961.

src: However, the July campaign has been marred by violence and accusations of fraud on all sides.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kempen pada bulan Julai itu telah dicemari oleh keganasan dan tuduhan penipuan oleh semua pihak.

src: International observers, such as the Carter Centre, expressed concern that the incumbent President's domination of the media would undermine the campaign.
ref: Pemerhati antarabangsa, seperti Carter Centre, melahirkan rasa kebimbangan bahawa penguasaan media oleh penjawat kini Presiden akan melemahkan kempen.

src: Several hundred people protested at alleged irregularities in the polls on the 18th of July, which ended in 7 people being killed in police clashes.
ref: Beberapa ratus orang membantah dakwaan penyelewengan dalam pemilihan pada 18 Julai, yang berakhir dengan 7 orang terbunuh dalam pertempuran dengan polis.

src: This Thursday, 6 people were killed in election related incidents in the capital, Kinshasa, and yesterday, Kabila's presidential guards killed an opposition candidate's bodyguard in a gunfight.
ref: Khamis ini, 6 orang terbunuh dalam kejadian yang berkaitan dengan pilihanraya di ibu negara, Kinshasa, dan semalam, pengawal presiden Kabila membunuh seorang pengawal peribadi calon pembangkang dalam kejadian tembak-menembak.

src: The United Nations Security Council passed a resolution today demanding Iran halt all "enrichment-related and reprocessing activities, including research and development" before August 31.
ref: Dewan Keselamatan Bangsa-bangsa Bersatu telah meluluskan satu resolusi hari ini bagi meminta Iran menghentikan semua "aktiviti memproses semula dan yang berkaitan dengan memperkayakan, termasuk kajian dan pembangunan" sebelum 31 Ogos.

src: The resolution, number 1696, was drafted by the permanent five members of the council and was passed by a 14-1 vote, with Qatar, the only Arab member of the council voting against.
ref: Resolusi tersebut, bernombor 1696, telah dilakarkan oleh lima ahli tetap dewan dan telah diluluskan dengan 14-1 undi, dengan Qatar, satu-satunya ahli dewan Arab yang mengundi untuk membantahnya.

src: The resolution expressed "serious concern" at Iran's non-compliance with the IAEA's demand to halt enrichment and other activities and asked the IAEA director to report on Iran's compliance by the end of August.
ref: Resolusi itu menyuarakan "kebimbangan serius" kepada ketidak patuhan Iran dengan permintaan IAEA bagi menghentikan perkayaan dan semua aktiviti lain dan juga meminta direktor IAEA untuk melaporkan kepatuhan Iran di akhir bulan Ogos.

src: Iran's ambassador to the UN, Javad Zarif told the Reuters news agency, "Iran's peaceful nuclear programme poses no threat to international peace and security and therefore dealing with this issue in the Security Council is unwarranted and void of any legal basis or practical utility," Valery Churkin, Russia's ambassador to the UN said the deadline was meant to meet Iran's request to allow it to consider an offer made in June by the permanent five and Germany, offering Iran a "package" of sops in return for giving up enrichment activities.
ref: Duta besar iran ke UN, Javad Zarif berkata kepada agensi berita Reuters, "Program nuklear Iran yang aman tidak membahayakan keamanan dan keselamatan antarabangsa dan dengan demikian untuk mengendalikan isu ini di Dewan Keselamatan adalah tidak wajar dan membatalkan sebarang dasar undang-undang atau kemudahan praktikal," Valery Churkin, duta besar Russia ke UN berkata tempoh akhir itu bermaksud untuk memenuhi permintaan Iran supaya membenarkan ia mempertimbangkan satu tawaran yang dibuat pada Jun oleh lima kekal dan Jerman, yang menawar Iran satu "pakej" sops dengan syarat ia melepaskan aktiviti-aktiviti pengkayaan.

src: The massive surge of hot air that has plagued the West and Midwest during last week has now moved over the eastern seaboard of the United States.
ref: Lonjakan besar angin panas yang menyerang Barat dan Barat Tengah pada minggu lepas sekarang telah bergerak ke pesisir timur Amerika Syarikat.

src: Many cities are already struggling due to power outages from mid-July's Heat Wave, particularly some in the Queens and Staten Island in New York City.
ref: Banyak bandar yang sudah bergelut dengan masalah gangguan bekalan kuasa dari Gelombang Haba pertengahan Julai, terutamanya di Queens dan Staten Island di New York City.

src: Consolidated Edison, the power supplier for the New York City area, has reported that many customers are still without power.
ref: Consolidated Edison, pembekal tenaga kuasa kepada kawasan New York City, melaporkan bahawa masih banyak pengguna masih tiada tenaga kuasa.

src: They urge customers to lighten the load on power usage to help avoid further service interruption.
ref: Mereka menggesa pengguna agar mengurangkan penggunaan tenaga kuasa untuk mengelakkan gangguan perkhidmatan lebih teruk.

src: Baltimore, Washington D.C. and Philadelphia are all expecting highs to reach above 100ºF (37.8ºC).
ref: Baltimore, Washington D.C. dan Philadelphia semua menjangkakan suhu tinggi melebihi 100ºF (37.8℃).

src: Philadelphia will reach 100ºF, Washington D.C. will have a high of 101ºF and Baltimore and Richmond may see temperatures rise above the 100 mark.
ref: Philadelphia akan mencecah suhu 100ºF, Washington D.C. akan mengalami suhu setinggi 101ºF dan Baltimore dan Richmond akan menyaksikan peningkatan suhu melebihi 100 mark.

src: To exacerbate the situation, heat indices are expected to reach well over the 110s for much of the east coast due to high humidity levels.
ref: Lebih memburukkan keadaan, indeks suhu dijangkakan mencecah melebihi 110s di sebahagian besar kawasan pantai timur disebabkan oleh kadar kelembapan yang tinggi.

src: Many residents say this heat is unheard of as temperatures are expected to be higher than that of Florida and some parts of Texas, where it is typically hotter.
ref: Kebanyakan penduduk berkata keadaan panas ini tidak pernah dialami di mana suhu dijangkakan lebih tinggi dari di Florida dan beberapa tempat di Texas, di mana ia selalunya lebih panas.

src: Resulting from the Israeli bombings on July 13 and 15, 2006 of the Jiyeh power station, located on the coast 30 kilometers south of Beirut, Lebanon, approximately 35,000 tons of heavy fuel oil have spilled into the Mediterranean Sea.
ref: Akibat daripada pengeboman Israel pada 13 dan 15 Julai 2006 terhadap stesen kuasa Jiyeh, yang terletak di pesisiran pantai 30 kilometer di selatan Beirut, Lebanon, kira-kira 35,000 tan minyak bahan api berat telah tumpah ke Laut Mediterranean.

src: According to Berj Hatjian from the Lebanon Ministry of Environment, "What we have here is equivalent to a tanker sinking, and 20,000 to 30,000 tonnes reaching the shoreline."
ref: Menurut Berj Hatjian daripada Kementerian Alam Sekitar Lebanon, "Apa yang kita ada di sini adalah bersamaan dengan tenggelamnya sebuah kapal tangki, dan 20,000 hingga 30,000 tan mendekati pesisiran pantai".

src: Furthermore, several storage tanks caught fire due to the blast of the bombardment and continued to burn uncontrollably for 10 days after.
ref: Tambahan pula, beberapa tangki simpanan terbakar disebabkan oleh letupan pengeboman dan terus membakar tanpa kawalan selama 10 hari selepasnya.

src: Wind and water currents have spread the oil slick across 70-80 kilometers of Lebanon coastline.
ref: Arus angin dan air telah merebakkan tumpahan minyak di seluruh 70-80 kilometer dari pantai Lebanon.

src: Earlier today, the Australian Institute of Sport and Swimming Australia cancelled a team meeting for the Australian Stingers and a Swimming Australia Grand Prix event scheduled for this weekend after two Olympic bound water polo players, Melissa Rippon and Nicola Zagame, were diagnosed with whooping cough.
ref: Awal pagi tadi, Institut Kesukanan Australia dan Renang Australia telah membatalkan perjumpaan pasukan untuk Penyengat Australia dan acara Grand Prix Renang Australia yang dijadualkan hujung minggu ini selepas dua pemain polo air Olimpik, Melissa Rippon dan Nicola Zagame, didiagnosiskan dengan batuk kokol.

src: Both players are receiving treatment administered by the Australian Institute of Sport.
ref: Kedua-dua pemain menerima tawaran yang dikawal oleh Institut Kesukanan Australia.

src: In a statement issued by Water Polo Australia, they said "Water Polo Australia is taking this very seriously and will continue to work closely with AIS health professionals to provide the best care for those players diagnosed and to reduce any potential further risk".
ref: Dalam kenyataan yang dikeluarkan oleh Polo Air Australia, mereka berkata "Sukan Polo Air Australia mengambil hal ini sangat serius dan akan meneruskan untuk bekerja lebih dekat lagi dengan pakar kesihatan AIS untuk menyediakan cara penjagaan terbaik untuk pemain-pemain tersebut untuk di diagnosiskan dan untuk mengurangkan sebarang risiko pada masa hadapan".

src: In a statement released by Olympic swimming head coach Leigh Nugent, he said, "Originally we'd planned to have this camp as an opportunity to come together for some further relay preparation and the chance for some of the athletes to race and time trial, a month or so out from the Games.
ref: Dalam kenyataan yang dekeluarkan oleh ketua jurulatih renang Olimpik Leigh Nugent, beliau berkata, "Asalnya kami merancang untuk mengadakan kem ini sebagai satu cara untuk datang bersama sebagai persediaan yang boleh diharap pada masa hadapan dan peluang untuk sebahagian atlit untuk berlumba dan menguji masa, sebulan atau keluar dari Kejohanan.

src: From a relay perspective we are confident we're on track with our preparations and will fine-tune things when we get to Manchester in July."
ref: Dari perspektif wakil kami yakin bahawa kami dalam trek dengan persediaan dan memperhalusi perkara sebegini bila kami sampai di Manchester pada Julai ini".

src: Bruce, Canberra — Earlier today at the Australian Institute of Sport, Australia's Minister for Sport Kate Lundy and the Leader of the Opposition Tony Abbott were on hand when the Australian Olympic Team formally announced the Australian artistic gymnastics team to compete at the 2012 Summer Olympics.
ref: Bruce, Canberra - Awal hari ini di Institut Sukan Australia, Menteri Australia untuk Sukan Kate Lundy dan Ketua Pembangkang Tony Abbott berada di sana apabila pasukan Olimpik Australia secara rasmi mengumumkan pasukan gimnastik artistik Australia untuk bersaing di Sukan Olimpik 2012.

src: Melbourne-based Georgia Bonora and Ashleigh Brennan, Perth residents Emily Little and Lauren Mitchell, and Brisbane resident Larrissa Miller booked their trip to London.
ref: Berasaskan di Melbourne Georgia Bonora dan Ashleigh Brennan, penduduk Perth Emily Little dan Lauren Mitchell, dan penduduk Brisbane Larrissa Miller menempah perjalanan ke London.

src: Lundy announced the government's A$4.5 million support for the Green and Gold Room in London.
ref: Lundy mengumumkan A$4,500,000 sokongan kerajaan bagi Hijau dan Emas Bilik di London.

src: This facility, supported by the Australian Institute of Sport's experts, enables performance analysis to help the Australian Olympians excel during the London Games.
ref: Kemudahan ini, disokong oleh pakar Sukan Institut Australia, membolehkan analisis prestasi untuk membantu Olimpik Australia cemerlang pada Sukan London.

src: Lundy also mentioned Gillard's Prime Ministers Challenge, which is not just for Australia's Olympians and Paralympians, but seeks to encourage the nation's young to play sports.
ref: Lundy juga menyebut Perdana Menteri Challenge Gillard, yang bukan hanya untuk Olimpik Australia dan atlet paralimpik, tetapi bertujuan untuk menggalakkan negara yang muda untuk bermain sukan.

src: Abbott started off with a quip that the only gymnastics he participates in is verbal gymnastics.
ref: Abbott bermula dengan menyindir bahawa satu-satunya gimnastik beliau mengambil bahagian dalam adalah gimnastik lisan.

src: The opposition leader then told the media present that Australia's Olympians have the country's support, and congratulated the competitors on the hard work they have put in for over ten years to get there.
ref: Ketua pembangkang kemudian memberitahu media yang hadir bahawa Olimpik Australia mempunyai sokongan di negara ini, dan mengucapkan tahniah kepada pesaing kepada kerja keras mereka telah dimasukkan ke dalam selama lebih sepuluh tahun untuk sampai ke sana.

src: With encouragement for the Olympians, Abbott and Lundy spent time on the trampoline.
ref: Dengan galakan untuk Olimpian, Abbott dan Lundy menghabiskan masa di atas trampolin.

src: Yesterday, Basketball Australia announced the final Olympic squads for the 2012 Summer Olympics ahead of a farewell series in the Melbourne area this weekend for both the Opals women's team and the Boomers men's team.
ref: Semalam, Bola Keranjang Australia mengumumkan skuad akhir Olimpik bagi Sukan Olimpik musim panas 2012 di siri selamat tinggal di kawasan Melbourne hujung minggu ini untuk kedua-dua pasuka wanita Opals dan pasukan lelaki Boomers.

src: On the men's side, Patrick Mills, Matt Dellavedova, Joe Ingles, Adam Gibson, Peter Crawford, Brad Newley, David Barlow, David Andersen, Matt Nielsen, Mark Worthington, Aleks Maric, and Aron Baynes earned a trip to London.
ref: Di sebelah lelaki, Patrick Mills, Matt Dellavedova, Joe Ingles, Adam Gibson, Peter Crawford, Brad Newley, David Barlow, David Andersen, Matt Nielsen, Mark Worthington, Aleks Maric, dan Aron Baynes layak untuk perjalanan ke London.

src: The Opals kick off their Olympic campaign on the first day of the Olympics in a match against Great Britain.
ref: Opals memulakan kempen Olimpik mereka pada hari pertama Sukan Olimpik dalam perlawanan menentang Great Britain.

src: Conflicting reports say that the swan was found on Monday, Tuesday or Wednesday.
ref: Laporan yang bercanggah mengatakan bahawa angsa itu ditemui pada hari Isnin, Selasa atau Rabu.

src: The Friedrich Loeffler Institute which specializes in animal diseases confirmed the test results.
ref: Friedrich Loeffler Institut yang pakar dalam penyakit haiwan mengesahkan keputusan ujian.

src: "We can confirm that this is the highly pathogenic strain," said a spokesperson for the institute.
ref: "Kami boleh mengesahkan bahawa ini adalah tekanan yang sangat patogenik," kata seorang jurucakap institut.

src: The zoo still remains open for business and cleaning efforts have been intensified.
ref: Zoo ini masih dibuka untuk perniagaan dan perkhidmatan pencucian usaha telah dipergiatkan.

src: Officials have also restricted cats and dogs from roaming areas nearby.
ref: Pegawai juga telah menghadkan kucing dan anjing dari perantauan kawasan berhampiran.

src: There are at least 112 different species of birds, totaling 720, located at the zoo.
ref: Terdapat sekurang-kurangnya 112 spesies burung, berjumlah 720, yang terletak di zoo.

src: In April, H5N1 was first discovered in Germany in a domestic fowl and in wild birds.
ref: Pada bulan April, H5N1 pertama kali ditemui di Jerman dalam ayam tempatan dan burung liar.

src: Kuwait might finance a great number of public works in East Timor, in an investment worth 500 million to 600 million dollars, the East Timorese Prime Minister said today.
ref: Kuwait mungkin membiayai sejumlah besar kerja-kerja awam di Timor Timur, dalam pelaburan bernilai 500 hingga 600 juta dolar, Perdana Menteri Timur Timor berkata hari ini.

src: "I want to start right now the negotiations process with the Development Fund of Kuwait for the construction of great projects for East Timor's roads, bridges, harbors and airports", Ramos Horta, East Timor's Prime Minister, said.
ref: "Saya mahu memulakan proses rundingan sekarang juga dengan Dana Pembangunan Kuwait bagi pembinaan projek-projek besar untuk jalan raya, jambatan, pelabuhan dan lapangan terbang Timor Timur," Ramos Horta, Perdana Menteri Timur Timor, berkata.

src: We are now waiting a preliminary study made by an Indian company, paid by Kuwait", Ramos Horta added.
ref: Kita sedang tunggu kajian awal yang dilakukan oleh sebuah syarikat India, yang dibayar oleh Kuwait," kata Ramos Horta.

src: The East Timorese delegation is composed by the Minister of public works, Odete Victor, and the Minister of energy & mineral resources, José Teixeira.
ref: Delegasi Timor Timur terdiri daripada Menteri Kerja Raya, Odete Victor, dan Menteri sumber tenaga & mineral, José Teixeira.

src: This is the second visit to Kuwait in two years by Ramos Horta, an country with who the East Timorese Prime Minister maintains relations with several members of the royal family and of the government.
ref: Ini merupakan lawatan kedua ke Kuwait dalam dua tahun oleh Ramos Horta, sebuah negara yang Perdana Menteri Timur Timor mengekalkan hubungan dengan beberapa ahli keluarga diraja dan kerajaan.

src: The Ministry of Defence has confirmed that a British soldier has been killed in southern Afghanistan during a joint operation with Canadian-led NATO troops.
ref: Kementerian Pertahanan telah mengesahkan bahawa seorang askar British telah dibunuh di selatan Afghanistan semasa menyertai operasi bersama dengan tentera yang dipimpin NATO Kanada.

src: It is with regret that we can confirm that a member of the UK Armed Forces has been killed in action this afternoon during ongoing operations against insurgent positions in Helmand Province, Southern Afghanistan, said an MOD statement.
ref: Dengan rasa kesal bahawa kami boleh mengesahkan bahawa seorang anggota Angkatan Tentera UK telah terbunuh dalam pertempuran petang ini semasa operasi berterusan terhadap kedudukan pemberontak di Helmand Province, selatan Afghanistan, kata satu kenyataan MOD.

src: According to a spokesman for the International Security Assistance Force, a NATO peacekeeping organisation, troops came under fire after a successful operation.
ref: Menurut jurucakap Pasukan Bantuan Keselamatan Antarabangsa, sebuah pertubuhan pengaman NATO, tenteranya dikritik selepas pembedahan itu berjaya.

src: The Sunday Telegraph today quoted commandos as saying British troops in Afghanistan are on "the brink of exhaustion".
ref: The Sunday Telegraph hari ini memetik komando sebagai berkata pasukan British di Afghanistan berada di "ambang keletihan".

src: Google Inc. may offer hosting services to Wikipedia, a free community-built encyclopedia, and other projects hosted by the Wikimedia Foundation.
ref: Google Inc. boleh menawarkan perkhidmatan penyelenggaraan untuk Wikipedia, satu ensiklopedia percuma yang dibina oleh komuniti, dan projek-projek lain yang dianjurkan oleh Yayasan Wikimedia.

src: Google's competitors, such as Clusty.com, MSN Search, and Yahoo, already offer searching of encyclopedias as a dedicated search category.
ref: Pesaing-pesaing Google, seperti Clusty.com, MSN Search, dan Yahoo, sudah menawarkan perkhidmatan pencarian ensiklopedia sebagai kategori carian tersuai.

src: Clusty.com offers the English Wikipedia, MSN Search links to Encarta, and Yahoo has access to the Columbia Encyclopedia.
ref: Clusty.com menawarkan Wikipedia Inggeris, MSN Search berpaut atas Encarta, dan Yahoo mempunyai akses atas Ensiklopedia Columbia.

src: Wikipedia is often one of the top results of many searches.
ref: Wikipedia sering menjadi salah satu keputusan utama banyak carian.

src: Besides attribution, the license requires that modifications are made available under the same conditions, a principle known as "copyleft" and most frequently applied to computer software such as the free operating system Linux.
ref: Selain perantian, lesen itu memerlukan pengubahsuaian dibuat sedia di bawah syarat-syarat yang sama, satu prinsip yang dikenali sebagai "copyleft" dan yang paling kerap digunakan untuk perisian komputer seperti sistem operasi percuma Linux.

src: How would a tight Wikipedia integration into Google look?
ref: Bagaimana integrasi Wikipedia yang ketat ke Google akan kelihatan?

src: You can subscribe to Google Groups and post a response to a message thread.
ref: Anda boleh melanggan Kumpulan Google dan hantar respon ke satu rangkaian mesej.

src: Oil prices rose dramatically on Monday after a major Alaskan oil field shut down operations, halving the total output of oil from Alaska.
ref: Harga minyak meningkat secara mendadak pada hari Isnin selepas medan minyak utama Alaska menghentikan operasi, mengurangkan separuh jumlah pengeluaran minyak dari Alaska.

src: Coming on top of the ongoing violence in the Middle East, the price of Light, sweet crude for September delivery rose by $1.23 to US$75.99 a barrel in early afternoon Asian trading at the New York Mercantile Exchange.
ref: Berlaku sejurus selepas keganasan yang sedang berlaku di Timur Tengah, harga Light, gula mentah untuk penghantaran September meningkat sebanyak $1.23 ke US$75.99 satu tong pada awal petang perdagangan Asia di New York Mercantile Exchange.

src: The shutdown of the Prudhoe Bay oil field "caught traders by surprise", says Victor Shum, an energy analyst in Singapore.
ref: Penutupan lapangan minyak Purdhoe Bay "memeranjatkan peniaga," kata Victor Shum, seorang penganalisis tenaga di Singapura.

src: "The Middle East violence is a threat to the oil supply, but Alaska is a real disruption."
ref: "Keganasan Timur Tengah adalah satu ancaman kepada bekalan minyak, tetapi Alaska ialah gangguan sebenar".

src: BP Exploration Alaska, Inc, the company running the field, has said that oil production will be reduced by 400,000 barrels per day, or nearly 8% of the total U.S. oil production.
ref: BP Exploration Alaska, Inc, syarikat itu menguruskan medan itu, telah berkata bahawa pengeluaran minyak akan dikurangkan sebanyak 400,000 tong sehari, atau hampir 8% daripada jumlah pengeluaran minyak Amerika Syarikat.

src: BP officials do not know how long the field will stay offline.
ref: Pegawai BP tidak tahu berapa lama medan itu akan kekal di luar talian.

src: In testimony given before a U.S. military hearing, criminal investigator Benjamin Bierce narrated his account of how an incident involving five soldiers involved the serial rape of a 14-year-old Iraqi girl prior to shooting her.
ref: Dalam keterangannya yang diberikan di perbicaraan tentera A.S., penyiasat jenayah Benjamin Bierce menceritakan bagaimana satu insiden yang melibatkan lima orang askar terlibat dalam kes rogol bergilir-gilir ke atas seorang remaja Iraq berusia 14 tahun sebelum menembaknya.

src: According to Bierce, a U.S. Special Agent investigating the incident, the brutal attack which saw Abeer Qassim al-Janabi slain and her parents and younger sister murdered was premeditated.
ref: Menurut Bierce, Ejen Khas Amerika yang menyiasat kejadian itu, serangan kejam yang menyaksikan Abeer Qassim al-Janabi dibunuh dan ibu bapanya dan adik dibunuh telah dirancang terlebih dahulu.

src: Citing a sworn statement from Army Specialist James Barker, the five accused were said to have plotted the rape whilst drinking whisky and playing cards.
ref: Memetik kenyataan bersumpah daripada Pakar Tentera James Barker, lima tertuduh itu dikatakan telah merancang kes rogol semasa meminum wiski dan bermain kad.

src: According to Agent Bierce, Spc.
ref: Menurut Agent Bierce, Spc.

src: Green seized her father and they then took them into the house and Sgt.
ref: Green menyambar bapanya dan kemudian membawa mereka ke dalam rumah dan Sgt.

src: Cortez and Spc.
ref: Cortez dan Spc.

src: Barker followed them inside.
ref: Barker mengikuti mereka ke dalam.

src: Pte.
ref: Pte.

src: Green supposedly led the father, mother and younger sister into the bedroom and closed the door, while the teenage girl remained in the living room with the other Americans, Spc.
ref: Green dikatakan membawa ayah, ibu dan adik perempuan ke dalam bilik tidur dan menutup pintu, manakala gadis remaja tinggal di ruang tamu dengan orang Amerika yang lain, kenyataan Spc.

src: Barker's statement.
ref: Kenyataan Barker.

src: Barker tried to rape the girl, the statement said.
ref: Barker cuba merogol gadis itu, kata kenyataan itu.

src: Green raped the girl; according to Spc.
ref: Green merogol gadis itu; mengikut kenyataan Spc.

src: Barker's statement.
ref: Kenyataan Barker.

src: Pte.
ref: Pte.

src: Barker's statement.
ref: Barker.

src: Spc.
ref: Spc.

src: Barker said that he then poured kerosene lamp fuel on the girl's body but Barker did not say who set it on fire.
ref: Barker berkata dia kemudian menuangkan minyak tanah atas badan kanak-kanak itu tetapi Barker tidak berkata siapa yang membakarnya.

src: Gary Griesmyer, another Special Agent, quoted Sgt.
ref: Gary Griesmyer, seorang lagi Ejen Khas, mengatakan Sgt.

src: Cortez as telling him that the teenage girl was crying and talking in Arabic and that Spc.
ref: Cortez memberitahunya bahawa gadis remaja itu menangis dan bercakap dalam bahasa Arab yang Spc.

src: Private Justin Watt testified that Pte.
ref: Prebet Justin Watt memberi keterangan bahawa Pte.

src: Howard told him before the incident that Pte.
ref: Howard memberitahunya sebelum peristiwa itu yang Pte.

src: Cortez and Spc.
ref: Cortez dan Spc.

src: Barker were planning to rape a girl, and Pte.
ref: Barker telah merancang untuk merogol seorang gadis, dan Pte.

src: Howard was going to be the lookout.
ref: Howard akan menjadi pengawal.

src: Watt testified that he heard Mr. Green say, "I want to kill and hurt a lot of Iraqis."
ref: Watt memberi keterangan bahawa dia terdengar Encik Green berkata, "Saya mahu membunuh dan menyakiti hati ramai penduduk Iraq".

src: Green has been discharged from the military and has pleaded not guilty in a federal court in Kentucky where he will stand trial; he will not be facing a court martial regardless of what occurrs in the Baghdad hearing.
ref: Green telah dikeluarkan dari tentera dan telah mengaku tidak bersalah di sebuah mahkamah persekutuan di Kentucky di mana dia akan dibicarakan; dia tidak akan menghadiri mahkamah tentera tanpa mengambil kira apa yang berlaku di perbicaraan di Baghdad.

src: "If you have the power to make something right, you should do it."
ref: "Jika kamu mempunyai kuasa untuk membuat sesuatu yang betul, anda perlu melakukannya".

src: "But if something went down -- something terrible like that -- then it's my obligation to come forward," Watt said.
ref: "Tetapi jika sesuatu berlaku - sesuatu yang buruk seperti itu - maka ia adalah kewajipan saya untuk tampil ke hadapan," kata Watt.

src: Some lived in a "dilapidated, abandoned water treatment facility" he said.
ref: Sesetengah tinggal di sebuah "kemudahan rawatan air yang usang dan terbiar" katanya.

src: Pfc.
ref: Pfc.

src: "It's like this, I find out that guys in my squad, guys I trusted with my life, are allegedly responsible for one of the most brutal rapes/murders I've ever seen."
ref: "Macam ini, saya mengetahui bahawa lelaki dalam skuad saya, lelaki yang saya percaya dengan nyawa saya, didakwa bertanggungjawab untuk salah satu kes rogol/bunuh paling kejam yang pernah saya lihat".

src: Pfc.
ref: Pfc.

src: He said that the "mentally draining" living conditions of the combat unit was a factor.
ref: Dia berkata, keadaan hidup unit tempur "yang menyusutkan mental" adalah satu faktor.

src: An article 32 hearing, like this, seeks to determine if a soldiers should face court martial.
ref: Sebuah artikel perbicaraan 32, seperti ini, bertujuan untuk menentukan sama ada tentera perlu menghadapi mahkamah tentera.

src: "No-one likes to see their culture being denigrated but we are aware that the moko is in the public domain."
ref: "Tiada seorangpun yang gembira melihat budaya mereka direndah-rendahkan tetapi kami sedar bahawa moko termasuk dalam bidang awam."

src: Rotorua acedmic Ngahihi o te ra Bidois, who has a full facial moko, has asked the Halloween Town store to remove the tattoo kits.
ref: Rotorua acedmic Ngahihi o te ra Bidois, yang mempunyai muka penuh moko, telah meminta stor Halloween Town untuk menghapuskan kit tatu tersebut.

src: A full-face moko is traditionally restricted to male Māori and is used to represent mana (prestige).
ref: Muka penuh moko secara tradisinya hanya terhad kepada lelaki Maori dan digunakan bagi melambangkan mana (martabat).

src: By Friday evening Saomai had left a path of destruction in Zhejiang and neighboring province Fujian.
ref: Menjelang petang Jumaat Saomai telah meninggalkan jejak kebinasaan di Zhejiang dan wilayah jirannya Fujian.

src: An estimated 3.5 million people were affected by the storm, some 1.6 million of whom were evacuated.
ref: Dianggarkan 3.5 juta orang telah dijejas oleh ribut itu, antara 1.6 juta daripada mereka telah dipindahkan.

src: In Zhejiang, 18,000 houses were destroyed and in Fujian, 32,000.
ref: Di Zhejiang, 18,000 buah rumah telah musnah dan di Fujian, 32,000.

src: Phone and power lines were knocked down and outages were wide-spread.
ref: Telefon dan talian kuasa telah terurai dan gangguan tenaga elektrik adalah meluas.

src: With wind speeds of 216 km/h (135 mph) at the time of landfall it is the strongest typhoon to hit China since August 1, 1956, when a storm with wind speeds of 244 km/h killed 4,900 people.
ref: Dengan kelajuan angin 216 km/j (135 bpj) pada masa pendaratan ia adalah taufan paling dasyat yang melanda China sejak 1 Ogos, 1956, apabila ribut dengan kelajuan angin 244 km/j membunuh 4,900 orang.

src: The central government has allocated 166 million yuan to assist the affected region.
ref: Kerajaan pusat telah memperuntukkan 166 juta yuan untuk membantu kawasan yang terjejas.

src: The majority of NHL clubs have lost money over the last five years and as a result the clubs wanted to cap pay at a set amount.
ref: Majoriti kelab NHL telah kehilangan wang dalam tempoh lima tahun lalu dan kesannya semua kelab mahu membuat bayaran dengan jumlah yang ditetapkan.

src: Speaking about the cancellation, Gary Bettman said "The shame of this is that our fans deserve better."
ref: Menyentuh tentang pembatalan tersebut, Gary Bettman berkata "Ini adalah satu yang mengecewakan kerana semua peminat berhak mendapat yang lebih baik".

src: This will be the first year since 1919 that the Stanley Cup - the top prize in the NHL - will not be awarded.
ref: Tahun ini adalah tahun pertama sejak tahun 1919 apabila Piala Stanley - hadiah teratas di dalam NHL - tidak akan dianugerahkan.

src: That year, a flu epidemic forced the finals to be called off.
ref: Pada tahun itu, satu wabak flu telah memaksa pusingan akhir dibatalkan.

src: Some of the United Kingdom's most influential British Muslims have written a letter to Prime Minister Tony Blair saying that there must be urgent changes to UK foreign policy.
ref: Sebahagian daripada umat Islam British paling berpengaruh di United Kingdom telah menulis surat kepada Perdana Menteri Tony Blair mengatakan bahawa dasar luar negeri UK mesti segera diubah.

src: The letter has been signed by three Muslim Members of Parliament, three Muslim peers and thirty-eight Muslim groups including the Muslim Council of Britain, the Muslim Association of Britain, the British Muslim Forum and the Muslim Solidarity Committee.
ref: Surat yang ditandatangani oleh tiga Ahli Muslim di Parlimen, tiga rakan Muslim dan tiga puluh lapan kumpulan Muslim termasuk Majlis Islam Britain, Persatuan Islam Britain, Forum Islam Britain dan Kesatuan Masyarakat Islam.

src: But current policy on the Middle East is seen by almost everyone I speak to as unfair and unjust.
ref: Tetapi dasar sekarang ke atas Timur Tengah dilihat oleh hampir semua orang yang saya bercakap sebagai tidak adil dan tidak betul.

src: Whether we like it or not such a sense of injustice plays into the hands of extremists.
ref: Sama ada kita suka atau tidak rasa ketidakadilan itu menjadikan ia jatu ke tangan pelampau.

src: As moderates we will do all we can to fight extremism.
ref: Sebagai yang bersederhana kami akan membuat yang kami mampu untuk menentang kegiatan pelampau.

src: In a response to the letter, a 10 Downing Street spokesman said: "We should always remember that the terrorism affecting the West today has blighted Muslim countries for several decades.
ref: Sebagai maklum balas kepada surat, jurucakap kepada 10 Downing Street berkata: "Kita perlu sentiasa beringat bahawa keganasan yang memberi kesan kepada Barat hari ini telah merosakkan negara-negara Islam untuk beberapa dekad.

src: Our foreign policy is focused on supporting the people of those countries in their desire to live in a democracy just as we enjoy in the UK."
ref: Dasar luar negeri memfokus kepada menyokong orang di negara-negara berkenaan dalam keinginan mereka untuk hidup dalam demokrasi di UK".

src: Fox News said that they did not know who captured the journalists but said that "We can confirm that two of our people were taken against their will in Gaza," and that "negotiations were under way to secure their release."
ref: Fox News berkata mereka tidak tahu siapa yang menangkap wartawan itu tetapi berkata bahawa "Kami boleh mengesahkan bahawa dua orang kami telah diambil tanpa kerelaan mereka di Gaza," dan bahawa "rundingan sedang dilakukan untuk mendapatkan pembebasan mereka".

src: The incident began when two vehicles blocked the transmission truck, labelled 'TV', and their bodyguard was forced to the ground at gunpoint by a masked man.
ref: Kejadian itu bermula apabila dua kenderaan menyekat trak penghantaran, yang dilabel 'TV', dan pengawal peribadi mereka dipaksa meniarap atas tanah dengan pistol oleh seorang lelaki bertopeng.

src: Hamas, the Islamic militant group that heads Gaza's government, did not claim responsibility, and condemned the kidnapping.
ref: Hamas, kumpulan militan Islam yang mengetuai kerajaan Gaza, tidak mengaku bertanggungjawab, dan mengutuk penculikan.

src: "Do not comment officially and of course, not on the air, about it."
ref: "Jangan komen secara rasmi dan sudah tentu, tidak di udara, mengenainya".

src: The United Nations brokered cease-fire between Israel and Hezbollah is largely holding as Israel has begun to withdraw its forces from Lebanon.
ref: Gencatan senjata yang diusahakan oleh Persatuan Bangsa-bangsa bersatu antara Israel dan Hizbullah berjalan lancar kerana Israel telah mula menarik balik tentera dari Lebanon.

src: UNSC Resolution 1701, which calls for a "full cessation of hostilities" in the Israeli-Lebanon war, was passed by the UN Security Council last Friday and was approved by Lebanon and Israel over the weekend.
ref: Resolusi 1701 UNSC, yang menyeru untuk "pemberhentian penuh dengan permusuhan" dalam perang Israel - Lebanon, yang telah diluluskan oleh Majlis Keselamatan PBB pada Jumaat lepas telah dipersetujui oleh Lebanon dan Israel pada hujung minggu.

src: As part of the truce agreement, they must cross the river and exercise control over what has been Hezbollah controlled territory in southern Lebanon.
ref: Sebagai sebahagian daripada perjanjian gencatan senjata, mereka perlu menyeberangi sungai dan melaksanakan kawalan ke atas wilayah di selatan Lebanon yang dikawal Hizbullah.

src: The head of the Israeli army says the IDF could complete its withdrawal from Lebanon in 7 to 10 days.
ref: Ketua tentera Israel berkata IDF boleh menyelesaikan pengunduran dari Lebanon dalam 7 hingga 10 hari.

src: The new international peace-keeping force may number as many as 15,000, significantly larger than the existing force of 2,000, known as UNIFIL, which is expected to take up border positions in the mean time.
ref: Pasukan pengaman antarabangsa yang baru mungkin berjumlah sebanyak 15,000, jauh lebih besar daripada jumlah yang sedia ada sebanyak 2,000 yang dikenali sebagai UNIFIL, dijangka akan mengambil posisi di sempadan dalam masa yang sama.

src: The UN hopes for an advance force of up to 3,500 within the next 10 to 14 days.
ref: PBB berharap untuk sebuah pasukan awal sebanyak 3,500 dalam tempoh 10 hingga 14 hari akan datang.

src: France, who is expected to lead the international force, is seeking a clearer mandate from the UN on the rules of engagement.
ref: Perancis, yang dijangka akan mengetuai pasukan antarabangsa telah memohon mandat kaedah-kaedah penglibatan yang jelas dari PBB bagi.

src: Over 1,200 people have lost their lives in the conflict.
ref: Lebih 1,200 orang telah kehilangan nyawa mereka dalam konflik tersebut.

src: Israel says it killed 530 Hezbollahh fighters while Hezbollah puts the toll at about 80.
ref: Israel berkata ia telah membunuh 530 pejuang Hizbullah manakala Hizbullah meletakkan jumlah di kira-kira 80.

src: "We are talking about pneumonia that is being treated with massive antibiotics.
ref: "Kami bercakap tentang pneumonia yang sedang dirawat dengan antibiotik yang sangat banyak.

src: Yesterday doctors stated that Sharon's urine ouput had "decreased significantly" and that a scan of his brain "showed a deterioration in his brain function," said Anat Dolev, a Sheba Medical Center spokesman.
ref: Semalam doktor menyatakan bahawa output air kencing telah "berkurangan dengan ketara" dan imbasan otaknya "menunjukkan kemerosotan di dalam fungsi otaknya," kata Anat Dolev, seorang jurucakap Pusat Perubatan Sheba.

src: Yesterday the hospital reported that the condition of Sharon was getting worse.
ref: Semalam hospital itu melaporkan bahawa keadaan Sharon menjadi semakin teruk.

src: Sharon has been in a coma since suffering a major stroke on January 4.
ref: Sharon telah berada di dalam koma sejak menderita dengan strok yang teruk pada 4 Januari.

src: After five hours of meeting, the presidents Hugo Chávez from Venezuela and Alvaro Uribe from Colombia put a end to the diplomatic tension that had completed two months.
ref: Selepas lima jam bermesyuarat, presiden-presiden Hugo Chavez dari Venezuela dan Alvaro Uribe dari Colombia telah menamatkan ketegangan diplomatik yang berlangsung selama dua bulan.

src: President Chavez said: "We have decided to turn the page so we can fix the things that were misadjusted, clarify the things that could be clouded and work together in the construction for the common people".
ref: Presiden Chavez berkata: "Kita membuat keputusan untuk memulakan lembaran baru agar kita dapat membetulkan perkara yang telah disalahsusun, mengesahkan perkara-perkara yang tidak pasti dan bekerjasama dalam pembangunan untuk orang awam".

src: The meeting was scheduled for early this month, however it was postponed due to a disease of the Colombian president.
ref: Mesyuarat tersebut telah dijadualkan pada awal bulan ini, walau bagaimanapun ia telah ditunda disebabkan penyakit dihidapi presiden Colombia.
