src: The encounter served both to finish the harshness between the two countries and to resume bilateral agreements and the activity in the border which were paralyzed as a result of the crisis.
ref: Pertemuan antara dua pihak menamatkan kekerasan antara dua negara dan meneruskan perjanjian dua hala dan aktiviti di sempadan yang telah cacat akibat krisis tersebut.

src: Uribe admitted that the Colombian armed conflict is a problem which must be solved by his country despite the disturbances caused by subversive groups in the neighboring countries to Colombia.
ref: Uribe mengaku konflik senjata Colombia adalah masalah yang perlu diselesaikan oleh negara beliau walaupun terdapat gangguan daripada kumpulan-kumpulan subversif di negara-negara jiran Colombia.

src: They will share the second-largest lottery jackpot in Canadian history as the lucky winners of Saturday's $43.2-million Lotto 649 draw.
ref: Mereka akan berkongsi hadiah loteri kedua terbesar dalam sejarah Kanada sebagai pemenang bertuah cabutan Lotto 649 sebanyak $43.2 juta.

src: After the first, overnight on Tuesday at Addenbrooke's Hospital in Cambridge, it was reported in a press release by Marussia that she had lost her right eye, and was still in a "critical but stable" condition.
ref: Selepas, semalaman pada Selasa di Hospital Addenbrooke di Cambridge, dilaporkan dalam siaran akhbar oleh Marussia bahawa dia telah kehilangan mata kanannya, dan masih dalam keadaan yang "kritikal tetapi stabil".

src: Ferrari driver Fernando Alonso was among those expressing his support, dedicating his pole postion in Saturday's qualifying to De Villota.
ref: Pemandu Ferrari Fernando Alonso adalah antara mereka yang menyatakan sokongan beliau, mendedikasikan posisi tiang beliau dalam kelayakan untuk De Villota pada Sabtu.

src: Despite questions being raised, both about De Villota's experience and the positioning of the truck with which she collided, he has described it as "so unique that it was just incredible bad luck".
ref: Walaupun soalan yang dibangkitkan, berkaitan dengan pengalaman De Villota dan kedudukan lori yang bertembung dengannya, beliau menyifatkan ia sebagai "begitu unik bahawa ia adalah hanya nasib malang yang luar biasa".

src: With fifty days left to until the start of the 2012 Summer Paralympics, the Australian Paralympic Committee earlier today announced the 35-member final swimming Paralympic squad bound for the London Games.
ref: Dengan lima puluh hari lagi sehingga permulaan Sukan Paralimpik Musim Panas 2012, Jawatankuasa Paralimpik Australia awal hari ini mengumumkan skuad renang Paralimpik muktamad yang beranggota 35 orang yang akan menyertai Sukan di London.

src: Five Queensland swimmers have earned spots to London, including Kayla Clarke of Silkstone, Daniel Fox of Cleveland, Brenden Hall of Petrie, Grant Patterson of Cairns and Rick Pendleton of Sippy Downs.
ref: Lima perenang Queensland telah mendapat pengesahan akan ke London, termasuk Kayla Clarke dari Silkstone, Daniel Fox dari Cleveland, Brenden Hall dari Petrie, Grant Patterson dari Cairns dan Rick Pendleton dari Sippy Downs.

src: Only four Victorians booked a trip to London, including Matthew Haanappel of Croydon Hills, Tanya Huebner of Hampton, Ahmed Kelly of North Melbourne and Prue Watt of Hawthorn East.
ref: Hanya empat orang Victoria akan pergi ke London, termasuk Matthew Haanappel dari Croydon Hills, Tanya Huebner dari Hampton, Ahmed Kelly dari North Melbourne dan Prue Watt dari Hawthorn East.

src: Western Australia and the Australian Capital Territory are each sending two swimmers, with Katherine Downie of Quinns Rocks and Jeremy McClure of Mount Pleasant representing Western Australia and Ellie Cole of Bruce and Richard Eliason of Flynn representing the Australian Capital Territory.
ref: Australia Barat dan Wilayah Ibu Negara Australia masing-masing akan menghantar dua perenang, dengan Katherine Downie dari Quinns Rocks dan Jeremy McClure dari Mount Pleasant mewakili Australia Barat dan Ellie Cole dari Bruce dan Richard Eliason dari Flynn mewakili Wilayah Ibu Negara Australia.

src: Tasmania and the Northern Territory did not qualify any swimmers.
ref: Tasmania dan Wilayah Utara tidak ada perenang yang berkelayakan.

src: The team will travel to London for a training camp on August 10 ahead of the August 29 start of the Games.
ref: Pasukan itu akan pergi ke London untuk kem latihan pada 10 Ogos sebelum 29 Ogos tarikh bermulanya Sukan itu.

src: The 5,023 m high volcano spat lava, stones and ash for several hours on Wednesday night.
ref: Gunung berapi dengan ketinggian 5,023 m itu meludahkan lava, batu dan abu untuk beberapa jam pada malam Rabu.

src: Towns like Ambato or Riobamba, 30 km away from the volcano have been covered with up to 5cm of ash.
ref: Bandar-bandar seperti Ambato atau Riobamba, 30 km dari gunung berapi tersebut telah ditutup dengan lebih daripada 5cm abu.

src: At least seven small villages and hamlets have been completely destroyed.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tujuh buah kampung kecil dan dusun telah musnah sama sekali.

src: The Institute for Geophysics has lost an important part of its equipment installed on the slopes of Tungurahua, limiting their capability to monitor the volcanic activity.
ref: Institut Geofizik telah kehilangan bahagian penting peralatan yang dipasang di lereng Tungurahua, menghadkan keupayaan mereka untuk memantau aktiviti gunung berapi.

src: Losses in agriculture due to the ash cover are estimated at $150 Million.
ref: Kerugian dalam bidang pertanian disebabkan ditutupi abu dianggarkan $150 Juta.

src: In 1999, after a long period of rest, the volcano started an eruptive process that continues to this day.
ref: Pada 1999, setelah lama berehat, gunung berapi memulakan proses letusan yang berterusan sehingga hari ini.

src: In May 2006 it increased dramatically culminating in violent eruptions on July 14 and August 16.
ref: Pada Mei 2006, ia meningkat secara mendadak membawa kepada letusan ganas pada 14 Julai dan 16 Ogos.

src: His convictions for receiving funds from a terror group and using a false passport were quashed on Friday.
ref: Dakwaan menerima dana daripada kumpulan pengganas dan menggunakan pasport palsu terhadap dia telah dibatalkan pada hari Jumaat.

src: Mr Thomas was earlier sentenced to five years in jail.
ref: Encik Thomas sebelum ini telah dijatuhkan hukuman penjara lima tahun.

src: He was found guilty in February of accepting cash and a plane ticket from an al-Qaeda agent in Pakistan.
ref: Beliau didapati bersalah pada bulan Februari kerana menerima wang tunai dan tiket kapal terbang daripada ejen al-Qaeda di Pakistan.

src: The former taxi driver was sentenced to five years in prison in March.
ref: Bekas pemandu teksi tersebut dijatuhkan hukuman penjara lima tahun pada bulan Mac.

src: Thomas appealed his conviction on the grounds that interviews conducted in Pakistan after his arrest in 2003 breached Australian law and should not have been allowed as evidence at his trial.
ref: Thomas merayu atas alasan bahawa temu ramah yang dijalankan di Pakistan selepas dia ditangkap pada tahun 2003 melanggar undang-undang Australia dan tidak sepatutnya dibenarkan untuk menjadi keterangan dalam perbicaraannya.

src: His lawyer said Mr Thomas, who is married and has three children, accepted the money and plane ticket because he wanted to return home.
ref: Peguamnya berkata Encik Thomas, yang sudah berkahwin dan mempunyai tiga orang anak, menerima wang dan tiket pesawat kerana dia mahu pulang ke rumah.

src: Liberty Victoria president Brian Walters, SC, welcomed the decision, saying: "We believe that the Court of Appeal has righted a great injustice."
ref: Presiden Liberty Victoria Brian Walters, SC, menyambut baik keputusan itu, berkata: "Kami percaya bahawa Mahkamah Rayuan telah membetulkan satu ketidakadilan yang besar".

src: Prosecutor Nick Robinson is calling for a retrial based on a television interview with the ABC.
ref: Pendakwa Nick Robinson menggesa perbicaraan semula berdasarkan wawancara televisyen dengan ABC.

src: Rob Stary said the defence team would counter with arguments that prosecutors withheld a statement from a prisoner now held overseas.
ref: Rob Stary berkata pasukan pembelaan akan balas dengan hujah-hujah bahawa pendakwa menahan kenyataan daripada banduan yang ditahan di luar negara.

src: "The AFP has withheld important information that would have contradicted other evidence," he said.
ref: "AFP telah menyembunyikan maklumat penting yang bercanggah dengan bukti lain," katanya.

src: A report by the International Water Management Institute (IWMI) says rising demand for irrigation to produce food and biofuels will aggravate scarcities of water.
ref: Satu laporan oleh Institut Pengurusan Air Antarabangsa (IWMI) mengatakan peningkatan permintaan untuk pengairan untuk menghasilkan makanan dan biobahan api akan memburukkan lagi kekurangan air.

src: IWMI warns there has to be a radical transformation in the management of water resources - citing as examples Australia, south-central China, and last year’s devastating drought in India.
ref: IWMI memberi amaran bahawa perlu ada perubahan yang radikal dalam pengurusan sumber air - mengambil contoh Australia, selatan-tengah China, dan kemarau yang amat buruk pada tahun lalu di India.

src: Report authors claim that the price of water could double or triple over the next two decades.
ref: Penulis laporan mendakwa bahawa harga air boleh naik dua atau tiga kali ganda dalam tempoh dua dekad akan datang.

src: The report, backed by the United Nations and farm research groups, shows that globally, water usage had increased by six times in the past 100 years and would double again by 2050 - driven mainly by irrigation and demands by agriculture.
ref: Laporan itu, yang disokong oleh Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dan kumpulan penyelidikan ladang, menunjukkan bahawa di peringkat global, penggunaan air telah meningkat sebanyak enam kali ganda dalam 100 tahun yang lalu dan akan berganda lagi pada tahun 2050 - didorong terutamanya oleh pengairan dan permintaan oleh sektor pertanian.

src: If people are growing biofuels and food it will put another new stress, says David Molden, who led the study at the Sri Lanka-based IWMI.
ref: Jika masyarakat menanam biobahan api dan makanan ia akan mengenakan tekanan baru, kata David Molden, yang mengetuai kajian di IWMI yang berpangkalan di Sri Lanka.

src: Solutions included helping poor countries to grow more food with available fresh water via simple, low-cost measures, a shift from past policies that favoured expensive dams or canals, the report said.
ref: Penyelesaian-penyelesaian termasuk membantu negara-negara miskin untuk menanam lebih banyak makanan dengan air tawar sedia ada melalui kaedah mudah, murah, peralihan daripada dasar lalu yang menggemari empangan mahal atau terusan, kata laporan itu.

src: Billions of people in Asia and Africa already faced water shortages because of poor water management, he said.
ref: Berbilion-bilion orang di Asia dan Afrika telah mengalami kekurangan air kerana pengurusan air yang kurang baik, katanya.

src: Rijsberman said water scarcity in Africa was caused by a lack of infrastructure to get the water to the people who needed it.
ref: Rijsberman berkata kekurangan air di Afrika adalah disebabkan oleh kekurangan infrastruktur untuk mendapatkan air untuk orang yang memerlukannya.

src: The water is there, the rainfall is there, but the infrastructure isn't there, Rijsberman told reporters.
ref: Terdapat air, terdapat hujan, tetapi tiada infrastruktur, Rijsberman memberitahu pemberita.

src: Other recommendations for certain regions include the extension and the improvement of agriculture using rainwater, the introduction of cereal varieties that need less water as well as the development of irrigation systems.
ref: Cadangan-cadangan lain untuk kawasan-kawasan tertentu termasuk perluasan dan peningkatan pertanian menggunakan air hujan, pengenalan jenis bijirin yang memerlukan air yang kurang dan juga pembangunan sistem pengairan.

src: But the priority, Rijsberman stresses, is to change mentalities and often outdated government policies.
ref: Tetapi keutamaannya, Rijsberman menekankan, adalah untuk mengubah mentaliti dan dasar kerajaan sering ketinggalan zaman.

src: Government policies and their approach to water are probably the most urgent that need changing in the short term, he said.
ref: Dasar kerajaan dan pendekatan mereka terhadap air adalah mungkin perkara paling penting yang perlu diubah dalam jangka pendek, katanya.

src: There is, he says, enough land, water and human capacity to produce enough food for a growing population over the next 50 years, but one of the challenges is to provide enough water for agriculture without damaging the environment.
ref: Ada, beliau berkata, cukup tanah, air dan kapasiti manusia untuk menghasilkan makanan bagi penduduk yang semakin meningkat dalam tempoh 50 tahun akan datang, tetapi salah satu cabaran adalah untuk menyediakan air yang cukup untuk pertanian tanpa merosakkan alam sekitar.

src: In Australia last week, Rijsberman said he would "not be surprised to see the price of water double or triple over the next two decades."
ref: Di Australia minggu lalu, Rijsberman berkata beliau akan "tidak berasa terkejut melihat harga air dua atau tiga kali ganda dalam tempoh dua dekad akan datang."

src: Lech Walesa, the founder of the Solidarity movement has quit the organisation.
ref: Lech Walesa, pengasas pergerakan perpaduan telah meletakkan jawatan dari pertubuhan itu.

src: The Solidarity trade union movement and political party was founded in 1980 to combat Poland's Communist government.
ref: Pergerakan Perpaduan persatuan pekerja dan parti politik diasaskan pada tahun 1980 untuk memerangi kerajaan komunis Poland.

src: "I have given up my membership last year because Solidarity and I have gone separate ways," said Walesa who served as Poland's first post-Communist president from 1990 to 1995.
ref: "Saya telah menyerahkan keahlian tahun lepas kerana Perpaduan dan saya tidak lagi sehaluan," kata Walesa yang berkhidmat sebagai Presiden pertama selepas tamat kerajaan komunis dari 1990 hingga 1995.

src: Walesa says he left Solidarity after the union ignored his criticism of its support of the Law and Justice Party led by the Kaczynskis.
ref: Walesa berkata dia meninggalkan Perpaduan selepas kesatuan tidak menghiraukan kritikan terhadap sokongan untuk undamg-undang dan Parti Keadilan yang diketuai oleh Kaczynskis.

src: Despite attempts to destroy the group through repressions, it came to embody a broad social anti-communist movement within Poland.
ref: Walaupun percubaan untuk memusnahkan kumpulan itu melalui penindasan, ia telah mewujudkan gerakan anti-komunis sosial yang luas di dalam Poland.

src: It is credited as one of many dissident movements which in the 1980s pressured reforms which eventually led to the dissolution of the Soviet Union and states in its sphere of influence.
ref: Ia dipuji sebagai salah satu daripada banyak pergerakan pembangkang yang pada tahun 1980-an tekanan pembaharuan yang akhirnya membawa kepada pembubaran Kesatuan Soviet dan negeri didalam lingkungan pengaruhnya.

src: The Australian federal government has announced it will subsidise the breast-cancer drug Herceptin under the Pharmaceutical Benefits Scheme (PBS) for women with HER2 positive cancer.
ref: Kerajaan persekutuan Australia telah mengumumkan bahawa ia akan memberikan subsidi kepada ubat kanser payudara, Herceptin di bawah Skim Faedah Farmaseutikal (PBS) bagi wanita menghidapi kanser HER2 positif.

src: In addition, those who are predisposed to heart damage (which can be a side effect of the drug) will not be provided with the subsidised medication.
ref: Di samping itu, orang-orang yang terdedah kepada kerosakan jantung (akibat kesan sampingan ubat tersebut) tidak akan diberikan ubat subsidi.

src: The government will provide subsidised Herceptin for 52 weeks (as found to be most effective in clinical trials) at a cost of around AUD$50,000 per patient.
ref: Kerajaan akan memberikan Herceptin yang disubsidi untuk 52 minggu (kerana didapati paling berkesan dalam ujian klinikal) dengan kos kira-kira AUD$50,000 bagi setiap pesakit.

src: Herceptin will become available on the PBS from 1 October.
ref: Herceptin akan didapati di PBS bermula dari 1 Oktober.

src: The shooting death by Canadian troops of a 10 year-old boy in Afghanistan has raised fears of a backlash and retaliation.
ref: Kematian tembakan oleh angkatan tentera Kanada terhadap kanak-kanak lelaki berusia 10 tahun di Afghanistan telah menimbulkan rasa kebimbangan akan reaksi yang drastik dan tindakan balas dendam.

src: The boy was shot and a teenager injured at around 5pm local time yesterday when, while driving a motorcycle, they sped through a roadblock cordoning off the scene of a suicide bombing.
ref: Budak lelaki itu ditembak dan seorang remaja tercedera pada kira-kira 5 petang masa tempatan semalam apabila sewaktu mereka memacu motosikal, mereka memecut melalui sekatan jalan raya yang sedang menyekat kawasan pengeboman berani mati.

src: A soldier fired a bullet which passed through the 17 year-old driver and killed the boy.
ref: Seorang tentera telah melepaskan tembakan peluru yang melepasi pemandu berusia 17 tahun dan membunuh budak lelaki itu.

src: "A motorcycle carrying two people broke through the Afghan National Police outer security cordon at high speed," said Colonel Fred Lewis, deputy commander of the Canadian contingent of NATO's International Security Assistance Force (ISAF) in Afghanistan.
ref: "Sebuah motosikal yang membawa dua orang itu merempuh melalui sekatan sekuriti luar Polis Kebangsaan Afghanistan pada kelajuan tinggi," kata Kolonel Fred Lewis, timbalan komander Bantuan Keselamatan Antarabangsa NATO (ISAF) kontinjen Kanada di Afghanistan.

src: "The driver failed to heed multiple warnings to stop as he headed towards the inner Canadian cordon. "
ref: "Pemandu itu gagal mematuhi pelbagai amaran supaya berhenti semasa dia menuju ke kawasan sekatan dalaman Kanada".

src: "A Canadian ISAF soldier then opened fire in a defensive application of our rules of engagement. "
ref: "Seorang tentera ISAF Kanada kemudian melepaskan tembakan dalam konteks bertindak untuk pertahanan peraturan ketenteraan kami".

src: "A single round struck both the driver and the passenger of the motorcycle."
ref: "Satu pusingan tunggal mengena kedua-dua pemandu dan penumpang motosikal".

src: Lewis doubts soldiers had time to fire warning shots due to the speed of the oncoming motorcycle.
ref: Lewis meragui bahawa tentera mempunyai masa untuk melepaskan tembakan amaran kerana kelajuan motosikal dari arah depan.

src: He also said that while no explosives were found on the vehicle he had a "sneaking suspicion" that soldiers feared the motorcycle carried a second suicide bomber and acted defensively.
ref: Beliau juga berkata bahawa walaupun tiada bahan letupan ditemui atas kenderaan itu dia mempunyai "syak wasangka" bahawa tentera takut akan motosikal itu membawa pengebom berani mati kedua dan telah bertindak mempertahankan diri.

src: He added that he was concerned that the Taliban would try to exploit the incident for propaganda purposes and that he was concerned about a possible backlash by locals.
ref: Dia menambah bahawa dia bimbang bahawa Taliban akan cuba mengeksploitasi insiden itu untuk tujuan propaganda dan dia mengambil berat reaksi drastik yang mungkin datang dari kalangan penduduk tempatan.

src: "The message is that we're here to help them and we certainly would never want to hurt them."
ref: "Mesejnya ialah kita berada di sini untuk membantu mereka dan kami memang tidak mahu mencederakan mereka".

src: Relatives of the boys were at the gates of the Canadian military base last night demanding answers.
ref: Saudara-mara kanak-kanak lelaki berada di pintu pagar pangkalan tentera Kanada malam tadi untuk menuntut jawapan.

src: Corporal David Braun was killed in the suicide attack which occurred two hours before the shooting.
ref: Koperal David Braun telah terbunuh dalam serangan bunuh diri yang berlaku dua jam sebelum tembakan itu.

src: Three other soldiers were wounded but are listed in good condition.
ref: Tiga anggota tentera yang lain tercedera tetapi dikatakan dalam keadaan baik.

src: South Auckland Tyndale Park Christian School have been asking parents of the pupils for permission to administer corporal punishment.
ref: Sekolah Kristian South Auckland Tyndale Park meminta ibu bapa murid-murid untuk kebenaran untuk hukuman fizikal.

src: The child will then either be spoken to, prayed with or both.
ref: Kanak-kanak itu akan kemudian sama ada dibincang bersama, berdoa bersama atau kedua-duanya.

src: Tyndale Park Christian School is a private Christian school that caters for students ranging from Year 1 to Year 13.
ref: Sekolah Kristian Tyndale Park ialah sebuah sekolah swasta Kristian yang menampung pelajar yang terdiri daripada Tahun 1 hingga Tahun 13.

src: "This is between the parents that enrol their children at our school and that is where the buck stops."
ref: "Ini adalah antara ibu bapa yang menghantar anak-anak ke sekolah kami dan itu adalah setakat tanggungjawab itu."

src: "It's got nothing to do with anyone else except our parents," he added.
ref: "Ia tidak berkaitan dengan orang lain kecuali ibu bapa kita," katanya.

src: Bruce Adin, Ministry of Education northern regional manager, said: "The legality of the Tyndale Park document was unclear, but if school staff strapped a student it would be illegal."
ref: Bruce Adin, pengurus wilayah utara Kementerian Pendidikan, berkata: "Kesahihan dokumen Tyndale Park adalah tidak jelas, tetapi jika kakitangan sekolah mengikat pelajar ia akan menjadi haram di sisi undang-undang."

src: "Corporal punishment in schools was made illegal years ago because it was considered to be brutal and unnecessary," Bradford said.
ref: "Hukuman fizikal di sekolah telah dijadikan haram di sisi-sisi undang-undang tahun lalu kerana ia dianggap kejam dan tidak perlu," kata Bradford.

src: Israel has purchased two more Dolphin class submarines which have the capacity to carry nuclear warheads.
ref: Israel telah membeli dua lagi kapal selam kelas Dolphin yang mempunyai keupayaan untuk membawa kepala peledak nuklear.

src: Israel already has three older nuclear weapons-capable Dolphin submarines but the new Dolphins have propulsion systems that allow them to remain submerged for longer periods of time, according to the Jerusalem Post, making it harder for them to be tracked by satellite.
ref: Israel sudah mempunyai tiga kapal selam berkeupayaan Dolphin dengan senjata nuklear tetapi kapal-kapal Dolphin yang baru mempunyai sistem pendorongan yang membolehkan mereka untuk kekal tenggelam untuk tempoh yang lebih lama, mengikut laporan Jerusalem Post, menyukarkan bagi mereka untuk dikesan oleh satelit.

src: Experts view the purchase as a clear signal to Iran that Israel can retaliate if subjected to a nuclear attack.
ref: Pakar-pakar berpandangan pembelian tersebut merupakan satu isyarat jelas kepada Iran bahawa Israel boleh bertindak balas apabila terjadi serangan nuklear.

src: German officials confirm that the contracts for the new submarines was signed July 6.
ref: Pegawai Jerman mengesahkan bahawa kontrak untuk kapal selam yang baru telah ditandatangani 6 Julai.

src: Israel's possession of nuclear arms has often been a locus of bitter controversy in the Middle East, especially among countries who believe that the world community, and especially the United States, is hypocritical in its tolerance of Israeli nuclear arms while decrying the efforts of other Middle Eastern nations to develop their own nuclear capabilities.
ref: Milik Israel senjata nuklear sering menjadi lokus kontroversi pahit di Timur Tengah, terutamanya di kalangan negara-negara yang percaya bahawa masyarakat dunia, terutama Amerika Syarikat, adalah hipokrit dalam toleransi senjata nuklear Israel sambil mengutuk usaha negara-negara Timur Tengah lain untuk membangunkan keupayaan nuklear mereka.

src: America is stuck in Iraq and cannot go after Iran militarily right now, according to an unnamed official quoted by the paper.
ref: Amerika Syarikat terperangkap di Iraq dan tidak boleh mengejar ketenteraan Iran sekarang, menurut seorang pegawai yang tidak dinamakan dipetik oleh akhbar itu.

src: A report by the US House of Representatives' Intelligence Committee released on Wednesday asserts that if Iran arms itself with nuclear weapons, Israel would be pressed to respond militarily.
ref: Satu laporan Jawatankuasa Perisikan Rakyat Amerika Syarikat yang dikeluarkan pada Rabu menegaskan bahawa jika Iran mengeluarkan senjata nuklear sebagai perlindungan dirinya, Israel akan ditekan untuk bertindak balas secara ketenteraan.

src: "Israel would find it hard to live with a nuclear armed Iran and could take military action against Iranian nuclear facilities," the report states.
ref: "Israel akan mendapati sukar untuk hidup dengan Iran yang bersenjata nuklear dan boleh mengambil tindakan ketenteraan terhadap kemudahan nuklear Iran," menurut laporan tersebut.

src: Iran has continually maintained that it seeks only to develop nuclear technology for the production of electrical power, though this has been disputed by many nations.
ref: Iran telah sentiasa menegaskan bahawa ia hanya membangunkan teknologi nuklear untuk pengeluaran kuasa elektrik, walaupun ini telah dipertikaikan oleh banyak negara.

src: Residents in the city of Port Harcourt said that Nigerian troops burnt down hundreds of slum dwellings, allegedly as reprisal after an Army sergeant was killed in Thursday's abduction of oil workers in the area.
ref: Penduduk di bandar Port Harcourt berkata, tentera Nigeria membakar beratus-ratus kediaman setinggan, yang didakwa sebagai tindak balas selepas seorang sarjan Tentera dibunuh dalam penculikan pekerja minyak pada hari Khamis di kawasan itu.

src: On Friday, people returning to the area and onlookers were chased away by soldiers.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, orang-orang kembali ke kawasan dan penonton telah dihalau keluar oleh tentera.

src: He said that militants active in the area had set the fires, wearing Army camouflage.
ref: Beliau berkata bahawa kumpulan militan yang aktif di kawasan itu telah membuat kebakaran itu, memakai penyamaran Tentera.

src: Nigerian military sources said at least two foreign oil workers were missing, one of them, Italian.
ref: Sumber tentera Nigeria berkata sekurang-kurangnya dua pekerja asing minyak telah hilang, salah seorang daripada mereka, rakyat Itali.

src: The Italian foreign ministry, though, said that three foreigners were missing.
ref: Kementerian Luar Itali, walau bagaimanapun, berkata tiga warga asing telah hilang.

src: Nineteen people were held captive in eight separate abductions this month.
ref: Sembilan belas orang telah ditawan dalam lapan penculikan berasingan bulan ini.

src: Last week, as part of a tougher line adopted by the Nigerian government, President Obasanjo sent in the Army, with orders to use "force for force" against militants in the region.
ref: Minggu lalu, sebagai sebahagian daripada garis yang lebih sukar diterima pakai oleh kerajaan Nigeria, Presiden Obasanjo menghantar Tentera ke dalam, dengan perintah untuk menggunakan "kuasa untuk kuasa" terhadap militan di rantau itu.

src: Over 160 people were taken into custody in a two day crackdown, including over 100 from a nearby slum, but most have been released since then.
ref: Lebih 160 orang ditahan dalam tindakan keras dua hari, termasuk lebih 100 daripada setinggan yang berdekatan, tetapi kebanyakan telah dilepaskan sejak itu.

src: Ireland called for 9000 soldiers to be sent soon, whereas Philippe Douste-Blazy, the French Foreign Minister maintained that only 7000 are to be sent.
ref: Ireland memanggil 9000 tentera untuk dihantar kemudian, sementara Phillipe Douste-Blazy, Menteri Luar Perancis, tetap akan hanya menghantar hanya 7000 orang.

src: The French President Jacques Chirac declared during a conference with the German Chancellor, Angela Merkel that there not more than 15,000 "blue helmets" will be stationed in Lebanon, calling this number "definitely excessive".
ref: Presiden Perancis Jacques Chirac mengisytiharkan semasa persidangan bersama Canselor Jerman, Angela Merkel bahawa tidak lebih dari 15,000 "helmet biru" akan bertapak di Lebanon, dengan memanggil angka ini "lebih dari cukup."

src: The Israeli Prime Minister's spokesman Avi Pazner, speaking after the French announcement of sending 2000 soldiers, said "11,000 soldiers would still be missing".
ref: Jurucakap Perdana Menteri Israel Avi Pazner, berkata selepas pengumuman Perancis untuk menghantar 2000 orang tenteranya, dengan berkata "11,000 tentera masih lagi tidak mencukupi."

src: He was first transferred to a prison camp in Afghanistan and then transferred to Guantanamo bay.
ref: Beliau mula dipindahkan ke kem penjara di Afghanistan dan kemudiannya dipindahkan ke Guantanamo bay.

src: He was designated an "enemy combatant" even after German law enforcement and US intelligence officials concluded that there was no information tying him to al-Qaeda or other terrorist activities.
ref: Beliau di anggap "pejuang musuh" walaupun selepas penguat kuasa undang-undang Jerman dan risikan pegawai A.S. membuat kesimpulan bahawa tiada maklumat mengaitkan hubungan beliau dengan al-Qaeda atau aktiviti pengganas lain.

src: Kurnaz's lawyers have charged that Kurnaz was tortured while being held in Afghanistan and - to a lesser degree - while at Guantanamo Bay.
ref: Peguam Kurnaz telah menuduh bahawa Kurnaz telah diseksa semasa ditahan di Afghanistan dan sementara di Guantanamo Bay, beliau juga diseksa tetapi pada kadar lebih rendah.

src: Pentagon spokesman Chito Peppler said that the conditions for the prisoner transfer of Kurnaz to Germany included guarantees that Kurnaz be treated humanely by German authorities and that Germany take steps to ensure Kurnaz would not pose any threat to the world.
ref: Jurucakap Pentagon, Chito Peppler berkata bahawa syarat-syarat untuk pemindahan banduan dari Kurnaz ke Jerman termasuk jaminan bahawa Kurnaz akan dilayan dengan secara berperikemanusiaan oleh pihak berkuasa Jerman dan Jerman mengambil langkah-langkah untuk memastikan Kurnaz tidak akan menimbulkan sebarang ancaman kepada dunia.

src: A Kamov-32 fire-fighting helicopter has crashed while trying to fill its water tanks, reports the Turkish Anatolian News agency.
ref: Helikopter pemadam kebakaran Kamov-32 terhempas ketika cuba untuk mengisi tangki air, lapor Berita agensi Anatolia Turki.

src: Since mid-August, the forest fires have swept the Southern part of Turkey including popular tourist destinations like Bodrum and Antalya-Kas.
ref: Sejak pertengahan bulan Ogos, kebakaran hutan telah melanda bahagian Selatan Turki termasuk destinasi pelancongan yang popular seperti Bodrum dan Antalya-Kas.

src: Lately the General Directorate for Forestry has sent short text messages through Turkish operators for citizens to be aware of forest fires.
ref: Akhir-akhir ini Direktorat Perhutanan Umum telah menghantar teks mesej ringkas melalui pengusaha Turki untuk rakyat menyedari akan kebakaran hutan.

src: The latest fire in Kas was taken under control with the help from fire helicopters, where the Kamof-32 type Russian fire helicopter has crashed while filling its tanks with water from nearby Lake Gombe.
ref: Kebakaran terkini di Kas di bawah kawalan dengan bantuan dari helikopter pemadam api, di mana Kamof-32 jenis helikopter pemadam api Rusia telah terhempas semasa mengisi tangki dengan air berdekatan dengan Lake Gombe.

src: In the southern city of Diwania, Iraqi troops battled members of the Shia minority's Mehdi Army, killing 40 gunmen and wounding another 40 civilians.
ref: Di selatan bandar Diwania, tentera Iraq bertempur dengan anggota Tentera Mehdi dari kumpulan minoriti Syiah, membunuh 40 lelaki bersenjata dan mencederakan 40 orang awam yang lain.

src: In Baghdad a mid-morning blast injured about a dozen people, and killing at least eight police officers.
ref: Di Baghdad satu letupan pada tengah pagi mencederakan kira-kira sedozen orang, dan membunuh sekurang-kurangnya lapan orang pegawai polis.

src: The blast was aimed at the heavily securied Iraqi Interior Ministry, which has been the frequent target of attacks.
ref: Letupan itu bertuju kepada Kementerian Dalam Negeri Iraq yang mempunyai banyak kawalan keselamatan, yang sering menjadi sasaran serangan.

src: This morning's violence contrasted statements by Maj Gen William Caldwell, who claimed "Insurgents and terrorists are hitting back in an attempt to offset the success of the Iraqi government and its security forces," the general went on to say that violence had fallen by half since July, but had increased suddenly in the last two days.
ref: Keganasan pagi ini berbeza dengan kenyataan Mejar Jeneral William Caldwell, yang mendakwa "Pemberontak dan pengganas membalas dalam usaha untuk mengimbangi kejayaan kerajaan Iraq dan pasukan keselamatannya," umum seterusnya berkata keganasan yang telah jatuh sebanyak separuh sejak Julai, tetapi telah meningkat secara tiba-tiba dalam tempoh dua hari lepas.

src: Yesterday five US soldiers were killed in three separate bombing incidents, killing four and one respectively, the US military announced today.
ref: Semalam lima askar AS terbunuh dalam tiga insiden pengeboman berasingan, yang membunuh empat dan satu orang masing-masing, tentera AS mengumum hari ini.

src: The assassination of the chief prosecutor in Saddam Hussein's trial for genocide highlights the deep divisions between Iraq's cultural factions, lending creedance to speculation that Iraq has a long way to go before the safety of civilians can be assured.
ref: Pembunuhan ketua pendakwa dalam perbicaraan Saddam Hussein atas pembunuhan beramai-ramai menonjolkan pembahagian yang mendalam antara puak budaya Iraq, menyokong kepercayaan terhadap spekulasi bahawa masih lama lagi untuk Iraq sebelum keselamatan orang awam boleh dijamin.

src: Factions still loyal to the Hussein Regieme remain under cover, undermining the reported progress of western forces.
ref: Puak yang masih setia kepada Hussein Regieme kekal terselindung, melemahkan kemajuan kuasa-kuasa barat seperti yang dilaporkan.

src: Bloc Quebecois Member of Parliament Benoit Sauvageau was killed in an automobile accident on Monday morning after his vehicle hit a tow truck at the side of a road in his Montreal constituency.
ref: Bloc Quebec Ahli Parlimen Benoit Sauvageau terbunuh dalam kemalangan kereta pada pagi Isnin selepas kenderaannya melanggar trak tunda ditepi jalan di kawasan pilihanraya Montrealnya.

src: Sauvageau, 42, had been an MP since 1993 and represented the riding of Repentigny at the time of his death.
ref: Sauvageau, 42, pernah menjadi Ahli Parlimen sejak tahun 1993 dan mewakili kawasan pilihanraya Repentigny pada masa kematiannya.

src: Visibly shaken by the news, Duceppe said: "It's awful, at 42 with four children (daughters) between the ages of five and 15, it's not right."
ref: Terkejut dengan berita itu, Duceppe berkata: "Adalah teruk, pada usia 42 dengan empat anak (anak perempuan) yang berumur antara lima dan 15, itu tidak betul".

src: Former Quebec Premier Lucien Bouchard, who led the BQ when Sauvageau was first elected, told Radio Canada: "It's a tragedy."
ref: Bekas Perdana Quebec Lucien Bouchard, yang mengetuai BQ apabila Sauvageau dipilih buat kali pertama, memberitahu Radio Kanada: "Ia adalah satu tragedi".

src: "He is a man who was engaged in political fights but he did it correctly, with nobility and idealism and a lot of respect for others, even his adversaries," said Bouchard.
ref: "Dia seorang lelaki yang terlibat dalam perjuangan politik tetapi dia melakukannya dengan betul, dengan kemuliaan dan idealisme dan banyak menghormati orang lain, termasuk lawannya," kata Bouchard.

src: StopBadware.org decided to investigate after their users have sent in complaints regarding the operation of the software.
ref: StopBadware.org memutuskan untuk menbuat penyiasatan selepas pengguna mereka menghantar aduan mengenai operasi perisian tersebut.

src: The page then warns readers not to use the AOL software unless they're prepared to handle the risks involved.
ref: Muka tersebut kemudian memberi amaran kepada pembaca untuk tidak menggunakan perisian AOL tersebut melainkan mereka bersedia untuk mengendalikan risiko terlibat.

src: The report clarifies its charges; for example it lists "RealPlayer, QuickTime, AOL You've Got Pictures Screensaver, Pure Networks Port Magic, and Viewpoint Media Player" as the software that is installed without notification.
ref: Laporan tersebut menjelaskan dakwaannya; sebagai contoh ia menyenaraikan "RealPlayer, QuickTime, AOL You've Got Pictures Screensaver, Pure Networks Port Magic, dan Viewpoint Media Player" sebagai perisian yang dipasang tanpa pemberitahuan.

src: Additionally, the AOL toolbar, a bookmark to AOL.com, as well as extra icons are added to Internet Explorer without consent.
ref: Tambahan, the AOL toolbar, penanda kepada AOL.com, dan juga ikon tambahan ditambah kepada Internet Explorer tanpa kebenaran.

src: The report continues by noting that AOL coerces users into upgrading the software by a popup window that does not allow refusal, as well as automatically upgrades the software without allowing that option to be disabled.
ref: Laporan itu berterusan mencatatkan yang AOL memaksa pengguna untuk menaik taraf perisian tersebut dengan tingkap pop-up yang tidak membenarkan penolakan, dan juga naik taraf automatik perisian tersebut tanpa membenarkan pilihan tersebut untuk dinyahaktifkan.

src: AOL spokesman Andrew Weinstein claims that these problems are going to be addressed in an upgrade available next month.
ref: Jurucakap AOL Andrew Weinstein menyatakan yang masalah tersebut akan diselesaikan dalam naik taraf tersedia bulan hadapan.

src: When AOL was issued with an advance copy of the report, StopBadware.org was "very impressed" with their response, and that they look forward to working with AOL.
ref: Bila AOL diserahkan dengan salinan terdahulu laporan tersebut, StopBadware.org "sangat kagum" dengan respons mereka, dan mereka tidak sabar untuk bekerja dengan AOL.

src: In the biggest ever narcotics haul in India's capital, the New Delhi police have seized over 4,400 kg of Mandrax and Rs.
ref: Dalam rampasan narkotik terbesar di ibu negara India, polis New Delhi telah menyita lebih 4,400 kg Mandrax dan Rs.

src: 20 crore from a dealer in the city.
ref: 20 juta dari pembekal di dalam bandar tersebut.

src: The consignment, meant for a customer in the U.S, was seized from a godown in Badarpur, near the Delhi-Haryana border.
ref: Penghantaran tersebut, bertujuan untuk pelanggan di U.S, telah disita dari gudang di Badarpur, berhampiran sempadan Delhi-Haryana.

src: The Deputy Commissioner of Police for South District, Delhi Police, Anil Shukla said, "Sharma befriended container drivers and once they had driven past customs, he and his men would meet them at a distance and pilfer the containers."
ref: Timbalan Pesuruhjaya Polis Daerah Selatan, Polis Delhi, Anil Shukla berkata, "Sharma berbaik-baik dengan pemandu kontena dan selepas mereka memandu melepasi kastam, dia dan orang-orangnya akan menemui mereka ketika ia jauh dari situ dan mencuri kontena tersebut".

src: The passengers, including women and children, were from Bagsibundu village in Koppal district and were going to visit the Alamatti dam after going on a pilgrimage to Koodalasangama.
ref: Penumpang-penumpang, termasuk wanita dan kanak-kanak, adalah dari kampung Bagsibundu dalam daerah Koppal dan sedang dalam perjalanan melawat dam Alamatti selepas menziarahi Koodalasangama.

src: District officials rushed to the spot and initiated efforts to rescue survivors and extricate the bodies of the deceased.
ref: Pegawai daerah bergegas ke tempat kejadian dan memulakan usaha menyelamatkan mereka yang terselamat dan mencari mayat.

src: Chief Minister of Karnataka, H.D Kumaraswamy expressed shock over the accident.
ref: Ketua Menteri Karnataka, H.D Kumaraswamy melahirkan rasa terkejut diatas kemalangan tersebut.

src: Mexico's electoral court has unanimously rejected claims of massive fraud in the July 2nd presidential election and reported that the partial recount ordered at the end of last month has not changed the original result of a narrow victory for conservative candidate Felipe Calderon of the National Action Party (PAN).
ref: Mahkamah pilihan raya Mexico telah sebulat suara menolak dakwaan penipuan besar-besaran dalam pilihan raya presiden 2 Julai dan melaporkan bahawa sebahagian pengiraan semula diperintah di akhir bulan lalu tidak pernah berubah hasil asal kemenangan tipis untuk calon konservatif Felipe Calderon Parti Tindakan Kebangsaan (PAN).

src: "The citizens have always the righ to change or to modify its government", article that has been claimed by Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador as a right to summon a National Democratic Convention.
ref: "Warga sentiasa mempunyai hak untuk menukar atau mengubah suai kerajaannya," artikel yang telah dituntut oleh Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador sebagai hak untuk memanggil suatu Konvensyen Demokratik Kebangsaan.

src: The seven judges have until August 31 to resolve all complaints and until September 6 to officially declare a president-elect or annul the elections.
ref: Tujuh hakim mempunyai sehingga 31 Ogos untuk menyelesaikan semua aduan dan sehingga 6 September untuk mengisytiharkan secara rasmi presiden-pilihan umat atau membatalkan pilihan raya.

src: Leonel Castillo, the president of the tribunal, said Lopez Obrador's claims of massive fraud "turned out to be completely unfounded."
ref: Leonel Castillo, presiden tribunal itu, berkata tuntutan Lopez Obrador terhadap penipuan besar-besaran "ternyata benar-benar tidak berasas".

src: Lopez Obrador's election team had filed complaints at 50,000 polling stations but the court ordered a recount at only 11,839 stations or 9% of all voting locations following massive street protests.
ref: Pasukan pilihan raya Lopez Obrador telah memfailkan aduan di 50,000 pusat pengundian tetapi mahkamah mengarahkan pengiraan semula hanya 11,839 stesen atau 9% daripada semua lokasi mengundi berikutan bantahan jalanan besar-besaran.

src: India's nominee for the post of Secretary-General of the United Nations, Shashi Tharoor has revealed a four-point plan to tackle the problems the international body is facing.
ref: Calon India bagi jawatan Setiausaha Agung Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, Shashi Tharoor telah mendedahkan pelan empat mata untuk menangani masalah yang badan antarabangsa sedang menghadapi.

src: The United Nations with its "impressive achievements" and "haunting failures" has changed but needs to change further, he said in an article in Newsweek International.
ref: Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu dengan "pencapaiannya yang mengagumkan" dan "kegagalan yang menghantuinya" telah berubah tetapi perlu berubah lagi kelak, katanya dalam satu artikel dalam Newsweek International.

src: Tharoor's proposal is concentrated on four areas- making democracy a priority; bolstering the ranks (of the United Nations); prioritising and streamlining; and healing wounds.
ref: Cadangan Tharoor ini tertumpu pada empat bidang- menjadikan demokrasi satu keutamaan; mengukuhkan kedudukan (Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu); mengutamakan dan memperkemaskan; dan penyembuhan luka.

src: He also pointed out "problems without passports" such as climate change, narcotics smuggling and human rights violations.
ref: Beliau juga berkata "masalah tanpa pasport" seperti perubahan iklim, penyeludupan narkotik dan pelanggaran hak asasi manusia.

src: Tharoor, a leading candidate to succeed Kofi Annan, said that strengthening the capacities of both the UN and its member-states was the best way to deal with these problems.
ref: Tharoor, calon utama untuk menggantikan Kofi Annan, berkata bahawa pengukuhan kapasiti kedua-dua PBB dan negara anggotanya merupakan cara terbaik untuk menangani masalah ini.

src: Tharoor stated that further efforts were needed to promote democracy and good governance the world over.
ref: Tharoor menyatakan bahawa usaha selanjutnya diperlukan untuk menggalakkan demokrasi dan pengurusan yang baik di seluruh dunia.

src: "We now have a Democracy Fund to help us do that, financed not just by the rich West but by countries like India," he said.
ref: "Kami kini mempunyai Dana Demokrasi untuk membantu kami berbuat demikian, bukan sahaja dibiayai oleh negara Barat yang kaya tetapi oleh negara-negara seperti India," katanya.

src: He said the UN should support the efforts bodies like NATO and the EU were making in their peacekeeping.
ref: Beliau berkata PBB perlu menyokong usaha badan-badan seperti NATO dan EU yang menjalankan dalam menjaga keamanan mereka.

src: Tharoor also spoke about the conflict in Iraq, saying "And where the task, like enforcing peace in Iraq, is clearly beyond us (the UN), we should let wars be fought by warriors, not peacekeepers," In reference to "healing wounds", he pointed out the danger of the Cold War divisions being replaced by a North-South divide at the UN.
ref: Tharoor juga bercakap mengenai konflik di Iraq, berkata "Dan di mana tugas, seperti menguatkuasakan keamanan di Iraq, adalah jelas di luar kawalan kami (PBB), kita harus membiarkan peperangan diperjuangkan oleh pahlawan-pahlawan, bukan pasukan pengaman," Merujuk kepada "penyembuhan luka," beliau menunjukkan bahaya bahagian Perang Dingin yang digantikan dengan jurang Utara-Selatan di PBB.

src: "The new secretary-general must urgently combat this."
ref: "Setiausaha Agung baru perlu memerangi ini dengan segera".

src: Tharoor is currently the UN's Under Secretary-General for Communications and Public Information.
ref: Tharoor kini adalah Setiausaha Agung PBB bagi Komunikasi dan Maklumat Awam.

src: He and South Korean Foreign Minister Ban Ki Moon are considered frontrunners in the race to succeed Annan, whose term ends at the end of the year.
ref: Beliau dan Menteri Luar Korea Selatan, Ban Ki Moon dianggap sebagai pendahulu dalam pertandingan untuk mengganti Annan, yang tempohnya berakhir pada akhir tahun ini.

src: Dozens of people have been killed as a result of flooding in Plateau State, located in the central part of Nigeria.
ref: Berpuluh-puluh orang terbunuh akibat banjir di Plateau State, yang terletak di bahagian tengah Nigeria.

src: The flooding occurred as the result of a large amount of rainfall close to Jos, a city in the north of the state, causing overflow of a dam.
ref: Banjir itu berlaku diakibatkan oleh jumlah hujan yang besar berhampiran dengan Jos, sebuah bandar di utara negeri ini, dan menyebabkan limpahan empangan.

src: The Red Cross has reported the recovery of 35 corpses, while BBC News Online has placed the death toll at a minimum of 39.
ref: Palang Merah melaporkan 35 mayat dijumpai, manakala BBC News Online telah meletakkan angka kematian pada angka sekurang-kurangnya 39.

src: A spokesperson for the Red Cross said approximately two hundred houses had been sunk or wrecked.
ref: Jurucakap Palang Merah berkata kira-kira dua ratus buah rumah telah tenggelam atau rosak.

src: A significant number of the affected houses had been built of mud.
ref: Sebilangan besar rumah-rumah yang terlibat telah dibanjiri lumpur.

src: Manasie Phampe, leader of the Red Cross of the state, explained: "Rainwater and water from the Lamingo dam which overflowed swept across several neighbourhoods in the city".
ref: Manasie Phampe, pemimpin Palang Merah di negeri ini, menjelaskan: "Air hujan dan air dari empangan Lamingo yang melimpah melanda beberapa kawasan di bandar."

src: "The march is a way to say, loud and clear, that we want Giuliana Sgrena to be freed... to say no to terrorism and violence", Piero Fassino, leader of the Democratici di Sinistra (Democrats of the Left) party, said.
ref: "Perarakan itu adalah satu cara untuk berkata, dengan kuat dan jelas, yang kita mahu Giuliana Sgrena dibebaskan...untuk mengatakan tidak kepada keganasan dan kekejaman", Piero Fassino, pemimpin parti Democratici di Sinistra (Demokrat haluan kiri), berkata.

src: Giuliana Sgrena was kidnapped near Baghdad's University on February 4 while she was covering Iraqi elections for Il Manifesto.
ref: Giuliana Sgrena diculik berhampiran Universiti Baghdad pada 4 Februari semasa dia membuat liputan pilihan raya Iraq untuk Il Manifesto.

src: On February 15 Associated Press Television received a video showing Sgrena demanding help from Italian politicians and people, and asking for Italian troop's withdrawal from Iraq.
ref: Pada 15 Februari Televisyen Associated Press menerima sebuah video yang menunjukkan Sgrena menuntut bantuan daripada ahli-ahli politik Itali dan rakyat, dan meminta pengunduran tentera Itali daripada Iraq.

src: The explosion is said to be the most powerful explosion known to scientists, which consists of a gamma-ray burst or an x-ray blast.
ref: Letupan itu dikatakan adalah letupan terkuat diketahui saintis, yang terdiri daripada satu pecahan sinar gama atau pecahan sinar-x.

src: Scientists say that bursts signal the beginning of a star's death.
ref: Para saintis berkata yang pecahan itu adalah tanda permulaan kepada kematian sebutir bintang.

src: Swift first detected the explosion on February 18 (it was given a designation GRB 060218), which allowed telescopes and satellites to watch the event as it happened.
ref: Swift pada mulanya telah mengesan letupan tersebut pada 18 Februari (ia telah diberi gelaran GRB 060218), yang membenarkan teleskop dan satelit untuk melihat kejadian tersebut ketika ia terjadi.

src: The blast lasted for more than 2,000 seconds (33 minutes).
ref: Pecahan itu terjadi selama lebih dari 2,000 saat (33 minit).

src: "Those observations capture the time when the star collapsed, ejected its outer envelope and most of its mass and left a compact remnant behind."
ref: "Pemerhatian itu menangkap masa apabila bintang runtuh, mengeluarkan lapisan luarannya dan kebanyakan beratnya dan meninggalkan satu tinggalan padat".

src: "And we think that compact remnant is a neutron star," said an author writing for journal Nature, where the report will be published on Thursday.
ref: "Dan kami berpendapat tinggalan padat itu adalah sebutir bintang neutron," kata seorang penulis untuk jurnal Nature, di mana laporan tersebut akan diterbitkan pada hari Khamis.

src: The star is at least 440 million light years from Earth.
ref: Bintang itu terletak sekurang-kurangnya 440 juta tahun cahaya dari Bumi.

src: The jet was flying with another F-16 when it crashed.
ref: Jet itu sedang terbang dengan sebuah lagi F-16 apabila ia terhempas.

src: The controversy began when councillor Lynn Philip Hodgson lowered the town hall flag out of respect for a fallen Canadian soldier.
ref: Kontroversi bermula apabila ahli majlis Lynn Philip Hodgson menurunkan bendera dewan bandar tersebut sebagai penghormatan terhadap tentera Kanada yang gugur.

src: Rather than an issue of patriotism, the controversy dealt with union contracts which may have specified that the raising and lowering of flags was a role reserved only for union members.
ref: Bukannya isu patriotik, kontroversi tersebut berlaku berikutan kontrak kesatuan yang menetapkan penaikan dan penurunan bendera adalah satu peranan yang dikhaskan hanya kepada ahli kesatuan.

src: "The public reaction to the lowering of the flag in a timely manner needs to be addressed," said Drebit.
ref: "Reaksi orang awam terhadap penurunan bendera perlu ditangani dengan segera," kata Drebit.

src: The union dropped the grievance and said it was all a "misunderstanding."
ref: Kesatuan meleraikan ketidak puas hatian dan berkata semuanya adalah "salah faham."

src: United States and Iraqi forces have captured the al-Qaeda in Iraq's second in command, Hamad Jama al-Saedi.
ref: Tentera Amerika Syarikat dan Iraq telah menangkap pemerintah kedua al-Qaeda di Iraq, Hamad Jama al-Saedi.

src: He is also known as Al-Suaidi, Abu Rana and Abu Humam.
ref: Dia turut dikenali sebagai Al-Suaidi, Abu Rana dan Abu Humam.

src: "Deliberate intelligence work both by Iraqi forces and as well as multinational forces have dealt a very severe blow to al Qaeda organization in Iraq," said Barham Salih, the Planning Minister for Iraq.
ref: "Kerja perisik terancang oleh kedua-dua tentera Iraq dan juga tentera pelbagai negara telah memberi tamparan hebat kepada organisasi al Qaeda di Iraq," kata Barham Salih, Menteri Perancangan untuk Iraq.

src: According to Rubaie, the building was currently in use by some families.
ref: Menurut Rubaie, bangunan itu sedang digunakan oleh beberapa keluarga.

src: The men's team final in artistic gymnastics reached a tense conclusion last night at the Olympic Games in London.
ref: Pasukan lelaki terakhir dalam gimnastik artistik berada dalam situasi tegang malam tadi di Sukan Olimpik di London.

src: Japan took silver with 271.952 points, and Great Britain got bronze with 271.711 points.
ref: Jepun mendapat pingat perak dengan 271.952 mata, dan Great Britain mendapat pingat gangsa dengan 271.711 mata.

src: British gymnast Louis Smith celebrated Britain's bronze: "It's a beautiful day for the sport and for British gymnastics."
ref: Gimnas British Louis Smith meraikan pingat gangsa Britain: "Ia adalah hari yang indah untuk sukan ini dan untuk gimnastik British".

src: Smith also promised great things from Britain's up-and-coming male gymnasts, promising that team members Sam Oldham and Max Whitlock would improve for the next Olympics in Rio.
ref: Smith juga menjanjikan sesuatu yang hebat dari gimnas lelaki Britain, berjanji bahawa ahli-ahli pasukan Sam Oldham dan Max Whitlock akan memperbaiki prestasi untuk Sukan Olimpik yang akan datang di Rio.

src: Smith also commended the junior squad: "The juniors we've got coming up — we've been junior European champions for the last six years — there's so much depth."
ref: Smith juga memuji skuad junior: "pemain muda kami akan datang - kami telah menjadi juara muda Eropah sejak enam tahun lalu - terdapat begitu banyak pemain pelapis".

src: The US team, who had come first in the qualifying round, came fifth in the finals which led to tears from John Orozco.
ref: Pasukan Amerika Syarikat, yang mendapat tempat pertama di pusingan kelayakan, mendapat tempat kelima di peringkat akhir yang menyebabkan John Orozco berlinangan air mata.

src: The US team vowed to fight on in the individual competition.
ref: Pasukan Amerika Syarikat berikrar untuk berjuang di dalam pertandingan individu.

src: Steve Penny from USA Gymnastics told reporters: "Our guys know that they're better than fifth place, and they're going to try to show that off through the rest of the competition."
ref: Steve Penny dari Gimnastik Amerika Syarikat memberitahu pemberita: "Mereka tahu bahawa mereka lebih baik daripada tempat kelima, dan mereka akan cuba untuk tunjukkan sehingga akhir pertandingan".

src: Saturday, September 2nd, Wellington held a computer recycling day for free hosted by computer maker, Dell.
ref: Sabtu, 2 September, Wellington mengadakan hari kitar semula komputer secara percuma yang dihos oleh pembuat komputer, Dell.

src: During the recycling day, sponsored by Environment Ministry and Computer Access New Zealand Trust, Dell New Zealand took in more than 30 tonnes of obsolete equipment by 1,200 people at Wellington's Westpac Stadium.
ref: Pada hari kitar semula itu, yang ditaja oleh Kementerian Alam Sekitar dan Amanah Computer Access New Zealand, Dell New Zealand dapat mengumpulkan lebih daripada 30 tan peralatan usang daripada 1,200 orang di Stadium Wellington Westpac.

src: Susan McGregor, an Auckland City Council spokesperson, said: "There is a regional forum looking into waste disposal; but to date there is only a scheme for hazardous material to be collected separately by the council."
ref: Susan McGregor, seorang jurucakap bagi Majlis Perbandaran Auckland, berkata: "Terdapat satu forum serantau yang mengkaji pembuangan sampah; tetapi setakat ini hanya ada satu skim untuk bahan berbahaya yang dikutip secara berasingan oleh pihak majlis".

src: "It [the council] would welcome computer companies taking some responsibility for disposing of old computer ware."
ref: "Ia [majlis] mengalu-alukan syarikat-syarikat komputer menanggung sedikit tanggungjawab untuk melupuskan barang komputer lama".

src: According to Dell, out of the 6.3 million New Zealand computers, 250,000 of them are old and obsolete, mainly because most computer owners, according to a survey, will upgrade their computers every two to five years.
ref: Menurut Dell, daripada 6.3 juta komputer New Zealand, 250,000 daripada itu sudah tua dan usang, terutamanya kerana kebanyakan pemilik komputer, menurut satu kaji selidik, akan menaiktarafkan komputer mereka setiap dua hingga lima tahun.

src: Sydney, Australia had recently hosted one of their own computer recycling days; however Wellington's event was four times more successful.
ref: Sydney, Australia baru-baru ini menjadi tuan rumah salah satu daripada hari kitar semula komputer mereka sendiri; walau bagaimanapun acara Wellington adalah empat kali ganda lebih berjaya.

src: One Briton was killed and five others were injured at the Roman Theatre in central Amman.
ref: Seorang warga Britain mati dan lima lagi cedera di Roman Theatre di tengah Amman.

src: Two British women were among the injured tourists, the rest were from the Netherlands, New Zealand and Australia (So far the dead man has not been named).
ref: Dua wanita Britain antara yang tercedera, selebihnya dari Netherlands, New Zealand dan Australia (Setakat ini lelaki yang mati belum dikeluarkan nama).

src: It is not yet clear whether the man was acting on his own or as part of group.
ref: Ia masih belum jelas sama ada lelaki itu bertindak sendiri atau sebagai sebahagian daripada kumpulan.

src: A BBC reporter in the area has said that the area is cordoned and currently being patrolled by armed police.
ref: Wartawan BBC di kawasan itu telah berkata bahawa kawasan itu ditutup dan sedang diawasai oleh polis bersenjata.

src: India's former External Affairs Minister Natwar Singh has, for the first time, been directly accused by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) for his involvement in the Iraq oil scam.
ref: Bekas Menteri Hal Ehwal Luar India Natwar Singh, buat kali pertama, dituduh secara langsung oleh Direktorat Penguatkuasaan (ED) kerana terlibat dalam penipuan minyak di Iraq.

src: The ED, which is responsible for enforcing foreign exchange control laws, has alleged that Singh, along with his son Jagat Singh and three others, acquired foreign exchange worth $8.9 lakh illegally.
ref: ED, yang bertanggungjawab untuk menguatkuasakan undang-undang kawalan pertukaran asing, telah mendakwa Singh, bersama-sama dengan anaknya Jagat Singh dan tiga yang lain, yang memperolehi pertukaran asing bernilai $ 8.9 lakh secara haram.

src: The money was transferred to an account in the name of Indus Trading Company, which itself is owned by Andaleeb Sehgal, a friend of Mr. Singh.
ref: Wang telah dipindahkan ke akaun atas nama Indus Trading Company, yang itu sendiri dimiliki oleh Andaleeb Sehgal, sahabat Mr Singh.

src: The independent Pathak Commission's report had stated that there was "no material evidence to show that Natwar Singh derived any financial or other personal benefits from the contracts."
ref: Laporan Suruhanjaya Pathak bebas telah menyatakan bahawa terdapat "tiada bukti bahan untuk menunjukkan bahawa Natwar Singh memperolehi apa-apa faedah kewangan peribadi atau lain-lain daripada kontrak".

src: Sri Lankan government troops are claiming their first significant victory since the peace accord went into effect four years ago, capturing the rebel-held enclave of Sempur in the country's embattled east.
ref: Askar kerajaan Sri Lanka menuntut kemenangan besar pertama meraka sejak perjanjian damai telah berkuat kuasa empat tahun yang lalu, mengambil semula wilayah yang dikuasai pemberontak Sempur di wilayah timur negara ini.

src: "We captured the main Sampur artillery position of the Tigers, We suspect they dismantled the guns or pulled them back.
ref: "Kami menangkap kedudukan utama meriam Sampur Tiger, kami mengesyaki mereka menghapuskan senjata api atau menarik mereka balik.

src: Princess Kiko has given birth to a 2,558 gram (5.639 lb) baby boy, on 6 September at 8 h 27 (Japan Standard Time).
ref: Puteri Kiko telah melahirkan seorang bayi lelaki 2,558 gram (5.639 paun), pada 6 September di 8 h 27 (Masa Piawaian Jepun).

src: Emperor Akihito, currently on a tour of Hokkaido, welcomed the birth.
ref: Maharaja Akihito, yang kini dalam lawatan ke Hokkaido, menyambut kelahiran itu.

src: A number of traditional rites will take place, including the baby boy being symbolically presented with a sabre.
ref: Beberapa upacara tradisional akan dijalankan, termasuk bayi lelaki tersebut secara simboliknya diberikan satu sabit.

src: The boy will be the third in line to succeed to the Japanese throne after the Crown Prince Naruhito and Prince Akishino, father of the child.
ref: Anak itu akan menjadi orang ketiga dalam barisan untuk menduduki takhta Jepun selepas Putera Mahkota Naruhito dan Putera Akishino, bapa kepada kanak-kanak itu.

src: The panel's recommendation to allow women to inherit the throne was met with fierce criticism from conservatives.
ref: Cadangan panel untuk membenarkan wanita untuk mewarisi takhta telah dikritik hebat daripada kumpulan konservatif.

src: The largest multiplex cinema complex in Southeastern Europe opened on Friday in Bucharest, the capital of Romania.
ref: Kompleks panggung wayang terbesar di tenggara Eropah dibuka pada Jumaat di Bucharest, ibu negara Romania.

src: The cinema is operated by Movieplex Italy and is located in the Plaza Romania shopping centre.
ref: Panggung wayang ini dioperasikan oleh Moviplex Italy dan terletak di kompleks membeli-belah Plaza Romania.

src: Plaza Romania is one of the newest shopping centres in Bucharest, having opened in October 2004 after a 45 million euro investment by Anchor Group, a Turkish company, which also invested in the Bucharest Mall, another large shopping centre in the Romanian capital.
ref: Plaza Romania merupakan satu daripada pusat membeli-belah baru di Bucharest, telah dibuka pada Oktober 2004 selepas pelaburan sebanyak 45 milion euro di Bucharest Mall, pusat membeli-belah besar lain di ibu negara Romania.

src: Artistic gymnastics events at the London 2012 Summer Olympic Games concluded yesterday with two gold medal wins for China and gold medals for the Netherlands and the United States.
ref: Acara gimnastik artistik di Sukan Olimpik Musim Panas London 2012 telah disimpulkan semalam dengan dua pingat emas dimenangi China dan pingat emas untuk Netherland dan Amerika Syarikat.

src: China's Feng Zhe won gold in the men's parallel bars, just narrowly beating out the German gymnast Marcel Nguyen by 0.166 points.
ref: Feng Zhe dari China telah memenangi emas di dalam acara palang selari lelaki, hanya tipis mengalahkan ahli gimnastik Jerman Marcel Nguyen dengan 0.166 mata.

src: China also claimed a gold with Deng Linlin scoring a 15.600 in the women's beam.
ref: China turut memperoleh emas dengan Deng Linlin yang mendapat 15.600 mata di dalam palang wanita.

src: The balance beam proved treacherous for some: Gabrielle Douglas, considered a favourite for the event, came seventh after a dramatic fall.
ref: Palang pengimbang terbukti berbahaya bagi sesetengah orang: Gabrielle Douglas, yang dianggap digemari ramai untuk acara ini, di tempat ketujuh selepas jatuh secara dramatik.

src: The United States did manage to get a bronze on the beam thanks to Alexandra Raisman who pulled off a routine that received enormous applause.
ref: Amerika Syarikat berjaya memperoleh gangsa untuk acara palang hasil daripada Alexandra Raisman yang berjaya membuat rutin yang membawa kepada tepukan gemuruh.

src: She initially got less points than Romania's Catalina Ponor, but took the bronze after an appeal.
ref: Dia yang pada awalnya mendapat mata kurang dari Catalina Ponor dari Romania, tetapi mendapat gangsa selepas satu rayuan.

src: Danell Leyva from the United States started with a strong 15.833 point routine.
ref: Danell Leyva dari Amerika Syarikat bermula dengan rutin mata setinggi 15.833.

src: China's Zhang Chenglong then grabbed the lead by earning 16.266 points.
ref: Zhang Chenglong dari China kemudiannya mendahului dengan memperoleh 16.266 mata.

src: Zonderland's performance makes him the first Dutch gymnast to win gold at the Olympics since the win for the Dutch women's team at the Amsterdam Games in 1928.
ref: Persembahan Zonderland menjadikan dia ahli gimnastik Belanda yang pertama yang memenangi emas di Olimpik sejak kemenangan kumpulan wanita Belanda di Sukan Amsterdam pada tahun 1928.

src: Hambuchen got a silver medal and the Chinese gymnast Zou Kai took bronze.
ref: Hambuchen mendapat pingat perak dan ahli gimnastik China Zou Kai pula memperoleh gangsa.

src: Aliya Mustafina from Russia took home bronze for her 14.900 point routine.
ref: Aliya Mustafina dari Russia membawa pulang gangsa dengan rutin 14.900 mata.

src: The special TADA court hearing the 1993 Mumbai blasts case began delivering its verdict today.
ref: TADA khas mahkamah perbicaraan kes letupan di Mumbai pada tahun 1993 mula menyampaikan keputusan hari ini.

src: The judge decided to acquit three other Memons, Suleiman, Hanifa and Raheen, giving them the benefit of the doubt.
ref: Hakim memutuskan untuk membebaskan tiga Memons lain, Suleiman, Hanifa dan Raheen, memberikan mereka manfaat keraguan.

src: After the blasts, which killed over 250 people in 13 explosions across the city, the Memon family fled to Dubai, and then Pakistan.
ref: Selepas letupan yang mengorbankan lebih 250 orang di 13 letupan di seluruh bandar, keluarga Memon melarikan diri ke Dubai, dan kemudian Pakistan.

src: Except Tiger and his brother Ayub, however, the rest of them returned to India in 1994, and were arrested by the CBI.
ref: Kecuali Tiger dan adiknyanya Ayub, bagaimanapun, yang lain daripada mereka kembali ke India pada tahun 1994, dan telah ditangkap oleh CBI.

src: Since then, Yakub has been in custody and has, according to his lawyer Subhash Kanse, been undergoing treatment for depression.
ref: Sejak itu, Yakub telah berada dalam tahanan dan telah, menurut peguamnya, Subhash Kanse, menjalani rawatan untuk kemurungan.

src: The leu, Romania's national currency, continues to appreciate against the euro and the US dollar after it reached high levels a few days ago.
ref: Leu, matawang kebangsaan Romania, terus meningkat berbanding euro dan dolar US selepas mencapai tahap yang tinggi beberapa hari lalu.

src: These rates are also significantly stronger from the period in mid-2004 when the euro was worth more than 40,000 lei.
ref: Nilai-nilai tukaran ini ternyata kukuh berbanding tempoh pada pertengahan 2004 apabila euro bernilai lebih daripada 40,000 lei.

src: The National Bank, however, is hesitant to intervene in the marketplace once again due to the positive effects of the leu's appreciation on importers, who can now get products for lower prices, and for consumers, who now have higher purchasing power for imported goods.
ref: Bank Nasional, bagaimanapun, teragak-agak untuk mencampur tangan ke dalam ruang niaga sekali lagi berikutan kesan positif daripada kenaikan leu terhadap pengimport, yang kini boleh mendapatkan produk pada harga rendah, dan terhadap pengguna, yang kini mempunyai kuasa belian barangan import yang lebih tinggi.

src: Romanians are also pleased that their currency, which has faced long periods of fairly sharp depreciation in the 1990s due to high inflation, is finally picking up again and strengthening against other currencies.
ref: Rakyat Romania juga gembira bahawa matawang mereka, yang menghadapi kejatuhan merudum teruk untuk jangka masa panjang pada 1990-an berikutan inflasi yang tinggi, akhirnya meningkat kembali dan diperkukuhkan berbanding matawang lain.

src: Other countries are finding Romanian exports more expensive, and therefore less competitive, due to the leu's appreciation, and this could widen the already large account deficit in the country.
ref: Negara lain merasakan barangan eksport Romania lebih mahal, dan oleh itu kurang berdaya saing, berikutan kenaikan leu, dan ini boleh meluaskan lagi masalah kekurangan akaun yang telah pun berleluasa di negara itu.

src: Analysts predict, however, that the leu's surge cannot be stopped and it will continue strengthening against the euro, reaching a rate of 34,000 lei for one euro in the next week.
ref: Jangkaan penganalisis, bagaimanapun, lonjakan leu tidak boleh dihentikan dan ia akan kekal diperkukuhkan berbanding euro, mencapai nilai 34,000 lei untuk satu euro dalam minggu hadapan.

src: The current leu will be replaced in July 2005 with the New Leu (RON), with 10,000 old lei = 1 New Leu.
ref: Leu pada masa kini akan digantikan pada Julai 2005 dengan Leu Baru (RON), dengan 10,000 lei lama = 1 Leu Baru.

src: Starting from next month, all Romanian prices must be shown in both the old currency and the new currency.
ref: Bermula pada bulan hadapan, semua harga barang Romania mesti ditunjukkan didalam kedua-dua matawang baru dan lama.

src: The World Health Organization, Rotary International, the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention and UNICEF are leading the Initiative and coordinating a series of overlapping immunization campaigns in the region.
ref: Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia, Rotary International, Pusat Kawalan dan Pencegahan Penyakit A.S. dan UNICEF memimpin Inisiatif itu dan menyelaraskan satu siri kempen imunisasi bertindih di rantau ini.

src: The three countries are the last in Asia to have endemic polio, and the disease is confined to a small number of regions within the country.
ref: Ketiga-tiga negara adalah yang terakhir di Asia yang mempunyai endemik polio, dan penyakit ini terhad kepada sebilangan kecil kawasan-kawasan di negara itu.

src: Only 186 cases were reported in 2004, down from 336 the previous year.
ref: Hanya 186 kes dilaporkan pada tahun 2004, turun daripada 336 pada tahun sebelumnya.

src: Chavez said in a speech Tuesday, "The hypothesis is not absurd ... that those towers could have been dynamited."
ref: Chavez berkata dalam ucapan pada hari Selasa, "Hipotesis itu tidak masuk akal...yang menara-menara itu boleh diletupkan."

src: The U.S. government has maintained that Al-Qaeda orchestrated the attacks under the leadership of Osama bin Laden.
ref: Kerajaan U.S. telah menegaskan bahawa Al-Qaeda yang merancang serangan itu di bawah pimpinan Osama bin Laden.

src: The attack consisted of a magic number which was entered in the PIN keypad, which caused the machine to disburse $20 bills when it recorded giving out $5 dollar bills.
ref: Serangan itu terdiri dari nombor majik yang dimasukkan kedalam PIN papan kekunci, yang mengakibatkan mesin mengembalikan wang $20 apabila dicatatkan untuk mengeluarkan wang $5.

src: No one in authority noticed for nine days, until an honest ATM user reported the machine was giving out too much money.
ref: Tiada penguatkuasa yang menyedarinya untuk sembilan hari, sehingga pengguna ATM yang jujur melaporkan yang mesin tersebut memberikan wang yang terlalu banyak.

src: Numerous cities throughout Texas, United States have begun broadening their efforts to fight mosquito populations, in an effort to reduce transmission of the sometimes-lethal West Nile virus.
ref: Beberapa bandar di seluruh Texas, Amerika Syarikat telah mula meningkatkan usaha mereka untuk melawan populasi nyamuk, dalam usaha mengurangkan pennularan virus Wes Nile yang kadang-kadang membawa maut.

src: Officials there have requested use of five planes, intended to spray most of North Dallas, as well as other sections of the city.
ref: Pegawai di sana telah meminta penggunaan lima kapal terbang, ingin menyembur kebanyakan kawasan North Dallas, begitu juga bahagian-bahagian lain bandar.

src: Tim Whitley, a city official in Malakoff, told Wikinews his city has begun using a pesticide specialist to spray two times weekly.
ref: Tim Whitley, seorang pegawai bandar di Malakoff, memberitahu Wikinews bandar itu telah mula menggunakan seorang pakar racun perosak untuk menyembur dua kali seminggu.

src: According to Whitley, certain atmospheric conditions, such as wind speed and humidity, must be right before the large scale treatments can occur.
ref: Menurut Whitley, keadaan atmosfera tertentu, seperti kelajuan angin dan kelembapan, mesti berlaku sejurus sebelum semburan skala besar boleh berlaku.

src: He explained two treatments per week is more often than usual for the city.
ref: Dia menjelaskan dua semburan setiap minggu adalah lebih kerap dari biasa untuk bandar itu.

src: "With the concerns in Dallas, we're taking it seriously", Whitley added.
ref: "Tentang masalah di Dallas, kami mengambil perhatian serius," tambah Whitley.

src: As a result, that city has increased its pesticide treatments.
ref: Hasilnya, bandar itu telah meningkatkan semburan racun perosak.

src: Media sources indicate well over 80 cases of West Nile virus have been reported this year in Dallas county alone.
ref: Sumber media menunjukkan lebih daripada 80 kes virus Wes Nile telah dilaporkan tahun ini di daerah Dallas sahaja.

src: A top-ranking Dallas county official told media he views the problem with serious concern.
ref: Seorang pegawai kanan daerah Dallas memberitahu media dia melihat masalah dengan mengambil perhatian yang serius.

src: About 60 percent of West Nile cases in the U.S. happen in Texas.
ref: Kira-kira 60 peratus kes Wes Nile di Amerika Syarikat berlaku di Texas.

src: Historically, there have been some objections raised over aerial spraying and the potential health hazards distributing such chemicals may pose.
ref: Dari segi sejarah, terdapat beberapa bantahan atas semburan udara dan kemungkinan bahaya kesihatan disebabkan penyebaran bahan kimia itu.

src: The earliest cases of the virus appeared in the U.S. in the late 1990s.
ref: Kes-kes awal virus itu muncul di Amerika Syarikat pada lewat tahun 1990-an.

src: American researchers at the University of Rochester Medical Center in New York say that it could take months to develop a useable drug from the compound, parthenolide.
ref: Penyelidik Amerika di Pusat Perubatan Universiti Rochester di New York mengatakan bahawa ia mungkin mengambil masa berbulan-bulan untuk meghasilkan ubat yang boleh digunakan daripada kawasan, parthenolide.

src: "We have proof that we can kill leukemia stem cells with this type of agent, and that is good news."
ref: "Kami mempunyai bukti bahawa kita boleh membunuh sel-sel stem leukemia dengan ejen jenis ini, dan itu adalah berita yang baik".

src: Parthenolide appears to target the roots of myeloid leukemia, stem cells, while current treatments including the relatively new drug Gleevec don't.
ref: Parthenolide kelihatan menyasarkan akar leukemia mieloid, sel-sel stem, manakala rawatan semasa termasuklah dadah yang agak baru Gleevec tidak berupaya sedemikian.

src: Used for centuries to fight fevers, inflammation and arthritis, feverfew earned interest from the Rochester researchers after other scientists showed that it could prevent skin cancer in animal models.
ref: Digunakan selama berabad-abad lamanya untuk melawan demam, keradangan dan artritis, daun sedar menarik perhatian penyelidik Rochester selepas ahli-ahli sains lain menunjukkan bahawa ia boleh mencegah kanser kulit dalam model haiwan.

src: Comparing the impact of parthenolide to the common chemotherapy drug cytarabine, they found that parthenolide selectively killed leukemia cells while sparing normal cells better.
ref: Perbandingan kesan parthenolide dengan ubat kemoterapi biasa cytarabine, mereka mendapati bahawa parthenolide membunuh sel-sel leukemia secara terpilih sambil mengekalkan sel-sel normal yang lebih baik.

src: While the findings suggest that parthenolide is a good starting point for new drugs, people with leukemia aren't being encouraged to take high doses of feverfew as they could not take enough of the remedy to halt the disease.
ref: Walaupun penemuan itu menunjukkan bahawa parthenolide adalah titik permulaan yang baik untuk ubat-ubatan baru, orang berpenyakit leukemia tidak digalakkan untuk mengambil dos daun sedar yang tinggi kerana mereka tidak mungkin boleh makan ubat itu secukup mungkin untuk menghentikan penyakit itu.

src: After an introduction from Virginia governor Bob McDonnell, who himself had been considered a potential running mate, Romney officially made the announcement.
ref: Selepas pengenalan dari Gabenor Virginia Bob McDonnell, yang dirinya telah dianggap sebagai rakan sepencalonan berpotensi, Romney membuat pengumuman rasmi.

src: He referred to Ryan as "an intellectual leader of the Republican Party" and initially labeled Ryan as the "next president of the United States" before correcting himself after Ryan reached the podium.
ref: Beliau merujuk kepada Ryan sebagai "seorang pemimpin intelek dari Parti Republikan" dan pada mulanya melabel Ryan sebagai "presiden Amerika Syarikat yang seterusnya" sebelum memperbetulkan dirinya selepas Ryan tiba di pentas ucapan.

src: Ryan, 42, has represented Wisconsin's 1st congressional district since 1999 and serves as chairman of the House Budget Committee.
ref: Ryan, 42, telah mewakili kongres daerah Wisconsin pertama sejak tahun 1999 dan berkhidmat sebagai Pengerusi Jawatankuasa Bajet Dewan.

src: He added that the campaign "won't duck the tough issues—we will lead" and went after the record of President Barack Obama, arguing that his policies "didn't make things better."
ref: Tambahnya, kempen "tidak akan mengelak isu yang sukar -kita akan mendahului" dan mengejar rekod Presiden Barack Obama, dengan alasan bahawa dasar-dasar beliau "tidak membuat keadaan yang lebih baik."

src: According to Reuters, Romney made the decision on August 1 after returning from his international trip.
ref: Menurut Reuters, Romney membuat keputusan itu pada 1 Ogos selepas pulang dari lawatan antarabangsa.

src: Four days later, Ryan was secretly flown to Brookline, Massachusetts to meet Romney at the home of Beth Myers, who was running the vice presidential search.
ref: Empat hari kemudian, Ryan telah diterbangkan secara rahsia ke Brookline, Massachusetts untuk bertemu Romney di rumah Beth Myers, yang sedang bertanding dalam pemilihan naib presiden.

src: Thereafter, the campaign decided to make the announcement in Virginia, and so Ryan was once again secretly flown, this time to Elizabeth City, North Carolina near Norfolk, where he met with Romney and prepared his acceptance speech.
ref: Selepas itu, kempen ini telah memilih untuk membuat pengumuman di Virginia, dan Ryan sekali lagi diterbangkan secara rahsia, kali ini ke Elizabeth City, North Carolina berhampiran Norfolk, di mana beliau bertemu dengan Romney dan menyediakan ucapan penerimaannya.

src: NBC News first announced the decision, and the Romney campaign announced the news to supporters through a phone application at seven a.m., a couple of hours before the official announcement.
ref: NBC News yang pertama mengumumkan keputusan itu, dan kempen Romney mengumumkan berita kepada penyokong melalui aplikasi telefon pada tujuh a.m., beberapa jam sebelum pengumuman rasmi.

src: A 35-year old woman, Venus Critchfield of Philipippi, West Virginia, United States was convicted of child abuse and sentenced to two to six years in prison.
