ref: Seorang wanita berusia 35 tahun, Venus Critchfield dari Philipippi, West Virginia, Amerika Syarikat telah disabitkan diatas penderaan kanak-kanak dan dijatuhkan penjara dua ke enam tahun.

src: Critchfield also forced the children to continuously eat food and drink, and then eat their own vomit.
ref: Critchfield juga memaksa kanak-kanak itu untuk makan dan minum berterusan, dan kemudian memakan muntah mereka sendiri.

src: Her stepson, now aged 17, described the abuse in court.
ref: Anak tiri lelakinya, kini berusia 17, menerangkan penderaan tersebut didalam mahkamah.

src: Circuit Judge Alan D. Moats called this the worst case he has seen in 30 years.
ref: Hakim Lita Alan D. Moats memanggil ini sebagai kes paling teruk pernah dilihatnya dalam 30 tahun.

src: "You are the antithesis of everything that is a mother."
ref: "Kamu adalah antitesis kepada segalanya tentang ibu."

src: The abuse involved all six of Critchfield's children, however only some were willing to testify against her.
ref: Penderaan melibatkan kesemua enam anak Critchfields, walau bagaimanapun hanya sebahagian sanggup memberi keterangan tehadapnya.

src: Critchfield pleaded guilty and was convicted of two counts of child abuse, with injury.
ref: Critchfield mengaku bersalah dan tertuduh tehadap dua kali penderaan kanak-kanak, dengan kecederaan.

src: The charges pertained to abuse committed from January 2001 until January 2002.
ref: Tuduhan itu adalah terhadap penderaan yang dilakukan dari Januari 2001 hingga Januari 2002.

src: State welfare services had removed the children, now 11-16 years old, from the Critchfields' care in previous cases.
ref: Perkhidmatan Kebajikan Negeri telah mengalihkan kanak-kanak, kini berusia 11-16 tahun, dari penjagaan Critchfiled dalam kes sebelumnya.

src: Colombian authorities rescued a 2-month-old baby, who was kidnapped by a woman on Monday in Bogotá, in Armenia on Thursday night, September 14.
ref: Pihak berkuasa Colombia menyelamatkan bayi berusia 2 bulan yang telah diculik oleh seorang wanita pada hari Isnin di Bogota di Armenia pada Khamis malam, 14 September.

src: The baby girl, Maribel Muñoz, was taken by a woman who told her parents, Zenaida Muñoz and Henry López Romero that she belonged to an NGO and could get medical care for the girl inside Hotel Tequendama.
ref: Bayi perempuan, Maribel Munoz, telah diambil oleh wanita yang memberitahu ibu bapanya, Zenaida Munoz dan Henry Lopez Romero bahawa dia merupakan NGO dan cuba mendapatkan penjagaan kesihatan untuk kanak-kanak perempuan di dalam Hotel Tequendama.

src: The parents, who are displaced people, went to Caracol TV network in order to report the kidnapping.
ref: Ibu bapa, yang telah dilarikan pergi ke siaran TV Caracol untuk melaporkan tentang penculikan itu.

src: Surveillance recordings from the hotel and the city's bus terminal helped with the search.
ref: Rakaman pengawasan dari hotel dan terminal bas bandar membantu dalam siasatan.

src: The woman, described as in her late twenties, of height 1.65 m, and having black hair and almond-shaped eyes, left the hotel with two men and went to the local bus terminal.
ref: Wanita, dijelaskan berusia lewat dua puluhan, dengan ketinggian 1.65 m, dan berambut hitam dan mata berbentuk badam, meninggalkan hotel dengan dua lelaki dan pergi ke terminal bas tempatan.

src: On Thursday, a taxi driver told the media that the day before, he had driven a woman with those features to Cedritos, a neighbourhood in northeast Bogotá.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, pemandu teksi memberitahu media bahawa sehari sebelum itu, dia memandu wanita dengan ciri-ciri berkenaan ke Cedritos, kejiranan di timur laut Bogota.

src: Finally, on Thursday night, the kidnapper, Esmeralda Echeverri Castaño, was taken into custody in Cali.
ref: Akhirnya, pada hari Khamis malam, penculik, Esmeralda Echeverri Castano, telah ditangkap di Cali.

src: The doctors found the baby to be in good health.
ref: Doktor mendapati bahawa bayi dalam keadaan baik.

src: Maribel's parents, who live in a modest house in Usme, south Bogotá, recognized the baby on Friday early morning, thanks to a digital picture sent from Armenia to the police in Bogotá.
ref: Ibu bapa Maribel, yang tinggal di rumah kos sederhana di Usme, selatan Bogota, mengecam bayi itu pada awal Jumaat pagi, terima kasih kepada gambar digital yang dihantar dari Armenia ke polis di Bogota.

src: At around 08:00 local time (1200 UTC), Leonardo Fuentes, general secretary of the Municipal Educational Corporation of Rancagua, authorized the police to clear out the students.
ref: Sekitar 08:00 waktu tempatan (1200 UTC), Leonardo Fuentes, setiausaha agung Perbadanan Pendidikan Bandar Rancagua, memberi kuasa kepada polis untuk menyelesaikan pelajar-pelajar tersebut.

src: Student leader Jennifer Olivares told Diario VI Región the police "stripped off [their] clothes" upon their arrival at the police station, Comisaría de Rancagua, something which Lieutenant Colonel of Carabineros Iván Guajardo did not deny.
ref: Ketua pelajar Jennifer Olivares memberitahu pihak polis Diario VI Region "menanggalkan pakaian mereka" setibanya di balai polis, Comisaria de Rancagua, sesuatu yang Leftenan Kolonel Carabineros Iván Guajardo tidak menafikan.

src: Ignacio Muñoz, former leader of the occupation of the Liceo María Luisa Bombal, told El Rancahuaso "the Mayor [Eduardo Soto] promised to begin the reconstruction works last summer, and it's August already and they don't even begin to take the debris outside".
ref: Ignacio Munoz, bekas ketua pekerjaan Liceo Maria Luisa Bombal, memberitahu El Ranchausao "Datuk Bandar [Eduardo Soto] berjanji untuk memulakan kerja-kerja pembinaan semula pada musim panas yang lalu, dan kini sudah bulan Ogos dan mereka masih belum memulakan untuk mengambil serpihan-serpihan diluar."

src: Education Regional Secretary (Seremi de Educación) Pedro Larraín said the government "does not share" such actions, "because they harm education".
ref: Setiausaha Pendidikan Wilayah (Seremi de Education) Pedro Larrain berkata pihak kerajaan "tidak berkongsi" tindakan tersebut, "kerana ia mengancam pendidikan."

src: The Region of Libertador General Bernardo O'Higgins was one of the first in 2012 to resuscitate the previous year's student protests, more specifically at the Liceo Industrial de San Fernando, which was taken control by the students in late July, and which as of yesterday was still taken.
ref: Wilayah Libertador General Bernardo O'Higgins adalah salah seorang yang pertama pada tahun 2012 untuk memulihkan semula protes pelajar pada tahun sebelumnya, lebih khusus di Liceo Industrial de San Fernando, yang telah diambil alih kawalan oleh pelajar pada akhir bulan Julai, dan yang sehingga semalam masih diambil alih.

src: The students of the Liceo Industrial were particularly affected, after the president of the school's centro de alumnos Guillermo Horta Farías was stabbed outside the educational establishment on July 31; his fellow schoolmates subsequently organized a march in his honour in Rancagua, on August 8.
ref: Pelajar-pelajar daripada Perindustrian Liceo terutamanya telah terjejas, selepas presiden sekolah centro de alumnos Guillermo Horta Farías ditikam luar pertubuhan pendidikan pada 31 Julai; rakan-rakan sekolah beliau kemudiannya menganjurkan perarakan untuk menghormatinya di Rancagua, pada 8 Ogos.

src: Maher said he was asked by CBS News to appear on the segment.
ref: Maher berkata dia telah diminta oleh CBS News untuk muncul di segmen itu.

src: Instead, he said they would send over a list of "acceptable topics".
ref: Sebaliknya, dia berkata mereka akan menghantar satu senarai "topik yang boleh diterima".

src: CBS News executive producer Rome Hartman has since responded in an e-mail to TVNewser saying that, "Bill Maher was never told that he couldn't discuss religion in a Free Speech segment," and added, "In fact, Free Speech has already addressed religion and we expect others will in the future."
ref: Penerbit eksekutif CBS News Rome Hartman telah membalas dalam e -mel kepada TVNewser mengatakan bahawa, "Bill Maher tidak pernah diberitahu bahawa dia tidak boleh membincangkan agama dalam segmen Ucapan Percuma," dan menambah, "Sebenarnya, Ucapan Percuma telah pun membincangkan agama dan kita berharap orang lain akan berbuat demikian pada masa akan datang".

src: No response from Bill Maher on this statement as of yet.
ref: Tiada jawapan daripada Bill Maher atas kenyataan ini lagi.

src: They are run by Ottobrock, which has been repairing wheelchairs at the Paralympics since 1988.
ref: Mereka dikendalikan oleh Ottobrock, yang telah membaiki kerusi roda di Paralimpik sejak 1988.

src: The workshop opened on August 22 and will remain until September 10.
ref: Bengkel ini dibuka pada 22 Ogos dan akan kekal sehingga 10 September.

src: The prosthetic technicians have to deal with everything from flat tyres to broken spokes to full-scale rebuilds.
ref: Juruteknik prostetik perlu berurusan dengan segala-galanya dari tayar rata untuk jejari patah untuk membina semula dalam skala penuh.

src: They frequently collaborate on determining how best to effect a repair.
ref: Mereka sering bekerjasama dalam menentukan cara terbaik untuk melaksanakan pembaikan.

src: The objective is to get the wheelchair repaired and back in service as soon as possible.
ref: Objektifnya adalah untuk mendapatkan kerusi roda dibaiki dan kembali dalam perkhidmatan dengan seberapa segera yang mungkin.

src: Those for wheelchair basketball and rugby have cambered wheels so they can spin around.
ref: Kepada orang berkerusi roda bola keranjang dan ragbi telah ada melengkung roda supaya mereka boleh berputar di sekitar.

src: Ottobrock has a welding workshop where frames are repaired; the teams' equipment managers understandably cannot bring such heavy equipment with them to the games, so they rely on the workshops.
ref: Ottobrock mempunyai bengkel kimpalan di mana bingkai dibaiki; pengurus peralatan pasukan 'difahami tidak boleh membawa peralatan berat itu dengan mereka kepada permainan, jadi mereka bergantung kepada bengkel.

src: When a repair job is required, it is often required in a hurry.
ref: Apabila kerja pembaikan diperlukan, ia sering diperlukan dalam tergesa-gesa.

src: In addition to wheelchairs, the workshops handle all manner of work with prostheses.
ref: Selain kerusi roda, bengkel mengendalikan segala macam kerja dengan prostesis.

src: The Chinese Boccia team brought in its power chairs to have the electronics adjusted.
ref: Pasukan China Boccia membawa masuk kerusi kemampuannya supaya elektronik diselaraskan.

src: London, England— Australia lost Sunday night to Canada 50–57 in the women's wheelchair basketball at the Olympic Park in London.
ref: London, England- Australia tewas pada malam Ahad kepada Kanada 50-57 dalam bola keranjang kerusi roda wanita di Taman Olimpik di London.

src: The Gliders were down by eight points at quarter time; but, fought their way back into the game, tying at 40-all at one point in the third quarter.
ref: The Gliders telah terkebelakang lapan mata pada suku masa pertama; tetapi, dengan perjuangan mereka di dalam permainan, seri 40-40 pada masa suku ketiga.

src: Both Amber Merritt and Cobi Crispin ran up large numbers of personal fouls: four for Meritt and five for Crispin, hampering Australia's game style.
ref: Kedua-dua Amber Merritt dan Cobi Crispin mengumpul sejumlah besar main curang: empat untuk Meritt dan lima untuk Crispin, menghalang gaya permainan Australia.

src: Nonetheless, the pair still contributed to the team's scoreline, with Crispin scoring 12 points with 15 rebounds, and Merritt scoring 16 points with six rebounds.
ref: Namun, pasangan itu masih menyumbang kepada jaringan pasukan itu, dengan Crispin menjaringkan 12 mata dengan 15 melantun, dan Merritt menjaringkan 16 mata dengan enam melantun.

src: Shelley Chaplin scored eight points with five rebounds and seven assists.
ref: Shelley Chaplin menjaringkan lapan mata dengan lima melantun dan tujuh bantuan.

src: This was the Australian's third game in the Group A round-robin.
ref: Ini adalah permainan ketiga Australia dalam Kumpulan A pusingan robin.

src: Over the prior two days they had defeated Brazil 52-50 and Great Britain 51-24.
ref: Dalam masa dua hari sebelum ini mereka telah mengalahkan Brazil 52-50 dan Great Britain 51-24.

src: The top four teams in each group then go on into the quarter-finals.
ref: Empat pasukan teratas dalam setiap kumpulan kemudian mara ke suku akhir.

src: Eva Avila, 19, of Gatineau, Quebec was crowned this years winner of Canadian Idol.
ref: Eva Avila, 19, dari Gatineau, Quebec menjadi juara Idola Kanada tahun ini.

src: Craig Sharpe, 16, of Upper Island Cove, Newfoundland and Labrador was the runner up.
ref: Craig Sharpe, 16, dari Upper Island Cove, Newfoundland dan Labrador adalah naib johan.

src: Former Canadian Idol winner Melissa O'Neil sang her new hit single Speechless.
ref: Bekas pemenang Idola Kanada Melissa O'Neil menyanyikan lagu barunya Speechless.

src: Nelly Furtado sang her new hit single Maneater from her new album Loose.
ref: Nelly Furtado menyanyi lagu barunya Maneater daripada album barunya Loose.

src: Avila sang what will be the first single of her upcoming album: Meant to Fly, co-written by Chantal Kreviazuk and her husband Raine Maida.
ref: Avila menyanyikan apa yang akan menjadi single pertama album akan datangnya: Meant to Fly, ditulis bersama dengan Chantal Kreviazuk dan suaminya Raine Maida.

src: Sony BMG Music Canada is the record label that will be releasing her single on September 26.
ref: Sony BMG Music Kanada adalah label rekod yang akan mengeluarkan lagu tunggalnya pada 26 September.

src: Her new recording was on the radio airwaves at 12 am.
ref: Rakaman barunya ada di gelombang radio pada 12 pagi.

src: Canadian Idol host Ben Mulroney announced Sunday that Cyndi Lauper has agreed to produce one track for Avila's future album.
ref: Juruacara Kanada Idola Ben Mulroney mengumumkan pada hari Ahad yang Cyndi Lauper telah bersetuju untuk menghasilkan satu trek untuk album akan datang Avila.

src: The new study is an international study of survival and mortality.
ref: Kajian terbaru ini adalah kajian antarabangsa terhadap kehidupan dan moral.

src: The study also reveals that a male born in the late 1870's would have had an average life span of 51-years-old and in the 1930's the average life span was 69-years-old.
ref: Kajian itu juga membongkarkan bahawa lelaki yng lahir lewat 1870an mungkin ada kehidupan anggaran dalam 51 tahun dan pada lewat 1930an anggaran kehidupan adalah 69 tahun.

src: And in females the life expectancy is 75-years-old, previously 55-years-old.
ref: Dan jangka hayat perempuan dijangkakan 75 tahun, sebelum ini 55 tahun.

src: Kim Dunstan, Statistics NZ demographer, said: "The dramatic lifespan changes were attributed to many factors, including improved hygiene, sanitation, medicines and infectious disease control.
ref: Kim Dunstan, Ahli Demografi Statistik NZ, berkata:" Jangka hayat yang dramatik yang disebabkan oleh banyak faktor, termasuk memperbaiki kebersihan, sanitasi, ubatan dan kawalan penyakit berjangkit.

src: People born in the late 1870's had a 23% chance of not making it to see their 15th birthday, people born in the 1900's had a 15% chance, people born in the 1930's had a seven percent chance, people born in the 1960's had a three percent chance and those born around the 1990's had a one percent chance.
ref: Orang yang lahir pada lewat 1870an mempunyai 23% peluang untuk tidak melihat hari jadi ke 15 mereka, orang yang lahir pada 1900an mempunyai 15% peluang, orang yang lahir pada 1930an ada tujuh pertus peluang, orang yang lahir pada 1960an ada tiga peratus peluang dan mereka yang lahir sekitar 1990an ada satu peratus peluang.

src: Mr Dunstan said: "The study provided the most complete picture of how long New Zealanders lived and showed for the first time the impact of war deaths on the population.
ref: Encik Dunstan berkata:"Kajian ini menyediakan gambar yang hampir lengkap terhadap berapa lama New Zealand hidup dan menunjukkan untuk pertama kali impak dari kematian perang terhadap populasi.

src: A lot of people have had family members who died in the war and can relate to their own experiences."
ref: Ramai orang yang ahli keluarga mati dalam perang itu dan boleh dikaitkan dengan pengalaman sendiri."

src: A History of Survival in New Zealand also shows that New Zealand is one of the few countries in the world that has an almost complete and detailed history of births, deaths and migration information dating back to the late 1800's.
ref: Sejarah dalam Kehidupan di New Zealand juga menunjukkan bahawa New Zealand merupakan salah satu dari beberapa negara dalam dunia yang mempunyai makluamat yang terperinci dan hampir lengkap dalam sejarah kelahiran, kematian dan migrasi sejak dari lewat 1800an.

src: It will also be used in the future relating to health, population and mortality areas.
ref: Ia juga akan digunakan kerana mengikut kepada populasi berkaitan kesihatan, populasi dan kawasan moral.

src: "We see the study very much as the basis for further work ... across other organisations in New Zealand and, indeed, internationally," Mr. Dunstan said.
ref: "Kami melihat kajian ini merupakan tapak kepada kerja akan datang...melawan organisasi lain di New Zealand dan, mungkin, antarabangsa," kata Encik Dunstan.

src: Shinzo Abe took 66% of the vote in today's Liberal Democratic Party election for a leader to replace Junichiro Koizumi, whose term as party chief expired.
ref: Shinzo Abe berjaya mendapat 66% undi terhadap Parti Liberal Demokratik hari ini pada pilihan raya untuk memilih ketua bagi menggantikan Junichiro Koizumi, yang mana tamat sebagai ketua parti.

src: Abe is a third-generation politician related to two former Prime Ministers.
ref: Abe ialah ahli politik generasi ketiga yang berkait dengan dua bekas perdana menteri sebelum ini.

src: The election comes on the day before his 52nd birthday.
ref: Pilihanraya itu diadakan pada hari sebelum hari jadi beliau yang ke 52 tahun.

src: He is expected to become the nation's first Prime Minister born after World War II.
ref: Beliau dijangkakan untuk menjadi Perdana Menteri pertama negara yang lahir selepas Perang Dunia Kedua.

src: "The LDP has helped make Japan a democracy that has contributed to the world," Abe said after the vote.
ref: "LDP telah membantu Jepun sebagai satu demokrasi yang telah menyumbang kepada dunia," kata Abe selepas undian.

src: "I will demonstrate my leadership to preserve the flame of ideals, and put reforms forward as the first party leader from the postwar generation."
ref: "Saya akan mempamerkan sifat kepimpinan saya untuk mengekalkan idea-idea yang hebat dan meletakan pembaharuan kehadapan sebagai ketua parti pertama selepas perang".

src: Cedar Park Police Captain Mike Harmon said authorities arrived at the parking lot around 4:30 AM local time.
ref: Kapten Polis Cedar Park Mike Harmon berkata pihak berkuasa tiba di perkarangan tempat letak kereta sekitar jam 4:30 pagi waktu tempatan.

src: There they arrested Onwukaife, who has been charged with aggravated assault with a deadly weapon.
ref: Mereka memberkas Onwukaife, yang telah direman atas sebab serangan kejam dengan menggunakan senjata yang boleh membunuh.

src: As-of Monday, Gietl has been released from hospital whilst the others remain in critical, but stable, condition.
ref: Sehingga Isnin, Gietl telah dkeluarkan dari hospital manakala yang lain masih kritikal, namun dalam keadaan yang stabil.

src: Police informed media the incident occurred follwing a dispute which began at a nearby party where alcohol was being served.
ref: Polis memberi tahu media bahawa kejadian berlaku ekoran perselisihan faham yang bermula di parti berdekatan yang mana disediakan alkohol.

src: Onwukaife was expected to be released on Monday, after which he would immediately be jailed.
ref: Onwukaife dijangka akan dibebaskan pada Isnin, selepas beliau akan terus dipenjarakan.

src: Police advised media the investigation is on-going and more charges may still be filed.
ref: Polis menasihati media bahawa siasatan masih lagi dijalankan dan banyak lagi tuduhan akan difailkan.

src: Specifically, Police are trying to determine if any other participants in the fight were armed.
ref: Secara terperinci, polis sedang cuba untuk mengetahui sama ada terdapat pihak lain yang bersenjata semasa kejadian.

src: "For courage as much as anything, I walked with my close friend and business partner, who like me, hails from San Diego, California."
ref: "Demi mendapat keberanian sebanyak mungkin, saya berjalan dengan rakan rapat dan rakan perniagaan saya, yang seperti saya juga, berasal dari San Diego, California".

src: :"I left my suite at the Royal River Hotel and walked down Soi Charansandwong, the narrow street that leads from the hotel to the busy road that crosses the city and shortly thereafter, the Chao Phraya River, known as the 'River of Kings."
ref: :"Saya tinggalkan bilik di Hotel Royal River dan berjalan ke Soi Charansandwong, jalan sempit yang menghala dari hotel ke jalan sibuk yang menyeberangi bandar dan lebih sedikit, ialah Sungai Chao Phraya, dikenali sebagai 'Sungai Raja'".

src: "Evidence of this is clear:" "at least a third of the people walking on the streets wear the 'King Shirt,' a bright yellow shirt that bears the crest of the King."
ref: "Bukti untuk ini sangat jelas:" "Sekurang-kurangnya satu pertiga daripada orang yang berjalan di jalan raya memakai 'Kemeja Raja', kemeja kuning terang dengan lambang diraja".

src: :"Even newsreaders on the local television news can sometimes be seen wearing the yellow shirt as a showing of support for the King."
ref: :"Hinggakan pembaca berita di televisyen berita tempatan boleh kadangkala dilihat memakai kemeja kuning tersebut sebagai menunjukkan sokongan kepada Raja".

src: :"Leaving the alleyway, we walked to the busy Thonburi district."
ref: :"Meninggalkan lorong tersebut, kami berjalan ke daerah sibuk Thonburi".

src: "Immediately, I could see a group of soldiers, some standing, others sitting, along a sidewalk on the main street."
ref: "Serta-merta, saya dapat melihat sekumpulan askar, sesetengahnya berdiri, sesetengahnya duduk, disepanjang jalan utama".

src: :"Walking slowly down to where the soldiers were and smiling at them as we walked, we approached the man who appeared to be the commanding officer."
ref: :"Berjalan perlahan kearah dimana askar-askar tersebut dan senyum kepada mereka sambil kami berjalan, kami mendekati lelaki yang kelihatan seperti pegawai berkuasa".

src: "He was a bit business like at first, but this was a man who had a job to do, of course."
ref: "Dia sedikit seperti cekap pada mulanya, tetapi ini ialah seseorang yang perlu menjalankan tugas, sudah tentu begitu".

src: :"Each soldier, unable to wear a yellow shirt and stay in uniform, instead bore a yellow ribbon of support for the King, usually tied to his rifle."
ref: :"Setiap askar, tidak boleh memakai kemeja kuning dan kekal dalam uniform, sebaliknya menggunakan reben kuning sebagai menyokong raja, kebiasaannya diikat kepada senapangnya".

src: "He smiled and accepted the offering and handed them out to his men."
ref: "Dia senyum dan menerima tawaran tersebut dan meyerahkannya kepada pegawainya".

src: :"As we continued to walk down the sidewalk, three women came out of their shop, one wearing a yellow king shirt, and they thanked us for the gesture."
ref: :"Sedang kami meneruskan berjalan di kaki lima jalan, tiga wanita keluar dari kedai mereka, seorang memakai kemeja kuning raja, dan berterima kasih kepada kami atas perbuatan tersebut".

src: "Walking on the cool, green grounds of the Temple complex, the Coup felt like it was a million miles distant."
ref: "Berjalan di atas tanah yang sejuk hijau dikompleks kuil, rampasan kuasa itu terasa seperti jauh berjuta batu".

src: "Bowing and placing our palms together, we greeted a monk on the grounds who was trimming a hedge."
ref: "Tunduk dan meletakkan tapak tangan kami bersama, kami menegur sami ditanah yang sedang memangkas pagar".

src: "'We needed it', he smiled,"  'things were too corrupt.'
ref: "'Kami perlukannya', dia tersenyum," Hal-hal terlalu tercemar.

src: "But, certainly, I felt no danger on the street from the army or from anyone I encountered."
ref: "Tetapi, pastinya, saya tidak merasa bahaya dijalanan dari askar atau dari sesiapa yang saya temui".

src: "Returning to Soi Charansandwong, I approached an ATM and withdrew a couple of hundred dollars worth of Baht, the currency of Thailand, with my US bank issued card."
ref: "Pulang ke Soi Charansandwong, saya menuju ke sebuah ATM dan mengeluarkan wang bernilai beberapa ratus dolar Bath, matawang Thailand, dengan kad yang dikeluarkan oleh bank US saya".

src: "As he measured me, I asked if business had been slowed due to the Coup."
ref: "Sedang dia mengukur saya, saya bertanya jika perniagaan telah berkurang akibat rampasan kuasa tersebut".

src: "He promised me that my suit, which included two pairs of pants and two custom made dress shirts, would be ready early the next morning."
ref: ' "Dia janjikan bahawa sut saya, yang termasuk dua pasang seluar dua dan dua kemeja ditempah khas, akan siap awal pagi esoknya".

src: "The commanding officer gave us a very big smile this time as we passed him and several of the soldiers gave smaller, shy smiles as we passed."
ref: "Pegawai berkuasa memberikan senyum yang sangat lebar kali ini semasa kami melepasi dia dan beberapa askar memberikan senyuman, senyuman malu-malu sewaktu kami melepasi".

src: "Encouraged, we once again popped into a small shop and bought additional soft drinks to hand out."
ref: "Teruja, kami sekali lagi masuk ke sebuah kedai kecil dan membeli tambahan minuman ringan untuk diagihkan".

src: The British Prime Minister Tony Blair has announced that the minimum wage is to go up from GBP 4.85 (EUR 7.03) per hour to GBP 5.05 (EUR 7.32) per hour in October and GBP 5.35 (EUR 7.76) per hour in October 2006.
ref: Perdana Menteri Britain Tony Blair telah mengumumkan upah minimum akan dinaikkan dari GBP 4.85 (EUR 7.03) sejam ke GBP 5.05 (EUR 7.32) sejam pada bulan Oktober dan GBP 5.35 (EUR 7.76) sejam pada bulan Oktober 2006. Upah minimum untuk mereka yang berumur 18-21 tahun, upah minimum pembangunan juga akan dinaikkan dari GBP 4.10 (EUR 5.94) sejam ke GBP 4.25 (EUR 6.16) sejam.

src: The minimum wage started in the UK in 1998 as one of the election proposal of the Labour government and it started at GBP 3.60 (EUR 5.22) per hour.
ref: Kongress Kesatuan Sekerja berkata mereka mengalu-alukan kenaikan itu, tetapi mereka mahukan upah mininum ditambah ke GBP 6.00 (EUR 8.70) sejam.

src: The Confederation of British Industry (CBI) called for a "pause year" on the minimum wage to assess the above inflation rises Political speculators are says the announcement is to coincide with a possible general election in May this year.
ref: Spekulator politik berkata pengumuman itu akan berlaku serentak dengan kemungkinan pilihan raya umum pada bulan Mei tahun ini.

src: News of his death was shared with Wikinews through the Australian Tax Office and Tony Naar of the Australian Paralympic Committee.
ref: Berita kematiannya telah dikongsi dengan Wikinews melalui Pejabat Cukai Australia dan Tony Naar daripada Jawatankuasa Paralimpik Australia.

src: French, who lived in Penrith, New South Wales, was one of fifteen athletes to compete at Australia's second Paralympic Games in 1964 in Tokyo when he won a silver medal in the men's 25 metre freestyle event.
ref: French, yang tinggal di Penrith, New South Wales, adalah salah satu daripada lima belas atlet yang akan bersaing di Sukan Paralimpik kedua Australia pada tahun 1964 di Tokyo apabila dia memenangi pingat perak dalam acara gaya bebas 25 meter lelaki.

src: In 2000, his medal was displayed at the Our Sporting Heritage exhibition at the Arms of Australia Inn Museum.
ref: Pada tahun 2000, pingat beliau dipamerkan di pameran Sporting Heritage di Muzium Arms of Australia Inn.

src: His legacy of participation can be seen in the upcoming 2012 Summer Paralympics in London.
ref: Warisan penyertaan beliau boleh dilihat di Sukan Paralimpik Musim Panas tahun 2012 di London yang akan datang.

src: Australia are sending 161 athletes to the Paralympics this year.
ref: Australia akan menghantar 161 atlet ke Sukan Paralimpik tahun ini.

src: A Virgin Trains train travelling at high speed collided with a car near Copmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, killing the car's driver.
ref: Sebuah kereta api Virgin bergerak pada kelajuan tinggi berlanggar dengan sebuah kereta berhampiran Copmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, membunuh pemandu kereta itu.

src: The train then partially derailed but remained upright, coming to a stop further down the tracks.
ref: Sebahagian dari kereta api itu kemudiannya tergelincir tetapi kekal tegak, berhenti jauh di bawah trek.

src: The car driver is believed to have been killed instantly.
ref: Pemandu kereta dipercayai terbunuh serta-merta.

src: North Yorkshire Police said that the car had left the road, driven through a fence and ended up on the track.
ref: Polis North Yorkshire berkata, kereta itu telah meninggalkan jalan raya, dilanggar dan melalui pagar dan berhenti di trek itu.

src: On 13 December 2001, at 11:45 a.m. local time(UTC+5:30), just as the MPs were preparing to leave the House, militants armed with AK-47s and hand-grenades breached the security at Gate No.12 of the Parliament Building and opened indiscriminate fire, killing six policemen and one Parliament employee.
ref: Pada 13 Disember 2001, jam 11:45 pagi waktu tempatan (UTC + 5:30), sama seperti Ahli Parlimen bersedia untuk meninggalkan Dewan, militan bersenjatakan AK-47 dan bom-bom tangan melanggar keselamatan di Pintu No.12 daripada Bangunan Parlimen dan melepaskan tembakan rambang, membunuh enam anggota polis dan seorang pekerja Parlimen.

src: The attack increased tensions between India and Pakistan, which was accused by India of providing support to the Kashmiri militant group Jaish-e-Mohammed, involved in the attack.
ref: Serangan itu meningkatkan ketegangan antara India dan Pakistan, yang telah dituduh oleh India memberikan sokongan kepada kumpulan militan Kashmir Jaish-e-Mohammed, yang terlibat dalam serangan itu.

src: The court also fined Shaukat Hussain's wife, Afsan Guru Rs.
ref: Mahkamah juga mendenda isteri Shaukat Hussain, Afsan Guru Rs.

src: 10,000 and sentenced her to five years rigorous imprisonment for concealing details of the plot.
ref: 10,000 dan menjatuhkan hukuman lima tahun penjara ketat kerana menyembunyikan butiran plot.

src: A Delhi High court ruling, however, later acquitted Afsana Guru and Geelani.
ref: A Delhi keputusan Mahkamah Tinggi, bagaimanapun, kemudian membebaskan Afsana Guru dan Geelani.

src: On 4 August 2005, a Supreme Court bench including Justice P V Reddy and Justice P V Neolkar confirmed the death penalty for Mohammed Afzal and sentenced Shaukat Hussain Guru to 10 years rigorous imprisonment for concealing details of the conspiracy, thereby sparing him the gallows.
ref: Pada 4 Ogos 2005, bangku Mahkamah Agung termasuk Hakim PV Reddy dan Keadilan PV Neolkar mengesahkan hukuman mati bagi Mohammed Afzal dan dihukum Shaukat Hussain Guru kepada 10 tahun penjara yang ketat kerana menyembunyikan butiran konspirasi, dengan itu terselamat dari digantung.

src: Instead of returning to practise from a fractured finger today as scheduled, flamboyant Dallas Cowboys receiver Terrell Owens is instead recovering at Baylor Medical Center this morning from an apparent suicide attempt last night.
ref: Daripada kembali ke latihan selepas kepatahan jari hari ini seperti yang telah dijadualkan, penerima cemerlang Dallas Cowboys Terrell Owens sebaliknya sedang pulih di Baylor Medical Center pagi ini dari satu percubaan ketara membunuh diri malam semalam.

src: She called 911 and Owens was rushed to the hospital.
ref: Dia menelefon 911 dan Owens disegerakan ke hospital.

src: Original reports stated that Owens was suffering from an adverse reaction to the pain medication, which he was taking for a fractured hand.
ref: Laporan awal melaporkan yang Owens sedang menderita dari tindak balas ubat tahan sakit yang diambil untuk tangannya yang patah.

src: Paramedics have only confirmed that they called police to report that they were bringing Owens to hospital.
ref: Paramedik telah mengesahkan yang mereka hanya menelefon polis bagi melaporkan yang mereka sedang membawa Owens ke hospital.

src: Harabe, only the tenth person ever to represent his country at the Games, is making his Paralympic Games debut.
ref: Harabe, yang merupakan orang kesepuluh pernah mewakili negaranya ke Sukan tersebut, membuat penampilan pertama di Sukan Paralimpik.

src: The British High Commissioner to Papua New Guinea, Jackie Barson, MBE, wished both athletes well, saying in a written statement, "It is a fantastic achievement for the PNG to be represented by two world class Paralympic athletes".
ref: Pesuruhjaya Tinggi British ke Papua New Guinea, Jackie Barson, MBE, mendoakan kedua atlit tersebut, berkata dalam kenyataan bertulis, "Ia merupakan pencapaian hebat kepada PNG untuk diwakili oleh dua atlit Paralimpik bertaraf dunia."

src: The 2012 Games will be the fourth time the country has participated, with the three other appearances happening at the 1984 Summer Paralympics, 2000 Summer Paralympics and 2008 Summer Paralympics.
ref: Sukan 2012 akan menjadi kali keempat penyertaan negara tersebut, dengan tiga kemunculan lain berlaku ketika Paralimpik Musim Panas 1984, Paralimpik Musim Panas 2000, dan Paralimpik Musim Panas 2008.

src: Other members of the Papua New Guinea 2012 Paralympic delegation include PNG Paralympic Committee President Bernard Chan; Chef de Mission Dr. Kefu Ma; team manager Rosemary Mawe; Davina Chan, the president's wife; coach William McKenny; and official Jeffrey Robby.
ref: Ahli lain delegasi Paralimpik 2012 Papua New Guinea termasuk Pengerusi Jawatankuasa Paralimpik PNG Bernard Chan; Ketua Misi Dr. Kefu Ma; pengurus pasukan Rosemary Mawe; Davina Chan, isteri president; jurulatih William MsKenny; dan pegawai Jeffery Robby.

src: Military officials have not yet released the name of the soldier.
ref: Pihak tentera masih belum mengumumkan nama tentera tersebut.

src: One soldier from Hamilton, Ontario was reported to have suffered minor hearing loss as a result of the blast.
ref: Seorang tentera dari Hamilton, Ontario dilaporkan telah mengalami kehilangan pendengaran kecil disebabkan letupan tersebut.

src: Many in Toronto wore red in support for the troops.
ref: Ramai orang di Toronto memakai baju merah sebagai sokongan untuk askar-askar tersebut.

src: The letter was reportadly sent to "political leaders" while the Iran-Iraq war was taking place.
ref: Surat itu telah dilaporkan telah dihantar ke "pemimpin politik" ketika perang Iran-Iraq sedang berlaku.

src: Khomeini says that "more aircraft, helicopters, men and weapons" would be needed to continue the fight and that "within five years, need laser-guided and atomic weapons in order to win the war" with Iraq.
ref: Khomeini mengatakan bahawa "lebih banyak pesawat, helikopter, tentera dan senjata" akan diperlukan untuk meneruskan perjuangan dan "dalam tempoh lima tahun, memerlukan laser berpadu dan senjata atom untuk menang peperangan" dengan Iraq.

src: BBC News also say that Khomeini states Iran's economy "was operating at a level below zero."
ref: BBC News juga mengatakan bahawa Khomeini menyatakan ekonomi Iran "telah beroperasi pada tahap di bawah sifar".

src: He also said that people who were needed to volunteer for battle were "in short supply."
ref: Beliau juga berkata bahawa orang-orang yang diperlukan untuk menjadi sukarelawan untuk berperang adalah "semakin berkurangan".

src: Ferrari driver Michael Schumacher won the FIA Formula-1 2006 Sinopec Chinese Grand Prix on the Shanghai International Circuit.
ref: Pemandu Ferrari, Michael Schumacher memenangi FIA Formula-1 Grand Prix 2006 Sinopec China di Litar Antarabangsa Shanghai.

src: Although the wet weekend was more suitable for the Michelin-tyred cars, Schumacher overtook both Renault drivers to win the race.
ref: Walaupun hujung minggu adalah basah adalah lebih sesuai untuk kereta bertayar Michelin, Schumacher mendahului kedua-dua pemandu Renault untuk memenangi perlumbaan.

src: The situation became irreversible after Alonso's second pit-stop, where he was delayed for more then ten seconds longer then usual because of the problems with the right rear wheel.
ref: Keadaan menjadi tidak boleh diubah selepas kedua pit-stop Alonso, di mana beliau telah ditangguhkan selama lebih daripada sepuluh saat lagi kerana masalah dengan roda kanan di belakang.

src: Tough luck for Fernando, pit-stop problem spoiled a fantastic battle.
ref: Nasib yang sukar untuk Fernando, masalah pit-stop merosakkan pertempuran yang hebat.

src: After it the Honda team driver Rubens Barichello lose the nose of his car in a hit of BMW Sauber, while his teammate, Jenson Button, has secured his fourth place (Rubens was included in the final standings on the sixth place).
ref: Selepas ia Honda pemandu pasukan Rubens Barichello kehilangan bahagian depan keretanya di langgar BMW Sauber, manakala rakan sepasukannya, Jenson Button, telah mendapat tempat keempat (Rubens telah dimasukkan ke dalam kedudukan akhir di tempat keenam).

src: Felipe Massa, the second Ferrari driver, penalized for engine change, was out due to a collision with David Coulthard from the Red Bull team.
ref: Felipe Massa, pemandu Ferrari kedua, dihukum kerana perubahan enjin, ketinggalan disebabkan oleh perlanggaran dengan David Coulthard daripada pasukan Red Bull.

src: He regained two points more from Alonso in the drivers' championship - now they both have 116 points, though Renault team now returned the lead in the constructors' championship for just one point.
ref: Beliau kembali dua mata lebih dari Alonso dalam senarai pemandu kejohanan - kini kedua-duanya mempunyai 116 mata, walaupun pasukan Renault kini kembali menerajui dalam kategori pengeluar kejohanan untuk hanya satu mata.

src: According to Economic Planning Secretary Arsenio Balisacan, strong domestic demand from the services sector and spending from money remitted by expatriate Filipinos helped boost the nation's economy despite the ongoing global economic crisis.
ref: Menurut Setiausaha Perancang Ekonomi Arsenio Balisacan, permintaan domestik yang kuat dalam sektor perkhidmatan dan perbelanjaan wang yang dibayar oleh ekspatriat Filipino membantu meningkatkan ekonomi negara meskipun krisis ekonomi dunia sedang berlaku.

src: In spite of this growth, numerous risks still lurk around the corner, said Balisacan.
ref: Di sebalik perkembangan ini, masih terdapat beberapa risiko tersembunyi yang membimbangkan, kata Balisacan.

src: Balsican also noted that poor infrastructure may also have a negative impact although spending on infrastructure, which may cost nearly $200 million in investment, may contribute to growth.
ref: Balsican juga menyatakan bahawa infrastruktur yang lemah juga mampu membawa kesan negatif walaupun perbelanjaan untuk infratruktur, yang membelanjakan hampir $200 juta dalam pelaburan, yang akan menyumbang kepada perkembangan.

src: The Philippines central bank has cut key interest rates three times already this year in order to continue this economic expansion.
ref: Bank Negara Filipino sudah mengurangkan kadar faedah utama tiga kali tahun ini untuk meneruskan perkembangan ekonomi ini.

src: Analysts, such as economist Eugene Leow of Singapore-based DBS bank, agree that, "There is definitely room to further cut rates if needed," in order to promote further growth.
ref: Penganalisa, seperti pakar ekonomi yang berpangkalan di Bank DBS Singapura Eugene Leow, bersetuju, "Pasti ada ruang untuk meneruskan pengurangan kadar jika perlu," dalam mendorong perkembangan lanjut.

src: Lundy is expected to be in London for the entire Paralympics, and is scheduled to watch athletics, cycling, powerlifting, rowing, swimming, wheelchair rugby, basketball and tennis.
ref: Lundy dijangka berada di London sepanjang Paralimpik, dan dijadualkan untuk menyaksikan olahraga, lumba basikal, angkat berat, kayak, renang, ragbi kerusi roda, bola keranjang, dan tennis.

src: The US Army Corps of Engineers decision to place restrictions on issuance of nationwide pollution permits has been upheld by a federal court.
ref: Keputusan Kor Jurutera Tentera US untuk meletakkan sekatan ke atas pengeluaran permit pencemaran di seluruh negara kini disahkan oleh mahkamah persekutuan.

src: In National Association of Home Builders v. Army Corps of Engineers, the District Court for the District of Columbia found that the Corps of Engineers had not acted in an "arbitrary" or "capricious" manner in changing the terms and conditions for issuance of a national pollution permit, including reducing the size of area into which pollutants may be discharged from 10 acres to 1 acre, raising the threshold for requiring additional permits from 1 acre to 1/10 acre, A nationwide permit allows an organization to engage in certain industrial activities on a national basis (such as mining and construction), reducing the amount of paperwork and filings needed for otherwise minor environmental impacts, as opposed to an ordinary permit for a specific location which will engage in activities which generate water pollution.
ref: Dalam Persatuan Kebangsaan Home Builders v. Army Corps of Engineers, Mahkamah Daerah bagi Daerah Columbia mendapati bahawa Kor Jurutera tidak bertindak dengan cara yang "sewenang-wenangnya" atau "sering berubah" dalam mengubah terma-terma dan syarat-syarat bagi pengeluaran suatu permit pencemaran negara, termasuk mengurangkan saiz kawasan yang mana bahan pencemar yang dilepaskan daripada 10 ekar kepada 1 ekar, menaikkan ambang yang memerlukan permit tambahan daripada 1 ekar kepada 1/10 ekar, Satu permit untuk seluruh negara membolehkan satu organisasi melibatkan diri dalam aktiviti industri tertentu di peringkat nasional (seperti perlombongan dan pembinaan), mengurangkan jumlah kertas kerja dan fail-fail yang diperlukan untuk kesan alam sekitar yang sebaliknya kecil, berbanding permit biasa untuk lokasi tertentu yang akan melibatkan diri dalam aktiviti-aktiviti yang menjana pencemaran air.

src: Environmental groups were pleased with the decision, but are concerned over other actions of the Bush Administration, such as the attempts to weaken provisions of the 2002 Clean Water Act to allow additional dumping of construction and mining waste into waterways as fill material.
ref: Kumpulan alam sekitar gembira dengan keputusan itu, tetapi bimbang dengan tindakan lain Pentadbiran Bush, seperti percubaan untuk mengurangkan peruntukan Akta Air Bersih tahun 2002 bagi membenarkan buangan tambahan sisa pembinaan dan perlombongan ke dalam saluran air sebagai bahan isian.

src: They went from being behind 14-8 to being down 20-17; at which point, Ukraine took a time out.
ref: Dari ketinggalan 14-8, mereka ditewaskan 20-17 di mana pada satu ketika, Ukraine telah mengambil masa rehat.

src: Ukraine managed to stay ahead despite a challenge from Great Britain in the second set, which saw the score get to 23-20.
ref: Ukraine berjaya berada di hadapan walaupun menghadapi cabaran dari Great Britain pada set kedua, yang menyaksikan mata meningkat sehingga 23-20.

src: The game was the first for Great Britain in the country's history, having never qualified a team before.
ref: Permainan ini adalah yang pertama untuk Great Britain di dalam sejarah negara in, di mana mereka tidak pernah mempunyai pasukan yang layak.

src: They will play their second match of pool play tomorrow when they face the Netherlands.
ref: Mereka akan bermain perlawanan kedua mereka dalam kolam esok apabila mereka menghadapi Belanda.

src: Ukraine, the top ranked European side in the competition, entered the tournament having finished second at the Intercontinental Cup earlier in the year where they beat Russia, Slovenia, Brazil and Great Britain.
ref: Ukarine yang berada di kedudukan teratas bahagian Eropah, memasuki pertandingan ini setelah merangkul tempat kedua Piala Intercontinental awal tahun ini selepas mengalahkan Rusia, Slovenia, Brasil, dan Great Britian.

src: This year Zorn was inducted into the International Paralympic Hall of Fame at a ceremony in London.
ref: Pada tahun ini, Zorn telah dilantik dalam jawatan Hall of Fame Paralimpik Antarabangsa dalam satu upacara di London.

src: Having last competed in the 2004 Summer Paralympics, if she was swimming today, she would be classified as an S12 swimmer.
ref: Terakhir kali menyertai pertandingan renang di Sukan Paralimpik Musim Panas 2004, jika beliau masih aktif berenang pada hari ini, beliau layak dikelaskan sebagai perenang S12.

src: She currently works for the United States Department of Veterans Affairs, helping returning soldiers adjust to life as civilians.
ref: Beliau sekarang sedang berkhidmat di Jabatan Hal Ehwal Veteran Amerika Syarikat, membantu askar yang kembali dari medan perang menyesuaikan diri dengan kehidupan sebagai orang awam.

src: Foreign ministers seeking to resolve Iran's nuclear crisis will meet in London today at 5P.M.
ref: Menteri-menteri luar negeri yang sedang mencari penyelesaian untuk krisis nuklear Iran akan bertemu di London hari ini pada pukul 5 petang.

src: The countries sending their foreign ministers are United Kingdom, the United States, China, France, Germany and Russia.
ref: Negara-negara yang menghantar menteri luar negeri mereka adalah United Kingdom, Amerika Syarikat, China, Perancis, Jerman dan Rusia.

src: The participating nations, with the exception of Germany, have veto powers in the UN Security Council.
ref: Negara-negara yang mengambil bahagian, kecuali Jerman, mempunyai kuasa veto dalam Majlis Keselamatan PBB.

src: The UN Security Council is also likely to meet next week to discuss further action to take against Iran, following its failure to persuade Iran to freeze its uranium enrichment program.
ref: Majlis Keselamatan PBB juga dijangka bertemu minggu depan untuk membincangkan tindakan selanjutnya terhadap Iran, berikutan kegagalan memujuk Iran untuk membekukan program pengayaan uranium itu.

src: Solana's representative, Cristina Gallach, stressed the current diplomatic efforts were different from a European initiative in 2004-05, which ultimately failed.
ref: Wakil Solana, Cristina Gallach, menekankan usaha-usaha diplomatik semasa adalah berbeza daripada inisiatif Eropah pada 2004-05, yang akhirnya gagal.

src: Following Hungary's release and repatriation of convicted Azeri axe-murderer Ramil Safarov, who Azerbaijan subsequently pardoned, Armenia announced it is "ready for war".
ref: Selepas pembebasan oleh Hungary dan penghantaran balik Ramil Safarov daripada kumpulan Azeri yang didapati bersalah sebagai pembunuh menggunakan kapak, yang kemudiannya diampuni Azerbaijan, Armenia mengumumkan bahawa ia telah "bersedia untuk berperang."

src: Safarov was found guilty of the 2004 murder of Armenian officer Gurgen Margaryan in Budapest, when both Safarov and Margaryan were attending a NATO Partnership for Peace programme.
ref: Safarov didapati bersalah pada tahun 2004 kerana membununh pegawai Armenia Gurgen Margaryan di Budapest, apabila mereka menghadiri program Perkongsian untuk Keamanan NATO.

src: Safarov killed Margaryan in his sleep with an axe; the attack allegedly stemming from a desire to avenge Azeris killed during the Nagorno-Karabakh War and being mocked by Margaryan and another Armenian.
ref: Safarov membunuh Margaryan yang sedang tidur dengan kapak; serangan yang didakwa berpunca daripada keinginan membalas dendam untuk pasukan Azeri yang dibunuh semasa Perang Nagorno-Karabakh dan skerana diejek oleh Margaryan dan seorang warga Armenia.

src: On his return home, Safarov was met with a hero's welcome, given a pardon by president Ilham Aliyev, promoted to the rank of major, awarded eight-years of back-pay and given a house.
ref: Sejak kepulangannya, Safarov telah mendapat sambutan sebagai wira, diberi pengampunan oleh Presiden Ilham Aliyev, dinaikkan pangkat ke mejar, dianugerahkan lapan tahun gaji tertangguh dan diberikan sebuah rumah.

src: Armenian President Serzh Sarkisian declared: "We don't want a war, but if we have to, we will fight and win."
ref: Presiden Armenia Serzh Sarkisian mengisytiharkan: "Kita tidak mahu peperangan, tetapi jika kita perlu, kita akan bertarung dan menang."

src: "We are not afraid of killers, even if they enjoy the protection of the head of state" .
ref: "Kami tidak takut dengan pembunuh, meskipun mereka menikmati perlindungan ketua negara."

src: With the demise of the short-lived Armenian-Azerbaijan-Georgia Transcaucasian Democratic Federative Republic, fighting broke out which only ended when the two nations were annexed by the expanding Soviet Union.
ref: Dengan tamatnya Persekutuan Demokratik Republik Armenia-Azerbaijan-Georgia Transcaucasian yang tidak kekal lama, pertempuran tercetus dan hanya berakhir apabila kedua-dua negara digabungkan oleh Kesatuan Soviet yang berkembang.

src: With the USSR's collapse, Armenia and Azerbaijan re-emerged as independent states — as-did old rivalries over territory.
ref: Dengan keruntuhan USSR, Armenia dan Azerbaijan muncul semula sebagai negara merdeka - begitu juga persaingan lama ke atas wilayah.

src: Nagorno-Karabakh remains legally part of Azerbaijan, but under effective Armenian control.
ref: Nagorno-Karabakh masih sah sebagai sebahagian daripada Azerbaijan, tetapi di bawah kawalan Armenia.

src: On multiple occasions president Ilham Aliyev has stated his willingness to resort to force in order to assert Azeri rule, with oil wealth tipping any local arms race in favour of Azerbaijan.
ref: Presiden Ilham Aliyev telah beberapa kali menyatakan kesediaannya menggunakan kekerasan untuk mengukuhkan peraturan Azeri, dengan kekayaan minyak memberi ganjaran kepada mana-mana perlumbaan senjata tempatan yang berpihak kepada Azerbaijan.

src: On Friday, The National Security Council of Armenia decided to break ties with Hungary during an emergency summit, describing the Hungarian actions as a "grave mistake".
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, Majlis Keselamatan Negara Armenia mengambil keputusan untuk memutuskan hubungan dengan Hungary dalam satu sidang kemuncak kecemasan, menggambarkan tindakan Hungary sebagai "kesilapan besar."

src: Ferrari driver Felipe Massa and his teammate Michael Schumacher won the front row on the FIA Formula-1 2006 Fuji Television Japanese Grand Prix on the Suzuka International Racing Course.
ref: Pemandu Ferrari Felipe Massa dan rakan sepasukannya Michael Schumacher memenangi di bahagian hadapan dalam Kejohanan Formula-1 2006 Fuji Television Japanese Grand Prix di Litar Lumba Antarabangsa Suzuka.

src: On the dying minutes of the qualification Massa suddenly overtook the seven times world champion thus winning the pole for the red team.
ref: Pada minit-minit terakhir untuk pusingan kelayakan Massa secara tiba-tiba mengatasi juara dunia tujuh kali sekaligus memenangi petak pertama unutk pasukan merah.

src: Not a bad result for another Japanese team - Honda drivers Jenson Button and Rubens Barrichello on the fourth line of the grid.
ref: Tidak kurang hebat juga untuk pemandu pasukan Jepun - Honda iaitu Jenson Button dan Rubens Barrichello yang mendapat barisan keempat dalam petak.

src: The Free State Cheetahs and the Blue Bulls will meet next week in the 2006 Currie Cup final, South Africa's domestic club rugby competition.
ref: Free State Cheetahs dan Blue Bulls akan bertemu pada minggu ini di pusingan akhir Piala Currie 2006, pertandingan kelab ragbi tempatan Afrika Selatan.

src: The Bulls were the first to go through, winning the first semi final against rivals Western Province, and the Cheetahs won their semi against the Sharks.
ref: Pasukan Bull yang pertama dapat pergi, dengan memenangi separuh akhir pertama menentang Wilayah Barat, dah Cheetahs menang separuh akhir menetang Sharks.

src: The Blue Bulls hosted WP at home, at Loftus Versfeld in Pretoria.
ref: Bulls Biru menjadi tuan rumah terhadap WP, di Loftus Versfeld di Pretoria.

src: The Blue Bulls led WP 20 to nine at half time.
ref: Bulls Biru mengatasi WP 20 kepada sembilan pada separuh masa pertama.

src: At the second semi-final at Bloemfontein, the Cheetahs hosted the Sharks at the Free State Stadium.
ref: Pada separuh akhir di Bloemfontein, Cheetahs menjadi tuan rumah kepada Sharks di Stadium Free State.

src: The Free State were up 17 to nil during the first half.
ref: Free State berjaya mengumpul sebanyak 17 berbanding dengan kosong pada separuh masa pertama.

src: The score was furthered to 24 points, but the Sharks' JP Pietersen scored minutes before the half finished to give the Sharks their first points, and the game went onto halftime, Cheetahs leading 24-7.
ref: Mata itu kemudian ditambah kepada 24 mata, tetapi JP Pietersen dari Sharks menjaringkan beberapa minit sebelum separuh masa tamat untuk memberikan Sharks mata pertama mereka, dan permainan diteruskan kepada separuh masa, Cheetahs mendahului dengan 24-7.

src: The Cheetahs will host the final next week, being the highest place finalist (first, the Blue Bulls were second).
ref: Cheetah akan menjadi tuan rumah untuk peringkat akhir minggu hadapan, menjadikan kedudukan paling tinggi peringkat akhir (pertama, Blue Bulls yang kedua).

src: The final will be the third Blue Bulls/Cheetahs affair in a row, and the fifth Blue Bulls appearance in a row.
ref: Peringkat akhir akan menjadi yang hubungan ketiga buat Blue Bulls/Cheetah dalam barisan, dan kelima buat Blue Bulls untuk penampilan di barisan.

src: A gene has been discovered that turns stem cells into cancer killers, promising new treatments that boost the body's ability to destroy tumors.
ref: Satu gen telah ditemui yang dapat menukarkan sel stem kepada pembunuh kanser, menjanjikan rawatan baru yang dapat meransangkan kebolehan badan untuk memusnahkan tumor.

src: South Korean scientists from the Korea Research Institute of Bioscience and Biotechnology in Daejeon say that the gene, Vitamin D3 Upregulated Protein 1 (VDUP1), spurs stem cells to become natural killer cells.
ref: Saintis Korea Selatan dari Institut kajian Biosains dan Bioteknologi Korea di Daejeon berkata yang gen itu, Vitamin D3 Upregulated Protein 1 (VDUP1), meransang sel stem untuk menjadi sel pembunuh semulajadi.

src: Research leader Inpyo Choi says the team observed that VDUP1 plays a decisive role in causing stem cells to become natural killers.
ref: Ketua pengkaji Inpyo Choi berkata yang pasukan tersebut memerhatikan yang VDUP1 memainkan peranan pemutus dalam menyebabkan sel stem untuk menjadi pembunuh semulajadi.

src: Besides determining the gene's importance to the immune system, Choi and colleagues have developed technology needed to spur the creation of natural killers from a person's own bone marrow stem cells.
ref: Selain memutuskan yang gen tersebut penting kepada sistem imun, Choi dan rakan sekerja telah membina teknologi yang diperlukan untuk meransang penciptaan pembunuh semulajadi dari sel stem sumsum tulang pesakit sendiri.

src: Choi calls this "the first step toward developing new treatments using our own immune system to fight cancers and other serious diseases."
ref: Choi memanggil ini "langkah pertama kearah membina rawatan baru menggunakan sistem imun kita sendiri untuk melawan kanser dan penyakit serius lain".

src: Though Ferrari drivers Felipe Massa and Michael Schumacher started the race from the first row, Alonso managed to overtake both Toyotas on the first part of the race and Massa after the pit stops.
ref: Walaupun pemandu Ferrari Felipe Massa dan Michael Schumacher telah memulakan perlumbaan dari barisan pertama, Alonso berjaya memintas kedua-dua pelumba Toyota itu di bahagian pertama perlumbaan dan Massa selepas hentian pit.

src: The situation in the drivers' championship became almost critical for Schumacher, who lost 10 points this week-end.
ref: Situasi kejuaraan pemandu menjadi lebih kritikal buat Schumacher, yang hilang 10 mata di penghujung minggu ini.

src: "I have to say clearly I don't really believe in the championship anymore," was Schumacher's reaction.
ref: "Saya perlu nyatakan dengan jelas yang saya tidak percaya kepada kejuaraan lagi," merupakan reaksi Schumacher.

src: In the constructor's championship Renault is 9 points ahead of Ferrari.
ref: Di dalam kejuaraan pengeluar Renault mempunyai 9 mata di hadapan Ferrari.

src: The New Zealand A1GP team, with racer Jonny Reid, placed seventh in A1GP feature race and picked up four championship points in the second round at Brno track, Czech Republic.
ref: Pasukan A1GP New Zealand, dengan pelumba Jonny Reid, ditempatkan pada tempat ketujuh dalam perlumbaan feature A1GP dan mengambil empat mata kejohanan pada pusingan kedua di trek Brno, Republik Czech.

src: New Zealand managed to secure themselves first place in the qualifying race by being fastest in all four qualifying segments with a time of 3:30.053, Germany second with 3:30.524.
ref: New Zealand berjaya meletakkan diri mereka di tempat pertama dalam perlumbaan kelayakan dengan merupakan yang terpantas di antara semua keempat-empat segmen kelayakan dengan catatan masa 3:30.053, Jerman di tempat kedua dengan 3:30.524.

src: This put New Zealand in the pole position to start the sprint race.
ref: Ini meletakkan New Zealand di kedudukan teratas untuk memulakan perlumbaan pecut.

src: When racing for the 20 minute sprint race started Germany and New Zealand 'locked horns' before the very first corner.
ref: Apabila lumba untuk perlumbaan pecut 20 minit bermula Jerman dan New Zealand 'mengunci tanduk'sebelum selekoh yang pertama.

src: New Zealand managed to crawl their way back to get seventh place, but dropped to fourteenth place from twelfth, out of 23 competing nations, on the leader board with only five points.
ref: New Zealand berjaya merangkak balik untuk mendapatkan tempat ketujuh, tetapi jatuh di tempat keempat belas dari kedua belas, daripada 23 negara yang bertanding, dengan hanya lima mata pada leader board.

src: David Sears, Engineering Team Director for both Germany and New Zealand, said: "Reid and his German counterpart Nico Hülkenberg were warned about keeping apart...but still ended up making life difficult for themselves."
ref: David Sears, Pengarah Pasukan Kejuruteraan untuk kedua-dua Jerman dan New Zealand, berkata: "Reid dan rakan Jermannya Nico Hülkenberg telah diberi amaran tentang menjaga jarak pisah...tetapi akhirnya membuat hidup jadi sukar kepada diri mereka sendiri."

src: Sears added: "To finish first you must first finish and the track is incredibly wide here at Brno, so why New Zealand and Germany should be rubbing wheels on the very first corner is anyone's guess.
ref: Sears menambah: "Untuk tamat di tempat pertama anda mesti menamatkan perlumbaan dahulu dan landasan adalah sangat luas di sini di Brno, jadi siapa dapat menyangka mengapa New Zealand dan Jerman perlu menggesek roda di selekoh pertama.

src: To recover and finish strongly was encouraging for Jonny and the car certainly has the raw speed and looks to be one of the quickest going around.
ref: Untuk kembali semula dan tamat dengan kuat telah memberikan semangat kepada Jonny dan keretanya mesti mempunyai kelajuan mentah dan kelihatan menjadi salah satu yang bergerak paling cepat di antaranya.

src: "We were so much quicker than the other teams in qualifying that it would be criminal to be banging wheels when a great result is there for the taking."
ref: "Kami adalah lebih cepat daripada pasukan lain dalam kelayakan dimana ia adalah menjadi jenayah untuk menghantuk roda apabila keputusan yang hebat ada disitu untuk diambil."

src: The website of international news service Al Jazeera was hacked Tuesday by a group idenitified only as Al-Rashedon.
ref: Laman web perkhidmatan berita antarabangsa Al Jazeera telah digodam Selasa oleh sekumpulan yang hanya dikenali sebagai Al-Rashedon.

src: The type of group and its exact purposes are unclear at this stage, although it appears to be supportive of Syrian President Bashar al-Assad.
ref: Jenis tujuan yang tepat serta kumpulan dan tidak jelas pada peringkat ini, walaupun ia kelihatan menyokong Presiden Syria Bashar al-Assad.

src: A screenshot of the hacked page contains the current Syrian flag displayed on the top left and a screenshot of a regular Al Jazeera homepage, overlaid by a graphic resembling a rubber stamp with the word "HACK" written on it and a silhouette of two men sitting at a desk.
ref: Gambar yang ditangkap di halaman yang digodam mengandungi bendera Syria semasa dipaparkan di sebelah kiri atas dan screenshot laman utama Al Jazeera tetap, dilapisi dengan grafik yang menyerupai suatu cap getah dengan perkataan "hack" yang ditulis di atasnya dan bayang dua lelaki duduk di meja.

src: We're compelled to do so on behalf of the Syrian people."
ref: Kami dipaksa untuk berbuat demikian bagi pihak rakyat Syria".

src: According to technological weblog Gizmodo, reports have emerged of the .net and not the .com version of the website being hacked.
ref: Menurut blog teknologi Gizmodo, laporan telah muncul daripada .net dan bukan versi .com bagi laman web yang digodam.

src: From there, she is primped and plucked by hair and makeup artists, then tweaked on a Photoshop-like program.
ref: Dari situ, dia disolek dan disambar oleh artis rambut dan solek, kemudian diubahsuai dengan program seperti Photoshop.

src: Two young, teenage girls walk past, glancing at the board.
ref: Dua remaja perempuan yang muda berjalan lalu sambil mengerling ke arah papan iklan tersebut.

src: "No wonder our perception of beauty is distorted" ends the ad in text, "Every girl deserves to feel beautiful just the way she is."
ref: "Tidak hairanlah persepsi kita tentang kecantikan diputarbelitkan" mengakhiri iklan itu dengan teks, "Setiap gadis berhak berasa cantik begitu sahaja".

src: Recently some fashion capitals have mandated minimum body mass indexes for runway models.
ref: Baru-baru ini beberapa pusat fesyen utama telah mewajibkan indeks jisim badan minimum untuk model landasan.

src: The top rated comedy in the United States and Canada is Ugly Betty, a series that stars an average girl coping at a fashion magazine.
ref: Komedi yang mendapat penilaian tertinggi di Amerika Syarikat dan Kanada adalah Ugly Betty, satu siri yang dibintangi ole seorang gadis biasa menghadapi dan mengatasi majalah fesyen.

src: The series is based on Betty la Fea, an extremely popular Colombian telenovela, which has been reproduced internationally.
ref: Siri ini berdasarkan Betty la Fea, sebuah telenovela Colombia yang amat popular, yang telah diterbitkan semula di peringkat antarabangsa.

src: Only two percent of women surveyed worldwide consider themselves beautiful, according to ABC Good Morning America co-anchor Robin Roberts, whose program debuted the commercial this morning at 8:07 am EST.
ref: Hanya dua peratus daripada wanita yang dikaji di seluruh dunia menganggap diri mereka cantik, mengikut ABC Good Morning America bersama penyampai bersama Robin Roberts, yang programnya memulakan iklan itu pagi ini pada pukul 8:07 am EST.

src: Snow started to fall at around 12:00 pm EST on Thursday, October 12, heavy at times, and accompanied by thunder and lightning.
ref: Salji mula turun sekitar 12:00 PM EST pada Khamis, 12 Oktober, ada kalanya lebat, dan diikuti oleh ribut dan kilat.

src: A driving ban has been issued for Tonawanda, New York, Buffalo and Amherst where at least "80% of roads in Amherst are impassible."
ref: Larangan memandu telah dikeluarkan di Tonawada, New York, Buffalo dan Amherst di mana sekurang-kurangnya "80% daripada jalan-jalan di Amherst tidak dapat dilalui".

src: A driving ban remains in effect while a state of emergency exists.
ref: Larangan memandu akan terus berkuat kuasa selagi keadaan darurat kekal.

src: Water will be shut off in 24 hours due to the lack of electricity to water pumps in the area and in a press conference, Mayor of Buffalo, Byron Brown issued a "boil water advisory."
ref: Bekalan air akan ditutup dalam masa 24 jam disebabkan oleh kekurangan tenaga elektrik untuk pam air di dalam kawasan dan dalam persidangan media, Datuk Bandar Buffalo, Byron Brown mengeluarkan "nasihat memasak air".

src: Residents are asked to bottle water and prepare for the outage.
ref: Penduduk diminta untuk membotolkan air dan bersedia untuk sebarang gangguan.

src: It is not known when water will be turned back on.
ref: Ia masih lagi tidak tahu bila air akan dibuka semula.

src: At least 3 people have been killed due to the storm.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 3 orang telah terbunuh disebabkan ribut.

src: Two of those people were killed in a two-car accident in Lancaster, New York, and the other person was in Niagara County and died after being hit by a vehicle.
ref: Dua orang daripadanya terbunuh dalam satu kemalangan membabitkan dua kereta di Lancaster, New York dan seorang lagi di Niagara County dan meninggal setelah dilanggar oleh kenderaan.

src: One person was crushed and killed by a falling tree in Amherst, while in the process of removing snow from his property.
ref: Seorang telah dihempap dan dibunuh oleh pokok tumbang di Amherst, ketika dalam proses untuk mengalihkan salji dari hartanahnya.

src: Many trees, which still have their leaves, have broken into pieces as the heavy, wet snow began to pile up, as much as an inch an hour.
ref: Banyak pokok, yang masih berdaun, patah bertaburan apabila salji berat, basah mula bertimbun, sebanyak satu inci satu jam.

src: The storm has caused many delays and cancellations in flights leaving from or going to Buffalo.
ref: Ribut telah mengakibatkan banyak kelewatan dan pembatalan kapal terbang berlepas dari atau masuk ke Buffalo.

src: Nearly 400,000 people in Buffalo and surrounding suburbs are still without power and forecasters at the NOAA are warning people "not to go outside in an area where heavy snow has fallen unless absolutely necessary."
ref: Hampir 400,000 orang di Buffalo dan persekitaran kawasan luar bandar masih tiada bekalan tenaga dan peramal kaji cuaca di NOAA memberi amaran kepada penduduk "supaya tidak keluar ke kawasan di mana salji lebat telah turun melainkan hanya betul-betul memerlukannya".

src: Power may not be restored to the affected areas until Sunday and possibly next week in some areas.
ref: Bekalan tenaga mungkin tidak dapat dipulihkan di kawasan-kawasan terjejas sehingga Ahad dan kemungkinan minggu hadapan di beberapa kawasan.

src: Damage to trees is extensive with nearly every tree destroyed on Granger Place in Buffalo.
ref: Kerosakan pada pokok-pokok adalah sangat teruk dengan hampir setiap pokok rosak di Granger Place di Buffalo.

src: "This was extremely heavy snow and most of the trees still have most of their leaves ... we can't do a complete damage assessment until the snow stops falling," said spokesman for Niagara Mohawk, Western New York's area power company, Steve Brady.
ref: "Salji ini sangat lebat dan kebanyakan pokok-pokok masih lagi mempunyai daun...kami tidak dapat mentaksir jumlah kerosakan sehingga salji berhenti turun," kata jurucakap kepada Niagara Mohawk, syarikat bekalan kuasa Barat New York, Steve Brady.

src: Wind is expected to be strong and gusty which could bring down tree limbs which are broken but still attached to the tree.
ref: Angin diramalkan kuat dan kencang di mana mungkin akan menumbangkan dahan-dahan pokok yang patah tetapi masih bersambung pada pokok.

src: Some areas could see an additional 6 inches of snow by Saturday morning.
ref: Beberapa kawasan akan melihat tambahan salji setinggi 6 inci pada pagi Sabtu.

src: The recent E. coli outbreak that killed three people and sickened nearly 200 in the United States and Canada has been linked to cattle.
ref: Wabak E. coli baru-baru ini yang mengorbankan tiga orang dan membuat hampir 200 jatuh sakit di Amerika Syarikat dan Kanada telah dikaitkan dengan lembu.

src: Shortly after the outbreak began, the contaminated spinach had been traced to the Salinas Valley region of California.
ref: Tidak lama selepas wabak itu bermula, bayam yang tercemar telah dikesan di rantau Salinas Valley California.

src: Now, health officials say the contamination came from cattle manure.
ref: Kini, pegawai kesihatan berkata pencemaran itu datang daripada baja lembu.

src: The infected cattle manure was found on a ranch in Salinas Valley that is adjacent to the field that produced contaminated spinach.
ref: Baja Lembu yang dijangkiti ditemui di sebuah ladang di Salinas Valley yang bersebelahan dengan padang yang menghasilkan bayam tercemar.

src: Dr. Kevin Reilly of the California Department of Health Services said that "we don't know if wild swine are playing a role or not, but we do know that on this particular ranch, there is a very large population of wild boar, and we have witnessed on this site that they have torn through fencing and under fencing and have the ability to access the field".
ref: Dr. Kevin Reilly dari Perkhidmatan Kesihatan Jabatan California berkata bahawa "kita tidak tahu jika babi liar memainkan peranan atau tidak, tetapi kita tahu bahawa di ladang khusus ini, terdapat nombor babi hutan yang sangat besar, dan kita telah menyaksikan di laman web ini bahawa mereka telah merentas melalui pagar dan di bawah pagar dan mempunyai keupayaan untuk mengakses padang".

src: The bacteria could have been carried by wild animals from the cattle ranch to the spinach field.
ref: Bakteria boleh dibawa oleh haiwan liar dari ladang lembu ke padang bayam.

src: Irish Taoiseach Bertie Ahern and British Prime Minister Tony Blair have unveiled a new roadmap for the Northern Ireland devolution process.
ref: Perdana Menteri Ireland Bertie Ahern dan Perdana Menteri Britain Tony Blair telah memperkenalkan satu hala tuju baru bagi proses penurunan kuasa Utara Ireland.

src: The roadmap sets a target date for a new Northern Ireland Executive to be set up.
ref: Hala tuju tersebut menetapkan satu tarikh sasaran supaya Eksekutif baru Utara Ireland ditubuhkan.

src: The roadmap, known as the Saint Andrews Agreement, came after three days of intense talks in St. Andrews, Scotland.
ref: Hala tuju tersebut, dikenali sebagai Perjanjian Saint Andrews, diperkenalkan selepas perdebatan sengit selama tiga hari di Saint Andrews, Scotland.

src: The first deadline is on November 10, 2006 during which time both parties must accept the agreement and for the first time in the history of the party, the Democratic Unionist Party will cast a vote for their rivals, Sinn Fein.
ref: Tarikh akhir pertama adalah pada 10 November 2006 iaitu semasa kedua-dua parti hendaklah bersetuju dengan perjanjian dan buat pertama kalinya dalam sejarah Parti Union Demokratik mengundi bagi lawan mereka, Sinn Fein.

src: The second deadline is on November 27, 2006 in which the Northern Ireland Assembly, would gather to elect the first minister and deputy first minister of the Executive.
ref: Tarikh akhir kedua adalah pada 27 November 2006 iaitu apabila Perhimpunan Utara Ireland berkumpul untuk memilih menteri pertama dan timbalan menteri pertama bagi Eksekutif itu.

src: In a reassurance to unionists, the governments said they will not transfer duties over to the executive till 2008.
ref: Sebagai jaminan kepada ahli kesatuan, pihak kerajaan berkata mereka tidak akan memindahkan tugas kepada pihak eksekutif sehingga 2008.

src: Sinn Fein demanded an immediate transfer of power, possibly to a Sinn Fein minister.
ref: Sinn Fein menuntut peralihan kuasa dengan segera, mungkin kepada salah seorang menteri Sinn Fein.

src: "You can't have a democratic society unless the police are given full support," Blair said.
ref: "Masyarakat berdemokrasi tidak akan terbentuk selagi kerjasama sepenuhnya tidak diberikan kepada pihak polis," kata Blair.

src: Most of the participants at the summit favored a referendum, except for Ian Paisley, according to an anoynoums source who wished not be identified as he no authorization to release details publicly.
ref: Kebanyakan peserta di sidang kemuncak itu menyokong referendum, kecuali Ian Paisley, menurut sumber tidak bernama yang tidak mahu identitinya diketahui ramai kerana dia tiada berkebenaran untuk melepaskan maklumat kepada kepada orang ramai.

src: Tony Blair said the essential parts of the agreement are that all parties accept policing and the courts and have a clear agreement on power-sharing.
ref: Tony Blair berkata bahawa bahagian-bahagian penting dalam perjanjian itu ialah kesemua parti bersetuju akan kuasa polis dan mahkamah mempunyai persetujuan jelas terhadap perkongsian kuasa.

src: "So those are the two essential parts of it," Mr Blair said.
ref: "Bahawasanya itulah dua bahagian penting perjanjian itu," kata Blair.

src: Ian Paisley, the notorious hardliner evangelist who has made his political career out of saying no to comprehensive reforms, eschewed his trademark fire-brand rhetoric offered a welcome and said that the province is "at a crossroads."
ref: Ian Paisley, seorang mubaligh Kristian yang terkenal kerana tidak bersetuju dengan dasar-dasar partinya yang melibatkan diri dalam politik menolak pembaharuan secara menyeluruh, menjauhkan diri daripada tanda retorik yang berjenamakan api, memberikan sambutan dan berkata wilayah itu"sedang berada di simpang jalan."

src: Paisley said of Ulster, "a place where there is a road to democracy and where there is a road to anarchy."
ref: Paisley berkata tentang Ulster, "Ia adalah satu tempat dimana terdapat jalan ke arah demokrasi dan jalan ke arah anarki."

src: Further adding, "I trust that we will see in the coming days the vast majority of people taking the road to democracy."
ref: Tambahan lagi, "Saya percaya bahawa pada masa hadapan, sebahagian besar rakyat akan memilih jalan ke arah demokrasi."

src: He also said on the possible election of Paisley and McGuinness to their minister positions, "I do not think anybody will find it easy to sit in an executive with people who they are deeply opposed to, or indeed hostile to."
ref: Beliau juga turut memberi komen terhadap kemungkinan pilihanraya Paisley dan McGuinness untuk mendapat jawatan menteri, "Saya tidak yakin bahawa sesiapapun rasa ini adalah suatu perkara yang mudah untuk menjawat dalam eksekutif bersama orang yang bercanggah dengan mereka, ataupun sesungguhnya bermusuhan."

src: Referring to Sinn Fein, Paisley stated "We will meet the requirements. "
ref: Merujuk kepada Sinn Fein, Paisley berkata, "Kami akan memenuhi keperluannya."

src: "But the IRA-Sinn Fein has got to meet those requirements."
ref: "Tetapi IRA-Sinn Fein hendaklah memenuhi keperluannya juga."

src: "And when they do, we will really be on the way to peace in Northern Ireland."
ref: "Dan apabila mereka sudah memenuhi keperluannya, kita akan menuju ke arah pencapaian keamanan di Utara Ireland."

src: Paisley left St. Andrews quickly after attending the press conference in order to be with his family for his fiftieth wedding anniversary.
ref: Paisley meninggalkan St. Andrews sejurus selepas menghadiri sidang akhbar supaya dapat bersama-sama dengan keluarga beliau untuk ulang tahun perkahwinan beliau yang kelima puluh.

src: Sinn Fein leader, Gerry Adams offered a guarded welcome of the plans and stated "requires thoughtful consideration and consultation."
ref: Ketua Sinn Fein, Gerry Adams menawarkan kata alu-aluan yang berhati-hati mengenai rancangan tersebut dann berkata "ini memerlukan pertimbangan dan perundingan."

src: However, he stated the restoration of power-sharing was an "an enormous prize. "
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, dia berkata bahawa pemulihan perkongsian kuasa merupakan "hadiah yang lumayan."

src: "Common sense, political realism and the interests of all sections of our people demand that we achieve this."
ref: "Kesedaran sivik, kesedaran berpolitik dan minat semua orang dalam masyarakat mendorong supaya kami mencapai ini."

src: Sir Reg Empey, the leader of the Ulster Unionist Party said that the agreement was "Belfast for slower learners."
ref: Tuan Reg Empey, ketua Parti Persatuan Ulster berkata bahawa perjanjian tersebut merupakan "Belfast bagi pelajar lembap."

src: He added "Sinn Fein will sign up to the PSNI being the only force of law and order and Ian Paisley, or a colleague, will share the joint office of first and deputy first minister with Martin McGuinness in a mandatory coalition."
ref: Beliau menambah, "Sinn Fein akan mendaftar ke PSNI, menjadi satu-satunya kuasa undang-undang dan perintah dan Ian Paisley atau rakan sekerja akan berkongsi pejabat dengan Menteri Pertama dan Timbalan Menteri Pertama bersama Martin McGuinness dalam gabungan mandatori."

src: Direct rule from London has been in place since the Assembly and Executive dissolved in 2002 over allegations of IRA spying ring.
ref: Arahan secara langsung dari London telah dilaksanakan sejak Perhimpunan dan Eksekutif telah dibubarkan pada tahun 2002 atas dakwaan rangkaian pengintip IRA.

src: A man was sentenced to three years probation after he and his mother argued about "American Idol," a popular TV show in the U.S. Cory Favreau hit his mother with a novelty bike chain in May after she expressed praise for last year's runner-up Katherine McPhee.
ref: Seorang lelaki dijatuhi hukuman pemulihan tiga tahun selepas dia dan ibunya bergaduh tentang "American Idol," rancangan TV popular di U.S. Cory Favreau memukul ibunya dengan rantai basikal mainan pada Mei selepas ibunya megeluarkan pujian kepada naib juara tahun lepas Katherine McPhee.

src: She was treated for a cut on her head and was released, police say.
ref: Dia telah dirawat untuk luka di kepalanya dan dibebaskan, polis berkata.

src: He also pleaded guilty to a contempt charge for violating a court order to stay away from his mother.
ref: Dia juga mengaku bersalah terhadap tuduhan menghina kerana melanggar perintah mahkamah untuk menjauhkan diri dari ibunya.

src: In the second canonization ceremony of his papacy, Pope Benedict XVI today named four new saints.
ref: Dalam upacara pengisyitiharan wali yang kedua kepausan beliau, Pope Benedict XVI hari ini menamakan empat orang kudus baru.

src: The new saints were Rosa Venerini (1656-1728), Mother Theodore Guerin (1798-1856), Filippo Smaldone (1848-1923), and Bishop Rafael Guizar Valencia (1878-1938).
ref: Orang kudus baru itu adalah Rosa Venerini (1656-1728), Ibu Theodore Guerin (1798 - 1856), Filippo Smaldone (1848 - 1923), dan Bishop Rafael Guizar Valencia (1878 - 1938).

src: Mother Theodore Guerin pioneered schools and religious institutions in Indiana after emigrating from France in 1840.
ref: Ibu Theodore Guerin memulakan institusi sekolah dan keagamaan di Indiana selepas berhijrah dari Perancis pada 1840.

src: One of the schools she founded, a girls academy, is still in existence a few miles west of Terre Haute.
ref: Satu dari sekolah yang beliau tubuhkan, akademi perempuan, masih beroperasi beberapa batu di barat Terre Haute.

src: Now named Saint Mary-of-the-Woods College, it is the oldest Catholic liberal arts college for women in the United States of America.
ref: Sekarang menamakan Kolej Saint Mary-of-the-Woods, yang merupakan kolej artis liberal Katholik wanita yang tertua di Amerika Syarikat.

src: Italian priest Filippo Smaldone founded an order of nuns and schools for the deaf.
ref: Paderi Itali iaitu Smaldone menubuhkan satu arahan untuk nun dan sekolah kepada pekak.

src: Bishop Rafael Guizar Valencia disguised himself to care for the wounded during the anti-clerical Mexican revolution.
