ref: Bishop Rafael Guizar Valencia menyamar diri sendiri untuk menjaga orang cedera semada revolusi anti-kerani Mexican.

src: He did share the ball with the rest of the team.
ref: Dia ada berkongsi bola dengan keseluruhan pasukan.

src: By contrast, the Australian defenders held Canada's Garett Hickling to just seven goals.
ref: Sebaliknya, pemain pertahanan Australia menyekar Garett Hickling dari Kanada kepada hanya tujuh gol.

src: At one point two Australian defenders trapped him in a corner, unable to move, which he appeared to find very frustrating.
ref: Pada satu ketika dua orang pemain pertahanan Australia memerangkapnya di satu sudut, tidak dapat bergerak, dan dia kelihatan sangat kecewa.

src: Spectators included the Australian Chef de Mission, Jason Hellwig, and his deputies, Michael Hartung and Kate McLoughlin.
ref: Penonton termasuk Chef de Mission Australia, Jason Hellwig, dan timbalannya, Michael Hartung dan Kate McLoughlin.

src: The rugby team's gold medal brought Australia's count to 32, and the total medals to 85, putting Australia in fifth place.
ref: Pingat emas pasukan ragbi membawa kiraan Australia ke 32, dan jumlah pingat ke 85, meletakkan Australia di tempat kelima.

src: The team's gold medals were presented by HRH The Earl of Wessex.
ref: Pingat emas pasukan itu telah disampaikan oleh HRH Earl of Wessex.

src: The TADA court in Mumbai held four accused guilty of assisting Tiger Memon in smuggling arms and RDX that were used in the serial blasts.
ref: Mahkamah TADA di Mumbai telah menahan empat orang yang tertuduh bersalah dalam membantu Tiger Memon dalam penyeludupan senjata dan RDX yang digunakan dalam letupan siri.

src: Tulsiram Dhondu Surve, watchman of high security Wangani microwave tower in Raigad district, was found guilty of allowing Tiger's men to use government property for the purpose of loading arms into vehicles which then transported them to Mumbai.
ref: Tulsiram Dhondu Surve, penjaga keselamatan tinggi Wangani menara ketuhar gelombang mikro di daerah Raigad, didapati bersalah keranan membenarkan orang suruhan Tiger untuk menggunakan harta milik kerajaan untuk tujuan muatan senjata ke dalam kenderaan yang kemudiannya membawa mereka ke Mumbai.

src: The watchman was convicted under Section 202 of the Indian Penal Code for "not informing authorities of the smuggling of arms and explosives despite having knowledge of the activities."
ref: Penjaga itu didapati bersalah di bawah Seksyen 202 Kanun Keseksaan India kerana "tidak memberitahu pihak berkuasa tentang penyeludupan senjata dan bahan letupan walaupun dia tahu akan perkara-perkara itu".

src: Judge Kode, however, acquitted Anant Bhoir, who had allowed his dumper to be used for disposing of RDX in the Nagla Bunder Creek.
ref: Hakim Kode bagaimanapun membebaskan Anant Bhoir, yang telah membenarkan lori pembuangnya untuk digunakan untuk melupuskan RDX dalam Anak Sungai Nagla Bunder.

src: An analysis of melatonin studies has upheld the controversial supplement's effectiveness as a sleep aid.
ref: Analisis kajian melatonin telah mengekalkan keberkesanan makanan tambahan yang berkontroversi sebagai alat bantuan tidur.

src: The analysis, which included 17 peer-reviewed scientific papers, was aimed at determining whether supplements of the hormone can improve sleep among insomniacs, older adults and others.
ref: Analisis itu, yang melibatkan 17 kertas kerja saintifik, semakan sejawat bertujuan menentukan sama ada makanan tambahan hormon itu boleh meningkatkan tidur di kalangan orang yang mengalami insomnia, orang dewasa yang lebih tua dan orang lain.

src: "A meta-analysis essentially tells 'yes' or 'no'—that a treatment does or does not have a significant effect," says Richard Wurtman of MIT, the study's principal investigator.
ref: "Satu meta-analisis pada dasarnya memberitahu 'ya' atau 'tidak' - sama ada satu rawatan mempunyai atau tidak mempunyai kesan yang ketara," kata Richard Wurtman dari MIT, penyelidik utama kajian itu.

src: At that dose, says Wurtman, the hormone's effects end after a few days because melatonin receptors in the brain become unresponsive when exposed to too much of the hormone.
ref: Pada dos itu, kata Wurtman, kesan hormon ini berakhir selepas beberapa hari kerana reseptor melatonin dalam otak menjadi tidak responsif apabila terdedah kepada terlalu banyak hormon.

src: Such inadvertent overdosing, say the researchers, has contributed to controversy over melatonin's efficacy.
ref: Terlebih dos yang tidak disengajakan itu, berkata penyelidik-penyelidik, telah menyumbang kepada kontroversi keberkesanan melatonin ini.

src: But the new meta-analysis shows that melatonin does indeed have positive effects on sleep—even though some of the analyzed studies also involved high doses of the hormone.
ref: Tetapi meta-analisis yang baru menunjukkan bahawa melatonin sememangnya mempunyai kesan positif ke atas tidur walaupun beberapa kajian yang dianalisis juga melibatkan dos hormon yang tinggi.

src: The research is reported in the journal Sleep Medicine Reviews.
ref: Kajian ini dilaporkan dalam jurnal Sleep Medicine Reviews.

src: City officials in seven United States cities were warned today about a possible attack on NFL stadiums using "dirty bombs."
ref: Penguatkuasa bandar di tujuh bandar Amerika Syarikat mendapat amaran hari ini kemungkinan serangan terhadap stadium-stadium NFL menggunakan "bom beradioaktif".

src: The Department of Homeland Security, which issued the warnings, has also added that the threat is "not credible."
ref: Jabatan Keselamatan Dalam Negeri, yang mengeluarkan amaran tersebut, turut menambah bahawa amaran itu "tidak boleh dipercayai".

src: The bomb threat, originally discovered on 4chan, stated that truck bombs containing radiological materials would be detonated during the football games this Sunday.
ref: Amaran bom tersebut, yang asalnya ditemui di 4chan, menyatakan bahawa bom tersebut mengandungi bahan radiologikal yang mungkin diletupkan semasa perlawanan bola sepak Ahad ini.

src: While the Department of Homeland Security did not disclose which cities were mentioned, an unnamed department official has said the cities named were Atlanta, Miami, New York, Seattle, Houston, Oakland, California, and Cleveland, Ohio.
ref: Sementara Jabatan Keselamatan Dalam Negeri tidak menyatakan negeri-negeri mana yang dinyatakan, pegawai satu jabatan tidak dinamakan menyatakan nama negeri-negeri tersebut Atlanta, Miami, New York, Seattle, Houston, Oakland, California, dan Cleveland, Ohio.

src: In response to the threat, several teams are scheduled to sweep some stadiums with radiation detection devices on Sunday for the presence of radioactive materials.
ref: Sebagai tindakbalas terhadap ancaman tersebut, beberapa pasukan dijadualkan menyapu beberapa stadium dengan alat pengesan radioaktif pada Ahad untuk mengesan kehadiran bahan radioaktif.

src: In addition, the parking areas and entrances will be monitored closely for suspicious activity.
ref: Sebagai tambahan, kawasan letak kereta dan pintu masuk akan dipantau rapat untuk aktiviti yang mencurigakan.

src: The FBI has questioned a Milwaukee resident said to be responsible for the threats, which were posted on the web site last week.
ref: FBI telah menyoal-siasat penduduk Milwaukee yang dikatakan bertanggung-jawab terhadap ancaman tersebut, yang diposkan di laman web minggu lepas.

src: The FBI has declined to release the details of the investigation.
ref: FBI telah menolak untuk mengeluarkan butiran siasatan.

src: For more information on the election, read Toronto municipal election, 2006.
ref: Untuk maklumat lanjut mengenai pilihan raya tersebut, baca pilihanraya bandaraya Toronto, 2006.

src: The Group of Ministers (GoM) set up by the union government has given the thumbs-up for community radio stations to operate in India.
ref: Group of Minister (GoM) yang ditubuhkan oleh kesatuan kerajaan telah memberi kebenaran kepada komuniti stesen radio untuk beroperasi di India.

src: The GoM has proposed that universities, registered trusts, civil society bodies and NGOs be allowed to run such stations.
ref: GoM telah mengusulkan untuk universiti-universiti, amanah berdaftar, badan masyarakat sivil dan NGO dibenarkan untuk mengendalikan stesen tersebut.

src: It has also proposed a single window clearance system to authorise such networks, with the assurance that the requisite clearances will be provided within three months.
ref: Ia juga mengusulkan sistem perlepasan jendela untuk memberi kuasa kepada rangkaian tersebut, degan jaminan bahawa perlepasan yang diperlukan akan diberi dalam tempoh tiga bulan.

src: The possibility that the proposal may run into some trouble when put before the Cabinet does exist.
ref: Kemungkinan untuk usul tersebut mendapat tentangan apabila dibentangkan di kabinet memang wujud.

src: There are also concerns that community radios may be used by insurgent groups to compromise India's internal security.
ref: Mereka juga bimbang bahawa komuniti radio boleh dipergunakan oleh kumpulan pemberontak untuk mengancam keselamatan dalaman India.

src: Brazilian driver Filipe Massa, driving for Ferrari, won the Brazilian Grand Prix at Autódromo José Carlos Pace in Interlagos, São Paulo.
ref: Pemandu Brazil Filippe Massa, memandu untuk pasukan Ferrari, telah memenangi Brazillian Grand Prix di Autodromo Jose Carlos Pace bertempat di Interlagos, Sao Paulo.

src: Massa started from pole and controlled the race from start to the finish line.
ref: Massa bermula dari petak pertama dan menguasai perlumbaan dari mula sehingga garisan penamat.

src: In the beginning of the third qualification session his car slowed down and forced him to start 10th on Sunday.
ref: Ketika permulaan sesi kelayakan ketiga, keretanya menjadi perlahan dan memaksanya bermula pada petak ke 10 pada hari Ahad.

src: In the race he was almost on the back of Fisichella, but damaged his tyre in the overtaking attempt and lose all positions.
ref: Dalam perlumbaan tersebut beliau hampir berada di belakang Fisichella, tetapi tayarnya rosak ketika percubaan untuk memintas dan akhirnya kehilangan posisi.

src: Giancarlo made a crucial mistake prior to Senna's "S"-curve allowing Michael to pass him.
ref: Giancarlo melakukan kesilapan besar sebelum lengkungan "S" di Senna, membolehkan Michael memintas.

src: The "Red Baron" set up the fastest time and the top speed record for this track.
ref: "Red Baron" mencatat masa terpantas dan rekod kelajuan tertinggi untuk trek ini.

src: Rubens Barrichello (Honda, Pedro de la Rosa (McLaren-Mercedes) and Poland Robert Kubica (Sauber-BMW) were 7-th, 8-th and 9-th respectfully.
ref: Rubens Barrichello (Honda, Pedro de la Rosa (McLaren-Mercedes) dan Poland Robert Kubica (Sauber-BMW) masing-masing menduduki tempat ke 7, 8, dan 9.

src: The annual Living Planet Report compiled by the Zoological Society of London and the Global Footprint Network, published this week by WWF International, assessed "the health of the planet's ecosystems" and measured the demands people make on the planet's resources.
ref: Laporan Living Planet tahunan yang disusun oleh Zoological Society dan Global Footprint Network, diterbitkan minggu ini oleh WWF Antarabangsa, menilai "kesihatan ekosistem planet" dan mengukur permintaan yang manusia buat keatas sumber planet.

src: The Living Planet Index is based on population trends between 1970 and 2003 of over 3 600 populations of more than 1 300 vertebrate species from around the world.
ref: Indeks Hidup Planet adalah berdasarkan tren populasi diantara 1970 dan 2003 yang lebih 3600 populasi lebih dari 1300 spesis veterbrata dari seluruh dunia.

src: Tropical species populations declined by around 55 per cent on average from 1970 to 2003, while temperate species populations, have shown little overall change.
ref: Populasi spesis tropika menurun lebih kurang 55 peratus pada purata dari 1970 ke 2003, sementara populasi spesis iklim sederhana, telah menunjukkan sedikit perubahan keseluruhan.

src: In 2003 this was 14.1 billion global hectares, or 2.2 global hectares per person (a global hectare is a hectare with world-average ability to produce resources and absorb wastes).
ref: Pada 2003 ini adalah 14.1 bilion hektar global, atau 2.2 hektar global setiap orang (hektar global adalah hektar dengan kebolehan purata dunia untuk menghasilkan sumber dan menyerap buangan).

src: The total supply of productive area, or biocapacity, in 2003 was 11.2 global hectares, or 1.8 global hectares per person.
ref: Bekalan keseluruhan kawasan produktif, atau biokapasiti, pada 2003 adalah 11.2 hektar global, atau 1.8 hektar global setiap orang.

src: Demand overshot supply first in the 1980s and has been increasing every year since.
ref: Permintaan melebihi bekalan pertama kali pada 1980an dan telah meningkat setiap tahun sejak itu.

src: By 2003 the overshoot was about 25 per cent.
ref: Pada 2003 lebihan itu adalah lebih kurang 25 peratus.

src: James P. Leape, the Director General of WWF International summarises: "The message of these two indices is clear and urgent:" "we have been exceeding the Earth's ability to support our lifestyles for the past 20 years, and we need to stop."
ref: James P. Leape, Ketua Pengarah WWF Antarabangsa menyimpulkan: "Mesej dari dua indeks ini jelas dan penting:" "Kita telah melebihi kebolehan Bumi untuk menyokong gaya hidup kita selama 20 tahun, dan kita perlu berhenti".

src: She also rounds out the top positions within New Zealand being taken by women.
ref: Beliau juga berada di antara jawatan tertinggi dalam pengambilan New Zealand oleh wanita.

src: All four of Governor-General, Prime Minister, Chief Justice and the Speaker of the House are female.
ref: Kesemua empat Gabenor Jeneral, Perdana Menteri, Ketua Hakim dan Speaker Dewan adalah perempuan.

src: The position has usually been appointed unopposed, but the other two candidates stood to protest at the lack of consultation by Prime Minister Helen Clark.
ref: Jawatan tersebut biasanya dilantik tanpa perlu bertanding, tetapi dua calon lain bangun membankang kepada kurangnya konsultasi oleh Perdana Menteri Helen Clark.

src: Wilson was previously Attorney-General, a position that Deputy Prime Minister Dr. Michael Cullen now holds.
ref: Wilson sebelum ini merupakan Peguam Negara, jawatan yang mana Timbalan Perdana Menteri Dr. Michael Cullen pegang sekarang.

src: The first charges under the new U.K. International Criminal Court Act have been brought against seven British servicemen.
ref: Tuduhan pertama di bawah Akta Mahkamah Jenayah Antarabangsa U.K. yang baru telah dibawa menentang tujuh orang pasukan setia negara British.

src: The charges relate to the mistreatment of civilians and the death of Baha Mousa (26) a hotel receptionist in Basra in 2003.
ref: Tuduhan tersebut berkaitan dengan penganiayaan orang awam dan kematian Baha Mousa (26) seorang penyambut tetamu hotel di Basra pada 2003.

src: He said that he had never seen anything like it before and didn't know what to do.
ref: Dia berkata yang dia tidak pernah melihat sesuatu seperti itu dan tidak tahu apa yang perlu dilakukan.

src: He had not intervened "because they (the soldiers) were bigger than me, and I didn't know what their orders were".
ref: Dia tidak masuk campur kerana "mereka (tentera-tentera itu) lebih besar dari saya, dan saya tidak tahu apa arahan mereka."

src: "I think we're all proud of what we've accomplished so far."
ref: "Saya fikir kami semua bangga dengan apa yang dicapai setakat ini".

src: "I think it will serve us well in the future, but right now we just need the points," said Ryan Miller, one of the Sabres goalies.
ref: "Saya fikir ia akan membantu kami di masa hadapan, tetapi buat masa ini kami hanya perlu mata," kata Ryan Miller, seorang daripada penjaga gol Sabres.

src: Currently Buffalo is 10-0-0 and is currently the top team in the NHL.
ref: Buat masa ini, Buffalo dengan 10-0-0 dan kini berada di tangga tertinggi dalam NHL.

src: They will play the Atlanta Thrashers, who trail the Sabres by only 3 points in the NHL overall, on Saturday October 28.
ref: Mereka akan bermain dengan Atlanta Thrashers, yang ketinggalan hanya 3 mata di belakang Sabres dalam NHL secara keseluruhan, pada Sabtu, 28 Oktober.

src: Beginning at the end of last season, the Sabres have won 15 games in a row.
ref: Bermula di pengakhiran musim lalu, Sabres telah menang 15 permainan berturut-turut.

src: The mother of a firefighter who died in his duties fighting the blaze in southern California, has pleaded to the arsonist responsible for the 40,450 acre inferno to give himself up, and that she will not judge him.
ref: Ibu seorang ahli bomba yang meninggal dunia semasa tugasnya melawan kebakaran di selatan California, merayu kepada pembakar yang bertanggungjawah bagi kebakaran dahsyat 40,450 ekar untuk menyerah diri, dan dia tidak akan mengadilinya.

src: Bonnie McKay, mother to 27-year-old Jason McKay, said "I firmly believe you didn't believe that things were going to turn out the way they did, but they did."
ref: Bonnie McKay, ibu Jason McKay yang berumur 27 tahun, berkata "Saya amat percaya kamu tidak percaya sesetengah perkara akan terjadi, tetapi ia terjadi".

src: The fire, which has claimed the lives of four firefighters and caused 95% burns to a fifth, is now 60% contained.
ref: Kebakaran tersebut, yang meragut nyawa empat ahli bombo dan mengakibatkan 95% luka bakar kepada yang kelima, yang kini 60% terkawal.

src: There is a massive aerial attack on the fire in progress, making use of fire helicopters and planes to dump thousands of gallons of water onto the blaze over the canyons of Riverside County.
ref: Serangan udara sedang dijalankan secara besar-besaran ke atas api, menggunakan helikopter bomba dan kapal terbang untuk menyimbah beribu-ribu gelen air atas api itu yang merentasi gaung Riverside Country.

src: Repeated incidents of controversial approaches of Israeli F-16 jets to German military vessels, as well as claims of the opposition parties that Angela Merkel's government had tricked them into approving Germany's Lebanon mission cause ongoing controversies surrounding the historical deployment of Bundeswehr troops to the Middle East.
ref: Kejadian berulang pendekatan kontroversi Israel F-16 jet kepada kapal tentera Jerman, dan juga tuntutan pihak pembangkang bahawa kerajaan Angela Merkel telah menipu mereka ke dalam meluluskan misi Lubnan menyebabkan kontroversi berterusan Jerman sekitar penempatan bersejarah tentera Bundeswehr ke Timur Tengah.

src: The latest event to hit the headlines today was an encounter of a German helicopter with two Israeli jets off the Lebanese coast during the night of Thursday to Friday.
ref: Acara terkini untuk menjadi berita utama hari ini adalah pertemuan sebuah helikopter Jerman dengan dua jet Israel di luar pantai Lubnan pada malam Khamis hingga Jumaat.

src: Peter Wichert apparently was responsible for an unclear statement which Angela Merkel supposedly sees as the cause of the current conflict.
ref: Peter Wichert nampaknya bertanggungjawab bagi kenyataan yang tidak jelas dimana Angela Merkel kononnya dilihat sebagai punca konflik semasa.

src: Studies conducted by a team of physicists at the University of Texas at Arlington (UTA) conclude that new synthetic NBA basketballs are less lively, more slippery when damp, and bounce more erratically than the traditional leather balls.
ref: Kajian yang dijalankan oleh sepasukan ahli fizik di Universiti Texas di Arlington (UTA) telah menyimpulkan bahawa bola keranjang sintetik baru NBA kurang lincah, lebih licin apabila lembap, dan melantun lebih tidak menentu daripada bola kulit tradisional.

src: James Horwitz, Chairman of the UTA Department of Physics was contacted by the Dallas Mavericks owner Mark Cuban to study the new ball.
ref: James Horwitz, Pengerusi Jabatan Fizik UTA telah dihubungi oleh pemilik Dallas Mavericks Mark Cuba untuk mengkaji bola baru itu.

src: Traditional leather basketballs provide more grip when they are slightly wet.
ref: Bola keranjang kulit tradisional memberikan cengkaman lebih banyak apabila mereka sedikit basah.

src: The synthetic balls bounce 30% more sporadically, possibly due to deep embossing, and are less lively than leather basketballs.
ref: Bola sintetik itu melantun 30% lebih sekali sekala, mungkin disebabkan oleh cetakan timbul yang dalam, dan kurang lincah berbanding bola keranjang kulit.

src: On November 13, Torontoians will be heading to the polls to vote for their ward's councillor and for mayor.
ref: Pada 13 November, rakyat Toronto akan menuju ke pemilihan untuk membuang undi untuk ahli majlis wad mereka dan untuk Datuk Bandar.

src: This ward's candidates include Francis Ahinful, Ted Berger, Anthony Caputo, Suzan Hall (incumbent), Andre Lucas, Rosemarie Mulhall, Brian Prevost, and Sonali Verma.
ref: Calon wad ini termasuk Francis Ahinful, Ted Berger, Anthony Caputo, Suzan Hall (penyandang), Andre Lucas, Rosemarie Mulhall, Brian Prevost dan Sonali Verma.

src: For more information on the election, read Toronto municipal election, 2006.
ref: Untuk maklumat lanjut mengenai pilihan raya, baca pilihan raya perbandaran Toronto, 2006.

src: The Caledonia land dispute has been going on since February 28 and still has not been resolved.
ref: Pertikaian tanah Caledonia telah berlaku sejak 28 Februari dan masih belum diselesaikan.

src: The native protesters occupied the Douglas Creek Estates, a housing development, southwest of Hamilton, saying that the property belongs to them.
ref: Penunjuk perasaan asli menduduki Douglas Creek Estates, sebuah pembangunan perumahan, barat daya Hamilton, mengatakan bahawa tanah itu adalah milik mereka.

src: "I certainly don't expect that there will be lawbreaking that isn't dealt with and that will be my message to our people as well, that it's their duty and responsibility is to enforce the laws," said OPP Commissioner Julian Fantino, on his first official day on the job.
ref: "Saya sudah pasti tidak menjangkakan bahawa akan ada pelanggaran undang-undang yang tidak diuruskan dan yang juga akan menjadi mesej saya kepada orang ramai, bahawa mereka bertanggungjawab untuk menguatkuasakan undang-undang," kata Pesuruhjaya OPP Julian Fantino, pada hari rasmi pertama beliau di tempat kerja.

src: While under former commissioner Gwen Boniface, who resigned last year because of the dispute, the OPP were criticised for not enforcing the law, especially when several camera people were assaulted by native protesters.
ref: Manakala di bawah bekas Pesuruhjaya Gwen Boniface, yang meletakkan jawatan tahun lalu kerana pertikaian itu, OPP telah dikritik kerana tidak menguatkuasakan undang-undang, terutamanya apabila beberapa orang kamera diserang oleh penunjuk perasaan asli.

src: Fantino said the on-going occupation of a property by members of the Six Nations Reserve is beyond his ability to resolve.
ref: Fantino berkata pendudukan berterusan sebuah rumah oleh ahli-ahli Rizab Enam Bangsa adalah di luar kemampuannya untuk menyelesaikannya.

src: Officials in Ontario and the federal governments are currently negotiating with Six Nations representatives.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai di Ontario dan kerajaan persekutuan sedang berunding dengan wakil-wakil Enam Bangsa.

src: The strike has affected a very large area in New Delhi including major markets in Rohini, Chandani Chowk, Karol Bagh and south extension of Delhi.
ref: Mogok itu telah memberi kesan kepada kawasan yang sangat besar di New Delhi termasuk pasaran utama dalam Rohini, Chandani Chowk, Karol Bagh dan lanjutan selatan Delhi.

src: A group of traders met the union urban development minister S Jaipal Reddy to air their grievances about the government's response towards the MCD's sealing drive.
ref: Sekumpulan peniaga bertemu dengan kesatuan menteri pembangunan bandar S Jaipal Reddy untuk menyuarakan rasa tidak puas hati mereka mengenai tindak balas kerajaan terhadap memandu kedap MCD.

src: Traders also met Delhi Chief minister Sheila Dikshit to submit a memorandum calling for an end to the sealing drive.
ref: Peniaga juga bertemu Ketua Delhi Menteri Sheila Dikshit untuk menyerahkan memorandum menggesa menamatkan memandu kedap.

src: The Bank rate and the cash reserve ratio are left unchanged at 6% and 5% respectively.
ref: Kadar Bank dan nisbah rizab tunai masing-masing ditinggalkan tidak berubah pada 6% dan 5%.

src: The Reserve Bank estimated real GDP growth in the first quarter of 2006-07 at 8.9%, up from 8.5% last year.
ref: Rizab Bank menjangkakan kenaikan GDP sebenar dalam suku pertama 2006-07 sebanyak 8.9%, meningkat dari 8.5% pada tahun lepas.

src: Also those with mental illnesses are advised to steer clear of the pills.
ref: Juga mereka yang menghidap penyakit mental adalah dinasihatkan untuk mengelakkan pengambilan pil.

src: "If people insist on taking the pills, they should make sure they stick to the manufacturer's recommended dose, of one or two pills, and not combine them with other stimulants."
ref: "Jika seseorang tekad untuk mengambil pil itu, mereka perlu memastikan mereka berpegang kepada dos yang disyorkan pengilang, iaitu satu atau dua pil, dan tidak menggabungkan mereka dengan perangsang yang lain".

src: A study done at the Christchurch Hospital has shown that 61 patients had been to the emergency department a total of 80 times.
ref: Satu kajian yang dilakukan di Hospital Christchurch telah menunjukkan bahawa 61 pesakit telah ke jabatan kecemasan sebanyak 80 kali.

src: The pills are often sold as "herbal highs" but according to Boswell, there is nothing "herbal" about them as they were first made to treat cattle that had worms.
ref: Pil sering dijual sebagai "herba khayal" tetapi menurut Boswell, tiada apa yang "herba" tentangnya kerana ia pada mulanya dibuat untuk merawat lembu yang mempunyai cacing.

src: Boswell said: "Further research on the effects of BZP is soon to be released by the Health Minister," as the New Zealand government is debating whether or not they should be banned or have their sale restricted.
ref: Boswell berkata: "Kajian lanjut mengenai kesan BZP tidak lama lagi akan dikeluarkan oleh Menteri Kesihatan," kerana kerajaan New Zealand membahaskan sama ada mereka perlu diharamkan atau menghadkan jualan.

src: Wellington, New Zealand, airport has denied supporters of New Zealand's National party to use its land for its newest billboard advertising.
ref: Wellington, New Zealand, lapangan terbang telah menafikan penyokong parti Kebangsaan New Zealand untuk menggunakan tanahnya untuk pengiklanan papan iklan terbarunya.

src: Bill English, National member, said: "Vicious attacks on critics by Helen Clark and her Labour-led Government have led to Wellington Airport turning down a National Party billboard as it was too politically sensitive."
ref: Rang Undang-Undang Inggeris, ahli Parti Kebangsaan, berkata: "Serangan ganas atas pengkritik oleh Helen Clark dan Kerajaan yang dipimpin Parti Buruh telah mendorong Lapangan Terbang Wellington untuk menolak permohonan papan iklan Parti Kebangsaan kerana ia terlalu sensitif dari segi politik".

src: However the sign has been put up in Auckland, State Highway 20 and on Christchurch's Main North Road.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun tanda itu telah diletak di Auckland, Lebuhraya Negeri 20 dan on Jalan Utama Utara Christchurch.

src: "The billboards are being paid for from party funds and highlight the scandals and controversies that have surrounded Helen Clark during her time as Prime Minister."
ref: "Papan iklan itu sedang dibayar daripada dana parti dan menyerlahkan skandal dan kontroversi yang mengelilingi Helen Clark semasa beliau menjadi Perdana Menteri".

src: "The airport company has every right to decide who advertises on airport property, but last year Wellington Airport accepted billboards critical of the Government," English said.
ref: "Syarikat lapangan terbang itu mempunyai hak untuk memutuskan siapa untuk beriklan di atas hartanah lapangan terbang, tetapi tahun lepas Lapangan Terbang Wellington menerima papan iklan mengkritik pemerintah," kata English.

src: The billboard states on it: "painter-gate, corn-gate, doone-gate, speed-gate, pledge-gate and (next to an arrow) departure gate," all these words were accompanied by a picture of Helen Clark, PM, which slowly decreased in size.
ref: Papan iklan itu bertulis di atasnya: "painter-gate, corn-gate, doone-gate, speed-gate, pledge-gate and (bersebelahan dengn satu anak panah) departure gate," semua kata-kata ini disertai dengan gambar Helen Clark, PM, yang semakin kecil dalam saiz.

src: And then, at the bottom next to the National logo, it said: "Proudly paid for by supporters of the National Party - with their own money."
ref: Dan kemudian, di bahagian bawah bersebelahan dengan logo Kebangsaan, ia berkata: "Dengan bangganya dibayar oleh penyokong Parti Kebangsaan - dengan wang mereka sendiri".

src: Louise Murray, a spokesman for the airport, said: "The airport reserves the right to decline any advertising."
ref: Louise Murray, jurucakap lapangan terbang itu, berkata: "Lapangan terbang itu berhak untuk menolak sebarang pengiklanan".

src: "However, Wellington Airport, like everyone else, saw Helen Clark's assault on the Auditor-General and Labour's plans to legislate to stop people who don't belong to political parties criticizing the Government next election."
ref: "Bagaimanapun, Lapangan Terbang Wellington, seperti orang lain, menyaksikan serangan Helen Clark terhadap Ketua Audit Negara dan rancangan Parti Buruh untuk menggubal undang-undang untuk menghentikan orang-orang yang tidak tergolong dalam parti politik untuk mengkritik pilihan raya akan datang Kerajaan".

src: The virus also "spreads fast" and has covered a "big geographic region" according to Chinese health officials.
ref: Virus ini juga "merebak cepat" dan telah meliputi satu "kawasan geografi besar" menurut pegawai-pegawai kesihatan Cina.

src: It is not known how dangerous the new virus is and whether it is stronger or deadlier than the current H5N1 virus.
ref: Ia adalah tidak diketahui betapa bahayanya virus baru dan sama ada ia adalah lebih kuat atau lebih membawa maut daripada virus H5N1.

src: Despite being detected in humans, no evidence has turned up to suggest that the virus can be spread easily from human to human.
ref: Walaupun dikesan pada manusia, tiada bukti yang telah hadir untuk mencadangkan bahawa virus ini boleh merebak dengan mudah dari manusia kepada manusia.

src: "This virus seemed to spread very fast over a big geographic region."
ref: "Virus ini seolah-olah untuk merebak dengan pantas di rantau geografi yang besar."

src: "However, we don't have any evidence to show whether this virus is more dangerous or less dangerous than any other H5N1 viruses," said State Key Laboratory of Emerging Infectious Diseases at the University of Hong Kong in China director, Yi Guan.
ref: "Bagaimanapun, kita tidak mempunyai apa-apa bukti untuk menunjukkan sama ada virus ini adalah lebih berbahaya atau kurang berbahaya daripada apa-apa virus H5N1," kata Negeri Makmal Utama Emerging Penyakit Berjangkit di Universiti Hong Kong di pengarah China, Yi Guan.

src: The strain was discovered during April and June of 2006 in China's Fujian Province when Guan's team examined ducks, chickens, geese and other birds at a market in the province.
ref: Stren itu ditemui semasa April dan Jun 2006 di Wilayah Fujian China apabila pasukan Guan diperiksa itik, ayam, angsa dan burung lain di sebuah pasar di wilayah itu.

src: Of the over 10,000 Internet users who participated in the survey, only 66% said they were either satisfied or very satisfied with their current ISP.
ref: Dari lebih 10,000 pengguna Internet yang terlibat di dalam kaji selidik ini, hanya 66% yang mengatakan mereka sama ada berpuas hati atau amat berpuas hati dengan ISP sekarang.

src: The reason, according to the Consumers' Institute, is because of national ISP, Xtra dragging down the ratings.
ref: Puncanya, menurut Institut Pengguna, adalah kerana ISP kebangsaaan, Xtra yang menyebabkan rating menurun.

src: The best ISP, as voted by the survey respondents, was Inspire, the third consecutive time they have won.
ref: ISP terbaik, yang dipilih responden kaji selidik, adalah Inspire, yang kali ketiga berturut-turut menang.

src: 97% of Inspire's users said that its performance was either good or very good.
ref: 97% pengguna Inspire berkata prestasinya adalah sama ada bagus atau amat bagus.

src: David Russel, chief executive of the Consumers' Institute, said: "The wonderful world of cyberspace has a long way to go in New Zealand in terms of providing customer satisfaction."
ref: David Russel, ketua eksekutif Institut Pengguna, berkata: "Ruang siber yang mengagumkan masih mempunyai jalan yang panjang di New Zealand bagi memberikan kepuasan kepada pelanggan".

src: Providers must sharpen up on their advertising and improve the performance of their service desks.
ref: Pembekal mesti menambahkan pengiklanan dan meningkatkan prestasi meja servis mereka.

src: "Broadband speed and the price people are paying are the biggest bones of contention."
ref: "Kelajuan jalur lebar dan harga yang dibayar orang ramai menjadi perebutan terbesar".

src: Mr. Russell added: "Support, both online and offline is a key factor in satisfaction with your ISP."
ref: Encik Russell menambah: "Sokongan, kedua-dua di dalam talian dan luar talian adalah satu faktor utama yang membawa kepuasan kepada ISP anda".

src: The New Zealand government has now introduced graphic health warnings on cigarette packs.
ref: Kerajaan New Zealand telah memperkenalkan gambar amaran kesihatan pada pek rokok.

src: The new warnings will cover 30% of the front side and 90% of the back.
ref: Amaran baru akan meliputi 30% daripada bahagian depan dan 90% daripada bahagian belakang.

src: The new warnings will come into effect January 2007 but the manufacturers will not have to produce the new warnings until February 27, 2008 and retailers have till August 2008 to clear all their old stock.
ref: Amaran baru akan berkuat kuasa Januari 2007 tetapi pengeluar tidak wajib untuk mengeluarkan amaran baru sehingga 27 Feb 2008 dan peniaga mempunyai masa hingga Ogos 2008 untuk membersihkan semua stok lama mereka.

src: Actually seeing what it does to you is probably more acute than just reading the words on a cigarette packet.
ref: Sebenarnya melihat apa yang ia lakukan terhadap anda mungkin lebih berkesan daripada hanya membaca perkataan pada paket rokok.

src: The approach is designed to shock people into realising smoking kills and causes serious illness.
ref: Pendekatan ini direka untuk mengejutkan orang tentang bahaya merokok dan ia menyebabkan penyakit yang serius.

src: Chris Laurenson, Health Ministry team leader national drug policy, said that international evidence was strong.
ref: Chris Laurenson, ketua pasukan Kementerian Kesihatan polisi dadah kebangsaan, berkata bahawa bukti antarabangsa adalah kukuh.

src: "That was confirmed by research in New Zealand which supported the effectiveness of pictorial labelling."
ref: "Itu telah disahkan oleh penyelidikan di New Zealand yang menyokong keberkesanan pelabelan bergambar".

src: However, according to Mr O'Conner, one company had used removable sticker that were later removed due to consultation.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, menurut Encik O'Conner, satu syarikat telah menggunakan pelekat boleh tanggal yang kemudiannya dikeluarkan selepas perundingan.

src: The industries will not be reimbursed for any cost that may occur.
ref: Industri tidak akan dibayar balik untuk apa-apa kos yang mungkin berlaku.

src: "They have already been implemented in other countries and the NZ tobacco industry has the technology to print the new packets within weeks," Becky Freeman, the Action on Smoking and Health director said.
ref: "Ia telah dilaksanakan di negara-negara lain dan industri tembakau NZ mempunyai teknologi untuk mencetak paket baru dalam beberapa minggu," kata Becky Freeman, Pengarah Tindakan Terhadap Perokok dan Kesihatan.

src: It is reported that Margaret Beckett, UK Foreign Secretary, is considering becoming the first UK Government Minister to admit to a link between the invasion of Iraq and the threat of terrorism in UK.
ref: Telah dilaporkan bahawa Margaret Beckett, Setiausaha Luar UK, sedang mempertimbangkan untuk menjadi Menteri Kerajaan UK pertama yang mengaku tentang hubungan antara serangan ke atas Iraq dan ancaman keganasan di UK.

src: Prime Minister Tony Blair has always claimed that the war in Iraq has not fuelled terrorism in UK; that there was terrorism long before the invasion.
ref: Perdana Menteri Tony Blair sentiasa berkata bahawa perang di Iraq tidak mendorong keganasan di UK; bahawa terdapat keganasan lama sebelum pencerobohan itu.

src: Beckett is considering admitting the link between Iraq and terrorism in UK when discussing the problem of Muslim youth becoming influenced by international terrorists.
ref: Beckett sedang mempertimbangkan pengakuan hubungan antara Iraq dan keganasan di UK apabila membincangkan masalah belia Islam yang semakin dipengaruhi oleh pengganas antarabangsa.

src: She has already disagreed openly with Prime Minister Blair recently by demanding that there be public debate into the need for the replacement of the Trident missile system and the Royal Navy's Vanguard class submarines, by apologising for the Iraq invasion and by not disagreeing with General Sir Richard Dannatt, who said that British troops in Iraq were provoking trouble.
ref: Dia telah tidak bersetuju secara terbuka dengan Perdana Menteri Blair baru-baru ini dengan menuntut bahawa ada perbahasan awam terhadap keperluan untuk penggantian sistem peluru berpandu Trident dan kapal selam kelas Vanguard Tentera Laut Diraja, dengan meminta maaf atas pencerobohan di Iraq dan dengan tidak tidak bersetuju dengan Jeneral Sir Richard Dannatt, yang berkata, tentera Britain di Iraq telah membangkitkan masalah.

src: Consistent with the town traditions in the East Sussex county of England, effigies of various figures were carried through the town, and later burnt.
ref: Selaras dengan tradisi pekan di daerah East Sussex England, patung-patung ukiran pelbagai bentuk telah diarakkan melalui bandar, dan kemudian dibakar.

src: As per tradition and local fame, effigies were carried through the town and burned on huge fires.
ref: Mengikuti tradisi dan kemasyhuran tempatan, patung-patung itu telah diarakkan melalui bandar dan dibakar dengan api kuat.

src: These include The Pope, Guy Fawkes and other unpopular figures.
ref: Ini termasuk Paus, Guy Fawkes dan mereka yang tidak dikenali ramai.

src: One of this year's unfortunate guest appearances was also rendered as a hugely grotesque likeness of the U.S. Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice.
ref: Salah satu penampilan tetamu malang tahun ini juga telah dikatakan sebagai sangat mirip Setiausaha Negara Amerika Syarikat Condoleezza Rice yang aneh.

src: The unflattering effigy clutched a tattered U.S. flag in one hand, and a miniature Tony Blair in the other.
ref: Patung yang tidak cantik itu memegang bendera A.S. yang koyak dalam satu tangan, dan patung kecil Tony Blair di satu tangan lagi.

src: This year's enemies included British Transport Police, whose attitude and handling of Bonfire night is an issue of local contention.
ref: Musuh pada tahun ini termasuklah Polis Pengangkutan British, yang sikap dan pengendalian malam unggun api menjadi isu perbalahan tempatan.

src: Transport police were quietly represented by a pig head wearing a police helmet.
ref: Polis Pengangkutan telah secara senyap-senyap diwakili oleh kepala babi yang memakai topi keledar polis.

src: Six arrests occurred in respect of criminal damage and public order offences, but the event was less rowdy than in previous years and eras in the history of the Bonfire.
ref: Enam tangkapan berlaku berkenaan dengan kerosakan jenayah dan kesalahan ketenteraman awam, tetapi acara itu kurang hiruk-pikuk berbanding tahun dan era sebelumnya dalam sejarah unggun api.

src: Superintendent Cliff Parrot of the Sussex Police said, "The event passed safely and was a resounding success with fewer arrests than last year, People were well behaved and acted responsibly, which in turn allowed everyone else to enjoy the celebrations."
ref: Pegawai Penguasa Polis Sussex Cliff Parrot berkata, "Acara ini berlangsung dengan selamat dan merupakan satu kejayaan yang membanggakan dengan kurang tangkapan berbanding tahun lepas, orang ramai juga berkelakuan baik dan bertindak secara bertanggungjawab, yang membolehkan orang lain untuk menikmati keraian itu".

src: The steep streets of the small town, located one hour south of London, were filled during the chilly winter evening with crowds carrying burning torches, with police, and with alcohol consumption accompanied by loud deafening bangs.
ref: Jalan pekan kecil yang curam, yang terletak satu jam di selatan London, telah dipenuhi pada malam musim sejuk yang sejuk dengan orang ramai membawa obor membakar, bersama polis, dan dengan penggunaan alkohol disertai dengan gendang kuat yang memekakkan telinga.

src: In addition to effigies, flaming crosses were carried in recognition of the town's 17 Protestant Martyrs.
ref: Selain patung, salib-salib yang menyala telah diarakkan bagi mengiktiraf 17 Syahid Protestan pekan ini.

src: These preceded elaborate costumed parades where participants dressed as Vikings, Antique firemen, Mongol warriors, and Zulus (including for the first time at Lewes, a female chieftain).
ref: Ini mendahului perarakan berkostum beradun di mana peserta berpakaian seperti Vikings, ahli bomba Antik, pahlawan Mongol, dan Zulu (termasuk buat pertama kali di Lewes, seorang ketua suku kaum wanita).

src: Polling places opened at 13:00 UTC (8:00 AM EST) this morning in Palm Beach County, Florida for the United States midterm elections.
ref: Tempat mengundi untuk pilihanraya pertengahan penggal telah dibuka pada jam 13:00 UTC (8:00AM EST) pagi ini di Palm Beach County, Florida.

src: Early voters wreaked havoc on the city streets, causing backups near polling locations and interrupting traffic flows to area elementary and senior high schools.
ref: Pengundi awal telah membuat kekecohan di jalan-jalan menyebabkan polis bantuan diletakkan berdekatan kawasan undi dan ini menganggu aliran lalu lintas ke kawasan sekolah rendah dan sekolah tinggi.

src: Due to the increase in traffic, some area school administrations asked teachers to accept late students without reprimand.
ref: Disebabkan oleh kesesakan lalu lintas, pengurusan sekolah di beberapa kawasan meminta guru-guru menerima pelajar pelajar yang lambat tiba tanpa teguran.

src: When the host was calling up the Country Music Award Female Vocalist Of The Year award, Faith Hill stood up and was in shock after hearing Carrie Underwood's name.
ref: Apabila hos telah mengumumkan Anugerah Vokalis Wanita Terbaik bagi muzik country, Faith Hill berdiri dan sungguh terkejut selepas mendengar nama Carrie Underwood.

src: !, said Faith Hill directly into the camera as her smile turned into a look of shock.
ref: , Kata Faith Hill terus ke kamera dengan senyumannya bertukar menjadi satu rupa kejutan.

src: The idea that I would act disrespectful towards a fellow musician is unimaginable to me, Hill said in a statement.
ref: Idea bahawa saya akan bertindak tidak hormat terhadap rakan pemuzik tidak dapat dibayangkan pada saya, Hill berkata dalam satu kenyataan.

src: For this to become a focus of attention given the talent gathered is utterly ridiculous.
ref: Untuk ini menjadi tumpuan disebabkan bakat yang ada adalah sama sekali tidak masuk akal.

src: She didn't realize that the camera was rolling the whole time.
ref: Dia tidak sedar bahawa kamera sedang merakam sepanjang masa.

src: She just thought they were doing a shot when they read the nominees off.
ref: Dia hanya berfikir yang mereka sedang membuat rakaman ketika mereka membaca senarai pencalonan.

src: Gary Borman, Hill's manager, said that it was just "a joke".
ref: Gary Borman, pengurus Hill, berkata bahawa ia adalah sekadar "satu jenaka".

src: Williams had a variety show on television called "The Andy Williams Show" from 1962 to 1967 and 1969 to 1971.
ref: Williams mempunyai rancangan aneka ragam di televisyen bertajuk "Andy Williams Show" dari 1962 hingga 1967 dan 1969 hingga 1971.

src: 40th President of the United States Ronald Reagan said Williams' voice was "a national treasure".
ref: Presiden ke-40 Amerika Syarikat Ronald Reagan berkata suara Williams adalah "khazanah negara."

src: Williams was born Howard Andrew Williams on December 3, 1927 in Wall Lake, Iowa.
ref: Williams dilahirkan dengan nama Howard Andrew Williams pada 3 Disember 1927 di Wall Lake, Iowa.

src: His older brothers Robert, Donald, and Richard and he formed the Williams Brothers, a singing quartet.
ref: Abang beliau Robert, Donald, dan Richard dan dia membentuk Williams Brothers, satu nyanyian kuartet.

src: He married Claudine Longet in 1961 and they divorced in 1975.
ref: Beliau berkahwin dengan Claudine Longet pada tahun 1961 dan mereka bercerai pada tahun 1975.

src: The vote was 72-49 with the noes as the majority, a conscience vote is where the individual Member of Parliament (MP) votes instead of the party and their policies.
ref: Undian adalah sebanyak 72-49 dengan tidak sebagai majoriti, undian suara hati di mana Ahli Parlimen (MP) secara individu mengundi tanpa mengira parti dan polisi mereka.

src: The bill was brought before Parliament with the intent of placing the drinking age back at 20 following its lowering to 18 in 1999.
ref: Undang-undang tersebut telah dibawa ke Parlimen dengan niat untuk meletakkan umur peminum kembali kepada 20 tahun yang kemudian diikuti penurunan kepada 18 tahun pada tahun 1999.

src: It was first drafted by Matt Robson of the NZ Progressive Party, and was then taken on by Martin Gallagher from the New Zealand Labour Party.
ref: Ia pertama kali dicadangkan oleh Matt Robson bagi Parti Progresif NZ, dan kemudiannya diambil oleh Martin Gallagher dari Parti Buruh New Zealand.

src: However, the Labour-led government is being attacked for interfering with the liquor purchase age bill.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kerajaan Buruh yang meneraju telah diserang kerana mencampuri undang-undang umur pembelian minuman keras.

src: Before the debate on the bill, two ministers who are against raising the age, justice minister Mark Burton and associate health minister, Damien O'Conner both announced that they would fully review the sale/supply of liquor to people below the age of 18, regardless of whether the bill were passed or not.
ref: Sebelum perdebatan ke atas undang-undang, dua menteri yang mana menentang kenaikan had umur, menteri keamanan, Mark Burton dan timbalan menteri kesihatan, Damien O'Conner, kedua-duanya mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan mengkaji sepenuhnya penjualan/pembekalan minuman keras kepada mereka yang berusia 18 tahun, tanpa mengambil kira samada undang-undang itu diluluskan atau tidak.

src: Leader of Jim Anderton's Progressive coalition and supporter of the bill, Jim Anderton, said: "Making a last-minute plea to MPs is not to be fooled by the promise of the unnecessary review."
ref: Ketua kepada gabungan Progresif Jim Anderton dan penyokong kepada undang-undang tersebut, Jim Anderton, berkata: "Membuat pengakuan di saat akhir kepada MP bukanlah untuk diperbodohkan oleh janji kepada ulasan yang tidak diperlukan."

src: "This is the review you have when you want to give parliamentarians a soft option."
ref: "Ini merupakan ulasan yang kamu peroleh apabila anda mahu memberi ahli-ahli parlimen pilihan yang lembut."

src: "And I hear that sigh of relief in many places, 'oh gosh you've got a review so we don't have to make a hard decision'."
ref: "Dan saya mendengar keluhan kelegaan di banyak tempat, 'oh tuhan kamu telah menerima ulasan jadi kami tidak perlu untuk membuat keputusan yang sukar'."

src: "Well this is the place for hard decisions and this is where the buck stops."
ref: "Ini adalah tempat untuk suatu keputusan yang sukar dan ini adalah di mana tanggungjawab terhenti."

src: Christopher Bishop, a spokesman for the Keep it 18 campaign, said: "We welcome the Government's moves to review the supply of alcohol to minors in the likely event that the Sale of Liquor Amendment Bill is defeated today."
ref: Christopher Bishop, jurucakap kepada kempen Keep it 18, berkata: "Kami mengalukan kedatangan gerakan Kerajaan untuk membuat kajian pembekalan alkohol kepada minor dalam acara yang mana Pindaan Undang-Undang Jualan Minuman Keras itu dikalahkan hari ini."

src: "Raising the drinking age is never going to work as a way of dealing with New Zealand's drinking culture."
ref: "Menaikkan had usia meminum tidak akan berjaya hingga bila-bila dengan cara pengendalian budaya minum warga New Zealand."

src: Chester Burrows, National MP, said: "My experience is I've seen too many pissed young people, raped young people, assaulted young people."
ref: Chester Burrows, MP Nasional, berkata: "Pengalaman saya melihat terlalu ramai orang muda yang mabuk, merogol yang muda, menyerang orang muda."

src: Gordon Copeland, United Future MP, who also preferred the split age, said he had "no doubt the move would influence the way people voted."
ref: Gordon Copeland, MP Kesatuan Masa Hadapan, yang juga memilih untuk jarak usia, berkata beliau "tidak mempunyai kesangsian terhadap pergerakan yang akan mempengaruhi cara mereka mengundi."

src: "We can at least let this bill go through to the next stage."
ref: "Kita akan sekurang-kurangnya melepaskan undang-undang ini untuk melalui peringkat yang akan datang."

src: Ross Bell, spokesman for the Drug Foundation, said: "Not only is such a review too narrow, it also seemed to pre-empt the outcome of Wednesday's debate."
ref: Ross Bell, jurucakap kepada Yayasan Dadah, berkata: "Bukan hanya kajian itu yang terlalu sempit, ia juga kelihatan seperti keputusan kegagalan awal kepada perdebatan pada hari Rabu."

src: "A cynical person might think the announcement gave MPs an excuse not to support the bill."
ref: "Orang yang sinis mungkin berfikir bahawa pengumuman tersebut memberi MP alasan untuk menyokong undang-undang tersebut."

src: However it has been suggested by the select committee previously researching the drinking problem in New Zealand that there is little hard evidence 18 & 19 year olds are buying alcohol for minors, with the largest problem instead being the purchasing of alcohol by parents for their children.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, ia telah dicadangkan oleh komiti terpilih yang sebelum ini menjalankan kajian semula tentang masalah minuman keras di New Zealand dan terdapat sedikit bukti kasar di mana 18 & 19 tahun membeli alkohol untuk minor, dengan masalah terbesar selain itu adalah pembelian alkohol oleh ibu bapa kepada anak-anak.

src: A 73-year old retired pastor, Reverend Roland Weisselberg, burned himself alive during Reformation Day services on Tuesday]in Erfurt, Germany.
ref: Paderi bersara berusia 73 tahun, Reverend Roland Weisselberg, membakar dirinya hidup-hidup semasa servis Hari Reformasi pada Selasa di Erfurt, Jerman.

src: His self-immolation was apparently in protest against the spread of Islam, which he felt the Protestant church should take more seriously.
ref: Pengorbanan dirinya adalah jelasnya dalam bantahan terhadap penyebaran Islam, yang dirasakannya gereja Protestant sepatutnya mengambil lebih serius.

src: His last words were "Jesus and Oskar,", believed to a reference to Oskar Bruesewitz, a priest who burned himself alive to protest the Communist government of East Germany.
ref: Perkataan terakhirnya adalah "Jesus dan Oskar", dipercayai merujuk kepada Oskar Bruesewitz, paderi yang membakar dirinya hidup-hidup untuk menentang kerajaan Komunis di Jerman Timur.

src: Rev.
ref: Rev.

src: Weisselberg had lived under Communism in East Germany, and had been a publisher in his former vocation.
ref: Wiesselberg telah hidup dibawah komunisme di Jerman Timur, dah telah menjadi penerbit dalam kerjaya lamanya.

src: Weisselberg's self-immolation, stressing that Christians could not accept a "clash of cultures".
ref: Weisselberg, menekankan yang Kristian tidak boleh menerima "konflik budaya".

src: He confessed that the issue of Islam had been sidelined within the Church and was only spoken about in private.
ref: Dia mengaku yang isu mengenai Islam telah ditolak tepi didalam Gereja dan hanya dibicarakan secara sulit.

src: There were few Muslims there with whom they could engage in dialogue, Noack said.
ref: Terdapat sejumlah kecil penganut Islam disana yang dapat mereka libatkan dalam dialog, kata Noack.

src: Chicago peace activist and musician Malachi Ritscher burned himself alive Friday morning (Nov. 3, 2006) on the Kennedy Expressway, apparently in protest of the Iraq war.
ref: Aktivis keamanan dan pemuzik dari Chicago, Malachi Ritscher membakar dirinya hidup-hidup pada pagi Jumaat (3 Nov 2006) di Lebuhraya Kennedy, jelasnya sebagai bantahan terhadap perang Iraq.

src: Police found a homemade sign near his body which said "Thou Shalt Not Kill."
ref: Polis menemui satu tanda buatan sendiri di badannya yang berkata "Awak Tidak Patut Membunuh".

src: Before the act, he posted a suicide note on his website.
ref: Sebelum kelakuan itu, dia memaparkan nota bunuh diri di laman webnya.

src: Palance is survived by his second wife, Elaine Rogers Palance; his daughter, Holly; another daughter, Brook Palance Wilding; grandchildren Lily and Spencer Spottiswoode and Tarquin Wilding; his brother, John Palance, and sister Anne Despiva.
ref: Palance meninggalkan isteri keduanya, Elaine Rogers Palance, anak perempuannya, Holly; anak perempuannya yang lain, Brook Palance Wilding, cucu Lily dan Spencer Spottiswoode dan Tarquin Wilding; abangnya, John Palance, dan kakak Anne Despiva.

src: A memorial service for him is planned for December 16.
ref: Upacara peringatan untuk beliau dirancangkan pada 16 Disember.

src: He also played the role of the Oscar- nominated Jack Wilson in "Shane".
ref: Beliau juga pernah memainkan watak untuk Oscar- dicalonkan Jack Wilson dalam "Shane".

src: The program has been used to manage the large case load which has accumulated since the September 11, 2001 attacks, leaving US officials free to concentrate on the "high value" suspects who are kept under US control at secret locations throughout the world.
ref: Program ini telah digunakan untuk menguruskan beban kes besar yang terkumpul sejak serangan 11 September, 2001, meninggalkan pegawai AS bebas untuk menumpukan perhatian terhadap suspek "bernilai tinggi" yang disimpan di bawah penguasaan AS di lokasi rahsia seluruh dunia.

src: Today, US officials were reluctant to defend this policy for any specific cases, but White House spokesman Dan Bartlett presented a generic defense of US anti-terrorism policies on Sunday talk shows in the United States.
ref: Kini, pegawai AS enggan untuk mempertahankan polisi ini bagi kes-kes tertentu, tetapi jurucakap Rumah Putih Dan Bartlett menyampaikan polisi pertahanan berketurunan anti-keganasan AS dalam rancangan bual Ahad di Amerika Syarikat.

src: A former government official claimed that the program was "fully authorized" and that the CIA was "not doing anything illegal" in an interview with The New York Times, and said that the leadership of the House and Senate intelligence committees was able to find out about the program, or had been informed of its existence.
ref: Bekas pegawai kerajaan mendakwa bahawa program tersebut "disahkan sepenuhnya" dan CIA "tidak melakukan sebarang akticiti haram" dalam satu temubual dengan The New York Times, dan berkata bahawa kemimpinan Dewan dan Senat jawatankuasa penyelidikan mengetahui tentang program tersebut, atau telah diberitahu tentang kewujudannya.

src: Allowing the CIA to have so much power in deciding who can stay in the country and who is shipped off to other countries is controversial, because in the past, the White House, State Department, or Justice Department would have been involved in approving individual cases of sending prisoners to other countries.
ref: Membenarkan CIA untuk memperoleh kuasa dalam menentukan siapa yang boleh tinggal di dalam negara dan siapa yang dihantar ke luar negara menimbulkan kontroversi, kerana sebelum ini, Rumah Putih, Jabatan Negara, atau Jabatan Kehakiman yang akan terlibat dalam meluluskan kes-kes individu dalam menghatar banduan ke negara-negara lain.

src: While refusing to admit that the rendition policy even exists, the Bush administration claimed that they do not hand over people to be tortured in other countries, to get around US laws which prohibit such practices.
ref: Sementara enggan mengakui bahawa polisi pembawaan tersebut wujud, pentadbiran Bush mendakwa bahawa mereka tidak menyerahkan orang untuk diseksa di negara-negara lain, bagi mengelakkan undang-undang AS yang menghalang perbuatan tersebut.

src: The case of Australian Mamdouh Habib attracted widespread attention in that country, after he was released in January after 40 months, without any charges being pressed.
ref: Kes warga Australia Mamdouh Habib menarik perhatian orang ramai dalam negara tersebut, selepas dia dilepaskan pada Januari selepas 40 bulan, tanpa sebarang tuduhan dilakukan.

src: Australian officials were aware that he had been transferred by the United States to Egypt for six months.
ref: Pegawai Australia menyedari bahawa dia telah dipindahkan oleh Amerika Syarikat ke Mesir selama enam bulan.

src: The United States denies that Habib was tortured with their knowledge, although US officials were not present during his overseas captivity and could not guarantee that he had not been tortured.
ref: Amerika Syarikat menafikan bahawa Habib diseksa sepanjang pengetahuan mereka, walaubagaimanapun pegawai AS tidak berada bersama semasa tawananya di luar negara dan tidak mampu memberi jaminan bahawa dia tidak diseksa.

src: A similar case involving Syrian born Canadian Maher Arar, deported to Syria in October, 2002, subsequently held and allegedly tortured for 374 days, led to Canada issuing a travel advisory strongly cautioning Canadians born in Iraq, Iran, Syria, Libya and Sudan against travel to the United States for any reason.
ref: Satu kes yang serupa melibatkan warga Kanada yang dilahirkan di Syria Maher Arar, dihantar pulang ke Syria pada Oktober, 2002, seterusnya ditahan dan didakwa diseksa selama 374 hari, membawa kepada Kanada untuk mengeluarkan nasihat perjalanan kepada sebarang warga Kanada yang dilahirkan di Iraq, Iran, Syria, Libya dan Sudan untuk tidak ke Amerika Syarikat untuk sebab apa pun.

src: Mr. Arar's attempt to sue American Attorney-General John Ashcroft over the incident in January 2004 was dismissed when the US government invoked the rarely used "state secrets privilege", claiming that to go forward in open court would jeopardize intelligence, foreign policy, and national security interests.
ref: Cubaan Encik Arar untuk menyaman Peguam Amerika- General John Ashcroft berikutan insiden pada Januari 2004 ditolak apabila kerajaan AS melibatkan "keistimewaan rahsia negara" yang jarang digunakan, mendakwa bahawa pengkemukaan secara terus kepada mahkamah akan mengancam perisikan, dasar luar, dan kepentingan keselamatan negara.

src: Legal analysts point out that information obtained through the use of torture is useless in court proceedings, but US officials insist that the information obtained from such interrogations is still useful for their purposes, and that "it has resulted in the capture of terrorists."
ref: Penganalisis undang-undang menunjukkan bahawa maklumat yang diperoleh melalui penggunaan penyeksaan tidak berguna di prosiding mahkamah, tetapi pegawai AS bertegas mengatakan bahawa maklumat yang didapati melalui pemeriksaan tersebut masih berguna bagi tujuan mereka, dan ia "telah menunjukkan hasil dalam menangkap pengganas".

src: Nobel Laureate in Physics Hans Bethe died in his home in Ithaca, New York on March 6, 2005, according to Cornell University, where he was professor emeritus of physics.
ref: Penerima anugerah Nobel Fizik Hans Bethe meninggal dunia di rumahnya di Ithaca, New York pada 6 Mac 2005, menurut Universiti Cornell, di mana beliau merupakan profesor emeritus fizik.

src: Bethe, whose mother was Jewish, fled Germany in 1933 when the Nazi Party came to power.
ref: Bethe, yang ibunya orang Yahudi, melarikan diri dari Jerman pada tahun 1933 apabila Parti Nazi berkuasa.

src: Bethe moved first to England and in 1935 to the USA where he taught at Cornell University.
ref: Bethe mula-mulanya berpindah ke England dan pada tahun 1935 ke Amerika Syarikat di mana beliau mengajar di Universiti Cornell.

src: Between 1935 and 1938, he studied nuclear reactions and reaction cross sections.
ref: Antara tahun 1935 dan 1938, beliau telah mengkaji tindak balas nuklear dan tindak balas silang seksyen.

src: When Oppenheimer started the secret weapons design laboratory, Los Alamos, he appointed Bethe as Director of the Theoretical Division.
ref: Apabila Oppenheimer memulakan makmal reka bentuk senjata rahsia, Los Alamos, beliau melantik Bethe sebagai Pengarah Bahagian Teori.

src: Though he would see the project through to its end, in Bethe's account he was primarily hopeful that the weapon would be impossible to produce.
ref: Walaupun beliau akan melihat projek sehingga ke hujungnya, atas nama Bethe, beliau terutamanya berharap senjata itu akan mustahil untuk dihasilkan.

src: Among his many honors, Bethe received the Max Planck medal in 1955, and in 1961 he was awarded the Eddington Medal of the Royal Astronomical Society for his work in identifying the energy generating processes in stars.
ref: Antara anugerah-anugerah yang dimenanginya, Bethe menerima pingat Max Planck pada tahun 1955, dan pada tahun 1961 beliau dianugerahkan Eddington Medal of Royal Astronomical Society untuk kerja dalam mengenal pasti proses penjanaan tenaga dalam bintang.

src: In 1967, Bethe was awarded the Nobel Prize in Physics for his studies of the production of solar and stellar energy, stellar nucleosynthesis.
ref: Pada tahun 1967, Bethe telah dianugerahkan Hadiah Nobel dalam Fizik untuk pengajian pengeluaran solar dan tenaga najam, sintesis nuklear najam.

src: In 1995, at the age of 88, Bethe wrote an open letter calling on all scientists to "cease and desist" from working on any aspect of nuclear weapons development and manufacture.
ref: Pada tahun 1995, pada usia 88, Bethe menulis surat terbuka menyeru semua ahli-ahli sains untuk "berhenti dan berakhir" daripada bekerja di mana-mana aspek pembangunan senjata nuklear dan pembuatan.

src: The New York Mets baseball team has agreed to a 20-year sponsorship deal with financial house Citigroup for the team's new ballpark, now called CitiField.
ref: Pasukan besbol New York Mets telah bersetuju untuk perjanjian penajaan 20 tahun dengan rumah kewangan Citigroup untuk padang bola baru pasukan tersebut, yang kini dipanggil CitiField.

src: The deal, which includes stadium naming rights, is worth more than $20 million annually, according to a baseball official.
ref: Perjanjian tersebut, yang termasuk hak menamakan stadium, bernilai lebih dari $20 juta tahunan, menurut pegawai besbol.

src: This tops the approximately ten million annually the NFL's Houston Texans receive from Reliant Energy to call their home Reliant Stadium.
ref: Ini melebihi lebih kurang sepuluh juta tahunan yang diterima NFL Houston Texas dari Reliant Energy untuk memanggil rumah mereka Stadium Reliant.

src: Other commercial arrangements are part of the contract, the official said.
ref: Perjanjian komersial lain adalah sebahagian dari kontrak tersebut, kata pegawai tersebut.

src: Construction on the ballpark, next to the current stadium in Queens, New York, began last summer and is scheduled to be ready for the 2009 season.
ref: Pembinaan padang bola tersebut, bersebelahan stadium kini di Queens, New York, bermula musim panas lepas dan dijadualkan akan siap untuk musim 2009.

src: The announcement will be made Monday at a special ceremony that will be attended by New York Govener, George Pataki and New York City Mayor Michael Bloomberg.
ref: Pengumuman tersebut akan dibuat pada Isnin di upacara istimewa yang akan dihadiri oleh Gabenor New York, George Pataki dan Datuk Bandar Bandar New York Michael Bloomberg.

src: Citigroup is one of the world's largest full-service banks, with two hundred million customers in more than 100 countries.
ref: Citigroup adalah salah satu bank servis penuh terbesar dunia, dengan dua ratus juta pelanggan di lebih dari 100 negara.

src: Students in hundreds of schools around New Zealand are given NCEA (National Certificate of Educational Achievement) credits for simple, everyday tasks, an investigation by The New Zealand Herald on Sunday shows.
ref: Pelajar dalam beratus-ratus sekolah di seluruh New Zealand diberi NCEA (Sijil Pencapaian Pendidikan National) kredit untuk tugas yang mudah, setiap hari, menurut penyiasatan oleh The New Zealand Herald di rancangan Ahad.

src: One of the standards include coming to school on time and good behaviour for 20 days, it appears on the students records as: "Work and Study Skills: Demonstrate Care and Timeliness as an Employee".
ref: Salah satu standard termasuk datang ke sekolah tepat pada masa dan berkelakuan baik selama 20 hari, ia muncul dalam rekod pelajar sebagai: "Kerja dan Kemahiran Pengajian: Menunjukkan Penjagaan dan Ketepatan masa sebagai seorang pekerja".

src: Bill English, Member of Parliament for National and the education spokesman for National, said: "The easy credits demotivated students.
ref: Ahli Parlimen Negara dan jurucakap pendidikan untuk Negara, Bill English, berkata: "kredit mudah mengurang motivasi pelajar.

src: The standards are not made up by the school but are real standards written by the New Zealand Qualifications Authority (NZQA).
ref: Piawaian tidak disediakan oleh pihak sekolah tetapi adalah piawaian sebenar ditulis oleh Lembaga Kelayakan New Zealand (NZQA).

src: The chief executive of NZQA, Bali Haque, said: "Level one was absolutely basic and the delivery of unit standards was a developing process.
ref: Ketua eksekutif NZQA, Bali Haque, berkata: "Tahap satu adalah asas yang mutlak dan penghantaran piawaian unit adalah proses membangun.

src: The intention here is to recognise the learning that people have done, and give them credit for it."
ref: Niat di sini adalah untuk mengiktiraf pembelajaran yang dilalui orang, dan memberikan kredit untuk itu kepada mereka".

src: The school used one standard that was titled "Interpersonal Communications: Participate in a team or group to complete routine tasks," and all the student had to do was pick up rubbish in a group.
ref: Sekolah menggunakan satu piawaian yang bertajuk "Interpersonal Communications: Mengambil bahagian dalam pasukan atau kumpulan untuk menyelesaikan tugas-tugas rutin," dan semua pelajar hanya perlu mengambil sampah dalam satu kumpulan.

src: The dean of education at the University of Auckland, John Langley, said: "The other standards are meaningless.
ref: Dekan pendidikan di University of Auckland, John Langley, berkata: "Piawaian lain adalah tidak bermakna.

src: I turned 51 last week and I still can't gift wrap a parcel - and actually, it doesn't matter.
ref: Saya berumur 51 minggu lalu dan saya masih tidak dapat membalut hadiah - dan sebenarnya, ia tidak bermakna.

src: The authority needed to look at what the NCEA standards were and how they were applied."
ref: Pihak berkuasa diperlukan untuk melihat apa piawaian NCEA dan bagaimana ia telah digunakan".

src: "It is better to offer people those sorts of simple, unsophisticated qualifications than not to - as long as people understand the purpose," Mr Haque said.
ref: "Adalah lebih baik untuk menawarkan rakyat sesuatu kelayakan yang mudah, kurang canggih daripada tidak - selagi orang ramai memahami tujuannya," kata Encik Haque.

src: There are some very low-level unit standards which are extraordinarily easy to pass... For people with above-average or average abilities to be using those unit standards is absolute nonsense."
ref: Terdapat beberapa piawaian unit yang sangat tahap rendah yang luar biasa mudah untuk lulus... Bagi mereka yang mempunyai kebolehan melebihi purata atau purata untuk menggunakan piawaian unit tersebut adalah langsung tidak masuk akal".

src: Spokesman, Gilbert Peterson, for the employers and manufacturers association, said: "The titles of particular standards meant nothing to employers faced with a big grab bag of assessments.
ref: Jurucakap, Gilbert Peterson, bagi majikan dan pengeluar persatuan, berkata: "Tajuk piawaian tertentu tidak bermakna kepada majikan berhadapan dengan beg besar penilaian.

src: Getting credits for doing the washing or talking to your mate is just amazing.
ref: Mendapatkan kredit dengan membasuh atau bercakap dengan kawan adalah sangat luar biasa.

src: However Mr Haque said that he was confident employers would recognise the standards as basic, and that they were not misleading.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun Encik Haque berkata bahawa dia yakin majikan akan mengiktiraf piawaian sebagai asas, dan bahawa mereka tidak mengelirukan.

src: While insulin resistance, a characteristic of diabetes, is linked with neurodegeneration, the new finding provides a strong connection between diabetes and Alzheimer's disease.
ref: Walaupun rintangan insulin, ciri kencing manis, dikaitkan dengan kemerosotan saraf, penemuan baru menyediakan hubungan kuat antara kencing manis dan penyakit Alzheimer.

src: "What we found is that insulin is not just produced in the pancreas, but also in the brain," says study senior author Suzanne de la Monte of Rhode Island Hospital and Brown University Medical School.
ref: "Apa yang kita dapati adalah insulin tidak hanya dihasilkan dalam pankreas, tetapi juga di dalam otak," kata penulis kanan kajian dari Hospital Pulau Rhode dan Sekolah Perubatan Universiti Brown, Suzanne de la Monte.

src: "And we discovered that insulin and its growth factors, which are necessary for the survival of brain cells, contribute to the progression of Alzheimer's."
ref: "Dan kami mendapati bahawa insulin dan faktor-faktor pertumbuhan, yang diperlukan untuk sel-sel otak terus hidup, menyumbang kepada perkembangan Alzheimer".

src: Additionally, they determined that a drop in insulin production in the brain contributes to brain cell degeneration, a symptom of Alzheimer's.
ref: Selain itu, mereka berpendapat bahawa penurunan pengeluaran insulin di dalam otak menyumbang kepada kemerosotan sel otak, gejala Alzheimer.

src: These abnormalities do not correspond to type 1 or type 2 diabetes, but reflect a different and more complex disease process that originates in the CNS (central nervous system), the researchers report.
ref: Kecacatan ini tidak selari dengan diabetes jenis 1 atau jenis 2, tetapi mencerminkan proses penyakit yang berbeza dan lebih kompleks yang berasal di CNS (sistem saraf pusat), para penyelidik melaporkan.

src: Analysis of postmortem brain tissue also revealed that the proteins aren't produced at normal levels in human Alzheimer's sufferers.
ref: Analisis tisu otak dari bedah siasat juga mendapati bahawa protein tidak dikeluarkan pada paras normal oleh pesakit Alzheimer.

src: Insulin and IGF I were significantly reduced in the frontal cortex, hippocampus and hypothalamus—all areas affected by Alzheimer's—while not in the cerebellum, which is generally not affected by Alzheimer's.
ref: Insulin dan IGF I telah berkurangan di frontal korteks, hipokampus dan hipotalamus- semua kawasan yang terjejas kerana Alzheimer - manakala yang tidak dalam cerebellum, yang biasanya tidak terjejas akibat Alzheimer.

src: The study "opens the way for targeted treatment to the brain and changes the way we view Alzheimer's disease," says de la Monte.
ref: Kajian "membuka jalan bagi rawatan yang disasarkan ke otak dan mengubah cara kita melihat penyakit Alzheimer," kata de la Monte.

src: The research is reported in the Journal of Alzheimer's Disease.
ref: Kajian ini dilaporkan dalam Jurnal Penyakit Alzheimer.

src: Peruvians living near the site of a release of mercury are preparing to sue a U.S. mining company, announcing last Saturday that they will bring their case before a Denver judge.
ref: Orang Peru yang tinggal berhampiran tapak pelepasan merkuri bersedia untuk menyaman sebuah syarikat perlombongan Amerika Syarikat, mereka umumkan Sabtu lepas bahawa mereka akan membawa kes mereka di hadapan hakim Denver.

src: On June 2, 2000, a serious accident in the province of Cajamarca, in Peru, poisoned many residents with mercury, a highly toxic heavy metal.
ref: Pada 2 Jun 2000, kemalangan serius di wilayah Cajamarca, di Peru, meracuni ramai penduduk dengan merkuri, logam berat yang sangat toksik.

src: A truck from Newmont Mining Company dumped two metal canisters of mercury along an Andean highway, in the communities of San Juan, Choropampa, and Magdalena.
ref: Sebuah trak dari Newmont Mining Company membuang dua kanister logam merkuri di sepanjang lebuh raya Andean, dalam komuniti San Juan, Choropampa, dan Magdalena.

src: Curious townspeople (mostly children) picked up the silvery droplets, and some even drank some of it.
ref: Penduduk bandar yang ingin tahu (kebanyakannya kanak-kanak) mengambil titisan berwarna perak, dan ada juga yang meminumnya.

src: Some of those who came in contact with the mercury suffered blindness, and one even had a purplish rash on her body.
ref: Sebahagian daripada mereka yang terlibat dalam sentuhan dengan merkuri mengalami kebutaan, dan ada juga mempunyai ruam ungu di badannya.

src: Over 300 people directly suffered the effects of mercury poisoning.
ref: Lebih 300 orang secara langsung mengalami kesan keracunan merkuri.

src: In today's global economy, many international businesses have looked overseas to maintain their profits, but environmental law professor James Otto is asking about the cost to the environment and public health.
ref: Dalam ekonomi global hari ini, banyak perniagaan antarabangsa telah mengintai peluang di luar negara untuk mengekalkan keuntungan mereka, tetapi profesor undang-undang alam sekitar James Otto bertanya tentang kesan terhadap alam sekitar dan kesihatan awam.

src: "Any company that wants to mine internationally now must not only have the legal right to mine but also a 'social license' to operate," he said.
ref: "Mana-mana syarikat yang mahu melombong di peringkat antarabangsa kini bukan sahaja harus mempunyai hak yang sah untuk melombong tetapi juga 'lesen sosial'untuk beroperasi," katanya.

src: After the breakdown of mediation talks with Newmont on January 20, the residents and their lawyer decided to stop negotiating behind closed doors and take their case to the public.
ref: Selepas pemecahan rundingan penyelesaian dengan Newmont pada 20 Januari, penduduk dan peguam mereka mengambil keputusan untuk berhenti berunding secara tertutup dan membawa kes mereka kepada orang ramai.

src: Last Saturday, March 5, 2005, they announced that they are bringing their suit before Denver District Judge Robert Hyatt.
ref: Sabtu lepas, 5 Mac, 2005, mereka mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan membawa saman mereka kepada Hakim Daerah Denver Robert Hyatt.

src: This is not the first time Newmont Mining has had trouble with an emerging Third World environmental movement.
ref: Ini bukanlah kali pertama Newmont Mining telah mempunyai masalah dengan Dunia Ketiga yang baru muncul dengan gerakan alam sekitar.

src: Recently, in August 2004, a US$543 million lawsuit was filed against Newmont Mining by the Indonesian Environmental Ministry and local villagers.
ref: Baru-baru ini, pada bulan Ogos 2004, tuntutan mahkamah bernilai AS$543 juta telah difailkan terhadap Newmont Mining oleh Kementerian Alam Sekitar Indonesia dan penduduk setempat.

src: They claim that pollution caused by the company’s mining activities has caused serious illnesses and other health problems, including skin disease, tumors, birth defects, and a decline in fish stocks, a staple food.
ref: Mereka mendakwa bahawa pencemaran yang disebabkan oleh aktiviti perlombongan syarikat itu telah menyebabkan penyakit yang serius dan masalah kesihatan yang lain, termasuk penyakit kulit, tumor, kecacatan kelahiran, dan penurunan dalam stok ikan dan makanan asas.

src: At least six Newmont Mining managers, including an American and an Australian, face up to 15 years in a Jakarta prison for environmental and corporate crime in that case.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya enam pengurus Newmont Mining, termasuk seorang rakyat Amerika dan Australia, menghadapi sehingga 15 tahun hukuman penjara Jakarta untuk jenayah alam sekitar dan korporat dalam kes itu.

src: The local Peruvian residents are continuing their fight for safer mining practices and compensation for existing damage and injuries.
ref: Penduduk tempatan Peru meneruskan perjuangan mereka untuk amalan perlombongan selamat dan pampasan bagi kerosakan dan kecederaan yang sedia ada.

src: Newmont Mining officials have blamed the June 2000 mercury spill on a contractor, and have lost the battle to keep the case out of the American court system.
ref: Pegawai Newmont Mining telah menyalahkan tumpahan merkuri kepada kontraktor pada bulan Jun 2000, dan telah kalah dalam perlawanan untuk memastikan kes itu berada di luar sistem mahkamah Amerika.

src: Two rockets landed in the city, killing a 57-year-old woman and injuring a 24-year-old bodyguard of the Israeli Defense Minister Amir Peretz, who lives in the city.
ref: Dua roket mendarat di bandar tersebut, membunuh seorang wanita berusia 57 tahun dan mencederakan seorang pengawal peribadi berusia 24 tahun kepada Menteri Pertahanan Israel, Amir Peretz, yang tinggal di bandar itu.

src: The bodyguard lost both legs due to shrapnel wounds and is still in surgery, several hours after the attack.
ref: Pengawal peribadi itu hilang kedua-dua kaki akibat luka daripada serpihan dan masih dalam pembedahan, beberapa jam selepas serangan.

src: The Al-Quds Brigades, military wing of Islamic Jihad, took responsibility for the attack, saying they have launched "two sophisticated Quds rockets at a mid-range" as a retaliation for the IDF artillery shelling of Beit Hanoun earlier this month, in which 19 people were killed.
ref: Briged Al-Quds, sayap tentera Jihad Islam, mengambil tanggungjawab ke atas serangan itu, berkata yang mereka telah melancarkan "dua roket canggih Quds pada anggaran tengah" sebagai serangan balas kepada serangan meriam IDF di Beit Hanoun awal bulan ini, di mana 19 orang telah terbunuh.

src: Izz al-Din al-Qassam, Hamas' military wing, also took responsibility for the attack.
ref: Izz al-Din al-Qassam, sayap tentera Hamas, juga mengambil tanggungjawab untuk serangan itu.

src: IDF officials said today that the attack was carried out from the area around Beit Hanoun cemetery, where large-scale Qassam launching operation is underway.
ref: Pegawai IDF hari ini berkata serangan itu dijalankan di luar kawasan sekitar tanah perkuburan Beit Hanoun, di mana operasi pelancaran besar-besaran Qassam sedang dijalankan.

src: Another attack occurred hours later, when another rocket landed near several young men, injuring a 17-year-old youth severely and several others lightly.
ref: Satu lagi serangan berlaku beberapa jam kemudian, apabila roket lain mendarat berhampiran beberapa lelaki muda, mencederakan seorang remaja berusia 17 tahun dengan teruk, dan beberapa yang lain secara ringan.

src: Attacks by Israel aimed at Hamas fighters have killed over 400 Palestinians including many civilians, since June this year.
ref: Serangan oleh Israel yang diarah kepada pejuang Hamas telah membunuh lebih 400 orang rakyat Palestin termasuk ramai orang awam, sejak Jun tahun ini.
