src: Columbia University President Lee Bollinger Wednesday jokingly named Bill Clinton to a professorship.
ref: Presiden Universiti Columbia Lee Bollinger pada hari Rabu bergurau menamakan Bill Clinton ke jawatan profesor.

src: In opening remarks at the Kraft Program Series, "Challenges of New Democracies," he said that "the last time he was here I said that 'one more lecture,' and he'd be up for tenure."
ref: Dalam ucapan aluan di Siri Program Kraf, "Cabaran Demokrasi Baru," katanya bahawa "kali terakhir dia berada di sini saya menyebut 'satu lagi kuliah, 'dan dia akan ditetapkan tempoh perkhidmatan".

src: Both nations former leaders spoke about the challenges they faced during their times in office in order to bring the former Warsaw Pact countries into the West.
ref: Kedua-dua negara bekas pemimpin bercakap mengenai cabaran yang dihadapi pada masa mereka di pejabat untuk membawa negara-negara bekas Pakatan Warsaw ke Barat.

src: Havel mentioned that no one anticipated the rise of criminal mafias in the post-communist period, and that he and other dissidents imaged a swift transition from communism to democracy.
ref: Havel berkata bahawa tidak ada sesiapa yang menjangka kebangkitan mafia jenayah dalam tempoh pasca-komunis, dan bahawa beliau dan pembangkang lain menggambarkan peralihan pantas daripada komunisme ke demokrasi.

src: He cited Czechoslovakia's 1948 destruction of civil society as a significant delay.
ref: Beliau memberi contoh kemusnahan Czechoslovakia pada tahun 1948 terhadap masyarakat tempatan sebagai kelewatan yang ketara.

src: Citing an even distribution of "intelligence and ability... throughout the world," with India and China's enormous population, he said that it's only a matter of time when "other people get their act together" and "have more people than we do" when, "as a nation, we won't be dominant."
ref: Memetik pengagihan adil tentang "kecerdasan dan keupayaan...di seluruh dunia," dengan populasi yang besar di India dan China, beliau berkata, hanya menunggu masa apabila "orang lain menyebabkan mereka berkerjasama" dan "mempunyai lebih ramai orang daripada kita" apabila, "sebagai sebuah negara, kita tidak akan menjadi dominan".

src: Acknowledging increasing American reliance upon Chinese economic growth, Clinton said the Chinese government will shortly have "a trillion dollars in cash reserves" while the United States has "a combined annual budget and trade deficit of a trillion dollars."
ref: Mengakui peningkatan pergantungan Amerika Syarikat ke atas pertumbuhan ekonomi China, Clinton berkata kerajaan China tidak lama lagi akan mempunyai "satu trilion dolar dalam rizab tunai" manakala Amerika Syarikat mempunyai "gabungan bajet dan defisit perdagangan tahunan yang berjumlah trilion dolar".

src: Mentioning the Bush administration's tax cut given to him and others in his income tax class, he said that the United States "had to borrow money from (the Chinese government) to pay for my tax cut."
ref: Menyebut potongan cukai di bawah pentadbiran Bush yang diberikan kepadanya dan orang lain yang bertaraf sepertinya untuk membayar cukai pendapatan, beliau berkata bahawa Amerika Syarikat "terpaksa meminjam wang dari (kerajaan China) untuk membayar potongan cukai saya".

src: He also suggested that increasing American foreign aid to 0.7% of the U.S.'s $11 trillion Gross Domestic Product aid through cuts in the Department of Defense budget would "create a world with more partners and fewer adversaries."
ref: Beliau juga mencadangkan bahawa peningkatan bantuan luar Amerika ke 0.7% daripada $11 trilion bantuan Keluaran Dalam Negara Kasar Amerika Syarikat melalui pemotongan bajet Jabatan Pertahanan akan "mewujudkan sebuah dunia yang mempunyai lebih ramai rakan kongsi dan kurang musuh".

src: Criticizing a "dubious construction of a very vaguely identified threat of WMDs in Iraq," Mr. Havel questioned why planners failed to anticipate civil instability after initial combat operations.
ref: Mengkritik "pembinaan yang meragukan tentang ancaman senjata pemusnah besar-besaran di Iraq yang dikenal pasti secara samar-samar," Encik Havel mempersoalkan mengapa perancang gagal menjangka ketidakstabilan awam selepas operasi pertempuran awal.

src: Mr. Clinton declined comment citing his recent testimony before the Baker-Hamilton Commission and his wife Hillary's position as New York senator.
ref: Encik Clinton enggan mengulas petikan keterangannya baru-baru ini di hadapan Suruhanjaya Baker-Hamilton dan kedudukan isterinya Hillary sebagai senator New York.

src: Construction workers escaped injury, luckily they were on a coffee break at the time of the incident.
ref: Pekerja pembinaan tidak cedera, bernasib baik kerana mereka sedang berehat pada masa kejadian itu.

src: The Vancouver Fire Department says they have no idea as to why the building collapsed.
ref: Jabatan Bomba Vancouver berkata mereka tidak tahu mengapa bangunan itu runtuh.

src: According BC Hydro spokeswoman Elisha Moreno, the hardest-hit areas are Vancouver, Surrey, Langley, Abbotsford and Mission, B.C.
ref: Menurut jurucakap BC Hydro Elisa Moreno, kawasan-kawasan yang paling teruk terjejas adalah Vancouver, Surrey, Langley, Abbotsford dan Mission, B.C.

src: Extensive ferry cancellations, road closures, and massive power outages are in effect until the storm ends.
ref: Pembatalan meluas feri, penutupan jalan, dan gangguan bekalan kuasa secara besar-besaran dikuatkuasakan sehingga ribut berakhir.

src: The RCMP have advised people to stay home and off the highway.
ref: RCMP telah menasihatkan orang ramai untuk tinggal di rumah dan menjauhkan diri daripada lebuh raya.

src: An alleged Russian spy was arrested in Montreal, having threatened national security.
ref: Seorang yang dikatakan perisik Rusia telah ditahan di Montreal, telah mengancam keselamatan negara.

src: The man is identified as a Russian spy and has been living under a false name.
ref: Lelaki yang dikenali sebagai perisik Rusia dan telah tinggal dengan menggunakan nama palsu.

src: Public Safety Minister Stockwell Day and Immigration Minister Monte Solberg signed the document that authorized the man's arrest.
ref: Menteri Keselamatan Awam Stockwell Day dan Menteri Imigresen Monte Solberg telah menandatangani dokumen memberi kuasa atas penahanan lelaki tersebut.

src: The certificate alerts Ottawa about possible threats to the country.
ref: Sijil itu mengarahkan Ottawa supaya berwaspada akan kemungkinan ancaman keselamatan pada negara itu.

src: A security certificate has been issued ... against a foreign national.
ref: Sijil keselamatan telah dikeluarkan...menentang warganegara asing.

src: The man came to Canada several years ago with the name of Paul William Hampel, and is now reported to be false.
ref: Lelaki itu datang ke Canada beberapa tahun yang lepas dengan menggunakan nama Paul William, dan kini telah dilaporkan palsu.

src: Any speculation about the individual's other nationality is premature at this point," Barbara Campion, a spokesperson for CSIS.
ref: Sebarang spekulasi mengenai kerakyatan lain individu tersebut masih pramatang pada masa ini," Barbara Campion, jurucakap CSIS.

src: Ottawa believed the man had been "engaging in an act of espionage or an act of subversion," and "belonged to an organization that there are reasonable grounds to believe engages."
ref: Ottawa percaya lelaki itu mesti telah "terlibat dalam tindikan pengintipan atau perbuatan subversif," dan "dimiliki oleh sebuah organisasi yang mempunyai alasan munasabah untuk melibatkan diri."

src: "I don't think we're going to get the most intimate of details, no, not at all", he told CTV Montreal....We'll see a public version of the allegations that will be released by the federal court judge who is going to be responsible for reviewing the basis upon which cabinet will have declared this individual subject to a security certificate.
ref: "Saya tidak fikir kita akan mendapat maklumat terperinci yang sulit, tidak, sama sekali tidak," katanya kepada CTV Montreal...Kita akan melihat dakwaan versi awam yang akan dikeluarkan oleh hakim mahkamah persekutuan yang akan bertanggungjawab dalam mengkaji semula asas yang mana kabinet akan mengisytiharkan individu ini tertakluk kepada sijil keselamatan.

src: "Beyond that, there is a real appetite building among many countries for technological secrets", he said.
ref: "Selain itu, terdapat juga hasrat sebenar yang makin meningkat di kalangan banyak negara untuk mendapatkan rahsia teknologi," katanya.

src: Reports say the man's methods in Canada matched the techniques used by the Russian intelligence agency's Directorate S, which runs the Russian spy network.
ref: Laporan mengatakan cara yang digunakan lelaki itu di Canada sama dengan teknik yang dilaporkan oleh agensi perisik Lembaga Pengarah S, yang mengendalikan rangkaian perisik Rusia.

src: The court hearing for the man being held in Montreal will be on Wednesday.
ref: Perbicaraan lelaki itu akan diperdengarkan di mahkamah di Montreal pada hari Rabu.

src: The UK Audit Commission has delivered a report that questions the reappointment of Mike Storey, the former leader of Liverpool City Council.
ref: Pembadanan Audit UK telah menghantar laporan yang menyoal pelantikan semula Mike Storey, bekas ketua Bandar Majlis Liverpool.

src: Earlier in 2006 the council was the subject of a series of reports from alleged council insiders via a blog.
ref: Pada awal 2006 majlis mesyuarat menjadi subjek laporan bersiri daripada dakwaan orang dalaman majlis mesyuarat melalui sebuah blog.

src: Best current affairs report finalist were Alex Teka, Detox Diary, Not Fit to Practise and Turning the Tide.
ref: Finalis laporan hal ehwal semasa ialah Alex Teka, Detox Diary, Not Fit to Practise dan Turning the Tide.

src: Winner was John Campbell, the prize was awarded to him by his producer, Carol Hirschfield.
ref: Pemenang ialah John Campbell, hadiah telah dianugerahkan kepadanya oleh penerbit beliau, Carol Hirschfield.

src: The best news or current affairs editor was Shahir Daud.
ref: Editor terbaik berita atau hal ehwal semasa ialah Shahir Daud.

src: Lifestyle and information programme finalists were House Trap, Target and The Living Room.
ref: Finalis gaya hidup dan program maklumat ialah House Trap, Target dan The Living Room.

src: The winner of favourite female, as voted by the public "by a country mile", was Hillary Barry.
ref: Pemenang pelakon wanita pilihan, seperti yang diundi oleh orang ramai "oleh satu negara," ialah Hillary Barry.

src: The winner was, as voted by the public, Shortland Street.
ref: Pemenang adalah, seperti yang diundi oleh orang ramai, Shortland Street.

src: Best sports or event coverage out of Na Ratou Mo Tatou, V8 Supercars Pukekohe or 3 News election night was Na Ratou Mo Tatou (ANZAC day coverage).
ref: Sukan atau liputan terbaik ialah acara daripada Na Ratou Mo Tatou, V8 Supercars Pukekohe atau 3 News malam pilihan raya adalah Na Ratou Mo Tatou (liputan hari ANZAC).

src: Fred Renata, best camera non factual, and best editing for non-factual went to Bryan Shaw.
ref: Fred Renata, kamera terbaik bukan fakta, dan penyuntingan terbaik bukan fakta jatuh kepada Bryan Shaw.

src: Winner was Campbell Live, when on stage Mr Campbell said: "Bloody Stoked."
ref: Pemenang ialah Campbell Live, apabila berada di atas pentas Encik Campbell berkata: "Bloody Stoked."

src: Best news finalists were 3 News and One News and the winner was One News.
ref: Finalis berita terbaik ialah 3 News dan One News dan pemenangnya ialah One News.

src: Best actor finalists were Antony Starr, Ryan O'Kane and Scott Wills and the winner was Ryan O'Kane.
ref: Finalis pelakon terbaik ialah Antony Starr, Ryan O'Kane dan Scott Wills dan pemenangnya adalah Ryan O'Kane.

src: The last award, best drama, the finalists were The Insiders Guide to Love, Doves of War, Outrageous Fortune.
ref: Anugerah lepas, drama terbaik, finalisnya ialah The Insiders Guide to Love, Doves of War, Outrageous Fortune.

src: The winner of best drama was The Insiders Guide to Love.
ref: Pemenang drama terbaik ialah The Insiders Guide to Love.

src: Although there have been reports that planning and design work on replacement vessels and new designs of nuclear war heads has been proceeding for some years, the first Cabinet meeting to consider this pledge will take place tomorrow.
ref: Walaupun terdapat laporan bahawa perancangan dan kerja reka bentuk pada kapal penggantian dan reka bentuk baru kepala perang nuklear ini telah berjalan selama beberapa tahun, mesyuarat Kabinet pertama yang perlu dipertimbangkan ikrar ini akan berlangsung esok.

src: No Cabinet papers have been circulated before the meeting at which it is said there will be a “first run round the issues”.
ref: Tiada kertas Kabinet telah diedarkan sebelum mesyuarat di mana dikatakan akan ada "jangka pertama isu-isu."

src: The principle of retaining a nuclear deterrent will be put to the vote in the House of Commons next year and, although it may split the Labour Party, is likely to be carried with the support of the Conservative opposition.
ref: Prinsip mengekalkan penghalang nuklear akan mendapat undi di Dewan Rakyat tahun depan dan, walaupun ia mungkin memecahkan Parti Buruh, mungkin akan dilaksanakan dengan sokongan pembangkang Konservatif.

src: It is reported that some Cabinet Ministers have reservations about the prudence of maintaining the nuclear deterrent when the apparent threats are from saboteurs and suicide bombers.
ref: Ia dilaporkan bahawa beberapa Menteri Kabinet mempunyai keraguan tentang kebijaksanaan untuk mengekalkan penghalang nuklear apabila ancaman jelas adalah dari pengkhianat dan pengebom berani mati.

src: They also have doubts about the legality of adding to the stock of nuclear warheads contrary to the spirit of the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty and about the way that the decision is being pushed through without consultation with the Labour Party.
ref: Mereka juga mempunyai keraguan tentang kesahihan menambah kepada stok muncung perang nuklear bertentangan dengan semangat Perjanjian Pengawalan Senjata Nuklear dan tentang cara yang keputusan diluluskan tanpa berunding dengan Parti Buruh.

src: The only other European country with nuclear capability is France.
ref: Satu-satunya negara Eropah yang lain dengan keupayaan nuklear ialah Perancis.

src: Prime Minister Blair and Chancellor Brown are agreed on the need to retain a nuclear deterrent.
ref: Perdana Menteri Blair dan Canselor Brown bersetuju mengenai keperluan untuk mengekalkan penghalang nuklear.

src: Replacements for the smaller nuclear-powered w:attack submarines are under construction and will be armed with Tomahawk missile tactical missile systems.
ref: Penggantian untuk kapal selam berkuasa nuklear serangan kecil sedang dalam pembinaan dan akan bersenjata dengan sistem peluru berpandu taktikal peluru berpandu Tomahawk.

src: As of 9 am this morning, flaring is still being carried out by ExxonMobil at Jurong Island, Singapore.
ref: Sehingga pukul 9 pagi ini, pembakaran masih sedang dijalankan oleh ExxonMobil di Pulau Jurong, Singapura.

src: This is the 3rd day flaring works are being carried out by the company to burn off excess fuel from the refinery plant.
ref: Ini merupakan hari ketiga pembakaran dijalankan oleh syarikat tersebut untuk membakar lebihan bahan bakar dari kilang penapisan.

src: ExxonMobil wishes to assure members of the public that no health risk is posed as water and carbon dioxide are produced as a result of the flaring.
ref: ExxonMobil berharap dapat memberi jaminan kepada orang ramai bahawa tiada risiko kesihatan yang timbul daripada penghasilan air dan karbon hasil dari pembakaran.

src: Regular STOMP contributor Mike Muk shot a video of the flaring as well and he sent it in to Stomp.
ref: Penyumbang tetap STOMP Mike Muk merakam video pembakaran tersebut dan telah menghantarnya kepada Stomp.

src: STOMPer NZSheep also sent a picture to a website, offering the closest look of the flaring activity, taken just outside the security fences surrounding Jurong Island.
ref: STOMPer NZSheep juga menghantar gambar kepada laman web, memberi gambaran paling dekat tentang aktiviti pembakaran itu, diambil hanya dari luar pagar keselamatan yang mengelilingi Pulau Jurong.

src: Radonski promised a shift towards more of a business-friendly stance: "Those who want progress, jobs, well-managed companies, somewhere we can develop small and medium businesses…everyone who wants that kind of country, come and join my bus for progress".
ref: Radonski menjanjikan peralihan ke arah lebih kepada pendirian mesra perniagaan: "Mereka yang mahu kemajuan, pekerjaan, syarikat-syarikat yang diuruskan dengan berjaya, di suatu tempat kita boleh membangunkan perniagaan kecil dan sederhana...setiap orang yang mahu jenis negara yang macam itu, datang dan sertai bas saya untuk kemajuan".

src: Nick Clarke, the UK radio broadcaster, died today from cancer at the age of 58.
ref: Nick Clarke, penyampai radio UK, meninggal dunia hari ini akibat kanser pada usia 58 tahun.

src: He was fired after a disappointing season which was filled with controversy and tragedy.
ref: Beliau dipecat selepas musim mengecewakan yang penuh dengan kontroversi dan tragedi.

src: On November 7th, starting defensive lineman Bryan Pata was shot and killed outside his apartment in Kendall.
ref: Pada 7 November, bermula penjaga garis pertahanan Bryan Pata telah ditembak dan dibunuh di luar apartmennya di Kendall.

src: The Hurricanes also went though a four game losing streak.
ref: The Hurricanes juga mengalami empat kekalahan berturut-turut.

src: "We have suffered disappointments and tragedy off and on the field," University of Miami President Donna Shalala said in a statement regarding Coker's firing.
ref: "Kami telah mengalami kekecewaan dan tragedi kira dan di padang," kata Universiti Miami Presiden Donna Shalala dalam satu kenyataan mengenai tembakan Coker itu.

src: Coker may coach one more game if the Hurricanes get selected for a bowl game.
ref: Coker boleh melatih satu perlawanan lagi jika Hurricanes dipilih untuk perlawanan ragbi kolej.

src: University of Rutgers head coach Greg Schiano and former University of Wisconsin coach Barry Alvarez has emerged as one of the top candidates.
ref: Universiti Rutgers ketua jurulatih Greg Schiano dan bekas University of Wisconsin jurulatih Barry Alvarez telah muncul sebagai salah satu calon utama.

src: Atmospheric scientists warn that greenhouse gas emissions are increasing more rapidly, despite global efforts to curb the use of fossil fuels, new research by Australia's Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation (CSIRO) shows.
ref: Saintis atmosfera memberi amaran bahawa pelepasan gas rumah hijau semakin meningkat lebih cepat, walaupun usaha global bagi membendung penggunaan bahan api fosil, menunjukkan hasil penyelidikan baru oleh Komanwel saintifik Australia dan Penyelidikan Perindustrian (CSIRO).

src: Data from the Cape Grim air pollution monitoring station in north-west Tasmania shows carbon dioxide emissions have increased by 2.5% each year for the past five years.
ref: Data daripada Cape Grim menunjukkan pencemaran udara stesen pemantauan di utara-barat Tasmania menunjukkan pelepasan karbon dioksida telah meningkat sebanyak 2.5% setiap tahun bagi lima tahun yang lalu.

src: "It shows recent efforts globally to reduce emissions have had little impact on emissions growth," he said.
ref: "Ia menunjukkan usaha baru-baru ini di peringkat global untuk mengurangkan pengeluaran tidak memberikan impak yang banyak kepada pertumbuhan pengeluaran," katanya.

src: The CSIRO found that in global terms, China has the highest current growth rate in CO2 emissions although it's emissions per person are below the global average.
ref: CSIRO mendapati bahawa dari segi global, China mempunyai kadar pertumbuhan semasa yang tertinggi dalam pengeluaran CO2 walaupun pelepasan bagi setiap orang adalah di bawah purata global.

src: China's accumulated contribution since the start the 1800s is only five per cent of the global total.
ref: Sumbangan terkumpul China sejak awal tahun 1800-an hanya lima peratus daripada jumlah di peringkat global.

src: The USA and Europe have each contributed more than 25% of accumulated global emissions.
ref: Amerika Syarikat dan Eropah masing-masing menyumbang lebih daripada 25% daripada pengeluaran global terkumpul.

src: "To have four years in a row of above-average carbon dioxide growth is unprecedented," Dr Fraser said.
ref: "Pertumbuhan karbon dioksida untuk empat tahun berturut-turut melebihi kadar purata pernah berlaku sebelum ini," kata Dr Fraser.

src: The Canadian House of Commons will re-open the debate on same-sex marriage next Wednesday, December 6th, when it debates a resolution to reconsider the Civil Marriage Act that was passed by the previous Liberal-led parliament in 2005.
ref: Dewan Rakyat Kanada akan membuka semula perdebatan mengenai perkahwinan sama jantina pada hari Rabu, 6 Disember, apabila perbahasan resolusi untuk menimbang semula Akta Perkahwinan Awam yang telah diluluskan oleh parlimen yang diterajui oleh parti Liberal sebelum ini pada tahun 2005.

src: In the intervening election, the victorious Conservatives promised that if they were elected parliament would hold a free vote on whether to amend or repeal the Act.
ref: Pada pilihan raya berselang, Parti Konservatif yang menang berjanji bahawa jika mereka dipilih Parlimen akan mengadakan buangan undi bebas untuk menentukan sama ada akan meminda atau memansuhkan Akta itu.

src: Several surveys have suggested that MPs in the minority parliament will overwhelmingly reaffirm support for same-sex marriage once a vote has held.
ref: Beberapa kajian telah mencadangkan bahawa Ahli Parlimen di Parlimen minoriti itu akan lebih lagi mengesahkan sokongan untuk perkahwinan sama jantina setelah buangan undi diadakan.

src: The pro-same sex marriage group Canadians for Equal Marriage estimates that the motion will be defeated by at least 35 votes.
ref: Kumpulan yang menyokong perkahwinan sama seks Kanada untuk Perkahwinan Sama menganggarkan bahawa usul itu akan dikalahkan dengan sekurang-kurangnya 35 undi.

src: New Zealand Members of Parliament will receive thousands more after getting pay increases today.
ref: Ahli-ahli Parlimen New Zealand akan menerima ganjaran ribuan lebih banyak selepas kenaikan gaji hari ini.

src: The pay rises for backbench MPs are between 3.8% and 4.1% which will mean a backbench MP will now earn around NZ$122,500.
ref: Kenaikan gaji Ahli Parlimen tanpa jawatan adalah antara 3.8% dan 4.1% bermakna Ahli Parlimen sekarang akan mendapat sekitar NZ$122,500.

src: Other MPs with senior positions will get rises of between 4% and 8.1%.
ref: Ahli Parlimen lain dengan jawatan senior akan mendapat kenaikan antara 4% dan 8.1%.

src: This year the Prime Minister's increase will be worth just over $14,000 - paying her $6,942 a week.
ref: Peningkatan gaji Perdana Menteri tahun ini sedikit lebih daripada $14,000 - membayar beliau $6,942 seminggu.

src: Helen Clark, PM of New Zealand, received a 9.4 per cent rise last year, increasing her salary by nearly $30,000 to $347,000.
ref: Perdana Menteri New Zealand, Helen Clark menerima kenaikan sebanyak 9.4 peratus tahun lepas, ini meningkatkan gaji beliau dari $30,000 hingga $347,000.

src: The latest increase will see her salary rise to about $361,000.
ref: Peningkatan terkini akan melihat kenaikan gajinya sehingga kira-kira $361,000.

src: The pay rise will be backdated to July 1, The New Zealand Herald reported today.
ref: Tarikh peningkatan gaji ditunda ke 1 Julai, The Herald New Zealand melaporkan hari in.

src: Mr Key told The New Zealand Herald that he would donate a significant amount of his pay check to charitable organisations, as he has done since he first became an MP.
ref: Encik Key berkata kepada The Herald New Zealand bahawa dia akan menderma sejumlah besar gajinya kepada badan-badan kebajikan, seperti yang telah dilakukannya sejak beliau mula-mula menjadi seorang Ahli Parlimen.

src: Last year backbenchers got a 4.1% increase in their pay.
ref: Penyokong kerajaan tahun lalu mendapat kenaikan 4.1% dalam gaji mereka.

src: India's economy has grown by 9.2 percent in Q2 (July-September) of the fiscal year 2006-07, which was 8.4 percent last year for the same quarter.
ref: Ekonomi India telah tumbuh sebanyak 9.2 peratus pada K2 (Julai - September) pada tahun fiscal 2006-07, dimana 8.4 peratus pada suku yang sama tahun lepas.

src: The annual growth rate, of Asia's fourth-largest economy, for the quarter is also higher than that of the last quarter's (April-June), which was 8.9 percent.
ref: Kadar pertumbuhan tahunan, ekonomi keempat terbesar Asia, untuk suku ini juga lebih tinggi berbanding suku lepas (April-Jun), iaitu 8.9 peratus.

src: India's annual economic growth has been an average of 8 percent since past three fiscal years.
ref: Pertumbuhan ekonomi tahunan India berpurata 8 peratus semenjak tiga tahun fiskal lepas.

src: Manufacturing sectors, which contribute 17 percent in the GDP, have been recorded 11.9 percent growth comparing to last year's 11.3 percent for the same quarter.
ref: Sektor perindustrian, yang menyumbangkan 17 peratus pada KDNK, telah dicatatkan pertumbuhan 11.9 peratus berbanding tahun lepas 11.3 peratus untuk suku yang sama.

src: Reserve Bank of India hiked repo rate by 0.25 percent to 7.25 percent, keeping the reverse repo rate unchanged at 6% on October 31.
ref: Bank Reserve India mencapai kadar repo 0.25 peratus kepada 7.25 peratus, menetapkan kadar repo berbalik tidak berubah pada 6% pada 31 Oktober.

src: Finance minister P. Chidambaram said that he was very worried about the higher inflation rate due to supply side constraints.
ref: Menteri Kewangan India P. Chidambaram berkata yang dia sangat risau akan kadar inflasi lebih tinggi akibat halangan dari bahagian bekalan.

src: Homeland Security spokesman Russ Knocke says: "There is no information to corroborate this aspirational threat."
ref: Jurucakap Keselamatan Dalam Negeri Russ Knocke berkata: "Tidak ada maklumat untuk menyokong ancaman aspirasi ini".

src: The Homeland Security group claims that the threat was for all of December.
ref: Kumpulan Keselamatan Dalam Negeri mendakwa bahawa ancaman itu adalah untuk sepanjang Disember.

src: Fiji’s fourth coup in 20 years rose today as troops disarmed Fiji's only armed police unit.
ref: Kudeta keempat Fiji dalam masa 20 tahun merupakan satu-satunya unit polis bersenjata Fiji berbangkit hari ini sebagai tentera tanpa senjata.

src: Fiji's president dissolved parliament on Tuesday and sanctioned the military to remove embattled Prime Minister Laisenia Qarase, said New Zealand Prime Minister Helen Clark Qarase, who is in his residence in Suva, said the military was staging a coup and he would not resign but would have to be forcibly removed from office.
ref: Presiden Fiji membubarkan parlimen pada hari Khamis dan membenarkan tentera untuk membuang Perdana Menteri Laisenia Qarase yang terlibat, kata Perdana Menteri New Zealand Helen Clark.

src: "I am the democratically elected prime minister of the people of Fiji."
ref: Qarasa, yang berada di kediaman beliau di Suva, menyatakan bahawa tentera dalam peringkat kudeta dan beliau tidak akan meletak jawatan tetapi terpaksa dibuang secara daripada pejabat beliau.

src: "I have been advised this morning that the president of Fiji has acted outside his constitutional powers and supported the removal of the democratic prime minister by the military," Clark said in a statement to the New Zealand parliament.
ref: "Saya adalah perdana menteri yang dipilih secara demokratik oleh rakyat Fiji".

src: Acting Police Commissioner Moses Driver denied that any take over had occurred.
ref: "Saya dinasihatkan pagi ini bahawa presiden Fiji telah bertindak di luar bidang kuasa perlembagaan dan menyokong pembuangan perdana menteri demokratik oleh tentera," Clark memberitahu dalam satu kenyataan kepada parlimen New Zealand.

src: No shots were fired when the police were locked out.
ref: Tentera seterusnya mengelilingi Akademi Polis Nasova di Suva dan menuntut penyerahan senjata, dan menduduki balai polis utama di Suva.

src: At a news conference inside the main Suva barracks, Commander Frank Bainimarama said that police weapons were confiscated so that "dissidents" did not use them against the military.
ref: Tiada tembakan yang berlaku semasa polis ditahan.

src: There are approximately four roadblocks with 20 soliders at each.
ref: Juga dilaporkan bahawa tempat pemeriksaan tentera ditubuhkan sekitar ibu negara.

src: Troops tried to arrest the Prime Minister of Fiji, Laisenia Qarase, in the afternoon by setting up a roadblock between Suva and the province where Mr Qarase was attending a meeting, but he escaped in a helicopter, and has since been in hiding.
ref: Dianggarkan empat sekatan jalan raya melibatkan 20 tentera di setiap satu sekatan tersebut.

src: The army kept up the pressure on Mr Qarase when he was later summoned to President Ratu Josefa Iloilo's residence.
ref: Perdana Menteri dan kabinet beliau dipercayai selamat, di kawasan yang selamat, dan sesetengah daripada mereka berpisah bagi tujuan keselamatan yang lebih terjamin.

src: Mr Qarase drove to the estate, but was told by soldiers at a roadblock outside that he would have to walk the rest of the way.
ref: Tentera masih meneruskan tekanan ke atas Encik Qarase apabila dia seterusnya dipanggil ke kediaman Presiden Ratu Josefa Iloilo.

src: A witness inside the grounds said the prime minister, whose bodyguards were also disarmed by the military, refused and returned to his office.
ref: Encik Qarase memandu ke kediaman tersebut, tetapi dimaklumkan tentera di sekatan jalan raya bahawa dia dikehendaki untuk berjalan kaki bagi baki perjalanan.

src: Mr Qarase will make another attempt to meet President Iloilo on Tuesday morning.
ref: Saksi kejadian menyatakan bahawa perdana menteri, pengawal peribadi beliau turut dilucutkan senjata oleh tentera, menolak dan pulang ke pejabat beliau.

src: He had earlier imposed a deadline of noon (0000GMT) on Friday, December 1 but that deadline was extended to today as there was the annual rugby game between the police and the military.
ref: Dia seterusnya menetapkan tarikh akhir pada tengahari (0000GMT) pada hari Jumaat, 1 Disember tetapi tarikh akhir tersebut dilanjutkan sehingga hari ini berikutan berlakunya perlawanan ragbi tahunan antara polis dan tentera.

src: Commander Bainimarama is both an avid rugby fan and active church goer.
ref: Komander Bainimarama merupakan peminat ragbi dan aktif pergi ke gereja.

src: "I maintain my demands and the deadline still stands and I will make a commitment to my stand after the rugby match," he said.
ref: "Saya mengekalkan tuntutan saya dan tarikh akhir masih berkuat kuasa dan saya akan melaksanakan komitment terhadap pendirian saya selepas perlawanan ragbi ini," kata beliau.

src: Mr Qarase told Fiji radio on Monday morning that he remained in control and has called an emergency cabinet meeting for Tuesday.
ref: Encik Qarase memberitahu radio Fiji pada pagi Isnin bahawa beliau masih dalam kawalan dan telah memanggil mesyuarat kabinet kecemasan pada hari Selasa.

src: Fiji's Great Council of Chiefs called for calm on Monday and for the military to return to negotiations with the government.
ref: Ketua Dewan Besar Fiji meminta untuk bertenang pada hari Isnin dan agar tentera kembali berunding dengan kerajaan.

src: Local radio reported seven government vehicles used by ministers and parliament's Speaker had been confiscated by the military since Monday night.
ref: Radio tempatan melaporkan tujuh buah kenderaan rasmi kerajaan digunakan oleh menteri dan pembesar parlimen telah dirampas oleh tentera sejak malam Isnin.

src: Including New Zealand which has banned Commander Bainimarama from entering New Zealand except if he is attending political crises talks.
ref: Termasuk New Zealand yang telah mengharamkan Komander Bainimarama daripada memasuki New Zealand kecuali atas urusan menghadiri persidangan krisis politik.

src: Conditions on the street of Fiji are said to be mixed, with some apprehension.
ref: Keadaan di jalan-jalan sekitar Fiji disifatkan sebagai bercampur dengan sedikit kebimbangan.

src: The International Community have said they will discontinue aid to Fiji which is worth millions annually.
ref: Komuniti antarabangsa menyatakan bahawa mereka akan menghentikan bantuan kepada Fiji yang bernilai jutaan setiap tahun.

src: In an atmosphere of fun and excitement, the 4th annual Junior Eurovision Song Contest was held in Bucharest, Romania.
ref: Dalam suasana riang dan seronok, Peraduan Lagu Eurovision Junior tahunan ke-4 telah diadakan di Bucharest, Romania.

src: The big winners of the night were twin duo Sisters Tolmatchevy with their song "Vesna" (Spring).
ref: Pemenang besar malam itu adalah pasangan anak kembar Sisters Tolmatchevy dengan lagu "Vesna" (Spring) mereka.

src: Romanian reporter, Andreea Marin took to the stage to kick off the 15 performances from various European countries.
ref: Wartawan Romania, Andreea Marin naik ke pentas untuk memulakan 15 persembahan dari pelbagai negara Eropah.

src: Dracula was also present on stage, helping Ioana and Andreea present.
ref: Dracula turut hadir di atas pentas, membantu Ioana dan Andreea sekarang.

src: At the end of the voting, most of the reactions expressed shock in the Portuguese and Macedonian results.
ref: Pada akhir pengundian, kebanyakan reaksi dilahirkan terkejut atas keputusan Portugis dan Macedonia.

src: These two countries could be found at the bottom of the scoreboard.
ref: Kedua-dua negara boleh didapati di bahagian bawah papan mata.

src: His running-mate Julia Gillard was elected unopposed to the deputy leadership.
ref: Rakan sekempen beliau Julia Gillard dipilih sebagai Timbalan kepimpinan dipilih tanpa bertanding.

src: The vote was called on Friday after Kevin Rudd challenged former leader Kim Beazley for the leadership.
ref: Undi dipanggil pada hari Jumaat selepas Kevin Rudd mencabar bekas pemimpin Kim Beazley untuk kepimpinan.

src: Mrs Macklin has been deputy leader under three leaders since 2001.
ref: Puan Macklin telah menjadi timbalan ketua di bawah tiga pemimpin sejak tahun 2001.

src: The party will elect its shadow ministry in a separate ballot on Thursday.
ref: Parti itu akan memilih kementerian nasihatnya dalam pembuangan undi yang berasingan pada hari Khamis.

src: Premier of Queensland Peter Beattie has said that the leadership change "will herald in a new period of stability for the party."
ref: Ketua Pemimpin Queensland Peter Beattie telah berkata bahawa perubahan kepimpinan "akan menandakan dalam satu tempoh baru kestabilan parti."

src: Labor MP Dick Adams said even though he voted for Beazley to remain as leader, he supports the party's new leadership.
ref: Ahli Parlimen Parti Buruh Dick Adams berkata walaupun dia mengundi Beazley untuk kekal sebagai pemimpin, beliau menyokong kepimpinan baru parti.

src: "There'll be a lot more harmony and a lot more opportunity of ideas," he said.
ref: "Akan ada banyak lagi keharmonian dan lebih banyak peluang untuk idea," katanya.

src: "I think the new ideas need to flow and I think if it's opened up, as some people have said, they want those ideas to come forward, but I think we'll have some interesting policy direction to take to the people."
ref: "Saya rasa idea-idea baru perlu mengalir dan saya fikir jika ia dibuka, sebagaimana beberapa orang telah berkata, mereka mahu idea-idea untuk tampil ke hadapan, tetapi saya fikir kita akan mempunyai beberapa hala tuju dasar yang menarik untuk dimulakan demi rakyat."

src: Sharan Burrow, the president of the ACTU - the peak union body in Australia said Mr Rudd will be a strong leader.
ref: Sharan Burrow, presiden ACTU - puncak badan kesatuan di Australia kata Encik Rudd akan menjadi pemimpin yang kuat.

src: "I have no doubt that Kevin Rudd will say that these laws have to go, that they will be replaced by a policy that reinstates rights," Ms Burrow has told Sky News.
ref: "Saya tidak ragu bahawa Kevin Rudd akan mengatakan bahawa undang-undang ini perlu dilupuskan, bahawa ia akan digantikan dengan dasar yang menghidupkan semula hak-hak," Cik Burrow memberitahu Berita Sky.

src: Government MP, Christopher Pyne said that the new leadership was a poor choice for the party.
ref: Ahli Parlimen Kerajaan, Christopher Pyne berkata kepimpinan baru adalah pilihan yang lemah untuk parti.

src: "The combination of Kevin Rudd and Julia Gillard will have all the hallmarks of the mongoose and the cobra.
ref: "Gabungan Kevin Rudd dan Julia Gillard akan mempunyai semua ciri-ciri cerpelai dan ular tedung."

src: It shows Labor is obsessed about leadership rather than policy and strategy," Mr Pyne said.
ref: "Ia menunjukkan Parti Buruh taksub tentang kepimpinan daripada polisi dan strategi," kata Encik Pyne.

src: The speech is called : Statement: Trident - The Future of the UK Nuclear Deterrent.
ref: Ucapan ini dipanggil : Kenyataan: Trident - Penghalang Nuklear untuk Masa Depan UK.

src: The first Trident submarine went on patrol in December 1994.
ref: Kapal selam pertama Trident telah meronda pada Disember 1994.

src: The present system consists of Trident ballistic missiles with nuclear warheads carried by four Vanguard class nuclear powered submarines.
ref: Sistem sekarang termasuk peluru berpandu balistik Trident dengan kepala peledak nuklear yang dibawa oleh empat kapal selam berkuasa nuklear kelas Vanguard.

src: The main issue is about the replacement of the submarine fleet.
ref: Masalah utama ialah tentang penggantian kumpulan kapal selam.

src: Supporters who include the majority of the main opposition party, argue that because of the proliferation of nuclear weapons and threats from countries such as Iran and North Korea, Britain must have a nuclear defence capability.
ref: Penyokong yang kebanyakannya datang dari parti pembangkang, berpendapat bahawa kerana percambahan senjata nuklear dan ugutan dari negara seperti Iran dan Korea Utara, Britain harus mempunyai kemahiran pertahanan nuklear.

src: Fifteen Anglican bishops have denounced the possession of such a weapon as ‘evil’.
ref: Lima belas biskop Anglica telah mengutuk pemilikan senjata itu adalah 'jahat'.

src: Alex Salmond, leader of the Scottish National Party (SNP), said that although Scotland had no power to stop the replacment of the Trident weapons system, it had a host of powers to protect the environment.
ref: Alex Salmond, Ketua Parti Kebangsaan Scottish (SNP), berkata bahawa walaupun Scotland tiada kuasa untuk menghalang penukaran sistem senjata Trident, ia mempunyai pelbagai kuasa untuk melindungi alam sekitar.

src: He promised that if the UK government went ahead with the Trident project, the SNP would propose to use those powers to stop it proceeding in Scotland.
ref: Beliau berjanji bahawa jika kerajaan UK meneruskan projek Trident ini, SNP akan mencadangkan untuk menggunakan kuasa-kuasa tersebut untuk menghalang perlaksaannya di Scotland.

src: There are two establishments in Scotland, at Faslane and Rosyth, providing services to the nuclear submarine fleet.
ref: Terdapat dua pembentukan di Scotland, di Faslane dan Rosyth, yang menyediakan perkhidmatan untuk angkatan kapal selam nuklear.

src: Blogger George Vaccaro is a customer from the US who apparently purchased wireless network connection from Verizon, thinking that he was getting a good deal.
ref: Pemblog George Vaccaro adalah seorang pelanggan dari Amerika Syarikat yang nampaknya telah membeli sambungan rangkaian tanpa wayar dari Verizon, memikirkan yang dia telah mendapat tawaran yang baik.

src: When he called the Verizon customer service, he said he also found out that several Verizon representatives think 0.002 cents is equal to 0.002 dollars.
ref: Ketika dia membuat panggilan ke perkhidmatan pelanggan Verizon, dia berkata, dia juga mendapati bahawa beberapa wakil Verizon berpendapat bahawa 0.002 sen adalah bersamaan dengan 0.002 dolar.

src: According to the phone conversation recording he posted to his blog, Vaccaro also posted on his blog the text of what he said was an e-mail reply from a Verizon Wireless customer service representative on December 8, stating:
ref: Menurut rakaman perbualan telefon yang dipaparkan di blognya, Vaccaro turut memuatnaikkan di blognya teks yang dia katakan adalah jawapan e-mel daripada wakil perkhidmatan pelanggan Verizon Wireless pada 8 Disember, yang menyatakan:

src: Russia Today TV, Moscow's English-language satellite television channel, reported that Russian government officials are considering filing libel suits against international journalists over their reporting on the poisoning death of former Russian spy Alexander Litvinenko.
ref: TV Rusia Today, saluran televisyen satelit Moscow berbahasa Inggeris, melaporkan bahawa pegawai-pegawai kerajaan Rusia sedang mempertimbangkan memfailkan saman fitnah terhadap wartawan antarabangsa ke atas laporan mereka atas kematian keracunan bekas perisik Rusia Alexander Litvinenko.

src: Litvinenko was a strong critic of Russian President Vladimir Putin and shortly before he died in London from radiation poisoning in late November, Litvinenko accused Putin of ordering his assassination.
ref: Litvinenko adalah pengkritik yang kuat Presiden Rusia Vladimir Putin dan tidak lama sebelum dia meninggal dunia di London kerana keracunan radiasi pada akhir November, Litvinenko menuduh Putin kerana mengarahkan pembunuhannya.

src: According to a report posted late Friday on the Russia Today TV web site, the Federal Agency for Press and Mass Media is gathering publications worldwide to be studied for libelous and offensive comments against Russia in their coverage of the Litvinenko's case.
ref: Menurut laporan yang disiarkan lewat Jumaat di laman web TV Rusia Today, Agensi Persekutuan Akhbar dan Media Massa akan menghimpunkan penerbitan di seluruh dunia untuk dikaji untuk komen berunsur fitnah dan serangan terhadap Rusia dalam liputan kes mereka mengenai kes Litvinenko.

src: In a Voice of America interview shortly before he was poisoned by a radioactive substance polonium-210, former Russian spy Litvinenko had accused Putin of ordering the murder of Russian journalist Anna Politkovskaya to silence her and intimidate other independent journalists.
ref: Dalam temubual Voice of America tidak lama sebelum beliau diracuni oleh bahan radioaktif polonium-210, bekas perisik Rusia Litvinenko menuduh Putin mengarahkan pembunuhan seorang wartawan Rusia Anna Politkovskaya untuk menutup mulut beliau dan menakut-nakutkan wartawan bebas yang lain.

src: She had been killed by an unknown assailant in Moscow in early October.
ref: Dia telah dibunuh oleh penyerang yang tidak diketahui di Moscow pada awal Oktober.

src: Several senior Russian politicians have said that the deaths of Politkovskaya and Litvinenko were playing into the hands of Russia's enemies and, therefore, could not have been authorized by Moscow.
ref: Beberapa ahli politik kanan Rusia telah berkata bahawa kematian Politkovskaya dan Litvinenko sedang bermain ke tangan musuh Rusia dan, oleh itu, tidak mungkin diberi kuasa oleh Moscow.

src: FreeMediaOnline.org, a California-based nonprofit organization which monitors media and supports press freedom worldwide, said that the latest warnings issued by the Federal Agency for Press and Mass Media would prove a major embarrassment for Putin and for Russia if they were carried out.
ref: FreeMediaOnline.org, sebuah pertubuhan yang berpangkalan di California organisasi bukan berasaskan keuntungan yang memantau media dan menyokong kebebasan akhbar di seluruh dunia, berkata bahawa amaran terbaru yang dikeluarkan oleh Agensi Persekutuan Akhbar dan Media Massa akan membuktikan yang akan memalukan untuk Putin dan Rusia jika ianya dilaksanakan.

src: FreeMediaOnline.org also noted that uncovering the truth about the murders of Politkovskaya and Litvinenko would be difficult because independent journalists in Russia have been either silenced or intimidated by President Putin's media advisors, government regulators, and security services.
ref: FreeMediaOnline.org juga menyatakan bahawa pendedahan kebenaran tentang pembunuhan Politkovskaya dan Litvinenko adalah sukar kerana wartawan bebas di Rusia telah sama ada disenyapkan atau diancam oleh penasihat media Presiden Putin, pengawal selia kerajaan, dan perkhidmatan keselamatan.

src: According to FreeMediaOnline.org, journalists working for these channels no longer dare to offer any significant criticism of Mr. Putin's policies.
ref: Menurut FreeMediaOnline.org, wartawan yang bekerja untuk saluran - saluran ini tidak lagi berani untuk menawarkan apa-apa kritikan yang ketara terhadap dasar Encik Putin.

src: The organization warned that restrictions on media freedom in Russia have emboldened criminal elements to engage in illegal activities.
ref: Organisasi ini memberi amaran bahawa sekatan ke atas kebebasan media di Rusia telah memberanikan unsur-unsur jenayah untuk melibatkan diri dalam aktiviti-aktiviti menyalahi undang-undang.

src: A Japanese official has stated that Japan is opposed to re-entering into six-party talks between the United States, China, Russia, South Korea, and North Korea in regards to the N. Korean nuclear weapons program stating that N. Korea must "compromise."
ref: Seorang pegawai Jepun telah menyatakan bahawa Jepun ditentang untuk memasuki semula ke dalam rundingan enam pihak di antara Amerika Syarikat, China, Rusia, Korea Selatan dan Korea Utara dalam hal program senjata nuklear Korea Utara menyatakan bahawa Korea Utara mesti "berkompromi."

src: "It's fine if North Korea can bring some contribution to peace, but simply starting talks is not meaningful," said the chairman of the Liberal Democratic Party's policy research council in Japan, Shoichi Nakagawa.
ref: "Tidak bermasalah jika Korea Utara boleh membawa beberapa sumbangan kepada perdamaian, tetapi hanya memulakan perbincangan tidak membawa apa-apa makna," kata pengerusi majlis dasar penyelidikan Parti Liberal Demokratik di Jepun, Shoichi Nakagawa.

src: "The situation has changed since the last six-party talks in September last year.
ref: "Keadaan ini telah berubah sejak rundingan enam pihak terakhir pada bulan September tahun lepas.

src: North Korea has conducted missile test launches and undertaken a nuclear test.
ref: Korea Utara telah menjalankan ujian pelancaran peluru berpandu dan menjalankan satu ujian nuklear.

src: We believe it is necessary for North Korea to show concrete actions toward the abandonment of all nuclear weapons and existing nuclear programs," said Shinzo Abe, the Prime Minister of Japan.
ref: Kami percaya adalah perlu bagi Korea Utara untuk menunjukkan tindakan konkrit ke arah penghentian semua senjata nuklear dan program nuklear yang sedia ada," kata Shinzo Abe, Perdana Menteri Jepun.

src: Six-party talks are said to resume on December 18, 2006.
ref: Rundingan enam pihak dikatakan akan bersambung semula pada 18 Disember 2006.

src: An angry Judge Rodney S. Melville threatened to issue a bench warrant for the arrest of world famous pop singer Michael Jackson if he failed to appear at the Santa Barbara County Superior Court in California Thursday Jan. 10, 2005.
ref: Hakim Rodney S. Melville dengan marah mengugut untuk mengeluarkan waran tangkap kepada penyanyi pop terkenal dunia Michael Jackson jika beliau gagal untuk hadir ke Mahkamah Atasan Daerah Santa Barbara di California pada Khamis 10 Jan 2005.

src: Jackson is under indictment there on seven counts of lewd and lascivious acts on a child under 14, and two counts of administering an intoxicating agent.
ref: Jackson dibawah dakwaan oleh tujuh tuduhan untuk perbuatan lucah dan keberahian terhadap kanak-kanak bawah 14 tahun, dan dua tuduhan mentadbir dan memabukkan agen.

src: Jackson's defense lawyer, Tom Mersereau Jr., advised the judge that Jackson awoke earlier that morning with severe back pain and was under treatment at an area hospital at the time.
ref: Peguam bela Jackson, Tom Mersereau Jr., menasihati hakim bahawa Jackson bangun awal pagi tadi dengan sakit belakang dan sedang dirawat di kawasan hospital pada masa itu.

src: The judge moved to give the celebrity one hour to appear or face arrest for contempt of court.
ref: Hakim memberikan selebriti itu masa sejam untuk hadir atau berdepan dengan tahanan kerana menghina mahkamah.

src: During the countdown, live televised reports recounted how Jackson had arrived for court 20 minutes late on his own arraignment for these charges, only to be met by a stern lecture from Judge Melville for that transgression.
ref: Semasa kiraan detik it, laporan siaran langsung televisyen menceritakan bagaimana Jackson telah sampai 20 minit lewat atas dakwaan sendiri untuk tuduhan itu, hanya kerana bebelan tegas dari Judge melville berkenaan perlanggarannya.

src: There was also another occasion where Jackson, while recovering from flu symptoms, delayed the trial's jury selection for a week until he was well enough to return.
ref: Terdapat juga beberapa peristiwa dimana Jackson, semasa sedang sembuh dari tanda-tanda selesema, menangguhkan perbicaraan juri selama seminggu sehingga beliau cukup sihat untuk kembali.

src: The glaringly clear message sent by the judge was: bad back or not, Jackson was to appear in court!
ref: Mesej yang jelas dihantar oleh hakim adalah: kembali jahat atau tidak, Jackson harus hadir di mahkamah!

src: Only the televised scene of Jackson's expectant defense lawyer Mersereau with his assistant Susan Yu, both busy on cells phones while tensely waiting curbside beside the court house for the Jackson motorcade, seemed to undermine a feeling that Jackson would make it in time to avoid having his bail revoked.
ref: Hanya di siaran televisyen peguam bela Jackson yang mengandung Mersereau bersama pembantu beliau Susan Yu, kedua-duanya sibuk dengan telefon bimbit, sambil menunggu dengan tegang ditepi jalan sebelah rumah mahkamah untuk konvoi Jackson, nampaknya menjejaskan perasaan yang Jackson akan samapi tepat pada masanya untuk mengelakkan ikat jamin nya terbatal.

src: As the deadline came and passed without Jackson’s arrival, live reports were busy with speculation on the superstar persona of Michael Jackson then taking on newer aspects of super-bizarre.
ref: Selepas tarikh akhir sampai dan berlalu dengan ketidakhadiran Jackson, laporan siran langsung sedang sibuk dengan spekulasi terhadap persona bintang terkenal Michael Jackson kemudian mengambil aspek yang lebih baru terhadap super-pelik.

src: But Jackson’s flair for tardiness showed itself with an arrival that was a mere 3 minutes after the judge was being forced to make good on his threat.
ref: Tetapi bakat Jackson terhadap kelewatan menunjukkan diri beliau dengan ketibaan hanya 3 minit selepas hakim terpaksa membuat ugutan tersebut.

src: Dressed in a blue blazer over a light weight undershirt, the star's recent departure from the hospital was evident by the pajama bottom pants and open-heeled bedroom slippers he wore into the court room.
ref: Bersiap dengan baju kobar biru dengan baju dalam yang ringkas, bintang yang baru bergerak dari hospital telah dibuktikan dengan seluar tidue dan selipar bilik tiduer terbuka yang beliau pakai untuk masuk ke bilik perbicaraan.

src: He listed slightly to the right and kept a fixed, distant face that was surrounded by uncombed strands of his long hair.
ref: Beliau mengiring sekidikit ke kanan dan kedudukan tegap, muka yang jauh dikelilingi oleh rambut panjang yang tidak disikat.

src: In private chambers, Judge Melville met with both the prosecution lawyer, Tom Sneddon, and Jackson’s defense lawyer to verify the defendant’s claims of back pain.
ref: Dikamar persendirian beliau, Hakim Melville bertemu dengan peguam dakwa, Tom Sneddon, peguam bela Jackson untuk mengesahkan tuntutan defenden terhadap sakit belakang.

src: After re-taking the bench in the court room, the judge announced to the jury they would proceed with the docket as planned.
ref: Selepas mengambil semula bangku di bilik mahkamah, hakim mengumumkan kepada juri bahawa mereka akan meneruskan acara pengadilan seperti yang dirancang.

src: Mr. Jackson narrowly escaped prison, and the trial would continue where it left off on the previous day with direct testimony from the now 15 year old boy who accuses him.
ref: Encik Jackson nyaris mengelak dari dipenjarakan, dan perbicaraan itu akan disambung dimana ianya berhenti pada hari sebelum ini dengan kenyataan yang tepat dari budak sekarang berumur 15 tahun yang menuduh beliau.

src: The Italian government disputes this account, and has said that the US was fully aware of the operation on March 4.
ref: Kerajaan Itali mempertikaikan perkara ini, dan telah berkata bahawa AS menyedari sepenuhnya operasi itu pada 4 Mac.

src: La Repubblica is reporting that US forces were aware of Italian intelligence agent Nicola Calipari's presence, but not the specific details of his mission.
ref: La Repubblica melaporkan bahawa tentera AS menyedari kehadiran ejen perisikan Itali Nicola Calipari, tetapi bukan mengenai butir-butir tertentu misinya.

src: However, as the deputy commander of the coalition forces in Iraq, Marioli reported that he was unaware of Calipari's purpose in Iraq, so he could not tell coalition troops on the ground the details of the Italian mission.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, sebagai timbalan komander angkatan campuran di Iraq, Marioli melaporkan bahawa dia tidak tahu mengenai tujuan Calipari di Iraq, jadi dia tidak boleh memberitahu tentera bersekutu di darat butiran terperinci misi Itali.

src: American politician of the Democratic party Dennis Kucinich plans to run for president in 2008 the five-term congressman's spokesman, Andy Juniewicz, said Monday.
ref: Ahli politik parti Demokratik Amerika Dennis Kucinich merancang untuk bertanding sebagai presiden 2008 kata jurucakap lima-penggal ahli kongres tersebut, Andy Juniewicz, Isnin.

src: Kucinich ran in 2004 and was last in nearly every primary and caucus of that year.
ref: Kucinich bertanding pada 2004 dan berada di tempat terakhir dalam hampir semua pilihan raya utama dan rundingan pada tahun tersebut.

src: Kucinich began his political career as a Cleveland city councilman and later as the youngest person ever elected mayor of the Midwestern city.
ref: Kucinich memulakan kerjaya politik beliau sebagai ahli Majlis bandar Cleverland dan kemudiannya merupakan calon termuda yang pernah dicalonkan sebagai datuk bandar Midwestern.

src: The congressman made his decision to run, according to a written statement, because he felt his own party's leadership was not aggressive enough in opposing the Iraq war.
ref: Ahli kongres tersebut membuat keputusan untuk bertanding, menurut satu kenyataan bertulis, berikutan beliau merasakan kepimpinan parti beliau tidak cukup agresif dalam menentang peperangan Iraq.

src: He has advocated cutting off funds for the war, saying that voting for money to maintain or expand the war is incompatible with a position of opposition to it.
ref: Beliau memperjuangkan penyekatan dana terhadap peperangan tersebut, menyatakan bahawa mengundi untuk mengekalkan atau memanjangkan peperangan adalah tidak seimbang dengan posisi menentang peperangan tersebut.

src: He also co-chaired the Congressional Progressive Caucus and is a self-described "Wellstone Democrat."
ref: Beliau juga mempengerusikan bersama Kongres Progresif Rundingan dan digambarkan sebagai "Demokrat Wellstone".

src: The latest victims were found on 12 December 2006 in a rural area a few hundred meters apart, and one body discovered within 40 minutes of the other.
ref: Mangsa-mangsa terbaru dijumpai pada 12 Disember 2006 di kawasan pedalaman dengan jarak beberapa ratus meter, dan satu mayat dijumpai dalam masa lingkungan 40 minit daripada dengan yang lain.

src: Five women have been found dead within 10 days and authorities face an "unprecedented" murder investigation.
ref: Lima wanita dijumpai mati dalam tempoh masa 10 hari dan pihak berkuasa menghadapi siasatan pembunuhan "yang belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya".

src: Xtra, owned by New Zealand telecommunication monopoly company Telecom, has created a joint venture between themselves and Yahoo!7, creating Yahoo Xtra.
ref: Xtra, yang dimiliki oleh syarikat New Zealand yang monopoli telekomunikasi Telecom, telah mewujudkan satu usaha sama antara mereka dan Yahoo!7, mewujudkan Yahoo Xtra.

src: Yahoo!7 is the joint venture between Yahoo!
ref: Yahoo!7 adalah usaha sama antara Yahoo!

src: and Australian network, Seven.
ref: dan rangkaian Australia, Seven.

src: The joint venture replaces the current and long-lasting partnership between Microsoft and Xtra, called XtraMSN.
ref: Usaha sama menggantikan kerjasama semasa dan berkekalan lama antara Microsoft dan Xtra, yang dipanggil XtraMSN.

src: has worked together with BT Group, Verizon and Rogers Communications.
ref: telah bekerjasama dengan BT Group, Verizon dan Rogers Communications.

src: "We see there is a fantastic opportunity to grow online advertising and the share of the online market."
ref: "Kami melihat terdapat peluang yang hebat untuk memperkembangkan pengiklanan dalam talian dan bahagian pasaran dalam talian."

src: "Online advertising in New Zealand is getting to a tipping point of growth where there is a critical mass of online connections, broadband connections and an increase in the amount of time people are spending online."
ref: "Pengiklanan dalam talian di New Zealand sedang berkembang ke arah titik pertumbuhan di mana terdapat lebih ramai sambungan talian, sambungan jalur lebar dan peningkatan dalam jumlah masa orang menghabiskan dalam talian."

src: When the new site is launched, it will include a range of news, sport, weather, enhanced e-mail spam and virus protection, photo sharing, and internet radio.
ref: Apabila laman baru dilancarkan, ia akan termasuk pelbagai berita, sukan, cuaca, spam e-mel dipertingkatkan dan perlindungan virus, perkongsian gambar, dan radio internet.

src: Theresa Gattung, chief executive of Telecom, said: "The Yahoo Xtra joint venture will provide New Zealanders with access to the world's best online services in a localised way."
ref: Theresa Gattung, Ketua Eksekutif Telekom, berkata: "Yahoo Xtra bersama ini menyediakan orang New Zealand dengan akses ke atas perkhidmatan dalam talian yang terbaik di dunia dengan cara tempatan."

src: Ian Smith, chief executive of Yahoo!7, said: "The company was achieving market growth of online advertising of between 50 and 60 per cent a year in Australia and believed it could do the same in New Zealand."
ref: Ian Smith, Ketua Eksekutif Yahoo!7, berkata: "Syarikat ini telah mencapai pertumbuhan pasaran pengiklanan dalam talian di antara 50 dan 60 peratus setahun di Australia dan percaya ia boleh melakukan perkara yang sama di New Zealand."

src: He said that the partnership will give them a great opportunity to showcase its tools, technology and platforms in New Zealand.
ref: Dia berkata, kerjasama itu akan memberikan mereka peluang yang baik untuk mempamerkan alat-alat, teknologi dan platform di New Zealand.

src: The reason they chose Yahoo!7 over other companies was because Yahoo!7 has the top position in big fields such as TV and video.
ref: Sebabnya mereka memilih Yahoo!7 daripada syarikat lain adalah kerana Yahoo!7 mempunyai kedudukan tertinggi dalam bidang besar seperti TV dan video.

src: High winds and heavy rains have left 4 people dead, and much of the Seattle, Washington area is without electrical power.
ref: Angin kencang dan hujan lebat telah meninggalkan 4 orang mati, dan banyak kawasan Seattle, Washington terputus kuasa elektrik.

src: Flood, storm, and strong wind watches were in effect last night as a rare thunderstorm system moved into the Pacific Northwest region, hitting areas from Seattle to Portland with high winds and heavy rains.
ref: Banjir, ribut, dan angin yang kuat berlaku malam tadi sebagai satu sistem ribut petir jarang berlaku dimana ianya berpindah ke rantau Pasifik Barat Laut, melibatkan kawasan-kawasan dari Seattle ke Portland dengan angin kencang dan hujan lebat.

src: Interstate 5 through Seattle was closed at its intersection with Mercer Street due to standing water.
ref: Interstate 5 hingga Seattle telah ditutup di persimpangan dengan Mercer Street kerana air yang bertakung.

src: The State Route 520 floating bridge, a major conduit across Lake Washington to the technology-rich Eastside was closed and its drawspan opened to protect it from storm damage well into Friday.
ref: Jambatan terapung State Route 520, saluran utama di seluruh Lake Washington kepada teknologi yang kaya di Eastside telah ditutup dan drawspannya telah dibuka untuk melindunginya daripada kerosakan ribut sehingga hari Jumaat.

src: Local roads throughout the region were strewn with debris, especially evergreen branches and leaves.
ref: Jalan raya tempatan di seluruh rantau ini telah berselerak dengan serpihan, terutama dahan evergreen dan daun.

src: Four deaths were reported in connection with the storm as of Friday.
ref: Empat kematian dilaporkan berkaitan dengan ribut pada Jumaat.

src: A Seattle woman died in the basement of her home after floodwaters caused the basement door to close and jam shut.
ref: Seorang wanita di Seattle meninggal dunia di ruangan bawah tanah rumahnya kerana ditenggelami air menyebabkan pintu ruangan bawah tanah itu tertutup rapat.

src: Two others died in outlying areas after tall Northwest evergreens fell on their vehicles, and a man in Grays Harbor, near the Pacific coast, died in his sleep after a tree fell on his mobile home.
ref: Dua lagi meninggal dunia di kawasan luar selepas dahan tinggi evergreen Northwest jatuh pada kenderaan mereka, dan seorang lelaki di Grays Harbor, berhampiran pantai Pasifik, meninggal dunia dalam tidur selepas pokok jatuh pada rumah bergeraknya.

src: KOMO news reported a caller saying a 100-foot evergreen had fallen into his house.
ref: KOMO berita melaporkan seorang pemanggil mengatakan evergreen setinggi 100 kaki telah jatuh ke dalam rumahnya.

src: Seattle City Light, the municipal electric utility for the city, reported a peak of 175,000 customers without power, most in the north and south ends of the city, as well as the east edge of town and the Green Lake area.
ref: Seattle City Light, utiliti elektrik perbandaran untuk bandar, melaporkan sebanyak 175,000 pelanggan tanpa kuasa elektrik, sebahagian besar di utara dan hujung selatan bandar, serta pinggir timur bandar dan kawasan Green Lake.

src: Puget Sound Energy, the electric utility for much of the Seattle metro area, reported 700,000 customers (over 66%) without power, with the area around Seattle the worst hit.
ref: Puget Sound Energy, utiliti elektrik untuk kebanyakkan kawasan metro Seattle, melaporkan 700,000 pelanggan (lebih 66%) tanpa kuasa elektrik, dengan kawasan di sekitar Seattle paling teruk terjejas.

src: PSE, which had already enlisted additional powerline workers from neighboring states, did not send crews out until mid Friday morning due to continued high winds.
ref: PSE, yang sudah menyenaraikan pekerja tambahan kuasa elektrik daripada negara-negara jiran, tidak menghantar kakitangan keluar sehingga pagi pertengahan Jumaat kerana angin kencang berterusan.

src: Estimates for power restoration were anywhere from a few days to over a week.
ref: Anggaran untuk pemulihan kuasa adalah dari mana-mana sahaja dari beberapa hari hingga lebih seminggu.

src: Island County, at the mouth of Puget Sound, was completely without power.
ref: Island County, di muara Puget Sound, tidak mempunyai kuasa elektrik sama sekali.

src: Schools in Seattle and throughout its suburbs were closed Friday, many due to power outages.
ref: Sekolah di Seattle dan di pinggir bandar ditutup pada hari Jumaat, kebanyakkannya disebabkan oleh gangguan kuasa.

src: The city of Mercer Island, connected to the mainland only by Interstate 90, is reportedly inaccessible.
ref: Bandar Mercer Island, dihubungkan dengan tanah besar hanya dengan Interstate 90, dilaporkan tidak boleh diakses.

src: The Seattle Post-Intelligencer failed to print due to power failures at the printing facility, which had redundant power feeds from both the Seattle utility as well as PSE.
ref: The Seattle Post-Intelligencer gagal untuk mencetak disebabkan oleh kegagalan kuasa di fasiliti percetakan, yang mempunyai suapan kuasa berlebihan dari kedua-dua utiliti Seattle serta PSE.

src: The Seattle Times, a competing paper under a joint operating agreement, managed to print only 13,000 copies of its regular circulation of over 200,000.
ref: The Seattle Times, satu kertas di bawah perjanjian operasi bersama, boleh mencetak hanya 13,000 salinan edaran biasa yang kini melebihi 200,000.

src: Concourse A and the South Satellite terminal lost power, and a blown-out window caused Concourse C to also close.
ref: Concourse A dan terminal Selatan Satelit kehilangan kuasa, dan tingkap yang ditiup angin menyebabkan Concourse C juga tutup.

src: The Seattle Seahawks vs. San Francisco 49ers football game was delayed 15 minutes.
ref: Permainan bola sepak The Seattle Seahawks vs San Francisco 49ers telah ditangguhkan 15 minit.

src: The gridiron was plagued by standing water, as the stadium's loudspeakers played "Who'll Stop The Rain?"
ref: Lapangan hijau telah dibelenggu oleh air bertakung, lalu pembesar suara stadium memainkan "Who'll Stop The Rain?"

src: shortly before kickoff.
ref: sejurus sebelum sepak mula.

src: The mother of Brazilian soccer player Luis Fabiano has been kidnapped.
ref: Ibu pemain bola sepak Brazil, Luis Fabiano telah diculik.

src: The police are not giving too many details, and a great part of local media is not reporting the case, afraid of putting the life of Fabiano's mother at risk.
ref: Pihak polis tidak memberi terlalu banyak maklumat, dan sebahagian besar media tempatan tidak melaporkan kes itu, kerana takut merisikokan nyawa ibu Fabiano.

src: According to the police, he was living in Saquarema with a woman who is pregnant.
ref: Menurut polis, dia tinggal di Saquarema dengan seorang wanita yang mengandung.

src: The two countries do not have a formal extradition treaty.
ref: Kedua-dua negara tidak mempunyai perjanjian ekstradisi formal.

src: On Friday, James appeared in a Santa Barbara, California court for arraignment on charges of kidnapping and murdering a 15-year-old boy.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, James muncul di mahkamah Santa Barbara, California untuk dakwa atas tuduhan menculik dan membunuh seorang budak lelaki berusia 15 tahun.

src: James will plead not guilty, according to his attorney, James E. Blatt.
ref: James akan mengaku tidak bersalah, menurut peguam beliau, James E. Blatt.

src: Blatt also criticized the portrait prosecutors had painted of his client.
ref: Blatt juga mengkritik bahawa pendakwa potret telah dicat oleh anak guamnya.

src: He was not the shooter," said Blat.
ref: Dia bukan penembak," kata Blat.

src: Blatt requested that the trial be continued on April 4.
ref: Blatt meminta agar perbicaraan diteruskan pada 4 April.

src: Governor Jon Corzine announced a bill that would provide $270 million to stem cell research.
ref: Gabenor Jon Corzine telah mengumumkan satu rang undang-undang yang akan memberikan $270 juta kepada penyelidikan sel induk.

src: He announced, "I don't want New Jersey to join the crowd of stem cell research states, I want New Jersey to lead it."
ref: Beliau mengumumkan, "Saya tidak mahu New Jersey untuk turut serta di dalam kumpulan penyelidikan sel induk negara, saya mahu New Jersey mengetuainya".

src: President Niyazov of Turkmenistan had declared himself to be "President For Life" in 1999 after his last elected victory in 1992 and had not selected a successor.
ref: Presiden Turkmenistan Niyazov telah mengisytiharkan dirinya sebagai "Presiden Seumur Hidup" pada tahun 1999 selepas kemenangan pilihanraya terakhirnya pada tahun 1992 dan tidak lagi memilih pengganti.

src: His rule over Turkmenistan came after years of service in the Communist Party of the USSR.
ref: Pmerintahan beliau ke atas Turkmenistan bermula selepas beberapa tahun berkhidmat dalam Parti Komunis Kesatuan Soviet.

src: Also the amount of time fireworks are available for sale during Guy Fawkes has been restricted to three days before Guy Fawkes night instead of ten days.
ref: Juga jumlah bunga api masa yang ada untuk dijual dalam Guy Fawkes telah dihadkan kepada tiga hari sebelum malam Guy Fawkes bukannya sepuluh hari.

src: "We want to see fireworks users behaving responsibly, being aware of and avoiding fire risk, guarding the personal safety of themselves and others, and being aware of the effect the noise has on animals."
ref: "Kami ingin lihat pengguna bunga api berkelakuan secara bertanggungjawab, menyedari dan mengelakkan risiko kebakaran, menjaga keselamatan diri sendiri dan orang lain, dan menyedari kesan bunyi yang ada pada haiwan".

src: Sparklers will only be available for purchase in packs contained with other fireworks.
ref: Bunga api hanya boleh dibeli dalam pek lengkap dengan bunga api lain.

src: This restriction is to try and prevent the dangerous, home-made "sparkler bombs."
ref: Sekatan ini adalah untuk mencuba dan mengelakkan bahaya, buatan sendiri "bom buatan berkilau".

src: Mike Hall, chief executive of the New Zealand Fire Service, said that he is pleased with the new restrictions around the sale of fireworks.
ref: Mike Hall, Ketua Eksekutif Perkhidmatan Bomba New Zealand, berkata beliau gembira dengan sekatan baru di sekitar penjualan bunga api.

src: In response to why the government had not banned the complete sale of fireworks, Hon Benson-Pope said: "I have listened to the various groups that do want a ban, and I am still open to that possibility in the future, but I believe the best approach at this stage is to tighten up the laws around sale."
ref: Sebagai tindak balas kepada mengapa kerajaan tidak mengharamkan penjualan lengkap bunga api, Hon Benson-Pope berkata: "Saya telah mendengar pelbagai kumpulan yang melakukan mahu larangan, dan saya masih terbuka kepada untuk kemungkinan pada masa akan datang, tetapi saya percaya pendekatan terbaik pada peringkat ini adalah untuk mengetatkan undang-undang di seluruh dijual".

src: The government has asked the Environmental Risk Management Authority to investigate the fireworks available for purchase in regards to the style, design and the construction of the various fireworks.
ref: Kerajaan telah meminta Lembaga Pengurusan Risiko Alam Sekitar untuk menyiasat bunga api boleh dibeli tidak kira gaya, reka bentuk dan pembinaan pelbagai bunga api.

src: "...and next year government will consult with industry about new regulations in this area," Hon Benson-Pope said.
ref: "...dan tahun depan kerajaan akan berunding dengan industri mengenai peraturan-peraturan baru di kawasan ini," kata Hon Benson-Paus.

src: "I don't feel it's fair on New Zealanders to ban fireworks sales at this stage because of the actions of a minority."
ref: "Saya tidak rasa ia adil di New Zealand untuk mengharamkan penjualan bunga api pada peringkat ini kerana tindakan minoriti".

src: "I understand the frustration the Police and Fire Service teams feel when faced with problems over Guy Fawkes, and I hope these new restrictions will send a message that deliberate harm or damage is criminal and is being clamped down on," Mr Benson-Pope said.
ref: "Saya faham kekecewaan Polis dan Perkhidmatan Bomba Pasukan rasa apabila berhadapan dengan masalah berkenaan Guy Fawkes, dan saya berharap sekatan baru akan menghantar mesej yang bahaya sengaja atau kerosakan adalah jenayah dan sedang mengetatkan kawalan," kata Encik Benson-Pope.

src: His death at age 73 was announced by his agent.
ref: Kematiannya pada usia 73 telah diisytiharkan oleh agen beliau.

src: He was born in 1933 and grew up in poverty until he formed James Brown & The Famous Flames.
ref: Beliau dilahirkan pada tahun 1933 dan membesar di dalam kemiskinan sehingga membentuk James Brown & The Famous Flames.

src: His influence on 20th century music, from funk to hip hop was profound.
ref: Pengaruhnya dalam musik abad ke 20, dari funk ke hip hop adalah mendalam.

src: Before he died, he scheduled a New Year's Eve concert series in New Jersey and New York that would help kick off a 2007 tour.
ref: Sebelum kematiannya, dia menjadualkan konsert siri Malam Tahun Baru di New Jersey dan New York yang mungkin membantu permulaan konsert lawatan tahun 2007.

src: The head of the earthquake monitoring agency in the Philippines disputed the Japanese agency's warnings, however.
ref: Namun, ketua agensi pemantauan gempa bumi di Filipina mempertikaikan amaran agensi Jepun.

src: Despite the Japanese Meteorological Agency's warning of a tsunami threat to the Philippines, Renato Solidum, the director of the Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology, denied that a tsunami is headed towards the Philippines, saying that the Pacific Tsunami Warning Center in Hawaii had not released any tsunami advisory.
ref: Walaupun amaran Agensi Meteorologi Jepun mengeluarkan ancaman tsunami kepada Filipina, Renato Solidum, pengarah Institut Gunung Berapi dan Seismologi Filipina, menafikan bahawa tsunami menuju ke Filipina, dengan mengatakan bahawa Pusat Amaran Tsunami Pasifik di Hawaii tidak mengumumkan apa-apa amaran tsunami.

src: Nevertheless, Solidum said that residents in low-lying areas in the Philippines should, as a precaution, move to higher ground.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Solidum berkata penduduk di kawasan-kawasan rendah di Filipina harus, sebagai langkah berjaga-jaga, bergerak ke kawasan yang lebih tinggi.

src: In the aftermath of the quake, news agencies have aired reports of collapsed houses, hotel guests being trapped in elevators, and telephone outages due to severed lines across Taiwan.
ref: Selepas kejadian gempa bumi itu, agensi berita telah menyiarkan laporan rumah runtuh, tetamu hotel terperangkap dalam lif, dan gangguan telefon kerana talian terputus di seluruh Taiwan.

src: The earthquake has damaged six submarine fiber-optic communications cables, restricting internet access to millions of users in Asia and Australia.
ref: Gempa bumi itu telah merosakkan enam kabel komunikasi gentian optik dasar laut, menyekat akses internet untuk berjuta-juta pengguna di Asia dan Australia.

src: Home users are experiencing severe connection issues, with timeouts becoming very common.
ref: Pengguna di rumah mengalami isu berkaitan sambungan talian, dan selalunya berlaku timeout.

src: Repairing the lines "is not a matter of days," says Hong Seoung-Yong, a ministry official from South Korea handling the problem.
ref: Membaiki talian "akan memakan masa yang lama," kata Hong Seoung-Yong, seorang pegawai kementerian dari Korea Selatan yang mengendalikan masalah ini.

src: Service providers may choose to bypass those lines in favour of European ones, say a spokesman for Japanese telecoms firm KDDI Corp, Satoru Ito.
ref: Pembekal perkhidmatan boleh memilih untuk memintas talian yang memihak kepada Eropah, kata jurucakap firma telekom Jepun KDDI Corp, Satoru Ito.

src: That 2004 earthquake registered as a magnitude 9.1, and caused a tsunami with waves reaching as high as 33 feet.
ref: Gempa bumi 2004 itu didaftarkan sebagai magnitud 9.1, dan menyebabkan tsunami dengan ombak mencapai setinggi 33 kaki.

src: On November 5, Hussein was sentenced to death for his role in the Dujail massacre in 1982, in which 148 Shiites died.
ref: Pada 5 November, Hussein telah dijatuhkan hukuman mati atas penglibatannya di dalam pembunuhan beramai-ramai Dujail pada tahun 1982, di mana 148 orang Syiah telah terkorban.

src: According to Iraqi laws, Hussein would be hanged within 30 days, and there is no chance of pardon.
ref: Menurut undang-undang Iraq, Hussein akan digantung di dalam tempoh 30 hari, dan tidak ada peluang untuk mendapat pengampunan.

src: France yesterday ended Ireland's dream of winning the Grand Slam - European Rugby's top title.
ref: Perancis semalam menamatkan impian Ireland untuk memenangi Grand Slam - kejuaraan utama Ragbi Eropah.

src: The RBS Six Nations clash, which took place at Dublin's Lansdowne Road finished with the French team ahead on 26 points against Ireland's 19.
ref: Pertembungan dalam RBS Enam Negara, yang berlangsung di Lansdowne Road di Dublin tamat dengan pasukan Perancis di hadapan dengan 26 mata berbalas Ireland 19 mata.

src: After a French dominated first half, Ireland had a glimmer of hope as Brian O'Driscoll managed to get a try almost from nothing mid-way through the second half, sadly for the homeside, it wasn't enough as France responded with a second try to take them to 26 ponits.
ref: Selepas Perancis menguasai separuh masa pertama, Ireland mempunyai sedikit harapan apabila Brian O'Driscoll berjaya mendapatkan satu trai daripada tiada pada pertengahan masa sehingga separuh masa kedua, sedih untuk pasukan tuan rumah, ia tidak mencukupi apabila France membalas dengan trai kedua untuk membawa mereka ke 26 mata.

src: The first half included a succession of poor wides by Dublin's forwards, but Westmeath failed to capitalise on the mistakes of their opponents, finishing the half with just three points.
ref: Pada separuh masa pertama termasuk kejayaan miskin oleh penyerang Dublin, tetapi Westmeath gagal untuk mengambil kesempatan terhadap kesilapan pemain pertahanan, menghabiskkan separuh masa dengan tiga mata.

src: The second half was a slightly better contest with a sudden burst of energy by the Westmeath forwards producing several points to bring the game back to level pegging at 0-8 to 0-8.
ref: Separuh masa kedua mempamerkan pertandingan lebih baik sedikit dengan tenaga tiba-tiba dikeluarkan oleh penyerang Westmeath menghasilkan beberapa mata untuk membawa kembali permainan ke tahap tambatan 0-8 kepada 0-8.

src: At least seven bomb blasts occurred early on New Year's Eve in Bangkok.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tujuh letupan bom berlaku pada malam tahun baru di Bangkok.

src: Four explosions went off almost simultaneously in different parts of Thailand's capital city, at around 6:00 p.m. local time (1100 GMT).
ref: Empat letupan berlaku hampir berturutan di bahagian berlainan pusat bandar Thailand, lebih kurang 6:00 petang waktu tempatan (1100 GMT).

src: The first blast was in a bus-stop shelter at Victory Monument, which is a busy hub for public transportation.
ref: Letupan pertama adalah dibangsal perhentian bas di Monumen Victory, dimana ialah pusat yang sibuk untuk kenderaan awam.

src: Another was a 61-year-old man who later died at a hospital.
ref: Seorang lagi ialah lelaki berusia 61 tahun yang kemudiannya mati disebuah hospital.

src: The blast caused a secondary explosion to some nearby cooking-gas cylinders.
ref: Letupan itu mengakibatkan letupan kedua kepada beberapa silinder gas masakan berhampiran.

src: Seventeen people were wounded in a blast at a police box near a Big C supermarket at the Saphan Kwai intersection.
ref: Tujuh belas lelaki telah tercedera dalam letupan dikotak polis berhampiran pasar raya Big C dipersimpangan Saphan Kwai.

src: A witness there said a man dropped a grenade from a pedestrian bridge.
ref: Seorang saksi berkata seorang lelaki menjatuhkan bom tangan dari jambatan pejalan kaki.

src: Another blast was at a police box on Sukhumvit Soi 62.
ref: Satu lagi letupan ialah dikotak polis di Sukhumvit Soi 62.

src: The New Year's countdown at CentralWorld was held at around 9:00 p.m. with police and Bangkok Governor Apirak Kosayothin then urging the thousands of gathered revelers to "go home and stay in peace."
