ref: Encik Dunne berkata sebab perubahan yang dicadangkan itu adalah kerana New Zealand mempunyai pelbagai budaya, maka hari kebangsaan New Zealand haruslah mengenai semua orang dan bukanlah satu sungutan.

src: He says that he is now considering writing up a new bill to submit it to the New Zealand Parliament.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa dia kini mempertimbangkan untuk menulis rang undang-undang baru untuk diserahkan kepada Parlimen New Zealand.

src: Waitangi day is on February 6, each year and celebrates the Waitangi signing of New Zealand's founding document, the Treaty of Waitangi (Te Tiriti o Waitangi).
ref: Hari Waitangi adalah pada 6 Februari setiap tahun dan meraikan tandatangan Waitangi dalam perlembagaan New Zealand, Perjanjian Waitangi (Te Tiriti o Waitangi).

src: Flights from Auckland to Vancouver will operate three times a week between November and March, to coincide with the peak travel season between the two destinations, as Canadians escape winter and New Zealand skiers head to the Canadian slopes.
ref: Penerbangan dari Auckland ke Vancouver akan beroperasi tiga kali seminggu antara November dan Mac, berbetulan dengan musim puncak di antara dua destinasi, kerana orang Kanada melarikan diri daripada musim sejuk dan pemain ski New Zealand menuju ke lereng Kanada.

src: In total, they contributed $136 million to New Zealand's economy.
ref: Secara keseluruhannya, mereka menyumbang $136 juta ke ekonomi New Zealand.

src: The amount of power generated by wind turbines in the state stands now at 895 megawatts.
ref: Jumlah kuasa yang dihasilkan oleh turbin angin di negeri itu sekarang adalah 895 megawatt.

src: The bill signed by the Governor requires energy companies to provide 25 percent of power from renewable sources by 2025.
ref: Rang undang-undang yang ditandatangani oleh Gabenor mewajibkan syarikat-syarikat tenaga menyediakan 25 peratus kuasa daripada sumber yang boleh diperbaharui menjelang tahun 2025.

src: Xcel Energy, which supplies approximately half of the electricity in the state, is required to provide 30 percent from renewable sources by 2020.
ref: Xcel Energy, yang membekalkan kira-kira separuh daripada tenaga elektrik di negeri itu, dikehendaki menyediakan 30 peratus daripada sumber yang boleh diperbaharui menjelang tahun 2020.

src: In Iran, the state-controlled TV station has announced that the country for the first time test-fired a space rocket, with scientific equipment aboard.
ref: Di Iran, stesen TV yang dikawal oleh kerajaan telah mengumumkan bahawa negara itu buat kali pertama melancarkan ujian roket angkasa, dengan perkakasan saintifik di dalamnya.

src: The rocket was later reported not be designed to reach an orbit.
ref: Roket itu kemudiannya dilaporkan tidak ditetapkan untuk mencapai sebuah orbit.

src: Iran claims it reached an altitude of 94 miles and then parachuted home.
ref: Iran mendakwa ia mencapai ketinggian 94 batu dan kemudian terjun balik.

src: No images have been released, and no other reports have confirmed the launch.
ref: Tiada imej telah dikeluarkan, dan tidak ada laporan lain telah mengesahkan pelancaran tersebut.

src: The announcement comes at a time of international tension over Iran's nuclear program.
ref: Pengumuman itu dibuat pada masa ketegangan antarabangsa berhubung program nuklear Iran.

src: In a speech today, Iranian President Mahmoud Ahmadinejad compared his country's nuclear program with a train with no brakes and no reverse gear.
ref: Dalam sebuah ucapan hari ini, Presiden Iran Mahmoud Ahmadinejad membandingkan program nuklear negara itu dengan kereta api tanpa brek dan tidak ada gear undur.

src: Diplomats said that if Iran would possess advanced missile capabilities it would be of concern to the nations who believe Iran is developing nuclear weapons, something Iran denies.
ref: Para diplomat berkata jika Iran akan mempunyai keupayaan peluru berpandu canggih ia akan menjadi perhatian kepada negara-negara yang percaya Iran sedang membangunkan senjata nuklear, sesuatu yang Iran nafikan.

src: He also said that the test was in line with international regulations on the matter.
ref: Beliau juga berkata bahawa ujian itu adalah sejajar dengan peraturan antarabangsa mengenai perkara itu.

src: Although the news would mean a significant breakthrough for Iran's missile technology, the story was only mentioned during one TV broadcast, and not at all by other official Iranian media.
ref: Walaupun berita itu bermakna satu kejayaan yang besar bagi teknologi peluru berpandu Iran, cerita itu hanya disebutkan dalam satu siaran TV, dan langsung tiada dari media rasmi Iran yang lain.

src: Iran has said in the past it wants more satellites to increase its cellular phone and internet capabilities.
ref: Iran telah berkata pada masa lalu ia mahu lebih satelit untuk meningkatkan keupayaan telefon bimbit dan internet.

src: Since 2005, Iran already has one satellite in space, Sinah-1, which was launched in Russia with a Russian rocket.
ref: Sejak tahun 2005, Iran telah mempunyai satu satelit di angkasa, Sinah-1, yang dilancarkan di Rusia dengan sebuah roket Rusia.

src: Soon after the 2005 launch, Iran announced they would develop their own launcher.
ref: Tidak lama selepas pelancaran 2005 itu, Iran mengumumkan bahawa mereka akan membangunkan pelancar mereka sendiri.

src: A memorandum, or "memo", was circulating the 1,100 employer, TVNZ yesterday from CEO, Rick Ellis, which stated that their "guesstimate" of job losses was around 130-160.
ref: Satu memorandum, atau "memo," telah diedar kepada 1,100 majikan, TVNZ semalam daripada Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif, Rick Ellis, yang menyatakan bahawa "anggaran tekaan" mereka tentang jumlah kehilangan pekerjaan adalah sekitar 130-160.

src: The numbers are not set in stone, according to a spokesperson for TVNZ.
ref: Nombor-nombor tidak ditetapkan, menurut seorang jurucakap TVNZ.

src: The lay-offs have been expected since late last year where he announced it to a parliamentary select committee.
ref: Pemberhentian telah dijangka sejak akhir tahun lepas di mana beliau mengumumkan kepada Jawatankuasa Pilihan Parlimen.

src: In two weeks time, staff will be asked what they think of the proposed changes, which also includes a top level management restructuring.
ref: Dalam masa dua minggu, kakitangan akan ditanya apa yang mereka fikir tentang perubahan yang dicadangkan itu, yang juga termasuk penyusunan semula pengurusan peringkat tertinggi.

src: Steve Mahery, broadcasting minister, said, "The restructuring of TVNZ is an operational issue, and I expect they'll meet their charter requirements."
ref: Steve Mahery, menteri penyiaran, berkata, "Penstrukturan semula TVNZ adalah sebuah isu pengendalian, dan saya menjangka mereka akan memenuhi syarat-syarat piagam mereka."

src: Microsoft decided to buy a health information search engine called Medstory.
ref: Microsoft memutuskan untuk membeli satu enjin carian maklumat kesihatan yang dipanggil Medstory.

src: This is the company's first step towards an involvement in the health market.
ref: Ini merupakan langkah pertama syarikat tersebut ke arah penglibatan dalam pasaran kesihatan.

src: The software that Medstory develops involves artificial intelligence techniques which are applied to both medical and health information stored in medical journals, as well as government documents.
ref: Perisian yang dibangunkan Medstory melibatkan teknik kepintaran buatan yang diaplikasikan kepada kedua-dua maklumat perubatan dan kesihatan yang disimpan dalam jurnal perubatan, dan juga dokumen kerajaan.

src: The industry analyst and Medstory investor, Esther Dyson, mentioned that the technology provided by Medstory is not just a search engine, it also represents an ontology engine.
ref: Penganalisis industri dan pelabur Medstory, Esther Dyson, menyatakan bahawa teknologi yang disediakan oleh Medstory bukan hanya enjin carian, ia juga merupakan satu enjin ontologi.

src: He also outlined the fact that Microsoft has acquired "some of the best deep technology" in the fast growing field of medical search engines.
ref: Beliau juga menggariskan fakta bahawa Microsoft telah memperoleh "di antara teknologi dalaman yang terbaik" dalam bidang berkembang pesat enjin carian perubatan.

src: Protests have continued after Manchester United defeated Lille in the Champions League round of 16.
ref: Protes telah berterusan selepas Manchester United menewaskan Lille di pusingan Liga Juara-Juara 16.

src: A free kick by Ryan Giggs in the second half of the game caused great controversy, as Lille was setting up their wall as the ball went into the back of the net.
ref: Satu sepakan percuma oleh Ryan Giggs pada separuh masa kedua permainan menimbulkan kontroversi yang hebat, kerana Lille telah menubuhkan pertahanan mereka semasa bola masuk ke dalam jaring.

src: Lille players nearly walked off the pitch at the time, but they were goaded back onto the field, and the game ended 1 - 0 for Manchester United.
ref: Pemain-pemain Lille hampir berjalan keluar padang pada masa itu, tetapi mereka telah dirangsang kembali ke padang, dan permainan berakhir 1-0 untuk Manchester United.

src: UEFA has rejected their appeal again, saying no proof of a technical error has been presented.
ref: UEFA telah menolak rayuan mereka sekali lagi, mengatakan ada bukti kesilapan teknikal telah dibentangkan.

src: Lille will have 3 days after receiving notice from UEFA to lodge another appeal to the Court of Arbitration for Sport, or the claim will be dismissed in full.
ref: Lille akan mempunyai 3 hari selepas menerima notis daripada UEFA untuk membuat satu lagi rayuan kepada Mahkamah Timbangtara Sukan, atau tuntutan akan ditolak sepenuhnya.

src: The second leg game between United and Lille will take place next Wednesday at Old Trafford.
ref: Permainan kedua antara United dan Lille akan berlangsung hari Rabu depan di Old Trafford.

src: Vail, Colorado, United States — Yesterday, Wikinews sat down with Australian blind Paralympic skier Melissa Perrine who was participating in a national team training camp in Vail, Colorado.
ref: Vail, colorado, Amerika syarikat - Semalam, Wikinews duduk bersama pemain ski buta Paralimpk Australia Melissa Perrine yang telah mengambil bahagian dalam kem latihan pasukan kebangsaan di Vail, Colorado.

src: Three people are dead and five are injured after an explosion tore through a shopping center near the port of Jounie, 20 kilometres north of Beirut, Lebanon.
ref: Tiga orang mati dan lima lagi tercedera selepas satu letupan yang memusnahkan sebuah pusat membeli-belah berdekatan pelabuhan Jounie, 20 kilometer utara Beirut, Lebanon.

src: The 45-pound bomb, which was placed under a stairwell, exploded around 1:30am local time (0330 UTC).
ref: Bom 45-paun itu, telah diletakkan di bawah tangga, dan meletup sekitar jam 1:30 pagi waktu tempatan (0330 UTC).

src: Harper, who is currently writing a book about the history of Hockey, admitted he's a curling fan.
ref: Harper, yang sekarang sedang menulis buku berkaitan dengan sejarah Hockey, mengaku beliau peminat curling.

src: He started to be a fan of curling in Winnipeg, Manitoba 10 years ago and said his father used to play it.
ref: Beliau mula menjadi peminat curling semasa di Winnipeg, Manitoba 10 tahun dahulu dan berkata ayahnya pernah pernah bermain permainan itu.

src: About the last decade or so I've made an effort to get to the Brier when I could.
ref: Sejak sedekad yang lepas saya telah berusaha untuk pergi ke Brier apabila saya boleh.

src: "I've obviously got a soft spot for Kevin Martin and Alberta because he's had such a great career," said Harper.
ref: "Saya ternyata memberi tempat selesa untuk Kevin Martin dan Alberta kerana beliau mempunyai kerjaya yang hebat," kata Harper.

src: "But what's so great about the Brier is whoever wins is not like your normal pro athlete."
ref: "Tetapi apa yang sangat hebat tentang Brier ialah sesiapa sahaja yang menang bukan seperti atlit yang professional".

src: She wore a large crown and was draped in gold.
ref: Beliau memakai mahkota besar dan dikelilingi oleh emas.

src: The first leg of the matches ended in a goalless draw, as both teams were spirited in defense.
ref: Perlawanan pertama berakhir dengan seri tanpa jaringan, kerana kedua-dua pasukan bersemangat tinggi dalam pertahanan.

src: Kaka and Inzaghi played as frontmen for AC, while Vennegoor of Hesselink and Jiri Jarosik were the strike pair for Celtic.
ref: Kaka dan Inzaghi bermain sebagai penyerang untuk AC, manakala Vennegoor of Hesselink dan Jiri Jarosik adalah pasangan penyerang untuk Celtic.

src: Milan had the first chance of the game early when Kaka found room and flashed a shot towards the bottom corner, but keeper Artur Boruc got down well to make the stop.
ref: Milan mempunyai peluang pertama pada awal permainan apabila Kaka mendapat peluang dan menyepak bola ke arah sudut di bawah, tetapi penjaga gol Artur Boruc pun bertindak dengan baik untuk memberhentikan bola itu.

src: Celtic then had a valid penalty claim after only 6 minutes when Jarosik's volley looked to be blocked by the hand of Maldini, but referee Konrad Plautz waved away the appeals.
ref: Celtic kemudian mendapat tuntutan penalti yang sah selepas hanya 6 minit apabila tendangan sangga Jarosik nampaknya disekat oleh tangan Maldini, tetapi pengadil Konrad Plautz tidak mengendahkan rayuan itu.

src: Celtic's defense continued to play well, and they limited Milan's chances to long ranged shots.
ref: Pertahanan Celtic terus bermain dengan baik, dan mereka menghadkan peluang Milan untuk tendangan berjarak panjang.

src: Lee Naylor then performed defensive heroics for Celtic as he took the ball away from the open Inzaghi, who was waiting to tap the ball in at the back post.
ref: Lee Naylor kemudian melakukan pertahanan yang berani untuk Celtic semasa dia mengambil bola dari Inzaghi secara terbuka, yang sedang menunggu untuk menyambungkan bola dalam hantaran belakang.

src: Kaka had two more shots from range at the net, but neither were on target.
ref: Kaka mempunyai dua lagi tendangan dari jarak tertentu pada jaring, tetapi tidak juga kena sasaran.

src: Naylor again saved Celtic by clearing the ball off the line from a Kaka attempt.
ref: Naylor sekali lagi menyelamatkan Celtic dengan mengeluarkan bola dari garis dari satu percubaan Kaka.

src: He struck a fine shot at the net, but Massimo Oddo did well to block the attempt.
ref: Dia menjaringkan satu tendangan yang sangat sempurna pada jaring, tetapi Massimo Oddo bertindak dengan baik untuk menghalang percubaan itu.

src: Maldini then had a header at the Celtic net, but Boruc was again in the right place to make the stop.
ref: Maldini kemudian mempunyai tandukan di jaring Celtic, tetapi Boruc sekali lagi di tempat yang betul untuk menghentikannya.

src: Boruc was again forced into action from a Seedorf free kick, which he was able to deflect out with a hand.
ref: Boruc sekali lagi bertindak atas sepakan percuma Seedorf, yang dia mampu untuk memesongkan dengan satu tangan.

src: As 90 minutes approached, Celtic had two well positioned free-kicks, but could take advantage of neither, and the game entered extra time.
ref: Pada masa 90 minit menghampiri, Celtic mendapat dua kedudukan yang baik untuk sepakan percuma, tetapi dapat mengambil kesempatan daripada tidak menggunakannya, dan perlawanan memasuki masa tambahan.

src: It was Milan who pushed however, and Andrea Pirlo twice forced Boruc to make saves.
ref: Milan yang mendesak walau bagaimanapun, dan Andrea Pirlo telah dua kali mendesak Boruc melakukan penyelamatan.

src: Gravesen's long effort for Celtic was easy pickings for Dida, and Craig Beattie headed a good chance over the bar.
ref: Usaha lama Gravesen untuk Celtic adalah pemilihan mudah untuk Dida, dan Craig Beattie membawa peluang yang baik di palang.

src: Celtic vainly tried to tie the game, bringing on Kenny Miller, but AC finished the game comfortably, and advanced to the next round of the tournament.
ref: Celtic dengan angkuhnya cuba untuk menyerikan permainan itu, membawa masuk Kenny Miller, tetapi AC menyelesaikan permainan itu dengan senang, dan maju ke pusingan kejohanan seterusnya.

src: The law is, as the Associated Press dubs it, a "clumsy effort" to curb the urban youth activity known as happy slapping in which an act of violence, such as kicking a helpless victim, is filmed by the attacker's friends for entertainment purposes.
ref: Undang-undang tersebut, dinamakan oleh Persekutuan Akhbar sebagai "usaha cuai" untuk membendung aktiviti belia bandar yang dikenali sebagai tamparan bahagia di mana perbuatan ganas, seperti menendang mangsa yang tidak berdaya, dirakam oleh kawan penyerang sebagai hiburan.

src: Under the new legislation, written by Minister of the Interior Nicolas Sarkozy, convicted "citizen journalists" could face up to five years in prison.
ref: Dibawah undang-undang baru, yang ditulis oleh Menteri Dalam Negeri Nicolas Sarkozy, mensabitkan "wartawan rakyat" akan berdepan dengan hukuman lima tahun penjara.

src: Media freedom group Reporters Without Borders has called the act "dangerous", and warned that it can be used to target "regular citizens" who film acts of violence.
ref: Kumpulan media bebas Wartawan Tanpa Sempadan telah memanggil perbuatan itu "berbahaya," dan memberi amaran bahawa ianya mungkin digunakan untuk menyasarkan "rakyat biasa" yang merakamkan perbuatan keganasan.

src: The first leg of the round of sixteen in the UEFA Cup occurred earlier today, with all eight games being played.
ref: Kaki pertama pusingan enam belas dalam Piala UEFA berlaku awal hari ini, dengan kesemua lapan perlawanan yang dimainkan.

src: Other represented countries were Israel (Maccabi Haifa), Scotland (Rangers), Ukraine (Shakhtar Donetsk), and Netherlands (AZ Alkmaar).
ref: Negara-negara wakilan lain ialah Israel (Maccabi Haifa), Scotland (Rangers), Ukraine (Shakhtar Donetsk), dan Belanda (AZ Alkmaar).

src: The government of Eritrea warned of "dire consequences" unless Uganda removes its troops from the African Union (AU) peacekeeping force deployed to Somalia.
ref: Kerajaan Eritrea telah memberi amaran "akibat yang buruk" kecuali jika Uganda mengeluarkan tenteranya dari pasukan pengaman Kesatuan Afrika (AU) yang diarahkan ke Somalia.

src: Ali Abdu, Eritrea’s information minister stated, "We believe the government of Uganda must rectify its error and pull out from Somalia, otherwise the situation will become increasingly dangerous."
ref: Ali Abdu, Menteri Penerangan Eritrea menyatakan, "Kami percaya kerajaan Uganda perlu membetulkan kesilapan dan menarik diri dari Somalia, jika tidak, keadaan akan menjadi semakin berbahaya".

src: "It will not only worsen, but will become a war between the Somali people and external forces."
ref: "Ia bukan hanya akan memburukkan lagi, tetapi akan menjadikan satu peperangan di antara rakyat Somalia dengan kuasa-kuasa luar".

src: The AU plans to send 8,000 multinational troops in total, and has recently vowed to continue their deployment despite attacks on its first deployed forces and threats of an Islamist commander.
ref: AU merancang untuk menghantar 8,000 tentera pelbagai warganegara dalam jumlah keseluruhan, dan baru-baru ini berikrar untuk meneruskan penempatan mereka walaupun serangan ke atas pasukan pertama yang dikerahkan dan ancaman dari komander Islam.

src: The Islamic Courts Movement has also threatened to wage jihad against the peacekeeping forces.
ref: Mahkamah Pergerakan Islam juga telah mengancam untuk melancarkan jihad menentang semua tentera pengaman.

src: Reacting to the comments, Paddy Ankunda, a spokesman for the Uganda Peoples Defense Force (UPDF) said, "Eritrea has no right to demand that we withdraw."
ref: Bertindak balas kepada komen tersebut, Paddy Ankunda, jurucakap Pasukan Pertahanan Rakyat Uganda (UPDF) berkata, "Eritrea tidak mempunyai hak untuk meminta kami menarik diri".

src: "We received a mandate, not only from the AU but also from the UN."
ref: "Kami telah menerima mandat, bukan sahaja dari AU tetapi juga dari UN".

src: The UPDF forces have been attacked since arriving at Mogadishu on March 6.
ref: Tentera UPDF telah diserang sejak tiba di Mogadishu pada 6 Mac.

src: Over this week, two UPDF troops were wounded in an ambush and a landmine was discovered on the road leading to the airport.
ref: Sepanjang minggu ini, dua pasukan UPDF cedera di dalam serangan hendap dan satu periuk api yang ditemui di jalan menuju ke lapangan terbang.

src: Another mortar attack that missed a UPDF convoy and hit a nearby restaurant on March 7 killed 13 civilians and wounded 20.
ref: Satu lagi serangan mortar tersasar dari satu konvoi UPDF dan mengena restoran berdekatan pada 7 Mac membunuh 13 orang awam dan mencederakan 20 orang.

src: The UPDF attributed the loss of one of its planes, which burst into flames while landing, to a technical problem and not the result of an insurgent attack.
ref: UPDF menganggap kehilangan salah satu daripada kapal terbangnya, yang terbakar semasa mendarat, adalah satu masalah teknikal dan bukan hasil daripada serangan pemberontak.

src: Eritrea also took the opportunity to condemn its rival Ethiopia that helped install the provisional government of Somalia.
ref: Eritrea juga mengambil kesempatan untuk mengutuk pesaingnya Ethiopia yang membantu memulakan kerajaan sementara Somalia.

src: The National Hockey League (NHL) has handed down a season-long suspension, including the playoffs, to Chris Simon of the New York Islanders.
ref: Liga Hoki nasional (NHL) telah menjatuhkan penggantungan musim panjang, termasuk pertandingan kepada Chris Simon dari New York Islanders.

src: The suspension, for a minimum of 25 games, is a ruling for a hit Simon laid on Ryan Hollweg of the New York Rangers during a March 8 game at Nassau Veterans' Memorial Coliseum.
ref: Penggantungan itu, minimum 25 permainan, akibat pukulan Simon terkena pada pemain New York Rangers Ryan Hollweg semasa permainan pada 8 Mac di Colleseum Peringatan Veteren Nassau.

src: "The National Hockey League will not accept the use of a stick in the manner and fashion in which Mr. Simon used his Thursday night," said Colin Campbell, NHL Senior Executive Vice President and Director of Hockey Operations.
ref: "Liga Hoki Nasional tidak akan menerima kegunaan kayu dalam apa keadaan dan fesyen seperti mana yang digunakan oleh Encik Simon malam Khamis," kata Colin Campbell, Naib Presiden Pegawai Atasan NHL dan Pengarah Operasi Hoki.

src: Based on his $1-million contract, which expires at the conclusion of the 2006-07 season, Simon forfeits a minimum of $80,213.90.
ref: Berdasarkan kontrak $1 juta, yang akan tamat pada konklusi musim 2006-07, Simon kehilangan minimun $80,213.90.

src: "I spoke with Colin Campbell this morning and he informed me of his decision.
ref: "Saya telah bercakap dengan Colin Campbell pagi tadi dan beliau memberi tahu saya tentang keputusannya.

src: Chris Simon has played a major role in our success this season and we will miss his presence in our lineup.
ref: Chris Simon telah memainkan peranan penting dalam kejayaan kita musim ini dan kita akan rindu akan kehadirannya dalam barisan kita.

src: His regret is clearly evident in the statement he released last night.
ref: Beliau menyesal dengan tindakan beliau dalam kenyataan yang dikeluarkan tahun lepas.

src: In a statement March 10, prior to the verdict, Simon expressed regret for his actions.
ref: Dalam kenyataan 10 Mac, Sebelum keputusan dibuat, Simon menyatakan penyesalan terhadap perbuatannya.

src: "After watching the tape the morning after Thursday's game, I was disgusted.
ref: "Selepas melihat rakaman pada pagi Khamis, saya rasa menyampah.

src: There is absolutely no place in hockey for what I did.
ref: Tiada tempat dalam hoki sperti yang dia lakukan.

src: My hope is to reach out to him in the near future."
ref: Harapan saya untuk mendekati beliau pada masa hadapan."

src: When I saw the tape on Friday morning, it explained a lot to me when I saw the look on my face after being hit into the boards.
ref: Semasa saya melihat rakaman itu Jumaat pagi, ia banyak menjelaskan semasa melihat muka saya selepas dipukul oleh kayu.

src: Simon didn't appear to let it excuse his hit on Hollweg.
ref: Simon tidak muncul untuk menyatakan sebab untuk memukul Hollweg.

src: "I need to make clear that this is not justification for the danger I put Ryan Hollweg in and the damage I have caused the game.
ref: "Saya perlukan penjelasan yang jelas bahawa ini bukan justifikasi untuk meletakkan Ryan Hollweg dalam bahaya dan menyebabkan masalah.

src: The Associated Press indicated that criminal charges against Simon are being considered.
ref: Associated Press menyatakan pendakwaan jenayah terhadap Simon akan dipertimbangkan.

src: According to a spokesperson for Nassau County District Attorney Kathleen Rice, "no decision has been reached" on bringing charges, but that "prosecutors would review the tape."
ref: Menurut jurucakap untuk Mahkamah Daerah Negara Nassau Kathleen Rice, "tiada keputusan yang telah dicapai" terhadap denda, tetapi "pendakwa raya akan meneliti rakaman tersebut."

src: The lead singer of Boston, Brad Delp was found dead in his house alone last Friday.
ref: Penyanyi utama Boston, Brad Delp telah ditemui mati seorang diri di rumahnya Jumaat lepas.

src: After the death, the bands website went down and was replaced with the message: "We just lost the nicest guy in rock and roll."
ref: Selepas kematian itu, laman web band itu ditutup dan digantikan dengan mesej: "Kita baru sahaja kehilangan lelaki yang paling baik dalam rock and roll".

src: Their first album, which was self titled, was a huge success.
ref: Album pertama mereka, yang bertajuk diri, merupakan satu kejayaan yang besar.

src: The album had hits on it such as "Long Time" and "More than a Feeling".
ref: Album itu mempunyai lagu hits seperti "Long Time" dan "More than a Feeling".

src: Delp left the band in 1991, and was replaced by Fran Cosmo.
ref: Delp meninggalkan band pada 1991, dan telah diganti oleh Fran Cosmo.

src: The three major US stock market indices each fell two percent from Monday's closing price, marking the second-biggest loss of 2007.
ref: Tiga indeks pasaran saham utama Amerika Syarikat masing-masing turun dua peratus berbanding harga penutupan pada hari Isnin, menandakan kehilangan kedua terbesar tahun 2007.

src: London's FTSE 100, Paris' CAC 40 and Frankfurt's DAX 30 indices each closed down more than 1 percent.
ref: FTSE 100 London, CAC 40 Paris dan DAX 30 indeks Frankfurt setiap satu tutup lebih daripada 1 peratus.

src: As the Mortgage Bankers Association reported that late payments on mortgages and home foreclosures in the US homes rose in the fourth quarter to their highest level in years, investors are concerned that not only US banks but also multi-national banks around the globe could have exposure.
ref: Dengan Persatuan Gadai Janji Bank melaporkan bahawa kelewatan pembayaran gadai janji dan rampasan rumah di perumahan Amerika Syarikat meningkat pada suku keempat ke tahap tertinggi dalam beberapa tahun ini, para pelabur bimbang bukan sahaja bank-bank Amerika Syarikat tetapi juga bank-bank multinasional di seluruh dunia mungkin mempunyai pendedahan.

src: More than two dozen sub-prime lenders have closed or sold operations as defaults on those mortgages have risen.
ref: Lebih daripada dua dozen pemberi pinjaman sub-prima telah tutup atau menjual operasi apabila kegagalan membayar balik gadai janji mereka telah meningkat.

src: The delinquencies and defaults have started to soar, said Nicolas Retsinas, director of Housing Studies at Harvard University.
ref: Tunggakan dan kegagalan bayar telah mula meningkat, kata Nicolas Retsinas, Pengarah Pengajian Perumahan di Universiti Harvard.

src: A lot of these lenders started to make loans and lost track of some of the fundamentals.
ref: Banyak pemberi pinjaman ini mula memberi pinjaman dan kehilangan jejak sesetengah pokok.

src: New Century Financial Corporation, the second largest sub-prime lender in the US, has recently revealed that its creditors were no longer providing funds and, further, it has become subject of an SEC investigation.
ref: Perbadanan Kewangan New Century, pemberi pinjaman sub-prima kedua terbesar di Amerika Syarikat, baru-baru ini mendedahkan bahawa pemiutang tidak lagi menyediakan dana dan tambahan pula, ia telah menjadi subjek penyiasatan SEC.

src: The New York Stock Exchange has said it will delist New Century.
ref: Bursa Saham New York telah berkata ia akan menyahsenaraikan New Century.

src: Accredited Home Loan Lending, another major sub-prime mortgage specialist, said it was seeking fresh capital and waivers on its lending covenants.
ref: Accredited Home Loan Lending, satu lagi pakar gadai janji utama sub-prima, berkata ia mencari modal baru dan pengecualian dalam perjanjian pemberian pinjamannya.

src: The lenders then bundle these mortgages as collateral for loans that they obtain from other financing firms, such as GMAC.
ref: Pemberi pinjaman kemudian menggabungkan semua gadai janji ini sebagai cagaran untuk pinjaman yang mereka perolehi daripada firma pembiayaan yang lain, seperti GMAC.

src: Such firms can then repackage these loans and sell them as mortgage-backed securities.
ref: Firma-firma seperti itu kemudiannya mempakej semula pinjaman-pinjaman ini dan menjualnya sebagai sekuriti bersandarkan gadai janji.

src: These securities may end up in the hands of major multi-national banks such as Citibank, HSBC, and Commerzbank.
ref: Sekuriti-sekuriti ini mungkin akhirnya terjatuh di tangan bank multinasional utama seperti Citibank, HSBC dan Commerzbank.

src: Each level of lending assumes a level of financial risk, but trouble can arise when the risk tolerances are exceeded.
ref: Setiap tahap pinjaman mengandaikan tahap risiko kewangan, tetapi masalah boleh timbul apabila toleransi risiko dilampaui.

src: While no one is predicting major bank failures at this point, it is feared that their profits could be hurt.
ref: Walaupun tiada siapa yang meramalkan kegagalan bank utama pada masa ini, dikhuatiri keuntungan mereka akan terjejas.

src: The Namibian Dairy producers organization requested the Namibian directorate of local income in May 2006 to follow the example of South Africa and declare fresh milk as a basic need upon which no taxation is applicable.
ref: Organisasi pengeluar Tenusu Namibia meminta lembaga pengarah pendapatan tempatan Namibia tersebut pada Mei 2006 untuk mengikut contoh Afrika Selatan dan mengisytiharkan susu segar sebagai keperluan asas dimana tiada cukai boleh dikenakan.

src: Calle Schlettwein, permanent Secretary of the Namibia Ministry of Finance said the decision not to discard VAT on milk is because of two reasons: "This industry is already receiving advantages because of Article 26 of the African Customs Union (SACU)," he said.
ref: Calle Schlettwein, setiausaha tetap Kementerian Kewangan Namibia berkata keputusan tidak menghapuskan VAT keatas susu adalah kerana dua sebab: "Industri ini telah menerima kelebihan kerana Artikel 26 Kesatuan Kastam Africa (SACU)," katanya.

src: The price of fresh milk is to climb by 50c in the beginning of April 2007 following increases in production costs to producers.
ref: Harga susu segar akan meningkat sebanyak 50c pada awal April 2007 menikuti peningkatan dalam kos pengeluaran kepada pengeluar.

src: The dairy industry has warned of a collapse of the industry and a dependence on foreign imports if prices are not increased to match rising production costs.
ref: Industri tenusu telah memberi amaran akan kejatuhan industri tersebut dan kebergantungan kepada import asing jika harga tidak dinaikkan sesuai dengan kenaikan kos pengeluaran.

src: Iraqi Brigadier General Qassim Atta al-Mussawi reported that Operation Law and Order (Arabic: Fardh Al-Qanoon) has been successful in curbing violence in the capital.
ref: Briged Jeneral Iraq Qassim Atta al-Mussawi melaporkan bahawa Undang-undang Operasi dan Perintah (Bahasa Arab: Al-Fardhu Qanoon) telah berjaya membendung keganasan di ibu negara.

src: Coalition forces have swept through various Baghdad neighborhoods in the past few months.
ref: Tentera persekutuan telah bergegas ke beberapa kawasan Baghdad dalam beberapa bulan yang lalu.

src: Atta, a spokesperson for the operation cited comparative statistics for the four-week periods of mid-January to mid-February versus mid-February to mid-March: * Civilian killing: 1440 to 265 * Roadside bombings: 163 to 102 * Carbombs: 56 to 36 * Mortar attacks: 204 to 109 * Assassination incidents: 519 to 22 * Kidnappings: 98 to 10 It is not clear what these numbers are based on, and independent estimates of the death toll are much higher.
ref: Atta, seorang jurucakap untuk operasi itu yang menamakan statistik perbandingan bagi tempoh empat minggu dari pertengahan Januari hingga pertengahan Februari berbanding dengan pertengahan Februari hingga pertengahan Mac: *pembunuhan Orang Awam: 1440 kepada 265 * pengeboman Tepi Jalam: 163 kepada 102 * Pengeboman kereta: 56 kepada 36 * serangan Meriam : 204 kepada 109 * insiden Pembunuhan orang ternama: 519 kepada 22 * Penculikan: 98 kepada 10 Adalah tidak jelas angka-angka ini berdasarkan apa, dan anggaran bebas mengenai jumlah kematian adalah jauh lebih tinggi.

src: The New York Times estimates 450 Iraqi civilian deaths in and around the capital in the period, using initial reports provided by hospitals and the Iraqi Interior ministry.
ref: New York Times menganggarkan 450 kematian orang awam Iraq di dalam dan di sekitar ibu negara dalam tempoh tersebut, menggunakan laporan awal yang disediakan oleh hospital dan Kementerian Dalam Negeri Iraq.

src: The Associated Press reports that deaths from bombings have dropped by a third (528 to 370) after the start of the operations.
ref: The Associated Press melaporkan bahawa kematian akibat pengeboman telah berkurangan sebanyak satu pertiga (528 ke 370) selepas permulaan operasi-operasi itu.

src: It also reports that the number of bodies found in Baghdad, believed to be victims of sectarian death squads, has dropped from more than 200 a week to about 80 a week.
ref: Ia juga melaporkan bahawa bilangan mayat-mayat yang dijumpai di Baghdad, yang dipercayai adalah mangsa skuad pembunuh mazhab, telah berkurang daripada lebih daripada 200 seminggu kepada kira-kira 80 seminggu.

src: "The murders and executions have come down by over 50 percent," Caldwell said.
ref: "Pembunuhan dan hukuman mati telah berkurangan lebih daripada 50 peratus," kata Caldwell.

src: The troop surge has also been in recent debate on whether or not it is the right move as of now.
ref: Peningkatan pasukan tentera baru-baru ini juga telah diperdebatkan sama ada ia adalah langkah yang betul pada masa ini.

src: The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) announced today that computer systems involved with the processing of tax returns for individuals are back online.
ref: Agensi Rizab Kanada (CRA) telah mengumumkan hari ini bahawa sistem komputer yang terlibat dalam pemprosesan pulangan cukai bagi individu telah kembali dalam talian.

src: Tax processing had been halted on March 6, 2007, due to a computer glitch.
ref: Pemprosesan cukai telah terhenti pada 6 Mac, 2007, kerana kerosakan sementara komputer.

src: The source of the problem had been traced back to software maintenance performed on March 4.
ref: Sumber masalah itu dikesan daripada penyelenggaraan perisian yang telah dijalankan pada 4 Mac.

src: Tax processing for businesses had not been affected by the computer shutdown.
ref: Pemprosesan cukai bagi perniagaan tidak terjejas oleh penutupan komputer itu.

src: In his statement, Dorais thanked taxpayers "for their patience and understanding" during the service outage.
ref: Di dalam kenyataannya, Dorais mengucapkan terima kasih kepada pembayar cukai "atas kesabaran dan timbang rasa mereka" semasa gangguan servis berlaku.

src: He also stated that "the integrity and safety of personal data was never at risk".
ref: Dia turut menyatakan bahawa "integriti dan keselamatan maklumat peribadi tidak pernah berada di dalam bahaya".

src: The CRA suggests that it would work quickly to process the resulting backlog of tax returns.
ref: CRA turut mencadangkan yang mereka akan bekerja dengan lebih pantas bagi memproses tunggakan pulangan cukai yang terjadi.

src: However, he did turn himself in after giving the interview.
ref: Bagaimanapun, beliau menyerah diri selepas ditemu bual.

src: John Clarke, the convicted rapist, was on the run from police after leaving his home while he was on home detention on Monday, and two probation officers were also present.
ref: John Clarke, perogol yang disabitkan, sedang melarikan diri daripada polis selepas meninggalkan rumahnya semasa tahanan rumah pada hari Isnin, dan dua pegawai perunding cara juga turut hadir.

src: One News, owned by TVNZ, were interviewing John Clarke yesterday, meanwhile a lot of time and effort from police was going into trying to hunt him down.
ref: One News, yang dimiliki oleh TVNZ, telah menemuramah John Clarke semalam, sementara itu banyak masa dan usaha daripada pihak polis telah dicurahkan untuk memburunya.

src: After they have finished the interview, Mr Clarke handed himself in to the Greymouth police, which One News also recorded.
ref: Setelah mereka selesai temu bual itu, Encik Clarke menyerah diri kepada polis Greymouth, yang One Berita juga merekod.

src: A spokeswoman for TVNZ, Megan Williams said that they would only agree to the interview with Mr Clarke if he handed himself into police after they had finished.
ref: Jurucakap TVNZ, Megan Williams berkata bahawa mereka hanya akan bersetuju untuk menemuduga Encik Clarke jika dia menyerahkan dirinya kepada polis selepas mereka selesai.

src: The police say that they would have expected TVNZ to have called them "...to say 'look Gary, perhaps if you pull back some of your resources at 5 o'clock, this guy's going to give himself up'," said Sergeant Cross.
ref: Pihak polis mengatakan bahawa mereka berjangka TVNZ akan memberitahu mereka "...untuk mengatakan 'Gary, mungkin jika kamu berundur pada pukul 5, lelaki ini akan menyerah diri," kata Sarjan Cross.

src: After having a meeting in Bari, Italy, on the 13th of March, the President of Russia, Vladimir Putin, and the Prime Minister of Italy, Romano Prodi, gave a press-conference, summarizing the results of their conversations.
ref: Selepas mesyuarat di Bari, Itali, pada 13 Mac, Presiden Rusia, Vladimir Putin, dan Perdana Menteri Itali, Romano Prodi, memberikan persidangan akhbar, merumuskan hasil perbualan mereka.

src: The main point the two leaders agreed on was that only diplomatic means should be used in solving such international conflicts as in Afghanistan, Iraq and, especially, Iran with its nuclear program issue.
ref: Perkara paling penting yang kedua-dua pemimpin bersetuju adalah bahawa hanya cara diplomatik boleh digunakan dalam menyelesaikan konflik antarabangsa seperti di Afghanistan, Iraq dan, terutamanya, Iran dengan isu program nuklearnya.

src: Mr. Prodi agreed with the Russian President on this point and also stated that such conflicts should be solved using a multi-lateral approach, where several nations would take part in discussions.
ref: Encik Prodi bersetuju dengan Presiden Rusia pada ketika ini dan juga menyatakan bahawa konflik itu perlu diselesaikan dengan menggunakan pendekatan pelbagai hala, di mana beberapa negara akan mengambil bahagian dalam perbincangan.

src: All of this could be reached only through thoroughly developed partnership agreements, he added.
ref: Semua ini dapat dicapai hanya melalui perjanjian perkongsian yang dibina dengan teliti, katanya.

src: Woolmer was found unconscious in his room at the Pegasus Hotel at 10:45 Sunday morning, only hours after Pakistan's Cricket World Cup exit at the hands of Ireland.
ref: Woolmer ditemui tidak sedarkan diri di dalam biliknya di Hotel Pegasus pada jam 10:45 pagi pada hari Ahad, hanya beberapa jam selepas Pakistan terkeluar dari Piala Dunia Kriket di tangan Ireland.

src: After being found by hotel workers in his room, he was rushed to the emergency department at the University Hospital in Kingston, but doctors where not able to save him.
ref: Selepas ditemui oleh pekerja-pekerja hotel di dalam biliknya, dia dikejarkan ke jabatan kecemasan di Hospital Universiti Kingston, tetapi doktor tidak dapat menyelamatkan dia.

src: Team spokesman Parvez Mir reported that when he was found "He had blood on him and there was vomit on the walls."
ref: Jurucakap pasukan Parvez Mir melaporkan bahawa apabila dia ditemui "Dia mempunyai darah di atasnya dan terdapat muntah di dinding."

src: Mir also told media that Woolmer suffered from a medical condition, but that it was too early to decide whether or not it had anything to do with his death.
ref: Mir juga memberitahu media bahawa Woolmer mengalami masalah kesihatan, tetapi ia masih terlalu awal untuk membuat keputusan sama ada atau tidak ia mempunyai apa-apa kaitan dengan kematiannya.

src: He was to remain coach until after the 2007 World Cup, and was tipped to replace Duncan Fletcher as the coach of England after his contract with the PCB expired.
ref: Beliau kekal sebagai jurulatih sehingga selepas Piala Dunia 2007, dan telah disebut-sebut untuk menggantikan Duncan Fletcher sebagai jurulatih England selepas kontraknya dengan PCB tamat.

src: Two cars have been involved in a road traffic accident in the Scottish Lothian and Borders region, causing three fatalities and sending three to hospital.
ref: Dua buah kereta telah terlibat dalam kemalangan jalan raya di kawasan Lothian and Borders Scotland, menyebabkan tiga kematian dan menghantar tiga orang lain ke hospital.

src: The incident occurred on the A68 road approximately 1.5 miles south of the Midlothian village of Pathhead when a Škoda Octavia and a Nissan Note travelling in opposite directions collided at approximately 0730 UTC today.
ref: Kejadian itu berlaku di jalan raya A68 kira-kira 1.5 batu selatan daripada kampung Midlothian di Pathhead apabila kereta Skoda Octavia dan Nissan Note dalam perjalanan dari arah yang bertentangan berlanggar pada kira-kira 0730 UTC hari ini.

src: The female driver of the vehicle managed to get out of the vehicle herself but another male passenger in the front of the car had to be cut free by fire service members.
ref: Pemandu perempuan kenderaan berjaya keluar dari kenderaan itu sendiri tetapi seorang penumpang lelaki di hadapan kereta terpaksa dibebaskan oleh ahli-ahli bomba.

src: "This is a tragic incident," Inspector Simon Bradshaw of Lothian and Borders Police said, "and we are currently in the process of carrying out inquiries in order to establish the full circumstances of the collision."
ref: "Ini adalah kejadian tragis," Inspektor Simon Bradshaw daripada Lothian and Borders Polis berkata,"dan kami sedang dalam proses menjalankan siasatan untuk mengetahui keadaan penuh perlanggaran".

src: The A68 road close to the location of the accident was temporarily closed to allow police to investigate the incident, with traffic redirected to the B6370 road via the town of Gorebridge.
ref: Jalan A68 yang berhampiran dengan lokasi kemalangan itu ditutup sementara untuk membolehkan polis menyiasat kejadian itu, dan lalu lintas diarahkan ke jalan B6370 melalui bandar Gorebridge.

src: The Airbus A380, the world's largest passenger plane, was set to land in the United States of America on Monday after a test flight.
ref: Airbus A380, kapal terbang penumpang terbesar dunia, dijadualkan untuk mendarat di Amerika Syarikat pada hari Isnin selepas satu ujian penerbangan.

src: One of the A380s is flying from Frankfurt to Chicago via New York; the airplane will be carrying about 500 people.
ref: Salah satu A380 terbang daripada Frankfurt ke Chicago melalui New York; kapal terbang tersebut bakal membawa sekitar 500 orang.

src: A second A380 is also travelling to the U.S. on Monday, but without passengers.
ref: A380 kedua juga berjalan ke A.S. pada Isnin, namun tanpa penumpang.

src: The test flights are being used to monitor everything from how easily the plane docks at the terminal gate to the way the in-flight dining and entertainment services work.
ref: Kapal terbang uji tersebut digunakan untuk memantau semuanya bermula daripada betapa mudahnya kapal terbang tersebut berlabuh di pintu terminal kepada cara perkhidmatan makanan dan hiburan dalam penerbangan berfungsi.

src: Deliveries to Singapore Airlines, its launch customer, are not due until October - two years late.
ref: Penghantaran kepada Singapore Airlines, pelanggan pelancaran tersebut, adalah dijangka sehingga Oktober- dua tahun lewat.

src: Delays of the production of the A380 have cost Airbus more than 6 billion dollars.
ref: Penangguhan pengeluaran A380 telah mengakibatkan Airbus kos sebnyak 6 bilion dolar.

src: Airbus has warned there could be additional charges to come.
ref: Airbus telah memberi amaran adanya kemungkinan bayaran tambahan.

src: These monetary problems have led to a recently-announced restructuring program at Airbus, called Power8, in which 10,000 jobs go and several factories will be sold to Airbus partners.
ref: Masalah kewangan ini telah menjurus kepada program penyusunan semula Airbus yang diumumkan baru-baru ini, digelar Power8, dimana 10,000 pekerjaan hilang dan beberapa kilang bakal dijual kepada rakan kongsi Airbus.

src: France will lose 4,300 jobs, followed by Germany having a loss of 3,700 jobs, while the United Kingdom and Spain will see 1,600 and 400 jobs cut respectively.
ref: Perancis bakal hilang 4,300 pekerjaan, diikuti oleh Jerman yang hilang 3,700 pekerjaan, sementara di United Kingdom dan Sepanyol bakal melihat 1,600 dan 400 pekerjaan hilang masing-masing.

src: The South African government has reported that former President Nelson Mandela has been discharged from a hospital in Pretoria, where he was hospitalised December 8.
ref: Kerajaan Afrika Selatan telah melaporkan bahawa bekas Presiden Nelson Mandela dibenarkan keluar dari sebuah hospital di Pretoria, di mana beliau dimasukkan ke hospital pada 8 Disember.

src: Mandela received hospital treatment for gallstones and a lung infection.
ref: Mandela menerima rawatan hospital untuk merawati penyakit batu karang dan jangkitan paru-paru.

src: Presidential spokesperson Mac Maharaj said Mandela "will undergo home-based high care at his Houghton home until he recovers fully".
ref: Jurucakap presiden Mac Maharaj berkata Mandela "akan menjalani rawatan rapi di rumahnya di Houghton sehingga dia pulih sepenuhnya".

src: Mandela was hospitalised for eighteen days, his longest hospitalisation since 1990, when he was released from prison after 27 years.
ref: Mandela dimasukkan ke hospital selama lapan belas hari, kemasukan ke hospital yang paling lama sejak tahun 1990, apabila beliau dibebaskan dari penjara selepas 27 tahun.

src: Current president Jacob Zuma visited Mandela in hospital this past weekend.
ref: Presiden sekarang Jacob Zuma melawat Mandela di hospital hujung minggu yang lepas.

src: Zuma visited Mandela again on Christmas, as did Graca Machel, Mandela's wife.
ref: Zuma melawat Mandela sekali lagi pada hari Krismas, begitu juga Graca Machel, isteri Mandela.

src: Mandela has been hospitalised three times since the start of last year.
ref: Mandela telah dimasukkan ke hospital tiga kali sejak awal tahun lalu.

src: In January 2011, Mandela received hospital treatment for an acute respiratory infection.
ref: Pada bulan Januari 2011, Mandela menerima rawatan hospital untuk jangkitan pernafasan akut.

src: Work at a Robben Island limestone quarry, where he was imprisoned for sixteen years during South Africa's Apartheid, damaged his eyes and lungs.
ref: Bekerja di sebuah kuari batu kapur Pulau Robben, di mana beliau dipenjarakan selama enam belas tahun semasa Aparteid di Afrika Selatan, merosakkan mata dan paru-parunya.

src: During the 1980s, while still a prisoner on Robben Island, he developed .
ref: Dalam tahun 1980-an, ketika beliau masih seorang tahanan di Pulau Robben, beliau medapat penyakit tersebut.

src: On behalf of the government, Maharaj also asked for a "continuation of the privacy in order to allow for the best possible conditions for full recovery".
ref: Bagi pihak kerajaan, Maharaj juga meminta "lanjutan privasi bagi membolehkan keadaan terbaik untuk pemulihan penuh".

src: As many as nine other buildings in the Lagos Island fire yesterday were also impacted by the flames, according to authorities.
ref: Sebanyak sembilan buah bangunan lain di Pulau Lagos dipengaruhi kebakaran semalam, menurut pihak berkuasa.

src: The fire was reportedly the cause of the explosion, although this is yet to be confirmed.
ref: Kebakaran itu dilaporkan sebagai punca letupan, walaupun ia belum disahkan.

src: Some local residents reportedly jumped out of the windows of buildings in fright in the large commercial area of Jankara.
ref: Beberapa penduduk tempatan dilaporkan melompat keluar dari tingkap bangunan dalam ketakutan di kawasan komersial besar Jankara.

src: Some local businesses were open when the incident occurred, but yesterday was a public holiday in Nigeria.
ref: Sebahagian perniagaan tempatan dibuka semasa kejadian berlaku, tetapi semalam merupakan cuti umum di Nigeria.

src: A school located in close proximity to the warehouse was significantly damaged in the incident.
ref: Sebuah sekolah yang terletak di kawasan berhampiran gudang tersebut rosak teruk dalam kejadian tersebut.

src: The windows of several nearby buildings were also destroyed as the fire caused the windows of houses a few miles away to shake.
ref: Tingkap beberapa buah bangunan berdekatan juga rosak kerana kebakaran tersebuut menyebabkan gegaran tingkap rumah-rumah beberapa batu jauhnya.

src: Crowds of thousands of nearby people accumulated near the fire, with spectators and individuals intending to assist or gain information about relatives amongst them.
ref: Ribuan orang ramai dari kawasan berdekatan berkumpul berhampiran kebakaran, dengan penonton dan individu ingin membantu dan memperolehi maklumat mengenai saudara-mara mereka.

src: Some people in the crowd attempted to assist fire crews with holding fire hoses and gathering water-filled containers.
ref: Sesetengah orang ramai cuba membantu pihak bomba dengan memegang hos api dan mengumpul bekas yang mengandungi air.

src: Some of these people were taken to hospital for treatment after experiencing injuries.
ref: Sesetangah dari mereka dibawa kehospital untuk rawatan setelah mengalami kecederaan.

src: Additional water arrived later, as the severity of the fire slowly decreased.
ref: Tambahan air tiba kemudian, apabila kekuatan api berkurangan secara perlahan-lahan.

src: News agency Reuters was told by a government official that the possibility of further explosions from fireworks also interfered with the fire service's rescue operation.
ref: Agensi berita Reuters diberitahu oleh pegawai kerajaan yang kemungkinan letupan lajutan akibat bunga api juga mengganggu operasi penyelamatan pihak bomba.

src: Ibrahim Farinloye from the National Emergency Management Agency reported one fatality to Agence France-Presse (AFP), saying: "We pulled out a body from the building".
ref: Ibrahim Farinloye dari Agensi Pengurusan Kecemasan Negara melaporkan satu kematian kepada Agence France-Presse (AFP), mengatakan: "Kami menarik keluar satu mayat dari bangunan tersebut".

src: Nicolas Adesile, of the Red Cross, told the same news agency that as many as thirty people have been treated thus far.
ref: Nicolas Adesile, dari Palang Merah, memberitahu agensi berita yang sama bahawa sebanyak tiga puluh orang telah dirawat setakat ini.

src: It was a frustrating game for the Penguins, as they were unable to convert 0 of 6 power play attempts.
ref: Ia merupakan perlawanan yang mengecewakan bagi Penguins, apabila mereka tidak dapat menukar 0 daripada 6 cubaan power play.

src: After Armstrong scored, the Islanders' defense tightened, and would not give up another goal.
ref: Selepas Armstrong mendapatkan mata, pertahanan Islanders diperketat, dan tidak melepaskan gol yang lain.

src: Less than three minutes later, Jason Blake would notch his 36th of the year, beating Penguins goalie Marc-Andre Fleury.
ref: Kurang dari tiga minit kemudian, Jason Blake yang akan menjarikan gol ke-36 tahun itu, menewaskan penjada gol Penguins Marc-Andre Fleury.

src: Blake's goal was assisted by Ryan Smith and Tom Poti.
ref: Jaringan Blake dibantu oleh Ryan Smith and Tom Poti.

src: This effort by the Greek government has been fully supported by the Embassy of the United States in Athens which, in a statement, announced that offers up to $1 million to those who will significantly help towards the capture of terrorists.
ref: Usaha kerajaan Greek ini mendapat sokongan penuh oleh Kedutaan Amerika Syarikat di Athens yang mana, di dalam satu kenyataan, telah mengumumkan akan tawaran itu sehingga ke $1 juta kepada mereka yang banyak menolong bagi penangkapan pengganas - pengganas itu.

src: As the Embassy stated, "you can help bring terrorists to justice and save lives by providing valuable information to resolve past acts of terrorism or prevent future ones".
ref: Sepertimana yang telah dinyatakan oleh Kedutaan itu, "kamu dapat membantu membawa pengganas ke pengadilan dan menyelamatkan banyak nyawa dengan memberi maklumat berharga untuk menyelesaikan tindakan pengganasan yang terdahulu atau pencegahan di masa hadapan."

src: ELA took responsibility for a rocket attack against the US Embassy in Athens, on January 12, 2007.
ref: ELA telah mengaku bertanggungjawab ke atas serangan roket ke Kedutaan US di Athens, pada 12 Januari, 2007.

src: The submarine was not in danger and its nuclear reactor was unaffected.
ref: Kapal selam tersebut tidak dalam keadaan bahaya dan reaktor nuklear tidak terjejas.

src: The crew brought the submarine to surface quickly through the ice.
ref: Kru tersebut menaikkan kapal selam ke atas pemukaan dengan cepat menembusi ais.

src: The Tireless was fitted, in 2001, with an update to the piece of air-purification machinery thought to have failed.
ref: The Tireless telah dipasang, pada tahun 2001, dengan kemas kini mesin penulenan udara yang dianggap gagal.

src: He added, "I also wish to pay tribute to the crew of HMS Tireless that this incident has been dealt with and contained so professionally."
ref: Dia bertambah, "Saya juga ingin memberi penghormatan kepada kru HMS Tireless kerana insiden ini telah diselesaikan dan dilakukan dengan amat profesional".

src: It was not stated what the official cause of death was.
ref: Sebab rasmi kematian pegawai tersebut tidak dinyatakan.

src: According to the Iranian navy's Habibollah Sayyari, the "Velayat 91" drills — to be held for a six day period ending on Wednesday — are intended to showcase "the armed forces' military capabilities."
ref: Menurut tentera laut Iran Habibollah Sayyari, latihan "Velayat 91" - akan diadakan dalam tempoh enam hari yang akan berakhir pada hari Rabu - bertujuan untuk mempamerkan "keupayaan ketenteraan angkatan tentera."

src: Iran's state-run media reports that the Iranian government warns all ships to stay away until the end of the exercises.
ref: Media negera yang dikendalikan oleh Iran melaporkan bahawa kerajaan Iran memberi amaran kepada semua kapal untuk menjauhkan diri sehingga latihan berakhir.

src: According to this report the drills — which began on Friday — are to be conducted over roughly half a million square miles (a million square kilometers) of waters stretching from the Strait of Hormuz to the northern part of the Indian Ocean which includes the Gulf of Oman.
ref: Menurut laporan latihan ini - yang bermula pada hari Jumaat - akan dijalankan atas kira-kira setengah juta batu persegi (satu juta kilometer persegi) kawasan laut bermula dari Selat Hormuz sehingga ke bahagian utara Lautan Hindi termasuk Teluk Oman.

src: The Strait of Hormuz is a major shipping route of great strategic importance.
ref: Selat Hormuz merupakan laluan perkapalan utama yang mempunyai kepentingan strategik yang besar.

src: That is nearly 20% of the worldwide oil trade and about 35% of oil transported by sea.
ref: Itu hampir kepada 20% daripada perdagangan minyak di seluruh dunia dan kira-kira 35% daripada minyak diangkut melalui laut.

src: This is only one in a series of major naval drills held by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz.
ref: Ini hanya satu daripada beberapa siri latihan ketenteraan laut utama yang diadakan oleh Iran di Selat Hormuz.

src: Four months ago, the United States with some of its allies also conducted a series of exercises and naval drills, concerned with keeping the strait open.
ref: Empat bulan lalu, Amerika Syarikat dengan beberapa sekutunya juga menjalankan beberapa siri latihan dan latihan ketenteraan laut, mengambil berat untuk memastikan selat itu buka.

src: England beat Kenya by 7 wickets (with 60 balls remaining) in the final Group C game in the World Cup at Beausejour Stadium, Gros Islet, Saint Lucia.
ref: England menewaskan Kenya dengan 7 wickets (dengan 60 bola berbaki) dalam perlawanan terakhir Kumpulan C di Piala Dunia di Stadium Beausejour, Gros Islet, Saint Lucia.

src: England will now advance through to the Super 8 stage.
ref: England kini akan mara ke peringkat Super 8.

src: Rain delayed the start of the match by some two hours, and therefore the match was only a 43 over game.
ref: Hujan menangguhkan permulaan perlawanan itu selama kira-kira dua jam, dan oleh itu perlawanan itu hanya mencapai mata 43 dalam keseluruhan permainan.

src: Former Roman Catholic priest Bartley Sorensen of the US state of Pennsylvania was yesterday sentenced to eight years and one month in federal prison after pleading guilty to child pornography charges in May 2012.
ref: Bekas paderi Roman Katolik Bartley Sorensen dari negeri Pennsylvania Amerika Syarikat telah dihukum penjara lapan tahun dan satu bulan semalam di penjara persekutuan selepas mengaku bersalah atas tuduhan pornografi kanak-kanak pada bulan Mei 2012.

src: Police investigating the case found some 5,000 child pornography images in Sorenson's church office.
ref: Polis yang menyiasat kes itu menjumpai kira-kira 5,000 imej pornografi kanak-kanak di pejabat gereja Sorenson ini.

src: Sorenson has also been ordered to pay a fine of $25,000.
ref: Sorenson juga telah diarah supaya membayar denda sebanyak $25,000.

src: CBC's French language network Télévision de Radio-Canada indicated the initial results were erroneous.
ref: Rangkaian Television de Radio-Canada CBC berbahasa Perancis menunjukkan keputusan awal adalah salah.

src: The ADQ have won well over the seats needed for them to have official party status.
ref: ADQ telah memenangi lebih daripada kerusi yang diperlukan bagi mereka untuk mempunyai status rasmi parti.

src: In the 2003 Quebec election they won a total of 4 seats, and would have needed 8 more seats to obtain party status.
ref: Pada tahun 2003 pilihan raya Quebec mereka memenangi sebanyak 4 kerusi, dan memerlukan 8 kerusi lagi untuk mendapatkan status parti.

src: In the 2003 election, the ADQ garnered 21% of the vote.
ref: Pada pilihan raya 2003, ADQ mendapat 21% undi.

src: If the results of the 2007 election holds, with 31% of the vote for the ADQ, it would represent a significant gain for the party.
ref: Jika keputusan pilihan raya 2007 dapat dikekalkan, dengan 31% daripada undi untuk ADQ, ia akan mewakili keuntungan yang ketara untuk parti.

src: The move to apply the money so quickly to tax cuts during the campaign, resonated with some as a cynical move to buy votes, and may have harmed the Liberal chances.
ref: Langkah itu adalah untuk memohon wang dengan cepat untuk pemotongan cukai semasa kempen, dikhabarkan dengan sebahagian daripadanya sebagai langkah sinis untuk membeli undi, dan mungkin telah menganiaya peluang Liberal.

src: Compared to the 2003 election, voter turnout is up by approximately 3%, according to Elections Quebec.
ref: Berbanding dengan pilihan raya 2003, peratusan keluar mengundi adalah sehingga kira-kira 3%, menurut Pilihan Raya Quebec.

src: At Wilfrid Laurier University in Waterloo, Ontario, Canada, students are finding that popular MP3 players, such as Apple's iPod, are very convenient devices for listening to music at the gym, while traveling on foot, and in the car.
ref: Di Universiti Wilfrid Laurier di Waterloo, Ontario, Kanada, pelajar mendapati bahawa pemain MP3 popular seperti Apple iPod, adalah alat yang sangat sesuai untuk mendengar muzik di gym, semasa berjalanan kaki, dan di dalam kereta.

src: 94 of the 150 students (62.66%) did in fact own MP3 devices, most of who were found to be carrying it on them when questioned.
ref: 94 daripada 150 pelajar (62.66%) mempunyai alat MP3 sendiri, kebanyakan daripadanya didapati membawa bersama mereka ketika disoal.

src: There was one simple follow up question for those who had a player: "If it were possible to have complete and safe control of the device on the steering wheel of a car, would you rather listen to your device, or the radio?"
ref: Ada satu soalan susulan mudah bagi mereka yang mempunyai alat itu: "Jika alat itu mampu mempunyai kawalan penuh dan selamat pada stereng kereta, adakah kamu ingin mendengarnya, atau radio?"

src: Of the 94, 78 (82.98%) said yes, eleven (11.70%) said no, and five (5.32%) said both.
ref: Daripada 94, 78 (82.98%) berkata ya, sebelas (11.70%) berkata tidak, dan lima (5.32%) berkata kedua-duanya.

src: The reasons for those who would listen to their device were commercial free music, personalized choice of music, and complete control of what you are listening to.
ref: Sebab-sebab bagi mereka yang akan mendengar alat mereka adalah muzik komersial yang bebas, pilihan muzik peribadi, dan kawalan yang lengkap atas apa yang anda dengar.

src: Many are being built with auxiliary jacks for the stock radio, allowing the driver to easily connect any audio playing device to the car's sound system with a simple 3.5mm plug.
ref: Kebanyakannya sedang dibina dengan bicu tambahan untuk stok radio, membolehkan pemandu untuk menyambung apa-apa alat pemain audio dengan mudah ke sistem bunyi kereta dengan palam 3.5mm yang biasa.

src: What's more, cars in the upper price echelon are being built with (1) a custom made area in the dash for MP3 players (iPod's being the most popular), and (2) implementing audio device control right onto the steering wheel.
ref: Malah, kereta-kereta bernilai tinggi sedang dibina dengan (1) kawasan tempah-khas dalam papan pemuka untuk pemain MP3 (iPod adalah yang paling popular), dan (2) kawalan alat audio terus di stereng.

src: The march, titled "326 March for Democracy and Peace", will begin in ten different locations, converging on the square near the Presidential Office in downtown Taipei City.
ref: Perarakan, bertajuk "Perarakan 326 untuk Demokrasi dan Keamanan," akan bermula di sepuluh lokasi yang berbeza, bertumpu di dataran berhampiran Pejabat Presiden di pusat bandar Bandar Taipei.

src: "Democracy and peace are the ultimate goal of the march," said Joseph Wu, the Mainland Affairs Council Chairman.
ref: "Demokrasi dan keamanan adalah matlamat utama perarakan," kata Joseph Wu, Pengerusi Majlis Hal Ehwal Tanah Besar.

src: Wu announced on Friday that he would take part in the rally, but did not disclose in which part of the parade he would appear.
ref: Wu mengumumkan pada Jumaat lalu bahawa beliau akan mengambil bahagian dalam perhimpunan tersebut, tetapi tidak mendedahkan di bahagian perarakan yang mana yang beliau akan muncul.

src: "I cannot and will not be absent on March 26, and I will take my entire family to participate in this sacred moment in history to walk and stand up together with the Taiwanese people," Chen said.
ref: "Saya tidak boleh dan tidak akan tidak hadir pada 26 Mac, dan saya akan membawa seluruh keluarga saya untuk mengambil bahagian dalam momen keramat dalam sejarah ini untuk berjalan dan berdiri bersama-sama dengan rakyat Taiwan," kata Chen.

src: A Chinese scholar warned that the situation could become "further aggravated" by Saturday's planned event.
ref: Seorang sarjana Cina memberi amaran bahawa keadaan akan menjadi "lebih buruk" disebabkan acara yang dirancang Sabtu ini.

src: "Such moves are doomed to meet failure," said Huang Jiashu, a professor at the People's University of China.
ref: "Pergerakan seperti ini pasti akan bertemu kegagalan," kata Huang Jiashu, seorang profesor di Universiti Rakyat China.

src: He stated that secessionist forces had "malevolently distorted" the anti-secession law.
ref: Beliau menyatakan bahawa kuasa-kuasa puak pemisah telah "memutarbelitkan" undang-undang anti-pemisah.

src: The Taiwan Domestic News Hour on ETTV is running a 326 graphic to note the march and rally during its news reports about the upcoming event, and also has an animated graphic with marchers carrying signs in the lower-left hand corner of the screen.
ref: Berita Tempatan Taiwan di ETTV sedang mempertontonkan 326 grafik dalam laporan berita mereka untuk mendapatkan perhatian mengenai perarakan dan perhimpunan yang bakal berlangsung, dan juga mempunyai grafik animasi dengan pengarak perbarisan membawa tanda-tanda di sudut bawah kiri hujung skrin.

src: Television star Jerry Springer has signed a contract to join the year-old political network Air America Radio Network starting April 1.
ref: Bintang televisyen Jerry Springer telah menandatangani kontrak untuk menyertai angkaian politik Air America Radio Network bermula 1 April.

src: After initially being carried by only 45 stations nationwide, the host of the long-running syndicated program, The Jerry Springer Show will eventually have his radio show heard on all 51 Air America affiliates.
ref: Selepas pada mulanya dibawa oleh hanya 45 stesen di seluruh negara, hos kepada program bersindiket yang telah lama disiarkan itu, Jerry Springer Show akan akhirnya kedengaran di semua 51 sekutu Air America.

src: The show also is planned to be broadcast by the Sirius and XM satellite radio services.
ref: Rancangan itu juga dijangka akan disiarkan oleh servis radio satelit Sirius dan XM.

src: "Progressive, populist voices need to be a part of our nation's dialogue," Springer said in a press release.
ref: "Progresif, suara populis perlu menjadi sebahagian daripada dialog negara kita," kata Springer dalam satu kenyataan akhbar.

src: Although best-known for his low-budget, tongue-in-cheek talk show, Springer does have a political pedigree.
ref: Walaupun terkenal dengan bajet rendah, rancangan bualbicara gurauan, Springer sebenarnya mempunyai kelulusan politik.

src: He was a Democrat mayor of Cincinnati in 1977 and made a failed bid for governor of Ohio in 1982.
ref: Dia adalah seorang Datuk Bandar Demokrat Cincinnati pada tahun 1977 dan gagal untuk menjadi gabenor Ohio pada tahun 1982.

src: It was an unusual ending to Thursday's game at U.S. Cellular Field between the Chicago White Sox and the Cleveland Indians.
ref: Perlawanan U.S. Cellular Field Khamis lalu di antara Chicago White Sox dengan Cleveland Indians berakhir dengan luar biasa.

src: Pierzynski with the bases loaded, walking in the winning run.
ref: Pierzynski dengan memijak tapak, dan mendapat larian kemenangan.

src: Grady Sizemore got things started for the Indians by hitting a solo home run in the first, but the Sox would tie it up in the second on a Paul Konerko RBI groundout.
ref: Grady Sizemore memulakan segalanya untuk Indians dengan memukul satu solo lari habis di pusingan pertama, tetapi Sox menyerikan keputusan pada pusingan kedua dengan Paul Konerko keluar padang RBI.

src: Another Indian homer came from the bat of Jason Michaels, but the Sox again tie it up in the fourth with Tadahito Iguchi hitting an RBI sacrifice fly.
ref: Satu lagi larian habis Indian datang dari pemukul Jason Michaels, tetapi Sox sekali lagi menyerikan keputusan di dalam pusingan keempat dengan Tadahito Iguchi memukul satu balingan korban RBI.

src: Matt Thornton is credited a blown save for giving up Chicago's one run lead in the eighth.
ref: Matt Thornton diberi penghargaan penyelamat terbaik kerana memberi Chicago satu larian mendahului di pusingan kelapan.

src: Cleveland starter Jeremy Sowers pitched the first six innings, giving up just a hit and two runs.
ref: Pemula Cleveland Jeremy Sowers membaling untuk enam pusingan, memberi hanya satu pukulan dan dua larian.

src: The White Sox, now 1-2, are staying in town to play the visiting Minnesota Twins while Cleveland, now 2-1, will go home to face off against the Seattle Mariners.
ref: White Sox, sekarang 1-2, berada di bandar untuk melawan Minnesota Twins yang akan datang melawat sementara Cleveland, sekarang 2-1, akan pulang bagi menghadapi Seattle Mariners.

src: IBM's T.J. Watson Research Center in Cambridge released a free tool March 25 for visualizing the changing history of a document or directory of documents, called history flow.
ref: Pusat Penyelidikan T.J. Watson IBM di Cambridge telah mengeluarkan satu peralatan percuma pada 25 Mac bagi pemvisualan perubahan sejarah sebuah dokumen atau direktori dokumen, yang dipanggil aliran sejarah.

src: The tool offers a variety of views of document histories, including a view that gives each revision equal importance, and a timeline view which displays each revision proportionally to how long it remained current.
ref: Peralatan tersebut menawarkan pelbagai pandangan tentang dokumen sejarah, termasuk satu pandangan yang memberi setiap semakan kepentingan yang sama, dan sebuah pandangan garis waktu yang menunjukkan setiap semakan mengikut kadar kepada berapa lama ia kekal semasa.

src: The tool was first developed in 2003 by a collaboration between Fernanda B. Viégas of the MIT Media Lab and Martin Wattenberg and Kushal Dave of IBM.
ref: Peralatan itu pertama kali dibangunkan pada tahun 2003 dengan satu kerjasama di antara Fernanda B. Vieges dari Makmal Media MIT dan Martin Wattenberg dan Kushal Dave dari IBM.

src: It was initially tested out on a large subset of the pages of Wikipedia, a free online encyclopedia project which preserves every change made to each of its articles.
ref: Ia pada mulanya diuji ke atas satu bahagian besar dari halaman di Wikipedia, sebuah projek ensiklopedia percuma dalam talian yang mengekalkan setiap perubahan yang dibuat ke atas setiap artikelnya.

src: The resulting paper was drafted in the winter of 2003 and presented at a conference in April 2004; it remains the most comprehensive overview of the lifecycle of articles in an active wiki community.
ref: Keputusannya telah dirangka pada musim sejuk tahun 2003 dan dibentangkan di sebuah konferens pada April 2004; ia kekal sebagai gambaran keseluruhan yang paling komprehensif bagi kitaran hayat setiap artikel di dalam sebuah komuniti aktif wiki.

src: A year later, the history flow paper is still the most frequently cited source of statistics about the reversion of vandalism on Wikipedia.
ref: Setahun selepas itu, kertas aliran sejarah itu masih kekal sebagai sumber statistik yang paling banyak dipetik bagi pengembalian vandalisme di Wikipedia.

src: The current tool is maintained by Martin Wattenberg and Jonathan Feinberg at IBM.
ref: Peralatan itu pada masa kini diselenggara oleh Martin Wattenberg and Jonathan Feinberg di IBM.

src: The tool is free to download and use, but its code is not open source.
ref: Peralatan itu adalah percuma untuk dimuat turun dan digunakan, tetapi kodnya bukan dari sumber terbuka.

src: Everton came from behind to thrash Fulham 4-1 on Friday at Goodison Park.
ref: Everton kembali menunjukkan dirinya untuk membelasah Fulham 4-1 pada Jumaat di Goodison Park.

src: England international Andy Johnson was paired with 18 year old James Vaughan up front for Everton, while Chris Coleman's Fulham had a full North American strike force through American Bryan McBride and Canadian Thomasz Radzinski.
ref: Pemain antarabangsa England Andy Johnson telah dipasangkan dengan James Vaughan 18 tahun di barisan depan Everton, manakala Chris Coleman dari Fulham mempunyai kuasa serangan penuh Amerika Utara melalui Bryan McBride dan Kanada Thomasz Radzinski dari Amerika.

src: The visitors started the game strongly with long range efforts from Rosenior and Smertin, but neither were able to bother Tim Howard in the Everton goal.
ref: Pasukan pelawat memulakan permainan dengan bersemangat dengan usaha jangka panjang dari Rosenior dan Smertin, tetapi tidak mampu untuk menggoyahkan Tim Howard di gol Everton.

src: Carlos Bocanegra then opened Everton wide open as he stole away from the defenders and headed home Simon Davies' cross, giving Fulham the lead after 22 minutes.
ref: Carlos Bocanegra kemudian membuka luas jaring Everton apabila dia mencuri dari pemain pertahanan dan menuju rumah Simon Davies, memberikan Fulham mendahului selepas 22 minit.

src: Everton answered back quickly through Lee Carsley after Joleon Lescott's ball found him in the box, and Carsley knocked home the equalizing goal.
ref: Everton membalas kembali dengan pantas melalui Lee Carsley selepas mendapat bola daripada Joleon Lescott di dalam kotak, dan Carsley menyamakan gol.

src: Everton put Fulham on the back foot after their goal, and should have taken the lead when a nice interchange of play between Vaughan and Johnson left Vaughaun all alone on net, but his shot was hit off the post, and bobbled safely to a Fulham defender.
ref: Everton meletakkan Fulham di belakang selepas menjaringkan gol mereka, dan sepatutnya mendahului dengan permainan yang cantik antara Vaughan dan Johnson meninggalkan Vaughaun sendirian di gawang, tetapi rembatannya terkena tiang, dan melantun dengan selamat kearah pemain pertahanan Fulham.

src: Vaughaun would hit the post again several minutes later, but he finally notched his name on the scoresheet just before the break.
ref: Vaughaun terkena tiang lagi beberapa minit kemudian, tetapi dia akhirnya mencatat namanya pada kertas skor sejurus sebelum rehat.

src: Arteta and Johnson made room on the left side, and Arteta's cross was finished well by the young Vaughan, giving Everton a demanding 3-1 lead.
ref: Arteta dan Johnson membuat ruang di sebelah kiri, dan halangan Arteta dapat dilepasi dengan baik oleh Vaughan yang masih muda, memberikan Everton mendahului dengan 3-1.

src: After the break, Fulham came out strongly, eager to get back into the match.
ref: Selepas rehat, Fulham keluar dengan bertenaga, bersemangat untuk kembali ke dalam perlawanan itu.

src: McBride had two good chances from headers, but he was unable to find the net on either.
ref: McBride mendapat dua peluang tandukan yang baik, tetapi beliau gagal mencari jaring dalam kedua-dua percubaan.

src: Zat Knight then had a chance for Fulham, but the cottagers where again unable to get their attempts on target.
ref: Zat Knight kemudian mendapat peluang untuk Fulham, tetapi sekali lagi gagal mensasarkan percubaan mereka pada sasaran.

src: Vuaghan was soon replaced by fellow youngster Victor Anichebe, and he made a nearly instant impact.
ref: Vuaghan tidak lama kemudian digantikan oleh rakan sepasukan yang muda iaitu Victor Anichebe, dan beliau memberikan perubahan yang hampir serta-merta.

src: Anichebee received a pass within the box, and he cooly side-footed the ball hard and low past Niemi, leaving the keeper no chance, and guaranteeing Everton the win on the afternoon.
ref: Anichebee menerima hantaran dalam kotak, dan dia dengan bersahaja menyepak sisi bola dengan kuat dan rendah melepasi Niemi, membuatkan penjaga gol tiada peluang, sekaligus menjamin Everton menang pada sebelah petang.

src: Substitute Helguson had two chances in quick succession for Fulham, but it wasn't to be their day, as the cottagers drop dangerously into relegation contention.
ref: Pemain ganti Helguson mendapat dua peluang secara berturut-turut untuk Fulham, tetapi hari ini bukan hari mereka, dan mereka telah tersingkir.

src: Everton's next match in the league is in only 3 days time against Bolton, who are now in sixth place after the Toffee's win.
ref: Perlawanan seterusnya bagi Everton dalam liga adalah hanya dalam masa 3 hari menentang Bolton, yang kini berada di tempat keenam selepas kemenangan keatas Toffee.

src: Fulham on the other hand will be facing off with fellow relegation contenders Manchester City at Craven Cottage, and it is looking up to be a true relegation six-pointer.
ref: Fulham pula akan berhadapan dengan pesaing yang juga tersingkir Manchester City di Craven Cottage, menanti untuk menjadi pasukan yang tersingkir enam mata.

src: As intended, this will help audience to distinguish the tyres, it will be more helpful than the previous white heavy dot on the outer side of the tyre.
ref: Sebagaimana dikehendaki, ini akan membantu penonton untuk membezakan tayar, ia akan menjadi lebih berguna berbanding titik putih besar sebelumnya di bahagian luar tayar.

src: Cambridge University have defeated Oxford University by 1¼ lengths to win the 153rd Boat Race.
ref: Universiti Cambridge telah mengalahkan Universiti Oxford dengan kepanjangan 1¼ untuk memenangi perlumbaan bot ke 153.

src: Oxford finished with a time of 18 minutes and 2 seconds.
ref: Oxford tamat dengan catatan masa 18 minit dan 2 saat.

src: Oxford had the stronger start and were ahead for much of the first half of the race.
ref: Oxford mempunyai permulaan yang lebih kukuh dan berada di hadapan bagi lebih separuh masa pertama perlumbaan.

src: They had a slight advantage over Cambridge at Hammersmith Bridge, where they would be favoured by racing the inside of the upcoming bend.
ref: Mereka mempunyai sedikit kelebihan berbanding dengan Cambridge di Hammersmith Bridge, di mana mereka akan disebelahi dengan berlumba di bahagian dalam selekoh yang mendatang.

src: Before the race, Cambridge were strong favourites, being 9lb heavier per man on average.
ref: Sebelum perlumbaan, Cambridge adalah kegemaran ramai, dengan setiap lelaki 9lb lebih berat secara purata.

src: The Cambridge crew had 5 returning blues compared to Oxford's one.
ref: Kelasi Cambridge mempunyai 5 orang pendayung yang kembali bermain berbanding Oxford satu.

src: Furthermore the international achievement of Cambridge's rowers far exceeded that of Oxford: the World Champion stern pair of Germans Thorsten Engelmann (the heaviest ever oarsman at 110.8kg) and Sebastian Schulte, Olympic Gold medallist Kieran West MBE and GB medal winner Tom James.
ref: Tambahan pula pencapaian antarabangsa pendayung Cambridge jauh melebihi Oxford: pasangan tegas Juara Dunia Jerman Thorsten Engelmann (pendayung paling berat dengan berat badan 110.8kg) dan Sebastian Schulte, pemenang pingat Emas Olimpik Kieran West MBE dan pemenang pingat GB Tom James.

src: The heavily fancied Cambridge crew did not win by the margin expected by many, thanks in part to a strong row from Oxford, and the sagging stern containing the heaviest Cambridge oarsmen.
ref: Kelasi Cambridge yang banyak disukai tidak menang dengan beza yang dijangka oleh ramai, disebabkan dayungan kuat dari Oxford, dan bahagian belakang bot yang senget membawa pendayung Cambridge yang paling berat.

src: Also of note, only a week before, Cambridge were victorious at the prestigious Head of the River Race (raced on the same course, but from Mortlake to Putney).
ref: Juga harus diperhatikan, hanya seminggu sebelum itu, Cambridge menang dalam Perlumbaan Head of the River yang berprestij (berlumba di laluan yang sama, tetapi dari Mortlake ke Putney).

src: However the race was abandoned due to weather conditions with only 29 out of 420 crews finishing.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun perlumbaan itu ditinggalkan kerana keadaan cuaca dengan hanya 29 daripada 420 kru tamatkan permainan itu.
