src: The race, first held in 1829, is currently held on a 6,779 m (4 miles and 374 yards) stretch of the River Thames in London from Putney to Mortlake.
ref: Perlumbaan itu, yang pertama diadakan pada 1829, kini diadakan sepanjang Sungai Thames di London dari Putney untuk Mortlake yang berpanjangan 6779 m (4 batu dan 374 ela).

src: In the earlier race for reserve crews, Goldie (Cambridge) beat Isis (Oxford).
ref: Dalam perlumbaan sebelum ini untuk kelasi simpanan, Goldie (Cambridge) menewaskan Isis (Oxford).

src: Racing for the women's and lightweight crews took place at Henley on April 1st, where Cambridge won the Women's Boat Race and Oxford won the reserve women's, lightweight women's, lightweight men's and reserve lightweight men's races.
ref: Perlumbaan untuk wanita dan kelasi kelas ringan berlangsung di Henley pada 1 April, di mana Cambridge memenangi Perlumbaan Bot Wanita dan Oxford memenangi wanita kelas ringan pemain simpanan, wanita kelas ringan, lelaki kelas ringan dan pemain simpanan, lelaki kelas ringan.

src: A conflict erupted between Greek Orthodox monks and Arab Christians in Jerusalem on Good Friday, as the Arab Christians protested the monks' sale of church land to Jewish residents.
ref: Konflik meletus antara sami Ortodoks Greek dan Kristian Arab di Jerusalem pada hari Good Friday, kerana orang-orang Kristian Arab membantah penjualan tanah gereja oleh sami-sami kepada penduduk Yahudi.

src: Israeli police broke up the protest near the Church of the Holy Sepulchre.
ref: Polis Israel memecahkan protes berhampiran dengan Gereja Holy Sepulchre.

src: Omar Harani, a 25-year-old leading the protesters, told the Telegraph, "We gave the land 2,000 years ago to the Church to look after," and continued, "So it is not their land to sell."
ref: Omar Harani, yang berusia 25 tahun mengetuai penunjuk perasaan, memberitahu Telegraph, "Kami telah memberikan tanah 2,000 tahun yang lalu kepada Gereja untuk menjaga," dan lagi, "Jadi ia bukan tanah mereka untuk dijual".

src: "For hundreds of years we Christians, who used to be 15 per cent of the population, have been persecuted and driven out of the Holy Land and now we are a tiny minority."
ref: "Selama beratus-ratus tahun kita orang Kristian, yang pernah menjadi 15 peratus daripada penduduk, telah dianiaya dan dihalau keluar dari Tanah Suci dan kini kita minoriti kecil".

src: "But we will make our voice heard to stop this sale."
ref: "Tetapi kita akan membuat suara kita didengari untuk menghentikan penjualan ini".

src: In a land of four million people where roughly one fourth of the population faces danger of hunger, opposition party supporters are receiving a harsh message from government run emergency food stations in the run up to Thursday's election: Vote for Mugabe, or starve.
ref: Di satu kawasan yang didiami empat juta orang di mana kira-kira satu perempat daripada penduduknya menghadapi bahaya kelaparan, penyokong parti pembangkang menerima mesej kasar dari stesen makanan kecemasan kerajaan saat-saat menjelang pilihan raya pada hari Khamis: Undi untuk Mugabe, atau kebuluran.

src: The government food distribution agency is the only source for something to eat for vast numbers of Zimbabweans today.
ref: Agensi pengagihan makanan kerajaan adalah satu-satunya sumber untuk makanan untuk sejumlah besar orang Zimbabwe pada masa kini.

src: Determined to destroy opposition parties, Mugabe and his supporters seek to prevent anyone who supports the opposition from receiving rations.
ref: Bertekad untuk memusnahkan parti-parti pembangkang, Mugabe dan penyokongnya berusaha untuk menghalang sesiapa yang menyokong pembangkang daripada menerima catuan.

src: New Zealand beat South Africa by 5 wickets in the Super 8 phase of the World Cup at the Cricket National Stadium, St. George's, Grenada, securing their place in the semi-finals, along with Australia, Sri Lanka and a currently unknown team.
ref: New Zealand mengalahkan Afrika Selatan dengan 5 wiket di dalam fasa Super 8 Piala Dunia di Stadium Kriket Kebangsaan, St. George's, Grenada, menjaminkan tempat mereka ke suku akhir, bersama-sama Australia, Sri Langka dan sebuah lagi pasukan yang masih belum diketahui.

src: South Africa will have to beat England in their upcoming game in order to secure their progression.
ref: Afrika Selatan perlu menumpaskan England dalam pertarungan berikutnya untuk menjamin kemaraan mereka.

src: Ridden by Robbie Power and trained by Gordon Elliott, the 33-1 outsider won the 4 mile 4 furlong (7.2 km) race by three-quarters of a length, becoming the sixth Irish winner in the past nine years.
ref: Ditunggang oleh Robbie Power dan dilatih oleh Gordon Elliot, kuda 33-1 yang tidak dijangka akan menang telah memenangi perlumbaan 4 mile 4 furlong (7.2 km) dengan panjang tiga-suku, dan menjadi pemenang Ireland keenam bagi tempoh sembilan tahun.

src: Slim Pickings, leading the race at the penultimate fence, was overtaken by Silver Birch on the last jump.
ref: Slim Pickings, yang mendahului perlumbaan di pagar kedua yang terakhir, telah dikalahkan oleh Silver Birch pada lompatan terakhir.

src: Silver Birch then held off a late challenge by McKelvey in a close finish.
ref: Silver Birch kemudiannya mendapat cabaran pada saat terakhir dari McKelvey menghampiri garisan penamat.

src: A1 Team New Zealand has won the feature race at the A1 Grand Prix in Shanghai, China today, followed by A1 Team Great Britain and A1 Team Germany.
ref: Pasukan A1 New Zealand telah memenangi perlumbaan litar di Grand Prix A1 Shanghai, China hari ini, diikiuti pasukan A1 Great Britain dan pasukan A1 Jerman.

src: The third place win for Germany has secured the 2006/2007 championship.
ref: Kemenangan tempat ketiga untuk Jerman telah mengesahkan kejuaraan 2006/2007.

src: In qualifying for the sprint race, Great Britain's driver Robbie Kerr managed to secure the pole position with the fastest lap time recorded this weekend.
ref: Dalam kelayakan untuk perlumbaan pecut, pemandu Great Britain Robbie Kerr berjaya mendapat petak pertama dengan masa terpantas dicatatkan pada hujung minggu ini.

src: New Zealand's driver, Jonny Reid, started in second position, narrowly missing out on what would have been his third pole position of the season.
ref: Pemandu New Zealand, Jonny Reid, bermula di petak kedua, hanya terlepas sedikit di mana dia boleh mendapat petak pertama untuk kali ketiga musim ini.

src: Third and fourth place starters are the United States and Germany respectively.
ref: Permulaan di petak ketiga dan keempat masing-masing adalah Amerika Syarikat dan Jerman.

src: During the entire sprint race, Great Britain were the leaders, with a "comfortable" lead, always maintaining their position in front of New Zealand.
ref: Semasa sepanjang perlumbaan pecut, Great Britain merupakan pendahulu, dengan pendahuluan "selesa," sentiasa mengekalkan posisi di hadapan New Zealand.

src: During the feature race Jonny Reid, driving New Zealand's Black Beauty car, passed Great Britain on lap number 16 of the 50-lap race.
ref: Semasa perlumbaan litar Jonny Reid, memandu kereta Black Beauty New Zealand, memintas Great Britain di pusingan ke-16 daripada perlumbaan 50 pusingan.

src: Both teams went into the game on highs, as United had thrashed Roma 7-1 during the week, and Watford had defeated Portsmouth 4-2 in the Premiership.
ref: Kedua-dua pasukan masuk ke dalam perlawanan itu dengan semangat tinggi, kerana United telah menewaskan Roma dengan teruk 7-1 dalam minggu ini, dan Watford telah mengalahkan Portsmouth 4-2 dalam Liga Perdana itu.

src: With that confidence boost for Watford boss Adrian Boothroyd, Watford sported an attacking lineup with Hameur Bouazza and Tamas Priskin as strikers.
ref: Dengan itu peningkatan keyakinan untuk bos Watford Adrian Boothroyd, Watford menggayakan satu barisan serangan dengan Hameur Bouazza dan Tamas Priskin sebagai penyerang.

src: United's recent injury troubles allowed Alan Smith to play as strike partner to Wayne Rooney with Ole Gunnar Solskjaer on the bench.
ref: Masalah kecederaan United baru-baru ini membenarkan Alan Smith untuk bermain sebagai rakan penyerang kepada Wayne Rooney dengan Ole Gunnar Solskjaer di bangku simpanan.

src: Watford were not dispirited by the early goal, and soon began to create chances through set pieces.
ref: Watford tidak hilang semangat dengan gol awal itu, dan tidak lama kemudian mula mencipta peluang dengan menetapkan gerakan terancang.

src: A flailing boot by a Watford player in the area connected with Edwin Van Der Sar's recently healed nose, and the big Dutch keeper had to have splints put in before play could continue.
ref: Satu but terkulai dari pemain Watford di kawasan itu terkena hidung Edwin Van Der Sar yang baru sembuh, dan penjaga gol Belanda yang besar itu terpaksa memasukkan splin ke dalam sebelum permainan boleh diteruskan.

src: United's response was nearly instant, as Smith's pass into Rooney released him on the right.
ref: Tindak balas United adalah hampir dengan serta merta, ketika Smith menghantar bola melalui Rooney yang melepaskannya di sebelah kanan.

src: After Lee nearly blocked a pass into Ronaldo, the Portuguese winger was able to bobble the ball home, scoring his twenty-first goal of the season, and restoring United's lead.
ref: Selepas Lee hampir menyekat hantaran bola kepada Ronaldo, pemain sayap Portugal itu dapat menghantar bola balik, menjaringkan gol kedua puluh satu musim ini, dan mengembalikan pendahuluan United.

src: Ronaldo then had a chance for his second as he was released by Rooney, but a last ditch tackle by DeMerit kept the scoreline at 2-1.
ref: Ronaldo kemudian mempunyai peluang untuk gol keduanya semasa dia dilepaskan oleh Rooney, tetapi rebutan bola di hadapan penjaga gol oleh DeMerit mengekalkan mata terakhir pada 2-1.

src: A groin injury for United's Rio Ferdinand then forced Alex Ferguson to replace him with Darren Fletcher, a move which saw a shuffle in the entire back line.
ref: Kecederaan pada bahagian tubuh di antara abdomen dengan pangkal peha Rio Ferdinand daripada United kemudian memaksa Alex Ferguson untuk menggantikannya dengan Darren Fletcher, satu langkah yang menyaksikan perubahan di barisan belakang keseluruhannya.

src: Watford started the second half strongly with Bouazza nearly scoring off a long throw, but his side footed effort went just wide.
ref: Watford memulakan separuh masa kedua dengan kuat dengan Bouazza hampir menjaringkan satu balingan jauh, tetapi usaha sepakan tepinya tersasar.

src: Alan Smith then set up Rooney's second goal of the match as his curling cross was easily deflected in by Rooney's left foot.
ref: Alan Smith kemudian merancang gerakan gol kedua Rooney untuk perlawanan itu apabila penyeberangan lencongnya dengan mudah dipesongkan oleh kaki kiri Rooney.

src: Cristiano Ronaldo was then replaced with Kieran Richardson, and the substitute made nearly an instant impact, scoring United's fourth goal of the afternoon.
ref: Cristiano Ronaldo kemudiannya digantikan dengan Kieran Richardson, dan pemain gantian itu memberikan impak yang segera, menjaringkan gol keempat United pada petang itu.

src: A well timed pass by Smith was met by the sprinting Richardson, and he easily chipped the ball over Lee and into the back of the net to secure a place in the final for United.
ref: Hantaran bola yang kena pada waktu oleh Smith ditemui oleh Richardson yang memecut, dan dia dengan mudah menyingkirkan bola melepasi Lee dan ke belakang jaring untuk mengukuhkan tempat di perlawanan akhir untuk United.

src: Relegation bound Watford will meet Blackburn in the Premiership next, while United have a league game of their own at Old Trafford against Sheffield United.
ref: Watford yang terikat dengan penurunan akan bertemu Blackburn dalam Liga Perdana akan datang, sementara United mempunyai permainan liga sendiri di Old Trafford menentang Sheffield United.

src: He was studying English and lived on the university campus.
ref: Dia sedang belajar Bahasa Inggeris dan tinggal di dalam kampus universiti.

src: The President of Virginia Tech, Charles Steger said in an interview that the "possibility exists" that more than one gunman was involved.
ref: Presiden Virginia Tech, Charles Steger berkata di dalam satu temubual bahawa "ada kemungkinan" yang lebih dari seorang penembak terlibat.

src: "It appears that the second shooter was a resident in our dormitory... it appears he was an on-campus resident," Steger said.
ref: "Penembak kedua mungkin merupakan seorang penyewa di dalam asrama kami...dan dia tinggal di dalam kampus ini," kata Steger.

src: Ballistic reports confirm that the same gun was used in both instances of the campus shootings, but police could not confirm if the shooter was the same.
ref: Laporan balistik mengesahkan senjata api yang sama telah digunakan di kedua-dua kes tembakan kampus, tetapi polis tidak dapat mengesahkan jika penembak adalah dari orang yang sama.

src: The first took place at 07:15 (12:15 UTC), at West Ambler Johnston Hall dormitory.
ref: Tembakan pertama berlaku pada jam 07:15 (12:15 UTC), di asrama West Ambler Johnston Hall.

src: Then, at about 09:15 (14:15 UTC), 30 people were killed in the second shooting, about half a mile (800 metres) from the first at the Norris Hall classroom building, on the same campus.
ref: Kemudian, lebih kurang jam 09:15 (14:15 UTC), 30 orang telah terbunuh di dalam tembakan kedua, lebih kurang separuh batu (800 meter) dari tembakan pertama di bangunan kelas Norris Hall, di kampus yang sama.

src: Bodies were found in four classrooms and a stairwell, according to Virginia state police superintendent Col. Steve Flaherty.
ref: Semua mayat telah ditemui di empat buah kelas dan ruang tangga, menurut penguasa polis Virginia Col. Steve Flaherty.

src: Some students complained that they had received no warning from the university until an e-mail alert sent more than two hours after the first incident.
ref: Sebahagian pelajar telah membuat aduan yang mereka tidak menerima sebarang amaran dari universiti sehinggalah satu e-mel amaran dihantar lebih dari dua jam selepas kejadian pertama.

src: The university has suspended classroom courses for one week, and Norris Hall will remain closed for the rest of the semester.
ref: Universiti telah menggantung kursus kelas selama satu minggu, dan Norris Hall akan kekal ditutup bagi seluruh semester itu.

src: University officials have expressed an interest in developing a text messaging alert system where persons can add their phone number to a list for notification in the event that incidents may warrant the use of caution or extra attention.
ref: Pengawai universiti telah menyatakan minat untuk menghasilkan satu sistem mesej amaran di mana semua orang boleh memasukkan nombor telefon ke dalam senarai bagi pemberitahuan di dalam kejadian yang memerlukan penggunaan amaran atau perhatian lebih.

src: In a reaction to the school massacre, the gun control group Brady Campaign to Prevent Gun Violence asks for "common-sense actions to prevent tragedies like this from continuing to occur".
ref: Sebagai satu reaksi kepada pembunuhan beramai-ramai di sekolah itu, kumpulan kawalan senjata api Kempen Brady untuk Mencegah Keganasan Senjata Api meminta supaya "tindakan menggunakan akal bagi menghalang tragedi seperti ini berulang semula."

src: The New York Times ran an editorial with a similar message for gun control.
ref: New York Times telah menyiarkan satu rencana dengan mesej yang serupa tentang kawalan senjata api.

src: Authorities from the Occupational Safety and Health Administration do not know why the platform broke free from the bridge.
ref: Pihak berkuasa dari Pentadbiran Keselamatan dan Kesihatan Pekerjaan tidak tahu mengapa platform tersebut jatuh bebas dari jambatan.

src: The $220 million bridge is scheduled for opening in June, 2007, and is the largest construction project in the history of Ohio.
ref: Jambatan yang bernilai $220 juta itu dijadualkan untuk dibuka pada bulan Jun, 2007, dan adalah projek pembinaan terbesar dalam sejarah Ohio.

src: "On behalf of Director Beasley and the Ohio Department of Transportation, we extend our deepest sympathy to the family of Andrew Burris," said ODOT District 2 director, Dave Dysard.
ref: "Bagi pihak Pengarah Beasley dan Jabatan Pengangkutan Ohio, kami menyampaikan rasa simpati yang tidak terhingga kepada keluarga Andrew Burris," kata pengarah Daerah ODOT 2, Dave Dysard.

src: "Andrew was a part of the team that took the pylon to the top back in 2005."
ref: "Andrew adalah sebahagian daripada pasukan yang mengambil pilon ke puncak pada tahun 2005."

src: "For four-and-a-half years, he was an integral part of the team that worked to complete this vital link for our community."
ref: "Selama empat dan setengah tahun, dia merupakan sebahagian penting pasukan yang bekerja untuk melengkapkan pautan penting ini bagi masyarakat kita."

src: On Presidents' Day in 2004, five workers were killed and four were injured when a crane collapsed.
ref: Pada Hari Presiden pada tahun 2004, lima pekerja terbunuh dan empat cedera apabila sebuah kren tumbang.

src: Mr. Burris was from a line of carpenters, and kept a scrapbook of the project.
ref: Encik Burris adalah dari pasukan tukang kayu, dan memyimpan buku skrap tentang projek itu.

src: According to the USGS numerous earthquakes ranging from magnitudes 5.1 to 6.1 have been reported off the western coast of Japan, prompting tsunami warnings to be issued.
ref: Menurut USGS banyak gempa bumi yang terdiri daripada magnitud 5.1 hingga 6.1 telah dilaporkan di luar pantai barat Jepun, menyebabkan amaran tsunami dikeluarkan.

src: Japan's weather agency says the first and last quakes were actually 6.7 magnitude.
ref: Agensi cuaca Jepun berkata gempa pertama dan terakhir sebenarnya 6.7 magnitud.

src: The tsunami warnings were issued only after Japan's weather agency said that an 18-inch (46cm) wave could be a possibility.
ref: Amaran tsunami telah dikeluarkan hanya selepas agensi cuaca Jepun berkata bahawa 18-inci (46 cm) gelombang boleh menjadi kemungkinan.

src: There are no reports of damage, injuries, deaths or tsunamis.
ref: Tiada laporan kerosakan, kecederaan, kematian atau tsunami.

src: A main belt asteroid, No.
ref: Satu jaluran asteroid utama, No.

src: 274301, has been named after Wikipedia, a free encyclopedia.
ref: 274301, telah dinamakan Wikipedia, sebuah ensiklopedia percuma.

src: The information became available on the Minor Planet Center's website yesterday.
ref: Maklumat itu didapati di laman web Pusat Planet Kecil semalam.

src: The decision of the Committee for Small Body Nomenclature to assign the name "Wikipedia" to the asteroid was published in the Minor Planet Circular of January 27, published online yesterday, page 82403.
ref: Keputusan Jawatankuasa Tatanama Jasad Kecil untuk memberikan nama "Wikipedia" kepada asteroid telah diterbitkan dalam Pekeliling Planet Kecil pada January 27, diterbitkan dalam talian hari ini, halaman 82403.

src: It was submitted to the Committee by the head of the Andrushivka Astronomical Observatory in Ukraine, Yuri Ivashchenko.
ref: Ia telah diserahkan kepada Jawatankuasa itu oleh ketua Balai Cerap Astronomi Andrushivka di Ukraine, Yuri Ivashchenko.

src: The asteroid 274301 Wikipedia was discovered by the team of astronomers of Andrushivka Astronomical Observatory.
ref: Asteroid 274301 Wikipedia telah ditemui oleh sepasukan ahli astronomi dari Balai Cerap Astronomi Andrushivka.

src: At first it was observed by that team on August 25, 2008 at 22:47 (UTC).
ref: Pada mulanya ia diperhati oleh pasukan itu pada 25 Ogos 2008 pada pukul 22:47 (UTC).

src: The asteroid had been previously spotted by observatories including Caussols-ODAS in France, and Mt.
ref: Asteroid itu telah sebelum ini ditemui oleh balai cerap termasuk Caussols-Odas di Perancis, dan Mt.

src: Lemmon Survey and Steward Observatory in Arizona, US.
ref: Lemmon Ukur dan Steward Observatory di Arizona, Amerika Syarikat.

src: On April 18, 2011 the minor planet received the number 274301.
ref: Pada April 18, 2011 planet kecil ini menerima nombor 274301.

src: Residents of Santa Clara County, California expressed their opposition at a public hearing Thursday January 31 to a local detainment provision of the Secure Communities program of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE).
ref: Penduduk di Daerah Santa Clara, California menyatakan penentangan mereka pada satu perbicaraan awam pada Khamis 31 Januari mengenai peruntukan penahanan tempatan ke atas program Komuniti Selamat AS Penguatkuasaan Imigresen dan Kastam (ICE).

src: The comments came in a public hearing of a policy working group of the Public Safety and Justice Committee, convened to discuss a November 7 recommendation by District Attorney Jeff Rosen to honor ICE detainer requests for serious and violent offenders.
ref: Komen-komen dalam perbicaraaan awam satu kumpulan pengendalian polisi dari Jawatankuasa Keselamatan dan Keadilan Awam, diadakan untuk membincangkan cadangan 7 November oleh Peguam Daerah Jeff Rosen untuk menghormati permintaan penahan ICE bagi pesalah yang serius dan ganas.

src: Since October 18, 2011, Santa Clara County has refused ICE requests to detain individuals who would otherwise be released.
ref: Sejak 18 Okt 2011, Daerah Santa Clara telah menolak permintaan ICE untuk menahan individu yang sebaliknya akan dilepaskan.

src: Supporters of DA Rosen's proposal had earlier asked their people to email the supervisors and attend this meeting and the Board of Supervisors' Meeting next Tuesday, February 12.
ref: Penyokong cadangan Peguam Daerah Rosen yang sebelum ini meminta orang ramai mereka untuk menghantar e-mel kepada penyelia dan menghadiri mesyuarat ini dan kepada Mesyuarat Lembaga Penyelia pada hari Selasa minggu depan, 12 Februari.

src: The January 31 hearing began with comments by approximately 25 of the audience of roughly 35–40, all of which opposed the DA's proposal.
ref: Perbicaraan pada 31 Januari itu bermula dengan komen oleh kira-kira 25 daripada hadirin yang berjumlah lebih kurang 35-40, semuanya tidak bersetuju dengan cadangan Peguam Daerah.

src: They wrote, "There is nothing more valuable to public safety than community trust in local law enforcement because it establishes residents' willingness to report crimes and cooperate with police.
ref: Mereka menulis, "Tidak ada yang lebih berharga untuk keselamatan awam daripada kepercayaan masyarakat dalam penguatkuasaan undang-undang tempatan kerana ia menetapkan kesediaan penduduk untuk melaporkan jenayah dan bekerjasama dengan polis.

src: Since the January 31 hearing, support for the position of the Sheriff and the DA has begun to materialize with at least one conservative group asking their followers to email the supervisors and attend public meetings such as the one this Thursday and the Board of Supervisors' meeting next Tuesday, February 12.
ref: Sejak perbicaraan pada 31 Januari, sokongan untuk kedudukan Sheriff dan DA telah mula menjadi kenyataan dengan sekurang- kurangnya satu kumpulan konservatif meminta pengikut mereka untuk menghantar e-mel kepada penyelia dan menghadiri mesyuarat awam seperti hari Khamis ini dan mesyuarat Lembaga Penyelia hari Selasa depan, 12 Februari.

src: ICE claims an official limit of at most two days.
ref: ICE mengatakan had rasmi paling banyak adalah dua hari.

src: If Los Angeles loses, it appears local taxpayers may be liable.
ref: Jika Los Angeles kalah, ternyata pembayar cukai tempatan mungkin harus bertanggungjawab.

src: After DA Rosen's presentation on November 7, the Santa Clara County Public Safety and Justice Committee referred this issue to its policy review working group, which held various private meetings, failed to reach a consensus, and then organized the public meeting of January 31.
ref: Selepas penyampaian Peguam Daerah Rosen pada 7 November, Jawatankuasa Keselamatan Awam dan Keadilan Daerah Santa Clara merujukkan isu ini kepada kumpulan kajian semula dasar kerja, yang mengadakan pelbagai mesyuarat sulit, gagal mencapai kata sepakat, dan kemudian menganjurkan mesyuarat orang ramai pada 31 Januari.

src: Yeltsin maintained a low profile since his resignation, making almost no public statements or appearances.
ref: Yeltsin mengekalkan sikap rendah diri sejak perletakan jawatannya, hinggakan hampir tiada kenyataan dan penampilan awam.

src: He used this occasion as an opportunity to criticize a "monopolistic" United States foreign policy, and to state that Vladimir Putin was the right choice for Russia.
ref: Dia menggunakan upacara ini sebagai peluang untuk mengkritik "sifat monopoli" dasar luar Amerika Syarikat, dan membuat kenyataan bahawa Vladimir Putin adalah pilihan yang tepat untuk Rusia.

src: Abdullah Gül, current deputy prime minister and foreign minister of Turkey, has been named as the new presidential candidate by his party, the Justice and Development Party (AKP).
ref: Abdullah Gül, Timbalan Perdana Menteri dan Menteri Luar Turki yang terkini, telah dinamakan sebagai calon presiden baru oleh partinya, Parti Keadilan dan Pembangunan (AKP).

src: The AKP has 353 of the 550 seats in Grand National Assembly of Turkey.
ref: AKP mempunyai 353 daripada 550 kerusi dalam Perhimpunan Agung Nasional Turki.

src: While Gül may not get elected in the first or second round, when a two-thirds majority is needed, their votes are enough to elect the new president at the third or fourth rounds of the election process, when a simple majority is needed.
ref: Walaupun Gül mungkin tidak terpilih pada pusingan pertama atau kedua, apabila majoriti dua pertiga diperlukan, undian mereka adalah cukup untuk memilih presiden baru pada pusingan ketiga atau keempat proses pilihan raya, apabila majoriti mudah diperlukan.

src: The main opposition party, the Republican People's Party (CHP), hinted that it may nominate its own candidate to challenge Gül.
ref: Parti pembangkang utama, Parti Rakyat Republikan (CHP), memberitahu bahawa mereka boleh menamakan calon mereka sendiri untuk mencabar Gül.

src: In mainland China, the China Daily published an editorial under the headline, "March sets stage for secessionist scheming" in which it labeled the rally as "secessionist scheming" and a "misuse of people power".
ref: Di tanah besar China, China Daily editorial menerbitkan artikel di bawah tajuk, "Puak Pemisah menetapkan Mac sebagai pentas muslihat" di mana ia dilabel perhimpunan tersebut sebagai "tipu muslihat puak pemisah" dan "penyalah guna kuasa rakyat".

src: China Daily said of President Chen that, "his participation in the protest added to his record as a man of bad faith.
ref: China Daily berkata Presiden Chen itu, "penyertaan beliau dalam protes menambah rekod dia sebagai lelaki tidak jujur.

src: Only one month ago, Chen solemnly pledged to develop cross-Straits relations during his meeting with PFP chairman James Soong.
ref: Hanya sebulan yang lalu, Chen telah berjanji untuk membangunkan hubungan merentas selat dalam pertemuannya dengan Pengerusi PFP James Soong.

src: The Taipei Times quoted Lee, "The March 26 march ended perfectly, yet it wasn't just the close of a political carnival."
ref: Taipei Times memetik Lee berkata, "Perarakan 26 Mac berakhir dengan sempurna, namun ia bukan sahaja penutupan karnival politik".

src: Otherwise the march will just have been emotional venting, which won't solve the current [cross-strait] problems.
ref: Jika tidak, perarakan tersebut akan hanya menjadi pembolongan emosi yang tidak akan menyelesaikan masalah [merentas selat].

src: A camera set up in the jungles of Malaysian Borneo in Sabah by the World Wide Fund for Nature or WWF, has captured, for the first time, a Borneo Rhino on videotape.
ref: Sebuah kamera yang dipasang di hutan di Borneo Malaysia di Sabah oleh Tabung Alam Sedunia atau WWF, telah menangkap, buat kali pertama, Badak Borneo dalam pita video.

src: "This astonishing footage captures one of the world's most elusive creatures."
ref: "Rakaman ini yang menakjubkan menangkap salah satu makhluk yang paling sukar ditemui di dunia".

src: "In the video, the rhino comes out of the jungle brush and then proceeds to sniff the camera and equipment surrounding it."
ref: "Dalam video itu, badak itu keluar dari pokok hutan dan kemudiannya terus berjalan menghidu kamera dan peralatan di sekitarnya".

src: "The video also shows the rhino getting a bite to eat."
ref: "Video ini juga menunjukkan badak sedang makan".

src: It is estimated that there are only 25 to 50 of the rhinos alive on the planet, and they can only be found in the jungles of Sabah, or better known as the "Heart of Borneo."
ref: Adalah dianggarkan bahawa terdapat hanya 25 hingga 50 daripada badak seperti ini hidup di dunia ini, dan mereka hanya boleh didapati di dalam hutan di Sabah, atau lebih dikenali sebagai "Heart of Borneo".

src: For the past 20 years, the rhino has not been reported anywhere else in Sabah and researchers say that it is likely "extinct" in the rest of Malaysia.
ref: Sepanjang 20 tahun yang lalu, badak itu tidak pernah dilaporkan di tempat lain di Sabah dan penyelidik mengatakan bahawa ia mungkin "pupus" di kawasan Malaysia yang lain.

src: Researchers say that poaching to use the rhino's horn in medicine and encroachment into their habitats are causing them to decline.
ref: Penyelidik mengatakan bahawa pemburuan untuk menggunakan tanduk badak dalam perubatan dan pencerobohan habitat mereka menyebabkan mereka berkurangan.

src: "The rhino is very sensitive to the presence of human beings."
ref: "Badak ini sangat sensitif dengan kehadiran manusia".

src: "Till now, we can still see the rhino, but if we cannot develop any kind of protection method, I think the rhinos will survive less than 10 years," said a project manager for the WWF for elephants and rhinos in the Borneo region, Raymond Alfred.
ref: "Sehingga sekarang, kami masih boleh melihat badak itu, tetapi jika kita tidak boleh menyediakan apa-apa jenis kaedah perlindungan, saya rasa badak itu akan terus hidup kurang daripada 10 tahun," kata seorang pengurus projek untuk WWF untuk gajah dan badak di rantau Borneo, Raymond Alfred.

src: Statoil ASA (Statoil), a Norwegian state-owned oil company, entered into an agreement Friday to purchase all outstanding common shares of the privately held Canadian firm, North American Oil Sands Corporation (NAOSC).
ref: Statoil ASA (Statoil), sebuah syarikat minyak milik negara Norway, memasuki satu perjanjian pada hari Jumaat untuk membeli kesemua saham cemerlang milik persendirian firma Kanada, Perbadanan Pasir Minyak Amerika Utara (NAOSC).

src: It is estimated that the NOASC oil sands hold approximately 2.2 billion barrels of oil reserves.
ref: Dianggarkan pasir minyak yang dimiliki NAOSC sekitar anggaran 2.2 bilion tong bekalan minyak.

src: The company is planning to develop an extraction project and an upgrading facility.
ref: Syarikat tersebut merancang untuk memperkembangkan projek penyaringan dan penaiktarafan fasiliti.

src: When the project is completed, NAOSC expects it to produce over 200,000 barrels of bitumen per day.
ref: Apabila projer tersebut siap, NAOSC menjangka ia akan menghasilkan lebih 200,000 daripada tong bitumen setiap hari.

src: The NAOSC board of directors has approved the bid from Statoil unanimously, and has recommended that its shareholders accept the offer.
ref: Lembaga pengarah NAOSC telah mempersetujui tawaran oleh Statoil sebulat suara, dan menyarankan supaya pemegang saham untuk menerima tawaran tersebut.

src: Paramount announced Friday that it had entered into a lock-up agreement with Statoil, which calls for Paramount to sell its 30.9% interest in NAOSC to Statoil ASA for a cash deal worth approximately $682 million.
ref: Paramount mengumumkan pada hari Jumaat bahawa ia telah memasuki satu perjanjian tertutup dengan Statoil, yang meminta Paramount untuk menjual 30.9% faedah dalam NAOSC kepada Statoil ASA bagi memperoleh tawaran tunai bernilai $682 juta.

src: "We are impressed by the performance and competence held by the employees in NAOSC,” said Helge Lund, chief executive of Statoil.
ref: "Kami kagum dengan pencapaian dan kebolehan pekerja di NAOSC," kata Helge Lund, ketua eksekutif Statoil.

src: “Combined with Statoil’s experience and commitment to prudent operations, we are well-positioned to develop the resources in a sustainable manner, creating value for Statoil and its shareholders."
ref: "Gabungan pengalaman dan komitmen Statoil ke arah operasi yang cermat, kami bersedia untuk memajukan sumber dengan cara yang berkekalan, membentuk nilai untuk Statoil dan pemegang sahamnya".

src: Statoil admits, however, that heavy oil production, such as is required in the oil sands, is "energy intensive and challenging in an environmental perspective."
ref: Statoil mengakui, walaubagaimanapun, penghasilan minyak berat, yang diperlukan dalam minyak pasir, adalah "tenaga intensif dan mencabar dari perspektif alam sekitar".

src: Under new environmental regulations announced Thursday by Canadian Environment Minister John Baird, companies that can't meet new intensity targets for CO2 emission reductions will be able to purchase offset credits or contribute to a technology fund, at an initial cost of $15 per tonne of emissions.
ref: Di bawah akta baru pengawalan alam sekitar yang diumumkan pada hari Khamis oleh Menteri Alam Sekitar Kanada John Braid, syarikat itu tidak mampu mencapai sasaran intensiti pengurangan pengeluaran CO2 akan dikenakan untuk membeli pengimbangan kredit atau menyumbang kepada dana teknologi, kos awal sebanyak $15 per tan pengeluaran.

src: However, Julia Langer, director of the World Wildlife Fund's global threats program, told the Globe and Mail that the initial exemptions for new plants and the technology fund contributions would undermine the government's new environmental plan.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, Julia Langer, pengarah program ancaman antarabangsa Tabung Alam Sedunia, memberitahu Globe and Mail bahawa pengecualian awal terhadap loji baru dan sumbangan dana teknologi akan menjejaskan pelan alam sekitar baru kerajaan.

src: "This is a regulatory plan that is geared to business as usual for the tar sands sector," said Langer.
ref: "Ini adalah rangka peraturan yang ditujukan kepada perniagaan seperti biasa dalam sektor tar pasir," kata Langer.

src: New reports have emerged detailing the extent of the efforts by the Iranian government to purge Western cultural influence in Iran that is deemed un-Islamic.
ref: Report baru telah mendesak perincian tahap usaha oleh kerajaan Iran untuk pembersihan kesan budaya di Iran yang difikirkan tidak Islam.

src: Based on Iran's Islamic Sharia law, non-compliance results in legal punishment because the state sees itself responsible in executing punishment for Islamic theological sins.
ref: Berdasarkan Undang-undang Syariah Islam Iran, ketidak patuhan keputusan dalam hukuman undang-undang kerana negara dilihat bertanggungjawab dalam hukuman pembersihan dosa-dosa teologi.

src: Barber clients who violate government policies will be subject to lashes, fines and imprisonment.
ref: Pelanggan tukang gunting rambut yang melanggar polisi kerajaan akan disebat, didenda dan dipenjara.

src: Iranian male youth are not supposed to sport outlandish hairstyles or use gel to make their hair stand.
ref: Remaja lelaki Iran tidak sepatutnya menggayakan gaya rambut aneh atau menggunakan gel untuk meninggikan rambut mereka.

src: The Supreme Cultural Revolution Council, created during the Islamic Cultural Revolution, indicated that it would filter immoral video and audio messages sent using cellular phones.
ref: Majlis Agung Revolusi Kebudayaan, ditubuhkan semasa Revolusi Kebudayaan Islam, menyatakan yang mereka akan menapis video tidak bermoral dan mesej audio dihantar menggunakan telefon bimbit.

src: According to Iranian television statement, "In order to prevent possible misuse of MMS, immoral actions and social problems, the Telecommunications Ministry will filter immoral MMS."
ref: Mengikut kenyataan televisyen Iran, "Untuk menghalang kemungkinan penyalah gunaan MMS, aktiviti tidak bermoral dan masalah sosial, Menteri Telekomunikasi akan menapis MMS tidak bermoral".

src: In response to the United States Department of State issuing its annual Country Reports on Human Rights Practices, China has issued a contradictory report highlighting human rights abuses in the US, The Human Rights Record of the United States in 2004.
ref: Sebagai tindak balas kepada Jabatan Negara Amerika Syarikat mengeluarkan Laporan Negara tahunan tentang Amalan Hak Asasi Manusia, China telah mengeluarkan laporan yang bercanggah yang menonjolkan pencabulan hak asasi manusia di Amerika Syarikat, Rekod Hak Asasi Manusia di Amerika Syarikat pada tahun 2004.

src: "Only the Chinese people themselves have the right to comment on the human rights situation in their own country," said Liu Jianchao, spokesman for the Chinese Foreign Ministry.
ref: "Hanya orang Cina sendiri berhak untuk mengulas keadaan hak asasi manusia di negara mereka sendiri," kata Liu Jianchao, jurucakap Kementerian Luar China.

src: The US State Department, beginning in 1977, issues annual country reviews of its perceptions of the rights records of individual nations, based on the Universal Declaration of Human Rights.
ref: Jabatan Negara Amerika Syarikat, bermula pada tahun 1977, mengeluarkan ulasan tahunan negara tentang persepsi rekod hak-hak negara-negara individu, berdasarkan Deklarasi Hak Asasi Manusia Sejagat.

src: The current report for 2004, released on February 28, 2005, contains candid assessments and detailed criticism of the human rights records of 192 countries, including China.
ref: Laporan semasa bagi tahun 2004, yang dikeluarkan pada 28 Februari 2005, mengandungi penilaian terang dan kritikan terperinci rekod hak asasi manusia daripada 192 buah negara, termasuk China.

src: Amnesty International, the international 'watch-dog organization' for human rights, has however criticized this paper as being biased, because it is made by a government which itself is violating human rights on many sectors.
ref: Amnesty International, 'organisasi pemerhati' antarabangsa untuk hak-hak asasi manusia, telah bagaimanapun mengkritik kertas ini sebagai berat sebelah, kerana ia dibuat oleh sebuah kerajaan yang itu sendiri melanggar hak asasi manusia dalam banyak sektor.

src: Amnesty International's 2004 annual report on US human rights in 2003 agrees with many of these claims.
ref: Laporan tahunan 2004 Amnesty International mengenai hak asasi manusia Amerika pada tahun 2003 bersetuju dengan banyak dakwaan ini.

src: Amnesty is also worried about: severe violations committed by the United States' army outside the countries' borders; the situation of the prisoners in Guantanamo Bay; United States' general misbehaviour against international peace; ill-treatment of US immigrants; ill-treatment and excessive use of force by the US law enforcement officials; the US citizens losing civil rights and liberties after the 9/11 attacks; and continued use of death penalty by the state, which is in direct breach with the 3rd article of the United Nations' Universal Declaration of Human Rights (the right to life).
ref: Amnesty juga bimbang tentang: pelanggaran teruk yang dilakukan oleh tentera Amerika Syarikat di luar sempadan negara; keadaan tahanan di Teluk Guantanamo; salah laku umum Amerika Syarikat terhadap keamanan antarabangsa; layanan buruk pendatang Amerika Syarikat; layanan buruk dan penggunaan kekerasan yang berlebihan oleh pegawai-pegawai penguatkuasa undang-undang Amerika Syarikat; rakyat AS kehilangan hak-hak sivil dan kebebasan selepas serangan 9/11; dan penggunaan hukuman mati yang berterusan oleh kerajaan, yang melanggar artikel ke-3 Deklarasi Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu bagi Hak Asasi Manusia (hak untuk hidup) secara langsung.

src: But that doesn't mean it won't buttress the negative image of the United States held by its critics around the world."
ref: Tetapi itu tidak bermakna ia tidak akan menyokong imej negatif Amerika Syarikat yang dipegang oleh pengkritik di seluruh dunia."

src: This ongoing dispute does not capture the entire relationship of US and China on civil rights.
ref: Pertikaian berterusan ini tidak menguasai hubungan seluruh Amerika Syarikat dan China mengenai hak-hak sivil.

src: This is the second time in three years that the US has not submitted such a resolution, which in fact has never passed the UN when it was submitted before.
ref: Ini adalah kali kedua dalam tempoh tiga tahun bahawa Amerika Syarikat masih belum menyerahkan apa-apa resolusi, yang sebenarnya tidak pernah diluluskan oleh UN apabila ia dikemukakan sebelum ini.

src: "A huge part of the state system was devoted to the election process."
ref: "Bahagian besar daripada sistem negeri menumpukan kepada proses pilihanraya".

src: "That is not a secret…" "We have all seen what happens when the executive branch gets involved in elections."
ref: "Ini bukan rahsia..." "Kami telah melihat semua yang berlaku apabila eksekutif cawangan terlibat dalam pilihanraya".

src: "I think we will not get into that now …" "I think that staff should get back to work," he said.
ref: "Saya fikir kita tidak akan dapat masuk kepada itu buat masa ini..." "Saya fikir kakitangan patut kembali kepada kerja mereka," kata beliau.

src: "Whoever is ... on my staff, if I hear that they got promoted for money or because they are someone's relative, or they belong to particular clan, then this person will be removed immediately," he added.
ref: "Siapa pun...kepada semua staf saya, jika saya mendengar bahawa ada antara mereka mendapat promosi untuk duit atau kerana ada terdapat saudara kepada seseorang, atau mereka merupakan sebahagian daripada kaum kerabat, mereka akan dibuang serta merta," tambah beliau.

src: Did we need to take a poll to find out how well America sleeps at night?
ref: Adakah kita perlu mengambil undian untuk mengetahui bagaimana rakyat Amerika tidur pada waktu malam?

src: The National Sleep Foundation, the poll sponsor, reports three-quarters of adults say they frequently have a sleep problem, such as waking during the night or snoring.
ref: Yayasan Tidur Kebangsaan, penaja undian, melaporkan tiga suku daripada orang dewasa mengatakan mereka sering mempunyai masalah tidur, seperti bangun pada waktu malam atau berdengkur.

src: The average adult gets less than the recommended seven to nine hours of uninterrupted sleep each night.
ref: Purata orang dewasa mendapat kurang daripada yang disyorkan iaitu tujuh hingga sembilan jam tidur tanpa gangguan setiap malam.

src: This leads to poorer health, lower productivity on the job, more danger on the roads and a less vibrant sex life.
ref: Ini membawa kepada masalah kesihatan, produktiviti yang lebih rendah di tempat kerja, lebih bahaya di jalan raya dan kehidupan seks yang kurang bersemangat.

src: Becky Mcerien, 50, in Philadelphia, told a reporter "By 3 to 4 in the afternoon, I'm starting to feel brain-drained and I need that caffeine to pick me back up again," But Guillermo Sardina, 55, of Hamilton, N.J., said "I sleep through the night.
ref: Becky Mcerien, 50, di Philadelphia, memberitahu wartawan "Pada pukul 3-4 petang, saya mula berasa otak tersumbat dan saya perlu bahawa kafein untuk menjemput saya kembali semula," Tetapi Guillermo Sardina, 55, dari Hamilton, N.J., berkata, "Saya tidur sepanjang malam.

src: Darwin McCallian, 51, of Burke, Va., rises at 4 a.m. to get a jump on traffic for his commute to Washington, DC.
ref: Darwin McCallian, 51, dari Burke, Va., bangun pada 4 pagi untuk mengelakkan kesesakan perjalanan ke Washington, DC.

src: They recommend avoiding alcohol and caffeine close to bedtime, and that adults pay attention to how much sleep they get as well as the quality of that sleep, and seek help if needed.
ref: Mereka mengesyorkan untuk menjauhi alkohol dan kafein sebelum tidur, dan bahawa orang dewasa memberi perhatian kepada berapa banyak tidur mereka mendapat serta kualiti tidur itu, dan mendapatkan bantuan jika diperlukan.

src: Hughes retired 19 Texas Rangers without allowing a hit on Tuesday at the Rangers Ballpark in Arlington.
ref: Hughes menamatkan 19 Texas Rangers tanpa membenarkan satu pukulan pada hari Selasa di Rangers Ballpark di Arlington.

src: Established big league stars such as Kenny Lofton, Mark Teixeira and Michael Young could not solve the youngster's blazing fastball or sharply biting curve.
ref: Bintang-bintang liga besar yang terkenal seperti Kenny Lofton, Mark Teixeira dan Michael Young tidak dapat menangani bola yang laju atau lencongan tajam yang mendadak.

src: Even as his pitch count rose, the Yankees allowed him to keep firing.
ref: Walaupun kiraan balingannya meningkat, Yankees membenarkannya untuk terus membaling.

src: After Teixeira fouled off an 0-2 pitch with one out in the sixth inning, Hughes grabbed his leg, having suffered a hamstring injury.
ref: Selepas Teixeira mendapat batal 0-2 balingan dengan satu out di inning yang keenam, Hughes memegang kakinya, setelah mengalami kecederaan hamstring.

src: His no-hit bid ended there (Texas would break up the no-hitter in the eighth inning off reliever Mike Myers), though he did earn his first big league win in a 10-1 Yankee romp over Texas.
ref: Sasaran tiada-pukulannya berakhir di sana (Texas akan memecahkan tiada-pukulan di inning kelapan melalui Mike Myers), dia tetap mendapat kemenangan liga besar pertamanya 10-1 Yankee ke atas Texas.

src: He walked off the mound under his own power, but will reportedly miss 4-6 weeks.
ref: Dia berjalan melalui padang dengan kekuatan sendiri, tetapi dilaporkan akan terlepas daripada permainan selama 4-6 minggu.

src: Several Yankees have already voiced their excitement for the righthander's chances in the big leagues.
ref: Beberapa ahli Yankees telah menyuarakan kegembiraan mereka untuk peluang pelempar kanan dalam liga besar.

src: For his part, Yankees star Jason Giambi compared him to Roger Clemens during Spring Training: "He looks like a young Rocket."
ref: Sementara itu, bintang Yankees Jason Giambi membandingkannya dengan Roger Clemens semasa Latihan Musim Bunga: "Dia kelihatan seperti Roket muda."

src: In a related story from today, the Yankees fired strength and conditioning coach Marty Miller.
ref: Dalam satu cerita yang berkaitan hari ini, Yankees memecat jurulatih kekuatan dan latihan Marty Miller.

src: Reportedly, this was out of general manager Brian Cashman's concern for the alarming number of hamstring injuries so far this season.
ref: Dilaporkan, ini merupakan tindakan pengurus besar Brian Cashman kerana bilangan kecederaan hamstring yang semakin membimbangkan pada musim ini.

src: Simpson acquitted of murder charges in the 1990s, died Tuesday afternoon in his home in Los Angeles, California.
ref: Simpson daripada tuduhan membunuh pada tahun 1990-an, meninggal dunia petang Selasa di rumahnya di Los Angeles, California.

src: He had been suffering from complications of an inoperable brain tumor.
ref: Dia telah mengalami komplikasi tumor otak yang tidak boleh dibedah.

src: "The world has lost not only a legendary attorney, but an outstanding humanitarian."
ref: "Dunia telah kehilangan bukan sahaja seorang peguam yang hebat, tetapi seorang berperikemanusiaan yang cemerlang."

src: Other Team USA performances in the downhill included a fourth place finish by visually impaired woman skier Danelle Umstead and guide Robert Umstead, a fifth place finish by Christopher Devlin-Young in the men's sitting group, an eighth place finish by Ralph Green in the men's standing group, an eighth place finish by women's standing skier Allison Jones, a ninth place finish by visually impaired Mark Bathum and guide Sean Ramsden, a tenth place finish by Tyler Walker in the men's sitting, and a thirteenth place finish by Heath Calhoun in the men's sitting.
ref: Pencapaian kumpulan USA lain dalam acara downhill termasuk tempat keempat ditamatkan oleh pemain ski wanita cacat penglihatan Danelle Umstead dan pengajar Robert Umstead, tempat kelima ditamatkan oleh Christopher Devlin-Young dalam acara duduk lelaki berkumpulan, tempat kelapan ditamatkan oleh Ralph Green dalam acara berdiri lelaki berkumpulan, tempat kelepat ditamatkan oleh pemain ski berdiri wanita Allison Jones, tempat kesembilan ditamatkan oleh Mark Bathum yang cacat penglihatan dan pengajar Sean Ramsden, tempat kesepuluh ditamatkan oleh Tyler Walker dalam acara duduk lelaki, dan tempat ketiga belas ditamatkan oleh Heath Calhoun dalam acara duduk lelaki.

src: In the Super-G event on Thursday, Jones finished fourth in the women's standing group, Devlin-Young finished fifth, Stephani Victor finished fourth in the women's sitting group, Umstead and Umstead finished fifth in their group, Bathum and Ramsden finished seventh in their group, Walker finished twelfth in his group, Green finished sixteenth in the men's standing, Jonathan Lujan finished nineteenth in the men's standing, Stephen Lawler finished twentieth in the men's sitting, Heath Calhoun finished twenty-third in men's sitting, and Andrew Earl Kurka finished twenty-fifth in the men's sitting group.
ref: Dalam acara Super-G pada hari Khamis, Jones menamatkan di tempat keempat dalam acara berdiri wanita berkumpulan, Devlin-Young menamatkan di tempat kelima, Stephani Victor di tempat keempat dalam acara duduk wanita berkumpulan, Umstead dan Umstead menamatkan di tempat kelima dalam kumpulan mereka, Bathum dan Ramsden menamatkan di tempat ketujuh dalam kumpulan mereka, Walker menakan di tempat kedua belas dalam kumpulannya, Green menamatkan di tempat keenam belas dalam acara berdiri lelaki.

src: A few members of Team USA had difficulties, and were not able to start or finish their races.
ref: Jonathan Lujan menamatkan di tempat kesembilan belas dalam acara berdiri lelaki, Stephen Lawler menamatkan di tempat kedua puluh dalam acara duduk lelaki, Heath Calhoun menamatkan di tempat kedua puluh tiga dalam acara duduk lelaki, dan Andrew Earl Kurka menamatkan di tempat kedua puluh lima dalam acara duduk lelaki berkumpulan.

src: In the downhill and Super-G event, 2010 Winter Paralympics medalist Alana Nichols did not start.
ref: Sebahagian ahli kumpulan USA mengalami kesukaran, dan tidak mampu untuk memulakan atau menyelesaikan perlumbaan mereka.

src: Visually-impaired B3 classified skier Bathum chatted with his guide, Sean Ramsden, immediately following both his races.
ref: Pemain ski Bathum yang cacat penglihatan klasifikasi B3 memberitahu pengajar beliau, Sean Ramsden, sejurus selepas kedua-dua perlumbaan.

src: While he was unhappy with his downhill run, Bathum was happy with and had fun during his seventh place run in the Super-G event where he finished with a factored time of 1:13.51, only 3.02 seconds slower than the winning time set by Spanish skier Jon Santacana.
ref: Sementara beliau kecewa dengan acara turun bukit, Bathum gembira dan berseronok dengan tempat ketujuh dalam acara Super-G dimana beliau menamatkan dengan masa 1:13.51, dengan hanya 3.02 saat lebih perlahan daripada set masa pemenang oleh pemain ski Sepanyol Jon Santacana.

src: United States skiers were scheduled to compete yesterday in the Slalom discipline but the competition was cancelled due to high winds.
ref: Pemain ski Amerika Syarikat dijadualkan untuk bertanding semalam di disiplin Slalom tetapi pertandingan tersebut dibatalkan berikutan angin kencang.

src: Several members of Team USA had a pizza party after the slalom cancellation.
ref: Sebahagian ahli daripada kumpulan USA mengadakan parti piza selepas pembatalan slalom.

src: Friday's scheduled event had been rescheduled as a result of predicted snow and high winds during the day.
ref: Acara Jumaat yang ditetapkan telah dijadualkan semula berikutan salji yang diramalkan turun dan angin kencang pada siang hari.

src: No snow arrived until late in the afternoon, where there was limited accumulation.
ref: Tiada salji turun sehingga lewat petang, dimana terdapatnya pengumpulan terhad.

src: Some of the younger members of Team USA took advantage of the night off on Thursday to go bowling before a busy training day Friday.
ref: Beberapa ahli yang lebih muda dari Kumpulan USA mengambil peluang cuti yang diberikan pada malam Khamis dengan bermain bowling sebelum bermulanya latihan sibuk pada hari Jumaat.

src: When a member of Team USA competing in La Molina was asked if they heard confirmation of this, they were unable to confirm.
ref: Apabila salah seorang ahli Kumpulan USA bertanding di La Molina ditanya mengeai pengesahan tentang perkara ini, dia tidak dapat mengesahkan.

src: The Scottish National Party (SNP), which supports Scottish independence from the UK, has pulled off a historic, albeit narrow, victory in yesterday's Scottish elections.
ref: Parti Kebangsaan Scotland (SNP), yang menyokong kemerdekaan Scotland dari UK, telah mendapat kemenangan yang bersejarah, walaupun sedikit, dalam pilihan raya Scotland semalam.

src: In the third Scottish election since the opening of the Scottish Parliament in 1999, the left of centre SNP beat the ruling Labour Party by a single seat.
ref: Dalam pilihan raya Scotland ketiga sejak persidangan Parlimen Scotland pada tahun 1999, di sebelah kiri pusat SNP mengalahkan Parti Buruh yang memerintah dengan satu kerusi.

src: He added that the Labour Party had "lost the moral authority to govern Scotland."
ref: Tambahnya, Parti Buruh telah "hilang kewibawaan untuk mentadbir Scotland".

src: It is believed that many factors caused the Labour vote to slump and the SNP vote to rise, including the war in Iraq and the renewal of Trident, which are both unpopular in Scotland.
ref: Adalah dipercayai bahawa banyak faktor menyebabkan undi Buruh merosot dan undian SNP meningkat, termasuk perang di Iraq dan pembaharuan Trident, yang kedua-duanya tidak popular di Scotland.

src: The election also raises a serious dilemma for the Labour party's Gordon Brown, a Scotsman widely tipped to succeed Tony Blair as the next prime minister of the United Kingdom.
ref: Pilihan raya ini juga menimbulkan dilema serius untuk Gordon Brown dari parti Buruh, orang Scotland yang selalu disebut untuk menggantikan Tony Blair sebagai Perdana Menteri United Kingdom seterusnya.

src: An SNP government in Scotland will find itself facing the very Labour party it beat in power in London.
ref: Kerajaan SNP di Scotland akan berdepan dengan Parti Buruh yang ia telah tewaskan dengan kuasa di London.

src: During the Battle, Canada lost about 2000 Sailors and 762 members of the Royal Canadian Air Force.
ref: Semasa peperangan, Kanada kehilangan kira-kira 2000 Kelasi dan 762 anggota Tentera Udara Diraja Kanada.

src: The Parade started out at Nathan Phillips Square, it then marched a short ways to the Cenotaph at Old City hall, where a ceremony was held for the dead and wounded in the Battle of the Atlantic.
ref: Perarakan bermula di Nathan Phillips Square yang kemudiannya berarak dari satu jalan yang singkat ke Tugu Peringatan di Dewan Bandar Lama, di mana satu majlis telah diadakan untuk orang terkorban dan cedera dalam Pertempuran Atlantik.

src: The parade then began again with a snappy left turn and marched along Queen Street West.
ref: Perarakan kemudian dimulakan semula dengan memusing ke kiri dan berarak di sepanjang Jalan Permaisuri Barat.

src: There where approximately 130 sailors, sea and air cadets in attendance.
ref: Terdapat kira-kira 130 anak kapal laut dan kadet udara yang hadir.

src: The IPC Alpine World Championships wrapped up yesterday in La Molina, Spain with a friendly, non-medal counting team event won by Austria.
ref: Kejuaraan Dunia IPC Alpine telah berakhir semalam di La Molina, Sepanyol dengan satu acara pasukan persahabatan, tiada hitungan pingat yang dimenangi oleh Austria.

src: The winner was tabulated based on the fastest score for a visually impaired skier on the team, a female skier on the team, and a male skier on the team.
ref: Pemenang telah diklasifikasikan berdasarkan mata terpantas bagi pemain ski dengan penglihatan terjejas di dalam pasukan, seorang pemain ski wanita di dalam pasukan, dan seorang pemain ski lelaki di dalam pasukan.

src: The Austrian team included Markus Salcher, Roman Rabl, and Claudia Loesch for times counted, with Philipp Bonadimann, Thomas Grochar, and Martin Wuerz also competing.
ref: Pasukan Austria termasuk Markus Salcher, Roman Rabl, dan Claudia Loesch bagi masa yang dikira, dengan Philipp Bonadimann, Thomas Grocher, dan Martin Wuerz turut bertanding.

src: The United States team 1 came in second with Tyler Walker, Mark Bathum, and Alana Nichols times counting, and Heath Calhoun, Ralph Green, and Allison Jones also belonging to the team.
ref: Pasukan 1 Amerika Syarikat telah mendapat tempat kedua dengan kiraan masa Tyler Walker, Mark Bathum, dan Alana Nichols, dan Heath Calhoun, Ralph Green, dan Allison Jones yang turut berada di dalam pasukan itu.

src: Russia came in third with Ivan Frantseva, Alexandr Alyabyev, and Mariya Papulova having their scores counted.
ref: Russia berada di tempat ketiga dengan Ivan Frantseva, Alexandr Alyabyev, dan Mariya Papulova mendapat mata mereka dikira.

src: The next major competition ahead of the 2014 Winter Paralympics is the test event in Sochi, Russia in March of this year.
ref: Pertandingan besar selepas ini sebelum Paralimpik Musim Sejuk 2014 ialah acara percubaan di Sochi, Russia pada Mac tahun ini.

src: Elections in Zimbabwe began with both the ruling and opposition parties predicting victory.
ref: Pilihanraya di Zimbabwe bermula dengan kedua-dua pihak pemerintah dan pihak pembangkang menjangkakan menang.

src: The main opposition — Movement for Democratic Change (MDC) claims the election is being rigged, and despite being allowed to freely campaign, the government's intimidation of voters and moves to hurt opposition supporters will prevent the MDC win.
ref: Pembangkang utama- Movement for Democratic Change (MDC) mendakwa pilihanraya telah dimanipulasi, dan meskipun dibenarkan untuk bebas berkempen, ugutan pihak kerajaan terhadap pengundi dan gerakan untuk menyakiti penyokong pihak pembangkang akan menghalang MDC untuk menang.

src: The government recently withheld food aid from those supporting the MDC, according to a United Nations report.
ref: Pihak kerajaan baru-baru ini menahan bantuan makanan untuk mereka yang menyokong MDC, menurut laporan Persatuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu.

src: The UN further reports the government dismissed election officials and poll workers suspected of supporting MDC.
ref: UN kemudiannya melaporkan pihak kerajaan memberhentikan pegawai pilihanraya dan pekerja pengundian yang disyaki menyokong DMC.

src: Last week, a Catholic archbishop in Zimbabwe urged followers to start a non-violent, popular uprising against Mugabe, and rallies have been common in recent days.
ref: Minggu lepas, seorang ketua biskop katolik di Zimbabwe menggesa para pengikut untuk memulakan pemberontakan tanpa keganasan menentang Mugabe, dan perhimpunan sudah menjadi kebiasaan di kebelakangan ini.

src: The previous elections, which the MDC almost won, were marred by violence and similar allegations of vote-rigging.
ref: Pilihanraya lepas, dimana MDC hampir menang, dicemari oleh keganasan dan dakwaan selari dengan undian tipu.

src: More than 5.7 million Zimbabweans are registered to vote, and can cast their ballots at one of the more than 8,000 polling stations.
ref: Lebih dari 5.7 juta rakyat Zimbabwe mendaftar untuk mengundi, dan layak untuk membuang undi di salah sebuah dari 8,000 tempat mengudi.

src: Ashley said in a statement "Newcastle United has a wonderful heritage and the passion of its fans is legendary."
ref: Ashley mengatakan dalam kenyataannya "Newcastle United mempunyai warisan yang hebat dan semangat peminatnya adalah lagenda".

src: "I am sure that, like me, they are already excited about the prospects for next season under the new manager's stewardship."
ref: "Saya pasti, seperti daya, mereka telah teruja mengenai prospek untuk musim akan datang di bawah pengawasan pengurus baru".

src: Ashley is already the largest shareholder in Newcastle United and currently runs Sports World International, the largest sporting goods retail in the United Kingdom.
ref: Ashley telah menjadi pemegang saham terbesar di Newcastle United dan kini menjalankan Sports World International, pembekal alatan sukan terbesar di United Kingdom.

src: In an unannounced vote yesterday, the Philadelphia City Council in the United States voted 16-1 to endorse the eviction of, and end their lease held in perpetuity with, the local council of the Boy Scouts in Philadelphia.
ref: Dalam undi tanpa pengemuman semalam, Majlis Bandaraya Philadelphia di Amerika Syarikat mendapat undi 16-1 untuk menyokong pengusiran, dan menamatkan pajakan mereka dipegang secara berterusan, oleh majlis tempatan Pengakap di Philadelphia.

src: The Scouts must pay market rent or leave the building.
ref: Pengakap perlu membayar sewa pasaran atau meninggalkan bangunan tersebut.

src: Emergency services were alerted to the incident, which occurred on Ford Terrace on the island of Benbecula, at 1139 UTC yesterday.
ref: Perkhidmatan kecemasan telah dimaklumkan ke tempat kejadian, yang berlaku di Ford Terrace di kepulauan Benbecula, pada pukul 1139 UTC semalam.

src: STV News reported the mail carrier, who has not yet been publicly identified, was conducting his duties at the time of the incident.
ref: Berita STV melaporkan pembawa surat tersebut, yang masih belum dikenalpasti secara awam, sedang menjalankan tugasnya semasa kejadian tersebut.

src: The Northern Constabulary said the local Road Policing Unit based in the town of Dingwall in the Scottish Highlands has launched an investigation into the incident.
ref: The Northern Constabulary berkata pihak Unit Trafik tempatan yang berpangkalan di bandar Dingwall di Scottish Highlands telah memulakan siasatan ke atas kejadian tersebut.

src: "Our thoughts are with the postman's family, friends and colleagues at this very sad time", the spokesperson added.
ref: "Ingatan kami berada bersama keluarga posmen tersebut, sahabat-sahabat dan rakan sekerjanya pada masa kesedihan ini," tambah jurucakap tersebut.

src: No other vehicles are thought to have been involved; the Northern Constabulary has not yet said if it is looking for any other persons in relation to the fatality.
ref: Tiada kenderaan lain yang difikirkan terlibat; Northern Constbulary masih belum berkata sekiranya mereka mencari orang lain yang terlibat dengan kemalangan maut itu.

src: The increase in storage is announced on the main Gmail page with a JavaScript counter that increases the quoted available storage in relation to the current date.
ref: Peningkatan dalam simpanan diumumkan di halaman utama Gmail dengan kaunter JavaScript meningkatkan simpanan tersedia yang disebut berkenaan dengan tarikh semasa.

src: For example, on April 1 at 5 a.m. UTC the site announced 1025 MB available, 30 hours later — 2050 MB, and a week later it should announce a total of 2075 MB.
ref: Sebagai contoh, pada 1 April 5:00 a.m. UTC laman tersebut mengumumkan 1025 MB tersedia ada, 30 jam kemudian - 2050 MB, dan seminggu kemudian ia seharusnya mengumumkan jumlah terkumpul sebanyak 2075 MB.

src: Unless Google adjusts the code behind the counter, the text will read "Over 2075" after April 9.
ref: Melainkan Google melaraskan kod di belakang kaunter, teks akan dibaca "Melebihi 2075" selepas 9 April.

src: Code analysis performed by Wikinews writer Pingswept, and while believed to be correct, is original reporting and has not been verified by any external source.
ref: Kod analisis yang dilakukan oleh penulis Wikinews Pingswept, dan meskipun dipercayai benar, merupakan laporan asal dan tidak disahkan oleh mana-mana sumber luar.

src: Initially arrested in late January following a local news television story on the thefts, he stands accused of stealing parts worth between US$300 and US$600 each from locations that included Milwaukee Area Technical College, Waukesha County Technical College, ITT Technical Institute, University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee, Marquette University, the Pick 'n Save on Capitol Drive in Brookfield, and the Arby’s also located on Capitol Drive in Brookfield.
ref: Pada mulanya ditangkap pada lewat Januari berikutan kisah di berita televisyen tempatan mengenai kecurian, dia dituduh mencuri alat ganti bernilai antara US$300 dan US$600 dari setiap satu lokasi yang termasuk Kolej Teknikal Kawasan Milwaukee, Kolej Teknikal Daerah Waukesha, Institusi Teknikal ITT, Universiti Wisconsin-Milwaukee, Universiti Marquette, Pick 'n Save di lebuhraya Capitol Drive di Brookfield, dan Arby's yang juga terletak di lebuhraya Capitol Drive di Brookfield.

src: Feerick was dubbed the "Backpack Bathroom Bandit" by the media because video showed him committing the thefts while wearing a backpack.
ref: Feerick telah digelar "Pencuri Tandas Berbeg Galas" oleh media kerana video menunjukkan ia melakukan pencurian ketika memakai beg galas.

src: The thefts reportedly took place in September and October of last year, with several area police departments involved in investigating them.
ref: Kecurian dilaporkan berlaku pada bulan September dan Oktober tahun lepas, dengan beberapa jabatan polis kawasan terlibat dalam menyiasatnya.

src: Dark Floors, a horror film under production in Northern Finland and starring the hard rock band Lordi (who are famed for their monster costumes and lyrical themes), has received €300,000 (£200,000) funding from the Finnish government.
ref: Dark Floors, sebuah filem hantu di bawah penerbitan di Utara Finland dan dilakonkan oleh kumpulan hard rock Lordi (yang terkenal dengan kostum raksasa dan lirik tema ), telah menerima pendanaan sebanyak €300,000 (£200,000) dari kerajaan Finland.

src: Lordi are also famed for their record-breaking 292 point victory in the Eurovision Song Contest 2006 with their song Hard Rock Hallelujah.
ref: Lordi juga terkenal dengan kemenangan di Pertandingan Lagu Eurovision 2006 dengan 292 mata yang memecahkan rekod dengan lagu Hard Rock Hallelujah.

src: It was also the first time a hard rock song had won the contest, and Finland's first ever victory.
ref: Ia juga yang pertama kali sebuah lagu hard rock telah memenangi pertandingan itu, dan kemenangan Finland yang pertama.

src: The film is being shot in English, with a largely Finnish cast, and has a production cost of €4.2 million (£2.84 million).
ref: Filem itu dibuat di dalam bahasa Inggeris, dengan kebanyakannya terdiri dari pelakon Finland, dan mempunyai kos penerbitan sebanyak €4.2 juta (£2.84 juta).

src: Lead singer Mr Lordi said that as their masks and costumes were derived from horror films it was "kind of natural" that they should make their own.
ref: Penyanyi utama Encik Lordi berkata topeng dan kostum mereka diperoleh dari filem hantu dan ia adalah "agak natural" yang mereka harus membuat filem sendiri.

src: Upon arrival, a woman's sevens match was in progress between the Sunshine Coast Stingrays and Toowoomba Army.
ref: Semasa ketibaan, perlawanan tujuh sebelah wanita sedang berlangsung di antara Sunshine Coast Stringrays dan Toowoomba Army.

src: Sunshine Coast won this contest 26 to 15, an 11 point margin.
ref: Sunshine Coast memenangi pertarungan ini 26 berbalas 15, dengan jurang 11 mata.

src: Caloundra went ahead after 12 minutes with a converted try.
ref: Caloundra mendahului selepas minit ke 12 dengan satu percubaan konversi.

src: University put on 21 points to 6 in the final half an hour.
ref: University menghasilkan 21 mata kepada 6 dalam 30 minit terakhir.

src: They won lineouts against the throw and counter rucked in a more efficient manner than Sunshine Coast.
ref: Mereka memenangi lontaran masuk line out dan juga ruck balas dengan cara yang lebih efisien berbanding Sunshine Coast.

src: The final score in a lop side contest — Sunnybank Dragons 36 defeated Sunshine Coast Stingrays 6.
ref: Mata akhir di pertarungan cantas - Sunnybank Dragon 36 menewaskan Sunshine Coast Stingrays 6.

src: Finnish symphonic power metal band, Nightwish, has announced details about their latest studio album, which will be the first to feature new Swedish lead vocalist Anette Olzon, who recently replaced Tarja Turunen.
ref: Band simfoni power metal Finland, Nightwish telah mengumumkan butiran mengenai album studio terbaru mereka, yang akan menjadi yang pertama untuk menampilkan ketua vokalis baru Anette Olzon, dari Sweden yang baru-baru menggantikan Tarja Turunen.

src: Among the details released is the name of the new album, which until now had been unrevealed.
ref: Antara butiran yang dikeluarkan adalah nama album baru, yang sehingga kini masih belum diumumkan.

src: Nightwish have also released a full track listing for the album and revealed that as well as Eva, which has already been released, the song Amaranth will be released as a single.
ref: Nightwish juga telah mengeluarkan satu senarai trek penuh untuk album itu dan mendedahkan bahawa di samping Eva, yang telah diterbitkan, lagu Amaranth akan dikeluarkan sebagai single.

src: The album will debut in the band's native Finland on September 26 from record labels Spinefarm Records and distributed by Universal Music Group.
ref: Album ini akan diperlihatkan di umum buat kali pertama di tempat berasal kumpulan itu, Finland pada 26 September daripada label rekod Spinefarm Records dan diedarkan oleh Universal Music Group.

src: Nuclear Blast will release Amaranth on August 24 and Spinefarm/Universal will release it on August 22.
ref: Nucler Blast akan mengeluarkan Amaranth pada 24 Ogos dan Spinefarm/Universal akan menerbitkannya pada 22 Ogos.

src: The BBC has announced it will not play "Ding-Dong!
ref: BBC telah mengumumkan bahawa ia tidak akan memainkan "Ding-Dong!

src: The Witch Is Dead" in its entirety on today's Radio 1 Chart Show.
ref: The Witch Is Dead" secara keseluruhannya pada hari ini dalam Acara Carta Radio 1.

src: The song has become the third most downloaded single of the week, following the death of former United Kingdom Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher.
ref: Lagu ini telah menjadi lagu perseorangan ketiga paling banyak muat turun minggu ini, berikutan kematian bekas Perdana Menteri United Kingdom, Margaret Thatcher.

src: Controller of Radio 1 Ben Cooper said "about a four or five second clip" of the song would be included in a news item explaining why it has featured in the charts, which will air as part of the programme.
ref: Pengawal Radio 1, Ben Cooper berkata "tentang klip empat atau lima saat" lagu itu akan dimasukkan ke dalam berita menjelaskan mengapa ia telah dimasukkan ke dalam carta, yang akan ke udara sebagai sebahagian daripada program ini.

src: "But on the other hand they couldn't have just ignored the fact that it does feature amongst the most downloaded singles of the week."
ref: "Tetapi dari sudut yang lain, mereka tidak boleh hanya mengabaikan hakikat bahawa ia adalah antara lagu perseorangan yang paling banyak dimuat turun dalam minggu tersebut."

src: Mrs Thatcher's supporters have launched a campaign to get "I'm in Love with Margaret Thatcher" into the music chart alongside "Ding Dong the Witch is Dead".
ref: Penyokong Puan Thatcher telah melancarkan kempen untuk mendapatkan "I'm in Love with Margaret Thatcher" ke dalam carta muzik di samping "Ding Dong the Witch is Dead."

src: Mrs Thatcher's funeral is scheduled for St.Paul's Cathedral on Wednesday.
ref: Pengebumian Puan Thatcher dijadualkan di Gereja St. Paul pada hari Rabu.

src: It is to be attended by leading figures from the worlds of politics and entertainment, as well as several international figures, including former Australian Prime Minister John Howard and inventor of the World Wide Web Sir Tim Berners-Lee.
ref: Ia akan dihadiri oleh tokoh-tokoh dari dunia politik dan hiburan, serta beberapa tokoh-tokoh antarabangsa, termasuk bekas Perdana Menteri Australia, John Howard dan pencipta World Wide Web Sir Tim Berners-Lee.

src: Researchers at the Massachusetts General Hospital have created laboratory-grown rat kidneys that function when transplanted into rats according to a study published online yesterday in the medical journal Nature Medicine.
ref: Penyelidik-penyelidik di Hospital Besar Massachusetts telah mencipta buah pinggang daripada tikus makmal yang berfungsi apabila dipindahkan ke dalam tikus menurut satu kajian yang diterbitkan dalam talian hari ini dalam jurnal perubatan Nature Medicine.

src: The kidneys were capable of urine production and excretion without blood clots in both the laboratory and inside living rats.
ref: Buah pinggang itu berupaya dalam pengeluaran air kencing dan perkumuhan tanpa darah beku dalam makmal dan tikus yang hidup.

src: These kidneys would also be of the patient's tissue avoiding issues of organ rejection and would increase the pool of kidneys available for human transplant.
ref: Buah pinggang ini juga akan menjadi tisu pesakit dan mengelakkan isu-isu penolakan organ dan akan meningkatkan bilangan buah pinggang untuk pemindahan organ manusia.

src: The researchers incubated the kidneys in a specialized oven for 12 days to mimic the insides of a rat.
ref: Para penyelidik mengeram buah pinggang itu di dalam ketuhar khas selama 12 hari untuk meniru bahagian dalaman tikus.

src: The researchers reported that these kidneys produced urine at 23% of the normal levels of properly working kidneys.
ref: Para penyelidik melaporkan bahawa buah pinggang ini menghasilkan air kencing pada kadar 23% berbanding tahap normal buah pinggang yang berfungsi.

src: The lead researcher of the study published in Nature Medicine, Dr. Harald C. Ott, says this partial functionality is enough, saying, "If you're on haemodialysis then kidney function of 10% to 15% would already make you independent of hemodialysis."
ref: Penyelidik utama kajian itu menerbitkan dalam Nature Medicine, Dr Harald C. Ott, berkata fungsi separa ini adalah mencukupi, mengatakan: "Jika anda menjalani hemodialisis maka fungsi buah pinggang sebanyak 10% hingga 15 % akan membebaskan anda daripada hemodialisis".

src: The techniques developed by Ott and the team of researchers still have to be further researched before it can be applied for use in humans.
ref: Teknik-teknik yang dibangunkan oleh Ott dan pasukan penyelidik masih perlu terus dikaji sebelum ia boleh digunakan untuk manusia.

src: "Then in an ideal world, you'd take cells from that patient and create a kidney on demand."
ref: "Dalam dunia yang ideal pula, anda akan mengambil sel daripada pesakit itu dan membuat buah pinggang atas permintaan".

src: The US Senate rejected Wednesday a bill amendment aimed at increasing the security of gun background checks, on what President Barack Obama described as "a shameful day for Washington."
ref: Dewan Negara US menolak pindaan undang-undang pada Rabu yang menumpukan pada meningkatkan tahap keselamatan pemeriksaan lakar belakang senjata api, seperti yang digambarkan oleh Presiden Barack Obama sebagai "hari yang memalukan pada Washington".

src: On April 10 Senator Pat Toomey, accompanying Senator Joe Manchin in announcing the amendment, said it aimed to make "it more difficult for criminals and mentally ill people to obtain guns".
ref: Pada 10 April Ahli Dewan Negara Pat Toomey, menemani Senator Joe Manchin dalam mengumumkan berkaitan pindaan, berkata ianya tertumpu untuk membuat "lebih bayak kesusahan kepada penjahat dan pesakit mental untuk memiliki senjata api".

src: The bill received only 54 of the required 60 votes to proceed, despite strong public support for tighter gun control in the wake of the Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting last year.
ref: Pindaan itu hanya mendapat 54 daripada 60 undian untuk diteruskan, walaupun dengan sokongan kuat dari orang awam untuk mengetatkan lagi kawalan senjata api dalam mengingati kejadiaan tembak di Sekolah Rendah Sandy Hook tahun lepas.

src: Gun rights groups have campaigned strongly against the vote, claiming that the measures would violate constitutional rights, and targeting individual Senators with mocking material appearing online.
ref: Kumpulan pemegang senjata api berkempen hebat bagi menetang undian, mendakwa bahawa penilaian itu akan melanggar hak perlembagaan, dan menyasarkan kepada individu Ahli Dewan Rakyat dengan mengejek bahan itu terdapat melalui atas talian.

src: An onlooker in the gallery shouted "Shame on you" as the result of the vote was announced.
ref: Seorang penonton di geleri itu menjerit "Malulah anda" selepas keputusan undian itu diumumkan.

src: The President spoke to the press and spectators shortly after the vote was announced, passionately assuring his audience that he would continue to pursue measures to reduce the incidence of gun violence in the United States.
ref: Presiden berkata kepada media dan penonton sejurus selepas keputusan diumumkan, bersemangat meyakinkan pendengar bahawa beliau akan terus mengejar pemeriksaan untuk mengurangkan insiden terhadap keganasan senjata api di Amerika Syarikat.

src: Team New Zealand have defeated Swiss syndicate Alinghi in the second race of the 32nd America's Cup Challenge on Sunday, making the overall score equal with one win for each team.
ref: Pasukan New Zealand telah mengalahkan sindiket Switzerland Alinghi dalam perlumbaan kedua Piala Cabaran ke-32 Amerika pada hari Ahad, menjadikan mata keseluruhan bersamaan dengan satu kemenangan bagi setiap pasukan.

src: Team New Zealand, racing with NZL-92, crossed the start line three seconds ahead of Alinghi's yacht, SUI-100.
ref: Pasukan New Zealand, berlumba dengan menggunakan NZL -92, melintasi garisan permulaan tiga saat di hadapan kapal layar Alinghi, SUI-100.

src: But Alinghi led the race at the first mark by 13 seconds, though near the ending of the race, Team New Zealand managed to overtake Alinghi to lead the final leg of the race by 28 seconds.
ref: Tetapi Alinghi mendahului perlumbaan itu di tanda pertama dengan 13 saat, walaupun berhampiran pengakhiran perlumbaan, pasukan New Zealand berjaya memintas Alinghi untuk mendahului peringkat akhir perlumbaan dengan 28 saat.

src: Former Alinghi and Team New Zealand skipper, Russell Coutts said that the latest win for Team New Zealand will act as a big boost for them.
ref: Bekas Alinghi dan ketua pasukan Pasukan New Zealand, Russell Coutts berkata kemenangan terbaru untuk pasukan New Zealand akan menjadi perangsang besar untuk mereka.

src: Ray Davis, Team New Zealand after-guard, said, "It’s been huge for the team to get a win on the board in the America’s Cup.
ref: Ray Davis, perancang strategi pelayaran kapal pasukan New Zealand, berkata, "Amat bermakna bagi pasukan kami menang dalam profesion kami di Piala Amerika.

src: It has been a long time coming for Emirates Team New Zealand."
ref: Ia telah lama untuk pasukan Emirates New Zealand."

src: The next race is scheduled for tomorrow, Monday being a race-off day.
ref: Perlumbaan seterusnya dijadualkan esok, Isnin sebagai hari perlumbaan.

src: The last time Alinghi and Team New Zealand fought for the America's Cup was when Team New Zealand was defending the trophy in Auckland, New Zealand.
ref: Kali terakhir Alinghi dan Pasukan New Zealand berjuang untuk Piala Amerika adalah apabila skuad New Zealand mempertahankan trofi di Auckland, New Zealand.

src: The past three consecutive America's Cup challenges have been all whitewash victories, and five of the last six challenges have also been whitewashes.
ref: Cabaran Piala Amerika tiga kali berturut-turut yang lepas kesemuanya adalah kemenangan yang mengaburkan kebenaran, dan lima daripada enam cabaran lepas juga adalah kemenangan yang mengaburkan kebenaran.

src: "I have been in prison for an entire year and my health is deteriorating."
ref: "Saya telah berada dalam penjara sepanjang tahun dan kesihatan saya semakin merosot."
