src: "I regret the lack of interest of the Israeli government and military in my case and their failure to meet the demands."
ref: "Saya menyesal atas ketidakpedulian kerajaan Israel dan tentera dalam kes saya dan kegagalan mereka untuk memenuhi permintaan-permintaan itu."

src: "Just as I have parents, a mother and father, thousands of Palestinian detainees have mothers and fathers whose sons must be returned to them."
ref: "Sebagaimana saya mempunyai ibu bapa, ibu dan bapa, beribu-ribu tahanan Palestin mempunyai ibu dan bapa yang anak-anak mesti dikembalikan kepada mereka."

src: "I imagine that it's the same as the letter they dictated to him and doesn't reflect his real state."
ref: "Saya membayangkan bahawa itu sama dengan surat yang dibaca kepadanya dan tidak mencerminkan keadaan sebenarnya."

src: "How cruel can Hamas be? "
ref: "Betapa kejamnya Hamas boleh jadi?"

src: "We will not compromise with Hamas," said Miri Eisin, a spokeswoman for Israeli Prime Minister Ehud Olmert.
ref: "Kami tidak akan bertolak ansur dengan Hamas," kata Miri Eisin, seorang jurucakap Perdana Menteri Israel, Ehud Olmert.

src: "The ball is now in the Israeli court," said Osama al-Muzaini, a senior official for Hamas.
ref: "Keputusannya kini dipegang oleh mahkamah Israel," kata Osama al-Muzaini, seorang pegawai kanan Hamas.

src: Shalit was kidnapped exactly one year ago today on June 25, 2006.
ref: Shalit diculik tepat satu tahun yang lalu hari ini pada 25 Jun 2006.

src: He was kidnapped in Gaza City which sparked a month long war between Lebanon and Israel.
ref: Dia diculik di Bandar Gaza yang mencetuskan perang sepanjang sebulan antara Lubnan dan Israel.

src: A gunman opened fire at a hunting shop in the Russian city of yesterday, leaving six people dead.
ref: Seorang lelaki bersenjata melepaskan tembakan di sebuah kedai memburu di bandar Rusia semalam, menyebabkan enam orang mati.

src: Two of the victims were young girls aged 14 and 16.
ref: Dua daripada mangsa-mangsa adalah budak perempuan berumur 14 dan 16.

src: The man left the scene in a BMW, later abandoning the vehicle.
ref: Lelaki itu meninggalkan tempat kejadian dengan sebuah BMW, kemudian meninggalkan kereta tersebut.

src: Local authorities have said the search involves around 1200 police; InSerbia reports a team of 50 troops have also been dispatched to assist with the manhunt.
ref: Pihak berkuasa tempatan berkata pencarian melibatkan lebih kurang 1200 polis, di Serbia laporan mengatakan sepasukan 50 tentera telah dihantar untuk membantu dalam pemburuan itu.

src: Police also warned civilians the suspect may have a gas pistol and a semi-automatic rifle.
ref: Polis juga memberi amaran kepada orang awam bahawa suspek mungkin mempunyai pistol gas dan senapang semi-automatik.

src: Regional police spokesperson Alexei Pomorov told AFP, "We do not know whether it was a conflict because there's no one we can ask: everyone's dead".
ref: Jurucakap polis tempatan Alexei Pomorov memberitahu AFP, "Kita tidak tahu sama ada ia adalah konflik kerana tidak ada seorang pun yang boleh kita soal: semua orang sudah mati."

src: The European Union would like to make it easier to dismiss employees.
ref: Kesatuan Eropah hendak menjadikan ianya lebih mudah untuk memecat pekerja.

src: Then, thanks to the improved flexibility of the market, it should be simpler to find a job.
ref: Dan, terima kasih kepada kefleksibelan pasaran yang bertambah baik, ia sepatutnya lebih mudah untuk mencari pekerjaan.

src: Surveys show that Europeans mostly seem to agree with the need to adapt and change.
ref: Tinjauan menunjukkan orang Eropah kebanyakannya bersetuju dengan keperluan untuk menyesuaikan diri dan berubah.

src: The concept of flexicurity, preached by the European Commission, is aimed to encourage EU governments to unfasten their employment policies.
ref: Konsep fleksikuriti, yang disampaikan oleh Suruhanjaya Eropah, ditujukan untuk menggalakkan kerajaan-kerajaan EU untuk melonggarkan polisi buruh mereka.

src: Such a policy "extends the time needed for jobseeking and the period of unemployment", writes the Commission in its report.
ref: Polisi sebegitu "memanjangkan masa yang diperlukan untuk mencari pekerjaan dan tempoh pengangguran", Suruhanjaya tersebut menulis di dalam laporannya.

src: On its paper, the Commission is inspired by the social model of the Scandinavian countries - namely by the social system established in Denmark in the late 1990's.
ref: Di dalam dokumen, Suruhanjaya itu mendapat inspirasi daripada model sosial negara-negara Skandinavia - iaitu oleh sistem sosial yang ditubuhkan di Denmark pada lewat tahun 1990-an.

src: The first new channel HBO plans to launch in Asia is HBO Signature, which is targeted to women.
ref: Saluran baru pertama HBO merancang untuk dilancarkan di Asia ialah HBO Signature, yang menumpukan kepada wanita.

src: According to reports, HBO already has struck deals for carriage in all of those countries except Macau.
ref: Menurut laporan, HBO sudah membuat perjanjian untuk pembawa di semua negara tersebut kecuali Macau.

src: In addition to programming HBO Signature to women, the company said it plans on two other genre-based channels, but did not disclose what niches they would market toward.
ref: Sebagai tambahan untuk mengaturkan HBO Signature kepada wanita, syarikat itu turut berkata sedang merancang untuk dua lagi saluran berasaskan kategori, tetapi tidak mendedahkan kepada bidang apa mereka mahu pasarkan.

src: A clue could be to look to the U.S. where HBO's niche channels include HBO Family for children-friendly programming and the self-explanatory HBO Comedy channel.
ref: Satu maklumat boleh dilihat ke A.S. di mana bidang saluran HBO termasuklah HBO Family untuk program mesra kanak-kanak dan saluran HBO Comedy yang kita dapat tahu dari namanya.

src: Like the parent HBO Asia channel, along with limited original programming, the new genre channels are expected to offer top Hollywood fare dubbed into local languages.
ref: Sebagaimana saluran utama HBO Asia, dan juga program original terhad, saluran kategori baru ini dijangka dapat menawarkan menu terbaik Hollywood dialih bahasa ke bahasa tempatan.

src: This is the largest expansion of HBO Asia, which has been operating in Asia since 1992 and serves 25 countries, since the launch of Cinemax Asia in 1996.
ref: Ini adalah peluasan terbesar HBO Asia, yang mana telah beroperasi di Asia sejak 1992 dan menawarkan perkhidmatan di 25 buah negara, sejak pelancaran Cinemax Asia pada tahun 1996.

src: West Indies have beaten England by 15 runs in the first Twenty20 international of their tour of England at The Oval, London, England.
ref: West Indies telah menewaskan England sebanyak 15 larian dalam Twenty20 antarabangsa pertama sempena lawatan ke England di The Oval, London, England.

src: The West Indian innings started off badly by losing Gayle early, however they turned their fortunes around with some attacking and aggressive cricket and posted a huge total of 208.
ref: Inning West Indies bermula dengan teruk apabila kehilangan Gayle pada awal masa, namun mereka mengubah nasib mereka dengan beberapa permainan serangan dan kriket yang agresif dan mencatatkan jumlah besar 208.

src: A bigger total could have been posted if it had not been for a late innings batting collapse.
ref: Jumlah yang lebih besar mungkin dapat diperoleh jika bukan kerana tewasnya pemukul pada inning lewat.

src: England started their reply by getting off to a flyer, but lost some early wickets that slowed down the run-rate.
ref: England memulakan permainan mereka dengan baik, tetapi kehilangan beberapa wiket awal sehingga melewatkan kadar run.

src: Leading the charge was Paul Collingwood with a fast 79 with 5 4's and 4 6's.
ref: Mengetuai serangan adalah Paul Collingwood dengan catatan pantas 79 dengan 5 4's dan 4 6's.

src: Had they not have lost the early wickets, England would have probably won the match to take a 1-0 lead in the series.
ref: Jika bukan kerana kehilangan wiket awal, England mungkin memenangi perlawanan untuk mendahului 1-0 dalam siri ini.

src: The anonymous individual responsible for suggesting, 14 hours before police discovered the body, that WWE wrestler Chris Benoit's wife was dead is saying his/her comment was a "terrible coincidence."
ref: Individu bertanggungjawab yang namanya tidak diketahui menunjukkan, 14 jam sebelum polis menemui mayat itu, bahawa isteri WWE gusti Chris Benoit telah mati dan dia mengatakan komennya adalah "kebetulan yang amat dahsyat".

src: In a post made at 12:26 AM EDT Friday morning to the talk page of a Wikinews article headlined as the "Death of Nancy Benoit rumour posted on Wikipedia hours prior to body being found", the user admitted to writing that Nancy Benoit was dead at the Wikipedia article page for Benoit came from information that was garnered from "rumors and speculation online."
ref: Dalam kenyataan yang dibuat pada 12:26 EDT pagi Jumaat untuk halaman perbualan sebuah artikel Wikinews bertajuk "Khabar angin kematian Nancy Benoit yang dinyatakan atas Wikipedia berjam-jam sebelum mayatnya dijumpai," pengguna yang mengakui menulis yang Nancy Benoit telah mati di halaman artikel Wikipedia untuk Benoit mendapat maklumat melalui "khabar angin dan spekulasi dalam talian".

src: The IP Address of the individual making the apology was identical to that of the one who posted the Nancy Benoit rumor, a strong confirmation of the admission's authenticity.
ref: Alamat IP individu yang memohon maaf itu adalah sama dengan orang yang mencatatkan khabar angin Nancy Benoit, pengesahan yang kuat terhadap kebenaran pengakuan itu.

src: Wikinews originally broke the story about the suspicious edit after receiving a tip from Wikipedia administrators.
ref: Wikinews asalnya menggemparkan peristiwa tentang pengeditan yang mencurigakan itu selepas menerima ramalan daripada pentadbir Wikipedia.

src: The fact the edit originated from a computer in Stamford, Connecticut (the site of WWE headquarters) appears to be another coincidence.
ref: Hakikat pengeditan itu berasal daripada komputer di Stamford, Connecticut (kawasan ibu pejabat WWE) nampaknya adalah satu lagi kebetulan.

src: The anonymous editor left a lengthy apology to the Wikimedia community, explaining, "I hope this puts an end to this speculation that someone knew about the tragedy before it was discovered."
ref: Editor yang namanya tidak diketahui memaparkan permohonan maaf yang panjang lebar kepada komuniti Wikimedia, dengan menjelaskan, "Saya harap ini mengakhiri spekulasi ini bahawa seseorang mengetahui tentang tragedi itu sebelum ia ditemui".

src: Wikinews is continuing to follow the story, but the anonymous user has declined an interview.
ref: Wikinews terus mengikuti kisah ini, tetapi pengguna yang namanya tidak diketahui telah menolak satu permintaan temu bual.

src: Six additional members of the pod had died during the stranding, including at least one calf.
ref: Enam lagi paus telah mati semasa terdampar, termasuk sekurang-kurangnya seekor anak paus.

src: More than 300 people were watching as the whales set out to sea following a 30 hour rescue effort.
ref: Lebih daripada 300 orang menyaksikan ikan paus tersebut dibawa ke laut berikutan usaha menyelamat yang mengambil masa 30 jam.

src: Western Australian State Government Department of Conservation and Land Management (CALM) officers feared that the whales could become stranded again.
ref: Pegawai Jabatan Pemuliharaan dan Pengurusan Tanah Kerajaan Australia Barat (CALM) khuatir ikan paus tersebut akan terkandas lagi.

src: "I think the plan is that the vet will be there again [today] and will give them some vitamins to kick them along before they actually take their swim out to sea."
ref: "Saya rasa rancangannya ialah doktor haiwan akan berada di sana lagi [hari ini] dan akan memberikan mereka beberapa vitamin untuk memberi mereka tenaga sebelum mereka benar-benar berenang kembali ke laut".

src: England have beaten West Indies by five wickets in the second Twenty20 international of the West Indies tour of England at The Oval, London, England.
ref: England telah mengalahkan West Indies dengan lima wickets dalam Twenty20 antarabangsa kedua pelancongan West Indies di England di The Oval, London, England.

src: England's victory tied the two match series 1-1 after West Indies won the first Twenty20 yesterday.
ref: Kemenangan England mengikat dua siri perlawanan 1-1 selepas West Indies memenangi Twenty20 pertama semalam.

src: Chris Gayle got the West Indies off to a good start with 61 runs off 37 balls, but the England bowlers and fielders restricted their score to 169-7 after 20 overs despite some big hits from Marlon Samuels.
ref: Chris Gayle mendapat West Indies dengan permulaan yang baik dengan 61 larian 37 bola, tetapi pemain England dan fielders terhad skor mereka untuk 169-7 selepas 20 overs walaupun beberapa pukulan besar dari Marlon Samuels.

src: In reply, England faltered, losing three wickets in 14 balls followed by the dismissal of Kevin Pietersen for 19.
ref: Di jawapannya, England gerun, kehilangan tiga wickets dalam 14 bola diikuti dengan pemecatan Kevin Pietersen untuk 19.

src: However Owais Shah scored 55 to help England past the target.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun Owais Shah menjaringkan 55 untuk membantu England lepas sasaran.

src: The event will feature multiple independently produced films and screenplays.
ref: Acara itu akan menampilkan beberapa filem dan skrip yang dihasilkan oleh penerbit bebas.

src: Numerous films will be screened at the festival, including the short film, Byron's Theme.
ref: Banyak filem akan ditayangkan di festival itu, termasuk filem pendek, Byron's Theme.

src: Other films include A Thousand Kisses Deep, and A White Mule.
ref: Filem-filem lain termasuk A Thousand Kisses Deep dan A White Mule.

src: Screenwriter and indie film producer, Kara Rainer's story entitled RORRIM was selected as a finalist in the screenplay category.
ref: Cerita bertajuk RORRIM oleh Penulis skrip dan penerbit filem bebas, Kara Rainer telah dipilih sebagai peserta peringkat terakhir dalam kategori layar.

src: Rainer told Wikinews, "...I am thrilled that RORRIM was picked with so many [screenplays] being selected."
ref: Rainer berkata kepada Wikinews, "...Saya teruja bahawa RORRIM dipilih bersama dengan begitu banyak [skrip filem] yang terpilih".

src: Rainer's story revolves largely around an old hand mirror she discovered while attending an estate sale in Dallas, Texas.
ref: Cerita Rainer ini sebahagian besarnya berkisar sekitar cermin tangan lama dia temui semasa menghadiri jualan hartanah di Dallas, Texas.

src: In 2012, the festival opened with the film, The Black Tulip, a film shot entirely in Afghanistan.
ref: Pada tahun 2012, festival bermula dengan filem, The Black Tulip, sebuah filem dirakam sepenuhnya di Afghanistan.

src: That film ultimately won multiple awards at that year's festival, including Best Producer and Best Actor.
ref: Filem tersebut akhirnya memenangi pelbagai anugerah di festival tahun ini, termasuk Penerbit Terbaik dan Pelakon Lelaki Terbaik.

src: The festival will be featured at the historic Chinese 6 Theatres on Hollywood Boulevard in Hollywood, California.
ref: Pesta ini akan ditampilkan di Teater Chinese 6 yang bersejarah di Hollywood Boulevard di Hollywood, California.

src: The aims of the ban are to reduce the risks associated with passive smoking and to reduce the number of smokers overall.
ref: Tujuan pengharaman ini adalah untuk mengurangkan risiko berkaitan merokok secara pasif dan mengurangkan jumlah perokok keseluruhannya.

src: The ban is not being welcomed by all citizens, however.
ref: Larangan ini tidak disambut baik oleh semua rakyat, sebaliknya.

src: Activist group Freedom To Choose is challenging the law at the High Court saying it is in violation of the European Convention on Human Rights.
ref: Kumpulan aktivis Kebebasan Untuk Memilih mencabar undang-undang itu di Mahkamah Tinggi dengan mengatakan ia melanggar Konvensyen Eropah mengenai Hak Asasi Manusia.

src: The business community is expressing concerns about the impact on pubs and similar establishments.
ref: Komuniti perniagaan menyatakan kebimbangan mengenai kesan ke atas pub dan pertubuhan yang seumpamanya.

src: However, a survey by the Campaign for Real Ale suggests 840,000 people who do not regularly go to the pub would do so following the introduction of the ban and that England's 6.2 million regular drinkers would be more likely to visit pubs and bars.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kajian yang dijalankan oleh Kempen untuk Real Ale menunjukkan 840,000 orang yang tidak kerap pergi ke pub itu akan berbuat demikian berikutan pengenalan larangan dan 6.2 juta peminum tetap England akan menjadi lebih cenderung untuk melawat pub dan bar.

src: Smoking kills 100,000 people in Britain each year through cancer, lung conditions, and heart problems.
ref: Merokok membunuh 100,000 orang di Britain setiap tahun melalui kanser, keadaan paru-paru, dan masalah jantung.

src: Approximately 1,000 people a day in England are admitted to hospital with an illness related to smoking, costing the National Health Service an estimated £1.5 billion.
ref: Kira-kira 1,000 orang di England dimasukkan ke hospital setiap hari dengan penyakit yang berkaitan dengan merokok, membebankan Perkhidmatan Kesihatan Kebangsaan pada anggaran £1.5 bilion.

src: A young woman was killed Friday night after an accident occurred on a gyrating ride at the Playland amusement park in Rye, New York in the United States.
ref: Seorang wanita muda telah dibunuh malam Jumaat selepas kemalangan berlaku pada perjalanan bergelora di taman hiburan Playland di Rye, New York di Amerika Syarikat.

src: The woman, Gabriela Garin, was a worker at the amusement park, and had worked there for the past seven years.
ref: Wanita itu, Gabriela Garin, adalah seorang pekerja di taman hiburan, dan telah bekerja di sana selama tujuh tahun yang lalu.

src: The new operator then noticed Garin, and shut the ride down in 20 seconds, but Garin had already been ejected from the ride and killed, according to a park spokesperson.
ref: Pengendali baru kemudian perasan Garin, dan menutup tunggangan dalam 20 saat, tetapi Garin telah pun dikeluarkan dari tunggangan dan terbunuh, menurut seorang jurucakap taman.

src: The ride is an attraction that spins people around in two-seat cars, inside a darkened tent to flashing lights and music.
ref: Tunggangan itu adalah satu tarikan yang memutarkan orang di dalam kereta yang mempunyai dua tempat duduk, di dalam khemah yang gelap kepada kelipan cahaya dan muzik.

src: This incident is not the first in the ride's history.
ref: Insiden ini bukan yang pertama dalam sejarah tunggangan ini.

src: A safety precaution was put in place after this incident, however, the spokesperson acknowledged that it was not followed when Garin was killed.
ref: Langkah keselamatan telah dilaksanakan selepas kejadian ini, bagaimanapun, jurucakap itu mengakui bahawa ia tidak diikuti apabila Garin terbunuh.

src: The company which owns the ride shut it down, along with two other rides it owns at the park.
ref: Syarikat yang memiliki tunggangan itu menutupnya, bersama-sama dengan dua tunggangan lain yang ia miliki di taman itu.

src: The park features more than 50 rides, a pool, and a beach.
ref: Taman ini mempunyai lebih daripada 50 permainan, kolam renang, dan pantai.

src: The final destination of the landing is not known and will be determined as the flight nears its end.
ref: Destinasi terakhir untuk mendarat masih belum diketahui dan akan diputuskan apabila penerbangan hampir berakhir.

src: The basket is small and has openings in the side for Hempleman-Adams to extend his legs as he sleeps.
ref: Bakulnya kecil dan mempunyai lubang-lubang di tepi untuk Hempleman-Adams meluruskan kakinya semasa dia tidur.

src: Hempleman-Adams is hoping to make the crossing in three to four days and reach Europe by July 5 or 6th.
ref: Hempleman-Adams berharap untuk membuat rentasan itu dalam masa tiga ke empat hari dan sampai ke Eropah sebelum 5 atau 6 Julai.

src: Skipper Brad Butterworth, coincidently a New Zealander, led the Switzerland-based boat to a second straight "Auld Mug" trophy.
ref: Pengemudi Brad Butterworth, secara kebetulannya rakyat New Zealand telah memimpin bot dari Switzerland itu untuk memenangi trofi "Auld Mug" untuk dua kali berturut-turut.

src: The race started with Team New Zealand, skippered by Dean Barker, having a slight advantage.
ref: Perlumbaan ini bermula dengan Team New Zealand, dikemudi oleh Dean Barker, sedikit mendahului di hadapan.

src: Team New Zealand still had to complete their 360 degree penalty turn, and did so.
ref: Team New Zealand masih mempunyai 360 degree pusingan penalti dan mereka meneruskan pelayaran untuk menghabiskan pusingan penalti tersebut.

src: After completing the turn, Alinghi sailed up beside them and took the win by one second.
ref: Setelah selesai menghabiskan pusingan tersebut, Alinghi berlayar menghampiri mereka dan memenangi dengan satu saat.

src: Swiss President Micheline Calmy-Rey congratulated the team, sending a telegram that read: "We Swiss find our way at sea, not just in the mountains."
ref: Presiden Swiss Micheline Calmy-Rey mengucapkan tahniah kepada pasukan tersebut dan telah menghantar satu telegram yang menulis: "Kami orang Swiss dapat mencari arah kami di laut dan bukan hanya di gunung."

src: Micheline Calmy-Rey, president of Switzerland, sent a telegram to the team congratulating them of their win.
ref: Presiden Switzerland, Micheline Calmy-Rey menghantar telegram kepada pasukan itu untuk mengucapkan tahniah atas kemenangan mereka.

src: "We Swiss find our way at sea, not just in the mountains," referring to Switzerland being most popular for Alpine skiing.
ref: "Kami orang Swiss akan dapat mencari arah kami di laut dan bukan hanya di gunung," merujuk kepada Switzerland yang lebih terkenal dengan olahraga ski Alpine.

src: Managing director of Team New Zealand, Grant Dalton, said, "All credit to Alinghi."
ref: Pengurus utama Team New Zealand, Grant Dalton berkata, "Tahniah Alinghi."

src: "They kept it close when we got past them on the first run they just kept on sailing the way they do and beat us fair and square in the end."
ref: "Mereka berjaya mengekalkan jarak dekat dengan kami apabila kami mendahului mereka di pusingan pertama dan mereka tetap terus berlayar dengan gaya tersendiri dan berjaya mengalahkan kami dengan adil."

src: The New Zealand Government has announced that it is setting aside NZ$10 million to help retain key yachties.
ref: Kerajaan New Zealand telah mengumumkan akan menyediakan NZ$10 juta bagi membantu mengekalkan ahli layar utama.

src: This is just under double what the government gave them after the loss in 2003.
ref: Ini sedikit bawah dari dua kali ganda apa yang diberikan kerajaan kepada mereka selepas kekalahan pada tahun 2003.

src: Sports and recreation minister for New Zealand, Trevor Mallard, said, "It is the view of the government that the team should continue, that it should be based in New Zealand and that Auckland should host an America's Cup regatta again."
ref: Perdana Menteri Sukan dan Rekreasi New Zealand, Trevor Mallard berkata "Kerajaan berpendapat pasukan ini perlu diteruskan dan patut berpusat di New Zealand dan Auckland patut sekali lagi menjadi penganjur bagi Piala Kapal Layar Amerika Syarikat."

src: The money, to be channeled through UNICEF for its water and sanitation program, will be used to develop new wells and improve existing ones.
ref: Duit itu, akan disalurkan melalui UNICEF untuk air dan program kebersihan, akan digunakan untuk membangunkan telaga dan memperbaharui yang sedia ada.

src: UNICEF is to contribute a further €60,000, as well as technical expertise to the Ministry of Agriculture, who will carry out the bulk of the work.
ref: UNICEF akan menyumbangkan lebih €60,000, sebagaimana iklan teknikal dari Menteri Pertanian, yang akan dibuat kerja olehnya.

src: At the same time, the UN aid agency World Food Program (WFP) indicated that it is working with the Ministry of Agriculture and UNICEF to gradually shift Djibouti's reliance on emergency aid to a Food for Work program, which it hopes will assist nomadic herders in Djibouti with long-term sustainability.
ref: Pada masa yang sama, dana agensi Program Makanan Dunia (WFP) UN menyatakan bahawa ia berkerjasama dengan Menteri Pertanian dan UNICEF untuk meningkatkan tempat bergantung Djibouti terhadap bantuan makanan kecemasan kepada Program Makanan Dunia, yang berharap akan membantu pengembala nomad dengan jangka masa yang pangjang.

src: "And, together with the UN Food and Agriculture Organization, we will try and promote vegetable gardens."
ref: "Dan, bersama dengn Organisasi Pertanian dan Makanan, kami akan cuba untuk mempromosikan kebun sayur".

src: Djibouti has survived harsh drought conditions for the past 5 years.
ref: Djibouti telah terselamat dari keadaan kemarau untuk hampir 5 tahun.

src: Almost 50 percent of people in rural Djibouti do not have ready access to properly developed source of drinking water.
ref: Hampir 50 peratus orang di luar bandar Djibouti tiada alatan lengkap untuk mencari sumber air untuk diminum.

src: And, due to the ongoing drought, water availability for livestock is limited.
ref: Dan, disebabkan kemarau yang berpanjangan, kegunaan air untuk hidupan ternakan amat terhad.

src: Livestock have shown signs of distress and, subsequently, milk production is down substantially.
ref: Haiwan ternakan tlah menunjukkan tanda-tanda distres dan, seterusnya, hasil susu berkurangan dengan banyak.

src: As the droughts continue, the importance of properly maintained wells has become apparent.
ref: Disebabkan kemarau yang berpanjangan, kepentingan untuk menjaga telaga dengan baik dilihat amat penting.

src: "Now it is good for us to have functioning wells so that we can keep cattle here," said Anou Amada, farmer in the village of Andoli.
ref: "Sekarang amat penting untuk kita mempunyai telaga yang berfungsi dengan baik supaya kita boleh membela lembu disini," kata Anou Amada, pekebun di dalam kampung Andoli.

src: A 2006 survey indicated that only 15 percent of wells in Djibouti were equipped with a protective concrete wall to prevent contamination.
ref: Pada banci tahun 2006 menyatakan bahawa hanya 15 peratus dari telaga di Djibouti telah disediakan dengan dinding konkrit untuk mengelak dari tercemar.

src: Andoli's well is one of many undergoing repair through WFP's Food for Work project.
ref: Telaga Andoli adalah salah satu dari yang akan diperbetulkan melalui projek makanan WFP.

src: "We want the people to participate and to appropriate these pumping stations."
ref: "Kami mahu orang itu menyertai dan menghargai stesen pam itu".

src: "The government’s role in the long term should be as restricted as possible," he added.
ref: "Peranan kerajaan dalam jangka masa panjang seharusnya menjadi ketat seketatnya," tambahnya lagi.

src: Lawyers representing Haitian cholera victims warned the United Nations (UN) on May 7, if they do not admit liability for the spread of cholera in 2010, they'll be sued.
ref: Peguam mewakili mangsa-mangsa taun di Haiti memberi amaran kepada Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu (UN) pada 7 Mei, jika mereka tidak mengaku bertanggungjawab kepada penyebaran taun pada 2010, mereka akan disaman.

src: Lawyers demand the UN apologize to and compensate the victims and improve sanitation efforts.
ref: Peguam mendesak UN memohon maaf dan memberi membayar ganti rugi kepada mangsa dan memperbaiki usaha sanitasi.

src: UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.
ref: Pasukan keamanan UN, yang tiba di Haiti selepas gempa bumi 2010, dipersalahkan dalam penyebaran penyakit itu yang telah bermula berdekatan perkhemahan tentera.

src: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
ref: Mengikut tuntutan mahkamah, pembuangan dari khemah tidak disanitasi dengan baik, menyebabkan bakteria memasuki cabang Sungai Artibonite, satu daripada sungai terbesar di Haiti.

src: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
ref: Institut Keadilan dan Demokrasi Haiti telah merujuk kepada kajian bebas yang mencadangkan batalion pasukan keamanan UN Nepal dengan tidak sedar telah membawa penyakit itu ke Haiti.

src: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
ref: Danielle Lantagne, pakar penyakit UN, menyatakan bahawa pecetus kepada penyakit itu kemungkinan besarnya adalah pasukan keamanan tersebut.

src: Scientists from Pacific Bio-sciences of California Inc. analyzed the bacteria in Haiti and concluded its genome is an almost identical match to samples recovered in South Asia, but different to those found in Latin America.
ref: Saintis dari Bio-sains Pasifik California Inc. menganalisa bakteria di Haiti dan membuat kesimpulan genomnya ialah hampir serupa dengan sampel yand dijumpai di Asia Selatan, tetapi lain dengan yang dijumpai di Amerika Latin.

src: The UN continues to deny any responsibility for the cholera outbreak and claims it is immune from further legal proceedings.
ref: UN terus menafikan sebarang kebertanggungjawaban kepada tersetusnya taun dan mendakwa mereka terkecuali dari tindakan lanjut undang-undang.

src: Hu Jintao, the President of the People's Republic of China had lunch today with the President of Brazil, Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, at the Granja do Torto, the President's country residence in the Brazilian Federal District.
ref: Hu Jintao, Presiden Republik Rakyat China telah makan tengah hari hari ini bersama Presiden Brazil, Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, di Granja do Torto, kediaman rasmi Presiden itu di Wilayah Persekutuan Brazil.

src: Also present were Roger Agnelli (Vale do Rio Doce company president) and Eduardo Dutra (Petrobras, government oil company, president).
ref: Turut hadir adalah Roger Agnelli (presiden syarikat Vale do Rio Doce) dan Eduardo Dutra (presiden Petrobras, syarikat minyak kerajaan).

src: 25 people were killed today and 33 were injured when a large explosion ripped through a karaoke bar in Tianshifu, Liaoning Province, China.
ref: 25 orang terbunuh hari ini dan 33 cedera apabila satu letupan yang besar berlaku di bar karaoke di Tianshifu, Wilayah Liaoning, China.

src: Four people are reported to be in a serious condition.
ref: Empat orang dilaporkan berada dalam keadaan serius.

src: Originally, Xinhua reported only five fatalities, but as rescue workers continued to move away debris, the full extent of the death toll was discovered.
ref: Pada asalnya, Xinhua melaporkan hanya lima kematian, tetapi apabila pekerja penyelamat terus mengetepikan runtuhan, jumlah sebenar angka kematian telah ditemui.

src: Xinhua has also reported that several employees at the bar, as well as the wife of the owner, were being questioned.
ref: Xinhua juga telah melaporkan bahawa beberapa pekerja di bar, dan juga isteri kepada pemilik, telah disoal siasat.

src: According to a philly.com article authored by The Associated Press, Xinhua failed to state whether this was as witnesses or as suspects in any potential criminal activity, but the Shanghai Daily said that Xinhua had reported the people had been detained as suspects.
ref: Menurut satu artikel philly.com dikarang oleh The Associated Press, Xinhua gagal menyatakan sama ada ini merupakan saksi atau sebagai suspek dalam kemungkinan aktiviti jenayah, tetapi Shanghai Daily berkata Xinhua melaporkan orang tersebut telah ditahan sebagai suspek.

src: The two-storey building, which also housed a bathhouse, was completely leveled by the blast.
ref: Bangunan dua tingkat, yang juga menempatkan rumah mandi, telah sepenuhnya dimusnahkan oleh letupan.

src: In addition, several cars were buried under the debris and windows in nearby buildings were shattered by the pressure wave.
ref: Selain itu, beberapa kereta telah terkubur di bawah runtuhan itu dan tingkap di bangunan berdekatan telah dipecahkan akibat gelombang tekanan.

src: A power cut in the area was also caused by the blast due to damage to the local electricity network.
ref: Kuasa elektrik di kawasan itu juga terputus disebabkan oleh letupan yang merosakkan rangkaian elektrik tempatan.

src: China has been the location of many disasters in both public and private places, such as fires and explosions.
ref: China telah menjadi lokasi banyak bencana di kedua-dua tempat awam dan persendirian, seperti kebakaran dan letupan.

src: Earlier this year, an unsafe arrangement with a two-ton steel ladle resulted in the Qinghe Special Steel Corporation disaster, in which molten steel was accidentally poured into a room full of workers, killing 32.
ref: Pada awal tahun ini, perletakkan yang tidak selamat dengan dua tan senduk keluli mengakibatkan bencana Qinghe Special Steel Corporation, di mana keluli lebur tidak sengaja dituangkan ke dalam bilik yang penuh dengan pekerja, membunuh 32.

src: The majority of China's accidents stem from a combination of lax safety regulations and negligence, and accidents continue regularly despite promises by the government to prevent them.
ref: Majoriti kemalangan China berpunca dari gabungan peraturan keselamatan yang longgar dan kecuaian, dan kemalangan terus berlaku secara tetap walaupun kerajaan berjanji untuk menangani mereka.

src: Authorities from the U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation are currently investigating death threats targeted towards the New York investment firm Goldman Sachs.
ref: Pihak berkuasa dari Biro Penyiasatan Persekutuan Amerika Syarikat sedang menyiasat ancaman bunuh yang disasarkan terhadap firma pelaburan Goldman Sachs di New York.

src: The bank is working closely with law enforcement authorities, however, it was told by Goldman Sachs that the threat is not likely to be credible.
ref: Bank itu sedang bekerjasama rapat dengan pihak berkuasa undang-undang, walau bagaimanapun, Goldman Sachs memberitahu bahawa ancaman itu kemungkinan tidak boleh dipercayai.

src: Goldman Sachs is headquartered in New York and maintains offices in London, Frankfurt, Tokyo, Hong Kong and other major financial centers.
ref: Goldman Sachs beribu pejabat di New York dan mempunyai pejabat di London, Frankfurt, Tokyo, Hong Kong dan pusat kewangan utama lain.

src: Microsoft has extended the warranty on its Xbox 360 video game console to three years from the date of purchase following a large number of problems with the console and "an unacceptable number of repairs", costing the company more than one billion US dollars.
ref: Microsoft telah memanjangkan jaminan bagi Xbox 360 konsol permainan video kepada tiga tahun dari tarikh pembelian diikuti banyak masalah konsol dan "jumlah pembaikpulihan yang tidak terbilang", memakan kos syarikat itu lebih daripada satu billion mata wang US.

src: The fault, which has been dubbed the "red ring of death", causes the console to fail completely.
ref: Kerosakan itu, yang digelar "red ring of death", menyebabkan konsol itu gagal secara keseluruhan.

src: In an open letter to owners of the Xbox 360, Peter Moore of Microsoft said, "As of today, all Xbox 360 consoles are covered by an enhanced warranty program to address specifically the general hardware failures indicated by the three flashing red lights on the console."
ref: Dalam surat terbuka kepada pemilik Xbox 360, Peter Moore dari Microsoft berkata, "Untuk hari ini, semua konsol Xbox 360 telah dirangkumi jaminan program yang dipertingkatkan khususnya untuk kegagalan perkakas secara umum yang dikesan dengan tiga lampu merah berkelip atas konsol".

src: The extended warranty covers repairing and shipping of the console and the company has promised to reimburse those owners who have already had to pay for repairs.
ref: Pemanjangan jaminan merangkumi pembaikian dan penghantaran konsol dan syarikat telah berjanji untuk membayar gantirugi kepada pemilik yang telah membayar pembaikpuluhan.

src: Microsoft has not released details of the number of units that have suffered from the problem but has said it is "bigger than we are comfortable with".
ref: Microsoft tidak menyiarkan secara terperinci jumlah unit yang bermasalah tetapi telah berkata "ia adalah lebih banyak daripada jumlah yang kami rasa selesa".

src: The Xbox 360 was launched by Microsoft in 2005 and in January of this year the company lowered its sales expectations to 12 million units for the year ending June 2007.
ref: Xbox 360 yang dipasarkan oleh Microsoft pada tahun 2005 dan pada tahun yang sama pada bulan Januari, syarikat menurunkan jangkaan jualannya kepada 12 billion unit sehingga ke akhir bulan Jun 2007.

src: A Wimbledon champion in 2000, 2001 and 2005, Williams was not the favorite to win the title again this year.
ref: Juara Wimbledon pada tahun 2000, 2001 dan 2005, Williams tidak menjadi pilihan untuk memenangi gelaran sekali lagi tahun ini.

src: In spite of her initial strength, Serena's hopes to dominate the tournament were cut short when she lost to No.
ref: Walaupun kekuatan awal beliau, harapan Serena untuk menguasai kejohanan itu dipotong pendek apabila dia tewas kepada pemain pilihan No.

src: 1 seeded Justine Henin in the quarterfinals.
ref: 1 Justine Henin pada suku akhir.

src: Bartoli, the eighteenth seed for this year's championships, had never progressed past the fourth round of any Grand Slam event.
ref: Bartoli, pilihan kelapan belas untuk kejohanan tahun ini, tidak pernah berkembang melepasi pusingan keempat mana-mana acara Grand Slam.

src: However, she progressed to the final by defeating third seed Jelena Janković in the fourth round and Justine Henin in the semifinals in one of the major upsets of Wimbledon history.
ref: Bagaimanapun, beliau mara ke perlawanan akhir dengan mengalahkan pemain pilihan ketiga, Jelena Jankovic pada pusingan keempat dan Justine Henin pada separuh akhir dalam salah satu gangguan utama dalam sejarah Wimbledon.

src: As Henin lost to Bartoli in the semifinals, Venus Williams was poised to become the lowest seeded player in recorded history to win the Wimbledon singles title.
ref: Sebagai Henin kalah kepada Bartoli di separuh akhir, Venus Williams telah bersedia untuk menjadi pemain yang paling rendah pemain pilihan dalam catatan sejarah untuk memenangi kejuaraan Wimbledon.

src: With powerhouse serves and an aggressive ground strokes battle, she did just that.
ref: Dengan kuasa berfungsi dan tanah agresif sebatan pertempuran, dia berbuat demikian.

src: Venus was reunited with the Venus Rosewater Dish on Centre Court during the trophy ceremony.
ref: Venus telah bersatu semula dengan Dish Venus Rosewater di Centre Court semasa majlis trofi.

src: Another first, the All England Club is paying men's and women's singles champions equal prize money.
ref: Satu lagi yang pertama, All England Club adalah membayar juara perseorangan lelaki dan wanita sama hadiah wang.

src: Venus was paid $1.407 million, to which she replied "Thank you, All England Club - we're playing under equal terms."
ref: Venus telah dibayar $1.407 juta, yang dia menjawab "Terima kasih, All England Club - Kami bermain di bawah terma yang sama."

src: Australian Treasurer Wayne Swan has today handed down his last budget before the 2013 Federal election.
ref: Bendahari Australia Wayne Swan telah menurunkan belanjawan terakhirnya hari ini sebelum pilihan raya Persekutuan 2013.

src: There is to be a A$60 billion write down over four years.
ref: Selama empat tahun terdapat penurunan nilai sebanyak A$60 bilion.

src: "Because of our deep commitment to jobs and growth, we have taken the responsible course to delay the return to surplus, and due to a savage hit to tax receipts, there will be a deficit of $18 billion in 2013/14".
ref: "Disebabkan komitmen mendalam kami terhadap pekerjaan dan pertumbuhan, kami telah mengambil tindakan yang bertangunggjawab dengan menangguhkan pengembalian lebihan, dan disebabkan pukulan hebat terhadap terimaan cukai, defisit akan menjadi $18 bilion pada tahun 2013/14."

src: People earning the Newstart Allowance can now earn more from paid employment before there payments from the government are cut.
ref: Mereka yang menerima Peruntukan Newstart kini boleh mendapat lebih banyak dari pekerjaan bergaji sebelum bayaran dari kerajaan dipotong.

src: Mr Swan announced the so called "Baby Bonus" was to be merged into the Family Tax Benefit Part A.
ref: Encik Swan mengumumkan ia yang diberi nama "Baby Bonus" akan dimasukkan ke dalam Faedah Cukai Keluarga Bahagian A.

src: Dutch adventurer Ralph Tuijn has reached the halfway point of his attempt to be the first person to row across the Pacific Ocean unaided.
ref: Pengembara Belanda Ralph Tuijn telah mencapai separuh percubaanya untuk menjadi orang pertama mendayung merentasi Lautan Pasifik tanpa bantuan.

src: The 16,000 kilometre journey from the coast of Peru to the seaside city of Brisbane, Australia, the widest section of the Pacific, has never been crossed absolutely unaided by a rower, and Tuijn says just nine people have rowed it even with assistance.
ref: Perjalanan 16,000 kilometer dari pantai Peru ke bandar tepi pantai di Brisbane, Australia, bahagian yang paling luas di Pasifik, tidak pernah dilintasi sama sekali tanpa bantuan oleh pendayung, dan Tuijn berkata hanya sembilan orang telah mengayuh di sana dengan bantuan.

src: He has been making good progress, and has since cut his estimated time of arrival in Brisbane by a month.
ref: Beliau telah membuat kemajuan yang baik, dan telah mengurangkan anggaran masa beliau tiba di Brisbane selama sebulan.

src: His boat, the Zeeman Challenger, is a seven-metre custom plywood vessel.
ref: Perahu beliau, the Zeeman Challenger, berukuran tujuh meter kapal papan lapis yang direka khas.

src: He is suffering from the constant attention of sharks, who often bump his boat and disrupt his attempts at sleep.
ref: Beliau mengalami perhatian yang berterusan dari jerung, yang sering bertembung dengan perahunya dan mengganggu usahanya ketika tidur.

src: He has also accidentally burnt himself when he spilled hot water on his foot whilst trying to make coffee, apparently also from a shark 'bump'.
ref: Beliau juga tidak sengaja melecur apabila dia tertumpah air panas di kakinya ketika cuba untuk membuat kopi, nampaknya juga berpunca dari 'pertembungan'dengan jerung.

src: He is also forced to manually pump water for cooking and drinking after his automatic water pump broke down not long into his journey.
ref: Beliau juga terpaksa secara mempam air dengan manual untuk memasak dan minum selepas pam air automatik beliau rosak tidak lama ketika dalam perjalanannya.

src: Tujin, who is raising money for a children's home in Mumbai, India, is rowing at an average speed of 58 kilometres each day.
ref: Tujin, yang mengumpul wang untuk rumah kanak-kanak di Mumbai, India, mendayung pada kelajuan purata 58 kilometer setiap hari.

src: Hundreds of legal, highly-skilled workers in the United States sent hundreds of flowers to the Director of the United States Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), Emilio Gonzalez as part of a symbolic and peaceful protest over what they said was a "flip-flop" by the State Department and the USCIS on eliminating Green card processing delays.
ref: Beratus-ratus, pekerja berkemahiran tinggi, yang sah di sisi undang-undang di Amerika Syarikat menghantar beratus-ratus bunga kepada Pengarah Perkhidmatan Kewarganegaraan dan Imigresen Amerika Syarikat(USCIS), Emilio Gonzalez sebagai sebahagian daripada protes simbolik dan aman tentang apa yang mereka katakan adalah "pecah janji" oleh Jabatan Negara dan USCIS ke atas menghapuskan kelewatan pemprosesan kad Hijau.

src: Dr. Gonzalez announced on the USCIS website late last night that the flowers will be forwarded to the injured service members recuperating at Walter Reed Army Medical Center and at Bethesda Naval Hospital.
ref: Dr Gonzalez mengumumkan di laman web USCIS lewat malam tadi bahawa bunga akan dipanjangkan kepada anggota perkhidmatan tercedera yang sedang dirawat di Pusat Perubatan Tentera Walter Reed dan di Hospital Bethesda Laut.

src: In response, Immigration Voice, a non-profit organization representing skilled, legal immigrants, said that they welcome the fact that Dr. Gonzalez acknowledged the symbolic gesture of our protest and are overjoyed that these flowers will brighten the day of the injured service brethren.
ref: Sebagai tindak balas, Suara Imigresen, sebuah pertubuhan bukan mencari keuntungan yang mewakili pendatang mahir, yang sah di sisi undang-undang berkata, pihaknya mengalu-alukan hakikat bahawa Dr Gonzalez mengakui isyarat simbolik bantahan kami dan gembira yang bunga-bunga ini akan mencerahkan hari saudara-saudara berbakti yang tercedera.

src: Immigration Voice also said that it is their sacrifice for American freedom that has made this country great and such a desirable destination for multitude of people from around the world and that they wanted to say "Thank you and god bless you" to the servicemen.
ref: Suara Imigresen juga berkata bahawa disebabkan pengorbanan mereka untuk mendapatkan kebebasan Amerika yang telah menjadikan negara ini hebat dan destinasi yang diidami warga seluruh dunia dan mereka mahu mengatakan "Terima kasih dan Tuhan memberkati anda" kepada anggota yang berbakti.

src: WMAQ-TV NBC 5 Chicago announced yesterday that reporter Amy Jacobson was leaving her job after being videotaped in a bikini with her two sons at the home of Craig Stebic.
ref: WMAQ-TV NBC 5 Chicago mengumumkan semalam bahawa wartawan Amy Jacobson telah meninggalkan pekerjaannya selepas rakaman videonya diambil dalam bikini dengan dua anak lelakinya di rumah Craig Stebic.

src: Jacobson has been covering the story of Stebic's wife Lisa, who has been missing since April 30.
ref: Jacobson telah membuat liputan kisah isteri Stebic Lisa, yang hilang sejak 30 April.

src: Jacobson has reported at WMAQ for the last ten years.
ref: Jacobson telah melapor di WMAQ dari sepuluh tahun yang lalu.

src: "The decision to part ways has been a difficult one."
ref: "Keputusan untuk berpisah adalah satu keputusan yang sukar."

src: Jacobson said her attorney told her it is illegal to videotape people on private property and she said she "is looking at all of her legal options."
ref: Jacobson mengatakan peguam beliau memberitahunya adalah haram untuk merakam video seseorang dalam tempat peribadi mereka dan dia berkata dia "sedang mengkaji semua pilihan undang-undang itu."

src: A press release was sent to the WMAQ-TV Newsroom staff on July 10, 2007.
ref: Satu kenyataan akhbar telah dihantar kepada kakitangan Bilik Berita WMAQ-TV pada 10 Julai 2007.

src: Jacobson came to WMAQ-TV in 1996 from Fox affiliate WJBK located in Detroit.
ref: Jacobson datang ke WMAQ-TV pada tahun 1996 dari Fox affiliate WJBK terletak di Detroit.

src: She started at WMAQ as a freelance reporter and moved up to general assignment reporter.
ref: Beliau mula berkhidmat dengan WMAQ sebagai wartawan bebas dan naik ke wartawan tugasan umum.

src: She and her husband have two children and live on the north side of Chicago.
ref: Beliau dan suaminya mempunyai dua orang anak dan tinggal di sebelah utara Chicago.

src: UK Prime Minister Gordon Brown has announced a review into the 'social effects' of gambling, throwing doubt over the government's previous plans to grant a license for a 5,000 m² 'supercasino'.
ref: Perdana Menteri UK Gordon Brown telah mengumumkan satu kaji semula tentang 'kesan sosial'perjudian, melemparkan kesangsian terhadap rancangan kerajaan yang terdahulu untuk memberikan lesen kepada 'superkasino'berukuran 5,000 meter persegi.

src: The review, to take place in September, will look at "whether regeneration in the areas for the super-casinos may be a better way of meeting their economic and social needs than the creation of super-casinos".
ref: Kaji semula itu, yang akan diadakan pada bulan September, akan melihat "sama ada pembangunan semula di kawasan-kawasan untuk super kasino itu mungkin kaedah yang lebih baik bagi memenuhi keperluan ekonomi dan sosial mereka daripada membina super kasino".

src: Gordon Brown made the announcement during Prime Ministers questions, in response to a question from Labour MP Andy Reed.
ref: Gordon Brown membuat pengumuman itu semasa soalan-soalan Perdana Menteri, sebagai jawapan kepada soalan dari MP Buruh Andy Reed.

src: The plan to allow the building of a single supercasino, and 16 smaller casinos, was set in motion by previous Prime Minister Tony Blair.
ref: Rancangan untuk membenarkan pembinaan sebuah super kasino, dan 16 kasino yang lebih kecil, telah dijalankan oleh Perdana Menteri terdahulu Tony Blair.

src: An independent Casino Advisory Panel had recommended in February 2007 that the supercasino license should be granted to the city of Manchester, a recommendation which the Government was expected to follow.
ref: Panel Penasihat Kasino bebas telah mencadangkan pada Februari 2007 untuk memberikan lesen superkasino kepada bandar Manchester, satu cadangan di mana Kerajaan diharap akan mengikutnya.

src: The new announcement by Gordon Brown throws doubt over these plans, and BBC News are quoting an unnamed 'Whitehall source' as having commented that the supercasino plan is "dead in the water".
ref: Pengumuman baru oleh Gordon Brown itu menimbulkan kesangsian terhadap rancangan-rancangan tersebut, dan BBC News memetik 'sumber Whitehall 'tidak bernama yang memberi komen bahawa rancangan super kasino itu "tidak boleh bergerak".

src: Norwegian cyclist Thor Hushovd sprinted his way to a stage four victory in the 2007 Tour de France on Wednesday.
ref: Pelumba basikal Norway, Thor Hushovd telah berjaya memenangi kemenangan di pentas keempat di dalam 2007 Tour de France, Rabu lalu.

src: Fabian Cancellara of Switzerland maintained the overall lead, while Hushovd moved into second place, 29 seconds behind Cancellara.
ref: Fabian Cancellara dari Switzerland kekal mendahului secara keseluruhan manakala Hushovd naik ke tempat kedua, 29 saat di belakang Cancellara.

src: "When I get into the mountains, it's sure that it's finished," Cancellara said.
ref: Cancellara berkata "Apabila saya memasuki pergunungan, sudah pasti semuanya akan tamat".

src: Danish mountain specialist, and "King of the Mountains" for 2005 and 2006, Michael Rasmussen agrees that the Alps will be a turning point in the race.
ref: Pakar pergunungan Danish dan "Raja Pergunungan" untuk tahun 2005 dan 2006, Michael Rasmussen bersetuju bahawa gunung Alps akan mengubah corak perlumbaan.

src: Two Long Island, New York teenagers, aged 15 and 17, have been charged for their alleged involvement in a suspected plot to attack their school next April, on the ninth anniversary of the Columbine High School shooting massacre.
ref: Dua remaja dari Long Island, New York, berumur 15 dan 17, telah didakwa kerana didakwa terbabit dalam plot yang disyaki bertujuan menyerang sekolah mereka pada bulan April depan, dalam ulang tahun kesembilan tembakan pembunuhan beramai-ramai di Columbine High School.

src: The plot was uncovered when the 15-year-old suspect lost his journal at the McDonalds restaurant where he worked.
ref: Plot itu terbongkar apabila suspek berusia 15 tahun kehilangan jurnalnya di restoran McDonalds di mana dia bekerja.

src: The journal was found by a fellow classmate of the teenagers' school, who quickly turned it over to school officials.
ref: Jurnal ini ditemui oleh seorang rakan sekelas sekolah remaja-remaja itu, yang dengan cepat menyerahkannya kepada pegawai sekolah.

src: The 17-year-old was allegedly planning to aid in the attack on the school.
ref: Remaja berusia 17 tahun itu didakwa merancang untuk membantu dalam serangan ke atas sekolah.

src: The two teens were arrested and held in Long Island jail on misdemeanor conspiracy, which is punishable by up to one year in prison.
ref: Kedua-dua remaja ditangkap dan ditahan di penjara Long Island atas konspirasi pelanggaran undang-undang, yang boleh dihukum sehingga satu tahun di dalam penjara.

src: The 15-year-old will appear in juvenile court on Friday and the 17-year-old suspect is expected to plead not guilty at a hearing.
ref: Remaja berusia 15 tahun itu akan hadir di mahkamah juvana pada hari Jumaat dan suspek yang berusia 17 tahun dijangka mengaku tidak bersalah di satu perbicaraan.

src: The Young Earth Creationist who sent threatening emails and letters to biologists at the University of Colorado at Boulder also sent threatening letters to the University chancellor G.P.
ref: Young Earth Creationst yang menghantar e-mel dan surat ancaman kepada ahli biologi di Universiti Colorado di Boulder juga menghantar surat ancaman kepada Canselor Universiti G.P.

src: Peterson as well as the vice-chancellor of undergraduate education and others.
ref: Peterson serta Naib Canselor pendidikan sarjana muda dan yang lain-lain.

src: The man who had sent the threats has been identified as Menachem "Michael" Korn, a former Orthodox Jew who converted to Messianic Judaism (no longer affiliated with either) and who now self-identifies as "Christian".
ref: Orang yang telah menghantar ancaman-ancaman itu telah dikenal pasti sebagai Menachem "Michael" Korn, bekas Yahudi Ortodoks yang memeluk agama Yahudi Mesianik (tidak lagi bergabung dengan yang kedua-duanya) dan kini memperkenalkan diri sebagai "Kristian."

src: Claimed excerpts of the threats were posted on The Panda's Thumb, a biology blog that focuses on "the claims of the anti-evolution movement."
ref: Petikan yang dikatakan daripada ancaman itu dipaparkan dalam The Panda's Thumb, satu blog biologi yang memberi tumpuan kepada "tuntutan pergerakan anti-evolusi."

src: Among other statements, Korn compared evolutionary biologists to child molesters and discussed killing the "enemies of Christian society" who are "terrorists against America".
ref: Antara kenyataan lain, Korn membandingkan ahli biologi evolusi dengan pencabul kanak-kanak dan membincangkan pembunuhan "musuh masyarakat Kristian" yang menjadi "pengganas terhadap Amerika."

src: Korn had apparently distributed fliers on campus before and harassed professors but over the last few days the threats had become more extreme.
ref: Korn nampaknya telah mengedarkan risalah di kampus sebelum ini dan mengganggu profesor-profesor tetapi sejak beberapa hari lepas ancaman telah menjadi lebih melampau.

src: The chief-minister of Civil House José Dirceu was a member of the delegation.
ref: Ketua Menteri Rumah Awam Jose Dirceu merupakan ahli delegasi itu.

src: Unfortunately they arrived too late for the funeral and the delegation watched only part of the funeral activities.
ref: Malangnya mereka tiba terlalu lewat semasa pengebumian dan delegasi itu hanya menonton sebahagian daripada aktiviti pengebumian.

src: Jamil Murad had visited Yasser Arafat in April 2004, along with nine other Brazilian deputies.
ref: Jamil Murad telah melawat Yasser Arafat pada April 2004, bersama sembilan lagi timbalan ahli Brazil.

src: Iraq has defeated Australia 3-1 in their 2007 AFC Asian Cup Group A match at the Rajamangala Stadium, Bangkok, Thailand.
ref: Iraq telah menewaskan Australia 3-1 dalam perlawanan Kumpulan A Piala Asia tahun 2007 di Stadium Rajamangala, Bangkok, Thailand.

src: Iraq took the lead after twenty-three minutes when midfielder Nashat Akram scored.
ref: Iraq mendahului selepas dua puluh tiga minit apabila pemain tengah Nashat Akram menjaringkan gol.

src: He curled in a free kick from around thirty yards out, and Salih al Sadwn rushed towards Australian goalkeeper Mark Schwarzer.
ref: Dia mengherotkan sepakan percuma dari lebih kurang tiga puluh ela jauh dan Salih al Sadwn bergegas kari ke arah penjaga gol Australia, Mark Schwarzer.

src: Al Sadwn's presence sufficiently distracted Schwarzer, who dived the wrong way.
ref: Kehadiran Al Sadwn ini cukup mengganggu Schwarzer, yang jatuh atas padang dan berpura-pura tercedera dengan cara yang salah.

src: The Australian captain managed to head a curling cross by midfielder Brett Emerton back across Iraqi Noor Hassan's goal and into the top corner.
ref: Kapten Australia berjaya menanduk tendangan lencong pemain tengah Brett Emerton kembali merentasi gol pemain Iraq Noor Hassan dan ke dalam penjuru teratas.

src: Hawar Mulla Mohammed was played through with a lovely ball from a teammate, who had attracted the Australian central defence out-of-position.
ref: Hawar Mulla Mohammed bermain sepanjang waktu permainan dengan sepakan bola yang baik daripada rakan sepasukan, yang telah menarik perhatian pertahanan tengah Australia supaya tersasar daripada kedudukan mereka.

src: Iraq sealed the three Group A points when Karrar Jassim Mohammed scored in the eighty-sixth minute.
ref: Iraq memeteraikan tiga mata Kumpulan A apabila Karrar Jassim Mohammed menjaringkan gol pada minit kelapan puluh enam.

src: If Iraq defeats or draws with Oman in their final Group A encounter, they will progress through to the quarter-final stage.
ref: Jika Iraq kalah atau seri dengan Oman pada perlawanan terakhir pertemuan Kumpulan A, mereka akan mara ke peringkat suku akhir.

src: Australia must defeat Thailand to remain any chance of progressing through to the next stage.
ref: Australia mesti mengalahkan Thailand untuk mengekalkan sebarangan peluang untuk mara ke peringkat seterusnya.

src: In the event that Australia win (ie.
ref: Sekiranya Australia menang (iaitu.

src: are on four points) and Iraq win or draw (ie.
ref: berdasarkan empat mata) dan Iraq menang atau seri (iaitu.

src: are on seven or five points), Australia will progress through to the next stage on head-to-head rather than Thailand despite having a possibly-worse goal difference.
ref: berdasarkan tujuh atau lima mata), Australia akan mara ke peringkat seterusnya dan menghadapi sesama pasukannya dan bukannya Thailand walaupun mempunyai perbezaan gol yang mungkin lebih teruk.

src: If Iraq lose to Oman and Australia win, all four teams will end up on four points.
ref: Jika Iraq tewas kepada Oman dan Australia menang, semua empat pasukan akan berakhir dengan empat mata.

src: In Group B, Japan defeated United Arab Emirates 3-1 at the My Dinh National Stadium, Hanoi, Vietnam.
ref: Dalam Kumpulan B, Jepun menewaskan United Arab Emirates 3-1 di Stadium Nasional My Dinh, Hanoi, Vietnam.

src: Defending champions Japan took the lead when Naohiro Takahara scored after twenty-two minutes.
ref: Juara bertahan Jepun mendahului apabila Naohiro Takahara menjaringkan gol selepas dua puluh dua minit.

src: The Emirates scored a goal after sixty-six minutes through Saeed Alkas, but no comeback eventuated and the final score was 3-1 top Japan.
ref: Emirates menjaringkan gol selepas enam puluh enam minit melalui Saeed Alkas, tetapi tiada kembali semula terjadi dan mata akhir adalah 3-1 mendahului Jepun.

src: It leaves Japan equal on top of the Group B table with Vietnam on two points, with the teams locked on four points each.
ref: Ia meninggalkan Jepun seri di atas jadual Kumpulan B dengan Vietnam pada dua mata, dengan pasukan-pasukan itu kekal pada empat mata masing-masing.

src: The winner of the match will take top spot in the group.
ref: Pemenang perlawanan akan mengambil tempat teratas dalam kumpulan.

src: In the event that the Japan-Vietnam match is drawn, both teams have a goal difference of +2.
ref: Sekiranya perlawanan Jepun-Vietnam seri, kedua-dua pasukan mempunyai perbezaan gol +2.

src: However, Japan have scored one more goal than Vietnam, and will take top spot in the group on that basis.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Jepun telah menjaringkan satu gol lebih daripada Vietnam, dan akan mengambil tempat teratas dalam kumpulan atas dasar itu.

src: Qatar, the other team in Group B, must win against UAE and hope for a winner in the Japan-Vietnam match to progress, or else defeat the Emirates by three goals or more.
ref: Qatar, pasukan lain dalam Kumpulan B, mesti menang menentang UAE dan mengharapkan kemenangan dalam perlawanan Jepun-Vietnam untuk mara ke peringkat seterusnya, jika tidak mengalahkan Emirates dengan tiga gol atau lebih.

src: On Sunday two separate suicide bombing attacks killed up to 31 people.
ref: Pada hari Ahad dua serangan letupan bunuh diri berasingan telah membunuh sebanyak 31 orang.

src: Since the Red Mosque siege began there have been 67 people killed in bombing and shooting in Pakistan.
ref: Sejak pengepungan Masjid Merah bermula 67 orang telah terbunuh di dalam letupan dan tembakan di Pakistan.

src: On Saturday 24 soldiers were killed when a suicide bomber crashed into two army vehicles in the town of Swat along the Afghani border.
ref: Pada hari Sabtu 24 orang tentera telah terbunuh semasa seorang pengebom bunuh diri melanggar dua kenderaan tentera di bandar Swat di sepanjang sempadan Afghanistan.

src: Friday, an undersea earthquake off the far east coast of Russia's Kamchatka Peninsula was felt in the capital city of Moscow, 10,000 kilometers away.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, gempa bumi dasar laut di kejauhan pantai timur Semenanjung Kamchatka Russia telah dirasai di ibu kota Moscow, 10,000 kilometer dari sini.

src: The earthquake occurred 600km below sea level in the Okhotsk Sea and recorded an 8.2 magnitude on the Richter Scale, with the Moscow shock measured as 1.0 on the scale.
ref: Gempa bumi itu berlaku 600 kilometer di bawah paras laut di Laut Okhotsk dan mencatatkan magnitud 8.2 pada skala Richter, dengan kejutan Moscow yang diukur sebagai 1.0 pada skala.

src: Citizens in Moscow said that the tremors were not "really strong" but they were enough to shake things hanging on walls.
ref: Warga di Moscow berkata bahawa gegaran tidak "begitu kuat" tetapi ia cukup kuat untuk mengoyangkan barang-barang yang tergantung di dinding.

src: The last time such a shock was felt in Moscow was in 1984.
ref: Kali terakhir kejutan seperti itu dirasai di Moscow adalah pada tahun 1984.

src: This is a so-called deep-focus earthquake, that's why it was felt at such a large territory.
ref: Ini adalah yang dinamakan gempa bumi yang berfokus dalam, itulah sebabnya ia dirasai di kawasan yang besar.

src: If an earthquake happens at such a low depth, the waves move along low layers, practically the mantle, but weaken significantly before reaching the earth surface.
ref: Jika gempa bumi yang berlaku pada kedalaman yang rendah, gelombang bergerak bersama lapisan yang rendah, terutamanya mantel, tetapi menjadi lemah dengan ketara sebelum sampai ke permukaan bumi.

src: This is why there usually is no injuries or casualties in such cases.
ref: Ini adalah mengapa biasanya tiada kecederaan dalam dalam kes-kes tersebut.

src: Sahkalin Island was under a tsunami warning on Friday, however, it was lifted soon after.
ref: Pulau Sahkalin di bawah amaran tsunami pada hari Jumaat, walau bagaimanapun, ia telah ditarik balik tidak lama kemudian.

src: The island may have to prepare for a tsunami situation again, with another under sea earthquake predicted in the next week with a magnitude of over 7.0.
ref: Pulau ini mungkin perlu bersedia untuk keadaan tsunami lagi, dengan satu lagi gempa bumi bawah laut yang diramalkan pada minggu depan dengan magnitud melebihi 7.0.

src: The plane reportedly skidded off the wet runway, crossed a busy thoroughfare before careening into a fuel depot and warehouse ultimately bursting into flames.
ref: Pesawat itu dilaporkan tergelincir di landasan yang basah, merentasi jalan sebelum melanggar gudang depot bahan api yang menyebabkan kebakaran.

src: Authorities believe that all 180 people onboard the plane have died, and a further 15 people on the ground are feared dead as well.
ref: Pihak berkuasa percaya bahawa 180 orang yang menaiki pesawat itu telah mati, dan 15 orang yang di sekitar juga dikuatiri mati.

src: Low clouds and heavy rain were reported at the time of the crash.
ref: Awan mendung dan hujan lebat dilaporkan pada masa nahas itu.

src: Additionally, the runway has had a history of problems with standing water.
ref: Tambahan pula, landasan itu mempunyai sejarah masalah dengan air betakung.

src: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA), one of the main stock indices in the United States, has broken an all-time closing record, to close at 14,000.41 points which is up 82.19 points (0.59%) from its last close.
ref: Purata Industri Dow Jones (DJIA), salah satu indeks saham utama di Amerika Syarikat, telah memecah rekod penutupan sepanjang masa, tutup pada 14,000.41 mata di mana ia meningkat 82.19 mata (0.59%) daripada penutup terakhir.

src: Just 59 days before, the Dow hit an all-time high when it passed 13,000.
ref: Hanya 59 hari sebelum ini, Dow mencapai nilai tertinggi sepanjang masa apabila ia melepasi 13,000.

src: This is the first time the DJIA has ever closed above 14,000 since its debut on May 26, 1896.
ref: Ini adalah kali pertama DJIA tutup melebihi 14,000 sejak kemunculan buat pertama kalinya pada 26 Mei 1896.

src: The Standard & Poor's 500 Index closed at 1,553.08 points which was up 6.91 points (0.45%) and the NASDAQ Composite Index closed at a six-year high to 2,724.74 points, which was up 20.55 point (0.76%).
ref: Indeks Standard & Poor 500 ditutup pada 1,553.08 mata yang meningkat 6.91 mata (0.45%) dan Indeks Komposit NASDAQ tutup pada rekod enam tahun yang tinggi pada 2,724.74 mata, yang meningkat 20.55 mata (0.76%).

src: The available information about the phosphorous cloud following the railway accident in the Ukraine last Monday is becoming more and more cryptic.
ref: Maklumat yang ada tentang awan fosforus berikutan kemalangan kereta api di Ukraine Isnin lepas telah menjadi semakin tersembunyi.

src: The political involvement of most media and other factors are causing contradictions among official sources that are making press work extremely hard.
ref: Penglibatan politik oleh kebanyakan media dan faktor-faktor lain menyebabkan percanggahan sumber rasmi yang menjadikan tugas laporan akhbar sangat sukar.

src: Moreover, no one is permitted to enter the accident location.
ref: Tambahan pula, tiada siapa dibenarkan masuk ke lokasi kemalangan.

src: The site of the accident was closed to visitors following the injury of three TV journalists who got too close.
ref: Lokasi kemalangan ditutup kepada pelawat berikutan kecederaan tiga wartawan TV yang berada terlalu dekat dengan kawasan itu.

src: The United States Geological Survey (USGS) reported that the first earthquake took place at 9:27 (-3 UTC) 165 kilometers from the city of Cruzeiro do Sul, in the Amazonian state of Acre and measured 6.1 degrees on the Richter scale.
ref: Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat (USGS) melaporkan gempa bumi pertama berlaku pada 9:27 (-3 UTC) 165 kilometer dari bandar Cruzeiro do Sul, dalam daerah Amazon di Acre dan berukuran darjah 6.1 skala Richter.

src: At 12:34 (-3 UTC) another earthquake with an intensity of 6.2 degrees in Richter scale shook the north of Argentina, and the phenomenon was also felt in some Bolivian cities.
ref: Pada 12:34 (-3 UTC) satu lagi gempa bumi dengan kekuatan darjah 6.2 skala Richter menggegarkan utara Argentina, dan fenomena tersebut juga dirasai di beberapa bandar Bolivia.

src: According to the USGS, the epicentre was the Jujuy region 140 kilometres east of Tarija (Bolivia) at a depth of 247 kilometers.
ref: Menurut USGS, pusat gempa adalah kawasan Jujuy 140 kilometer ke timur Tarija (Bolivia) pada kedalaman 247 kilometer.

src: The authorities have not reported any injuries or property damage.
ref: Pihak berkuasa tidak melaporkan sebarang kecederaan atau kerosakan harta benda.

src: Alexandre Vinokourov of Kazakhstan has won stage 15 of the 2007 Tour de France in a time of 5h 34' 28".
ref: Alexandre Vinokourov dari Kazakhstan telah memenangi peringkat ke-15 Tour de France 2007 dalam masa 5j 34'28."

src: Michael Rasmussen of Denmark kept his overall lead by 2' 23' over Alberto Contador of Spain.
ref: Manakala Michael Rasmussen dari Denmark mengekalkan pendahuluannya dengan 2'23'mengatasi Alberto Contador dari Sepanyol.

src: The explosion occurred on the grounds of a military academy's infantry school where weapons and ammunition are stored.
ref: Letupan itu berlaku atas halaman sekolah akademi ketenteraan pasukan tentera berjalan kaki di mana senjata dan amunisi disimpan.

src: The blast, which occurred at 4:30 a.m. EEST (UTC+3) is believed to have been caused by excessive summer temperatures, but other reports suggest that a gas leak may have sparked the blast.
ref: Letupan yang berlaku pada 4:30 pagi EEST (UTC+3) dipercayai telah disebabkan oleh suhu musim panas yang keterlaluan, tetapi laporan lain menunjukkan bahawa kebocoran gas mungkin telah mencetuskan letupan itu.

src: Firefighters report several deaths and injuries, but also said that the fires caused by the blast have been extinguished.
ref: Anggota bomba melaporkan beberapa kematian dan kecederaan, tetapi berkata bahawa api yang disebabkan oleh letupan itu telah padam.

src: In a document dated March 30, 2005 by a group calling itself "the 70 million people of Iran," a declaration was issued asking the current government of The Islamic Republic of Iran to "...peacefully surrender the power to its rightful owners..." by June 16 of this year.
ref: Dalam dokumen bertarikh 30 Mac 2005 yang diterbitkan oleh kumpulan yang menggelar diri sebagai "70 juta orang penduduk Iran," membuat perisytiharan untuk meminta kerajaan Republik Islam Iran kini supaya "menyerahkan kuasa kepada pemilik yang sah secara aman..." pada 16 Jun tahun ini.

src: It threatens boycotts and blackouts throughout Iran on June 10 if there are no indications the regime intends to comply with its demands.
ref: Ia mengancam untuk boikot dan memutuskan bekalan di seluruh Iran pada 10 Jun jika tidak ada tanda-tanda rejim bercadang untuk mematuhi permintaan itu.

src: Copies of the document have been furnished to the leaders of the EU, Russia, Japan and the United States.
ref: Salinan dokumen telah diberikan kepada para pemimpin Kesatuan Eropah, Rusia, Jepun dan Amerika Syarikat.

src: A separate document to the leaders of the G8 nations asks for their support, and promises armed resistance to the current government of Iran on June 18, 2005 if peaceful remonstrances fail to have their intended effect.
ref: Satu dokumen berasingan dihantar kepada pemimpin-pemimpin negara-negara G8 untuk meminta sokongan mereka, dan mengharapkan campur tangan bersenjata kepada kerajaan Iran sekarang pada 18 Jun 2005 sekiranya rundingan aman gagal dilaksanakan seperti yang diharap.

src: The group claims there are "2,195 resistance cells" operating in Iran and abroad.
ref: Kumpulan itu mendakwa terdapat "2,195 kumpulan penentang" yang beroperasi di dalam dan luar negara Iran.

src: April 7, 2005 ABC News anchorman Peter Jennings was diagnosed this week with lung cancer.
ref: 7 April, 2005 peneraju berita ABC News Peter Jennings telah didiagnosis minggu ini dengan barah paru-paru.

src: Despite beginning out-patient treatment next week which will involve chemotherapy, Jennings will continue to front ABC's 'World News Tonight' show, "to the extent he can do so comfortably", says ABC News.
ref: Walaupun akan memulakan perubatan pesakit luar pada minggu depan yang akan melibatkan kemoterapi, Jennings akan terus meneraju rancangan 'Berita Dunia Malam Ini'di ABC, "setakat yang dia boleh lakukan dengan selesa", kata ABC News.

src: "I am sure I will learn from them how to cope with the facts of life that none of us anticipated."
ref: "Saya pasti saya akan mempelajari dari mereka tentang bagaimana untuk menghadapi perkara-perkara di dalam hidup yang tidak dapat dielakkan dan yang langsung kita tidak jangkakan".

src: The 66-year-old anchor man, who gave up smoking several years ago, added: "I hope it goes without saying that a journalist who doesn't value deeply the audience's loyalty should be in another line of work."
ref: Peneraju berita berumur 66 tahun itu, yang telah berhenti merokok beberapa tahun yang lalu, menambah: "Saya harap sudah tentulah seorang wartawan yang tidak menilai kesetiaan para penonton dengan mendalam patut bekerja di dalam bidang yang lain".

src: Jennings began his career at ABC News in 1964 and in 1983 was made senior editor and anchor of World News Tonight.
ref: Jennings memulakan kerjayanya di ABC News pada tahun 1964 dan pada tahun 1983 dia telah dijadikan editor kanan dan peneraju berita untuk Berita Dunia Malam Ini.

src: April 7, 2005 The Federal Bureau of Investigation is investigating allegations of wrongdoing in the building of a new $1.5 billion "skyway" portion of the San Francisco-Oakland Bay Bridge, according to a report published in the Oakland Tribune.
ref: 7 April, 2005 Biro Penyiasatan Persekutuan sedang menyiasat dakwaan salah laku dalam pembinaan $1.5 bilion "skyway" yang baru sebahagian dari Jambatan Teluk San Francisco-Oakland, menurut laporan yang disiarkan dalam Oakland Tribune.

src: The bridge spans the San Francisco Bay between Oakland and Yerba Buena Island.
ref: Jambatan itu merangkumi Teluk San Francisco antara Oakland dan Pulau Yerba Buena.

src: "We've got good welds, good procedures and everything is in place to have a quality product.
ref: "Kami mendapat kimpalan yang baik, prosedur yang baik dan segala-galanya adalah berjalan lancar untuk mendapatka produk yang berkualiti.

src: If a defect got in, we can't find it," Pete Siegenthaler, Caltrans project manager told the Tribune in an interview.
ref: Jika kecacatan terhasil, kita tidak boleh menjumpainya," Pete Siegenthaler, pengurus projek Caltrans memberitahu Tribune dalam satu wawancara.

src: A KFM spokesman told the Tribune that the welds are in "compliance with stringent Caltrans specifications."
ref: Seorang jurucakap KFM memberitahu Tribune bahawa kimpalan berada dalam keadaan "mematuhi spesifikasi Caltrans dengan ketat."

src: The federal government is getting involved in the investigation because more than $1 million in U.S. taxpayer money was spent during its construction.
ref: Kerajaan persekutuan terlibat dalam penyiasatan itu kerana lebih daripada $1 juta wang pembayar cukai A.S. telah dibelanjakan di dalam pembinaannya.

src: The current 68-year-old span was damaged in the 1989 Loma Prieta earthquake.
ref: Jambatan yang kini berusia 68 tahun itu telah rosak dalam gempa bumi Loma Prieta pada 1989.

src: At $6.2 billion total, the new bridge qualifies as the largest public works project in California's history.
ref: Pada jumlah $6.2 bilion, jambatan baru itu layak sebagai projek kerja raya awam terbesar dalam sejarah California.

src: The British actor Chris Langham has been found guilty on 15 counts of downloading child pornography.
ref: Pelakon British Chris Langham telah didapati bersalah atas 15 tuduhan memuat turun pornografi kanak-kanak.

src: A jury of four women and seven men took two hours and forty minutes to reach a verdict at Maidstone Crown Court.
ref: Juri yang terdiri daripada empat wanita dan tujuh lelaki mengambil masa dua jam dan empat puluh minit untuk mencapai keputusan di Maidstone Crown Court.

src: Judge Philip Statman said that Langham will remain in custody till his sentencing on September 14.
ref: Hakim Philip Statman berkata Langham akan kekal dalam jagaan sehingga dijatuhkan hukuman pada 14 September.

src: Langham, 58, from Goldford, Kent claimed that he had been studying porn sites, researching for a character called, "Pedro," for the television series Help.
ref: Langham, 58, dari Goldford, Kent mendakwa bahawa beliau telah mengkaji laman web lucah, penyelidikan untuk watak yang dipanggil, "Pedro," untuk siri televisyen Help.

src: However, co-star Paul Whitehouse claimed he had no knowledge of this research.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, bintang bersama, Paul Whitehouse mendakwa dia tidak mempunyai pengetahuan tentang kajian ini.

src: Langham refused to answer questions about certain images found on his computer.
ref: Langham enggan menjawab soalan mengenai imej tertentu yang terdapat pada komputernya.

src: He also said his brothers and sisters were abused, and that he felt no shame at looking at child pornography.
ref: Beliau juga berkata, abang dan kakaknya telah didera, dan bahawa dia tidak berasa malu melihat pornografi kanak-kanak.

src: Langham however was cleared of charges of indecently assaulting an underage girl.
ref: Langham bagaimanapun telah dibersihkan daripada tuduhan menyerang seorang gadis bawah umur.

src: "I have been found guilty on charges I have made admission to from the moment of my first arrest."
ref: "Saya telah didapati bersalah atas tuduhan yang telah mengaku dari saat penangkapan pertama saya".

src: "I am grateful to the jury for their careful deliberation and I would also like to thank the press for their restraint in not making the lives of my wife, children and family difficult during this time and I implore them to continue to grant my family the privacy they need."
ref: "Saya berterima kasih kepada juri kerana pertimbangan berhati-hati dan saya juga ingin mengucapkan terima kasih kepada akhbar untuk menahan diri mereka tidak membuat kehidupan isteri saya, anak-anak dan keluarga sukar pada masa ini dan saya merayu kepada mereka untuk terus memberikan keluarga saya privasi yang mereka perlukan".

src: "I am afraid I am unable to comment further until sentence on the 14 September."
ref: "Saya takut saya tidak dapat mengulas lanjut sehingga hukuman pada 14 September".

src: The jury had to view some images that had to be selected carefully - but what they saw and heard in evidence is harrowing and disturbing.
ref: Juri terpaksa lihat beberapa gambar yang perlu dipilih dengan berhati-hati - tetapi apa yang mereka lihat dan dengar sebagai keterangan adalah menakutkan dan membimbangkan.

src: This will affect the filming of the next series of the satirical sitcom The Thick of It, where Langham plays Hugh Abbot MP.
ref: Ini akan memberi kesan kepada penggambaran siri seterusnya sitkom menyindir The Thick of It, dimana Langham memainkan Hugh Abbot MP.

src: The last two special episodes did not star Langham due to his arrest.
ref: Dua episod khas terakhir tidak dibintangi Langham kerana penangkapannya.

src: Australian Capital Territory — Thousands of Canberrans took a look at the new Cotter Dam on the Cotter River on open day on Sunday.
ref: Wilayah Ibu Negara Australia - Beribu-ribu orang Canberra datang melawat Empangan Cotter yang baru di Sungai Cotter pada hari terbuka pada hari Ahad.

src: The public was given limited access to the still-active construction site.
ref: Orang awam diberi akses terhad ke tapak pembinaan yang masih aktif.

src: They ran every 15 minutes from 8:30 am to 4:00 pm.
ref: Mereka bergerak setiap 15 minit dari pukul 8:30 pagi hingga 4:00 petang.

src: The dam is to supply fresh water to the city of Canberra.
ref: Emapangan itu membekalkan air bersih ke bandar Canberra.

src: This is to provide water security for the city as droughts become more frequent due to global warming.
ref: Ini adalah untuk menyediakan bekalan air untuk bandar disebabkan kemarau menjadi lebih kerap akibat pemanasan global.

src: It is a gravity dam, which holds back the waters through sheer mass.
ref: Ia adalah sebuah empangan graviti, yang mengekalkan air melalui pengumpulan semata-mata.

src: In addition to the main dam, there are two saddle dams filling depressions in the landscape so flood waters flow over the spillway and not out the sides of the lake.
