ref: Selain tambahan kepada empangan utama, terdapat dua empangan pelana mengisi lekukan dalam landskap agar air limpahan banjir mengalir ke alur limpah dan tidak mengalir keluar pinggir tasik.

src: The dam on the Cotter River has been under construction for four years.
ref: Empangan di Sungai Cotter telah dalam pembinaan selama empat tahun.

src: The dam replaces an old dam, first built in 1911 but subsequently expanded several times.
ref: Empangan ini menggantikan empangan lama, mula-mula dibina pada tahun 1911 tetapi kemudiannya berkembang beberapa kali.

src: The river is named after Garrett Cotter, an Irish-born convict who was transported to Australia and lived in the area in the 1830s and 1840s.
ref: Sungai ini dinamakan sempena Garrett Cotter, seorang banduan kelahiran Irish yang telah dipindahkan ke Australia dan menetap di kawasan itu pada tahun 1830-an dan 1840-an.

src: After birth, the cub was immediately taken into the arms of its mother.
ref: Selepas kelahiran, anaknya segera dibawa ke dalam tangan ibunya.

src: Bai Yun has had three other cubs, Hua Mei, 1999, Mei Sheng, 2003, and Su Lin, 2005.
ref: Bai Yun sudah mempunyai tiga ekor anak yang lain, Hua Mei, 1999, Mei Sheng, 2003, dan Su Lin, 2005.

src: The newborn cub's gender is not yet known - zookeepers want to avoid going close to the cub for a few days, and are watching on a closed-circuit camera.
ref: Jantina bayi yang baru lahir masih belum diketahui - penjaga zoo mahu mengelak pergi berhampiran dengan anaknya selama beberapa hari, dan menonton kamera litar tertutup.

src: While Bai Yun has been relatively fertile in captivity, other animals have had difficulty mating.
ref: Walaupun Bai Yun agak subur dalam kurungan, haiwan lain mempunyai kesukaran mengawan.

src: Since these pandas possess extremely low hormonal desires for sex, scientists in China have recently developed a method involving "panda porn" to induce the animals into mating.
ref: Disebabkan panda berkeinginan hormon yang amat rendah untuk seks, saintis di China baru-baru ini memperkembangkan kaedah yang melibatkan "panda lucah" untuk mendorong haiwan supaya mengawan.

src: Bai Yun, however, seems to be getting along just fine, producing her previous two cubs with a male panda named Gao Gao.
ref: Bai Yun, bagaimanapun, seolah-olah bergaul dengan baik, menghasilkan dua anaknya sebelum itu dengan panda lelaki bernama Gao Gao.

src: The conference will have the theme of "Branding a Country: Building a Reputation from Within" and is the inaugural BeyondBorders conference launched by the Brand Academy, the first Romanian institution dedicated to brand education.
ref: Persidangan itu akan mempunyai tema "Penjenamaan Negara: Membina Reputasi dari Dalam" dan persidangan Beyond Borders julung kali yang dilancarkan oleh Akademi Brand, institusi Romania pertama khusus untuk pendidikan jenama.

src: Clinton's previous visit to Romania was July 11, 1997, when he visited the country to promote political and military integration around the time of the NATO Summit.
ref: Lawatan Clinton sebelum ini ke Romania adalah pada 11 Julai 1997, apabila beliau melawat negara ini untuk mempromosi integrasi politik dan ketenteraan sekitar masa Sidang Kemuncak NATO.

src: The BeyondBorders 2005 conference will focus on strategies to brand Romania and promote it to the world.
ref: Persidangan Beyond Borders 2005 akan memberi tumpuan kepada strategi untuk menjenamakan Romania dan mempromosikannya kepada dunia.

src: In recent years, Romania has realised the need for branding and for improving its image in the world in order to fuel prosperity.
ref: Dalam beberapa tahun kebelakangan ini, Romania telah menyedari keperluan untuk penjenamaan dan memperbaiki imejnya di dunia untuk menjana kemakmuran.

src: The conference organisers hope that it will act as a springboard for an integrated national branding project for Romania.
ref: Penganjur persidangan itu berharap ia akan bertindak sebagai batu loncatan untuk projek penjenamaan negara bersepadu bagi Romania.

src: The planet, named TrES-4, after the Transatlantic Exoplanet Survey (TrES) is 1.7 times the size of the planet Jupiter.
ref: Planet tersebut, bernama TrES-4, sempena Transatlantic Exoplanet Survey (TrES) adalah 1.7 kaliganda saiz planet Musytari.

src: TrES-4 also has a lower mass than Jupiter and an extremely low density of 0.2 grams per cubic centimetre, which is less than a wine cork.
ref: TrES-4 juga mempunyai jisim yang lebih rendah daripada Musytari dan kepadatan yang amat rendah iaitu 0.2 gram per sentimeter padu, yang mana lebih rendah dari gabus wain.

src: Due to the planet's size, current theories about superheated giant planets find it hard to explain why it is so large.
ref: Disebabkan oleh saiznya, teori sekarang mengenai planet gergasi pemanasan lampau sukar untuk menjelaskan mengapa ia sangat besar.

src: Francis O'Donovan, a graduate student in astronomy at the California Institute of Technology which operates one of the TrES telescopes said, "We continue to be surprised by how relatively large these giant planets can be.
ref: Francis O'Donovan, seorang pelajar ijazah sarjana dalam astronomi di Institut Teknologi California yang mengoperasikan salah sebuah teleskop TrES berkata, "Kami berterusan dikejutkan dengan kebesaran relatif planet gergasi ini".

src: A report released tonight by the Health and Safety Executive has confirmed that there is a "strong possibility" that the cause of the recent foot-and-mouth outbreak is contamination, most probably by human movement, from a nearby research facility in Guildford, Surrey, UK.
ref: Sebuah laporan dikeluarkan malam ini oleh Eksekutif Kesihatan dan Keselamatan mengesahkan terdapat "kemungkinan besar" bahawa punca wabak kaki dan mulut baru-baru ini adalah disebabkan pencemaran, berkemungkinan besar daripada pengerakan manusia, dari kemudahan penyelidikan Guilford, Surrey, UK.

src: The strain of the disease had already been identified as an O1 BFS67-like virus, which was isolated in a 1967 outbreak and was being used at the labs for research and the production of vaccines.
ref: Punca asal penyakit yang telah dikenalpasti sebagai virus serupa O1 BFS67, yang telah diasingkan pada wabak 1967 dan telah digunakan di makmal-makmal untuk penyelidikan dan pengeluaran vaksin.

src: It is not yet known whether the virus escaped from the Merial or the IAH lab.
ref: Ia belum diketahui sama ada virus tersebut bebas daripada Merial atau makmal IAH.

src: Since foot-and-mouth was confirmed in cows at a Surrey farm, more than 200 cattle have been culled as a preventative measure.
ref: Sejak kaki dan mulut telah disahkan pada lembu-lembu di ladang Surrey, lebih 200 lembu telah dimusnahkan sebagai langkah berjaga-jaga.

src: A protection zone has been set up around the affected areas and rules preventing the movement of livestock have been introduced throughout the country, with the aim of stopping further spread of the contagious disease.
ref: Satu zon perlindungan telah ditubuhkan di sekitar kawasan-kawasan terjejas dan peraturan mencegah pergerakan ternakan telah diperkenalkan di seluruh negara, dengan tujuan menghalang merebak penyakit berjangkit.

src: Restrictions on the import of English beef have already been imposed.
ref: Pengehadan ke atas import daging Inggeris telah dilaksanakan.

src: Fiji's national airline Air Pacific has now officially returned to its original name: Fiji Airways.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan negara Fiji Air Pacific kini secara rasmi kembali kepada nama asalnya: Fiji Airways.

src: The re-brand was described by interim CEO Aubrey Swift as allowing the airline to align itself "closer with Fiji as a destination".
ref: Penjenamakan semula digambarkan oleh Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif interim Aubrey Swift sebagai membolehkan syarikat penerbangan itu untuk menyelaraskan dirinya "lebih dekat dengan Fiji sebagai destinasi."

src: The name change is designed in part to reduce the confusion which surrounded the name Air Pacific.
ref: Perubahan nama direka sebahagiannya mengurangkan kekeliruan yang dikelilingi nama Air Pacific.

src: Swift noted that "Air Pacific just didn’t resonate with our customers" and said that same people "thought we were an air conditioning company".
ref: Swift berkata "Air Pacific hanya tidak bergema dengan pelanggan-pelanggan kami" dan berkata bahawa orang yang sama "fikir kami sebuah syarikat penghawa dingin."

src: Pacific Voyager and Tabua Class have been replaced with economy and business class respectively.
ref: Pacific Voyager dan Tabua Kelas telah digantikan dengan kelas ekonomi dan perniagaan masing-masing.

src: The airline has also introduced plans to overhaul its fleet of older Boeing 747s with Airbus A330s.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan itu juga telah memperkenalkan rancangan untuk membaik pulih armada 747 Boeing lebih tua dengan Airbus A330.

src: It has said that the completion of this overhaul and the re-branding efforts will be completed by the end of the year.
ref: Ia telah berkata bahawa penyiapan baik pulih ini dan usaha penjenamaan semula akan siap pada akhir tahun ini.

src: The airline's new brand-mark and livery features a masi design created by Fijian artist, Makereta Matemosi.
ref: Jenama-tanda baru syarikat penerbangan itu dan livery mempunyai reka bentuk masi dicipta oleh artis Fiji, Makereta Matemosi.

src: "It is authentic, distinctive, and true to the airline's Fijian roots", the airline said.
ref: "Ia adalah sahih, tersendiri, dan selari dengan akar Fiji syarikat penerbangan itu," kata syarikat penerbangan itu.

src: Jaynes, who used the alias “Gaven Stubberfield” as well as others, peddled junk products and pornography.
ref: Jaynes, yang menggunakan alias "Gaven Stubberfield" dan juga orang lain, menyebarkan produk sampah dan pornografi.

src: The case was prosecuted in Virginia because it is the home to the leading internet service provider AOL, the company who instigated the charges.
ref: Kes itu didakwa di Virginia kerana ia adalah rumah kepada pembekal perkhidmatan internet AOL, syarikat itu yang memulakan tindakan undang-undang.

src: This is the first time a conviction has been gained using the legislation enacted in 2003 to curb bulk e-mail, aka spam, from unsolicited distribution into users mailboxes.
ref: Ini adalah kali pertama kesalahan disabitkan berdasarkan undang-undang yang digubal pada tahun 2003 bagi membendung e-mel pukal, yang juga dinamakan spam, dari pengedaran tanpa diminta ke peti mel pengguna.

src: Jaynes remains free on a $1 million bond while his case is appealed.
ref: Jaynes masih bebas dengan bon $1 juta sementara kesnya dirayu.

src: Prosecutors differed with his attorneys on the prospects of Jaynes winning his appeal.
ref: Pendakwa berbeza pendapat dengan peguamnya mengenai prospek Jaynes memenangi rayuannya.

src: His attorney, David Oblon, though never denying that his client was in the “marketing” business, argued that nine years was too long to sentence an out of state resident for a law that had taken effect just two weeks earlier.
ref: Peguamnya, David Oblon, walaupun tidak pernah menafikan bahawa anak guamnya dalam perniagaan "pemasaran," berhujah bahawa sembilan tahun terlalu lama untuk menjatuhkan hukuman ke atas penduduk keluar negeri dari bagi undang-undang yang telah berkuat kuasa dua minggu lebih awal.

src: "Still, the sentence is not what we recommended and we're disappointed."
ref: "Namun, hukuman itu bukan apa yang kami syorkan dan kami kecewa".

src: Prosecuter Lisa Hicks-Thomas said she was pleased with the outcome and confident the law would be upheld on appeal.
ref: Pendakwa Lisa Hicks-Thomas berkata dia gembira dengan keputusan itu dan yakin undang-undang akan ditegakkan atas rayuan itu.

src: The earthquake jolted an area about 20 miles south of Hilo.
ref: Gempa bumi itu menggegarkan kawasan kira-kira 20 batu ke selatan Hilo.

src: There were no immediate reports of injuries from the earthquake, as of late Monday night.
ref: Tiada laporan kecederaan akibat gempa bumi, pada lewat malam Isnin.

src: However, Tom Brown, a spokesman for Hawaii County Civil Defense did report that the quake caused a small landslide.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Tom Brown, jurucakap Pertahanan Awam Hawaii County itu melaporkan bahawa gempa bumi itu menyebabkan tanah runtuh kecil.

src: Public and private schools alike closed early Tuesday morning as residents and visitors were warned to stock up on food and water.
ref: Sekolah kerajaan dan swasta sama-sama ditutup awal pagi Selasa sebagai penduduk dan pelawat telah diberi amaran untuk menyimpan makanan dan air.

src: Meteorologists predict the eye of the category three storm will pass less than 100 miles from the islands, leaving parts of Hawaii exposed to strong winds and up to 15 inches of rain.
ref: Kaji cuaca meramalkan mata daripada tiga kategori ribut akan lulus kurang daripada 100 batu dari pulau-pulau, meninggalkan bahagian Hawaii terdedah kepada angin kuat dan sehingga 15 inci hujan.

src: However, meteorologists also express caution in saying that even a slight change in course could take the storm closer to land.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, ahli kaji cuaca juga menyeru agar berhati-hati dalam mengatakan bahawa sekalipun terdapat sedikit perubahan dalam perjalanan boleh mengambil ribut lebih dekat dengan tanah.

src: Mayor Harry Kim also declared a state of emergency on Monday.
ref: Datuk Bandar Harry Kim juga mengisytiharkan darurat pada hari Isnin.

src: On the 3rd day of the 2007 World Deaf Swimming Championships, the Men 1500m Freestyle, Women 800m Freestyle, 50m Breaststroke, 200m Freestyle, 4x100m Medley Relay Groups finales took place during the afternoon and evening.
ref: Pada hari ke-3 untuk Kejohanan Renang Dunia untuk orang Pekak 2007, perenang lelaki 1500m Gaya Bebas, perenang wanita 800m gaya bebas, 50m Dada, 200m gaya bebas, 4x100m Medley Relay Kumpulan peringkat akhir akan bermula pada waktu petang dan malam.

src: Belarus deaf swimmer Natalia Deeva not only broke old "women 50m breaststroke record" established by her teammate Aksana Petrushenka on June 19, 2006 with 35.28 seconds at 50m Breaststroke heat session within 34.97 seconds, but also broke her record again at final session within 34.91 seconds.
ref: Perenang pekak Belarus Natalia Deeva bukan sahaja memecahkan rekod lama "wanita 50m kuak dada" yang dicatatkan oleh rakan sepasukan beliau Aksana Petrushenka pada 19 Jun 2006 dengan 35.28 saat untuk 50m sesi saringan Dada dalam 34.97 saat, tetapi juga memecahkan rekod sekali lagi pada sesi akhir dalam tempoh 34.91 saat.

src: Besides of individual record, Natalia Deeva and Aksana Petrushenka also participated Women 4x100m Medley Relay Group Final, not only won the 1st place, but also broke former record established by Russian National Team on January 10, 2005 with 4 minute and 39.63 seconds at that group final within 4 minute and 38 seconds.
ref: Selain rekod individu, Natalia Deeva dan Aksana Petrushenka juga mengambil bahagian wanita 4x100m Medley Relay Kumpulan Peringkat Akhir, bukan sahaja memenangi tempat pertama, tetapi juga memecahkan rekod lama yang dicatatkan oleh Pasukan Kebangsaan Rusia pada 10 Januari 2005 dengan 4 minit dan 39.63 saat pada kumpulan yang akhir dalam tempoh 4 minit dan 38 saat.

src: With the three-times new world records written, that's exactly a "New Record Day" for Belarus.
ref: Dengan rekod dunia tiga kali baru ditulis, ia betul-betul "Hari Rekod Baru" untuk Belarus.

src: Even though heats and finales were still in process, but due to a torrential rain in Taiwan, the Award Ceremony of 3rd Matchday has been postponed to next matchday.
ref: Walaupun peringkat saringan dan akhir masih dalam proses, tetapi disebabkan oleh hujan lebat di Taiwan, Majlis Anugerah untuk perlawanan hari 3 telah ditunda ke hari perlawanan yang akan datang.

src: Bolessuaf, 86, likes to read the card written in Polish that he received from his cousin, the Pope.
ref: Bolessuaf, 86, suka membaca kad yang ditulis dalam Polish yang diterima dari sepupunya, Pope.

src: "A great man, who always fought for the good of the others," he adds.
ref: "Lelaki yang hebat, yang sentiasa berjuang untuk kebaikan orang lain," tambahnya.

src: "To me, he seems to be a brother, more than my own brother ," said Isidoro.
ref: "Pada saya, beliau adalah seperti abang, lebih dari abang saya sendiri," kata Isidoro.

src: He declined saying that he is afraid of flying in airplanes.
ref: Dia menolak mengatakan dia takut untuk menaiki kapal terbang.

src: An Asiana Airlines Boeing 777 airplane crashed upon landing at San Francisco International Airport around 11:30 AM local time today.
ref: Sebuah pesawat Asiana Airlines Boeing 777 telah terhempas semasa pendaratan di Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa San Francisco sekitar jam 11:30 AM waktu tempatan hari ini.

src: Two deaths are reported and 10 passengers were taken to San Francisco General Hospital critically injured.
ref: Dua kematian dilaporkan dan 10 penumpang telah dihantar ke Hospital Awam San Francisco dilaporkan cedera parah.

src: In total, officials report 181 people were hospitalized and one person remains unaccounted for.
ref: Secara keseluruhan, laporan rasmi 181 orang dimasukkan ke hospital dan seorang lagi masih tidak dikira.

src: A large portion of the passenger area of the plane was on fire and has burned out.
ref: Sebahagian besar bahagian penumpang dalam pesawat itu telah terbakar.

src: Passengers were seen using emergency slides to escape the wreckage.
ref: Penunmpang dilihat menggunakan gelongsor kecemasan untuk keluar dari bangkai pesawat.

src: There have been no reports stating that the airplane pilot made distress calls before the accident.
ref: Tiada laporan yang menyatakan bahawa juruterbang pesawat melakukan penggilan kecemasan sebelum kemalangan.

src: The National Transportation Safety Board will be investigating the crash.
ref: Lembaga Keselamatan Pengangkutan akan menyiasat nahas terbabit.

src: More than 70 flights headed to San Francisco were not allowed to land at the airport and were sent to other cities.
ref: Lebih 70 penerbangan menghala ke San Francisco tidak dibenarkan mendarat di lapangan terbang dan diubah ke bandar lain.

src: United Airlines and Virgin America offered passengers the opportunity to change the flights at no extra cost until Monday.
ref: United Airlines dan Virgin America menawarkan peluang kepada penumpang untuk menukar penerbangan sehingga Isnin dengan tidak dikenakan sebarang caj.

src: She rescheduled, along with colleagues, her flight to fly on United Airlines instead.
ref: Beliau menjadualkan semula, bersama rakan-rakna beliau, penerbangannya untuk terbang menggunakan United Airlines.

src: A 'terrorist attack' took place yesterday in the form of reportedly at least four explosions at the Mahabodhi Temple in Bodh Gaya, India.
ref: Satu 'serangan pengganas'berlaku semalam dalam bentuk yang dilaporkan sekurang-kurangnya empat letupan di Kuil Mahabodhi di Bodh Gaya, India.

src: Four other explosions took place in the vicinity, including one near an eighty-foot tall statue of Buddha and three at Tergar Monastery.
ref: Empat letupan lain berlaku di kawasan itu, termasuk satu berhampiran sebuah patung Buddha setinggi lapan puluh kaki dan tiga di Biara Tergar.

src: Early reports claim little damage was done to the temple.
ref: Laporan awal mengatakan sedikit kerosakan telah dilakukan terhadap kuil.

src: Police commented that Sundays are quiet days at the temple, or more could have been injured.
ref: Polis berkata bahawa hari Ahad adalah hari yang tenang di kuil, jika tidak lebih ramai mungkin tercedera.

src: Totaling twelve acres, it is a designated UNESCO World Heritage Site.
ref: Berjumlah dua belas ekar, ia telah diiktiraf sebagai sebuah Tapak Warisan Dunia UNESCO.

src: The temple is located next to the Bodhi tree, where Buddhists believe that Buddha achieved enlightenment.
ref: Kuil ini terletak bersebelahan dengan pokok Bodhi, di mana penganut Buddha percaya bahawa Buddha mendapat makrifat.

src: The bombs were described as "low-intensity but not crude," according to police.
ref: Bom itu digambarkan sebagai "berkeamatan rendah tetapi tidak kasar," menurut polis.

src: The bombs used comprised of a small container with gas, a detonator, and an analog clock.
ref: Bom-bom yang digunakan terdiri daripada bekas kecil dengan gas, peledak, dan jam analog.

src: The bombs actually went off starting at 5:25 AM and ending at 5:58 AM local time.
ref: Bom itu sebenarnya meletus bermula pada 5:25 pagi dan berakhir pada 5:58 waktu tempatan.

src: 200 monks live at the monastery, where daily classes take place during the times when the explosions happened.
ref: 200 sami tinggal di biara, di mana kelas harian dijalankan semasa waktu letupan itu berlaku.

src: However, no classes were being held the morning of the attack.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, tiada kelas diadakan pada pagi serangan itu.

src: The Ministry of Home Affairs has declared the explosions an act of terrorism.
ref: Kementerian Dalam Negeri telah mengisytiharkan letupan tersebut sebagai tindakan keganasan.

src: In October members of the Indian Mujahideen claimed to have visited Mahabodhi Temple to plan a terrorist attack.
ref: Pada bulan Oktober anggota Mujahideen India didakwa telah melawat Kuil Mahabodhi untuk merancang serangan pengganas.

src: The four suspects named other members of the terrorist group and claimed that they planned to attack Mahabodhi Temple.
ref: Keempat-empat suspek menamakan ahli-ahli lain kumpulan pengganas tersebut dan mendakwa bahawa mereka merancang untuk menyerang Kuil Mahabodhi.

src: The police in Delhi claim to have told the police in Bihar about the potential of a terrorist attack.
ref: Pihak polis di Delhi mendakwa telah memberitahu polis di Bihar mengenai potensi serangan pengganas.

src: Political conflict has risen in the wake of the attacks between the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) and Indian National Congress.
ref: Konflik politik telah meningkat berikutan pembangkitan serangan antara Parti Bharatiya Janata (BJP) dan Kongres Kebangsaan India.

src: The Ministry also believes that it could be tied to conflicts in Myanmar between Buddhists and Muslims, despite the rarity of violence against Buddhists in India.
ref: Kementerian juga percaya bahawa ia mungkin berkaitan dengan konflik di Myanmar antara penganut Buddha dan Islam, walaupun terdapat jarang keganasan terhadap Buddha di India.

src: Utah's governor, Jon Huntsman, honored the dead rescuers by saying, "There's nothing more selfless than someone giving their life in pursuit of saving someone else."
ref: Gabenor Utah, Jon Huntsman memberi penghormatan kepada penyelamat yang terkorban berkata, "Tidak ada apa yang dapat dibandingkan dengan seseorang yang sanggup mengadaikan nyawanya demi menyelamatkan seseorang."

src: Seismologists said a similar incident happened on the day of the original August 6 cave in.
ref: Seismologi mengatakan insiden yang hampir sama berlaku pada hari asal tanah runtuh Ogos 6.

src: A "bump" is caused by coal shooting out from the walls of a mine due to extreme pressure.
ref: "Benjolan" adalah dari arang yang dipancut keluar dari dinding lombong yang disebabkan oleh tekanan yang melampau.

src: No further details were available about the official cause of the rescuers' deaths.
ref: Tidak ada butiran yang lebih lanjut tentang punca rasmi kematian penyelamat.

src: All rescue efforts to find the remaining six missing miners have been called off for now.
ref: Semua usaha menyelamat untuk mencari baki enam pelombong lain yang hilang telah dibatalkan sekarang.

src: Last night, Adly Mansour, the interim leader of Egypt, announced plans to reform Egypt's constitution and hold a new round of parliamentary and presidential elections.
ref: Pada malam tadi, Adly Mansour, pemangku pemimpin Mesir, mengumumkan rancangan untuk reformasi perlembagaan Mesir dan mengadakan pilihan raya parlimen dan presiden yang baru.

src: Parliamentary elections would then be held, perhaps in early 2014, followed by presidential elections upon the forming of a new parliament.
ref: Pilihan raya Parlimen akan diadakan, mungkin pada awal tahun 2014, diikuti dengan pilihan raya presiden sebelum pembentukan sebuah parlimen baru.

src: The Muslim Brotherhood claim the attack was unprovoked and those gathered were praying.
ref: Ikhwanul Muslimin berkata serangan itu tak berunsur provokasi dan orang-orang tersebut berkumpul untuk berdoa.

src: Colonel Ahmed Mohammed Ali, spokesman for the army, said the group had attacked security forces and were armed with "large quantities of firearms, ammunition and Molotov cocktails".
ref: Kolonel Ahmed Mohammed Ali, jurucakap tentera, berkata kumpulan itu telah menyerang pasukan keselamatan dan bersenjatakan "sejumlah besar senjata api, peluru dan bom api Molotov".

src: The Muslim Brotherhood claimed children were killed in the conflict but Colonel Ali claims the photos being used by the Muslim Brotherhood are actually photos from Syria in March.
ref: Ikhwanul Muslimin mendakwa kanak-kanak telah terbunuh dalam konflik tetapi Kolonel Ali mendakwa gambar-gambar yang digunakan oleh Ikhwan Muslimin sebenarnya gambar dari Syria pada bulan Mac.

src: Colonel Ali also stated two policemen and a soldier were killed.
ref: Kolonel Ali juga menyatakan dua anggota polis dan seorang tentera telah terbunuh.

src: The shooting of 51 people on Monday follows violence last week which killed 36 people in Cairo.
ref: Kejadian menembak 51 orang pada hari Isnin berlaku berikutan keganasan minggu lepas yang mengorbankan 36 orang di Kaherah.

src: British Foreign Sectretary William Hague said: "It is crucial that there is a swift return to democratic processes in Egypt."
ref: Setiausaha Luar British William Hague berkata: "Adalah penting untuk kembali ke proses demokratik di Mesir dengan segera".

src: Former British Prime Minister Tony Blair said the intervention by the army was necessary to prevent "chaos", and said the protests that led to the downfall of Morsi are due to dissatisfaction with the efficacy of government: "When governments don't deliver, people protest."
ref: Bekas Perdana Menteri Britain, Tony Blair berkata campur tangan tentera adalah perlu untuk mengelakkan "huru-hara," dan berkata protes yang membawa kepada kejatuhan Morsi adalah disebabkan rasa tidak puas hati terhadap keberkesanan kerajaan: "Apabila kerajaan tidak berfungsi dengan berkesan, orang membantah".

src: Blair advised Western governments to "engage with the new de facto power and help the new government make the changes necessary, especially on the economy, so they can deliver for the people."
ref: Blair menasihatkan kerajaan Barat untuk "melibatkan diri dengan kuasa baru de facto dan membantu kerajaan baru membuat perubahan yang diperlukan, terutamanya ke atas ekonomi, supaya mereka dapat menyumbang kepada rakyat".

src: "In that way, we can also help shape a path back to the ballot box that is designed by and for Egyptians".
ref: "Dengan cara itu, kita juga boleh membantu membentuk jalan kembali ke peti undi yang direka oleh dan untuk orang-orang Mesir.".

src: April 9, 2005 A rise in flesh-eating staph infections has worried doctors about the possible spread of drug resistant bacteria.
ref: April 9, 2005 Peningkatanan jangkitan staph yang merupakan pemakan-daging menyebabkan kebimbangan doktor mengenai kemungkinan penyebaran bakteria berintangan terhadap ubat.

src: Staphylococcus aureus, commonly known as staph, is a bacteria that commonly causes skin infections in otherwise healthy people.
ref: Staphylococcus aureus, biasanya dikenali sebagai staph, adalah bakteria yang biasanya menyebabkan jangkitan kulit di kalangan orang sihat.

src: However, as a persistent threat in hospitals, it tends to infect patients who are already sick and whose systems are vulnerable due to IV lines that pierce the skin.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, sebagai ancaman berterusan di hospital, ia cenderung untuk menjangkiti pesakit yang sudah sakit dan mereka yang mempunyai sistem yang vulnerabel disebabkan saluran IV yang menusuk kulit.

src: Doctors have already battled for years against drug-resistant strains of the bacteria, but the struggle has generally been confined to hospitals.
ref: Doktor telah memerangi jenis bakteria yang berintangan ubat selama bertahun-tahun, tetapi perjuangan itu secara amnya hanya di dalam lingkungan hospital.

src: Cases have multiplied by 25 times since 1998 at the University of Chicago.
ref: Kes telah berganda sebanyak 25 kali sejak tahun 1998 di Universiti Chicago.

src: The infections are particularly problematic because nearly a quarter of people who get a staph infection require hospitalization.
ref: Jangkitan kuman itu sangat bermasalah kerana hampir satu perempat daripada orang-orang yang mendapat jangkitan staph memerlukan rawatan di hospital.

src: At higher risk are prison inmates, homeless people, military personnel, and families with kids in day care.
ref: Orang yang berisiko lebih tinggi adalah penghuni penjara, orang tak berumah, anggota tentera dan keluarga yang mempunyai anak-anak di pusat jagaan harian.

src: Finland now holds the world record for the longest non-stop round of karaoke singing.
ref: Finland kini memegang rekod dunia bagi pusingan nyanyian karaoke tanpa henti terpanjang.

src: The country already holds the record for the largest number of karaoke singers at any given time.
ref: Negara itu telah memegang rekod bagi jumlah terbesar penyanyi karaoke setiap masa.

src: The previous record was 145 hours, as held by China.
ref: Rekod sebelum ini adalah selama 145 jam, yang dipegang oleh China.

src: However, in a karaoke bar in Kouvola, a small town on Finland's southern coast, the record was surpassed on Wednesday, with the ultimate goal being 240 hours non-stop.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, di bar karaoke di Kouvola, bandar kecil di pantai selatan Finland, rekod itu telah ditandingi pada Rabu, dengan matlamat utamanya adalah 240 jam tanpa henti.

src: The record goes alongside Finland's other record for karaoke, that of the largest number singing at any given time.
ref: Rekod pergi bersama rekod lain Finland bagi karaoke, yang merupakan jumlah nyanyian terbesar setiap masa.

src: This is held by 80,000 fans of the Finnish hard rock band Lordi, who had met in Helsinki for the band to give a brief free concert to celebrate their victory at that year's Eurovision.
ref: Ini dijalankan oleh 80,000 peminat kumpulan rock hebat warga Finland, Lordi, yang telah bertemu di Helsinki untuk kumpulan tersebut bagi memberi konsert ringkas percuma untuk meraikan kejayaan mereka di Eurovision tahun lepas.

src: The show culminated with all 80,000 joining in with the band on the winning song, Hard Rock Hallelujah.
ref: Persembahan itu berakhir dengan semua 80,000 penyertaan dengan kumpulan tersebut atas kemenangan lagu, Hard Rock Hallelujah.

src: Young people are gathering in Kigali for the first Global Youth Conference on Genocide Prevention.
ref: Orang muda berkumpul di Kigali untuk Konferens Pemuda Dunia bagi Pencegahan Genosid yang pertama kali.

src: Approximately 100 students from Rwanda, Burundi and the Congo will share ideas about the past and present in Rwanda as well as the future for the Great Lakes region.
ref: Anggaran seramai 100 orang pelajar dari Rwanda, Burundi dan Congo akan berkongsi idea-idea mengenai masa lalu dan masa sekarang di Rwanda dan juga masa hadapan bagi kawasan Great Lakes.

src: The remains of the last missing person following the bridge collapse in Minneapolis were recovered on Monday.
ref: Baki dari orang hilang terakhir dari runtuhan jambatan di Minneapolis ditemui Isnin.

src: The official death toll now stands at 13, following the collapse nearly three weeks ago.
ref: Jumlah kematian rasmi kini mencapai 13, dari runtuhan hampir tiga minggu lepas.

src: Jolstad, nicknamed "Jolly," was a member of the construction crew that was resurfacing the bridge.
ref: Jolstad, nama panggilan "Jolly", adalah ahli krew pembinaan yang sedang melapis jambatan tersebut.

src: Jolstad's wife, Lisa Jolstad, was worried that the search for her husband's remains would drag on, leaving her without any closure.
ref: Isteri Jolstad's, Lisa Jolstad, bimbang yang pencarian suaminya akan berlarutan, meninggalkan dia tanpa sebarang penutup.

src: Sheriff Rich Stanek said, "There aren't a lot of smiles here tonight…" "We all have very heavy hearts."
ref: Syerif Rich Stanek berkata, "Tidak banyak senyuman disini malam ini..." "Kami semua sangat berberat hati."

src: "It weighed on a lot of people, both personally and professionally."
ref: "Ia beban kepada ramai orang, secara peribadi dan professional."

src: Governor Tim Pawlenty asked President Bush on Monday to declare the collapse a major disaster, allowing the state to be eligible for more federal money.
ref: Gabenor Tim Pawlenty meminta Presiden Bush pada Isnin untuk mengumumkan runtuhan tersebut sebagai bencana besar, membenarkan negeri tersebut layak untuk wang persekutuan.

src: President Bush is scheduled to be in Minneapolis today to get a briefing on the bridge.
ref: Presiden Bush dijadualkan berada di Minneapolis hari ini untuk menerima taklimat mengenai jambatan tersebut.

src: Six people were killed in Oklahoma, eight were killed in Texas, and one person was killed in Missouri due to the storms.
ref: Enam orang terbunuh di Oklahoma, lapan terbunuh di Texas, dan seorang terbunuh di Missouri disebabkan oleh ribut itu.

src: Some parts of the U.S. saw eleven inches of rain in the matter of a few hours on Monday.
ref: Beberapa bahagian di U.S. menerima sebelas inci hujan selama beberapa jam pada hari Isnin.

src: The storms moved into Ohio on Tuesday, flooding a seven-mile (11 km) stretch of Interstate 75 in northwestern Ohio.
ref: Ribut itu bergerak ke Ohio pada hari Selasa, membanjiri tujuh-mile (11 km)panjang lebuhraya Interstate 75 di barat laut Ohio.

src: Southwestern Wisconsin was under another flash flood watch Tuesday night and Wednesday, with a chance of rain through Friday.
ref: Southwestern Wisconsin menerima satu lagi pengawasan banjir kilat malam Selasa dan Rabu, dengan kemungkinan hujan sehingga Jumaat.

src: On Monday, the heavy rain flooded street, streams, and a sewage treatment plant in Iowa.
ref: Pada hari Isnin, hujan lebat membanjiri jalan, sungai, dan loji rawatan kumbahan di Iowa.

src: Wind gusts of up to 82 mph (132 km/h) and golf-ball sized hail were reported in Nebraska from these storms.
ref: Hembusan angin kencang sehingga 82 mph (132 km/h) dan hujan batu bersaiz bola golf dilaporkan di Nebraska berikutan ribut ini.

src: In Minnesota, a dive team and a National Guard helicopter were called in to search for Jered Lorenz, 37, whose car was found overturned lodged in between rocks along a creek.
ref: Di Minnesota, sepasukan penyelam dan sebuah helikopter Pengawal Kebangsaan telah dipanggil untuk mencari Jered Lorenz, 37, yang keretanya ditemui terbalik terletak di antara batu-batu di sepanjang sebuah sungai.

src: Numerous mud slides were reported all across Minnesota, an area believed to be among the hardest hit areas according to meteorologists.
ref: Beberapa tanah runtuh dilaporkan di seluruh Minnesota, sebuah kawasan yang dipercayai antara kawasan paling teruk dilanda banjir mengikut ahli kaji cuaca.

src: Ben Tracy of WCCO-TV in Rushford, Minnesota reported, "It's the worst flooding anyone here has seen in 30 years."
ref: Ben Tracy daripada WCCO-TV di Rushford, Minnesota melaporkan, "Ini adalah banjir paling teruk yang pernah disaksikan sesiapa sahaja di sini dalam tempoh 30 tahun".

src: South Africa has won the first One-Day International of the series against Zimbabwe by five wickets at Queens Sports Club, Bulawayo, Zimbabwe.
ref: Afrika Selatan telah memenangi tempat pertama siri Satu Hari Antarabangsa terhadap Zimbabwe dengan lima gawang di Kelab Sukan Queens, Bulawayo, Zimbabwe.

src: Vernon Philander took two wickets in two balls and some poor running decisions led to five run outs in the whole innings.
ref: Vernon Philander mengambil dua wiket dalam dua bola dan beberapa keputusan buruk membawa kepada lima markah mati dalam seluruh pusingan.

src: South Africa suffered an early blow when opening batsman Loots Bosman was dismissed in the first over, but captain Graeme Smith and ODI debutant Gulam Bodi added 72 runs together, followed by a partnership of 74 runs from Bodi and A B de Villiers.
ref: Afrika Selatan mengalami tamparan awal apabila pemukul Loots Bosman telah dibuang dalam over pertama, tetapi ketua pasukan Graeme Smith dan ODI debut Gulam Bodi menambahkan 72 markah bersama, diikuti dengan perkongsian 74 markah dari Bodi dan A B de Villiers.

src: Smith (50 runs), Bodi (51) and de Villiers (63) all made half centuries, and South Africa comfortably reached the target with nineteen balls remaining.
ref: Smith (50 markah), Bodi (51) dan de Villiers (63) semuanya berjaya separuh abad, dan Afrika Selatan dengan selesa mencapai sasaran dengan baki sembilan belas bola.

src: The second ODI will be held at Harare Sports Club, Harare on August 25, with the final ODI the day afterwards.
ref: ODI kedua akan diadakan di Kelab Sukan Harare, Harare pada 25 Ogos, dengan ODI akhir pada hari berikutnya.

src: Dean moved across the Bay of Campeche, eyeing over 100 oil platforms and several oil ports in the center of the country's oil industry.
ref: Dean bergerak merentasi Teluk Campeche, mengintai lebih 100 pelantar minyak dan beberapa pelabuhan minyak di pusat industri minyak di negara ini.

src: Over 14,000 workers in the area had to be evacuated.
ref: Lebih 14,000 pekerja di kawasan itu terpaksa dipindahkan.

src: Currently, there are no reports of deaths or serious injuries following the landfall in Mexico.
ref: Pada masa ini, tiada laporan kematian atau kecederaan yang serius berikutan apa yang melanda Mexico.

src: Overall Dean is being blamed for at least 20 deaths in the Caribbean.
ref: Secara keseluruhan Dean sedang dipersalahkan untuk 20 kematian di Caribbean.

src: The storm has since been downgraded to Category 1 status.
ref: Ribut itu telah pun diturunkan kepada status Kategori 1.

src: An eyewitness, who had been drinking outside the pub at the time, said the boy was one of three playing football in the car park when a teenager, believed to be male, on a BMX bicycle fired three shots at the group from approximately 30 metres away, one hitting the victim in the neck.
ref: Seorang saksi, yang telah minum di luar pub pada masa itu, berkata kanak-kanak itu merupakan salah satu daripada tiga orang yang bermain bola sepak di tempat letak kereta apabila seorang remaja, dipercayai seorang lelaki, berbasikal BMX melepaskan tiga das tembakan ke arah kumpulan itu dari jarak kira-kira 30 meter, satu mangsa terkena di leher.

src: The other shots missed the boys, one hitting a car.
ref: Tembakan lain tersasar dari kanak-kanak lelaki lain, satu terkena kereta.

src: The boy's mother was called to the scene as people came out of the pub to help him.
ref: Ibu kanak-kanak itu telah dipanggil ke tempat kejadian apabila orang keluar dari pub untuk membantunya.

src: A spokesman for North West Ambulance Service said: "We treated an 11-year-old with serious gunshot wounds."
ref: Jurucakap Servis Ambulans North West berkata: "Kami merawat seorang berusia 11 tahun dengan luka tembakan yang serius".

src: In an appeal to the local community to help catch the killer, Merseyside Police Assistant Chief Constable Simon Byrne said: "Someone out there knows who put the gun in his hand and I want your help to get the community to turn that gunman in tonight."
ref: Dalam rayuan kepada masyarakat tempatan untuk membantu menangkap pembunuh tersebut, Penolong Ketua Konstabel Polis Merseyside Simon Byrne berkata: "Seseorang di luar sana tahu siapa yang meletakkan pistol di tangannya dan saya mahu bantuan anda supaya komuniti menangkap lelaki bersenjata itu pada malam ini".

src: "You can only imagine the heartache of the family that's been ripped apart."
ref: "Anda hanya boleh membayangkan kepiluan keluarga yang sudah terpisah".

src: "To think your young son is out playing football and then to get a call to say he's been shot, I really don't know as a parent how you would handle that."
ref: "Untuk membayangkan anak kecil kamu keluar bermain bola sepak dan kemudian mendapat panggilan mengatakan dia telah ditembak, saya benar-benar tidak tahu sebagai ibu bapa bagaimana kamu akan mengendalikan perkara itu".

src: The area around the pub was made a "designated area" by police last year, meaning officers could disperse groups and move people away from the area.
ref: Kawasan di sekitar pub itu dijadikan "kawasan yang ditanda" oleh polis tahun lepas, bermakna pegawai boleh menyuraikan kumpulan dan memindahkan orang jauh dari kawasan itu.

src: Researchers say that new, ten million-year-old fossils found in Ethiopia, prove that the theory that humans may have evolved from a species of great apes eight million years ago, may not be true, but that humans may have split from apes as long as 10.5 million years ago.
ref: Penyelidik mengatakan yang terbaru, fosil berusia sepuluh juta tahun ditemui di Ethiopia, membuktikan teori yang manusia berubah dari spesis beruk besar lapan juta tahun dulu, mungkin tidak benar, tetapi manusia mungkin telah berbahagi dari beruk sejauh 10.5 juta tahun lalu.

src: Current fossils and research say that the evolutionary split from apes to humans occurred at least eight million years ago.
ref: Fosil-fosil dan kajian semasa mengatakan yang pembahagian evolusi dari beruk kepada manusia berlaku sekurang-kurangnya lapan juta tahun lalu.

src: The new fossils say that the split may have happened as long as 10.5 million years ago.
ref: Fosil terbaru mengatakan yang pembahagian mungkin telah terjadi sejauh 10.5 juta tahun lalu.

src: "Based on this fossil, that means the split is much earlier than has been anticipated by the molecular evidence."
ref: "Berdasarkan kepada fosil ini, ini bermaksud pembahagian jauh lebih awal dari yang dijangka oleh bukti molekul".

src: Despite the finds, other researchers are not convinced that the findings are correct.
ref: Walaupun dengan penemuan tersebut, penyelidik-penyelidik lain tidak yakin yang penemuan tersebut tepat.

src: "These structures appear on at least three independent lineages of apes, including gorillas, and they could relate to a dietary shift rather than indicating a new genetic trait," said a Professor at the London Natural History Museum in the United Kingdom, Peter Andrews who also added, "but the fossil evidence for the evolution of our closest living relatives, the great apes, is almost non-existent.
ref: "Struktur ini dilihat pada sekurang-kurangnya tiga keturunan bebas beruk, termasuk gorilla, dan mereka mungkin berkaitan dengan perubahan pemakanan daripada menunjukkan sifat genetik baru," kata Professor di Muzium Sejarah Semula Jadi di United Kingdom, Peter Andrew juga menambah, "tetapi bukti fosil untuk evolusi saudara hidup terdekat kita, beruk besar, hampir tidak wujud.

src: Researchers have named the newly discovered species Cororapithecus abyssinicus whose remains were found in the Afar Region of Ethiopia, the same place where the remains of Lucy were discovered in 1974.
ref: Para penyelidik telah menamakan penemuan baru spesis Cororapithecus abyssinicus yang tinggalan ditemui di daerah Afar di Ethiopia, tempat yang sama tinggalan Lucy ditemui pada 1974.

src: Another car exploded about one hour later in the town of Amorebieta, possibly the one used by the activists to flee.
ref: Sebuah kereta lain meletup kira-kira sejam kemudian di bandar Amorebieta, berkemungkinan kereta yang digunakan oleh aktivis itu untuk melarikan diri.

src: ETA detonated two small explosive devices on July 25 along the route that the Tour of France used when the race dipped into northern Spain for a few hours.
ref: ETA meletupkan dua alat letupan kecil pada 25 Julai sepanjang perjalanan yang digunakan oleh Tour de France semasa perlumbaan itu memasuki bahagian utara Spain untuk beberapa jam.

src: ETA called the cease-fire in March 2006, but grew frustrated with a lack of government concessions in ensuing peace talks, and set off a huge bomb in a parking area at Madrid's airport on December 30, killing two people.
ref: ETA membuat gencatan senjata api pada Mac 2006, tetapi menghasilkan kekecewaan kerana kurangnya kata sepakat dalam perbincangan keamanan yang berlaku kemudiannya, dan meletakkan bom besar di sebuah kawasan meletakkan kereta di lapangan terbang Madrid pada 30 Disember, mengorbankan dua orang.

src: It insisted then that the truce was still in effect, but finally declared it formally over in June, and Spanish security forces have been on alert ever since.
ref: Sebelum ini ia berkeras bahawa kedamaian sementara masih dirasai, tetapi akhirnya menyatakan ia dengan rasminya berakhir pada Jun, dan badan keselamatan Spain berada dalam keadaan bersiap sedia sejak itu.

src: Sourav Ganguly was caught off the bowling of Andrew Flintoff, who finished the innings as the top performing England bowler, taking 5-56.
ref: Sourav Ganguly telah ditangkap di luar bowling Andrew Flintoff, yang menghabiskan inning sebagai pembaling England yang paling hebat, mengambil 5-56.

src: Sachin Tendulkar fell just short of a century, being caught behind on 99 runs.
ref: Sachin Tendulkar kalah dengan kurang daripada seratus larian, di belakang dengan 99 larian.

src: Tendulkar was surprised at the decision, and television replays were inconclusive as to whether the ball had hit his glove or not.
ref: Tendulkar terkejut dengan keputusan itu, dan ulang tayang televisyen tidak membawa sebarang keputusan sama ada bola telah memukul sarung tangannya atau tidak.

src: Dravid finished on 92 not out, helping India to an imposing total of 329-7 after fifty overs.
ref: Dravid selesai pada mata 92 tidak keluar, membantu India mencapai jumlah 329-7 yang mengagumkan selepas lima puluh over.

src: In reply England started quickly, recording 75 runs off the first ten overs.
ref: Sebagai balasan England bermula dengan cepat, merekodkan 75 larian pada sepuluh over yang pertama.

src: The England wickets fell regularly after that, with Kevin Pietersen and Paul Collingwood bowled by Piyush Chalwa for 25 and 27 runs respectively.
ref: Wiket England mundur secara teratur selepas itu, dengan Kevin Pietersen dan Paul Collingwood bowl oleh Piyush Chalwa untuk 25 dan 27 larian masing-masing.

src: Andrew Flintoff was dismissed for just nine runs, and despite 64 runs from Ian Bell, England needed 90 runs from the last eight overs with just three wickets remaining.
ref: Andrew Flintoff pernah disingkir hanya kerana sembilan larian, dan walaupun terdapat 64 larian daripada Ian Bell, England memerlukan 90 larian dari lapan over yang lepas dengan hanya tiga wiket yang terakhir.

src: Dimitri Mascarenhas hit 52 runs, including five sixes, and Stuart Broad hit 20 runs off the final over, but it came too late and England fell ten runs short of the 330 run target.
ref: Dimitri Mascarenhas memukul 52 larian, termasuk lima sixes, dan Stuart Broad mencecah 20 larian pada over terakhir, tetapi sudah terlambat dan England kekurangan sepuluh larian daripada sasaran 330 larian.

src: The third match will be played at Edgbaston, Birmingham, on August 27.
ref: Perlawanan ketiga akan diadakan di Edgbaston, Birmingham, pada 27 Ogos.

src: 69,000 fans packed Allianz Arena and saw Bayern Munich maintained their perfect record on Saturday with a 3-0 victory against Hannover.
ref: 69,000 peminat merumuni Arena Allianz dan melihat Bayern Munich mengekalkan rekod sempurna mereka pada hari Sabtu dengan kemenangan 3-0 terhadap Hannover.

src: Once referee Thorsten Kinhöfer whistled for the opening kickoff, both teams played attacking style.
ref: Apabila pengadil Thorsten Kinhöfer bersiul untuk pembukaan permulaan, kedua-dua pasukan memainkan gaya penyerangan.

src: Hannover answered a couple of headers from Martin Demichelis with Hanno Balitsch's drive.
ref: Hannover menyambut dan membalas beberapa sepakan bola dengan kepala daripada Martin Demichelis dengan pimpinan Hanno Balitsch.

src: Bayern Munich sealed the victory with 2 goals from Mark van Bommel and Hamit Altintop in the 2nd half.
ref: Bayern Munich menang dengan 2 gol daripada Mark van Bommel dan Hamit Altintop pada separuh masa ke-2.

src: Ancient Olympia, birthplace of the Olympics, was also threatened but firefighters kept the site safe.
ref: Olympia Purba, tempat kelahiran Sukan Olimpik, juga terancam tetapi anggota bomba berjaya menyelamatkan kawasan tersebut.

src: The new museum of Olympia was saved in the last minute but part of the ancient stadium was not spared.
ref: Muzium baru Olympia dapat diselamatkan pada minit terakhir tetapi sebahagian daripada stadium purba tersebut tidak dapat diselamatkan.

src: The Greek Government has offered a €1 million reward for anyone providing information which leads to the arrest of an arsonist.
ref: Kerajaan Greek telah menawarkan ganjaran €1 juta untuk sesiapa yang memberikan maklumat yang membawa kepada penangkapan pencetus kebakaran itu.

src: US Attorney General Alberto Gonzales, after several months of controversy, today announced his resignation after 13 years of public service.
ref: Peguam Negara AS Alberto Gonzales, selepas kontroversi beberapa bulan, mengumumkan peletakan jawatannya hari ini selepas 13 tahun dalam perkhidmatan awam.

src: While he did not elaborate on the circumstances of his departure, he referred to his tenure as a "remarkable journey" and said he had "lived the American dream."
ref: Walaupun dia tidak mengulas secara lanjut mengenai keadaan pemergiannya, dia merujuk kepada tempoh perkhidmatannya sebagai "perjalanan yang luar biasa" dan berkata dia telah "hidup dalam impian Amerika".

src: Critics of the embattled Attorney General have called for his ousting for several months, largely over his conflicts with the US Congress over the Bush Administration's warrant-less wiretapping program, and his firing of nine US attorneys.
ref: Pengkritik Peguam Negara yang dilandai masalah telah meminta penyingkirannya selama beberapa bulan, sebahagian besarnya mengenai konflik dengan Kongres AS ke atas rancangan pengintipan dengar melalui talian telefon tanpa waran di bawah Pentadbiran Bush, dan dia memecat sembilan peguam AS.

src: President Bush spoke on his "close friend's" resignation saying that he has reluctantly accepted the resignation, but noted that Gonzales' name had been "dragged through the mud for political reasons."
ref: Presiden Bush bercakap mengenai peletakan jawatan "kawan rapat" beliau dengan mengatakan bahawa beliau telah menerima peletakan jawatan itu dengan berat hati, tetapi menyatakan bahawa nama Gonzales telah "berlumuran lumpur atas sebab-sebab politik".

src: The Houston Astros have fired manager Phil Garner and general manager Tim Purpura less than two years after leading the team to its first World Series appearance (2005).
ref: Houston Astros telah memecat pengurus Phil Garner dan pengurus besar Tim Purpura dalam masa kurang daripada dua tahun selepas mengetuai pasukan untuk penampilan pertama Siri Dunia (2005).

src: Bench coach Cecil Cooper was appointed interim manager and team president Tal Smith will serve as interim general manager.
ref: Jurulatih simpanan, Cecil Cooper telah dilantik pengurus sementara dan presiden pasukan, Tal Smith akan berkhidmat sebagai Pengurus Besar sementara.

src: "I felt this was the time for a change," owner Drayton McLane said.
ref: "Saya rasa ini adalah masa untuk perubahan," kata pemilik, Drayton McLane.

src: Garner took over the Astros in the middle of the 2004 season after Jimy Williams was fired.
ref: Garner mengambil alih Pasukan Astros di tengah-tengah musim 2004 selepas Jimmy Williams dipecat.

src: He has a 985-1,054 career record as a major league manager, including 277-252 with the Astros.
ref: Beliau mempunyai rekod 985-1,054 kerjaya sebagai pengurus liga utama, termasuk 277-252 dengan Pasukan Astros.

src: Purpura joined the organization in 1994 and directed player development and the Astros' six minor league affiliates before taking over from Gerry Hunsicker as GM before the 2005 season.
ref: Purpura menyertai organisasi pada tahun 1994 dan mengarahkan pembangunan pemain dengan enam sekutu liga kecil Astros sebelum mengambil alih daripada Gerry Hunsicker sebagai GM sebelum musim 2005.

src: The Astros are currently in fifth place in the National League Central with a record of 58-73.
ref: The Astros kini di tempat kelima dalam Liga Utama Nasional dengan rekod 58-73.

src: At the time, he stated, "I complained to the police that they were misconstruing my actions.
ref: Pada masa itu, dia menyatakan, "Saya mengadu kepada polis bahawa mereka telah mentafsir tindakan saya.

src: After his arrest, he stated, "I should have had the advice of counsel in resolving this matter.
ref: Selepas dia ditangkap, dia menyatakan, "Saya perlu mempunyai nasihat peguam dalam menyelesaikan perkara ini.

src: Craig had previously faced allegations of homosexual behavior, and in 1982 went on network news to deny rumors involving cocaine and sex with male in congressional pages.
ref: Craig sebelum ini berhadapan tuduhan perlakuan homoseksual, dan pada tahun 1982 meneruskan berita rangkaian untuk menafikan khabar angin yang melibatkan kokain dan hubungan seks dengan lelaki di dalam laman kongres.

src: He is considered a social conservative in his voting record, and supported a Federal Marriage Amendment to bar same-sex marriage.
ref: Beliau dianggap konservatif sosial dalam rekod mengundi, dan menyokong Pindaan Perkahwinan Persekutuan melarang perkahwinan sejenis.

src: Those who turned out for the spectacle were treated to live music and purple flags with lighting to take on a mystic theme.
ref: Mereka yang datang untuk menyaksikannya disajikan dengan muzik secara langsung dan bendera ungu yang berlampu untuk mengambil tema mistik.

src: Mount Panorama provided perfect conditions for the show, with minimal light and clear skies.
ref: Gunung Panorama menyediakan keadaan yang sesuai untuk pertunjukkan tersebut, dengan cahaya yang minimum dan langit yang cerah.

src: Just before 7 p.m. AEST the eclipse began to be visible with the Earth beginning to shadow the Moon, by 8:37 p.m. AEST the top of Mount Panorama was bathed in an eerie red glow as the moon glowed deep red.
ref: Sebelum 7 malam AEST gerhana mula kelihatan dengan Bumi mula menutupi Bulan, pada 08:37 malam AEST puncak Gunung Panorama bermandikan suasa merah yeng menyeramkan apabila bulan bercahaya merah pekat.

src: West Ham United midfielder Kieron Dyer suffered a suspected broken leg in the Carling Cup tie against Bristol Rovers.
ref: Pemain tengah West Ham United, Kieron Dyer disyaki mengalami patah kaki dalam Piala Carling seri menentang Bristol Rovers.

src: You put a strong side out and you wonder why sometimes.
ref: Anda meletakkan pasukan yang kuat dan kadang-kadang anda tertanya-tanya mengapa.

src: Everyone in the dressing room is really down about it."
ref: Semua orang di bilik persalinan sangat bersedih mengenainya".

src: Their older brother is being charged with the stabbings, one of which was fatal.
ref: Abang mereka disabitkan kesalahan menikam, satu daripadanya membawa maut.

src: Grandfather Lovett Williams said Tyrel was found upon his dead brother, Tyron.
ref: Datuk Lovett Williams berkata Tyrel dijumpai semasa Tyron, adiknya telah mati.

src: While Tyron was pronounced dead at the scene, Tyrel underwent hours of surgery at Children's Hospital in Pittsburgh and is expected to survive.
ref: Walaupun Tyron disahkan meninggal dunia di tempat kejadian, Tyrel menjalani pembedahan berjam-jam di Hospital Kanak-Kanak di Pittsburgh dan dijangka untuk terus hidup.

src: Williams allegedly told police that Tyrel said his 18-year-old brother, Troy Lavalle Hill, was their killer.
ref: Williams mendakwa memberitahu polis bahawa Tyrel berkata abangnya yang berusia 18 tahun, Troy Lavalle Hill, ialah pembunuh mereka.

src: The boys have a 3-year-old sister who was not home at the time of the stabbing.
ref: Kanak-kanak lelaki itu mempunyai seorang adik perempuan berusia 3 tahun yang tiada di rumah semasa mereka ditikam.

src: Search parties worked throughout the night on Tuesday looking for Hill but he did not turn up until a neighbor spotted the suspect on Loretta Drive in Penn Hills.
ref: Pihak pencarian bekerja sepanjang malam pada hari Selasa mencari Hill tetapi dia tidak menonjolkan diri sehingga seorang jiran ternampak suspek di Loretta Drive di Penn Hills.

src: Another neighbor added, "Wonderful neighbors, just the sweetest kids I've ever known."
ref: Seorang jiran lagi menambah, "Jiran-jiran yang indah, hanya kanak-kanak manis yang saya pernah tahu".

src: Grief counselors were on duty at the childrens' middle school, Linton Middle School.
ref: Kaunselor yang sedih bertugas di sekolah menengah kanak-kanak itu, Sekolah Menengah Linton.

src: There is no word on a motive in the case.
ref: Tidak ada kata pada motif dalam kes itu.

src: As long as [Tyrel] makes it, I might make it, too."
ref: Selagi [Tyrel] menempuhnya, saya mungkin menempuhnya, juga".

src: The 35m vessel has been stranded since last Thursday, when she was grounded whilst on her way to the APEC meeting in Sydney.
ref: Kapal berukuran 35m itu telah terkandas sejak Khamis lepas, apabila ia telah ditambat, semasa dalam perjalanan ke mesyuarat APEC di Sydney.

src: After the completion of repairs, the ship is expected to continue to Sydney, although it will not reach it in time for the APEC meeting.
ref: Selepas selesainya pembaikan, kapal itu dijangka akan terus ke Sydney, walaupun ia tidak akan sampai dalam masa untuk mesyuarat APEC.

src: The ship's 18-man crew are said to be "very happy" with developments.
ref: 18 orang anak-anak kapal dikatakan "sangat gembira" dengan perkembangan itu.

src: According to the Australian Navy's Commander Forbes Peters, Indonesian officials are as pleased as the ships crew, with Peters saying "The naval attache and the first secretary to the ambassador are on site here and they cuddled Lieutenant Commander Larry Cook."
ref: Menurut Komander Tentera Laut Australia Forbes Peters, pegawai Indonesia gembira sebagaimana anak-anak kapal rasa, dengan Peters berkata "Atase tentera laut dan setiausaha pertama kedutaan berada di tapak di sini dan mereka memeluk Leftenan Komander Larry Cook".

src: "They are over the moon and I'm sure the commanding officer is as well, even though he's currently at sea on his ship."
ref: "Mereka sangat gembira dan saya pasti pegawai yang memberi arahan juga rasa begitu, walaupun dia kini berada di laut di atas kapal itu".

src: According to city health officials in Hammond, Indiana, there have been two more cases of West Nile virus reported in humans.
ref: Menurut para pegawai kesihatan bandar di Hammond, Indiana, terdapat dua lagi kes virus Nil Barat yang dilaporkan pada manusia.

src: The two victims are former chief of police, Frank DuPey and a 67-year-old Hammond resident.
ref: Dua mangsa tersebut adalah bekas ketua polis, Frank DuPey dan seorang penduduk Hammond berumur 67 tahun.

src: Thousands of Greeks gathered last night in Syntagma square in front of the parliament building in Athens to protest over the political response to the fires.
ref: Beribu-ribu orang-orang Greece berkumpul malam tadi di dataran Syntagma di hadapan bangunan parlimen di Athens untuk membantah tindak balas politik terhadap kebakaran.

src: Victory Park, Woombye, Queensland — Conversions were a rarity on Saturday as Noosa defeated Nambour in a four try to two round 18 Sunshine Coast Rugby Union match in Woombye, Australia.
ref: Victory Park, Woombye, Queensland - Penukaran adalah jarang a pada hari Sabtu semasa Noosa mengalahkan Nambour dalam empat percubaan untuk dua pusingan 18 Sunshine Coast Rugby Union Perlawanan di Woombye, Australia.

src: Last year, in a glimpse of problems yet to surface, the Republican head of the U.S. House Committee on Standards of Official Conduct, or "House Ethics Committee", presided over three admonitions that included offering to endorse the candidacy of a political lawmaker’s son in exchange for votes on legislation.
ref: Pada tahun lepas, dalam sepintas pandangan masalah yang belum lagi timbul, ketua Republikan Jawatankuasa Dewan Amerika Syarikat berkenaan Piawai Tatalaku Rasmi, atau "Jawatankuasa Etika Dewan," mempengerusikan tiga teguran termasuk menyokong pencalonan anak lelaki seorang penggubal undang-undang politik dalam pertukaran untuk undi berkaitan undang-undang.

src: Last week the Washington Post reported that Mr. DeLay took a trip to Moscow in 1997, financed by lobbyists of the Russian Government.
ref: Pada minggu lepas Washington Post melaporkan bahawa Encik DeLay mmbuat lawatan ke Moscow pada tahun 1997, yang dibiayai oleh pelobi-pelobi Kerajaan Rusia.

src: The news agency reported that DeLay would look forward to meeting the charges with the ethics committee in a sit-down and blamed all of his problems on House Democrats.
ref: Agensi berita melaporkan bahawa DeLay akan berharap untuk menghadapi pertuduhan itu dengan jawatankuasa etika dan menyalahkan semua masalahnya atas Dewan Demokrat.

src: Senator Chris Dodd, a Democrat from Connecticut, advised his Republican colleagues strongly to "Be careful about how closely you embrace Mr. DeLay, as long as he's there, he's going to become a pretty good target."
ref: Senator Chris Dodd, seorang ahli Demokrat dari Connecticut, menasihatkan rakan-rakan Republikan untuk lebih "Berhati-hati untuk menerima Encik DeLay, selagi beliau berada di sana, beliau akan menjadi sasaran yang cukup baik".

src: Other Republicans are starting to get jittery about their reelection hopes if DeLay is allowed to retain power.
ref: Ahli-ahli Republik lain mula rasa gelisah mengenai pemilihan semula jika DeLay dibenarkan mengekalkan kuasa.

src: Tom's conduct is hurting the Republican Party, is hurting this Republican majority and it is hurting any Republican who is up for re-election, Rep. Christopher Shays, R-Conn., told the Associated Press after making similar comments at community meetings in his home district this weekend.
ref: Kelakuan Tom mengugat Parti Republik, mengugat majoriti Republikan ini dan ia mengugat mana-mana ahli-ahli Republik yang menginginkan pemilihan semula, Wakil Christopher Shays, R-Conn., memberitahu Associated Press selepas membuat komen yang sama di mesyuarat komuniti di kawasan daerah beliau pada hujung minggu ini.

src: But he thinks everything done by DeLay was "according to the law."
ref: Namun beliau berpendapat segala yang dilakukan DeLay adalah "mengikut undang-undang".

src: I think he has to come forward and lay out what he did and why he did it and let the people then judge for themselves, he said on ABC's This Week, a Sunday political talk program.
ref: Saya rasa beliau perlu tampil ke hadapan dan memberikan penjelasan apa yang dilakukannya dan mengapa dia melakukannya dan biar orang ramai yang menghakiminya untuk diri mereka, katanya pada Minggu Ini di ABC, satu program ceramah politik hari Ahad.

src: Now you may not like some of the things he's done, that’s for the people of his district to decide, whether they want to approve that kind of behavior.
ref: Sekarang anda mungkin tidak suka perkara yang telah dia lakukan, biar penduduk daerah beliau yang menilainya, biar mereka menerima atau tidak tingkah lakunya.

src: Thursday at Madrid–Barajas Airport, Wikinews interviewed Spanish Paralympic swimmer Marta Gomez, who is scheduled to compete at the 2013 IPC Swimming World Championships that start on Monday in Montreal, Canada.
ref: Khamis di Lapangan Terbang Madrid-Barajas, Wikinews menemuramah perenang Paralimpik Sepanyol Marta Gomez, yang dijadual bertanding dalam Kejohanan Renang Dunia IPC 2013 yang bermula pada hari Isnin di Montreal, Kanada.

src: This is Laura Hale, I'm interviewing Marta Gómez, a Spanish Paralympic swimmer going to the 2013 IPC Swimming World Championships in Montreal.
ref: Ini adalah Laura Hale, saya sedang menemuramah Marta Gómez, perenang Paralimpik Sepanyol yang akan pergi ke Kejohanan Renang Dunia IPC 2013 di Montreal.

src: Are you going to Montreal and what strokes and distances are you competing in?
ref: Adakah anda akan ke Montreal dan apa jenis gaya dan jarak akan anda bertanding?

src: Hassan Rowhani, head of the Supreme National Security Council for Iran, announced Monday that the country would temporarily suspend conversion of uranium as of November 22.
ref: Hassan Rowhani, Ketua Majlis Keselamatan Negara Tertinggi Iran, mengumum pada hari Isnin bahawa negara itu buat sementara waktu akan menggantung penukaran uranium sehingga 22 November.

src: "Iran is planning to suspend uranium conversion activities from November 22," Rowhani said during a news conference.
ref: "Iran merancang untuk menggantung aktiviti penukaran uranium dari 22 November," kata Rowhani dalam satu sidang akhbar.

src: Uranium is a chemical element which can be used in nuclear weapons and nuclear power plants.
ref: Uranium adalah unsur kimia yang boleh digunakan dalam senjata nuklear dan loji kuasa nuklear.

src: Rudd claimed that the policy he'd put forward has "one simple principle" behind it: "If you are a people smuggler bringing someone to Australia and you are seeking to settle them in Australia, we will not allow it."
ref: Rudd mendakwa bahawa polisi yang diketengahkan beliau mempunyai "satu prinsip mudah" di belakangnya: "Jika kamu penyuludup membawa seseorang untuk Australia dan kamu mahu menempatkan mereka di Australia, kami tidak akan membenarkannya".

src: Rudd also used the debate to take a firm stance on same-sex marriage.
ref: Rudd juga telah berdebat untuk mengambil pendirian tegas di atas isu perkahwinan sama jantina.

src: Pledging that a bill to legalise same-sex marriage would be introduced within 100 days of government, Rudd promised to allow a "full conscience vote" if he were to be re-elected.
ref: Berikrar bahawa tuntutan untuk membenarkan kepada perkahwinan sama jantina akan diperkenalkan dalam tempoh 100 hari bekerja, Rudd berjanji akan membenarkan "undi suara penuh" jika beliau dipilih sekali lagi.

src: Rudd called on the opposition to do the same, describing it as a "mark of decency" and stating that "folk out there want this to happen."
ref: Rudd memanggil pembangkang untuk melakukan perkara yang sama, menyatakannya sebagai "tanda kesopanan" dan menyatakan bahawa "rakyat di luar sana yang mahukan ini terjadi".

src: A train, traveling at a high rate of speed, was carrying over 850 passengers when it rammed into an empty train near Rio de Janeiro.
ref: Sebuah kereta api, yang berjalan pada kelajuan tinggi, membawa lebih daripada 850 penumpang apabila ia merempuh sebuah kereta api kosong berhampiran Rio de Janeiro.

src: The empty train was in the process of being moved between sets of tracks.
ref: Kereta api kosong itu sedang dalam proses untuk dipindahkan antara set trek.

src: "Our priority is to give support to the survivors, the passengers trapped in the wreckage, and reduce the number of fatal victims," said Col. Souza Filho, the head of Rio de Janeiro's Civil Defense Department in an interview with the Globo TV network.
ref: "Keutamaan kami adalah untuk memberikan sokongan kepada mangsa, penumpang terperangkap di dalam bangkai, dan mengurangkan jumlah mangsa maut," kata Kolonel Souza Filho, ketua Jabatan Pertahanan Awam Rio de Janeiro dalam satu temu bual dengan rangkaian TV Globo.

src: "They had fractures in their arms, their faces, everywhere," said Marcos de Souza, director of the Posse Hospital in a televised interview.
ref: "Mereka mempunyai keretakan pada tangan mereka, muka mereka, di mana-mana sahaja," kata Marcos de Souza, Pengarah Hospital Posse dalam satu temu bual televisyen.

src: Irish budget airline Ryanair have dismissed pilot John Goss, who has worked with the airline for 25 years, over remarks he made in a documentary about safety at the airline.
ref: Syarikat penerbangan bajet Ireland Ryanair telah memecat juruterbang John Goss, yang telah bekerja dengan syarikat penerbangan itu selama 25 tahun, atas kenyataan beliau dibuat dalam satu dokumentari mengenai keselamatan di syarikat penerbangan itu.

src: The programme discussed the airline's safety with a focus on fuel policy, investigating allegations Ryanair uses a bare minimum of fuel and intimidates pilots who raise concerns.
ref: Program ini membincangkan keselamatan syarikat penerbangan itu dengan memberi tumpuan kepada dasar bahan api, menyiasat dakwaan Ryanair menggunakan tahap minimum bahan api dan mengugut juruterbang yang mengutarakan kebimbangan mereka.

src: Goss, who had been due to retire in October, is a key figure of Ryanair Pilots Group (RPG), which conducted a survey of more than 1,000 flight crew.
ref: Goss, yang telah dijadualkan bersara pada bulan Oktober, adalah seorang tokoh utama Juruterbang Ryanair Group (RPG), yang menjalankan kajian lebih 1,000 anak kapal.

src: According to the RPG survey almost 90% of respondents said the safety culture was nontransparent.
ref: Menurut kaji selidik RPG hampir 90% daripada responden mengatakan budaya keselamatan adalah tidak telus.

src: Pilots interviewed for the programme said they felt pressured to save fuel, the cost of which has hit Ryanair's profits.
ref: Juruterbang ditemuramah untuk program itu berkata, mereka berasa tertekan untuk menjimatkan bahan api, kos yang telah menghentam keuntungan Ryanair.

src: One anonymous pilot interviewed by Channel 4 accused the airline of "threats and bullying".
ref: Seorang juruterbang tanpa nama ditemuramah oleh Channel 4 menuduh syarikat penerbangan itu "mengancam dan membuli".

src: Over 90% of those surveyed wanted a regulatory inquiry, with RPG saying the survey results were passed to the airline and the Irish Aviation Authority.
ref: Lebih 90% daripada mereka yang ditinjau mahu siasatan kawal selia, dengan RPG mengatakan keputusan kaji selidik telah diberikan kepada syarikat penerbangan dan Lembaga Penerbangan Ireland.

src: The airline says RPG only conducted their survey to unionise Ryanair pilots and issued a statement describing the documentary as "based on nothing more than anonymous hearsay claims made by individuals whose identity was concealed, and/or by representatives of pilot unions of Ryanair's competitor airlines masquerading as a non-Ryanair Pilot Group".
ref: Syarikat penerbangan itu berkata RPG hanya menjalankan kajian mereka dengan ahli kesatuan pekerja juruterbang Ryanair dan mengeluarkan kenyataan yang menerangkan dokumentari itu sebagai "hanya berdasarkan tuduhan tidak berasas dari individu yang merahsiakan identiti mereka dan/atau oleh wakil-wakil kesatuan juruterbang dari pesaing syarikat penerbangan Ryanair yang menyamar sebagai juruterbang kumpulan Ryanair".

src: The airline further say they "look forward to correcting Mr Goss's defamatory claims in court".
ref: Syarikat penerbangan itu lagi mengatakan mereka "melihat ke hadapan untuk membetulkan tuntutan fitnah Encik Goss di mahkamah".

src: Channel 4 have previously stated an intent to defend the legal action against them.
ref: Channel 4 telah menyatakan sebelum ini bahawa niat untuk mempertahankan tindakan undang-undang terhadap mereka.

src: Yesterday, Republican Fred Thompson confirmed his campaign for the United States presidential election, 2008.
ref: Semalam, ahli Republikan Fred Thompson mengesahkan kempennya bagi pilihan raya presiden Amerika Syarikat, 2008.

src: Thompson much expected declarations comes after months of "testing the waters."
ref: Pengumuman Thompson yang begitu dijangka ini diumumkan selepas beberapa bulan "menguji keadaan."

src: According to an advisor, Thompson will make the announcement on Leno opting not to appear at the Republican debate on September 5.
ref: Menurut salah seorang penasihat, Thompson bakal membuat pengumuman di Leno memilih untuk tidak muncul di debat Republikan pada September 5.

src: The Chinese domain was targeted in the latest of many denial of service attacks against China.
ref: Domain China disasarkan dalam serangan penafian perkhidmatan terbaru yang banyak terhadap China.

src: The domain was attacked twice, once at 2am local time, and again at 4am.
ref: Domain itu diserang dua kali, satu kali pada pukul 2 pagi waktu tempatan, dan sekali lagi pada 4 pagi.

src: The second was larger, and Chinese officials said work to restore service was progressing slowly.
ref: Yang kedua adalah lebih besar, dan pegawai China berkata kerja untuk memulihkan perkhidmatan telah berkembang secara perlahan-lahan.

src: This outage comes at a sensitive time for China, with the trial of , a former government official, having just ended.
ref: Gangguan ini datang pada masa yang sensitif bagi China, dengan perbicaraan ke atas, bekas pegawai kerajaan, yang baru sahaja berakhir.

src: According to a Wall Street Journal interview with Matthew Prince, CEO of , a company that tracks web traffic and metrics, during the attack Chinese Internet traffic dropped by 32%.
ref: Menurut satu wawancara Wall Street Journal dengan Matthew Prince, Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif, sebuah syarikat yang menjejaki trafik web dan metrik, semasa serangan itu trafik Internet Cina berkurangan sebanyak 32%.

src: The United Kingdom House of Commons voted 272–285 last night against proposed possible military action against Syria following claims the Assad regime used chemical weapons against civilians.
ref: Dewan Rakyat United Kingdom semalam telah mengundi 272-285 menolak cadangan untuk menghantar tindakan ketenteraan bagi menentang Syria berikutan dakwaan bahawa regim Assad telah menggunakan senjata kimia terhadap orang awam.

src: The government motion was defeated by opposition from the Labour Party, as well as rebel MPs from both the Conservative and Liberal Democratic parties.
ref: Gerakan kerajaan itu dikalahkan dengan penentangan dari parti Buruh, dan juga dari MP yang memberontak dari kedua-dua parti Konservatif dan parti Demokrat Liberal.

src: Ed Miliband, leader of the opposition Labour Party, said the proposal to go to war was an "ill-thought through action", it lacked international support, and Cameron had acted in a "cavalier and reckless" manner.
ref: Ed Miliband, ketua pembangkang parti Buruh, berkata cadangan untuk pergi berperang itu adalah satu "tindakan yang terburu-buru," ia tidak mempunyai sokongan antarabangsa, dan Cameron bertindak dengan "angkuh dan semborono".

src: Deputy Prime Minister and Liberal Democratic leader Nick Clegg said the sole intention of the government's motion was to "relieve humanitarian suffering by deterring and disrupting the further use of chemical weapons".
ref: Timbalan Perdana Menteri dan pemimpin Demokrat Liberal Nick Clegg berkata satu-satunya tujuan gerakan kerajaan itu adalah untuk "mengurangkan penderitaan kemanusiaan dengan menghalang dan mencegah penggunaan senjata kimia".

src: "President Obama's intentions are highly limited and so are ours."
ref: "Tujuan Presiden Obama juga amat terhad sebagaimana kami".

src: The former foreign secretary and Conservative MP Sir Malcolm Rifkind said during the debate: "The Assad regime in Damascus are watching very carefully as to whether they will get away with what they have done."
ref: Bekas setiausaha asing dan ahli MP Konservatif Sir Malcolm Rifkind berkata semasa perdebatan: "Regim Assad di Damaskus sedang memerhati dengan berhati-hati jika mereka dapat melepaskan diri dari apa yang telah mereka lakukan".

src: Opposition came also from Britain's smaller parties: Caroline Lucas from the Green Party said the actions "cannot be justified", and expressed concern that the United Kingdom would be "flouting international law" by going into Syria.
ref: Penentangan juga datang dari parti-parti Britain yang lebih kecil: Caroline Lucas dari Parti Hijau berkata tindakan itu "tidak boleh dipertahankan," dan menyatakan kebimbangan yang United Kingdom akan "melanggar undang-undang antarabangsa" dengan pergi ke Syria.

src: Respect MP George Galloway argued there was "no compelling evidence" of Syrian government involvement in the chemical weapons attack.
ref: MP parti Respect George Galloway berdebat dengan menyatakan bahawa "tidak ada bukti kukuh" tentang penglibatan kerajaan Syria dalam serangan senjata kimia itu.

src: The defeat of the government motion for military intervention has surprised some.
ref: Kekalahan gerakan kerajaan untuk campur tangan tentera itu mengejutkan sesetengah pihak.

src: Shadow Defence Secretary Jim Murphy said "Parliament is entirely unpredictable sometimes and I don't think many people saw this coming."
ref: Setiausaha Pertahanan Shadow Jim Murphy berkata "Parlimen secara keseluruhannya kadang-kadang tidak dapat diramal dan saya rasa ramai orang tidak menjangkakan keputusan ini".

src: Philip Hammond, the Defence Secretary, confirmed that following the vote, the country would not participate in any action in Syria, but he noted he expected the United States to carry on without the UK, anticipating "the US and other countries will continue to look at responses to the chemical attack."
ref: Philip Hammond, Setiausaha Pertahanan, mengesahkan yang berikutan undian tersebut, negara itu tidak akan menyertai sebarang tindakan di Syria, tetapi beliau turut menyatakan yang beliau menjangka Amerika Syarikat akan tetap meneruskannya tanpa UK, dan mengagak "US dan negara lain akan terus memerhati respon terhadap serangan kimia itu".

src: "They will be disappointed that Britain will not be involved."
ref: "Mereka akan kecewa kerana Britain tidak akan terlibat dalamnya".

src: Hammond noted the rejection of military intervention would strain the "special relationship" between Britain and the United States.
ref: Hammond turut menyatakan yang penolakan untuk campur tangan tentera ini akan menekan "hubungan istimewa" di antara Britain dengan Amerika Syarikat.

src: The United States has said they will still seek military action against the Syrian regime.
ref: Amerika Syarikat telah menyatakan yang mereka masih akan menggunakan tindakan ketenteraan terhadap regim Syria.

src: US defense secretary Chuck Hagel said the US would seek to build an "international coalition".
ref: Setiausaha pertahanan US Chuck Hagel berkata yang US akan membina satu "campuran antarabangsa".

src: Caitlin Hayden, spokeswoman for the White House, reacted to the British vote by saying: "The US will continue to consult with the UK Government — one of our closest allies and friends."
ref: Caitlin Hayden, jurucakap untuk White House, memberi komen kepada undian British dengan menyatakan: "US akan terus berunding dengan kerajaan UK - salah satu sekutu terdekat dan kawan kami".

src: Hayden said that President Obama "will be guided by what is in the best interests of the United States", and that Obama "believes that there are core interests at stake for the United States... countries who violate international norms regarding chemical weapons need to be held accountable".
ref: Hayden berkata bahawa Presiden Obama "akan dibimbing dengan apa kepentingan yang terbaik bagi Amerika Syarikat," dan Obama "percaya yang ada teras kepentingan bagi Amerika Syarikat di situ...negara-negara yang mencabuli norma antarabangsa berkenaan senjata kimia perlu bertanggungjawab".

src: Representative Eliot Engel, a Democrat on the House Foreign Affairs Committee, said the White House had told them "beyond a doubt [...] chemical weapons were used, and used intentionally by the Assad regime", and that there is evidence from intercepted communications of involvement by "high-level Syrian officials".
