ref: Wakil Eliot Engel, seorang ahli Demokrat di Dewan Jawatankuasa Hubungan Asing, berkata White House telah memberitahu mereka "Adalah sudah pasti [...] yang senjata kimia telah digunakan, dan digunakan secara sengaja oleh regim Assad," dan ada bukti dari komunikasi pintasan tentang penglibatan "pegawai tinggi Syria".

src: The Parliamentary vote on intervention in Syria is on the front pages of many of the national newspapers in Britain, with The Times claiming Cameron was "humiliated" by the vote.
ref: Undian Parlimen bagi campur tangan di Syria telah diletakkan di muka hadapan banyak akhbar kebangsaan di Britain, dengan The Times menyatakan Cameron telah "dimalukan" dengan undian tersebut.

src: Finland's National Bureau of Investigation, a division of Finland's national police, has ten suspects currently, in its recent investigation into alleged dog fighting in the south of the country.
ref: Biro Finland Penyiasatan, satu bahagian polis kebangsaan Finland, mempunyai sepuluh suspek pada masa ini, dalam penyiasatan baru-baru ini berhubung dakwaan anjing berperang di selatan negara itu.

src: All the suspects are male Finns residing in southern Finland.
ref: Semua suspek Finland lelaki yang tinggal di selatan Finland.

src: The new developments are the result of an investigation into four to six alleged dog fights.
ref: Perkembangan baru adalah hasil daripada siasatan ke 4 hingga 6 pergaduhan anjing didakwa.

src: They are being investigated under suspicion of breaching the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act.
ref: Mereka sedang disiasat di bawah disyaki melanggar Pencegahan Penganiayaan Terhadap Akta Haiwan.

src: At least thus far there has been no evidence of illegal gambling on the outcome of fights.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya setakat ini tiada sebarang bukti perjudian haram kepada hasil pergaduhan.

src: There also does not seem to be any large-scale organisation behind the incidents or connections with organised crime groupings.
ref: Terdapat juga tidak kelihatan apa-apa organisasi berskala besar di sebalik kejadian atau hubungan dengan kumpulan jenayah terancang.

src: "It would appear to be the pastime of a group of individuals."
ref: "Ia akan muncul sebagai hobi sekumpulan individu".

src: He added that about a dozen pit bulls from America were involved in the incidents.
ref: Tambahnya, kira-kira sedozen lembu jantan pit dari Amerika yang terlibat dalam insiden.

src: Key evidence includes video footage and testimony from veterinary surgeons, who were present when police raided several locations suspected to be involved.
ref: Bukti utama termasuk rakaman video dan keterangan daripada pakar bedah veterinar, yang hadir apabila polis menyerbu beberapa lokasi disyaki terlibat.

src: The investigation was begun as a result of an investigation into dog fighting in the United Kingdom by the state-run British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC).
ref: Siasatan itu telah dimulakan hasil daripada siasatan terhadap berperang anjing di United Kingdom oleh negeri yang dikendalikan oleh Perbadanan Penyiaran British (BBC).

src: A BBC journalist teamed up with a man with military experience to infiltrate a notorious dog fighting ring from Ulster, Ireland, known as The Farmer Boys.
ref: Seorang wartawan BBC bekerjasama dengan seorang lelaki yang mempunyai pengalaman tentera untuk menyusup cincin pertempuran anjing terkenal dari Ulster, Ireland, yang dikenali sebagai The Farmer Boys.

src: The documentary, which is part of the Panorama series, was broadcast in Finland yesterday by YLE.
ref: Dokumentari ini yang merupakan sebahagian daripada siri Panorama, telah disiarkan di Finland semalam oleh YLE.

src: The BBC had contacted Finland regarding it's discoveries in April.
ref: BBC telah menghubungi Finland mengenainya yang penemuan pada bulan April.

src: The BBC itself had begun it's investigation after Gerard Cavlan, a football player from Northern Ireland, was convicted on charges related to dog fighting.
ref: BBC sendiri telah mula siasatan itu selepas Gerard Cavlan, seorang pemain bola sepak dari Ireland Utara, didapati bersalah atas tuduhan yang berkaitan dengan melawan anjing.

src: Privacy laws in Finland required the faces of those believed to be involved to be pixelated during the Finnish version of the broadcast, although this was not mirrored in the UK screening - which, in an unprecedented move, coincided exactly with the showing in Finland.
ref: Undang-undang privasi di Finland diperlukan muka orang-orang yang dipercayai terlibat akan pixelated semasa versi Finland siaran, walaupun ini tidak dicerminkan dalam pemeriksaan UK - yang, dalam satu langkah yang belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya, bertepatan betul-betul dengan menunjukkan di Finland.

src: The investigation is the only one ever conducted into dog fighting in Finland.
ref: Siasatan itu adalah satu-satunya yang pernah dijalankan ke dalam pertempuran anjing di Finland.

src: Two men have been charged with starting the Zaca Fire, the second-largest wildfire in the history of California.
ref: Dua lelaki telah didakwa dengan memulakan kebakaran di Zaca, kebakaran kedua terbesar dalam sejarah California.

src: The fire is continuing to burn through the Los Padres National Forest, and has consumed a total of 240,000 acres, having started on July 4.
ref: Api terus membakar melalui Hutan Negara Los Padres, dan telah memusnahkan sejumlah 240,000 ekar, bermula pada 4 Julai.

src: However, the fire is now under control, and is expected to be contained by September 4.
ref: Bagaimanapun, kebakaran itu kini terkawal, dan dijangka dapat dibendung pada 4 September.

src: Jose Jesus Cabrera of Santa Ynez, 38, Santiago Iniguez Cervantes of Santa Maria, 46, and the company of Rancho La Laguna, whom they worked for, have all been charged with six counts of felony in relation to starting the fire.
ref: Jose Yesus Cabrera Santa Ynez, 38, Santiago Iniguez Cervantes Santa Maria, 46, dan syarikat Rancho La Laguna, majikan kepada ketiga-tiganya, semuanya telah didakwa dengan enam pertuduhan jenayah berkenaan memulakan kebakaran.

src: Three of the charges are for "recklessly causing a fire that caused great bodily injury".
ref: Tiga daripada dakwaan adalah "menyebabkan kebakaran besar yang menyebabkan kecederaan tubuh badan".

src: Two counts of this stem from the crash of a helicopter that was fighting the fires, and the other from a separate incident when a third firefighter was seriously wounded while battling the flames.
ref: Dua pertuduhan dari hal ini iaitu kemalangan helikopter yang memadamkan kebakaran, dan juga kejadian berasingan apabila seorang ahli bomba ketiga cedera parah ketika melawan api.

src: The other three counts are for recklessly causing a structure or forest fire, carelessness with a flaming substance and for not having the required permit to operate equipment capable of starting a fire.
ref: Tiga lagi pertuduhan adalah menyebabkan kebakaran struktur hutan secara melulu, kecuaian dengan bahan yang mudah terbakar dan kerana tidak mempunyai permit yang diperlukan untuk menggunakan peralatan yang mampu memulakan kebakaran.

src: 58 firefighters were injured in total by the blaze, although no life-threatening injuries were sustained.
ref: 58 anggota bomba cedera oleh kebakaran ini, walaupun tidak ada kecederaan yang mengancam nyawa direkodkan.

src: A lawyer for the men said he felt the charges were excessive considering the circumstances.
ref: Seorang peguam berkata beliau merasakan pertuduhan itu berat apabila melihat keadaan yang berlaku.

src: "We have a couple of hard working guys who go out to take care of a water pipe or some cattle on a very hot day on the Fourth of July and they took precautions and despite the precautions an accident happened and a fire started," said Attorney Robert Sanger.
ref: "Kami mempunyai beberapa lelaki yang bekerja keras yang berusaha untuk menjaga paip air atau lembu ternakan pada hari yang sangat panas pada empat Julai dan mereka mengambil langkah berjaga-jaga dan walaupun langkah berjaga-jaga diamalkan kemalangan tetap berlaku dan kebakaran bermula," kata Peguam Robert Sanger.

src: If convicted, the men could face up to nine years imprisonment.
ref: Jika sabit kesalahan, mereka boleh menghadapi hukuman sehingga sembilan tahun penjara.

src: It took Ballinger around four to five hours to complete all necessary steps.
ref: Ia mengambil masa Ballinger selama empat hingga lima jam untuk menyelesaikan semua langkah-langkah yang perlu.

src: However, half of this time was trying to get the case of the iPhone open.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, separuh daripada masa ini adalah berusaha untuk membuatkan sarung iPhone terbuka.

src: He also didn't want to scratch the case, unlike others, so he used plastic tools "used to replace iPod batteries that worked okay."
ref: Dia juga tidak mahu mencalarkan sarung itu, tidak seperti orang lain, jadi dia menggunakan alat plastik "yang digunakan untuk menggantikan bateri iPod yang berfungsi dengan baik".

src: He also recommends having two people on this job as this will help when it comes to shorting a circuit.
ref: Dia juga mencadangkan mendapatkan dua orang untuk kerja ini kerana ini akan membantu apabila kerja ini datang kepada pintasan litar.

src: After that, all you have to do is run some software, according to Ballinger.
ref: Selepas itu, apa yang anda perlu lakukan adalah menjalankan beberapa perisian, menurut Ballinger.

src: "The software part is pretty simple, follow the instructions and it could be made even easier if all the files were in one download.
ref: "Bahagian perisian ini agak mudah, ikut arahan dan ia boleh dibuat lebih mudah jika semua fail dalam satu muat turun.

src: However, he cannot use either the built-in YouTube application or the email applications as it will not connect to the Post Office Protocol.
ref: Bagaimanapun, dia tidak boleh menggunakan sama ada applikasi sedia-ada YouTube atau applikasi emel kerana ia tidak akan bersambung kepada Protokol Pejabat Pos.

src: He can also only get the Internet if there is a Wi-Fi connection, as Vodafone NZ has 3G but no EDGE; additionally, Ballinger could not get the slower GPRS working.
ref: Dia juga hanya boleh mendapatkan Internet jika terdapat sambungan Wi-Fi, kerana Vodafone NZ mempunya 3G tetapi tiada EDGE; tambahan, Ballinger tidak boleh mendapatkan GPRS yang perlahan untuk berfungsi.

src: "If there was a 3G phone then this phone would be amazing!"
ref: "Jika terdapat telefon 3G maka telefon ini akan menjadi luar biasa"!

src: India have beaten England by two wickets in the sixth One-Day International of the series at The Oval, London, England.
ref: India telah mengalahkan England dengan dua wiket dalam siri One-Day International keenam di The Oval, London, England.

src: Kevin Pietersen and ODI debutant Luke Wright both recorded fifties, with Wright sharing 106 runs with Owais Shah.
ref: Kevin Pietersen dan kemunculan sulung ODI Luke Wright kedua-duanya merekod lima puluh, dengan Wright berkongsi 106 larian dengan Owais Shah.

src: Shah reached 107 not out, and Dimitri Mascarenhas finished England's innings by hitting five sixes off the last five balls.
ref: Shah mencapai 107 tanpa keluar, dan Dimitri Mascarenhas menamatkan babak England dengan memukul lima enam daripada lima bola terkhir.

src: The final match will be played at Lord's, London on 8 September.
ref: Perlawanan akhir diadakan di Lord's, London pada 8 September.

src: Toy manufacturer Mattel announced today that they are recalling more products over fears of dangerous levels of lead in the toy's paint.
ref: Pembuat mainan Mattel mengumumkan hari ini bahawa mereka akan memanggil semula produk yang di paras berbahaya terhadap cat mainannya.

src: This soft, but heavy and poisonous metal can be fatal when there is more than 10 μg/dL in the blood.
ref: Ianya lembut, tetapi besi berat dan beracun mungkin boleh membawa bahaya yang ada lebih dari 10μg/dL dalam darah.

src: The 800,000 toys have been recalled over safety fears and are thought to be mostly Barbie products.
ref: Lebih 800,000 mainan telah dipanggil balik kerana takutkan keselamatan dan kebanyakkanya produk Barbie.

src: This recall has increased the concern over the safety of the Chinese production process.
ref: Panggilan semula ini telah meningkat kerana kebimbangan terhadap keselamatan proses produk buatan China.

src: The lead paint was traced to an un-authorised producer and that firm was closed down, however the most recent source has not yet been located.
ref: Cat itu telah dikesan sebagai dari pengeluar yang tidak berdaftar dan firma itu telah ditutup, bagaimanapun sumber terkini masih belum diketahui.

src: The eight Russian jets were flying in airspace patrolled by Nato, officials from the UK claimed.
ref: Lapan jet Rusia telah terbang di ruang udara yang dikawal oleh NATO, menuntut pegawai-pegawai dari UK.

src: They also confirmed that none had approached a foreign state and had been shadowed by aircraft from Nato countries.
ref: Mereka juga mengesahkan bahawa tiada sesiapapun menghampiri negeri asing dan telah dibayangi oleh pesawat dari negara-negara NATO.

src: The Ministry of Defence in the United Kingdom released a statement that the Russian Tupolev Tu-95 Bear aircraft, flying in four loosed pairs, were tracked by Norwegian aircraft before entering Nato airspace on Thursday morning.
ref: Kementerian Pertahanan di United Kingdom mengeluarkan kenyataan bahawa pesawat Bear Rusia Tupolev Tu-95, terbang dalam empat pasangan yang longgar, telah dikesan oleh pesawat Norway sebelum memasuki ruang udara NATO pada pagi Khamis.

src: The UK currently holds responsibility for the Nato airspace, and launched four F3 Tornados from RAF Leeming in North Yorkshire, UK, to identify the bombers.
ref: UK ketika ini memegang tanggungjawab bagi ruang udara NATO, dan melancarkan empat F3 Tornado dari RAF Leeming di North Yorkshire, United Kingdom, untuk mengenal pasti pengebom-pengebom itu.

src: The bombers eventually left the Nato zone, under tracking by UK aircraft and RAF radar in Northumberland.
ref: Pengebom-pengebom itu akhirnya meninggalkan zon NATO, di bawah pengesanan oleh pesawat UK dan radar RAF di Northumberland.

src: Lt Col John Inge Oegland, spokesman for the Norwegian armed forces, said there had been several similar incidents in recent months, but that the Russian flights were not causing alarm in Norway.
ref: Lt Kol John Inge Oegland, jurucakap angkatan tentera Norway, berkata terdapat beberapa insiden yang hampir sama pada kebelakangan bulan ini, tetapi penerbangan Rusia tidak menyebabkan kebimbangan di Norway.

src: Relations between Britain and Russia have worsened recently, particularly after Russia's refusal to allow the extradition of a former KGB bodyguard suspected of murdering emigre Alexander Litvinenko in London last year.
ref: Hubungan antara Britain dan Rusia telah bertambah buruk baru-baru ini, terutamanya selepas keengganan Rusia untuk membenarkan penyerahan balik bekas pengawal peribadi KGB yang disyaki membunuh Dhabaah Alexander Litvinenko di London pada tahun lepas.

src: Ignacio Corleto scored the only try of the match for Argentina in the 27th minute, but Contepomi missed the conversion, hitting the post.
ref: Ignacio Corleto menjaring satu-satunya percubaan untuk perlawanan tersebut untuk Argentina pada minit ke 27, tetapi Contepomi terlepas konversi tersebut, mengenai tiang.

src: Although France improved in the second half, Argentina's strong defence held them off and France were only able to close the lead to five points when David Skrela scored his fourth penalty of the match in the 60th minute.
ref: Walaupun Perancis bertambah baik pada separuh masa kedua, pertahanan kuat Argentina menyekat mereka dan Perancis hanya dapat merapatkan pendahuluan kepada hanya lima mata apabila David Skrela menjaringkan penalti keempatnya untuk perlawanan tersebut pada minit ke 60.

src: 2003 champions England start defending their title tomorrow when they play the United States.
ref: Juara 2003 England mula mempertahankan gelaran mereka esok semasa bermain dengan Amerika Syarikat.

src: Australia face Japan while New Zealand, who are one of the favourites to win the tournament, play Italy.
ref: Australia menghadapi Jepun sementara New Zealand, yang merupakan satu daripada kegemaran untuk memenangi kejohanan tersebut, bermain dengan Itali.

src: Despite Australia, the United States and China being non-signatories to the United Nations' Kyoto protocol on greenhouse gas reductions which is set to expire in 2012, the APEC accord calls for "We call for a post-2012 international climate change arrangement ... that strengthens, broadens and deepens the current arrangement and leads to reduced global emissions of greenhouse gases," according to the draft declaration.
ref: Walaupun Australia, Amerika Syarikat dan China yang bukan penandatangan-ke Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu Kyoto protokol pada pengurangan gas rumah hijau yang akan tamat pada tahun 2012, perjanjian APEC memerlukan "Kami memanggil antarabangsa susunan perubahan iklim pasca 2012...yang menguatkan, meluaskan dan mendalami perkiraan semasa dan membawa kepada mengurangkan pelepasan global gas rumah hijau," menurut draf deklarasi.

src: The draft agreement recognised that action was required to "slow, stop and reverse" greenhouse gas emissions; that nations should vow to reduce energy intensity by 25 percent by 2030; that forest cover in the region should be increased by 50 million acres by 2020; and that APEC nations will work with other nations to find a solution to climate change.
ref: Draf perjanjian mengiktiraf tindakan yang diperlukan untuk "perlahan, berhenti dan membalikkan" pelepasan gas rumah hijau; bahawa negara-negara perlu bersumpah untuk mengurangkan intensiti tenaga sebanyak 25 peratus pada tahun 2030;, litupan hutan di rantau ini perlu ditambah sebanyak 50 juta ekar pada tahun 2020; dan bahawa negara-negara APEC akan bekerjasama dengan negara-negara lain untuk mencari penyelesaian kepada perubahan iklim.

src: The declaration is non-binding and is simply a statement of goals to which the nations will try to achieve.
ref: Perisytiharan itu adalah tidak terikat dan hanya kenyataan matlamat yang bangsa-bangsa akan cuba untuk dicapai.

src: Host nation Australia has been criticised by China, Indonesia, Japan and Malaysia for putting climate change on the agenda at the APEC summit, saying they would prefer dialogue on climate change to occur under a United Nationa framework.
ref: Tuan rumah Australia telah dikritik oleh China, Indonesia, Jepun dan Malaysia kerana meletakkan perubahan iklim ke atas agenda pada sidang kemuncak APEC, berkata mereka lebih suka dialog mengenai perubahan iklim berlaku di bawah rangka kerja United Nationa.

src: Mr Wiraydua said that despite Indonesia not being entirely satisfied with the declaration they would "live with it".
ref: Mr Wiraydua berkata walaupun Indonesia yang bukan sepenuhnya berpuas hati dengan perisytiharan itu mereka akan "hidup bersamanya".

src: Two police officers were injured, one when hit by an iron bar and another when he was hit with a dart.
ref: Dua anggota polis tercedera, seorang apabila dipukul dengan batang besi dan seorang lagi apabila dia terkena damak.

src: Those arrested have been charged with offences ranging from assaulting police, hindering police, resisting arrest, offensive conduct and breaching a secure area.
ref: Mereka yang ditangkap telah dikenakan tuduhan dengan kesalahan menyerang polis, menghalang polis, melawan penangkapan, berkelakuan kasar dan memecah masuk kawasan yang dilindungi.

src: Despite the arrests, NSW Police Commissioner Andrew Scipione praised the conduct of the majority of protesters.
ref: Walaupun penangkapan telah dilakukan, Pesuruhjaya Polis NSW Andrew Scipione memuji kelakuan kebanyakan pembantah.

src: Mr Scipione credited the huge numbers of police and poor weather for the successful outcome of the rally.
ref: Encik Scipione memberi kredit kepada jumlah polis yang besar dan cuaca buruk untuk hasil perhimpunan yang berjaya.

src: "But more importantly, I think it was the combination of the show of force, the police were out there in big numbers, and we don't apologise for that.
ref: "Tetapi yang lebih penting, saya rasa ia adalah kombinasi pertunjukan kekuatan, pihak polis telah hadir di dalam jumlah besar, dan kami tidak meminta maaf untuk perkara sedemikikan.

src: "We always indicated that we would be there, in sufficient numbers to be able to act swiftly against those that broke the law.
ref: "Kami selalu menunjukkan yang kami akan sentiasa di situ, di dalam jumlah yang cukup untuk bertindak cepat terhadap mereka yang melanggar undang-undang.

src: Several protesters claimed that Sydney had been turned into a "police state" as a result of the security measures.
ref: Beberapa pembantah mendakwa Sydney telah bertukar menjadi "negara polis" kesan dari langkah-langkah keselamatan itu.

src: Commissioner Scipione said "all allegations of police misconduct would be investigated".
ref: Pesuruhjaya Scipione berkata "semua dakwaan tentang salah laku polis akan disiasat".

src: A second protest, held in Belmore Park attracted around 1,000 people from Vietnamese and Tibetian backgrounds protested against Chinese President Hu Jinato's human rights record.
ref: Bantahan kedua, diadakan di Taman Belmore menarik seramai 1,000 orang berketurunan Vietnam dan Tibet yang membantah terhadap rekod hak manusia Presiden China Hu Jinato.

src: Organiser of the protest, Tenpa Dugdak said Australian Prime Minister John Howard should make human rights in China an APEC issue.
ref: Penganjur bantahan itu, Tenpa Dugdak berkata Perdana Menteri Australia John Howard patut menjadikan hak asasi manusia di China sebuah isu di APEC.

src: A minimum of 85 Hindu pilgrims have been killed in India and 64 injured after their lorry and trailer plunged 24m (80ft) into a river gorge late last night.
ref: Terdapat sekurang-kurangnya 85 orang penganut Hindu telah terbunuh di India dan 64 tercedera selepas lori dan treler yang dinaiki mereka terjunam 24m (80 kaki) ke dalam gaung sungai lewat malam tadi.

src: An overnight rescue operation was initiated, removing both survivors and bodies of the dead from the wreck, with the aid of cranes and spotlights.
ref: Operasi menyelamat dimulakan serta merta, mengeluarkan kedua-dua mangsa dan mayat yang mati dari bangkai kenderaan, dengan bantuan kren dan lampu sorot.

src: The Press Trust of India reported that as many as 130 were injured, and Al Jazeera reported that there may have been 200 people on board.
ref: Press Trust of India melaporkan bahawa sebanyak 130 cedera, dan Al Jazeera melaporkan bahawa mungkin terdapat 200 orang penumpang didalamnya.

src: The driver had offered to take them to their destination for free, a practise common in India, despite the fact that such trucks are not safe for passenger transport, being designed primarily as freight transporters.
ref: Pemandu itu telah menawarkan untuk membawa mereka ke destinasi mereka secara percuma, perkara yang biasa di India, walaupun pada hakikatnya bahawa lori itu tidak selamat untuk pengangkutan penumpang, yang direka terutamanya sebagai pengangkut barang.

src: The temple is the subject of an annual ten-day pilgrimage every September, which begins on September 13, although most of the 250,000 pilgrims who flock to the site arrive several days in advance of the festival.
ref: Kuil ini merupakan tumpuan bagi jemaah sepuluh hari pada setiap bulan September setiap tahun, yang bermula pada 13 September, walau bagaimanapun kebanyakan daripada 250,000 jemaah yang berduyun-duyun ke tapak ini tiba beberapa hari sebelum perayaan itu.

src: The Chief Minister of Rajasthan Vasundhara Raje visited the three villages in which the victims resided.
ref: Ketua Menteri Rajasthan Vasundhara Raje melawat tiga buah kampung di mana mangsa ditempatkan.

src: The local government has initiated a full inquiry into the disaster.
ref: Kerajaan tempatan telah memulakan siasatan penuh bencana tersebut.

src: ABC News has obtained and released a transcript of a taped message from Osama Bin Laden.
ref: ABC News telah memperoleh dan mengeluarkan transkrip mesej yang dirakam oleh Osama Bin Laden.

src: Osama bin Laden's first video in almost three years has surfaced but has mixed reviews in the Arab world.
ref: Video pertama Osama bin Laden dalam hampir tiga tahun telah muncul tetapi telah mempunyai ulasan berbeza-beza di dunia Arab.

src: Al Qaeda supporters are enthused by the video coinciding with the 6th anniversary of the September 11, 2001 attacks, but other parts of the Muslim world seemed worried that the video may spawn new attacks creating more instability in the region than there already is.
ref: Penyokong al-Qaeda ghairah dengan video yang berbetulan dengan ulang tahun ke-6 daripada serangan 11 September 2001, tetapi bahagian lain dunia Islam seolah-olah bimbang bahawa video itu boleh mewujudkan serangan baru yang mewujudkan lebih banyak ketidakstabilan lagi di rantau itu berbanding sekarang.

src: Typhoon Fitow has struck Japan, leaving two people dead and a third missing.
ref: Typhoon Fitow telah melanda Jepun, meninggalkan dua orang mati dan tiga lagi hilang.

src: The Japan Meteorological Agency released the information on the storm's effects in the country yesterday.
ref: Agensi Meteorologi Jepun mengeluarkan maklumat mengenai kesan ribut di negara ini semalam.

src: According to information released by the Fire and Disaster Management Agency, around 200 buildings have been destroyed or badly damaged by the typhoon.
ref: Menurut maklumat yang dikeluarkan oleh Bomba dan Bencana Agensi Pengurusan, kira-kira 200 bangunan telah musnah atau rosak teruk akibat taufan itu.

src: Japan Airlines and All Nippon Airways, Japan's two largest air carriers, both said 240 domestic and eight international flights have been cancelled as a direct result of the storm, which is expected to be immediately followed by Tropical Storm Danas.
ref: Japan Airlines dan All Nippon Airways, dua syarikat penerbangan udara terbesar di Jepun, kedua-duanya berkata 240 domestik dan lapan penerbangan antarabangsa telah dibatalkan akibat langsung daripada ribut, yang dijangka akan segera diikuti oleh Ribut Tropika Danas.

src: It is predicted that the storm will deposit anything up to 150 millimeters (6 inches) of rainfall on areas on the Pacific coast, possibly triggering flash floods.
ref: Ia meramalkan bahawa ribut akan mendepositkan apa-apa sahaja sehingga 150 milimeter (6 inci) hujan turun di kawasan-kawasan di pantai Pasifik, mungkin mencetuskan banjir kilat.

src: New Zealand, Australia and England started their 2007 Rugby World Cup campaigns today with victories over Italy, Japan and the United States respectively.
ref: New Zealand, Australia dan England telah memulakan kempen Piala Dunia Ragbi 2007 mereka hari ini dengan kemenangan masing-masing ke atas Itali, Jepun dan Amerika Syarikat.

src: Australia and tournament favorites New Zealand comprehensively defeated their opposition, while defending champions England produced a comparatively unimpressive display to overcome the American team.
ref: Australia dan pasukan kegemaran kejohanan New Zealand dengan komprehensif telah menewaskan penentang mereka, sementara juara bertahan England jika dibandingkan telah menunjukkan satu perlawanan yang tidak menarik bagi menewaskan pasukan Amerika.

src: Tries from Doug Howlett, Mils Muliaina and two from Sitiveni Sivivatu increased the All Black's imposing lead.
ref: Cubaan dari Doug Howlett, Mils Muliana dan dua dari Sitiveni Sivivatu telah meningkatkan pendahuluan All Black yang mengagumkan.

src: Just before half time, Marko Stanojevic scored a try for Italy taking the score to 43-7.
ref: Sejurus sebelum separuh masa, Marko Stanojevic telah memperoleh satu cubaan ke atas Itali menjadikan mata sebanyak 43-7.

src: In the 71st minute, Mirco Bergamasco scored a consolation try for Italy.
ref: Pada minit ke 71, Mirco Bergamasco telah memperoleh satu cubaan sagu hati bagi Itali.

src: Australia overwhelmed Japan in the second half, scoring nine tries without reply.
ref: Australia mengalahkan Jepun di separuh masa kedua, memperoleh sembilan cubaan tanpa balasan.

src: In contrast to the day's earlier matches, the England team overcame the United States by only eighteen points.
ref: Sangat berbeza dengan perlawanan awal pada hari itu, pasukan England mengalahkan Amerika Syarikat dengan hanya lapan belas mata.

src: Nine minutes after the interval Tom Rees scored England's third try, but they were not able to score again.
ref: Sembilan minit selepas selang masa Tom Rees telah memperoleh cubaan ketiga England, tetapi mereka tidak lagi dapat memperoleh mata.

src: Matekitonga Moeakiola scored for the Americans in the 74th minute.
ref: Matekitonga Moeakiola telah memperoleh mata untuk Amerika pada minit ke74.

src: Four young girls were killed and six more people injured when a brick wall collapsed on top of them in Zambia.
ref: Empat kanak-kanak perempuan terbunuh dan enam lagi tercedera apabila dinding bata runtuh di atas mereka di Zambia.

src: The victims had been trying to reach a free mosquito net handout when a stampede erupted, causing the collapse.
ref: Mangsa-mangsa telah cuba untuk mencapai kelambu nyamuk yang percuma apabila rempuhan meletus, menyebabkan keruntuhan.

src: The accident occurred in the town of Mpika, where the Ministry of Health was conducting the handout as part of an anti-malaria initiative.
ref: Kemalangan itu berlaku di bandar Mpika, di mana Kementerian Kesihatan telah menjalankan pemberian itu sebagai sebahagian daripada inisiatif anti-malaria.

src: As people flocked to the community hall where the event was taking place, people outside the premises began climbing the walls in an effort to get in, initiating the collapse.
ref: Semasa orang berpusu-pusu ke dewan masyarakat di mana peristiwa itu berlaku, orang di luar premis itu mula memanjat dinding dalam usaha untuk masuk, menyebabkan runtuhan itu.

src: The four girls died on the spot in the incident, which occurred at around 17:30 local time.
ref: Empat kanak-kanak perempuan meninggal dunia di tempat kejadian, yang berlaku pada kira-kira 17:30 waktu tempatan.

src: In July 2004, Romania will revalue its currency, the leu, so that 10,000 old lei will equal 1 new leu, with 1 euro being equal to approximately 3.6 new lei.
ref: Pada Julai 2004, Romania telah menilai semula mata wangnya, leu, menjadi 10,000 leu lama akan bersamaan 1 leu baru, dengan 1 euro bersamaan lebih kurang 3.6 leu baru.

src: Dual pricing, in both the old leu and the new leu, has already been introduced from March 2005.
ref: Penentuan harga dual, di kedua-dua leu lama dan leu baru, telah diperkenalkan sejak Mac 2005.

src: The transition to the new leu is expected to stabilise the Romanian currency and prepare the country for euro adoption.
ref: Peralihan kepada leu baru dijangka akan menstabilkan matawang Romania dan menyediakan negara itu untuk penerimaan euro.

src: In Romania's case, the adoption will take place 5-7 years after accession in 2007.
ref: Di dalam kes Romania, penerimaan itu akan mengambil tempat 5-7 tahun selepas pertambahan pada 2007.

src: Mr Howard said that the APEC members had decided to make "An urgent request to all countries involved in the Doha process to renew their efforts to achieve an outcome, emphasizing that agriculture and industrial products are the two priority areas".
ref: Encik Howard berkata bahawa ahli-ahli APEC telah memutuskan untuk membuat "Satu permintaan segera kepada semua negara yang terlibat dalam proses Doha untuk memperbaharui usaha mereka untuk mencapai hasil, menekankan bahawa pertanian dan produk industri adalah dua bidang keutamaan."

src: The leaders wish for Doha to enter its final phase this year.
ref: Para pemimpin berharap Doha memasuki fasa akhir tahun ini.

src: Speaking to CNBC, the head of the World Trade Organisation, Pascal Lamy said that negotiations taking place in Geneva were making progress.
ref: Bercakap kepada CNBC, ketua Pertubuhan Perdagangan Dunia, Pascal Lamy berkata rundingan yang berlaku di Geneva sedang diteruskan.

src: It may take a few weeks, but my sense is that there is a lot of focus and energy," Mr Lamy said.
ref: Ia mungkin mengambil masa beberapa minggu, tetapi saya berasa bahawa terdapat banyak fokus dan tenaga," kata Encik Lamy.

src: In the area of health, the final declaration also promised to share influenza samples and provide equitable access to vaccines.
ref: Dalam bidang kesihatan, deklarasi terakhir juga berjanji untuk berkongsi sampel influenza dan menyediakan akses yang saksama kepada vaksin.

src: Security related issues were a commitment to rooting out terrorism and a recognition of the danger proliferation of weapons of mass destruction poses to the region.
ref: Isu-isu yang berkaitan keselamatan adalah komitmen untuk membanteras keganasan dan satu pengiktirafan kepada percambahan bahaya senjata pemusnah besar-besaran yang timbul di rantau ini.

src: Despite interest from India and Pakistan in joining the group, it was announced that additional members will be considered in 2010.
ref: Walaupun minat daripada India dan Pakistan untuk menyertai kumpulan, telah diumumkan bahawa ahli tambahan akan dipertimbangkan pada tahun 2010.

src: The final declaration also reaffirmed the Sydney Declaration on climate change, which had been agreed upon on Saturday.
ref: Deklarasi terakhir juga mengesahkan Deklarasi Sydney mengenai perubahan iklim, yang telah dipersetujui pada hari Sabtu.

src: The second tape was reportedly recorded from the same spot as the video that was released last week.
ref: Pita kedua yang dilaporkan direkod dari tempat yang sama seperti video yang telah ditayangkan minggu lepas.

src: Some reports suggest that the video will feature new images of bin Laden.
ref: Beberapa laporan mengatakankan bahawa video itu akan menampilkan imej baru bin Laden.

src: Bin Laden appeared for the first time in a video since 2004 when he released a video on September 7, 2007.
ref: Bin Laden muncul buat kali pertama dalam video sejak tahun 2004 apabila dia mengeluarkan video pada 7 September 2007.

src: The number one U.S. commander in Iraq said 30,000 United States troops may be able to leave Iraq by the summer of 2008.
ref: Komander A.S. pertama di Iraq berkata 30,000 angkatan tentera Amerika Syarikat mungkin akan dapat meninggalkan Iraq pada musim panas tahun 2008.

src: The top U.S. diplomat in Iraq, Ambassador Ryan Crocker, also joined General Petraeus in the presentation to Congress.
ref: Diplomat tertinggi A.S. di Iraq, Duta Ryan Crocker, juga menyertai Jeneral Petraeus dalam penyampaian kepada Kongres.

src: General Petraeus firstly said that the President's troop escalation in January met its objectives "in large measure."
ref: Jeneral Petraeus pertamanya mengatakan bahawa peningkatan jumlah angkatan tentera Presiden pada Januari mencapai matlamatnya "dalam ukuran yang besar."

src: Petraeus said, "I believe that we will be able to reduce our forces to the pre-surge level ... by next summer without jeopardizing the security gains we have fought so hard to achieve."
ref: Petraeus berkata, "Saya percaya bahawa mereka akan mampu mengurangkan tentera kita untuk tahap pra-gerakan...tanpa membahayakan keselamatan sebelum musim panas yang akan datang tanpa menjejaskan keuntungan keselamatan yang telah kita perjuangkan begitu keras untuk mencapainya."

src: However, Petraeus would not speak about troop withdrawals past the summer of 2008 until March, saying, "Our experience in Iraq has repeatedly shown that projecting too far into the future is not just difficult, it can be misleading and even hazardous."
ref: Walau bagaimnanapun, Petraeus tidak akan bercakap mengenai penarikan tentera selepas musim panas 2008 hingga Mac, berkata, "Pengalaman kami di Iraq berulang kali menunjukkan membuat perancangan panjang ke masa hadapan bukan hanya susah, ia juga mungkin akan membawa ke arah yang salah dan berbahaya."

src: The General recommends the government withdraw a Marine expeditionary team by the end of September 2007, and a brigade combat unit in December of 2007.
ref: Jeneral mencadangkan kerajaan untuk menarik pasukan ekspedisi Laut pada hujung bulan September 2007, dan pasukan briged tempur pada Disember 2007.

src: Petraeus also recommended, "reduction of eight further brigade teams and the battalion combats in 2008 until we reach the pre-surge levels of 15 brigade combat teams by mid-July 2008."
ref: Petraeus juga mencadangkan, "pengurangan lapan pasukan briged lain dan batalion perang pada 2008 sehingga kita mencapai tahap pra-gerakan 15 pasukan briged tempur pada tengah-Julai 2008."

src: "The level of security incidents has declined in eight of the past 12 weeks, with the level of incidents in the past two weeks the lowest since June of 2006," Petraeus testified.
ref: "Tahap kejadian keselamatan telah menurun dalam lapan daripada 12 minggu lepas, dengan tahap kejadian di dua minggunya ialah yang terendah sejak Jun 2006," terang Petraeus.

src: President Bush reportedly will use Petraeus and Crocker's recommendations as a base for his report to Congress.
ref: Presiden Bush melaporkan akan menggunakan cadangan Petraeus dan Crocker sebagai asas kepada laporannya kepada Kongres.

src: A senior administration official said it is "very likely" that President will speak in a prime-time address this week.
ref: Pegawai kanan pentadbiran berkata "berkemungkinan besar" Presiden akan bercakap dalam waktu perdana minggu ini.

src: Officials with the United States Department of Defense have stated that Israeli fighter planes struck at least one target inside Syria a week ago.
ref: Pegawai-pegawai beserta Jabatan Pertahanan Amerika Syarikat telah membuat kenyataan bahawa kapal terbang pejuang Israel menyerang sekurang-kurangnya satu sasaran didalam Syria seminggu yang lalu.

src: The actual target, or the extent of the damage has yet to be determined, but U.S. officials say a weapons storage facility was the likely target.
ref: Sasaran sebenar, atau tahap kerosakannya masih belum ditentukan, tetapi pegawai U.S. mengatakan sebuah gudang simpanan senjata adalah kemungkinan besar sasaran.

src: The Israeli government believes that Iran is sending weapons through Syria to Lebanon to arm the militant group Hezbollah.
ref: Kerajaan Israel percaya bahawa Iran menghantar senjata melalui Syria dan Lebanon untuk melengkapkan kumpulan militan Hezbollah.

src: Israel also thinks that those weapons are coming from North Korea.
ref: Israel juga berpendapat bahawa senjata datang daripada Korea Utara.

src: "They were engaged by the Syrians, they dropped their ordinance and scooted out of there."
ref: "Mereka menggunakan khidmat orang Syria, mereka menggugurkan ordinan mereka dan beredar pantas daripada situ".

src: "The Israelis think North Korea is selling to Iran and Syria what little they have left," said an unnamed Defense Department official who also said that Israeli planes are taking photographs of possible targets and nuclear power facilities inside Syria.
ref: "Pihak Israel berpendapat Korea Utara menjual kepada Iran dan Syria saki baki mereka," kata seorang pegawai tanpa nama Jabatan Pertahanan yang turut mengatakan kapal terbang Israel mengambil gambar sasaran yang sesuai dan kemudahan kuasa nuklear didalam Syria.

src: "We are exerting efforts so that we don't fall into this trap," said Bashar Jaafari, Syria's Ambassador to the United Nations.
ref: "Kami mengenakan usaha supaya kami tidak jatuh kedalam perangkap ini," kata Bashar Jaafari, duta Syria ke Persatuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu.

src: Zimbabwe have defeated Australia by five wickets in Group B of the 2007 Twenty20 World Championship at Newlands Cricket Ground, Cape Town, South Africa.
ref: Zimbabwe telah mengalahkan Australia dengan lima wicket dalam Kumpulan B Kejohanan Dunia Twenty20 2007 di Padang Kriket Newlands, Cape Town, Afrika Selatan.

src: Australia, who are the world champions in the 50 over format, struggled against some good fielding and bowling from Zimbabwe.
ref: Australia, yang merupakan juara dunia dalam format 50 over, berjuang terhadap beberapa pemadang dan bowling daripada Zimbabwe.

src: Elton Chigumbura took 3-20 and Gary Brent took 2-19 as Australia were restricted to 138 for 9 wickets after 20 overs.
ref: Elton Chigumbura mengambil 3-20 dan Gary Brent mengambil 2-19 sementara Australia terhad kepada 138 untuk 9 wickets selepas 20 overs.

src: Mahela Jayawardene scored 65 runs before falling lbw to Jimmy Kamande, who took 3-48, bowling Kumar Sangakkara for 30 and Tillakaratne Dilshan for just three runs.
ref: Mahela Jayawaredene mencapai 65 larian sebelum jatuh lbw kepada Jimmy Kamande, yang mengambil 3-48, bowl Kumat Sangakkara kepada 30 dan Tillakaratne Dilshan untuk hanya tiga larian.

src: Jehan Mubarak smashed 46 off 13 balls as Sri Lanka set a formidable target for Kenya.
ref: Jehan Mubarak memukul 46 dari 13 bola apabila Sri Lanka menetapkan target menggerunkan untuk Kenya.

src: Chaminda Vaas immediately made a breakthrough, dismissing opening batsman Maurice Ouma for a duck.
ref: Chaminda Vaas dengan segera membuat pelepasan, menolak pemukul pembuka Maurice Ouma untuk duck.

src: Kenya never recovered, and were reduced to just 88 runs in the 20th over as Sri Lanka dismissed their batsmen cheaply.
ref: Kenya tidak pernah pulih, dan dikurangkan kepada hanya 88 larian diatas 20 apabila Sri Lanka menolak pemukul mereka dengan mudah.

src: The win, by 172 runs, is the largest margin of victory in a Twenty20 international.
ref: Kemenangan, dengan 172 larian, dalam jidar kemenangan terbesar dalam Twenty20 antarabangsa.

src: On Friday morning, Finland scrambled an F-18 Hornet fighter jet to intercept a Russian Ilyushin Il-76 strategic airlifter, which had violated Finnish airspace.
ref: Pada pagi Jumaat, Finland menghancurkan sebuah jet pejuang F-18 Hornet untuk memintas sebuah airlifter strategik Ilyushin Il-76 Rusia, yang telah menceroboh ruang udara Finland.

src: The aircraft ventured about 4.5 kilometers (3 miles) into Finland's airspace near Porvoo over a period of three minutes, according to Finland's defense ministry.
ref: Pesawat tersebut menceroboh kira-kira 4.5 kilometer (3 batu) ke dalam ruang udara Finland berhampiran Porvoo dalam tempoh tiga minit, menurut Kementerian Pertahanan Finland.

src: Prime Minister Matti Vanhanen has stated that Finland would like an explanation from Russia regarding the reasons for its actions, but he has not made an official protest against Russia.
ref: Perdana Menteri Matti Vanhanen telah menyatakan bahawa Finland inginkan penjelasan dari Rusia berkenaan sebab-sebab tindakannya, tetapi beliau tidak membuat bantahan rasmi terhadap Rusia.

src: These kinds of (violations) must not happen, that's our clear message here, Vanhanen said.
ref: (Pencerobohan) seperti ini tidak boleh berlaku, itu mesej kami yang jelas di sini, kata Vanhanen.

src: And when they do happen, then they need to be sorted out between the countries in question.
ref: Dan apabila ia berlaku, maka ia perlu diselesaikan antara negara-negara berkenaan.

src: Vanhanen also stated that he felt it was important the incident was thoroughly investigated because of safety implications incurred if aircraft stray from their designated flight paths.
ref: Vanhanen juga menyatakan bahawa beliau merasakan adalah penting, kejadian itu disiasat dengan teliti kerana implikasi keselamatan yang ditanggung jika pesawat sesat dari laluan penerbangan mereka yang ditetapkan.

src: Russia apologised to Finland last year following a large number of similar incidents over the space of two years, but only after Finland had protested.
ref: Rusia memohon maaf kepada Finland tahun lalu berikutan sebilangan besar insiden yang sama dalam tempoh masa dua tahun, tetapi hanya selepas Finland membantah.

src: Russia regularly uses the area to fly missions, mostly with strategic airlifters, between Kaliningrad, capital of Kaliningrad Oblast and located between Poland and Lithuania, and St Petersberg in Russia.
ref: Rusia kerap menggunakan kawasan itu untuk misi terbang, kebanyakannya menggunakan airlifters strategik, antara Kaliningrad, ibu negeri Kaliningrad Oblast dan terletak di antara Poland dan Lithuania, dan St Petersberg di Rusia.

src: The most serious such incident involved the October 2005 crash of a Russian jet fighter in Lithuania.
ref: Insiden seperti itu yang paling serius melibatkan kemalangan jet pejuang Rusia di Lithuania Oktober 2005.

src: An aircraft dating back to the Second World War has crashed at Shoreham Airshow in West Sussex, United Kingdom whilst participating in a mock dogfight, killing the pilot.
ref: Sebuah pesawat sejak Perang Dunia Kedua telah terhempas di Shoreham Pertunjukan Udara di West Sussex, United Kingdom ketika mengambil bahagian dalam pertempuran olok-olok, membunuh juruterbang.

src: Witness Tim Deakin described the chain of events to BBC News 24: "The main point of the show was a Second World War dogfight between some Messerschmitts and some Spitfires.
ref: Saksi Tim Deakin menyifatkan rantaian peristiwa untuk BBC News 24: "Perkara utama persembahan itu merupakan dogfight Perang Dunia Kedua antara beberapa Messerschmitts dan beberapa Spitfires.

src: Midway through the dogfight one of the planes, I'm not sure which one, literally, turned quite steeply, went into almost a straight dive and ploughed into a hill probably about a mile from the airfield.
ref: Pertengahan pertempuran salah satu daripada kapal terbang, saya tidak pasti yang mana satu, secara literal, bertukar agak curam, masuk ke dalam hampir menyelam lurus dan dibajak ke dalam bukit mungkin kira-kira satu batu dari lapangan terbang.

src: There's still quite a bit of confusion about which aircraft it was."
ref: Masih ada sedikit kekeliruan tentang mana pesawat itu".

src: Authorities could not confirm any injuries or fatalities, but the missing man formation was performed in a flyby shortly after the crash.
ref: Pihak berkuasa tidak dapat mengesahkan apa-apa kecederaan atau kematian, tetapi pembentukan manusia yang hilang itu telah dilakukan di penerbangan lalu tidak lama selepas kemalangan itu.

src: The show is thought to have been attended by about 20,000 people, and was delayed by about 30 minutes after the crash.
ref: Rancangan ini dianggap telah dihadiri kira-kira 20,000 orang, dan telah lewat kira-kira 30 minit selepas kemalangan itu.

src: However, eventually a tannoy (PA) announcement stated that the pilot "would have wanted them to carry on", and the show continued.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, akhirnya tannoy (PA) pengumum menyatakan bahawa juruterbang "mahu mereka teruskan," dan persembahan diteruskan.

src: Officials have requested for anyone filming the airshow at the time to come forward in the hope that the footage will assist in investigating the cause of the crash.
ref: Pegawai telah diminta untuk sesiapa sahaja yang merakam penggambaran pertunjukan udara pada masa yang tampil ke hadapan dengan harapan bahawa rakaman itu akan membantu dalam menyiasat punca kemalangan itu.

src: They allege not only low wages but also severe abuses on FMC's part.
ref: Mereka mendakwa bukan sahaja kerana gaji yang rendah tetapi juga penderaan teruk oleh pihak FMC itu.

src: It is owned by Fresenius Medical Care (FMC), which is an international corporation with its headquarters in Germany.
ref: Ia dimiliki oleh Jagaan Perubatan Fresenius (FMC), yang merupakan sebuah syarikat antarabangsa yang beribu pejabat di Jerman.

src: Although the Federal Constitutional Court of Germany decided in February 2006 that shooting down a hijacked plane would only be lawful if there were no innocent passengers on the plane, Jung announced in public that he would give the order to attack if the basic principles of the constitution were in danger or if the plane posed a tremendous threat to the people.
ref: Walaupun Mahkamah Perlembagaan Persekutuan Jerman memutuskan pada Februari 2006 bahawa menembak jatuh kapal terbang yang dirampas hanya akan dibolehkan jika tiada penumpang-penumpang yang tidak bersalah di dalam pesawat, Jung mengumumkan di khalayak awam bahawa beliau akan memberi perintah untuk menyerang jika prinsip-prinsip asas perlembagaan berada dalam bahaya atau jika pesawat itu merupakan satu ancaman besar kepada rakyat.

src: Representatives of the grand coalition differed in their views regarding this question.
ref: Wakil-wakil dari kerajaan campuran itu berbeza dalam pandangan mereka mengenai persoalan ini.

src: The opposition in parliament even called Jung an "enemy of the constitution" and called for him to resign.
ref: Sehinggakan pembangkang di Parlimen memanggil Jung "musuh perlembagaan" dan menggesa beliau meletakkan jawatan.

src: The dispute between the two coalition partners concerning new laws to ensure the security of Germany remains unresolved.
ref: Pertikaian di antara kedua-dua ahli kerajaan campuran mengenai undang-undang baru untuk memastikan keselamatan Jerman masih tidak dapat diselesaikan.

src: In the United States and other European countries such as France, Great Britain or the Czech Republic laws were passed which give the government permission to shoot down a passenger plane under the control of terrorists.
ref: Undang-undang di Amerika Syarikat dan negara-negara Eropah yang lain seperti Perancis, Great Britain atau Republik Czech telah meluluskan yang mana memberi kebenaran kerajaan untuk menembak jatuh pesawat penumpang di bawah kawalan pengganas.

src: Israeli radio noted that this is the third Palestinian child in the past two months caught attempting to transfer explosives past Israeli checkpoints.
ref: Radio Israel berkata bahawa ini ialah kanak-kanak ketiga Palestin dalam masa dua bulan yang ditangkap kerana cubaan memindahkan bahan letupan ke pusat pemeriksaan Israel.

src: Scotland defeated Romania 42-0 in Pool C of the 2007 Rugby World Cup at Murrayfield, Edinburgh.
ref: Scotland mengalahkan Romania 42-0 dalam Pool C di Kejuaraan Ragbi Dunia 2007 di Murrayfield, Edinburgh.

src: Chris Paterson opened the scoring for Scotland in the second minute when he scored and converted a try.
ref: Chris Paterson membuka jaringan untuk Scotland di minit kedua apabila beliau mendapat mata dan mematahkan serangan.

src: Romania, who rarely looked like scoring, missed a chance to score a few minutes later when Ionut Dimofte missed a penalty.
ref: Romania, yang jarang dilihat mendapat mata, kehilangan peluang untuk menambah mata di beberapa minit kemudian apabila Ionut Dimofte gagal menyempurnakan penalti.

src: Allister Hogg and Rory Lamont added a try each during the first half to extend Scotland's lead to 21-0 at the interval.
ref: Allister Hogg dan Rory Lamont menambah mata di separuh masa pertama bagi melanjutkan penguasaan Scotland kepada 21-0 di antara waktu senggang.

src: Rory Lamont scored his second try towards the end of the match, and Scotland comfortably won without conceding a point.
ref: Rory Lamont menambah mata di serangan keduanya di akhir perlawanan, dan Scotland menang selesa tanpa menyerah sebarang mata.

src: Scotland have won both games played and are second in Pool C with ten points, behind New Zealand on points difference.
ref: Scotland memenangi kedua-dua perlawanan yang ditandingi dan berada di tangga kedua dalam Pool C dengan sepuluh mata, di belakang New Zealand dengan beza mata.

src: Romania have lost both their games and are fourth in the group with one point, behind Italy with four and Portugal with none.
ref: Romania kalah dalam kedua-dua perlawanan mereka dan berada di tangga ke-empat dalam kumpulan dengan satu mata, berada di belakang Itali dengan empat mata dan Portugal tanpa sebarang mata.

src: Andrea Masi opened the scoring in the fourth minute with a try for Italy.
ref: Andrea Masi telah membuka jaringan pada minit keempat dengan percubaan untuk Itali.

src: Portugal never gave up and David Penalva scored a try in the 33rd minute, providing their only points of the match.
ref: Portugal tidak pernah mengaku kalah dan David Penalva berjaya menjaringkan gol pada minit ke 33, memberikan mereka satu-satunya mata untuk perlawanan tersebut.

src: Italy led 16-5 at half time but were matched by Portugal for much of the second half.
ref: Itali mendahului 16-5 pada separuh masa tetapi disepadankan oleh Portugal pada separuh masa kedua.

src: However Bortolussi scored his fourth penalty of the match, followed by tries from Mauro Bergamasco and a second from Andrea Masi to wrap up the win for Italy.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun Bortolussi menjaringkan penalti keempatnya untuk perlawanan tersebut, diikuti dengan percubaan dari Mauro Bergamasco dan kemudiannya dari Andrea Masi untuk menutupi dengan kemenangan bagi Itali.

src: New Zealand lead the group with ten points, ahead of Scotland on points difference.
ref: New Zealand mendahului kumpulan itu dengan sepuluh mata, didepan Scotland dengan beza mata.

src: He hoped those disadvantaged people such as handicapped, cancer patients, deaf people can participate sports equally with common people, and also recommended some low-cost sports like long-distance running, walking, and bicycle riding, and hoped people in Taiwan will support "Taiwan Citizen Walking Day" at November 11, 2007.
ref: Beliau berharap orang-orang yang kurang bernasib baik seperti cacat, pesakit kanser, orang pekak boleh menyertai sukan seperti orang lain, dan juga mencadangkan beberapa sukan kos rendah seperti berjalan jarak jauh, berjalan, dan menunggang basikal, dan berharap rakyat di Taiwan akan menyokong "Hari Berjalan Rakyat Taiwan" pada November 11, 2007.

src: After the speech by Tsai, he presented a symbolized flag to a delegate named Tsia-tse Kuo and hoped this trip will succeed.
ref: Selepas ucapan itu oleh Tsai, beliau menyampaikan bendera lambang kepada seorang wakil bernama Tsia-tse Kuo dan berharap lawatan ini akan berjaya.

src: Some analysts say that the Federal Reserve's September 18th dramatic rate cut to 4.75% from 5.25% may be a case of "too little, too late", or that it was excessive and dooms the dollar.
ref: Beberapa penganalisis mengatakan bahawa kadar dramatik Rizab Persekutuan pada 18 September dipotong kepada 4.75% daripada 5.25% boleh menjadi kes "terlalu sedikit, terlalu lewat," atau bahawa ia adalah berlebihan dan satu malapetaka buat dolar.

src: According to Ambrose Evans-Pritchard, International Business Editor for The Daily Telegraph, "it's a signal that the oil-rich Gulf kingdom is preparing to break the dollar currency peg in a move that risks setting off a stampede out of the dollar across the Middle East."
ref: Menurut Ambrose Evans-Pritchard, Editor Perniagaan Antarabangsa The Daily Telegraph, "ia adalah satu isyarat bahawa Teluk kerajaan yang kaya dengan minyak itu sedang bersedia untuk memecahkan tambatan mata wang dolar dalam usaha yang berisiko berangkat rempuhan daripada dolar di seluruh Tengah Timur."

src: Hans Redeker, the Currency Chief at BNP Paribas, also stated today that Saudi Arabia's move to not adjust their own interest rates in sync with the Fed's cuts is a very dangerous situation for the US dollar.
ref: Hans Redeker, ketua mata wang di BNP Paribas, juga menyatakan hari ini bahawa langkah Arab Saudi untuk tidak menyesuaikan kadar faedah mereka sendiri selari dengan potongan Fed adalah satu keadaan yang sangat bahaya kepada dolar Amerika Syarikat.

src: Redeker points out that "Saudi Arabia has $800bn (£400bn) in their future generation fund, and the entire region has $3,500bn under management.
ref: Redeker menunjukkan bahawa "Arab Saudi mempunyai $800bn (£400bn) dalam dana generasi masa depan mereka, dan seluruh rantau ini mempunyai $3,500bn dibawah pengurusan.

src: They face an inflationary threat and do not want to import an interest rate policy set for the recessionary conditions in the United States."
ref: Mereka menghadapi ancaman inflasi dan tidak mahu mengimport dasar kadar faedah yang ditetapkan untuk keadaan kemelesetan di Amerika Syarikat."

src: The Federal Reserve's half-point rate cut has already caused a plunge in the world dollar index to a fifteen-year low, reaching the weakest level ever against the Euro at just under $1.40.
ref: Kadar separuh titik potong Rizab Persekutuan telah menyebabkan keturunan dalam indeks dolar dunia untuk lima belas tahun rendah, mencapai tahap yang paling lemah dalam pertarungan dengan Euro pada hanya di bawah $ 1.40.

src: Jim Rogers, the economic commentator and former partner of George Soros, stated, "If Ben Bernanke starts running those printing presses even faster than he's already doing, we are going to have a serious recession.
ref: Jim Rogers, pengulas dan bekas rakan kongsi George Soros ekonomi, menyatakan, "Jika Ben Bernanke menjadi semakin mereka menekan mencetak lebih cepat daripada dia sudah lakukan, kita akan mempunyai kemelesetan serius.

src: According to public sources, the Chinese government has begun a concerted campaign of economic threats against the United States, hinting that it may liquidate its vast holding of US treasuries if Washington imposes trade sanctions that seek to force a Yuan revaluation.
ref: Menurut sumber-sumber awam, kerajaan China telah mula kempen bersepadu daripada ancaman ekonomi terhadap Amerika Syarikat, membayangkan bahawa ia boleh mencairkan pegangan luas perbendaharaan Amerika Syarikat jika Washington mengenakan sekatan perdagangan yang bertujuan untuk memaksa penilaian semula Yuan.

src: Charges were filed following an accident in which police allege Spears smashed her car into another vehicle in a parking area in August of 2007.
ref: Pertuduhan difailkan berikutan kemalangan di mana polis mendakwa Spears melanggar sebuah kenderaan lain dalam kawasan letak kereta pada Ogos 2007.

src: She could face a maximum of six months in jail and US$2,000 in fines if convicted.
ref: Dia boleh menghadapi maksimum enam bulan penjara dan denda AS$2,000 jika sabit kesalahan.

src: Kim Robard-Rifkin was the owner of the other car and she filed a police report three days after the accident.
ref: Kim Robard-Rifkin adalah pemilik kereta tersebut dan dia telah membuat laporan polis tiga hari selepas kemalangan itu.

src: The 59-year-old nurse found out that it was Spears who ran into her car after watching a video on a celebrity website.
ref: Jururawat berusia 59 tahun itu mendapati bahawa adalah Spears yang berlari ke keretanya selepas menonton video di sebuah laman web selebriti.

src: Robard-Rifkin said, "I simply want my car fixed, the same as I would fix somebody's car if I had done that."
ref: Robard-Rifkin berkata, "Saya hanya mahu kereta saya dibaiki, sama seperti yang akan saya lakukan sekiranya saya melanggar kereta seseorang."

src: The Catalan club expects that this redesign will turn the stadium into a city landmark and that "the external image of the stadium will become a recognized brand for FCB."
ref: Kelab Catalan menjangkakan perekaan semula bentuk akan menjadikan stadium itu sebagai mercu tanda bandar dan "imej luaran stadium itu akan menjadi jenama yang dikenali bagi FCB."

src: This reptile-like cover of tiles and lights will allow the stadium to transform itself according to the time of day and the events taking place.
ref: Jubin penutup seperti reptilia dan lampu-lampu akan membolehkan stadium itu diubah mengikut masa dan acara yang yang dijalankan.

src: According to the Club, "the remodelled stadium is designed such that it can be built with minimal disruption to FCB normal football activity."
ref: Mengikut kepada Kelab, "pengubahsuaian stadium itu direka sebegitu supaya ia dapat dibina dengan gannguan yang minimum kepada aktiviti normal FCB."

src: He is not only a researcher; he had great success with the popular book The Music of the Primes.
ref: Beliau bukan sahaja pengkaji; beliau mencapai kejayaan hebat dengan buku terkenal The Music of Primes.

src: His last book Finding Moonshine will be published in English in February 2008.
ref: Buku terakhirnya Finding Moonshine akan diterbitkan dalam bahasa Inggeris pada February 2008.

src: It has already been published in Italian with the title Il disordine perfetto ("The perfect disorder").
ref: Ia telah diterbitkan dalam bahasa Itali dengan tajuknya Il disordine perfetto ("Keserabutan yang sempurna").

src: In September 2007 he was in Levico Terme (Trento, Italy) for a conference.
ref: Pada September 2007 beliau berada di Levico Terme (Trento, Itali) untuk persidangan.

src: Martin Hyde is running for the Green Party of Ontario in the Ontario provincial election, in the Ottawa West-Nepean riding.
ref: Martin Hyde akan bertanding untuk Parti Green dari Ontorio untuk pilihanraya wilayah Ontario, dalam riding Ottawa West-Nepean.

src: Note that he did not answer the question "Of the decisions made by Ontario's 38th Legislative Assembly, which was the most beneficial to your electoral district?"
ref: Ambil perhatian yang dia tidak menjawab soalan "Dari keputusan yang diambil oleh Dewan Undangan Ontario ke 38, yang manakah paling bermanfaat kepada daerah pilihanraya anda"?

src: "Which was least beneficial, or even harmful, to this riding?"
ref: "Yang manakah paling kurang bermanfaat, atau bahkan berbahaya, kepada riding ini"?

src: Due to greater consumer demand, British Airways announced yesterday that it would run a further three flights weekly on the route from Bucharest (Henri Coandă International) to London (Gatwick).
ref: Hasil dari kehendak penguna yang banyak, Penerbangan British telah mengumumkan semalam yang ia akan menjalankan tiga lagi penerbangan mingguan bagi laluan dari Bucharest (Henri Coanda Antarabangsa) ke London (Gatwick).

src: The extra flights will mean that British Airways will now fly from Bucharest to London, and back, ten times a week.
ref: Penerbangan tambahan ini bermaksud Penerbangan British kini akan terbang dari Bucharest ke London, dan kembali, sepuluh kali seminggu.

src: The fifteen year old Andrey Scherbakov spent two hours in the wheel well of the airplane at extreme temperature of −50° centigrade.
ref: Andrey Scherbakov yang berusia lima belas tahun menghabiskan masa selama dua jam di dalam tempat simpanan roda pesawat itu pada suhu melampau -50º celsius.

src: The rear wheels do not go all the way into the plane; the wheel merely retracts into an opening and remains exposed.
ref: Roda belakang tidak masuk sepenuhnya ke dalam pesawat; roda itu hanya menarik balik ke dalam bukaan dan masih terdedah.

src: The boy was delivered to the hospital by the airport staff and is said to be in a critical condition.
ref: Budak lelaki itu dihantar ke hospital oleh kakitangan lapangan terbang dan dikatakan berada dalam keadaan kritikal.

src: However, according to the medical staff at the hospital, it is nothing short of a miracle that the boy survived the ordeal.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, menurut kakitangan perubatan di hospital, ia adalah satu keajaiban bahawa budak lelaki itu terselamat daripada pengalaman pahit itu.

src: The Boeing 737 has a cruising speed of 900 kilometres per hour and was flying constantly at an altitude of 10,000 metres for two hours.
ref: Pesawat Boeing 737 mempunyai kelajuan pelayaran 900 kilometres sejam dan terbang secara konsisten pada ketinggian 10,000 metres selama dua jam.

src: Doctors in Ural city would have to remove his fingertips, which contracted gangrene after they had frozen, but they were committed to do everything within their power to stop it from spreading.
ref: Doktor di bandar Ural perlu membuang hujung jarinya, yang mendapat gangren selepas ia membeku, tetapi mereka komited untuk melakukan segala-galanya dalam keupayaan mereka untuk menghentikannya daripada merebak.

src: When Scherbakov finally came to his senses, he told the police that he had run away from his family so as to escape his alcoholic father.
ref: Apabila Scherbakov boleh berfikir secara waras, dia memberitahu polis bahawa dia telah melarikan diri dari keluarganya untuk melepaskan diri daripada bapanya yang merupakan kaki botol.

src: He said that he was wandering around the territory of the airport and noticed a hole in the fence.
ref: Katanya, dia telah merayau di sekitar kawasan lapangan terbang dan perasan lubang di pagar.

src: It is curious how the inspection staff and the technicians found nothing on their inspection of the aircraft just before the flight.
ref: Amat menghairankan bagaimana kakitangan pemeriksaan dan juruteknik tidak menjumpai apa-apa dalam pemeriksaan pesawat mereka sebelum penerbangan.

src: The boy claims that he fainted soon after and came around only when the plane had landed in Moscow after traveling hundreds of kilometres from Perm.
ref: Budak lelaki itu berkata bahawa dia pengsan tidak lama selepas itu dan sedar hanya apabila pesawat itu mendarat di Moscow selepas perjalanan beratus-ratus kilometer dari Perm.

src: Stowaways in wheel wells risk freezing to death after take-off or being crushed when the wheels retract.
ref: Penumpang gelap dalam tempat simpanan roda menanggung risiko mati kerana membeku selepas berlepas atau dihancurkan apabila roda menarik balik.

src: This year, a body was found in the wheel well of a jet in San Francisco after a flight from Shanghai and another body was found in Atlanta after a flight from Dakar, Senegal.
ref: Tahun ini, satu mayat ditemui dalam tempat simpanan roda jet di San Francisco selepas penerbangan dari Shanghai dan satu lagi mayat ditemui di Atlanta selepas penerbangan dari Dakar, Senegal.

src: At least 11 new species of life have been discovered in the rainforests of Thua Thien-Hue Province in Vietnam in a region of the forest described as the "Green Corridor."
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 11 spesies kehidupan baru telah ditemui di hutan hujan Wilayah Thua Thien-Hue di Vietnam di sebuah kawasan yang mempunyai hutan yang digambarkan sebagai "Koridor Hijau".

src: The discovery was made by researchers from the World Wide Fund for Nature (WWF).
ref: Penemuan itu dibuat oleh penyelidik daripada Kumpulan Dana Sedunia untuk Alam Semula Jadi (WWF).

src: Among the new species are five orchids and at least three other species of plants, two butterflies and a snake.
ref: Antara spesies baru ialah lima orkid dan sekurang-kurangnya tiga spesies lain tumbuh-tumbuhan, dua rama-rama dan seekor ular.

src: At least ten more species of plants are believed to be new species but are still being studied.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya lebih sepuluh spesies tumbuhan dipercayai spesies baru tetapi masih dalam kajian.

src: "You only discover so many new species in very special places, and the Green Corridor is one of them."
ref: "Anda hanya menemui banyak spesies baru di tempat-tempat yang sangat istimewa, dan Koridor Hijau adalah salah satu daripadanya".

src: The new species of butterflies are one subfamily of the Satyrinae species and the other a species of the Skipper butterfly.
ref: Spesies baru rama-rama adalah salah satu subfamili daripada spesies Satyrinae dan spesies lain daripada rama-rama Skipper.

src: The other two new plant species are of Arum and Aspidistra.
ref: Dua spesies baru tumbuhan adalah daripada Arum dan Aspidistra.

src: "The area is extremely important for conservation and the province wants to protect the forests and their environmental services, as well as contribute to sustainable development," said Provincial Forest Protection Department Director for the province, Hoang Ngoc Khanh.
ref: "Kawasan ini adalah sangat penting untuk pemuliharaan dan wilayah ini mahu melindungi hutan dan alam sekitar mereka, serta menyumbang kepada pembangunan mampan," kata Pengarah Jabatan Daerah Perlindungan Hutan bagi wilayah itu, Hoang Ngoc Khanh.

src: The species were found in the rainforest in 2005 and 2006.
ref: Spesies itu ditemui di hutan hujan pada tahun 2005 dan 2006.

src: According to a report released by the South African Broadcasting Corporation (SABC), a warrant has been issued by the South African National Prosecuting Authority (NPA), which operates separately from the police, for the arrest of Jackie Selebi national commissioner of the South African police and president of Interpol.
ref: Menurut laporan yang dikeluarkan oleh Perbadanan Penyiaran Afrika Selatan (PPAS), waran telah dikeluarkan oleh Pihak Berkuasa Pendakwaraya Kebangsaan Afrika Selatan (PBPKAS), yang beroperasi secara berasingan daripada pihak polis, bagi penangkapan Jackie Selebi pesuruhjaya kebangsaan polis Afrika Selatan dan presiden Interpol.

src: Agliotti was later arrested in connection with the murder of Brett Kebble.
ref: Agliotti kemudiannya ditahan yang dikaitan dengan pembunuhan Brett Kebble.

src: Agliotti is alleged to have strong links with organized crime and racketeering.
ref: Agliotti didakwa mempunyai hubungan yang kukuh dengan jenayah terancang dan penipuan.

src: A Washington, D.C. student of Georgetown University has been arrested on suspicion of a hate crime, in which he allegedly beat up another man because the victim was gay.
ref: Seorang pelajar Universiti Georgetown di Washington, D.C. telah ditangkap kerana disyaki atas jenayah kebencian, di mana dia didakwa telah memukul seorang lelaki lain kerana mangsa tersebut adalah seorang homoseksual.

src: News reports confirm that the victim - who also goes to the same school - recognized the alleged assailant, because of his profile and photos on Facebook.
ref: Laporan berita mengesahkan bahawa mangsa - yang turut pergi ke sekolah yang sama - mengenali penyerangnya, kerana profil dan gambar beliau di Facebook.

src: The victim was allegedly attacked by a group of males yelling homophobic slurs.
ref: Mangsa dikatakan diserang sekumpulan lelaki yang menjerit celaan yang berunsur homofobik.

src: "He made it a point to etch the suspect's face in his mind and remember him," Police Lt. Alberto Jova said.
ref: "Sampai pada satu ketika, dia mengukir wajah susupek ke dalam mindanya dan mengingatinya," kata polis Lt. Alberto Jova.

src: Cooney could not be reached for comment, and will be arraigned in D.C. A friend of the alleged assailant was shocked at the allegations and said he is "one of the nicest and most gentle people that we know at this school."
ref: Cooney tidak dapat dihubungi untuk mendapatkan komen, dan akan dihadapkan di D.C. Seorang rakan penyerang yang didakwa itu terkejut dengan dakwaan itu dan berkata dia adalah "salah seorang yang paling baik dan paling bersikap lembut yang kami kenal di sekolah ini".

src: The attack is considered unrelated to two other hate crimes which occurred this month in the Northwest quadrant of the city.
ref: Serangan itu dianggap tidak mempunyai kaitan dengan dua jenayah kebencian yang lain yang berlaku pada bulan ini di kuadran Barat Laut bandar.

src: Vodafone McLaren Mercedes driver Lewis Hamilton starting from pole wins the FIA Formula-1 2007 Japanese Grand Prix at the Fuji Speedway, Oyama, Japan.
ref: Pemandu Vodafone McLaren Mercedes Lewis Hamilton bermula dari petak pertama menang FIA Formula-1 2007 Grand Prix Jepun di Fuji Speedway, Oyama, Jepun.

src: A rainy and foggy weekend at Fuji appeared to be very hard for all drivers as the race ran longer then expected and the drivers have to concentrate more due to severe weather conditions.
ref: Hujung minggu yang hujan dan berkabus di Fuji kelihatan amat sukar bagi semua pemandu apabila perlumbaan lebih lama dari yang dijangka dan pemandu perlu menumpukan perhatian lebih disebabkan oleh keadaan cuaca yang teruk.

src: The race started behind the safety car which stayed on a track for an unusually long time, about 40 minutes.
ref: Perlumbaan bermula di belakang kereta keselamatan yang kekal di trek untuk masa panjang yang diluar kebiasaan, kira-kira 40 minit.

src: Both Ferrari drivers, who managed to get the second row on the starting grid in the Saturday qualifying session were out of the game on the first laps due to their tyre selection mistake - drivers were forced to change to extreme wet tyres after a few driving errors.
ref: Kedua-dua pemandu Ferrari, yang berjaya mendapat barisan kedua di petak permulaan dalam sesi kelayakan pada hari Sabtu keluar dari perlumbaan pada pusingan pertama kerana kesilapan memilh tayar- pemandu terpaksa menukar kepada tayar ekstrim yang basah selepas beberapa kesilapan memandu.

src: Alonso would be eliminated after 41 laps in a driving accident.
ref: Alonso akan disingkirkan selepas 41 pusingan dalam kemalangan memandu.

src: Robert Kubica got a drive through the pit-lane penalty after some dangerous driving and a collision with Hamilton, causing the Polish driver to be rolled back to 7th place.
ref: Robert Kubica dapat memandu melalui penalti lorong pit selepas beberapa memandu secara berbahaya dan perlanggaran dengan Hamilton, menyebabkan pemandu Poland itu akan ditempatkan semula ke tempat ke-7.

src: Felipe Massa took 6th place for Ferrari in his hard battle with Kubica in the sprint to the finish line.
ref: Felipe Massa mengambil tempat ke-6 untuk Ferrari dalam pertempuran sengit beliau dengan Kubica dalam acara pecut ke garisan penamat.

src: Adrian Sutil did his best for Spyker, finishing ahead of both Hondas.
ref: Adrian Sutil melakukan yang terbaik untuk Spyker, menamatkan perlumbaan di hadapan kedua-dua Honda.

src: Quarterback Brett Favre of the Green Bay Packers broke Dan Marino's record for career touchdown passes on Sunday, throwing number 421 to receiver Greg Jennings with 4:56 left in the first quarter.
ref: Quarterback Brett Favre daripada Green Bay Packers memecahkan rekod Dan Marino untuk hantaran pendaratan pada Ahad, membuang nombor 421 kepada penerima Greg Jennings dengan 4:56 kiri dalam suku pertama.

src: The recordbreaking pass was a 16-yard slant route, and Favre had to throw a bullet to complete it.
ref: Hantaran pemecah rekod itu adalah laluan condong 16 ela, dan Favre terpaksa membuang peluru untuk menyiapkannya.

src: Though the game was being played at the Metrodome, even the Minnesota Vikings fans stood and applauded as Favre celebrated with his teammates.
ref: Walaupun permainan itu sedang bermain di Metrodome, walaupun Minnesota Vikings peminat berdiri dan bertepuk tangan sebagai Favre disambut dengan rakan sepasukan.

src: "I'd like to take a minute to congratulate you on breaking one of the great records in sports."
ref: "Saya ingin mengambil sedikit masa untuk mengucapkan tahniah kepada anda untuk memecahkan satu rekod dalam sukan."

src: "I loved holding the touchdown record for the past 13 years, but if someone was going to break it, I'm glad it was someone like you, who has always competed at the highest level and always played only to win," said Marino.
ref: "Saya suka memegang rekod pendaratan untuk 13 tahun yang lalu, tetapi jika seseorang itu akan patah, saya gembira ia adalah orang seperti anda, yang sentiasa bersaing di peringkat tertinggi dan sentiasa dimainkan hanya untuk menang," kata Marino.

src: "Over the past 17 years, you've been a credit to the Packers, and to the National Football League and to the sport that we all love so much."
ref: "Sejak 17 tahun yang lalu, anda telah menjadi pujian kepada Packers, dan untuk Liga Bola Sepak Kebangsaan dan sukan yang kita semua suka begitu banyak."

src: This historic event came just two weeks after Favre broke John Elway's record for career wins by a quarterback, defeating the New York Giants for win number 149.
ref: Peristiwa bersejarah datang hanya dua minggu selepas Favre memecahkan rekod John Elway untuk kerjaya menang dengan quarterback, mengalahkan New York Giants untuk menang nombor 149.

src: Later in the second quarter of today's game, Favre threw the 8,359th pass of his career, eclipsing another of Marino's records.
ref: Kemudian pada suku kedua permainan hari ini, Favre melemparkan pas 8359 kerjayanya, melebihi satu lagi rekod Marino.

src: He added that, in his mind, Dan Marino is still the best quarterback of all time.
ref: Tambah beliau, di dalam fikirannya, Dan Marino masih lagi quarterback terbaik sepanjang zaman.

src: Bayern Munich's #1 goalkeeper Oliver Kahn striker Miroslav Klose have been ruled out of Thursday's UEFA Cup 1st Round 2nd Leg match against Portugal's Belenenses.
ref: Penjaga Goal #1 Bayern Munich Oliver Khan penyerang Miroslav Klose telah dikeluarkan dari pertandingan ke-2 pusingan pertama Piala UEFA pada Khamis menentang pasukan Portugal Belenenses.

src: Bastian Schweinsteiger, Marcell Jansen and Luca Toni didn't practice today for precautionary reasons.
ref: Bastian Schweinsteiger, Marcell jansen dan Luca Toni tidak berlatih untuk alasan berjaga-jaga.

src: Beira-Mar was arrested by the Colombian army at April 20-21, 2001, in a FARC camp located at a forest near Colombia and Venezuela and then transferred to Brazil where he is been in prison until now.
ref: Beira-Mar telah ditangkap oleh tentera Colombia pada April 20-21, 2001, di sebuah kem FARC yang terletak di hutan berhampiran Colombia dan Venezuela dan kemudian dipindahkan ke Brazil di mana beliau berada di penjara sehingga kini.

src: Zork Hun is running for the Libertarian party in the Ontario provincial election, in the Parkdale-High Park riding.
ref: Zork Hun akan bertanding untuk parti Libertarian di dalam pilihan raya wilayah Ontario, di kawasan pilihanraya Parkdale-High Park.

src: The jury in the Isiah Thomas sexual harassment trial revealed a guilty verdict Tuesday, ruling that the current New York Knicks coach subjected former Madison Square Garden executive Anucha Browne Sanders to unwanted sexual advances and verbal insults.
ref: Juri di dalam perbicaraan gangguan seksual Isiah Thomas telah mengeluarkan keputusan bersalah Selasa lalu, memutuskan yang jurulatih semasa New York Knicks telah memaksa bekas eksekutif Madison Square Garden Anucha Browne Sanders untuk kelakuan seksual tidak diingini dan kata-kata cercaan.

src: In a minor victory for Thomas, the ruling also said that Thomas will not have to pay punitive damages.
ref: Di dalam kemenangan kecil untuk Thomas, keputusan itu turut menyatakan yang Thomas tidak perlu membayar ganti rugi punitif.

src: However, Thomas' employer, Madison Square Garden, was also found guilty of harassment and will have to pay millions dollars worth of punitive damages to Browne Sanders.
ref: Bagaimanapun, majikan Thomas, Madison Square Garden, juga didapati bersalah ke atas gangguan dan perlu membayar ganti rugi punitif berjumlah berjuta dolar kepada Browne Sanders.

src: She stated that Thomas repeatedly called her a "bitch" and a "ho", and pressured her to kiss him and said that he loved her.
ref: Dia menyatakan yang Thomas berulang kali memanggilnya "betina" dan "perempuan jalang," dan memaksanya untuk cium dan memberitahunya dia mencintainya.

src: She also stated that the firing was the result of her filing a complaint about Thomas.
ref: Dia juga menyatakan pemecatannya itu adalah akibat dari dia memfailkan rungutan mengenai Thomas.

src: After the guilty verdict was read, a relieved Browne Sanders hugged her family and friends who were present at the trial.
ref: Selepas keputusan bersalah dibacakan, Browne Sanders yang lega memeluk keluarga dan rakannya yang hadir ke perbicaraan itu.

src: "I'm extremely disappointed that the jury did not see the facts in this case."
ref: "Saya amat kecewa dengan juri yang tidak melihat fakta-fakta di dalam kes ini".

src: Manchester United defeated AS Roma 1-0 in Group F of the UEFA Champions League 2007-08 at Old Trafford, Manchester, England.
ref: Manchester United menewaskan AS Roma 1-0 dalam Kumpulan F dalam Liga Juara UEFA 2007-08 di Old Trafford, Manchester, England.

src: Wayne Rooney scored the only goal of the match, his first goal of the season for Manchester United, in the 70th minute.
