ref: "Ben, terima kasih untuk persahabatan dan kezaliman kamu selama ini."

src: Upon hearing of Marlin's death Ruud Lemmen of Neurotic Records released the following statement: "It is with great regret that I've just learned about Ben losing his battle with cancer."
ref: Apabila mengetahui kematian Marlin Ruud Lemmen daripada Neurotic Records mengeluarkan kenyataan berikut: "Dengan rasa kesal yang hebat yang saya baru sahaja tahu mengenai Ben kekalahan pertempuran dengan kanser."

src: "Ben was a good guy, a funny fellow and I will never forget him."
ref: "Ben adalah seorang lelaki yang baik, rakan yang lucu dan saya tidak akan lupakan dia."

src: "My condolences go out to friends, family and band members."
ref: "Takziah kepada rakan-rakan, keluarga dan ahli-ahli kumpulan musik."

src: Microprocessor company Intel Corporation has quit the board of directors for the One Laptop Per Child association (OLPC), a non-profit organization that aims to provide children in developing countries with inexpensive laptops.
ref: Syarikat mikropemproses Intel Corporation telah menarik diri dari lembaga pengarah kepada persatuan Satu Komputer Riba Satu Kanak-Kanak (OLPC), organisasi nonprofit yang bertujuan untuk menyediakan kanak-kanak dinegara-negara membangun dengan komputer riba tidak mahal.

src: Intel joined the OLPC board in July 2007, agreeing to give financial and technological support to the project.
ref: Intel menyertai lembaga OLPC pada Julai 2007, bersetuju memberi sumbangan kewangan dan teknologi kepada projek tersebut.

src: Development began on a new laptop using an Intel processor rather than the current processor made by Advanced Micro Devices, a rival of Intel.
ref: Pembangunan bermula dengan komputer riba baru menggunakan pemproses Intel berbanding dengan pemproses kini dibuat oleh Advanced Micro Devices, lawan kepada Intel.

src: "At the end of the day, we decided we couldn't accommodate that request," Mulloy said.
ref: "Sebagai kesimpulannya, kami mengambil keputusan yang kami tidak dapat memenuhi permohonan tersebut," kata Mulloy.

src: OLPC President Walter Bender said in an interview that Intel's resignation will have "no impact" on the program.
ref: Presiden OLPC Walter Bender berkata dalam satu temu bual yang perletakan jawatan Intel akan "tiada kesan" kepada program tersebut.

src: "We never really got much going with Intel to have an impact," Bender said.
ref: "Kami tidak benar-benar mendapat banyak perkembangan dengan Intel untuk mendapat kesan," kata Bender.

src: He criticized Intel for a "seemingly half-hearted effort" in developing the new laptops and for using the agreement to make "marketing statements".
ref: Dia mengkritik Intel kerana "kelihatan usaha separuh hati" dalam membangunkan komputer riba tersebut dan menggunakan perjanjian tersebut untuk membuat "kenyataan pemasaran".

src: Along with technology writers for Slate, PC Magazine, USA Today, BusinessWeek, Aviation Weekly, Wikinews was invited by the America-Israel Friendship League and the Israeli Foreign Ministry to review Israel’s technology sector.
ref: Bersama dengan tulisan teknologi untuk Slate, Majalah PC, Hari ini USA, Minggu Bisnes, Minggu Penerbangan, Wikinews telah dijemput oleh Liga Persahabatan Amerika-Israel dan Menteri Luar Israel untuk meneliti sektor teknologi Israel.

src: It's part of an effort to 're-brand the country' to show America that there is more to Israel than the Palestinian conflict.
ref: Ini adalah sebahagian daripada 'penamaan semula negara'untuk menujukkan kepada Amerika bahawa ianya lebih kepada Israel berbanding konflik Palestin.

src: The schedule was hectic: 12-14 hours a day were spent doing everything from trips to the Weizmann Institute to dinner with Yossi Vardi.
ref: Jadual itu agak padat: 12-14 jam sehari dperlukan bagi membuat semua perjalanan dari trip ke Institut Weizmann ke makan malam bersama Yossi Vardi.

src: On Thursday, the fifth day of the junket, David Saranga of the foreign ministry was able to arrange an exclusive interview for David Shankbone with the President of Israel, Nobel Peace Prize recipient Shimon Peres.
ref: Pada Khamis, hari kelima pesta makan, menteri luar David Saranga telah berjaya mengaturkan temuduga eksklusif untuk David Shankbone dengan Presiden Israel, Shimon Peres pemenang Hadiah Nobel Keamanan.

src: In 1953, at the age of 29, Peres became the youngest ever Director General of the Ministry of Defense.
ref: Pada 1953, ketika berumur 29 tahun, Peres menjadi Ketua Pengarah termuda bagi Kementerian Pertahanan.

src: Forty years later it was Peres who secretly gave the green light for dialogue with Yassir Arafat, of the verboten Palestine Liberation Organization.
ref: Empat tahun selepas itu Peres secara sulit memberi lampu hijau untuk dialog bersama Yassir Arafat, Organisasi Liberal Palestin yang dilarang.

src: Peres shares a Nobel Peace Prize with Yitzak Rabin and Arafat for orchestrating what eventually became the Oslo Accords.
ref: Peres berkongsi Hadiah Nobel Keamanan dengan Yitzak Rabin dan Arafat kerana mendalangi yang akhirnya terjadinya Perjanjian Olso.

src: The "roadmap" that came out of Oslo remains the official Israeli (and American) policy for peace in the Palestinian conflict.
ref: "Pelan Tindakan" yang terhasil dari Olso mengekalkan polisi rasmi Israel (dan Amerika) untuk keamanan dalam konflik Palestin.

src: Although the majority of Israeli people supported the plans, land for peace was met with a small but fiery resistance in Israel.
ref: Walaupun majoriti rakyat Israel menyokong pelan tersebut, tanah untuk keamanan telah ditemui dengan kecil dan rintangan api di Israel.

src: a reference to Hitler's British appeaser.
ref: merujuk kepada keadaan British menenangkan Hitler.

src: It was during this time of heated exchanges in the 1990s that Yitzhak Rabin was assassinated by Yigal Amir, a Jew who thought it against Halakhic law to give up land given by God (Hashem).
ref: Ianya berlaku semasa pertukaran panas pada 1990an dimana Yitzhak Rabin telah dibunuh oleh Yigal Amir, seorang Yahudi yang menganggap ianya melawan Hukum Halakic untuk menyerahkan tanah yang dikurniakan oleh Tuhan (Hashem).

src: Peres is the elder statesman of Israeli politics, but he remembers that he has not always been as popular as he is today.
ref: Peres merupakan negarawan tua oleh politik Israel, tetapi beliau ingat bahawa beliau tidak selalu menjadi terkenal seperti beliau sekarang ini.

src: "Popularity is like perfume: nice to smell, dangerous to drink," said Peres.
ref: "Populariti ibarat minyak wangi: sedap dihidu, bahaya untuk diminum," kata Peres.

src: The search for popularity, he goes on to say, will kill a person who has an idea against the status quo.
ref: Carian untuk populariti, beliau menyambung berkata, akan membunuh seorang yang mempunyai idea untuk menentang status quo ini.

src: Below is David Shankbone's interview with Shimon Peres, the President of Israel.
ref: Temuduga David Shankbone bersama Presiden Israel Shimon Peres seperti dibawah.

src: A bomb exploded Tuesday night in Colombo, the capital of Sri Lanka.
ref: Sebutir bom meletup malam Selasa di Colombo, ibu negara Sri Lanka.

src: This blast has been blamed on the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (LTTE) by government officials.
ref: Letupan ini telah dituduh dilakukan oleh Harimau Pembebasan Tamil Eelam (LTTE) oleh pegawai-pegawai kerajaan.

src: The deputy director of the government teaching hospital in the town of Ragama, Lalini Gurusinghe, announced the death of the minister.
ref: Timbalan Pengarah hospital pelatih perubatan kerajaan di bandar Ragama, Lalini Gurusinghe, mengumumkan kematian menteri.

src: The explosion took place in Ja-Ela, a town some 12 miles north of Colombo.
ref: Letupan itu berlaku di Ja-Ela, sebuah bandar kira-kira 12 batu ke utara Colombo.

src: Israeli Prime Minister Ehud Olmert and Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas held a final meeting Tuesday before their separate talks with United States President Bush this week during his visit to Israel and the Palestinian territories.
ref: Perdana Menteri Israel, Ehud Olmert dan Presiden Palestin Mahmoud Abbas mengadakan mesyuarat akhir Selasa sebelum perbincangan berasingan mereka dengan Presiden Amerika Syarikat, Bush minggu ini semasa lawatannya ke Israel dan wilayah Palestin.

src: The talks are supposed to lead to the formation of a Palestinian state by the end of this year.
ref: Rundingan sepatutnya membawa kepada pembentukan sebuah negara Palestin pada akhir tahun ini.

src: Mahdi Abdel Hadi who heads the Palestinian research group PASSIA says both Mr. Olmert and Mr. Abbas are politically weakened, and it is unlikely either man can probably give the other what he wants.
ref: Mahdi Abdel Hadi yang mengetuai kumpulan penyelidikan Palestin PASSIA berkata kedua-dua Encik Olmert dan Encik Abbas lemah dari segi politik, dan ia tidak mungkin sama ada lelaki mungkin boleh memberikan lain apa yang dia mahu.

src: "I think both leaders, Olmert and Abbas are weak, vis-à-vis their constituencies," he explained.
ref: "Saya rasa kedua-dua pemimpin, Olmert dan Abbas lemah, berbanding dengan negara-negara kawasan masing-masing," katanya.

src: Olmert is facing challenges by other leaders to take over the prime ministership.
ref: Olmert sedang menghadapi cabaran oleh pemimpin lain untuk mengambil alih jawatan perdana menteri.

src: Abbas is challenged by the partition between Gaza and the West Bank and there have been no improvements to the quality of life under occupation."
ref: Abbas dicabar oleh bahagian antara Gaza dan Tebing Barat dan tidak ada penambahbaikan kepada kualiti hidup di bawah penjajahan".

src: Since their last meeting with Mr. Bush at the Annapolis Mideast peace conference, Mr. Abbas and Mr. Olmert have each accused the other of reneging on pledges to advance the peace process.
ref: Sejak pertemuan terakhir dengan Encik Bush pada persidangan damai Annapolis Timur Tengah, Encik Abbas dan Encik Olmert menuduh satu sama lain memungkiri janji untuk memajukan proses damai.

src: Now it will be up to Mr. Bush to see if he can get Mr. Abbas and Mr. Olmert to bridge their differences and get the peace process that was revived at Annapolis back on track.
ref: Sekarang ia terpulang kepada Encik Bush untuk melihat jika dia boleh mendapatkan Encik Abbas dan Encik Olmert untuk merapatkan perbezaan mereka dan mendapatkan proses damai yang telah dihidupkan semula pada Annapolis kembali ke landasan.

src: According to media reports, John McCain has won the New Hampshire Primary for the Republicans in the 2008 Presidential race.
ref: Menurut laporan media, John McCain telah memenangi New Hampshire Primary untuk Republican di 2008 Pertandingan Jawatan Presiden.

src: "I'm committed to keeping this country safe, and we're going to move on to Michigan and South Carolina and win the nomination," said McCain.
ref: "Saya komited untuk memastikan negara ini selamat, dan kami akan bergerak ke Michigan dan South Carolina dan memenangi penamaan calon," kata McCain.

src: MSNBC reports that Clinton beat Barack Obama by a "very narrow margin."
ref: MSNBC melaporkan bahawa Clinton mengalahkan Barack Obama oleh "margin sangat sikit."

src: Opinion polls held before the polls closed showed Obama winning.
ref: Undian pendapat diadakan sebelum pilihan raya ditutup menunjukkan Obama menang.

src: The United States Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) says it finished interrogating the nearly 105 Iraqi scientists it held in its search for weapons of mass destruction (WMD).
ref: Agensi Perisikan Pusat Amerika Syarikat (CIA) berkata mereka telah selesai menyoal siasat hampir 105 ahli-ahli sains Iraq yang diadakan dalam usaha mencari senjata pemusnah besar-besaran (WMD).

src: In many cases their information was helpful, but in other cases the wrong people were detained, and were subjected to questioning by "inexperienced and uninformed" interrogators.
ref: Kebanyakan maklumat mereka adalah membantu, tetapi dalam beberapa kes orang yang salah telah ditahan, dan di soal siasat oleh penyoal siasat "yang tidak berpengalaman dan tidak berpengetahuan."

src: From an update to the Comprehensive Report of the Special Adviser to the DCI on Iraq's WMD, "As matters now stand, the WMD investigation has gone as far as feasible."
ref: Daripada maklumat terkini dalam Laporan Komprehensif Penasihat Khas kepada DCI tentang WMD Iraq, "Buat masa ini, siasatan mengenai WMD telah berjalan sejauh yang boleh dilaksanakan."

src: After more than 18 months, the WMD investigation and debriefing of the WMD-related detainees has been exhausted.
ref: Selepas lebih daripada 18 bulan, penyiasatan WMD dan maklum balas daripada tahanan berkaitan WMD telah sampai jalan buntu.

src: Elsewhere, "Some may have other issues to account for, including Regime finance questions, but certainly some have been quite helpful toward the compilation of an accurate picture of the Regime's WMD efforts and intentions over the last three decades."
ref: Dalam hal lain, "Sesetengah mungkin mempunyai isu-isu lain untuk diambil kira, termasuk soal kewangan Rejim, tetapi pastinya ada yang membantu ke arah penyusunan gambaran yang tepat mengenai usaha WMD Rejim dan niat mereka sejak tiga dekad yang lalu."

src: The comments were addenda and an accompanying note, supplemental to the original report, which was issued last autumn, and seen as the final report of the Iraq Survey Group (ISG).
ref: Komen-komen adalah adendum dan nota yang disertakan, tambahan kepada laporan asal yang dikeluarkan musim luruh lalu, dan dilihat sebagai laporan akhir Kumpulan Tinjauan Iraq (ISG).

src: They were added by Charles Duelfer, head of the ISG, and Special Adviser to the Director of Central Intelligence in Baghdad.
ref: Ianya telah ditambah oleh Charles Duelfer, ketua ISG, dan Penasihat Khas kepada Pengarah Perisikan Pusat di Baghdad.

src: Deulfer emphasised that more information is likely to emerge naturally, over time, from people with differing viewpoints and interests.
ref: Deulfer menekankan bahawa maklumat lanjut mungkin akan timbul secara semula jadi, dari masa ke masa, daripada mereka yang mempunyai pandangan dan kepentingan yang berbeza.

src: And a backlog of documents recovered from the former regime remain to be examined.
ref: Dan tunggakan dokumen yang diperoleh daripada rejim terdahulu kekal untuk diperiksa.

src: The report confirms the expressed opinion of former UN weapons inspector, Scott Ritter, that Iraq had no significant WMDs.
ref: Laporan tersebut mengesahkan pendapat yang diberikan oleh bekas pemeriksa senjata PBB, Scott Ritter, bahawa Iraq tidak mempunyai WMD.

src: Duelfer summary of the intelligence obtained, as understood by the ISG, includes, "[T]he risk of Iraqi WMD expertise of material advancing the WMD potential in other countries is attenuated by many factors and is presently small ..." And, "So far, insurgent efforts to attain unconventional weapons have been limited and contained by coalition actions."
ref: Ringkasan Dulfer yang diperoleh risikan, seperti yang difahami oleh ISG, termasuk, "Ancaman kepakaran WMD Iraq dalam memajukan potensi WMD dalam negara lain dilemahkan oleh banyak faktor dan sekarang adalah kecil..." Dan, "Setakat ini, usaha-usaha untuk mencapai pemberontakan senjata konvensional telah terhad dan dibendung oleh tindakan gabungan."

src: Also, "There continue to be reports of WMD in Iraq."
ref: Dan, "Terdapat laporan berterusan mengenai WMD di Iraq."

src: "ISG has found that such reports are usually scams or in misidentification of materials or activities."
ref: "ISG mendapati bahawa laporan sedemikian kebiasaannya adalah penipuan atau salah mengidentifikasi bahan atau aktiviti."

src: "In a very limited number of cases they have related to old chemical munitions produced before 1990."
ref: "Dalam jumlah yang sangat terhad kes-kes mereka berkaitan dengan senjata kimia lama yang dicipta sebelum 1990."

src: Actress Hunter Tylo is reported to have rejoined the cast of The Bold and the Beautiful, in the latest chapter of a rocky relationship between Tylo and the casting office.
ref: Pelakon Hunter Tylo dilaporkan telah menyertai semula pelakon-pelakon The Bold and the Beautiful, dalam bab terkini hubungan tidak stabil diantara Tylo dan pejabat pelakon.

src: The news was first broken by entertainment magazine Soap Opera Weekly.
ref: Berita tersebut pertamanya dipecahkan oleh majalah hiburan Mingguan Soap Opera.

src: According to Soap Opera Weekly, history has been rewritten so that Taylor, in reality, did not die from her gunshot wounds back in October 2002.
ref: Menurut Mingguan Soap Opera, sejarah telah ditulis semula supaya Taylor, pada realiti, tidak mati dari luka tembakannya kembali pada Oktober 2002.

src: Both Tylo and Bedi are first seen on Monday, May 2.
ref: Kedua-dua Tylo dan Bedi adalah pertama kali dilihat pada Isnin, 2 Mei.

src: The magazine states that she has been on the set of the soap opera at CBS Television City since March 11.
ref: Majalah tersebut menyatakan yang dia telah berada di set drama opera tersebut di Bandar Televisyen CBS sejak 11 March.

src: For a while, she didn't even tell her husband, former Guiding Light actor Michael Tylo, where she was really going.
ref: Buat semetara, dia tidak pun memberitahu suaminya, bekas pelakon Guiding Light Michael Tylo, kemana dia pergi sebenarnya.

src: She told him that she was just going on "a lot of auditions," and that if she told sooner than she did, the news might slip out accidentally.
ref: Dia memberitahunya yang dia sedang melalui "banyak uji bakat," dan jika dia memberitahu lebih awal dari yang dilakukannya, berita itu mungkin terlepas keluar tidak sengaja.

src: Her husband currently teaches a class at the University of Nevada, Las Vegas and she couldn't afford any accidental hints that his students could have picked up on.
ref: Suaminya kini mengajar kelas di Nevada Universiti, Las Vegas dan dia tidak mampu sebarang tip terlepas secara tidak sengaja yang pelajarnya dapat mengambil.

src: She left in highly publicized disputes most recently in 2000 and 2001, due to a lack of story for her character.
ref: Dia meninggalkannya dalam pertikaian yang sangat dipublisitikan baru-baru ini pada 2000 dan 2001, akibat kekurangan cerita untuk wataknya.

src: Her most publicized departure, however, was in 1996; Tylo was scheduled to join the cast of Melrose Place and was fired when Melroses producer Aaron Spelling found out she was pregnant.
ref: Peninggalannya yang paling dipublisitikan, walaubagaimanapun, adalah pada 1996; Tylo dijadualkan menyertai pelakon Melrose Place dan dipecat apabila penerbit Melrose Aaron Spelling mendapat tahu yang dia sedang mengandung.

src: She took him to court and won after nearly a year of messy legal battles.
ref: Dia membawanya ke mahkamah dan menang setelah hampir setahun dalam pergelutan undang-undang.

src: With more than 300 million viewers in nearly 100 countries, The Bold and the Beautiful is claimed to be the most-watched television series in the world.
ref: Dengan lebih dari 300 juta penonton dalam lebih kurang 100 negara, The Bold and the Beautiful didakwa sebagai siri televisyen paling ditonton di dunia.

src: Controversy was sparked by his choice of conservative Italian Rocco Buttiglione for the Justice Commissioner position, who made several statements regarding homosexuality and women that members of the European Parliament objected to.
ref: Kontroversi tercetus oleh pilihannya iaitu orang Itali yang berpandangan konservatif Rocco Buttiglione untuk jawatan Jaksa Pesuruhjaya, yang membuat beberapa kenyataan mengenai homoseksual dan wanita yang dibantah oleh ahli-ahli Parlimen Eropah.

src: The European Parliament voted in favour the Commissioners on November 18th, giving Barroso and his staff the green light to start their official five-year term starting on Monday.
ref: Parlimen Eropah mengundi menyokong Pesuruhjaya itu pada 18 November, memberi kelulusan kepada Barroso dan kakitangannya untuk memulakan tempoh rasmi lima tahun mereka bermula pada hari Isnin.

src: In an escalating controversy that has contributed to Italian Prime Minister Silvio Berlusconi's political problems and created a national uproar in Italy, Italian prosecutors began their own independent probe on Wednesday of the death of Nicola Calipari.
ref: Didalam sebuah kontroversi yang sedang berkembang serta menyumbang kepada masalah politik Perdana Menteri Itali Silvio Berlusconi dan menghasilkan kegemparan negara Itali, para pendakwaraya Itali memulakan siasatan bebas mereka sendiri pada Rabu berkenaan kematian Nicola Calipari.

src: The premier has put his government's prestige on the line with assurances to the nation that full light would be shed on the shooting.
ref: Perdana menteri tersebut telah meletakkan prestij kerajaannya berisiko dengan jaminan kepada rakyat yang perhatian sepenuhnya akan diberikan kepada kejadian tembakan tersebut.

src: Italian Prime Minister Silvio Berlusconi's government received a vote of confidence from the Italian Senate Thursday, after it earned the confidence of the House yesterday.
ref: Kerajaan Perdana Menteri Itali Silvio Berlusconi menerima undian percaya dari Senat Itali pada Khamis, selepas menerima kepercayaan dari Parlimen semalam.

src: Wildlife scientists confirmed on Thursday that a bird long thought extinct, the Ivory-billed woodpecker, has been found in Arkansas.
ref: Saintis hidupan liar mengesahkan pada hari Khamis bahawa burung yang lama dianggap pupus, burung belatuk Ivory-billed, telah ditemui di Arkansas.

src: The birds inhabited a wide swath of American bottomlands and mountain pine forests until the latter part of the 1800s.
ref: Burung-burung yang mendiami kawasan dataran baruh Amerika yang luas dan hutan pain gunung sehingga bahagian akhir tahun 1800-an.

src: There have been several independent sightings of the bird in Arkansas over the last year, and even a videotape.
ref: Terdapat beberapa pemerhatian bebas burung di Arkansas sejak tahun lepas, dan juga pita video.

src: In an effort to support the birds, the Cornell Lab of Ornithology, The Nature Conservancy, and other groups have joined to form the Big Woods Conservation Partnership to conserve 200,000 acres of forest habitat and rivers in the area during the next 10 years.
ref: Dalam usaha untuk menyokong burung, Makmal Ornitologi Cornell, The Nature Conservancy, dan kumpulan-kumpulan lain telah menyertai untuk membentuk Pemuliharaan Perkongsian Big Woods untuk memelihara 200,000 ekar habitat hutan dan sungai-sungai di kawasan itu dalam tempoh 10 tahun akan datang.

src: John Fitzpatrick, director of the Cornell Laboratory of Ornithology told the Associated Press, "the bird captured on video is clearly an ivory-billed woodpecker.
ref: John Fitzpatrick, Pengarah Makmal Ornitologi Cornell memberitahu Associated Press, "burung yang ditangkap dalam video memang adalah burung belatuk ivory-billed.

src: Amazingly, America may have another chance to protect the future of this spectacular bird and the awesome forests in which it lives."
ref: Peliknya, Amerika mungkin mempunyai satu lagi peluang untuk melindungi masa depan burung yang menakjubkan ini dan hutan yang menggerunkan di mana ia hidup."

src: The device uses a lithium tantalate (LiTaO3) pyroelectric crystal to ionize deuterium atoms and accelerate the ions towards a stationary erbium deuteride (ErD) target.
ref: Peranti itu menggunakan litium tantalate (LiTaO3) kristal pyroelektrik untuk mengionkan zarah deuterium dan mempercepatkan ion itu kearah matlamat erbium deutride pegun (ErD).

src: Fusion of two deuterium nuclei results in the emission of helium nuclei (alpha particles), neutrons and gamma rays.
ref: Pelakuran antara dua nuclei deuterium terhasilnya pencaran nuclei helium (partikel alpha), neutron dan sinaran gamma.

src: The team anticipates applications of the device as a tabletop neutron generator, or in "microthrusters" for space propulsion.
ref: Pasukan itu mengharapkan penggunaan peranti itu sebagai meja penjana neutron, atau dalam "microthrusters" untuk pendorong angkasa.

src: It is possible that there may be applications related to nuclear weapons, although this possibility is not discussed in the research paper.
ref: Tidak mustahil terdapat aplikasi yang berkaitan dengna senjata nuklear, walaupon kebarangkalian itu tidak dibincangkan di kertas penyelidikan.

src: This development is not related to earlier claims of tabletop fusion or "cold fusion" having been observed during sonoluminescence.
ref: Pembangunan ini tidak berkaitan dengan tuntutan awal di meja pelakuran atau "pelakuran sejuk" yang telah ditelilti semasa sonoluminescence.

src: In fact, the leader of the team behind this development was one of the main critics of earlier low-temperature fusion claims.
ref: Sebenarnya, ketua kepada kumpulan yang membangunkan itu merupakan seorang daripada pengkritik utama terhadap pelakuran suhu-rendah.

src: Two activists who helped identify a vagrant Genetically Modified (GM) crop of papaya, which was later confirmed and destroyed by Thai officials, now face prison over their actions, says Greenpeace.
ref: Dua aktivis yang membantu mengenal pasti tanaman betik berkeliaran yang diubahsuai secara genetik (GM), yang kemudiannya disahkan dan dimusnahkan oleh pegawai Thailand, kini dimasukkan ke dalam penjara atas tindakan mereka, kata Greenpeace.

src: They were charged with theft, trespassing and destruction of property.
ref: Mereka didakwa kerana mencuri, menceroboh dan merosakkan harta benda.

src: Instead of getting to the bottom of who precisely was responsible for the contamination, the very department that was responsible for the contamination decided to take legal action against Pat and Jay.
ref: Daripada menyiasat dengan teliti siapa yang lebih bertanggungjawab atas pencemaran itu, jabatan yang bertanggungjawab mengenai pencemaran tersebut memutuskan untuk mengambil tindakan undang-undang terhadap Pat dan Jay.

src: The government passed a law on Friday ratifying Romania's accession treaty to the European Union, after the Treaty was signed in a ceremony in Luxembourg in April 25, which was attended by the heads of state of all 25 current EU member states.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat kerajaan meluluskan undang-undang mengesahkan perjanjian penyertaan Romania ke Kesatuan Eropah, selepas Perjanjian telah ditandatangani pada satu majlis di Luxembourg pada 25 April, yang dihadiri oleh ketua-ketua negara bagi semua 25 negara semasa anggota EU.

src: It must be approved in a joint session of the Senate and the Chamber of Deputies, with at least a two-thirds majority.
ref: Ia mesti diluluskan di sesi bersama Dewan Negara dan Dewan Perwakilan, dengan sekurang-kurangnya majoriti dua pertiga.

src: Once the accession treaty is ratified by all 25 member states of the European Union, Romania and Bulgaria will become full members in January 1, 2007.
ref: Setelah perjanjian penyertaan itu disahkan oleh semua 25 negara anggota Kesatuan Eropah, Romania dan Bulgaria akan menjadi ahli penuh pada 1 Januari 2007.

src: Heavy rain has washed away a 20-metre stretch of National Highway 75, in Alba county, western Romania, leaving only one of the lanes open to traffic.
ref: Hujan lebat telah menghanyutkan sepanjang 20 meter Lebuhraya Nasional 75 di daerah Alba, utara Romania, meninggalkan hanya satu laluan terbuka untuk lalu lintas.

src: Repair teams from the National Roads Department were called in to assess the damage and clear away the trees that had fallen onto the highway.
ref: Pasukan pembaikpulih dari Jabatan Jalanraya Kebangsaan telah dipanggil untuk menilai kerosakan dan mengalih pokok-pokok yang telah tumbang di atas lebuhraya.

src: Some people have deemed the floods in this region to be the worst in 50 years.
ref: Sesetengah pihak berpendapat banjir kali ini adalah yang terburuk dalam jangka 50 tahun di rantau ini.

src: Seeing heavy equipment being used to change what I thought were the gas prices, I thought, "Gawds, these prices are getting out of hand!"
ref: Apa yang saya fikirkan adalah harga gas, saya fikir, "Gawds, harga-harga ini berada di luar kawalan"!

src: After stopping in later and talking with the owner, I was impressed by how elated he was on the subject of bank processing fees.
ref: Selepas berhenti dan bercakap dengan pemiliknya, saya kagum dengan betapa terujanya beliau terhadap subjek yuran pemprosesan bank.

src: They had used the lift to change the pump price sign from Texaco to Shell.
ref: Mereka menggunakan lift untuk mengubah tanda harga pam dari Texaco ke Shell.

src: A chemical part of the saliva of a poisonous lizard, the Gila monster, has become an integral partner in the control of Type 2 diabetes.
ref: Bahan kimia dalam air liur biawak yang beracun, raksasa Gila, telah menjadi salah satu pasangan penting dalam kawalan penyakit diabetes Jenis 2.

src: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved its use for people who have not achieved adequate control of their diabetes with oral medications.
ref: Pentadbiran Makanan dan Ubat A.S. telah meluluskan penggunaannya untuk orang yang tidak dapat mengawal diabetes secukupnya melalui ubat oral.

src: Eli Lilly & Co. was the development partner in creation of the drug.
ref: Eli Lilly & CO adalah rakan kongsi dalam pembangunan penciptaan ubat.

src: "With Byetta's demonstrated effects on blood sugar and its safety profile, physicians and patients now have a new approach to fight the growing diabetes epidemic," said Sidney Taurel, CEO of Lilly.
ref: "Byetta membuktikan kesan pada paras gula dalam darah dan profil keselamatan, doktor dan pesakit sekarang mempunyai satu pendekatan baru untuk memerangi wabak diabetes yang semakin berleluasa," kata Sidney Taurel, Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif Lilly.

src: Around 1927, one of his teachers, Alfonso Caso, encouraged what will be the start of his career; he suggested Henestrosa to write the same zapotec myths, legends, and fables, the base of his first book Los Hombres Que Dispersó La Danza, published in 1929.
ref: Sekitar 1927, salah seorang daripada guru beliau, Alfonso Caso, menggalakkan apa yang akan menjadi pemulaan kerjaya beliau; mencadangkan Henestrosa untuk menulis mitos Zapotec, legenda, dan cerita dongeng, asas kepada buku pertama beliau Los Hombres Que Disperso La Danza, diterbitkan pada 1929.

src: In addition to his prose and poetry, Henestrosa served in the federal legislature and was a Senator from the state of Oaxaca from 1982 to 1988.
ref: Di samping prosa dan sajak, Henestrosa berkhidmat dalam badan perundangan persekutuan dan merupakan Senator daripada negeri Oaxaca sejak 1982 ke 1988.

src: Snow has fallen in Baghdad, Iraq for the first time in approximately 100 years.
ref: Salji telah turun di Baghdad, Iraq untuk kali pertama di dalam lebih kurang 100 tahun.

src: Although Baghdad sometimes sees hail and sleet, snow has never been seen in living memory.
ref: Walaupun Baghdad kadangkala menerima hujan batu dan hujan beku, salji tidak pernah dilihat sepanjang ingatan penduduk yang masih hidup di situ.

src: Snow was also recorded in the western and central parts of the country, where it is also very unusual, and in the Kurdish north, which is mountainous and commonly sees snowfall.
ref: Salji juga didapati di bahagian barat dan pertengahan negara itu, di mana ia adalah sangat pelik, dan di utara Kurdish, yang bergunung-ganang dan biasanya mendapat salji.

src: A statement by the meteorology department read "Snow has fallen in Baghdad for the first time in about a century as a result of two air flows meeting."
ref: Satu kenyataan oleh jabatan meteorologi berkata"Salji telah turun di Baghdad untuk kali pertama di dalam lebih kurang satu abad disebabkan pertemuan dua aliran udara".

src: Dawood Shakir, director of the meteorology department, told AFP his take on the causation of the snow: "It's very rare."
ref: Dawood Shakir, pengarah jabatan meteorologi, memberitahu AFP pendapatnya tentang punca salji: "Ia adalah sangat luar biasa".

src: "These snowfalls are linked to the climate change that is happening everywhere."
ref: "Salji yang turun dikaitkan dengan perubahan iklim yang berlaku di mana-mana sahaja".

src: "We are finding some places in the world which are warm and are supposed to be cold."
ref: "Kita menjumpai beberapa tempat di dunia yang panas dan sepatutnya sejuk".

src: Temperatures in some parts of the country fell below freezing, compared to winters that are normally mild in a climate that sees summer temperatures of 120 degrees Fahrenheit.
ref: Suhu di beberapa bahagian di negara itu turun di bawah paras beku, dibandingkan dengan musim sejuk yang selalunya beriklim sederhana yang mempunyai suhu musim panas dengan 120 darjah Fahrenheit.

src: Snow fell in the capital city from prior to dawn until just after 9 a.m. local time.
ref: Salji turun di ibu negeri dari sebelum fajar hingga sejurus selepas jam 9 pagi waktu tempatan.

src: However, many local people still had positive things to say about the once in a lifetime event.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, ramai orang tempatan masih memberikan komen yang positif tentang kejadian sekali seumur hidup itu.

src: Mohammed Abdul-Hussein, a 63-year-old in retirement, commented "For the first time in my life I saw a snow-rain like this falling in Baghdad."
ref: Mohammed Abdul-Hussein, seorang pesara berumur 63 tahun, berkata "Untuk pertama kali di dalam hidup saya melihat hujan-salji sebegini turun di Baghdad".

src: Fawzi Karim, who runs a small restaurant in Hawr Rajab, six miles from Baghdad said "I asked my mother, who is 80, whether she'd ever seen snow in Iraq before, and her answer was no…" "This is so unusual, and I don't know whether or not it's a lesson from God," while college student Talib Haider said "a friend of mine called me at 8 a.m. to wake me up and tell me that the sky is raining snow."
ref: Fawzi Karim, yang mengurus restoran di Hawr Rajab, enam batu dari Baghdad berkata "Saya bertanya ibu saya, yang berumur 80, sama ada dia pernah melihat salji sebelum ini di Iraq, dan jawapannya adalah tidak..." "Ini sangat luar biasa, dan saya tidak tahu sama ada ia adalah pengajaran dari Tuhan," sementara pelajar kolej Talib Haider berkata "seorang rakan saya menelefon saya pada pukul 8 pagi untuk mengejutkan saya dan memberitahu yang salji sedang turun dari langit".

src: "I tried to film it with my cell phone camera."
ref: "Saya cuba untuk merakamnya dengan kamera telefon bimbit saya".

src: Resident Aysar Khaled told Reuters "I woke up and I saw snow falling, so I woke up all the family and told them to come and see the snowfall."
ref: Penduduk Aysar Khaled memberitahu Reuters "Saya bangun dan melihat salji sedang turun, jadi saya kejutkan seluruh keluarga dan memberitahu mereka untuk datang melihat jhujan salji".

src: "Everyone in Baghdad is delighted because this is a new thing, this is the first time that it snows in Baghdad…" Some viewed it as a sign of impending peace, or at least of an improving situation in the war-torn country.
ref: "Semua orang di Baghdad bergembira kerana ini sesuatu yang baru, ini adalah kali pertama salji turun di Baghdad…" Ada pihak yang melihatnya sebagai petanda keamanan yang akan berlaku, atau sekurang-kurangnya situasi yang menjadi lebih baik di negara yang hancur akibat peperangan itu.

src: The snow was "a new sign of the new Iraq," according to traffic policeman Murtadha Fadhil, who spoke to Reuters whilst sheltering under a balcony.
ref: Salji itu adalah "petanda baru untuk Iraq yang baru", menurut polis trafik Murtadha Fadhil, yang bercakap dengan Reuters ketika sedang berteduh di bawah balkoni.

src: Those efforts came to a head today with the official May 1 start of jury duty by more than 27,000 newly qualified jurors.
ref: Usaha-usaha tersebut sampai ke kemuncaknya hari ini dengan rasminya 1 Mei menjadi permulaan tugas juri untuk lebih daripada 27,000 juri baru yang berkelayakan.

src: According to People's Daily, "It is the first time in Chinese history that the people's juries are appointed in a uniformed way by the people's congresses at all levels."
ref: Menurut People's Daily, "Ia adalah kali pertama dalam sejarah China yang juri rakyat dilantik dengan cara yang seragam oleh kongres rakyat di semua peringkat."

src: Two jurors and a judge will be sitting on each three-person panel, and decide both criminal and civil cases.
ref: Dua juri dan hakim akan duduk pada setiap tiga orang panel, dan memutuskan kedua-dua kes jenayah dan sivil.

src: The juries will be available when requested by litigants and also in cases "with considerable social repercussions", which appears to mean major cases.
ref: Juri akan disediakan apabila diminta oleh pihak yang berperkara dan juga dalam kes-kes "dengan kesan sosial yang besar," yang kelihatan membawa maksud kes-kes utama.

src: The changes to the jury system are part of a long-term planned reform of China's judicial system that was announced in 1999 by China's top judge, Xiao Yang.
ref: Perubahan kepada sistem juri adalah sebahagian daripada pembaharuan jangka panjang yang dirancang sistem kehakiman China yang diumumkan pada tahun 1999 oleh hakim China, Xiao Yang.

src: In addition to jury reforms, the plan addressed trial procedures and court structure and supervision.
ref: Selain pembaharuan juri, rancangan itu ditujukan kepada prosedur perbicaraan dan struktur mahkamah dan pengawasan.

src: The goal was to "perfect the socialist judicial system with Chinese characteristics...in accordance with the Constitution and laws, and [without] judicial independence and supremacy, which exist in many Western countries," according to Xiao Yang as reported by the People's Daily in 1999.
ref: Matlamatnya adalah untuk "menyempurnakan sistem kehakiman sosialis dengan ciri-ciri Cina...mengikut Perlembagaan dan undang-undang, dan [tanpa] kebebasan kehakiman dan keluhuran, yang wujud di negara-negara Barat," menurut Xiao Yang seperti yang dilaporkan oleh People's Daily pada tahun 1999.

src: "Court reform represents a major part of China's reform of the judicial system and political restructuring."
ref: "Reformasi Mahkamah mewakili sebahagian besar daripada reformasi sistem kehakiman China dan penyusunan semula politik."

src: In August 2004, the 10th National People's Congress (NPC) Standing Committee approved a "resolution on improving the people's jury system", which took effect today.
ref: Pada bulan Ogos 2004, Kongres Kebangsaan (NPC) Jawatankuasa Tetap Rakyat ke-10 meluluskan "ketetapan untuk meningkatkan sistem juri rakyat," yang berkuat kuasa hari ini.

src: The system specifies that either by recommendation of local work units or by self-application, potential jurors can take qualifying examinations and be presented to standing committees of the NPC for appointment as jurors.
ref: Sistem ini menyatakan bahawa sama ada dengan pengesyoran unit kerja tempatan atau oleh permohonan sendiri, juri yang berpotensi boleh mengambil peperiksaan kelayakan dan akan dibentangkan kepada jawatankuasa tetap NPC untuk dilantik sebagai juri.

src: The first batch of 1,342 jurors were tested in Beijing under the new law on April 23, 2005.
ref: Kumpulan pertama seramai 1,342 juri telah diuji di Beijing di bawah undang-undang baru pada 23 April 2005.

src: Those who were certified to begin service on May 1 are said to "participate in all hearing activities of people's courts according to the law, enjoying the same rights as do the judges except that for a presiding judge after their assumption of the post," according to the People's Daily.
ref: Mereka yang telah disahkan untuk memulakan perkhidmatan pada 1 Mei dikatakan "mengambil bahagian dalam semua aktiviti sidang dengar mahkamah rakyat mengikut undang-undang, menikmati hak yang sama seperti yang dilakukan oleh para hakim kecuali bagi seorang hakim yang bersidang selepas andaian mereka terhadap jawatan itu," menurut kepada People's Daily.

src: The implementation of the NPC's decision will add more transparency and justness to the country's judicial system, he added.
ref: Pelaksanaan keputusan NPC akan menambah lebih banyak ketelusan dan keadilan kepada sistem kehakiman di negara ini, katanya.

src: China has one of the world's largest prison systems with over 1 million prisoners, similar to Russia.
ref: China mempunyai salah satu sistem penjara terbesar di dunia dengan lebih 1 juta tahanan, sama dengan Rusia.

src: The United States, however, is the world's largest jailer, with a staggering 2 million prison inmates, out of 9 million total around the entire globe.
ref: Amerika Syarikat, bagaimanapun, merupakan penjara terbesar di dunia, dengan jumlah mengejutkan seramai 2 juta penghuni penjara, daripada 9 juta jumlah seluruh seluruh dunia.

src: International Labor Day, or May Day, has been marked by protests throughout Switzerland.
ref: Hari Pekerja Antarabangsa, atau Hari May, telah pun ditandakan sebagai bantahan di seluruh Switzerland.

src: Roughly 12,000 protesters organized across the country, rallying against the dismantling of social welfare, as well as wage dumping and the large salaries of top company officials.
ref: Secara kasarnya 12,000 penunjuk perasaan berkumpul di seluruh negara, bersatu menentang pembubaran kebajikan sosial, begitu juga pembuangan pendapatan dan gaji tinggi di syarikat besar rasmi.

src: These usually involved clashes between left and right extremists rather than with authorities.
ref: Ini biasanya melibatkan pertempuran antara ekstrimis kanan dan kiri lebih daripada pihak berkuasa.

src: Protesters in Geneva demand reform regarding illegal immigration, and equality for men and women.
ref: Penunjuk perasaan di Geneva mendesak pembaharuan berkenaan imigran tanpa izin, dan persamaan bagi lelaki dan wanita.

src: In Zurich trade unions urged the free movement of people, as well as an ending to the pressure on salaries.
ref: Di Zurich, kesatuan pekerja mendesak pergerakan bebas para pekerja, begitu juga dengan pengakhiran kepada tekanan ke atas gaji.

src: Vasco Pedrina, Co-president of the union Unia, called the difference between high and low incomes a "existential and human tragedy".
ref: Vasco Pedrina, Presiden-bersama kepada kesatuan Unia, memanggil perbezaan antara pendapatan tinggi dan rendah ialah "kewujudan dan tragedi kemanusiaan".

src: Pedrina and others, including Bern mayor Alexander Tschäppät, spoke out during the Saturday and Sunday period of protests.
ref: Pedrina dan yang lain, termasuk datuk bandar Bern, Alexander Tschappat, berkata ketika dalam masa penentangan pada Sabtu dan Ahad.

src: Although the show kept most of its audience that lead-in The Simpsons gave, FOX was still fourth out of five major broadcast networks in the half-hour, losing most notably to ABC's hit Desperate Housewives (UPN, the other major American broadcast network, does not air original programming on Sundays).
ref: Walaupun rancangan mengekalkan sebahagian besar penonton yang dibawa masuk daripada The Simpsons, FOX masih menduduki tangga keempat daripada lima rangkaian penyiaran utama dalam setengah jam, ditewaskan paling teruk oleh ABC dengan drama popular Desperate Housewives (UPN, rangkaian utama siaran Amerika lain, yang tidak menyiarkan rancangang asal pada hari Ahad).

src: However, the season premiere of Family Guy and the series debut of American Dad (which helped usher in what the network termed "The New FOX Sunday") helped bring FOX to the #2 spot out of five networks in the crucial 18 to 49 demographic, one of the most important to advertisers in the key May sweeps period.
ref: Bagaimanapun, musim perdana Family Guy dan siri debut American Dad (yang membantu menyambut apa rangkaian menggelar "The New FOX Sunday") membantu membawa FOX ke tempat # 2 daripada lima rangkaian dalam demografi penting 18-49, salah satu pengiklan yang paling penting dalam loteri penting tempoh Mei.

src: "Sweeps" occurs four times a year and helps networks and independent affiliates determine how much a fixed amount of time for commercial advertisement will cost (the higher the ratings, the more revenue for the networks selling the time to advertisers).
ref: "Loteri" berlaku empat kali setahun dan membantu rangkaian dan persekutuan bebas menentukan berapa banyak jumlah yang tetap masa untuk kos iklan komersial (semakin tinggi penilaian, pendapatan yang lebih tinggi untuk rangkaian menjual masa untuk pengiklan).

src: On the whole, Family Guy averaged a 6.3 rating in the overnights as posted by Zap2It.
ref: Secara keseluruhannya, Family Guy mendapat penarafan 6.3 dalam semalam seperti yang disiarkan oleh Zap2It.

src: While the overnight ratings are fairly accurate, the numbers are preliminary and are subject to minor change.
ref: Sementara purata semalaman agak tepat, nombornya adalah di peringkat awal dan tertakluk pada perubahan kecil.

src: One ratings point is equal to 1,096,000 households, as there are now 109,600,000 households in the United States with at least one television.
ref: Satu penilaian adalah sama dengan 1,096,000 keluarga, kerana kini terdapat 109,600,000 keluarga di Amerika Syarikat dengan sekurang-kurangnya satu televisyen.

src: This translates into a little more than 6.9 million households whose sets were tuned into Family Guy, as recorded by the sample of "Nielsen families," who record their viewing habits and contribute to the ratings process the US uses.
ref: Ini bermakna lebih sedikit daripada 6.9 juta keluarga menonton Family Guy, seperti yang dirakam oleh sampel "keluarga Nielsen," yang merakam tabiat penonton mereka dan menyumbang kepada penilaian proses yang digunakan Amerika Syarikat.

src: For example, nine percent of viewers in the United States with their televisions on at 9 P.M. Eastern Daylight Time were tuned to Family Guy.
ref: Sebagai contoh, sembilan peratus daripada penonton di Amerika Syarikat dengan televisyen mereka pada jam 09 P.M. Waktu Siang Timur telah menyasarkan ke Family Guy.

src: Averaged with the performance of American Dad, a cartoon produced by Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane, FOX earned a mere 5.8 rating/9 share for the hour.
ref: Purata dengan prestasi American Dad, kartun yang dihasilkan oleh pencipta Family Guy Seth MacFarlane, FOX memperoleh hanya kadar 5.8 untul 9 bahagian untuk jam tersebut.

src: The episode revolved around a big scheme Peter Griffin, the main character of the series, conjured.
ref: Episod ini berkisar skim besar Peter Griffin, watak utama siri ini, menunjukkan.

src: Peter stumbles upon a sequel to the film The Passion of the Christ, and vows to keep the movie from ever seeing the light of day.
ref: Peter terserempak dengan sekuel kepada filem The Passion of the Christ, dan berjanji untuk menjaga filem dari pernah melihat cahaya hari.

src: Sharansky said that although he was always against what he calls the "so-called disengagement plan," he decided to leave the government once the battle against the withdrawal was no longer able to be waged from within the government.
ref: Sharansky berkata walaupun beliau sentiasa menentang apa yang dia gelar "apa yang dinamakan pelan pengunduran," dia membuat keputusan untuk meninggalkan kerajaan sekiranya pelawanan menentang penarikan balik itu tidak dapat lagi dilancarkan dari dalam kerajaan.

src: "Our main battle now is public opinion, because the struggle in the government is finished," he said.
ref: "Perjuangan utama kami sekarang ialah pendapat umum, kerana tempuhan dalam kerajaan sudah diselesaikan," katanya.

src: Although he hopes to take the struggle to the people, the former minister hopes his move will pave the way for other politicians to follow their consciences.
ref: Walaupun beliau berharap untuk menempuh untuk rakyat, bekas Menteri itu berharap langkah beliau akan membuka jalan untuk ahli-ahli politik lain untuk mengikuti hati nurani mereka.

src: "I don’t know how effective my quitting will be," Sharansky said, "but I hope it will encourage other politicians and ministers to at least vote according to what they believe and what they think."
ref: "Saya tidak tahu bagaimana berkesannya perletakan jawatan saya," kata Sharansky, "tetapi saya berharap ia akan menggalakkan ahli-ahli politik dan menteri-menteri lain untuk sekurang-kurangnya undi mengikut apa yang mereka percaya dan apa yang mereka fikir".

src: The former prisoner of Zion (who served time in a Soviet prison for wanting to emigrate to Israel) says his main objection to the plan to withdraw from Gaza and northern Samaria is the fact that the withdrawal is not contingent on the creation of democracy within the Palestinian Authority.
ref: Bekas banduan Zion (yang dipenjarakan di penjara Soviet kerana ingin berhijrah ke Israel) berkata bantahan utama beliau atas rancangan untuk menarik diri dari Gaza dan utara Samaria adalah kerana pengunduran itu tidak bergantung pada penciptaan demokrasi dalam Kuasa Palestin.

src: "I have promoted the spread of democracy as the only answer for thirty years."
ref: "Saya telah menngajukan demokrasi sebagai satu-satunya jawapan selama tiga puluh tahun".

src: Although he has in the past supported withdrawal from parts of the land of Israel, Sharansky says the current plan goes too far.
ref: Walaupun dahulu beliau telah menyokong pengunduran dari bahagian-bahagian tanah Israel, Sharansky berkata pelan sekarang keterlaluan.

src: "We cannot control another people and we will need serious compromise, but that compromise does not include giving another people the ability to destroy us…as if we run from Gaza, Gaza will not run after us."
ref: "Kita tidak boleh mengawal orang lain dan kita perlu kompromi yang serius, tetapi kompromi itu tidak termasuk membiarkan orang lain berkeupayaan memusnahkan kita...seolah-olah kita yang lari dari Gaza, Gaza tidak akan mengejari kami".

src: "I had many opportunities to present my point of view to the Prime Minister, both publicly and privately," Sharansky said.
ref: "Saya mempunyai banyak peluang untuk mengemukakan pandangan saya kepada Perdana Menteri, secara umum dan peribadi," kata Sharansky.

src: "We are speaking about three generations of Jews that were sent on the important mission by the Israeli government and made an empty desert into a blossoming garden."
ref: "Kami berbincang mengenai tiga generasi Yahudi yang telah dihantar atas misi penting oleh kerajaan Israel dan menjadikan gurun pasir kosong kepada taman mekar".

src: "Now we will just destroy all these beautiful communities, with their unique agriculture and incredible Judaism - for what?"
ref: "Sekarang kami hanya akan memusnahkan segala masyarakat yang indah, dengan pertanian yang unik dan prinsip Yahudi yang unik - untuk apa"?

src: Sharansky asks.
ref: Sharansky bertanya.

src: On Thursday the 22nd of March, 2005, Anna Ayala, a woman from Las Vegas, claimed to have found a human finger in her bowl of chili at a Wendy's restaurant located at 1405 Monterey Highway, just south of downtown San Jose, California, owned by Fresno-based Jern Management..
ref: Pada hari Khamis 22 Mac 2005, Anna Ayala, seorang wanita dari Las Vegas, mendakwa telah menemui satu jari manusia dalam mangkuk cilinya di restoran Wendy yang terletak di 1405 Monterey Highway, di selatan pusat bandar San Jose, California, yang dimiliki oleh Pengurusan Jern yang berpusat di Fresno.

src: The finger, which probably belonged to a woman as it had a long and manicured fingernail, did not belong to any of the restaurant employees.
ref: Jari tersebut, yang mungkin milik seorang wanita kerana ia mempunyai kuku yang panjang dan rias tangan, bukan milik mana-mana pekerja restoran tersebut.

src: Mosaic, which owns the clothing brands Oasis, Karen Millen, Coast and Whistles, operates 600 stores and is majority owned by retail investment group Baugur.
ref: Mosaic, yang memiliki jenama pakaian Oasis, Karen Millen, Coast dan Whistles, mengendalikan 600 kedai dan majoritinya dimiliki oleh kumpulan pelaburan runcit Baugur.

src: Mosaic employs approximately 5,400 staff throughout the UK and Ireland.
ref: Mosaic mengambil kerja lebih kurang 5,400 pekerja seluruh UK dan Ireland.

src: The exchange was founded in 1985 and has since grown to encompass 34 firms with a combined value of over US$21bn (€16.3bn; GBP11.1bn).
ref: Pertukaran tersebut diasakan pada 1985 dan sejak itu telah berkembang merangkumi 34 firma dengan gabungan nilai melebihi US$21bn (€16.3bn; GBP11.1bn).

src: A shipment of humanitarian aid from the Italian government was delivered to Tbilisi, the capital of flood ravaged Georgia on Tuesday.
ref: Satu kapal bantuan kemanusiaan daripada kerajaan Itali telah dihantar ke Tbilisi, ibu negara Georgia yang dilanda banjir pada hari Selasa.

src: Norway and the United States sent tents, clothes, food and generators for electricity.
ref: Norway dan Amerika Syarikat menghantar khemah, pakaian, makanan dan penjana elektrik.

src: Torrential rains lasting nearly a week combined with snow-melt to create in the worst floods in 20 years in the Caucasus republic.
ref: Hujan lebat yang berpanjangan hampir seminggu bersama salji cair mengakibatkan banjir paling dasyat dalam sejarah 20 tahun di republik Caucasus.

src: Former Russian nuclear energy minister Yevgeny Adamov was arrested on Monday by Swiss authorities.
ref: Bekas menteri tenaga nuklear Rusia Yevgeny Adamov ditahan pada hari Isnin oleh pihak berkuasa Switzerland.

src: The arrest came at the request of U.S. officials who claim he stole more than nine million dollars allocated by Washington to help improve Russian nuclear safety.
ref: Penahanan itu dibuat atas permintaan pegawai A.S. yang mendakwa dia mencuri lebih daripada sembilan juta dolar diperuntukkan oleh Washington untuk membantu meningkatkan keselamatan nuklear Rusia.

src: The Ministry of Justice in Switzerland said Adamov will be extradited to the US.
ref: Kementerian Keadilan di Switzerland berkata Adamov akan diekstradisi ke Amerika Syarikat.

src: Adamov's lead lawyer said he will fight the extradition warrant and called the accusations "baseless".
ref: Peguam utama Adamov berkata dia akan berjuang untuk mencabar waran ekstradisi itu dan menyifatkan tuduhan itu "tidak berasas".

src: Adamov, who has on a number of occasions been investigated for his financial dealing by the U.S. and Russia alike, said he was being punished for his help in building a nuclear plant in Iran.
ref: Adamov, yang beberapa kali disiasat bagi urusan kewangan beliau oleh Amerika Syarikat dan juga Rusia, berkata beliau dihukum kerana bantuannya dalam membina loji nuklear di Iran.

src: Swiss officials said it is common for this process to take several months.
ref: Pegawai Swiss berkata ia adalah perkara biasa bagi proses ini untuk mengambil masa beberapa bulan.

src: Adamov's U.S. lawyer, Larry Breur, said Adamov admitted to depositing the money into a personal account, but then he used that account to dispense the money to Russian agencies and nuclear scientists.
ref: Peguam Amerika Syarikat Adamov, Larry Breur berkata Adamov mengaku mendepositkan wang ke dalam akaun peribadi, tetapi kemudian dia menggunakan akaun itu untuk mengeluarkan wang itu untuk agensi-agensi Rusia dan ahli-ahli sains nuklear.

src: Yevgeny Adamov was a minister in Boris Yeltsin's government, but was removed from power by Vladimir Putin in an effort to remove corruption.
ref: Yevgeny Adamov ialah seorang menteri dalam kerajaan Boris Yeltsin, tetapi telah dibuang dari kuasa oleh Vladimir Putin dalam usaha untuk menghapuskan rasuah.

src: Adamov was in Bern attempting to unblock bank accounts belonging to his daughter.
ref: Adamov berada di Bern mencuba untuk membuka sekatan akaun bank yang dimiliki oleh anak perempuannya.

src: In the case of a Marine who fired upon an unarmed and wounded Iraqi in a mosque in November 2004, the U.S.
ref: Di dalam kes seorang Tentera Marin yang menembak sorang rakyat Iraq yang cedera dan tidak bersenjata di dalam sebuah masjid pada bulan November 2004, Perkhidmatan Siasatan Jenayah Tentera Laut Amerika Syarikat, diketuai oleh Mejar Jeneral Richard Natonski, telah memutuskan bahawa tentera tersebut bertindak untuk mempertahankan diri, dan di dalam bidang undang-undang peperangan.

src: In a statement released by the Marine Corps: "He has determined that the actions of the Marine in question were consistent with the established rules of engagement, the law of armed conflict and the Marine's inherent right of self-defense."
ref: Di dalam sebuah rakaman pita video peristiwa tersebut, tentera marin Amerika Syarikat Camp Pendleton mengangkat senjatanya dan menembak tubuh seorang rakat Iraq yang terbaring ke dinding di dalam masjid.

src: A television journalist embedded with the Marines recorded the killing on videotape.
ref: Lelaki yang terbunuh itu adalah salah seorang pemberontak Iraq yang telah cedera di dalam pertempuran dan dilucutkan senjatanya oleh tentera marin, yang kemudian meninggalkan lelaki-lelaki yang cedera di dalam masjid itu.

src: The man killed was one of several Iraqi insurgents who had been wounded in fighting and then disarmed by marines, who then moved on leaving the wounded men in the mosque.
ref: Pada hari berikutnya, barisan kedua tentera marin bergerak melalui kawasan itu, yang bertempur dengan lebih ramai pemberontak.

src: The next day a second line of marines moved through the area, who fought with more insurgents.
ref: Disebabkan masa telah berlalu sejak kumpulan pertama tentera marin, barisan kedua telah menganggap bahawa mana-mana bangunan boleh diduduki semula oleh pemberontak.

src: Due to the time that had passed since the first wave of marines, the second line assumed that any buildings could have been re-occupied by insurgents.
ref: Koperal itu telah menjumpai lelaki-lelaki yang tercedera di dalam masjid itu apabila mereka memeriksanya.

src: The corporal found wounded men in the mosque when they searched it.
ref: Pada masa itu, tentera marin dari serangan barisan pertama sedang mendekati masjid itu, termasuk wartawan tersebut, yang juga berada di situ pada masa pertama.

src: Some were still alive and one marine thought a man lying on the ground was a threat because one of his arms was not clearly visible, so he could be hiding a weapon.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, daripada mendapatkan dirinya dijaga untuk tentera yang lain memeriksanya dia telah menembaknya, semasa wartawan itu merakamnya.

src: However, instead of keeping him covered so another could search him he shot him, while the journalist was taping it.
ref: Apabila tentera marin itu melihatnya dan mendapat tahu lelaki-lelaki itu sudahpun dilucutkan senjata sebelumnya dia menjerit dan berkata dia tidak mengetahuinya.

src: When the marine saw this and heard that these men had already been disarmed before he shouted that he didn't know that.
ref: Di dalam testimoni bersumpah, koperal itu berkata dia berpendapat bahawa orang-orang di dalam masjid itu adalah ancaman.

src: In sworn testimony, the corporal said he thought the people in the mosque were a threat.
ref: Satu taktik tentera anti-Iraq (AIF) yang diketahui adalah untuk berpura-pura cedera atau mati, dan tentera marin itu boleh mendakwa dengan adil yang mereka masih menjadi ancaman.

src: "The evidence supports the conclusion that the shooting of all three AIF by the corporal during the assault on the mosque was consistent with the ROE (rules of engagement)."
ref: "Bukti itu menunjukkan bahawa menurut tindakan AIF tersebut, koperal itu percaya mengikut budi bicaranya bahawa mereka menimbulkan ancaman kepadanya dan teman-teman Tentera Marinnya dan menembak dengan wajar untuk mempertahankan diri".

src: "The evidence indicates that based on the actions of those AIF, the corporal reasonably believed that they posed a hostile threat to him and his fellow Marines and justifiably fired in self-defense."
ref: "Rakaman pita video yang dipertingkatkan menyokong bahawa dakwaan koperal di mana AIF yang cedera itu menyembunyikan tangan kirinya di belakang kepala".

src: "Accordingly, it was reasonable to believe that the corporal fired on the AIF after reasonably believing that the individual was committing a hostile act by exhibiting a known enemy TTP (feigning death and subsequently moving his concealed arm)."
ref: "Berdasarkan semua bukti di dalam kes ini, dan peraturan pertempuran yang berkuat kuasa pada masa itu, ia adalah jelas bahawa koperal itu boleh berpendapat mengikut budi bicaranya yang AIF yang ditunjuk di dalam pita video itu menimbulkan ancaman dan mewajarkan tindakan untuk membunuh itu".

src: Kevin Sites, the NBC TV journalist who taped the event as "pool" footage, was embedded with the 3rd Battalion, 1st Marine Regiment when it neutralized Fallujah.
ref: Insiden di dalam masjid itu menimbulkan kontroversi yang agak banyak sama ada wartawan yang turut serta patut mengekalkan pendapat yang neutral.

src: Sharif Hikmat Nashashibi of the Arab Media Watch said the footage would support the idea in the Middle East that the prime concern of US forces is not the welfare of Iraqis.
ref: Di Amerika, walau bagaimanapun, tembakan tersebut tidak ditunjuk kerana NBC berpendapat ia terlalu mengejutkan.

src: In the USA, however, the shooting itself was not shown because NBC considered it too shocking.
ref: Sekarang Sites tidak mengikut tentera dan dia mahu memberitahu cerita sepenuhnya kepada orang ramai.

src: Now that Sites is no longer embedded he wants to bring the whole story out in the open.
ref: Walaupun Sites menunjukkan rakaman itu dengan penjelasan yang panjang tentang bagaimana tentera-tentera menghadapi tekanan yang teruk, yang boleh menjejaskan keputusan mereka, dia telah menerima beribu mel kebencian setiap hari dan juga ancaman untuk dibunuh.

src: Despite the fact that Sites introduced the footage with a long explanation of how the soldiers were under a lot of stress, which could easily cloud their judgement, he received thousands of hate-mails per day and even death-threats Sites later responded to the criticism in an open letter to the regiment in his weblog.
ref: Sites kemudian menjawab kritik tersebut di dalam surat terbuka kepada rejimen itu di weblognya.

src: Germany has been one of the most significant donors to Albania since the fall of Communism.
ref: Jerman telah menjadi salah satu penderma paling utama kepada Albania sejak kejatuhan Komunisme.

src: In total, it has contributed more than €326 million to the country's development, while investing €135 million in its water supply and urban canals.
ref: Secara keseluruhannya, ia telah menyumbang lebih dari 326 juta kepada pembangunan negara itu, sementara sedang melabur 135 juta bagi bekalan air dan terusan bandar.

src: On the same day that the Yad Vashem Holocaust History Museum was opened this year, a lesser-known museum and educational center was opened by a Muslim man in the Israeli town of Nazareth.
ref: Pada masa yang sama Muzium Sejarah Holocaust Yad Vashem telah dibuka pada tahun ini, muzium yang kurang dikenali dan pusat pendidikan telah dibuka oleh lelaki Muslim di bandar Israel, Nazareth.

src: This unique museum, intended to raise awareness of past Jewish suffering in the eyes of Palestinians through historical photographs and Arabic-language educational materials, is believed to be the first-ever Arab holocaust museum.
ref: Muzium unuk ini, diharapkan untuk mendapat tumpuan tentang penderitaan orang Yahudi dimata rakyat Palestin melalui gambar sejarah dan bahan pendidikan bahasa Arab, dipercayai sebagai muzium holocaust pertama Arab.

src: Nazareth is of course well-known to Christians as the site where Joseph and Mary brought up the child Jesus.
ref: Nazareth terkenal kepada orang Kristian sebagai tempat Yusuf dan Mariam membawa anak Isa.

src: In modern times, Nazareth is the largest Arab town in Israel, having many self-proclaimed Palestinians, a Muslim majority, and a 35% Arab-Christian minority.
ref: Dalam zaman moden, Nazareth merupakan bandar Arab terbesar di Israel, mempunyai banyak rakyat Palestin yang merasakan, majoriti muslim dan minoriti 35% Arab-Kristian.

src: The museum's owner Khaleed Mahameed, a 43-year old lawyer, husband, and father of two, said that he learned about the holocaust during his time at Hebrew University in Jerusalem.
ref: Pemilik muzium Khaleed Mahameed, 43 tahun seorang peguam, suami, dan ayah kepada dua orang anak, berkata bahawa beliau belajar berkenana holocaust semasa pengajiannya di Universiti Hebrew di Jerusalem.

src: He spent about 20,000 shekels (US$4,500) of his own money in order to create the museum, despite the alienation of his own brother, the rejection of the Arab news media, and a public that is slow to accept his ideas.
ref: Beliau menghabiskan lebih kurang 20,000 shekels (US$4,500) wang sendiri untuk menghasilkan muzium itu, walaupun dialienkan oleh saudara sendiri, ditolak oleh media berita arab dan orang ramai sedikit demi sedikit menerima ideanya.

src: Mahameed purchased about 80 photographs from the more well-known museum at Yad Vashem in Jerusalem, site of Israel's national memorial to the Shoah (holocaust), located on the Har Hazikaron (Mount of Remembrance).
ref: Mahameed membeli hampir 80 gambar dari muzium yang lebih dikenali di Yad Vashem di Jerusalem, bahagian memorial kebangsaan Israel kepada Shoah (holocaust), terletak di Har Hazikaron (Gunung Peringatan).

src: The newly enlarged Israeli museum at Yad Vashem, opened March 15 with the attendance of President Moshe Katsav, replaced what was the world's first holocaust museum, established in 1972.
ref: Bahagian besar terbaru muzium Israe di Yad Vashem, dibuka pada 15 Mac dengan kehadiran Presiden Moshe Katsav, menggantikan muzium holocaust pertama dunia yang ditubuhkan pada 1972.

src: As part of his effort to educate Palestinians, Mahameed has printed 2,000 booklets in Arabic describing photographs of Nazi horrors, offered stipends to Arab students of the subject, and started a new museum website (Alkaritha.org) with some translations offered in English, Arabic, and Hebrew.
ref: Sebagai sebahagian dari usaha untuk mendidik rakyat Palestin, Mahameed telah mencetak lebih 2000 nashkah di Arab untuk menggambarkan kekejaman Nazi, menawarkan biasiswa kepada pelajar Arab untuk subjek ini, dan memulakan laman sesawang muzium baru (Alkaritha.org) dengan sebahagian diubah bahasa dalam Inggeris, Arab dan Hebrew.

src: Mahameed believes contributions such as his are necessary to the Mideast peace effort.
ref: Mahameed percaya sumbangan ini antara usaha beliau untuk keamanan Timur Tengah.

src: "Understanding this and the fact that personal security is perhaps the major concern of Jews in Israel and elsewhere, as a direct outcome of the Holocaust and the feelings of persecution, is extremely important."
ref: "Memahami bahawa fakta keselamatan peribadi mungkin kebimbangan utamam oleh Yahudi di Israel dan dimana-mana, sebagai hasi yang jurus terhadap holocaust dan perasaan ini sangat penting."

src: "This, in turn, would hopefully lead towards a peaceful resolution of the Israeli-Palestinian conflict and an end to discriminatory policies towards Arab citizens and the acceptance that they deserve equal rights."
ref: "Ini berharap akan membentuk resolusi keamanan terhadap konflik Israel-Palestin dan pengakhiran kepada polisi diskriminasi terhadap rakyat Arab dan menerima bahawa mereka berhak mendapat sama rata."

src: Mahameed is not without his critics, not only among Arabs who say that Mahameed should do more to draw attention to the situation of present-day Palestinians, but also representatives of the Israel office of the Jewish Anti-Defamation League (ADL), who have stated without visiting the museum that they consider some of the attitudes expressed on Mahameed's website to be anti-Semitic.
ref: Mahameed tidak mempunyai kritik, bukan hanya dikalangan Arab yang berkata bahawa Mahameed seharusnya menarik lebih banyak perhatian tentang keadaan terkini Palestin, tetapi juga menjadi perwakilan pejabat Israel dari Liga Anti-Fitnah Yahudi (ADL), yang berkata tanpa melawat muzium bahawa mereka menanggap kelakuan terhadap laman sesawang Mahameed kerana anti-Semitik.

src: "The establishment of the first Holocaust museum for the Arabic-speaking public can be an important first step in educating the Arab world on the unique horrors of the destruction of European Jewry."
ref: "Pembukaan muzium holocaust pertama untuk bahasa arab awam mungkin menjadi langkah pertama dalam mendidik dunia Arab tentang kekejaman unik kemusnahan terhadap Yahudi Eropah."

src: "Particularly now, at a time when Holocaust denial is rife both within and outside of the Arab world, the attempt to teach young Arabs about the Holocaust and to learn moral and ethical lessons from it is a worthy pursuit."
ref: "Sekarang ini, semasa holocaust menolak keadaan sama ada diluar dan dalam dunia Arab, pendekatan untuk mengajar orang muda Arab tentang holocaust dan belajar moral dan pengajaran etik dari yang layak mengajar."

src: Friday was Yom Hashoah, or Holocaust Remembrance Day in Israel, a day of solemn reflection on the loss of 5 to 7 million Jewish lives due to unprovoked Nazi aggression in World War II.
ref: Jumaat merupakan Yom Hashoah, atau Hari Memperingati Holocaust di Israel hari untuk muhasabah diri terhadap kehilangan 5 hingga 7 juta nyawa orang Yahudi hasil dari provokasi Nazi dalam perang Dunia Kedua.

src: Images, films and documentaries of the Holocaust are typically broadcast throughout the Israeli news media on that day, deeply affecting the survivors and their children.
ref: Gambar, filem dan dokumentari tentang holocaust disiarkan melalui media berita Israel pada hari itu, memberi kesan mendalam kepada rakyat yang terselamat dan anak-anak mereka.

src: However, these images do not typically reach a Palestinian audience, according to museum visitor Mufeed Khattib last month.
ref: Bagaimanapun, gambar itu bukan tipikal untuk mencapai rakyat Palestin, menurut pengunjung muzium Mufeed Khattib bulan lepas.

src: "Perhaps I didn't see it well because it was on Israeli TV," he said.
ref: "Mungkin saya tidak melihatnya dangan bagus kerana iannya di TV Israel," kata beliau.

src: "It is different for me that an Arab man did this."
ref: "Ia sangat pelik untuk saya yang orang Arab lakukan ini."

src: On Saturday, Danny Luong, the youngest of the children at four months old, was discovered by a duck hunter in a marshy area near Bayou la Batre, about 5 miles west of the 80 foot high Dauphin Island Bridge.
ref: Sabtu lalu, Danny Luong, termuda dari empat beradik berusia 4 bulan, telah dijumpai oleh pemburu itik di kawasan berpaya berdekatan dengan Bayou la Batre, lebih kurang 5 batu arah barat dari jambatan Dauphin Island yang tingginya 80 kaki.

src: A second child, 3-year-old Ryan Phan, was found near Barton Bay by a search and rescue team today at 10:30 am local time.
ref: Kanak-kanak kedua, Ryan Phan berusia 3 tahun dijumpai berdekatan Barton Bay oleh pasukan pencari dan penyelamat hari ini pada pukul 10:30 pagi waktu tempatan.

src: If convicted, he faces either the death penalty or life imprisonment without parole.
ref: Jika terbukti bersalah, suspek akan dijatuhkan dengan hukuman mati atau hukuman penjara seumur hidup tanpa parol.

src: "The inevitable nightmare we have feared has now been confirmed."
ref: "Mimpi ngeri yang kita takutkan selama ini telah menjadi nyata".

src: "We believe, certainly now, that the father of these children threw these children off the Dauphin Island bridge," Mobile County sheriff Sam Cochran said on Saturday.
ref: Sabtu lalu, Ketua polis Mobile County Sam Cochran berkata "Kami percaya, dan kini pasti bahawa ayah kepada kanak-kanak ini telah menolak mereka dari jambatan Dauphin Island".

src: Luong and his wife, Kieu Ngoc Phan, reported the children missing on Monday.
ref: Luong dan isterinya, Kieu Ngoc Phan, telah melaporkan kehilangan anak mereka pada hari Isnin.

src: When questioned, Luong claimed responsibility for the act, saying that he threw the children into the river after an argument with his wife.
ref: Apabila disoal, Luong mengaku bertanggungjawab atas pembunuhan itu, mengatakan dia menolak anak-anaknya ke dalam sungai selepas bergaduh dengan isterinya.

src: However, he later retracted his confession, instead claiming that two women, one of whom is named "Kim", took the children and drove off in a van.
ref: Bagaimanapun, dia kemudiannya menarik balik pengakuan tersebut dan sebaliknya menyatakan dua wanita, salah seorang daripadanya bernama "Kim" telah membawa lari anak-anaknya dengan sebuah van.

src: "Why didn't he kill me instead of the children?
ref: Phan berkata melalui jurubahasa sambil menangis, "Mengapa dia tidak bunuh saya tapi bunuh anak-anak kami?

src: She was being comforted by an associate pastor from a Vietnamese church.
ref: Dia sedang ditenangkan oleh pembantu paderi dari sebuah gereja untuk orang Vietnam.

src: According to the family, Luong called from jail and told them he wanted to be "more famous than the 9/11 hijackers" and that he "wasn't afraid of the electric chair".
ref: Menurut keluarga mereka, Luong menelefon dari penjara dan memberitahu yang dia mahu "menjadi lebih terkenal dari perampas pesawat 9/11" dan dia "tidak takutkan kerusi elektrik".

src: The search continues for the other two children - Hannah Luong, 2, and Lindsey Luong, 1.
ref: Pencarian diteruskan bagi mencari dua lagi kanak-kanak - Hannah Luong, 2 tahun dan Lindsey Luong, 1 tahun.

src: The search area has been expanded across the state border towards Pascagoula, Mississippi, as authorities believe the strong currents may have moved the bodies westward.
ref: Kawasan pencarian telah diluaskan ke seberang sempadan memasuki Pascagoula, Mississippi kerana pihak berkuasa percaya arus kuat mungkin telah membawa mayat menuju ke barat.

src: Mobile County Commissioner Steve Nodine reports that the search is costing an estimated $100,000 per day.
ref: Pesuruhjaya polis Mobile County Steve Nodine melaporkan pencarian ini memakan kos anggaran sebanyak $100,000 sehari.

src: The militant Islamist group Taliban attacked a hotel in Kabul, Afghanistan last night.
ref: Militan kumpulan Islam Taliban menyerang sebuah hotel di Kabul, Afghanistan semalam.

src: Seven people, including a U.S. citizen and a journalist from the Norwegian newspaper Dagbladet were killed.
ref: Tujuh orang, termasuk seorang warganegara Amerika dan seorang wartawan dari akhbar Dagbladet Norway terbunuh.

src: Norwegian Minister of Foreign Affairs Jonas Gahr Støre is staying at the hotel, but was unharmed.
ref: Menteri Luar Negeri Norway Jonas Gahr Store yang menginap di hotel itu, tidak mengalami sebarang kecederaan.

src: The likely target was Mr. Gahr Støre and a Norwegian delegation, who evacuated into the cellar.
ref: Sasaran mungkin adalah Encik Gahr Store dan delegasi Norway, yang dipindahkan ke dalam ruangan bawah tanah.

src: U.S. military forced rushed to the scene, and managed to kill at least one of the attackers.
ref: Tentera Amerika Syarikat terpaksa bergegas ke tempat kejadian, dan berjaya membunuh sekurang-kurangnya salah seorang daripada penyerang.

src: Taliban spokesman Zabiullah Mujahid claimed responsibility shortly after the attack.
ref: Jurucakap Taliban Zabiullah Mujahid mendakwa bertanggungjawab sejurus selepas serangan itu.

src: Last week, Naked News announced that it would dramatically increase its international language mandate to news reporting, with three new broadcasts.
ref: Pada minggu lepas, Naked News mengumumkan bahawa ia akan meningkatkan mandat bahasa antarabangsanya secara dramatik dalam laporan berita, dengan tiga siaran baru.

src: Wikinews interviewed one of the English broadcast's anchors a little while ago, about the program.
ref: Wikinews menemuramah salah seorang pembaca berita siaran bahasa Inggeris tidak lama dulu, mengenai program itu.

src: The internationally-focused newscast created a stir upon its launch in 1999, but has since expanded with online viewers in 172 nations.
ref: Siaran warta berita yang fokus pada peringkat antarabangsa menjadi kecoh apabila ia dilancarkan pada tahun 1999, tetapi kini telah berkembang dengan penonton dalam talian di 172 negara.

src: "We are looking forward to expanding into other languages as well, because there is definitely a market demanding our brand of infotainment."
ref: "Kami juga berharap untuk berkembang ke dalam bahasa-bahasa lain, kerana pasti ada pasaran meminta jenama kami untuk hiburan informasi".

src: Branding and practices will be licensed to the other production and distribution companies.
ref: Penjenamaan dan amalan akan dilesenkan kepada syarikat-syarikat pengeluaran dan pengagihan lain.

src: Despite this, the press release lists hotel rooms as being one of the primary distribution methods; hotels account for a large segment of the pornography industry's broadcast market.
ref: Walaupun begitu, siaran mengeluarkan senarai bilik hotel sebagai satu daripada kaedah pengedaran utama; akaun hotel bagi segmen besar industri pornografi bagi pasaran siaran.

src: Protesters gathered in Amsterdam, Maastricht, and several other cities in The Netherlands to protest a visit by the United States President, George W. Bush.
ref: Penunjuk perasaan berkumpul di Amsterdam, Maastricht, dan beberapa bandar lain di Belanda untuk membantah lawatan oleh Presiden Amerika Syarikat, George W. Bush.

src: As many as 2,000 people gathered in Amsterdam's Museum Square, voicing their discontent with the war in Iraq.
ref: Sebanyak 2000 orang berkumpul di Muzium Square, Amsterdam, menyuarakan rasa tidak puas hati terhadap perang di Iraq.

src: Two days before Tom Cruise: An Unauthorized Biography, a biography of actor Tom Cruise written by journalist Andrew Morton, was released in the United States, a video showing Cruise promoting Scientology was leaked to the Internet.
ref: Dua hari sebelum biografi pelakon Tom Cruise bertajuk Tom Cruise: Sebuah Biografi Tanpa Izin, yang ditulis oleh wartawan Andrew Morton, dikeluarkan di Amerika Syarikat, satu video yang menunjukkan Cruise mempromosikan Scientologi telah dibocorkan di Internet.

src: The promotional video appeared on video-sharing sites including YouTube, Gawker.com and radar online.com, and clips from the video were also shown on Wednesday morning talk shows in the United States.
ref: Video promosi itu muncul di laman perkongsian video termasuk YouTube, Gawker.com dan radar online.com, dan klip daripada video itu juga telah ditayangkan dalam rancangan perbincangan pada pagi Rabu di Amerika Syarikat.

src: In the 9-minute video produced by the Church of Scientology, Cruise is seen discussing his beliefs while the theme from his Mission: Impossible films plays as background music.
ref: Dalam video 9 minit yang dihasilkan oleh Gereja Scientologi, Cruise dilihat membincangkan kepercayaannya semasa tema dari filem-filem Mission: Impossible dimainkan sebagai muzik latar.

src: The format of the video appears to be an interview with Cruise, and it is edited with questions cut out.
ref: Format video itu kelihatan seperti temu bual dengan Cruise, dan ia disunting dengan soalan telah disunting dan dipadamkan.

src: The term stands for Keeping Scientology Working, which refers to a 10-point letter written by Scientology founder L. Ron Hubbard in 1965 to ensure the organization's survival.
ref: Istilah itu bermaksud Mengekalkan Fungsi Scientologi, yang merujuk kepada surat berperkara 10 yang ditulis oleh pengasas Scientologi L. Ron Hubbard pada tahun 1965 untuk memastikan penerusan hidup organisasi itu.

src: Cruise also discusses "SPs", or Suppressive Persons, "PTSPs", a "potential trouble source" influenced by a Suppressive Person, and the need to "confront and shatter suppression".
