ref: Cruise juga membincangkan "SP", atau Orang Bersifat Menindas, "PTSPs", satu "potensi sumber masalah" dipengaruhi oleh Orang Bersifat Menindas, dan keperluan untuk "menghadapi dan menghancurkan penindasan."

src: Cruise makes assertions about programs which use Hubbard's teachings such as Criminon and Narconon "We're the authorities on getting people off drugs."
ref: Cruise membuat penegasan mengenai program-program yang menggunakan ajaran Hubbard, seperti Criminon dan Narconon "Kami adalah pihak berkuasa yang memaksa orang berhenti mengambil dadah."

src: " In answering that question, Tom Cruise has introduced LRH [L. Ron Hubbard] technology to more than 1 billion people on earth."
ref: "Dalam menjawab soalan itu, Tom Cruise telah memperkenalkan teknologi LRH [L. Ron Hubbard] kepada lebih daripada 1 bilion orang di muka bumi."

src: "And that is only the first wave he has unleashed."
ref: "Dan ini adalah hanya gelombang pertama yang telah dia lepaskan."

src: "That is why the story of Tom Cruise, Scientologist, has only just begun."
ref: "Sebab itu kisah Tom Cruise, Ahli Scientologi, baru sahaja bermula."

src: In a statement, the Church of Scientology said that the video was Cruise's acceptance speech after he had been given the organization's "Freedom Medal", and was shown "before an audience of 5,000 church parishioners and their guests."
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan, Gereja Scientologi berkata video itu adalah ucapan penerimaan Cruise selepas dia diberikan "Pingat Kebebasan" organisasi, dan ditunjukkan "di hadapan 5,000 ahli gereja dan tetamu mereka."

src: The statement also called the video that appeared on the Internet a "pirated and edited version."
ref: Kenyataan itu juga menamakan video yang muncul di Internet "versi cetak rompak dan yang telah disunting."

src: Eighty Scientologists have received the "Freedom Medal" since the award's establishment in 1985, but Cruise is the only recipient of the Freedom Medal of Valor.
ref: Lapan puluh Ahli Scientologi telah menerima "Pingat Kebebasan" sejak penubuhan anugerah itu pada tahun 1985, tetapi Cruise adalah satu-satunya penerima Pingat Kebebasan Keberanian.

src: Andrew Morton's Tom Cruise: An Unauthorized Biography characterizes Cruise as the second most powerful individual within the organization.
ref: Tom Cruise: Sebuah Biografi Tanpa Izin karyaan Andrew Morton, menyifatkan Cruise sebagai individu yang kedua paling berkuasa dalam organisasi itu.

src: Gawker.com posted a copy of the video Tuesday morning, and said that the video had "been passed around privately by reporters and writers investigating Cruise's ties to Scientology."
ref: Gawker.com memaparkan salinan video pada pagi Selasa, dan berkata bahawa video itu telah "telah diedarkan secara persendirian oleh pemberita dan penulis yang menyiasat hubungan Cruise dengan Scientologi."

src: Gawker.com noted that a smaller video clip which had previously been available on YouTube "is no longer available, most likely after the Church of Scientology sent in a copyright infringement notice."
ref: Gawker.com berkata klip video lebih kecil yang sebelum ini boleh didapati di YouTube "sudah tiada, kemungkinan besar selepas Gereja Scientologi menghantar satu notis pelanggaran hak cipta."

src: Gawker.com has stated that the video will stay up on its site, and has reprinted correspondence with Ava Paquette, an attorney with Moxon & Kobrin, a law firm representing the Church of Scientology.
ref: Gawker.com telah menyatakan bahawa video itu akan kekal di laman web itu, dan telah mencetak semula surat-menyurat dengan Ava Paquette, seorang peguam yang berkhidmat dengan Moxon & Kobrin, firma guaman yang mewakili Gereja Scientologi.

src: Ebner appeared on The Today Show on Wednesday, and discussed the video's appearance on the Internet.
ref: Ebner muncul di The Today Show pada hari Rabu, dan membincangkan kewujudan video itu di Internet.

src: Ebner told the New York Daily News that "These tapes were made for purposes of recruitment."
ref: Ebner memberitahu New York Daily News bahawa "Semua pita ini telah dibuat untuk tujuan perekrutan."

src: For websites based in Britain usage of the video is protected under copyright laws, specifically for reporting news and current affairs.
ref: Untuk laman web yang berpangkalan di Britain penggunaan video itu dilindungi di bawah undang-undang hak cipta, khususnya untuk melaporkan berita dan hal ehwal semasa.

src: Copies of the video were not available on Google Video on Thursday, but were still available on YouTube.
ref: Salinan video itu tidak terdapat di Google Video pada hari Khamis, tetapi masih boleh didapati di YouTube.

src: "The mistake was not to foresee that a news story has special protection in copyright law in reporting news and current events."
ref: "Kesilapan itu tidak untuk meramalkan bahawa satu cerita berita mempunyai perlindungan khusus dalam undang-undang hak cipta dalam melaporkan berita dan peristiwa-peristiwa semasa."

src: Thursday was the second day of play in the third test between Australia and India at the WACA, Perth, Australia.
ref: Hari Khamis adalah hari kedua permainan dalam ujian ketiga antara Australia dan India di WACA, Perth, Australia.

src: Australia took the remaining four wickets before the lunch break.
ref: Australia mengambil baki empat wickets sebelum rehat tengah hari.

src: Mahendra Singh Dhoni (19) and Irfan Pathan (28) both fell lbw in successive overs.
ref: Mahendra Singh Dhoni (19) dan Irfan Pathan (28) kedua-dua mendapat lbw dari pengambilalihan berturut-turut.

src: India reached 330 all out with the loss of Anil Kumble for one run and R. P. Singh for a duck.
ref: India mencapai 330 semua keluar dengan kehilangan Anil Kumble untuk satu larian dan RP Singh untuk satu duck.

src: The next session, Australia played well, despite losing Ricky Ponting (20) and Michael Clarke (23), coming to the tea break with a score of 5/148.
ref: Sesi akan datang, Australia bermain dengan baik, walaupun kehilangan Ricky Ponting (20) dan Michael Clarke (23), datang ke minum petang dengan skor 5/148.

src: Andrew Symonds was Australia's top scorer with 66 runs, while Adam Gilchrist made 55.
ref: Andrew Symonds merupakan penjaring terbanyak Australia dengan 66 larian, manakala Adam Gilchrist dengan 55.

src: The leaders of more than 50 countries and heads of several international organisations attended the parade.
ref: Para pemimpin lebih daripada 50 buah negara dan ketua-ketua beberapa pertubuhan antarabangsa menghadiri perarakan itu.

src: George W. Bush watched the parade with Russian President Vladimir Putin.
ref: George W. Bush menonton perarakan itu dengan Presiden Rusia Vladimir Putin.

src: The culmination was the flight of 12 planes (made up of SU-25s and MIG-29s), which emitted white, blue and red smoke to paint a Russian flag in the air.
ref: Kemuncaknya adalah penerbangan 12 pesawat (terdiri daripada SU- 25s dan MIG -29), yang memancarkan asap putih, biru dan merah untuk melukis bendera Rusia di udara.

src: Mass celebrations are planned to be held at Poklonnaya Gora, Moscow's primary WW2 memorial.
ref: Sambutan besar-besaran dirancang akan diadakan di Poklonnaya Gora, peringatan PD2 utama Moscow.

src: The 60th anniversary of Victory in Europe (VE) Day was commemorated across Europe yesterday.
ref: Ulang tahun ke-60 Hari Kemenangan di Eropah (VE) telah diperingati di seluruh Eropah semalam.

src: The U.S. military reports 75 militants dead in an offensive launched Sunday in western Iraq.
ref: Tentera Amerika melaporkan 75 militan mati dalam serangan yang dilancarkan pada hari Ahad di Iraq barat.

src: A report by a Chicago Tribune journalist embedded with U.S. forces said the offensive "was seeking to uproot a persistent insurgency in an area that American intelligence indicated has become a haven for foreign fighters flowing in from Syria."
ref: Satu laporan oleh seorang wartawan Chicago Tribune tersorok di kalangan tentera A.S. berkata serangan itu "sedang berikhtiar untuk menghapuskan pemberontakan berterusan di kawasan yang perisik Amerika menunjukkan telah menjadi syurga bagi pejuang asing yang masuk dari Syria."

src: More than 1,000 U.S. and coalition troops supported by fighter jets and helicopter gunships attacked villages in and around Al Qaim, near the Syrian border.
ref: Lebih daripada 1,000 angkatan tentera A.S. dan askar-askar gabungan dibantu oleh jet pejuang dan helikopter bersenjata menyerang kampung-kampung di dalam dan sekitar Al Qaim, berhampiran sempadan Syria.

src: The American Forces Press Service reports: "Coalition forces also destroyed car bombs, bomb-making material and two buildings that contained large weapons caches to include hand- and rocket-propelled grenades."
ref: Perkhidmatan Akhbar Angkatan Amerika melaporkan: "Angkatan Gabungan juga memusnahkan bom kereta, bahan membuat bom dan dua buah bangunan yang mengandungi stok senjata yang besar termasuk bom tangan gerakan tangan dan gerakan roket."

src: Col. Bob Chase, the chief of operations for the Second Marine Division, has said there were "a handful" of marine casualties.
ref: Kolonel Bob Chase, ketua operasi bagi Bahagian Marin Kedua, telah berkata terdapat "sebilangan" mangsa marin.

src: The source also reports Chase saying, "The objective is to totally disrupt the safe havens and rat lines that have allowed them to bring those materials across the border.
ref: Sumber itu juga melaporkan yang Chase berkata, "Objektifnya adalah untuk benar-benar mengganggu kawasan-kawasan perlindungan selamat dan lingkaran rahsia yang telah membenarkan mereka untuk membawa bahan-bahan menyeberangi sempadan.

src: This had been a very secure area for the insurgents."
ref: Ini telah menjadi suatu kawasan yang sangat selamat untuk pemberontak-pemberontak."

src: The judge ordered the cessation of broadcasts by the local relay transmitter of Canal 7 television station in Mendoza's capital.
ref: Hakim itu mengarahkan pemberhentian siaran oleh penghantar geganti tempatan stesen televisyen Canal 7 di ibu kota Mendoza.

src: The country's Media Secretary, Public Broadcasting System and Channel 7 will appeal the resolution of the Second Federal Court of Mendoza.
ref: Setiausaha Media negara itu, Sistem Penyiaran Awam dan Saluran 7 akan merayu resolusi Kedua Mahkamah Persekutuan Mendoza.

src: "We are going to do everything necessary to defend the right to the information", said Rosario Lufrano, the executive director of Canal 7.
ref: "Kami akan melakukan segala yang perlu untuk mempertahankan hak maklumat," kata Rosario Lufrano, pengarah eksekutif Canal 7.

src: They are hoping to qualify for the World Championships, which are being held in Toronto, Canada, in June next year.
ref: Mereka berharap untuk layak ke Kejohanan Dunia, yang sedang diadakan di Toronto, Kanada, pada bulan Jun tahun depan.

src: Inglis is one of two new players in the team.
ref: Inglis adalah satu daripada dua pemain baru dalam pasukan.

src: The letter, which is assumed to be a hoax, could have a major impact on New Zealand's meat industry.
ref: Surat tersebut, yang mana dianggap hanyalah palsu, mampu memberi impak yang besar kepada industri daging New Zealand.

src: All sheep and cattle are being individually inspected every 48 hours.
ref: Semua kambing biri-biri dan lembu diperiksa satu demi satu setiap 48 jam.

src: Meanwhile, restrictions on the movement of livestock are in place, so that in the very unlikely event that there has been a release of the disease, the effects will be contained.
ref: Sementara itu, sekatan ke atas pergerakan ternakan dikenakan, supaya tiada pengeluaran kenyataan mengenai penyakit tersebut, kesannya akan dapat dibendung.

src: Police efforts are underway to track the origin of the letter that initiated the scare.
ref: Polis sedang menjalankan usaha menjejaki sumber kepada surat itu yang memulakan ketakukan tersebut.

src: Australia will press on with plans to withdraw its troops from Iraq in June this year, although promises were made by the nation's foreign minister that relations with the United States will not be affected by the move.
ref: Australia akan bergerak maju dengan rancangan untuk menarik balik tenteranya dari Iraq pada Jun tahun ini, walaupun janji-janji telah dibuat oleh menteri luar negeri bahawa hubungan dengan Amerika Syarikat tidak akan terjejas oleh langkah itu.

src: Foreign minister Stephen Smith said that the withdrawal will be conducted in an orderly fashion to minimise inconvenience to other nations in Iraq.
ref: Menteri Luar Negeri Stephen Smith berkata penarikan balik itu akan dijalankan dalam cara yang teratur untuk meminimumkan kesulitan kepada negara-negara lain di Iraq.

src: Speaking in New York as part of his first US visit since the election he said "We want to do that in a way which sees minimal disruption, which causes the least inconvenience to our allies there, both the United States and the United Kingdom."
ref: Bercakap di New York sebagai sebahagian daripada lawatan Amerika Syarikat yang pertama sejak pilihan raya beliau berkata, "Kami mahu berbuat demikian dengan cara yang melihat gangguan yang minimum, yang menyebabkan kesulitan-kurangnya kepada sekutu kami di sana, kedua-dua Amerika Syarikat dan United Kingdom".

src: It is currently the intention for this to remain the case.
ref: Ia kini niat untuk ini mengekalkan kes itu.

src: Smith said of the effect on relations with the US - which have been strong since World War II - "It's not something which I believe will disturb what to date has been a very good working relationship between the new government and the (U.S.) administration."
ref: Smith berkata kesan ke atas hubungan dengan Amerika Syarikat - yang telah kukuh sejak Perang Dunia II - "Ia bukan sesuatu yang saya percaya akan mengganggu apa setakat ini adalah hubungan kerja yang sangat baik antara kerajaan baru dan pentadbiran (Amerika Syarikat)".

src: "It's a very strong alliance - an alliance which transcends changes in governments."
ref: "Ia adalah satu pakatan yang sangat kuat - satu pakatan yang melampaui perubahan dalam kerajaan".

src: "Administrations come and go, governments come and go, but the alliance is a long-term, enduring fundamental relationship between our two nations."
ref: "Pentadbiran datang dan pergi, kerajaan datang dan pergi, tetapi perikatan adalah jangka panjang, berkekalan hubungan asas antara kedua-dua negara".

src: Prime Minister Kevin Rudd (Labour) defeated Conservative head and former PM John Howard.
ref: Perdana Menteri Kevin Rudd (Buruh) mengalahkan ketua Konservatif dan bekas PM John Howard.

src: Howard is a supporter of US President George W. Bush and his government.
ref: Howard adalah penyokong Presiden Amerika Syarikat George W. Bush dan kerajaannya.

src: Major said that there won't be a currency union between a newly independent Scotland and a post-split United Kingdom: "A currency union, which the SNP [Scottish National Party] assume is negotiable, would require the UK to underwrite Scottish debts.
ref: Major berkata tidak akan ada kesatuan matawang di antara Scotland baru merdeka dan selepas pemisahan United Kingdom: "Kesatuan matawang, di mana SNP [Parti Kebangsaan Scotland] beranggapan boleh dirundingkan, masih memerlukan UK untuk menjamin hutang-hutang Scotland.

src: There can be no halfway house, no quasi-independence underpinned by UK institutions."
ref: Tidak akan ada rumah separuh jalan, tiada kemerdekaan-quasi disokong oleh institusi-institusi UK".

src: Spain uses uncertainty over EU membership to deter Catalonia from even holding a referendum on independence.
ref: Sepanyol menggunakan ketidakpastian ke atas keahlian EU untuk menghalang Catalonia daripada memegang referendum ke atas kemerdekaan.

src: It is hardly likely she would happily wave in Scotland.
ref: Ia adalah sukar untuk dia melambai dengan gembira di Scotland.

src: Spain will not be alone in being wary of separatist tendencies."
ref: Sepanyol tidak akan keseorangan untuk berjaga-jaga terhadap kecenderungan pemisah".

src: A spokesperson for Alex Salmond, First Minister of Scotland and the leader of the Scottish National Party, responded to Major's remarks: Sir John Major is quite wrong to suggest that the rest of the UK should lay exclusive claim to all the assets of the UK, which the people of Scotland contribute to and of which Sterling is one.
ref: Seorang jurucakap untuk Alex Salmond, Menteri Pertama bagi Scotland dan ketua bagi Parti Kebangsaan Scotland, memberi respon terhadap kenyataan Major: Sir John Major silap untuk mencadangkan bahawa seluruh UK sepatutnya mengambil hak eksklusif ke atas kesemua aset di UK, di mana orang Scotland juga menyumbang dan Sterling adalah salah satu.

src: He was the Tory prime minister who presided over his party's complete wipe-out in Scotland and the more he tries to lecture the people of Scotland, the better it will be for the Yes vote."
ref: Beliau merupakan Tory perdana menteri yang mempengerusikan parti beliau dalam penghapusan keseluruhan di Scotland dan semakin beliau cuba mengajar orang Scotland, ia akan menjadi lebih baik untuk undi Ya".

src: A Russian Proton-M/Briz-M carrier rocket launched this morning at 00:18 UTC, carrying the Ekspress AM-33 (also known as Express AM-33) communication satellite.
ref: Sebuah roket pembawa Rusia Proton-M/Briz-M dilancarkan pagi ini pada pukul 00:18 UTC, membawa satelit komunikasi Ekspress AM-33 (juga dikenali sebagai Express AM-33).

src: Launch, from area 200/39 at the Baikonur Cosmodrome in Kazakhstan took place on schedule, and the satellite was successfully placed into an intermediate transfer orbit.
ref: Pelancaran, dari kawasan 200/39 di Baikonur Cosmodrome di Kazakhstan berlangsung mengikut jadual, dan satelit telah berjaya ditempatkan ke dalam orbit pemindahan pertengahan.

src: It was constructed by NPO PM and Thales Alenia Space, and will be operated by the Russian Space Communication Company, and RKA.
ref: Ia telah dibina oleh NPO PM dan Thales Alenia Space, dan akan dikendalikan oleh Syarikat Komunikasi Russian Space, dan RKA.

src: It will be placed in a geosynchronous orbit, about 36,000 kilometres above the Earth, at a longitude of 95.5°E.
ref: Ia akan diletakkan di orbit geosynchronous, kira-kira 36,000 kilometer di atas Bumi, pada longitud 95.5ºE.

src: It will replace the AM-11 satellite, which malfunctioned in 2006.
ref: Ia akan menggantikan satelit AM-11, yang berhenti berfungsi pada tahun 2006.

src: Officials say the rods could be able to provide enough plutonium to make two nuclear bombs.
ref: Para pengawai berkata yang semua batang itu mampu menyediakan plutonium yang mencukupi bagi membuat dua bom nuklear.

src: This could possibly signal that North Korea is preparing for a nuclear arms test.
ref: Ini mungkin menjadi tanda yang Korea Utara sedang bersiap sedia untuk ujian senjata nuklear.

src: North Korea has also announced plans to continue operating the Yongbyon facility, as well as to begin construction on a larger reactor.
ref: Korea Utara turut mengumumkan rancangan untuk terus menjalankan operasi fasiliti Yongbyon itu, dan juga memulakan pembinaan reaktor yang lebih besar.

src: By a majority of 378 to 262, Members of the European Parliament have voted to abolish the right of European Union countries to opt out of Working Time Directive.
ref: Dengan majoriti 378 ke 262, Ahli Parlimen Eropah telah mengundi untuk memansuhkan hak negara-negara Kesatuan Eropah bagi tidak melibatkan diri dalam Arahan Waktu Kerja.

src: If the Council of Ministers agrees, the right to opt out of the directive will be phased out over a period of three years.
ref: Jika Badan Menteri bersetuju, hak untuk tidak melibatkan diri dalam arahan tersebut akan dimansuhkan dengan berperingkat dalam tempoh tiga tahun.

src: Under the "derogation" provision of the directive, individual workers can waive the right to work no more than 48 hours per week.
ref: Di bawah "pengurangan" peruntukan bagi arahan itu, pekerja individu boleh mengetepikan hak untuk bekerja tidak lebih dari 48 jam seminggu.

src: United States Senator John McCain (R-AZ) has won the State of Florida's Republican Party primary election, edging out former Massachusetts Governor Mitt Romney by five percent (36 versus 31%).
ref: Senator Amerika Syarikat John McCain (R-AZ) memenangi pilihan raya utama Parti Republikan di Negeri Florida, mengetepikan bekas Gabenor Massachusetts Mitt Romney sebanyak lima peratus (36 berbanding 31%).

src: With this win, Sen. McCain is now clearly the frontrunner going into next week's Super-Tuesday primaries.
ref: Dengan kemenangan ini, Senator McCain kini jelas merupakan calon pilihan ke primer Super-Selasa minggu depan.

src: Schwarzenegger called McCain "a great American hero and an extraordinary leader" and praised him for his ability to cross party lines.
ref: Schwarzenegger memanggil McCain "hero hebat Amerika dan pemimpin luarbiasa" dan memujinya untuk kebolehannya melangkaui garisan parti.

src: "I think Senator McCain has proven over and over again that he is reaching across the aisle to get things done," Schwarzenegger said.
ref: "Saya fikir Senator McCain telah berulang kali membuktikan yang dia bertolak ansur dengan parti lawan untuk mendapatkan sesuatu," kata Schwarzenegger.

src: Also present was former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani, who recently dropped out of the race and pledged to support McCain.
ref: Turut hadir ialah bekas datuk bandar New York Rudy Giuliani, yang baru-baru ini digugurkan dari bertanding dan berikrar akan menyokong McCain.

src: "This is a man who is moving us into our future," Giuliani said.
ref: "Ini ialah lelaki yang sedang menggerakkan kita ke masa depan kita," kata Giulani.

src: Schwarzenegger said he also admires Giuliani and only decided to endorse McCain after Giuliani had dropped out.
ref: Schwarzenegger berkata dia juga mengagumi Giuliani dan hanya memutuskan untuk menyokong McCain selepas Giuliani keluar.

src: McCain used this as an opportunity to discuss his views on greenhouse gas emissions and environmental technology, which have come under criticism from others in the Republican Party.
ref: McCain menggunakan ini sebagai peluang untuknya membincangkan pandangannya mengenai pelepasan gas rumah hijau dan teknologi alam sekitar, yang mana telah dikritikan oleh yang lain dari Parti Republik.

src: "We don't have to have increased costs to Americans," McCain said.
ref: "Kita tidak perlu untuk menambahkan kos kepada warga Amerika," kata McCain.

src: "In fact, with the development of green technologies, we can have reduced costs to the American consumer with the development of new technologies."
ref: "Sebagai fakta, dengan pembangunan teknologi hijau, kita akan dapat mengurangkan kos kepada pengguna Amerika dengan pembangunan teknologi baru".

src: California is one of the 24 states whose primary will be held on February 5, also known as Super Tuesday.
ref: California adalah satu dari 24 negeri yang undian pertama akan diadakan pada 5 Februari, juga dikenali sebagai Super Selasa.

src: NASA has held a memorial ceremony to mark the fifth anniversary of the Space Shuttle Columbia disaster.
ref: NASA telah mengadakan majlis peringatan sempena ulang tahun kelima bencana Kapal Angkasa Columbia.

src: NASA officials, astronauts, schoolchildren and family members attended the ceremony, which was held just miles from Columbias intended landing site.
ref: Pegawai NASA, angkasawan, pelajar sekolah dan ahli keluarga menghadiri majlis itu, yang diadakan hanya satu batu dari lapangan pendaratan untuk Columbia.

src: Approximately 200 people attended the event, held at the Kennedy Space Center's Space Mirror Memorial to all 24 astronauts killed in space disasters.
ref: Kira-kira 200 orang menghadiri majlis itu, yang diadakan di Space Mirror Memorial Kennedy Space Center kepada semua 24 angkasawan terbunuh dalam bencana angkasa.

src: Each was presented with a rose, which was placed in front of a granite memorial bearing the names of the 24.
ref: Setiap satu telah diberi dengan bunga ros, yang diletakkan di hadapan sebuah peringatan granit yang mengandungi nama 24 para angkasawan.

src: Evelyn Husband-Thompson, widow of commander Rick, who has remarried just three weeks ago, said "This morning, I couldn't stop thinking about Rick and Willie and Kalpana and Dave and Mike and Laurel and Ilan."
ref: Evelyn Husband-Thompson, balu komander Rick, yang telah berkahwin semula tiga minggu lalu, berkata "Pagi ini, saya tidak dapat berhenti berfikir tentang Rick dan Willie dan Kalpana dan Dave dan Mike dan Laurel dan Ilan".

src: "We so miss them, and we will never forget them."
ref: "Kami begitu merindui mereka, dan kami tidak akan sekali-kali melupakan mereka".

src: 44 teenagers from Israel were amongst those present, there in respect to astronaut Ilan Ramon.
ref: 44 remaja dari Israel adalah antara mereka yang hadir, di sana memberi penghormatan kepada angkasawan Ilan Ramon.

src: Former shuttle commander Bill Readdy commented that, despite a large number of memorials, including one on Mars, "... much more importantly than any physical monument, they're memorialized right here in our hearts," Going on to name them individually, then saying "We'll always miss your easy laughter and your smiling faces."
ref: Bekas komander kapal angkasa Bill Readdy mengulas bahawa, walaupun sebilangan besar peringatan, termasuk satu di Marikh,"...lebih penting daripada mana-mana tugu peringatan, mereka diingati di sini di dalam hati kami," Mahu menamakan mereka secara individu, kemudian berkata "Kami akan sentiasa merindui wajah ketawa dan senyuman anda".

src: God willing, five years from now, they'll have even more to be proud of us about as we take even longer strides ... back to the moon and onward toward Mars.
ref: Dengan izin tuhan, lima tahun dari sekarang, mereka akan mempunyai lebih banyak yang boleh dibanggakan daripada kami di mana kami mengambil langkah yang lebih lama...kembali ke bulan dan seterusnya ke arah Marikh.

src: NASA boss Michael Griffin was amongst several people who commented on the dangerous nature of spaceflight.
ref: Bos NASA Michael Griffin adalah antara beberapa orang yang memberi komen mengenai sifat bahaya penerbangan angkasa lepas.

src: He proceeded to read a letter from United States President George W. Bush praising the astronauts, which was then presented to Husband-Thompson.
ref: Dia meneruskan untuk membaca surat daripada Presiden Amerika Syarikat George W. Bush memuji angkasawan, yang kemudiannya diserahkan kepada Husband-Thompson.

src: "Space exploration is a dream deeply rooted in humanity, and the seven brave astronauts of Columbia sacrificed their lives so the rest of mankind could realize that dream," said Bush's letter.
ref: "Penerokaan angkasa adalah impian yang mendalam dalam kemanusiaan, dan ketujuh angkasawan berani Columbia mengorbankan nyawa mereka supaya manusia dapat merealisasikan impian itu," kata surat Bush.

src: "They assumed great risk so they could understand what lies beyond the heavens."
ref: "Mereka mengandaikan risiko yang besar supaya mereka dapat memahami apa yang terdapat disebalik langit".

src: Griffin also noted the importance of learning from mistakes, adding "Americans don't quit and we won't quit."
ref: Griffin juga menyatakan kepentingan belajar daripada kesilapan, menambah "Orang Amerika tidak berhenti dan kami tidak akan berhenti".

src: "We'll never quit," and that "not quitting has high costs."
ref: "Kami tidak akan sesekali berhenti," dan bahawa "tidak berhenti mempunyai kos yang tinggi".

src: Two weeks ago, on February 1st, it was the second day of the national environmental Focus the Nation teach-in.
ref: Dua minggu lepas, pada 1 Febuari, ini merupakan hari kedua pengajaran am untuk fokus alam sekitar kebangsaaan.

src: One of these events, which took place at the same time at other educational institutions across the country, took place in the city of Lynn at the campus of North Shore Community College.
ref: Salah satu daripada acara tersebut, yang juga diadakan pada masa yang sama di institut - institut pengajian yang lain seluruh negara, mengambil tempat di kampus Kolej Komuniti North Shore yang terletak di Bandar Lynn.

src: Wikinews accredited reporter Patrick Mannion was there in attendance along with Congressman John F. Tierney of Massachusetts's 6th congressional district and Lynn's State Senator Thomas McGee.
ref: Wartawan Patrick Mannion yang diiktiraf oleh Wikinews turut berada disana bersama ahli kongres majlis kongres Massachusetts ke-6 John F. Tierney dan Senator Negeri Lynn Thomas McGee.

src: One of Lynn's two representatives, Robert Fennell, also attended; the other representative Steven Walsh sent an aide.
ref: Salah seorang daripada dua wakil tersebut, Robert Fennell, juga menghadiri; manakala seorang lagi wakil, Steven Walsh menghantar pembantunya.

src: The representatives for the nearby cities of Salem and Beverly, John Keenan and Mary Grant along with various local area mayors and city councilors also attended the event.
ref: Wakil dari bandar berdekatan seperti Salem dan Beverly, John Keenan dan Mary Grant turut hadir ke majlis tersebut bersama beberapa datuk bandar tempatan dan ahli majlis bandar yang lain.

src: John F. Kerry, the senator for Massachusetts was supposed to attend but could not due to voting on the economic stimulus package in Washington D.C..
ref: John F. Kerry, senator Massachusetts sepatutnya hadir tetapi tidak dapat berbuat demikian disebabkan pengudian pada pakej rangsangan ekonomi di Washington D.C. Walaubagaimana pun, Senator Kerry telah merakam kenyataan melalui video DVD untuk majlis tersebut yang mana beliau tujukan kepada orang ramai.

src: However, Senator Kerry did record a video statement DVD for the event in which he addressed the gathered crowd.
ref: Senator McGee memulakan dengan berucap mengenai pentingnya membina semula Sekolah Tinggi Teknikal North Shore dan menerapkan fokus terhadap pekerjaan berasakan alam sekitar dan perlunya untuk membaikpulih Sekolah Tinggi Pertanian dan Teknikal Essex yang semakin merosot, tetapi terkenal dengan ajaran teknik pertanian yang boleh membantu untuk menyelamatkan kawasan pertanian yang semakin berkurangan di utara Boston.

src: Senator McGee started things off by talking about the need to recreate the North Shore Technical High School to include a focus on environmental jobs and the need to improve the Essex Agricultural and Technical High School which is deteriorating, but is known for it's agricultural teaching which would help to save the dwindling farming areas north of Boston.
ref: McGee menggesa orang ramai supaya lebih melibatkan diri dengan tanaman tempatan dan tanah ladang tersebut perlu untuk diiktiraf dan dibangunkan semula.

src: McGee urged people that should get more involved with their local farming co-ops and that farmland needs to be recognized and redeveloped.
ref: Beliau menyatakan bahawa obesiti dikalangan orang muda menjadi masalah dan sekolah tersebut sedang melahirkan kerjasama dengan ladang tempatan untuk menyediakan lebih banyak makanan berkhasiat dan menunjukkan kepada pelajar apa yang sedang berlaku kepada ladang mereka sekarang.

src: He noted that obesity in young people is a problem and that schools are developing partnerships with local farms to provide more healthy meals and to show students whats going on at their local farm.
ref: Wakil Keenan memuji kolej tersebut kerana menggadakan dialog ini dan Al Gore dengan filemnya, An Inconvenient Truth.

src: Representative Keenan commended the college for holding this dialogue and Al Gore along with his movie, An Inconvenient Truth.
ref: Keenan menyatakan perlunya stesen kuasa batu arang di Salem untuk menukar kepada batu arang yang bersih.

src: Keenan noted the need for Salem's coal-fired power station for the need to switch to clean coal.
ref: Pembantu Walsh menyatakan beliau komited untuk menamatkan sisa kertas di Rumah Bandar Massachusetts.

src: Walsh aide's brought up the fact he is committed to ending paper waste at the Massachusetts State House.
ref: Presiden majlis bandar dari Chelsea, Roseann Bongiovanni, yang merupakan pengarah eksekutif bersekutu bagi organisasi komuniti tempatan, Kerjasama Chelsea, bertanya pelbagai sebab kepada orang ramai sebab kenapa mereka perihatin terhadap pemanasan global.

src: Bongiovanni then noted that Chelsea and neighboring East Boston have no green space or waterfront due the industrialization of both areas, noting that 100% of the jet fuel for planes at Logan Airport, 70% to 80% of heating oil and that the trucks delivering the oil are spewing diesel.
ref: Beliau juga menyatakan mengenai timbunan besar garam di Chelsea yang digunakan untuk mencairkan ais di lebuhraya dalam Komanwel dan berkata ianya berada di lokasi secara "haram".

src: She further noted the company, Energy Management Inc., behind the controversial Cape Wind project, proposed building a diesel power plant across the street from a Chelsea elementary school and that air quality in Chelsea is bad.
ref: Beliau mengakhiri dialog beliau dengan berkata bahawa "pemanasan global tidak ada sempadan".

src: Mary Grant said she was interested in hearing ideas and noted the redeveloping of Beverly's high school to include more solar panels and a new wind turbine and that the school would be powered by 50% of it.
ref: Seorang bertanya berkenaan keperluan untuk mengurangkan tahap birokrasi dalam kerajaan kerana beliau "berlari mengelilingi bandar kerajaan" hanya untuk mendapatkan ladang lebah di belakang rumahnya.

src: Robert Fenell, the owner of Lynn's Capitol Diner who is notable for keeping chickens at the establishment located in downtown Lynn just two blocks away from the college noted that people should start going organic and going back to nature, that people should switch to more energy efficient lighting and grow gardens in their backyard.
ref: Selepas Fenell berkata bahawa inilah masa untuk soal jawab, dan beberapa soalan ditanyakan oleh pelbagai penonton termasuk Mannion sendiri, yang bertanya mengenai Garisan Biru MBTA dan transit pantas dan orang lain bertanyakan pelbagai soalan seperti adakah kurikulum hijau perlu atau tidak dimasukkan dalam pembelajaran atau bertanyakan kepada ahli politik supaya mereka lebih banyak berkongsi berkaitan kedudukan mereka.

src: After Fennell spoke it was time for questions and answers, and questions were given by various audiences members including Mannion himself, who asked about the MBTA's Blue Line and rapid transit and others asking various questions such wither or not to include a green curriculum in state education or asking for the politicians to talk more on some of their positions.
ref: Selepas sesi soal jawab berakhir, video kenyataan dari John Kerry itu mula ditayangkan.

src: After questions and answers finished, the video statement from John Kerry began to play.
ref: Kerry mengingatkan bahawa masih ada keraguan terhadap pemanasan global dan perubahan iklim di dalam kongres bahawa siapa "yang menguji sains" walaupun usaha dan penyelidikan dijalankan oleh Al Gore dan United Nation dan menegaskan bahawa "Rumah Putih adalah tempat terakhir unutk perubahan".

src: Kerry noted that there are still skeptics of global warming and climate change in Congress who "test the science" despite the efforts and research of Al Gore and the United Nations and noting that "the White House is the last place for change."
ref: Beliau kemudiannya memberi kenyataan bahawa dunia memerlukan perjanjian antarabangsa baharu terhadap pertukaran cuaca dan mengingati bahawa Amerika sangat dahsyat bila berdepan dengan penjimatan tenaga.

src: He then went on to say that the world needed a new international treaty on climate change and noted that America is horrendous when it comes to energy efficiency.
ref: Kerry juga menyatakan bahawa pentadbiran Bush menolak untuk penukaran dan tunjang di persidangan iklim di Bali; "Nasib baik, masa hampir tamat".

src: Kerry also noted that the Bush administration resisted the change and the points of the climate conference in Bali; "Luckily, time is almost up," added Kerry.
ref: tambah Kerry.

src: Kerry went on to mention the need for massive new research on new energy and capturing carbon and noted he was working with Alaska's senator, Ted Stevens on pushing for sequestering plants.
ref: Kerry meneruskan lagi untuk menyebut keperluan penyelidikan secara besar-besaran terhadap tenaga baru dan menangkap karbon serta berkata bahawa beliau telah berkerja bersama Senator Alaska, Ted Stevens supaya memaksa tanaman tersembunyi.

src: Kerry continued the theme of environmental conservation and change by topping off his statement by reminding the crowd of first Earth Day and how it lead to the creation of the Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act, Endangered Species Act and the Environmental Protection Agency and it noted it happened because of people's actions.
ref: Kerry menyambung tema untuk pemulihan alam sekitar dan perubahan dengan menangkas kenyataan beliau dengan mengingatkan orang ramai terhadap Hari Dunia pertama dan bagaimana ia membawa kepada terhasilnya Akta Udara Bersih, Akta Air Bersih, Akta Spesis Terancam dan Agensi Perlindungan Alam Sekitar dan menegaskan bahawa ianya berlaku disebabkan tindakan orang ramai.

src: Tierney finished off the speech by noting the need for high risk energy research in the style of DARPA so we can better compete against the "Chinas and Japans."
ref: Tierney mengakhiri ucapan dengan mengingatkan bahawa pentingnya penyelidikan kuasa berisiko tinggi berdasarkan cara DARPA supaya kita dapat menandingi "China dan Jepun".

src: Some flu viruses in the United States and Canada have shown increased levels of resistance to the antiviral drug Tamiflu (oseltamivir), the World Health Organization (WHO) said on Friday.
ref: Sesetengah virus selesema di Amerika Syarikat dan Kanada telah menunjukkan peningkatan tahap ketahanan terhadap ubat antivirus Tamiflu (oseltamivir), Pertubuhan Kesihatan Sedunia (WHO) berkata semalam.

src: Tamiflu is currently the recommended treatment for humans infected with bird flu, and governments worldwide have been stockpiling the drug in case of a flu pandemic.
ref: Tamiflu kini adalah rawatan yang disyorkan untuk manusia dijangkiti selesema burung, dan kerajaan di seluruh dunia telah menyimpan stok simpanan ubat ini untuk kes wabak selesema.

src: The drug resistance appears to be limited to the H1N1 variant which causes seasonal flu, while H3N2 or influenza B strains and the H5N1 strain that causes bird flu did not show increased resistance.
ref: Ketahanan ubat itu nampaknya terhad kepada varian H1N1 yang menyebabkan selesema bermusim, manakala H3N2 atau strain influenza B dan strain H5N1 yang menyebabkan selesema burung tidak menunjukkan ketahanan meningkat.

src: The European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control found 19 cases of resistance among 148 samples from last November.
ref: Pusat untuk Pencegahan dan Kawalan Penyakit Eropah mendapati 19 kes ketahanan antara 148 spesimen dari November lepas.

src: In a wider study of 437 H1N1 isolates from 19 countries, the European agency found 59 resistant samples from 9 countries.
ref: Dalam satu kajian yang lebih luas 437 H1N1 diasingkan dari 19 negara, agensi Eropah mendapati 59 spesimen yang tahan dari 9 negara.

src: Resistance has not been shown to increase in Japan or Hong Kong.
ref: Ketahanan tidak menunjukkan peningkatan di Jepun atau Hong Kong.

src: The statement added that these mutations would most likely render Tamiflu ineffective for the prevention or treatment of flu caused by resistant H1N1 viruses.
ref: Kenyataan itu menambah bahawa mutasi tersebut kemungkinan besar boleh menyebabkan Tamiflu tidak berkesan untuk pencegahan atau rawatan selesema yang disebabkan oleh virus H1N1 yang tahan.

src: The WHO also stated that this phenomenon does not influence the effectiveness of flu immunizations.
ref: WHO juga menyatakan bahawa fenomena ini tidak mempengaruhi keberkesanan imunisasi selesema.

src: At least 30 people have been killed by twin earthquakes in Rwanda and the Democratic Republic of the Congo.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 30 orang terbunuh dalam gempa bumi berkembar di Rwanda dan Republik Demokratik Congo.

src: Radio Rwanda reports that ten of the Rwandan fatalities occurred together when a church collapsed onto them, killing them instantly.
ref: Radio Rwanda melaporkan bahawa sepuluh daripada kematian Rwanda berlaku bersama-sama apabila sebuah gereja runtuh, membunuh mereka serta-merta.

src: The quake could also be felt in nearby Burundi, but there are no reports of damage or injuries there.
ref: Gempa bumi itu juga boleh dirasai berdekatan Burundi, tetapi tiada laporan kerosakan atau kecederaan di sana.

src: Further falls are predicted for the company in its next fiscal year.
ref: Penurunan seturusnya diramalkan bagi syarikat itu dalam tahun fiskal akan datang.

src: "While it is impossible to accurately forecast full year fuel prices and yields this far in advance, there is now a significant chance that profits may decline next year," Ryanair CEO Michael O'Leary cautioned.
ref: "Walaupun ianya mustahil untuk meramal dengan tepat harga bahan api tahun penuh dan hasil ini jauh lebih awal, kini terdapat satu kemungkinan besar bahawa keuntungan mungkin menurun tahun depan," CEO Ryanair Michael O'Leary memberi amaran.

src: Ryanair said that it is not hedged against oil price increases for the next fiscal year.
ref: Ryanair berkata bahawa ia tidak dilindungi terhadap kenaikan harga minyak untuk tahun fiskal akan datang.

src: However shrewd, Mr. O’Leary has plans to spend up to 200 million purchasing back shares in the company, which equates to 3% of the company share capital.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Encik O'Leary yang licik mempunyai rancangan untuk membelanjakan sehingga 200 juta membeli balik saham-saham dalam syarikat itu, yang bersamaan dengan 3% daripada modal saham syarikat.

src: US$300 checks would be sent to people on low-income including retirees on Social Security which was not included in the original bill backed by President George W. Bush.
ref: Cek AS$300 akan dihantar kepada orang-orang dengan pendapatan rendah termasuk pesara dengan Keselamatan Sosial yang tidak dimasukkan ke dalam rang undang-undang asal yang disokong oleh Presiden George W. Bush.

src: The plan would begin to decrease rebates for citizens with taxable incomes of US$75,000 for individuals and US$150,000 for couples.
ref: Pelan ini akan mula mengurangkan rebat untuk rakyat dengan pendapatan boleh cukai sebanyak AS$75,000 bagi individu dan AS$150,000 untuk pasangan.

src: The House overwhelmingly approved the more broad Senate amended bill which included the low-income portion mentioned above along with provisions that would keep illegal aliens from receiving a rebate check.
ref: Rumah Putih meluluskan rang undang-undang Senat yang diubah dengan lebih terbuka yang termasuk bahagian berpendapatan rendah yang tersebut di atas bersama-sama dengan peruntukan-peruntukan yang akan menjaga pendatang haram daripada menerima cek rebat.

src: Despite some opposition from some Congressmen, such as John B. T. Campbell III of California's 48th congressional district, the plan passed overwhelmingly 380–34.
ref: Walaupun terdapat beberapa bantahan daripada beberapa ahli Kongres, seperti John B.T.

src: after having to shed some incentives included by Senate Democrats which caused the bill to fail.
ref: Senat Amerika Syarikat mengundi beberapa jam sebelum itu pada rang undang-undang yang diluluskan di Senat, 81-16, selepas terpaksa mengurangkan beberapa insentif termasuk oleh Senat Demokrat yang menyebabkan rang undang-undang itu gagal.

src: Barack Obama, the junior senator from Illinois and 2008 US presidential candidate has swept all three of today's Democratic contests, two caucuses in Nebraska and Washington and the primary in Louisiana.
ref: Barrack Obama, senat junior daripada Illinois dan calon presiden AS 2008 telah menyapu bersih kesemua tiga pertandingan Demokratik hari ini, dua kaukus di Nebraska dan Washington dan kaukus utama di Louisiana.

src: Obama also won the tiny United States territory of the United States Virgin Islands.
ref: Obama juga memenangi wilayah kecil Amerika Syarikat, Kepulauan Virgin Amerika Syarikat.

src: Obama also had a major lead over Clinton in the Washington caucuses by a 2-1 margin.
ref: Obama juga mendahului Clinton di Washington kaukus dengan jurang sebanyak 2-1.

src: The state, which is still suffering from the effects of Hurricane Katrina three years later could play a large role in the election this year.
ref: Negeri tersebut, yang masih mengalami kesan Taufan Katrina tiga tahun kemudian boleh memainkan peranan yang besar dalam pilihan raya kali ini.

src: Despite these wins it is still a close race between the two Democratic candidates, with Obama showing a lead in pledged delegates, and Hillary Clinton showing a narrow lead when super delegates are taken into account.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, kemenangan ini masih menunjukkan persaingan sengit antara dua calon Demokratik, dengan Obama yang mendahului dalam delegasi mesyuarat, dan Hillary Clinton yang menunjukkan saingan rapat apabila super delegasi diambil kira.

src: Each candidate needs to win the support of 2,025 delegates to secure the nomination.
ref: Setiap calon harus memenangi sokongan 2,025 delegasi untuk memastikan pencalonan.

src: After the voting and caucusing ended yesterday both candidates gave a speech at the Democratic Party's Jefferson and Jackson Dinner in Virginia- Clinton giving her standard stump speech and refusing to talk about what had happened during the day; Obama repeating many of the things he had said earlier in his "Yes We Can" speech, this time with detailed policy proposals as well as "hope-mongering".
ref: Selepas pengundian dan bercaucus tamat semalam kedua-dua calon memberikan ucapan di Parti Demokratik Jefferson dan Jackson Dinner di Virginia- Clinton memberi ucapan sedia ada dan menolak untuk berbicara mengenai apa yang telah berlaku di siang harinya; Obama mengulangi beberapa perkara yang disebutkan dalam ucapan terdahulu "Ya Kita Boleh," kali ini dengan cadangan polisi yang lebih jelas dan juga "hopemonger."

src: George W. Bush, the president of the United States has visited Tennessee, which was hit by over 25 tornadoes which caused over 33 deaths.
ref: George W. Bush, presiden Amerika Syarikat telah melawat Tennessee, yang dilanda lebih 25 tornado menyebabkan lebih 33 kematian.

src: Later in the speech Mr.Bush said that he's "sorry you're going through what you're going through," to the residents of Macon County, which he was visiting.
ref: Kemudian dalam ucapan tersebut Encik Bush berkata "maaf kerana kamu melalui apa yang sedang kamu lalui," kepada penduduk Daerah Macon, yang dilawati beliau.

src: Up to 539 oil workers are being moved off the affected rig in an operation that began at 09:20 UTC this morning.
ref: Seramai 539 pekerja sedang dipindahkan dari pelantar yang terjejas dalam satu operasi yang bermula jam 09:20 UTC pagi ini.

src: Barry Nielson, a Squadron leader with the RAF was quoted (BBC News) as saying "It's unusual, that's probably the best way to describe it."
ref: Barry Nielson, peneraju Skuadron dengan RAF dipetik (BBC News) seperti berkata "Ia adalah luar biasa, itu mungkin cara terbaik untuk menggambarkannya".

src: One man with a pistol forced employees to the ground while the other two men stole the paintings.
ref: Seorang lelaki dengan pistol memaksa pekerja-pekerja meniarap di lantai manakala dua lelaki lain mencuri lukisan.

src: There is a reward of 90 thousand US dollars for the artwork.
ref: Ganjaran 90 ribu dolar Amerika untuk karya seni tersebut.

src: The robbers, who were still at large, stole the paintings Sunday from the E.G.
ref: Perompak - perompak itu, yang masih bebas, mencuri lukisan pada hari Ahad daripada E.G.

src: Bührle Collection, one of Europe's finest private museums for Impressionist and ｖ, police said.
ref: Bührle Collection, salah satu muzium swasta terbaik di Eropah untuk penggemar karya seni dan v, kata polis.

src: It was the largest art robbery in Swiss history and one of the biggest ever in Europe, said Marco Cortesi, spokesman for the Zurich police.
ref: Ia adalah rompakan karya seni terbesar dalam sejarah Switzerland dan salah satu yang terbesar di Eropah, kata Marco Cortesi, jurucakap polis Zurich.

src: He compared it to the theft in 2004 of Edvard Munch's The Scream and Madonna from the Munch Museum in Norway.
ref: Beliau membandingkannya dengan kes kecurian The Scream dan Madonna milik Edvard Munch pada tahun 2004 dari Muzium Munch di Norway.

src: Last week, Swiss police reported that two Pablo Picasso paintings were stolen from a Swiss exhibition near Zurich.
ref: Minggu lepas, polis Switzerland melaporkan bahawa dua lukisan Pablo Picasso dicuri dari pameran Swiss berhampiran Zurich.

src: The Brazilian president Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva is due to meet the French President Nicholas Sarkozy later today.
ref: Presiden Brazil, Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva telah dijadualkan untuk melawat Presiden Perancis Nicholas Sarkozy lewat hari ini.

src: Lula da Silva is due to meet with Sarkozy in French Guiana.
ref: Lula da Silva dijadualkan untuk bertemu dengan Sarkozy di Guiana, Perancis.

src: In addition, subjects such as biofuels, nuclear science and defence are expected to be discussed in the meeting.
ref: Di samping itu, subjek seperti biobahan api, sains nuklear dan pertahanan dijangka akan dibincangkan dalam mesyuarat itu.

src: Initial forecasts are suggesting that the bridge, will be about 400 meters long, and will cost approximately US$38.6 million.
ref: Ramalan awal mencadangkan bahawa jambatan itu, lebih kurang 400 meter panjang, dan akan memakan kos kira-kira AS$38.6 juta.

src: The cost of the project is planned to be divided equally between Brazil and France.
ref: Kos projek ini dirancang akan dibahagikan sama rata antara Brazil dan Perancis.

src: This was made clear in an agreement between the two nations that was signed in July 2005.
ref: Ini telah dinyatakan dengan jelas dalam perjanjian antara kedua-dua negara yang ditandatangani pada Julai 2005.

src: There were 8 games played in the National Hockey League on February 14, 2008, including the #2 Dallas Stars taking on the Phoenix Coyotes, and the Minnesota Wild and Vancouver Canucks fighting for playoff contention in the Northwest division.
ref: Terdapat 8 permainan dimainkan dalam Liga Hoki Kebangsaan pada 14 Februari 2008, termasuk #2 Dallas Star berhadapan dengan Coyotes Phoenix, dan Minnesota Wild dan Vancouver Canucks berjuang untuk perlawanan penentuan untuk pertandingan di bahagian Barat Laut.

src: Between the debate and the first voting round Bobošíková withdrew her candidacy, citing a lack of support for her.
ref: Antara perdebatan dan pusingan pengundian pertama Bobošíková menarik balik pencalonan beliau, memetik kekurangan sokongan untuknya.

src: Two recent polls have shown that the residents of the town of Berwick-upon-Tweed, England would prefer to live in Scotland.
ref: Dua pungutan suara baru-baru ini menunjukkan bahawa penduduk bandar Berwick-upon-Tweed, England lebih suka menetap di Scotland.

src: Located 57 miles from Edinburgh, Scotland and over 300 miles from London, Berwick was a frequent bone of contention in the border wars between the independent kingdoms of England and Scotland, changing hands at least 13 times between 1147 and 1482.
ref: Terletak 57 batu dari Edinburgh, Scotland dan lebih 300 batu dari London, Berwick menjadi punca pertelagahan yang kerap berlaku di dalam peperangan sempadan di antara kerajaan bebas England dan Scotland, dan berubah kuasa sekurang-kurangnya 13 kali di antara 1147 dan 1482.

src: Under the Treaty of Perpetual Peace agreed in 1502 by the English King Henry VII and the Scottish King James IV, Berwick was declared to be "of the Kingdom of England but not in it".
ref: Di bawah Perjanjian Keamanan Abadi yang dipersetujui pada tahun 1502 oleh Raja England Henry VII dan Raja Scotland James IV, Berwick telah diisytiharkan sebagai "sebahagian daripada Kerajaan England tetapi bukan di dalamnya."

src: This resulted in Berwick having to be named individually in legislation until the British Parliament passed the Wales and Berwick Act in 1746 which stated that unless specially specified otherwise, the term "England" in laws included Berwick and Wales; in 1853 the declaration of war on Russia specifically mentioned Berwick, but the 1856 Treaty of Paris did not, leading to the urban legend that the town was still at war with Russia until the Mayor signed a peace treaty with a Soviet diplomat in 1966.
ref: Ini menyebabkan Berwick dinamakan berasingan di dalam penggubalan undang-undang sehingga Parlimen British meluluskan Akta Wales dan Berwick pada tahun 1746 yang menyatakan selagi tidak dinyatakan sebaliknya, perkataan "England" di dalam undang-undang termasuk Berwick dan Wales; pada tahun 1853 deklarasi peperangan terhadap Rusia secara khusus menyebut tentang Berwick, tetapi Perjanjian Paris 1856 tidak menyatakannya, membawa kepada urban legend yang bandar itu masih berperang dengan Rusia sehingga Datuk Bandar menandatangan perjanjian damai dengan seorang diplomat Soviet pada tahun 1966.

src: A poll conducted for the ITV television programme, Tonight, to be broadcast on February 18 has shown that 60% (1,182 for, 775 against) of those polled would prefer the town to be in Scotland, while a poll for The Berwick Advertiser newspaper showed 78% in favour.
ref: Pungutan suara diadakan untuk rancangan televisyen ITV, Tonight, yang akan ditayangkan pada 18 Februari menunjukkan yang 60% (1,182 menyokong, 775 menentang) daripada pengundi lebih suka bandar itu berada di dalam Scotland, sementara pungutan suara untuk suratkhabar The Berwick Advertiser menunjukkan 78% menyokong.

src: A spokesman for Scottish First Minister Alex Salmond said "The Scottish Government has no territorial demands on our friends in England.
ref: Jurucakap untuk Menteri Pertama Scotland Alex Salmond berkata "Kerajaan Scotland tidak mempunyai tuntutan wilayah terhadap rakan kita di England.

src: But it's clear most people in Berwick would rather be part of SNP-governed Scotland than Labour-run England."
ref: Tetapi ia jelas yang kebanyakan orang di Berwick lebih suka menjadi sebahagian daripada Scotland yang diperintah oleh SNP daripada England yang diperintah oleh Buruh."

src: Polling was active from 8:00AM to 5:00PM local time (0300 to 1200 UTC).
ref: Pembuangan undi adalah aktif daripada 8:00AM sehingga 5:00PM waktu tempatan (0300 ke 1200 UTC).

src: According to media reports, in some areas of province women were stopped from casting their vote.
ref: Menurut laporan media, di sesetengah kawasan dalam wilayah wanita dihalang untuk memutuskan undi.

src: Missing elections material delayed the beginning of voting in some regions.
ref: Kehilangan bahan untuk pilihanraya melewatkan permulaan mengundi di sesetengah daerah.

src: 33,000 polling staff had been appointed to over 5000 polling stations.
ref: 33,000 staf pembuangan undi telah diletakkan di 5000 tempat pembuangan undi.

src: According to Pakistani newspaper Dawn, sources in the provincial home department said overall voting turnout was 70% in Mastung, 65% in Nushki, 55% in Pishin, 50% in Jhal Magsi, 45% in Nasirabad, Kohlu and 35% in Barkhan.
ref: Menurut Dawn, surat khabar Pakistan, sumber di jabatan perumahan wilayah berkata kesuluruhan kedatangan mengundi adalah 70% di Mastung, 65% di Nushuki, 55% di Pishin, 50% di Jhal Magsi, 45% di Nasirabad, Kohlu dan 35% di Barkhan.

src: Unofficial election results for district council of Quetta District, containing the capital of Balochistan, are as follows:
ref: Keputusan undian tidak rasmi untuk majlis perbandaran Daerah Quetta, kawasan terletaknya ibu negara Balochistan, adalah seperti berikut:

src: Dutch financial institution ING Group reported today in its quarterly results an impairment charge of €194 million euros (approximately US$285.6 million).
ref: Institusi kewangan Belanda, Kumpulan ING hari ini melaporkan keputusan nilai caj suku tahunan merosot sebanyak €194 juta euro (kira-kira US$285.6 juta).

src: However, as a result of selling an equity stake in rival ABN AMRO, the net profit of €2.48 billion, was 18% higher than last year.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, hasil daripada menjual ekuiti dalam saingan ABN AMRO, keuntungan bersih sebanyak €2.48 juta, adalah 18% lebih tinggi berbanding tahun lepas.

src: The impairment charge is a result of risky investments, including RBMS (mortgage) investments backed by subprime loans and Alt-A loans, which are made to borrowers with a slightly better credit profile than those in the subprime category, as well as from collateral debt obligations (CDOs).
ref: Kemerosotan nilai caj adalah berpunca daripada pelaburan berisiko, termasuk Pelaburan RBMS (gadai janji) yang disokong oleh pinjaman sub prima dan pinjaman Alt-A, yang dibuat kepada peminjam dengan profil kredit yang sedikit lebih baik daripada dalam kategori sub prima, selain daripada hutang cagaran kewajipan (CDO).

src: The same region was hit by an earthquake in 2004, that triggered a tsunami.
ref: Rantau yang sama telah dilanda gempa bumi pada tahun 2004, yang mencetuskan tsunami.

src: According to local citizens the quake lasted about one minute and was felt in Banda Aceh, the province capital, approximately 300 km (185 mls) away, also in Meulaboh and Gunung Sitoli on Nias island.
ref: Menurut penduduk tempatan gempa bumi itu berlangsung kira-kira satu minit dan dirasai di Banda Aceh, ibu kota wilayah itu, kira-kira 300 km (185 batu) jauhnya, juga di Meulaboh dan Gunung Sitoli di pulau Nias.

src: Japan's meteorological agency said India's Andaman and Nicobar island chain was also at risk.
ref: Agensi meteorologi Jepun berkata rantaian pulau Andaman dan Nicobar di India juga berisiko.

src: Indonesia's meteorology and geophysics agency recorded at least two aftershocks about 20 minutes after the first tremors, one measuring 5.5 and the other 5.3 on the Richter scale.
ref: Agensi meteorologi dan geofizik Indonesia mencatatkan sekurang-kurangnya dua gempa susulan kira-kira 20 minit selepas gegaran pertama, satu berukuran 5.5 dan 5.3 lain pada skala Richter.

src: Budi Waluyo, an official at the National Meteorology and Geophysics Agency said the quake occurred about 30 kilometres beneath the ground.
ref: Budi Waluyo, seorang pegawai di Agensi Meteorologi dan Geofizik Kebangsaan berkata gempa bumi itu berlaku kira-kira 30 kilometer di bawah tanah.

src: The US Geological Survey measured the quake at 7.6 on the Richter scale.
ref: Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat mengukur gempa pada magnitud 7.6 dengan skala Richter.

src: "The quake has no tsunami potential because it's happening under the ground, not the sea," Waluyo said.
ref: "Gempa bumi itu tidak berpotensi menyebabkan tsunami kerana ia berlaku di bawah tanah, bukan laut," kata Waluyo.
